Dr Fauci, umujyanama wa White House, avuga ko afite icyizere ko urukingo ruzaboneka muri uyu mwaka Bwana Redfield yavuze ko "iyi virus imwe kandi ntoya" izafata Amerika ikiguzi cya tiriyari $7. Muri iyi nteko kandi Dr Anthony Fauci, umujyanama w'ibiro bya perezida wa Amerika, yavuze ko imibare y'ubwandu bushya iri kuzamuka cyane muri leta zitandukanye za Amerika. Bwana Fauci yavuze ko iminsi iri imbere izaba ikomeye cyane kuko iki icyorezo kiri kuza bushyashya. Aba bagabo b'inzobere mu by'ubuzima, imbere y'inteko ishingamategeko ya Amerika bahakanye ko nta wasabwe na Perezida Donald Trump ko bagabanya ikigero cyo gupima iyi virus. Bavuze ibi nyuma y'uko mu mpera y'icyumweru gishize ubwo yiyamamarizaga muri leta ya Oklahoma, Bwana Trump yavuze ko yasabye ikipe ye kugabanya gupima abantu ngo imibare itangazwa y'abandura nayo igabanuke. Bwana Fauci yabwiye inteko ati: "Mu byo nzi, nta muntu wo muri twe wasabwe kugabanya gupima. Ahubwo tuzakomeza kongera ibipimo bifatwa". Trump yavuze iki? Ibiro bye bivuga ko ibyo yatangaje ku kugabanya ibipimo byari "ugutebya". Gusa ejo ku wa kabiri ibi Trump yarabihakanye, abwira abanyamakuru ko "atajya akina". Abanyamerika hafi miliyoni 2,3 bamaze kwandura coronavirus, abagera ku 120,000 yarabishe - imibare minini kurusha ibindi bihugu ku isi. Ejo ku wa kabiri ari kwiyamamaza mu mujyi wa Phoenix muri leta ya Arizona, Bwana Trump yavuze ko coronavirus iri "kurembera". Aha Arizona aho yari ari, amasaha macye mbere y'uko ahagera bari bamaze kurenga umubare munini w'ubwandu bushya bari baragize mu bihe bishize. Dr Fauci yabwiye inteko ishingamategeko ya Amerika ko nta muntu wabasabye kugabanya gupima Abashinzwe ubuzima muri Amerika baburira ko 80% by'ibitanda by'ibitaro biri gukoreshwa, ko ubushobozi bw'ubuvuzi bushobora kurengerwa mu minsi cyangwa ibyumweru biri imbere. Dr Fauci yabwiye inteko ko "afite icyizere" ko urukingo rw'iyi virus ruzaba rwarabonetse mu mpera y'uyu mwaka wa 2020. Yavuze ko ari ikibazo "cy'igihe atari icy'uko ruzaboneka", gusa yongeraho nanone ko "bishobora gufata igihe". Kompanyi y'imiti yitwa Moderna irateganya kwinjira mu cyiciro cya gatatu cy'igerageza ry'urukingo mu ntangiriro y'ukwezi gutaha kwa karindwi. Byitezwe ko icyiciro cya kabiri cyo cyatanze umusaruro.

Iyo ndege yataye ibarabara igwako ku munsi wa mbere Abatabazi bari mu bikogwa vyo gukura ibiziga mu bisigarira vy'indege yo mw'ishirahamwe Bangladeshi airline US-Bangla, inyuma yaho umuriro waciye waduka uzimirijwe. Iyo ndege yataye ibarabara igwako, igihe yariko irururuka ku munsi wa mbere ku mugoroba. Ingendo zose zategerezwa gukoresha ikibuga "Tribhuvan International Airport" zasibijwe, nkuko amakuru yo muri ico gihugu avuga. Umwotsi mwinshi wakwiye ikirere igihe iyo ndege yagira isanganya Iyo ndege yagize isanganya ngo ifise inomero S2-AGU, ikaba iyo mu bwoko bwa "Bombardier Dash 8 Q400", ariko ubutegetsi ntiburavyemeza. Iyo ndege yaguye 14:20 amasaha yo muri ico gihugu, nkuko igisata gikurikirana uruja n'uruza rw'indege cavuze.

Icuma co gufata amafoto Bwana Gatsimbazi yabariye BBC ko yariko arakurikina inkuru y'icapiro ry'ibitabo ryariko rirasamburwa mu karere ka Nyarugenge, ariko aranafata amafoto. Ngo ubwo nyene umukuru wa Nyarugenge ari kumwe n'abapolisi baciye baza bamubwiriza guhanagura ayo mafoto, nawe ababwira ko ari ku kazi kandi ko amategeko amwemerera gufata ayo mafoto. Ngo baciye bamwaka ico gikoresho ku nguvu, bafuta amafoto yose yarimwo ashika ku majana abiri. Nelson Gatsimbazi avuga ko amategeko agenga itangazamakuru amwemerera gufata amafoto ari mu kazi, mu gihe yitwaje ibimuranga. Ngo yaciye atabaza umuvugizi w'igipolisi c'u Rwanda, Theos Badege, anamubwira abamuhohoteye abo ari bo. Bwana Badege yabariye BBC ko ari vyo, ngo baravuganye bumvikana aho baza guhurira ariko Gatsimbazi ngo ntiyahashitse, eka mbere ngo ntibashoboye no kubonana. Umuvugizi w'igipolisi yavuze ko yabwiwe ko bwana Gatsimbazi yasabwe kwerekana ikarata y'akazi ntiyabikora. Ngo kandi mu bari aho bose, nta numwe yigeze yemanga ko Nelson Gatsimbazi yahohotewe n'abapolisi.

Koroneri Eddy Kapend arahakana ko atari we yateguye igandagurwa rya Perezida Laurent Kabila N'aho Perezida Kabila yarashwe n'uwamucungerera ubuzima, babiri mu bategetsi biwe bo hejuru, Koroneri Eddy Kapend na Georges Leta, baragize uruhara mw'iryo gandagurwa. Mu kwa gatandatu kw'umwaka uheze, Perezida Félix Tshisekedi yagabanije igihano c'urupfu bari baciriwe. Iki kigongwe gitanzwe mu gihe hari ukutumvikana hagati ya Perezida Tshisekedi n'uwo yasubiriye, umuhungu wa Laurent Kabila ari we Joseph Kabila. Joseph Kabila yafashe ubutegetsi inyuma y'urupfu rwa se wiwe mu 2001, akaba yarongoye DR Congo mu kiringo c'imyaka 18 imbere y'uko Perezida Tshisekedi atsinda amatora yo mu kwa cumi na kabiri 2018. N'aho bwari bwo bwa mbere habaye uguhererekana ubutegetsi mu mahoro kuva mu myaka hafi 60 yari iheze, abatari bake mu bafise uruhara mu buzima bwa politike ya Congo bariyamirije ivyavuye muri ayo matora. Hari benshi bazi ko uyu mukuru w'igihugu mushasha yagiranye amasezerano yo mu mpisho na Joseph Kabila, gushika n'ubu agifise inguvu nyinshi mu gihugu. Giscard Kusema, umwe mu bajejwe kumenyesha amakuru mu biro vy'umukuru w'igihugu, yabwiye itororokanirizo ry'amakuru AFP ko Koroneri Kapend hamwe na bamwe mu bo bapfunganywe "baronse ico kigongwe c'umukuru w'igihugu..ikaba ari ingingo iraba benshi ata nkunzi". Koroneri Kapend yari umwishikira cane kwa Perezida Laurent Kabila. Sentare yasanze ari we yateguye igandagurwa ryiwe, afatanije n'abandi bari bajejwe umutekano w'uyo yahoze ari umukuru w'igihugu, harimwo mbere n'uwari ajejwe ibiro vy'igendereza ico gihe, Georges Leta. Bompi barahakana ko ata ruhara babigizemwo. Félix Tshisekedi yatsinze amatora yo mu kwa cumi na kabiri 2018 yabayemwo impari, maze aca ashikirirwa ubutegetsi ku wa 24 z'ukwa mbere 2019 Iki kigongwe gitanzwe inyuma y'indwi nkeya Perezida Tshisekedi asambuye ihuriro ryiwe n'umugambwe wa Kabila usanzwe ari wo wiganje mu nama nshingamateka, inyuma y'umwaka wose barabana urunuka. Muri kino gihe, Perezida Tshisekedi ariko arondera urundi runani rwomutuma agira inguvu zikwiye mu nama nshingamateka. Laurent-Désiré Kabila yari yafashe ubutegetsi ku wa 17 z'ukwa gatanu 1997, atembagaje intwaro ya Mobutu Sese Seko Kuku Ngbendu Wa Za Banga mu ntambara yamaze amezi hafi indwi, afashijwe n'ingabo cane cane z'u Rwanda, Uganda na Angola, maze yomora uyu mukuru w'igihugu citwa Zaire ico gihe yari amaze imyaka ishika 32 agitwaza umukazo. Ubutegetsi bwa Perezida Kabila ntibworohewe kuko haciye imisi mike imigenderanire hagati yiwe na bamwe mu bamufashije gufata ubutegetsi, u Rwanda na Uganda, yaratitutse bituma haduka intambara ya kabiri mu 1998, intambara ivugwa ko yagizwemwo uruhara n'ibihugu icenda, harimwo Zimbabwe, Angola na Namibia vyagiye kumufasha kurwanya abari bateye igihugu ciwe. Yagiye kugandagurwa ku wa 16 z'ukwa mbere 2001, amaze imyaka itatu n'amezi hafi umunani, maze inama nshingamateka ica yemeza ko umuhungu wiwe, Joseph Kabila, yomusubirira. Joseph Kabila nawe yagiye kuva ku butegetsi atsinzwe muri ayo matora yo mu 2018, amatora yabayemwo impari, akiyamirizwa na bamwe mu batavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi bwa Kabila, cane cane Martin Fayulu avuga ko ari we yayatsinze ariko akanyarwa intsinzi.

Abakuru bo mu ishyaka CCM Iyi nama yateranye kuri iki cyumweru mu murwa mukuru wa politike, Dodoma, yatoye Bwana Magufuli ku majwi 1822, angana na 100% by'abatoye bose. Abakuru mu ishyaka rya CCM 1822 ni bo bitabiriye iyo nama. Bwana Magufuli w'imyaka 60 y'amavuko uri ku butegetsi kuva mu 2015, yatorewe kwiyamamariza manda ya kabiri y'imyaka itanu - ari nayo ya nyuma yemewe n'itegekonshinga rya Tanzania. Abitabiriye inama nkuru ya CCM barimo n'abahagarariye u Burundi na Vietnam Mu bandi bitabiriye iyo nama, harimo abahagarariye ibihugu nk'u Burundi, Mozambique, Repubulika ya Demokarasi ya Kongo, Sudani y'epfo na Vietnam. Nkuko byavuzwe na Bashiru Ally, umunyamabanga mukuru wa CCM, iri shyaka ryanatangaje gahunda yaryo y'ibikorwa mu myaka iri imbere, harimo guha akazi abaturage bagera kuri miliyoni 8 no guteza imbere ubuhinzi no kwihaza mu biribwa n'ibijyanye n'amazi n'amashanyarazi (cyangwa umuyagankuba mu Kirundi). John Magufuli uri ku butegetsi kuva mu 2015, yatorewe kwiyamamariza manda ya kabiri y'imyaka itanu - ari nayo ya nyuma yemewe n'itegekonshinga Ntibiramenyekana uzahagararira abatavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi muri ayo matora. Perezida Magufuli ashimagizwa ku kuyobora ibikorwa byinshi by'iterambere, ariko abamunenga barimo n'imiryango iharanira uburenganzira bwa muntu bavuga ko yakoresheje umwanya we mu gutoteza abatavuga rumwe na we no guhonyora ubwisanzure bw'itangazamakuru.

FRODEBU ivuga ko idashobora gusiba amatora yo mu 2020 FRODEBU ivuga ko yahawe ibibanze bikeyi cane mu mugwi ujejwe amatora ugereranije n'igihagararo c'uwo mugambwe mu gihugu. Uwo mugambwe uvuga ko ababikoze bashatse kuwuca intege kugira wikure mu vy'amatora, ngo ari ivyo nturota ubikora. Umuvugizi wa Sahwanya FRODEBU, Phenias Niyigaba, yabwiye BBC ko ari akamaramaza uravye igitigiri c'ababaserukiye muri CENI. Yagize ati: "Mu bantu bashika 150 mu ntara baduhaye umuntu umwe gusa ku ntara, bigiye mu makomine hoho vyabaye ibara umugambwe FRODEBU warakumiriwe bimwe biboneka. "Ikomine zose twagomba kuba dufise umuntu umwe umwe, ni kuvuga ikomine 119, twagomba kuba tuhafise abantu baduserukira ariko siko vyagenze." Mu baserukiye imigambwe mu mugwi CNI mu makomine bashika 600, Sahwanya FRODEBU ivuga ko yahawe abantu 6 gusa. Bwana Niyigaba yabandanije avuga ko FRODEBU ari umugambwe ukomeye uravye ingene userukiwe hose mu gihugu ku buryo utari ukwiriye ikibanza wahawe. Yatsinze amatora ya mbere ya demokrasi Sahwanya FRODEBU niwo mugambwe watsinze amatora ya mbere ya demokrasi mu gihugu c'u Burundi, amatora yashikanye ku butegetsi Prezida Melchior Ndadaye mu 1993. Ndadaye yarongoye u Burundi ikiringo c'amazi atatu, aza kugandagurwa we n'abafasha biwe mw'itembagazwa ry'ubutegetsi ryo mu kwezi kwa cumi 1993. Leonce Ndikumana aheruka kugenwa ngo azoserukire Sahwanya Frodebu mu matora y'umukuru w'igihugu mu 2020 Kuva ico gihe, Sahwanya FRODEBU, kiretse amatora yo mu 2005 yatsinzwe, yarikuye mu yandi yose yakurikiye ivuga ko yabayemwo ubusuma. Ubu hoho FRODEBU izokwitaba Umuvugizi w'uwo mugambwe, Phenias Niyigaba, yabwiye BBC ko amatora y'umwaka uza wa 2020 bategerezwa kuyitaba uko vyogenda kwose. Yagize ati: "Turamaze gushikiriza imigambi y'umugambwe wacu, mbere turamaze no gutora uwuzoduserukira mu matora y'umukuru w'igihugu". Uwo nawe ni Leonce Ngendakumana asanzwe ari icegera c'umukuru w'uwo mugambwe, akaba kandi ari mu bayobozi ba FRODEBU bo kuva kera. Bwana Niyigaba yabandanije agira ati: "Ivyo vyose babigira kugira dushavure tuvuge ngo turayavuyemwo. Nibacire birarura, rero banse kuduha abaduserukira, twe tuzocunganira ku tuzu tw'amatora." Amatora rusangi mu gihugu c'u Burundi yitezwe mu kwezi kwa gatanu 2020.

Perezida Donald Trump na mukeba we Joe Biden mu kiganiro mpaka ku wa kane nijoro Kuri iki cyorezo, Biden avuga ko bishobotse habaho n'izindi "Guma mu rugo", mu gihe Trump we ashimangira ko cyari igihe cyo gufungura Amerika. Bwana Trump yaneguye, nta bimenyetso atanze, ko Bwana Biden atunzwe n'ubushabitsi bw'umuhungu we. Naho Biden agarura ibivugwa kuri Trump ko yanyereje imisoro. Mu makusanyabitekerezo, Bwana Biden ari imbere ya mukeba we mu kugira amahirwe menshi yo gutorwa, mu gihe amatora abura iminsi 11. Ariko ikinyuranyo ni gitoya muri leta nkeya zizwiho kutagira uruhande ruhoraho zitora hagati y'abademokarate n'abarepubulikani. Abantu bagera kuri miliyoni 47 ubu bamaze gutora, umuhigo kugeza ubu kuko birinda kuzajya gutora hari abantu benshi muri iki gihe cy'icyorezo. Ni iki cyaranze izi mpaka? Iki kiganiro cyabaye ku wa kane nijoro i Nashville muri leta ya Tennessee ntabwo cyaranzwe n'ubushyamirane kandi cyarimo kuvuga ku bintu bifatika kurusha icyo mu kwezi gushize cyageze aho aba bakandida batukana. Kubera ibyabaye icyo gihe, abagitegura bafashe ingamba nshya zirimo kuzimya indangururamajwi mu gihe umukandida adahawe umwanya, mu rwego rwo kwirinda gucana mu ijambo. Gusa ntibyabujije ko ikiganiro cyo kuri uyu wa kane nijoro cyajemo guseserezanya buri umwe yibasira undi mu buzima bwe bwite. Aba bagabo berekanye ko batandukanye cyane mu buryo babona ibintu byose mu gihugu cyabo, kuva kuri coronavirus kugeza ku iyangirika ry'ikirere n'uko ryakwirindwa. Bavuze iki kuri coronavirus? Kuri iki cyorezo ni ho hagaragaje cyane kutavuga rumwe kwabo. Abajijwe niba yashyigikira izindi gahunda za 'Guma mu rugo' mu gihe abahanga muri siyansi baba babisabye, Bwana Biden ntiyazuyaje kubyemera. Naho Bwana Trump yavuze ko ari amakosa kurushaho kuzahaza ubukungu kubera indwara abantu benshi babasha gukira. Trump ati: "Iki ni igihugu cy'ubukungu bunini cyane, abantu bari kubura akazi, abantu bari kwiyahura. Agahinda gakabije, ubusinzi, ibiyobyabwenge, byose bigeze ku rwego tutigeze tubona mbere." Trump w'imyaka 74, yavuze ko iki cyorezo "kiri gucika" kandi urukingo ruzaba rwabonetse mu mpera z'uyu mwaka, mu gihe Biden we yaburiye igihugu ko bagiye kujya mu gihe "kibi cyane cy'ubukonje". Trump yagize ati: "Turi kwiga kubana nayo". Biden w'imyaka 77 yahise amusubiza ati: "Have have, [ahubwo] iri kutwica." Bwana Biden yashinje mukeba we uruhare mu rupfu rw'Abanyamerika barenga 200,000 iki cyorezo cyishe. Ati: "Umuntu wese wagize uruhare muri izi mpfu ntakwiye gukomeza kuba perezida wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika". Bavuze iki ku irondaruhu? Mu gusubizanya ku bijyanye n'ivanguramoko, Trump yagize ati: "Muri iki cyumba ni njye muntu w'ivanguramoko riri hasi cyane." Yagaruye iby'itegeko ryo mu 1994 mukeba we Biden yagize uruhare mu gutegura, itegeko inkubiri ya 'Black Lives Matter' ishinja gufunga abirabura benshi bo muri Amerika. Ariko Biden yavuze ko Trump ari "umwe mu baperezida baranzwe n'ivanguramoko twagize mu mateka ya vuba. Umena amavuta kuri buri kibatsi cy'ivanguramoko." Kuzimya indangururamajwi cyangwa nibura kumenya ko bishoboka, bisa nk'aho byakoze. Mu kiganiro mpaka cya kabiri, aba bakandida bagaragaje koroshya. Buri umwe yaretse undi aravuga. Bumvikanye mu mvugo irimo kubahana. No mu gihe baseserezanyaga babikoraga batuje. Nyuma y'ikiganiro cya mbere cyarimo gutukana no gucyocyorana, aho Trump yaciye mu ijambo kenshi Biden bikanamugaragaza nabi, ubu Trump yari yacishije macye - kandi byatumye ajya impaka neza. Kuri iyi nshuro nanone, Biden yabyitwayemo neza yirinda ibibazo n'amakosa yatuma mukeba we amubaza ibibazo bigendanye n'amagara ye n'ubwenge bwe. Muri rusange, ikiganiro mpaka cyo gushyogozanya cyabanje ni cyo kizajya mu mateka. Bavuze iki ku ihindagurika ry'ikirere? Aba bagabo ntibavuze rumwe kuri politiki y'iby'ingufu, aho Trump yabajije mukeba we ati: "Ese wafunga inganda zitunganya ibitoro?" Biden aramusubiza ati: "Yego, nafata urugendo rwo guhindura inganda z'ibitoro, kuko izo nganda zirahumanya bikomeye." Yavuze ko uko igihe gitambuka ibitoro bigomba gusimbuzwa ingufu zongera gutunganywa kuko Amerika igana ku guhagarika burundu kwangiza ikirere. Trump yamusubije ati: "Mu by'ukuri icyo ari kuvuga ni uko agiye gusenya inganda z'ibitoro. Texas, ibyo uzabyibuka? Pennsylvania, Oklahoma, Ohio ibyo uzabyibuka?"

Abategetsi ba Wuhan vyabaye ngombwa ko bubaka ibindi bitaro kugira ngo bashobore kwakira abandura coronavirus babandanya bongerekana Abavuzi batandatu baramaze kuhasiga ubuzima, nayo abashika 1716 bamaze kwandukirwa kuva uwo mugera wadutse, nk'uko abo bategetsi babimenyesha. Gushika ubu, abantu barenga 1300 baramaze guhitanwa n'uwo mugera. Urupfu rwa muganga Li Wenliang, yari yagerageje kugabisha abategetsi uwo mugera ugitangura kwibonekeza, rwatumye abanyagihugu bashangashirwa. Zeng Yixin icegera c'umushikiranganji w'amagara y'abantu w'Ubushinwa, avuga ko abaganga 1102 banduye mu karere ka Wuhan, ahatanguriye ico kiza, abandi 400 nabo bakaba ari abo mu bindi bice vy'igihugu. Avuga ko igitigiri c'abaganga bagenda bandura uwo mugera kigenda congerekana. Asubirwamwo n'itororokanirizo ry'amakuru Reuters, Bwana Zeng avuga ati: "Abaganga bafise akazi katoroshe na gato; bakorera mu buryo butoroshe kandi ntibanaruhuka; bamana umutima uhagaze, kandi kwandukirwa ni ibintu vyoroshe kuri bo". Abategetsi bo muri ako karere babandanya bita ku rutare kugira barabe ko bobaronsa ibikoresho vyo kwikingira nka twa dutambara two kwambara mu maso, ya marori yo kwikingira hamwe n'impuzu Bambara mu kwikingira. Umuganga umwe yabwiye Reuters ko we na bagenzi we 16 bafise ibimenyetso vyerekana ko bashobora kuba baranduye. Uwundi nawe avuga ko we na bagenziwe barenga ijana ku bitaro akorerako bashizwe ukwa bonyene. Yabwiye televiziyo CNN ya Amerika ko abandi 30 kuri 500 bahakora bamaze kwandura. Ibiharuro vya nyuma vyerekana ko abantu bashasha 122 bapfuye mu Bushinwa, ivyatumye ico gitigiri gishika kuri 1381. Coronavirusu yatanguriye m karere ka Wuhan Muri ico gihugu nyene, ubushikiranganji bw'amagara y'abantu bumenyesha ko abantu banduye uwo mugera bababa 64.000. Hagati aho, ibitigiri vy'abandura uwo mugera hanze y'Ubushinwa biracari hasi, nk'uko bivugwa n'ishirahamwe OMS. Uwo mugera umaze gukwiragira mu bihugu bishika 24 kw'isi, aho abashika 500 bamaze kuwandura hanze y'Ubushinwa. Muri Philippines, umuntu umwe aramaze guhitanwa n'ico kiza. Umukuru w'ishami rya ONU ryitaho amagara kw'isi OMS, Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, afise ubwoba ko mu gihe woshika mu bihugu bitifashe mu birava ubuvuzi wokora ibara.

Vincent Biruta, minisitiri w'ububanyi n'amahanga w'u Rwanda Iyi minisiteri ivuga ko ibona uburyo icyorezo cya coronavirus kiri gukwirakwira ku isi ariko n'ishami ry'umuryango w'abibumbye ryatanze inama ku ngendo mpuzamahanga mu kuyirinda. Mu bihugu bitandatu; Burundi, Kenya, Rwanda Tanzania, Sudani y'Epfo na Uganda bigize EAC ntabwo haragera indwara ya coronavirus. Iri tangazo ryasinyweho na minisitiri Vincent Biruta riributsa ko ibihugu byinshi ku isi, birimo n'ibigize EAC, byafashe ingamba zo kugabanya ingendo no guhagarika cyangwa gusubika zimwe mu nama mpuzamahanga byari kwakira. Iri tangazo BBC yabonye, rivuga kandi ko leta y'u Rwanda yagabanyije ingendo z'imbere no hanze y'igihugu ku bategetsi, bityo ibi byagira ingaruka ku mubare usabwa mu nama za EAC. Kubera izo mpamvu leta y'u Rwanda ikaba isaba ubunyamabanga wa EAC gusubika inama y'abakuru b'ibihugu bigize uyu muryango, gukora izindi nama kuri 'videoconference' aho biri ngombwa no guhagarika cyangwa gusubika izindi nama n'ibikorwa bihuza abantu benshi. Inama ya 21 y'abakuru b'ibihugu bigize EAC yari iteganyijwe mu kwezi kwa 11 umwaka ushize ariko yimurirwa mu kwezi kwa kabiri uyu mwaka. Tariki 22 z'ukwezi gushize kwa kabiri, EAC yatangaje ko iyi nama yari iteganyijwe kubera Arusha tariki 29/02/2020 yongeye gusubikwa bisabwe na Sudani y'Epfo ngo ibanze ishyireho guverinoma. Inama y'abakuru b'ibihugu bigize uyu muryango igomba guterana buri mwaka irebera hamwe ibikorwa by'uyu muryango bigamije ahanini kuganisha ku bumwe bw'ibi bihugu mu by'ubutegetsi n'ubukungu.

Iri tegeko ryerekeye abana batari kumwe n'abavyeyi babo gusa Yategetse kandi gusubiramwo integuro ijanye n'abimukira yasizwe n'uwo yasubiriye. Mu kugerageza kurwanya abimukira mu buryo buteye kubiri n'amategeko, ubutegetsi bwa Perezida Donald Trump bwari bwatandukanije abakuze batagira ivya ngomwa n'abana babo binjiye baciye ku rubibe rwa Amerika na Mexique. Aya mategeko yateweko igikumu na Perezida Biden agiye gushiraho umurwi uzosubiza mu miryango yabo abana baharurwa hagati ya 600 na 700 batandukanijwe n'abavyeyi babo. Ubutegetsi bwa Trump bwaratandukanije abana n'imiburiburi 5.500 n'abakuze kuri urwo rubibe hagati ya 2017-2018. Abaharanira uburenganzira bwa muntu bavuga ko ubutegetsi bwa Perezida Barack Obama - Perezida Biden akaba yari icegera ciwe - na bwo bwatandukanije abana batari bafise ivya ngombwa n'abavyeyi kuri urwo rubibe, n'ubwo vyabaye gake cane. Rimwe muri aya mategeko ya Biden rizoshinga umurwi uhuriyemwo ibisata bitandukanye - ukazoba urongowe n'umunyamabanga mushasha w'umutekano w'igihugu Alejandro Mayorkas - kugira ngo ahagarikire ibikorwa vy'ugusubiza hamwe imiryango. Itegeko rya kabiri n'irya gatatu yateweko igikumu ma Biden ejo ku wa kabiri ategeka ko hasubirwamo politike y'abinjira n'abasohoka ya Trump yagabanije uburenganzira bwo kuronswa ubuhungiro, igabanya umuvuduko w'abinjira muri Amerika, kandi ihagarika intererano yahabwa ibihugu vy'amahanga. Mw'ijambo yashikirije mu biro vy'umukuru w'igihugu, Biden yavuze ati: "Tugiye gukora kugira ngo dukureho iceyi twatewe n'ubutegetsi buheruka, tuvugishije ukuri, bwatandukanije abana bubavana mu minwe y'imiryango yabo, ba nyina na ba se babo, ku rubibe ata nteguro n'imwe yo kuzosubiza hamwe abana bakiri mu basho n'abavyeyi babo". Biden asaba kandi ko hashirwaho itegeko riha uburenganzira bwo kuba mu gihugu, rikaba n'inzira yo gushobora kuronsa ubwenegihugu abimukira badafise ivya ngombwa bashika imiriyoni 11 muri Amerika. Ariko, abihweza ibintu n'ibindi bavuga ko uyu mukuru w'igihugu mushasha yirinze guhindura poritike igumye ya Trump yafashwe mu ntumbero yo kugabanya ibitigiri vy'abinjira mu gihugu mu buryo butemewe n'amategeko ku rubibe rwo mu bumanuko. Ejo kuwa kabiri, mu nama mu biro vy'umukuru w'igihugu, umunyamabanga ajejwe kumenyesha amakuru Jen Psaki yavuze ko ubutegetsi bwiyemeje gushiraho integuro ishira imbere iteka ry'umuntu ijanye n'ubwimukira. Yavuze ariko ko mu gihe iyo nteguro itarajaho, si igihe "co kwinjira muri Amerika". Gutandukanye imiryango vyaje gute? Muri politike yo "kutihanganirana na gato" abimukira yemejwe mu kwa kane 2018, abimukira bakuze badafise ivya ngombwa binjiriye ku rubibe rwa Amerika na Mexique bafashwe nk'inkozi z'ikibi bacirwa urubanza barapfungwa. Imbere y'aha, ibi vyaha ntivyafatwa nk'ubukozi bw'ikibi. Kubera abana bari kumwe n'abo bapfunzwe batashobora gucirwa urubanza ngo bagirwe n'icaha, ntibemerewe gupfunganwa n'abavyeyi babo, maze bituma bashirwa mu bibanza vyo kubakurikiraniramwo. Amasanamu n'amareresi y'abana bari baryamye ku birago muri ivyo bigo vyari vyarengewe yarateye uburakari mu gihugu, bica bituma Trump ahagarika iyi poritike mu kwa gatandatu uwo mwaka. Mu ndwi iheze, igisata ca Biden kijejwe ubutungane carakuyeho iryo tegeko ku mugaragaro. Hagati aho, ivyo bigo bizibije iminyororo bisanzwe bipfungiwemwo abo bana vyari vyubatswe n'ubutegetsi bwa Obama. Abana baharurwa mu 60.000 bahagaritswe ku rubibe rwo mu bumanuko batari kumwe n'abavyeyi babo barapfungiwe muri ibi bigo mu ci ryo mu 2014. N'aho ibitigiri bidatomotse neza, abategetsi b'igihe ca Obama bavuga ko ivyo gutandukanya imiryango vyari ibintu bitari bikunze kuba mu gihe c'ubutegetsi bwiwe, nk'akarorero, ni mu gihe wasanga hari abiketswe ko bariko bakora magendo. Uwari umuhanuzi mukuru wa Obama ajejwe abinjira n'abasohoka, Cecilia Munoz - akaba mu 2011 yashigikiye cane iyi poritike yo gutandukanya imiryango y'abimukira - yari mu murwi wa Biden wari ujejwe ibikorwa vy'uguhanahana ubutegetsi.

mu ndirimbo ye nshya Spirit iri kuri Album yasohotse uyu munsi Muri iyi ndirimbo Beyoncé afatanyijemo n'uyu mugabo we Jay- Z n'umuhanzi Childish Gambino, mu gitero cye aririmba mo ati: "My baby father, bloodline Rwanda". Ntibizwi neza niba koko ibisekuru by'umugabo we Jay-Z -bafitanye abana batatu - biri mu Rwanda, cyangwa byari iby'inganzo y'abahanzi gusa. Ikizwi ni uko muri Album nshya Beyoncé yasohoye uyu munsi yiyegereje cyane umugabane wa Afurika. Mu ndirimbo 27 zigize iyi Album indirimbo zimwe zaririmbwe izindi yaziririmbanye n'abahanzi bo muri Afurika y'Iburengerazuba. Muri abo bahanzi harimo; Tekno, Yemi Alade, Mr Eazi, Tiwa Savage bo muri Nigeria, John Kani wo muri Afurika y'Epfo na Salatiel wo muri Cameroun. Muri iriya ndirimbo "Mood 4 Eva" baririmbamo ibindi bintu cyangwa abantu byerekeye Afurika nka Nelson Mandela, Jay-Z akigereranya mu butunzi na Mansa Musa (umwami w'abami w'ubwami bwa Mali, bivugwa ko ari mu bantu batunze kurusha abandi mu mateka y'isi). Muri iyi ndirimbo kandi Beyoncé aririmba ko ari "Umwamikazi wa Sheba" (Queen of Sheba), uyu avugwa mu mateka ko yavuye muri Afurika akajya gusura umwami Salomon w'abisiraheli. Kuri iyi Album nshya kandi indirimbo ya Beyoncé yise 'Spirit' itangizwa n'amagambo y'igiswahili aririmbwa ngo 'Uishi kwa muda mrefu mfalme' (bivuze: urambe mwami). Kubera iterambere ry'ubukungu n'ikoranabuhanga bigenda bigerwaho, abahanga mu bukungu bavuga ko isoko rishya ryo gucuruzaho n'ibihangano by'ubuhanzi n'ubugeni mu gihe kiri kuza ari Afurika. Abakurikiranira hafi ibya muzika bavuga ko Beyoncé n'umugabo we bashaka kurushaho kwiyegereza no kwigarurira abakunzi ba muzika kuri iri soko rishya riri kuzamuka.

Prezida Isaias Afwerki amaze imyaka 26 ku butegetsi Mu 1994 abayoboke b'iryo dini bose baratswe ubwenegihugu, abakurikira iryo dini bose barahigwa buhongo barapfungwa ata rubanza baciriwe. Kimwe mu vyo bagirizwa kwari kwanka kuja mu myimenyerezo ya gisirikare. Itangazo ry'ivyabona vya Jehovah rivuga ko abayoboke baryo bavuye mw'ibohero muri Eritrea inyuma yo kurangiza igipfungo kiri hagati y'imyaka itanu na 26. Bamwe bapfunzwe bazira kwanka ibitajanye n'ukwemera kwabo - mu gihugu kuja mu myimenyerezo ya gisirikare ari itegeko. Iryo shengero rivuga ko abandi bayoboke baryo 24 bakiri mw'ibohero. Mu 1994 Prezida Isaias Afwerki yatse ubwenegihugu ivyabona vya Jehovah - haciye umwaka umwe abaye umukuru w'ico gihugu cari gihejeje kwikukira. Eritrea ni kimwe mu bihugu bitwaza umukazo kw'isi - nta matora canke inama nshingamateka bibayo, kandi integuroy'ibwirizwa shingiro ntirigera ishirwa mu bikorwa. Amashengero atatu yonyene ni yo yemewe - abakirisu b'abaOrthodoxe, aba Islam b'aba Sunni hamwe n'aba Luther.

Mu Rwanda, abana b'incuke n'abiga mu myaka itatu ya mbere y'amashuri abanza bagiye kumara amezi 10 batiga. Aba ni abana bo ku Gisenyi bajyanywe ku ishuri mu mpera za 2019 Kuva mu kwa 11 umwaka ushize amashuri yongeye gufungura nyuma y'amezi arindwi afunze kubera Covid, gusa abiga amashuri y'incuke n'imyaka itatu ibanza kugeza ubu bagomba kuguma mu rugo. Jean Paul Ndayisabye umubyeyi w'abana batatu wo ku Kacyiru i Kigali ku tariki 01/01/2021 yandikiye perezida avuga ko abana bo muri icyo cyiciro biga mu mashuri mpuzamahanga mu Rwanda bo biga. Avuga ko hariho "igisa n'ivangura rishingiye ku bukungu ku buryo abifite aribo babona amahirwe yo kwigisha abana babo n'aho abafite ubushobozi buke cyangwa buciriritse bakomeje gutegereza nk'aho iyi ndwara ireba icyiciro cyimwe cy'abantu". Coronavirus mu Rwanda imaze kwica abantu barenga gato 100 kuva yahaboneka mu kwezi kwa gatatu umwaka ushize, naho abamaze kuyandura bo barenga 8,800. Ku mbuga nkoranyambaga, hari benshi bagaragaza ko bidakwiye kuba amashuri mpuzamahanga - yiganjemo abana bo mu miryango ikize - yo asa n'atarebwa n'izi ngamba zo kurinda abana icyorezo. Ndayisabye we yabwiye BBC ko icyo asaba mu ibaruwa ye ari uko "niba abana biga bige bose, niba batiga nabwo bagume mu ngo bose nta busumbane bubayemo." Nta gisubizo ku ibaruwa ye arabona, yabwiye BBC ati: "Igisubizo ni abanyarwanda nka 99.9% bagitegereje". Ku bibazo bisa n'iki cy'abana bataremerwa gusubira ku mashuri, ejo kuwa mbere Alphonse Sebaganwa ukuriye ikigo gishinzwe uburezi mu Rwanda (REB) yasubije umwe kuri Twitter ati: "...turiho turabitegura neza kandi muramenyeshwa gahunda yo gutangira bidatinze..." Kuri bamwe ariko iki si igisubizo gifatika, uwitwa Ndikuyeze yasubije Sebaganwa ko gusubiza atavuze igihe ntacyo biba bifashije. Hari abari bategereje igisubizo cy'ikibazo cy'aba banyeshuri mu byemezo by'inama y'abaminisitiri byatangajwe mu ijoro ryo kuwa mbere. Nta mwanzuro w'iyi nama ukivugaho, mu ngamba nshya zatangajwe ni icyo ubu bamwe bari kwita "Guma mu karere", ibuza ingendo hagati y'uturere, n'uturere n'umujyi wa Kigali.

Perezida Emmanuel Macron w'Ubufaransa na Ibrahim Keita wa Mali. Ibrahim Boubakar Keita yabwiye ikinyamakuru Jeune Afrique ko benshi mu baguye muri icyo gitero ari abasirikare ba Mali bari barafashweho ingwate n'abarwanyi bagendera ku matwara akaze y'idini ya Islamu. Ubufaransa bwari bwaravuze ko abantu baguye muri icyo gitero cyo mu kwezi kwa cumi ari abayoboke b'umutwe wa Ansar Dine ugendera ku matwara akaze y'idini ya Kiyisilamu. Perezida Keita yavuze ko ari byiza kwemera ukuri kandi ko Ubufaransa na Mali byagombye kubivugaho rumwe. Abasirikare b'Ubufaransa bamaze imyaka itanu bari mu bikorwa byo kurwanya imitwe igendera ku matwara akaze ya Isilamu n'indi ishaka kwivana kuri Mali.

Saido Berahino ukinira West Brom Odemwingie, ubu ukinira ekipe ya Stoke, yavuze ko ibyo byamwibukije ibibazo bwite yagize igihe yakiniraga iyo kipe ya West Brom. West Brom yahanishije uyu mukinnyi, ukomoka muri Nigeriya, igihano cyo gutanga umushahara w'ibyumweru 2 kubera ko yaganiriye na ekipe ya Queens Park Rangers atabifitiye uruhushya mu kwezi kwa 1 muri 2013. Odemwingie yanditse ku rubuga nkoranyambaga rwa Twitter avuga ati "Ibyambayeho bishobora kongera kuba, niba atavuye muri iyi kipe mu mezi ari mbere." Odemwingie yavuye muri iyi kipe mu kwezi kwa 9 mu 2013, ajya muri Cardiff City. Berahino, ufite imyaka 20, yahisemo kutageza ikirego mu rukiko arega mugenzi we, James Morrison, wamukubise ikofi mu cyumweru gishize ubwo bari mu cyumba bahinduriramo imyenda. Uyu musore ukinira Ubwongereza mu rwego rw'abari munsi y'imyaka 21, yashakaga gutanga ikirego mu rukiko kubera icyo kibazo nyuma y'umukino na Cardiff City, aho amakipe yombi yanganyije, 3 - 3.

Iperereza rya BBC ryasanze hari imiti mpimbano icuruzwa muri Afurika, abayicuruza bakaba baca urwaho ku kuba nta muti wa coronavirus uraboneka ndetse n'ibura ry'indi miti y'ibanze. OMS ivuga ko imiti nk'iyo ishobora kugira "ingaruka zikomeye" ku buzima. Impuguke imwe yaburiye ko hashobora kwaduka "ikindi cyorezo gitewe n'imiti itujuje ubuziranenge kandi mpimbano". Ku isi abantu bakomeje kwirundaho imiti y'ibanze bakayihunika mu ngo zabo. Ariko mu gihe ibihugu bibiri bya mbere bikora imiti myinshi ku isi - Ubushinwa n'Ubuhinde - biri mu bihe bidasanzwe, abacyeneye imiti baruta imiti iri ku isoko. Ndetse n'icuruzwa ry'imiti mpimbano riri kwiyongera. Ubwo ku itariki ya 11 z'ukwa gatatu OMS yatangazaga ko ubu noneho coronavirus ari icyorezo cyugarije isi, muri icyo cyumweru polisi mpuzamahanga Interpol yafashe abigana imiti. Operation Pangea, itsinda rya Interpol rirwanya imiti mpimbano, yataye muri yombi abantu 121 bo mu bihugu 90 ku isi mu gihe cy'iminsi irindwi gusa. Ibyo byatumye ifata imiti mpimbano yajyaga gushyira ubuzima mu kaga ifite agaciro karenga miliyoni 14 z'amadolari y'Amerika. Mu bihugu byo kuva muri Malaysia kugera muri Mozambique, abapolisi ba Interpol bafashe ibyo kwipfuka mu maso (masques/masks) bibarirwa mu bihumbi za mirongo. Mu kwezi gushize kwa gatatu Interpol yafashe 'masques' mpimbano kandi zitujuje ubuziranenge zigera ku 34,000 Nyinshi muri izo 'masques' byavugwaga ko zifite ubushobozi bwo kuvura coronavirus. Jurgen Stock, umunyamabanga mukuru wa Interpol, yagize ati: "Ubucuruzi butemewe n'amategeko bw'ibikoresho by'ubuvuzi mpimbano nk'ibyo muri iki gihe cy'akaga mu buzima, bugaragaza kutita na gacye ku buzima bw'abantu". Nkuko OMS ibitangaza, ubucuruzi bwose hamwe bw'imiti mpimbano, harimo n'imiti ishobora kuba yifitemo ubwandu runaka, buba bugizwe n'imiti ifite ibikora imiti bitari iby'ukuri. OMS yongeraho ko hari nubwo nta n'ibigize imiti iyo miti mpimbano iba yifitemo, cyangwa yaramaze kurangiza igihe. OMS ivuga ko ubucuruzi bw'imiti nk'iyo itari yo mu bihugu biri mu nzira y'amajyambere n'ibyateye imbere biciriritse, bubarirwa agaciro karenga miliyari 30 z'amadolari y'Amerika. Pernette Bourdillion Esteve, wo mu itsinda rya OMS rirwanya imiti itari yo, yagize ati: "Ibintu bigenze neza iyo miti ishobora kutavura indwara bivugwa ko yagombaga kuvura". "Bigenze nabi bwo iyo miti iteza ikibazo ku buzima, kubera ko ishobora kuba yarandujwe n'ikintu kirimo uburozi". Uko ikwirakwizwa Urwego rujyanye no gukora imiti rubarirwa agaciro karenga tiriyari (trillion) imwe y'amadolari y'Amerika. Uko ikwirakwizwa mu buryo bugari bihera mu nganda z'ingenzi z'imiti nk'izo mu Bushinwa no mu Buhinde, bikagera n'aho ishyirirwa mu bikarito n'amacupa i Burayi, muri Amerika y'epfo cyangwa muri Aziya. Bigakomereza kandi ku bashinzwe gukwirakwiza imiti bayohereza muri buri gihugu cyo ku isi. Esteve yavuze ko "bishoboka ko nta kindi kintu cyakwiriye ku isi kurusha imiti". Ariko muri iki gihe isi yinjiye mu bihe bidasanzwe, urwego rwo gukwirakwiza imiti rwamaze gutangira gucumbagira. Inganda nyinshi zikora imiti zo mu Buhinde zabwiye BBC ko ubu zikora ku kigero kiri hagati ya 50% na 60% cy'ubushobozi zisanzwe zifite. Kandi kubera ko inganda zikora imiti zo mu Buhinde zihariye 20% by'imiti yibanze yoherezwa muri Afurika, ibihugu byo kuri uyu mugabane biri kugirwaho ingaruka zikomeye. Ephraim Phiri, ucuruza imiti mu murwa mukuru Lusaka wa Zambia, yavuze ko byatangiye kumugiraho ingaruka. Yagize ati: "Imiti yatangiye gushira kandi nta yindi turikongera muri 'stock' yo kuyisimbura. Nta kintu na kimwe twabikoraho". "Birikutugora rwose kubona imiti...cyane cyane nk'irwanya za 'microbes' (antibiotics) n'irwanya malaria". Abakora n'abakwirakwiza imiti na bo bari kugorwa kuko ibikoresho by'ibanze bikoreshwa mu gukora ibinini kuri ubu bihenze cyane. Bigatuma inganda zimwe zitabyigerezaho ngo zibone n'uko zunguka - zikabona zaba ziri gukorera mu gihombo. Umwe mu bakora imiti wo muri Pakistan yavuze ko yajyaga agura ibyibanze byo gukoramo umuti wa hydrochloroquine uvura malaria ku madolari agera hafi ku 100 ku kilo. Ariko ubu avuga ko ikilo kimwe cy'ibyo bikoresho by'ibanze bivamo uwo muti cyazamutse kikaba gihagaze ku madolari 1,150. Perezida Donald Trump yagerageje kwemeza ubushobozi bwa hydrochloroquine - ariko nta gihamya iriho yuko ishobora gufasha mu kurwanya Covid-19 Mu gihe ibihugu byinshi bikomeje kwinjira mu bihe bidasanzwe aho ubuzima busanzwe busa n'ubwahagaze, ntabwo ari gusa igabanuka mu ikorwa ry'imiti riteje ikibazo. Ahubwo hari n'ikibazo cy'abacyeneye imiti barushaho kwiyongera, mu gihe abantu ku isi bo bahangayikishijwe n'uko bakwibikaho imiti y'ibanze myinshi ishoboka. Ni uru ruhurirane rw'igabanuka ry'ingano y'imiti ikorwa no kwiyongera k'umubare w'abayicyeneye rwatumye OMS iburira ko hari ukwiyongera guteye impungenge kw'ikorwa ry'imiti itari yo n'icuruzwa ryayo. Esteve, wo muri OMS, yagize ati: "Iyo imiti ikorwa idahuye n'ikigero cy'abayicyeneye, bituma habaho ko imiti mibi cyangwa imiti itari yo igerageza kuziba icyo cyuho cy'abacyeneye imiti nyayo ariko ntibayibone". Imiti itari yo Ubwo BBC yaganiraga n'abacuruzi b'imiti n'inganda ziyikora mu bice bitandukanye byo ku isi, byagaragaye ko imiti ivura malaria yugarijwe ku isi. Ni kuva Perezida Donald Trump wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Amerika yatangira kuvuga ko chloroquine n'umuti bifitanye isano wa hydroxychloroquine, ishobora kuvura coronavirus. Yabivugiye mu biganiro bya buri munsi agirana n'abanyamakuru mu biro bye bya White House. Chloroquine mpimbano muri DR Congo Ibyo byatumye ku isi abantu batangira kugura ku bwinshi iyo miti, ubusanzwe ikoreshwa mu kuvura malaria. OMS yakomeje gutangaza ko nta gihamya ntakuka iriho yuko chloroquine cyangwa hydroxychloroquine ishobora kwifashishwa mu kuvura virusi itera indwara y'ubuhumekero ya Covid-19. Ariko mu kiganiro aherutse kugirana n'abanyamakuru, Perezida Trump, avuga kuri iyo miti ubundi ivura malaria, yagize ati: "Ni iki uhomba [mu kuwunywa]? Wunywe". Muri iki gihe aho abacyeneye iyo miti barushaho kwiyongera, BBC yatahuye ko chloroquine nyinshi itari iy'ukuri iri kugurishwa muri Repubulika ya Demokarasi ya Kongo no muri Cameroun. OMS nayo yatahuye ko imiti mpimbano iri gucuruzwa mu gihugu cya Niger. Chloroquine y'ukuri ivura malaria ubusanzwe igurishwa ku madolari hafi 40 y'Amerika ku ipaki irimo ibinini 1,000. Ariko abacuruzi b'imiti muri DR Congo batahuwe ko ubu basigaye bayigurisha ku giciro kigera ku madolari 250 y'Amerika. Uwo muti uri kugurishwa yo bivugwa ko wakorewe mu Bubiligi n'uruganda "Brown and Burk Pharmaceutical limited". Ariko uruganda rw'imiti rwa 'Brown and Burk' rwanditswe ko rukorera mu Bwongereza, rwatangaje ko "ntaho ruhuriye n'uyu muti" Rwongeyeho ruti: "Ntabwo dukora uyu muti, ni mpimbano". Imiti ya malaria ariko itari iy'ukuri yatahuwe irimo gucuruzwa muri DR Congo Muri iki gihe icyorezo cya coronavirus gikomeje ku isi, Profeseri Paul Newton, impuguke mu bijyanye n'imiti mpimbano wo kuri Kaminuza ya Oxford mu Bwongereza, yagize icyo aburira. Yavuze ko icuruzwa ry'imiti mpimbano kandi mibi ku buzima ahubwo rizarushaho kwiyongera. Profeseri Newton avuga ko ari aha za leta z'ibihugu byo ku isi kwishyira hamwe zigahashya iyo miti mpimbano zisenyeye ku mugozi umwe. Yagize ati: "Dufite ibyago ko haduka ikindi cyorezo, kivuye mu miti itujuje ubuziranenge n'imiti itari yo, keretse twese ku isi niduhuriza hamwe tugashyiraho gahunda ihuriweho y'ikorwa, ikwirakwizwa ryo mu buryo bungana n'igenzura ry'ubudakemwa by'amagerageza, imiti n'inkingo". "Bitabaye ibyo, ibyo ducyesha ubuvuzi bugezweho...bizahatikirira".

Abahanga bavuga ko ibikorwa bya muntu aribyo nyirabayazana w'ibyorezo, ibiza n'amakuba y'isi Insanganyamatsiko y'uyu munsi ni "ukugira icyo dukora turwanya ihindagurika ry'ikirere" nk'uko bivugwa n'umuryango w'abibumbye. Iki cyo ikibazo gihangayikishije isi n'abayituye uyu munsi ndetse kizagora cyane abazayitura mu gihe kizaza, uyu munsi washyiriweho kugira icyo duhindura mu gukemura icyo kibazo. Tariki 22/04/1970 abaturage ba Amerika bagera kuri miliyoni 20 bagiye mu mihanda bamagana ubujiji bwariho mu kwangiza isi, basaba ingamba nshya ngo irengerwe. Iyo tariki yahise yitwa "umunsi w'isi" ndetse ugenda wizihizwa no mu bindi bihugu by'isi. Kuva ubwo muri Amerika hatowe amategeko arengera ibidukikije, itegeko rirengera amazi meza, umwuka mwiza n'ibinyabuzima biri gucika. Mu 2016 UN yahisemo ko ku itariki nk'iyi aribwo hasinywa amaserano mpuzamahanga ya Paris yo kurwanya ihindagurika ry'ikirere. Ni iki isi dutuye idusaba? Ubutumwa bwatanzwe n'Umuryango w'Abibumbye (UN/ONU) buvuga ko isi idutuje idusaba kugira icyo dukora mu kuyirengera. Umunyamabanga mukuru w'umuryango w'abibumbye Antonio Guterres yagize ati: "Tugomba kurushaho kugira icyo dukora mu kurinda umubumbe wacu coronavirus ndetse n'akandi kaga kose gakomoka ku iyangirika ry'ikirere" Imiriro y'ishyamba n'ubushyuhe bw'ikirenga biherutse gutwika Australia, icyorezo cy'inzige giheruka kwibasira Afurika y'iburasirazuba. Ubu n'icyorezo kidasanzwe mu mateka y'isi cya virus yiswe Covid-19 kiri kugarika ingogo, inkomoko yabyo abahanga bavuga ko ari urusobe rw'imibereho ya none. UN ivuga ko ihindagurika ry'ikirere ryahinduye byinshi ku buzima kamere n'urusobe rw'ibinyabuzima. Ibyo ni nk'iyangizwa ry'amashyamba, ikoreshwa nabi ry'ubutaka, kwiyongera kw'imyuka ihumanya ikirere no kwiyongera kw'ubucuruzi butemewe bw'inyamaswa n'ibizikomokaho. Iki cyanyuma kikaba kivugwa mu gukwira kw'indwara ziva ku nyamaswa zijya mu bantu nka Covid-19. Ishmi ry'ibidukikije rya UN rivuga ko mu ndwara nshya ziboneka mu bantu buri mezi ane(4), 75% byazo ziva ku nyamaswa. UN isaba abatuye isi ko umunsi nk'uyu ubibutsa ko bakwiye gutekereza ku kugera ku bukungu bitabangamiye isi n'ubuzima. Bakirinda bimwe cyangwa byose muri biriya bikorwa byandiza uyu mubumbe dutuye bigashyira ubuzima mu kaga. UN ivuga ko igikorwa gito mu kurengera isi, ariko gikozwe na buri wese n'umutima ushaka, cyakiza benshi none n'abazaza nyuma yacu.

Messi avuga ko ata murwi ushoboye kumugura Uyu mukinyi yari aherutse kumenyesha ko yipfuza kuva muri uyu murwi, ariko amasezerano afitaniye na Barcelona akaba ategeka ko umurwi umukeneye utegerezwa kumugura ku giciro c'imiliyoni 700 z'ama Euro. Avugana n'ikinyamakuru Goal, Messi yavuze ati: "Naribaza kandi nari nzi neza ko nari mfise uburenganzira bwo kugenda". "Igihe cose, umukuru w'umurwi yama ambwira ko ihiganwa rirangiye nari gushobora gufata ingingo yo kuguma mu murwi cane nkagenda". "Rero nemeye kuguma muri uno murwi. Ubu rero ngiye kubandanya nkinira uyu murwi kubera umukuru wayo yambwiye ko inzira yonyene ishoboka kugira ngo ngende kwari uko uwunkeneye angura imiliyoni 700, ibi navyo bikaba bidashoboka". Messi avuga ko iyindi nzira kwari ukwitura ubutungane, ariko akaba atavyo ashaka. Ati: "Sinumva ko nashobora kuja kwitwarira Barcelona kubera ni umurwi nkunda, wampaye vyose kuva ndawushitsemwo". "Ni umurwi w'ubuzima bwanje, niwo wampaye ubuzima. Ndazi neza ko ntari kwubahuka kwitwarira Barça muri sentare". Avuga ko n'umuryango wiwe utavyumva. Ati: "Igihe mbwiriye umugore n'abana ko nshaka kuva muri uno murwi, ryabaye ibara". "Bose baciye barira, abana ntibashaka kuva i Barcelona, kandi ntibanashaka guhindura amashure". Inyuma y'iminsi icenda Barcelona yabitswe ibara na Bayern ku bitsindo 8-2 mu gice ca kabiri gishira ica nyuma mw'ihiganwa rihuza imirwi yabaye iya mbere i Bulaya (Uefa Champions League), Messi yatangaje ko yipfuza kuva muri uyu murwi inyuma y'imyaka 20 amazemwo. Barça yarangije ihiganwa ry'umwaka w'inkino uheze ata gikombe na kimwe ironse, bica biba ngombwa ko yirukana umumenyereza Quique Setien imusubiriza na Ronald Koeman yigeze kumenyereza Everton hamwe n'umurwi nserukiragihugu w'Ubuholande. Luis Suarez yemeye gukinira Juventus Umusatirizi wa wa Barcelona Luis Suarez yemeye kuja gukinira umurwi wa Juventus wo mu Butaliyano, nk'uko bivigwa n'umumenyeshamakuru wa BBC Radio 5 Live, Guillem Balague. Suarez ashobora kwimukira muri uyo murwi wo mw'ihiganwa Serie A kuri gusa - cane ku giciro kibayabaye - mu gihe yoshobora kwemererwa n'umurwi wiwe wa Barcelona ko ashobora kuvuwamwo akaja kuronderera ahandi. Amasezerano uyu mukinyi akomoka muri Uruguay afitaniye na Barcelona azorangira mu mwaka uza, ariko mu gihe yoshobora gukina inkino zingana n'ibice 60% mu mwaka w'inkino wa 2020-2021, ashobora kwongerwa uwundi mwaka. Mu gihe yokwimukira muri Juventus, suarez yokwisanga ariko akinana n'umukeba akomeye cane wa Messi, Cristiano Ronaldo. Sanchez ati: si nigeze ndyoherwa no gukina muri Manchester United Alexis Sanchez yahoze akinira Manchester United avuga ko atigeze na rimwe aryoherwa no gukinira uyu murwi kuva awinjiyemwo avuye muri Arsenal. Sanchez ubu yinjiye burundu mu murwi Inter Milan inyuma y'umwaka yari amaze awukinira nk'intizo avuye muri Man United. Avuga ko amaze kwimukira muri Manchester United mu masezerano yo kuguzanya abakinyi, aho Arsenal nayo yahawe Henrikh Mkhitaryan mu kwa mbere 2018, yanasavye umufasha wiwe nimba ashobora guhagarika amasezerano yiwe akisubirira i Londres. Mw'ireresi yacishije ku rubuga rwa Instagram, uyu mukinyi w'imyaka 31 avuga ati: "Rimwe na rimwe, hari ibintu uba utabona neza mpaka ushitseyo". "Hari ikintu ntari namenye, kandi nticari ciza". "Numva nezerewe cane , kuko nkiri muto narakunda cane uyu murwi, ari naco gituma nahemutse ndawinjiyemwo. Ariko muvy'ukuri, sinari nabwiwe ingene ibintu vyari bimeze muri uyo murwi". "Umunsi wa mbere ntashe nabwiye umuryango wanje n'umufasha wanje nti: 'Nta buryo bwo guhagarika amasezerano nkisubirira muri Arsenal?', ariko baciye bantwenga".

Melchior Ndadaye yishwe afite imyaka 40 uwamurindaga yahise avuga ok atazasubira mu gisirikare Bwana Ndadaye yagandaguwe haciye iminsi 102 yimitswe, inyuma y'amatora ya mbere yo ku wa 01 ukwezi kwa gatandatu, aho yatsinze Perezida Petero Buyoya yari amaze imyaka itandatu atwara igihugu. Igandagurwa rya Perezida Ndadaye ryatumye Abarundi basubiranamwo bapfa ubwoko, igihugu naco gica cinjira mu ntambara yamaze imyaka irenga cumi. Urubanza rw'abamugandaguye rwaciwe muri iyi ndwi, Pierre Buyoya n'abandi bantu 15 bahoze ari aba-ofisiye bakuru mu ntwazangabo z'u Burundi baciriwe umunyororo wo guherayo, abandi batatu baciriwe imyaka 20 y'igipfungo naho umwe agirwa umwere. Bwana Buyoya mu mwaka uheze urwo rubanza yavuze ko rufise imvo za politiki. Mbega Ndadaye ni nde? Melchior Ndadaye yavutse ku wa 28 z'ukwa gatatu 1953, muri komine Nyabihanga, ico gihe ikaba yari mu ntara ya Muramvya. Igihe ubwicanyi bwo mu mwaka wa 1972 bwaduka, Ndadaye yahungiye mu Rwanda, ahereza amashure yisumbuye i Butare mu Rwanda mu 1975, ari naho yize kaminuza. Yagiye guhunguka mu 1983. Mu 1988, yapfunzwe amezi abiri bivuye ku ciyumviro yari ashikirije ku vyerekeye indyane zari zihejeje kuba mu makomine ya Ntega na Marangaza z'intara za Kirundo na Ngozi. Ndadaye ari mu banyepolitike bakuru batanguje umugambwe FRODEBU mu mpisho mu 1986. Uyu mugambwe wagiye kwemerwa mu 1992 inyuma y'aho kamarampaka yo mu kwa gatatu 1992 yemeje ibwirizwashingiro ryemerera intwaro ishingiye ku migambwe myinshi mu Burundi. Ndadaye yaragandaguwe umuryango wiwe barawureka Yarongoye uwo mugambwe awushitsa ku matora y'umukuru w'igihugu yo ku wa 01 na 29 z'ukwa gatandatu 1993, wagiye gutsinda uri kumwe n'imigambwe, RPB, PP na PL. Ndadaye, umukuru w'igihugu Amatora yo mu 1993 yaranzwe n'amajambo yo gutyozanya hagati y'abahiganwa bari bahanganye mu myiyamamazo. Gratien Rukindikiza, yari mu gisirikare c'u Burundi akaba yari arongoye ingabo zacungera ubuzima bwa Perezida Melchior Ndadaye, umwaka uheze yaganiriye na BBC, avuga ko Ndadaye azwi uko atari ameze. Bwana Rukindukiza ati: "Umwanya twamaranye, nasanze Ndadaye yari umuntu Abarundi batazi, kuko yari mu bantu bataboneka kenshi, bita aba 'Revolutionnaires', kuko ingene yiyumvira ibintu vyari bitandukanye n'ivyo bamwitirira". Bwana Rukindikiza avuga ko Perezida Ndadaye yari amaze kugira intambwe iteye imbere ku bibazo nkoramutima vyari bihanze igihugu, harimwo ivy'amoko, iterambere n'imigenderanire n'ibindi bihugu. Hariho abatari bake babona ko Perezida Ndadaye yagandaguwe kubero y'uko yari umuhutu, Rukindikiza abona ko abamugandaguye babikoze kuko yari afise intumbero bamwe batagomba. Yagandaguwe amaze guhakwa kenshi Igihe Perezida Ndadaye agandagurwa, Bwana Rukindikiza ntiyari bwatahuke ava mw'izinga rya Maurice aho yari yarungitswe gutegura urugendo rwiwe nk'umukuru w'igihugu muri ico gihugu. Ndadaye yagandaguwe ku wa 21 z'ukw'icumi, inyuma y'incuro zitari nke z'ukugerageza kumugandagura ariko bikaburizwamwo. Yatanguye guhakwa ataranimikwa, ibizwi cane bikaba ari ivyabaye mw'ijoro ryo kw'igenekerezo rya 02 buca ari irya 03 z'ukwezi kw'indwi 1993, hasigaye iminsi umunani ngo ashikirizwe amabanga. Ndadaye yarashoboye kurusimba ku butwari bwa Bwana Rukindikiza nk'uko we nyene abisigura. Kuri uyo munsi, Rukindikiza niwe yari kw'izamu ryategerezwa kurangiza isaha indwi z'ijoro. Ati: "Jewe nasa n'uwuryamye, niho baza baramvyura bambwira ko abasirikare badukikuje". Avuga ko yaretse uwari arongoye ico gitero arinjira kugira bavugane maze amusigurire ivyo ari vyo, kuko ngo n'amatelefone bari bayaciye. Ati: "Ndamubajije ivyabaye, yambwiye y'uko mu biro bikuru vya gisirikare bari bamaze gufata ingingo ko Ndadaye bamutora bakaja kumwica, ko rero noreka bakinjira bakamutora". Avuga ko muri iryo joro yabakuriye inkoni ku gishitsi, arabahakanira ko ata Ndadaye bakorako akiri kw'izamu, ahubwo arabagabisha ko abarasa badakuye meza. Ati: "Harabaye impari gushika n'aho n'umuntu yari ajejwe umutekano mu gisagara cose ca Bujumbura mu gisirikare ampamagara kuri walkie-talkie. "Ambwira ko ntegerezwa kubareka ngo binjire, nawe nyene ndamuhakanira y'uko ntareka umuntu n'umwe ngo yinjire, mbere ko ngomba ntangure kubarasa". Mu 2018 intwazangabo zine zahoze mu gisirikare c'u Burundi zarafashwe zagirizwa kugira uruhara mu rupfu rwa Prezida Melchior Ndadaye Rukindikiza avuga ko ivyo yabigize mu kwihagararako kuko wewe avuga ko yari afise abasirikare 35 b'abajandarume, mu gihe abari bamuteye bangana incuro zitatu kandi bamwe bita abakomando. Ati: "Jewe naciye ndamutera ubwoba, ndamubwira ko ubwo nyene tubarigita, nawe aca agira ubwoba, asubira muri camp Muha kurondera abamufasha (renfort)". Avuga ko muri ako kanya yasigaye aratera ubwoba abasigaye aho, babanza baguma inyuma, ari naho yaciye aronka akanya gatoya ko kuja kuvyura Ndadaye kugira ngo amubwire ivyariko biraba, nawe akaba yamwishuye ko yizeye ubutwari bwiwe. Rukindikiza avuga ko abo bari babateye bagize ubwoba barateba baragenda, bahura n'uwari abarongoye atwaye izindi ngabo zogufasha. Bamubwiye ingene Rukindikiza yari yarakaye cane kandi ko yahatswe kubamara, "bose baca basubira inyuma, ivyo kwica Ndadaye bica bipfa uko". Ndadaye amaze gushikirizwa amabanga, Rukindikiza avuga kandi ko yashoboye kuburizamwo umugambi wo kumurasa avuye mu rugendo muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika mu kwezi kw'icenda. Bamwishe uwamurinda adahari Rukindikiza ati: "Igihe bamugandagura jewe siho nari ndi, numvise ko ntsinzwe, kuko nari nagiye napanze vyose kandi n'ibikoresho vyose biri aho, kandi napanze ingene haramutse habaye ibintu bashobora gukingira ibiraro kugira ntibajabuke, ariko ivyo vyose bikaba ata na kimwe bagize". Avuga ko yanaronse amakuru y'ingene vyagenze, aho yamenye ko "mbere no muri bamwe mu bari bamucungereye basa n'abamuhemukiye, kuko harimwo bamwe mu ntwazangabo buriye uruzitiro bagasiga Ndadaye ku kirimba". Ati: "Nabonye ari échec ikomeye kuri jewe, mbere nca mfata ingingo y'uko ata gisirikare c'u Burundi nzosubiramwo". Bamwe bavuga ko Ndadaye yishwe n'intwazangabo ntoya ariko vyateguwe n'abakuru Kuki Ndadaye yagandaguwe? Ico kibazo cokwishurwa n'ababikoze bo nyene. Hagati aho, mu gihe Rukindikiza avuga ko abamugandaguye bamuhoye ko batabona ibintu kumwe, Sylvetre Ntibantunganya yahoze ari umukuru w'igihugu akaba n'umwe mu bategetsi bakuru ba Frodebu abibona ukundi. Ku bwiwe, umuzo wa demokarasi ntiwari wizwe neza kugira ngo Abarundi bose bayitegurire. Umwaka uheze Ntibantunganya yabwiye BBC ati: "Igandagurwa rya Ndadaye ryavuye k'uko ibintu biraba demokarasi mu gihugu bitari vyateguwe neza kugira ngo imitima yose y'Abarundi, na cane cane abari bafise ubutegetsi muri irya myaka, itegurwe neza. "Yari ikeneye kumenya ico demokarasi ivuga, ico isaba, hanyuma kandi igende yigisha abantu kwemera amatora, ibiyavuyemwo bakavyemera ata guhigimanga". Perezida Ndadaye amaze kwicwa, Abarundi barasubiranyemwo bapfa amoko, cane cane hagati y'Abahutu n'Abatutsi. Mu 2019, mu kwibuka imyaka 26 yari iheze Perezida Ndadaye agandaguwe, umuhizi Perezida Nkurunziza yakiriye Laurence Ndadaye yari umutambukanyi wiwe

Iki cyemezo kije nyuma y'umugambi wari watangijwe wo kugeza amashanyarazi ku baturage benshi hatitawe ku mikoro yabo. Hari abagezwagaho insinga z'amashanyarazi ariko imyaka myinshi igahita batarashobora kuyakoresha kubera ko badashoboye kuyagura. Akarere ka Rwamagana kari mu burasirazuba bw'igihugu ni agace karimo umujyi ariko nanone kakagira igice kinini cy'icyaro kirangwa ahanini n'intoki. Aka ni kamwe mu twatangiriwemo umushinga wo kugeza amashanyarazi kuri benshi hatarebwe cyane amikoro bafite. Menshi mu mazu yometseho utwuma twa cash power abandi bita mubazi ndetse n'insinga z'amashanyarazi. Gusa hari abaturage basa n'abataramenye ko iri terambere ryaje. Ikibazo cyabaye ingorabahizi ni ifatabuguzi ritangwa kugira ngo umuntu ahabwe amashanyarazi ryishyuzwaga ibihumbi mirongo itanu na bitandatu by'amafaranga y'u Rwanda. Aya yiyongeraho agurwa umuriro ukoreshwa mu rugo hashingiwe ku bushobozi bwa buri muntu. Aya na yo atangwa mbere yuko umuntu ahabwa urugero runaka rw'ingufu yaguze. Ikigo gishinzwe gukwirakwiza amashanyarazi EUCL na cyo kivuga ko cyasanze bitoroshye ku baturage kubonera rimwe aya mafaranga. Bwana Jean Claude Kalisa uyobora iki kigo avuga ko bamaze kubona umuti w'iki kibazo, nk'urugero k'uwuguze umuriro w'amafaranga 500, agahabwa umuriro w'amafaranga 250, hanyuma 250 asigaye akaba ay'ifatabuguzi. Menshi mu mazu yometseho utwuma twa cash power Nkuko byari byatangajwe na Leta y'u Rwanda, uyu mwaka wagombaga kurangira amashanyarazi amaze kugezwa ku gice kingana na 70% by'abatuye igihugu cyose. Kugeza ubu ariko umubare w'abafite ingufu z'amashanyarazi ngo nturarenga urugero rwa 30% nkuko bitangazwa n'abashinzwe ingufu z'amashanyarazi. Uretse ubu buryo bwo kwishyuza bwavuguruwe, hamaze gufatwa n'ikindi cyemezo cyo kugurisha ku mafaranga makeya ingufu z'amashanyarazi ku baturage bakoresha ingufu nkeya ari na bo biganjemo abakene. Ku muturage utarenza Kilowatt 15 ku kwezi azajya yishyura amafaranga 80 kuri Kilowatt 1 mu gihe ku bandi igiciro cya Kilowatt ari amafaranga 180.

Igitero cikekwa ko hakoreshejwe ubumara cishe 89 Rex Tillerson afise umugambi wo guhura n'ibihugu bikorana na Amerika vyo mu buseruko bwa hagati, imbere yuko aja i Moscou. Ubwongereza bwasavye ko Uburusiya n'abategetsi bo mu gisirikare ca Syria bafatigwa ibihano bikomeye. Ivyo bikurikiye igitero bivugwa ko hakoreshejwemwo ubumara muri Syria. Syria yarahakanye ko itigeze igaba igitero c'ubumara ku gisagara ca Khan Sheikhoun kigenzugwa n'inyeshamba mu ndwi iheze, cahitanye abantu 89. Ivyononekaye inyuma y'igitero ca Amerika ngo ntibiri ukwo ico gihugu kibishikiriza Umwe mu bategetsi ba Amerika yavuze ko Uburusiya bwari buzi ivy'ico gitero c'ubumara kiba, kuberako "drone" yari yiriwe ica hejuru y'ibitaro vy'i Khan Sheikhoun, abanyagihugu nabo bahiga uwobatabara. Haheze amasaha indege itera ikibombe ku bitaro, Amerika ikibaza ko ico gitero cari ico gupfukapfuka igitero ca mbere, niko itororokanirizo ry'amakuru Associated Press ryavuze. Hagataho umushikiranganji wo kwivuna abansi wa Amerika, James Mattis, yatanze insiguro nshasha ku gitero co ku kirindiro ca Shayrat ku munsi wa kane. Yavuze ati "igitero giharuye" ca Amerika - hatewemwo "missiles" 59 - cononye ibibanza vy'ibitoro hamwe n'ic'amasasu, gisambura ibice 20% vy'indege z'ingwano za Syria". Igisirikare ca Syria kiremera ko hari vyinshi vyasambutse ariko umuvugizi w'ubushikiranganji bwo kwivuna abansi bw'Uburusiya, yavuze ko indege zitandatu zo mu bwoko bwa MiG-23 hamwe n'inyubakwa ziharuye arivyo vyononekaye kandi ko "missiles" 23 zonyene arizo zashitse Shayrat.

Aba bombi bapfiriye mu mpanuka y'indeg ya kajugujugu ubwo bari bavuye mu muhango w'ubukwe bwabo Will Byler na Bailee Ackerman Byler bombi bigaga kuri Kaminuza ya Sam Houston State University. Ikinyamakuru cyandikwa n'abanyeshuri ni cyo cyatangaje iyi nkuru bwa mbere. Iyo mpanuka y'indege yabereye hafi y'ahitwa Uvalde, nko kuri kilometero 135 mu burengerazuba bwa San Antonio. Ku mbuga nkoranyambaga, abari batashye ubwo bukwe batangaje ubutumwa bwo kwihanganisha abasigaye bo mu miryango ya ba nyakwigendera. Umwe mu nshuti zabo zo kuri Facebook, yanditse ati: "Ndashavuye bitavugwa!" Yongeyeho ko n'umupilote wari utwaye iyo ndege na we yapfiriye muri iyo mpanuka. Ukuriye ishyirahamwe ry'abanyeshuri bo kuri kaminuza bigagaho, yasohoye itangazo kuri Facebook avuga ko ba nyakwigendera "bazahora bibukirwa ku mitima yabo yuje ubwuzu no kugira ishyaka kwabo". Indi nshuti yabo nayo yanditse ubutumwa kuri Instagram igira iti: "Mfite amahoro kubera ko muvuye kuri iyi si mwuzuye ibyishimo n'urukundo. Mbega ukuntu ari byiza ukuntu mugiye gukora ukwezi kwa buki muri kumwe na Yezu". Yongeyeho ati: "Ndishimye cyane kuba narashoboye kuba hamwe namwe mwese muri iyi minsi ya nyuma. Imitima yacu irakomeretse kuri ubu, ariko tuzi ko iri atari ryo herezo". Bombi bari bamaze isaha imwe irenga gato basezeranye ubwo kajugujugu barimo yakoreraga impanuka mu rwuri rw'umuryango wa Byler ruri mu majyepfo ya Texas. Nkuko byatangajwe n'ikinyamakuru cy'abanyeshuri cyitwa the Houstonian, Will Byler yigaga mu ishami ry'ubuhinzi. Bailee Ackerman Byler we yigaga iyamamaza-buhinzi. Bombi bari bari mu mwaka wabo wa nyuma kuri iyo kaminuza. Nkuko byatangajwe n'urwego rw'igihugu ry'umutekano mu bwikorezi, indege barimo yakoze impanuka ni iyo mu bwoko bwa Bell 206B. Ibyasigaye by'iyo ndege byatoraguwe mu gitondo cyo ku cyumweru aho habereye impanuka. Polisi ikorera muri ako gace yavuze ko hapfuye abantu benshi, ariko ntiyatangaza amazina yabo. Kompanyi ikora ibyo gutegura ubukwe, ku wa mbere yasohoye itangazo ivuga ko yifatanyije "n'uyu muryango muri ibi byago". Ku rubuga rwa Instagram, iyi kompanyi yatangaje ifoto y'ubukwe bwa banyakwigendera. Gerald Green Lawrence, wari utwaye iyo kajugujugu, na we yatangajwe ko ari umwe mu bapfuye. Umukobwa we yabwiye igitangazamakuru ABC ko yari yarabaye mu gisirikare cy'Amerika afite ipeti rya kapiteni ndetse akaba yaranarwanye mu ntambara ya Vietnam.

Madagascar ifise hafi abantu 7500 banduye coronavirus Urubuga rwa Actu Orange ruvuga ruti: " Ubushikiranganji bw'amagara y'abantu bwerekanye ko ikiza ca Covid-19 mu ndwi ziheze ciyongereye ku buryo buteye ubwoba muri Madagasikari, aho habonetse abantu benshi bayanduye mu turere tumwe tumwe, cane cane ku mugwa mukuru, Antananarivo". Abarongoye ibitaro bimwe bimwe vyo ku mugwa mukuru wa Madagasikari baragabisha ko barengewe inyuma y'ibiharuro biherutse kuduga ku buryo buteye ubwoba, kandi ko bazokwakira gusa indembe za Covid-19. Kugeza ubu iryo zinga rya Madagascar rifise abantu hafi 7500 banduye Covid-19 kandi ko hafi 80% muri bo basuzumwe mu kwezi guheze. Perezida Andry Rajoelina mu ntango z'uku kwezi yongeye kwugara umugwa mukuru inyuma y'aho ibiharuro vy'abanduye vyongerekaniye. Mu kwa kane, yatanguje icese "umuti" kama wo kwirinda Covid-19 wakwiragijwe cane mu gihugu, anashimangira ko igihugu kiriko kirarwanya iyi ndwara. Eka hari n'ibihugu bitari bike vya Afrika navyo nyene vyarungikiwe uwo muti, Covid-Organics. Hagati aho, uwo muti kama w'amazi wariyamirijwe n'abahinga mu vyo amagara y'abantu muri Nijeriya na Republika y'Intwaro Rusangi ya Congo, inyuma yo kuwukorako ivyigwa kugira bihweze nimba koko ushobora kuvura Covid-19.

Bobi Wine, ugaragara hano mbere gato yo kurira indege muri Uganda, avuga ko yakorewe iyicarubozo - ikirego igisirikare cya Uganda gihakana Uyu munyapolitiki utavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi bwa Perezida Yoweri Kaguta Museveni wa Uganda, ubusanzwe izina rye bwite ni Robert Kyagulanyi. Ashinjwa ibyaha by'ubugambanyi ku birego byo gutera amabuye ku rukurikirane rw'imodoka zari zitwaye Perezida Museveni mu kwezi gushize kwa munani. Yatawe muri yombi ku itariki ya 13 y'ukwezi gushize kwa munani, nuko arekurwa by'agateganyo mu cyumweru gishize. Ubu ari muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Amerika aho yagiye kwivuriza icyo avuga ko ari iyicarubozo yakorewe. Igisirikare cya Uganda cyamaganye ibyo birego by'iyicarubozo, kivuga ko ibyo ari "umwanda." Bwana Museveni na we yise "inkuru z'ibihuha" inkuru zivuga ku ikubitwa rya Wine. Bobi Wine yavuze ko yashatse kwandika uko we azi ibintu byabaye byagenze kubera ko Bwana Museveni n'abategetsi bo muri leta ye bavuga ko ibyabereye mu mujyi wa Arua mu majyaruguru ashyira uburengerazuba bwa Uganda "bitumvikana." Mu butumwa bwe bwo kuri Facebook, Wine yagize ati: "Barankubise, bantera ingumi, bantera n'imigeri na bote zabo. Nta gice cy'umubiri wanjye cyagiriwe impuhwe. Bakubise amaso yanjye, umunwa n'izuru. Bankubise ku nkokora no ku mavi. Bariya bantu ni ba nta mpuhwe!" Yongeyeho ati: "Bamfashe ku bugabo nuko bapfyonda udusabo tw'intanga mu gihe babaga bankubitisha ibindi bintu...Batangira kunkubita ku tugombambari bankubitisha ibirindi by'imbunda nto za pisitoli. Naranihaga kubera ububabare nuko bansaba kureka kubasakuriza. Bakoresheje ibintu bimeze nk'ibitambaro bampfuka mu maso." Muri ubwo butumwa, Wine yavuze ko imbunda zashyizwe mu cyumba yari arimo mu rwego rwo kumwegekaho ikirego cyo gutunga imbunda mu buryo bunyuranyije n'amategeko. Yagize ati: "Nabwiwe ko hari imbunda eshatu zateranyijwe ndetse bivugwa ko zasanzwe mu cyumba cyanjye! Sinashoboye kwiyumvisha ukuntu leta yakorera iyicarubozo umuturage wa Uganda mu buryo bubi cyane hanyuma ikamwegekaho gutunga imbunda!" Nyuma yaho, urukiko rwa gisirikare rwamukuyeho ikirego cyo gutunga imbunda mu buryo bunyuranyije n'amategeko, nuko rwohereza dosiye ye mu rukiko rwa gisivile.

Bwana Blair ashika Edinburgh muri kajugujugu inyuma y'amatora kamarampaka ku bwigenge Bwana Blair avuga ko yemera ko kuvanga amashirahamwe ya Ecosse na Angleterre mw'ishirahamwe rimwe vyotuma ubucuti buri hagati y'ivyo bihugu bibiri bukomera inyuma yaho Ecosse yemerewe kwitunganiriza ivy'intwaro. Bwana Blair yavuga na BBC ya Ecosse bahimbaza imyaka 20 irangiye hatunganijwe amatora kamarampaka y'ubwigenge. Ao matora kamarampaka yabaye haheze amezi ane habaye amatora yatumye umugambwe w'aba Travaillistes utsinda mu matora yo mu 1997. Ivuka ry'inama nshingamateka ya Ecosse Usubije amaso inyuma kuri ayo matora kamarampaka-yatumye havuka inama nshingamateka ya Ecosse i Edinburgh, Bwana Blair avuga aravye inyuma "ko yari akwiye kuraba inzira zotuma Ecosse na Angleterre bigumana ku bijanye n'imico". Yabwiye uwurongoye igisata ca Politike muri BBC ya Ecosse: "Ndazi ko bisa n'ibitangaje ariko hari igihe nagumana iciyumviro ko twokwugurura ishirahamwe ry'umupira w'amaguru rya Angleterre hamwe n'irya Ecosse, munyuma tukayavanga." "Naguma nibaza ingene tworondera inzira ukuntu abanyagihugu bokwumva ko bari kumwe." Bwana Blair, umukunzi w'umugwi Newcastle United, avuga ko azoraba impamvu zumvikana zotuma ayo mashirahamwe aja hamwe. Ariko aremera ko uwosaba ngo habe umugwi userukira uwa Ecosse, Angleterre, Pays de Galles na Irlande du Nord vyoba kure gushikako. Yongeye ati: "Nariko ndaraba inzira zotuma, naho tutumvikanye hasabwa ubwigenge, haguma ibintu twohurizako kandi nibaza ko muri kazoza bikwiye ko tubiraba."

Iminsi 100 ntishobora kurabirwako ibikorwa yemeye gukora mu kiringo c'iminsi ishika 2,556 yatorewe gushika mu kwezi kwa gatandatu 2027, ariko iyi minsi y'intango kuri bamwe itanga ishusho y'ejo hari imbere. Kuva Bwana Ndayishimiye arahiriye amabanga y'umukuru w'igihugu akanashinga leta nshasha, hariho impinduka zimaze kwibonekeza. Uwo yasubiriye yari yarumvikanye avuga ko "ata coronavirus ikirangwa mu Burundi", ashitse ku butegetsi, yihutiye gutangaza ko coronavirus "ari umwansi wa mbere w'Abarundi". Kwegera amashirahamwe mpuzamakungu, ingendo n'ibikorwa imbere mu gihugu, amajambo akomeye ku Rwanda, itahuka ry'impunzi, icizere gikeya afitiwe n'umurwi wa ONU ujejwe agateka ka zina muntu, urugendo muri Tanzania n'amajambo yahavugiye... ni bikeya mu vyaranze iyi minsi 100 iheze. Hari impinduka ziboneka mu gihugu? Appolinaire Nishirimbere, umukozi w'inama nshingamateka kandi umuhinga mu vy'ubutungane bw'amakori n'amatagisi, aba i Bujumbura, avuga ko kuva hajaho perezida mushasha impinduka zibonekeza mu bisata vyinshi mu buzima busanzwe mu gihugu. Ati: "Muri iyi minsi iheze haramaze kuboneka cane cane mu gipolisi, abapolisi n'abacamanza mu gisata c'ubutungane bafatwa kubera bariye ibiturire, kandi ivyo ntitwari tubiherutse mu Burundi. "Ubu n'aho uca ku mabarabara urabona ko abapolisi batinya bimwe bita 'petite corruption' kuko batazi uwoshobora kubatanga, ariko kera wamenga ni ibintu bisanzwe, umuntu yahagarara bakamwaka amahera. "Ndabona ko ari ikintu gikomeye cane gitanga icizere muri kazoza, n'aho muri ico gisata hariho ivyo guhindura cane cane mu giturire kinini kuko ntiturabona umuntu n'umwe yariye igiturire c'amahera menshi." Bwana Nishirimbere abona kandi kuba perezida mushasha yarasohoye itegeko ko abakukuruke batangura kuvurwa ku buntu ari ikintu gikomeye yashize mu ngiro ningora mu vyo yari yarasezeranye. Ishirahamwe rirwanya ibiturire n'isesagurwa ry'amatungo ya leta OLUCOME, rikorera mu Burundi, rivuga ko rizirikana ko Bwana Ndayishimiye yavuze ko azoshira inguvu cane mu kurwanya igiturire n'isahurwa ry'amatungo ya leta, ariko ngo ntarakora ibitegetswe n'itegeko. Gabriel Rupfiri arongoye OLUCOME avuga ko bamaze kwumva ivyo yashikirije baciye bamuha dosiye zimwe bamaze gukora z'abantu bari muri leta bakekwa gusahura leta. Avuga ko ababijejwe bemereye iryo shirahamwe ko "bagiye kubikurikirana kandi bitazoteba". Muri kuno kwezi yakiriye intumwa za ONU M. Huang Xia (ibubamfu) n'umupfasoni Bintou Keita Amategeko avuga ko abategetsi berekana amatunga yabo n'imvo yayo mu gihe kitarenga iminsi 15 bashizweko. Ati: "Twaranditse amabaruwa atatu dusaba ko hari igikorwa, mu nyuma igenekerezo rya 23/08 yatanze indwi zibiri ko agiye kubikurikirana, ubu ni itariki 23/09 [ku wa gatatu w'iyi ndwi] nta kintu na kimwe muri ubwo buryo cigeze gikorwa. "Twebwe rero dusanga ibintu vyotera bisubira inyuma mu gihe atoramuka ariye umutima amenyo kuko impinduka zose hama hari abantu batagomba ko zishoboka". Yongerako ati: "Mu ncamake tubona ko atabanje kwinyugutura, kwikurako ababandi bari mu ruhande rwiwe n'abari muri leta bizomugora ko ashobora gutera intambwe." Mu ijambo yashikirije inama rusangi ya ONU yatangaje uyu munsi, ku rubuga hwaniro rwa Twitter, Perezida Ndayishimiye yavuze bimwe bimwe muvyo ariko ararangura muri iki kiringo ciwe ca mbere. Aha avugamwo ko akomeje politiki yo kurwanya igiturire, akarenganyo no kwiba amatunga ya leta. 'Magufuli ni Papa', ikindi gihugu 'gikoresha uburyarya' Hariho abari biteze impinduka mu migenderanire y'u Burundi n'u Rwanda yabaye mibi kuva habaye igerageza ryo gutembagaza ubutegetsi mu 2015. Mu ntango z'ukwezi guheze k'umunani Bwana Ndayishimiye, avuga ku kibazo bafitanye n'u Rwanda, yagize ati: "Ntitwifuza yuko tugirana imigenderanire n'igihugu gikoresha uburyarya, igihugu c'iciyorobetsi". Ivyo vyatumye bamwe bamwe babona ko impinduka bari biteze zitagiye kwibonekeza vuba. Ariko mu mpera z'ukwo kwezi nyene hatewe intambwe ikomeye. Ubwa mbere muri ayo matati amaze imyaka, abarongoye igendereza (ubutasi) mu ngabo z'ibihugu vyompi bahuriye ku mupaka wa Nemba, eka n'ibihugu vyompi bikorana inama bumvikana ingene botahukana impunzi ziva mu Rwanda. Onesphore Sematumba, umusesenguzi wa politi yo mu karere k'ibiyaga binini wo mw'ishirahamwe International Crisis Group, abona mu minsi 100 iheze Bwana Ndayishimiye yabandanije politike yari isanzweho. Ati: "Hari abari biteze ko ashobora kuza agakora iyo twokwita nka 'révolution' ariko usanga yabandanije politike yari isanzweho cane cane mu migenderanire n'amakungu. "Ubona ko adashaka kwihutisha ibintu ngo nk'uwugiye kubiri n'inzira yamugejeje aho ari, ariko hari utuntu twagiye duhinduka twerekana ko atari uwundi Nkurunziza yaje". Bwana Sematumba abona ijambo Bwana Ndayishimiye yavugiye i Kigoma muri Tanzania - aho yavuze ko Tanzania ari nk'umuvyeyi w'Uburundi naho Perezida Magufuli ari nka Papa wiwe - vyerekana gushimangira politiki yaje asanga. Hari hashize imyaka ishika itanu umukuru w'igihugu c'Uburundi atajabutse hanze y'igihugu mu rugendo rw'akazi ruzwi Ati: "Naho ku rwego rwo kubana n'u Rwanda haracari ukwikekana n'ubwo hari intambwe yatewe kuko kuba abakuriye ingabo barahuye ni ikintu gitanga icizere." Muri iki gihe giheze Bwana Ndayishimiye hamwe n'umushikiranganji ajejwe imigenderanire n'amakungu, bariko barakira abahagarariye imiryango mpuzamakungu itandukanye, Ubumwe bw'Uburayi n'iyindi. Ivyo bamwe bamwe babona ko ari ukwugurura bushasha umubano n'amakungu uyu mukuru w'igihugu yasezeranye, mw'ijambo ryiwe amaze kurahira, ko uzoba ushingiye ku bwubahane. Umurwi wa ONU ujejwe amatohoza ku Burundi uvuga ko utabona icizere mu butegetsi bwiwe, ukavuga ko hari ivyaha vyo guhonyanga agateka ka muntu bibandanya, eka na bamwe mu bagirijwe ivyaha vyakozwe hambere uyo murwi uvuga ko ubu bakomeye muri leta. Kazoza bakabona gute? Bwana Nishirimbere avuga ko amashirahamwe mpuzamakungu amwe atobura ico avuga ku gihugu nk'Uburundi caciye mu bibazo bikomeye kuva cikukira, ariko ubu abona impinduka zimuha n'icizere. Ati: "Agahaze koko ntigashobora kubura mu gihugu caciye mu ngorane, gusa ntibiba ari umugambi wa leta. Ayo maraporo atangwa nibaza ko abayakora bataba bageze hano ngo babaze abo biraba. "Iyi minsi 100 irampa icizere kuko mbona afise [Perezida Ndayishimiye] ugushaka kwa politike, arashaka kwiyegereza abantu bose, ivyo rero bituma mbona ko mu myaka indwi hari aho azotugeza". Bwana Rupfyiri we abona ko Perezida Ndayishimiye akeneye kugendera ku mategeko y'igihugu akubahiriza agateka ka buri wese no gucungera itunga ry'igihugu kugira ngo kazoza k'igihugu kabe keza. Agira ati: "Ntabwo turiko turagaya vyose, oya, ahubwo turiko turakebura kuko no mu 2005 burya vyatanguye gutya, abantu bavuga ngo Nkurunziza ibintu biriko biragenda neza, mu nyuma ngo abantu bari impande yiwe ni bo bamuboheye amaboko imugongo, harazamwo ivya Rajabu [Hussein] aragenda. "Mugabo twarabonye ko vyagumye biyangara kugeza aho u Burundi bwahavuye buja inyuma mu bintu vyose, ivyo rero ni vyo tudashaka ni co gituma tuguma dukebura hakiri kare." Bwana Rupfyiri yongeraho ati: "Mu Kirundi baravuga ngo 'Inda n'ibanga ntibibangikanywa', umuntu w'umusuma, umuntu atigeze yiyambura umunoho iyo agiye gutwara abantu nta kindi abona azobanza kubona inda yiwe. "Ni co gituma ikintu tuguma tumusaba kugeza n'iyi saha, abo bantu ba mpemazuzuye, nibave muri leta tubone leta ifise ishusho itanga akarorero, twarabamuhaye kuva kera kandi na we arabazi. "Ibwirizwashingiro rivuga ko umutegetsi agiyeho kuva kuri perezida gushikana ku wutunganya ivy'amahera kw'ikomine, umwe wese ategerezwa guhita yerekana ubutunzi bwiwe, none abasuma badasumvya inguvu leta wosigura gute ko amezi atatu ashobora guhera ata na kimwe barakora?" Bwana Sematumba wewe avuga ko uko u Burundi buriko buriyegereza imiryango mpuzamakungu bizotuma "buzogenda bwemerwa, bwizerwe gusumba". Ati: "Uko bagenda begerana n'umuryango mpuzamakungu buhoro buhoro bazogenda banahuzwa n'abandi bari bafitaniye ibibazo kugira ngo ntitugere ku bushamirane bweruye bwo gutana mu mitwe. "N'ubwo hari imbogamizi zigihari hari icizere ko bizogenda biba vyiza."

Prezida Magufuli bamutazira "Bulldozer" Umuvugizi w'umugambwe Chadema utavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi Tumaini Makene, yabwiye BBC ko umugambwe wiwe witeguye kwitwarira uwurongoye igipolisi yategetse ko uwo mushingamateka afatwa n'abandi bategetsi b'igipolisi bahonyanga amategeko. Umukenyezi Mdee n'umuyoboke w'umugambwe Chadema, umugambwe ukomeye mu yitavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi bw'ico gihugu co muri Afrika y'Ubuseruko. Yagirijwe na Ally Hapi arongoye igipolisi mu gisagara ca Dar es Salaam - kuba yatutse umukuru w'igihugu no kugomorera abanyagihugu mu ndyane inyuma ngo yaho avugiye ko Prezida yibaza ko ivyo avuga ari amategeko, ko hazogera umunsi azobwira abanyagihugu kugenda batambaye mu gikiriza. Uwurongoye umugambwe "Alliance for Change and Transparency", Zitto Kabwe, yavuze ko ifatwa ryiwe "biguma vyerekana ingene ubutegetsi bukoreshwa nabi". Itegeko rirekurira uwurongoye igipolisi gufata umuntu "ntaco risana n'ivyo Mdee yagirizwa," niko yabandanije avuga. Abantu benshi barafashwe muri kahise mu kuba bavugiye amajambo ku rubuga hwaniro, amajambo ubutegetsi buvuga ko yoteranya ku bijanye na politike. Ubutegetsi bwemeza ko bukora bwisunze amategeko, ngo bukarondera kwirinda ko haduka imidugararo muri Tanzaniya. Bwana Magufuli yatsinze amatora y'umukuru w'igihugu mu 2015, akaba ashigikiwe n'abatanzaniya benshi naho yidogegwa n'imigambwe itavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi hamwe n'amashirahamwe aharanira amateka.

Iyi kompanyi y'ikoranabuhanga yemeje ko yari yatangije iperereza nyuma y'impungenge zatangajwe ku myitwarire ye. Iyi kompanyi yavuze ko yakoze iperereza hamwe n'ikigo cy'ubujyanama mu mategeko, kandi igaha ubufasha uwo mukozi wayo wayigejejeho ikirego. Umuvugizi wa Bwana Gates yahakanye avuga ko icyemezo cye cyo kwegura akava mu nama nkuru y'ubuyobozi bwa Microsoft nta ho cyari gihuriye na gato n'iryo perereza. Amakuru ajyanye n'iryo perereza yamenyekanye nyuma yuko mu ntangiriro y'uku kwezi Bill na Melinda Gates batangaje icyemezo cyabo cyo gutandukana nk'abashakanye, mu rushako rwari rumaze imyaka 27. Ku wa mbere, umuvugizi wa Microsoft yavuze ko iyi kompanyi ikora za 'softwares' yakiriye ikirego mu mpera y'umwaka wa 2019 kivuga ko Bwana Gates yari "yarashatse gutangiza umubano wa hafi" n'umukozi w'umugore mu mwaka wa 2000. Uwo muvugizi yagize ati: "Akanama k'ubuyobozi bukuru kasuzumye iyo mpungenge, gafashijwe n'ikigo cy'ubujyanama mu mategeko cyo hanze [kitari icyo muri kompanyi], mu gukora iperereza ryimbitse". "Mu iperereza ryose, Microsoft yahaye ubufasha busesuye uwo mukozi watangaje iyo mpungenge". Iryo perereza ntabwo ryageze ku mwanzuro, kuko Bwana Gates yeguye ku mwanya we mu nama nkuru y'ubuyobozi bwa Microsoft mbere yuko rirangira. Mu butumwa yatangaje ku rubuga rwa LinkedIn mu kwezi kwa gatatu mu 2020, Bwana Gates yavuze ko yafashe icyo cyemezo kugira ngo ashobore kubona umwanya uhagije wo kwita ku kazi ke mu kigo cye gitanga imfashanyo cya Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation. Byabaye hashize amezi atatu yongeye gutorerwa kuyobora inama nkuru y'ubuyobozi. Icyo gihe, yanditse ati: "Mu cyubahiro kuri Microsoft, kwegura mu nama nkuru y'ubuyobozi ntabwo bivuze na gato kwegura muri kompanyi. Microsoft izahora iteka ari igice cy'ingenzi cy'akazi ko mu buzima bwanjye..." "Ndumva mfite icyizere kurusha mbere hose ku iterambere kompanyi irimo kugeraho ndetse n'uburyo ishobora gukomeza kuba ingirakamaro ku batuye isi". Ariko, ku cyumweru ikinyamakuru The Wall Street Journal cyo muri Amerika cyatangaje ko inama nkuru y'ubuyobozi bwa Microsoft yari yafashe icyemezo ko kuba Bwana Gates hari aho ahuriye n'umukozi w'umugore bidakwiye, ndetse ko agomba kwegura. Umuvugizi wa Bwana Gates yemeye ko uwo mubano wabayeho ubwo yari abibajijwe n'icyo kinyamakuru, ariko ahakana avuga ko nta ho byari bihuriye n'icyemezo cye cyo kwegura. Ati: "Habayeho umubano mu myaka hafi 20 ishize warangiye mu bwumvikane". "Icyemezo cya Bill cyo kuva mu nama nkuru y'ubuyobozi nta ho cyari gihuriye na gato n'iki kibazo. Mu by'ukuri, mu myaka myinshi mbere yaho yari yaravuze ko ashaka kumara igihe kinini kurushaho mu bikorwa bye byo gufasha". Ikigo Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation cyabwiye BBC ko cyemeranya n'ibyo. Umunyamakuru wa BBC Michelle Fleury arasobanura inkuru y'umubano wa Bill na Melinda Gates Bill na Melinda Gates batangaje ko batandukanye mu ntangiriro y'uku kwezi kwa gatanu. Bombi bakoresheje za miliyari z'amadolari mu bikorwa byo gutanga imfashanyo mu bice bitandukanye ku isi, ndetse basezeranyije ko bazakomeza gukorera hamwe mu kigo cyabo cyo gufasha, na nyuma yuko ibijyanye na gatanya yabo byose bizaba bimaze gushyirwa mu bikorwa. Ibitangazamakuru byo muri Amerika byatangaje ko abo bombi bemeranyijwe ku igabana ry'umutungo mbere yuko batangaza ko batandukanye. Bwana Gates, w'imyaka 65, ni we muherwe wa kane ku isi, nkuko bitangazwa n'ikinyamakuru Forbes. Abarirwa umutungo wa miliyari 124 z'amadolari y'Amerika. Mu myaka ya 1970, afatanyije na Paul Allen wapfuye mu 2018, yashinze Microsoft. Ndetse yayigumyemo mu buryo buhoraho kugeza mu 2008. Umutungo w'inyubako wa Bill na Melinda Gates ucyekwa ko ubarirwa muri za miliyoni z'amadolari, ukaba uherereye muri leta za Washington, Florida na Wyoming. Urugo rwabo rw'ibanze ni inzu iri ku nkengero y'ikiyaga mu mujyi wa Medina muri leta ya Washington, bitangazwa ko ifite agaciro katari munsi ya miliyoni 127 z'amadolari.

Hari byinshi tutazi bijyanye no kumurika imideli Umunyamakuru wa BBC Charli Howard - unazwi ku kazi akora ko kumurika imideli nk'umuntu munini ndetse akaba ari n'impirimbanyi iharanira ko abantu bose bahabwa agaciro nubwo baba bateye mu buryo butandukanye - yakoze iperereza ku bijyanye n'imideli. Ku isonga ry'ibyo yari agamije hari iki? Gutahura imyambarire ishyize mu gaciro ku bantu kandi itabangamiye n'isi dutuye... kandi muri iryo perereza rye yatahuye bimwe mu bintu atari yiteze: 1. Bamwe mu banyamideli bambara ibintu by'amapamba ngo bagaragare ko ari banini Charli (ibumoso) ari kumwe n'inshuti ye Sonny Turner nayo imurika imideli Charli yavuganye na mugenzi we w'umunyamideli - akaba n'inshuti ye - witwa Sonny Turner wambara nimero 16 ku myambaro ye, icyo gipimo kikaba ari cyo cya rusange ku ikanzu mu Bwongereza. Ariko afatwa nkaho ari "umuntu munini" - bivuze ko ari umuntu ufite ingano iruta isanzwe (bitavuze ko byanze bikunze ari umuntu ufite umubyibuho ukabije). Sonny ati: "Uruganda rw'imideli rushaka kubamo abantu b'ingeri zitandukanye, ariko zidatandukanye cyane". "Bashaka abakobwa banini kurushaho... ariko bashaka abakobwa bafite amaguru manini, amayunguyungu manini [na], amabere manini. Ntabwo bashaka umuntu ufite mu maso hanini". Rero amakompanyi akora mu byo kumurika imideli akoresha abanyamideli bananutse bambaye ibintu by'amapamba ku bice by'umubiri byabo bitwikiriye, nkuko Charli abivuga. Yibuka ko hari "ibintu by'inziga ushyira ku mpande inyuma mu ipantaro yawe ngo bitume ugaragara ko ubyibushye". 2. Kumurika imideli by'abambara bikwije bibarirwamo agaciro ka za miliyari z'amadolari Mariah Idrissi ni umwe mu banyamideli ba mbere bakomeye bambaye umwitandiro wabo ujyanye n'idini rya kisilamu Umunyamideli Mariah Idrissi w'umuyisilamu yabaye umwe mu banyamideli ba mbere bambaye umwitandiro wabo mu gikorwa gikomeye cyo kwamamaza imideli. Icyo gihe yamurikiraga inzu y'imideli ya H&M mu 2015. Yabwiye umunyamakuru wa BBC Charli ko uruganda ruciriritse mu by'imideli - ni ukuvuga uburyo bumurika imideli abayimurika bambaye ibitabafatiriye cyane cyangwa bitabambika ubusa - ruri gukura cyane. Icyegeranyo cyo mu mwaka wa 2018 gihuriweho na kompanyi yo muri Amerika DinarStandard yiga kuri gahunda z'ubucuruzi ndetse n'ibiro ntaramakuru Reuters, cyarebye gusa ku kumurika imideli bikorwa n'abayisilamu, cyasanze ko abaguzi batanze agera kuri miliyari 270 z'amadolari ku myambaro bamurika y'abambara bikwije mu mwaka wa 2017. Biteganyijwe ko ibicuruzwa byo muri urwo rwego bizasarura mu baguzi agera kuri miliyari 361 mu mwaka wa 2023. Ariko ibyo by'abanyamideli bamurika imyambaro idafatiriye ku mubiri cyane bikomeje kwamamara, bititaye ku idini runaka. Icyegeranyo cyakozwe n'inzu y'imyambaro John Lewis yo mu Bwongereza kivuga ko abaguzi bo mu Bwongereza ubu bibanda kuri "'styles' [imyambarire] ndende kandi zirekuye" kurusha "imyambaro ifatiriye cyane". Mariah ati: "Kwambara ibirekuye ni yo mibereho rwose...Niba ushaka kwambara mu buryo burushijeho koroshya, ibyo ni byiza...Ariko kuri jye nk'Umuyisilamu, binajyanye n'idini ryanjye kwambara nicishe bugufi". 3. Ukunda ibya kera ariko ugakunda no kumurika ku rubuga rwa internet ibyo waguze? Wigira ikibazo! Charli yambaye ikanzu yo kuri modeli ya kera Igikorwa cyo kumurika mu buryo bwa videwo - abantu bifata amashusho bapfundura ibyo baguze bagashyira videwo ku rubuga rwa internet - gikundwa n'abantu babarirwa muri za miliyoni. Ariko Charli yatahuye ko hari ubundi bwoko bw'ubwo buryo, bwagizwemo uruhare na rwiyemezamirimo mu by'imideli wongera kugurisha ibintu kuri internet witwa Bella McFadden, unazwi ku izina rya @internetgirl. Bella yakoze ubucuruzi bwe bwo gucuruza imyambaro ya kera abinyujije ku rubuga rwo kongera kugurishirizaho rwitwa Depop. Ubwo buryo butuma abakiliya bashobora kuryoherwa no gufungura ibyo baguze bakabyereka ababakurikiye kuri internet babikoze mu buryo bwa videwo, ndetse bitabangamiye ibidukikije kuko iyo myenda iba ari iya sekeni ('second-hand'), bivuze ko hakoreshwa ibintu bicye. 4. Kugaragazwa mu bundi buryo kw'ipantalo yawe ukunda? Ibyo bishobora kugira ingaruka ku bakozi babikora Charli yifotoza yambaye ipantalo igaragara nkaho yambawe mbere Abakunzi b'imideli bazi ko ibigezweho byo gukunda amapantalo y'amakoboyi (jeans) ashaje cyangwa ama-déchiré, atari ibya none. Ariko wari uzi ko uburyo bukoreshwa mu kuyakora kuriya bushobora kugira ingaruka ku bantu bayakora? Tansy Hoskins, umunyamakuru ukurikirana iby'imideli akaba n'umwanditsi, avuga bumwe mu buryo bumenyerewe cyane buzwi nka 'sandblasting' ari bwo bukoreshwa. Ni uburyo bwo gushyira ku myambaro umucanga ushyushye cyane. Kubera ko buhendutse kandi bwihuse, ubwo buryo bukoreshwa cyane na nyinshi mu nganda zikora imyambaro - ariko ikibazo ni uko bushobora gutera ibibazo bikomeye byo mu myanya y'ubuhumekero ku bakozi bo mu nganda. Tansy ati: "'Sandblasting' ni uburyo bubi cyane. Butuma habaho uduce duto cyane tw'umukungugu n'utuvungukira [tujya mu mwuka]". "Ugiye muri izi nganda, n'uyu munsi, usanga abantu bamwe bahawe ibyo kwipfuka ('masks') naho abandi ntabyo bahawe. Abakozi bahumeka uwo mukungugu wose: uhita ujya mu bihaha byabo". Mu bihugu byinshi - nko mu Misiri, Pakistani, Bangladesh n'Ubushinwa - hari amategeko macye cyane yo kurinda abakozi bo mu nganda nk'izo. Kandi n'ahakoreshwa ubundi buryo busimbura ubwo, nabwo butera ibindi bibazo: muri Turukiya, inganda zikoresha uburyo bwo kumeshesha amapantalo ikinyabutabire cya 'potassium permanganate'. Ariko Tansy avuga ko ubwo buryo bushobora "gutera ibibazo bikomeye cyane ku mubiri w'abakozi".
