Ubundi buryo nabwo - nko gukoresha intoki mu gushyira umucanga kuri ayo mapantalo bukoreshwa cyane muri Vietnam - nabwo bushobora guteza umukungugu mubi ku buzima bwa muntu, mu gihe ubundi bwa gakondo kurushaho bwo kumeshesha amabuye ipantalo nabwo bukoresha amazi menshi cyane. 5. Niba wibwira ko za plastike nto cyane ziteye ikibazo...za plastike zimwe ni na ntoya cyane kuburyo udashobora gupima ingano yazo Izi plastike zakoreshejwe zizaba nto bingana gute uko igihe kigenda gishira? Za plastike nto cyane, akenshi ziva ku bikoresho byo gukora imyenda, mu myaka ya vuba ishize zagarutsweho mu bitangazamakuru nk'ikintu cy'ibanze gihumanya ikirere. Ibyo tubikesha, ku gice gito, ubushakashatsi bwakozwe na Dr Mark Browne, impuguke mu mibanire ya muntu n'ibindi binyabuzima abana nabyo, akaba ari n'umwarimu kuri Kaminuza ya South Wales muri Australia. Amaze igihe akora ubushakashatsi muri urwo rwego. Mark avuga ko uko uburyo bwo gupima bugenda burushaho gutanga ibipimo nyabyo, n'utwo duce duto cyane kurushaho twa za plastike tuzatahurwa. Atanga ubutumwa ku bantu ko bakwiye kumenya ko ibyo dukoresha buri munsi, uko igihe kigenda gishira byicamo uduce duto cyane natwo twicamo utundi duce duto cyane, kandi ko dushobora guteza ibibazo ku buzima. 6. Abagena iforoma y'imyambaro n'abafotozi bakora ubucuruzi mu ibanga Ushobora gutahura ko iyi foto yafashwe n'umufotozi uzwi cyane? Giulia Mensitieri ni impuguke mu miterere n'imihindagurikire y'imibereho ya muntu, wanditse igitabo gihishura uguhembwa umushahara muto ku banyamideli bakora mu kumurika imideli ihenze. Avuga ko abantu barimo nk'abagena iforoma y'imideli ('stylists') n'abafotozi bakorera inzu z'imideli zikomeye, akenshi bahembwa intica ntikize, ubundi bakaba bahembwa ibicuruzwa, cyangwa se ntibanahembwe. Mu kwirwanaho kubera umushahara muto, bamwe bakorera inzu zikomeye z'ubucuruzi... ariko bakabikora bakoresheje amazina mahimbano atari ayo basanzwe bakoresha mu by'imideli. Charli avuga ko impamvu ari uko "bikurinda kubona akazi" mu yandi makompanyi atishyura.

Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi ariko aratanga inyigisho mu 2014 Ubwo bushikiranganji buvuga ko ivyo bitero vy'indege bishobora kuba vyarishe Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi n'abandi bayoboke biwe 330 ku wa 28 ukwezi kwa gatanu . Bivugwa ko ivyo bitero vyari bitumbereye ahariko harabera inama y'abategetsi ba gisirikare ku cicaro c'umugwa mukuru bigaruriye wa Raqqa, mu buraruko bwa Syria. Libani yafashe umugore w'umukuru wa I-S Hari inkuru nyishi zagiye zirashikirizwa zerekeye urupfu rwa Baghdadi. Itangazo ry'ubushikiranganji bw'Uburusiya ryaciye mw'itororokanirizo ry'amakuru rya reta Sputnik, rivuga ko abategetsi ba gisirikare ba IS 30 hamwe n'abagwanyi 300 bari muri iyo nama y'i Raqqa. "Inkuru ziva ahantu hatandukanye, zivuga ko umukuru wa IS Ibrahim Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi, yoba yariciwe muri ico gitero, yari yitavye iyo nama," ni ko iryo tangazo ryongerako. Ubushikiranganji bw'intwaro yo hagati mu gihugu bwerekanye iyi foto ya Baghdadi mu kwezi kwa mbere mu 2014 Aho Baghdadi yinyegeje ntihari hazwi muri iyi misi, n'aho vyemezwa ko yari i Mosul muri Irak imbere y'uko hatangura ibitero vy'ibihugu birongowe na Amerika, mu twigoro two gusubira kwigarurira ico gisagara mu kwezi kw'icumi mu mwaka wa 2016. Itororokanirizo ry'amakuru rya Reuters ryavuze ko yoba yari yinyegeje mu karere kanini cane k'ubugaragwa, ariko ko atari i Mosul canke i Raqqa.

Mohamed Salah yahawe ako gashimwe na prezida wa CAF Ahmad Ahmad (i bubamfu) na prezida wa Liberia George Weah (i buryo) Salah w'imyaka 26 yarushishe amajwi mugenzi we wo muri Liverpool Sadio Mane wo muri Senegal hamwe n'umukinyi w'imbere wo muri Gabon Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang. Yahawe ako gashimwe mu birori vyabereye mu gihugu ca Senegal ku musi wa kabiri. Salah yavuze ati:"Nahora nipfuza gutwara aka gashimwe kuva nkiri umwana, ubu rero ndabishitseko incuro zibiri nikurikiranya." Umukinyi w'imbere wa Houston Dash wo muri Afrika y'epfo Thembi Kgatlana, yatsindiye agashimwe k'umukinyi mwiza w'umwaka mu bigeme. Salah kandi ni we yabaye umukinyi mwiza w'umwaka wa BBC incuro zibiri yikurikiranya mu kwezi kwa cumi na kabiri. Yatsindiye Liverpool ibitego 44 mu mwaka wa 2017-18, afasha n'uwo mugwi gushika mu rukino rwa nyuma mu migwi yabaye iya mbere iwabo i Buraya, aho batsinzwe na Real Madrid. Yratsindiye kandi ibitego bibiri Misri mu nkino z'igikombe c'isi mu gihugu c'Uburusiya. Yatsinze ibitego 16 mu nkino 29 yakiniye Liverpool mu mahiganwa yose muri uyu mwaka. Salah, Mane na Aubameyang bari mu mugwi wa mbere mwiza w'umwaka muri Afrika hamwe n'umukinyi w'inyuma wa Manchester United Eirc Bailly, umukinyi wo hagati wa Manchester City Riyad Mahrez, umukinyi wo hagati wa Liverpool Naby Keita hamwe n'umukinyi w'inyuma i bubamfu wa Tottenham Serge Aurier. Ku musi wa kabiri, Caf yatangaje kandi ko igihugu ca Misri ari yo izokwakira inkino z'igikombe ca Afrika mu 2019 inyuma y'aho Kameruni inaniriwe kwitegura neza ku gihe. Umugwi mwiza wa Afrika w'abakinyi 11: Denis Onyango (Mamelodi Sundowns/Uganda), Serge Aurier (Tottenham/Cote d'Ivoire), Medhi Benatia (Juventus/Maroc), Eric Bailly (Manchester United/Cote d'Ivoire), Kalidou Koulibaly (Naples/Senegal); Naby Keita (Liverpool/Guinee), Thomas Partey (Atletico Madrid/Ghana), Riyad Mahrez (Manchester City/Algeria); Mohamed Salah (Liverpool/Misri), Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang (Arsenal/Gabon), Sadio Mane (Liverpool/Senegal)

Umuhungu w'umunyepalestina ari gupimwa muri Gaza. Gukingira ntabwo ho biratangira Israel ni kimwe mu bihugu biri imbere y'ibindi muri gahunda yo gukingira iki cyorezo ku isi, ariko Abanyapalestina bo muri West Bank na Gaza, higaruriwe na Israel, nta rukingo na rumwe barabona. Inzobere za UN/ONU zivuga ko Israel ari yo ifite inshingano zo gukingira abantu batuye muri utwo duce twa Palestina tugoswe na Israel. Israel yo ivuga ko ibyo bitari muri gahunda kandi itigeze ibona ubusabe na bumwe bwa Palestina. Ubu nibwo bwa mbere koherezayo inkingo bigiye kubaho. Muri Israel abantu bagera ku 640,000 banduye Covid-19 abandi 4,700 irabica nk'uko bivugwa na kaminuza ya John Hopkins. Muri Gaza na West Bank handuye abagera ku 160,000 abandi 1,833 bamaze gupfa nk'uko iyo kaminuza y'ubushakashatsi ibyerekana. Amasezerano adasanzwe ya Israel n'uruganda Pfizer - aho Israel iha amakuru y'ingenzi mu by'ubuvuzi urwo ruganda narwo rugaha iki gihugu inkingo byihuse - yatumye Israel iba igihugu cya mbere kimaze gukingira abantu benshi, ubaze ku mubare w'abaturage, kurusha ibindi ku isi. Abagera kuri miliyoni 1.7 - ni hafi 20% by'abisiraheli - bamaze kubona doze zombi z'urukingo. Abarenga miliyoni eshatu bamaze kubona doze ya mbere. Kandi iki gihugu kiracyari muri gahunda ya 'Guma mu rugo'. Ku cyumweru, ibiro bya minisitiri w'ingabo wa Israel Benny Gantz byemeje ko iki gihugu kiza koherereza inkingo ubutegetsi bwa Palestina. Ubutegetsi bwa Palestina bwo ntacyo buravuga kuri ibi. Byifashe bite muri Gaza na West Bank? Haba muri West bank, aho bategekwa by'igice na leta ya Palestina, cyangwa muri Gaza, igenzurwa n'umutwe wa gisirikare wa Hamas, ntaho baratangira gukingira. Abashinzwe ubuzima muri Palestina bavuga ko bari gushakisha uko babona inkingo, ariko ntibizwi igihe bazatangirira gukingira. Utu duce twizeye ko tuzabona urukingo muri gahunda ya OMS/WHO ya Covax, yo kugeza inkingo ku bihugu bikennye, igihe cy'iyi gahunda ntabwo kizwi neza. Muri utwo duce, haheruka kugezwa inkingo ibihumbi zakorewe mu Burusiya ariko ntabizwi aho zagiye. Abanyepalestina bagera kuri miliyoni 2.7 batuye muri West Bank, naho abagera kuri miliyoni 1.8 baba muri Gaza. Ni inde ugomba gukingira abanyapalenstina? Israel ishingira ku masezerano ya Oslo yo mu 1993 na 1995, avuga uburyo Gaza na West Bank zizategekwa mu buryo bw'agateganyo kugeza amasezerano y'amahoro ahoraho agezweho. Ivuga ko ibyo biha ubutegetsi bwa Palestina inshingano yo kwita ku buzima muri utwo duce, bishingiye ku ngingo y'ubwigenge bwaho. Palestina ariko ivuga ko ayo masezerano avuga ko Israel igomba gufatanya mu kurwanya ibyorezo n'indwara zandura muri utwo duce. Inzobere za UN zivuga ko Amasezerano y'i Geneva ku duce twigaruriwe ariyo agomba gushyirwa imbere, bityo leta ya Israel ikagira inshingano yo gukingira Abanyepalestina batuye muri Gaza na West Bank, nk'uko ikingira abaturage bayo. Gahunda yihuse cyane yo gukingira muri Israel iragera no ku barabu b'abisiraheli bahatuye hamwe n'abanyepalestina baba mu gace kometswe kuri Israel kari mu burasirazuba bwa Yeruzalemu. Kuwa gatanu, OMS/WHO yaburiye ku "kwikubira inkingo kw'ibihugu" ivuga ko "hari akaga ko igikoresho cyari gufasha kurangiza icyorezo - inkingo - gishobora kurushaho kuzambya" ubusumbane ku isi.

Iyi kompanyi ivuga ko izasubukura ingendo muri ibyo bihugu mu gihe hazaba "hari umucyo ku buryo ibintu byifashe". OMS/WHO ivuga ko ubwoko bushya bwa Covid-19 bwabonetse bwa mbere muri Africa y'Epfo aribwo buri gutera inkubiri ya kabiri y'ubwandu bw'iki cyorezo muri Africa. WHO ivuga ko ubu bwoko bushya bumaze kuboneka muri Botswana, Ghana, Kenya, Comoros, Zambia, no mu bindi bihugu 24 bitari ibyo muri Africa. Ibihugu birimo Leta zunze ubumwe za Amerika, Ubwongereza, Ubuholandi, Emira zunze ubumwe z'Abarabu n'ibindi byo muri Amerika y'Epfo byahagaritse ingendo z'indege z'abagenzi muri Africa y'Epfo kubera ubu bwoko bushya. U Rwanda, u Burundi, DR Congo na Tanzania nabyo biri mu bihugu Ubwongereza bwahagaritse abagenzi babiturukamo, mu kwirinda ubwo bwoko bushya bwa Covid-19. Kompanyi ya Rwandair mbere y'uko ihagarika ingendo zimwe na zimwe kubera coronavirus yari isanzwe ijya mu byerekezo hafi 30 muri Africa, Asia, Iburayi no mu burasirazuba bwo hagati. Mu minsi ishize, iyi kompanyi yatangije urugendo rushya rugana i Bangui muri Centre Afrique.

Hejuru uhereye ibumoso; Térence Mpozenzi, Agnès Ndirubusa Egide Harerimana. Hasi: Christine Kamikazi n'umushoferi wabo Adolphe Masabarakiza baracyafunze Aba banyamakuru bararegwa icyaha cyo 'ubufatanyacyaha mu guhungabanya umutekano w'igihugu'. Christine Kamikazi, Agnès Ndirubusa, Térence Mpozenzi, Egide Harerimana n'umushoferi wabo Adolphe Masabarakiza bafashwe kuwa kabiri ushize mu ntara ya Bubanza batara amakuru ku mirwano y'ingabo za leta n'inyeshyamba. Antoine Kaburahe uyobora ikinyamakuru Iwacu yabwiye BBC ko ejo kuwa mbere n'uyu munsi kuwa kabiri aba baregwa bumviswe n'urukiko rwa Bubanza bari kumwe n'abunganizi batatu babo. Nyuma yo kumvwa uyu munsi, avuga ko babwiwe ko umwanzuro utangazwa mu masaha 48. Bwana Kaburahe avuga ko ibyo aba banyamakuru bakoze ari ibyo umunyamakuru wese ukora umwuga we neza yakora. Ati: "Mu gihe hari amakuru, umunyamakuru arahaguruka akagenda, akabaza, agatohoza, nicyo bakoze rero...Nibaza ko aho nta kosa na rimwe ririmo mu gihe agiye kumugaragaro atihishe". Abanyamakuru ba Iwacu, Christine Kamikazi, ibumoso, na Agnès Ndirubusa bafunzwe hamwe na bagenzi babo kuva kuwa kabiri Bwana Kaburahe avuga ko iki kinyamakuru kimaze imyaka 11 gikora mu Burundi, kitwararika amategeko y'igihugu, ubu ngo ni ubwa mbere bashinjwe ibyaha bimeze gutya. Ati: "Nta kintu na kimwe bakoze batari basanzwe bakora, ahubwo byari gutangaza iyo ayo makuru [y'igitero] avugwa bakaguma bicaye i Bujumbura, none bari kuvuga iki bari kwandika iki?" Ubutabera mu Burundi nta makuru arambuye bwatanze ku biregwa aba banyamakuru, umuvugizi w'igipolisi mu cyumweru gishize yatangaje ko iperereza riri gukorwa. Imiryango mpuzamahanga iharanira uburenganzira n'ubwisanzure bw'itangazamakuru ivuga ko aba banyamakuru bafunzwe kubera umwuga wabo, igasaba ko barekurwa.

Iyo sake yimuriwe ahororerwa inkoko (ifoto yo mu bubiko) Nyir'iyi nkoko yamuteye icyo cyuma ahagana mu rukenyerero ubwo yari irimo igerageza guhunga. Uwo mugabo yapfiriye mu nzira ajyanwe ku bitaro azize kubura amaraso. Polisi ubu irimo gushakisha abandi bantu 15 bagize uruhare mu gutegura icyo gikorwa cy'imirwano y'isake, yabereye mu cyaro cya Lothunur muri leta ya Telangana mu ntangiriro y'iki cyumweru. Iyo sake yafungiwe kuri stasiyo ya polisi, nyuma iza kwimurirwa ahororerwa inkoko. Polisi yavuze ko iyo nkoko yari irimo gutegurwa ngo ishoke imirwano ubwo yageragezaga guhunga. Nyirayo yagerageje kuyifata ariko akubitwa n'icyo cyuma yambitswe gifite uburebure bwa santimetero 7 (7cm) cyari ku kaguru kayo, ubwo yari arimo agundagurana nayo. Abantu bari bari muri icyo gikorwa cyo kurwanisha isake baregwa kwica umuntu, gukina imikino y'amahirwe itemewe n'amategeko ndetse no gutegura imirwano y'isake, nkuko ibiro ntaramakuru AFP bibitangaza. Umupolisi B Jeevan ukorera aho byabereye yavuze ko iyo sake izajyanwa mu rukiko nk'ikimenyetso mu gihe kiri imbere, nkuko bitangazwa n'ikinyamakuru The New Indian Express. Imirwano y'isake yaciwe n'amategeko y'Ubuhinde mu mwaka wa 1960, ariko muri rusange iracyabaho mu turere tw'icyaro nk'aho muri leta ya Telangana, aho myinshi ikorwa mu gihe cy'iserukiramuco ry'abo mu bwoko bw'aba Hindu rizwi nka Sankranti. Ubu si bwo bwa mbere nyir'isake imwishe mu Buhinde. Mu mwaka ushize, umugabo wo muri leta ya Andhra Pradesh yarapfuye nyuma yuko akubiswe mu ijosi n'urwembe rwari rushumitse ku isake ye. Nkuko CNN yabitangaje icyo gihe, nyir'iyo sake yari ayijyanye mu mirwano ubwo ibyo byabaga.

Iyi nkangu yatewe n'imvura nyinshi Ku munsi w'ejo ku wa gatandatu, abategetsi babwiye ibitangazamakuru byo muri Kenya ko mu mirambo imaze kuboneka harimo n'iy'abana barindwi. Amakuru avuga ko iyo mvura nyinshi yibasiye ibyaro bya Nyarkulian na Parua. Perezida Uhuru Kenyatta yasohoye itangazo avuga ko "yihanganishije abikuye ku mutima" imiryango n'inshuti babuze ababo. Bwana Kenyatta yongeyeho ko habayeho "isenyuka rikomeye" ry'imitungo n'ibikorwa remezo, ndetse avuga ko yategetse igisirikare n'inzego z'ubutabazi kujya muri ako karere gufasha. Abategetsi bavuga ko imihanda yo muri ibyo byaro yarenzwe n'amazi kandi n'iteme rimwe ryatwawe. Joel Bulal, umutegetsi wo mu nzego z'ibanze muri ako gace, yabwiye ikinyamakuru Daily Nation cyo muri Kenya ko ibikorwa by'ubutabazi bikomeje mu kugerageza gushakisha abantu baburiwe irengero. Apollo Okello, umuyobozi w'ako karere, yavuze ko abandi bashobora kuba barenzweho muri iyo nkangu, ariko avuga ko ibikorwa by'ubutabazi biri gukomwa mu nkokora n'ikirere kimeze nabi. Urubuga rwa internet rw'ikinyamakuru The Standard - nacyo cyo muri Kenya - rusubiramo amagambo ye agira ati: "Turikugerageza kugera aho iteme ryatwariwe n'imyuzure, imvura iracyagwa". Amafoto yo ku mbuga nkoranyambaga agaragaza ibiti, icyondo n'imyanda binyanyagiye mu mihanda. Mu butumwa bwo kuri Twitter, umuryango utabara imbabare wa Croix-Rouge - ishami rikorera muri Kenya - wemeje ko wambariye gutabara nyuma y'amakuru avuga ku nkangu "ikomeye". Ikigo cya Kenya cy'iteganyagihe cyari cyatanze itangazo ku itariki ya 18 y'uku kwezi kwa cumi na kumwe kiburira abatuye "ahakunze kwibasirwa n'inkangu" ko hazagwa imvura nyinshi. Mu byumweru bicye bishize, ibihugu byo mu burasirazuba bw'Afurika byaguyemo imvura nyinshi. Inkangu n'imyuzure byishe abantu muri Ethiopia na Tanzania, mu gihe abantu babarirwa mu bihumbi amagana bataye izabo muri Somalia kubera imvura nyinshi.

Umuyobozi wa polisi yakuwe ku kazi nyuma y'ubu bwicanyi bw'i Marikana Muri uwo mwaka wa 2012, polisi yishe irashe abakozi 34 bakoraga mu bucukuzi bw'amabuye y'agaciro bari bari mu myigaragambyo ijyanye no gusaba kongererwa imishahara. Icyo gihe polisi yavuze ko yabishe mu rwego rwo kwitabara. Kuva ubutegetsi bushingiye ku ivangura bwa apartheid bwavaho muri Afurika y'epfo mu mwaka wa 1994, ubwicanyi bwakorewe abo bakozi bakoraga mu bucukuzi bw'amabuye y'agaciro ya Lonmin platinum ni bwo bwari buguyemo abantu benshi cyane bishwe na polisi. Icyo gihe Afurika y'epfo yose yaguye mu kantu. Abandi bakozi icumi bishwe mu bikorwa byabaye mu minsi yabanjirije ubwo bwicanyi bw'ikivunge. Abantu 70 babukomerekeyemo, polisi inata muri yombi abarenga 200. Imiryango y'abo bakozi iri guhabwa iyi ndishyi mu rwego rwo kuyihanganisha muri rusange. Itsinda ryitwa Socio-Economic Rights Institute rihagarariye abantu 300 bo mu miryango yaburiye abayo muri ubwo bwicanyi, ryari ryareze mu rukiko leta y'Afurika y'epfo kubera kutita ku bo muri iyo miryango. Iri tsinda ryavuze ko rizavugana n'abo mu miryango y'abishwe kugira ngo rimenye niba bemera iyo ndishyi leta yatanze. Jacob Zuma wahoze ari Perezida w'Afurika y'epfo, ni we washyizeho akanama gashinzwe kwiga ku bwicanyi bw'i Marikana kayobowe n'umucamanza uri mu kiruhuko cy'izabukuru. Ibyatangajwe n'aka kanama byatumye umuyobozi wa polisi yirukanwa. Kanasabye ko hakorwa iperereza ku myitwarire ya polisi ndetse gasonera bamwe mu banyapotiliki bo hejuru, barimo na Perezida w'Afurika y'epfo uriho ubu Cyril Ramaphosa. Icyo gihe yari umuyobozi muri icyo kirombe gicukurwamo amabuye y'agaciro ya Lonmin platinum cy'i Marikana. Yaregwaga ko yasabye ko abateguye iyo myigaragambyo babiryozwa, ariko aka kanama katangaje ko kasanze nta bimenyetso bihari byo kumuhamya ibyo birego.

General Major Ibrahim Attahiru Iyirukanwa ry'uyu mujenerali wari warahawe ako kazi mu kwezi kwa gatanu kuje gukurikira ibitero izo ntagondwa zimaze ibyumweru zigaba. Ubuyobozi bw'igisirikare cya Nigeria ntabwo bwigeze butanga ibisobanuro birambuye ku cyatumye General Major Ibrahim Attahiru avanwa kuri uwo mwanya. Ariko abakurikiranira hafi ibibera muri Nigeria baravuga ko ibi bishobora kuba bifite aho bihuriye n'ibitero biheruka bya Boko Haram mu majyaruguru y'uburasirazuba bw'igihugu - harimo n'icyahitanye abantu byibura 50 mu musigiti wo mujyi wa Mubi mu ntara ya Adamawa. Umuvugizi w'igisirikare cya Nigeria yabwiye BBC ko General Attahiru yahawe akandi kazi ku biro bikuru by'igisirikare mu mujyi wa Abuja. Yasimbuwe na General Nicholas Rogers uherutse kuyobora igikorwa gihuriweho n'igipolisi n'igisirikare mu karere gakunze kuvugwamo ibikorwa byo gukozanyaho bishingiye ku moko hagati mu gihugu.

Ababikira b'aba Missionaires de la Charite bageze i Roma Mama Tereza azoba azwi kw'izina rya Tereza mweranda w'i Calcutta. Abanyamakuru bavuga ko iragi rya Mama Tereza, rihuye gose n'indoto za Papa kuri Ekleziya katolika, aho yifuza cane gufasha abakene. Ariko hari abanegura Mama Tereza ko yakoze bike cane mu kugabaniriza ububabare abari ku mpfiro. Banamwagiriza ko yashatse kugondoza abakene b'aba Hindu ngo baje mw'idini ry'aba Kirisu.

Bwana Abiy yagaragaje umuhate mu guhosha amakimbirane mu nzira z'amahoro Byatangajwe na madamu Berit Reiss-Andersen umuyobozi w'iyi komite, hari saa tanu z'amanywa ku isaha y'i Gitega mu Burundi, saa sita ku isaha y'i Addis Ababa. Amaze gutangazwa ko yegukanye iki gihembo, Bwana Abiy yahamagawe kuri telephone n'abagize komite itanga iki gihembo kuko ubu ari mu gihugu cye. Yagize ati: "Nishimiye cyane kumenya ayo makuru, murakoze cyane guha iki gihembo Afurika, Ethiopia nanjye, nizeye ko abategetsi ba Afurika bazabyakira neza bakarushaho kubaka amahoro ku mugabane wacu". Igihembo cy'amahoro cya Nobel nicyo gikuriye ibindi bitangwa n'iyi komite yo muri Norvege. Gihabwa umuntu umwe, itsinda ry'abantu cyangwa umuryango runaka, buri mwaka. Ibyishimo byagaragajwe ku mbuga nkoranyambaga abaturage ba Ethiopia bishimira iki gihembo bavuga ko ari ishema ku gihugu cyabo n'umutegetsi wabo. Bwana Ahmed w'imyaka 43, ahawe iki gihembo kuko kuva yagera ku butegetsi yaharaniye gushaka ibisubizo by'amakimbirane mu gihugu cye biciye mu nzira z'amahoro. Yashyize umuhate kandi mu kunga igihugu cye no kongera kubana neza na Eritrea nyuma y'imyaka irenga 50 ubutegetsi bw'ibi bihugu buzirana, ababituye bagatandukanywa. Bwana Abiy ateye ikirenge mu cy'abandi banyafurika nka Denis Mukwege wo muri DR Congo, Ellen Johnson Sirleaf na Leymah Gbowee bo muri Liberia, Wangari Maathai wo muri Kenya. Mu bandi bagihawe harimo; Barrack Obama, Kofi Annan, Nelson Mandela, Desmond Tutu na Albert Lutuli ari nawe munyafurika wa mbere wagitwaye kuva byatangira gutangwa mu 1901.

Perezida Donald Trump yatanguriye imyiyamamazo ku wa 20/06/2020 mu gisagara ca Tulsa i Oklahoma Mu ntango z'iyi ndwi, Bwana Trump yari yari yigamvye ko hafi umuliyoni w'abantu bari biyandikishije ngo bashobore kwitabira iyo myiyamamazo yabereye mu gisagara ca Tulsa mu ntara ya Oklahoma. Hagati aho, ico kibanza gisanzwe gifise ibibanza 19.000 nta n'uko yanegereje ico gitigiri mu gihe yari yiteze ko abantu bashobora kurenga gushika n'aho hategurwa n'ibindi bibanza hanze y'ikibuga. Mu gihe hari amakenga kuri iyo myiyamamazo ibaye mu gihe ico gihugu gihanzwe n'umugera wa coronavirus, Bwana Trump yafashe umwanya muremure avuga kuri ico kiza. Mw'ijambo yavuze mu nyuma akabifata nk'ukuyayata, Trump yabwiye abari aho ko yasavye ababijejwe kugabanya umurindi wo gupima Covid-19 kubera abenshi muri bo basanga baranduye. Avuga ko igikorwa co gupima ari "inkota". Ati: Ehe ndabereke ikibi kirimwo: iyo uriko upima ku rugero runini gutyo, uzokwama uronka abantu benshi, kandi uzoronka benshi banduye". "Rero nababwiye nti 'gabanya akariro ko gupima'. Barapima bakaguma bapima!" Imyiyamamazo ya Trump yitabwe n'abantu imparurwa Abinjira muri iyo myiyamamazo bose, bategerezwa gutera igikumu ku rwandiko rwo kwemeza ko Trump ata ruhara azoba afise mu gihe hogira abandurira muri yo. Aho hari haciye amasaha makeya imbere y'uko ibikorwa bitangura, abategetsi bavuga ko batandatu mu bajejwe gutegura iyo myiyamamazo bari bapimwe bagasanga baranduye. Hagati aho, ntibiboneka neza igituma abitavye iyo myiyamamazo bari bakeya ugereranije n'abari bitezwe. Trump yagereranije abashoboye kwinjira muri yo n'"abarwanyi" , maze yifatira mu gahanga ibimenyeshamakuru n'abari mu myiyerekano yo kwiyamiriza ivanguramoko rikorerwa abirabure ko ari bo batumye abanywanyi biwe batitaba. Avuga kuwo bahiganwa wo mu mugambwe w'aba Democrates Joe Biden, Bwana Trump yamwise "icitso c'akarwi k'abantu b'intagondwa". Hafi y'ahariko harabera iyo myiyamamazo harabaye imishamirano ariko mito cane ataco yononye. Kuva Amerika yinjira muri ca kiringo ca guma mu rugo kubera Coronavirus, iyo myiyamamazo niryo koraniro rya mbere rinini ribereye mu kigo, ikaba ibaye mu gihe ibiharuro vy'abayandura muri iyo ntara ya Oklahoma bigenda vyiyongera. Mu gihugu cose, abarenga imiliyoni 2.2 nibo bamaze kwandura uwo mugera, abandi barenga 119.000 bakaba baritavye Imana.

Abantu 157 batikiriye mu mpanuka ya Ethiopian Airways imiryango yabo ijya mu gahinda gakomeye Ubu bwishyu, buzagenda butangwa mu gihe cy'imyaka myinshi, butandukanye n'ikirego cyatanzwe kubera izi mpanuka, zombi zahitanye abantu 346. Aya mafaranga azakoreshwa mu kwishyurira amashuri no kubeshaho imiryango yabuze ababo hamwe n'ibikorwa rusange bya rubanda nk'uko Boeing ibivuga. Impanuka yo mu kwa gatatu ya Ethiopian Airways yari iya kabiri ya Boeing 737 Max mu mezi atanu. Nyuma y'indi ndege nk'iyi ya Lion Air muri Indonesia yakoze impanuka mu kwezi kwa 19 kwa 2018. Abahanga mu iperereza ku mpanuka z'indege basanze izi mpanuka zaratewe n'ikibazo cya tekiniki muri izi ndege. Indege z'ubwoko bwa 737 Max bwahise buhagarikwa kongera kuguruka kw'isi kugeza ubu. Itangazo rya Boeing ry'ejo kuwa gatatu rivuga ko ayo mafaranga "azafasha uburezi, ingorane n'ibikenerwa mu buzima ku miryango yagizweho ingaruka, ibikorwa rusange n'iterambere rya rubanda yagizweho ingaruka. Abanyamategeko b'imiryango bamaganye iki gikorwa Boeing ivuga ko izakorana na za leta z'ibihugu n'imiryango itegamiye kuri leta mu gukemura ibyo bibazo. Kandi ko amafaranga y'ibanze azatangwa mu gihe cy'imyaka myinshi. Dennis Muilenburg umuyobozi mukuru wa Boeing avuga ko bababajwe cyane n'ibyabaye muri izi mpanuka kandi bazakomeza kwifatanya n'imiryango yabuze ababo. Ati: "Twizeye ko iyi nkunga yacu izashobora kuborohereza". Nomi Husain umunyamategeko wo muri Leta ya Texas uhagarariye imwe mu miryango yaburiye abayo mu mpanuka yo muri Ethiopia yanenze ibyo Boeing yakoze. Yavuze ko "inyishyu batanze itanegereye na gato impozamarira ku miryango yasigaye ugereranyije n'abo babuze". Bwana Husain afite imanza zirindwi z'imiryango yabuze ababo, imwe muri yo irasaba impozamarira zigera kuri miliyoni $276. Avuga kandi ko hari imanza zigera kuri 50 zimaze gushingwa n'indi miryango. Abantu bakomoka mu bihugu 35 baguye mu mpanuka ya Ethiopian Airways, muri bo harimo umunyarwanda umwe, Jackson Musoni.

Major Callixte Sankara, avugira MRCD Mu minsi ishize igisirikare cy'u Rwanda cyemeje ko hari abateye uturere twa Nyaruguru na Nyamagabe baturutse mu Burundi, bakagenda basahuye. Igisirikare cy'u Rwanda cyavuze ko ari abasahuzi, kandi ko ata muntu n'umwe bakomerekeje cyangwa ngo bice. Ejo ku cyumweru niho MRCD wasohoye itangazo umenyesha ko ufite umutwe wa gisirikare wiswe FLN- Forces de Libération Nationale/Ingabo zo Kubohora Igihugu/National Liberation Forces. MRCD uvuga ko umaze ukwezi urwana n'ingabo z'u Rwanda muri Nyungwe Uwo mutwe rero wemeza ko ibiherutse kubera Nyarurguru na Nyamagabe n'intambara zakurikiyeho mw'ishyamba rya Nyungwe, ari abasirikare bawo barimo barwana n'ab'u Rwanda. BBC yashoboye kuvugana n'uwuvuga ko ari visi prerezida wa MRCD, Maj. Callixte N. Sankara, yemeza ayo makuru. Umva aho munsi ikiganiro twagiranye: Umutwe MRCD uvuga ko uri mu rugamba n'igisirikare cy'u Rwanda BBC iracyagerageza kumenya icyo uruhande rw'u Rwanda rubivugaho.

Audrey abaganga bavuga ko babonaga ko yapfuye Audrey Schoeman yagize ubukonje bukabije mu mubiri we ku kigero kitwa 'hypothermia' aho umubiri ukonja kugera munsi ya 35C. Uyu mugore basanze yaheze mu rubura mu misozi ya Pyrenees muri Espagne mu kwezi gushize aho yari yagiye kurira imisozi (hiking). Abaganga bavuga ko igihe umutima we wahagaze ari cyo kirekire bamaze kubona cyabayeho muri Espagne. Madamu Schoeman w'imyaka 34, atuye i Barcelona, ubwo yaheraga muri iyi misozi ategereje ubutabazi byageze aho ata ubwenge, umugabo we Rohan avuga ko yari azi ko umugore we yapfuye. Yabwiye abanyamakuru ati: "[mugezeho]...Nasanze atagihumeka, n'umutima utagitera." Ikipe uy'abatabazi yageze kuri uyu mugore hashize amasaha abiri, umubiri we wari wakonje bikabije munsi ya 18C, yagejejwe kwa mu nta kimenyetso na kimwe ko ari muzima. Dr Eduard Argudo wafashije kumugarura mu buzima avuga ko ubukonje bwo muri iriya misozi ari nabwo bwatumye abasha kongera guhumeka. Mu itangazo yasohoye yanditse ati: "Mu by'ukuri byabonekaga ko yapfuye. "Ariko twari tuzi ko mu gihe cya hypothermia, yari afite amahirwe macye yo gukira." Hypothermia yakingiye ubwonko bwe kwangirika mu gihe butari gukora, nubwo bwose nabyo byari ku nkombe y'urupfu nk'uko muganga Argudo abivuga. Ati:"Iyo umutima uhagarara igihe kingana gutya ku gipimo cy'ubushyuhe gisanzwe, yari kuba yarapfuye." Mu gusiganwa n'igihe, abaganga bakoresheje imashini kabuhariwe mu kongera gutembereza amaraso, kuyaha umwuka [oxygen] no kuyasubiza mu muntu. Mu gihe umubiri we wari ugeze ku gipimo cya 30C, bakoresheje imashini yitwa 'defibrillator' ishitura umutima, hari hashize amasaha atandatu ubutabazi buhamagawe. Madamu Schoeman yavuye mu bitaro hashize iminsi 12, afite utubazo ducye two gukora kw'ingingo, no kutumva ikintu cyose ku ntoki kubera ubukonje bukabije [hypothermia] zahuye nabwo. Bigenda bite umubiri iyo uri mu bukonje bukabije? Hari abandi bantu bakuru n'abana bagiye barokoka ubukonje bukabije bamazemo igihe kinini mu gihe bagejejwe kwa muganga. Ariko buri gihe haba hari ibyago byo kwangirika k'ubwonko. Igipimo cy'ubushyuhe busanzwe bw'umubiri kiba kiri munsi gato cyangwa hejuru gato ya 37C. Iyo iki gipimo kigeze munsi ya 35C umuntu aratetemeka, ashobora kuzungera no kumva arushye cyane. Munsi ya 32C umuntu ata ubwenge akagwa ndetse umutima ushobora guhagarara. Kuri madamu Schoeman, nubwo we byari birenze cyane ibi kandi bikabije, ubukonje bukabije bwabaye umugisha. Ubukonje biboneka ko bwatumye umutima usa n'uhagaze, amaraso ntakomeze kugenda no guhumeka bukajya ku rwego ruri hasi cyane byose kugira ngo birinde ubwonko kwangirika. Igihe umutima we wamaze udatera ntabwo kizwi neza - birashoboka ko amaraso ye yari agitembera ariko ku rwego rwo hasi cyane rudashobora kuboneka. Audrey n'umugabo we hamwe n'abaganga bamugaruye mu buzima Ubusanzwe, nyuma y'igihe cy'isaha umutima udatera, ubwonko bwari kuba bwangiritse. "Twari dufite ubwoba ko ubwonko bwangiritse kuko nta muntu twari twakabonye wamaze igihe kingana gutya ngo abashe kugaruka" - Bwana Argudo. Avuga ku gukira kwe, Madamu Schoeman avuga ko nta na kimwe azi ku byabaye nyuma yo guhera mu misozi. Ati: "Ntabwo nari nzi ibiri kuba nko mu gihe cy'umunsi umwe cyangwa ibiri, nakangutse gusa ndi mu ndembe". Avuga ko kuva icyo gihe yahise atangira gusoma no kumenya byinshi kuri hypothermia. Madamu Schoeman avuga ko ari amahirwe kuba ariho kandi abishimira cyane abaganga bamurokoye. Ati: "Gusa mu gihe cyabyo, nizeye ko nzongera kubasha kuzamuka imisozi. Sinshaka ko ibyabaye binyambura gukora ibyo nkunda".

Perezida watowe w'Amerika Joe Biden ubwo yakingirwaga coronavirus mu bitaro byo muri leta ya Delaware Bwana Biden yiyongereye ku mubare ukomeje kwiyongera w'abategetsi bafashe urwo rukingo (cyangwa urucanco mu Kirundi), barimo Visi Perezida Mike Pence na Nancy Pelosi, umukuru w'inteko ishingamategeko umutwe w'abadepite. Ku cyumweru, hatangiye gutangwa urukingo rwa kabiri rwa Moderna, rwemejwe mu cyumweru gishize. Ubu bivugwa ko Abanyamerika barenga 500,000 bamaze gukingirwa. Avugira mu mujyi wa Newark muri leta ya Delaware, aho yakingiwe birimo kunyura kuri televiziyo, Bwana Biden yagize ati: "Ndimo gukora ibi kugira ngo nereke abantu ko bakwiye kwitegura igihe urukingo ruzaba rubagezeho ngo barufate". Ati: "Nta kintu na kimwe gihari cyo kugirira impungenge". Yavuze ko ubutegetsi bwa Trump "bukwiye gushimirwa ukuntu" kubera gutangiza gahunda y'igihugu y'ikingira. Jill Biden, umugore wa Bwana Biden, mbere yaho ku wa mbere na we yari yakingiwe, nkuko uyu perezida watowe yabivuze. Kamala Harris, wiyamamaje hamwe na Bwana Biden akaba ari Visi Perezida watowe, ndetse n'umugabo we Doug Emhoff, biteganyijwe ko bakingirwa bwa mbere mu cyumweru gitaha. Itsinda ry'abazakorana bya hafi na Bwana Biden ku butegetsi bwe, ryihaye intego yuko Abanyamerika miliyoni 100 bazaba bamaze guhabwa urukingo rwa Covid-19 mu minsi 100 ya mbere y'ubutegetsi bwa Bwana Biden. Kugeza ubu muri Amerika hamaze gutangazwa abantu barenga miliyoni 18 banduye coronavirus, muri bo abarenga 319,000 yarabishe, nkuko imibare ya Kaminuza ya Johns Hopkins ibigaragaza. Trump ntarikingiza Perezida Donald Trump, mu kwezi kwa 10 wamaze iminsi itatu mu bitaro arwaye coronavirus, ntabwo yavuze igihe azakingirirwa. Bwana Trump ubu ni umwe mu ba nyuma mu bategetsi bo hejuru batorwa batarafata uru rukingo rumwe muri ebyiri ziteganyijwe. Mu butumwa bwo kuri Twitter ku itariki ya 13 y'uku kwezi kwa 12, yagize ati: "Ntabwo nakoze gahunda yo gufatiraho urukingo, ariko mfite amashyushyu yo kubikora mu gihe gikwiye". Bamwe mu bajyanama be baramushyigikiye ku gucyerererwa gukingirwa, bavuga ko akirinzwe n'ubwirinzi bwavuye ku miti yahawe agakira iyi virusi ubwo yari arwaye.

Umuduga wari utwawe na Minassian, amaze kuwugongesha abanyamaguru Uwo akekwa, vyavuzwe ko ari umusore w'imyaka mirongo ibiri n'itanu yitwa Alek Minassian, yafashwe ata rusoro na rumwe rurekuwe. Video y'ukuntu yafashwe imwerekana atumbereza ikintu gisa n'inkoho ku mupolisi asemerera ati "nyica". Ariko uwo mupolisi yaranse kurekura urusoro mu nyuma aza gushobora kumugondoza amufata ata gukirana kuhabaye. Igitero c'umuduga ejo i Toronto cahitanye abantu cumi Minassian yatwaye imodoka anyaruka, aza arakata amakorosi mu kibanza abanyamaguru bagiramwo, agenda uburebure bushika ku kirometero. Abantu bashika cumi na batanu nibo bivugwa ko bariko baravurwa ibikomere. Soma kandi:

Idarapo rya Arsenal mu mfuruka y'ikibuga Ku mashusho ya CCTV yashitse mu minwe y'ikigo Sun, ubona Alexandre Lacazette, Matteo Guendouzi, Mesut Ozil na Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang bariko bakwega ubwo bumara. Abo bakinyi bari mu munsi mukuru mu bunywero bwo mu gisagara ca Londres mu kwezi kwa Munani. "Oxyde nitreux" ni umwuka uzwi ko utuma umuntu atwenga canke yumva umengo ageze mw'ijuru. Umuvugizi wa Arsenal yabwiye BBC ko abakinyi baza kuvugishwa, bibutswe amabanga yabo. "Oxyde nitreux" ituma ubwonko bukora buhoro buhoro hamwe n'umubiri, ivyo bigatuma abayikoresha bumva umengo bari mw'ijuru nk'uwafashe ibiyovyabwenge, bigashobora no gutuma umuntu ata ubwenge, akameneka umutwe, akamera nk'umusazi. Igisata ca leta kijejwe ibiyovyabwenge kivuga ko mu gihe umuntu afashe ubwo bumara ku rugero runini, ko bishobora gutuma umubiri n'ubwonko bibura umwuka ukwiye wa "oxygène". Mu gihe bitabujijwe gutunga ibiyovyabwenge, birabujijwe kubitanga canke kubigurisha.

Arsenal igiye kwamamaza ubukerarugendo mu Rwanda Bitegekanijwe ko mu mwaka uza imipira abakinyi ba Arsenal bazokwambara bakina izoba yanditsweko "Visit Rwanda" bivuga biti "Temberera u Rwanda". Igisata c'abakerarugendo kizoheza kirihe uwo mugwi mu kumenyekanisha imirimo yaco. Prezida Paul Kagame ni umukunzi w'umugwi Arsenal ariko ntawuzi ko yoba ariwe yatumye ayo masezerano apfundikwa. Arsenal yashikirije ivy'ayo masezerano ku buryo bwa Twitter: Impera ya Twitter ubutumwa, 1 Uwurongoye igisata c'ubucuruzi mu mugwi Arsenal, Vinai Venkatesham yagize ati: "N'ugukorana guhimbaye kuzotuma dufasha u Rwanda kwubaka igisata c'abakerarugendo. "Ico gihugu kiramaze guhinduka muri ino myaka ya vuba, Arsenal izotuma abantu biyumvamwo u Rwanda mu buryo bushasha." Igihugu c'u Rwanda kimaze igihe kirondera kuzamura igisata c'abakerarugendo, ni igihugu kimwe muri bitatu kw'isi gifise inkoto zo mu misozi. Ayo masezerano afise ikiringo c'imyaka itatu, abaye mu gihe umugwi Arsenal waronse umumenyereza mushasha Unai Emery, amakuru yamenyeshejwe n'umuyobozi nshingwabikogwa Ivan Gazidis. Prezida Paul Kagame ni umukunzi w'umugwi Arsenal Emery afise imyaka 46, yiyunze n'aba Gunners avuye ahejeje gushikana umugwi wo mu Bufaransa PSG ku ntsinzi mw'ihiganwa rya Ligue 1. Uwo mugabo aturuka mu gihugu ca Espagne yaratsinze n'ibindi bikombe bine vy'amahiganwa yo mu gihugu hagati, imbere yaho akaba yafashije umugwi wa Séville gutsinda incuro zitatu zikurikiranya ihiganwa rya Europa League. Unai Emery yahora ari umumenyereza wa Paris St Germain (PSG) yashikanye ku ntsinzi y'igikombe ca Ligue 1 Asubiriye Arsene Wenger yaramaze imyaka 22 amenyereza Arsenal. "Unai yagiye aragira amahirwe mu mwuga wiwe, yarateje imbere abakinyi ubona ko bafise impano i Buraya kandi agakinisha urukino ruryoshe, ruja imbere ubona ko bijanye koko na Arsenal," niko Gazidis yavuze. "Ukuntu yitanga cane kandi akunda umupira hamwe n'agaciro ubona ko ashira imbere mu rukino haba ku kibuga canke inyuma y'ikibuga, vyatumye dusanga ariwe muntu dukwiye gufata ngo tubandanya hamwe."

Luc Van Damme yagiye gutandukanywa na nyina afise imyaka ibiri gusa Iyi ni inkuru yakurikiranywe na BBC Gahuza, ushobora no kumva mu kiganiro Imvo n'imvano giheruka kuri uru rubuga rwacu. Igihe c'ubukoloni, leta mbirigi yaratandukanije abana b'imvange bari bavutse ku bakenyezi bo mu bihugu vyatwara n'Ububirigi, ivyo bakaba babigira mu ntumbero y'ukwikingira ngo abanyagihugu ntibahave bagumuka. Nico gituma Luc yagiye arerwa n'uwundi muryango, atandukanywa n'umuvyeyi wiwe n'abo bavukana mu kiringo c'imyaka 15. Ivyo vyabandanije ari akamizwe n'ingoma gushika ku wa 19 z'ukwezi kwa kane 2019, aho umushikiranganji wa mbere w'Ububirigi, Charles Michel, asabiye imbabazi ku mubabaro bateye mu kunyaga abo bana b'imvange. Luc Van Damme avuga ko mu muryango bari abana batanu b'imvange banyurujwe bakarungikwa mu Bubirigi. Umwanditsi Assumani Budagwa akomoka muri Congo avuga ko imvange zafatwa nk'ikintu gishobora gutera ibibazo ku butegetsi bwa gikoloni bw'Ububirigi, ari naco gituma mu nyuma yahavuye ifata ingingo zari zigamije kwikingira, ariko zimwe zigatera umubabaro ku bavyeyi. Avuga ko muri izo ngingo harimwo kubuza ko abazungu n'abirabure bubakana kugira ngo ntihasubire kuvuka imvange. "Inyindi ngingo yafashwe kwabaye ukunyuruza abana b'imvange bavutse kuri ba nyina b'abanya Afrika kugira ngo ntihazohave haduka imigumuko". Leta mbirigi yahavuye ifata itegeko ribuza ko abazungu n'abirabure bubakana kugira ngo ntihasubire kuvuka imvange Luc Van Damme yagiye kuronka amahirwe y'ukubonana n'umuvyeyi wiwe mu 1978, igihe aronse akazi ko kuja gukorera muri Congo, aho yagiye kwigisha kw'ishure ry'ababirigi i Goma. "Ngeze mu biro vy'umukuru w'ishure, umupatiri yakoze ikosa ambwira ati: ' Umviriza, hariho ikibanza kw'ishure ry'ababirigi i Kigali mu Rwanda', ca wiyumvira rero ingene niyumvise nk'umuntu afise amamuko mu Bubirigi no mu Rwanda!" "Kari akaryo keza kuri jewe ko gusubira aho nataye uruzogi, mu Rwanda". Bwana Budagwa avuga ko abo bantu b'imvange muri kino gihe bibaza ibibazo vyinshi ku mamuko yabo, ni mu gihe n'abana babo ubu bari mu ngorane z'ukutabona ico bari. Ati: " Nibo bagerageza guhimiriza abavyeyi babo kurondera amamuko yabo, kurondera iyo ba se na ba nyina babo bari". Assumani Budagwa avuga ko ingingo zafashwe na leta mbirigi zateye umubabaro mu miryango Amaze amezi abiri gusa mu Rwanda, Luc yashoboye gutorana na nyina wiwe. "Umunsi umwe mvuye kwigisha inyuma y'amezi abiri nshitse mu Rwanda, nahuye n'abantu batatu, umugore umwe muto muto n'abagabo babiri barebare, bambajije bati 'yoba ari wewe Van Damme'?". "Nishuye nti: "Ego ni jewe Luc Van Damme, ndabafashe iki?' Ico bakoze, abo bagabo banyeretse uyo mugore muto muto bambwira ko ari we mama wanje". "Muri ako kanya, mama yaguye igihumura! Ntiyarize, yaragerageje kwifata, n'ukuri vyari biteye igomwe, turahoberana n'inkumbu nyinshi cane nyene nk'abanya Afrika". Luc Van Damme ari kumwe na nyina wiwe inyuma y'aho ashikiye ku gatumba aho yavukiye "Twagumye tubonana kenshi, kuko naranashitse ku gatumba aho navukiye". Hagati aho, Luc avuga ko bitamworoheye cane kubera ingorane z'ururimi. Ukunyaga abana b'imvange ni kimwe mu mabi yakozwe n'abakoloni b'ababirigi mu bihugu vy'Uburundi, Urwanda na Congo, aho benshi mu bagore b'abanyarwandakazi, Abarundikazi n'abanyekongokazi bambuwe abana babo bamaze amezi make bavutse, ntibongera kubaca n'ikanda. Ububirigi busaba imbabazi Kw'igenekerezo rya kane ukwezi kwa kane uno mwaka, umushikiranganji wa mbere w'ububirigi Charles Michel yasavye imbabazi, yemera ko ivyakozwe na leta mbirigi mu gihe c'ubukoloni biteye umubabaro. Ati: "Mu gutunganya umugambi w'ikumira ry'abana b'imvange n'imiryango yabo mu gice ca Afrika cakoronijwe n'ababirigi, igihugu c'Ububirigi carakoze ibikorwa bihonyanga uburenganzira bwa kiremwamuntu". "Nico gituma, kw'izina rya leta, ndemeye ko imvange zakorewe ikumira ku butegetsi bwa gikoroni be na politike y'inyuruzwa vyajanye, muri Congo-Belge no muri Rwanda-Urundi gushika mu 1962 n'inyuma y'aho bironkeye intahe y'ukwikukira". Kw'izina rya leta y'Ububirigi, ndasavye imbabazi ku bantu b'imvange bavuye mu ntwaro ya gikoroni y'Ububirigi no ku miryango yabo, ku karenganyo bakorewe n'umubabaro bagize". Luc Van Damme avuga ko ashima uko ari nk'imvange, akavuga ko ubuzima ari urugamba, bigasaba kwizera. Ati: "Uratsinda canke bikakwigisha. Ku ruhande rwanje, ivyo naciyemwo vyose vyarankomeje kandi binyigisha ibintu vyinshi, kandi bizobandanya binyigisha".

Rurangiranwa wo muri Cameroun Samuel Eto'o yakinye mu bihugu vya Espagne, Uburusiya, Turkiya, Qatar n'Ubwongereza. Uyo yatsindiye incuro 4 agashimwe k'umukinyi mwiza wo ku mugabane wa Afrika gatangwa buri mwaka yamenyesheje ko agiye mu zabukuru mu mupira w'amaguru afise imyaka 38 mu kwezi kwa 9. Eto'o yizera ko kujabuka ibahari Atlantique aja muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika kwiga ibijanye n'ubutunzi bizofasha intumbero yiwe yo gufasha umugabane wa Afrika. Eto yabwiye ikinyamakuru co mu Bufaransa, Jeune Afrique, candikirwa kuri Internet ati: "Ngomba gufasha no gutanga intererano nziza mu guhindura umugabane wacu". ''Iyo uri umukinyi w'umupira w'amaguru urariha amafranga abantu kugira bagufashe mu kazi kawe n'ibindi vya nkenerwa muri rusange." ''Ariko iyo ari wewe utegerezwa gutunganya akazi abantu bakora, kandi ukaba ushaka kubateza imbere, utegerezwa kwiga ubundi ubumenyi bushasha." Uyo yahoze ari umukinyi w'imbere w'igihugu ca Cameroun n'ikipe ya Barcelona, akaba kandi ari we yinjirije igihugu ciwe ibitsindo vyinshi, bishika 56 mu nkino 118, yaremanze ingingo yiwe yo kwiga ubuzima bwiwe bwose niyahagarika gukina umupira w'amaguru. Yasiguye ati: ''Mu kwezi kwa mbere nzotangura ivyigwa vyo gutunganya ibijanye n'ubutunzi muri Kaminuza ya Havard inyuma y'aho iyo Kaminuza ingiriye neza ikanyemerera inyigisho z'umwihariko''. "Nzoba mba mu gisagara ca Boston mu kiringo kingana hafi umwaka. Ntibizoba vyoroshe, ariko ni ibitoroshe binezereye, mukaba musanzwe muzi ko jewe nkunda cane ibimbiza akuya". Eto'o yatsindiye ibikombe vyinshi mu gukina kwiwe muri Espagne no mu Butaliyano, ariko aho yabiciye bigacika ku rwego rw'amakipe ni muri Barcelona aho yakinye kuva mu 2004 gushika mu 2009. Mu bikombe yaronse muri iyo kipe harimwo 3 vyo mw'ihiganwa La Liga na bibiri vya Champions League. Yaratsindiye kandi Champions League amenyerezwa na Jose Mourinho muri Inter Milan mu 2010, akaba kandi afise umudari w'inzahabu mw'ihiganwa Olempike ku rwego rw'ikipe y'igihugu ca Cameroun mu 2000. Eto'o mu mwuga wiwe yakinye kandi mu bihugu nka Turkiya, Uburusiya hamwe na Qatar, akaba kandi ari nawe amaze kwinjiriza ibitsindo vyinshi mw'ihiganwa ry'igikombe ca Afrika, akaba afise ibitsindo 18. Yakinye mu mahiganwa ane y'igikombe c'isi aserukiye ikipe ya Cameroun izwi nka "Les Lions Indomptables" mu 1998, 2002, 2010 no mu 2014 aho yakinye incuro 8 akinjiza ibitsindo 3. Uyo musatirizi kandi yanatsindiye ibikombe vya Afrika bibiri yikurikiranya akinira igihugu ciwe, mu 2000 n'i 2002.

Hatangajwe kandi ko nta kibazo rutera ubuzima bw'abaruhawe ngo ndetse runabarinda urupfu no kuba bajyanywa mu bitaro kubera iyi ndwara. Uru rukingo rwabanje guteza impaka nyuma yaho rutangiye gutangwa amakuru ajyanye n'igerageza ryarwo rya nyuma atarashyirwa ahagaragara. Ariko abashakashatsi bavuga ko ubu noneho akamaro karwo kerekanwe. Ruje rusanga izindi nkingo zarangije kwemerwa zirimo Pfizer, Oxford/AstraZeneca, Moderna na Janssen. Urukiko rwa Sputnik rukora mu buryo busa n'urwa Oxford/AstraZeneca rwakorewe mu Bwongereza n'urwa Janssen rwakorewe mu Bubirigi. Rukoresha ubwoko bw'agakoko gatera grippe kambuwe ubukana kugirango katangiza ubuzima. Kakaba kinjiza mu mubiri agace gatoya cyane ka coronavirus. Ibi bituma umubiri mu buryo butawangije, uhura n'agace ndangamimerere gatoya ka coronavirus maze ukabasha kumenya ko utewe ugahita wirinda mu buryo budashobora gutuma umuntu arwara. Iyo muntu amaze gukingirwa, umubiri utangira gukora abasirikare bawurinda indwara ya Covid-19. Ibi rero bisobanuye ko umubiri uba utojwe ukuntu uzitwara n'uhura n'iyi ndwara. Uru rukingo rushobora kubikwa mu bukonje buri hagati y'ibipimo 2 na 8 Celcius (firigo isanzwe ifite ibipimo 3 na 5 Celcius) ku buryo kurutwara no kurubika byoroshye. Urukingo rwa kabiri ntirutangwa nk'izindi Ugereranyije n'izindi nkingo zo mu bwoko bumwe, umuntu ahabwa inkingo ebyiri za Sputnik V zitandukanye gatoya; hagashira iminsi 21 hagati yazo. Zombi zibasira amahembe y'agakoko gashya ka Corona ariko zigakoresha uburyo butandukanye mu guhangana nako. Ibi bikorwa kubera ko gukoresha uburyo bubiri budasa biha imbaraga abasirikare barinda umubiri kurusha gukoresha uburyo bubiri busa - ibi bikaba ngo bishobora gutuma urukingo rurinda umuntu igihe kirekire. Usibye kwerekana ko rukora, amagerageza yasanze uru rukingo nta n'ikibazo ruteye cyangwa se ngo abaruhawe rubagaruke. Ubundi bisanzwe byitezwe ko inkingo zose zishobora kugwa nabi abazihawe. Ariko uko kugwa nabi kuba koroheje ku buryo ibyo umuntu ashobora guhura nabyo nyuma yo kuruhabwa harimo kubabara mu kaboko katewemo urukingo, kugira umunaniro cyangwa se kugira umuriro udakabije. Kandi mubaruhawe nta numwe wapfuye cyangwa ngo arware cyane. Usibye mu Burusiya, uru rukingo rurimo gukoreshwa mu tundi duce tw'isi nka: Argentina Intara z'abanyapalesitina Venezuela Hungary UAE Irani Abanditse iyi nyandiko yo mu kinyamakuru The Lancet bavuga ko amagerageza yibanze ku bafite ibimenyetso by'indwara ya Covid-19, ko rero hakenewe no kumenya niba uru rukingo rushobora gukora ku bantu batagaragaza ibimenyetso cyangwa se niba rushobora kubuza abakingiwe kuba bakwanduza abandi.

Ibi bihugu biherereye mu karere ka Caucase, byahoze ari repubulika ebyiri mu zari zigize Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Abasoviyeti (Uburusiya bw'ubu). Birarwanira akarere ka Nagorno-Karabakh, kemewe mu rwego mpuzamahanga nk'akarere k'Azerbaijan, ariko gategekwa n'abo mu bwoko bw'abanya-Armenia. Iyi mirwano ni yo ya mbere ikaze ibayeho hagati y'impande zombi kuva mu myaka ibarirwa muri za mirongo ishize. Buri ruhande rushinja urundi kuba ari rwo rwayitangije. Kuva mu mwaka wa 1988 kugeza mu wa 1994, Armenia n'Azerbaijan byararwanye bipfa ako karere, biza gutangaza agahenge. Ariko nta na rimwe byari byagera ku bwumvikane kuri ako karere. Iyi foto, yatangajwe na minisiteri y'ingabo y'Armenia, yerekana umwe mu barashi b'imbunda z'imizinga muri ubu bushyamirane bwongeye kubura. Impande zombi zakoze ku ntwaro zikomeye, ndetse ingo zimwe n'inyubako zarashenywe mu turere dutuwemo n'abaturage b'abasivile. Hano, abaturage bo mu karere ka Nagorno-Karabakh barimo guhabwa ibiryo nyuma yo guhungira mu mujyi wo muri Armenia uri ku mupaka. Ingabo z'Azerbaijan zarashe mu murwa mukuru w'akarere ka Nagorno-Karabakh, ari wo Stepanakert. Hatangajwe ko haguye abantu benshi muri uwo mujyi, wasigaye utagira umuriro w'amashanyarazi (umuyagankuba mu Kirundi) nkuko bitangazwa n'ibiro ntaramakuru Armenpress. Uyu mukecuru agaragara ari imbere y'inzu ye muri uwo mujyi. Hagati aho, abategetsi b'akarere ka Nagorno-Karabakh bavuze ko barashe ku kibuga cy'indege cya gisirikare cyo mu mujyi wa Ganja, wa kabiri mu bunini muri Azerbaijan. Abazimya umuriro boherejwe i Ganja no mu yindi mijyi n'ibyaro ngo bazimye imiriro. Hari ubwoba ko umubare nyakuri w'abapfuye mu ngabo zo ku mpande zombi no ku ruhande rw'abaturage, ushobora kuba ari munini kurushaho, kuko imibare y'abatangajwe ko bapfuye itigeze igenzurwa n'uruhande rudafite aho rubogamiye. Uyu mugore yajyanwe mu bitaro byo mu mujyi wa Ganja mu ntangiriro y'iki cyumweru. Igisirikare cy'Azerbaijan kivuga ko abasirikare bacyo bisubije ibyaro byinshi, mu gihe ubutegetsi bw'akarere ka Nagorno-Karabakh buvuga ko ingabo zabwo "zongereye" ibirindiro byazo ku rugamba. Ikoreshwa ry'intwaro ziremereye ryashegeshe imihanda yo mu mujyi, nka hano mu mujyi wa Stepanakert. Ndetse n'iyi nyubako yo mu mujyi wa Ganja yangijwe bikomeye n'ibisasu. Leta y'Azerbaijan yavuze ko mu mirwano iheruka "ibikorwa remezo bya gisivile n'inyubako z'amateka zimaze igihe kirekire zangijwe". Ku mpande zombi muri iyi mirwano, inzu zo kubamo zarashenywe, zirangizwa zisigara nta muntu uzibamo. Ibikoresho yo mu nzu byafotowe binyanyagiye mu myanda (imicafu mu Kirundi). Hano, iki ni igice cyo hejuru cy'inzu yo kubamo yo mu karere ka Nagorno-Karabakh, nyuma yo kuraswaho.

Godbless Lema (hagati), ku ifoto yafotowe mu 2011. Yahoze ahagarariye agace ka Arusha mu nteko ya Tanzania Zitto Kabwe wo mu batavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi muri Tanzania, yatangaje ku rubuga rwa Twitter ko bari bafite ubwoba ko Kenya ishobora kumusubiza muri Tanzania. Imiryango iharanira uburenganzira bwa muntu, nka Amnesty International, yari yamaganye gufungwa kwa Bwana Lema n'umuryango ubwo bari bageze muri Kenya, bahunze. Bwana Lema yafashwe ari mu modoka atwawe n'umunyamategeko we bari kwerekeza i Nairobi. Yari kumwe n'umugore we n'abana. Muri Tanzania hari ibikorwa bimwe byo kwibasira abatavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi nyuma y'amatora Perezida John Magufuli yatsinze ku bwiganze. Ikinyamakuru the Standard cyavuze ko polisi ya Kenya yafashe aba bantu bageze mu mujyi uri ku ntera ya 45Km uvuye ku mupaka wa Tanzania binjiye muri Kenya. Hari amakuru yavuze ko uyu mugabo wari umudepite mu nteko ya Tanzania yanze guha urwandiko rwe rw'inzira (passport) abakozi bo ku mupaka ba Tanzania. Umunyamategeko we, George Luchiri Wajackoyah, yasubiwemo n'iki kinyamakuru avuga ko yari ajyanye uyu munyapolitiki ku biro bya UNHCR i Nairobi. Iki kinyamakuru gusibiramo kandi amagambo ya Bwana Lema avuga ko yazanye n'abana be batatu n'umugore we. Akaba ari "gusaba ubuhungiro". Bwana Lema yari mu bakuru b'ishyaka CHADEMA ritavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi bafunzwe bakarekurwa mu cyumweru gishize, bashinjwaga gutegura imyigaragambyo yo gusaba ko amatora asubirwamo.

Ingabo za LONI muri Congo Abayobozi baravuga ko ubwo bwicanyi bwabereye i Beni mu ijoro ryakeye. Abakoze ubwo bwicanyi ntibaramenyekana, ariko abanyamakuru baravuga ko bishoboka ko ari abarwanyi b'umutwe wa ADF NALU ukorera muri ako karere. Uwo mutwe ukomoka muri Uganda, ariko ukorera cyane cyane muri Congo. Imiryango idaharanira inyungu iravuga ko abantu bagera ku 1000 bamaze kwicwa n'imitwe y'abitwaje intwaro i Beni no mu turere tuheregeye mu myaka 2 ishize.

Umuvuduko w'ubutunzi bw'Ubushinwa ngo ntugenda nk'uko vyibazwa. Amabanki y'Ubwongereza afise ubutunzi buciye miriyaridi 530 z'ama dolari, arimwo ingurane n'ayandi bashoye mu bikorwa bizana amafaranga, mu Bushinwa no muri Hong Kong, n'ukuvuga ibice 16% vy'amafaranga amabanki y'Ubwongereza afise mu bihugu vyo hanze. Rogoff yabwiye BBC ko ibihugu vya Bulaya na Amerika vyari bikwiye kuraba ko ubutunzi bwavyo buhagaze neza, bitaratangura gusubira inyuma. Yibukije ko igendereza ry'ikigega mpuzamakungu FMI ryagiye ryerekana ko ubutunzi bw'isi muri rusangi butiyongereye mu myaka icenda irangiye, kandi ko hari impungenge ko n'uyu mwaka ariko bizogenda. Uretse mu Bushinwa, bwana Rogoff avuga ko no mw'isi muri rusangi hari impungenge ku bibazo bitandukanye, nko kwibaza nimba ari Donald Trump canke Hillary Clinton azotsinda amatora muri Leta zunze Ubumweza Amerika. Avuga ko bigoye kumenya icoba hamwe Trump ariwe yotsinda, ariko ngo Hillary Clinton aramutse atsinze, imigambi yiwe ishobora kiubuzwa gushirwa mungiro n'abashingamateka b'aba Republikani.

Na nyuma y'imyaka kuva aho apfiriye, ifoto ya Laurent-Désiré Kabila yari ikiboneka ku byapa ku mihanda yo mu murwa mukuru Kinshasa Bafite icyizere ko leta nshya iriho kuri ubu muri Kongo ishobora kumva kurushaho ubusabe bwabo. Ejo ku wa kane, umunyamategeko uburanira abo muri iyo miryango yagiranye inama n'umushinjacyaha mukuru wa Kongo bavugana ku busabe bwabo. Bwana Kabila yishwe arashwe n'umusirikare umwe mu bamurindaga ari mu biro bye mu murwa mukuru Kinshasa, ku itariki ya 16 y'ukwa mbere mu mwaka wa 2001. Hari hashize imyaka ine inyeshyamba yari ayoboye zifashe ubutegetsi zimaze guhirika uwari Perezida Mobutu Sese Seko. Urukiko rwa gisirikare rwahamije abantu bagera hafi ku 100 iyicwa rye, kandi icyo cyemezo cy'urukiko kiba ntajuririrwa. Abantu 24 bakatiwe igihano cy'urupfu, abandi barafungwa. Abantu icumi muri abo bamaze gupfira muri gereza. Mu mwakawa 2013, urukiko nyafurika rw'uburenganzira bwa muntu rwasanze ikatirwa ryabo ryaravuye ku rubanza rwaciwe mu buryo bwo kubogama.

Nijeria imaze gutsinda urukino rumwe aho yirahiye Koreya y'Epfo ibitsindo bibiri ku busa mu rukino rwabaye ku wa 12 z'ukwa gatandatu Ibihugu vya Nijeriya, Kameruni na Afrika y'Epfo nivyo vyaserukiye umugabane wa Afrika muri iryo higanwa ririko ribera mu gihugu c'Ubufaransa. Imirwi ya Afrika y'Epfo na Kameruni yoyo ivyayo ntivyoroshe kuko mu mirwi birimwo ata nota na rimwe vyigeze bironka, bigasigura ko batigeze batsinda n'urukino na rumwe. Amaso yose asigaye yerekeje cane kuri Nijeriya mu murwi A ikaba iri kumwe n'ibihugu vy'Ubufaransa, Noroveje hamwe ka Koreya y'Ubumanuko. Nijeria iri mu mwanya wa gatatu inyuma y'Uburafansa bufise amanota atandatu, bugakurikirwa na Noroveje hamwe na Nijeriya nyene, vyompi bifise amanota atatu atatu, ariko Noroveje ikaba ifise ibitsindo vyinshi, mu gihe Nijeriya yoyo ifise ideni ry'igitsindo kimwe. Koreya y'Epfo yoyo ifise ubusa. Rero, Nijeria isigaje guhura n'Ubufaransa. Ari nka hamwe yovyifatamwo neza igatsinda urwo rukino, irafise amahirwe yo kubandanya, ariko bikava ku kungene ibintu bizogenda hagati ya Koreya y'Ubumanuko na Noroveje. Mu biharuro vya hafi, kugira ngo Nijeria ibandanye, ni uko itsinda Ubufaransa canke bakanganya, hanyuma Koreya y'Epfo nayo igategerezwa gutsinda Noroveje. Mu gihe yoguma mu kibanza ca gatatu, voyvana n'ingene ibintu vyoba bihagaze kugira ngo ibe mu mirwi myiza iri mu bibanza vya gatatu. N'aho ivya Kameruni bitoroshe, ari nka hamwe yotsinda urukino rwayo rwo ku wa kabiri, irashobora kubandanya kuko ni iya gatatu mu murwi E n'amanota ubusa, ariko ikagira ideni ry'ibitsindo bitatu. Vyovana n'ingene iyindi mirwi iri mu bibanza vya gatatu ihagaze. Ni inkino zizobera ica rimwe ejo ku wa mbere isaha 16 mu masaha y'Uburundi n'u Rwanda. Muri iryo higanwa, uno munsi mu murwi F, ibihugu ca Suwede na Tayilandi biratana mu mitwe isaha indwi mu masaha y'Uburundi n'u Rwanda, mu gihe Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika ziza gutana mu mitwe na Shili isaha icumi. Mu zindi nkino, igihugu ca Ukraine caraye gitahukanye igikombe c'ihiganwa ry'umupira w'amaguru kw'isi rihuza imirwi nserukirabihugu y'abatarenza imyaka 20 ku ruhande rw'abagabo, gitsinze igihugu ca Koreya y'Epfo ibitsindo 3-1. Muri iryo higanwa, Afrika yari yaserukiwe n'ibihugu vya Senegali, Nijeriya, Mali na Afrika y'Epfo. Igihugu ca Senegali nico cinanase kirashika mu gice ca kane gishira ica nyuma (Quart de finale), mu gihe Nijeriya na Mali bitarenze igice c'umunani gishira ica nyuma (8e de finale) bimaze kurengana igice c'ugukuranamwo mu mirwi (phase de groupes).

Umuyobozi w'akarere Pete Buttigieg (uri hagati) yashyingiye Mary na Gabe mu biro bye Pete Buttigieg, umuyobozi w'akarere ka South Bend muri leta ya Indiana, yavuze ko Mary na Gabe ejo ku wa mbere bamusanze ari bwo akigera ku biro bye ahagana ku isaha ya saa mbiri n'iminota 15 za mu gitondo bakamusaba kubashyingiranya mbere yuko umwana wabo avuka. Abakozi bo ku karere ni bo babaye abahamya b'iryo shyingirwa ryabo, nuko bakoresha agatambaro mu mwanya w'impeta zitari zaboneka. Nuko Mary asaba guhura na muganga ku isaha ya saa tatu za mu gitondo, abyara umwana w'umukobwa. Bwana Buttigieg yatangaje ku ipaji ye yo ku rubuga nkoranyambaga rwa Facebook ko Jade Katherine Jones abaye "umuturage mushya" wo mu karere ayobora ka South Bend. Muri ubwo butumwa bwe bwaherecyejwe n'ifoto y'urwo ruhinja, yagize ati: "Ibihe nk'ibi ni byo nzakumbura manda yanjye nk'umuyobozi w'akarere nirangira". Umuyobozi w'akarere yagize ati: "Ikaze kuri Jade muri iyi si idasanzwe kandi iryoshye!" Uyu mukuru w'akarere ka South Bend yagize ati: "Ishimwe ku bamaze gushyingirwa bakaba n'ababyeyi bashya, kandi ikaze kuri Jade muri iyi si idasanzwe kandi iryoshye!" Mu kwezi kwa mbere k'uyu mwaka wa 2019, Bwana Buttigieg w'imyaka 37 y'amavuko yatangaje ko aziyamamaza mu matora ya perezida w'Amerika yo mu mwaka utaha wa 2020, ajya mu bahatanira kuzahagararira ishyaka ry'abademokarate, bamaze kuba imbaga kugeza ubu. Naramuka atsindiye kurihagararira, Bwana Buttigieg azaba abaye uwa mbere mu biyemerera ku mugaragaro ko bakorana imibonano mpuzabitsina n'ab'igitsina kimwe na bo ushoboye guhagararira ishyaka rikomeye.

Izo nteko zigiye gukingira ivyashara vy'abashinwa ntibibwe Ashikiriza ijambo umugwi w'abagwizatunga 120 b'Abashinwa ku munsi wa gatatu, perezida Museveni yamenyesheje ko hagiye kwongerezwa ugukizura hamwe na kamera zo gucungera umutekano. Ubushinwa bufise imitahe myinshi muri Uganda, ariko bumaze gutakaza amahera menshi biciye mu busuma. Leta iriko yihutira kwongereza umutekano mu gihe ubwicanyi bugenda bwiyongera hirya no hino mu gihugu. Mw'itangazo yashikirije, perezida Museveni yavuze ati:"Kuri jewe iki kibazo kiroroshe gutorera inyishu." Yongeyeko k'umuntu wese ajejwe umutekano azotakaza inkoho yiwe, ashobora gushikirizwa ubutungane bwa gisirikare. Hari amakenga ko abacungera umutekano boba bafasha abaje kwiba. Benshi mu banditse ku rubuga rwa facebook rwa perezida babaza igituma bitayeho gucungera cane amakompanyi y'abanyamahanga, ahubwo basaba leta gushigikira cane abanyamitahe b'abaganda. Mu minsi iheze Uganda yatanguje umugwi w'urwaruka rugiye gufasha gukomeza umutekano mu gisagara ca Kampala Umumenyeshamakuru wa BBC Catherine Byaruhanga ari ku mugwa mukuru Kampala, avuga ko ubutegetsi bwa perezida Museveni bubangamiwe n'iyongerekana ry'ubugizi bwa nabi, harimwo ubwicanyi, ukunyuruza abantu hamwe n'ubusuma bugirwa hakoreshejwe ibigwanisho. Mu gutorera inyishu ico kibazo c'umutekano, reta yategetse ko haba ugukizura mu ku mugwa mukuru no mu micungararo yawo, ishirwaho ry'amakamera, ishinga n'umugwi w'abanyagihugu bafise ibigwanisho wiswe Local Defence Units (LDUs)

Umutoza Mauricio Pochettino yinjije mu kibuga rutahizamu Fernando Llorente ku munota wa 84 asimbura, ahita atsinda igitego ku mupira wa mbere yari afashe ari mu rubuga rw'amahina rwa Borussia Dortmund Son Heung-min, Jan Vertonghen na Fernando Llorente ni bo batsinze ibyo bitego mu gice cya kabiri Tottenham yihariye, muri uyu mukino wabereye ku kibuga cya Wembley mu Bwongereza. Pochettino yagize ati: "Iyi kipe ni indwanyi. Iranshimishije cyane". "Bakwiye ishimwe ryose. Ibyo bari gukora biratangaje". Tottenham yakoze ibisa nk'ibitangaza ubwo yakomezaga muri iki cyiciro cy'imikino yo guhita amakipe akuranamo cya Champions League, mu gihe nyamara mu cyiciro cyo mu matsinda yabonye inota rimwe mu mikino itatu ibanza. Muri uyu mukino wabaye ku wa gatatu, Tottenham ntabwo yari ifite rutahizamu kizigenza wayo, Harry Kane, ndetse n'umukinnyi ukina hagati mu kibuga, Dele Alli. Ariko yashoboye gutsinda Dortmund imaze kugera muri iki cyiciro cy'imikino ya Champions League inshuro eshanu mu myaka itandatu y'imikino ishize. Pochettino yavuze ko Son, rutahizamu ukomoka muri Koreya y'epfo, "yafashije cyane" iyi kipe atsinda igitego cya mbere. Yagize ati: " Son nanone yabaye umukinnyi w'igitangaza. Ntekereza ko ari umukinnyi uha ikipe ibintu byinshi. Aramwenyura kandi afite ingufu nyinshi. Imikinire ye ikomeje gutera imbere umukino ku mukino". Umukino wo kwishyura uteganyijwe kuba ku itariki ya 5 y'ukwezi gutaha kwa gatatu ku kibuga Westfalenstadion cya Dortmund mu Budage. Pochettino, Umunya-Argentine w'imyaka 46 y'amavuko, yongeyeho ati: "Ibitego 3-0 ni intsinzi nziza cyane, ariko nanone ntekereza ko dukwiye gutekereza ko ducyeneye kurangiza uyu murimo neza". "Iteka iyo dukina muri iri rushanwa kandi dukina n'ikipe nziza nka Dortmund, biba bigoye cyane".

Aba bagabo uko ari bane baburanye bahakana ibyo bashinjwaga Akshay Thakur, Vinay Sharma, Pawan Gupta na Mukesh Singh mu 2013 nibwo bakatiwe igihano cy'urupfu. Aba bagabo bahawe iki gihano muri gereza yo mu murwa mukuru yitwa Tihar, iki gihano ni ubwa mbere gitanzwe mu Buhinde kuva mu 2015. Umukobwa bahohoteye yishwe n'ibikomere hashize iminsi afashwe ku ngufu n'abagabo batandatu icya rimwe bari mu modoka ya bisi iri kugenda. Iki gikorwa cyateye umujinya rubanda ndetse gituma Ubuhinde buvugurura amategeko ahana ibi byaha. Uyu mukobwa w'imyaka 23 wari umunyeshuri mu ishami rya physiotherapy, itangazamakuru ryamuhaye izina rya Nirbhaya - utagira ubwoba - kuko atagombaga gutangazwa umwirondoro. Abantu batandatu barafashwe nyuma y'ubu bugizi bwa nabi. Umwe muri bo, Ram Singh, basanze yapfuye ari muri gereza mu 2013, bivugwa ko yiyahuye. Undi, yari umusore w'imyaka 17 ubwo ibyo byabaga, yarekuwe mu 2015 amaze imyaka itatu afunze, igifungo kiruta ibindi mu Buhinde ku bana. Mu mezi macye ashize, aba bane basigaye bari bajuririye iki gihano bakatiwe mu rukiko rw'ikirenga basaba ko nibura bakatirwa gufungwa ubuzima bwose. Gusa uru rukiko ruruta izindi rwanze ubujurire bwabo bituma nta handi bashobora kuregera. Ubujurire bwabo bwanzwe ejo habura amasaha macye ngo banyongwe. Iminota micye nyuma y'uko bicwa kuri uyu wa gatanu mu gitondo, nyina wa Nirbhaya yagize ati: "Nahobeye ifoto y'umukobwa wanjye ndamubwira nti amaherezo tubonye ubutabera". Se yavuze ko ubu "yongeye kugirira ikizere ubutabera". Abapolisi bagenzura imodoka yabereyemo ubu bugizi bwa nabi Bagiye kwicwa, umutekano wari ucunzwe cyane hanze y'iyi gereza ahari hongerewe abapolisi n'ingabo kugira ngo bakaze umutekano. Itsinda ry'abantu bari bitwaje ibyapa bari hanze y'iyi gereza bahise batangira kugaragaza ibyishimo babwiwe ko iby'abo bagabo bane byarangiye. Bamwe baririmbaga bati "urupfu ku bafata ku ngufu" abandi bafite ibyapa bishimira ubutabera. Nirbhaya byamugendekeye bite? Uyu munyeshuri yateze imodoka rusange itari iri mu kazi ahagana saa mbili n'igice z'ijoro tariki 16/12/2012 ari kumwe n'umusore w'inshuti. Bari batashye bavuye kureba filimi hafi aho. Abagabo batandatu basanze muri iyi modoka bahise batangira kubasagarira, bakuranwa mu gusambanya ku ngufu uyu mukobwa nyuma bamukubita bikomeye n'umutarimba (Fer à béton). Umusore bari kumwe nawe yarakubiswe cyane. Nyuma babajugunye ku nzira bazi ko bapfuye. Abahisi nibo bababonye bambaye ubusa kandi buzuye amaraso, batabaza polisi. Hashize ibyumweru bibiri, mu Buhinde hadutse imyigaragambyo yamagana uburyo abagore bafatwa n'ibindi byaha nk'ibi bigikorerwa abagore n'abakobwa hamwe na hamwe. Nirbhaya ntiyarokotse kuko yazize ibikomere mu bitaro byo muri Singapore aho yari yajyaywe nyuma y'uko arembye bikomeye ari mu bitaro by'i New Delhi.

Rusesabagina azwi ku isi kubera filimi Hotel Rwanda ya Hollywood - itavugwaho rumwe, ikinnyemo inkuru y'uko yakijije abantu muri jenoside mu 1994. Mu kiganiro na France 24, Bwana Kagame yaburiye imyifatire "yageza ku ivanguraruhu" imbere y'ubucamanza bw'u Rwanda ubwo yari abajijwe niba Rusesabagina azacirwa urubanza rutabogamye. Yagize ati: "Nanjye ubwanjye ndashaka kubona urubanza rutabogamye. Kuki mutekereza ko kutabogama ari iby'i Burayi cyangwa Amerika cyangwa abandi batari twe? "Ni nkaho kugira ngo u Rwanda cyangwa Africa ntibibogame bigomba kuba bihagarikiwe n'Uburayi cyangwa Amerika cyangwa ahandi. Oya. Oya rwose." Inteko ishingamategeko y'Ubumwe bw'Uburayi yanenze uko Rusesabagina yafashwe akagezwa mu Rwanda, ndetse yavuze ko itizeye ko azabona ubucamanza butabogamye mu Rwanda. Rusesabagina - wari umukuru wungirije w'impuzamashyaka MRCD ifite umutwe wa FLN, aregwa ibyaha by'iterabwoba bishingiye ku bitero byo mu 2018 na 2019 byiciwemo abantu mu Rwanda byigambwe na FLN. Abunganizi be mu mategeko bahakanye ibyaha aregwa. We kandi avuga ko yashimuswe i Dubai akagezwa mu Rwanda mu kwezi kwa munani umwaka ushize. Ariko kuri iki Perezida Kagame, uri mu ruzinduko mu Bufaransa, yavuze ko nta kibi cyabaye mu buryo Rusesabagina yafashwe. Yabajije abanyamakuru ati: "Ikibazo kiri he mu gushuka umunyabyaha uri gushakisha?"

Wayne Rooney yasinye amasezerano y'imyaka ibiri na Everton Yagiye muri Manchester United avuye mu mugwi wamureze wa Everton ari nawo yasubiyemwo, aho hari mu 2004 aho yavuye ahembwa £ 27 000 000. Man Utd yashize ubu butumwa bwo gusezera Rooney kuri Twitter Agiye muri uwo mugwi wa Everton mu gihe nawo umaze kwemerera Romelu Lukaku kuja muri Man Utd, imutanze kuri miriyoni 75. Rooney yatanguranye na Everton afise imyaka 9 Rooney yatanguriye muri uwo mugwi wa Everyton afise imyaka icenda. Yabaye mu bakinyi ba mbere bahembwa neza bakiri bato ariko yemera kwimuka mu 2004 ahamagawe na Sir Alex Ferguson, yamwemereye umushahara ata wundi mukinyi n'umwe ari munsi y'imyaka 20 yari bwabone. Wayne Rooney yahawe amasezearano y'imyaka ibiri muri Everton.

Muri kino gihe, abasirikare ba Amerika bashika 5200 nibo babarizwa muri Iraki Abasirikare barenga 5000 ba Amerika bari muri Iraki, aho bagiye gufasha ico gihugu kurwanya umurwi wa ki isilamu, Etat Islamique. Amerika yoyo ivuga ko ari nka hamwe vyoba ngombwa ko bava muri ico gihugu ku nguvu, izoca igifatira ibihano bikomeye. Iyo nteguro yemejwe inyuma y'ijambo umushikiranganji wa mbere wa Iraki, Adel Abdul Mahdi, yashikirije inama nshingamateka, aho yasavye ko abasirikare bose mvamakungu bava mu gihugu. Iyo nteguro isaba leta guhagarika intererano yasavye amakungu ngo ayifashe kurwanya umuhari Etat Islamique. Ivuga ko "leta ya Iraki itegerezwa gukora ibishoboka vyose kugira yirukane abasirikare mvamakugungu bose, no kubabuza gukoresha ubutaka, ikirere n'amazi vy'ico gihugu ku mvo izo ari zo zose". Ihamagarira kandi leta kwitwarira Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika mw'ishirahamwe mpuzamakungu ONU "kw'ivogerwa ry'ubusugire bwa Iraki". Imbere y'uko abo bashingamateka bemeza iyo nteguro, umushikiranganji wa mbere wa Iraki yamenyesheje ko igisirikare ca Amerika gitegerezwa kuva mu gihugu vuba bwango kugira ngo itunganye gushasha ibijanye "n'imigenderanire na Amerika n'ibindi bihugu". Amerika igabisha Iraki ko izofatirwa ibihano Inyuma y'aho inama nshingamateka ya Iraki yemereje iyo nteguro, Perezida Donald Trump wa Amerika yaciye agabisha ko azofatira ico gihugu "ibihano bikomeye", mu gihe abasirikare ba Amerika bova mu gihugu ku gahato. Inyuma y'aho igisirikare ca Amerika ciciye Jenerali Qassem Soleimani wa Irani ku kibuga c'indege ca Iraki, amakungu afise ubwoba ko ibintu bishobora kuyangara Ati: "Ni mba badusaba kuva muri ico gihugu, bitabaye mu bwumvikane, tuzobafatira ibihano batari bwigere babona". Ku bwa Bwana Trump, kuba abasirikare ba Amerika bari muri Iraki vyabatwaye amamiliyaridi menshi ku buryo batovayo ku nguvu. Ati: "Ntiturota tuvayo bataturishe". Perezida Trump abandanya kandi agabisha Irani ko "izobona ayo imbwa yaboneye ku mugezi" ari nka hamwe hogira ibitero ikora ku birindiro vya Amerika mu karere k'Uburasirazuba bwo hagati mu guhora urupfu rwa Qassem Soleimani yishwe na Amerika. Urupfu rwa Qassem Soleimani rwatumye imigenderanire hagati ya Irani na Amerika iba mibi gusumba, inyuma y'aho Perezida Donald Trump yivumburiye mu masezerano ya Irani n'ibihugu vya rutura ku bijanye n'umugambi w'ico gihugu wo guhingura ibirwanisho vy'ubumara.

Umutoza wa Liverpool, Kenny Dalglish Ibyo ni ibivugwa na Mark Lawrenson wigeze gukina mu ikipe imwe na Kenny Dalglish muri za 1980. Mark Lawrenson yabwiye BBC ko adatekereza ko Kenny Dalglish ashobora kwegura cyangwa ngo yirukanwe. Bwana Lawrenson avuga ko Liverpool ishobora gutwara igikombe cya FA gutyo ikaba ifite ibikombe bibiri muri uno mwaka. Ikipe ya Liverpool yatsinze igikombe cya Carling kandi iri mu kimwe cya kabiri cy'irushanwa ry'igikombe cya FA. Nyuma yo gutsindwa na Newcastle United 2-0 ndetse n'umuzamu akerekwa ikarita itukura, Liverpool yageze ku mwanya wa 8 n'amanota 41 ku rutonde rwa shampiyona yo mu Bwongereza.

Hafi abantu 1400 bamaze kwicwa na Ebola mu gihugu gituranyi cya Repubulika ya Demokarasi ya Kongo Uyu ni we muntu wa mbere wemejwe ko yanduye Ebola muri iki gihugu, mu gihe mu gihugu gituranyi cya Repubulika ya Demokarasi ya Kongo imaze guhitana abantu hafi 1400 kuva mu kwezi kwa munani umwaka ushize. Abantu barenga 2000 bamaze gutangazwa ko banduye Ebola muri Kongo mu mezi 10 ashize ihadutse. Bivugwa ko uwo mwana w'umuhungu wo muri Uganda yari yambutse umupaka ku cyumweru ava muri Kongo ari kumwe n'abo mu muryango we. Abategetsi bavuga ko yahise ajyanwa mu bitaro muri Uganda nyuma yaho yari yagaragaje ibimenyetso birimo kuruka amaraso. Nyuma ku munsi w'ejo ku wa kabiri, ikigo cya Uganda gipima za virusi cyemeza ko koko uwo mwana w'umuhungu yanduye Ebola, mbere yuko biza gutangazwa n'abategetsi. Itangazo rihuriweho ryasohowe na minisiteri y'ubuzima muri Uganda ndetse OMS, rivuga ko impande zombi zohereje itsinda ry'ubutabazi bwihuse ngo ritahure abandi bafite ibyago byo kwandura Ebola. Mu kiganiro n'abanyamakuru ejo ku wa kabiri, Minisitiri w'ubuzima wa Uganda, Dr. Jane Ruth Aceng, yavuze ko abo mu muryango w'uwo mwana bari gukurikiranwa, barimo na babiri bagaragaza ibimenyetso bijya gusa n'ibya Ebola. Nyuma yaho, yatangaje ubutumwa ku rubuga nkoranyambaga rwa Twitter avuga ko ubu iki gihugu cyagiye "mu bihe bidasanzwe" kubera iyi ndwara. Iryo tangazo rya minisiteri y'ubuzima ya Uganda na OMS ryongeraho ko Uganda isanzwe yarakingiye Ebola abakora mu bikorwa by'ubuvuzi bagera hafi ku 4700. Ebola ni ndwara ki?

Amategeko ya Tanzania ararekurira abigisha gukubita abana atiko bigakorwa "mu gihe vyumvikana" kandi ku ntoke no ku bisusu gusa, Sperius Eradius w'imyaka 13 yapfuye inyuma y'imisi mike ahanywe n'umwigisha wiwe amwagiriza kumutwara isakoshi, nk'uko AFP ibandanya ivyandika. Mu kwerekana umubabaro, umuryango w'uwo mwana wanse kumushingura gushika uwo mwigisha abanje kwirukanwa. Ubushikiranganji bw'amagara y'abantu na bwo bwiyamirije ivyo vyashitse, buvuga ko bihonyanga amategeko agenga abana, avuga ko umwana wese ategerezwa gukingirwa, nk'uko vyandikwa n'ikinyamakuru co muri Tanzania Guardian. Umushikiranganji w'amagara y'abantu Ummy Mwalimu yavuze ko yarungitse umuganga w'umuhinga i Bukoba, mu buraruko bushira uburengero bwa Tanzania gutohoza ivyo vyashitse, nk'uko vyandikwa n'ikinyamakuru Citizen. Ishirahamwe ry'abapfasoni b'abamenyeshamakuru bo muri Tanzania ryabwiye AFP ko ivyo vyashitse ari "ubugome no guta ubuntu" banahamagarira guhagarika "ugukubitwa no kwica". Amategeko ya Tanzania ararekurira abigisha gukubita abana ariko bigakorwa "mu gihe vyumvikana" kandi ku ntoke no ku bisusu gusa, nk'uko bivugwa na AFP.

Umunye Australia yababonye avuga ko benshi mu bantu bari bahari basa n'abatari abaho. Alex Hawke yavuze ko yababajwe cane n'ivyo yabonye kuri 'beach' ya Bronte i Sydney ku musi wa Noheli. Video y'abantu benshi yashizwe ku mbuga ngurukanabumenyi yerekana urwaruka ruririmba rwongera rutamba, rurenze ku mategeko yo kugwanya coronavirus. Bamwe mu babiboneye bavuze ko benshi bari abongereza. Ingabo zidasanzwe za Australia zagirizwa kwica abasivire muri Afghanistani Uko inyoni ya gasuku yarokoye nyirayo wari ugiye guhira mu nzu Virusi ya Covid imara 'iminsi 28 itarapfa' muri 'laboratoire' Australia iri mu rugamba rwo kugwanya ico kiza giherutse kwongerekana inyuma y'amezi atari make ata muntu abonetse yanduriye mu gihugu hagati. Iyaduka bushasha bw'uwo mugera indwi imwe imbere ya Noheli ryatumye hasubira gushirwaho ayandi mategeko yo kwikingira muri ico gisagara, harimwo kubuza amakoraniro menshi mu biruhuko no kwiyugarana mu karere kamerewe nabi ka Northern Beaches. Ubu abamaze gufatwa muri iryo yongerekana ry'ico kiza bashika 129. Hawke yabwiye radio Sydney ati:"Mu gihe umuntu ageramiye umutekano w'abantu c'anke amagara, viza yiwe ishobora gufutwa ." Yavuze ko yasavye ubushikiranganji bw'intwaro yo hagati mu gihugu gukorana n'abategetsi ba New South Wales (NSW) muri iyi misi himirije umwaka mushasha kugira ngo umuntu wese azofatwa "akora ibintu bidakurikije amategeko", viza yiwe izoce isubira kwihwezwa na reta. Yavuze ko benshi mu bafise viza z'akanya gato bubahiriza amategeko y'amagara y'abantu. Igipolisi kivuga ko ata n'umwe mu bari mu musi mukuru i Bronte yaciwe amande canke ngo ahanwe. Australia yarugaye imbibe ku bantu nka bose kiretse ku benegihugu batashe canke abafise uruhusha rwo kuba muri ico gihugu n'imiryango yabo mu kwezi kwa gatatu. Mu kwezi kwa kane, reta yavuze ko hariyo abantu barenga imiliyoni zibiri bafise viza y'umwanya muto muri ico gihe.

Indi mpanuka y'ikamyo itwaye ibikomoka kuri peteroli yaguyemo abantu 220 ahitwa Sange muri Kongo mu mwaka wa 2010 Byabereye hafi y'umujyi wa Kisantu, uri hagati y'umurwa mukuru Kinshasa n'icyambu cya Matadi. Atou Matabuana, guverineri w'intara yo hagati ya Kongo, yavuze ko abagera ku 100 bagize ibikomere bitewe n'ubushye. Radio Okapi y'umuryango w'abibumbye yatangaje ko "inkongi y'umuriro yakwiragiye byihuse igakongeza inzu ziri hafi aho." Abategetsi bavuze ko abandi bantu bagera ku 100 bagize ibikomere bitewe n'ubushye kubera iyi mpanuka Imihanda yo muri Kongo akenshi usanga yararaye ikirengagizwa ntikorwe kubera imyaka myinshi iki gihugu cyamaze mu ntambara. Mu mwaka wa 2010, abantu 220 barapfuye ubwo ikamyo itwaye ibikomoka kuri peteroli yabirindukaga igaturika nuko igakongeza umuriro ku bice by'icyaro cyo muri iki gihugu. Umwe mu babibonye yabwiye ibiro ntaramakuru AFP ko yabonye "imirambo 53 yahiye irakongoka." Umuganga ukora ku bitaro biri hafi aho biri kuvura abakomeretse kubera ubushye yavuze ko bari gusiganwa n'igihe kugira ngo barebe niba barokora ubuzima bwabo. Dogiteri Trésor yagize ati: "Turimo kugerageza kubafasha, turimo kugerageza kubongerera amazi mu mubiri ariko mbabajwe no kuvuga ko hari bamwe barimo gupfa." Guverineri Matabuana yavuze ko abategetsi bo mu nzego z'ibanze "bafashe ingamba zo kwita ku bagizweho ingaruka" n'iyo mpanuka. Ariko umutwe uharanira demokarasi uzwi nka Lucha, watangaje ubutumwa ku rubuga nkoranyambaga rwa Twitter unenga uburyo ubutabazi bwakozwe, uvuga ku bucye bw'imodoka z'imbangukiragutabara. Umujyi wa Kisantu uri hafi ku birometero 120 mu majyepfo ashyira uburengerazuba bw'umurwa mukuru Kinshasa. Naho Matadi, icyambu kiri ku rundi ruhande rw'aho byabereye, iri ku nyanja ya Atlantika - kikaba ari nacyo cyambu kimwe rukumbi Kongo ifite.

Nadal yarondera gutwara intsinzi y'ihiganwa rya Wimbledon incuro zitatu zikurikirana Bitumye indoto z'uwo mukinyi wo muri Espagne zo gutsinda gatatu gatatu yikurikiranya amahiganwa French Open na Wimbledon zirangira. Muller agiye guhura na Marin Cilic mu rukino rukurikira Muller w'imyaka 34, azohura n'umunya Croatia ari mu kibanza c'indwi Marin Cilic mu gice c'ica kane. "Nti vyari vyoroshe," niko Muller yavuze, mu gihe agiye gukina mu gice c'ica kane ubwa mbere kuva mu 2008 mw'ihiganwa rya US open.

Amasezerano y'akazi hagati ya Antonio Conte na Chelsea azogeza mu 2019 Uwo mugwi watahukanye igikombe ca Premier League mu mwaka uheze, ntiwashoboye kugura abakinyi bashasha mu karyo ko kurondera abakinyi bashasha ko mu kwezi kwa mbere. Uwo mugabo w'imyaka 48 aturuka mu gihugu c'Ubutaliyano, avuga ko akwiye kuraba ingene yomenya kugondoza. "Nkwiye kuvugana n'abandi bamenyereza vyorohera kugondoza imigwi yabo igatanga amahera yo kugura abakinyi bakomeye," niko yavuze. "Nibaza ko vyantaye kuw'amazi mu kugerageza kugondoza umugwi ngo ugure abakinyi. Nibaza ko kuri ico kintu nkwiye gukora cane. "Nkwiye kwigira ku bandi bamenyereza kuri ico kintu." Mu kwezi kwa mbere Conte yamenyesheje ko anezerejwe n'ingene babanye na Chelsea, ashaka kwishura abavuga ko imigenderanire yiwe na nyen'umugwi Roman Abramovich yoba itifashe neza. Abramovich ngo yoba yashavujwe nuko Conte yavuze ko atahawe uburenganzira bwo kurondera abakinyi uno mwaka. Ariko Conte yemeza ko ashobora gukora neza n'abakinyi afise muri kino gihe. "Igikogwa canje ni kuzamura umukinyi umwumwe wese, ku mpande zose - hamwe n'ukuntu biyumvira. Kuri ivyo, ndazi ko mpagaze neza," niko yavuze.

Hari ibintu by'ingenzi biri kudushiraho - kandi nta nubwo tubizi Ushobora kuba warumvise ukuntu amazi akomeje kugenda agabanuka, ibikomoka kuri peteroli ndetse n'inzuki zikora ubuki. Ariko hari n'ibindi biri kugenda biducikaho, cyangwa tubivuze mu bundi buryo bworoshye, turi gucunga nabi bigatuma bigenda bicika. Ibi bigira ingaruka kuri buri gice cy'ubuzima bwacu. Dore bitandatu ushobora kuba utari uzi: 1. Umwanya ukikije isi Ibintu bigongana mu gice gikikije isi bishobora kwangiza iminara ducyenera ngo telefone zacu zikore Kugeza ubu muri uyu mwaka wa 2019, hari ibintu birenga 500,000 biri mu mwanya ukikije isi. Muri byo ibigera hafi ku 2,000 mu by'ukuri bifite akazi bikora - imibumbe igaragiye isi dukoresha buri munsi mu itumanaho, mu buryo bwa GPS ndetse no mu kureba ibiganiro dukunda kuri televiziyo. Ibisigaye ni ibisigazwa bivuye mu kohereza ibyogajuru mu isanzure ndetse n'ibivuye ku igongana ry'ibintu mu gice gikikije umubumbe w'isi. None ikibazo kiri hehe? Uwo mubare w'ibintu birenga 500,000 biri mu mwanya ukikije isi, ni umubare w'ibintu gusa biri kugenzurwa - kandi ibindi bishya byoherezwa buri munsi. Uko ikoranabuhanga rigenda ritera imbere, biri kugenda birushaho koroha kohereza ikintu muri uwo mwanya ukikije isi. Nubwo ibyo muri rusange ari inkuru nziza kuri twe nk'ibiremwa, nta genzura ry'umwuka wo muri ibyo bintu byose binagana hejuru y'uyu mubumbe wacu. Ndetse nta n'uburyo buhari bwo gusukura aho hantu hari ibyo bisigazwa bidakenewe, byegereye isi. Uko ibi bintu birushaho kwiyongera, ibyago byuko ibyo bisigazwa byagongana bigateza ibyago bikomeye birushaho kuba ku kigero cyo hejuru. Nubwo hari ibikorwa byo gushakira umuti iki kibazo, kuri ubu uwo muti ntawo dufite. 2. Umucanga Turi gukoresha umucanga byihuse cyane kurusha uko isi ishobora kuwusimbuza undi mushya Ushobora gutekereza ko ari ugukabya - ni gute dushobora gushirirwa n'umucanga mu gihe dufite imyaro y'inyanja n'ibiyaga ndetse n'ubutayu bwuzuye uwo mucanga? Ariko, ukuri ni uko umucanga ari cyo kintu gikomeye ('solide') gicukurwa cyane ku isi - cyo kimwe n'amabuye yo mu bwoko bwa 'gravier'. Abantu tu kuwucukura byihuse cyane kurusha uko isi, muri kamere yayo, ishobora gusimbuza uwo twacukuye, nkuko bitangazwa n'umuryango w'abibumbye (ONU). Mu gihe umara imyaka ibarirwa mu bihumbi ngo uboneke uvuye ku isuri, umucanga ukoreshwa cyane buri munsi mu bwubatsi. Ukoreshwa kandi mu buryo bwo kumutsa amazi magari hashakwa ubutaka bushya (bizwi nka 'land reclamation') no mu kuyungurura amazi, ndetse no gufatisha ibirahuri ku madirishya y'inzu, no muri za telefone zigendanwa. Mu gihe ukubura umucanga byugarije urusobe rw'ibinyabuzima, hakomeje gusabwa ko hajyaho ikigo cy'isi cyo kugenzura ukwiyongera kw'ikoreshwa ry'umucanga. 3. Umwuka wa Helium Ntabwo ari mu guhaga imipira gusa: Umwuka wa helium unakoreshwa mu bikoresho byo gucisha mu cyuma byo kwa muganga Bishobora kuba igihe kigeze ngo ujye wumva ko ukoze ikintu kidakwiye mu gihe uretse umupira wo mu munsi mukuru ugatumbagira mu kirere. Umwuka wa helium na wo ni umwuka ushobora gushiraho, uvonwa hasi mu butaka, kandi ubu hasigaye imyaka ibarirwa muri za mirongo ngo uwodufite ushireho. Ibigereranyo bimwe biteganya ko nko mu myaka nka 30 cyangwa 50 iri imbere, ari bwo ibura ryawo rizaba ritangiye kwigaragaza. Mu gihe ibyo bishobora kumvikana nkaho bizabishya iminsi mikuru y'abana gusa, umwuka wa helium ni ingenzi mu buvuzi: ukonjesha ibice ('magnets') bituma gucishwa mu cyuma bishoboka. Ibi byateje imbere uburyo bwo gupima no kuvura indwara ya kanseri, ndetse n'ibikomere byo mu bwonko n'ibyo ku ruti rw'umugongo. 4. Imineke Ushobora gutekereza ku kubaho mu gihe nta mineke izaba iriho? Ibyago byacu bitari kure bishobora gutangira kutugeraho mu ibura rya bimwe mu mvange y'imbuto! Nyinshi mu nsina z'imineke zeraho imineke igurishwa muri iki gihe, zifite ibyago byo kwibasirwa n'indwara izwi nka 'Panama disease'. Insina z'amoko anyuranye zitanga imineke ziri kwibasirwa n'indwara zikomeye, abahinzi b'insina mu karere kacu n'ubu baracyatinya indwara ya 'kirabiranya' igera mu nsina ikararika. Indwara ya 'Panama disease' nayo yibasiye insina zera ibitoki bivamo imineke benshi ku isi barya ya 'Cavendish' (iyo bamwe bita 'Gros Michel'). Ibi bituma abahinga urutoki bava ku nsina z'imineke yo muri ubu bwoko bitabira guhinga izo mu bwoko bwa kamaramasenge, nkuko zimenyerewe mu Kinyarwanda. Abashakashatsi bavuga ko bari gushaka izindi mbuto nshya zishobora guhangana n'iyo ndwara, ariko ntizibuze iyo mineke ya kamaramasenge kugumana icyanga cyayo kiryohereye. 5. Ubutaka Uba ucyeneye gusukira ibihingwa Nubwo ubutaka bwacu butazagira gutya ngo burigite giturumbuka buve ku isi, twabukoresheje nabi mu buryo buteye impungenge. Ubutaka bwo ku gice cyo hejuru cyane, ni bwo ibihingwa bikuramo byinshi mu bibitunga biba bikeneye mu mikurire yabyo. Ikigo WWF - umuryango utegamiye kuri leta uharanira kubungabunga ubuzima bwo mu gasozi - kigereranya ko uburenga kimwe cya kabiri cy'ubwo butaka bwo hejuru bwazimiye ku isi mu myaka 150 ishize. Nyamara icyo kigo kikavuga ko byafata imyaka igera kuri 500 ngo ubutaka bureshya na santimetero 2.5 bwikore - bwiremareme - mu buryo bwabwo bwa kamere. Isuri, guhinga cyane ubutaka butaruhurwa cyangwa ngo burazwe, gutema amashyamba ndetse n'ukwiyongera k'ubushyuhe ku isi, byose byibazwa ko bigira uruhare mu izimira ry'ubwo butaka, ari bwo byinshi mu bihingwa byo ku isi byera ibidutunga bishingiraho. 6. Ikinyabutabire cya Phosphorus Ushobora no kunanirwa kurasa umwambi wo mu kibiriti mu gihe kitari kure kiri imbere, mu gihe iki kinyabutabire - kiri mu ngano ishobora gushiraho - cyaba kitakiriho Ntabwo ushobora guhita wiyumvisha ukuntu ikinyabutabire cya phosphorous (phosphore) kigaruka kenshi mu buzima bwacu bwa buri munsi. Ariko ntabwo tugikeneye gusa kubera imiterere y'ingirabuzima-fatizo (DNA) za muntu, ahubwo kinagize igice cy'ingenzi cy'ifumbire ikoreshwa mu buhinzi kuri ubu idafite ikintu kindi kizwi cyayisimbura.
