Aho gusubira mu butaka kiba cyavuyemo - kikaba cyabusubiramo kinyuze mu bimera no mu myanda y'inyamaswa. Ubu akenshi ikinyabutabire cya phosphorus gitemberera mu mijyi kinyuze mu bihingwa, bikarangira gikumunzuriwe mu nyanja hamwe n'indi myanda kinyuze mu buryo bwo kumena imyanda bwo mu mijyi dutuyemo. Mu gihe ibintu bikomeje kwiyongera nkuko bimeze kuri ubu, hagereranywa ko aho dukura iki kinyabutabire cya phosphorus kuri ubu hazamara imyaka iri hagati ya 35 na 400 - nyuma y'icyo gihe tukazisanga dushonje. Iyi nkuru yegeranyijwe ivuye mu kiganiro cya BBC radio 4 (yumvikana mu Bwongereza)

Umuzingo w'indirimbo uheruka w'umuraperi XXXTentacion watangiye uri ku isonga kuri Billboard 200 chart Yamamaye vuba nyuma yo gusohora imizingo ibiri y'indirimbo yakunzwe cyane. Yarashwe ku wa mbere ubwo yavaga ahacururizwa imodoka mu majyepfo ya Florida, nuko ucyekwa witwaje intwaro agahita amurasa. Polisi ikorera mu gice cya Broward yavuze ko XXXTentacion - ubundi witwa Jahseh Onfroy ku mazina ye y'ukuri atari ay'ubuhanzi - yahise ajyanwa ku bitaro aho yaje gupfira. Akenshi yafatwaga nk'umwe mu baraperi batavugwaho rumwe cyane ndetse yashinjwaga ibirego by'ihohotera rikorerwa mu rugo. Bamwe mu bakora mu nzego z'ubutabazi bwihuse bafotowe bari hafi y'imodoka y'umuraperi XXXTentacion nyuma yo kuraswa Uyu muraperi watangiye kumenyekana ubwo yashyiraga indirimbo ku rubuga rwa interineti rwa SoundCloud, yari yarashimwe nk'impano ikomeye mu muziki. Nyuma y'urupfu rwe, ubutumwa bw'akababaro bukomeje kwisukiranya butanzwe n'inkomarume mu muziki w'injyana ya hip-hop. Ubuyobozi bwo mu gice yarasiwemo bwavuze ko Onfroy yavaga ahacururizwa imodoka mbere gato ya saa kumi z'umugoroba ubwo abantu babiri bacyekwa bitwaje intwaro bamwegeraga. Nibura umwe muri bo yamurashe mbere yuko bombi bahunga bava aho ibyo byabereye mu gace ka Deerfield Beach kari ku birometero 69 mu majyaruguru ya Miami, bari mu modoka yijimye ihenze yo mu bwoko bwa SUV. Abakora iperereza bavuze ko bigaragara ko bishoboka ko bwari ubujura. Videwo yashyizwe ku mbuga nkoranyambaga igaragara nk'iyerekana Onfroy yicaye yegamye mu modoka ye. Uwabonye uko byagenze yabwiye urubuga TMZ rwandika ku makuru y'ibyamamare ko amasasu menshi yumvikaniye hanze y'inzu icururizwamo imodoka. XXXTentacion yitabiriye ibihembo bya BET Hip Hop umwaka ushize Mu ndirimbo zakunzwe cyane z'uyu muraperi harimwo SAD! na Moonlight, zahise zimenyekana cyane nyuma y'umuzingo w'indirimbo we wa mbere yasohoye mu kwezi kwa munani k'umwaka ushize. Umuzingo we w'indirimbo uheruka watangiye uri ku isonga kuri Billboard 200 chart mu kwezi kwa gatatu. Uwo muzingo w'indirimbo wumviswe ku rubuga rwa interineti inshuro zigera kuri miliyoni zibarirwa mu magana. Uwo muzingo w'indirimbo wavugaga ku ngingo zirimo agahinda gakabije ndetse yashimwe cyane na bamwe mu baraperi bakomeye. Uyu muraperi yagize ibibazo bikomeye mu gukura kwe XXXTentacion yahuye n'ibibazo bikomeye mu gukura kwe, aza no kwirukanwa mu cyiciro rusange cy'amashuri yisumbuye kubera kurwana. Ariko yahise ashyira imbaraga ze n'uburakari mu muziki. Ubutumwa bw'akababaro bwahise bwisukiranya ku mbuga nkoranyambaga. Mu bagize ibyo batangaza harimo Kanye West. Abinyujije kuri Twitter, yagize ati: "Ukiriho sinigeze nkubwira ukuntu nakwigiragaho". Naho umukinnyi w'umupira w'amaguru Daniel Sturridge, wakiniye Liverpool n'ikipe y'igihugu y'Ubwongereza, we yagize ati: "Ni umunsi w'agahinda ku muziki".

Yoshihide Suga yavutse ku babyeyi b'abahinzi b'inkeri (strawberry/fraise) Mu kwezi gushize, Bwana Abe yatangaje ko yeguye ku mwanya wa minisitiri w'intebe kubera uburwayi bwo mu mara. Bwana Suga w'imyaka 71, asanzwe ari umunyamabanga mukuru wa leta iriho ubu, kandi benshi biteze ko ari we uzatsindira kuba minisitiri w'intebe. Afatwa nka soma mbike wa Bwana Abe ndetse byitezwe ko yakomeza gahunda ze mu gihe yaba atowe. Bwana Suga yatsinze n'ubwiganze bw'amajwi ayo matora yo kuyobora ishyaka Liberal Democratic Party (LDP), abona amajwi 377 ku badepite n'abarihagarariye mu turere 534 batoye. Kuri ubu, ubwo ishyaka LDP ryamaze guhitamo umuyobozi waryo mushya, ku wa gatatu w'iki cyumweru hazaba andi matora mu nteko ishingamategeko, aho bisa nk'ibizwi neza ko azagirwa minisitiri w'intebe kubera ubwiganze bw'iri shyaka mu nteko. Akomerezaho kuri manda yari igeze muri kimwe cya kabiri cy'uwo yaba asimbuye, byitezwe ko Bwana Suga asoza igihe cyari gisigaye kuri iyi manda, kugeza habaye amatora mu kwezi kwa cyenda mu 2021. Yoshihide Suga ni muntu ki? Bwana Suga, umunyapolitike w'inararibonye, yavutse ku babyeyi b'abahinzi b'inkeri (strawberry/fraise). Kubera uruhare rwe rw'ingenzi ku butegetsi buriho aho yari asanzwe ari umunyamabanga mukuru wa leta, byitezwe ko azakomeza gahunda za leta zari zisanzweho, akayobora inzibacyuho (imfatakibanza) kugeza habaye amatora yo mu 2021. Koichi Nakano, wigisha siyansi ya politike akaba anakuriye iryo shami kuri Kaminuza ya Sophia iri mu murwa mukuru Tokyo, yabwiye BBC ati: "Shinzo Abe n'abandi bakuru mu ishyaka bahisemo Bwana Suga kubera ko ari we ugaragaza cyane 'gukomeza' ibyagezweho, umuntu batekereza ko yakomeza ibya leta ya Abe kandi Abe atayirimo". Nubwo adafatwa nk'urusha abandi umuhate no gukunda politike, Bwana Suga azwiho gutanga umusaruro cyane no gushyira mu ngiro gahunda. Bimwe mu birori bikomeye aheruka kugaragaramo, ni mu 2019 habaho kuva ku ngoma y'umwami w'abami (empereur) Akihito hajyaho ingoma y'uriho ubu Naruhito. Bwana Suga ni we watangarije Abayapani n'amahanga izina ry'ingoma nshya rya Reiwa. Nyuma yaho gato yatangiye guhabwa izina ry'akabyiniriro (ry'iritazirano) rya "Uncle Reiwa" Ni bande bandi bari biyamamaje? Abandi bagabo babiri bari bagerageje amahirwe yabo ku mwanya w'ubuyobozi bw'ishyaka LDP. Fumio Kishida wigeze kuba Minisitiri w'ububanyi n'amahanga ku butegetsi bwa Shinzo Abe, ariko wari umaze imyaka itatu ari umukuru w'akanama k'ubushakashatsi kuri gahunda z'iri shyaka. Umugereranyije na Bwana Suga, uyu mugabo w'imyaka 63 amurusha kumenyera gukorana n'ibihugu by'amahanga ariko ntabwo yari ashyigikiwe na minisitiri w'intebe weguye. Uwa gatatu na we wari wagerageje amahirwe ye ni Shigeru Ishiba, wahoze ari umunyamabanga mukuru w'ishyaka LDP ndetse wigeze kuba minisitiri w'ingabo muri guverinoma yabanje ya Abe. Shigeru Ishiba (ibumoso), Yoshihide Suga (hagati) na Fumio Kishida Muri abo batatu bose bahatanaga, Bwana Ishiba, na we ufite imyaka 63, ni we wagerageje kurusha abandi kwitandukanya cyane na gahunda za minisitiri w'intebe weguye ndetse yizeraga ko yari gutangira bundi bushya nyuma y'ubutegetsi bwa Bwana Abe. Nubwo yaba we, yaba na Bwana Kishida nta n'umwe muri bo wafatwaga nk'ufite amahirwe nyayo yo gutsinda Bwana Suga, kwiyamamaza kwabo gushobora kuba kwabashyize mu mwanya mwiza mu matora rusange yo mu 2021 ubwo iyi manda izaba irangiye.

Ababarirwa mu magana barishwe ubwo abashinzwe umutekano batatanyaga abigaragambirizaga ahitwa Rabaa al-Adawiya mu murwa mukuru Cairo mu mwaka wa 2013 Urukiko rwakatiye 75 muri bo igihano cy'urupfu mu gihe abandi 47 bakatiwe gufungwa burundu, barimo n'abayobozi bo mu idini ya isilamu. Umuryango uharanira uburenganzira bwa muntu Amnesty International, wavuze ko uru rubanza "mu buryo bugaragara rwaranzwe no kudashyira mu gaciro" kandi rukaba runyuranya n'itegeko-nshinga rya Misiri. Abantu babarirwa mu magana barishwe ubwo abashinzwe umutekano batatanyaga abigaragambirizaga ahitwa Rabaa al-Adawiya mu murwa mukuru Cairo mu mwaka wa 2013. Mu ntangiriro y'uyu mwaka, inteko ishingamategeko ya Misiri yahaye ubudahangarwa abasirikare bagize uruhare mu bikorwa byaguyemo abantu byabaye hagati y'ukwezi kwa karindwi kwa 2013 n'ukwezi kwa mbere kwa 2016. Abo bakatiwe mu rubanza rw'ikivunge bashinjwaga ibyaha bifitanye isano n'umutekano birimo gushishirakiza abandi ibikorwa by'urugomo, kwica no gukora imyigaragambyo itemewe n'amategeko. Iki gihano cy'urupfu ku bantu 75 cyari cyatanzwe mu kwezi kwa karindwi, kandi kwemezwa kwacyo kuri uyu wa gatandatu ndetse n'ibindi bihano, byabaye indunduro y'uru rubanza rw'ikivunge.

Umupaka wa Kamembe na Bukavu umaze amezi 8 ufunze uretse ku modoka zitwara ibicuruzwa hagati y'ibihugu Imipaka yo ku butaka hagati y'u Rwanda n'ibihugu birukikije iracyafunze kuri rubanda kuva mu kwezi kwa gatatu, kubera icyorezo cya coronavirus. Kemembe - Bukavu ni umwe mu mipaka inyuraho abantu benshi buri munsi, cyane cyane abambuka bajya gushaka akazi muri Congo, aho bavuga ko haboneka imirimo kurusha hano iwabo. U Rwanda na DR Congo baherutse kumvikana gufungurira umupaka ku bantu bacye bambuka bajyanywe n'impamvu zihariye, kandi bapimwe Covid-19. Kuva mu kwezi kwa gatatu, mu Rwanda hamaze gutangazwa abantu 5,192 banduye coronavirus, ministeri y'ubuzima ivuga ko ubu abakiyirwaye ari 217. Nsengiyumva Deo ukora ibyo gusana amazi n'amashanyarazi, avuga ko buri gitondo ku mupaka yahahuriraga nibura n'abantu 500 bari ku mirongo bambuka bajya i Bukavu. Ati: "[Abambuka] ni benshi cyane, jyewe najyaga ndeba nkibaza nti ni ikibazo. Twagendaga tukirirwa yo duhaha, tugataha nimugoroba." Nyuma y'amezi umunani uyu mupaka ufunze ati: "Ubuzima bwarahagaze kuko uriya mupaka niwo wari udutunze, twajyaga hakurya tugakorera amafaranga tukaza tukiteza imbere." Yemeza ko benshi mu bo azi nta mfashanyo ya leta babonye muri ibi bihe bikomeye barimo. Ati: "Ahubwo amadeni dufite niyo menshi, yenda usaba ikiro cy'isukari [cyangwa] agaceri kugira ngo ubone uko abana baramuka...turi mu buzima bugoye." Uwamahoro Olive avuga ko buri munsi yambukaga umupaka agiye i Bukavu gushaka ibiraka byo gukora ubusitani. Ati: "Mpakoze nk'imyaka umunani, iyo nabonaga ikiraka cya jardin nabonaga byibura amadorari $80 avunja 67,000Frw, gufunga umupaka byarampungabanyije kuko sinkibona aho nyakorera." 'Nta ujyayo ngo atahire aho' Aka gace k'umupaka ubusanzwe gahoraho urujya n'uruza rw'ibintu n'abantu bambuka Mu mujyi wa Bukavu bishyurwa mu madorari ya Amerika, ifaranga rihakoreshwa cyane, rigira iyo batashye hakuno mu Rwanda kuko rimwe rikubye inshuri 1,000 iryo ifaranga ry'u Rwanda. Undi ukora akazi ko kubaka wo mu mujyi wa Kamembe ati: "Muri Congo akazi kaba gahari ari kenshi, hari nubwo baguhamagara uri mu rugo ngo ngwino tuguhe akazi, haba hari akazi kenshi gatandukanye ntiwajyayo ngo utahire aho." Mu ntangiriro z'iki cyumweru ukuriye intara y'iburengerazuba mu Rwanda, n'ukuriye intara ya Kivu ya ruguru muri Congo bumvikanye gufungura umupaka wa Goma muri Congo na Gisenyi mu Rwanda. Ibi ariko ni ku baturage bakora imirimo ya ngombwa nk'abarimu, abanyeshuri, abaganga n'abacuruzi bari mu matsinda. Aba nabo kwambuka si ibya buri munsi, kandi buri wese aripimisha ku kiguzi cye Covid-19 kugira ngo yemererwe kwambuka. Ku baturage ba nyakabyizi bo ku Gisenyi cyangwa i Kamembe, nubwo batarwaye Coronavirus cyangwa ngo ibice ari benshi, iracyakomeje kubicisha inzara n'ingorane.

Abantu bagera ku 137 bimaze kumenyekana ko bapfuye naho abagera ku 5,000 barakomeka. Amashusho y'icyogajuru arerekana ibyangiritse aho wagirango ni intambara ikomeye yahabereye aho kuba ari impanuka. Interactive See how warehouses in Beirut's port area were devastated by blast 5 August 2020 9 June 2020 Ubwato bwitwa Orient Queen bwari buhagaze ku cyambu cya Beirut muri metero zibarirwa muri magana uvuye kuri iriya nzu yaturitse, bwarangiritse ndetse burabirinduka. Umwe mu bari babutwaye yarapfuye undi n'ubu ntaraboneka, nk'uko bivugwa na kompanyi ikoresha ubu bwato. Ibiro by'iyi kompanyi kuri iki cyambu byahindutse umuyonga kubera guturika. Inzu z'ubuhunikiro bw'imyaka (grain silos) - zabonekaga nk'inzu nini y'umweru kuri iki cyambu - zazahajwe cyane n'uku guturika. Genevieve Langdon, umwarimu wigisha isomo rya 'Blast and Impact Engineering' kuri kaminuza ya Sheffield mu Bwongereza, avuga ko imyaka (ibiribwa) yari ihunitse muri iyo nzu yashoboraga kugabanya ubukana bwo guturika. Ati: "Mu gihe guturika kwageraga ku rukuta rw'iyi nzu, birashoboka ko yafashe igice kinini cy'imbaraga. Iyo hataba iyi nzu tubona ko ibyangiritse hirya y'iyi nzu byari kuba bibi kurushaho." Ibigo bifasha, bivuga ko abantu bagera ku 300,000 basigaye ntaho kuba bafite kubera iyi mpanuka ndetse ko hari ubwoba bw'ubuke bw'ibiribwa n'imiti. Mego Terzian ukuriya umuryango w'abaganga batagira umupaka (MSF) avuga ko inzu zo kubika ibintu zarimo imiti n'inkingo kuri iki cyambu zangiritse, ndetse n'ikigo cy'igihugu cy'imashini zikura imyanda mu maraso (dialysis) cyangiritse burundu. Ishusho ya nyuma y'uku guturika, Bwana Terzina ayigereranya na nyuma y'intambara yabaye muri Liban hagati ya 1970 na 1990. Yabwiye AFP ati: "Twabaye mu bihe bikomeye gutya mu ntambara ya Liban" Interactive See how the blast ripped apart portside warehouses 5 August 2020 November 2018 Nyuma yo kwangirika kw'icyambu cya Beirut, ubucuruzi bwifashishije ibyambu bwa Liban ubu burimukira mu mujyi wa kabiri w'iki gihugu, Tripoli, kugira ngo igihugu kigerweho n'imiti, ibiribwa n'ibindi by'ibanze. Ibihugu bya Qatar, Kuwait na Jordan biravugwa ko biri kohereza ubufasha bwihuse mu buvuzi. Agace k'ubucuruzi, amazu y'uburiro hagati mu mujyi wa Beirut, mu burengerazuba bw'ahabereye guturika, naho ntihorohewe. Ibirahuri by'amadirishya n'inzugi byashwanyujwe n'uku guturika. Guverineri w'uyu mujyi Marwan Abboud, yavuze ko gusana ibyangiritse byose bishobora gutwara za miliyari z'amadorari. Ibindi ku guturika i Beirut Mu minsi micye yari ishize, abasengera ku musigiti wa Mohammad al-Amin, bariho bishimira umunsi mukuru wa Idi/Eid, ubu batangiye gusukura ibyangiritse mu musigiti wabo kubera uku guturika. Gusukura kandi byaratangiye muri kiriziya ya mutagatifu Joriji. .

Papa Francis yahagaritse kujya mu mwiherero ujyanye n'iki gihe cy'Igisibo, bwa mbere kuva yaba Papa Papa Francis w'imyaka 83 y'amavuko, yahagaritse kujya mu mwiherero ujyanye n'iki gihe cy'Igisibo, bwa mbere kuva yaba Papa, kubera kurwara ibicurane. Mu cyumweru gishize yanahagaritse byinshi mu bikorwa yari kwakiramo abantu. Ubutaliyani ni cyo gihugu cyibasiwe cyane na coronavirus i Burayi, abagera ku 1,835 bakaba barayanduye naho abandi 52 irabica.

Luis Suarez yirutse asiga abakinnyi ba Real Valladolid yinjiza igitego cye cya 21 muri La Liga cyo muri uyu mwaka wa mbere akiniye Atletico Madrid Iyi kipe y'umutoza Diego Simeone, ku munota wa 18 yari yabanjwe igitego na rutahizamu Oscar Plano wa Real Valladolid. Ariko yaje guhindura umukino mu gice cya kabiri ku gitego cya Angel Correa ku munota wa 57 n'icya Suarez cy'intsinzi cyo ku munota wa 67. Nubwo Real Madrid yatsinze Villarreal ibitego 2-1, ntabwo yashoboye kwegukana icyo gikombe kuko byasabaga ko Atletico itakaza amanota. Umunya-Uruguay Suarez, w'imyaka 34, yatangiye uyu mwaka w'imikino abwirwa n'umutoza Ronald Koeman wa Barça ko atari muri gahunda ze muri uyu mwaka, ariko yaje gutsinda ibitego 21 muri shampiyona - birimo n'icyahesheje Atletico igikombe. Nyuma y'umukino, Suarez wari uri mu marira y'ibyishimo yagize ati: "Nshimishijwe n'ukuntu Atletico yampaye agaciro ikampa amahirwe yo gukomeza kwerekana ko nshoboye gukina kuri uru rwego. Ndayishimiye kubera kungirira icyizere". "Hari abantu benshi twagiriye ibibazo hamwe, umugore wanjye, abana banjye". "Maze imyaka myinshi nkina umupira w'amaguru gusa uyu ni wo mwaka umuryango wanjye wababayemo cyane. Ndumva niyumva mu buryo butangaje kubera ko nigaragaje ku munsi wa nyuma w'umwaka w'imikino". Iki kibaye igikombe cya 11 cya shampiyona Atletico Madrid yegukanye Atletico yegukanye igikombe cya mbere cya shampiyona mu myaka irindwi ishize - kikaba n'icya 11 yegukanye muri rusange. Isoje ifite amanota 86, irusha amanota abiri Real Madrid yegukanye icyo mu mwaka ushize, iyi ikaba isoje uyu mwaka nta gikombe yegukanye. Barcelona - yakinaga idafite rutahizamu Lionel Messi wari uri mu kihuruko yitegura imikino y'igikombe cya Copa America ihuza ibihugu byo muri Amerika y'epfo - yagiye ku kibuga cya Eibar iyihatsindira igitego 1-0, cyinjijwe na Antoine Griezmann, bituma isoza shampiyona ku mwanya wa gatatu, imbere ya Sevilla. Sevilla, y'umutoza Julen Lopetegui, irakina umukino wayo wa nyuma wa shampiyona kuri iki cyumweru ikina na Alaves. Ariko inawutsinze ni ho ha handi yaguma ku mwanya wa kane kubera ko mu mikino yayihuje na Barça, iyi Barça ni yo yatsinze myinshi. Hanze y'ikibuga Jose Zorrilla i Valladolid, abafana ba Atletico Madrid bishimiye ko ikipe yabo yegukanye igikombe cya shampiyona

Tariki 12 z'uku kwezi nibwo aheruka kuboneka mu makuru agenzura indege z'intambara Bwana Pompeo yavuze ko bafite impungenge ko icyo gihugu gishobora kuba kibasiwe na coronavirus cyangwa n'icyorezo cy'inzara. Bwana Kim w'imyaka 36, aheruka kuboneka mu ruhame tariki 12 z'uku kwezi, byatumye hakwira amakuru ko ashobora kuba arembye. Mu cyumweru gishize ariko abategetsi muri Korea y'Epfo bavuze ko ibivugwa atari ukuri. Hari amakuru ko uyu mutegetsi w'ikirenga wa Korea ya ruguru yaba yaragiye kwibera mu ihoteli iri kunyanja ahitwa Wonsan kugira ngo yirinde kuba yakwandura coronavirus. Igihugu cya Korea ya ruguru cyafunze imipaka yacyo mu mpera z'ukwezi kwa mbere kubera iki cyorezo. Mike Pompeo yavuze iki? Ejo kuwa gatatu yabajijwe na Fox News kugira icyo avuga ku bivugwa ku buzima bwa Bwana Kim, Bwana Pompeo yagize ati: "Ntiduheruka kumubona. Nta makuru tubifiteho ubu, turi kubikurikirana cyane". "Hari impungenge ko hashobora kuba hariyo inzara, ibura ry'ibiribwa, no muri Korea ya ruguru". Avuga ko bari gukurikirana ibyo byose kuko bafite umugambi wo guca intwaro za kirimbuzi muri Korea ya ruguru. Mu myaka ya 1990, icyorezo cy'inzara bivugwa ko cyahitanye abantu ibihumbi amagana muri Korea ya ruguru. Kuwa mbere, Perezida Donald Trump yavuze ko afite "igitekerezo cyiza cyane" ku buzima bwa Bwana Kim, ariko ko "atakivuga". Yagize ati: "Icyo mwifuriza gusa ni ibyiza". Kuva mu 2018, Bwana Trump yabonanye na Bwana Kim inshuro eshatu, gusa umugambi wo guca intwaro kirimbuzi muri Korea ya ruguru ubu warasinziriye hashize amezi. Ibihuha ku buzima bwe byahereye he? Kim Jong-un aherutse kubura mu isabukuru ya sekuru, tariki 15/04. Uyu ni umwe mu minsi ikomeye mu mwaka, ni ivuka ry'uwashinze iki gihugu. Bwana Kim nta na rimwe yari yasiba uyu munsi mukuru, bisa n'aho atapfa kuwuburamo gusa nta mpamvu. Kuva ubwo, kubura kwe byahise bikwiza ibihuha, nta kuri nyako kuramenyekana ku bivugwa. Ubwo aheruka kuboneka tariki 12/04 yariho agenzura indege z'intambara mu mashusho bitazwi neza igihe yafatiwe. Yabonetse ameze neza bisanzwe. Mbere yari yayoboye inama ya politiki ikomeye nk'uko itangazamakuru rya leta ribivuga. Gusa kuva ubwo ntiyongeye kuboneka.

OIF iyoborwa n'Umunyarwanda Louise Mushikiwabo OIF yiyongereye ku yindi miryango imaze guhagarika Mali, nyuma yuko mu cyumweru gishize agatsiko k'abasirikare gahiritse ubutegetsi bwa Ibrahim Boubacar Keïta. Francophonie ifashe iki cyemezo hashize iminsi intumwa z'umuryango w'ubukungu w'ibihugu byo mu burengerazuba bw'Afurika (CEDEAO/ECOWAS) - na wo wahagaritse Mali - zinaniwe kugirana amasezerano n'ako gatsiko ka gisirikare mu biganiro bagiranaga. Abayoboye ihirikwa ry'ubutegetsi muri Mali bavuze ko badashishikajwe no kuguma ku butegetsi kandi ko bazakoresha amatora "mu gihe gikwiye". Nyuma, aka gatsiko k'abasirikare kavuze ko gacyeneye inzibacyuho y'imyaka itatu yategekwa n'umusirikare. Ubusabe bw'abakuru b'ibihugu muri Afurika bwuko Bwana Keïta yasubizwa ku butegetsi, ubu bwataye agaciro kuko nawe yaje kuvuga ko atagishaka kuba perezida. OIF - iyoborwa n'Umunyarwanda Louise Mushikiwabo - yatangaje ko mu minsi iri imbere izohereza intumwa zayo muri Mali.

Umwamikazi w'Ubwongereza, Perezida Donald Trump wa Amerika n'abandi bayobozi b'ibihugu bitabiriye mihango uyu munsi yabereye ahitwa Portsmouth mu Bwongereza. Iki gitero cyo mu kwezi kwa gatandatu mu 1944 cyagenze gite? Ingabo z'Ubwongereza, Amerika, Canada n'Ubufaransa zateye iz'Ubudage zari zikambitse muri Normandy mu majyaruguru y'Ubufaransa tariki 06 z'ukwezi kwa gatandatu mu 1944. Nicyo cyari igitero cya mbere kinini cyane cy'abarwanira mu mazi, mu kirere no ku butaka cyari gihuje izi ngabo z'ibihugu zifatanyije ngo zibohoze amajyaruguru y'uburengerazuba bw'uburayi yari yarafashwe n'ingabo z'abanazi ba Hitler. Iki gitero cyohereje ingabo zirenga ibihumbi ijana ku myaro itanu ya Normandy mu majyaruguru y'Ubufaransa. Ni igitero cyateguwe mu gihe cy'umwaka, cyagombaga kuba ku itariki nk'iyi ya gatanu z'ukwa gatandatu bizeye ko inyanja izaba ituje n'ukwezi kwazoye mu ijoro ariko haba imiraba n'umwijima bituma gikererezwaho amasaha 24 kiba tariki ya gatandatu. Uwo munsi byagenze bite? Indege zururukije ingabo zimwe inyuma y'ibirindiro by'umwanzi mu gihe amato ibihumbi nayo yariho asuka abasirikare ku myaro y'inyanja muri Normandy ngo rwambikane. Nubwo ingabo z'abadage zari ziteze iki gitero ntizatekerezaga ko kizaba kingana gutyo. Zahanganye n'amato yazanaga ingabo ku myaro itanu, ingabo za Amerika nizo zatakaje benshi mu mirwano yo kururutsa ingabo ku mwaro witwa Omaha. Nyuma y'imirwano n'ingabo z'abadage zababuzaga kugera ku mwaro uyu munsi warangiye ingabo z'ibi bihugu byishyize hamwe zibashije kugera neza ku butaka no gukomeza imbere mu gihugu. Ku myaro itanu ya Normandy hageze amato arenga 7,000 yazanye abasirikare bagera ku 156,000 b'ibi bihugu byishyize hamwe ndetse n'imodoka 10,000. Kugeza izi ngabo n'ibikoresho kuri iyi myaro ntibyari gushoboka hatari indege z'intambara n'amato abasha kurasa byarushanga imbaraga abadage. Kuri uyu munsi gusa abasirikare bagera ku 4,400 bo mu ngabo zishyize hamwe bahasize ubuzima, naho abagera ku 9,000 barakomereka abandi barabura. Ibihumbi byinshi by'abaturage b'Ubufaransa nabo barapfuye cyane cyane kubera ibisasu biremereye byaraswaga n'indege n'amato by'ingabo zishyize hamwe. Byagenze bite nyuma y'uyu munsi? Nubwo bari bamaze kwinjira mu Bufaransa iki gitero kinini cyane cyari gifite ibyago byo gusubizwa inyuma mu nyanja n'abadage mu gihe kidahise kitegura imirwano vuba vuba. Nicyo bakoze, bagiye bicamo ibice vuba begeranya imbaraga zabo mbere y'uko ingabo z'Ubudage zo zisuganya ngo zihangane n'igitero kingaga gutya batari biteze. Byagoye ingabo zishyize hamwe gufata imijyi inyuranye yo mu gace ka Normandy yari ifite imihanda mibi cyane kandi mito. Ariko kubera ubwinshi bwabo, ugereranyije n'abo barwanaga, bari no gufashwa n'ibitero by'indege zabo nyinshi babashije gutsinda abanazi - nubwo bahatakarije cyane. Izi ngabo z'ibihugu byishyize hamwe zakomeje kandi kugenda zongerwa mu Bufaransa. Byageze mu mpera z'ukwezi kwa munani mu 1944 ubwo umujyi wa Paris wafatwaga 10% by'abasirikare miliyoni ebyiri b'ibihugu byishyize hamwe boherejwe mu Bufaransa barishwe, barakomeretse cyangwa baraburiwe irengero. Nyuma yo kubona imbaraga zo kwishyira hamwe, hashize imyaka itatu (1947) Ubwongereza n'Ubufaransa byasinye amasezerano yo gutabarana mu gihe Ubudage bwatera kimwe muri byo. Aya masezerano yaje kwaguka ajyamo Amerika n'ibindi bihugu ubu bimaze kuba 29 (n'Ubudage bwaje kuyajyamo) avamo 'umuryango wo gutabarana w'ibihugu by'uburayi n'amerika' uzwi nka OTAN cyangwa NATO.

Abaganga batangiye imyigaragambyo mu kwezi gushize. Ibi rero byatumye imyigaragambyo bamazemo ukwezi kose ikomeza. Ishyirahamwe ry'abaganga riravuga ko iyo nyongera bayanze kubera ko itari ikwiriye rubanda ngo kubera ko batari mu myigaragambyo kubera inyungu zabo gusa. Abaganga baravuga ko bashaka ko bagira amategeko meza abagenga ariko na none bagashaka ko amavuriro ahabwa imiti n'ibikoresho bihagije. Barashaka kandi ko leta iha akazi abandi baganga kandi ikagena ingengo y'imari yo kubahugura no gukora ubushakashatsi. Abaganga bo muri Kenya batangiye imyigaragambyo mu kwezi gushize basaba ko amasezerano bumvikanye na leta mu mwaka wa 2013 yo kuzamura imishahara yabo inshuro 300 ku ijana ashyirwa mu bikorwa. Leta iravuga ko idafite ubushobozi bwo kubona ayo mafaranga ariko hari ibindi yabemereye. Mu ibyo bemerewe bishya harimo kongera umuganga uhembwa make amadolari 600 ku kwezi maze umushahara we ukagera ku madolari 2,000 ku kwezi. Kubera iyo myigaragambyo, ubuvuzi kabuhariwe nko kubaga byarahagaze mu mavuriro menshi ya leta. Ariko abandi bakozi mu buzima, nk'abaforomo n'abafata ibimo baracyavura. Abaganga binzobere bitabazwa mu ndwara zikomeye nibo bavura abarwayi mu mavururo yabo bwite.

Umunyamategeko wa Bwana Trump yavuze ko ibikorwa byo gushaka guhamya icyaha umukiliya we ari "urubanza rwa baringa" Ubwiganze bw'abasenateri - 57 kuri 43 batabishyigikiye, barimo abarepubulikani barindwi bo mu ishyaka rye - batoye bahamya icyaha Bwana Trump, haburaho amajwi 10 kuri 67 yari acyenewe ngo ahamwe n'icyaha. Nyuma yo kugirwa umwere, Bwana Trump yasohoye itangazo yamagana urubanza yavuze ko ari "ukwibasira umuntu kwa mbere gukomeye kubayeho mu mateka" y'Amerika. Ubu bwari ubwa kabiri habaye urubanza rwo kweguza Bwana Trump. Iyo icyo cyaha kiza kumuhama, sena yashoboraga gutora imubuza kuzongera kwiyamamariza kuba perezida ukundi. Nyuma y'ayo matora, umurepubulikani ukuriye abandi muri sena, Senateri Mitch McConnell, yavuze ko Bwana Trump "yagize uruhare" mu iterwa ry'inyubako ya Capitol, avuga ko ari "ukurenga ku nshingano mu buryo buteye isoni cyane". Mbere yaho kuri uwo wa gatandatu, yatoye atamuhamya icyaha, avuga ko ubu binyuranyije n'itegekonshinga kuko Bwana Trump atakiri Perezida. Bwana McConnell yagize uruhare mu gutinza urubanza rwa Bwana Trump ngo rube nyuma yo kuva ku butegetsi kwe, ku itariki ya 20 y'ukwezi kwa mbere. Ariko, Bwana McConnell yaburiye Bwana Trump ko bigishoboka ko yabiryozwa mu rukiko. Yagize ati: "Nta kintu na kimwe yari bwikuremo kugeza ubu. Dufite urwego rw'ubucamanza mpanabyaha muri iki gihugu, dufite uburyo bwo gucyemura ibibazo by'abaturage mu nkiko kandi abahoze ari ba perezida nta budahangarwa bafite bwo kuba babiryozwa hamwe cyangwa ahandi".

Isabel Dos Santos w'imyaka 46 Forbes ivuga ko ari we mugore ukize kurusha abandi muri Africa Isabel dos Santos yagiye abona amasezerano y'inyungu z'umurengera arimo ubutaka, petrol, diyama n'iby'itumanaho mu gihe se yari perezida wa Angola, igihugu gikungahaye ku mutungo kamere. Izi nyandiko zerekana uburyo we n'umugabo we bemerewe kugura ibintu by'agaciro bya leta inshuro nyinshi mu masezerano akemangwa. Madamu Dos Santos avuga ko ibimuvugwaho byose ari ibinyoma bifite impamvu za politiki kandi bikorwa na guverinoma ya Angola. Uyu mukobwa mukuru w'uwari Perezida Dos Santos, ubu atuye mu Bwongereza ndetse afite ibintu byinshi by'agaciro mu mujyi wa Londres. Bivugwa ko ari gukorwaho iperereza n'abategetsi ba Angola kuri ruswa, n'imitungo ye mu gihugu yarafatiriwe. BBC Panorama yageze ku nyandiko zirenga 700,000 zivuga ku butunzi bwe bunini cyane. Nyinshi muri zo zabonywe n'ikitwa Platform to Protect Whistle-blowers izigeza ku ihuriro ryitwa International Consortium of Investigative Journalists (ICIJ). Andrew Feinstein uyobora ikigo Corruption Watch avuga ko izi nyandiko zerekana uburyo Madamu Dos Santos yasahuye ibyari umutungo wa rubanda. Ati: "Buri gihe uko agaragaye ku rupapuro rwa mbere rwa magazine zibengerana ku isi, buri gihe uko yakiriye ibirori mu majyepfo y'Ubufaransa, ibyo abikora ahonyanga inzozi z'abaturage ba Angola". Iby'ibitoro (petrol) Amwe mu masezerano akemangwa yakorewe i Londres biciye mu ishami ryo mu Bwongereza rya Sonangol, kompanyi y'ubucuruzi bw'ibitoro ya leta ya Angola. Madamu Dos Santos mu 2016 yashyizwe ku buyobozi bwa Sonangol yari mu bihombo, uyu mwanya yawushyizweho na se Eduardo nawe wari mu bihe bya nyuma by'imyaka 38 ku butegetsi. Mu kwezi kwa cyenda 2017 ubwo Eduardo yavaga ku butegetsi, umukobwa we nawe nyuma y'amezi abiri yahise yirukanwa muri iyi kompanyi. Abanyangola benshi batunguwe n'uburyo Perezida mushya ari kwitwara mu bikorwa by'umuryango w'uwo yasimbuye nubwo bakomoka mu ishyaka rimwe. 30% by'abaturage ba Angola babayeho mu bukene aho batunzwe no munsi ya $2 ku munsi Izi nyandiko z'ibanga zerekana ko Madamu Dos Santos yavuye muri Sonangol amaze kwemeza ko kompanyi y'ubugenzuzi y'i Dubai yitwa Matter Business Solutions yishyurwa miliyoni $58 z'amadorari. We avuga ko nta nyungu y'amafaranga afite muri Matter, ariko izi nyandiko zerekana ko iyoborwa n'ushinzwe ubushabitsi bwe naho nyirayo akaba ari inshuti ye. BBC Panorama yamenye ko Matter yoherereje Sonangol inyandiko zishyuza (invoices) zirenga 50 i Londres ku munsi Dos Antos yirukanweho. Biboneka ko Madamu Dos Santos yemeje ko izo 'invoices' zishyurwa nyuma y'uko yirukanwe. Nubwo hari imirimo y'ubugenzuzi yari yakozwe na Matter, hari amakuru macye asobanura igiciro cy'umurengera cy'ako kazi. Inyandiko imwe yishyuza €472,196 ku kazi katavugwa, indi ikishyuza $928,517 ku kazi katagaragazwa neza k'ubufasha mu by'amategeko. Izindi nyandiko ebyiri zishyuza €676,339 buri imwe, zikishyuza akazi kamwe ku matariki amwe kandi Madamu Dos Santos yazisinyeho zombi. Abanyamategeko ba Matter Business Solutions bavuga ko iyi kompanyi yazanywe ngo ivugurure iby'ubucukuzi n'ubucuruzi bw'ibitoro muri Angola. Iyi kompanyi ivuga ko yishyuzaga akazi gatandukanye kakozwe n'izindi kompanyi nayo yabaga yahaye akazi, kandi ko ifite inyandiko zose zigaragaza ibyakozwe n'ibyishyujwe. Izi ni zimwe mu nyandiko zishyuza Dos Santos yasinye mu cyumweru cya nyuma mbere yo kwirukanwa Abanyamategeko ba Dos Antos bavuga ko ibikorwa byo kwishyura Matter byubahirije amategeko kandi atigeze yemeza kwishyurwa na kumwe nyuma yo kwirukanwa muri Sonangol. Bagira bati: "Ibyishyuwe byose biri mu masezerano yumvikanyweho n'impande zombi, amasezerano yemejwe n'inama y'ubutegetsi ya Sonangol". ICIJ na Panorama byagaragaje amakuru mashya ku masezerano yatumye Madamu Dos Antos aba umuherwe. Umutungo we munini ukomoka ku migabane ye muri kompanyi y'iby'ingugu yo muri Portugal yitwa Galp, imwe mu zo kompanyi ze zaguze na Sonangol mu 2006. Imigabane ye muri Galp ubu ibarirwa ku gaciro ka miliyoni €750. Iyi kompanyi yahawe inguzanyo na Sonangol ya za miliyoni z'amadorari yagombaga gutangira kwishyura nibura nyuma y'imyaka 11. Iyi kompanyi ya Madamu Dos Santos mu 2017 yasabye Sonangol ko yatangira kwishyura. Sonangol yaba yaranze ibyo gutangira kwishyurwa kuko uwishyura atashyiragamo hafi inyungu ya miliyoni €9 yagombaga gutanga. Isabel yasinye yemeza ko kompanyi ya leta yishyura hafi miliyoni 58$ Gusa icyo gihe Madamu Dos Santos yari akiri umuyobozi wa Sonangol, ariko yari yemeje uko kwishyura ideni rye n'ubundi. Hashize iminsi itandatu yarirukanywe, uko kwishyurwa gusubizwa Galp n'ubutegetsi bushya bwa Sonangol. Ibya Diyama No muri diyama ni inkuru nk'iyo. Umugabo wa Madamu Dos Santos yitwa Sindika Dokolo, mu 2012 uyu yasinye amasezerano na kompanyi leta ya Angola yitwa Sodiam itunganya diyama. Byari biteganyijwe ko impande zombi zigabana 50 - 50 igikorwa cyo kugura kompanyi itunganya imirimbo yo mu Busuwisi yitwa De Grisogono. Ariko byose byishyuwe na kompanyi ya leta. Izi nyandiko zerekana ko amezi 18 nyuma y'icyo gikorwa, Sodiam yarishye miliyoni $79 mu gihe Bwana Dokolo yashoye gusa miliyoni $4. Sodiam kandi yamuhaye miliyoni $5 nk'igihembo cyo kuba yarageze kuri ayo masezerano y'ubugure, bivuze ko nta mafaranga ye yakoresheje. Ayo masezerano ya diyama yo ashegesha abaturage ba Angola. Isabel Dos Santos n'umugabo we Sindika Dokolo bakunze kuboneka mu bikorwa by'imyidagaduro hamwe n'ibyamamare bikomeye ku isi Izi nyandiko zivuga ko Sodiam yagujije amafaranga yakoresheje muri aya masezerano muri banki yigenga yo Madamu Dos Santos abereye umunyamigabane mukuru. Sodiam yagombaga kwishyura 9% by'inyungu, iyo nguzanyo yemejwe n'iteka rya Perezida Eduardo, bivuze ko banki ya Madamu Dos Santos idashobora guhomba. Bravo da Rosa, umuyobozi mukuru mushya wa Sodiam, yabwiye Panorama ko abaturage ba Angola nta faranga na rimwe bavanye muri ayo masezerano. Ati: "Ahubwo twarangije kwishyura ya nguzanyo Sodiam imaze guhomba miliyoni $200." Perezida Eduardo kandi yahaye umukwe we (Dokolo) uburenganzira bwo kugura zimwe muri za diyama zidatunganyije za leta. Isabel dos Santos ni inde? Guverinoma ya Angola ivuga ko izo diyama zacurujwe ku giciro gito, Panorama yabonye amakuru ko hafi miliyari $1 yaburiwe irengero. Madamu Dos Santros yabwiye BBC ko ibyo ntacyo yabivugaho kuko atari umunyamigabane muri De Grisogono. Gusa inyandiko z'ibanga zasohotse zerekana ko ari umunyamigabane wa De Grisogono ahagarariwe n'abajyanama be mu by'imari. Bwana Dokolo nyuma yashyizemo amafaranga. Abanyamategeko be bavuga ko yashoye miliyoni $115 kandi ko kugura De Grisogono byari igitekerezo cye. Iby'ubutaka Izi nyandiko zerekana uko Madamu Dos Santos yaguze ubutaka bwa leta mu kwezi kwa cyenda 2017. Nanone ku mafaranga macyeya cyane. Kompanyi ye yaguze ubutaka bwa kilometero kare imwe mu mujyi wa Luanda ku iteka ryasinywe na se wari ukiri perezida. Iyi kompanyi ya leta ifite ishami mu Bowngereza aho amwe mu masezerano akemangwa yakoerwe Amasezerano y'ubugure avuga ko ubwo butaka bufite agaciro ka miliyoni $96 ariko izi nyandiko zerekana ko yishyuye 5% gusa nyuma yo kwemera ko agiye gushora imari aho mu iterambere. Panorama yakurikiranye bamwe mu baturage ba Angola basanzwe bavanywe kuri ubu butaka kugira ngo hashyirwe ibikorwa by'iterambere. Aba bavanywe kuri ubu butaka buri ku nkengero y'inyanja bajyanywa kuri 50Km uvuye i Luanda aho bubakiwe inzu zo kubamo. Teresa Vissapa yatakaje uturimo yakoraga kubera ibikorwa bya Madamu Dos Santos none ubu agowe no kurera abana be barindwi. Ati:"Ndasaba Imana gusa ngo rimwe azatekereze uko tubayeho. Birashoboka ko nta n'ibyo azi, ari turi mu magorwa." Madamu Dos Santos yanze kugira icyo avuga kuri ibi bikorwa byo kugura ubutaka bwo gukoraho ibikorwa by'iterambere no kwimura abantu. Gusa ntabwo ari yo masezerano y'ubutaka gusa yakoze yatumye abantu bavanwa mu byabo. Hari imiryango irenga 500 yavanywe ahandi hantu yari ituye hitegeye inyanja nyuma y'uko Isabel Dos Santos nawe yari mu mushinga w'ibikorwa by'iterambere aho hantu. Iyi miryango ubu ibayeho mu buzima bugoye hafi y'ikusanyirizo ry'imyanda muri Luanda. Madamu Dos Santos avuga ko nta bantu bimuwe n'imishinga ye kandi ko kompanyi ze zitishyuwe kuko imishinga y'iterambere yahagaritswe. Muri kompanyi z'itumanaho Uyu muherwe yavanye inyungu nini cyane muri kompanyi z'itumanaho muri Angola. Yagize imigabane ya 25% muri kompanyi nini mu gihugu, Unitel. Iyi yahawe uburenganzira bwo gukorera muri Angola na se mu 1999, umwaka wakurikiyeho nibwo Isabel yaguzemo iyo migabane. Unitel yamaze kumwishyura miliyari $1 nk'inyungu y'ishoramari rye, imigabane ye ibarirwa agaciro ka miliyari $1. Gusa ubwo sibwo buryo bwonyine abonamo 'cash' muri kompanyi zigenga. Yakoze ku buryo Unitel iguriza miliyoni $350 indi kompanyi yashinze yitwa Unitel International Holdings. Amazina y'iyi kompanyi yarimo urujijo kuko itari kompanyi ya Unitel kandi Madamu Dos Santos niwe wari nyirayo. Yasinye nk'uguza kandi nk'uguriza Inyandiko zerekana ko Madamu Dos Santos yasinye kuri iriya nguzanyo icya rimwe nk'uguza n'ugurizwa, ibintu bihabanye n'amategeko. Madamu Dos Santos yahakanye ko iyo nguzanyo itarimo ruswa. Ati: "Iyo nguzayo yemejwe n'abategetsi n'abanyamigabane b'impande zombi, kandi ni inguzanyo igenda yunguka imaze no kungukira Unitel". Kompanyi nyinshi ziri mu masezerano akemangwa zagenzurwaga n'abacungamari bakorera ikigo cy'imari Price Waterhouse Coopers (PWC). Iki kigo cyakuye za miliyoni nyinshi muri serivisi za 'auditing', 'consultance' n'ubujyanama mu misoro kuri kompanyi ze. Ariko PWC yahagaritse imikoranire na Isabel n'umuryango we, ni nyuma y'uko Panorama ibajije iyo kompanyi uko yafashije Dos Santos mu byamugejeje ku butunzi. Tom Keatinge, umuyoboiz wa 'Centre for Financial Crime and Security Studies' yabwiye Panorama ko PWC yagiye yerekana ko kompanyi za Dos Santos zizewe. PWC ubu ivuga ko iri gukora iperereza ku byakozwe n'abakozi bayo mu gihe bakoranaga na kompanyi za Dos Santos.

Anthony Joshua (iburyo) yakinishije amayeri yo ku rwego rwo hejuru mu gutsinda Andy Ruiz Jr (ibumoso) Joshua, Umwongereza w'imyaka 30 ufite inkomoko muri Nigeria, yarushije bigaragara Ruiz muri uwo mukino waraye ubereye muir Arabie Saoudite. Yamwihimuyeho kuko uwo Munya-Mexique ufite n'ubwenegihugu bw'Amerika yari yamutsinze bitunguranye mu mukino wabaye mu kwezi kwa gatandatu uyu mwaka. Joshua yabwiye BBC ati: "Ntabwo nashakaga gutwarwa n'intsinzi cyane ariko biteye gusabwa n'amarangamutima". "Ndi umugabo wakoze amakosa kandi igihe nari ndi mu gihe cyo gutsindwa mu buzima, narakuze ndongera ngaruka mu buryo bwo gutsinda". Muri uwo mukino wo ku munsi w'ejo, Joshua yari yahindutse mu mikinire, atandukanye n'uko yakinnye mu mukino wa mbere wabereye i New York. Yinjiye mu rwego rumwe na Muhammad Ali, Lennox Lewis, Floyd Patterson na Wladimir Klitschko rw'abateramakofe baremereye bongeye kwisubiza umuhigo wo ku rwego rw'isi. Nyuma y'uwo mukino, umuryango w'iteramakofe ku isi (WBO) wavuze ko agomba gukina n'Umunya-Ukraine Usyk mu gihe kitarenze iminsi 180 iri imbere. Joshua yabwiye ikiganiro BBC Radio 5 Live ati: "Icyo nshoboye gukora cyose, nzagikora. Niba ibyo bivuze kurwana n'abandi barwanyi bo ku rwego rwo hejuru, ikizaba kizabe". Yongeyeho ati: "Mujye ku rubuga [rwanyu] rwa Twitter rwa BBC Radio 5 Live mushyireho ubutumwa bwanyu muvuge uwo nkwiye gukurikizaho kurwana na we kuko niteguye icyo ari cyo cyose". Anthony Joshua yifata 'selfie' n'abafana be nyuma yo kwisubiza imihigo y'isi Kubrat Pulev, umuteramakofe wo muri Bulgaria ugenwa ngo ahatane w'ishyirahamwe mpuzamahanga ry'umukino w'iteramakofe (IBF), na we ari mu bazarwana na Joshua, ariko hazacyenerwa ko habaho amasezerano yuko habanza uwo Munya-Bulgaria cyangwa Usyk. Usyk - winjiye mu cyiciro cy'abaremereye amaze gutwara imikandara ine yose yo ku rwego rw'abaremereye biringaniye - na we yari ku kibuga cya Diriyah Arena mu nkengero z'umurwa mukuru Riyadh ku munsi w'ejo areba uwo mukino. Joshua yahara imikandara ye ya IBF na WBO aramutse atarwanye n'abo bategetswe ko arwana na bo, kandi Eddie Hearn ushinzwe ibikorwa byo kumwamamaza yavuze ko ibyo bidashobora kubaho. Niba ari uko bimeze, bivuze ko mu gihe cya vuba aha yazakina na Deontay Wilder cyangwa Tyson Fury.

Bwana Kim yafotowe ari gusoma iyo baruwa Bwana Kim yashimagije iyo baruwa avuga ko "ishimishije" ndetse avuga ko "azazirikana ashimitse ibintu by'ingenzi biyikubiyemo", nkuko bitangazwa n'ibiro ntaramakuru KCNA bya Koreya ya ruguru. Yanashimagije Bwana Trump ku "muhate udasanzwe" agira. Mu ntangiriro y'uku kwezi kwa gatandatu, Bwana Trump yavuze ko yohererejwe ibaruwa nziza n'uyu mutegetsi mukuru wa Koreya ya ruguru. Ntibyahishuwe igihe n'uburyo iyo baruwa Bwana Trump yandikiye Bwana Kim yamugezeho. Ibiro bya White House bya perezida w'Amerika ntacyo byatangaje. Ibiganiro hagati y'Amerika na Koreya ya ruguru byarahagaze nyuma y'inama y'abategetsi bombi mu murwa mukuru Hanoi wa Vietnam yabaye mu kwezi kwa kabiri uyu mwaka, ikarangira ntacyo igezeho. Bwana Trump na Bwana Kim mu nama y'i Vietnam Iyi baruwa ni cyo kintu cya mbere cy'ingenzi kibaye hagati y'ibihugu byombi guhera icyo gihe, nkuko umunyamakuru wa BBC Laura Bicker uri mu murwa mukuru Séoul wa Koreya y'epfo abivuga. Amerika yakomeje gushimangira ko Koreya ya ruguru igomba kureka gahunda yayo ya nikleyeri, mu gihe Koreya ya ruguru yo isaba ko ibanza ikadohorerwa ibihano yafatiwe. Ariko mu mezi ya vuba ashize, Bwana Trump yumvikanye avuga neza Bwana Kim. Mu ntangiriro y'uku kwezi kwa gatandatu, yabwiye abanyamakuru ko Koreya ya ruguru ku butegetsi bwa Bwana Kim "ifite ahazaza heza". No mu kwezi gushize kwa gatanu ubwo yagiriraga uruzinduko mu Buyapani, Bwana Trump yavuze ko Bwana Kim ari "umugabo w'intyoza" ndetse avuga ko yiteze "ibintu byinshi byiza" biva muri Koreya ya ruguru.

Mesut Ozil (hagati) amaze gutsindira Arsenal ibitego bitanu mu mikino 26 amaze kuyikinira muri uyu mwaka w'imikino Ozil wagiye rimwe na rimwe adakinishwa n'uyu mutoza ukomoka muri Espanye kuva yatangira gutoza iyi kipe muri uyu mwaka w'imikino, yafashije Arsenal gutsinda Newcastle ibitego 2-0, iba intsinzi ya 10 yikurikiranya muri shampiyona ku kibuga cyayo cya Emirates. Umutoza Emery yagize ati: "Nkunda ukuntu buri mukinnyi ari gukina kuri ubu kandi na Mesut n'ubuhanga bwe ari kudufasha kandi ari no kwitanga". Aaron Ramsey na Alexandre Lacazette ni bo batsinze ibyo bitego bya Arsenal. Mbere y'iyo ntsinzi y'ejo ku wa mbere, Ozil yari amaze gutangira mu mikino itatu gusa ya shampiyona guhera ku itariki ya 26 y'ukwezi kwa 12 k'umwaka ushize wa 2018. Mu kwezi kwa kabiri uyu mwaka, Emery yavuze ko Ozil, Umudage w'imyaka 30 y'amavuko, agomba "kwitwara neza mu buryo buhoraho mu myitozo no mu mikino, yirinda kuvunika cyangwa kurwara". Nyuma yongeyeho ko Ozil azakomeza kujya anyuzamo ntakinishwe. Ariko nyuma yuko yitwaye muri uwo mukino bigatuma anahabwa igihembo nk'umukinnyi wahize abandi muri uwo mukino, Emery yagize ati: "Mesut ari gukina nkuko tubishaka, haba hamwe n'abandi mu ikipe no mu mikinire ye bwite. Ari kwitanga cyane kandi akaduha ku buhanga bwe". Intsinzi ya Arsenal yatumye ijya imbere ya Tottenham - mucyeba wayo wo mu majyaruguru y'umujyi wa London - ndetse n'imbere ya Manchester United, kuri ubu ikaba iri ku mwanya wa gatatu ku rutonde rw'agateganyo rwa shampiyona ya Premier League. Emery yavuze ko ikipe ye ubu ifite akazi gakomeye ko kuguma kuri uwo mwanya kugeza shampiyona irangiye.

Pep Guardiola (ibumoso) na Ole Gunnar Solskjaer (iburyo) City iri mu mwanya mwiza wo kuba yarangiza shampiyona y'uyu mwaka iri imbere ya Man United ku nshuro ya karindwi yikurikiranya, ibintu ubundi bitari byarigeze bibaho mbere kuva mu myaka ya 1930. City imaze kwegukana ibikombe bitatu bya shampiyona ya Premier League kuva Man United yagera ku bintu bikomeye 20 mu mwaka wa 2013. Abajijwe mbere y'iyi 'derby' y'uyu munsi niba akibona United nk'ikipe ikomeye kurusha mucyeba wayo, umutoza Ole Gunnar yagize ati: "Yego". Yongeyeho ati: "Ni byo ntitwajya impaka ko turi inyuma cyane, ariko se ni iki tugiye kubikoraho? Guterera iyo? Kudahatana na bo [Manchester City]?" Mu bijyanye n'ibikombe, City iracyafite urugendo rurerure ngo ibe yashyikira United, ariko hanze y'ikibuga, City iri gusatira United mu bijyanye n'amikoro mu by'amafaranga. Ariko umutoza Pep Guardiola wa City avuga ko yumva kuba ikipe ikomeye birenze kuba byareberwa gusa ku bikombe yatwaye. Ati: "Niba uri kurebera ku bijyanye n'ibikombe, bameze [United] neza kuturusha, ibyo ntawabishidikanyaho. Imibare ni imibare [irivugira], kandi muri urwo rwego begukanye ibikombe byinshi kuturusha". "Ariko turi kugerageza kugera aho bageze uko dushoboye kose, kandi ku bafana ba City, Manchester City izahora iteka ari yo ikomeye kurushaho". Manchester City y'umutoza Pep Guardiola (iburyo) yatsinze imikino ibiri ya shampiyona yayihuje na Manchetser United y'umutoza Ole Gunnar (ibumoso) mu mwaka ushize w'imikino Kuva Sir Alex Ferguson yajya mu kiruhuko cy'izabukuru akareka gutoza United mu mwaka wa 2013, City imaze gutsinda imikino ya 'derby' irindwi mu gihe United yo yatsinze itatu. City kandi imaze kurusha United amanota 91 mu myaka itandatu y'imikino ishize. Ubu United - ya gatandatu - irarushwa na City - ya gatatu - amanota 11 ku rutonde rw'agateganyo rwa shampiyona y'uyu mwaka. Ole Gunnar ati: "Kuva nagera hano, abakinnyi barindwi, bafite ubunararibonye bwinshi, baragiye. Ducyeneye kongera kwiyubaka no guhindura umuco mu by'imikinire". Yongeyeho ati: "Ducyeneye kongera imbaraga mu ikipe mu busatirizi no mu mikinire". "Nitumara kubona abo bakinnyi, ndabizi neza ko icyuho kiri hagati yacu kizavaho. Ariko se nanone murabona nsa nk'umuntu ushobora gutanga amapawundi abarirwa muri za miliyoni amagana ku bakinnyi ntizeye neza?" Kuri ubu, ibyo bivuze gucungira ku bakinnyi bihuta cyane kandi bakina basatira izamu. Jose Mourinho wahoze ayitoza na we ni ko yavuze ubwo ikipe ye ya Tottenham yatsindwaga na United 2 - 1 ku wa gatatu w'iki cyumweru. Na Guardiola ni ko yavuze. Ati: "Biragaragara ko ari ikipe icungira ku guhindukirana byihuse uwo bahatanye ['counter attack']". Yongeyeho ati: "Iyo nibutse ibitego batsinze Chelsea mu ntangiriro y'uyu mwaka, byinshi byari kuri 'counterattack', ubwo Chelsea yasatiraga gacye kurushaho. Cyo kimwe no mu mukino na Liverpool, igitego cyavuye kuri 'counter attack'".

Abantu 37 b'ivyaha bito bito ngo nibo bishwe n'inteko z'umutekano Ico cegeranyo kivuga ko ari uburyo ubutegetsi bwafashwe, bwo kumarira abantu bose biketsweko ubusuma. Ivyabona vyabwiye HRW ko umuntu yafashwe yiba inka, ko yafatigwa ingingo mu nama yo mu muryango. Fulgence Rukundo yarabajijwe ku bijanye n'inka yibwe, mu nyuma ajanwa mu nama irongowe n'umukuru w'ikomine. Umwe mu babibonye aravuga ivyakurikiye: "Igihe inama ihereye, abasirikare batwaye Fulgence mu murima uri iruhande y'itongo ry'ibitoke. Twabikurikiye turi benshi; bamwe bari abana bo mu mashuli y'intango. Twashaka kubona ibiza kuba...Umusirikare yamubwiye ngo nahaguruke agende, uwundi musirikare adusaba kuhava. Muri uwo mwanya nyene, numvise uwurashe gatatu." Ibindi vyabona vyabwiye HRW ko abandi bishwe bagirizwa kwiba ibitoke, ipikipiki, kugurisha urumogi, kujabuka urubibe ruja muri RD Congo ata ruhusha, canke gukoresha insenga zitarekuriwe mu kuroba. Ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda bwahakanye ko ata bwicanyi ndengerabutungane bwakozwe. "Inyishu yanje ku cegeranyo ca HRW: Ni icegeranyo kidafashe. HRW yabuze ingene yimenyekanisha. Basubiye kubeshwa kandi bitey'isoni." (Niko umushikiranganji w'ubutungane, Johnson Busingye yavuze kuri Twitter. Yanse kuvugana n'abamenyeshamakuru. HRW yavuze ko mu 2015, yatohoje ko hari abantu baharugwa mu bihumbi bapfunzwe bidaciye mu mategeko barimwo abana bo mw'ibarabara hamwe n'abamaraya.

Pierre-Claver Kazihise arongoye uyo murwi yabwiye ururani rw'amaradiyo muri ico gihugu ko igikorwa kiriko kiraba ubu ari ukwegeranya ibiharuro vyavuye ku biro vy'amatora, kikaba kiriko kirabera ku makomine. Bamwe bamwe bavuga ko iminsi itanu canke itandatu yatanzwe hagati y'amatora no gutangaza ivyayavuyemwo vy'imfatakibanza ari myinshi. Muri ico kiganiro, Bwana Kazihise, asigurira abanyagihugu ko botahura ko igikorwa co guharura ivyavuye mu matora ari igikorwa kitoroshe kibwirizwa gufata umwanya. Ayo matora yabereye ku biro vy'amatora bingana na 14,665 mu gihugu cose, bikwiragiye ku bibanza vy'amatora (centres de vote) 3,807. Kuki bizofata iyo minsi? Asigura ingene igikorwa co guharura kigenda, bwana Kazihise yavuze ati: "Ejo bahejeje gutora, baciye bateranya ivyavuyemwo ku biro vy'amatora ubwo nyene". "Mu nyuma bahejeje, baca babijana kw'ikomine, mu murwi ujejwe amatora ku rwego rwa komine, CECI". "Aho baca babanza kwegeranya ivyavuye ku biro vy'amatora vyose kugira ngo bashobore kuronka ivyavuye mu bibanza vy'amatora (centres de vote) vyose bingana na 3,807". "Bahejeje kuronka ivyavuye muri ivyo bibanza vyose, baca bateranya ivyo biharuro kugira ngo baronke ivyo ku rwego rwa komine". "Bahejeje kwegeranya ivyavuye mu matora ku rwego rwa komine, baca babijana ku rwego rw'intara kugira ngo nabo bavyegeranye". "Abo nabo nibo baca babishikiriza umurwi ujejwe amatora ku rwego rw'igihugu kugira ngo nabo bashobore gutangaza ibiharuro vy'imfatakibanza vyavuye mu matora". Kuri ivyo biringo vyose, yibutsa ko ari amatora atatu, akavuga ko bagenda bateranya itora rimwe rimwe ryose bakabanza kuriheza imbere y'uko batandukira irindi. Ati: "Murumva rero ko ari umurimo utari muto na gato, usabwa gukorwa mu bwitonzi kugira ngo ntihabe ukwihenda". Asaba abariko barakora ico gikorwa ko bokwitonda bakabikora neza kugira ngo "havemwo ibintu bisukuye, bidatera impari kandi vyerekana neza ukuntu abantu batoye". N'aho hamwe hamwe hibonekeje ingorane z'ukwunguruza ibikoresho, umukuru w'umurwi ujejwe gutegura amatora amenyesha ko ahenshi vyamaze gushika ku makomine, kandi ko ubu bari muri ico gikorwa co guteranya amajwi. Vyitezwe ko ibiharuro vy'imfatakibanza bizotangazwa ku wa 25 canke ku wa 26, ni ukuvuga ku wa mbere canke ku wa kabiri w'indwi iza.

Iyi mbeba yapfuye yakuwe mu isosi ishyushye y'inyama n'imboga Imigabane ya resitora Xiabu Xiabu yaguye igera ku kigero cyo hasi cyane itari yarigeze igeraho mu gihe kigera hafi ku mwaka, nyuma yaho amafoto agaragaza iyo mbeba yapfuye iri gukurwa mu isosi y'inyama ivanzemo n'imboga hakoreshejwe uduti tubiri isakariye byihuse ku mbuga nkoranyambaga. Ishami ry'iyi resitora ryo mu ntara ya Shandong kuri ubu ryabaye rifunzwe. Amakuru aravuga ko ubuyobozi bw'iri shami rya resitora bwahaye uwo mugore amadolari 729 y'Amerika nk'impozamarira. Nkuko bitangazwa n'igitangazamakuru cyo muri ako gace cya Kankan News cyaganiriye n'umugabo w'uyu mugore - cyatangaje nka Bwana Ma, cyavuze ko yanze iyo mpozamarira. Yavuze ko yashakaga ko umugore we abanza agasuzumwa mu mubiri wose kugira ngo abone afate icyemezo ku ngano y'impozamarira. Uyu mugore utwite yari yasohokanye n'umuryango we muri iyo resitora ku itariki ya 6 y'uku kwezi kwa cyenda ubwo yabonaga iyo mbeba ipfuye mu isosi yari amaze kuryaho gacye. Iyi mbeba yapfuye yaje gukurwa muri iyo sosi ishyirwa ku isahani Amafoto y'iyo mbeba yapfuye yahise asakara ku rubuga nkoranyambaga rwa Weibo rwo mu Bushinwa, bamwe mu barukoresha bagaragaza uburakari n'iseseme. Umwe muri bo yagize ati: "Numvise nshatse kuruka. Sinzongera kurira isosi muri resitora ukundi." Ku ikubitiro, ubuyobozi bw'iyi resitora bwari bwasohoye itangazo ku wa gatandatu buvuga ko "buhakana" ko iyo mbeba ipfuye yaba yarageze muri iyo sosi kubera umwanda ariko nyuma bwaje gusiba iryo tangazo. Abategetsi bo mu mujyi wa Weifang ahari ishami ry'iyo resitora aho iyo mbeba ipfuye yasanzwe mu isosi, bavuze ko bazakora iperereza kuri resitora ya Xiabu Xiabu. Iyo ndyo y'isosi y'inyama ivanze n'imboga ni ifunguro rimenyerewe mu Bushinwa no mu bice bimwe na bimwe byo ku mugabane w'Aziya. Ritegurwa hashyirwa isafuriya ku muriro igashyirwa ku meza yo kuriraho, noneho hakongerwamo imboga zitandukanye n'inyama mbisi bigatekerwa hamwe.

Ibiganiro vya BBC vyari bimaze umwaka bihagaritswe mu Burundi Urweko rujejwe itangazamakuru mu Burundi, Conseil National de la Communication (CNC), nirwo rwatangaje iyo ngingo kuri uno wa gatanu. CNC yavuze ko kizira ko hagira umunyamakuru n'umwe ari ku butaka bw'u Burundi, yaba Umurundi canke umunyamahanga, atanga amakuru wenyene canke biciye ahandi, yotangazwa n'ivyo bitangazamakuru. Urwo rwego kandi ruvuga ko ikiganiro ca BBC casamiranye mu mwaka uheze cerekeye ubwicanyi bwagirizwa abajejwe umutekano bwabereye mu nzu iri ku murwa mukuru Bujumbura, vyari ibinyoma. CNC kandi ivuga ko ico kiganiro cahonyanze amategeko agenga itangazamakuru. Ibiganiro vya BBC vyari bimaze umwaka bihagaritswe mu Burundi.

Aba bose hamwe habaruwe ni 1,524 mu baturage miliyoni 47,564,296 ubu batuye Kenya nk'uko bigaragazwa n'imibare y'iri barura. Aba ni abantu imibiri yabo idafite ibiranga umubiri w'igitsinda Gore cyangwa Gabo bisanzwe bigaragarira amaso, bitwa 'Intersex'. Abaturage ba Kenya miliyoni 24 ni abagore naho miliyoni 23 ni abagabo, aba ba Intersex babaruwe muri buri 'county' (yagereranywa n'intara mu Burundi no mu Rwanda) muri 30 zigize Kenya. County ya Nairobi niyo ituwe n'abaturage benshi, miliyoni 4,3. Ni nayo yabaruwemo aba 'Intersex' benshi, 245. Abantu benshi bafite imiterere imeze gutya bakunda kwimwa uburenganzira bwabo, no guhohoterwa bya hato na hato mu bihugu binyuranye. Abenshi bahitamo guhisha imiterere yabo kubera inenwa n'ihohoterwa bashobora gukorerwa. Mu 2018 ibiro bishinzwe abantu muri Kenya byemeje aba Intersex nk'ikindi kiciro ndangagitsina cy'abantu. Mu kwezi kwa gatandatu uwo mwaka, abantu 200 banditswe mu irangamimerere nk'aba Intersex, muri bo 138 bari abana bo munsi y'imyaka 13. Ubu biteganyijwe ko ababaruwe nka Intersex bahabwa ibyangombwa biriho irangamimerere yabo; itari F cyangwa M, ahubwo I (Intersex). Imiterere y'umubiri wabo, inyuma, ni uko bamwe baba bafite ibitsina byombi biteye mu buryo budasobanutse neza. Imisemburo ndangagitsina isanzwe itandukanya abagabo n'abagore kuri bo ishobora kunyuranya n'imiterere igaragara inyuma ku mibiri yabo nk'uko abaganga babivuga.

Ubuzima busa nubusubirana muri Centreafrique Benshi muri abo ni abakirisitu bari baragize ubwoba bwo kwihorera nyuma yuko inyeshyamba zo mu mutwe ugizwe n'abayisilamu benshi wa Seleka uhirika ubutegetsi umwaka ushize. Icyo gihugu cyimaze umwaka kiri mu mvururu zinshingiye ku madini, ariko perezida mushya, Alexandre-Ferdinand Nguendet, yatangaje ko ibihe by'imvururu bidakurikiza amategeko byahagaze. Yagabishirije by'umwihariko abarwanyi n'abasahuzi, mu magambo ye ababwira ko, ibirori byarangiye. Umunyamakuru wa BBC yavuze ko ibintu bisa nibiri guhinduka muri uwo mujyi, aho ubuzima mu mihanda busa nuburi gusibirana.

Manchester United yasubiye gutsinda 4-0 mu rukino rwa kabiri rw'ihiganwa Mu minota ine gusa y'igice ca kabiri United yinjije ibitsindo bitatu vyikurikiranya, vyiyongera ku cari cinjiye mu gice cambere biba 4 ku busa bwa Swansea City. Mourinho yagize ati: "Hari umunezero mu kuntu twakinye. Ntivyari bikenewe kwugara umwango. "Numva mpagaze neza; nibiba vyabakundiye mukandaba ukuntu nari meze, nibaza ko vyagaragara mu maso." Jose Mourinho avuga ko uno munsi yari yorohewe cane kuko abankinyi bavyifashemwo neza Vyabanje kugorana United ariko yabanje kubira akuya kuko Swansea yari yazibiye neza, igice ca mbere kirangira ari igitsindo 1-0, cinjijwe na Eric Bally ku mupira wari wakuwemwo n'umunyegoli wa Swansea. Ariko ku munota wa 80 vyaseye nk'umwango wuguruwe igihe Romelu Lukaku yinjiza neza cane igitsindo ciwe ca gatatu mw'ikipe yiwe nshasha. Paul Pogba yinjije ica gatatu mu minota ibiri yakurikiye, arovye neza cane umunyegoli, nyuma yaho gatoyi uwinjiye asimbuye, Anthony Martial, aha United intsinzi ya kabiri mw'ihiganwa ya 4-0.

Umusaruro w'umuceri wagabanutse ku kigero cya 60% mu duce tumwe, ndetse abantu bamwe biba ngombwa ko biyambaza uwo batumije hanze Ibi bibazo byatewe n'uruzuba rwinshi rwakajijwe n'ihindugagurika ry'ibihe biterwa n'icyo bita El Nino. Ishami rya LONI ritanga imfashanyo y'ibirirwa rivuga ko umusaruro w'ibigori mu karere ka Androy wagabanutse ko mirongo inani ku ijana muri uno mwaka. Ibindi biribwa by'ibanze, birimo n'imyumbati nabyo ntibigipfa kuboneka. Abantu baragerageza kuramuka barya imbuto z'ibihingwa cyangwa se bakagurisha ibikoresho byo mu buhinzi cyangwa se amatungo Uduce tumwe mu majyepfo ya Madagascar twakubiswe n'urukurikirane rw'amapfa Icyegeranyo kigira kiti: "Ingo ziri kugabanya umusaruro w'ibihingwa mu gihugu." "[People are] Abantu bari gushaka uburyo bwo kurokoka nko kurya imbuto z'ibihingwa, kugurisha amatungo yabo n'ibikoresho bifashisha mu buhinzi ndetse no kurya ibiryo byo mu ishyamba bikennye mu ntungamubiri nk'imbundo zitukura z'inturusu."

Kidum avuga ko coronavirus yagize ingaruka zikomeye mu mibereho ye nk'umuririmbyi Mu kiganiro na BBC Gahuzamiryango, Kidum yavuze ko nubwo umuryango we - cyo kimwe n'iyindi myinshi muri Kenya - wari wahashye ukiziganira ibiribwa uko iki cyorezo cyagendaga kirushaho gukara, ubu bigoye ku muririmbyi nka we ubona icyo kurya ari uko yakoresheje ibitaramo. Ati: "Tuguma duteka indya (ibiribwa) dufise mu nzu, hanyuma abana na bo barabaturungikiye, ku ma 'internats' (ibigo aho abanyeshuri biga ari naho baba), ubu tubana n'abana muhira, amashuri yose yarugaye, urumva ni ibintu bigoye kabisa (rwose) gutahura". "Akazi kacu twebwe, dukora ahantu hahurira abantu benshi, rero ibyo bitagishoboka, urumva duca twicamara muhira". "Mu gutangura rero kwicara, urumva nta kazi gushika isi ironse umuti w'iyi ngorane dufise, [umuti] wa coronavirus". Avuga ko nk'umuhanzi ukoresha ibitaramo ahantu hatandukanye hahurira abantu benshi harimo no mu tubari two mu murwa mukuru Nairobi, iki cyorezo kimaze kumugiraho ingaruka zikomeye mu mibereho ye kubera ko abategetsi babujije guterana kw'abantu benshi nk'ingamba yo kwirinda ikwirakwira rya coronavirus. Ati: "Ncuraranga kuva ku munsi wa kabiri gushika ku munsi wa Mungu, rero ntagicuraranga ubuzima nari nsanzwe mbayemo burahindutse, byaciye rero kandi gutangira kwikora ku ntegabizoza (ku mafaranga y'ubwizigame), urumva si ibintu byoroshye, si ibintu byoroshye, sininjiza nguma ndya ibyo nakoreye gusa kera". Avuga ko kandi hari ibitaramo yateganyaga gukora byamaze gusubikwa harimo nk'igitaramo cyari kuzabera mu mujyi wa Mombasa ku munsi mukuru wa Pasika, kubera ko abategetsi baho bahagaritse ibintu byose bijyanye n'inzu z'urubyiniro, utubari n'amahoteli. Hasubitswe kandi n'igitaramo yateganyaga gukorera i Kampala muri Uganda. Ntari kurera amaboko Nubwo bimeze gutyo ariko, Kidum w'imyaka 45 y'amavuko yabwiye BBC ko muri iki gihe asigaye amara igihe kinini mu rugo, anyuzamo agafata akanya ko guhimba indirimbo azacuranga igihe iki cyorezo cyaba kirangiye. Avuga ko iyo amaze guhimba ubu yitwa 'Hatuachani', mu Giswayile, bishatse kuvuga ngo 'Ntiturekanye', ugenekereje mu Kinyarwanda. Amwe mu magambo yo muri iyo ndirimbo agira ati: "Imbaraga zaheze kabisa, inguvu zaheze, hanyuma kandi n'inyota yose yo kunywa amazi yaheze, meze sawa, nguma nicaye, nguma nsamara ndiko ndakuraba". "Ariko coronavirus irakaranduka, irakagenda kabisa, icyo kintu cyaje kutwononera umufuko wacu, hanyuma no kuzana kwicyekana mu bantu aho umuntu yasamuye [yitsamuye], bimwe bisanzwe gusa byo kwasamura 'tse', abantu baca biruka bibaza yuko umengo urabanduje kandi". Mu karere bimeze gute? Muri aka karere, kugeza ubu muri Kenya abantu 7 ni bo bamaze gutangazwa ko banduye indwara ya Covid-19 yo mu myanya y'ubuhumekero iterwa n'ubu bwoko bushya bwa coronavirus. Mu Burundi nta muntu bari bayisangamo cyo kimwe no muri Uganda, mu gihe mu Rwanda bamaze kuyisanga mu bantu 17, Repubulika ya Demokarasi ya Kongo ifite abarwayi 23 naho Tanzania batandatu. Ku isi abarenga 280,000 bamaze kuyandura, naho abarenga 11,000 imaze kubica.

Ellen Johnson Sirleaf yabaye umukuru w'igihugu wa Liberia kuva mu 2006 gushika 2018 Yarongoye igihugu ca Liberia mu kiringo c'imyaka 12 harimwo n'imyaka yaranzwe n'ikiza ca Ebola, hagati ya 2014 na 2016, aho cahitanye abantu bashika 5000 mu gihugu ciwe. BBC yaregeyeye uyo mukenyezi imubaza ico yoterera kugira ngo isi ishobore guhangana n'ikiza ca coronavirus kiyihanze muri kino gihe. Agira ati bantu mwese b'isi yose: Ku wa 19 z'ukwezi kwa cumi 2014, igihe ikiza ca Ebola cariko kirabica bigacika muri Afrika y'Uburengero, aho mu gihugu canje cari kimaze guhitana abantu 2000, abandi babandanya bandura ku buryo buteye ubwoba, narandikiye urwandiko isi ndayisaba ko yonterera ikampa imfashanyo y'abantu n'uburyo. Nasavye ko isi yose yoja hamwe igahagarika indwara twatinya ko yashobora kuba ikiza kw'isi yose. Uno munsi, nongeye gufata aka kanya ngo ntere akamo nsabe ko twese dufatana mu nda. Haraciye imyaka itandatu nsiguye ingene ubukene bwaranze igihugu canje inyuma y'intambara, hamwe n'igisata c'ubuvuzi atako cari cifashe, vyatumye kibangamirwa bikomeye na Ebola. Kandi narerekanye ko mu gihe isi yose yohagurukira rimwe ikarwanya ico kiza cari ciziziye akarere ka Afrika y'Uburengero, aho igisata c'ubuvuzi kitari cifashe neza, ko twoshobora kukirwanya. Navuze ko iyo indwara idashoboye guhagarikwa, aho yoba iri hose kw'isi, mu karere ako ariko kose, ni ikibazo kiba gihanze isi yose. Isi yaratwumvise kandi yarakoze itiziganya. Harabaye isekeza ryo kurondera uburyo ryarongowe n'ishirahamwe ONU, ishami rijejwe amagara y'abantu kw'isi, mu nyuma na Amerika irakurikira. Ico kiza twarakirwanirije hamwe. Ivyo vyatumye muri kino gihe haba incanco n'imiti nyayo kubera habaye ugukorana kw'abahinga karuhariwe kw'isi yose. Muri kino gihe isi ihanzwe n'ikiza ca coronavirus, nashaka gutera akamo nk'aka nyene ku bantu bose kw'isi yose. Ibi ndabikoze kubera nzi neza ko, n'aho gushika ubu ibihugu vya Afrika bigifise agahengwe, ni ikibazo c'umwanya gusa imbere y'uko iki kiza cizizira uyu mugabane usanzwe utiteguye bihagije guhangana n'iki kiza. Dutegerezwa gukorana kugira ngo tugihagarike, duhagarike ikwirakwira ryaco. Biraboneka ko habaye amakosa mu guhangana n'uwu mugera mu minsi ya mbere, kuva muri Aziya kugera i Bulaya, gushika muri Amerika. Harabaye ugusamara. Umwanya uratujana. Amakuru yawo yaranyegejwe, afatwa minenerwe, abantu bahabwa amakuru atari yo. Ukuri kwarahishijwe. Niyo makosa nkayo twakoze mu 2014, ariko twarikosoye, hanyuma turaja hamwe. Turi mu bihe bigoye aho imbibe z'ibihugu ziriko zirugarwa kw'isi yose kugira ngo bazibire ikwirakwira ry'uwo. Ariko rero turabe neza ntiduhave twihenda. Si ukuvuga ko dutegerezwa kuba ba nyamwigendako, aho ibihugu vyibako vyonyene, oya. Ahubwo ivyo vyerekana ko twese turiko turaja hamwe. Nashaka gutera akamo abantu bose ko bokwibuka ko kugira ngo ugire ubuzima bwiza ari uko ufasha abandi.

Caster Semenya yegukanye inshuro ebyiri umudari wa Olympike ndetse n'inshuro eshatu mu masiganwa yo ku rwego rw'isi mu gusiganwa muri metero 800 Urukiko nkemurampaka muri siporo rufite icyicaro i Lausanne mu Busuwisi, rwanzuye ko ubujurire bwa Semenya - ukomoka muri Afurika y'epfo - ku mategeko mashya y'ishyirahamwe ry'imikino ngororangingo ku isi, nta shingiro bufite. Ariko uru rukiko rwavuze ko rufite "impungenge zikomeye ku hazaza h'ishyirwa mu bikorwa" ry'ayo mategeko mashya. Semenya w'imyaka 28 y'amavuko, yari yavuze ko ayo mategeko mashya "atarimo gushyira mu gaciro" ndetse avuga ko ashaka "kwiruka mu buryo bw'umwimereri, nkuko navutse". None ubu uyu Semenya watwaye umudari mu kwiruka metero 800 mu marushanwa ya Olympike, ay'isi n'aya Commonwealth, agomba gufata imiti ngo yemererwe gusiganwa mu ntera yo kuva kuri metero 400 kugera kuri metero 1600, cyangwa agahindura akajya yiruka mu yindi ntera. Mu butumwa yatangaje ku rubuga nkoranyambaga rwa Twitter avuga kuri iki cyemezo cy'urukiko, Semenya yavuze ko "rimwe na rimwe biba byiza kurushaho kugira icyo uvuze ntacyo uvuze". Iki cyemezo cy'urukiko kireba kandi abandi bakina imikino ngororangingo bafite imiterere itandukanye mu bijyanye n'igitsina. Uru rukiko ruvuga ko rwasanze aya mategeko mashya areba abakina imikino ngororangingo bafite imiterere itandukanye mu bijyanye n'igitsina arimo ivangura, ariko ruvuga ko "ari ngombwa, ashyira mu gaciro kandi akwiye" mu kurinda "ubusugire bw'imikino ngororangingo y'abagore". Urukiko rwasabye ishyirahamwe ry'imikino ngororangingo ku isi gutekereza ku kuba ryatinza ishyirwa mu bikorwa ry'amategeko arebana no gusiganwa mu ntera yo kuva kuri metero 1500, kugeza habonetse ibindi bimenyetso. Semenya ariko azashobora guhatana mu irushanwa rya Diamond League i Doha muri Qatar rizatangira ku wa gatanu w'iki cyumweru, ndetse ashobora kujuririra iki cyemezo cy'urukiko mu nkiko zo mu Busuwisi mu gihe kitarenze iminsi 30. Nyuma y'iki cyemezo cy'urukiko, aya mategeko mashya y'ishyirahamwe ry'imikino ngororangingo ku isi azatangira gukurikizwa guhera ku itariki ya 8 y'uku kwezi kwa gatanu.

Brarudi ivuga ko ibinyobwa ihingura bikwije ibisabwa Brarudi ishikirije ivyo inyuma y'aho umushikiranganji w'ubudandaji, amahinguriro n'ingenzi amenyeshereje ko mu gihugu hari imyidogo ko ibinyobwa bihingurwa n'iryo shirahamwe vyatakaje akanovera. Hari haciye iminsi haboneka ubukene bw'inyobwa za Amstel ndende, hamwe na Amstel ngufi bita bock, Brarudi ikavuga ko vyatumwa n'abakiriya b'umurengera. Mu kiganiro yahaye abamenyeshamakuru ejo ku wa gatanu, umushikiranganji Jean-Marie Niyokindi, yavuze abihereza Primus, Amstel, Royal n'amafanta, vyose bihingurwa na Brarudi, "vyatakaje akanovera bagereranije n'imyaka iheze". Umushikiranganji Niyokindi akebura iryo hinguriro "gukora ibinyobwa vyiza bitonona amagara y'abavyihereza", haba mu Burundi, mu karere canke no mu bindi gihugu". Asaba ikigo BBN kijejwe kugenzura akaranga k'ibidandazwa kwama kirikanuye kikagenzura ko ivyo binyobwa bihingurwa n'iryo hinguriro biri kw'isoko bikwije ibisabwa. Bwana Niyokindi kandi ko hari icegeranyo cakozwe n'abagenduzi bo muri ubwo bushikiranganji bwiwe cerekana ko hari ubukene bw'ibinyobwa bihingurwa n'iryo shirahamwe. Avuga ko ivyo bituma ibice 90% vy'ababidandaza ivyo binyobwa hagati mu gihugu bikika mu kiza bakaduza ibiciro uko bishakiye, baciye kubiri n'amategeko agenga urudandaza rwazo. Brarudi ngo ishira imbere akanovera Mw'itangazo ryasohowe n'iryo hinguriro inyuma y'ayo majambo yashikirijwe n'umushikiranganji Niyokindi, Brarudi yavuze ko irazwa ishinga n'akanovera k'ibinyobwa rihingura ku neza n'abakiriya baryo. Rirahumuriza kuri ayo makenga y'akanovera, rikavuga ko amashiramamwe HEINEKEN na Coca-Cola akorana naryo, yama akora ivyigwa kugira ngo arabe ko inzoga zihingurwa zikwije ibisabwa kandi ko n'ibikoresho vyayo bimeze neza. Ishirahamwe Brarudi rimaze imyaka irenga 60 rikora inzoga mu Burundi, rikavuga ko ari ryo rya mbere ritanga amakori menshi mu gihugu. Ubukenye bw'ibinyobwa vya Brarudi bumaze igihe, aho hari abibaza ko vyoba bitumwa n'ikena ry'amafaranga y'agaciro, ariko Brarudi yo ikavuga ko biva ku bavyihereza bongerekanye. Kuva Uburundi bwinjiye mu ngorane za politike mu mwaka wa 2015, ibihugu biteye imbere bimwe vyahagaritse imfashanyo vyahora biha ico gihugu, ivyagize ingaruka mbi ku butunzi bwaco.

Ibi biganiro bishya biri muri gahunda yo kwagura BBC World Service kubera amafaranga leta y'Ubwongereza yongereye ku ngengo y'imali. Izi ndimi nshya enye ni Marathi, Gujarati, Telugu na Punjabi. Ziri mu ndimi 11 nshya BBC World Service imaze gutangiza muri gahunda yo kuyagura. Ubu BBC World Service ifite ibiganiro mu ndimi mirongo ine zirimo n'icyongereza.

Makenzi na Abouba bazakina mu ikipe imwe Aba ni ba myugariro, b'ibumoso (Abouba) n'iburyo (Karim), bombi bakinanye mu ikipe ya Gor Mahia, ndetse bakinanye mu ikipe ya Rayon Sports. Ni abakinnyi bazwi cyane mu Rwanda. Abouba Sibomana na Nizigiyimana bari bamaze iminsi bakora imyitozo bageragezwa n'iyi kipe ubu izakina ikiciro cya mbere muri Kenya, ibarizwa mu mujyi wa Nairobi. Nizigiyimana aheruka kugaragaza mu mikino y'igikombe cya Afurika mu Misiri mu ikipe y'igihugu cye, yakinishwaga nk'umusimbura. Nizigiyimana ni umukinnyi ufite inararibonye, yatangiye gukina nk'akazi mu ikipe ya Vital'O mu 2006, akinira andi makipe nka APR FC, Kiyovu Sports, Rayon Sports na Gor Mahia. Solomon Alubala umuyobozi w'imikino wa Wazito FC yatangaje ko aba bakinnyi bombi ari inyongera nziza ku ikipe yabo kuko bafite ubunararibonye, nk'uko bitangazwa n'iyi kipe. Wazito FC uyu mwaka izakina ikiciro cya mbere nyuma y'uko umwaka ushize w'imikino ibaye iya mbere mu kiciro cya kabiri. Iyi kipe yashinzwe mu 2011, ikina amarushanwa yo hasi hamwe n'ikiciro cya kabiri, mu 2017/2018 nibwo bwa mbere yazamutse mu kiciro cya mbere ariko irangiza mu za nyuma yongera kumanuka. Mu mwaka w'imikino ushize nibwo yongeye kuzamuka, Makenzi na Abouba bakazayikinira mu kiciro cya mbere kuri iyi nshuro ikigarutsemo bwa kabiri.

Abana batandukanijwe n'abavyeyi babo ku rubibe bafatwa nk'abatagira abavyeyi Bivuye kuri politike ya Trump yo gutuza abimukira binjira bava muri Mexique, abantu bakuze barapfungwa abana na bo bari kumwe bagaca bababaka. Ico kibazo kiriko kiratera uruhagarara muri politike ya Amerika. Ku musi wa kabiri, umushikirizamanza mukuru Jeff Sessions yishimikije Bibiliya mu kuvuga ko atazobihanagnira. N'ukuvuga ko abinjira muri Amerika ata ruhusha bategerezwa gucibwa urubanza, bikaba bije guhindura politike y'igihe kirekire aho abanjiye muri ico gihugu ubwa mbere bagirizwa icaha gito. ONU yasavye amakungu kworosha amategeko agenga abimukira Intara ya Texas yashize igisirikare ku rubibe bahana na Mexique Mexique irabura Amerika ko izihimura Trump: Uruzitiro hagati ya Amerika na Mexique ruzokoresha izuba Mu gihe abakuze bagirizwa icaha bakanapfungwa, abana bari kumwe baca bababaka bagaca bashirwa mu mugwi w'abatagira abo bari kumwe. Ibiharuro vy'intwaro yo hagati mu gihugu vyerekana ko abana 1995 batandukanijwe n'abakuze 1940, bapfunzwe kuva itariki 19 z'ukwezi kwa kane n'itariki 31 z'ukwa gatanu. Ico kibazo catumye abantu bihereza amabarabara mbere na Onu ikaba yanebaguye iyo nyifato. Nta myaka yatanzwe y'abo bana batandukanye n'abavyeyi babo. Abo bana baca mu bisata bijejwe amagara y'abantu n'igitanga imfashanyo vya Amarika. Baca barungikwa mu mabohero ya reta canke bagahabwa iyindi miryango ibakira mu ntumbero ya reta yo gutorera inyishu ico kibazo. Ishirahamwe mpuzamakungu Onu ryahamagariye Amerika guhita bahagarika ubwo nyene iryo tandukanywa ry'abana n'abavyeyo babo.

Ba Perezida Museveni, João Lourenço, Kagame na Tshisekedi bemeranyijwe ko inama itaha nk'iyi izabera i Gatuna Inama iheruka yabaye mu kwezi kwa munani umwaka ushize, yarangiye Perezida Kagame na Perezida Museveni bemeye ko bagiye kurangiza ibibazo byari bihari. Ibi ariko ntibyashobotse kuko amakimbirane akomeje nubwo hari ibikorwa byakozwe bigaragaza ubushake bwo gukemura aya makimbirane. Inama yo kuri iki cyumweru nayo yatumijwe kandi iyoborwa na Perezida João Lourenço wa Angola, na Perezida Felix Tshisekedi wa DR Congo, bombi bayirimo nk'abahuza. Imwe mu myanzuro yatangajwe nyuma y'iyi nama; Ubutegetsi bwa Uganda bushinja ubw'u Rwanda kwivanga mu mitegekere ya Uganda n'ubutasi ku butaka bw'iki gihugu. Ubw'u Rwanda bushinja ubwa Uganda gufasha abashaka guhungabanya u Rwanda, gukorera iyicarubozo no gufunga binyuranyije n'amategeko bamwe mu banyarwanda muri Uganda. Amakimbirane y'ibihugu byombi yatumye hari abaturage b'ibihugu byombi bahasiga ubuzima. Yatumye kandi u Rwanda 'rufunga' umupaka munini wakoreshwaga cyane wa Gatuna, runabuza abaturage barwo kwambuka bajya muri Uganda.

Umushikiranganji George Simbachawene yiboneye ingene impunzi zo mw'ikambi ya Mtendeli zariko zitegura ngo zitahuke Ivyo biri mu butumwa umushikiranganji George Simbachawene ariko ahereza impunzi z'Abarundi ziri mu makambi ya Tanzania mu rugendo arimwo mu ntara za Kigoma, Tabora na Katavi basanzwe batuyemwo. Uyu munsi kuwa kabiri, igihe yagendera ikambi y'impunzi ya Mtendeli iri muri District ya Kakonko, Bwana Simbachawene yashoboye kwibonera impunzi zariko zitekera imigizo yazo kugira ngo zitahuke. Avugana n'Abarundi basanzwe baba mw'ikambi ya Nyarugusu iri muri District ya Kasulu ejo ku wa mbere, bwana Simbachawene yabibukije icatumye bahungira muri Tanzania mu 2015, ko wari umutekano muke warangwa mu gihugu. Abibutsa inzira zitatu zo kurangiza ikibazo c'impunzi izo nazo zikaba ari ugutahuka mu gihugu c'amavukiro, uguhabwa ubwenegihugu iyo wahungiye, canke guhabwa ubuhungiro mu kindi gihugu kigira gatatu. Ahimiriza izo mpunzi guhitamwo uguhunguka bagasubira mu gihugu cabo, Bwana Simbachawene yumvikana avuga ati: "Muri izo nzira zitatu rero, wewe ufise ubwenge, uzi ko wipfuza gutegura imigambi ya kazoza kawe, uzi ko kuba mu mahanga hari uburenganzira uba udafise, ukabandanya uri umwana muto arindirije kugaburirwa, utazi ingene uzobaho ejo, ni vyiza ko wiyumvira ugahitamwo inzira ibereye". Yongerako ati: "Nobasaba ko mwiyandikisha muri benshi kugira muje kwubaka igihugu canyu, kuko kuguma ng'aha ni uguta umwanya, n'aho mwoba mu munezero umeze gute". Ubwenegihugu, ubuhungiro i Bulaya Asigura ku bijanye n'uguhabwa ubwenegihugu mu gihugu wahungiyemwo, Bwana Simbachawene yibukije ko hari impunzi zahunze mu 1972 zirenga ibihumbi ijana bahawe ubwenegihugu bwa Tanzania, ariko ko "ivyo bitazigera bisubira". Ati: "Leta ya Tanzania ku bushake bwayo hariho abo yahaye ubwenegihugu, ariko hari n'abatarashobora kuburonka gushika ubu". "Nagomba ndababwire, ibi ntituzobisubira. Birya vyo gutanga ubwenegihugu mu kivunga ntibizigera bisubira, kuko n'abo twahaye ubwo bwenegihugu ntibashoboye kuja kuba hamwe n'abandi banyagihugu, bagumye mu makambi". Mu gihe muri izo mpunzi hari abipfuza kuronswa ubuhungiro bugira gatatu, cane cane mu bihugu vya Bulaya, Bwana Simbachawene abahanura ko ivyo bobivana mu mutwe "na rirya n'ikiza ca coronavirus atawuzi ngo kizohera ryari". Ku ruhande rw'u Burundi, leta imenyesha ko ibandanya yakira abahunguka bavuye mu makambi atandukanye muri Tanzania. Kuri uyu wa kabiri, Ubushikiranganji bw'intwaro yo hagati mu gihugu, umutekano n'iterambere ry'amakomine bumenyesha ko bwakiriye abashika 376 batashe mu gihugu baciye muri komine Gisuru mu ntara ya Ruyigi mu buseruko bw'igihugu.

Kim Jong-un wa Korea ya ruguru na Donald Trump wa Amerika bahuriye mu gihugu ca Vietnam mu kwezi kwa kabiri Abarongoye inzego z'umutekano muri Korea y'Epfo bamenyesha ko izo misire zaterewe mu kigwa citwa Hodo mu buseruko bwa Korea ya ruguru. Mw'itangazo basohoye, bamenyesheje ko "amamisire ya hafi atari make yarashwe ava ku kigwa ca Hodo, hafi y'igisagara ca Wonsan kiri mu buseruko, akaba yatewe agana mu buburaruko bushira ubuseruko". Bamenyesheje kandi ko izo misire zagiye hagati y'ibirometero 70 na 200 imbere y'uko zigwa mu kiyaga c'Ubuyapani. Ico kigwa ca Hodo camye gikoreshwa mu kugerageza za misire zigendera hafi ku muvuduko munini cane, be n'ibindi birwanisho bishobora kurasa kure. Mu gihe vyoba ari vyo, bwoba ari bwo bwa mbere ico gihugu gisubiriye kugerageza misire, inyuma y'aho kigeragereje misire ziterwa kure (missile ballistique intercontinental) mu kwezi kwa 11 umwaka wa 2017. Mu kwezi guheze kwa kane, Korea ya Ruguru yamenyesheje ko yagerageje ikindi kirwanisho yise "tactical guided weapon", igikorwa cahagarikiwe na Bwana Kim ubwiwe nk'uko bivugwa n'itororokanirizo ry'amakuru rya Korea ya Ruguru (KCNA). Ico cari co kirwanisho ca mbere kigeragejwe inyuma y'aho ibiganiro hagati y'umutegetsi mukuru wa Korea ya ruguru, Kim Jong-un, n'umukuru w'igihugu ca Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika, Donald Trump, birangiriye ata masezerano bashitseko. Ibiganiro bigira kabiri hagati ya Trump na Kim muri Vitenam vyarangiye ataco bashitseko Perezida Trump yariyonjoroye mu co yise umugambi mubi wa Kim Jong-un i Hanoi ku mugwa mukuru wa Vietnam bari bahuriyemwo mu kwezi kwa kabiri kw'uno mwaka wa 2019. Iryo geragezwa ry'izo misire zidashika kure ntiritegerezwa kurenga kuvyo Korea ya ruguru yiyemeje vy'ukudasubira kugerageza misire zishika kure canke z'ubumara. Ariko umumenyeshamakuru wa BBC Laura Bicker avuga ko bisa n'uko ico gihugu kiriko kirarambirwa n'ibishikirizwa na Amerika ivuga ko ibihano mu vy'ubutunzi Korea ya ruguru yafatiwe bizobandanya gushika Bwana Kim afashe ingingo nyazo z'uguhagarika umugambi wiwe w'uguhingura ibirwanisho ruhonyanganda vy'ubumara. Umuvugizi w'ibiro Maison Blanche vy'umukuru w'igihugu wa Amerika, Sarah Sanders, avuga ati: "Turazi ivyo Korea ya ruguru yakoze muri iri joro. Tuzoguma tubikurikiranira hafi uko bizoba bikenewe kwose". Mu mwaka uheze wa 2018, Bwana Kim yamenyesheje ko yahagaritse umugambi wiwe w'ukugerageza ibirwanisho vy'ubumara, kandi ko atamisire zishika kure azosubira gukora. Ariko, ibikorwa vy'uguhingura ibirwanisho vy'ubumara bisa n'ibibandanya, aho mu kwezi guheze, amasanamu y'ibigendajuru yerekana ko ikigo gikuru ca Korea ya ruguru gihingura ibirwanisho vy'ubumara kiriko kirakora, bigashoboka ko yoba iriko ikora ibindi bobombe vy'ubumara.

Hari hashize ibyumweru humvikana amakuru yuko yatawe muri yombi mu birwa bya Comores akajyanwa mu Rwanda Major Sankara yakunze kumvikana avugira umutwe wa FLN, harimo no kwigamba ibitero mu bice byegereye ishyamba rya Nyungwe. Minisitiri Sezibera yavuze ko Major Sankara azashyikirizwa ubucamanza mu gihe cya vuba. Muri iki kiganiro yagiranye n'abanyamakuru nyuma y'inama n'abahagarariye ibihugu byabo mu Rwanda, Minisitiri Sezibera yanavuze ko u Rwanda rwasabye ibihugu by'amahanga gufata no kohereza mu Rwanda abakuru b'imitwe yitwaje intwaro irwanya u Rwanda avuga ko bari mu bihugu byabo. Dr Richard Sezibera yasabye ko abakuru b'imitwe irwanya u Rwanda bafatirwa mu bihugu barimo Mu bo yavuze ko yasabye abahagarariye ibihugu byabo mu Rwanda ko batabwa muri yombi, harimo Kayumba Nyamwasa, David Himbara na Charlotte Mukankusi, batavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda. Hari hashize ibyumweru humvikana amakuru yuko Major Sankara yatawe muri yombi mu birwa bya Comores akajyanwa mu Rwanda, nubwo umukuru w'ishyaka MRCD - ari ryo rifite umutwe w'inyeshyamba wa FLN - yari aherutse kumvikana ayahakana.

Amashusho yazungurutse yerekana abanyeshuli basohogwa mu migwi mitomito Bubaye ubwicanyi bwa kabiri buhitanye abantu benshi, bubereye kw'ishuli muri Amerika. Abarenga cumi bandi bakomeretse, kandi bamwe muribo bararemvye. Igipolisi cafashe uwikekwa kuri ubwo bwicanyi, umusore w'imyaka 19 azwi kw'izina rya Nikolas Cruz, yirukanywe kw'ishuli "Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School" kubera indero. Umukuru w'igipolisi yavuze ko yabanje yica abantu batatu hanze y'ishuli, imbere yuko agera imbere akica abandi. (Ni ishuli rigira 19 biciyemwo abantu muri Amerika uno mwaka; kuva mu kwezi kwa mbere kwo mu 2013 rikaba rigira irya 291.) Bwana Cruz yaciye ashira amafoto yiwe kuri Instagram, ikonte yiwe yahavuye yugagwa Igipolisi caciye kija gufungira Bwana Cruz ku biro vya Coral Springs inyuma y'isaha amaze gukora iryo bara. "Twamaze gutangura gusuzuma imbuga ngurukanabumenyi ziwe hamwe n'ivyo yagiye arashira ku mbuga hwaniro, bimwe murivyo ntibiryoshe kuraba," niko Sheriff Israel yavuze. "Ni umunsi mubi cane kuri twebwe," niko Robert Runcie, ari mu bagenzura iryo shuli yavuze. Iryo shuli rifise hafi abanyeshuli 3000, ivyigwa vyaciye bihagarikwa ino ndwi. Munyuma abanyeshuli babonanye n'abavyeyi babo Caesar Figueroa, umuvyeyi aharereye, yabwiye itororokanirizo ry'amakuru CBS ko umukobwa wiwe yari yinyegeje mu kabati igihe amuhamagara. Avuga ko yamusavye ngo ntamuhamagare kuberako atashaka ko uwo mwicanyi yumva ijwi ryiwe.

Aba ni abantu ba mbere basanzemo indwara ya Ebola muri iyi ntara. Ebola imaze umwaka yaradutse muri Kivu ya ruguru mu duce twa Beni na Butembo ndetse no mu mujyi wa Goma. Kugeza ubu imaze guhitana abantu barenga 1800. OMS ivuga ko ubwo aba bantu bari bamaze gukekwaho Ebola mu ijoro ryakeye abashinzwe ubuzima bahise batabara ngo bavurwe, bashaka abakoranyeho nabo batangira on gukingira. OMS iremeza ko umugore we iyi ndwara yaje kumuhitana, gusa umwana we w'amezi arindwi ubu akaba ari kuvurwa. i Mwenga ahagaragaye abarwayi ba Ebola babiri Umugore wishwe na Ebola i Mwenga bikekwa ko yari amaze iminsi avuye ku rugendo rurerure i Beni akagaruka iwe aciye i Goma na Bukavu mu nzira y'amazi agafata inzira isubira Mwenga. Mu kiganiro n'abanyamakuru kuri uyu wa gatanu, guverineri w'intara ya Kivu y'epfo Theo Ngwabije avuga ko abantu bamenyekanye ko bakoranyeho n'uyu mugore hamwe n'abamushyinguye ubu bakingiwe. Abandi bantu barwaye Ebola babonetse nyuma y'uko kuwa kabiri w'iki cyumweru abashinzwe ubuzima muri Congo berekanye umugore n'umwana we bavuwe bagakira Ebola i Goma muri Congo. Kuri uwo munsi kandi Dr Sabue Mulangu inzobere muri Ebola, yabwiye BBC ko aba bombi bakijijwe n'imiti ya Ebola iri kugeragezwa yagaragaje ko ku bantu 681 bayifashe 60% bari kukira Ebola.

Minisitiri Ngamije avuga ko bitari bisanzwe kubona abantu bapfa mu minsi ikurikiranye bazize Covid-19 Ku wa gatandatu, habonetse abantu bashya 100 banduye Covid-19, naho abantu babiri irabica. Kuva iki cyorezo cyagera mu Rwanda - ku wa mbere haraba hashize amezi icyenda - abarenga 6,500 baranduye, muri bo abarenga 5,800 barakize, naho abantu 56 muri bo cyarabishe, nkuko imibare ya leta ibigaragaza. Mu kiganiro ku gitangazamakuru cya leta, cyananyuze ku bitangazamakuru bimwe byo mu gihugu, Minisitiri Ngamije yagize ati: "Imibare iri kwiyongera mu buryo buteye inkeke". "Twaherukaga abantu 100 [banduye] ku munsi mu kwezi kwa munani... ubundi babaga ari 40". Yongeyeho ko bitari bisanzwe kubona abantu bapfa mu minsi ikurikiranye bazize Covid-19. Ni ikiganiro kandi cyari kirimo na Minisitiri w'ubutegetsi bw'igihugu Prof Shyaka Anastase, Minisitiri w'ubucuruzi n'inganda Madamu Soraya Hakuziyaremye n'umuvugizi wa polisi CP John Bosco Kabera. Uyu muvugizi wa polisi yavuze ko mu mezi icyenda ashize "nta gihe twigeze tubona abantu badohotse batubahiriza amabwiriza nk'iki gihe". Mu kutubahiriza amabwiriza hatanzwe ingero zirimo nka za 'restaurants' zisigaye zarahinduwe utubari, kudahana intera no kutambara agapfukamunwa cyangwa kukambara nabi. CP Kabera yavuze ko no mu minsi mikuru yegereje, abantu badakwiye gutezuka ku mabwiriza, ati: "Turabamenyesha ko coronavirus itagira Noheli cyangwa ubunani". Urukingo ni ryari mu Rwanda? Minisitiri Ngamije yavuze ko u Rwanda ruri muri gahunda y'umuryango w'abibumbye (ONU/UN) igizwe n'ibihugu 96 bizahabwa urukingo, kandi ko rwamaze gutanga ubusabe bwarwo. Ati: "Tugomba kuba mu bihugu bya mbere muri Afurika [bizabona urukingo]... Ibisabwa byose turabyujuje".
