Yavuze ko igihe ruzaba rugeze mu Rwanda - kigereranywa ko ari nko mu mezi atatu ari imbere - ruzatangwa bahereye kuri 20% bo mu cyiciro cy'abafite ibyago byinshi byo kwandura, nkuko bikubiye muri iyo gahunda ya ONU. Yongeyeho ko u Rwanda rushobora no kubona izindi nkingo binyuze mu bufatanye n'ibindi bihugu by'inshuti. Bwana Ngamije ati: "Nta kiguzi [abakingirwa] bazasabwa... ni urukingo ruzatangirwa ku buntu". "Iyaba rwari rubonetse [rutugezeho] n'ejo twakingira". Iki kiganiro kije gikurikira indi ngamba yafashwe muri iki cyumweru, aho minisiteri ya siporo yahagaritse imikino ya shampiyona y'umupira w'amaguru kubera uku kwiyongera k'ubwandu bwa coronavirus. Iyi minisiteri yavuze ko ku makipe amwe hagaragaye kurenga ku mabwiriza yo kwirinda.

Bwana Ahmad umuyobozi wa CAF kuva mu 2017 Ku ruhande, iperereza rya BBC rigaragaza ko Bwana Ahmad yahawe inyishyu inshuro ebyiri z'ubutumwa yagiyemo mu bihugu bibiri nyamara kandi ku matariki amwe mu gihe cy'igikombe cy'isi cya 2018. Inyandiko BBC yabonye, zerekana ko uyu mugabo yishyuwe kubera ubutumwa bw'akazi yagiyemo hagati ya tariki 23 y'ukwezi kwa gatandatu na tariki 1 y'ukwezi kwa karindwi. Icya mbere, inyandiko zigaragaza ko yashyize umukono ku nsimburamubyizi zigaragaza ko kuri aya matariki yari mu Misiri, ashyira kandi umukono ku zindi nyandiko z'insimburamubyizi zigaragaza ko kuri iyo minsi yari mu Burusiya. Nka Visi Perezida w'impuzamashyirahamwe y'umupira w'amaguru ku isi (FIFA), Bwana Ahmad yagombaga guhabwa insimburamubyizi y'amadolari y'Amerika 450 ku munsi mu gihe cyo gutegura irushanwa. CAF, ifite icyicaro i Cairo mu Misiri, nta mwanya wihariye igira mu gutegura igikombe cy'isi. CAF yahaye BBC igisata cya siporo itangazo rivuga ko "Perezida Ahmad yasabye ubuyobozi bwa FIFA kubafasha kuzana impinduka muri CAF kugira ngo ibikorwa bye bijye mu mucyo kurushaho". Bavuga ko Ahmad Ahmad atasubiza ku byo BBC yamubajije kuko bategereje ibizava mu iperereza rya FIFA. Mu kwezi gushize, FIFA yamenyesheje ko yohereje umunyamabanga mukuru wayo kuzajya kuyobora no kugenzura ibikorwa byose bya CAF guhera tariki ya mbere z'ukwezi kwa munani. Bwana Ahmad wahawe kuyobora CAF kuva mu 2017, ari gukorwaho iperereza na FIFA ku birego bya ruswa, birimo ibijyanye no kugura ibikoresho bidasanzwe by'icyumba cy'imyitozo ngororamubiri. Uyu mugabo w'imyaka 59 ukomoka muri Madagascar inshuro zose yahakanye ibyaha aregwa. Ku itariki 13 y'ukwezi kwa gatandatu 2018, Bwana Ahmad yagiye i Moscow mu nama rusange ya FIFA mu gikombe cy'isi, yabaye kuva tariki 14 kugeza tariki 11 z'ukwezi kwa karindwi. Inyandiko BBC yabonye zerekana ko Bwana Ahmad yavuye mu Burusiya tariki 23 y'ukwezi kwa gatandatu akamara iminsi ine mu Misiri, mbere yo gusubira i Moscow avuye no mu rundi rugendo iwabo muri Madagascar hagati ya tariki 27 y'ukwa gatandatu n'iya mbere y'ukwa karindwi. Gusa, inyandiko zerekana ko tariki 28 y'ukwezi kwa cyenda 2018 Bwana Ahmad yahawe amadolari 18,450 na CAF nk'insimburamubyizi y'iminsi 41 yamaze mu Burusiya hagati ya tariki ya 7 y'ukwezi kwa gatandatu na tariki 17 y'ukwezi kwa karindwi. Umukono we ugaragara ku nyandiko zerekana uko yakoresheje amafaranga mu rugendo rwitwa 'Ubutumwa: Igikombe cy'isi Uburusiya 2018'. Ibyumweru bibiri mbere yabwo, tariki ya 9 y'ukwa cyenda, Bwana Ahmad yari yahawe na CAF amadolari 4,040 nk'insimburamubyizi y'iminsi hagati ya tariki 23 y'ukwa gatandatu na tariki 1 y'ukwa karindwi y'uko "yasuye ibiro bya CAF". Bwana Ahmad yavuye Moscow tariki 23 y'ukwa gatandatu ajya mu Misiri ku cyicaro cya CAF ahagera ku munsi wakurikiyeho. BBC yamenye ko Bwana Ahmad atari mu Misiri cyangwa mu Burusiya hagati ya tariki 27 y'ukwa gatandatu n'iya mbere y'ukwa karindwi 2018, ahubwo yari muri Madagascar nk'uko inyandiko zibigaragaza. BBC yamubajije niba kuri ariya matariki atari ari muri Madagascar, ariko yaba we cyangwa CAF ntacyo basubije kuri iki kibazo. Bwana Ahmad Ahmad uyobora CAF kuva mu 2017 asigaje imyaka ibiri kuri manda ye y'imyaka ine.

"Abatabwa mu binogo nazanwa n'imodoka za leta" Ushikiriza inama nshingamateka na nkenguzamateka icegeranyo ca buri mwaka c'aho ugejeje ibikorwa, umugwi CVR wasavye leta ihari ubu gusaba ikigongwe ku bantu bose bahuye n'ivyo vvago. N'icegeranyo giteye ubwoba nk'uko vyashikirijwe n'umukuru w'umugwi CVR Pierre Claver Ndayicariye. Kivuga ido n'ido ry'ingene abantu ibihumbi n'ibihumbi bagizwe ahanini n'abo mu bwoko bw'abahutu bishwe muri uwo mwaka w' 1972 bagatabwa mu binogo rusangi na cane cane mu bibanza bitatu vy'intara ya Gitega ari naho ahanini uwo mugwi wakoreye mu mwaka uheze. Wamenyesheje ko ku binogo 8 washoboye kuzuramwo ibisigarira muri commune za Shombo, Giheta no ku ruzi Ruvubu, umugwi CVR waharuye abantu bahatawe barenga ibihumbi indwi n'amajana atatu na 40, abahicirwa bakaba begeranirizwa ku mugwa mukuru wa Gitega bakuwe cane cane mu ntara zihana urubibe n'iyo ntara. Benshi ngo bari abanyeshure, abarimu, abadandaza n'abihebeye imana. Uruhara rw'inzego za reta ico gihe ruguma rugaruka Umugwi CVR uvuga ko abaja kwicwa batangwa canke bakegeranywa n'abakuru b'imitumba, abakuru b'ama commune canke b'intara, imodoka zabatwara nazo zari iz'igisirikare canke izo cahamagaje. Izo mbere ngo ni nazo zongera zikaja kwimba ibinogo zigatwara abo bantu kubitabwamo bahejeje kwicwa bakubwiswe inyundo canke ibindi vyuma, barashwe canke bapfiriye mu twumba batsindagirwamwo ari benshi cane batabona izuba kandi badahabwa amazi, rimwe na rimwe mbere ngo hari abasukwa mu binogo bagihema. Ibikorwa vy'uwo mugwi umaze imyaka irenga itandatu ushinzwe birabandanya Ivyo vyose umugwi CVR uvuga ko wabibwiwe n'abakiriho mu babibonye, abacitse kw'icumu, apfakazi canke impfuvyi. Ngo hari n'abari mu nzego za reta ico gihe bakiriho kandi bavuganye n'uwo mugwi. Umugwi CVR mu mwaka uheze warakoreye kandi ugiye kuzobandanya ukorera mu ntara za Rumonge na Makamba ari naho bivugwa ko ubwicanyi bwatanguriye itariki 29 ukwezi kwa kane mu 1972 butumbereye abatutsi. Uwo mugwi ukibaza gusa ingene bwanyarutse gukwira igihugu cose kandi abavugwa ko bari bateye igihugu muri izo ntara batarenze aho. CVR ishaka ko ukuri kumenyekana ntihazosubira kugira uwuzira ivyo atakoze Pierre Claver Ndayicariye arongoye umugwi wo kurondera ukiri ku vyago vyashikiye Uburundi yavuze ko naho ico cegeranyo giteye ubwoba intumbero yaco ari ugukiza abarundi biciye mu kumenya ukuri benshi gushika ubu batigeze bamenya. Ibikorwa vy'uwo mugwi umaze imyaka irenga itandatu ushinzwe birabandanya, mu myaka ibiri iheze ukaba mbere warongerejewe ibikorwa kuko ubu utohoza gushika mu 1885 kare wageza kuva Uburundi bucikukira gushika mu 2008. Kuva wongewe ibikorwa ukaba usigaje imyaka ibiri ku kiringo c'imyaka ine wahawe ariko gishobora kwongerwa.

Uwo muriro wadutse kuri hoteli iri kwifashishwa by'agateganyo mu kuvura abarwayi ba Covid-19 Uwo muriro watangiye mu gitondo cyo kuri iki cyumweru kuri hoteli Swarna Palace iri kwifashishwa mu gucumbikira abarwayi ba coronavirus. Mu gihe cy'iminota 30 abazimya inkongi bari bamaze kuwuzimya. Abategetsi bavuze ko abarwayi bawurokotse bose bajyanwe ku bindi bitaro byo muri uwo mujyi. Minisitiri w'intebe Narendra Modi yavuze ko "atewe agahinda" n'uwo muriro, ubaye uwa kabiri mu minsi micye ishize wibasiye ikigo kivurirwamo abarwayi ba Covid-19. Uyu muriro wo kuri iki cyumweru watangiye nyuma gato ya saa kumi n'imwe zaho. Abarenga 20 bakomeretse, ubu bajyanwe ku bindi bitaro. Impamvu yawuteye ntizwi. Iperereza ryatangiye. Minisitiri w'intebe Modi yanditse kuri Twitter ko yifatanyije n'imiryango yagize ibyago. YS Jagan Mohan Reddy, Minisitiri mukuru muri iyo leta ya Andhra Pradesh, imwe mu zigize Ubuhinde, yamaze kuvuga ko abo mu miryango y'abagizweho ingaruka n'uwo muriro bazahabwa impozamarira ya miliyoni 5 z'ama-rupees. Ayo arenga miliyoni 64 mu mafaranga y'u Rwanda. Uyu muriro wadutse nyuma yaho ku wa kane abarwayi umunani bapfiriye mu bitaro byita ku barwaye Covid-19 byo mu mujyi wa Ahmedabad, biturutse ku muriro wadutse mu gice cyabyo cyita ku ndembe. Umwe mu bakuru bo mu rwego rwo kuzimya inkongi yabwiye BBC ishami ritangaza ibiganiro mu rurimi rwa Gujarati ko uwo muriro wakwirakwiriye uvuye ku mwambaro w'akazi wabugenewe (uzwi nka PPE mu mpine) w'umuganga. Uwo mwambaro we ngo wahiye kubera ikibazo mu nsinga z'amashanyarazi (cyangwa z'umuyagankuba, mu Kirundi). Kugeza ubu, Ubuhinde buri ku mwanya wa gatatu ku isi mu bihugu bifite abanduye Covid-19 benshi cyane bamaze gutangazwa. Bufite abanduye barenga miliyoni 2,1, muri bo abarenga 43,000 yarabishe, nkuko imibare ya Kaminuza ya Johns Hopkins yo muri Amerika ibigaragaza. Kuri iki cyumweru, mu Buhinde habonetse 64,000 bashya banduye Covid-19, uyu ukaba ari undi muhigo w'abandi benshi cyane babonetse mu munsi umwe.

Mu kwezi guhsize kwa 10, Doudou Diène uyobora komisiyo yakoze iperereza ku Burundi yavuze ko ibiri mu Burundi ari ingorane zahereye mu 2015 zikomeje Abafashwe bagafungwa ni abaturage bo muri komine Kanyosha mu ntara ya Bujumbura Rural, mu duce twa Kavumu, Sororezo, Cyoga, Muyira nk'uko Therence Nahimana uvugira CNL abivuga. Aba bafashwe nyuma yo kurasa no gukomereka k'umuyobozi w'agace (chef de zone) ka Kavumu mu ijoro ryo ku wa gatanu ushize, CNL ikeka ko bifitanye isano. Ubutegetsi bw'u Burundi ntacyo buratangaza ku ifungwa ry'aba bantu. Therence Nahimana ati: "Bucyeye baje Kavumu n'imitumba iyegereye bafata abanywanyi ba CNL, ariko habaye gutora mu bantu umwe umwe, nibyo bituma tugira amakenga ducyeka ko ari uruhigi". Nahimana avuga ko abarwanashyaka ba CNL bakomeza gutotezwa mu byo babona ko bifatiye ku mpamvu za politiki. Ishyaka CNL ritavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi riyobowe na Agathon Rwasa, riri mu mashyaka ashobora guhatana mu matora y'umukuru w'igihugu ateganyijwe umwaka utaha. Ishami ry'umuryango w'abibumbye ryita ku burenganzira bwa muntu mu kwezi gushize ryasohoye raporo ivuga ko mu Burundi hari ibikorwa bikomeye bibangamira uburenganzira bwa muntu. Iyi raporo ivuga ko ibi bikorwa byibasira abatari mu ishyaka CNDD-FDD riri ku butegetsi ntibanarishyigikire hamwe n'imiryango yabo, bikibasira kandi abo mu mashyaka atavuga rumwe naryo. Ambasaderi Albert Shingiro uhagarariye u Burundi muri UN mu cyumweru gishize yabwiye inama ishinzwe umutekano ku isi ko nta bibazo byo kubangamira uburenganzira bwa muntu biri mu gihugu cye. Ubutegetsi bw'u Burundi bwahakanye ibivugwa muri iyi raporo, buvuga ko ishingiye ku mpamvu za politiki kandi ibyo ivuga bitandukanye n'ukuri kw'ibiri mu gihugu. Therence Nahimana avuga ko abarwanashyaka ba CNL bafunzwe bamwe bajyanywe muri gereza nkuru ya Mpimba harimo abatarabwirwa ibyo baregwa, bikitwa ko hagikorwa amatohoza (iperereza). Ishyaka CNL, rivuga ko nta bworoherane bwa politiki buri mu Burundi, rimaze amezi rigaragaza zimwe mu nzu rikoreramo zikomeje gusenywa, abayoboke baryo bagakorerwa urugomo. Iri shyaka ubu rivuga ko ibiro ryafunguye ku cyumweru muri komine Muyinga mu ijoro ryakeye "byashenywe n'abantu batazwi". Mu bihe bishize, kuri ikikibazo uruhande rw'ubutegetsi rwagiye ruvuga ko ibi bikorwa n'abo muri iri shyaka ubwabo kugira ngo basebye ubutegetsi. Mu kwezi gushize urukiko rwakatiye gufunga burundu abagabo bane bahamijwe icyaha cyo kwica Nsavyumwami Grégoire umwe mu barwanashyaka ba CNL. Uyu yishwe mu kwezi kwa munani ubwo we na bagenzi be batezwe igico bavuye mu bikorwa by'iri shyaka bakagirirwa nabi we akahasiga ubuzima.

Umutwe w'intagondwa wa al-Shabab ugamije guhirika leta ya Somalia yemewe n'ibihugu by'amahanga Al-Shabab ivuga ko yafunguye icyo kigo mu mujyi wa Jilib mu majyepfo ya Somalia, umujyi uri mu gace uwo mutwe ugenzura. Radio Andalus y'uyu mutwe yatangaje ko washyizeho umurongo wa telefone utishyurwa ukora amasaha 24 buri munsi kugira ngo umuturage uwo ari we wese wo muri uwo mujyi ugaragaje ibimenyetso bya coronavirus ahamagare. Iyo radio ntiyatangaje umubare w'abamaze kwandura Covid-19 muri ako gace. Iryo tangazo ryanyuze kuri radio ya al-Shabab ntiryanavuze niba uwo mutwe ufite ibikoresho byo gupima coronavirus cyangwa niba abaganga bawo bafite ubushobozi bwo gutahura ubwandu bwayo. Mu ntangiriro y'uku kwezi kwa gatandatu, umukuru mu by'idini wa al-Shabab, Mohamed ala-Mohamed, yashishikarije abantu kwirinda Covid-19 banywa imvange y'imiti rwatsi avuga ko ivura Covid-19. Ishami ry'umuryango w'abibumbye ryita ku buzima (OMS/WHO) rivuga ko kugeza ubu nta muti nta n'urukingo byari byaboneka kuri Covid-19. Minisiteri y'ubuzima muri Somalia itanga amakuru mashya buri munsi ajyanye n'imibare yuko coronavirus ihagaze mu gihugu, ariko ntibizwi niba iyo mibare irimo n'abarwayi bo mu turere al-Shabab igenzura. Ubwo coronavirus yatangazwaga bwa mbere ko yagaragaye muri Somalia mu kwezi kwa gatatu uyu mwaka, al-Shabab yamaganye ayo makuru ivuga ko ari "igihano cy'Imana". Mu kwezi kwa kane uyu mwaka, Fuad Shangole, umwe mu bakuru akaba n'umubwiriza-butumwa muri al-Shabab, yavuze ko "Imana yohereje iyo virusi mu guhana abatari abayisilamu". Muri uko kwezi kwa kane kandi, umuvugizi wa al-Shabab, Ali Mohamud Rage, na we yavuze ko Covid-19 ari igihano cyatanzwe n'Imana kubera "akarengane kari mu bihugu bitari iby'abayisilamu no kwibasira abayisilamu". Umutwe wa al-Shabab ukorana n'uwa al-Qaeda. Umaze igihe ugaba ibitero bigamije guhirika ubutegetsi bwa leta ya Somalia bwemewe n'amahanga bufite icyicaro mu murwa mukuru Mogadishu.

Kuri gereza ya Nyarugenge iri i Mageragere mu mujyi wa Kigali Chief Superintendent of Prisons (CSP) Kayumba Innocent wari ukuriye iyi gereza, Superintendent of Prisons (SP) Eric Ntakirutimana wari umwungirije na Ephrem Mutamaniwa wari ushinzwe iperereza muri iyi gereza, bafunzwe mu kwezi gushize, ubugenzacyaha bwabwiye ibinyamakuru mu Rwanda ko baregwa ubuhemu. Inyandiko y'urukiko rw'ibanze rwa Nyarugenge BBC ifitiye kopi, igaragaza ko imfungwa ifite ubwenegihugu bw'Ubwongereza ihafungiye, Visa Debit Card yayo yatangiye kwibwaho ikoreshejwe atabizi kuva mu kwezi kwa cyenda 2020 kugeza mu kwa mbere 2021, akibwa amafaranga arenga miliyoni icyenda y'u Rwanda. Abaregwa bahakana ibyaha baregwa, bavuga ko nta gihamya kandi bo batazobereye mu ikonabuhanga, basaba gufungurwa bagakurikiranwa badafunze. Aba bategetsi ba gereza baregwa kwinjira mu makuru abitse muri mudasobwa cyangwa urusobe rwazo, maze bagatumiza ibintu bitandukanye birimo za telephone nshya, ibiribwa, inzoga n'ibindi, bakoresheje imyirondoro na simcards za bamwe mu bagororwa bafunze. Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko bufite ibimenyetso birimo abatangabuhamya na telephone ngendanwa zaguzwe zitumijwe hakoreshejwe iyo karita, izo telephone zikanakoreshwa n'abaregwa. Inyandiko y'urukiko ivuga ko ubushinjacyaha bubarega kwifashisha umwe mu bafunze uzobereye mu ikoranabuhanga kugira ngo babigereho. Umuturage ufite ubwenegihugu bw'Ubwongereza uhafungiye, yakoreshaga iyo karita mu kugura imiti ye, yaherukaga gukoresha ikarita ye mu kwezi kwa munani 2020, nk'uko inyandiko y'urukiko ibivuga. Mu kwiregura, Kayumba Innocent yavuze ko atazi iby'ikoranabuhanga kandi yagambaniwe n'uwahawe ibikoresho by'abafunze birimo visa cards na mudasobwa, kandi amenye ko habaye kwiba yasabye uwo mufungwa wibye gusubizaho amafaranga yibwe, ariko uwo ntabikore. Urukiko rw'ibanze rwa Nyarugenge rwavuze ko hari impamvu zikomeye zituma abaregwa bakurikiranwa bafunze, rwategetse ko bakomeza gufungwa by'agateganyo. Aba baregwa bajuririye uwo mwanzuro mu rukiko rwisumbuye, urukiko rwisumbuye rutegeka ko bakomeza gufungwa by'agateganyo.

Ingabo za FARDC ziregwa na ONU kwica abantu barenga 100 muri Kasai Iyo video y'iminota indwi, imaze iminsi ihanahanwa ku mbuga ngurukanabumenyi, yerekana igikorwa co kurwanya umugwi uzwi kw'izina rya Kamwina Nsapu mu ntara ya Kasai yo hagati. Umugwi witiriwe umukuru wawo Kamwina Nsapu, watanye mu mitwe n'ingabo za leta mu kwezi kwa munani umwaka uheze. Abagwanyi ba Kamwina Nsapu ahanini baba bitwaje ibihiri n'amatopito. Ku munsi wa kabiri, ishirahamwe mpuzamakungu ryatangaje ko ryibaza kw'abasirikare ba Congo boba barishe abantu barenga ijana mu ntambara zabahuje n'uyo mugwi.

Ubu bushakashatsi bwatahuye ko ikinyabutabire kigaragara gusa mu bihumyo gishobora guha ubwirinzi ubwonko bw'umuntu. Ubu bushakashatsi bwagaragaje ko uko abantu bwakoreweho barushagaho kurya ibihumyo, ari ko barushagaho kwitwara neza mu bizamini byo gutekereza no guconshora amakuru. Ariko aba bashakashatsi bavuga ko bitabashobocyeye kugaragaza isano itaziguye hagati y'ibihumyo n'imikorere y'ubwonko. Ibyavuye muri ubu bushakashatsi bwakozwe n'abashakashatsi bo kuri kaminuza y'igihugu ya Singapour (National University of Singapore), bishingiye ku mirire y'Abashinwa 663, bafite hejuru y'imyaka 60 y'amavuko, yagenzuwe guhera mu mwaka wa 2011 kugera mu wa 2017. Mu gihe cy'imyaka itandatu ubwo bushakashatsi bwamaze, abashakashatsi bavuga ko basanze kurya ibihumyo bigabanya ibyago byo gubanuka gucye kw'uko ubwonko bukoresha amakuru bubonye. Ko rero hafi abantu icyenda muri buri bantu 100 bariye ibice birenga bibiri by'ibihumyo buri cyumweru basanganywe icyo kibazo, ugereranyije n'abantu 19 mu bantu 100 bariye ibihumyo bitageze ku gice kimwe. Porofeseri Lei Feng wo kuri kaminuza y'igihugu ya Singapour mu ishami rijyanye no kuvura indwara zo mu mutwe akaba ari na we wayoboye itsinda ry'abakoze ubu bushakashatsi, yavuze ko "butangaje" kandi ko ari ubwo "gushimwa". Yagize ati: "Bisa nkaho ikiribwa kimwe dusanzwe tubona byoroshye gishobora kugira ingaruka zidasanzwe ku igabanuka ry'uburyo ubwonko bukoresha amakuru bubona". "Ariko turi no kuvuga ku ruhurirane rw'ibintu byinshi - icyayi, imboga rwatsi, ubunyobwa n'amafi na byo ni ingirakamaro". Avuga kuri ubu bushakashatsi, Dr James Pickett wo mu kigo Alzheimer's Society cyo mu Bwongereza cyita kikanakora ubushakashatsi ku bafite ibibazo byo mu mutwe, yagize ati: "Nubwo kurya indyo yuzuyemo imbuto n'imboga, zirimo n'ibihumyo, ari intangiriro nziza, inama isumba izindi twatanga ni no kugabanya ingano y'isukari n'umunyu, gukora imyitozo ngororangingo, kunywa inzoga mu rugero no kwirinda kunywa itabi".

Abimukira bafata urugendo rw'amazi kenshi bagenda mu bwato bubi kandi bwuzuye cane Ubwato bushasha bw'iryo shirahamwe bwitwa Ocean Viking, buriko ibendera ry'igihugu ca Norvege. Abantu 31 babukoramwo barimwo abaganga icenda bo mw'ishirahamwe bikorana, Medecins Sans Frontières (MSF). SOS Méditerranée ryahagaritse ibikorwa vy'ubwato bwa mbere bwitwa Aquarius, bumaze kwankirwa kwinjira mu Butariyano. Ibihumbi vy'abimukira bagerageza kujabuka ikiyaga Mediterane bashaka kuja i Buraya buri mwaka, kandi Libya niho hantu nyamukuru bahagurukira. Abafata urwo rugendo kenshi bagenda nabi mu bwato bubi cane kandi bwuzuye ku buryo benshi bapfa badashitse. Ariko kuva hagati y'umwaka wa 2017, igtigiri c'abimukira bafata urwo rugendo caragabanutse. Kugabanuka kwabo vyatewe ahanini n'utwigoro twa leta y'Ubutaliyano hamwe n'ibindi ihugu vya Buraya vyahimirije Libya kubuza abimukira kujabuka Mediterane - ariko iyo ngingo yariyamirijwe n'amashirahamwe aharanira agateka ka zina muntu. Ubu bwato bwitwa "Alex" bwari bwahagaritswe ku cyambu cya Lampedusa mu Butaliyani Uwafashije gushinga ishirahamwe SOS Méditerranée, Sophie Beau, yabariye BBC ko ata bwato bwo gutabara na bumwe kuri ubu bukorera muri ako karere, kandi amashirahamwe y'abagiraneza nta kundi yari kubigenza. Yabandanije ati: "Twatanguje SOS Méditerranée mu 2015. Kuva ico gihe twarashoboye gutabara abantu 30.000 ariko hari abandi benshi batabawe n'ayandi mato, harimwo n'aya gisirikare. "Ariko kuri ubu ni nk'aho ata batabazi bahari. Rero twebwe nk'abasivile, dukora ivyo dushoboye iyo amaleta yananiwe. Ntibihagije ariko turashobora kubikora, kandi turabikora." Yongeyeko yuko amategeko mpuzamakungu agenga inzuzi ashigikiye igikorwa cabo ku ngingo y'uko gukiza ubuzima bw'abantu birengeye imvo za politike. Mu kwezi kwa mbere, icegeranyo ca ONU cavuze ko abimukira batandatu bapfuye buri munsi bagerageza kujabuka Mediterane mu 2018. Ishirahamwe mpuzamakungu rijejwe abimukira rivuga ko n'imiburiburi abantu 426 bapfuye muri uno mwaka bagerageza kujabuka Mediterane.

Mourinho yavuze ko Manchester City yafashijwe n'imikino ibiri ibanza yakiniye kuri icyo kibuga Manchester City yongeye gusubira ku mwanya wa mbere by'agateganyo muri shampiyona ya Premier League nyuma yaho ibitego bya David Silva, Sergio Aguero na Ilkay Gundogan biyifashije kubona amanota atatu y'uwo mukino waberaga ku kibuga cyayo cya Etihad. Ni umukino warangiye Manchester City itsinze Manchester United ibitego 3-1. Ariko Mourinho yavuze ko Manchester City yafashijwe n'imikino ibiri ibanza yakiniye kuri icyo kibuga. Yavuze ko iyo mikino ya Manchester City - itsinda Southampton na Shakhtar Donetsk ku giteranyo cy'ibitego byose hamwe 12 kuri 1 - yayitsinze biyoroheye kurusha iyo Manchester United yo iheruka gukina. Uyu wari umukino wa wa gatatu wikurikiranya Manchester United ikinnye yasuye, nyuma yo gutsinda Bournemouth mu mpera y'icyumweru cyabanje na nyuma yo gutsinda Juventus ku wa gatatu ushize. Mourinho yabwiye ikiganiro cya BBC Radio 5 live ati: "Tubabajwe n'ibyavuye mu mukino mu gihe ikipe yari yitanze, ikipe yakinnye imikino itatu iyikinira hanze mu cyumweru kimwe, harimo umukino ukomeye cyane wa Juventus, mu gihe indi kipe [Manchester City] yo yakinnye imikino ibiri ya gicuti ikayikinira ku kibuga cyayo ikina na Southampton na Shakhtar". Ilkay Gundogan yatsinze igitego cya gatatu cya Manchester City, nyuma yo guhererekanya umupira kw'iyi kipe inshuro 44 Yongeyeho ati: "Kunanirwa k'umubiri no kunanirwa ko mu mutwe bitera gukora amakosa. Bari bananiwe ku mubiri no mu mutwe. Byagusaba kuba ukina umupira w'amaguru cyangwa undi mukino wo ku rwego rwo hejuru kugira ngo ibi ubashe kubyumva". Igitego kimwe cya Manchester United cyinjijwe kuri penaliti na Anthony Martial, nyuma y'ikosa umunyezamu Ederson yari akoreye kuri Romelu Lukaku. Umutoza Pep Guardiola wa Manchetser City yabwiye BBC Sport ko ikipe ye yari "ikwiye iyi ntsinzi". Yagize ati: "Mu gice cya mbere, twakinnye dufite ubwoba gacye...mu gice cya kabiri, umukino wari ufunguye gacye nuko tubona umwanya urushijeho wo gukina, nuko dukina neza dukina n'ikipe yo ku rwego rwo hejuru".

Kuri iyo tariki ya 5 y'ukwezi kwa 2 mu 1991 ni bwo Abarundi batoye ayo masezerano y'ubumwe bw'Abarundi n'amajwi 89.21%. Amasezerano y'ubumwe bw'Abarundi yari agamije kurandura burundu indyane zari zishingiye ku moko n'uturere. Kuva icyo gihe, ayo masezerano yabaye imwe mu nkingi zigize itegekonshinga ry'u Burundi. Ariko n'ubwo yashyizweho, indyane zishingiye ku moko na politiki zarakomeje, akaba ari yo mpamvu u Burundi bukiri mu bihugu by'Afurika n'isi muri rusange bifite impunzi nyinshi. Kuba u Burundi bufite abanyagihugu bumva ko baba bafite amahoro bari hanze y'igihugu cyabo, bigaragaza ko ubwo bumwe bw'Abarundi bugifite ikibazo. Imvo n'Imvano rero, yageragezaga kureba aho byapfiriye. Abatumire bacu bari Adrien Sibomana, wabaye umushikiranganji wa mbere uvuye muri ubwo bushake bwo gushyiraho amasezerano y'ubumwe bw'Abarundi, twari kumwe kandi na Cyprien Mbonimpa wabaye umushikirangaji w'imibano n'amahanga muri iyo leta yari iyobowe na Adrien Sibomana. Muri icyo kiganiro kandi twari kumwe na Agathon Rwasa, umukuru wa CNL, umugambwe utavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi buriho ubu mu Burundi, akaba yari muri PALIPEHUTU icyo gihe amasezerano y'ubumwe bw'Abarundi ashyirwaho, undi twari kumwe ni Léonce Ngendakumana wo muri Sahwanya-FRODEBU, umugambwe nawo utavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi buriho ubu mu Burundi, icyo gihe hashyirwaho amasezerano y'ubumwe bw'Abarundi uwo mugambwe wakoreraga mu kinyegero, ariko naho ugiriye ahagaragara ntiwemeraga ayo masezerano. Iki kiganiro mwagiteguriwe kandi murakigezwaho na Félin Gakwaya.

Polisi yavuze ko bane biciwe ahakorerwa 'massage' mu gace ka Acworth kari mu nkengero y'umujyi wa Atlanta, naho abandi bane bicirwa ahantu habiri hakorerwa 'massage' ho mu mujyi wa Atlanta nyirizina. Nyuma yaho, Koreya y'epfo yemeje ko bane mu bapfuye bakomoka muri icyo gihugu. Abategetsi bavuze ko nyuma yo gushakisha bataye muri yombi Robert Aaron Long w'imyaka 21, wo muri iyi leta ya Georgia, ucyekwaho kuba muri ibyo bitero byose uko ari bitatu. Bavuze ko bamusanze mu ntera igera hafi kuri 240km mu majyepfo ya Atlanta. Nta mpamvu yateye uko kurasana ko ku wa kabiri yari yamenyekana. Ariko, ibyaha by'urwango rwibasira Abanyamerika bakomoka muri Aziya byariyongereye mu mezi macye ashize, bitijwe umurindi n'amagambo avuga ko abakomoka muri Aziya ari bo ntandaro y'ikwirakwira rya Covid-19. Mu ijambo yagejeje ku baturage mu cyumweru gishize, Perezida Joe Biden yamaganye "ibyaha bibi by'urwango byibasira Abanyamerika bakomoka muri Aziya bagabweho ibitero, batotejwe, bakitirirwa kandi bakagirwa ba nyirabayazana". Robert Aaron Long ucyekwaho kugaba ibi bitero yafunzwe Ukurasana kwa mbere kwabaye hafi saa kumi n'imwe z'umugoroba zaho (ni ukuvuga 21:00 GMT) ahitwa Young's Asian Massage Parlor mu gace ka Acworth mu karere ka Cherokee. Capt Jay Baker, umuvugizi w'ibiro bishinzwe umutekano waho, yavuze ko abantu babiri bahise bapfira aho, naho abandi batatu bajyanwa ku bitaro, aha ni ho abandi babiri bapfiriye. Nyuma yaho yemeje ko abapfuye ari abagore babiri bakomoka muri Aziya, umuzungu w'umugore n'umuzungu w'umugabo, kandi ko umugabo ukomoka muri kimwe mu bihugu bivuga Icyespanyole yakomeretse. Ebyiri muri izo nzu zikorerwamo 'massage' zitandukanyijwe n'umuhanda mu mujyi wa Atlanta Nta saha irashira ibyo bibaye, polisi yatabajwe ngo igere aho "ubujura burimo gukorerwa" hitwa Gold Spa, naho hakorerwa 'massage', mu majyaruguru ashyira uburasirazuba bwa Atlanta. Mu itangazo polisi yasohoye yagize iti: "Abapolisi bahageze basanze abagore batatu bapfiriye imbere mu nzu mu bigaragara ko ari ibikomere byatewe n'amasasu". Bakiri aho, abapolisi bahamagajwe ngo bagere mu nyubako ikorerwamo 'massage' iri hakurya y'umuhanda yitwa Aromatherapy Spa, bahasanga undi mugore wishwe arashwe. Amagambo ya polisi yasubiwemo n'ikinyamakuru Atlanta Journal-Constitution ivuga ko abo bane bose bapfiriye i Atlanta ari abagore bafite inkomoko muri Aziya.

Umwigeme yagiye kwa muganga gupimwa ko akiri isugi Mu kamo urwo runani rwateye amakungu mu ntumbero yo kurangiza amabi akoregwa abagore n'abakobwa, uwo mugenzo udakenewe ukoregwa kwa muganga, kenshi ubabaza, ugatesha agaciro kandi ugatuma umuntu ahahamuka, ukwiye kurangira. Umugenzo wo gusuzuma umukobwa ko ari isugi ni uwa kera, ONU ikavuga ko ugikurikizwa niburiburi mu bihugu 20 mu turere twose tw'isi. Ukogwa ku mvo zitandukanye, abavyeyi canke abagiye kubana n'abo bigeme barasaba ko bikorwa, ndetse ngo hakaba n'abakoresha basaba ko abo bagiye guha akazi babanza gusuzumwa, nkuko icegeranyo ca ONU kivuga. Iryo suzuma rikogwa n'abaganga, abapolisi n'inararibonye mu miryango. Abigeme barakunze no gusuzumwa igihe bavuze ko bafashwe ku nguvu, kugira ukuri kuje ahabona. Bikogwa gute? Mu gusuzuma umukobwa ko akiri isugi, umuganga araba agace k'igitsinagore bita "hymen" ko katoba karatabutse, canke akaraba ingene umwenge w'igitsina ungana canke agakoresha intoke zibiri. Ababikora ngo baba bibaza ko ukwo baza gusanga igitsina c'umukobwa cifashe, bishobora gutuma bamenya ko yagize imibonano mpuzabitsina canke ko atayo arigera akora. Igisata kijejwe amagara y'abantu "Organisation Mondiale pour la Santé"(OMS) kivuga ko ata kintu na kimwe muri ubwo buryo gishobora kwemeza ko umukobwa canke umugore yakoze imibonano mpuzabitsina. Abagore n'abakobwa bari mu myiyerekano yo kwiyamiriza umugenzo wo gusuzuma ubusugi Kurondera kumenya ko umukobwa akiri isugi ni ikumira rishingiye ku gitsina Ijambo "isugi" ntiryazananye mu vy'ubuvuzi canke ubuhinga. Ni ijambo ryo mu kibano, rishingiye ku mico no kw'idini - ryerekana ikumirwa rishingiye ku gitsina abakobwa n'abagore bagirigwa, niko ONU ivuga. Ivyo ikibano cipfuza ko abakobwa n'abagore boguma ari "isugi" (ntibakore imibonano mpuzabitsina) ni ivyo abantu bishiramwo ko abagore bari bakwiye gukora iyo mibonano aruko barongowe. Ubwo buryo bwo kwiyumvira burabangamira abagore n'abakobwa kw'isi yose. Amaleta, abahinga mu vy'ubuvuzi hamwe n'imiryango bakwiye guhagarikisha uwo mugenzo. Urunani rw'amashirahamwe ya ONU ruvuga ko vyihuta guhimiriza abahinga mu vy'ubuvuzi hamwe n'imiryango ku mabi aturuka mu kurangura uwo mugenzo ku bagore n'abakobwa, bakamenya ko ataho bisiguritse ahubwo bagafasha kuwurangiza. Amashirahamwe menshi akorera ku vy'ubuvuzi hamwe n'ayaharanira agateka ka zina muntu aja yariyamirije uwo mugenzo ata na hamwe usigurika ku bijanye n'ubuhinga, ahubwo uhonyanga agateka k'abagore n'abakobwa. Urunani rw'amashirahamwe ya ONU, iry'agateka ka zina muntu, igisata ca ONU kijejwe abagore hamwe n'igisata kijejwe amagara y'abantu rwiyemeje gufasha kurandurana n'imizi uwo mugenzo wo gusuzuma abagore n'abakobwa ko ari isugi no gukomeza agateka k'abagore n'abakobwa bose. Rusaba amaleta gutunganya amategeko yihanikiza uwo mugenzo no kuyashirisha mu ngiro.

Uwujejwe imigenderanire mw'ishirahamwe ry'ubumwe bwa Buraya Federica Mogherini ari kumwe n'umushikiranganji w'imigenderanire wa Iran Mohammad Javad Zarif Vyitezwe ko Ubwongereza, Ubufaransa hamwe n'Ubudagi hamwe n'ishirahamwe ry'ubumwe bwa Buraya, babwira Mohammad Javad Zarif ko bagishigikiye ayo masezerano hanyuma bamuhamagarire kwemera ko amakungu agenzura ishirwa mu ngiro ryayo. Umushikiranganji w'Ubudagi ajejwe imigenderanire Sigmar Gabriel yavuze ayo masezerano akenewe cane ku neza y'umutekano w'ishirahamwe rya Buraya (EU). Federica Mogherini muri Iran Ivyo biganiro bibaye imbere y'umusi umwe ngo prezida Trump amenyeshe nimba yasubijeho ibihano ku gitoro ca Iran vyari vyavanyweho inyuma y'ayo masezerano. Zarif kandi ashobora kubazwa ibiraba imyiyerekano y'abiyamiriza reta iherutse kuba muri Iran.

Prezida wa Uganda Yoweri Museveni Iryo jambo ry'umukuru w'igihugu ryibanze ahanini ku kibazo c'umutekano muri ico gihugu. Ariko kandi yaravuze ivyerekeye indero, uburimyi hamwe n'imigambi mitomito. Museveni yashikirije iryo jambo inyuma y'amasaha atari make umupolisi umwe wo mu rwego rwo hejuru Muhammad Kirumira yishwe arashwe hagufi y'umuhana iwe mu kigwati cegereye umugwa mukuru Kampala ku musi wa gatandatu mw'ijoro. Kirumira yari umuntu atarabwa neza na bose, yishwe ari kumwe n'umupfasoni wiwe ku metero zike uvuye ku muhana wabo i Bulenga. Mu kwezi kwa gatatu mu 2017, Felix Kaweesi, umuvugizi w'igipolisi ca Uganda na we yarishwe arashwe Umumenyeshamakuru wa BBC ari mu gisagara ca Kampala avuga ko Museveni yavuze ku bwicanyi buheruka ba Kirumira, umushingamateka Ibrahim Abiriga hamwe n'uwahoze ari umuvugizi w'igipolisi Felix Kaweesi. Yavuze ko inzira nziza yo guhangana n'ubwo bugizi bwa nabi ari gutangura gushira kuraba intoke zakoze ku nkoho zose. Museveni yavuze ati:"Iyaba inkoho zose zariko ibimenyetso, mu gihe irashe yociye ubwo nyene ajanwa ku mashini, hagaca hamenyekana ko urwo rusase rwavuye mu nkoho nimero kanaka. Iyaba imodoka n'ipikipiki vyari bifise nimero za electronike, ubu tuba tuzi umwicanyi uwo ari we." Urukurikirane rw'iyicwa ry'abantu muri Uganda ruteye ubwoba Mohammed Kirumira n'umwe mu bantu benshi harimwo Maj Mohammed Kigundu na Felix Kaawesi bishwe co kimwe muri Uganda mu kiringo c'imyaka 2 iheze. Mu kwezi kwa gatatu 2017, Felix Kaweesi, umuvugizi w'igipolisi ca Uganda yarishwe arashwe igihe yari mu modoka yiwe agana muhira iwe. Abamwishe n'ubu ntibarafatwa. Mu kwezi kwa gatandatu, umushingamateka Ibrahim Abiriga yarishwe ari kumwe n'uuwumucungerera ubuzima ari muhira iwe inyuma y'igisagara ca Kampala, kandi nta muntu n'umwe arafatwa mu bamwishe. Mu kwezi kwa gatandatu, umushingamateka Ibrahim Abiriga yarishwe ari kumwe n'uuwumucungerera ubuzima ari muhira iwe Kirumira yavuze ko yari afise ubwoba kubera iterabwoba ryo kwicwa yari amaze imisi agirirwa, ariko ko ivyo bitamubujije kuvugisha ukuri. "Turerekana inkozi z'ikibi kugira dutabare igihugu. Uvuze uca upfa, unumye urapfa, nta kundi vyoba vyiza uvuze ugapfa abantu bamaze kumva ubutumwa. Muhammad Kirumira yanebagura bikomeye urwego akoreramwo rw'igipolisi Igihe kimwe Kirumira yigeze kubwira abamenyeshamakuru ati: "Ubutumwa bwanje rero ku bicanyi bitwaje inkoho n'uko munyishe ata co muzoba mukoze. Kubera nk'umuntu yizewe n'abanyagihugu ico nshaka gushikako ni ukuvugana n'abanyagihugu.

Kuva mu kwezi kw'icumi, ingabo za Congo ziri mu rugamba rwo kurwanya imirwi y'inyeshamba irangwa mu buseruko bw'ico gihugu Kapiteni Dieudonné Kasereka avugira ingabo za Congo ziri muri urwo rugamba, yabwiye BBC ko abo barwanyi ari abo mu murwi Conseil national pour la renaissance et la démocratie (CNRD). CNRD ni umurwi wiyonkoye kuri Forces démocratiques pour la libération du Rwanda (FDLR) ikorera mu buseruko bwa Republika y'Itwaro Rusangi ya Congo. Urugamba rwo kurwanya imirwi yitwaje ibirwanisho mu karere ka Kalehe rwatanguye ku wa 26 z'ukwezi kwa 11 mu karere ka Kalehe. Mu kiganiro yahaye BBC, Kapiteni Kasereka avuga ko abo barwanyi bashikirijwe igisirikare c'u Rwanda bari kumwe n'abandi 1471 bagizwe n'imiryango yabo. Amenyesha ko izo nyeshamba n'imiryango yabo bakiriwe na koloneli Patrick Musho ku ruhande rw'u Rwanda. Avuga ko intambara zikibandanya mu karere ka Mwenga, aho abo barwanyi ba CNRD bari bageze bariko berekeza mu karere ka Fizi. Amenyesha ko mu ntambara z'ejo ku wa Mungu mu gace ka Kasika zahuje abasirikare ba Congo n'izo nyeshamba avuga ko ziharurwa mw'ijana zanse gushira ibirwanisho hasi, bashoboye kwica umunyamabanga mukuru wa CNRD, bongera bafata mpiri n'abarwanyi bashika kw'icumi. Ku wa 16 z'uku kwezi, umurwi wa mbere ugizwe n'inyeshamba 291 hamwe n'abana 11 baratahukanywe inyuma y'aho batsindiwe n'igisirikare ca Congo mu ntara ya Kivu y'Ubumanuko. Kapiteni Kasereka avuga ko uwo murwi w'abo batahukanywe ku wa gatandatu "ugizwe n'abaheruka gufatwa no kwishikana, baka bari bacungiwe mw'ikambi ya gisirikare ya Nyamunyunyi", iri ku birometero 30 uvuye i Bukavu, umugwa mukuru wa Kivu y'Ubumanuko. Ku wa 08 z'uku kwezi nyene, igisirikare ca Congo cari catangaje ko abantu 1200 b'umurwi CNRD "bagizwe n'abarwanyi hamwe n'imiryango yabo" muri iyo ntara bishikanye. Mu buseruko bwa Congo, haharurwa imirwi y'inyeshamba ishika 133, imwe igizwe n'abanyekongo iyindi igizwe n'abanyamahanga, muri iyo 35 irwanira muri Kivu y'Ubumanuko, nk'uko bivugwa na Kapiteni Kasereka. Avuga ko igisirikare ca Congo kitarota gihagarika ibitero ku mirwi y'inyeshamba irwanira muri ako karere gushika yemeye gushira ibirwanisho hasi.

Umukinyi akinira hagati mu mugwi wa Ghana, Muntari, yarakinye no mu migwi ya Portsmouth na Sunderland Umukinyi wo hagati mu mugwi Pescara, Muntari w'imyaka 32, yabujijwe gukina urukino rukurikira inyuma yaho yiyamirije amacakubiri ashingiye ku rukoba abarorerezi bamugizeko ku munsi wa Mungu mw'ihiganwa rya "Série A" ryabera ahitwa Cagliari, aho yahawe ikarata y'umuhondo ku kwitwara nabi munyuma agasohogwa. Ikigo kigwanya ivangura Kick It Out cahavuye kivuga ko abarongoye umupira w'amaguru mu Butaliyano ari abantu ata jambo. "Abafise ububasha mu Butaliyano bari bakwiye gufata ingingo kugira ngo bino ntibisubire," niko Kick It Out yavuze ku mbuga hwaniro ya Twitter. Mw'itangazo ryacishijwe ku rubuga rw'ico kigo, cavuze kiti: "Garth Crooks, ari mu bategetsi b'ikigo Kick It Out , asaba umuntu wese yubaha umukinyi w'umwirabure mw'ihiganwa ryo mu Butaliyano kudakina mu mpera z'ino ndwi, kiretse igihano cahawe Sulley Muntari gifuswe. "Ntivyumvikana ingene Cagliari itashoboye guhana abarorerezi cumi babikoze. Bino ntibikwiye gusubira kwibonekeza." Umukinyi Muntari yabwiwe ko yigenjeje nabi ahejeje gusaba umusifuzi guhagarika urukino, munyuma aca arashoka abonye bidakozwe, umuhagarikizi w'urukino aca amuha ikarata ya kabiri y'umuhondo mu kuba agiye hanze atabirekuriwe. Umugwi ujejwe inyifato y'abakinyi "disciplinary committee" wahagaritse Muntari mu rukino rukurikira, wavuze ko abo barorerezi bigenjeje nabi ngo ariko uravye amategeko, ngo ntiwari gufatira ibihano abantu cumi gusa bari munsi ya 1% y'abarorerezi bose bari ku kibuga ca Cagliari.

Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi, umugabo washakishwaga cyane Amerika hari igihe yari imufite mu mfungwa zayo Uyu mugabo yari yarashyiriweho igihembo cya miliyoni $25, yashakishwaga na Amerika n'inshuti zayo kuva mu myaka itanu ishize umutwe wa Islamic State wakwimonogoza. Ku gasongero kawo, IS yageze aho itegeka ku buso bwa 88,000km² , ahantu haruta u Rwanda inshuro enye, ku butaka bunyuranye kuva mu burengerazuba bwa Syria kugera mu burasirazuba bwa Iraq. Aha bashyizeho amategeko yabo akarishye ku baturage barenga miliyoni umunani, bahakura za miliyari z'amadorari mu misoro ku bitoro (oil), gushimuta abantu n'ibindi. Nubwo uyu mutwe wambuwe igice kinini wayoboraga n'umuyobozi wawo akicwa, IS iracyafite abarwanyi bigaragara ko bakiteguye gukomeza kurwana. Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi amazina ye nyayo ni Awwad Ibrahim al-Badri yari afite imyaka 48 akaba yaravukiye mu mujyi uri hagati muri Iraq witwa Samarra. Akiri umuhungu muto yahimbwe akazina ka "uwizera" kubera uburyo yamaraga umwanya munini cyane mu musigiti asubiramo korowani, ndetse agacyaha cyane abatagendera ku mategeko ya sharia. Mu myaka ya 1990 ubwo yari arangije amashuri yagiye mu murwa mukuri i Baghdad, ahavana Master's mu masomo ya kisilamu ndetse atangira PhD muri Kaminuza ya Baghdad nk'uko byanditswe n'abamushyigikira. Muri kaminuza ngo yabaga ku musigiti, agakunda gukina umupira w'amaguru kandi akaba umuntu uvuga macye ndetse ngo wemeraga intambara ntagatifu (jihad) kuva icyo gihe. 'Kaminuza ya jihad' Mu 2003 ingabo za Amerika zimaze guhirika Perezida Saddam Hussein, bivugwa ko Maghdadi ari mu bashinze umutwe warwanyaga ukanatera ingabo za Amerika aho zikambitse. Mu 2004 yarafashwe afungwa n'ingabo za Amerika mu mujyi wa Falluja nyuma yimurirwa mu majyepfo ahitwa Bucca. Baghadadi yafungiwe hano muri Camp Bucca y'Abanyamerika mu gihe cy'amezi 10 Bucca niho bivugwa ko hahindutse kaminuza yigisha intambara ntagatifu, yahahuriye anahamenyanira na benshi. Bivugwa ko yayoboraga amasengesho muri gereza, ndetse akaba umuhuza mu gihe cy'ubushyamirane hagati y'imfungwa n'Abanyamerika bategeka aho bafungiye. Ntiyigeze afatwa nk'uteye inkeke Amerika, nyuma y'amezi 10 baramurekuye. "Yari umugizi wa nabi wo ku muhanda ubwo twamufataga mu 2004, biragoye kwiyumvisha ko twari dufite umuntu uzavamo umuyobozi wa IS". Ni ibyavuzwe n'umwe mu bategetsi ba Pentagon mu 2014. Mu 2003 yagiye mu mutwe wigometse ku butegetsi bwashyizweho n'Abanyamerika nyuma yo guhirika Saddam Hussein Kongera kubaka al-Qaeda muri Iraq Avaga Bucca, bivugwa ko Baghdadi yahuye na bamwe mu bari abayobozi ba Al Qaeda muri Iraq barimo Abu Musab al-Zarqawi bakamubera urugero. Mu 2006, Al Qaeda ya Iraq yashinze ishami iryita Mujahideen Shura, ishami Baghdadi yahise yiyemeza gukorana naryo. Mu mpera z'uwo mwaka al-Zarqawi amaze kwicwa mu gitero cy'indege z'ingabo za Amerika ririya shami ryahinduye izina ryitwa Islamic State of Iraq (ISI). Mu 2014 yafashwe amashusho ari kurahira mu musigiti wa Mosul Ubwo Abu Umar al-Baghdadi wayoboraga ISI yicwaga n'ingabo za Amerika mu 2010 ari kumwe n'uwari amwungirije Abu Ayyub al-Masri, Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi yahise agirwa umusimbura. Yafashe umutwe Abanyamerika bibwiraga ko kuwutsinda bitazatinda ariko n'ubu ntibirarangira. Yifashishije bamwe mu bahoze ari abasirikare n'abatasi ku butegetsi bwa Saddam hamwe na bamwe mu bafunganywe nawe i Bucca, yakomeje ISI bidasanzwe. Kugeza mu 2013 uyu mutwe wari ukomeye ufite abarwanyi muri Iraq na Syria, mu 2014 uyu mutwe wagabye ibitero bikomeye muri Iraq, ufata umujyi wa Mosul ndetse umanuka ugana i Baghdad. Hagati muri uyu mwaka, uyu mutwe watangaje icyo wise "caliphate" ndetse usaba abasilamu bose ku isi kumvira ubu bwami bushya bwa Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi. Uyu mugabo yavugaga nk'aba 'caliphs' ba Islam yo mu myaka amagana ishize, ndetse agasaba abayoboke be kurwana intambara ku batizera bose, ibihumbi by'abantu bavuye mu mahanga bajya gukorera ubwami bwe. Gutsindwa Mu myaka itanu yakurikiyeho, IS yagiye ivanwa mu birindiro yari yarafashe, abantu ibihumbi byinshi barapfuye abandi babarirwa muri za miliyoni barahunga. Ingabo za Iraq, zifashijwe n'abarwanyi b'aba Kurde Peshmerga bafashijwe na Amerika n'inshuti zayo gutsinda IS. Mu kwa karindwi 2017 ingabo za leta ya Iraq zasubiranye umujyi wa Mosul Ingabo za leta ya Assad muri Syria nazo zifashijwe n'ibitero by'indege z'Uburusiya byashegeshe IS, gusa ikibazo cyakomeje kwibazwa ni 'Baghdadi aracyariho cyangwa yarishwe?' Mu gihe hari abibazaga ko yaguye mu bitero by'indege, mu 2017 yasohoye amajwi ahamagarira abarwanyi "gukomeza intambara ku banzi babo". Mu kwezi kwa kane uyu mwaka, Baghdadi yagaragaye mu mashusho bwa mbere mu myaka itanu. Icyo gihe yemeye gutsindwa kwa IS avuga ko ubu uyu mutwe uri "mu ntambara ya nyuma", asaba abayishyigikiye gukora ibishoboka bakarwana n'umwanzi mu bya gisirikare, mu bukungu n'ubundi buryo bwose bushoboka. Yagize ati: "Bagomba kumenya ko jihad ikomeza kugeza ku munsi wo kuzuka, ko Imana yadutegetse iyo ntambara itadutegetse kuyitsinda." Ntabwo bizwi aho aya mashusho yafatiwe, gusa Baghdadi yabonekaga nk'umuntu ufite ubuzima bwiza. Ntawongeye kumva ibye kugeza mu kwezi kwa cyenda, ubwo IS yasohoraga amajwi ye avuga ko 'ibitero bya buri munsi biri gukorwa ahantu hatandukanye". Baghdadi bikekwa ko yari yihishe mu birindiro bya nyuma bya IS biri muri Syria hafi y'umupaka wa Turukiya. Mu minsi ishize ingabo za Amerika zatangaje ko zahavuye. Tariki 23 z'uku kwezi ingabo za Amerika zagabye ibitero bidasanzwe ahitwa Barisha mu majyaruguru ya Syria mu ntara ya Idlib, mu birindiro bya nyuma by'abarwanya perezida Assad. Intego yabo nyanyo yari Baghdadi, nubwo aha hantu ari mu birometero amaganga by'aho benshi bibwiraga ko yihishe. Perezida Trump ubu yatangaje ko Baghdadi yahungiye mu muhora wo munsi y'ubutaka ari kumwe n'abana batatu mu gitero yari yagabweho maze akiturikirazaho igisasu ubwo ingabo za Amerika zari zoherejemo imbwa. Uko ari bane bose ngo barapfuye. Aho yari atuye harashwe n'indege za Amerika harashwanyagurika Trump avuga ko nubwo umubiri we washwanyaguritse ariko ibipimo byagaragaje ko ari we. Yagize ati: "Umwicanyi ukomeye, wateye benshi umubabaro n'urupfu nawe yakuweho nabi - ntayindi nzirakarengane azongera kubabaza, umwana cyangwa umugore. Yapfuye nk'imbwa.Yapfuye nk'ikigwari. Isi ubu iratekanye kurusha. Umutwe wa Islamic State ntabwo uremeza niba Baghdadi yapfuye.

Robert Mueller, niwe ayoboye itohoza ku ruhara rw'Uburusiya Abaregwa abo aribo bose, bashobora gutabwa muri yompi kuva ku munsi wa mbere, nk'uko bitangazwa n'ikigo c'itangazamakuru CNN. Ibigo vy'iperereza vya Leta zunze Ubumwe za Amerika mu ntango z'uyu mwaka ko Uburusiya bwoba baragerageje gufasha Donald Trump mu matora. Ivyo binyamakuru vyavuga ko Uburusiya bwakoze isekeza ryo gutyoza umu democrate bahiganwa, Hillary Clinton, mu kuvogera 'emails' ziwe no kurarika abakoresha imbuga nkoranyambaga mw'iperereza ryo musevya. Iperereza riyobowe n'umujanama adasanzwe Robert Mueller, ryatanguye mu kwezi kwa gatanu. Uretse kuraba uruhara rw'Uburusiya mu matira ya Amerika, hariho kandi no kumenya nimba abakorera isekeza Trump boba barakoranye n'ubutegetsi bwa Moscow. Ku munsi wa gatanu Trump yavuze ko abamukorera isekeza ryo kwiyamamaza batakoranye n'Uburisya, nayo Uburisya bwahakanye kera uruhara muri ayo matora.

Pierre Claver Mbonimpa, umuyobozi wa APRODH, rimwe mu mashyirahamwe yafatiwe ibyemezo na leta Amashirahamwe adaharanira inyungu za politke 10 ni yo yafatiwe ingingo na reta y'Uburundi. Atanu yahagaritswe burundu ayandi atanu nyene vy'agateganyo. Menshi muri ayo mashirahamwe yari mu yiyamiriza ikiringo ca gatatu c'umukuru w'igihugu Pierre Nkurunziza, bamwe mu bayarongoye na bo bakaba bararungikiwe imitahe mpuzamakungu yo guhagarikwa. Ubwo bushikiranganji bwagiriza ayo mashirahamwe kurenga ku mategeko ayagenga no gucafuza igihugu, kubiba urwanko mu banyagihugu hamwe n'amacakubiri. Ayo mashirahamwe yahagaritswe burundu, yari yarahagaritswe vy'agateganyo mu kwezi kwa cumi na rimwe umwaka uheze, ariko gushika ubu aracasohora ivyegeranyo vy'akazi ajejwe ko kuvugira abanyagihugu. Hari kandi ayandi mashirahamwe atanu yabaye arahagaritswe vy'agateganyo, harimwo Syndicat UBJ ry'abamenyeshamakuru, Ligue Iteka, Cosome, ishirahamwe rishigikiye sentare mpuzamakungu CPI hamwe na SOS Torture. Yaba ayahagaritswe burundu canke vy'agateganyo, yose yari muyateguye imyiyerekano yo kwiyamiriza ikiringo ca gatatu c'umukuru w'igihugu Pierre Nkurunziza, mbere benshi mu bayarongoye barahunze igihugu, bamwe muri bo bakaba barasohorewe imitahe mpuzamakungu yo guhagarikwa na reta y'Uburundi. Ayo mashirshamwe yose aguma anebagura reta ko itubahiriza uburenganzira bw'abanyagihugu ijejwe kurongora.

Neymar ari muri Brezili mu myimenyerezo hamwe n'umurwi nserukiragihugu witegurira ihiganwa Copa América Ku cegeranyo cakozwe n'igipolisi mu gisagara ca São Paulo kiri mu buseruko bushira ubumanuko bwa Brezili, uyo mugore avuga ko Neymar yamufashe ku nguvu ari mw'ihoteri iri ku mugwa mukuru w'Ubufaransa, aho uyo mukinyi asanzwe akinira mu murwi Paris St-Germain (PSG). Abafasha ba Neymar basohoye itangazo rivuga ko uyo mukinyi "yahakanye yivuye inyuma" ico kirego. Neymar ubu asanzwe ari muri Brezili aho ari mu myimenyerezo hamwe n'umurwi nserukiragihugu witegurira ihiganwa Copa América rihuza imirwi nserukirabihugu ya Amerika y'Ubumanuko. Mbega aregwa iki? Nk'uko inzandiko z'igipolisi zibivuga, uyo mugore - izina ryiwe ritatanzwe - yamenyanye na Neymar aciye ku rubuga hwaniro rwa Instagram, ariho yaciye amusaba ko bohurira i Paris. Yaciye amurungikira itike y'indege imuvana muri Brezili ikamushikana mu Bufaransa, aho yari yamufatiye icumba mw'ihoteri yitwa Sofitel Paris Arc Du Triomphe. Uyo mugore avuga ko igihe Neymar yashika kuri iyo hoteri kw'igenekerezo rya 15 z'ukwezi kwa gatanu, "yasa n'uwari aborewe". Urwo rwandiko rwa polisi ruvuga ko bamaze kuyaga n'ukuramukanya, "hageze igihe Neymar atangura gukara, anakoresha ingimba arangura amabanga y'abubatse uyo mugore atavyiyumvamwo". Urwo rwandiko ruvuga ko uyo mugore yagiye gusubira muri Brezili haciye iminsi ibiri, ata n'uko ashikirije igipolisi c'Ubufaransa ivyamubayeko , kubera "yari atekewe n'ubwoba anatinya kuvuga ivyamubayeko mu kindi gihugu". None Neymar avuga iki? Mw'itangazo ryasohowe n'abafasha ba Neymar iyo nkuru imaze gukwira hose, bavuga bati: "Turiyamirije twivuye inyuma ivyo birego bidafise ishingiro, cane cane n'ingene ibinyamakuru vyerekana ko ari ibintu biteye ubwoba". Ejo ku munsi wa gatandatu, se w'uyo mukinyi, Neymar dos Santos, yabwiye televiziyo Band TV yo muri Brezili ko "biboneka y'uko yatezwe umutego". Yongeyeko ati: "Mu gihe abantu batonyurwa, canke ngo ukuri kuboneke hakiri kare, ibintu bizokomera. Bibaye ngombwa ko twerekana WhatsApp ya Neymar n'ibiganiro yagiranye n'uyo mukorwa, tuzobikora". None Neymar ariteguye gukina muri Copa América? Uyo musatirizi w'imyaka 27 y'amavuko yaratswe uburenganzira bw'ukuba kizigenza w'umurwi nserukiragihugu wa Brezili kubera inyifato itabereye. Ivyo bikurikiye ingingo y'abarongoye ishirahamwe ry'umupira w'amaguru mu Bufaransa yo kumubuza inkino zitatu, inyuma y'aho akubitiye umufana igihe PSG yari ihejeje gutsindwa n'umurwi Rennes mu rukino rwa nyuma rw'igikombe c'Ubufaransa mu kwezi guheze kwa gatanu. Bivugwa kandi ko yateye n'umudugararo mu cumba c'ukwihinduriramwo. Iryo higanwa rya Copa América rizobera muri ico gihugu kuva ku wa 14 z'ukwa gatandatu gushika ku wa 07 z'ukwezi kw'indwi. Brezili iri kumwe n'ibihugu vya Bolivia, Venezuela na Peru mu murwi A. Ku munsi wa kabiri, Neymar vyabaye ngombwa ko ahagarika imyimenyerezo igihe yavunika mw'ivi, n'aho vyavugwa ko bitari bikomeye.

Perezida Museveni wa Uganda ari ku butegetsi guhera mu mwaka wa 1986 Yavuze ko Somalia ari urugero rumwe yatanga, ariko yirinda gutanga izindi ngero z'ibindi bihugu "ku mpamvu za diplomasi [imibanire y'ibihugu]". Bwana Museveni yavuze ayo magambo ku wa mbere, mu nama ngaruka mwaka y'abakora mu rwego rw'ubucamanza rw'iki gihugu. Mu ijambo rye, yanenze ONU, by'umwihariko ku kuba ihagarariwe muri Repubulika ya Demokarasi ya Kongo "guhera mu mwaka wa 1960, ariko abantu bakaba bapfa nk'isazi". Muri iryo jambo rye, Bwana Museveni yanagaragaje amakenga ku mutekano bivugwa ko wagaruwe n'ubutumwa bw'ingabo za ONU zikorera muri Kongo buzwi nka MONUSCO. Yagize ati: "Ugiye muri Mali, ukajya n'aho handi hose, ndetse no muri Nigeria. Hari ibibazo bikomeye. [No muri] Tchad. Ariko hano twe twashinze inkingi y'umutekano". Nkuko bitangazwa n'ikinyamakuru The Economist, ikigero cy'ibyaha muri Uganda kiraringaniye nubwo ibikorwa by'ubujura bikomeje kwiyongera. Iki kinyamakuru cyongeraho ko umutekano mucye wahindutse ikibazo cya politiki muri iki gihugu.

Imyiyerekano yaratunganijwe mu burere butandukanye bwa Istanbul biyamiriza isubirwamwo ry'amatora Umugambwe AKP w'umukuru w'igihugu Recep Tayyip Erdogan uvuga ko ayo matora yaranzwe "n'utunenge hamwe n'ibiturire", vyatumye umugambwe utavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi, CHP, uyatsinda usumbije uwo wundi amajwi make cane. Ariko umukuru w'umugambwe CHP, Ekrem Imamoglu, yari yatangajwe ko ari we arongoye igisagara ca Istanbul mu kwezi kwa kane guheze, avuga ko iyo ngingo ari "iy'ubusuma". Ayo matora ategekanijwe kw'igenekerezo rya 23 z'ukwezi kwa gatandatu kw'uno mwaka, yatumye haba imyiyerekano muri ico gisagara. Ejo ku munsi wa mbere, abanyagihugu amajana n'amajana bariyegeranije mu burere butandukanye bw'igisagara ca Instanbul, bagenda bakubita ku masafuriya n'inkono, baririmba n'indirimbo zityoza leta. Inama nshingamateka ya Bulaya nayo nyene imenyesha ko iyo ngingo y'ugusubiramwo ayo matora izokura icizere c'amatora ashingiye ku ntwaro rusangi mu gihugu ca Turkiya. Kubera iki ayo matora asubirwamwo? Uwuserukira umugambwe AKP mu murwi ujejwe amatora, Recep Ozel, avuga ko ayo matora yasubiye gutunganywa gushasha kubera bamwe mu bari bayahagarikiye batari akabozi ba leta, kandi ko impapuro zimwe z'ivyavuye mu matora zitari zateweko igikumu. Ariko icegera c'umukuru w'umugambwe CHP, Onursal Adiguzel, avuga ko isubirwamwo ry'ayo matora ryerekana ko "gutsinda umugambwe AKP bitemewe n'amategeko". Ekrem Imamoglu yemejwe ko ari we mukuru w'igisagara ca Istanbul mu kwezi kwa kane guheze Abicishije ku rubuga hwaniro rwa Twitter, Bwana Adiguzel yanditse avuga ko iyo ngingo ari "intwaro y'agahotoro yeruye". Yanditse kandi ati: "Iyi ntwaro ihakana ishaka ry'abanyagihugu ikarenga amategeko si intwaro rusangi kandi si intwaro ishingiye ku mategeko". Hanyuma, mw'ijambo yacishije ku mbuga hwaniro, Bwana Imamoglu yariyamirije umurwi ujejwe gutegura amatora, avuga ko watewe igitsure n'umugambwe uri ku butegetsi. Yabwiye abari mu myiyerekano ati: " Ntavyo tuzokwumvikana ku mateka yacu. Iki gihugu cuzuye abagikunda imiliyoni 82 biteguye kurwanira intwaro rusangi gushika ku munota wa nyuma". Umurwi w'abanywanyi ba Bwana Imamoglu wasavye abantu ko bokwifata, uvuga uti: "Twese tuje hamwe, dutekane...tuzotsinda, tuzotsinda kandi". Mbega none vyagenze gute? Amatora yo mu makomine yabaye kw'igenekerezo rya 31 z'ukwa gatatu kw'uno mwaka, aho yaboneka ko ari amatora kamarampaka yo kwemeza ubutegetsi bwa Perezida Erdogan mu gihe ubutunzi bugeze ahamanuka. N'aho urunani rurongowe n'umugambwe AKP rwayatsinze ku bice 51 kw'ijana mu gihugu cose, umugambwe CHP utavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi wavuze ko watsinze ku mugwa mukuru Ankara no mu bisagara vya Azmir na Istanbul. Recep Tayyip Erdogan ntarota yemera gutsindwa mu gisagara ca Istanbul Mu gisagara ca Istanbul, amajwi arenga imiliyoni umunani niyo yaharuwe, Bwana Imamoglu aba ariwe atangazwa ko yatsinze, arushije uwo bahiganwa amajwi adashika ibihumbi 14. Kuva ico gihe, umugambwe uri ku butegetsi wagumye wiyamiriza ivyavuye muri ayo matora mu bisagara vya Ankara na Istanbul, vyatumye abatavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi bagiriza leta ko bariko bagerageza kwiba amatora. Perezida Erdogan ashaka ko vyanka vyakunda asubira gutsinda muri ico gisagara gifatwa nk'umutima w'igihugu mu vy'ubutunzi. Yakunze kuvuga ati: "Uw'ari we wese atsinze muri Istanbul aba atsinze muri Turkiya".

Aba Dogon bakunze kugendera ku mico kama mu mibereho yabo Iradiyo y'Abarfaransa FRI ivuga ko ico gitero cabereye ahitwa Sobane-Kou, hafi y'igisagara citwa Sanga. Ibiziga vy'abahitanywe n'ico gitero vyaturiwe nk'uko bivugwa n'umwe mu bategetsi bo muri ako karere, mu gihe bakirondera ibindi. Kuva mu mezi aheze, ico gihugu cagiye kirangwamwo ubwicanyi, bumwe bushingiye ku bwoko, ubundi nabwo bugakorwa n'imirwi igendera ku vyiyumviro bikaze vy'idini rya Isilamu. Aba Dogon basanzwe babeshejweho n'uruhigi be n'aba Peuls babeshejweho n'ubworozi barakunze gushamirana cane. Muri ako karere nyene mu kwezi kwa gatatu kw'uno mwaka, aba Peuls barenga 130 barishwe n'abantu bitwaje ibirwanisho bari bambaye impuzu kama z'aba Dogon. Imishamirano hagati y'izo mpande zibiri yariyongereye kuva hadutse imigumuko itewe n'umurwi ugendera mu vyiyumviro bikaze vya ki isilamu mu buraruko bwa Mali mu mwaka wa 2012. Imbere y'aho, imishamirano hagati y'aba Peuls n'aba Dogon yamye itorerwa umuti biciye mu mwumvikano, ariko iyo migumuko yatumye ibintu bimera nabi kubera ibirwanisho vyakwiragiye hose. Uruhande rumwe rumwe rwagiriza urundi ko arirwo rwatanguje intambara.

Umukuru w'igihugu ca Amerika yanditse ku musi wa mbere ubutumwa bwa Twitter yita umugera wa coronavirusi ''umugera w'Ubushinwa'' Umuvugizi w'ubushikiranganji bujejwe imigenderanire yagabishije Amerika ko ikwiye kwita ku biyerekeye imbere yo gukumira Ubushinwa. Umuntu yamenyekanye ubwambere ko yanduye ikiza ca coronavirusi yabaye uwo mu Bushinwa mu gisagara ca Wuhan mu 2019. Ariko, mu ndwi iheze umuvugizi w'ubushikiranganji bw'imigenderanire yatanze inkuru ivuga ko yabaye amayeri yo gushaka guhisha ukuri, yemeza ko igisirikare ca Amerika ari co cazanye uyo mugera muri ako karere. Ivyo vyagiriji bitagira ibimenyetso vyatumye umushikirangji wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika, Mike Pompeo, asaba Ubushinwa kureka gukwiragiza ''inkuru zitari zo'' mu kugerageza ''kwikurako iceyi'' kiva kuri ico kiza. Gushika ubu, abantu barenga ibihumbi 170 baramaze kumenyekana ko banduye ico kiza kw'isi yose, harimwo abarenga ibihumbi 80 mu gihugu c'u Bushinwa. Naho ari uko, kuri uno wa kabiri Ubushinwa bwavuze ko bwabonye umuntu umwe gusa yanduriye ico kiza mu gihugu, abandi bakaba ari abaje bagikuye mu bindu bihugu. None Trump yavuze iki? Umukuru w'igihugu ca Amerika yanditse ku musi wa mbere ubutumwa bwa Twitter yita umugera wa coronavirusi ''umugera w'Ubushinwa''. Ikigo mpuzamakungu kijejwe amagara y'abantu kw'isi, OMS, caragabishije ko hatogira uwitirira iki kiza akarere ngo kuko vyohava bizana ikumirwa. Ariko, hari igitigiri c'abayobozi ba Amerika bise uyo mugera ko ari uw'Ubushinwa. Hagati aho, Bwana Pompeo yasubiye kuwita ''umugera wa Wuhan''. Vyavuzwe kw'iki? Geng Shuang, umuvugizi w'ubushikiranganji bujejwe imigenderanire w'u Bushinwa, yanditse ku rubuga hwaniro rwa twitter ko ivyo Pompeo yanditse kuri urwo rubuga vyerekana ''ugukumira Ubushinwa''. Yongeye agira ati ''dusavye dushimitse Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika gukosora ayo makosa zikongera zikareka gukwiragiza ivyagiriji bitagira ifatiro ku Bushinwa. Ikinyamakuru cegamiye Leta y'Ubushinwa Xinhua yamenyesheje ko amajambo Trump yakoresheje yerekana urwanko ruhagaze ku rukoba, hamwe n'urwanko ku banyamahanga. Ngo vyerekana kandi ukuntu abanyapolitike ataco bashoboye kandi batagira ibanga, bigashobora gukabura ubwoba bwinshi buvuye kuri uyu mugera. Hariho kandi imyidogo iva imbere muri Amerika, aho umuyobozi w'igisagara ca New York, Bill de Blasio, yavuze ko ayo majambo ashobora gutuma abanyamerika bafise amamuko yo muri Aziya bavangurwa gusumba. Imigenderanire hagati ya Amerika n'Ubushinwa igeze hehe? Ivyo bihugu vyamye bitarabana ryiza. Umukuru w'igihugu Trump yagumye yagiriza Ubushinwa ko bukora urudandazwa rudakurikije amategeko kandi bukiba ubuhinga bukoreshwa, mugihe Ubushinwa bwo bubona ko Amerika ifise umugambi wo kubuza Ubushinwa gushikira icicaro cabwo nk'igihangange mu vy'ubutunzi kw'isi. Ivyo bihugu bibiri vyagiye mu ngwano ikaze ihagaze ku rudandazwa, yatumye Amerika n'Ubushinwa bitangishanya amakori ku bidanzwa bifise agaciro k'amajana y'amamiriyaridi y'amadokari. Ibi bisa n'ivyagabanutse mu ntango z'uyu mwaka kubera uyu mugera washinze imizi, hamwe n'isezerano ry'igice kimwe ryashitsweko mu kwezi kwa mbere.

Incanco hafi miliyoni 900 ziramaze gutumwako gushika ubu biciye mu nzira zitandukanye , izo zikaba zikwiye kugira hakingirwe 30% y'abanyafrika bose hamwe babarizwa muri miliyaridi 1.3 Ibigoye kigira izo nkingo zishike muri Africa ni vyinshi: ukuzitanguranwa n'ibihugu bifise amikoro, ukutaboneka kw'uburyo bwari bwemewe gutangwa, n'amategeko ajanye n'ivyuma bitanga ubukonje bwo kubikamwo izo nkingo. Umukuru wa OMS asa mbere n'uwabonye ko ibihugu vy'amikoro make bishobora gusigara inyuma cane muri uwo mugambi wo gukinga kwandura umugera wa Covid-19. Dr Tedros Ghebreyesus yagize ati: ''Turi hafi y'akaga ko kunanirwa ivyo dutegerezwa gukora nk'abantu kandi ingaruka n'ugutakaza ubuzima n'ibibeshaho abantu mu bihugu bikenye.'' Haguma haterwa akamo ko hoba isabikanywa atawe risiga inyuma. Gushika ubu inkingo imiliyoni 40 ziramaze guhabwa abantu mu bihugu nibura 49 vyifise, kugereranya n'incanco 25 gusa zatanzwe muri kimwe mu bihugu vy'amikoro make ku bwa Dr Tedros. ''Simvuze miliyoni 25, canke ibihumbi 25, mvuze 25 gusa'' ariko ntiyavuze ico gihugu icari co. Gushika ubu izo nkingo z'i Buraya nta na rumwe rurahabwa umuntu muri Africa, amezi abiri kuva zitanguye gutangwa i Buraya. Ihuriro ry'amashirahamwe ajejwe guhimiriza, People's Vaccine Alliance, rivuga ko ryasanze ''Ibihugu bitunze bifise abantu bangana na 14% y'ababa kw'isi yose vyaguze ibice birenga 50 kw'ijana (53%) vy'incanco zose zitanga icizere co gukingira abantu''. Aho harimwo incanco zose za Moderna muri uyu mwaka wa 2021 na 96% z'izo Pfizer itegekanya gukora. Igihugu ca Canada nico cahebuje nk'uko vyerekanwa n'ikigo cihweza ibijanye n'ubuhinga, Airfinity. Kivuga ko ico gihugu caguze ''inkingo zihagije kugira umunyeCanada wese akingirwe incuro zitanu''. Izo rero zitegerezwa kuboneka imbere y'uko ibihugu vy'amikoro make navyo bishikirwa. ''Ntimurondere inyungu z'umurengera'' Muri Africa , ibiriko biraba vyibutsa imyaka ya 90 aho imiti yi gupfupfahaza SIDA (ARV) yakorerwa muri Amerika. N'ubwo Africa ariyo yari ifise abantu benshi kuruta iyindi migabane bagendana uwo mugera, vyatwaye imyaka itari munsi y'itandatu kugira iyo miti ishikire Abanyafrika. Imiriyoni 12 z'abantu barapfuye muri Afrika mu kiringo c'imyaka cumi bahitanywe n'indwara zifatiye kuri SIDA mu gihe igitigiri c'abapfa cari cagabanutse cane muri Amerika , nk'uko biri mu mwihwezo w'ikigo ca Africa kijejwe kurwanya indwara no kuzikinga. Isekeza ritunganijwe neza ryatumye Afrika ironka imiti ya SIDA iciriritse Umuyobozi nshingwabikorwa wa UNAids Winnie Byanyima ari mu bantu bashira ijwi hejuru cane kugira abakora inkingo za Covid-19 ntibarondere inyungu z'umurengera. Yabwiye BBC ati : ''Ntitubasaba guhomba. Kuri za ARV, abantu bagendana umugera wa SIDA n'abaharanira uburenganzira bwo kubaho barahagurutse batuma ama reta yemera ko hakorwa imiti y'abahawe uruhusha n'abayikoze ubwa mbere (generique), iyo nayo ikaba yari izimbutse cane. ''Ni uko imiti ya SIDA yavuye ku ma dolari 10.000 ($10.000) ku mwaka(ku muntu umwe) ikamanuka gushika ku ma dolari ijana($100) ku mwaka. '' Ashaka ko vyogenda gutyo ku nkingo za Covi-19, agasaba ibigo bihingura imiti ngo ''ntibitwarwe no kurondera inyungu z'umurengera''. Avuga ko bishobora kubandanya vyunguka n'aho vyokwereka abandi inzira yo gucamwo mu gukora izo nkingo. 'Gusimba abandi ku murongo' Umukuru wa OMS nawe nyene asaba ko hoba ugusabikanya neza. Ariko avuga ko n'abafise iyo mvugo baca ku ruhande bakarengana Covax kugira biyumvikanire n'ayo makompanyi ahigura izo ncanco, bigatuma ibiciro biduga kandi hakaba kugerageza gusimba abandi. Afrika y'Epfo iri mu bihugu hari abantu batewe inkingo mu kuraba ko zikora, ariko n'ubu ntiratangura gukingira abanyagihugu Covax n'umugambi wa OMS na Vaccine Alliance wo gukwiragiza inkingo za Cobid-19 kw'isi ata n'umwe asizwe inyuma. Uwo mugambi ngo ntiwashoboye gushoka ugura izo kingo nk'uko ibihugu vyifise vyabikoze kuko wabanje kurondera uburyo. Umaze kuronka miliyaridi 6 z'ama dolari kuri 8 wari wiyemeje kwegeranya, izo ngo zikaba zigenewe ibihugu 92 vy'amikoro make n'ayabayabaye nk'uko bivugwa na Thabani Mapfosa wa Vaccine Alliance. Gushika ubu uwo mugambi umaze gutumako inkingo zingana n'imiriyoni 600 kuri ivyo bihugu, harimwo ibihugu vyose vya Afrika. ''Igikorwa amahanga'' Ariko rero ntihakenewe uburyo bwo kugura inkingo gusa. Ibihugu bitegerezwa kuronka uburyo bwo kugura ivyuma bitanga ubukonje bwo kuzibika na cane cane nka Pfizer, ibikwa mu bukonje bwa degre 70 munsi y'ubusa (-70C). Ishami rya ONU ryitaho abana UNICEF , risanzwe ritunganya itangwa ry'incanco ku bana, rizotanga uburyo bwo gushikana inkingo za Covid-19 iyo zitegerezwa gushika mu mugambi wa Covax. Iryo shami ririko riritegura kwiremeka nibura incuro zibiri ivyo ryahora ritwara muco ryise ''igikorwa amahanga kitari bwigere kiba''. Ivyo kugira bikunde, ibihugu bitegerezwa kuba vyiteguye mu buryo bwo kwakira izo nkingio no kuzitanga. Benjamin Schreiber ashinzwe guhuza ibikorwa vya Covax muri Unicef avuga ko afise ''impungenge ko ata mwiteguro uhagije uraba''. ''Ico twabonye n'uko no mu bihugu biteye imbere ishirwa mu ngiro ry'ibikorwa vyo gutanga incanco bitoroha namba, bikenera uburyo no gutegurwa neza, gushika ubu akaba ata mwiteguro uhagije urakorwa mu bihugu vy'amikoro make.'' Ariko afise icizere ko bizoshoboka kuko avuga ko nk'ibihugu vyo muri Afrika bimenyereye ivy'incanco gusumba ibindi bihugu vyinshi kw'isi. OMS imaze kwemera urucanco rumwe gusa Intambanyi si izo gusa. Mu mugambi wa Covax wa OMS, hemewe kugurwa incanco zimaze kwemezwa na OMS gusa. Gushika ubu naho urumaze kwemerwa gukoreshwa vyihutirwa ni Pfizer gusa. Moderna na AstraZeneca ziracari nu nzira yo kwemerwa. Gushika ubu rero nta tariki runaka BBC yabonye y'aho inkingo za mbere zishobora kubonekera muri Africa ifatiye ku bishikirizwa n'abategetsi ba Covax. Itariki yitwa ko ari iya hafi ni mu kwezi kwa kabiri ariko hashobora gushika no mpera z'ukwa gatatu kugira inkingo za mbere zirungitswe na Covax zishike muri Africa.

Ico gihugu cararungitse ingabo ibihumbi n'ibihumbi mu gihugu ca Mali kuva mu mwaka wa 2013 Bwana Macron yatangaje ivyo mu gihe yari mu rugendo muri Cote d'Ivoire, aho yamenyesheje ko ataco Ubufaransa butazokora kugira ngo buhashe abarwanyi bagendera ku vyiyumviro bikaze vy'idini rya Isilamu mu karere. Ivyo bibaye inyuma y'indwi nkeya abasoda b'abafaransa 13 baguye mw'isanganya rya kajugujugu muri Mali, igitigiri kitari bwaboneke kuva mu myaka ya 1980. Ico gihugu cararungitse ingabo ibihumbi n'ibihumbi mu gihugu ca Mali kuva mu mwaka wa 2013. Ni inyuma y'aho izo nyeshamba zigendera ku vyiyumviro bikaze vy'idini rya Isilamu bigaruriye ibice bitari bike vy'uburaruko bw'ico gihugu. Bafashijwe n'Ubufaransa, ingabo za Mali zarashoboye kwigarurira uturere twose twari mu minwe y'izo nyeshamb. Ahagit aho, habandanya hibonekeza umutekano muke mu gihe n'ibihugu bibanyi navyo nyene vyandukiwe. Mu gikorwa c'ukurwanya izo nyeshamba ciswe Opération Barkhane, Ubufaransa bwarungitse abasirikare bashika 4500 gufasha ingabo z'ibihugu vya Mali, Mauritania, Niger, Burkina Faso na Chad. Bwana Macron yavuze ko ejo ku wa gatandatu abo yise "abarwanyi b'imirwi y'iterabwoba" bishwe mu ntambara zabereye mu karere ka Mopti muri Mali. Ati: "Muri aka gatondo, kubera ubwira bw'abasirikare bacu n'ingabo za Barkhane, twashoboye kwica abarwanyi 13, dufata mpiri umwe muri bo twongera tubohoza n'abajandarume ba Mali babiri bari bagizwe imbohe". Bwana Macron yatangaje ivyo mw'ijambo ryiwe muri Cote d'Ivoire, aho yariko asangira umunsi mukuru wa Noël n'abasirikare b'Ubufaransa. Macron yariko asangira umunsi mukuru wa Noël n'abasirikare b'Ubufaransa Ku munsi wa gatanu, yari yavuze ko "azokwongereza inguvu" mu rugamba rwo kurwanya imirwi y'abarwanyi bagendera ku vyiyumviro bikaze vy'idini rya Isilamu mu karere ka Sahel no mu bice biri musi y'ubugaragwa bwa Sahara. Muri uwo mwanya nyene, abategetsi b'ibihugu vya Afrika y'Uburengero bari batanguye inama muri Nigeria yo kwiga ingene borwanya imvururu ziterwa n'iyo mirwi y'aba isilamu. Umukuru w'igihugu ca Nigeria Muhammadu Buhari yavuze ko izo mvururu ari ikibazo nyamukuru gihanze ako karere kose. Intumwa idasanzwe y'ishirahamwe ONU muri Afrika y'Uburengero no mu karere ka Sahel, Mohamed Ibn Chambas, yabwiye abo bategetsi bari mu nama ko ibikorwa vya gisirikare vyonyene bidashobora kurangiza izo mvururu. Asaba ko hokorwa n'ibindi kugira ngo ako karere gatere imbere. Abategetsi batanu b'ibihugu vya Sahel baritezwe mw'ikoraniro i Paris mu Bufaransa mu kwezi kwa mbere. Muri iyo nama, Bwana Macron azokwerekana neza "integuro" y'ibikorwa vy'ukurwanya imirwi y'abo barwanyi muri ako karere.

Umushingamateka Ibrahim Abiringa yari yegereye Perezida Museveni Yagandaguranywe na mwene wabo, kuwa gatanu uheze, n'umuntu yitwaje ikirwanisho ari kw'ipikipiki. Kuva mu gitondo, abajejwe umutekano barwijwe mu buraruko bw'ubuganda, ahabereye ibirori vyo gufubana iteka uwo mushinga mateka. Mur'ivyo birori, hamenyeshejwe ko amahera arenga miliyoni 36 z'amashiringi y'amaganda, ariyo bagenzi we b'abashingamateka begeranirije umuryango asize. Kuva kuwa mungu, abantu baharurwa mu majana bashigikiye uwo muhisi, nibo bahuriye ku kibuga c'indege c'I Arua, aho ibiziga vy'abo bavukanyi babiri vyatahukanwa mur'ako karere basanzwe bavuka mwo. Kubera ishavu, hari n'abashatse kudurumbanya ikirindiro c'igi polisi co ngaho I Arua. Bahavuye bigizwa yo n'igipolisi gikoresheje ibisasu bikoroza amasozi. Mu vyo abo bashavuye bashira hejuru, babaza ingene leta idashobora gukingira abarongozi igiye gushobora gukingira abanyagihugu basanzwe. Umwe mubategetsi batandukanye yafashe ijambo, umwe mu bagenzi yavuze ati "Abiringa yavutse mu 1956 ntiyari kurinda gutwarwa n'umwicanyi w'umwiyererezi." Uyo yongeye ati, "Mu buganda turakenyeye tubonye 'bodaboda' tuze turikeka dutinya urupfu?" Perezida Yoweli Museveni n'umutambukanyi wiwe, umushikiranganji wa mbere wa Uganda ni bamwe mu bategetsi bifadikanije n'umuryango mur'urwo rubanza. Umushingamateka Ibrahim Abiringa yari yegereye Perezida Museveni

Cameroun yageze muri 1/4 nyuma yo gutsinda amakipe ariko Colombia ya René Higuita, Argentine ya Maradona n'izindi Batatu mu bari bagize iyo kipe; Louis Paul Mfede, Benjamin Massing na kapiteni wabo Stephen Tataw, bo bamaze gupfa. Iyi kipe yarimo abakinnyi bamamaye nka Roger Milla, Jules Onana, Emmanuel Kundé, Cyrille Makanaky cyangwa Thomas N'Kono, yageze muri kimwe cya kane cy'iyo mikino aho yasezerewe n'Ubwongereza. Muri kimwe cy'umunani yari yabashije gusezerera Colombia, ndetse ikaba yari yazamutse mu matsinda ari iya mbere mu itsinda B ryarimo na Argentine ya Diego Maradona. Uku gutegereza ibihembo imyaka myinshi ngo kwatewe n'uko leta yahawe urutonde rw'abantu 44, aho kuba 22 bari bagize ikipe, abategetsi bakavuga ko batari gushobora kubona inzu 44. Ishyirahamwe ry'abahoze bagize ikipe ya 'les lions indomptables' riyobowe na Bertin Ebwelle, ryibukije ibyo bihembo mu rwandiko ryandikiye perezida. Izi nzu bagiye guhabwa ziherereye mu murwa mukuru Yaoundé, mu murwa w'ubucuruzi Douala no mu mujyi uri ku nyanja wa Limbe. Roger Milla, w'imyaka 67, umwe mu bakuze bari bayigize, yashimye Perezida Paul Biya kwibuka amasezerano yabahaye. Bamwe bibuka uburyo Roger Milla yamamaye cyane mu kwishimira igitego aceza cyane muri aho baterera 'corner'

Umukuru wa polisi Carmen Best yashinje abigaragambya n'abahatuye "kudafatanya" na polisi Umuhungu umwe w'imyaka 16 yararashwe aza gupfa agejejwe ku bitaro. Undi w'imyaka 14, ubu ari kuvurirwa mu cyumba cy'indembe. Ako gace kigenga, mu ntangiriro kari kazwi nka 'Capitol Hill Autonomous Zone' (CHAZ), ubu kiswe 'Capitol Hill Occupied Protest' (CHOP). Kashyizweho mu gihe cy'imyigaragambyo yo kwamagana urupfu rwa George Floyd. Kubera ko ako gace kajyanye n'imyigaragambyo yo kwamagana urugomo rwa polisi, ni ko kicungira umutekano ubwako. Mu itangazo ibitaro bya 'Seattle hospital Harborview Medical Center' byasohoye, byavuze ko umwe muri abo bahungu yahagejejwe ku wa mbere n'imodoka y'umuntu ku giti cye saa cyenda na 15 naho undi ahagezwa saa cyenda na 30 n'itsinda ry'ubuvuzi ry'urwego ruzimya inkongi. Iryo tangazo ry'ibitaro ryongeraho ko uwo muhungu wahagejejwe saa cyenda n'iminota 30 ari we wapfuye. Nubwo ako gace kabanje kuba ak'abigaragambya mu mahoro babarirwa mu magana, uku kubaye ukurasana kwa kane kubaye muri ako gace kazwi nka CHOP, mu minsi 10 ishize. Ubuzima buba bumeze gute muri ako gace? Nkuko ibitangazamakuru byaho bibivuga, ku manywa ahanini ako gace kaba karangwamo amahoro, abantu baruhuka, mu gihe abakorerabushake batanga ibiryo. Abigaragambya bagakozemo n'ubusitani ndetse ku muhanda bahashyira ishusho yanditseho n'irangi interuro igira iti: "Ubuzima bw'abirabura bufite agaciro". Ariko iyo ijoro riguye, bivugwa ko muri ako gace habamo ubushyamirane ubwo abigaragambya baba bagendagenda, n'abarinzi bitwaje intwaro ku mugaragaro bakagenzura imihanda yo muri ako gace bari ku irondo.

Isoko ya kijyambere mu mugyi wa Kigaliri yafariwe na Rwanda Revenue Authority Hafatiriwe isoko rya kijyambere riri mu mujyi wa Kigali, nyiraryo akaba yishyuzwa akayabo ya miliyoni 200 y'imisoro atishyuye. Umukozi w'ikigo cy'imisoro yasabye abahacururiza kujya banyuza amafranga y'ubukode kuri konti y'ikigo cy'imisoro aho kuyashyikiriza nyirinzu. Bigaragara ko imirimo yo kubaka iri soko yatwaye akayabo ndetse ngo hakaba hariyambajwe n'inguzanyo ya banki. Muri rusange, ikigo cy'imisoro gikurikiranye abantu bagera ku 1000 kirega kuba baranze kwishyura imisoro igera kuri miliyari 55 z'amafranga y'u Rwanda . Bibaye ubwa mbere iki kigo gikoresha imbaraga nyinshi mu kwishyuza imisoro itaratangiwe igihe. Ingano n'amafranga agomba kugaruzwa ndetse n'igihe gishize atishyurwa, ngo nibyo bitumye ikigo cy'imisoro gishyira ingufu nyinshi muri gahunda yo kubishyuza. Nyuma y'ibyumweru bibiri urutondo rw'abishyuzwa rushyizwe ahagaragara, ikigo cy'imisoro ngo kimaze kugaruza agera kuri miliyari 2 z'amafranga yu Rwanda.

Lisa Murkowski avuga ko Inama Nkenguzamateka yategerezwa kwitandukanya na Trump asanzwe yagirizwa Muri kuno kwezi, Bwana Trump yarabogojwe n'Inama Nshingamateka yiganjemwo abo mu mugambwe w'aba Démocrates. Bamwagiriza ko yakoresheje ububasha afise mu gukora amakosa kandi ko yaburabuje Inama Nshingamateka mu matohoza yariko irakora. Bwana Trump arindiriye ko Inama Nkenguzamateka nayo imucira urubanza kugira akurwe ku butegetsi burundu, ikiboneka ko ari kurondera umuzi w'ibuye kuko ino nama yiganziwe n'abo mu mugambwe wiwe w'aba Républicains. Umukuru w'abakenguzamateka b'aba Républicains, Mitch McConnell, avuga ko "azokorana muri vyose" n'ibiro vy'umukuru w'igihugu. Bwana Trump yamye yiyamiriza ibikorwa vy'ugushaka kumubogoza, akavuga ko "ari urwanko bamufitiye". Murkowski avuga iki? Umupfasoni Murkowski yabwiye televiziyo KTUU yo mu ntara ya Alaska ko atiyumva neza kubera amajambo yashikirijwe na Bwana McConnell aho avuga ko "azokorana muri vyose" n'ibiro vy'umukuru w'igihugu. Ati: "Ndavyumvise vyanteye umutima uhagaze". Uyo mukenguzamateka avuga ko Inama Nkenguzamateka yategerezwa kwitandukanya n'ibiro vy'ukumuru w'igihugu ku biraba n'ingene urwo rubanza rwokorwa. Ati: "Kuri jewe, twategerezwa kwitandukanya n'uwagirizwa". Hagati aho, avuga ko ivyo bikorwa vyo kubogoza Perezida Trump vyihutishijwe. Umupfasoni Murkowski, aboneka ko afise ivyiyumviro bitandukanye n'ivya Bwana Trump, aranegura umukuru w'igihugu ku bibazo bitari bike. Mu kwezi kw'icumi 2018, yarafashe ingingo yo kudatora mu matora yo kwemeza umukuru wa Sentare nkuru y'igihugu, kubera yagirizwa ivyo gufata ku nguvu. Bwana McConnell afise uruhara rudasanzwe ku kungene urubanza rwo kubogozwa rwobandanya, mu gihe rutegerezwa kutagira aho rwegamiye. Mitch McConnell avuga ko yizeye neza ko Bwana Trump azokwambikwa izera Hagati aho, mu ndwi iheze yaratangaje icese ko atari "umucamanza adategerezwa kugira aho yegamiye" muri urwo rubanza. Ati: "Uru ni ikibazo ca politike, ataco gisa gisana n'ivyo ubutungane. Kubogoza umukuru w'igihugu ni ingingo ya politike". Yarongeye avuga ko yizeye neza ko Bwana Trump azokwambikwa izera mu Nama Nkenguzamateka irongowe n'aba Républicains. Ati: "Ndazi ko tuzofata ingingo imworohereza". Muri iyo Nama Nkenguzamateka, abarongoye aba Républicains baramaze guterana amajambo n'abarongoye aba Démocrates basanzwe ari bake, ku vyerekeye urwo rubanza. Bwana Trump yagirizwa ko yafatiye ku mfashanyo ya gisirikare Amerika yashaka guha igihugu ca Ukraine mu gutegeka ico gihugu ngo gikore amatohoza kuri Joe Biden, ari mu barongoye umugambwe w'aba Démocrates, aboneka ko ashobora guhangana nawe mu matora ya 2020. Urubanza rushobora gutangura mu kwezi kwa mbere kw'umwaka buca utangura, mu gihe abakenguzamateka bazoba bavuye mu karuhuko.

Kuri Copacabana umucanga w'inyanja w'i Rio de Janeiro barunamira abishwe na Covid-19 Iyi virusi yishe abantu 50,000 mu mezi atatu ya mbere, ariko uyu mubare wikubye kabiri mu minsi 50 gusa. Bamaze kugira abantu barenga miliyoni eshatu banduye iyi ndwara. Abahanga mu buvuzi bavuga ko iki cyorezo muri Brazil kitaragera ku gasongero mbere yo gucururuka, ariko ubu bamaze gufungura amaguriro n'inzu z'uburiro. Perezida Jair Bolsonaro yabanje gufata nk'icyoroshye iyi virus ndetse arwanya ingamba zo kukirwanya avuga ko zizambya ubukungu. Nyuma nawe yaje gufatwa n'iki cyorezo ariko arakira, yakomeje kurwanya zimwe mu ngamba zafashwe n'abayobora intara, ndetse kenshi yagaragaye mu bantu benshi atambaye agapfukamunwa. Abahanga bavuga ko kutagira uburyo bwumvikanyweho hagati ya leta iyobowe na Bolsonaro n'abandi bategetsi biri mu byatumye iyi virus izahaza Brazil. Brazil iri kwitwara ite muri ibi bihe? Minisiteri y'ubuzima iyobowe n'umusirikare w'umujenerali udafite ubunararibonye mu by'amagara y'abantu. Ba minisitiri babiri, bari abaganga, bombi bareguye kubera kutumvikana na perezida ku mabwiriza asaba abantu kutegerana no gukoresha hydroxychloroquine, ubushakashatsi bwerekanye ko utavura kandi ufite ingaruka mbi. Perezida Bolsonaro - wise Covid-19 "uducurane tworoheje" kandi wanenzwe mu gihugu no mu mahanga uko yitwaye- avuga ko yakize iyi virus kubera uriya muti ubusanzwe uvura malaria. Dr José Davi Urbaez wo mu intsinda ryitwa Infectious Diseases Society yabwiye ibiro ntaramakuru Reuters ati: "Dukwiye kuba turi mu bihe by'amakuba, kuko iki cyorezo ari akaga nk'intambara y'isi. Ariko Brazil yose yibereye mu kinya". Perezida Bolsonaro aramutsa abamushyigikiye mu rugendo rwe rwa mbere ahitwa Sao Raimundo Nonato nyuma yo gukira coronavirus mu kwezi gushize Uyu muganga anenga umuhate mucye wa leta mu kurwanya iki cyorezo. Brazil ubu imaze kugira abantu 100,477 bapfuye kubera coronavirus na 3,035,582 bayanduye nk'uko bivugwa na minisiteri y'ubuzima yahoo. Iyi mibare bikekwako iri hejuru kurushaho kubera gupima biri hasi. Leta zunze ubumwe za Amerika nizo gusa zifite imibare irenze iyi. Umutegetsi utarategetse Ingingo za Katy Watson umunyamakuru wa BBC muri Amerika y'Epfo Mu gihe byari bitangajwe ko abapfuye muri Brazil barenze 100,000 humvikanye abantu bishimye ndetse baturitsa ibishashi by'umuriro wo mu byishimo mu mujyi wa São Paulo. Ntabwo bishimiraga ko Covid-19 iri kugarika ingogo - ahubwo ko ikipe ya Palmeiras yari itwaye igikombe cya shampiyona mukeba wayo Corinthians kuri za penaliti. Urukundo rutangaje rwa ruhago ntabwo barushyize hasi - cyane cyane ubu hari n'ikiri kubabuza ibyishimo - ariko kuba Jair Bolsonaro yarashimiye abegukanye igikombe nyamara ntagire icyo avuga kuri iyo mibare y'abari gupfa, bisobanuye byinshi ku buryo abona iki cyorezo. Inkuru nyamukuru z'ibinyamakuru z'ejo ku cyumweru zanengaga uyu mutegetsi. Kunanirwa gutegeka bikomeje gutera benshi amakenga cyane cyane kuba igihugu kimaze gufungura ibikorwa mu gihe iyi virus ikomeje guca ibintu. Ahandi muri America y'Epfo byifashe bite? Brazil yonyine, yihariye hafi kimwe cya kabiri cy'impfu zose za coronavirus muri America y'Epfo na Karayibe, aho abantu barenga miliyoni eshanu bamaze kuyandura nk'uko bivugwa na kaminuza ya Johns Hopkins ikurikirana iki cyorezo ku isi. Ibindi bihugu kuri uwo mugabane byakubititse birimo Mexico - ubu ni iya gatatu ku isi mu bihugu byapfushije benshi, 52,000 mu bantu 476,000 bayanduye - Peru, Colombia na Chile nabyo ntibyorohewe. Inzobere zivuga ko uruvange rw'imijyi ituwe mu bucucike bukabije, ubukene, ubutegetsi n'ubuvuzi buciriritse biri gutuma iki cyorezo cyimonogoza muri ako gace.

Babyukiye mu myigaragambyo yo kwamagana radio mpuzamahanga y'Abafaransa (RFI) Ubutumwa buhamagarira Abarundi bose kwitabira iyi myigaragambyo bwahererekanyijwe ku mbuga nkoranyambaga guhera ku wa kane nijoro. Mu cyumweru gishize, RFI yagiranye ikiganiro na Madamu Barankitse - utavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi kuri ubu uba mu buhungiro - wanenze ubutegetsi bw'u Burundi, umukuru w'igihugu na politiki y'iki gihugu. Videwo yagaragaye mu ntangiriro y'iki cyumweru, yerekana umuyobozi wa komisiyo ya leta ishinzwe kugenzura imikorere y'ibitangazamakuru (CNC), avuga ko bagiye kureba icyo amategeko ateganya, hanyuma hafatwe "ingingo ibereye" izatangazwa nyuma. Nestor Bankumukunzi ashinja RFI kubogama mu kunanirwa kubaza ibibazo bihinyuza bisaba Madamu Barankitse gutanga ibimenyetso by'ibyo yavugaga muri icyo kiganiro. Ntacyo RFI yari yatangaza ku mugaragaro ku myigaragambyo y'uyu munsi. Itangazo rihamagarira Abarundi kwitabira iyo myigaragambyo ryavugaga ko izabera ku mirwa mikuru y'intara, ko "n'iyonka nta muntu n'umwe ukwiye gusiba" kandi buri komini izahagarara ukwayo. Barasaba RFI na TV5 Monde kubasaba imbabazi Uyu munsi abaturage babyukiye mu mihanda bafite ibyapa byamagana ibitangazamakuru birimo RFI, TV5 Monde n'ibindi, babishinja "kwivanga mu buzima bw'u Burundi" no "guha ijambo Marguerite Barankitse". Nta mutegetsi mu Burundi wigaragaje ahamagarira iyi myigaragambyo. Imwe mu miryango yigenga ibogamiye kuri leta nka ACOPA, yasohoye amatangazo yamagana RFI n'ibindi bitangazamkauru byahaye umwanya Madamu Barankitse utavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi mu Burundi. Abaturage bahamagariwe kwitabira "nta usibye" Mu kwezi kwa gatatu uyu mwaka, ubutegetsi bw'u Burundi bwahagaritse burundu igitangazamakuru BBC gukorera mu Burundi ndetse na Radio Ijwi ry'Amerika. Ku wa kane w'iki cyumweru, akanama gashinzwe gukurikirana uburenganzira bwa muntu ku rwego mpuzamahanga mu nteko ishinga amategeko ya Canada kahaye Madamu Barankitse igihembo nk'impirimbanyi y'uburenganzira bwa muntu.

Kizito Mihigo agifatwa yavuze ko yemera ibyaha aregwa Mu cyumba cy'urukiko rw'ikirenga, umuririmbyi Kizito Mihigo wari mu mwambaro w'iroza, yari yicaye atuje, umwitegereje Kizito yasaga nk'umeze neza. Yari kumwe n'umwunganizi we mu mategeko, Antoinette Mukamusoni; iruhande rwabo hari Jean Paul Dukuzumuremyi baregwa mu rubanza rumwe. Hagombaga kandi kuba hari na Ntamuhanga Cassien, wari umunyamakuru, uyu bikaba biherutse kwemezwa ko yatorotse gereza mu mpera z'umwaka ushize. Ikibazo cya Cassien Ikibazo cya Cassien Ntamuhanga uregwa mu rubanza rumwe ni cyo cyabimburiye ibindi. Uyu wahoze ari umunyamakuru ntiyagaragaye mu rukiko kandi byemejwe ko yatorotse gereza, ubu akaba akekerwa hanze y'u Rwanda. Ubushinjacyaha bwasabye ko ubujurire yari yatanze bwaseswa kuko bigaragara ko nta nyungu agifite muri uru rubanza. Ikindi kibazo cyavuye ku ruhande rwa Jean Paul Dukuzumuremyi we wavuze ko adafite umwunganira mu mategeko kandi akaba atishoboye. Mu gihe itegeko rimwemerera kubona umunyamategeko atishyuye, Dukuzumuremyi yabwiye urukiko ko igihe kinini amaze azungurutswa mu magereza atandukanye y'igihugu byatumye atamenya ko ubujurire bwe bwakiriwe bityo ngo atangire kubutegura. Gutandukanya urubanza Nyuma y'izi nzitizi zatanzwe n'abo baregwa hamwe, Kizito Mihigo yasabye ko urubanza rwe rwatandukanywa n'urw'abagenzi be. Kizito Mihigo asaba ko urubanza rwe rwatandukanywa n'urwabandi baregwa hamwe Kuri we ngo ibibazo bigaragazwa na bagenzi be bituma atinda guhabwa ubutabera yajuriye asaba. Gusa ubushinjacyaha bwo bushimangira ko abaregwa bagomba kuguma mu rubanza rumwe kuko ibyo baregwa bifitanye isano.
