Umuririmbyi Kizito Mihigo wari umaze kwamamara cyane mu ndirimbo za kiliziya n'izihamagarira ubwiyunge yatawe muri yombi mu mpera z'umwaka wa 2014. Nyuma y'urubanza rutatinze, Kizito yahanishijwe igifungo cy'imyaka 10 ahamijwe ibyaha byo kugambirira guhungabanya umutekano w'igihugu, iterabwoba no gushaka kugirira nabi umukuru w'igihugu. Kwemera icyaha Kuva yagezwa bwa imbere mu rukiko, Kizito yakunze kumvikana avuga ko yemera icyaha ndetse asaba n'imbabazi ariko nta bisobanuro byinshi yatanze ku byo aregwa. Gusa nubwo yemera icyaha abatari bake bakunze kumvikana bavuga ko ifungwa rye rishobora kuba rihishe inyuma impamvu za politiki.

Uwapfuye ari mu bapolisi baheruka kujya mu butumwa bw'amahoro Mu mibare yatangajwe mu Rwanda habonetse abanduye bashya barindwi(7) n'abakize barindwi, abanduye bose hamwe bamaze kuba 384 mu gihe abayikize ari 269 naho abo yishe ni babiri. Uyu mupolisikazi w'ipeti rito mu gipolisi cy'u Rwanda yari mu butumwa mu majyaruguru ya Sudani y'Epfo mu mujyi wa Malakal, umujyi wa kabiri nyuma y'umurwa mukuru Juba. Umwe mu bapolisi bari kumwe na we mu butumwa yabwiye BBC ko uyu mukobwa yari mu bakora akazi ko kwita kuri bagenzi be, ko yari mu itsinda riheruka kujya mu butumwa bw'amahoro mu mezi ashize. Uyu mupolisikazi yari mu cyiciro cy'abapolisi n'ingabo b'u Rwanda bari muri Sudani y'Epfo bazwi nka RWAFPU-1 mu butumwa bwa UNMISS. Yari amaze igihe kirenga icyumweru agejejwe mu Rwanda. Abaye umuntu wa kabiri wishwe na Covid-19 mu Rwanda nyuma ya Hassan Gisaka wishwe n'iki cyorezo mu mpera y'icyumweru gishize. Ku isi, coronavirus imaze kwandura abantu miliyoni 6,4 abamaze kuyikira ni miliyoni 3 mu gihe abo imaze kwica ari 382,479 nk'uko bivugwa na Kaminuza ya Johns Hopkins yo muri Amerika. Muri Sudani y'Epfo abanduye bariyongereye mu gihe gito gishize ubu bageze kuri 994 mu gihe imaze kwica abantu 10. Gisenyi na Rubavu mu kato Mu buryo bwari bwitezwe, inama y'abaminisitiri mu Rwanda yemereye abatwara za moto mu Rwanda gusubira mu mihanda, uretse mu turere twa Rusizi na Rubavu mu burengerazuba. Hari hashize amezi abiri abatwara moto mu Rwanda - babarirwa mu 50,000 - batemerewe gukora, icyemezo cyafashwe mu kwirinda iki cyorezo. Inama y'abaminisitiri mu Rwanda yafunguye kandi ingendo hagati y'intara, n'intara n'umujyi wa Kigali, nazo zari zarafunzwe mu kwirinda ikwirakwira rya coronavirus. Uturere twa Rubavu na Rusizi twashyizwe mu kato kuko nta wemerewe kutuvamo cyangwa kutujyamo, ingendo mu modoka rusange ndetse na moto zitwara abantu birabujijwe. Mu mpera y'icyumweru gishize, minisiteri y'ubuzima yatangaje ko habonetse abantu batanu banduye coronavirus mu karere ka Rusizi, kugeza ubu abamaze kuhaboneka bose hamwe ni 11. Umunyamabanga wa leta muri minisiteri y'ubuzima yabwiye ikigo cya leta cy'itangazamakuru ko n'akarere ka Rubavu kashyizwe mu kato ngo bapime bamwe mu bahatuye bashingiye ku buryo kegeranye n'umujyi wa Goma muri DR Congo ahavugwa abarwayi b'iki cyorezo. Ingamba zindi zari zarafashwe mbere zagumishijweho.

Bisaba kwitwararika kugira umubyeyi wanduye abyare yonse atanduje umwana we Inkuru ya Jean-Claude Mwambutsa Mu kigo nderabuzima cya Remera mu mujyi wa Kigali ni hamwe mu hatangirwa serivisi yihariye yo gukurikirana abagore banduye SIDA batwite cyangwa bari konsa kugira ngo batanduza abana babo. Umunyamakuru wa BBC yaganiriye na bamwe muri aba bagore banduye, batifuje gutangazwa amazina, bamubwira ko ibi bishoboka iyo babashije kwitwararika gahunda za muganga. Umwe muri aba babyeyi wanduye afite umwana w'amezi icyenda, aramwonsa nta nkomyi, yaje hano kwa muganga gukurikirana uko ubuzima bwe n'umwana buhagaze. Yagize ati: "Ukurikiza ibyo muganga yagusabye byose, ugafata imiti igihe yategetse. Imiti umuntu arayigendana aho waba uri hose amasha yayo yagera ukibeta ukayinywa. "Ni bibi kubyara umwana ntumwonse, kandi burya iyo akonse niho wumva urukundo rw'umwana nawe akumva urwa mama we". Emile Musabyimana, umuyobozi w'ikigo nderabuzima cya Remera avuga uburyo bafasha umubyeyi wanduye kubyara no konsa umwana we kandi ntiyandure. Agira ati: "[iyo atwite] turamukurikirana akazabyara umwana muzima, dukurikirana abasirikare be [b'umubiri] na virusi iri mu maraso uko ingana, uko umwana agenda akura nawe turamukurikirana kandi akanonka nta kibazo, 99% baba bazima". Uyu muganga avuga ko bisaba ko umubyeyi yitabira kandi akagakurikiza gahunda zose ahawe na muganga, zirimo gufata imiti neza irinda umwana mu gihe atwite, gufata imiti igabanya ubukana n'ibindi. Bisaba kuba maso ngo umwana atandura Madamu Fatouma Uwonkunda umuforomokazi ukora muri iyi gahunda yo gufasha ababyeyi banduye kubyara no konsa batanduje abana yabwiye BBC ko umwana aba afite ibyago byinshi bityo bisaba kwitwararika kw'ababyeyi. Avuga ko hari nk'igihe umwana arwara ubugendakanwa bikaba ngombwa ko bamuhagarika konka kugira ngo atandura, bakabanza bakamuvura. Ati: "Niyo mpamvu dusaba ko n'umubyeyi akomeza gukurikirana umwana akajya amureba mu kanwa". Umwana asuzumwa VIH inshuro eshatu z'ingenzi, amaze ibyumweru bitandatu avutse, ku mezi icyenda no ku mezi 18. Madamu Uwokunda ati: "Ku mezi 24 dufata ikizami cya VIH cy'umwana, twasanga ari muzima tukamenya ko nyina yakurikije inama zose twamubwiye maze umwana tukamucutsa nibwo dusezerera n'umurwayi muri iyi serivisi". Ikigo gishinzwe ubuzima mu Rwanda kivuga ko mu myaka 10 ishize ku bana 100,000 bavukaga 1,000 muri bo babaga banduye cyangwa bakanduzwa SIDA nyuma n'ababyeyi babo. Kubera iyi serivisi ku babyeyi banduye, iki kigo kivuga ko imibare iheruka ari uko ku bana 100,000 bavuka ubu 150 ari bo bandura virusi ya VIH itera SIDA.

Itangazo ry'ishami rishinzwe amahoro n'umutekano ry'uyu muryango riravuga ko ubu "ari bwo buryo bwonyine bwo kurangiza ikibazo kiri muri Sudani". Imyigaragambyo y'abaturage yatumye igisirikare gihirika ku butegetsi Omar al-Bashir mu kwezi kwa kane, yarakomeje na nyuma, bamagana ko ubutegetsi buguma mu maboko y'abasirikare. Mu minsi ishize, abasirikare barashe ku bigaragambya. Abigaragambya bavuga ko hishwe bagenzi babo barenga 100, naho uruhande rw'ubutegetsi rukemeza ko abamaze kwicwa batarenga 61 i Khartoum mu murwa mukuru. Umunyamakuru wa BBC Catherine Byaruhanga uri i Khartoum avuga ko abantu bitwaje intwaro bashyigikiye ubutegetsi bwa gisirikare bashinjwa kwica abantu, bari kuboneka ahantu hose, ibi bikaba biteye ubwoba abaturage n'abari gutabara inkomere. Umuryango w'ubumwe bw'Afurika wasabye ko hakorwa iperereza kuri ubu bwicanyi nawo ushinja abashinzwe umutekano. Ishami rishinzwe amahoro n'umutekano muri uyu muryango rivuga ko umwanzuro wo guhagarika Sudani wemejwe n'abagize umuryango kandi uhita ujya mu bikorwa. Rivuga kandi ko rishobora gufatira ibihano bamwe mu bagize inama ya gisirikare iyoboye Sudani by'inzibacyuho nibananirwa guha ubutegetsi abasiviri. Uyu mwanzuro wagezweho nyuma y'inama y'igitaraganya yamaze amasaha atanu.

Kuva mu 2008 ba nyamweru barenga 20 bamaze kwicwa mu Burundi Umurambo wa Bonheur Niyonkuru ufite ubumuga bw'uruhu, benshi bita ba nyamweru, wabonetse kuwa gatandatu nk'uko umuyobozi wa ririya huriro ryabo Kazungu Kassim yabibwiye radio RFI. Si ubwa mbere mu Burundi havuzwe ihohoterwa n'iyicwa kuri ba nyamweru. Mu 2012 habonetse umurambo w'umukobwa w'imyaka 15 muri Bujumbura Rural yiciwe hafi y'iwabo, uyu yarishwe bamuca ijosi, amaguru n'amaboko barabitwara. Kuwa gatandatu umurambo wa Niyonkuru bawubonye mu Ntara ya Cibitoke hafi y'umupaka na DR Congo, basanze udafite akaboko, akaguru ndetse n'ururimi. Bwana Kazungu avuga ko ibi bikorwa n'abantu bajya gukoresha ibice by'imibiri ya ba nyamweru mu bikorwa by'ubupfumu mu myumvire y'uko ibyo bice by'umubiri bibageza ku bukire. Avuga kandi ko umwaka ushize hari undi mwana nk'uyu w'imyaka ine (4) waburiwe irengero muri komine Cendajuru kugeza n'ubu akaba atarongera kuboneka. Mu 2012 uriya mwana w'umukobwa basanze yishwe, nawe yaciwe ibice by'umubiri, yari abaye uwa 18 muri ba nyamweru wishwe kuva mu 2008. Kuva icyo gihe kugeza ubu ba nyamweru barenga 20 bamaze kwicwa mu Burundi.

Uganda ikomeje kurwana no kwita ku mpunzi zirenga miliyoni ziri muri iki gihugu Mu itangazo uyu muryango washyize ahagaragara, ushinja Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Amerika n'Uburayi kugira "ingamba zanga abanyamahanga" zikomeje kwirukana abimukira n'impunzi, kandi nanone bikagabanya cyane inkunga zakabagobotse bari hafi y'ibihugu byabo kavukire. Nigel Tricks, ukuriye uyu muryango mu karere k'Afurika y'iburasirazuba, yagize ati: "Kugabanya ingengo y'imari mu buryo bw'ubugome kandi bwihuse biri kugira ingaruka nini ku mfashanyo muri Afurika y'iburasirazuba. Niba hatabonetse indi nkunga, imirire mibi iziyongera, amashuri azafunga imiryango ndetse n'indwara zandurira mu kunywa amazi mabi zizaduka." Uganda icumbikiye impunzi zigera kuri miliyoni imwe n'ibihumbi 500 - umwe mu mibare minini y'impunzi ku isi. Ariko uyu mwaka yabonye imfashanyo yo kuzitaho ingana na miliyoni 158 z'amadolari y'Amerika, zivuye kuri miliyoni 346 mu mwaka ushize wa 2017. Umuryango ufasha impunzi wo mu gihugu cya Norvège unavuga ko amazi meza n'ibikorwa by'isukura bidahagije mu nkambi imwe y'impunzi muri Uganda byateje indwara ya kolera. Bwana Tricks yongeyeho ati: "Ibihugu bikize byagakwiye kongera inkunga ku bihugu bicyakira impunzi. Dufite amahirwe yo kwirinda akaga gatewe n'impunzi muri Afurika y'iburasirazuba niba tugize icyo dukora ubu ngubu."

Neymar n'ikipe ye ya Brezili bari mu bahabwa amahirwe yo kwegukana igikombe cy'isi cy'uyu mwaka, ariko baviramo muri kimwe cya kane Neymar yagize ati: "Nari mu cyunamo, nari mbabaye cyane rwose, ariko akababaro karashira." Ati: "Mfite umwana w'umuhungu, mfite umuryango, mfite inshuti, kandi bose ntibaba bashaka kumbona ndi aho ngendagenda ntacyo mfite cyo gukora." Neymar yanavuze ko amakuru avuga ko yaba agiye kwerekeza mu ikipe ya Real Madrid ari "ibihuha." Ku mpeshyi ishize nibwo Neymar w'imyaka 26 y'amavuko yageze mu ikipe ya PSG avuye muri Barcelona aguzwe miliyoni 200 z'amapawundi - amafaranga atari bwigere agurwa undi mukinnyi mbere mu mateka y'umupira w'amaguru ku isi. Amaze gutsindira PSG ibitego 28 mu marushanwa atandukanye ndetse yanayifashije gutsindira ibikombe bitatu bikinirwa muri shampiyona y'Ubufaransa. Neymar yanenzwe cyane ashinjwa kwigusha mu gikombe cy'isi giheruka, ariko we yavuze ko ahubwo abasifuzi bagombaga kuba baramurinze birushijeho ntakorerwe amakosa. Yabwiye ibiro ntaramakuru AFP ati: "Abantu bihutiraga kunenga ukorewe ikosa aho kunenga ukoze ikosa." Yongeyeho ati: "Nari nagiye mu gikombe cy'isi gukina umupira, guhangana n'andi makipe. Ntabwo ntari nagiyeyo ngo bantere imigeri. Uburyo banenze bararengereye, ariko jye ndi umuhungu ukuze. Ibyo menyereye guhangana nabyo." Yagize ati: "Sinshobora kuba umusifuzi ngo nkine n'umupira icyarimwe, ariko hari ibihe bigera nkumva iyaba byashobokaga ko mbikora byombi icyarimwe."

Ekleziya Gatolika niyo yahamagaje imyiyerekano yo ku munsi wa Mungu Ekleziya Gatolika niyo yahamagaje imyiyerekano yo kwiyamiriza iyo ndongozi, ikiringo gitegekanywa n'amategeko carangiranye na 2016. Abantu batandatu barishwe ku mugwa mukuru Kinshasa, igihe igipolisi gikoreshereje umwuka wa gazi n'amasasu y'ukuri gishwiragiza abari mu myiyerekano yakozwe no mu tundi duce tw'igihugu. "Tumaze gutororokanya abapatiri cumi bafashwe, barimwo Patiri Dieudonne Mukinayi wo kuri paruwasi ya Binza Ozone. Afungiwe mu nyubakwa y'umutegetsi ari muri leta kumwe n'abanyeshengero umunani," niko Georges Kapiamba w'ishirahamwe riharanira ubutungane muri Congo "Congolese Association for Justice" yabwiye radiyo Okapi, ifashwe mu mugongo na Onu. "Ku makuru dufise, baguma bahohoterwa. Impuzu zabo zaratabuwe. Ntawuzi irengero ry'ababikira babiri, abantu 257 bari mu myiyerekano barafashwe, bakaba bapfungiwe mu busho butandukanye bwa Kinshasa," niko Kapiamba yabandanije avuga. Umugwi "Lay Coordination Committee", ishami rya Ekleziya Gatolika, niwo wasavye ko haba imyiyerekano mu gihugu cose, kugira ngo bagondoze ubutegetsi bushire mu ngiro amasezerano yapfunditswe hagati ya leta n'imigambwe bitavuga rumwe itariki 31 Ukwezi kwa 12, 2016. Ikiringo ca Prezida Kabila carangiye mu kwezi kwa 12 kwo mu mwaka w'i 2016 ariko aracari ku butegetsi Muri ayo masezerano yahagarikiwe na Ekleziya Gatolika, Kabila yategerezwa gutunganya amatora mu 2017.

Iyi raporo yasohowe n'ibiro bishinzwe ububanyi n'amahanga by'Amerika Ni raporo ivuga ku bice bitandukanye by'uburenganzira bwa muntu mu buzima rusange kuva ku kutagirirwa nabi, uburenganzira ku myemerere, kwishyira hamwe, ku makuru..., kugera ku burenganzira ku kazi. Kuri bimwe mu bibazo bikomeye ku burenganzira bwa muntu bivugwa, leta z'u Rwanda n'u Burundi zagiye zibihakana mu gihe gitambutse zivuga ko ibikorwa byazo ku burenganzira bwa muntu byisunga amategeko n'amabwiriza ariho. Rwanda Iyi raporo y'Amerika ivuga ubwicanyi, kunyuruza abantu, iyicarubozo, gufunga abantu bidakurikije amategeko, gufungirwa politiki, kwinjira mu buzima bwite bw'abantu, kuniga ubwisanzure mu gutanga ibitekerezo n'ubw'itangazamakuru...ikavuga ko bikorwa n'inzego z'umutekano za leta. Iyi raporo iravuga ko guverinoma y'u Rwanda ifata ingamba zidahagije mu kubikumira cyangwa gukurikirana ababikora. Ivuga ku ibura n'iyicwa rya bamwe mu bari mu ishyaka FDU-Inkingi - ritaremerwa n'amategeko mu Rwanda - nka Anselme Mutuyimana wishwe na Eugène Ndereyimana na Boniface Twagirimana baburiwe irengero. Iyi raporo ivuga bimwe mu bibangamiye ubuzima n'uburenganzira bwa muntu mu magereza n'ibigo bishyirwamo abana bo ku mihanda, abasaritswe n'ibiyobyabwenge, abatagira aho baba, abafashwe bacururiza ku mihanda n'abandi. Ivuga ko inzego za gisirikare na polisi zirimo J-2 (intelligence staff) na National Intelligence and Security Services (NISS), bamwe mu bakozi bazo ari bo bakora ibikorwa by'iyicarubozo no gufungira abantu ahantu hatazwi. Ivuga kandi ko abaharanira uburenganzira bwa muntu banenga ikoreshwa ry'imbaraga z'umurengera mu guta muri yombi abacyekwaho ibyaha, aho abagera kuri batandatu bishwe bari kujyanwa aho bafungirwa. Illuminée Iragena yabuze mu 2016 na Eugène Ndereyimana wabuze mu kwa karindwi 2019 bombi bari abarwanashyaka ba FDU-Inkingi, ubu ntibaraboneka Mu mategeko agenga gufunga abantu no kubaburanisha, ku mfungwa za politiki, gufatira no guteza cyamunara imitungo y'abantu nka Rwigara Assinapol ndetse no kwimura abantu ku bw'inyungu rusange ntibahabwe cyangwa ntibahabwe ku gihe ingurane, ivuga ko naho hagaragara ibibangamiye abantu. Iyi raporo ivuga ko leta y'u Rwanda yagiriye inama abaturage b'u Rwanda kutajya muri Uganda kuko bamwe mu Banyarwanda bariyo bahohotewe nta mpamvu, gusa ikavuga ko hari amakuru ko hari ababujijwe kujya muri Uganda n'i Burundi. Raporo ya leta y'Amerika ishima leta y'u Rwanda mu kurengera impunzi n'uburenganzira bwazo ndetse n'abasaba ubuhungiro mu Rwanda ishingiye ku bivugwa n'ishami ry'umuryango w'abibumbye ryita ku mpunzi. Leta y'u Rwanda ibivugaho iki? Olivier Nduhungirehe, umunyamabanga wa leta muri minisiteri y'ububanyi n'amahanga y'u Rwanda, yabwiye BBC ko ari "raporo basohora buri mwaka, nta kintu dushobora kuyivugaho rwose. State Department [ibiro by'ububanyi n'amahanga by'Amerika] isohora raporo nk'iyi buri mwaka, nta kintu rwose dufite cyo kuyivugaho". Ku ngingo zinyuranye zivugwa n'iyi raporo y'umwaka ushize, abategetsi batandukanye mu Rwanda bagiye batangaza ko hisungwa amategeko mu kubungabunga uburenganzira bwa muntu. Mu kwezi kwa mbere uyu mwaka, Aimé Bosenibamwe, uyobora ibikorwa bya leta by'igororamuco, yabwiye BBC ko ibivugwa ku bigo bishyirwamo abantu by'agateganyo nta kuri kurimo kuko ari ahantu hujuje ibisabwa, kandi ko nta wuharenza amasaha 72. Polisi y'u Rwanda yagiye itangaza ko ku bantu babonywe bishwe cyangwa ababuriwe irengero, ikora iperereza abashinjwa kubigiramo uruhare bagakurikiranwa n'amategeko. Ku gufungira abantu ahantu hatazwi no kubakorera iyicarubozo, mu kwezi kwa kabiri 2019, uwari umushinjacyaha mukuru w'u Rwanda Jean Bosco Mutangana yavuze ko bene izo nzu ntaziba mu Rwanda. Yavuze kandi ko amategeko mu Rwanda ahana umuntu wese wafunze undi mu buryo bunyuranyije n'amategeko. Burundi Ku Burundi, iyi raporo y'ibiro by'ububanyi n'amahanga by'Amerika ishingiye cyane ku bivugwa na raporo ya komisiyo y'iperereza ku bibera mu Burundi yashyizweho n'ishami rya ONU ryita ku burenganzira bwa muntu yasohotse mu kwa cyenda umwaka ushize. Iyo raporo ivuga ku bikorwa by'ubwicanyi, iyicarubozo, urugomo, iterabwoba n'ubugizi bwa nabi ivuga ko byakorewe abatavuga rumwe na leta cyane abo mu ishyaka CNL. Ishingiye kuri raporo ya ONU, iyi raporo ya Amerika ivuga ku bibazo mu gufunga abantu binyuranyije n'amategeko n'aho bafungirwa, n'iyicarubozo bakorerwa aho bafungiye n'abafungirwa ahatazwi. Ivuga ku kwica nkana amategeko agenga ifungwa no kuburanisha abafunzwe cyangwa abashinjwa ibyaha birimo kubangamira umutekano w'igihugu no gutuka umukuru w'igihugu. Iyi raporo ivuga ko ibikorwa bya leta y'u Burundi byo gufunga bimwe mu bitangazamakuru mpuzamahanga, kuniga ubwisanzure bw'itangazamakuru no gufunga bamwe mu banyamakuru bigenga bibangamiye uburengnazira bwa muntu. Abanyamakuru b'ikinyamakuru Iwacu; Christine Kamikazi, Agnès Ndirubusa,Térence Mpozenzi na Egide Harerimana bakatiwe gufungwa imyaka ibiri bahamwe n'ibyaha birimo "ubufatanyacyaha mu guhungabanya umutekano w'igihugu". Iyi raporo kandi ishima umuhate wa leta y'u Burundi mu kubahiriza uburenganzira bw'impunzi zigera ku 75,000 zahungiye muri iki gihugu, mu kubona uburenganzira bw'ibanze. Leta y'u Burundi ivuga iki? BBC yagerageje kuvugana n'ubutegetsi bw'u Burundi ariko kugeza ubu ntibirashoboka. Leta y'u Burundi umwaka ushize yanenze iriya raporo ya komisiyo yashyizweho n'ishami rya ONU ryita ku burenganzira bwa muntu igakora iperereza ku burenganzira bwa muntu mu Burundi. Mu kwezi kwa gatandatu umwaka ushize, Ambasaderi Albert Shingiro uhagarariye u Burundi muri ONU yabwiye inama y'umutekano yayo ko ibiri muri iyo raporo ari ibinyoma kandi bifite impamvu za politiki. Bwana Shingiro yavuze ko ibya "politiki, ubutabera, uburenganzira bwa muntu n'umutekano bihagaze neza mu gihugu kuko leta ibicunze neza".

Bosco Ntaganda, umurwanyi kuva ku myaka 17, mu nyeshyamba, ingabo z'u Rwanda, n'iza DR Congo Kubera ibyaha yashinjwaga, ku nshuro ya mbere mu 2006 urukiko mpuzamahanga mpanabyaha rwashyizeho inyandiko zo kumuta muri yombi ashinjwa kwinjiza abana mu nyeshyamba. Yohererejwe uru rukiko rw'i Hague mu Buholandi mu 2013 amaze gusumbirizwa mu ntambara akabura amajyo akaza mu Rwanda akajya muri ambasade ya Amerika. Abakurikiranaga ibyarimo biba bavuze ko kwishyikiriza ubutabera yabitewe no gutsindwa ku ruhande rwe mu makimbirane yari amaze gucamo kabiri umutwe wa M23. Mu kwa gatanu 2012, ku byaha yashinjwaga hiyongereyeho gufata ku ngufu, ubwicanyi, kugirira nabi abasiviri kubera ubwoko bwabo, ibi bijyana n'ibyarezwe uwari umuyobozi we Thomas Lubanga - umuntu wa mbere wahamijwe ibyaha n'uru rukiko amezi abiri mbere y'icyo gihe. Umutangabuhamya yabwiye urukiko ko ubwo yari umwana, yarwanye iruhande rwa "Terminator", yavuze ko ari umugabo "wica abantu mu buryo bworoshye". Ntaganda ubu yakatiwe gufungwa imyaka 30 n'urukiko rwa ICC kubera ibyaha 18 by'intambara yahamijwe yakoze hagati ya 2002 na 2003. ________________________________________ "Terminator" Muri macye ________________________________________ Umushinjacyaha mukuru wa ICC yavuze ko "Ntaganda ari umugabo mubi ku rwego rumwe na Joseph Kony". Ubuzima bw'igitangaza no kudahanwa Ibi nibyo byabayeho mu myaka myinshi mu gihe Perezida Joseph Kabila yari yaranze kumufata - ngo kugira ngo amahoro ahinde muri DR Congo nk'uko yabivugaga. Byatumye uyu wari inyeshyamba agirwa jenerali akomeza kwidegembya mu mujyi wa Goma, adakorwaho aho yabaga mu buzima bw'agatangaza bwo kwinywera imivinyu no gukina tennis. Abo yahemukiye bahuye n'akaga Bavuga ko Ntaganda n'abarwanyi be bakoze ibyaha byo gufata abagore n'abakobwa ku ngufu, gusahura no kwica mu ntara za Kivu zombi no mu karere ka Ituri mu burasirazuba bwa DR Congo. Ntaganda yavukiye mu Kinigi mu Rwanda mu 1973, ni agace kari munsi y'ibirunga by'u Rwanda. Akiri umwana, iwabo bahungiye i Ngungu muri DR Congo nyuma y'uko abo mu bwoko bwe bw'abatutsi bagirirwaga nabi. Niho yigiye amashuri ariko ntiyarangiza ayisumbuye. Mu 1990 afite imyaka 17 yinjiye mu nyeshyamba za APR, zarwanyaga ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda zivuye muri Uganda. Izi nyeshyamba yarwanagamo zafashe ubutegetsi mu Rwanda mu 1994 ziyobowe na Paul Kagame - ubu ni Perezida w'u Rwanda. Nyuma, intambara yakomereje muri DR Congo, Ntaganda yagendaga ahinduranya mu kurwana mu nyeshyamba muri Congo cyangwa mu ngabo z'u Rwanda. Mu 2002 yinjiye mu mutwe wa Union des Patriotes Congolais (UPC) muri Ituri - aho yamaze imyaka itatu ari we ushinzwe ibikorwa bya gisirikare by'uyu mutwe wa Thomas Lubanga. Ibyaha yakoze icyo gihe ni byo byatumye ICC imushakisha. Bosco Ntaganda (imbere) yari umukuru w'ingabo zigera ku 50,000 muri DR Congo Nyuma yinjiye mu wundi mutwe - CNDP - wayoborwaga na Laurent Nkunda, undi murwanyi wari ukomeye mu karere, kimwe na Ntaganda, nawe warwanye mu nyeshyamba zitwaga APR. Afashijwe n'u Rwanda, Ntaganda yageze aho ahirika Gen Nkunda afata ubutegetsi bwa CNDP. Nubwo yashakishwaga n'urukiko rwa ICC kubera ibyaha yaregwaga, mu masezerano y'amahoro ya 2009, Ntaganda yinjijwe mu gisirikare cya DR Congo azamurwa mu mapeti agirwa Jenerali. Yakoreraga i Goma, aho yari ayoboye abasirikare bagera ku 50,000, benshi muri bo bahoze ari inyeshyamba bakomeje n'ubundi kuba abantu be. Iperereza rya ONU/UN ryatangaje ko Ntaganda yubatse ubushabitsi (business) bukomeye muri Kivu zombi. Bivugwa ko yasoreshaga ibirombe by'amabuye y'agaciro bikorwa n'abasirikare be, agacuruza ayo mabuye, amakara n'ibindi mu buryo butemewe n'amategeko. Umugabo utagira impuhwe Inzobere za ONU zakoze iperereza mu 2011 zavuze ko hari ubwo Bosco Ntaganda yinjizaga amadorari $15,000 mu cyumweru kimwe ku mupaka umwe gusa. Bivugwa ko afite imitungo myinshi i Goma no hanze yayo. Anneke Van Woudenberg, umushakashatsi w'umuryango uharanira uburenganzira bwa muntu Human Rights Watch, yahuye na "Terminator" inshuro nyinshi. Madamu Anneke avuga ko atari umuntu uzi kuvuga no gusobanura ingingo ze neza. Umugabo ureshya na 1,80m, ni umuntu utuje, ukunda kwambara ingofero zikoze mu ruhu. Gusa imbere ni undi muntu, Anneke ati: "Ni umuntu utazemera ibyaha bye. Buri gihe yavugaga impamvu izi na ziriya zatumye akora ibyo yakoze". Urutonde rw'ibyaha yahamijwe ni rurerure kuko ni umugabo ubwe ukunda intambara kandi wigiraga ku rugamba akayobora ibitero. Mu 2008, abanyamakuru mpuzamahanga bamufashe amashusho ayoboye ibitero mu gace kitwa Kiwanja kuri 90Km uvuye i Goma, aha hishwe abantu 150 ku munsi umwe gusa. Yahamwe n'ivyaha 18 vyo mu ntambara muri Kongo vyakozwe hagati ya 2002-2003 Yagirijwe mu 2006Yishikanye kuri ambasade ya USA i Kigali mu 2013 Ivyaha birimwo kwicaMu 2012 hongeweko gufata ku nguvu, gutoteza bifatiye ku moko Ashinjwa kuyobora ibitero byishe abantu bagera kuri 800 kubera ubwoko bwabo mu mujyi wa Mongbwalu mu karere ka Ituri mu 2002. Icyo gihe abarwanyi be bari bamaze gufata aka gace gakungahaye ku mabuye y'agaciro. Mu kwezi kwa kane 2012, yivanye mu gisirikare cya DR Congo, ava mu mujyi wa Goma atwara abasirikare barenga 600 bafite intwaro nyinshi. Bwana Kabila yahise ategeka ko bamufata - gusa avuga ko atazamushyikiriza ICC yamushakaga. Mu mpera z'uwo mwaka, umutwe wa M23 yari ayoboye wafashe umujyi wa Goma ariko nyuma wemera kuwurekura. Amezi yakurikiyeho y'imirwano yatumye abantu bagera ku 800,000 bava mu byabo. Jenerali Ntaganda imbere y'urukiko yavuze ko bimwe mu byaha aregwa yabikoze kubera amateka ye n'imyaka yari afite Ariko mu buryo butamenyekanye neza impamvu, umutwe wa M23 wacitsemo kabiri nyuma kandi y'igitutu cy'amahanga. Uruhande rwa Ntaganda rwatsinzwe n'urwa mugenzi we Col Sultani Makenga. Bisa nkaho yatinye gupfa maze afata inzira ajya mu Rwanda yerekeza i Kigali muri ambasade ya Amerika aho yaje kohererezwa urukiko rwa ICC rwari rumaze imyaka rumushaka. Kuva mu 2015 yaraburanishijwe, mu kwezi kwa karindwi uyu mwaka ahamwa n'ibyaha 18 by'intambara, uyu munsi yakatiwe gufungwa imyaka 30.

Abigaragambya bongeye guteranira mu mihanda yo mu murwa mukuru Khartoum kuri uyu wa gatandatu Barasaba ko ubutegetsi bushyirwa mu maboko y'abasivile aka kanya, nyuma yaho igisirikare ku wa kane gihirikiye Bwana Bashir - wari umaze imyaka hafi 30 ku butegetsi - kikanamuta muri yombi. Igisirikare gishaka kuguma ku butegetsi mu gihe cy'inzibacyuho y'imyaka ibiri, ikurikiwe n'amatora. Ishyirahamwe ry'abakozi muri Sudani, ari na ryo riyoboye iyi myigaragambyo, ryatangaje ubutumwa ku rubuga nkoranyambaga rwa Facebook bugira buti: "Turasaba igisirikare gutuma aka kanya habaho ihererekanya ry'ubutegetsi bugahabwa leta ya gisivile". Ebba Kalondo, umuvugizi w'umuryango w'ubumwe bw'Afurika, yavuze ko ubu igihe kigeze ngo impande zose ziganire. Mu gisa nko kongera kugira ikindi gishya igisirikare gihara, Jenerali Salah Gosh wari ukuriye urwego rw'ubutasi yeguye. Kwegura kwe kwatangajwe hashize amasaha Liyetona Jenerali Awad Ibn Auf, minisitiri w'ingabo wayoboye itsinda ry'abasirikare bahiritse Bwana Bashir, na we ubwe yeguye. Nta gisobanuro cyatanzwe ku mpamvu abo bombi beguye. Ihirikwa ku butegetsi rya Bwana Bashir ryaje rikurikira imyigaragambyo imaze amezi, yatangiye mu kwezi kwa cumi na kabiri k'umwaka ushize wa 2018, abigaragambya binubira izamuka ry'ibiciro birimo n'iry'ibicuruzwa by'ibanze nkenerwa mu buzima, nk'igiciro cy'umugati n'icy'ibikomoka kuri peteroli.

Ifoto ya Rooney inyuma yo guhagarikwa n'igipolisi co mu karere ka Loudoun Uwo yahoze akinira umugwi nserukiragihugu w'Ubwongereza yashikiwe n'ivyo ari mu rugendo mu ndege. Uwo mukinyi yahoze muri Manchester United yafashwe itariki 16 z'ukwezi kwa cumi na kabiri ku kibuga c'indege mpuzamakungu ca Dulles mu ntara ya Virginia agarutse avuye mu rugendo rw'umusi umwe muri Arabia Saoudite. Rooney w'imyaka 33 yarishe amande y'amadolari 25 hamwe n'amagarama y'urubanza y'amadolari 91 itariki zine z'ukwezi kwa mbere nk'uko bigaragara ku mpapuro za sentare z'umushikirizamanza w'intara ya Loudoun. Inkuru zerekeye uwo mukinyi zivuga:"Ari mu rugendo mu ndege Wayne yafashe imiti yari yategetswe n'umuganga aca anywa n'inzoga, bikaba vyatumye ata ubwenge ashitse ku kibuga c'indege. "Igipolisi camuhagaritse ameze uko, yagirizwa ikosa rito cano ryo kutubahiriza umutekano. "Yaciye acibwa amande aho nyene asanzwe aca ararekurwa inyuma y'umwanya muto ku kibuga c'indege. "Wayne arashimira abo bose bagize uruhara muri ibi bintu." Rooney ubu akinira umugwi wa DC United wo mu cicaro cambere mw'ihiganwa ryo muri Amerika na Canada, yagirijwe ikosa ryo ku rugero rwa kane, ihadabu idashobora kurenga amadolari 250. Uwo mukinyi w'imbere yimukiye muri Amerika mu kwezi kwa gatandatu mu 2018 inyuma yo gushira umukono ku masezerano y'imyaka itatu na DC United. Rooney yarafashije uwo mugwi gushika mu nkino zo gukuranamwo, aho batsinzwe urukino rwa mbere, uwo mukinyi yahoze muri Everton akaba yarahushije penalite mu rukino rwabahuje na Columbus Crew. Inkuru ziva mu mugwi wa DC United zivuga:"Turazi inkuru zivugwa ko Wayne yafashwe mu kwezi kwa cumi na kabiri. "Turazi inyota y'ibimenyeshamakuru yo gushaka kumenya ivyerekeye iyi nkuru ariko twibaza ko iki ari ikibazo kiraba Rooney gusa, DC United ikazocihweza yishimije amategeko agenga uwo mugwi. Nta kindi kintu dufise twobivugako."

Iyi raporo ivuga ko nta gihamya ihari ko Uburusiya na Iran byivanze mu matora mu buryo butaziguye Uburusiya bwakwirakwije "ibirego biyobya kandi bidafite ishingiro" bijyanye na Joe Biden waje gutsinda ayo matora, nkuko raporo ya leta y'Amerika ibivuga. Ariko iyi raporo yavuze ko nta leta y'igihugu cy'amahanga yahungabanyije ibyavuye muri ayo matora bya nyuma. Uburusiya bwakomeje guhakana ibirego byo kwivanga mu matora. Iyi raporo y'amapaji 15 yasohowe ku wa kabiri n'ibiro by'umukuru w'ubutasi bw'igihugu. Igaragaza ibyo ivuga ko byari "ibikorwa byo kugena" ibyavuye mu matora byakozwe n'Uburusiya na Iran. Ivuga ko abantu bafite aho bahuriye n'Uburusiya bakwirakwije ibivugwa bidafitiwe gihamya kuri Perezida Biden mbere y'amatora yo ku itariki ya 3 y'ukwezi kwa cumi na kumwe mu 2020. Inavuga ko gahunda igamije gutanga amakuru atari ukuri yashakaga kubangamira kugirira icyizere gahunda ngari y'amatora. Abantu bamwe bafite aho bahuriye n'ubutasi bw'Uburusiya na bo bakwirakwije mu bitangazamakuru imvugo zirwanya Biden, mu bategetsi bakuru no mu bashyigikiye Bwana Trump, nkuko iyi raporo ibivuga. Perezida Biden yatsinze Bwana Trump, arahizwa gutegeka Amerika ku itariki ya 20 y'ukwezi kwa mbere. Ubutasi bw'Amerika bwafashe umwanzuro ko mu 2016 Uburusiya bwari inyuma y'igikorwa cyo kubangamira kwiyamamariza kuba perezida kwa Hillary Clinton ahanganye na Bwana Trump Iyi raporo yongeyeho ko mu gihe Uburusiya bwashakaga kongerera Bwana Trump amahirwe yo gutsinda, Iran yo yakoze "ibikorwa by'urusobe byihishe byo kugena" ibiva mu matora mu muhate wo gukoma mu nkokora abamushyigikiye. Uwo wahoze ari Perezida w'Amerika yakoresheje gahunda yo "kotsa igitutu cyinshi gishoboka" kuri Iran, ayifatira ibihano bikomeye ndetse yongera intambara yo guterana amagambo hagati y'ibihugu byombi. Iyi raporo kandi yanzura n'"icyizere cyinshi" ko Ubushinwa - bumaze igihe bushinjwa n'Amerika gukora ubutasi bwo kuri za mudasobwa - bwahisemo kudakora ibikorwa byo kwivanga mbere y'amatora. Igira iti: "Ubushinwa bwashatse ituze mu mubano wabwo na Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Amerika ndetse bwabonaga ko ibyava mu matora ibyo ari byo byose nta nyungu ihagije bwabibonamo kuburyo bwakwirengera ibyago byo gusubira inyuma [mu mubano] igihe bwaba bufashwe". Nkuko iyi raporo ibitangaza, ibikorwa byo gutora n'ibyavuye mu majwi bya nyuma ntabwo byivanzwemo na za leta z'ibihugu by'amahanga. Iyi raporo y'ubutasi yatangarijwe rimwe n'iperereza rihuriweho n'ibiro by'ubutabera by'Amerika ndetse n'ibiro by'umutekano mu gihugu, naryo ryageze ku mwanzuro nk'uyu w'iyi raporo. Raporo y'ibyo biro byombi yavuze ko "ibikorwa bigari by'Uburusiya na Iran bigendereye ibikorwa-remezo byinshi by'inzego z'ingenzi byabangamiye umutekano w'imiyoboro myinshi yitaga ku mikorere imwe y'amatora". Ariko yashimangiye ko ibivugwa byo kugerageza kwivanga mu matora ahanini byari mu buryo buziguye. Inyandiko y'ibyo biro byombi igira iti: "Nta bimenyetso dufite byuko hari umunyamahanga uwo ari we wese wagerageje kwivanga... mu guhindura uburyo ubwo ari bwo bwose bwa tekinike bwo gutora, burimo nko kwiyandikisha kw'abatora, gutora, kubarura amajwi, cyangwa gutangaza ibyavuye mu matora". Mu kwezi kwa munani mu 2020, ubutasi bw'Amerika bwavuze ko Ubushinwa, Uburusiya na Iran byari bifite umuhate mu kugerageza kwivanga mu matora ya perezida yari hafi kuba. Iryo suzuma ryasanze Uburusiya bwarashakaga "guhindanya isura" ya Bwana Biden. Ryanasanze Ubushinwa na Iran byarashakaga ko Bwana Trump atsindwa amatora.

Ahmad Ahmad yasimbuye Issa Hayatou kuri uyu mwanya mu 2017 Itangazo rya FIFA rivuga ko ari kubazwa 'ibyo ashinjwa bigendanye n'imirimo ye nk'umuyobozi wa CAF'. Itangazo rya FIFA rivuga ko 'itazi amakuru arambuye kuri iryo perereza bityo itari mu mwanya mwiza wo kubivugaho'. Rivuga kandi ko bari gusaba ibisobanuro abategetsi mu Bufaransa kuri iryo perereza. Perezida wa CAF yafatiwe mu Bufaransa mu gihe hasigaye iminsi 15 hagatangira irushanwa ry'igikombe cya Afurika cy'ibihugu.

Prezida Emmerson Mnangagwa avuga ko azotohoza ku bwicanyi bwakurikiye amatora Mw'ijambo yashikirije ku munsi wahariwe intwari, yiyemeje gukora itohoza ku bwicanyi bwakurikiye amatora avuga ko bwakwezwe n'umugambwe MDC. Bwana Manangagwa vyatangajwe ko ari we yatsinze amatora akaba kandi yategerezwa kurahirira amabanga yo kuba umukuru w'igihugu ejo kuwa Mungu. Ivyo birori vyaciye vyimurwa umugambwe utavuga rumwe na leta, MDC, umaze gushikiriza ikirego muri sentare wiyamiriza ivyavuye mu matora. Kwumviriza urwo rubanza no kuruca birashobora gutwara ikiringo kingana n'indwi zibiri. Umugambwe utavuga rumwe na leta, MDC, uvuga ko udusandugu batoreramwo twujujwe amajwi ya bwana Mnangagwa kugira aronke intsinzi.

Tworonka "algorithme" yodukorera kino giharuro? "Igikorwa cose usanga cama ari ca kindi canke umuntu ashobora kumenya kare n'imbere yuko kirangugwa, kigiye gukogwa hisunzwe uburyo bwo guharura bita "algorithme" mu myaka itanu canke cumi iri imbere" na cane cane mu bihugu biteye imbere, nkuko bishikirizwa n'uwugenzura amahera akaba n'umwanditsi, John Pugliano. Pugliano n'umwanditsi w'ibitabo bisotora nka "The Robots are Coming: A Human's Survival Guide to Profiting in the Age of Automation"(Ibirobo biraje: Ingene umuntu yobandanya abaho mu myaka yo gusubiriza abantu ibirobo). Urutonde rw'imyuga igeramiwe, rurimwo iyarizwi gushika ubu ko ari ntamenwa, na burya ikenera abahinga babinonosoye. Hano twovuga nk'iy'ubuvuzi n'ubucamanza. Avugira kuri BBC Mundo ikoresha ururimi rw'iki Espagnol, Pugliano yagize ati: "Abaganga hamwe n'abahinga mu vy'amategeko ntibazogenda, ariko ibikorwa vyabo bizogabanuka." Hano munsi urabona imyuga indwi izibasigwa n'ubwo buhinga - n'iyindi ataco izoba, nkuko Pugliano abisigura. Pugliano avuga ko abaganga basanzwe bazobura ibibanza muri kazoza 1. Abaganga Bino bisa n'ibitumvikana uravye ingene abaganga bama barondegwa, na cane cane muri kino gihe abantu bashaje baguma bagwirirana kw'isi. Ariko Pugliano yemeza ko hari ibisata vy'ubuvuzi bizosubirigwa n'ibirobo kuberako bigeze aho bishobora gupima indwara. Ngo naho vyoba ukwo, abaganga bazoguma bakenewe mu vyumba vy'abagwaye, co kimwe n'abahinga nk'ababaga. 2. Abanyamategeko Pugliano yemeza ko abantu barondera inkaratasi zitandukanye bazogabanuka muri kazoza, co kimwe n'ubuzi bwamye bukogwa kimwe (routine). Ibikorwa bishingiye ku mategeko bidasaba ubuzobere canke abahinga, bizosubirigwa na mudasobwa. Ubuzi busaba kurema nk'ubwo mu gisata c'ubwubatsi nibwo buzogumaho nkuko bivugwa na John Pugliano 3. Abahinga mu vyo gucapa no kwubaka amazu Gushushanya inzu zisanzwe muri kino gihe birakoregwa kuri mudasobwa. Pugliano yemeza ko muri kazoza, abahinga bazi kurema (créatifs) no kuryohora aribo bonyene bazosigara muri ako kazi. 4. Abaharura amahera Pugliano avuga ko abahinga mu biharuzo vy'amatagise bazosigara, ariko ko abo mu gisata c'amakori asanzwe bazogenda bitewe nuko batazoba bagikenewe. 5. Abadereva b'indege z'ingwano Gushika ubu indege "Unmanned aerial vehicles" (UAV), zizwi ku izina rya "drones", zisigaye zikora akazi k'abadereva mu bihe biteye ubwoba - kandi zizobandanya zibikora mu gihe hatanguye gukoreshwa ibirobo bisubirira abantu mu ngwano. Uburyo bwo kurereka hakoreshejwe camera buramaze kugabanya akazi k'abapolisi hamwe n'abatohoza 6. Igipolisi n'abatohoza Igipolisi kirereka - co kimwe n'abakora itohoza b'ubumenyi buke - baramaze gusubirigwa n'ibikoresho bitutuka kw'iterambere ry'ubuhinga. Pugliano avuga ko naho ubwo buzi butazovaho burundu, ko ababukora batazokenegwa cane. 7. Abaranga amazu n'amatongo Co kimwe no mu bindi bisata vyo kugurisha ibidandazwa kimwe kimwe, hari imbuga ngurukanabumenyi zihuza abagura n'abagurisha, bigatuma abahora barondera abakiriya babura akazi. Ubwo buryo bubandanije, abahagarariye amashirahamwe y'ubudandaji bashobora gutakaza akazi. Abakorera mu gisata c'ubwenge bw'ubukorano (intelligence artificielle) hamwe n'abakingira itumanako bazokenegwa cane Ni iyihe myuga izovyagwa n'ubuhinga? Pugliano yemeza ko mu gihe hari imyuga izofudika, ko hari ubundi buzi buzovuka ahandi. Kazoza ni keza ku bahinga b'ubwenge bw'ubukorano (intelligence artificielle), ab'amaporogaramu ya mudasobwa hamwe n'abahinga mu gukingira canke gukora ibijanye na mudasobwa. Pugliano yemeza ko ubuzi bushingiye ku myuga, nk'abakora mu vyo gukwiragiza amazi mu mazu, abo mu gisata c'umuyagankuba hamwe n'abubatsi b'abahinga bazobandanya bakora.

Perezida w'Ubufaransa Emmanuel Macron yavuze ko itangwa ry'inkingo mu buryo butangana birimo kongera ubusumbane ku isi Bwana Macron yabwiye ikinyamakuru Financial Times cyo mu Bwongereza ko kunanirwa gusaranganya inkingo mu buryo burimo gushyira mu gaciro byarushaho kongera ubusumbane ku isi. Kugeza ubu byinshi mu bikorwa byo gukingira abaturage bimaze gukorwa n'ibihugu bikize. Bwana Macron yatanze igitekerezo cy'uburyo ubwo busumbane bwavaho, abivuga mbere y'inama yo mu buryo bw'ikoranabuhanga ry'iyakure ihuje ibihugu birindwi bikize kurusha ibindi bizwi nka G7 iba kuri uyu wa gatanu. Ibiro White House bya Perezida w'Amerika byatangaje ko Perezida Joe Biden agiye gutangaza inkunga ya miliyari 4 z'amadolari yo gufasha muri gahunda yo gusaranganya inkingo ku isi izwi nka Covax. Biteganyijwe ko Minisitiri w'intebe w'Ubwongereza Boris Johnson - uza kuyobora iyo nama y'ibihugu bikize cyane kurusha ibindi ku isi - aza kwemera inyongera y'inkingo muri gahunda ya Covax. Kugeza ubu, abantu bagera kuri miliyoni 110 ku isi bamaze gutangazwa ko banduye coronavirus, muri bo abarenga miliyoni 2,4 yarabishe, nkuko imibare ya Kaminuza ya Johns Hopkins yo muri Amerika ibigaragaza. Macron yavuze iki nyirizina? Bwana Macron yabwiye ikinyamakuru Financial Times ati: "Ntabwo turimo kuvuga ngo doze [z'inkingo] zibarirwa muri za miliyari zitangwe aka kanya, cyangwa [ngo hatangwe] za miliyari z'amafaranga y'ama-euro". "Bijyanye no gutanga byihuse kurushaho hagati ya 4 na 5% bya doze dufite". "Nta cyo bizahindura ku bikorwa byacu by'ikingira, ariko buri gihugu gikwiye gushyira ku ruhande umubare muto w'inkingo kigomba gutanga zibarirwa muri za miliyoni mirongo, ariko vuba cyane, kugira ngo abantu bariyo [mu bihugu bicyennye] babone ko zirimo kubageraho". Ku wa kane, Glendy Rivero yabaye muganga wa mbere muri Venezuela uhawe urukingo rw'Uburusiya rwa Sputnik V Bwana Macron yavuze ko umukuru w'Ubudage Angela Merkel ashyigikiye gahunda y'Uburayi yo gusaranganya inkingo, avuga ko yizeye ko Amerika nayo izashyigikira iyo gahunda. Bwana Macron yavuze ko mu gihe iyo gahunda itashoboka, Ubushinwa n'Uburusiya ari byo bizabikora, "bicire inzira intambara yo kugira ijambo ishingiye ku nkingo".

Ibiro ntaramakuru bya leta ya Sudani bivuga ko minisiteri y'ubuzima yemeje ko abantu barindwi aribo bapfuye naho 181 bagakomerekera muri iyo myigaragambyo. Ishyirahamwe ry'abaganga muri Sudani rishyigikiye abigaragambya, ryatangaje ko abantu bagera kuri batanu biciwe muri iyi myigaragambyo. Hagati aho, Radio ya leta ya Sudani yasubiyemo amagambo y'itangazo ry'inama ya gisirikare iri ku butegetsi muri iki gihugu ivuga ko izo mpfu z'"abashinzwe umutekano n'abigaragambya zigomba kuryozwa abigaragambya". Sudani ntiragira ituze kuva mu kwezi kwa kane nyuma y'ihirikwa ry'ubutegetsi bwa Perezida Omar al-Bashir, wari ubumazeho imyaka 30 akabuvanwaho n'igisirikare ku gitutu cy'abigaragambya. Abaturage bakomeje kwigaragambya bamagana ko ubutegetsi bwahise bufatwa n'abasirikare bakanga kubuha abasivile. Iyo myigaragambyo y'ejo ni yo ya mbere yitabiriwe n'abantu benshi cyane kuva haba iyo ku itariki ya gatatu y'ukwezi gushize kwa gatandatu bivugwa ko yaguyemo abarenga 100.

Josep Borrel avuga ko Trump yamuhanuye kwubaka uruhome muri Sahara mu guhagarika abimukira Umushikiranganji Josep Borrell yavuze ku munsi wa kabiri ko Perezida wa Amerika Donald Trump yamuhanuye "kwubaka uruhome mu bugaragwa bwa Sahara" mu gutorera umuti ikibazo c'abimukira baguma biyongera baja kurondera ubuhungiro mu bihugu vya Buraya. "Kwugara ibivuko siyo nyishu, si inyishu iruta kwubaka uruhome muri Sahara, nkuko Perezida Trump yahanuye vuba," niko Borrell avuga. Uwo mushikiranganji wa Espagne, yashikirije ayo majambo asangira n'abamenyeshamakuru i Madrid, ariko ntiyavuga igihe n'aho Perezida wa Amerika yatangiye iyo mpanuro. Ariko yarafise amakenga ku majambo ya Trump: "Mbe murazi ingene Sahara ingana?" Niko yabajije. Umuvugizi wo mu bushikiranganji bw'imigenderanire n'amakungu yavuze ko ata kindi kintu bongerako kuri ayo majambo. Ku bw'itangazamakuru rya Espagne, Trump yabwiye abahagarariye ubuserukizi bwa Espagne ko "uruhome rwo muri Sahara rudashobora kuba runini nk'urwokubakwa ku rubibe rwa Mexique." Umushikiranganji w'imigenderanire n'amakungu wa Espagne yashikirije ayo majambo mu kavunamusase n'ibigo vy'itangazamakuru i Madrid Abatamuha ni rwere Kimwe mu vyo Trump yemeye mu matora yo mu 2016 kwari "ukwubaka uruhome runini kandi rwiza" ku rubibe rwa Amerika na Mexique. Uwo mu Perezida yavuga ko Mexique izotanga amahera y'urwo ruhome, amaze amezi arondera amahera yo kurwubaka. Muri kino gihe, ivyo yashikirije ko Espagne yubaka uruhome muri Sahara mu guhagarika ingendo z'abimukira, vyashitse mu binyamakuru vya Amerika, bituma abantu benshi bagira ico babivugako ku mbuga hwaniro. Muvyo bashikiriza, hariho abadategera ico cipfuzo ciwe, abandi nabo bakibaza niba Perezida azi neza icigwa cerekeye isi (géographie), bamwibutsa ko Espagne iri i Buraya, Sahara nayo muri Afrika.

Bobi Wine yagiye kuri "podium" yambaye inkofero akunda itukura Hari abapolisi benshi mu kibanza yaririmbiyemwo, ivyo bikaba vyarekuwe bitewe nuko kitari igikorane ca politike. Bobi Wine yavuze ko yahohotewe agakubitwa igihe yarapfunzwe mu kwezi kw'umunani, ubutegetsi bukaba bwarabihakanye. Kubona akundwa cane n'urwaruka rwo muri Uganda, bihungabanya Perezida Yoweri Museveni mu vya politike. Benshi mu bari bitavye ico giteramo bari bambaye impuzu zitukura, ibara ry'umuhari wiwe wa politike 'people power'. "Ndashimiye igipolisi ca Uganda kukuba cadukomereje umutekano ntikituzibire nkuko cahora kibikora," niko uwo muririmvyi yabwiye isinzi ry'abantu ryamwitavye, nkuko bivugwa na AFP. "Turi abanyamahoro ariko turipfuza kandi ko batwumviriza." Uwo mushingamateka w'imyaka 36, izina ry'amavuko ari Robert Kyagulanyi, yatsindiye intebe y'ubushingamateka yitoje ku giti ciwe mu matora yo gusubirira yatunganijwe mu ntara y'amatora ya Kyadondo East, muri Uganda ya hagati. Mu kwezi kw'umunani we n'abandi banyepolitike 30 bagirijwe guhemukira igihugu, inyuma yaho imwe mu modoka zari ziherekeje umukuru w'igihugu iterewe amabuye mu myiyamamazo. Yavuye mu gihugu ca Uganda aja kwivuriza muri Amerika ibiguma yavuga ko yakuye mw'ibohero, munyuma agaruka mu kwezi kw'icenda. Bitatu vya kane vy'abanyagihugu ba Uganda bagizwe n'abantu bafise imyaka iri munsi ya 35. Bobi Wine asa nuko ariwe aserukira urwaruka rushavujwe no kubura akazi hamwe na politike zidahinduka, niko abanyamakuru bahagarariye ibigo bitandukanye bavuga. Bobi Wine yavutse imyaka ine imbere yuko Bwana Museveni aja ku butegetsi ubwa mbere mu 1986, akaba aguma amusaba ngo aje mu karuhuko k'iza bukuru mu matora yo mu 2021. Uwo musore yiyita "ghetto president" ntaratangaza ko yipfuza kugwanira ikibanza c'umukuru w'igihugu. Ico giteramo cahagarariwe n'abajejwe umutekano Abantu ibihumbi nibo bagiye mu giteramo ciwe i Kampala Urwaruka rubabajwe n'intwaro iri mu gihugu ca Uganda, rwibona muri Bobi Wine

Umuduga wa Zenon Ndaruvukanye wategerewe ari mu micungararo y'isoko rya Cotebu Zenon Ndaruvukanye yategerewe n'abantu bitwaje ibirwanisho mu micungararo y'isoko rya Kotebu, umupolisi yari amuherekeje ahasiga ubuzima ariko we ararusimba. Abo bamuteze baciye bahunga, umuduga wa Toyota Hilux barimwo bawusiga hafi y'isoko, binjira mw'isoko. Babiri muri bo baciye bafatwa, umwe ashobora guca mu ryahumye abajejwe umutekano. Abateye basize umuduga wa Toyota Hilux urimwo ibirwanisho Uwo muduga abapolisi bawusanzemwo ibirwanisho bitandukanye birimwo inkoho za kalashnikov, ama mitrailleuse, ama rokete hamwe n'ama grenade. Abo bantu kandi ngo bafatanywe n'amabombe abiri hamwe n'ibirwanisho vyo mu bwoko bwa RPG. Igipolisi kandi kivuga ko abo babiri bafashwe, baciye berekana aho babika ibirwanisho mu Kinindo, aho igipolisi casanze ibirwanisho vyinshi. Babiri bafashwe beretse igipolisi aho babika ibirwanisho mu Kinindo Ngo hafashwe mortier 60 imwe, rokete 6, grenades, kalashinikov 19, inkoho zitera amabombe RPG 7, mi kalash, ibikono vy'amasasu, imyambaro ya gisirikare 24 hamwe n'ibindi bikoresho. Mwomenya kandi ko Zenon Ndaruvukanye yahoze ari buramatari w'intara ya Bujumbura rurale. Vyari bimaze kuba Si ubwa mbere umuntu ari mu nzego za leta ahakwa kugandagurwa canke akagandagurwa n'abantu bitwaje ibirwanisho bamutegereye. Mu kwezi kw'umunani, uwundi muhanuzi mu biro vy'umukuru w'igihugu, akaba yarigeze no kuba umukuru w'urwego rujejwe iperereza, Gen Adolphe Nshimirimana, yaragandaguwe n'abamutegereye mu Kamenge. Nayo mu kwezi kw'icenda umugaba w'ingabo z'u Burundi Gen Prime Niyongabo, nawe yategerewe n'abantu bitwaje ibirwanisho baramuhusha kw'ibarabara rija mu Rumonge. Ubwicanyi mu Burundi bumaze guhitana abantu barenga amajana abiri kuva mu kwezi kwa kane, igihe Prezida Pierre Nkurunziza yagenwa ngo aserukire umugambwe CNDD FDD mu matora y'umukuru w'igihugu mu kiringo kigira gatatu.

Ibi bimeze uku mu gihe umukuru w'ishami rya ONU rijejwe amagara y'abantu kw'isi, OMS/WHO, agabisha ko isi "iriko yegereza igitigiri kitari bwabeho c'abandura" gushika ubu. Ubuhindi - igihugu gihanzwe n'ubwoko bugira kabiri bwa coronavirus - catangaje ko abantu barenga 230.000 ari bo banduye ku musi w'ejo wa gatandatu wonyene. Hafi abantu imiriyoni 140 nibo bamaze kwandura uwu mugera kuva wadutse. Ku wa gatanu, Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus arongoye OMS yagabishije ko "ibitigiri vy'abandura n'abapfa bibandanya biduga ku rugero ruteye ubwoba". Yongerako y'uko "mu mezi abiri aheze, ibitigiri vy'abandura ku ndwi vyiyongereye hafi incuro zibiri kw'isi". Ishure kaminuza Johns Hopkins rivuga ko Reta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika, Ubuhindi na Brezil - ibihugu bifise abanduye benshi gusumba ibindi kw'isi - vyonyene biteranije ibitigiri vy'abamaze guhitanwa n'uwo mugera barenga umuriyoni. Itororokanirizo ry'amakuru AFP rivuga ko mu ndwi iheze, abantu bashika 12.000 kw'isi yose bahitanye n'iki kiza. Hagati aho, ibitigiri bitangwa n'ibihugu vyinshi kw'isi bishobora kuba atari vyo. Umugambi wo gucandaga wifashe gute kw'isi? Amadoze arenga imiriyoni 800 y'incanco za coronavirus aramaze guhabwa abantu mu bihugu 165 kw'isi yose. Hagati aho, Dr Tedros yabwiye abategetsi ba ONU ku wa gatanu ati: "Ubusumbasumbane mu bijanye no kuronswa incanco nico kibazo nyamukuru muri kino gihe - kandi turiko turananirwa". Ibihugu bimwe biramaze kuronka no gucandaga abanyagihugu bavyo batari bake. Ivyo bihugu bifise ibitigiri binini vy'abanyagihugu bavyo bamaze gucandagwa, aha harimwo nk'Ubwongereza na Israel, bifise agahengwe kuko ibitigiri vy'abandura vyagabanutse cane rwose. Abahinga bo kw'ishure kaminuza Imperial College London bavuga ko isekeza ry'ugucandaga ririko riragabanya abandura, abapfa n'abinjizwa ibitaro. Muri iyi ndwi, umuganga akomeye w'umunya Israel yavuze y'uko yemera ko Israel - aho abarenga igice c'abanyagihugu bose bamaze gucandagwa - iri mu gushika ku rugero rw'aho igihugu cose kizoba gikingiwe. Ibi rero biri uko mu gihe hari ibihugu vyinshi bikirindiriye kuronswa incanco za mbere. Ibi nivyo vyatumye OMS igabisha ko hari ubusumbasumbane mu kuronswa incanco, aho biboneka ko zitariko zitangwa ku rugero rumwe hagati y'ibihugu bitunze n'ibikenye. Dr Tedros avuga ko mu bihugu bitunze, ica kane (1/4) c'abanyagihugu bamaze gucandagwa, mu gihe mu bihugu bikenye ari umwe ku bantu amajana ane (1/400). OMS iriko ikorana n'umugambi mpuzamakungu covax, mu guhimiriza ko ibihugu bitunze vyosangiza incanco ibihugu bikenye. Gushika mu mpera z'unwo mwaka, covax itegekanya ko yoba imaze gutanga imiriyaridi zibiri z'amadoze kw'isi yose, gusa incanco zimwe zisaba ko umuntu aterwa doze zibiri. Abahinga kandi bafise impungenge ku kuntu izi ncanco ziriko ziratangwa ubu zidashobora kurwanya ubwoko bushasha bw'iyi ndwara bukwirakwira ku muvuduko udasanzwe. Hariko harakorwa ubushakashatsi kugira ngo incanco zisubirwemwo kugira zishobore kurwanya ubwoko bushasha bw'umugera. Prof. Adam Finn ari mu murwi w'Ubwongereza ujejwe incanco (JCVI), avuga ko yiteze ko incanco zigiye kugenda zita inguvu buke buke uko uwu mugera uzogenda uhinduka.

Iyo video, yafashwe n'umuntu ari ku nzu hejuru, yerekana abapolisi bakubita umunyeshure Abapolisi bane bagaragara muri iyo video bariko baramukubita inkoni banamuhonyora ku mutwe, imbere y'uko bamujana. Abo bane baramaze kumenyekana kandi baciye bahagarikwa mu kazi, nk'uko vyatangajwe n'umukuru w'igipolisi Hilary Mutyambai. Igipolisi ca Kenya kiragirizwa kenshi gucisha ku buhombo, ariko abajejwe intwaro baca babihosha, bakavuga ko abapolisi babo bahabwa inyigisho zo ku rwego rwo hejuru. Ishirahamwe ry'agateka ka zina muntu, Human Rights Watch, ryavuze ko mu gihe co kwiyamamaza mu matora yo mu 2017, abapolisi bakubise bakanica abashigikiye abatavuga rumwe na leta. Ivyo vyabaye ejo ku wa mbere bigafatwa mu masanamu, vyabaye mu gihe c'imyiyerekano mu gisata c'uburimyi n'ubuhinga kuri Kaminuza ya Jomo Kenyatta, hafi y'umurwa mukuru Nairobi. 'Mwarakoze kuyikwirakwiza hose' Abanye Kenya benshi baciye baja ku rubuga hwaniro twitter, bandika ubutumwa bwinshi bwerekana ko bababajwe n'ivyabaye. Ispan Kimutai yanditse kuri twitter ati "Dutegerezwa kwiyamiriza gucisha ku buhombo abanyeshure bigirwa n'abapolisi. Erega uyu ni umunyeshure si inkozi y'iterabwoba." Yica abasuma: Bamwe ngo ni intwari abandi ngo ahonyanga amategeko. Uwo ni umupolisi Rashid Nayo Muthuri Kathure we yanditse ati "Dutegerezwa kandi kwibaza igituma abanyeshure ba Kaminuza bakoreshwako inguvu z'umurengera igihe cose bakoze imyiyerekano." Aho yatangaza abakubise uwo munyeshure abo ari bo hamwe n'uko bahagaritswe mu kazi, umukuru w'igipolisi yakeje "abantu bagize akenge ko gufata amasanamu y'ivyabaye". Uyu anashimira abanye Kenya bose bayakwirakwije. Kare, Bwana Mutyambai, yavuze ko ivyabaye ari "ibintu bibabaje". Yagize ati "Abapolisi bose barahawe inyigisho z'ukuntu bategerezwa kwubahiriza agateka ka zina muntu hamwe n'ukwishira ukizana."

Nko mu mugwi wa Muzinga uhurikiyemwo abamugariye ku rugamba, bavuga ko badafise ibikoresho vya nkenerwa bakenera kugira bashobore gukina neza. BBC yagendeye uwo mugwi mu kibanza bariko barimenyererezamwo bitegurira amahiganwa yimirije ya sitting volley ball, bamubwira ko binonora imitsi kugira babungabunge amagara yabo. Patrice Niyonsaba umwe mu ndongozi z'uwo mugwi yabwiye BBC ati:" Twahisemwo iyo nzira yo kwinonora imitsi kugira tubungabunge umubiri wacu usanzwe ufise ubumuga. «Ni bwo buryo twabonye bwodufasha kwibagira ivyo twaciyemwo n'agahitiye» «Hari abitwaza ubumuga bwabo bakaja gusega. Ariko twebwe si ko tubibona. Turashoboye kandi turamaze gutera iteka igihugu aho twagiye akatari gake guserukira uburundi mu makungu». Patrice avuga ko kuva uwo mugwi utanguye muri 2006, mu kibano ngo basigaye babubaha kubera babona ico bashoboye. Bamwe mu bakinyi b'umugwi wa Muzinga w'abamugariye ku rugamba wa sitting volley ball bariko baritegura kuja mu kibuga Ariko uwo yahoze ku rugamba avuga kandi ko bahanzwe n'ingorane zijanye n'ubukene bw'ibikoresho vya nkenerwa, amabutura, ivyo bambara ku mavi kugira bibakingire kubera bakina bicaye. Agira ati:«Iki kibuga dukinirako nticagenewe abagendana ubumuga. Kenshi turakomereka tukaja no kwa muganga. Dusaba ababijejwe ko bodufasha bakatwubakira ibibuga bimeze neza, baturonderere n'imyambaro bijanye» "Haragera igihe ubumuga tugendana tubwibagirwa" Umugwi Muzinga ugizwe n'abasirikare bamugariye ku rugamba, bafise ubumuga butandukanye. Inkino bakina harimwo sitting volley ball, Athlétisme, ping pong, Kwoga, n'izindi. Uwo mugwi ufise amashami agera kw'19 mu ntara zitandukanye z'igihugu. Anne Marie Nduwimana arongoye ishirahamwe AFHD ry'abakenyezi bagendana ubumuga na bo nyene bakina umukino wa sitting volley ball, avuga ko ingorane ari nyinshi. Anne Marie Nduwimana arongoye ishirahamwe AFHD ry'abakenyezi bagendana ubumuga na bo nyene bakina umukino wa sitting volley ball, avuga ko ingorane ari nyinshi. Avuga ati:"Kiretse ibibuga bitameze neza, aho bakinira ngo nta n'imisarani ihari yagenewe gufasha abafise mwene ubumuga. iyumvire nk'ubu umuntu agenda aravura hama akaja mu musarani w'abagenda n'amaguru. kenshi usanga hasi ata suku rihari ugasanga uwugendana ubumuga yinjiyeyo akoza amaboko hasi. murumva ko dushobora kuhakura ingwara." Abandanya avuga ko kugeza ubu ata mugwi nserukiragihugu w'abagendana ubumuga uhari, agasaba reta kwitaho ico gisata. AFHD ivuga ko bamaze kuja mu mahiganwa menshi mu bihugu vya Uganda na Tanzania.

Ababyinnyi n'abitabiriye igitaramo basigaye bari mu mwijima mu gice cya kabiri cy'imbyino yitwa Sleeping Beauty Ababyinnyi n'abitabiriye igitaramo basigaye bari mu mwijima mu gice cya kabiri cy'imbyino yitwa Sleeping Beauty itorero ndangamuco rya Australia ryari ririmo kubyina. Abanyacyubahiro bagera ku bihumbi 2 byabaye ngombwa ko bavanwa mu nzu iberamwo ibitaramo mu mujyi wa Adelaide bamurikiwe n'urumuri rw'amatoroshi, nyuma yo kubona ko iryo bura ry'umuriro ritari ribaye nkana bijyanye no kuryoshya igitaramo. Nyuma yaho, ikigo gishinzwe amazi n'umuriro muri Australia cyemeje ko imbeba ari yo yateje ibura ry'umuriro. Umugore uvugira ishami ry'iki kigo ryo mu majyepfo ya Australia yagize ati: "[Abakozi bacu] basanze imbeba yuriye imbere mu byuma bya volte ibihumbi 11 ica urusinga." Ibura ry'umuriro ryibasiye igice cyose cyegereye umugezi kiberamo ibitaramo bitandukanye. Ryanahagaritse ikindi gitaramo cyaberaga mu nzu nserukiramuco ya Adelaide Festival Centre. Ababyinnyi babanje gukomeza kubyina nkaho nta cyabaye, nuko abashinzwe gutegura igitaramo baza kubasaba kubihagarika. Ikinyamakuru the Adelaide Advertiser cyandikirwa muri uyu mujyi, cyatangaje ko ababyinnyi bashimiwe cyane n'abitabiriye igitaramo bari bacanye urumuri rwa telefoni zabo zigendanwa. Liz Hawkins, ukora mu byo kuyobora gahunda z'ibitaramo, yabwiye ikigo cy'itangazamakuru cya Australia ko ari ubwa mbere ikibazo nk'iki cyari kibaye. Yongeyeho ko abateguye igitaramo babyitwayemo neza. Iki gitaramo ntabwo kizimurirwa ku wundi munsi. Ariko abari bakitabiriye bo bazahabwa indishyi cyangwa ubundi buryo bw'impozamarira. Byibazwa ko iyi mbeba yo itahavuye amahoro.

Martin Fayulu, umunyapoliti watsinzwe amatora ya 2018 ejo kuwa mbere yabwiye abanyamakuru i Kinshasa ko uyu mushinga ugeze kuri 70% utegurwa ngo ujye mu bikorwa. Bamwe mu banyapolitiki bo muri DR Congo, Rwanda na Uganda batungwa urutoki na Martin Fayulu na Kardinali Fridolin Ambongo wa Kinshasa ko bari inyuma y'uyu mushinga. Umunyamategeko akaba n'umusesenguzi wa politiki Nixon Kambale yabwiye BBC Gahuzamiryango ko 'Balkanisation' ya DR Congo "ishoboka, kandi idashoboka". Balkanisation iva he? Iri jambo rikoreshwa kuva mu myaka ya 1830 ubwo ikitwaga 'empire Ottoman' cyari giherereye k'umwigimbakirwa (peninsula) wa Balkan cyagiye gicikamo ibihugu birimo Ubugereki, Serbia, Bulgaria, Albania, Croatia, Macedonia...kugeza mu 2008. Nixon Kambale avuga ko 'balkanisation' yavuzwe bwa mbere muri Congo mu 1960 na guverinoma ya mbere yari iyobowe na Patrice Lumumba ubwo habaga ibikorwa byo gushaka kwigenga kwa Kasai na Katanga. Ati: "No ku butegetsi bwa Mobutu habaye kugerageza kwigenga kwa Kasai, intambara ya Shaba, intambara eshatu za Moba, intambara y'i Bukavu, intambara ya ba Mulele... "Ibyo byose byatumaga abategetsi ba Congo icyo gihe kimwe n'ab'ubu bakomeza kuvuga 'balkanisation'". Mu 1996 ubwo umutwe wa AFDL wa Laurent-Désiré Kabila watangiraga kurwanya Perezida Mobutu, uyu nawe yavuze ko Kabila ashaka 'balkanisation' y'uburasirazuba bwa Zaire abifashijwemo n'u Burundi, u Rwanda na Uganda. Mu 1998 Laurent-Désiré Kabila amaze gushwana n'abamufashije kugera ku butegetsi nawe yabashinje kwifashisha imitwe y'inyeshyamba mu gushaka gukora 'balkanisation' mu burasirazuba. Perezida Kabila yashinjwe 'Balkanisation' na Mobutu nyuma nawe ayishinja abamurwanyaga Bwana Kambale avuga ko icyo gihe hari imitwe myinshi yitwaje intwaro mu burasirazuba ku buryo amabwiriza n'amategeko ya leta ya Kinshasa hari aho atakoraga. Ati: "Abanyecongo ndetse na kiliziya gatolika barahagurutse, habaho ibiganiro by'amahoro no gusaba amahanga ko icyo kintu kitabaho igihugu kigakomeza kuba kimwe". 'Balkanisation' iragarutse uyu munsi Bwana Kambale avuga ko iyo urebye kuva mu 2003 kugeza ubu hari ibice by'uburasirazuba bwa Congo bisa n'ibitagengwa n'amategeko ya leta ya Kinshasa. Ati: "Havugwa ko igice kiruta 40% cy'uburasirazuba bwa Congo kigenzurwa n'imitwe yitwaje intwaro aho leta idashobora gukandagira. "Aho rero abantu ntibashaka kuvuga 'balkanisation', ariko ntibashaka no kwemera ko hari uduce tunini tutagenzurwa na leta. Uko ni ukuri abantu bamwe badashaka kuvuga beruye. "Ubu hashize imyaka ine cyangwa itanu, biboneka ko leta itagenzura agace kose ka Beni, agace ka Masisi, agace ka Rutchuru, agace ka Walikale, agace ka Kalehe muri Kivu y'Epfo n'ahandi nka Minembwe". Utu duce tugenzurwa n'imitwe y'inyeshyamba z'abanyecongo ndetse n'iy'abavuye mu bihugu bituranyi. Bwana Kambale avuga ko muri iyo mitwe harimo ikoreshwa n'abategetsi bo mu bihugu bituranyi ndetse n'abategetsi bo muri DR Congo. 'Balkanisation' kuri 70% itegurwa? Mu kiganiro n'abanyamakuru ejo kuwa mbere i Kinshasa, Martin Fayulu yatangaje ko uwo mushinga wa 'balkanisation' ugeze kuri 70% utegurwa. Yavuze ko abategetsi b'ibihugu bituranyi na bamwe mu bategetsi ba DR Congo bari gufatanya muri uwo mushinga, ntiyavuze amazina yabo yeruye. Mu cyumweru gishize, Kardinali Fridolin Ambongo wa Kinshasa yavuze ko mu ruzinduko yakoreye mu burasirazuba yabonye ko hari umugambi wa 'balkanisation'. Bwana Fayulu mu kiganiro n'abanyamakuru ejo kuwa mbere Na we yemeza ko hari ibihugu n'abanyapolitike ba DR Congo bafite uruhare muri uwo mugambi. Ambasaderi Olivier Nduhungirehe umunyamabanga wa leta y'u Rwanda mu bubanyi n'amahanga yabwiye BBC Gahuzamiryango ko iby'uwo mugambi no kubishyiramo u Rwanda ari ibintu bivugwa gusa bidafite ishingiro. Ku mbuga nkoranyambaga hari ibitekerezo biciye ukubiri kuri uwo mugambi, bamwe bemeza ko uhari koko, abandi bavuga ko ari ikintu cya baringa kivugwa kikanakoreshwa mu nyungu za politiki kuva cyera. Ingabo za FARDC zateje urujijo Bwana Kambale avuga ko nyuma y'ibyatangajwe na Kardinali Fridolin Ambongo, igisirikare cya DR Congo nacyo cyatangaje ko hari ibigaragaza ko umugambi wa 'balkanisation' uriho. Ati: "Nyamara izo ngabo nizo ziri no mu bikorwa byo kurwanya imitwe yitwaje intwaro, ndetse zari zatangaje ko zigiye gufatanya n'ibihugu bituranyi. "Birashimishije ko ingabo ziri gufata ibice byari iby'inyeshyamba, ariko ku rundi ruhande zikavuga ko hari impungenge za 'balkanisation', ni ingingo ebyiri zibusanye. Ingabo zikwiye guhindura uko zitangaza amakuru". Balkanisation irashoboka kandi ntishoboka 'Balkanisation' ivugwa ku burasirazuba bwa Congo mu ntara za Kivu Bwana Kambale avuga ko 'balkanisation' ya Congo ishoboka kuko hari amoko y'abanyecongo agenda yimuka afite intwaro ajya ahantu hamwe cyangwa ahandi mu burasirazuba, agaragaza gushaka kwigenga. Avuga ko ibi byabaye muri Beni na Boga. Ati: "Ibi kandi byabaye muri teritwari ya Djugu muri Ituli aho abantu b'aborozi mu bwoko bwa Mbololo bimukanye amatungo yabo kandi banafite intwaro. "Wakwibaza ngo ni gute aborozi bimuka bakava aha bakajya hariya bafite intwaro leta ntigire icyo ikora? "Ibyo byose n'ibindi bishyirwa hamwe bigatuma bamwe bemeza ko hari igice cya Congo gishobora kuyivaho, aho rero nibwo habaho 'balkanisation'". Bwana Kambale ariko avuga ko nanone idashoboka kubera umuhate w'abanyecongo, abanyamadini, sosiyete sivile n'abanyapolitiki bamwe. Ati: "Na Perezida wa Repubulika yigeze kuvuga ko igihe cyose azaba ari ku butegetsi 'balkanisation' itazashoboka. "Ibyo byose nabyo iyo ubishyize hamwe ubona ko hari ubushake rusange mu gihugu cyose burwanya ikintu cyose cyaganisha kuri 'balkanisation' ya Congo. "Izo ngingo zombi rero izarusha indi ingufu niyo izabaho."

Abakora mu bikorwa byo kwamamaza Amara Enyia bashimiye umuraperi Kanye West ku mfashanyo yamuhaye Uyu mugore witwa Amara Enyia, aziyamamaza mu matora ateganyijwe mu kwezi kwa kabiri mu mwaka utaha wa 2019. Uyu mugore ashyigikiwe kandi n'umuraperi Chance the Rapper. Ayo mafaranga y'inkunga ni yo neza neza Madamu Enyia yari acyeneye ngo abashe kwishyura umwenda abereyemo akanama k'amatora ko muri leta ya Illinois yakagiyemo ubwo nabwo yiyamamarizaga kuyobora aka karere ka Chicago mu mwaka wa 2015. Mu itangazo abakora mu bikorwa byo kwamamaza Madamu Enyia bashyize ahagaragara, bashimiye Kanye "kugira ubuntu" kwe. Kanye atanze iyi nkunga hashize iminsi 11 ahuye na Perezida Donald Trump w'Amerika mu biro bya perezida w'Amerika bya White House. Icyo gihe bombi basangiye ifunguro rya saa sita, ari ko banaganira ku mavugurura mu magereza ndetse baganira no ku bindi bibazo byo muri politiki. Chance the Rapper yashyigikiye Madamu Enyia wiyamamariza kuyobora akarere k'umujyi ka Chicago Madamu Enyia avuga ko intego ye natorerwa kuba umuyobozi w'akarere ari "ugufasha rubanda - cyane cyane abafite ingorane - gukabya inzozi zabo muri politiki." Avuga ko ashaka gushinga banki y'abaturage i Chicago, avuga ko "izagabanya ruswa" ndetse "igateza imbere ubukungu". Undi muraperi Chance the Rapper na we uvuka i Chicago, na we ku wa kabiri yashyigikiye Madamu Enyia. Chance the Rapper yavuze ko ashyigikiye umuntu ushaka ko habaho "impinduka" kandi ushaka ko abantu bose "bafatwa kimwe". Nkuko bitangazwa n'ikinyamakuru The Chicago Sun Times, abakandida 17 ni bo bamaze kuvuga ko baziyamamaza kuri uwo mwanya w'ubuyobozi bw'akarere k'umujyi ka Chicago.

Ihoteri Intercontinental mu muji wa Kabul imaze guterwa incuro nyinshi Ico gitero catanguye nk'isaha zitayu z'ijoro mu masaha y'iKabul (16:30 GMT), ariko ntibashotse bavuga abahasize ubuzima. Bwana Danish yabwiye iyandikiro ry'amakuru Reurters ko mu bateye vyaboneka ko umengo harimwo n'abiyahuzi. Ngo bariko barasanira mu magorofa ya gatatu na kane muri iyo hoteri, aho bikekwa ko hafari abantu bafashwe ingwati.

Abagabo, abapfasoni n'abana bakuwe muriiyo kamyo Abategetsi bavuga ko baasanze abapfasoni n'abana bituniye inyuma mw'ikamyo mu ntara ya Tamaulipas mu bumanuko bw'urubibe rwa Texas. Bari baje bava i Guatemala, Honduras n'i El Salvador bagana igihugu ca Amerika. Abantu batatu bafashwe bagirizwa urudandaza rw'abantu. Abapoli bo muri Mexique bavuga ko iyo kamyo yahagaritswe kw'ibariyeri hanyuma ivyuma bipima vyerekana abantu binyegejemwo. Nta mazi, nta mfungurwa n'impwemu bari bafise. Abategetsi bavuga ko abagera ku mirongo ibiri na bane muri bo ari abana batari kumwe n'abavyeyi. Trump: Umugambi w'uruhome uracariho Trump: Uruzitiro hagati ya Amerika na Mexique ruzokoresha izuba Mu kwezi guheze, abantu barenga 170 batagira ibiaranga bo muri Amerika yo hagati barapfungiwe mu ntara za Coahuila na Tamaulipas. Guatemala, Honduras na El Saalvador ni vyo bihugu bikunze kuvamwo abimukira bashaka kwinjira rwihishwe muri Amerika. Prezida Donald Trump yariyemeje gutuza abimukira baba abaje mu mategeko canke abatayakurikije, kandi arabandanya umugambi wiwe udashigikiwe na bose wo kwubaka uruhome ku rubibe Mexique ihana na Amerika.

Agace ka Red Light kazwi cyane mu murwa mukuru Amsterdam w'Ubuholandi - gafatwa na bamwe nk'ikirango cy'umuco cy'umujyi mu gihe hari abagafata nk'ikirango cy'ubwisanzure mu bijyanye n'imibonano mpuzabitsina Mu mujyi wa Amsterdam mu Buholandi, hari ahantu hazwi cyane hitwa Red Light District - hahindutse isangano y'abakerarugendo n'akarango k'umuco. Aha ni urugero rw'ahantu hamaze imyaka hakorerwa uburaya nk'ubucuruzi bwemewe n'amategeko. Gusa ibi bishobora kurangira vuba aha. Inteko ishingamategeko y'Ubuholandi igiye gutangira impaka ku kuba uburaya bwemewe n'amategeko y'iki gihugu. Abakora n'abungukira muri aka kazi ubu bari ku gitutu cyo kurengera akazi kabo kuko amashyaka ya gikristu ndetse n'abaharanira uburenganzira bw'abagore yiteguye guhagarika uburaya nk'umwuga. Ese izi mpaka zishobora guhindura uko uburaya bukorwa n'ahandi ku isi? Ibi byagira ingaruka ki ku baguzi n'abagurisha n'ubuzima bwabo muri rusange? "Iyo aba ari mushiki wawe?" Iyi ni yo ntero y'ubukangurambaga bw'abaharanira impinduka mu Buholandi bifuza ko uburaya bugirwa ahubwo icyaha gihanwa. Abantu barenga ibihumbi 46 bamaze gushyira umukono ku nyandiko basaba inteko ishingamategeko kumva ubusabe bwabo bagatangira impaka mu nteko. Sara Lous, akora mu bukangurambaga bise "Ik ben onbetaalbaar" mu Giholandi - bivuze - "Si ndi igicuruzwa". Ubu bukangurambaga bugamije guhindura amategeko ariho maze hakajyaho itegeko rihana umugabo wese uguze 'indaya'. Kuva mu mwaka wa 1971, mu Buholandi kugura imibonano mpuzabitsina hagati y'abantu babiri bakuru byemewe n'amategeko. Lous avuga ko ibintu nk'ibi atari ibyo mu gihe isi igezemo. Abicuruza babona ari ukubambura akazi Umwe mu bicuruza muri Red Light District ukomoka muri Romania wahimbwe Cherry, avuga ko bimufasha kwishyura icumbi mu gihe atarabona 'akazi gasanzwe' ngo abeho mu 'buzima busanzwe'. Amaze imyaka irenga 10 akorera hano. Undi wahimbwe Foxy na we ukorera hano avuga ko nubwo bahindura amategeko bitazahagarika ubucuruzi bwabo ko bazajya babukorera mu bwihisho. Agira ati: "Ibi mbikora kubw'amahitamo yanjye". Avuga ko n'ibibazo nko gucuruza abantu biba no mu yindi myuga itandukare -atari mu buraya gusa. Amategeko abuza uburaya arakora? Amategeko agaruka ku buraya harimo aha ababukora uburenganzira ku buvuzi ariko hari n'ahari amategeko abuza uburaya, hakaba hari n'atabubuza ariko abuca intege, biterwa n'ibihugu, ariko hose mu bihugu ntakurikizwa kimwe. Inzobere zivuga ko mu bihugu bikennye amategeko areba uburaya usanga abangamiye cyane abakora ibi kandi akenshi adakumira ibyago byabo byo kwandura indwara zandurira mu mibonano mpuzabitsina, gucuruza abantu n'ihohoterwa rikorerwa abagore. Nko mu Rwanda, ubu nta tegeko ririho ribuza cyangwa ryemera uburaya nk'umwuga, mu gitabo cy'amategeko gicyuye igihe harimo ingingo zisobanura uburaya n'ababukora nk'akazi kabatunze ibyo bakwiye kubahiriza. Mu gitabo gishya cy'ibyaha n'ibihano muri rusange cyubahirizwa kuva mu mwaka ushize, ingingo yacyo ya 136 ica intege uburaya nk'akazi mu Rwanda kuko uwabujyamo n'uwo babukorana bashobora kubihanirwa baramutse barezwe. Iyi ngingo igira iti: "Umuntu wese washyingiwe ukorana imibonano mpuzabitsina n'uwo batashyingiranywe, aba akoze icyaha. Iyo abihamijwe n'urukiko ahanishwa igifungo kitari munsi y'amezi atandatu (6) ariko kitarenze umwaka umwe (1). Gukurikirana icyaha cy'ubusambanyi ntibishobora kuba hatareze uwahemukiwe mu bashyingiranywe ku buryo bwemewe n'amategeko. Muri icyo gihe hakurikiranwa uwarezwe n'uwakoranye icyaha na we". Mu Buholandi ho ubu abagamije guca uburaya nk'akazi barifuza ko hajya hahanwa ab'igitsina gabo bajya kugura indaya kuko ari bo bajya gushaka serivisi. Hari n'abandi ariko bumva ingufu zashyirwa mu gufasha kwifasha ab'igitsina gore bicuruza kuko akenshi babikoreshwa n'ubushobozi buke mu buzima. Bityo bikaba byatuma ibi bakora bifatwa nk'umurimo nk'indi itunga abantu. Hari inyungu mu buraya? Christina Parreira ati: "Kugura indaya nibyo kandi ni byiza". Akomeza agira ati : "Kandi ndumva bibabaje ko abavuga ko baharanira uburenganzira bw'abagore bashaka kubambura uruganda rumwe rutuma nabo binjiza menshi kurusha abagabo". Parreira ni umugore wicuruza bitari umwuga wo muri Nevada muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Amerika, uyu anafite impamyabumenyi y'ikirenga (PhD) akanakora ubushakashatsi muri uyu murimo wo kwicuruza. Arwanya abantu bose banga ko uburaya bwemerwa n'amategeko, akavuga ko we ubwe yabuvanyemo ubuzima bwiza. Ati: "Nabuvanyemo amafaranga ahagije, nabashije kurangiza PhD, mbese bwangiriye akamaro. Kubuca byashyira abantu babarirwa mu bihumbi amagana mu bushomeri". We avuga ko icyiza ari uko inzu bukorerwamo ziba zizwi, bityo abahaza barindwa kandi bakaba batekanye. Hano aravuga iwabo i Nevada aho uburaya ari umurimo wemewe n'amategeko. Ati: "Iyo hari umukiriya urenze imbibe hari aho ukanda ugatabaza". Julie Bindel, umunyamakuru akaba n'impirimbanyi iharanira ko uburaya bucibwa nk'akazi kemewe, avuga ko abakora aka kazi benshi bicwa n'abakiriya babo mu bihugu uburaya bwemewe nk'akazi. Bindel avuga ko uburaya atari umwuga ukwiriye abagore, akemeza ko ibibazo bizahoraho ku bagore bose igihe cyose hari abagore bicuruza nk'ibicuruzwa. Agira ati: "Hari ukwamamaza uzabona babwira abagabo ko bashobora kuryamana n'abagore benshi bashoboka babasomeza inzoga. Babigize nk'ikiribwa kiri mu muco, babagize nk'inyama yo mu mugati". Izi ni impaka zimaze iminsi zishyushye mu Buholandi n'ahandi uburaya bwemewe n'amategeko. Inteko ishingamategeko y'Ubuholandi ubu ikaba iri kwitegura nayo gutangira impaka. Uburaya mu bihugu biri mu nzira y'amajyambere imico myinshi ibufata nk'ibintu bidakwiye, ariko iterambere rituma ababukora n'uburyo bukorwa byiyongera mu mujyi. Hari abemeza ko uburaya ari wo mwuga wahereye kera cyane mbere y'indi yose bityo ko kuwuca bidashoboka. Pareira ukora uburaya muri Nevada we agira ati: "Igihe cyose abagabo bazaba bariho hazahoraho abakenera igitsina. Kandi ntacyo bitwaye mu gihe hari abagore bakuru bahisemo kugurisha iyo serivisi".

Umugambi w'umugabo yashatse gukora amanyanga ngo arihwe amahera ya "assurance" wamuhindukiriye nabi Uwo mugabo w'imyaka 34 vyiketswe ko yapfuye inyuma yaho imodoka yiwe bayisanze mu ruzi, ariko ikiziga ciwe kitigeze kiboneka. Ntiyigeze amenyesha umugore ivyo agiye gukora, we yibaza ko yapfuye. Uwo mugore yaciye asimbira mw'itangi n'abana, amaze gushira ubutumwa ku mbuga ngurukanabumenyi ko agiye kwiyahura. Uwo mugabo igipolisi kivuga ko yitwa He, yishikanye mu biro vy'igipolisi c'i Xinhua mu ntara ya Hunan ku wa gatanu uheruka. Apfunzwe yagirizwa amanyanga ku bijanye na "assurance" no kwonona ivyatunze n'ibigirankana, nkuko igipolisi ca Xinhua kivuga mw'itangazo kuri WeChat. Mu ntango y'ukwezi kw'icenda Bwana He yaguze uburyo bwo kwiteganiriza kazoza bw'umuliyoni w'ama yuan ($145000) atagishije inama umugore, niko igipolisi kivuga. Mu cegeranyo casohowe n'iradiyo y'igihugu "Voice of China radio", umugore wiwe niwe yanditswe ko ariwe ahawe ubwo buryo. Kw'itariki 19 ukwezi kw'icenda, Bwana He yakoresheje imodoka yatiye mu manyanga yo kubesha ko yapfiriye mu mpanuka, niko igipolisi kivuga. Basanze yari afise amadeni arenga 100000 vy'ama yuan. Ku tariki 11 ukwezi kw'icumi, ibiziga vy'umugore wiwe w'imyaka 31 n'agahungu k'imyaka ine hamwe n'agakobwa k'imyaka itatu vyatowe mw'itangi hafi yaho baba, nkuko Voice of China ivuga. Mu butumwa bwo kwiyahura yacishije kuri WeChat, yanditse ko agiye "kumuherekeza", yongera avuga ko "yari yipfuje ko umuryango wabo wa bane ugumana", niko Voice of China ibandanya ivuga. Bwana He yaciye yishikana mu biro vy'igipolisi umunsi ukurikira. Yashize videwo yahererekanijwe cane ku rubuga ngurukanabumenyi, aho ubona arira avuga ko yakopesheje amahera ngo avuze umukobwa wiwe w'imyaka itatu agwaye intandara.

Pete Hegseth avuga ko kudakaraba intoki bimufasha kwikingira indwara Ubwo yari ari mu kiganiro Fox and Friends cy'iyi televiziyo, Bwana Hegseth yavuze ko utu dukoko twanduriramo indwara zimwe na zimwe tutabaho kuko tutabonwa n'ijisho risanzwe ry'umuntu. Bwana Hegseth, wize kuri kaminuza za Harvard na Princeton - zimwe mu zikomeye cyane ku isi, yagize ati: "Nisiga umuti wo kunkingira". Yavuze ayo magambo nyuma yaho bagenzi be Ed Henry na Jedediah Bila bakorana muri icyo kiganiro, bamunnyeze bavuga ko arya pizza z'ibisigazwa. Bwana Hegseth yongeyeho ati: "Intego yanjye mu mwaka wa 2019 ni ukuvugira kuri televiziyo ibintu ubundi mvuga ntari kuri televiziyo". Ku mbuga nkoranyambaga, amagambo ye yakiriwe mu buryo butandukanye, bamwe bamushyigikira mu gihe abandi bagaragaje impungenge. Umwe mu bamushyigikiye ukoresha urubuga rwa Twitter wavuze ko ari hafi kuzuza imyaka 70 y'amavuko, yavuze ko umubiri w'umuntu ucyenera udukoko twa mikorobe tumwe na tumwe ngo umenye uburyo bwo kuturwanya, ko hari aho abantu bamwe badutinya byo gukabya. Undi muntu ukoresha Twitter, yibajije niba uyu munyamakuru yakumva anyuzwe abakozi bo muri resitora babaye bategura amafunguro mu gihe batakarabye intoki zabo ku bwende. Nyuma yaho, Bwana Hegseth yaje kubwira igitangazamakuru USA Today ko amagambo ye yari agamije gutebya. Yavuze ko bitumvikana ukuntu abantu bayafashe "uko yakabaye kandi bayaremereje". Ikigo cyo guhangana no gukumira indwara gifite icyicaro muri Amerika, gitangaza ko gukaraba intoki mu buryo buhoraho ari "bumwe mu buryo bwiza cyane bwo kwikuraho udukoko twa mikorobe, kwirinda kurwara, no kwirinda gukwirakwiza utwo dukoko twa mikorobe mu bandi bantu". Perezida Donald Trump w'Amerika - umaze kugaragara mu biganiro by'iyi televiziyo byinshi kurusha indi televiziyo ikomeye iyo ari yo yose ku isi - yemeye inshuro nyinshi ko atinya udukoko twa mikorobe. Mu gitabo cye yatangaje mu mwaka wa 1997 cyitwa The Art of the Comeback, Bwana Trump agira ati: "Umwe mu mivumo y'ubuzima bwo muri Amerika, ni uguhana ikiganza..." "Ndi umuntu ukunda mu buryo budasanzwe kugira intoki zisukuye. Numva ntuje cyane kurushaho iyo maze gukaraba intoki neza, ibintu nkora kenshi gashoboka". Bamwe bavuga ko guhangayicyishwa no kugira isuku cyane nabyo bishobora kuba ikintu kibi, mu kugabanya ubwirinzi kamere bw'umubiri ku dukoko twa mikorobe. Ariko nkuko Kevin Cook, umwe mu basomyi b'inkuru za BBC abivuga, "Kudakaraba intoki zawe na busa mu gihe cy'imyaka 10 birantunguye, nkaba mbifata nko kutita ku buzima bw'abandi bantu".

Jenerali Sani Abacha Ubuswisi buravuga ko banki y'isi igomba kugira uruhare mu gukurikirana uko ayo madolari azagirira abaturage ba Nigeriya akamaro. Birakekwa ko Jenerali Abacha, wapfuye muri 1998 ari umukuru w'igihugu, yasahuye amadolari arenga miliyari 2. Ntabwo umubare w'amadolari amaze gusubizwa mu gihugu uramenyekana. Kugaruza umutungo wa leta wasahuwe, n'imwe mu nshingano ikomeye Perezida Muhammadu Buhari yihaye.

Inyeshyamba z'aba Houthi zigenzura umurwa mukuru mugihe imitwe ikorana na al-Qaeda iri mu tundi duce tw'igihugu. Ababikuriraniye hafi mu ntara ya al-Baida baravuga ko icyo gitero cyagabwe mu rukerera rw'uyu munsi cyabimburiwe n'igitero cy'indege, cyakurikiwe na za kajugujugu zazanye abasirikare bakomeje icyo gitero. Ibitero by'utudege duto twa drone byakajije umurego ku butegetsi bwa Barack Obama Umusigiti ukoreshwa n'intagondwa biravugwa ko warashweho hamwe n'andi mazu yubatse muri ako karere. Umukuru wa al-Qaeda, Abdulraoof al-Dhahab, ari mu bishwe. Iki nicyo gitero cya mbere kibasiye intagondwa z'abayisilamu kuva aho Donald Trump agereye ku ntebe y'ubutegetsi muri Leta zunze ubumwe za Amerika. Igisirikare cya Amerika kiravuga ko cyaguyemo umusirikare wacyo umwe naho abandi batatu barakomereka.

Ubwo ubushyamirane bwari bukaze Tanzania yabujije kompanyi enye z'indege zo muri Kenya kugurukira mu kirere cyayo Iki cyemezo gifatwa nk'ikitavugwaho rumwe kuko leta ya Tanzania imaze amezi idatangaza amakuru ajyanye na Covid-19, ndetse mu kwezi kwa gatandatu Perezida John Magufuli yatangaje ko itakiharangwa kubera amasengesho y'abaturage. Kuri uyu wa gatatu, Tanzania nayo yahise ikuraho ingamba zo guhagarika kompanyi z'indege zo muri Kenya, ivuga ko kompanyi za Kenya Airways, Fly540 Limited, Safarilink Aviation na AirKenya Express Limited, guhera ubu zemerewe kongera kwerekeza muri Tanzania. Mu itangazo yasohoye, Hamza Johari ukuriye ikigo cy'indege za gisivile muri Tanzania yavuze ko Kenya yamaze kubimenyeshwa. Bwana Johari yagize ati: "Tanzania izahora iteka yihatira gukurikiza amahame y'ingenzi yo mu masezerano y'i Chicago yo mu 1944 n'amasezerano y'ibikorwa byo gutwara abantu mu ndege hagati ya leta zombi". Ibi bihugu bituranyi byari bibanye nabi kuva mu kwezi kwa gatanu ubwo Kenya yabuzaga abashoferi b'imodoka z'amakamyo bavuye muri Tanzania kwinjira mu gihugu. Leta ya Kenya yari imaze igihe ifite ubwoba ko Tanzania idakorera mu mucyo ku bijyanye no guhangana n'iki cyorezo. Ibindi bihugu Kenya yasoneye ko abagenzi babivuyemo badashyirwa mu kato bageze muri Kenya birimo nk'Afurika y'epfo, Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Amerika, Ubuhinde, Mexique (Mexico) na Espagne. Ibyo bihugu bisanzwe biri mu bifite umubare munini cyane w'abanduye n'abamaze kwicwa na Covid-19 ku isi. Ariko, abategetsi ba Kenya barakomeza gusaba abagenzi bose binjiye muri iki gihugu kwerekana icyemezo cyuko bapimwe Covid-19 bagasanga ntayo barwaye. Abagenzi bafite igipimo cy'umuriro kiri hejuru ya dogere 37.5 C bazajya bashyirwa mu kato. Kugeza ubu muri Kenya abantu barenga 36,000 bamaze gutangazwa ko banduye coronavirus, muri bo abarenga 600 yarabishe, nkuko imibare ya Kaminuza ya Johns Hopkins ibigaragaza.

Hari hashize amezi muri Nigeria abaturage barakaye kubera gufatwa ku ngufu kw'abana Iri tegeko ryashyizweho umukono na Guverineri Nasir Ahmad el-Rufai, riteganya gukuraho udusabo tw'intanga-ngabo ndetse n'igihano cy'urupfu ku bahamwe no gufata ku ngufu abana b'abakobwa bari munsi y'imyaka 14 y'amavuko. Mu gihe uwafashwe ku ngufu afite imyaka irenga 14, itegeko riteganya ko uwahamwe no kumufata ku ngufu acibwa udusabo tw'intanga ndetse agafungwa burundu. Ab'igitsina gore bakuze bahamwe n'icyaha cyo gufata ku ngufu umwana bazajya bakatwa uduheha dutwara intanga-ngore (fallopian tubes) ndetse bahabwe igihano cy'urupfu. Mu gihe uwafashwe ku ngufu atagejeje ku myaka 14 y'amavuko, hazajya hacyenerwa na raporo yo kwa muganga kugira ngo ishimangire ibyo birego byo gufatwa ku ngufu. Abafata abana ku ngufu bazajya banashyirwa mu gitabo cyabugenewe kandi banatangazwe mu bitangazamakuru. Mu butumwa yatangaje kuri Twitter ejo ku wa gatatu nimugoroba, Guverineri Nasir Ahmad el-Rufai yemeje ko koko yashyize umukono kuri iryo tegeko. Mu cyumweru gishize, abadepite bo muri leta ya Kaduna bari batoye bemeza uwo mushinga w'itegeko. Ubu Kaduna ni yo leta yonyine mu zigize Nigeria ifite itegeko nk'iryo rihana icyaha cyo gufata ku ngufu. Mu mezi macye ashize, muri Nigeria hakomeje kubaho ibikorwa bya rubanda n'ubukangurambaga bwo kwamagana gusambanya ku ngufu. Nubwo hari benshi batawe muri yombi bacyekwaho icyo cyaha, byemezwa ko ikigero cy'abo gihama kikiri hasi.

Sani Abacha yabaye perezida wa Nigeria nyuma ya coup d'eta ya gisirikare mu 1993 Mu kwezi kwa cyenda 1999, Enrico Monfrini umunyamategeko w'Umusuwisi yakiriye telephone yahinduye imyaka 20 ye yakurikiyeho. "Yarampamagaye hagati mu ijoro, ambaza niba naza kuri hotel aho ari, ko afite ikintu gikomeye. Ndavuga nti: 'Burije, ariko ntacyo.'" Uwari umuhamagaye yari umuntu umwe mu bakomeye muri leta ya Nigeria. 'Wabona ayo mafaranga?' Monfrini avuga ko uwo muntu yari yoherejwe i Geneva n'uwari perezida wa Nigeria icyo gihe, Olusegun Obasanjo, ngo amuhe ako kazi ko gushaka amafaranga yibwe na Abacha, wategetse kuva mu 1993 kugeza apfuye mu 1998. Nk'umunyamategeko, Monfrini yari afite abakiliya benshi muri Nigeria kuko yagiye ahakorera kuva mu myaka ya 1980. Umunyamategeko w'Umusuwisi Enrico Monfrini yahamagawe kuri telefone hagati mw'ijoro asabwa gukurikirana amafaranga ya Nigeria yibwe Akeka ko abakiliya be ari bo bamubereye umuranga. "Yarambajije ati: 'Wabona aho ayo mafaranga ari kandi ukayahagarika? Wakora uburyo ayo mafaranga asubizwa Nigeria?' "Naramusubije nti: 'Yego.' Ariko icyo gihe mu by'ukuri sinari nzi imiterere y'ako kazi. Nagombaga kubimenya vuba, nuko ndatangira." Mu gutangira, polisi ya Nigeria yamuhaye amakuru ya zimwe muri konti za banki zo mu Busuwisi zafunzwe, zisa n'izashyizweho amwe mu mafaranga Sani Abacha n'abakoranaga nawe bibye, nk'uko Monfrini yabyanditse mu gitabo cye 'Recovering Stolen Assets'. Yavuze ko iperereza ry'ibanze ryatangajwe na polisi mu kwa 11/1998 ryerekanye ko arenga miliyari $1.5 yibwe na Sani Abacha n'abakoranaga na we. 'Ibifurumba by'amadorari bitwarwa n'ikamyo' Bumwe mu buryo bwo kwigwizaho uyu mutungo bwari bukojeje isoni. Abacha yashoboraga gusaba umujyanama we kumusabira leta amafaranga y'ikintu cy'igihimbano kijyanye n'umutekano. Uyu agahita asinya ubusabe akabujyana kuri Banki nkuru y'igihugu, nayo yahitaga itanga amafaranga, kenshi muri cash. Umujyanama amafaranga yahitaga ayajyana ku rugo rwa Sani Abacha. Monfrini yandika ko amwe muri yo yabaga ari ibifurumba by'inoti z'amadorari "bashobora gutwara ku ikamyo". Ubu ni bumwe mu buryo Abacha n'abakorana nawe bibye amafaranga menshi cyane. Ubundi buryo burimo kuva ku guha amasoko ya leta inshuti ze ku biciro biri hejuru cyane, maze zikamuha ikinyuranyo, kugeza ku gusaba kompanyi zo mu mahanga kumwishyura amafaranga menshi ngo bazemerere gukorera muri Nigeria.
