Abacha yibye arenga miliyari y'amadorari harimo aho yabeshyaga ko amwe agenewe "umutekano we" Ibi byakomeje bityo mu gihe kigera ku myaka itatu kugeza ubwo ibintu byose bihindutse ubwo Abacha yapfuye urutunguranye afite imyaka 54, ku itariki 08/06/1998. Ntibizwi neza niba yarazize umutima cyangwa yararozwe kuko nta suzuma ku murambo ryakozwe, nk'uko umuganga we bwite yabibwiye BBC. Abacha yapfuye adakoresheje miliyari yibye ndetse n'amakuru amwe ya banki yari gufasha kumenya aho ayo mafaranga ari yarayajyanye. Enrico Monfrini ati: "Inyandiko nke ku byakozwe kuri konti nkeya zangejeje ku zindi konti." Amaze kubona amakuru ahagije, yajyanye ikibazo ku mushinjacyaha mukuru w'Ubusuwisi. Aha niho inzira yavuye. Monfrini yabashije kumvisha no kwemeza ubucamanza ko umuryango wa Abacha n'abakoranaga na we bari bagize igico cy'abagizi ba nabi. Ibi byari urufunguzo kuko byafunguye izindi nzira z'uburyo abategetsi bashobora gukurikirana izindi konti zitari zizwi. Sani Abacha yari inde? Umushinjacyaha mukuru yatanze impuruza kuri banki zose mu Busuwisi azisaba kuvuga konti zose zabayeho zafunguwe mu mazina ya Abacha cyangwa abantu be. "Mu masaha 48, 95% bya banki zose n'ibindi bigo by'imari byahise bitangaza ibyo bifite babona ko ari iby'uwo mugabo cyangwa umuryango we" Ibi byatumye n'izindi konti ziri muri banki zindi ahatandukanye ku isi zimenyekana. Monfrini yabwiye BBC ati: "Banki zahitaga ziha inyandiko umushinjacyaha i Geneva nanjye nkakora akazi k'umushinjacyaha kuko atari afite umwanya wo kubikora." 'Konti 'zivuga' cyane' Arakomeza ati: "Twashoboraga kubona kuri buri konti aho amafaranga yavuye cyangwa n'aho yagiye. "Ibyo byampaye amakuru aruseho ku yandi mafaranga yakiriwe avuye mu bindi bihugu n'ayoherejwe mu bindi bihugu. "Byari nk'umukino. Byatangiye ari konti nkeya cyane, biza kuba konti nyinshi rwose, kuko byarimo ihererekanya rigari mu bihugu byinshi. "Konti n'inyandiko zijyana nazo zavugaga byinshi. "Twari dufite ibimenyetso byinshi by'amafaranga yoherezwa hirya no hino, Bahamas, Nassau, ibirwa bya Cayman - n'ahandi." Ubunini bw'iyo mari ya Abacha n'abakoranye nawe byari bisobanuye akazi kenshi kuri Monfrini. "Bisa naho nta muntu wumvaga ako kazi. Nagombye kwishyura abantu benshi, abahanga benshi mu kubara imari, abandi banyamategeko benshi mu bihugu bitandukanye." Monfrini yari yemeye ko azahabwa 4% y'amafaranga azasubizwa Nigeria. Igihembo we avuga ko urebye ari "gito cyane." Hari byinshi bitaramenyekana n'ubu ku rupfu rutunguranye rwa Abacha Kubona ayo mafaranga urebye byarihuse cyane kurusha kuyasubiza muri Nigeria. Ati: "Abo kwa Abacha barwanaga nk'imbwa zasaze. Bajuririraga buri kintu cyose dukoze. Ibi byatindije icyo gikorwa mu gihe kirekire cyane." Gutinda kurushaho byabaye ubwo abanyapolitiki mu Busuwisi bajyaga impaka bibaza niba nasubizwa Nigeria atazongera akibwa. Amafaranga amwe yasubijwe avuye mu Busuwisi hashize imyaka itanu. Mu 2008, Monfrini yanditse ko miliyoni $508 z'abantu bo mu muryango wa Sani Abacha zabonetse muri banki nyinshi mu Busuwisi yoherejwe muri Nigeria hagati ya 2005 na 2007. Kugeza mu 2018, umubare w'amafaranga Ubusuwisi bwari bumaze gusubiza Nigeria yarengaga miliyari $1. Ibindi bihugu byagenze biguru ntege mu gusubiza izo 'cash'. "Urugero nka Liechtenstein, byari akaga. Byari biteye umujinya." Mu kwa gatandatu 2014, Liechtenstein amaherezo yoherereje Nigeria miliyoni $277. Hashize imyaka itandatu, mu kwa gatanu 2020, ikirwa cya Jersey cyoherereje Nigeria miliyoni $308. Ibi byabaye nyuma y'uko abategetsi ba Nigeria bemeye ko ayo mafaranga bazayakoresha by'umwihariko kubaka umuhanda mugari wa Lagos-Ibadan, n'umuhanda wa Abuja - Kano. Hari ibindi bihugu bitarasubiza amafaranga yibwe na Sani Abacha akayahishayo. Monfrini ategereje izindi miliyoni $30 zikiri mu Bwongereza, miliyoni $144 mu Bufaransa n'izindi miliyoni $18 ziri muri Jersey. Ubwo ngo bizaba birangiye, ariko ati: "nta n'uwamenya". Avuga ko akazi ke kabashije kubona yose hamwe arenga miliyari $2.4 Ati: "Kugeza ubu abantu bavuga ko Abacha yibye nibura hagati ya miliyari $4 na $5. Sintekereza ko ari byo. Nibaza gusa ko, menshi cyangwa macye, batwaye menshi cyane kuyo bari bafite." Yumvise ibihuha bivuga ko umuryango wa Abacha utagikize nka mbere. Cyangwa se nk'uko abivuga: "Ntabwo bacyoga mu noti nk'uko babikoraga hambere." Iyo arebye inyuma, yumva atewe ishema n'akazi yakoze. Ati: "Iyo mbwira abana banjye benshi iby'iki kirego, mbabwira ko nabonye ayo mafaranga nkayafatira, nkemeza abategetsi gukurikirana abo bantu no gusubiza ayo mafaranga ku neza y'abaturage ba Nigeria. "Twakoze akazi."

Tiwa Savage yahagaritse igiteramo yari afite muri Afrika y'Epfo Mu butumwa yacishije mu rubuga rwa Twitter, Burna Boy avuga ko yaheruka muri ico gihugu mu 2017, kandi ko atazosubirayo gushika leta ya Afika y'Epfo yisubiyeko. Tiwa Sawage nawe avuga ko ibiriko biraba bikomeye kandi ko atawungukira mu kumeneka kw'amaraso. Ati "kwica uwariwe wese w'umunyafrika bimuraba". Igipolisi c'ico gihugu carahagaritse abantu batari bake bari muri iyo migumuko imaze iminsi mu bisagara vya Johannesburg, Pretoria n'ahandi. Abantu bashika batanu baramaze kwicwa. Umukuru w'ico gihugu, Cyril Ramaphosa, n'abandi bakuru b'ibihugu vya Afrika bariyamiriza ivyo bitero. Umukuru w'igihugu ca Nigeria, Muhammadu Buhari, yarungitse intumwa muri Afrika y'Epfo itwaye "ubutumwa bwo kwerekana akababaro ku kuntu abanyagihugu baco bafashwe nabi". Umuririmvyi akomoka muri Nigeria azwi cane no muri Afrika, Tiwa Savage yanditse kuri Twitter ko yiyamirije yivuye inyuma ubwicanyi ku bantu b'iwe muri Afrika y'Epfo. Ati: "Kuri iyo mvo, sinshobora kuririmba mw'isabukuru rya DSTV ryimirije i Johannesburg ku wa 21 z'uku kwezi kw'icenda". Tiwa azwi cane mu ndirimbo nka "Eminado" na "All Over" amenyesha ko "kwica uwariwe wese w'umunyafrika bimuraba atarindiriye kuba umunyanigeria gusa". Mugenzi wiwe Burna Boy nawe akomoka muri Nigeria avuga ko ubwicanyi bushingiye ku rwanko ku banyamahanga buteye kubiri n'ivyo yarwaniye. Avuga ko Afrika yashigikiye abanya Afrika y'Epfo igihe bariko barwanya intwaro karyanishamiryango y'abazungu ya Apartheid kuva mu myaka ya 1960 gushika mu 1994 irangira. Burna Boy ni umwe mu baririmvyi bakomeye muri Nigeria Burna Boy yanditse ati: "Ndatahura ko abanya Afrika y'Epfo bataye umutwe kubera imyaka bamaze bacurwa bufuni na buhoro, ku buryo basigaye bafata nk'abansi abantu babafashije mu gihe bariko bacurwa bufuni na buhoro, ahubwo bagashimagiza ababahohoteye". Yongeyeko y'uko hari abanya Afrika y'Epfo "bameze neza, bafise ivyiyumviro birashe, n'aho atari benshi". Ishavu ryavuye kuri iyo migumuko ryatumye ishami rimwe ry'ikigo c'ubudandaji ca Afrika Afrika y'Epfo, Shoprite, giterwa kikanyagwa urukombamazi muri gisagara ca Lagos.

Ibi ni ibibazo abajejwe igendereza muri Amerika babandanya bibaza mu matora ategekanijwe mu kwa cumi na rimwe. Umutegetsi wo ku rwego rwo hejuru aragabisha ko hhari bihugu vya rutura bizokoresha "amayeri mu buryo bweruye n'ubwihishije" kugira ngo bazimagize abatora muri Amerika. Aha bakaba bavuga Uburusiya, Ubushinwa hamwe na Irani. Ariko rero, vyose ntivyofatwa kumwe kuko, nk'uko abajejwe igendereza muri Amerika bavyerekana, kimwe kimwe cose gifise intumbero n'ubushobozi cisangije. Eka n'ivyegeranyo ubwavyo biracariko birihwezwa - umwe mu nderetsi aherutse kuvuga ko yasabwe gutsinda ubwoba buterwa n'Uburusiya kuko bwatumye "umukuru w'igihugu abonwa nabi". None mu gihe hasigaye indwi zitatu ngo amatora abe, abatora muri Amerika bakeneye kumenya iki? UBURUSIYA Igendereza rivuga iki? Nta n'umwe atazi uruhara Uburusiya bwagize mu matora yo mu 2016 n'inyuma yayo. Mu majambo make, abajejwe igendereza muri Amerika bemeza ko Uburusiya bwivanze mu matora mu ntumbero yo gufahsa Donald Trump, bagafatira ku manama hagati y'abo bakorana n'abategetsi b'Uburusiya, ubusuma bwo ku mbuga ngurukanabumenyi bwakorewe Hillary Clinton n'abo mu mugambwe w'abaharanira Demokarasi, kwinjira mu bubiko nyabwonko bwerekana abatora, hamwe n'inguvu bwashize mu gukwiragiza ibinyoma canke amakuru yegamiye ku ruhande rumwe ku mbuga ngurukanabumenyi. Mu kwezi guheze, umurwi w'abakenguzamateka bo mu mugambwe w'Abarepubulika watanze ibindi vyemezo vyerekana ko Uburusiya bwashaka ko Trump ari we atsinda, bavuga ko imyiyamamazo yiwe yari yoroshe kwinjirwamwo n'abanyamahanga, ariko wirinda kuvuga ko hoba harabaye icaha. Igendereza ryerekana ko Uburusiya butigeze buhengeshanya kugerageza kwivanga muri politike ya Amerika, aha yari Putin (i bubamfu) na Trump (i buryo), muri Vietnam mu 2017 Uno mwaka wa 2020, uruhigi rwavuye kuri Hillary Clinton ruja kuri Joe Biden. Mu cegeranyo ciwe kikirindiriye gushirwa ahabona, umukuru w'ikigo kijejwe umutekano no kurwanya abasumyi b'urusaku (National Counterintelligence and Security Center, NCSC) William Evanina, avuga ko Uburusiya buriko "bukoresha amayeri atandukanye kugira bubanze bucuvye Biden yahoze ari icegera c'umukuru w'igihugu". Nayo kuvyo umukuru w'ikigo kijejwe igendereza muri Amerika, FBI, Christopher Wray, abona, Uburusiya ntibwigeze buhengeshanya kwivanga mu vya Amerika, akavuga ko ingene bwakoze mu matora y'abakenguzamateka mu 2018 bwariko "bugerageza amayeri butegekanya gukoresha mu 2020". Uburusiya bwamye bwamirira kure ivyo kwivanga mu matora y'ikindi gihugu. Mu ntango z'uno mwaka, umuvugizi w'ibiro vy'umukuru w'igihugu c'Uburusiya (Kremlin) yavuze ko ibi birego vy'ukwivanga mu matora "ari amajambo y'ubwoba" kandi ati "nta kuri kurimwo". Kuba rero Uburusiya bwoba bushaka canke budashaka ikindi kiringo ca Trump, hari abandi bihweza ibintu n'ibindi babona ko iki gihugu gifise intumbero nini cane yo gutesha umutwe ibihugu vy'abakeba mu gutera amadidane muri vyo. Akarorero muri uno mwaka, hari urwandiko rwashizwe ahabona n'umuryango w'ubumwe bw'ibihugu vya Bulaya rwavuga ko hari umugambi w'Uburusiya wo gukwiragiza amakuru y'ibinyoma ku bijanye na coronavirus kugira ngo uyu muryango unanirwe no kumenyesha ingene wariko urahangana nayo. Uburusiya bwavuze ko aya makuru ata shingiro yari afise. Abahiganwa bavuga iki? Joe Biden aherutse kugabisha ko "ibintu bitazokwijana" mu gihe Uburusiya bwobandanya bwivanga mu bibazo vya Amerika, aho yise Uburusiya ko ari "umukeba" wa Amerika. Perezida Trump yamye afata minenenrwe ivyo Uburusiya bwagirizwa bijanye no kwivanga mu matora, ivyo atumvikanyeko n'abiwe bajejwe igendereza. Inyuma y'umubonano na Vladimir Putin mu 2018, abajijwe nimba yizera abajejwe igendereza ba Amerika canke umukuru w'igihugu c'Uburusiya kuri ibi birego, Trump yishuye ati: "Perezida Putin avuga ko atari Uburusiya. Simbona igituma na kimwe bwoba bwo". Mu nyuma yahavuye yigarura avuga ko yavuze nabi. UBUSHINWA Abajejwe igendereza bavuga iki? Abategetsi bakuru mu butegetsi bwa Trump bavuga ko uno mwaka Ubushinwa ari bwo buteye ikibazo, ko atari Uburusiya. Umushikirizamanza mukuru wa Repubulika, William Barr , yavuze ati: "Narabonye ivyavuye mw'igendereza. Uko niko nabibonye". Umukuru w'umurwi ujejwe igendereza mu nama nshingamateka, umu democrate Adam Schiff, yaragije Barr ko ivyo yavuze ari "ikinyoma ceruye". Mu cegeranyo ciwe, Bwana Evanina yavuze ko abajejwe igendereza muri Amerika babona ko "Ubushinwa bushaka ko Perezida Trump - uyo iki gihugu kibona ko adatomoye - atosubira gutorwa". Xi Jinping w'Ubushinwa. Ubutegetsi bwa Trump buvuga ko Ubushinwa ari bwo buteye ikibazo mu matora ya Amerika Ati: "Ubushinwa buriko buriko bwongereza inguvu mu guhindura politike ya Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika, mu gutera igitsure abanyapolitike bubona ko barwanya inyungu z'Ubushinwa, no mu kurwanya ivyiyumviro binegura Ubushinwa". N'aho Ubushinwa bwahinyanyuye amayeri yo kwinjira mu banyapolitike, cane cane iciye ku buhinga bwa none bwo guhererekanya amakuru, ntibiboneka neza aho bwiteguye gushika. Ariko Bwana Evanina avuga ati: "Ubushinwa bubandanya bwihweza ingaruka n'inyungu bushobora kuvana mu vyo buriko burakora". Kumbure hari naho bwoba buriko burarondera kugira ikibanza gikomeye kw'isi. Facebook iherutse kwugara amakonte ngurukanabumenyi yari afitaniye isano n'Ubushinwa, amenshi muri yo akaba yari ashigikiye iki gihugu. Ubushinwa burahakana ko butivanga mu biraba 'ubuzima bw'ibindi bihugu', bukavuga ko "atavyo bushaka kandi ata n'inyungu bubibonamwo". Abahiganwa bavuga iki? Muri uku kwezi, Perezida Trump yarashize ku rubuga rwiwe rwa Twitter inkuru yanditswe n'ikinyamakuru co ku rubuga ngurukanabumenyi, Breitbart, cegamiye Trump, inkuru yavuga ko "Ubushinwa busa n'ubushigikiye Joe Biden mu matora y'umukuru w'igihugu". Afatiye ku muhungu wa Joe Biden, Hunter, Trump yanditse ati: "Nivyo nyene, bashaka Biden. Nafashe amamiliyaridi y'amadorari yari mu Bushinwa ndayagarukana mu gihugu, ndayaha abarimyi bacu n'ikigega ca Amerika. Ubushinwa burashaka kwifatira Amerika mu gihe Biden na Hunter bohashika". Imigenderanire hagati ya Amerika n'Ubushinwa iri hasi cane kubera impari muri vyose, kuva kuri coronavirus gushika kw'itegeko rijanye n'umutekano Ubushinwa bwahaye Hong Kong ku nguvu. Joe Biden abandanya agerageza kurwanya ivyo yagirizwa na Perezida Trump ko yorohereza Ubushinwa, akemerera abanyagihugu ko "azokara" ku bijanye n'agateka ka zina muntu n'ibindi bibazo. Hagati aho, abo mu mugambwe w'abaharanira Demokarasi babona ko Uburusiya ari bwo bubangamye iyo hageze amatora. Ni ikihe gihugu Amerika itinya gusumba? Bivana n'uwo ubajije Umwihwezo ukorwa na Gordon Corera, Umunyamakuru w'umuhinga muvyo umutekano Mu 2016, leta ya Amerika, co kimwe n'amakompanyi y'imbuga hwaniro, ntiyihutiye kurwanya ukwivanga kw'Uburusiya mu matora. Muri kino gihe, nta n'umwe atavuga, ariko gusa ibintu vyarahindutse. Amakompanyi aravuga cane ivyo ariko arakora hanyuma n'igisata kijejwe igendereza naco kikama gishira ahabona ivyegeranyo vyaco. Ariko rero ikibazo cahawe intumbero ya politike. Aba Democrates barajwe ishinga n'ingene Uburusiya buriko bwivanga muri aya matora bushaka gufasha Perezida Trump ngo asubire gutorwa, mu gihe abamushigikiye nabo ahubwo barajwe ishinga n'ingene Ubushinwa buriko burakora kugira ngo ntasubire gutorwa. Abajejwe umutekano w'igihugu bagerageza kwiyubara - baremera ko ibi ariko bimeze, ariko bakirinda kwerekana itandukaniro rihari kubera bafise amakenga ko hoca haduka impari zishingiye ku vyiyumviro vya politike. Ukwivanga kw'Uburusiya kuraboneka ko kwateguwe neza kandi mu buryo bwihishije gushika ubu, ariko atari ku rugero rumwe canke mu buryo bishobora kugira ingaruka nk'izo mu 2016 igihe binjira bakiba ama emails y'aba Democrates. Eka n'amayeri abashaka kwivanga muri ano matora bakoresha yarateye imbere, mu gukorera cane cane ku makuru nyayo ya Amerika, hagukoresha amakuru y'ibinyoma. Hanyuma kandi hari ubwoba ko hashobora no kwaduka n'ibindi bikomeye mu minsi ya nyuma y'imyiyamamazo harimwo mbere n'ukugerageza gutesha agaciro ibizova muri ayo matora yo nyene ubwayo. IRAN Abajejwe igendereza bavuga iki? Mw'itangazo ryiwe, Bwana Evanina avuga ko Tehran (umugwa mukuru wa Irani) idakeneye kubona Perezida Trump atwara ikindi kiringo, ikabona ko "ari igitsure ca Amerika kizobandanya kuri Irani mu kurondera guhindura ubutegetsi". Avuga ko Irani izoshira inguvu zayo zose "ku mbuga ngurukanabumenyi, nko mu gukwiragiza ibinyoma ku mbuga hwaniro be no gukwiragiza amakuru arwanya Amerika". Mu gushimangira ivyashikirijwe n'inzego zijejwe igendereza za Amerika, uruganda ruhingura inyabwonko Microsoft ruvuga ko abasuma bakoresha inyabwonko (pirates informatiques) bafitaniye imigenderanire n'Uburusiya, Ubushinwa na Irani, bariko baragerageza kuneka abantu bakomeye bafise uruhara mu matora ya Amerika. Kuri Irani, Microsoft ivuga ko hari ishirahamwe ryo muri Irani nyene ryitwa Phosphorus ryagerageje kwinjira mu ma konte y'abategetsi bo muri Maison Blanche/White House (ibiro vy'umukuru w'igihugu muri Amerika) hamwe n'abajejwe imyiyamamazo ya Trump hagati y'ukwa gatanu n'ukwa gatandatu uno mwaka, ariko bibata kuw'amazi. Iran, umukuru wayo Hassan Rouhani akaba ari we ari kuri iyi sanamu, irahakana ko ata ruhande na rumwe yegamiye mu matora ya Amerika Umuvugizi w'ubushikiranganji bw'imigenderanire wa Irani yavuze ko ibivugwa na Microsoft ari "ibiterasoni". Saeed Khatibzadeh ati: "Ntabwo Irani irajwe ishinga n'uwo ari we wese azotsinda amatora y'umukuru w'igihugu". Hari icegeranyo kivuga ku bijanye n'uruhara rwa Irani mu ntango z'uno mwaka casohowe n'ishirahamwe ryo muri Amerika Atlantic Council kivuga ko Irani irajwe ishinga n'ugukomeza izina ryayo mu makungu, mu kurondera kuba ari yo iri hejuru mu karere iherereyemwo. Abahiganwa bavuga iki? Irani ntivugwa cane mu matora ya Amerika nk'Uburusiya n'Ubushinwa. Perezida Trump yabandanije atera igitsure gikomeye cane Irani, mu kwivumbura muri ya masezerano yerekeye umugambi wa Irani wo kwimbura ubutare bw'ubumara (Accord nucléaire) hamwe no mu gutanga uruhusha rwo kwica wa mu Jenerali yari akomeye cane Qasem Soleimani. Joe Biden avuga ko iyi politike yananiwe. Mu kiganiro na CNN, yavuze ko "hariho inzira nziza yo gu`tera igitsure Irani", yemera ko azohagarika "ibikorwa bibi" vy'iki gihugu ariko kandi ashire imbere "inzira y'ibiganiro".

Giner Miller, yatanguye isekeza ryo kurwanya Brexit avuga ko iyo ngingo ya sentare ari ifatiro rya kazoza Leta y'Ubwongereza ivuga ko izokwunguruza kuri ico cemezo ca sentare, kandi ko ata mugambi ifise wo kureka ngo ico cemezo kidindize umugambi wayo wo gutangura kuva mw' Ubumwe bwa Bulaya bitarenze mu kwezi kwa gatatu kw'umwaka uza. Umushikiranganji wa mbere wa Ecosse Nicolas Sturgeon, yavuze ko iyo ngingo ya sentare ije gushira ahagaragararekana akajagari n'amadidane birangwa muri leta y'Ubwongereza. Umunyamakuru wa BBC araba ivya pilitike, avuga ko gutweara ico kibazo mu nama nshingamateka bishobora kujana igihugu mu nzira itoroshe, na burya abenshi mu bashingamateka badashigikiye ko ico gihugu kiva mu Bumwe bwa Bulaya.

Abajejwe umutekano barahagaritse Bobi Wine bamena idirisha ry'imodoka imbere y'ukuyitera vya vyuka bikoroza amosozi bamukwegera hanze. Bwana Fred Enanga avuga ko abo bapolisi bagirizwa icaha co gukoresha inguvu zirenze urugero. Abapolisi b'igisata kijejwe guhagarika imigumuko (FFU) baramenaguye amadirisha y'imodoka y'uwo mushingamateka kw'ibarabara ya Busabala, igihe yariko atera aja ahitwa One Love Beach, aho yari gukorera igiteramo yari yateguye c'umuziki wiwe yise Kyarenga Extra, caje kubuzwa n'abajejwe umutekano. Abajejwe umutekano barahagaritse uyo muririmvyi w'umuziki yahindutse umunyepolitike, bamena idirisha rimwe ry'imodoka imbere y'ukuyiteramwo vya vyuka bikoroza amosozi, nawe bamukwegera hanze. Inyuma y'aho umukuru w'igipolisi Okoth Ochola aburije ico giteramo ca Bobi Wine, abapolisi baciye bamusubiza inyuma gushika ku muhana iwe ahitwa Magere, Kasangati mu karere ka Wakiso. Mw'ijambo aherutse gushikiriza, umukuru w'igihugu ca Uganda Yoweri Museveni, yariyamirije ivyashikiye uyo mushingamateka, akavuga ko igipolisi cari gutegerezwa gukwega iyo modoka yiwe gushika aho ari ho hose cipfuza kuyitwara. Mw'iryo jambo yashikirije kw'igenekerezo rya 4 z'uku kwezi kwa gatanu, Bwana Museveni yavuze ati: "Sinemera kandi inzira yakoreshejwe n'igipolisi y'ukumenagura ibiyo vy'imodoka ya Bobi Wine. Bari gupfuma bakwega imodoka yiwe bakayitwara aho ari ho hose bashaka kumutwara". Museveni avuga ko atemera ingingo y'igipolisi y'ukumenagura ibiyo vy'imodoka ya Bobi Wine Ivyo vyatumye igisata kijejwe ubuhinga mu gipolisi ca Uganda, PSU, gifata ingingo y'ukwihweza amareresi yafashwe muri uwo mwanya kugira ngo gishengeze abo bapolisi imbere ya sentare y'igipolisi ijejwe inyifato, kugira bisigure ku birego vyo gukoresha inguvu zirenze urugero. Ugukoresha inguvu zirenze urugero guteye kubiri n'itegeko rigenga igipolisi muri Uganda. Iyo umupolisi yagiriwe n'ico caha, arirukanwa mu kazi canke akagabishwa bikomeye. Bwana Enanga, avuga ko badashobora gufata minenerwe ijambo ry'umukuru w'igihugu, kuko niwe mugaba w'ingabo. Avuga ko bazokwisunga amategeko ngengarugo y'igipolisi mu kwihweza ivyashikirijwe n'umukuru w'igihugu, hanyuma bafate ingingo. Sibwo bwa mbere abapolisi bamenaguye imodoka y'umunyepolitike atavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi canke kigakoresha inguvu zirenze urugero iyo bafashe uyo munyepolitike. Si bwo bwa mbere kandi abanyepolitike batavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi muri Uganda bahohoterwa. Mu matora y'umushingamateka wo mu karere ka Arua mu kwezi kw'umunani umwaka uheze wa 2018, Bobi Wine yarakubaguwe yongera arasinzikarizwa ubuzima n'abasirikare ba Uganda. Umudereva wiwe, Yasin Kawuma, yararashwe arapfa. N'aho Bobi Wine yababarijwe igufa akaja kwivuriza muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika, nta n'umwe mu bajejwe umutekano yigeze afatwa kuri ico caha. Mu mwaka wa 2011 mu gihe haba imyiyerekano bise Walk to Work yo kwiyamiriza ubuzima buzimvye muri ico gihugu, imodoka y'umunyepolitike Kizza Besigye yahoze arongoye umugambwe utavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi, FDC, yaramenaguwe n'igipolisi, kinamusuka ipiripiri mu maso. Kizza Besigye yaciye anyarukanwa kwa muganga, mu nyuma atwarwa n'indege mu gisagara ca Nairobi muri Kenya kuvurirwayo. Ico kibi cariyamirijwe mu gihugu no mu makungu, ariko nta n'umwe mu bajejwe umutekano babikoze yigeze ahanwa, n'inyuma y'aho ireresi yerekana amabi yakorewe ihanahaniwe ku mbuga hwaniro.

Mogadishu irakunze kwibasigwa n'ibitero biturutse ku bibombe vyatezwe mu miduga Abagwanyi b'umugwi ugendera ku vyiyumviro vya Islamu Al-Shabaab wavuze ko ariwo wagavye ico gitero. Umuntu yabonye ico gitero kiba yabwiye itororokanirizo ry'amakuru AFP ko ico giturika kinini caturutse ku modoka itwaye ibombe yari iruhande y'inzu y'akavunamusase kw'ihoteli Wehliye. Uwundi yabibonye, Mohamednur Abdirahman, yavuze ko: "Benshi mu bapfuye ari abantu bariko baranywa icayi". Ico gitero ca nyuma mu bitero vyinshi vya bombe bimaze iminsi bigabwa ku mugwa mukuru muri ino minsi ya vuva, ni ikimenyetso ko umwumvikano muke uri muri leta, utuma ikibazo c'umutekano cunyuka.

Icyambu cya Dakar cyegereye ahatuwe n'abantu Iyo 'nitrate d'ammonium' iri ku cyambu cy'i Dakar, yegereye ahatuwe n'abantu. Ijya kungana n'iyaturikiye i Beirut. Abategetsi bavuga ko icyo kinyabutabire kiri mu muzigo wa toni 3050 werekeza muri Mali. Abakuriye icyambu bavuga ko toni 350 zo muri uwo muzigo zamaze koherezwa muri Mali. Leta ya Sénégal ivuga ko nyir'uwo muzigo yasabye ko icyo kinyabutabire kibikwa mu nzu ibikwamo imizigo iri mu mujyi wa Diamniadio, uri ku ntera hafi ya 30km uvuye i Dakar. Ariko minisiteri y'ibidukikije ya Sénégal ntabwo iremera ubwo busabe. Ivuga ko aho hantu hataruzuza ibyangombwa byose bisabwa, birimo no kuhakorera ubushakashatsi ku bidukikije n'ingaruka ku bantu. Ibiro ntaramakuru AFP bisubiramo amagambo ya Baba Dramé, umwe mu bategetsi bo muri minisiteri y'ibidukikije, agira ati: "Twasabye nyirayo [nyir'iyo nitrate d'ammonium] gukora kuburyo icyo kinyabutabire gitwarwa kikavanwa muri Sénégal". Nyir'iyo 'nitrate d'ammonium' ntiyatangajwe, ndetse ntibizwi icyo ashaka kuyikoresha muri Mali. Abakuriye icyambu cya Dakar ntabwo bavuze itariki uwo muzigo wagereye kuri icyo cyambu. Kujyana uwo muzigo muri Mali biragoranye muri iki gihe kubera urujijo muri politike y'iki gihugu nyuma yuko ku wa kabiri abasirikare bigaruriye ubutegetsi, bahiritse Perezida Ibrahim Boubacar Keïta. Iturika rya 'nitrate d'ammonium' i Beirut ku itariki ya 4 y'uku kwezi kwa munani, ryishe abantu barenga 200, risenya n'inyubako muri uwo mujyi.

Abategetsi ba Korea ya Ruguru (Kim Jong-un) na Amerika (Donald Trump) bimirije kugirana inama Bikekwa ko bazoganira ku bijanye n'inama hagati ya Prezida Donald Trump n'indongozi ya Korea ya Ruguru, Kim Jong-un. Amakuru yerekeye iyo nama ya Finlande yatanguye guseruka igihe umutegetsi akomeye wa Korea ya Ruguru abonywe i Beijing yurira indege igiye Helsinki. Yitezwe guhura n'abakozi bari mu buserukizi bwa Amerika hamwe n'abahinga ba Korea Yepfo mu vy'umutekano. Umushikiranganji w'imigenderanire n'amakungu ya Korea ya Ruguru, Ri Yong Ho (hagati) ashitse muri Suède ku munsi wa kane Umushikiranganji w'imigenderanire wa Korea ya Ruguru amaze iminsi itatu abonana n'abantu muri Suède.

Al-Shabab imaze kugaba ibitero vyinshi ku basirikare b'igihugu Umuvugizi w'umugwi Al-Shabab yavuze ko abagwanyi b'uwo mugwi, bifatiye ico kirindiro hamwe n'igisagara ca Barire, kiri ku birometero 50 mu bumanuko bushira uburengero bwa Mogadishio. Yavuze ko abasirikare ba leta 21 bishwe, abandi barahunga. Leta hamwe na Al-Shabab bakunze gutanga ibitigiri bitandukanye, iyo hageze kuvuga abapfuye. Igihugu ca Somalia kirangwamwo umutekano muke kuva mu 1991, igihe abanyagihugu bo mu miryango itandukanye bakuriye ku butegetsi Prezida Mohamed Siad Barre, munyuma bagaca basubiranamwo.

Igipolisi cemeje ko abakobwa banyurujwe ari 317 muri ico gitero cabaye isaha indwi y'ijoro. Ababibonye bavuga ko abantu bitwaje ibigwanisho bari ku maguru bateye iryo shure ryisumbuye ry'abakobwa rya Jangele mu masaha ya kare cane yo ku wa gatanu, bararasa hanyuma banyuruza abo bakobwa babakura mu buryamwo bwabo. Umwigisha yabonye ico gitero yavuze ko ku bana 421, gushika ubu abamaze kuboneka ari 55 gusa. Amasaha make inyuma y'ico gitero, abavyeyi baciye batangura kurundana kw'ishure kubaza ivyashikiye abana babo. Umukuru w'igipolisi yasavye umuyobozi n'abavyeyi kugumya umutima abizeza ko igikorwa c'igipolisi gifatanije n'izindi nzego z'umutekano kija kurokora abana babo. Ntiharamenyekana abakoze ico gitero bakanyuruza abo bakobwa, ariko Zamfara n'imwe mu ntara zigeramiwe cane n'ibikorwa vy'imigwi y'inkozi z'ikibi inyuruza abantu kugirango isabe amafaranga imbere yo kubarekura-kenshi igatumbera amashuri. Igitero nk'ico ca vuba caheruka igihe abanyeshure n'abigisha baharugwa mu mirongo banyuruzwa bavanywe kw'ishure ry'abahungu mu ntara ya Niger iri hagati na hagati muri Nigeria haraheze indwi, kandi kugeza n'ubu bakaba bataraboneka.

Imyenda ya 'caguwa' ikunze kugurwa cyane mu bihugu byinshi by'Afurika, abayigura bakavuga ko inoze, yihariye kandi iramba kurusha imishyashya Icyo cyemezo cyo mu kwezi gushize kwa kane cyo guca iyo myenda izwi nka sekeni (second-hand) cyangwa 'caguwa', cyari cyishimiwe n'inganda n'abakora imyenda muri Uganda bavuga ko ari uburyo bwo kubunganira hakoreshwa imyambaro ikorerwa mu gihugu. Ariko icyo gihe abacuruzi ba 'caguwa' barinubye, bavuga ko ibicuruzwa bamaze gutumiza biri mu nzira biberekezaho binyuze mu nzira yo mu nyanja. Banashimangiye ko nta gihamya ihari yuko Covid-19 - indwara y'ubuhumekero iterwa n'ubu bwoko bushya bwa coronavirus - ishobora kuba ikiriho nyuma y'urugendo rurerure bifata ngo ibicuruzwa bive mu Bushinwa, Uburayi cyangwa Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Amerika. Mu masaha 24 uko kubuza ubucuruzi bwa 'caguwa' byahise bikurwaho, ku ikubitiro nta gisobanuro cyabyo gitanzwe. Amelia Kyambadde, Minisitiri w'ubucuruzi, inganda n'amakoperative muri Uganda, yavuze ko byari kuba ari akarengane kugumishaho uko guca 'caguwa', kuko hari ibicuruzwa byari byaramaze gutumizwa. Madamu Kyambadde yanavuze ko ubucuruzi bw'imyenda n'inkweto bya 'caguwa' buri kugenda bugabanuka, kubera imisoro yongerewe n'ibisabwa bijyanye n'isuku. Yagize ati: "Ugomba kugaragaza ko bateye imiti iyo imyenda byo kuyihumanura kandi barabigenzura". "Hari umusoro wihariye, kandi mu by'ukuri uwo musoro wiyongera buri mwaka. Nzi abantu bagiye mu bundi bucuruzi kubera [guhunga] uwo musoro". Mu mwaka wa 2018, ibihugu byo mu muryango w'Afurika y'uburasirazuba (EAC) byaburiwe ko guca itumizwa ry'imyenda n'inkweto bya 'caguwa' bishobora gutuma Amerika yihimura ikabifatira ibihano. Muri Uganda, ubucuruzi bw'imyenda n'inkweto bya 'caguwa' buri mwaka bubarirwa mu gaciro ka miliyoni hafi 200 z'amadolari y'Amerika.

Isi yugarijwe n'uko abana bazagabanuka cyane abashaje bakiyongera cyane Ikigereranyo cy'abana bavuka cyerekana ko hafi buri gihugu ku isi kizaba gifite abaturage bagabanutse cyane mu mpera z'iki kinyejana. Ibihugu 23 - birimo Ubuyapani na Espagne - ababituye bashobora kuzaba baragabanutseho kimwe cya kabiri mu 2100. Aba bashakashatsi bavuga ko abatuye ibihugu bazaba biganjemo abari mu zabukuru. Ni iki kiri kuba? Igipimo cy'imbyaro - ikigereranyo cy'abana umugore umwe abyara - kiri kumanuka. Niba iki kigereranyo kimanutse kikagera munsi ya hafi 2.1, icyo gihe umubare w'abatuye igihugu utangira kugabanuka. Mu 1950, abagore bari ku kigereranyo cyo kubyara abana 4.7 mu buzima bwabo. Abashakashatsi ba Kaminuza ya Washington ikigo cy'imibare mu by'ubuzima, bavuga ko kiriya kigereranyo cyari kigeze hafi ya 2.4 mu 2017. Ubushakashatsi bwabo bwatangajwe muri The Lancet, buteganya ko iki kigereranyo kizaba kigeze kuri 1.7 mu 2100. Kubera ibyo, aba bahanga bateganya ko umubare w'abatuye uyu mubumbe uzagera ku gasongera ukaba miliyari 9.7 ahagana mu 2064, mbere yo kumanuka ukaba miliyari 8.8 mu mpera z'iki kinyejana. Umushakashatsi Prof Christopher Murray yabwiye BBC ati: "Icyo ni ikintu gikomeye; kuba abaturage b'ibihugu byinshi ku isi bari kugabanuka. "Ni ikintu kigoye gutekereza no kwemera uburyo bikomeye; kandi bidasanzwe, bizadusaba gutegura sosiyete zituye isi". Kuki imbyaro ziri kugabanuka? Ntabwo ari ikibazo cy'intanga cyangwa ibindi abantu batekereza iyo havuzwe ikibazo cy'imbyaro. Ahubwo birava ku kuba abagore benshi bari kwiga no gukora imirimo, hamwe no kuboneka kw'imiti iringaniza imbyaro, ibi bituma abagore bahitamo kubyara bacye. Mu buryo bwinshi, kugabanuka kw'abatuye isi ni inkuru nziza. Ni ibihe bihugu byugarijwe? Abatuye Ubuyapani biteganyijwe ko bazagabanuka bakava kuri miliyoni 128 mu 2017 bakagera munsi ya miliyoni 53 mu mpera z'iki kinyejana. Ubutaliyani bwiteze igabanuka nk'iri aho abaturage bazava kuri miliyoni 61 bakagera kuri 28 mu gihe nk'icyo. Ibyo ni bibiri mu bihugu 23 - birimo na Portugal, Thailand, Espagne na Korea y'Epfo - biteganyijwe ko ababituye bazagabanukaho kimwe cya kabiri. Prof Christopher Murray ati: "Iryo ni igabanuka ridasanzwe". Ubushinwa, igihugu ubu gituwe kurusha ibindi ku isi, biteganyijwe ko abagituye bazagera ku gasongero bakaba miliyari 1.4 mu myaka ine iri imbere, mbere yo kumanuka bakaba miliyoni 732 mu 2100. Ubuhinde nabwo bizajya kumera nk'ibi. Gusa, iki ni ikintu kizaba hafi ku isi yose, mu bihugu 183 ku 195 ikigereranyo cy'imbyaro kizamanuka kigere munsi y'igikwiriye. Ibi se ni ikibazo? Ushobora kwibaza ko ibi ari byiza ku bidukikije. Abantu nibaba bacye bizagabanya kohereza ibyuka bihumanya ikirere no gutema amashyamba ngo bahinge. Prof Murray agira ati: "Ibyo ni byiza uretse kuzaba hari abashaje benshi kurusha abato, ibyo bikazana ingaruka z'iyo miterere mishya y'imyaka y'abatuye isi". Ibyo abahanga bateganya: Prof Murray yongeraho ko ibi bizatera impinduka zikomeye. Ati: "Bintera ubwoba kuko mfite umukobwa w'imyaka umunani, nkaba nibaza uko isi izaba imeze. Abavuka bazagabanuka cyane Ni ikihe gice kinini cy'abantu kishyura imisoro? Ni bande bishyura ibihabwa abari mu zabukuru? Ni bande bita ku bari mu zabukuru? Ese abantu bazabasha kureka akazi bakajya mu kiruhuko cy'izabukuru? Prof Murray avuga ko "bikenewe cyane ko isi izagera hariya yiteguye". Ese hari ibisubizo? Ibihugu bikize, byemera kwakira abimukira ngo byongere ababituye bizibe icyuho cy'abari kugabanuka. Gusa bisa n'aho iki atari igisubizo cya hose kuko muri buri gihugu abaturage bari kugabanuka. Prof Murray ati: "Tuzava mu gihe aho gufungura imipaka bitera impaka, tugere aho turwanira abimukira, kuko bazaba ari bacye". Ibihugu bimwe byatangiye kwitegura bifata ingamba zirimo kongera igihe cy'ikiruhuko cy'ababyeyi bombi mu gihe babyaye, kwita ku bana ku buntu, guha ababyeyi amafaranga n'ibindi, ariko nta gisubizo kirashe (cyangwa gitomoye, mu Kirundi) gihari. Suwede yabashije kongera kuzamura ikigereranyo cy'imbyaro kiva kuri 1.7 kigera kuri 1.9. Gusa ibindi bihugu byinshi biracyagowe. Nka Singapore ikigereranyo cy'imbyaro kiri kuri 1.3. Prof Stein Emil Vollset avuga ko ingamba zo kurwanya igabanuka ry'abaturage mu myaka iri imbere zizaba akazi gakomeye ku bihugu byinshi. Ati: "Kuko bizaba bitagomba guhungabanya uburenganzira bw'abagore". Kuri Afurika bite? Abatuye Afurika yo munsi y'ubutayu bwa Sahara biteganyijwe ko bazikuba gatatu bakarenga miliyari eshatu mu 2100. Aba bashakashatsi bavuga ko Nigeria izahinduka igihugu cya kabiri gituwe cyane ku isi na miliyoni 791 z'abaturage. Prof Murray ati: "Tuzagira abantu benshi bakomoka muri Afurika mu bihugu byinshi uko imyaka igenda ishira." Kuki ikigereranyo cya 2.1 gikwiye? Ushobora kwibaza ko umubare ukwiye kuba 2.0 - ababyeyi babiri bafite abana babiri - kugira ngo umubare w'abaturage ntuhinduke. Ariko n'ahari ubuvuzi buhambaye, abana bose ntabwo bagera ku myaka y'ubukure. Impinja zivuka nazo si nyinshi cyane ziba ari igitsina gabo. Ibihugu bifite ikigereranyo cy'impfu nyinshi mu bana binakenera ikigereranyo cy'imbyaro nyinshi. Inzobere zivuga iki? Prof Ibrahim Abubakar, wo muri University College London (UCL), ati: "Niba ibi byitezwe binafite igice cy'ukuri, kwimuka kw'abantu bizaba bikenewe cyane ku bihugu byose". Prof Abubakar avuga ko politiki z'ibihugu byose ku isi zikeneye guhinduka zigatekereza kuri ibi. Ati: "Uburyo ibyiciro by'imyaka y'abantu biri mu mirimo bizaba ikibazo gikomeye abantu bakwiyongera cyangwa bagabanuka".

Abageni basabye Papa guha umugisha urugo rwabo, ariko we yahise abasezeranya Abageni, bombi Paula Podest Ruiz, w'imyaka 39, na Carlos Ciuffardi Elorriga, ufite 41,bakora akazi ko kwita ku bagenzi mu ndege bari barasezaniriye mu butegetsi. Ariko ntibyashobokera kujya kwa padiri kubera ko kiliziya yabo yari yarangijwe n'umutingito. Paula Podest Ruiz (ibumoso) na Carlos Ciuffardi Elorriga basomanye nyuma y'umuhango wamaze aknya gato cyane Papa yabasezeranirije mu muhango watwaye igihe gito cyane igihe indege barimo yari irimo iva i Santiago yerekeza mu mujyi wa Iquique uri mu majyaruguru y'igihugu. Francis aje mu modoka ye yitwa Popemobile ku mucanga ahitwa Lobitos Beach, hafi y'umujyi wa Iquique Umuyobozi mukuru w'ikompanyi ifite iyo ndege niwe batanzeho umugabo. Abakarani bari muri yo ndege nibo batunganyije inyandiko zo gushyingiranwa zemewe n'amategeko. Ni ubwa mbere umupapa asezeranyiriza abageni mu ndege.

Seychelles cyabaye igihugu cya mbere muri Africa cyatangiye gukingira Covid Abarenga 60% by'abatuye ibirwa bya Seychelles barakingiwe byuzuye muri ibi birwa biri hirya y'uburasirazuba bw'umugabane wa Africa. Ariko kwiyongera kw'abanduye Covid byatumye hafatwa izindi ngamba zo kwirinda ku baturage baho bakabakaba 100,000. Byagenze bite kuri ubwo bwandu? Seychelles ni igihugu gito, rero muri rusange imibare y'abandura ku munsi ntabwo urebye ari minini - ariko ku kigereranyo cy'abaturage bose, ukwiyongera kwateye impungenge. Mu kwa kane, ikigereranyo cy'abandura bashya cyari hamwe kitazamuka, hafi 50 ku munsi. Kugera hagati mu kwa gatanu, ikigereranyo cy'icyumweru kimwe cy'abandura ku munsi cyageze ku bantu 400 ku munsi. Kuva icyo gihe imibare yarongeye iramanuka, ariko ikomeza kuba hejuru y'ikigereranyo cyo mu kwa kane. Tariki 10 z'uku kwezi, minisiteri y'ubuzima ya Seychelles yavuze ko hafi 1/3 cy'abanduye bashya ari abantu bakingiwe byuzuye. Ibindi bihugu ahari umubare ufatika w'abaturage bakingiwe byuzuye, byatangaje imibare yo hasi cyane y'ubwandu bushya. Urugero muri Israel, mu byiciro by'imyaka aho abarenga 90% babonye doze zombi z'urukingo, ubwandu bwatangajwe buri hadi ya 2%. Seychelles ikoresha uruhe rukingo? Hejuru ya 70% by'abaturage bafashe nibura doze imwe, naho 63% bo bafashe doze zombi kuva mu kwa mbere iki gihugu cyatangira gukingira. Urukingo bwakoresheje bwa mbere ni Sinopharm rwakorewe mu Bushinwa, bakoresheje doze zarwo bahawe na Emira Zunze Ubumwe z'Abarabu. Urukingo rwa Oxford-AstraZeneca, rwakorewe mu Buhinde rutangwa rwitwa Covishield, narwo rwarakoreshejwe, na vuba aha batanze urwa Sputnik V rwo mu Burusiya. Mu nkingo zatanzwe (hatarimo urwa Sputnik), 57% ni Sinopharm naho 43% ni Covishield. Ntabwo tuzi neza imibare y'abakingiwe byuzuye batewe Sinopharm n'abatewe AstraZeneca nyuma basanzemo Covid . Tuzi ko hafi 2/3 by'abo basanze baranduye benshi bari bafite ibimenyetso byorosheje cyangwa ntabyo, nk'uko komiseri ushinzwe ubuzima mu gihugu Dr Jude Gedeon abivuga. Ku bari bakeneye gushyirwa mu bitaro, 80% ni abantu batakingiwe, kandi benshi muri abo bari abantu basanganywe izindi ndwara. Izi nkingo zikora ku kihe gipimo? Ishami rya ONU/UN rishinzwe ubuzima ku isi, OMS/WHO, rivuga ko urukingo Sinopharm rw'Ubushinwa rukora ku gipimo cya 79% ku kurinda ubwandu butera uburwayi kandi rugakora cyane mu kurinda kuremba no gushyirwa mu bitaro. Ariko, muri rusange hari amakuru macye ku isi ku nkingo z'Abashinwa, mu kwezi gushize, ukuriye ikigo cy'Ubushinwa cya Centre for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), George Gau, yabaye nk'ukemanga ko zikora. Tariki 11 z'ukwa kane yabwiye abanyamakuru ati: "Tuzakemura ikibazo inkingo zihari ubu zifite cyo kudatanga ubwirinzi bwo ku rwego rwo hejuru cyane". Inkingo za Sinopharm z'Ubushinwa ziri gukoreshwa mu bihugu bitandukanye ku isi Hari kandi ibibazo ku gipimo cyo kurinda abantu ku rukiko rwa AstraZeneca ku bwoko bwa Covid bwo muri Africa y'Epfo bwageze no muri Seychelles. Inyigo yo muri Africa y'Epfo yerekanye kugabanuka k'ubushobozi bwo kurinda bwa AstraZeneca kuri Covid yoroheje n'igereranyije. Iyo nyigo ntabwo yasuzumye ubushobozi bw'urwo rukingo kuri Covid-19 y'igikatu, gusa WHO ivuga ko ibimenyetso bimwe bigaragaza ko rushobora kuba ruyirinda. Impungenge nk'izi ku rundi rukingo rwo mu Bushinwa zagaragaye muri Chile. Imibare y'abanduye naho yarazamutse mu kwezi gushize nubwo bwose bakingiye abantu benshi, aho mu bakingiwe abarenga 90% batewe CoronaVac, urukingo rwakozwe n'uruganda Sinovac rw'i Beijing. Abanenga ariko bavuga ko leta ya Chile yihuse cyane mu kuvanaho ingamba zo kwirinda, bigatuma abantu bahita bareka kwirinda. Ingamba zo kwirinda zakuweho vuba? Dr Gedeon, komiseri w'ubuzima muri Seychelles, avuga ko yizera ko kwiyongera kw'abanduye kuva ku kwiyongera kw'ibikorwa by'ubucuruzi. Ingamba zorohejwe mu kwezi kwa gatatu, zirimo kongera gufungura za restaurants no gufungura amashuri. Abategetsi bavuga kandi ko ibiro byo kwizihiza Pasika byaba byarabigizemo uruhare, kuko abantu batari bakirinda cyane kwandura, nyuma yo guterwa doze ya mbere cyangwa zombi z'urukingo. Umwaro muri Seychelles Ingamba zo kwirinda zongeye gusubizwaho muri uku kwa gatanu, amashuri arafungwa, utubari, restaurants n'amaduka bitegekwa gufunga kare n'amahuriro amwe y'abantu arabuzwa. Ubukerarugendo nabwo bwaba ari ikibazo Ibi birwa biri mu nyanja y'Ubuhinde bitunzwe ahanini n'ubukerarugendo. Mu 2019, abantu hafi 400,000 bavuye mu mahanga basuye Seychelles. Nyuma yo kugabanuka kw'imibare y'iki cyorezo, ubukerarugendo ubu bwongeye kuzamuka. Tariki 25 z'ukwezi kwa gatatu, Seychelles yatangaje ko abashaka kuyisura bitari ngombwa ko bashyirwa mu kato, nubwo icyangombwa ko utanduye kigisabwa, kandi hari amabwiriza ku bava mu bihugu bimwe. Abarenga 14,000 basuye iki gihugu mu kwezi kwa kane, benshi cyane ugereranyije n'ukwa gatatu. Ariko guverinoma yavuze ko ibi bitari mu byateye kwiyongera k'ubwandu. Dr Gedeon ati: "Nta bimenyetso byerekana ko abakerarugendo bari kuzana ubwandu bushya muri Seychelles."

Hafsat Baba, komiseri ushinzwe abagore n'iterambere ry'umuryango muri iyo leta, yavuze ko icyo cyemezo ari "inkuru nziza". Yongeyeho ko "bizaca intege" abasambanya abagore ku ngufu. Byitezwe ko ubu Nasir Ahmad el-Rufai, Guverineri wa leta ya Kaduna, agiye gushyira umukono kuri uwo mushinga w'itegeko kugira ngo uhinduke itegeko muri iyo leta. Mu kwezi kwa gatandatu uyu mwaka, ba guverineri ba leta zigize Nigeria batangaje ibihe bidasanzwe mu gihugu kubera gufata abagore ku ngufu n'ibindi bikorwa by'urugomo byibasira abagore n'abana. Umubare w'imanza z'abacyekwaho gufata abagore ku ngufu uracyari ku kigero cyo hasi, ndetse ipfunwe akenshi rituma abagore bafashwe ku ngufu babiceceka.

Abahanga muri siyansi bavuga ko ubwoko bushya bwa Covid babusanga muri 90% y'abantu bashya bandura Covid-19 muri icyo gihugu. Ubushakashatsi, bwakozwe ku bantu 2,000, bwagaragaje kurinda "byo ku rwego rwo hasi cyane" abashobora kwandura ubu bwoko bwa Covid-19. Africa y'Epfo yamaze kwakira doze miliyoni imwe z'urukingo rwa AstraZeneca ndetse byari biteganyijwe ko rutangira gutangwa mu cyumweru gitaha. Minisitiri w'ubuzima w'iki gihugu Zweli Mkhize ejo ku cyumweru yabwiye abanyamakuru ko leta igiye gutegereza ibyo abahanga bazageraho mbere yo gutera abantu uru rukingo. Ubushakashatsi kuri rwo bwakozwe na kaminuza ya Witwatersrand y'i Johannesburg ntabwo buranononsorwa bya nyuma. Hagati aho, minisitiri Zweli yavuze ko mu byumweru biri imbere bazatanga urukingo rwakozwe na Johnson & Johnson n'urwa Pfizer Muri iki kiganiro n'abanyamakuru, Prof Shabir Madhi wayoboye ubu bushakashatsi yagize ati: "Urukingo rwa AstraZaneca ntabwo rukora ku burwayi bworoheje n'ubugereranyije". Yavuze ko ubushakashatsi bwabo butarareba niba uru rukingo rukora ku burwayi bukomeye, kuko rwasuzumwe ku bantu b'ikigereranyo cy'imyaka 31 bari mu cyiciro cy'abadakomererwa n'ibimenyetso by'iyi virus. Prof Sarah Gilbert, umwe mu bayoboye abakoze uru rukingo muri Oxford, yavuze ko bizeye cyane ko muri uyu mwaka bazabona ubwoko bushya bwarwo bwo guhangana n'ubu bwoko bushya bwa Covid bwo muri Africa y'Epfo. Aba bahanga bavuga ko mu gihe cy'ibyumweru cyangwa amezi, uru rukingo rushobora guhindurwa kugira ngo rushobore amoko mashya y'iyi virus. Ibisubizo by'ibanze by'urukingo rwa Moderna byerekana ko rukingira ubu bwoko bushya bwo muri Africa y'Epfo. Ibisubizo by'ibanze by'urukingo rwa Pfizer-BioNTech byerekana ko rwo rukingira ubwoko bw'iyi virus bwo muri Africa y'Epfo, n'ubwoko bwayo bwabonetse mu Bwongereza.

Umugwi Uganda Cranes mu mwaka uheze Umugwi wa Uganda watsinze Harambee Stars ya Kenya ibitsindo 4 kuri 2 ku kibuga c'umupira Urukundo co muri komine Buye mu ntara ya Ngozi. Kenya yatahukanye igikombe ca CECAFA intsinze Zanzibar 3-2 Kenya yatahukanye igikombe ca CECAFA intsinze Zanzibar 3-2 Igihugu ca Kenya caheruka gutahukana igikombe ca CECAFA mu mwaka uheze, gikuyemwo umugwi wa Zanzibar ku bitsindo 3 kuri 2 mu rukino rwa nyuma. Finale y'uno mwaka izokinwa ku wa Mungu hagati y'imigwi y'ibihugu vya Somalia na Tanzaniya ku kibuga Ngome c'i Gitega, igisagara ca kabiri gikuru kiri hagati mu Burundi.

Kiretse abavuye muri Tanzania, ngo hari abandi amajana HCR yafashije gutahuka bava mu bindi bihugu vy'akarere Abatahuka bava cane cane mu nkambi za Nduta na Mtendeli mu gihugu ca Tanzania. Muri aya mezi aheze ariko harabaye imyidogo mu mpunzi ko zishirwako igitsure kugira zitahe. Mu bihumbi amajana vy'Abarundi bahungiye mu bihugu bibanyi muri iyi myaka ya vuba, Tanzania niyo iharugwamwo benshi cane, barenga ibihumbi amajana abiri. Catherine Wiesner, umuyobizi mpuzabikorwa wa HCR mu karere, yavuganye na Prudent Nsengiyumva wa BBC Gahuzamiryango Uretse abava muri Tanzania, Catherine Wiesner avuga ko hari abandi Barundi amajana HCR yafashije gutahuka bava mu bindi bihugu vy'akarere. Umviriza ikiganiro Catherine Wiesner yagiranye na BBC

Ingendo z'indege zitwara abantu zarahagaritswe henshi ku isi, mu kwirinda ikwirakwira rya coronavirus. Iki kigo cya Tanzania cyatangaje kuri Twitter ko ibi bitewe no "kugabanuka kw'abandura Covid-19". Kuwa mbere, minisitiri w'ubuzima wa Tanzania yavuze ko abaje mu gihugu bazajya basuzumwa ibimenyetso bya Covid-19 aho binjiriye mbere yo gukomeza mu gihugu. Mu minsi ishize, Perezida John Magufuli wa Tanzania yavuze ko igihugu kiri kwitwara neza mu kurwanya iki cyorezo, bivugwa ko ibi byatumye abaminisitiri batangira gusubiza ibintu uko byahoze. Urwego rw'ubukerarugendo ni rwo rwa kabiri mu byinjiriza Tanzania imari nini nyuma y'ubuhinzi, rukaba rwarazahaye cyane kubera iki cyorezo. Minisitiri ushinzwe ubukerarugendo yavuze ko igihugu kiri kongera kubufungura nyuma yo kumenya ko hari ibihugu byateguye ingendo zigana muri Tanzania. Leta ya Tanzania ariko ishinjwa kudatanga amakuru buri munsi y'uko icyorezo cya coronavirus kifashe mu gihugu. Hari ingamba zimwe zafashwe zibuza amakoraniro y'abantu benshi. Gusa Bwana Magufuli yatsimbaraye ko nta gufunga ibikorwa byose (lockdown) bigomba kubaho, kandi abajya mu nsengero bagomba gukomeza kujya gusenga.

Betlehem Tesfaye, w'imyaka itandatu, yatakaje amaguru ye yombi ubwo igisasu cyaturikaga Buri munsi umujyi wa Shire ni ko urushaho kwakira abandi bantu bashya baje bawuhungiramo. Betlehem Tesfaye, w'imyaka itandatu, wahageze ahunze aturutse mu mujyi baturanye wa Aksum (Axum/Axoum) uri ku ntera hafi ya 50km mu burasirazuba, yatakaje amaguru ye yombi mu gihe cy'imirwano. Nyina yishwe n'igisasu cyasize kimugaje uyu mwana we. Mu kumuvuza, se yakoresheje amafaranga yari yarizigamiye. None ubu ntabwo azi uko yashobora kumubonera amaguru y'amaterano (prosthetic legs) yo kumufasha kugenda. Cyo kimwe no mu yindi mijyi yo muri Tigray, umujyi wa Shire wabaye ubuhungiro bw'abantu b'imbabare babarirwa mu bihumbi za magana byabaye ngombwa ko bata ingo zabo kubera imirwano yaranzwemo ibirego by'ihonyorwa ry'uburenganzira bwa muntu birimo ubwicanyi no gufata ku ngufu abagore n'abakobwa mu buryo bugambiriwe. Ariko uyu mujyi utuwe n'abantu 170,000, urwi rwagati muri Tigray, urimo kugorwa mu buryo bwihariye. Mu mezi ane ashize, umujyi wa Shire wakiriye abantu benshi cyane, kandi ntiwari witeguye. Amashuri yo muri uyu mujyi ndetse na kaminuza byabaye indiri y'akababaro. Imiryango itanga imfashanyo igereranya ko abantu bagera ku 200,000 kuri ubu baba mu nkambi zubatswe huti huti muri uyu mujyi. Benshi muri bo ni abagore n'abana. Abahageze mbere bahageze mu kwezi kwa cumi na kumwe mu 2020 ubwo imirwano yatangiraga. Ahanini baturutse mu bibaya byo majyepfo no mu majyepfo ashyira uburengerazuba bwa Tigray, ahari isibaniro ry'imirwano mu minsi ya mbere. Iyi mirwano yaturutse ku bushyamirane bwari bumaze igihe bututumba hagati ya leta ya Minisitiri w'intebe wa Ethiopia Abiy Ahmed n'abategetsi bahoze bategeka aka karere bo mu ishyaka Tigray People's Liberation Front (TPLF) - ryari ryiganje muri politike ya Ethiopia kugeza ubwo Bwana Abiy yageraga ku butegetsi mu mwaka wa 2018. Nyuma yuko Bwana Abiy ategetse igabwa ry'igitero cya gisirikare kubera iterwa ry'ikigo cy'ingabo za Ethiopia mu murwa mukuru Mekelle wa Tigray, imirwano yahise irota mu bice byinshi ndetse yitabirwa n'ingabo nyinshi zitandukanye. Mu majyepfo no mu majyepfo ashyira uburengerazuba bwa Tigray, ingabo zo mu karere ka Amhara bahana imbibi zifatanyije n'ingabo z'igihugu za Ethiopia mu kurwanya ingabo z'ishyaka TPLF. N'ubwoba bwinshi, Atsede Mebrahtom w'imyaka 65 aribuka uko byari bimeze muri iyo minsi. Madamu Atsede yabaga mu mujyi witwa Dansha, afashwa n'abakobwa be babiri n'imiryango yabo. Atsede Mebrahtom ati: "Turi abanyamahirwe kuba tutarapfuye" Madamu Atsede, abakobwa be, abagabo babo ndetse n'abuzukuru be, ubu bose barimo kuba mu nkambi zo muri uyu mujyi wa Shire. Ubwo bahungaga bagata ingo zabo bahunganye ibintu bicye bashoboye n'amafaranga macye, ntabwo bari bazi aho bizarangira bageze. Bagendaga n'amaguru iyo byaba bibaye ngombwa, ubundi byashoboka bagakoresha amwe mu makamyo menshi n'imodoka za bisi zuzuye abantu na bo bahuye n'ibyo bibazo. Ati: "Ntabwo twashoboraga kuruhuka". Bari bafite inyota n'inzara. Ati: "Usabiriza agace k'umugati ukagaha umwana. Twatiye ibikombe ngo tubone uko duha abana amazi". Avuga ko mu nzira banyuzemo yabonye imirambo y'abantu iri ku muhanda idashyinguye - ishusho abona izamugora kuyibagirwa. Ati: "Ntabwo twishimye, ariko turacyariho. Iminsi iraza ikagenda [irahita indi igataha]. Turi abanyamahirwe kuba tutarapfuye". Bamwe bavuga ko byabaye ngombwa ko bata ingo zabo ziri ahantu ubu hagenzurwa n'ingabo zo mu karere ka Amhara. Leta y'akarere ka Amhara ivuga ko aho hantu hari harafashwe ku ngufu ubwo TPLF yagera ku butegetsi mu myaka ya 1990. Ibisigisigi by'imirwano biracyagaragara Hari imfashanyo irimo gutangwa mu nkambi. Ariko aba bari mu nkambi bavuga ko idahagije. Ubutegetsi bw'inzibacyuho (cyangwa bw'imfatakibanza mu Kirundi) bwa Tigray - bwashyizweho na leta ya Ethiopia nyuma yuko TPLF ihiritswe ku butegetsi - buvuga ko abantu bagera kuri miliyoni enye bacyeneye imfashanyo muri aka karere - barenze kimwe cya kabiri cy'abaturage ba Tigray. Abaturage barenga miliyoni imwe bataye ingo zabo. Etenesh Nigussie, umuvugizi w'ubwo butegetsi bw'inzibacyuho, avuga ko abaterankunga n'imiryango itanga imfashanyo bakwiye kongera umuhate wabo. Hashize igihe amahanga asaba ko imiryango itanga imfashanyo yakwemererwa kugera muri ako karere yisanzuye. Ahagaze mu muryango w'inyubako yahoze ikorerwamo n'abategetsi ba TPLF i Mekelle, Madamu Etenesh yagize ati: "Ubu [imiryango itanga imfashanyo] yemerewe kuza no gufasha. Iki ni cyo gihe nyacyo". Ati: "Twiteze ko iduha ibicyenewe byose byo gufasha no kurokora abantu bacu - byiyongera ku mfashanyo irimo gutangwa na leta". Dusubiye muri wa mujyi wa Shire, mpuye na Leteberhan Assefa wahageze aturutse mu mujyi wa Humera, umujyi muto uri mu ntera ya 450km uvuye hano, ukaba uri hafi y'umupaka wa Ethiopia, Sudan na Eritrea. Mbere gato yuko imirwano itangira, umukobwa wa Madamu Leteberhan yabyaye abazwe (caesarean section/césarienne), nuko ubwo bahungaga yagombaga kwita kuri uwo mukobwa we wari urimo yoroherwa, akanamutwaza uwo mwana w'uruhinja. Mu nkambi, avuga ko muri rusange yumva afite umutekano, ariko ko atitaweho mu mibereho. Izindi nkuru wasoma kuri Tigray: Nubwo hari iyi mibereho idashinga, abantu babarirwa mu bihumbi bakomeje kugera muri uyu mujyi wa Shire, bakahagera mu modoka za bisi zuzuye birenze urugero, mu makamyo ndetse bari no mu mizigo itwawe n'amafarasi. Impamvu ni uko nubwo mu gihe cy'ibyumweru leta ya Ethiopia yashoboye kwigarurira igice kinini cya Tigray, umutekano uracyari mucye, hakaba havugwa imirwano ya hato na hato mu bice bimwe na bimwe. Muri Tigray haracyakurikizwa amategeko yo mu bihe bidasanzwe, haba umukwabu nijoro, ndetse hari na za bariyeri nyinshi ku bagenzi bagenda muri aka karere. Ariko, uko imirwano yarangira kose, ibikomere bishobora kuzafata igihe cy'imyaka ngo bikire. Kuri bamwe, inkovu zizahoraho iteka.

Ubushakashatsi bushya bwakozwe na Kaminuza ya Ohio State yo muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Amerika, bwasanze mu gihe cy'imyaka irenga gato 20 y'amavuko ari bwo ubwonko bwacu ku nshuro ya mbere buba bwiganjemo ibitekerezo byo guhanga udushya. Ubu bushakashatsi bwagenzuye abantu batsindiye igihembo cyitiriwe Nobel mu ishami ry'ubukungu mu bihe byashize. Bwasanze abakoze akazi kabo k'ingenzi mu gihe bari mu kigero cy'imyaka 20 y'amavuko, barakunze kuvamo "abahanga ibitekerezo" by'udushya. Rero urebye, ni nkaho urumuri rwabamurikiye muri icyo gihe, ubundi bagakurikira inzira ruberetse. Ariko ntuhangayike niba uri hafi kuzuza imyaka 30 y'amavuko ukaba nta gitekerezo cyo guhanga agashya wari wagira. Bamwe muri twe, nkuko ubu bushakashatsi bubivuga, tuzatangira kugira ibitekerezo byo guhanga udushya tugeze mu myaka ya za 50 y'amavuko. 'Natanze umusaruro cyane mu myaka yanjye ya za 20' Nana Jones Darko w'imyaka 24 y'amavuko, afite inzu yo kogosheramo (salon de coiffure) ikorera mu modoka, abakiliya bakogosherwa aho igeze. Nana Jones Darko Avuga ko yamye afite ibitekerezo byo gukora ubucuruzi, ariko ko ageze mu myaka ya za 20 y'amavuko ari bwo yiyumvisemo ibitekerezo byinshi cyane byo guhanga udushya. Yagize ati: "Ndacyakomeje kwihugura ku bijyanye n'ikoranabuhanga". "Ntekereza ko abantu bagufata nk'umuntu ukomeje kurushaho mu byo uvuga iyo nanone ukuzeho gacye - ndetse n'imbogamizi ziragabanuka - rero ibyo bifasha n'ubwonko bwawe gukora neza no gusukiranya ibitekerezo". Ariko kandi Nana avuga ko hari n'igitutu cyinshi kiba gituruka ku babyeyi n'urungano cyo kugira icyo ugeraho mu myaka ya za 20 y'amavuko, cyane cyane iyo udakurikiza uburyo "busanzwe" bwo kubona akazi (ahanini nyuma yo kurangiza amashuri). Yongeraho ko icyo gitutu gituruka no "ku byo ureba kuri televiziyo n'abakinnyi b'umupira w'amaguru bafite imyaka 20 y'amavuko bagahembwa ibihumbi 200 by'amapawundi buri cyumweru". "Ndemeza rwose ko haba hari igitutu cyo kugira icyo ugeraho mu buzima mu myaka ya za 20 y'amavuko". 'Nta rirarenga ngo uhange udushya' Niba utarashoboye kugera neza ku byo washakaga gukora mu ibyiruka ryawe, rero ugomba kwitegura igihe cya kabiri cyo mu buzima aho uba ufite ibitekerezo byinshi byo guhanga udushya - nkuko bikomeza bivugwa n'ubu bushakashatsi - kiza mu myaka ya za 50 y'amavuko. Igihe cyawe cya kabiri cyo guhanga udushya twinshi kizagera uri mu kigero cy'imyaka ya za 50 y'amavuko Porofeseri Weinberg wakoze ubu bushakashatsi agira ati: "Ubu bushakashatsi bugaragaza rwose ko hari abantu bahanga udushya dukomeye bakabikora neza cyane mu myaka yabo y'ubukure". "Kandi niba ibyo bitari kukubaho, ukaba utari mu bari guhanga udushya mu myaka yabo ya za 20 y'amavuko, ntibivuze ko utakora ibintu by'ingenzi cyane nyuma yaho". Nana avuga ko nyina ari umwe muri abo bahanga udushya mu myaka yigiye imbere. Avuga ko uwo mubyeyi we kuri ubu uri mu kigero cy'imyaka 50 y'amavuko, yatangiye ubucuruzi bwe. Ashinga amashuri yigisha ibijyanye n'imideli no kurimba. Porofeseri Weinberg avuga ko urubyiruko rwumva rugifite ibindi byo kugeraho rwakomereza aho.

Lupita Nyong'o ari mu bakinyi rurangiranwa b'isinema, aturuka muri Kenya, akaba umukobwa wa Anyang Nyong'o, bulamatari w'intara ya Kisumu Mu vyo yashikirije ikinyamakuru New York Times, avuga ko ivyahishuwe kuri Bwana Weinstein ku bijanye n'abagore yakoreye ibiterasoni vy'igitsina, vyatumye atoreka gushikiriza ivyamushikiye. "Numva meze nk'uwugwaye mu nda. Numvise mfise ishavu rinini mu gihe ivyambayeko bitashikiye jewe gusa." Inyuma yo guhura n'uwo mugabo mw'isabukuru y'isinema yabera Berlin ari umunyeshuli, yaramutumiye mu rugo iwe i Connecticut ngo barabe isinema hamwe n'abana biwe. Imbere yuko iyo sinema itangura, yagerageje kumunywesha inzoga yo mu bwoko bwa "vodka" ariko aranka. Haheze umwanya muto iyo sinema itanguye, amubwira ko hari ikintu yipfuza kumwereka aca amutwara mu cumba ciwe amubwira ko hari ubutumwa ashaka kumushikiriza. "Ubwa mbere nibaza ko ariko arafyina. Ntiyafyina. Kuva igihe ndamubona ubwa mbere, numva ntatekaniwe. Naragize ubwoba munyuma mbona ko vyiza nomureka: Vyatuma nshobora kwicunga no gukurikira aho ajanye amaboko yiwe ico gihe cose." Munyuma yashatse gukura ikareso, nawe amubwira kw'ivyo vyotuma atiyumva neza, atumbera umuryango, aragenda. Haheze amezi make, yaramutumiye ngo baje kuraba isinema i New York, arondera ngo bajane mu kibanza barya, bakongera bakanyweramwo (restaurant). Harvey yarashitse hanyuma umufasha wiwe aca aranyika...Imbere yuko indya batanga ubwa mbere zishika, yamubwiye ati: "Reka nduge kw'ijambo. Ndafise icumba niharije hejuru aho dushobora kubandanya dufungurira." "Vyarantangaje. Ndamubwira ko nipfuza kurira muri "restaurant". Yambwiye ngo simpendwe. Mu gihe naba nipfuza kuba umukinyi w'isinema, nategerezwa kugira ibintu nka mwenivyo. Yambwiye ko amaze kugendana n'abakinyi bakomeye cane X na Y ati raba aho vyabashikanye." Igihe amwankiye, uwo mugabo yaciye ahindura inyifato, niko avuga. Bahavuye bagenda batariye. Uwo mugabo yagize ati: "Erega hano turahejeje, ushatse wokwigira." Uwo mwigeme Nyong'o yahejeje avuga ati: "Mvuze ivyambayeko ngo mfashe kurangiza ingene niyugaraniye mu gacerere."

Amnistie Internationale ivuga ko ubutegetsi bwa Sudani Yepfo bwanyonze abantu benshi cane mu 2018 Ico kigo kivuga ko nimiburiburi abantu indwi banyonzwe bamanitswe mu kwezi kwa kabiri kwonyene - barimwo abantu batatu bo mu muryango umwe. Benshi mu bamaze kunyongwa bagirizwa ubwicanyi ariko Amnistie ikavuga ko hari imanza z'abantu batatu zaciriwe mu kinyegero, imiryango y'abo imenya ivy'igihano c'urupfu bakatiwe bamaze kunyongwa. Amnistie Internationale ivuga ko ubutegetsi bwa Sudani Yepfo bwanyonze abantu benshi cane mu 2018 kurusha mu yindi myaka, kuva igihugu cikukira mu 2011. Icegera c'umuyobozi wayo mu karere ka Afrika y'ubuseruko, Seif Magango yabwiye BBC ko ni vyabandanya ku rugero bigezeko bishobora gushika ku gitigiri c'abanyongwa kivugwa mu bihugu vy'Ubushinwa na Irani. Yagize ati: "Turiko turavugana na leta ya Sudani Yepfo tuyisaba ngo yubahirize uburenganzira bwo kubaho, ihagarike gukoresha igihano c'urupfu, tukayibutsa ko amakungu ariko aravavanura n'ico gihano ko ikwiye kwisunga aho amateka ageze." "Twasavye Perezida Salva Kiir kudashira umukono ku ngingo z'igihano c'urupfu."

Uwo murwayi wa nyuma wa Ebola i Beni ubwo yakirwaga amaze gusezererwa Nyuma y'umwaka umwe n'igice Ebola yongeye kugaragara muri iki gihugu - ku nshuro ya cumi mu mateka yacyo - ubu hari icyizere ko vuba aha iyo ndwara ishobora gutangazwa ko itakirangwa muri Kongo. Yahitanye abantu barenga 2,200 muri Kongo. Abakora mu bikorwa by'ubuvuzi bagaragaye babyina mu mihanda yo mu mujyi wa Beni ubwo uwo murwayi wa nyuma wa Ebola yasezererwaga. Mu burasirazuba bwa Kongo, ubu hari icyizere ko igihe cy'icika rya Ebola cyegereje. Ariko mbere yuko bitangazwa ku mugaragaro ko nta Ebola ikirangwa muri Kongo, bigomba gusaba ko hashira iminsi 42 ikurikirana nta murwayi mushya wa Ebola ugaragaye - icyo gihe cy'ingenzi kiracyasigaje ukwezi kumwe. Ishami ry'umuryango w'abibumbye ryita ku buzima ryavuze ko abakozi mu by'ubuvuzi bari imbere mu rugamba rwo guhangana na Ebola, ari intwari mu rwego rw'ubuzima. Bamaze igihe bahanganye na Ebola muri ako karere kabarizwamo imitwe itandukanye y'inyeshyamba kandi kiganjemo amakuru ayobya.

Tottenham imaze gutsinda urukino rumwe mu nkino zine za nyuma iherutse gukina Uwo mugwi uri mu kibanza ca kane uri hejuru ya Chelsea amanota abiri, ukaba usigaranye imikino ibiri, Newcastle na Leicester imbere yuko ihiganwa ry'uno mwaka rirangira. Umumenyereza Mauricio Pochettino yavuze ko bategerezwa gukora ukwo bashoboye kwose ngo batsinde izo nkino kugira ngo binjire muri Champions League mu mwaka uza. "Inkino turazifise. Twemera gupfa ariko dutsinde," niko Pochettino avuga. Tottenham iza gukina na Newcastle ku kibuga ca Wembley ku munsi wa gatatu, imbere yo guhura na Leicester ku munsi wa Mungu. Umumenyereza wa Tottenham Mauricio Pochettino, ngo bagiye gukora ukwo bashoboye kugira ngo binjire muri Champions League Pochettino avuga ko Champions League ari "indoto y'uwariwe wese". "Champions League niryo higanwa rya mbere ryiza, co kimwe na Premier League, kw'isi," niko uwo munya Argentine yavuze. Ku rundi ruhande, umumenyereza wa Chelsea Antonio Conte yavuze ku munsi wa kabiri ko ico ashira imbere ari kuronka itike ryo kuja muri Champions League. Bahura na Huddersfield ku munsi wa gatatu munyuma baze baje Newcastle kuwa Mungu, imbere yuko bakina urukino rwa nyuma rwa FA Cup na Manchester United itariki 19 ukwezi kwa Gatanu. Umugwi wa mbere muri Premier League Manchester City hamwe na Manchester United baramaze kwironkera itike ya Champions League, mu gihe umugwi wa gatatu Liverpool urusha inota rimwe gusa Tottenham kandi usigaranye urukino rumwe gusa.

Ingoro ya CNL muri zone Minago mu ntara ya Rumonge yabomowe buca yugururwa ku wa 27 z'ukwezi kw'indwi Umunyamabanga mukuru w'uyo mugambwe yagiriza urwaruka rw'Imbonerakure, abarongoye umugambwe CNDD-FDD uri ku butegetsi, bamwe mu ntwaro na bamwe mu bajejwe umutekano, ko bahohotera abanywanyi bawo mu gihugu. Umuvugizi w'umugambwe CNDD-FDD avuga ko ataco uwo mugambwe ushobora kwishura BBC ku biwuvugwako. Umuvugizi w'ubushikiranganji bw'umutekano we yagiriza abanywanyi ba CNL ko aribo nkwezi y'amarere, ivyo uyo mugambwe wamirira kure. Itangazo ryateweko igikumu n'umunyamabanga mukuru wa CNL, Simon Bizimungu, ejo ku wa gatatu, rivuga ko abanywanyi b'uwo mugambwe babandanya bakorerwa amabi atandukanye. Uvuga ko abanywanyi bawo "bahohoterwa, bagaterwa ubwoba, bafatwa bagapfungwa hadakurikijwe amategeko, bagakubagurwa bakanakorerwa amaremenkanya". Bwana Bizimungu avuga kandi ko, hampande y'ibikorwa vy'uyo mugambwe bihagarikwa ata mvo ihari, ingoro zawo zisamburwa, izindi zigaturirwa, canke zikononwa. Ibi bimaze kwibonekeza mu ntara za Rumonge, Cibotoke, Ngozi, Rutana, Muyinga, Bujumbura n'ahandi. Bavuga ko baharura ingoro 20 zabo zimaze kononwa. Ingoro ya CNL ku mutumba wa Muyira muri komine Kanyosha y'intara ya Bujumbura yaturiwe mw'ijoro ryo ku wa 12 z'ukwa munani Bwana Bizimungu avuga ko ubu hasigaye hibonekeza ibitero bikorerwa abanywanyi ba CNL babasanze mu ngo zabo, mu ngoro z'umugambwe wabo, bavuye canke bagiye mu bikorwa vy'umugambwe. Imbonerakure n'abarongoye CNDD-FDD baragirizwa Mu bagirizwa ayo mabi, harimwo Imbonerakure n'abarongoye umugambwe CNDD-FDD uri ku butegetsi ku rwego rwo hasi. Aba ngo bakora ibitandukanye n'ibishikirizwa n'abarongoye CNDD-FDD ku rwego rw'igihugu. Ati: "Umugambwe CNL urashima amajambo meza ashikirizwa na bamwe bamwe mu barongoye umugambwe uri ku butegetsi ku rwego rwo hejuru, ariko ugatangazwa n'ingene ayo majambo ahushanye n'ibibera ku rubuga". Umuvugizi w'ubushikiranganji bw'umutekano, Petero Nkurikiye, yaragirije abanywanyi b'umugambwe CNL ko muri rusangi ari bo "bakora amakosa, bagahindukira bakavuga ko ari bo bahohoterwa". Mu kiganiro yahaye abamenyeshamakuru ku munsi wa kabiri, Bwana Nkurikiye yagiriza abanywanyi ba CNL ko bakora "utunama tutajanye n'amategeko mu kinyegero, mu bubare canke mw'ijoro". Umukuru wa CNL Agathon Rwasa yifatanije n'abanywanyi biwe ejo ku wa gatatu mu gufuba uwabo yishwe mu gitero cabaye ku wa Mungu i Muyinga ku banywanyi ba CNL Bwana Bizimungu ariyamiriza ivyashikirijwe na Nkurikiye. Ati: "Umugambwe CNL uriyamirije wivuye inyuma imvugo ihengamye y'umuvugizi w'ubushikiranganji bujejwe umutekano biboneka ko ifise intumbero yo guhanagura icaha no guha impigi abakorera ayo marorerwa abanywanyi ba CNL". Asaba umugambwe uri ku butegetsi gukurikirana abanywanyi bawo cane cane urwaruka rwawo rw'imbonerakure, bakabigisha kwihanganiranira no kwiga kubana neza n'abanywanyi b'iyindi migambwe. Umugambwe CNDD-FDD nturagira ico uvuze kuri ivyo vyagirizwa urwaruka rwawo rw'Imbonerakure n'abarongoye uyo mugambwe ku rwego rwo hasi.

Abakoze itohoza basanze ukuboko n'impeta y'abubatse vy'uwo mugabo biri mu nda y'ifi y'ubwo tiger shark Uwo mugabo yaherutse kuboneka ari mu mukino wo kwibira kw'izinga rya Reunion rigenzurwa n'Ubufaransa, hafi ya Madagascar mu mpera z'indwi iheze. Bivugwa ko yari mu karuhuko k'indwi imwe i Saint-Gilles ari kumwe n'umugore wiwe. Ikiganza ciwe, camenywe n'umugore wiwe, bagisanze munda ya tiger shark yafashwe mu ntumbero y'ubushakashatsi. Erick Quelquejeu aba hafi y'aho vyabereye yabariye BBC Scotland ko uwo mugabo yasize umugore wiwe akanya gatoyi gusa agiye kwoga. Bwana Quelquejeu yabariye BBC Scotland ko ku mucanga hasanzwe hari ivyapa bigabisha abantu ngo ntiboge Bwana Quelquejeu yagize ati: "Ni agace ko munsi y'amazi gafise agahora gato kajana kure munsi y'ibahari, ariko mu bisanzwe ni ahantu hakingiwe neza." Yongeyeko ati: "Umugore wiwe yari yagize ubwoba cane kubera ivyabaye. Kajugujugu nyinshi, indege nyinshi, aboga hamwe n'amato vyaragerageje kurondera uwo mugabo mw'ibahari ariko bamaze iminsi bataramutora. "Bivugwa ko haciye iminsi mike babonye ifi ya shark ifise ukuboko kwiwe mu nda, ariko ntituzi neza na neza ingene vyagenze." Bwana Quelquejeu yavuze ko inkengero z'ibahari zo mu burengero bw'izinga ziriho ivyapa bigaragara neza, bigabisha abantu kutoga kuko shark zari zimaze kurya abantu. Hari kandi n'ivyapa nk'ivyo ku bibuga vy'indege. Iri zinga ryarafashe ingingo zo gukingira abantu ngo ntibaribwe na shark Yogenyeko ati "Shark zirarya abantu cane kw'izinga rya Reunion kandi turamenyereye ingene tuvyitwaramwo. "Ni ikintu tutanyegeza umuntu n'umwe. Ahantu hose kuri iri zinga udashobora kwoga, hari ivyapa ku mucanga bigabisha abantu. "Vyongeye hari n'amato mato mato agira amarondo mu gice c'uburengero bw'izinga - kuko niho ibibanza vy'umucanga vyose biri - akingira abantu, kurereka ngo ntihagira uwukora iryo kosa." Iyo fi yari muri nyinshi zafashwe ku wa mbere no ku wa kabiri mw'ibahari Indiana, zifatwa nikigo Centre de Securite Requin (CSR). Bayisanze ku birometero 7 uvuye mu kibanza uwo mugabo yabonywemwo ubwanyuma. Iyo fi yasuzumwe ku wa gatatu mu gitondo. Ntibiramenyekana niba uwo mugabo yarasomye nturi akaza kuribwa na shark, canke niba yaramuteye. Umuvugizi w'ubushinkiranganji bw'imigenderanire n'amakungu yagize ati: "Turiko turafasha umuryango w'umugabo w'Umwongereza yapfuye yari mu mukino wo kwibira i La Reunion kandi turiko turavugana n'abajejwe intwaro baho." I Reunion, izinga riri mw'ibahari Indiana, uno mwaka abantu babiri baramaze gusigayo ubuzima mu bitero vya shark.

Ikarata yerekana akarere ka Lamu Abanyagihugu b'akarere ubwo bwicanyi bwabereyemwo baciye biha amabarabara kubwiyamiriza, igipolisi kikavuga ko bwoba bwaturutse ku bibazo vy'amatongo. Abantu bafise ibigwanisho ngo boba bagavye ibitero ku mazu mw'ijoro, babanza guhamagara abantu mu mazina, imbere yuko babica. Umukuru w'intara ya Lamu, Gilbert Kitiyo, avuga ko aborozi boba aribo bakoze ubwo bwicanyi. Yiyamirije abavuga ko al-Shabab ariyo yoba yakoze ubwo bwicanyi, asigura ko bwaturutse ku mvo z'amatongo, bitewe nuko abateye bari bazi amazina yabo bari baje kwica. Mu myiyerekano barimwo, abanyagihugu bidogeye abajejwe umutekano bavuga ko bananiwe kubakingira. Ico gitero kibaye haheze iminsi mike abandi bantu batatu bishwe n'abantu bavugwa ko boba ari abagwanyi ba al-Shabab, bateye imodoka barimwo ahitwa Nyongoro muri iyo ntara ya Lamu nyene. Ikinyamakuru Standard kivuga kw'ibitero vyagwiriye muri izo ndwi zirangiye. Ivyo vyatumye abanyagihugu baba mu mashamba n'abayegereye bimuka. Umukuru w'igipolisi mu karere ka Mombasa kahegereye Nelson Marwa, amaze iminsi amenyesheje ko hari ibikogwa bibandanya vyo kurekurira ibibombe mw'ishamba rya Boni, rivugwa ko ryigaruriwe n'abagwanyi ba al-Shabab.

Nk'uko itangazo risohowe na leta ribimenyesha, urwo rupfu rwabaye kuwa mbere itariki 08 z'ukwa gatandatu inyuma y'umutaga. Iryo tangazo rivuga ko yahitanywe n'indwara yatumye umutima uhagarara. Leta ivuga ko ku munsi wa gatandatu igenekerezo rya 06 z'uku, Perezida Nkurunziza yiriwe ameze neza, mbere akaba yaragiye kurorera urukino rwa volleyball i Ngozi. Riti : "Niho rero mw'ijoro ryo kuri uwo wa 06/06/2020 rishira uwa Mungu yumva atameze neza aca anyarukira ku bitaro vyo mu Karusi kwivuza". "Ku wa Mungu yiriwe ameze neza mbere aranaganira n'abantu". Iryo tangazo rivuga ko ibintu vyagiye guhinduka mu masaha y'igitondo c'ejo kuwa mbere aho umutima wahagaze. Rivuga ko abaganga bagerageje kumuhembura ariko bikaba ivy'ubusa. Leta y'u Burundi yatangaje ikigandaro c'iminsi ndwi. Urwo rupfu ruje inyuma y'iminsi itari mike hari amakuru yakwiriye ku mbuga ntangamakuru ko hari bamwe mu bategetsi muri leta y'u Burundi boba baranduye coronavirus. Mu bavugwamwo harimwo n'umuryango w'umukuru w'igihugu, ariko ayo makuru yose akaba yarahakanywe. Umutambukanyi w'umukuru w'igihugu, Denise Nkurunziza igenekerezo 28 z'ukwezi gushize kwa gatanu yatwawe i Nairobi muri Kenya kuvurwa indwara itaramenyekana gushika ubu. Mu mpera z'indwi iheze, humvikanye ubutumwa (audio) bivugwa ko ari ubwa Madamu Nkurunziza yarungikiye abasengera mu rusengero rumwe na we, abamenyesha ko amaze gutora mitende kubera ko bamusengeye. Pierre Nkurunziza na Denise Nkurunziza bafite abana batanu Muri ubwo butumwa ntavuga aho arwariye. Kw'igenekerezo rya 20/08/2020, Bwana Nkurunziza yagomba guhererekanya ubutegetsi na Evaritse Ndayishimiye aheruka gutsinda amatora y'umukuru w'igihugu yabaye mu kwezi guheze. Nkurunziza ni muntu ki? Pierre Nkurunziza ubu w'imyaka 55, se wiwe yarabaye umushingamateka mu nama nshingamateka y'u Burundi yicwa mu bwicanyi bwo mu 1972, nawe arokoka ubwicanyi bwo mu 1993, ico gihe akaba yari umwigisha kuri kaminuza y'u Burundi, maze aca yinjira mu nyeshamba zitwa FDD zegukira umuhari CNDD. Mu 2003 izi nyeshamba zateye igikumu na Leta ku masezerano y'amahoro ya Arusha yumvikanyeweko mu 2000 zinjizwa muri leta, Pierre Nkurunziza yari umuyobozi wazo agirwa umushikiranganji w'intwaro ibereye. Igenekerezo rya 19 z'ukwezi kwa munani 2005 yatowe ku rugero runini n'abari bagize inama nshingamateka, aca arahira ku wa 26 z'uko kwezi nyene, aba umukuru w'igihugu agira umunani w'u Burundi. Bwana Nkurunziza yari yubakanye na Denise Bucumi Nkurunziza bakaba bari bafise abana batanu. None hagiye gukurikira iki? Hari amakuru ariko aravugwa ko Pascal Nyabenda arongoye Inama nshingamateka yoba ariko yitegura kurahizwa kugira ngo amusubirire mu kurindikra kouwatowe ashikirizwa amabanga. Nk'uko ibwirizwashingiro rushasha ryo ku wa 17 z'ukwa gatanu 2018 ribitegekanya mu ngingo yayo ya 121: "Mu gihe Umukuru w'igihugu atanze imihoho, asandavye canke hari iyindi mvo iyo ari yo yose imubuza kuba akirangura amabanga ajejwe, mu kurindiria uwundi mushasha, asubirirwa n'Umukuru w'Inama Nshingamateka".

Hagati ya Cristiano Ronaldo, Luka Modric na Mohamed Salah, ni nde mukinyi mwiza wa Fifa uyu mwaka? Umukinyi w'imbere wa Barcelone umunya Argentine Lionel Messi, amaze gutwara Ballon d'Or incuro zitanu ntari kuri urwo rutonde rw'abakinyi batatu beza kw'isi. Kandi nta mukinyi n'umwe w'umugwi w'Ubufaransa watwaye igikombe c'isi ari kuri urwo rutonde. Umukinyi w'imbere wa Portugal yatwaye ako gashimwe mu 2016 na 2017, yatwaye ibikombe kigira gatanu c'imigwi yabaye iya mbere iwabo ku mugabane wa Buraya ari muri Real Madrid mu kwezi kwa gatanu, imbere y'uko aja mu mugwi wa Juventus aguzwe imiliyoni 99.2 z'amapawundi. Umukinyi wo hagati wa Real Madrid Lukas Modric ni we yabaye umukinyi mwiza mu gikombe c'isi ca 2018 aho Croatia yahura n'Ubufaransa. Umunye Misri na we Mo Salah yatsinze ibitego 44, atuma n'umugwi wiwe wa Liverpool ushika mu rukino rwa nyuma rw'imigwi yabaye iya mbere iwabo ku mugabane wa Buraya aho batsinzwe na Real Madrid. Modric yatsinze Ronaldo na Salah mu kuronka agashimwe k'umukinyi mwiza wa UEFA mu bagabo mu ndwi iheze. Umukinyi w'imbere w'Ubwongereza Harry Kane yatsindiye ikirato c'inzahabu mu gikombe c'isi yari ku rutonde rw'abakinyi cumi beza. Didier Descahamps amenyereza umugwi nserukiragihugu w'Ubufaransa ari ku rutonde rw'abahiganirwa agashimwe k'umumenyereza mwiza muri uyu mwaka, aho ahanganye n'umunye Croatia Zlatko Dalic hamwe n'uwahoze amenyereza Real Madrid Zinedine Zidane. Umugwi w'abahinga ni wo washize ahabona urutonde rw'abakinyi cumi beza mu gihe ba kizigenza b'imigwi, abamenyeshamakuru hamwe n'abakunzi b'imigwi ari bo batora uwatawukanye intsinzi baravye ibice 25 vy'abatoye. Abazoba batsinze bazotangazwa itariki 24 z'ukwezi kw'icenda i Royal Festivan mu gisagara ca Londres.

Yapfuye ku wa gatatu azize coronavirus akikijwe n'umuryango wiwe ku muhana iwe, hagati mu Bufaransa. Uwo munyepolitike yari ashigikiye ko Uburaya buja hamwe, Giscard d'Estaing yaroroheje amategeko agenga ukwahukana, gukorora imbanyi no gufata imiti yo kwikingira imbanyi mu myaka indwi yamaze ku butegetsi. Prezida Emmanuel Macron yavuze ko ubutegetsi bw'uwo muhisi bwahinduye Ubufaransa kandi ko aho yaganisha igihugu ari yo nzira kigikurikiza. Mw'itangazo yavuze ati: "Yarakoreye igihugu, umutegetsi w'iterambere n'umwidegemvyo, urupfu rwiwe rushize igihugu mu kigandaro." Incuti muri politike mu 1969, Giscard D'Estaing (i bubamfu) na Jacques Chirac barahanganye mu matora y'umukuru w'igihugu Umuryango w'uwo yahoze ari prezida wavuze ko amaziko yiwe azobera "mw'ibanga rikomeye". Mu ntango z'uyu mwaka, yaragirijwe gukuyakuya umumenyeshamakuru w'Umudagi bariko baragirana ikiganiro mu 2018 - akaba yarabihakanye. Igihe kinini muri politike Mu minsi yiwe ya nyuma, Giscard d'Estaing yakunze kwiyita umuhumure muri politike y'Ubufaransa. Nk'umwe mu baprezida bakiri bato b'Ubufaransa, yagize umwanya muremure muri politike inyuma yo kuva ku butegetsi gusumba uwo yamaze ariko ararondera kuba umukuru w'igihugu. Yabonwa nk'umuntu afise amanyama kandi yikumira; yakunzwe igihe gito ku butegetsi bwiwe, akaba yakuwe ku butegetsi n'inguvu z'abatavuga rumwe na reta yiwe b'impande zose. Giscard D'Estaing yaranebaguwe cane kubera gushigikira Jean-Bédel Bokassa yatwaza igikenye Yisanze ari mu bibazo bijanye no gushigikira umutegetsi wo muri Afrika atwaza igikenye kandi yagirizwa igiturire - Jean-Bédel Bokassa yari arongoye Centrafrique. Valéry Marie René Georges Giscard d'Estaing yari yavutse itariki 2 z'ukwezi kwa kabiri mu 1926 i Koblenz, mu gice c'Ubufaransa cari carigaruriwe n'Ubudagi.

Perezida Trump ararwanya amatora hakoreshejwe uburyo bwa posita Ibi abivuze mu gihe ishirahamwe rijejwe amaposita muri Amerika (USPS) rigabisha ko amakarata y'itora ashobora kudashika ku gihe mu matora yimirije mu kwa cumi na rimwe uno mwaka. Igitigiri c'abashaka gutora kitari bwigere kiboneka biteze gutora bakoresheje ubwo buryo bwa posita bivuye ku kiza karanda ca coronavirus. Umuyobozi w' ishirahamwe rijejwe amaposita asanzwe ari soma mbike na Perezida Donald Trump aranegurwa ko yikwega mu gukora. Abo mu mugambwe w'aba Démocrates, harimwo mbere n'uwahoze arongoye ico gihugu, Barack Obama, bagiriza Perezida Trump ko arwanya uburyo bwa posita mu ntumbero yo "gutesha agaciro amatora". Perezida Trumpyamye asemerera ko ugutora hakoreshejwe uburyo bwa posita bishobora gutuma amatora abamwo ubusuma ku nyungu za Joe Biden w'umu Démocrate basanzwe bahiganwa. Hagati aho, abahinga bavuga ko ubwo buryo bwo gutora hakoreshejwe posita, na Trump we ubwiwe asanzwe akoresha, ata tunenge bufise. Nancy Pelosi umukuru w'inama nshingamateka ariko araba ingene yohamagaza inama hakiri kare kugira ngo bihweze impinduka zakozwe mu gisata c'amaposita n'ingaruka zishobora kugira ku matora ategekanijwe ku wa 03 z'ukwa cumi na rimwe, nk'uko bivugwa n'itororokanirizo ry'amakuru Reuters. Hari intara nkeya zimaze kumenyesha gushika ubu ko zizotora zikoresheje uburyo bwa posita, ibi bikavuga ko abatora bazorungikirwa ikarata y'itora imbere y'uko amatora aba - kandi zimwe muri izo ntara zabiteguye imbere y'iki kiza. None Trump avuga iki neza na neza? Mu kiganiro yaraye agiranye n'abamenyeshamakuru ku mugoroba w'ejo ku wa gatandatu, Perezida Trump avuga ko ata ngorane afise ku bijanye no gutora umuntu atarinze kwishikira ku biryo vy'itora, kuko nawe niko abigenza. Ariko yongeyeko ati: "Amatora aciye mu buryo bwa posita azodukoza ibara, azotuma igihugu ciha amenyo y'abatwenzi kw'isi". Abandanya ati: "Ingorane ya mbere ni uko utazigera umenya igihe amatora azorangirira". Abandanya avuga ko bishobora gufata amezi canke imyaka kugira ngo ibizova mu matora yo mu kwa cumi na rimwe bimenyekane kuko kubw'iwe, "amakarata y'itora azotakara, kandi ayo azoba agiye". Yabwiye ikinyamakuru Fox News ko yahagaritse amahera agenewe igisata c'amaposita gisanzwe kiri mu ngorane z'uburyo, kubera adashigikiye aya matora hakoreshejwe uburyo bwa posita. Yagiriza abo mu mugambwe w'aba Démocrates basanzwe ari abakeba ko ari bo ntandaro yo kudashika ku masezerano mu ntumbero yo guha amahera igisata ca posita. Ati: "Ubu rero bakeneye ayo mahera ngo posita ishobore gukora kugira ngo ishobore gushikana aya mamiliyoni n'amamiliyoni y'amakarata y'itora". "Ubu rero, nimba badashatse ko tugira amasezerano, aya mahera ntayo bariko bararonka, vyumvikana ko ata vyo amatora hakoreshejwe uburyo bwa posita bazigera babona". Abo mu mugambwe w'aba Démocrates baranegura bikomeye Perezida Trump kuri iki kibazo ca posita, bakabona ko ari uburyo bwo kurondera kwiba amatora. Muri bo harimwo Nancy Pelosi na Chuck Schumer arongoye umurwi w'inkehwa z'aba Démocrates mu nama nkenguzamateka, bompi bagiriza Trump ko ariko ategura "amayeri yo gutoba amatora". Mu minsi iheze, Perezida Trump yasavye ko amatora yokwunguruzwa gushika coronavirus itujijwe kugira abantu bashobore gutora ata ngorane, ivyamiriwe kure.

Nyamutarutwa (ibumoso) wari ufite abana batandatu na Nyamwiza wari ufite abana babiri anatwite uwa gatatu, bishwe babanje gukorerwa iyicarubozo Buri mwaka tariki 29/05 ku isi hazirikanwa umunsi mpuzamahanga w'ibikorwa by'ingabo z'umuryango w'abibumbye mu kugarura amahoro ku isi. Mu burasirazuba bwa Congo niho hantu ku isi hari ingabo nyinshi za ONU/UN ziri mu butumwa bwo kugarura amahoro, umuvugizi wazo yabwiye BBC ko bari gukora ibishobora ngo bagarure amahoro muri aka gace. Perezida Felix Tshisekedi amaze kugera ku butegetsi yasezeranyije ko azakora ibishoboka byose akarwanya iyi mitwe ibuza amahoro uburasirazuba bwa Congo n'akarere. Mu kwezi kwa 10 umwaka ushize leta ya Congo yatangije ibitero by'ingabo bigamije kurandura imitwe yitwaje intwaro mu burasirazuba bwa DR Congo. Ubwicanyi bubanjirijwe n'iyicarubozo buheruka gukorerwa abagore b'impunzi z'ubu bushyamirane ahitwa Kivumu muri Minembwe, n'imirwano ihavugwayo muri iyi minsi byerekana ko intego y'ingabo za leta n'iza MONUSCO itaragerwaho. ICYITONDERWA: Amakuru amwe muri iyi nkuru ashobora kutagwa neza buri musomyi Imirwano iri muri aka gace ishingiye kuki? Kuva mu 1960 aka gace kakomeje kubamo intambara za hato na hato zishingiye ku butegetsi n'izindi nyungu, ariko zikitirirwa amoko atandukanye ahatuye. Ababembe, Abafulero, Abanyamulenge n'Abanyindu ni amwe mu moko yiganje muri aka gace k'amajyepfo y'intara ya Kivu y'Epfo. Abanyamulenge bavuga ko bamwe muri aya moko yandi batifuza ko baturana hano, ko bashaka kubarimbura cyangwa bagasubira mu Rwanda aho bamwe mu bo muri ayo moko yandi bavuga ko Abanyamulenge ariho iwabo. Inyandiko zimwe z'amateka zivuga ko ubwoko bw'Abanyamulenge bwavuye mu gice cyari ubwami bw'u Rwanda mu myaka ibarirwa mu binyejana ishize. Muri iki gihe buri bwoko muri aya atuye aka gace usanga bufite umutwe witwaje intwaro, imwe muri iyi mitwe ikorana kandi n'inyeshyamba z'Abanyarwanda cyangwa iz'Abarundi nazo ziri muri ako gace. Hari urusobe rw'ubushyamirane bushingiye ku nyungu bwite, amoko, ubutegetsi n'intege nke za leta itabasha kuvana intwaro mu baturage. Imirwano imaze igihe, iri hagati y'imitwe ya Mai-Mai ifite amoko ishamikiyeho cyangwa se hagati y'iyo mitwe n'umutwe w'Abanyamulenge uvuga ko ugamije kurengera abo muri ubu bwoko. Mu mpunzi zahunze iyo mirwano nyinshi ni iz'Abanyamulenge, gusa zirimo n'izo muri ayo moko yandi zahungiye ahatandukanye nk'uko abategetsi muri aka gace babibwiye BBC mu kwezi kwa 09/2019. Iyicwarubozo rya Nyamwiza na Nyamutarutwa BBC yabonye amashusho y'imirambo ya Nyamwiza Francine na Nyamutarutwa Nyamugisha bishwe by'agashinyaguro n'aba Mai Mai nk'uko Anna Nyiransasirwa warokotse ubwo bwicanyi abivuga. Aba bagore ni abo mu bwoko bw'Abanyamulenge bavuye mu byabo bahunga ibitero by'aba Mai Mai mu mwaka ushize, impunzi zose hamwe zirenga 46,000 nk'uko Gad Mukiza bourgmestre wa komine Minembwe yabibwiye BBC. Aba Banyamulenge bavuye mu bice bitandukanye by'aka karere ka Haut plateau, Uvira na Minembwe nka Mibunda, Kamombo, Rugezi, Kivumu, Rutigita n'ahandi hashenywe n'izo ntambara bahungira aho MONUSCO n'ingabo za leta zigomba kubarinda. Tariki 18/04/2020 Anna Nyiransasirwa w'imyaka 60 n'abandi bantu umunani b'impunzi bavuye aho bahungiye hitwa i Muzinda basubira ahitwa i Kivumu - hose ni muri Minembwe - bajya gushaka ibyo kurya mu mirima yabo aho bahunze. Aho bajyaga ni mu rugendo rurenze 15Km uvuye aho bahungiye. Ababana na Nyiransasirwa bavuga ko nyuma yagize ihungabana kubera kubona abo bari kumwe bicwa urubuzo. Inkambi y'impunzi ya Mikenke i Minembwe yagabweho igitero ejo kuwa kane irindwa n'ingabo za MONUSCO Mu kiganiro na BBC Gahuzamiryango ku byabaye Anne Nyiransabirwa yagize ati: "Wari umunsi wa mbere tugeze mu mirima yacu kuko twari tubonye bigoye maze tujya gushakira abana ibyo kurya. "Twari duherekejwe n'abasirikare ba leta batwemereye kuturinda. "Tumaze kwikorera tugeze ahantu ku musozi [aba Mai Mai] bararasa, abasirikare twari kumwe baraduhemukira baragenda ntibadutabara. "Twe twihishe ahantu hakundutse cyane mu isimu ndende, ariko abo basirikare baragaruka berekana aho turi. "Abo ni ba Mai Mai bakorana n'abo basirikare kuko barahamagaranye bababwira ko twihishe aho hantu. "Baraje aho twari turi, twari batatu, bararasa amasasu akomeretsa abana banjye [abagore babiri bari kumwe] ariko njyewe amasasu ntabwo yamfashe". Nyamwiza na Nyamugisha ni abakazana ba Nyiransasirwa. Avuga ko aba ba Mai Mai bamaze kurasa baje kuri aba bagore babiri bakomeretse bakabica nabi cyane babajombaguye ibyuma mu bice bitandukanye by'umubiri, ariko we ntibamukoraho. Ati: "Njye bampambiriye amaboko bayashyira inyuma, banjyana aho baba. Aho hantu nahagize iminsi ibiri n'amajoro abiri, nta bwoba nari ngifite nabonaga ndi mu rupfu. "Bampambiriye uwo munsi wose kugeza bangejeje iwabo ni ahantu hitwa i Musika hatuye abo ba Mai Mai n'imiryango yabo. Nahagize amajoro abiri n'amanywa abiri ntarya ntanywa".
