Abari mu kigandaro ku musi wa mbere wo gutegura amaziko y'umwami Kare mu gitondo ku wa kane, ikiziga c'uwo mwami urajanwa mu kibanza kidasanzwe aho kiza guturirwa kivuye ku kirimba hanyuma gice giturirwa. Abo mu muryango w'ubwami bwa Thailane hamwe n'abanyacubahiro bavuye mu bihugu 40 baraja muri ayo maziko yo guturira ikiziga c'uwo yahoze ari umwami Bhumibol Adulyadej, no mu gihe hitezwe isinzi ry'abantu mu micungararo y'ahaza kubera ico gikorwa. Ibisigarira vy'umwami bica vyegeranywa hanyuma bijanwe ku kirimba c'umwami ku musi wa gatanu. Ivyo birori bizoca bibandanya iyindi misi ibiri.

Abari mu myiyerekano muri Sudani banse kuva kw'izima Icegera c'umunyamabanga mu bushikiranganji bw'amagara y'abantu, Suleiman Abdel Jabbar, yabwiye itororokanirizo ry'amakuru Reuters ko muri abo, 52 bapfiriye ku mugwa mukuru Khartoum. Avuga ko 49 muri bo bari abasivire, batatu nabo bakaba ari abajejwe umutekano bishwe bacumiswe imbugita. Ishirahamwe ry'abaganga ryegamiye abatavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi ryamenyesheje ejo ku wa gatatu ko abantu bashika 100 ari bo bamaze kwicwa ku mugwa mukuru Khartoum, mu gihe c'imyiyerekano y'ukwiyamiriza ubutegetsi. Komite nyobozi y'iryo shirahamwe ry'abaganga yamenyesheje ko ibiziga 40 vyatowe mu ruzi Nil i Khartoum ku wa kabiri. Umwe mu barongoye iryo shirahamwe yabwiye BBC ko biboneye kandi bakigaragurira ibiziga mu mavuriro, akavuga ko igitigiri c'abahasize ubuzima ubu gishika abantu 100. Avuga ati: "Bwari ubwicanyi bw'agahomerabunwa". Uwahoze mu ngabo zicungera umutekano yabwiye umumenyeshamakuru Yousra Elbagir wa televiziyo Channel 4 yo mu Bwongereza ko bamwe mu batawe mu ruzi Nil bari bakubiswe canke barashwe, abandi nabo batemaguwe n'imipanga. Igice kinini c'umugwa mukuru Khartoum carugarijwe n'abajejwe umutekano inyuma y'ubwo bwicanyi. Ababibonye babwiye BBC ko abari mu myiyerekano bahungiye mu ma karitiye, aho bariko bazibira amabarabara baturira n'amapine. Umwe mu baba aho i Khartoum atashatse ko izina ryiwe rimenyekana avuga ati: "Dushitse aho tudashobora no kuva mu nzu kubera dutinya gukubitwa canke tukaraswa n'abajejwe umutekano". Abanyagihugu bo ku mugwa mukuru babwiye BBC ko batekewe n'ubwoba. Abari mu myiyerekano bahungiye mu makaritiye, igice kinini cya Khartoum kiragaragara Umukenyezi azwi kw'izina rya Sulaima yabwiye BBC ati: " Bazingurije amakaritiye, batera ubwoba abanyagihugu, kandi barasa. Nta mutekano twumva dufise kandi ntitwizeye inzego ziwujejwe. Ni urudubi". Ejo ku wa gatatu, icegera c'umukuru w'inama ya gisirikare irongoye igihugu, Mohammed Hamadan - azwi kw'izina rya Hemedti - yavuze ko vyabaye ngombwa ko bakoresha inguvu. Avuga ko abari mu myiyerekano binjiranywe n'inkozi z'ikibi n'abandi bagurisha ibiyayuramutwe. Avuga ati: "Ntidushobora kwihanganira imigumuko. Nta kundi. Dutegerezwa kwubahiriza amategeko mu gihugu". Inama ya gisirikare "yiteguye gusubira kuganira ata nzitizi" Umwe mu bavuzi yavuganye na BBC ari i Khartoum, avuga ko abagize umurwi witwara gisirikare wegamiye inzego z'umutekano bategetse ko amavuriro yugarwa kugira ngo ntihagire abasivire baja kwivurizayo. Yavuze ati: "Batwirukanye mu bitaro aho twariko turavura abakomeretse. Ni itegeko ryatanzwe n'inama ya gisirikare ko amavuriro yugarwa kubera yariko afasha abanyagihugu". Abari mu myiyerekano bamaze igihe bugarije ibiro bikuru vya gisirikare mu gihe hari hamaze iminsi hari ibiganiro hagati y'inama ya gisirikare n'abarongoye iyo myiyerekano. Impande zompi zari zimaze kwumvikana ku ntwaro mfatakibanza yomara imyaka itatu, ariko ku munsi wa mbere, Abdel Fattah al-Burhan akuriye iyo nama yarahagaritse ayo masezerano bari bamaze gushikako. Ariko ku munsi wa gatatu, Jenerali Burhan yatangaje ko inama ya gisirikare yari "yiteguye gusubira kuganira ata nzitizi ishizeho". Ako kamo kariyamirijwe n'abatavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi, bavuga ko badashobora kwicarana n'abo bita abicanyi. Amjad Farid umuvugizi w''ishirahamwe ry'abakozi avuga ati: "Abanyagihugu ba Sudani ntibashobora kuganira n'iyo nama ya gisirikare yica abanyagihugu". Dukeneye ko abagirizwa ubwicanyi bamenyekana bagashirwa imbere y'ubucamanza imbere y'ibiganiro ivyo ari vyo vyose vya politike". Gushika ubu, igihugu ca Sudani kirongowe n'inama ya gisirikare kuva uwahoze akirongoye, Omar al-Bashir, akuwe ku butegetsi n'igisirikare yari amazeko imyaka 30, inyuma y'imyiyerekano yari imaze igihe imwiyamiriza.

Gasol w'imyaka 40, yatwaye ibikombe bibiri bya NBA ari kumwe na LA Lakers, anitabira NBA All-Star gatandatu, aha i Barcelona ni na ho yavukiye. Aheruka kugaragara mu mukino wa NBA tariki 10-03-2019 ari mu ikipe ya Milwaukee Bucks. Mu itangazo yasohoye yagize ati: "Nishimiye gusubira mu ikipe nahereyemo". Mu mwaka w'imikino wa 1998-99 nibwo yatangiye gukina muri Barcelona, mu 2002 yabaye nimero ya gatatu mu batoranyijwe kwinjira muri NBA, ageze muri Memphis yahise aba umukinnyi mushya witwaye neza mu 2002. Mu myaka ibiri ishize yabangamiwe n'imvune ku kirenge, mu itangazo rye ryo ku wa kabiri yavuze ko yumva ubu ameze neza yiteguye gukina nanone. Uyu mukinnyi w'uburebure bwa 2.15m ku mukino atsinda ikigereranyo cy'amanota 17 no gufata imipira (rebounds) 9.2 mu mikino 1,226 ya shampiyona yakinnye mu makipe atanu ya NBA arimo na Chicago na San Antonio. Murumuna we Marc Gasol na we wavukiye agatangira gukina muri Barcelona ya Basketball akimukira i Memphis n'ababyeyi be ubwo mukuru we yari agiye gukinirayo ndetse na we nyuma agakina muri iyo kipe, ubu we ageze mu ikipe ya Los Angeles Lakers. Ikipe ya FC Barcelona y'umupira w'amaguru nayo, yahise igaragaza ibyishimo byo kuba Pau Gasol yaje mu ikipe yabo ya Basketball.

Ikamyo itwara lisansi yahiye Abategetsi baravuga ko iyo kamyo ikigwa itahise iturika, akaba ariyo mpamvu abantu bari baje ari benshi kwivomera lisansi yari itwaye. Nyuma rero yaje guturika maze itwika benshi muri abo bantu. Impanuka nk'iyi zikunze kuba mu karere gakennye ka Delta ahari imihanda idakoze neza. Abaturage baho ntibiborohera kwifata iyo barimo kubona hari ahantu lisansi irimo kumeneka.

Isinzi ry'abantu mu gisagara ca New York bateruye umugore mu kirere bigina ugutsindwa kw'Ubuyapani Inyuma y'aho Ubuyapani bitangarije ko bihagaritse intambara ku wa 15/08/1945, ibihugu vy.Ubwongereza, Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika na Australia vyaciye bitangaza akaruhuko k'iminsi ibiri ko kwigina iyo ntsinzi. Amamiliyoni n'amamiliyoni y'abantu mu gihugu vyari vyagiye hamwe kugira birwanye Abanazi n'incuti zabo baciye biha amabarabara mu minsi mikuru yo kwigina iyo ntsinzi. Abana bo mu karere ka Oak Ridge,mu ntara ya Tennessee muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika bigina bafise ibinyamakuru bitangaza ko intambara yari irangiye Ubudagi bwobwo bwari bwamaze kwemera ko bwatsinzwe mu kwa gatanu igenekerezo rya 08 1945, ariko Ubuyapani bwabandanije intambara mu karere ka Aziya n'amazinga yo mw'ibahari Pasifike Umunezero wari mwinshi mu karere ka Piccadilly Circus i Londres Abasirikare baharurwa mu 71,000 b'Ubwongereza n'incuti zabwo zo mu muryango wa Commonwealth nibo bapfiriye mu ntambara n'Ubuyapani nayo abandi 12.000 bari bagizwe imbohe bapfira mu maboko y'Abayapani. Ubuyapani bwarafashe nabi cane imbohe zo mu ntambara, zarimwo abasirikare b'Abongereza n'Abanyamerika bari bafashwe mpiri. Mu gisagara ca New York haboneka igishusho cerekana ukwibohora abigina intsinzi bagihagatiye Intambara irangiye i Bulaya, ingabo zari zishize hamwe kugira zirwanye Abanazi n'abo bari bafatanije bategetse Ubuyapani gushira amaboko hejuru ku wa 28/07/1945, ariko bwica amatwi. Ubuyapani bwagiye kwemera ko habavye Amerika imaze gutera vya bibombe ruhonyanganda vy'ubumara ku bisagara bibiri Hiroshima na Nagasaki, ku wa 06 na 09 z'ukwa munani 1945, buca burashira aho intahe ishize. Mu gisagara ca Newark mu ntara ya New Jersey muri Amerika, abasirikare bifatanije n'abanyagihugu mu kwigina intsinzi Mu gisagara ca Hiroshima, abantu baharurwa mu 140.000 kuri 350.000 baba muri co nibo baharurwa ko bapfuye, hamwe n'abarenga 74.000 mu gisagara ca Nagasaki. Abanyagihugu bihaye amabarabara mu gisagara ca New York Inyuma y'ibihuha vyakurikiye ivyo bibombe vy'ubumara, umukuru w'igihugu wa Amerika ico gihe Harry S Truman yaciye atangaza inkuru y'ugutsindwa kw'Ubuyapani ku wa 14/08/1945. Umugabo n'umugore basomana kubera umunezero mu gisagara ca Kansas c'intara ya Missouri Mw'ijambo yashikirije isinzi ryari imbere ya Maison Blanche/White House, Perezida Truman yavuze ati: "Uyu niwo munsi twari turindiranye igishika kuva umunsi Pearl Harbor iterwa. Uyu niwo munsi abansi ubwabo burangiye, nk'uko twari tuvyiteze". Umusirikare wa Amerika Fariko avuza inanga abandi basirikare bagenziwe baririmba mu gisagara ca Fort Snelling mu ntara ya Minnesota Umushikiranganji wa mbere w'Ubwongereza, Clement Atlee, yasubiriye Churchill yavuze ati: "Abansi bacu bagiye batsindwa " Yashimiye incuti zose z'Ubwongereza, ibihugu vya Australia Nouvelles Zelandes Ubuhindi na Burma, ibihugu vyose vyari vyigaruriwe n'Ubuyapani, hamwe n'Uburusiya. Yongeye ashimira vyihariye Amerika avuga ko "iyo itaba yo intambara mu karere k'ubuseruko yari kubandanya iyindi myaka itari mike". Aha hari mu gace ka Times Square muri New York City, Amerika Ku munsi wakurikiye, umwami w'abami w'Ubuyapani Hirohito yumvikanye kuri radiyo - ibitari bwigere bibaho - atangaza ko ibibombe ruhonyanganda, ruburakigongwe, vya Amerika ari vyo bitumye Ubuyapani bumanika amaboko ataco burinze gusaba. Yongeyeko ati: "Mu gihe twobandanya intambara, igihugu cy'Ubuyapani cose kirafise kuzimangana ubutakigaruka, abanyagihugu bakarimbuka bagahera burundu". Abagore muri Ohio, Amerika bigina intsinzi berekana ikinyamakuru cavuga ko Ubuyapani bwamanitse amaboko Agace ka Times Square, New York City, muri Amerika I Londres mu Bwongereza, umuryango w'ibwami warahagaze kw'ibaraza uramutsa isinzi ry'abariko barigina ku kirimba ca Buckingham. Isinzi ry'abariko barigina ku kirimba ca Buckingham Umuganwakazi Elizabeth hamwe n'umuganwakazi Margaret nabo nyene bahavuye bahamvya isinzi ryari ku kirimba. Kuva i bubamfu uja i buryo : umuganwakazi Elizabeth, umwamikazi Elizabeth, umwami George VI hamwe n'umuganwakazi Margaret

Donald Trump igihe yariko ajabuka umurongo ugabura ibihugu vya Koreya yinjira ku butaka bwa Koreya y'Uburaruko Bwana Trump abaye umukuru w'igihugu wa mbere wa Amerika ashoboye kujabuka akinjira ku butaka bwa Koreya y'Uburaruko inyuma y'ukubonana na Bwana Kim mu karere kagabura Koreya y'Uburaruko n'Ubumanuko. Muri uwo mubonano bisa n'uko wateguwe na Bwana Trump aho atumiriye Bwana Kim ku rubuga rwa Twitter, abo bategetsi bompi baramukanirije ku murongo ugabura ivyo bihugu vya Koreya, imbere y'uko Bwana Trump ajabuka akinjira muri koreya y'Uburaruko, intambwe ikomeye. Amwenyura, Bwana Kim yabwiye Trump ati: "Ndanezerewe n'ukuba ndi kumwe nawe kandi. Si nashobora kwibaza ko nobonana nawe muri kino kibanza". Bwana Trump nawe ati: "Ni igihe kidasanzwe...intambwe ikomeye cane". Mu nyuma, Bwana Kim aboneka ko aryohewe, yajabutse urubibe nawe yinjira ku butaka bwa Koreya y'Ubumanuko. Ari kumwe na Trump yavuze ati: "Ndizera ko iki ari ikimenyetso c'ishaka ryacu ry'uguhamba kahise kabi tukubaka kazoza gashasha". Inyuma y'aho, baciye bagana mu nyubakwa yiswe Freedom House (inzu y'ubwigenge) iri muri Koreya y'Ubumanuko, ariho babonaniye mu mwiherero wamaze ikiringo c'isaha irenga. TRump na Kim mu karere kagabura Koreya y'Uburaruko na Koreya y'Ubumanuko Mu bidakunze kuba, Bwana Kim yabwiye abanyamakuru ko ari "ikimenyesto" c'imigenderanire myiza hagati yiwe na Bwana Trump. Avugana n'abamenyeshamakuru ari kumwe na Bwana Kim, Perezida Trump yavuze ko ari "umunsi ukomey mu mateka y'isi", kandi ko ari "umunezero kuri we kubona ashoboye kujabuka uwo murongo" ugabura ivyo bihugu bibiri vya Koreya. Yavuze kandi ko yatumiye Bwana Kim ko yogendera Leta zunze Ubumwe za Amerika. Abo bategetsi babiri bumvikanye ko bashinga imirwi ijejwe kunagura ibiganiro. Kubera iki uwo mubonano ufise insiguro ikomeye Mu gihe ata nteguro yari ihari hagati y'abajejwe imigenderanire, uwo mubonano waboneka ko kari akaryo ko kwifotoza gusa. Ariko, werekanye ko abo bategetsi bompi bafise ishaka ryo kubandanya ibiganiro bizoshika ku masezerano yo guhagarika umugambi w'ibirwanisho vy'ubumara. Ibiganiro na Koreya y'Uburaruko mu ntumbero y'ukugerageza kuyumvisha ko yoheba umugambi wayo w'uguhing ura ibirwanisho vy'ubumara, vyarashitse ku ntambwe ikomeye mu mwaka uheze, aho abo bategetsi bompi bahurira mu gihugu ca Singapour. Bompi bariyemeje "gukora kugira bahagarike umugambi w'ibirwanisho vy'ubumara" muri Koreya yose, ariko badasiguye ingene vyari kugenda. Vyari vyitezwe ko mu mubonano wabo wa kabiri mu gisagara ca Hanoi muri Vietnam, bari gushika ku masezerano nyezina yari gutuma Koreya y'Uburaruko ihagarika umugambi wayo w'ugukora ibirwanisho vy'ubumara, hanyuma nayo igatezurirwa ibihano. Ariko ivyo biganiro vyaheze ataco bashitseko, kubera vyanse ko bumvikana ingene ivyo bihano vyotezurwa. Kuva ico gihe, ibiganiro vyarahagaze n'aho Bwana Kim na Bwana Trump baherutse kwandikiranira amakete. Mbega akarere kagabura ibihugu bibiri vya Koreya ni iki? Akarere kagabura ibihugu bibiri vya Koreya, ni akarere gafise ubwaguke bw'ibirometero bine, n'uburebure bw'ibirometero 250. Kagabura ibihugu vya Koreya y'Uburaruko na Koreya y'Ubumanuko kuva intambara ya Koreya irangiye mu mwaka wa 1953. Ako karere mu bisanzwe nta basirikare canke ibirindiro vya gisirikare birangwamwo, arico gituma kitwa Demilitarized Zone, canke Zone démilitarisée (DMZ). Hagati aho, ako karere kari ku mipaka iri mu mipaka icungerewe gisirikare bikomeye kw'isi.

ONU ivuga ko amategeko yorohejwe abimukira batokoresha uburyo bwa magendo Ngo mu gihe ayo mategeko yokworoshwa, vyotuma abimukira batabwirizwa guca mu buryo bw'amagendo. Ibi yashikirije mu nama rusangi ya ONU bije imbere y'ibiganiro vyanyuma ku mwumvikano ku kibazo c'abimukira. Bwana Guterres yavuze ko uruja n'uruza rw'abantu ari ikintu ngirakamaro ku buzima bw'isi ngo kandi ibihugu bishiraho inzitizi, nta kindi vyunguka atari kubangamira ubutunzi bwavyo. Igihugu ca Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika kivuga ko kitazoja muri uwo mugambi.

Kizito Mihigo akurikiranyweho ibyaha birimo kugambirira kugirira nabi leta. Cassien NTAMUHANGA wahoze akora umwuga w'itangazamakuru akaba ari we wakomeje kwiregura ku byaha ashinjwa, birimo kurema umutwe w'abagizi ba nabi, kugambirira kugirira nabi ubutegetsi buriho n'umukuru w'igihugu, gushaka gukora ibikorwa by'iterabwoba n'icyaha cy'ubwicanyi. Cassien Ntamuhanga yabwiye urukiko ko atemera inyandikomvugo yakoreshejwe kuva mu bugenzacyaha. Yavuze ko atemera ibyaha aregwa kuko ngo hari ibyongewe mu byo yavuze, ibyavanywemo n'ibyahimbwe. Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko hari n'ibyo ahakana kandi yari yeremeye imbere y'urukiko mu gihe cyo kuburana ifatwa n'ifungwa. Ariko bwagiye bunatanga izindi ngero buvuga ko bidatangaje ngo akenshi ariko abaregwa babigenza. Bumurega ibyaha bine birimo gushaka kugirira nabi ubutegetsi buriho n'imukuru w'igihugu, ibikorwa by'iterabwoba, ubwicanyi no kurema umutwe w'abagizi ba nabi binyuze mu gukorana na RNC ndetse na FDLR. Ubushinjacyaha buvuka kandi ko Cassien yari yasabwe kujya atangaza abasirikare ba FDLR bafashwe mu binyamakuru ngo kugirango badahita bicwa. We n'umwunganira babwiye urukiko ko icyaha baregwa cyo kurema iyo mitwe ataricyo kuko hari abayishinzwe banzwi kandi we akaba atagaragaramo. Cassien avuga ko amagambo yabwiwe kuri interneti mu buryo bwa SKYPE n'umwe mu bayoboke ba RNC witwa SANKARA biganye, kandi banakoranye mbere yuko ava mu gihugu, atagaragaza ko yemeye gukorana nabo mubyo bari bamaze kuvuga, ngo kuko atari aniteguye ko aribyo bagiye kumubwira, ngo kuko ntacyo yabashubije. Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko muri ayo magambo humvikanamo gushaka kwica bamwe mu bayobozi bakuru b'igihugu bo mu nzego zo hejuru bahorera Col Patrick KAREGEYA, no guca ikiraro cya Nyabarongo. Ibi NTAMUHANGA akavuga ko nta bwumvikane bwigeze bubaho bwo kubikora. Mu bindi aregwa, harimo itangazo rivugwa n'ubushinjacyaha ngo ryateguwe n'uwitwa NIYOMUGABO Gerard, ngo ryari rigamije kunga abanyarwanda bose. Cassien avuga ko Niyomugabo yigeze kubimubwiraho ndetse ngo akanamusaba kuzarisinyaho nk'umuntu uzwi kimwe na KIZITO Mihigo cyangwa se ibindi byamamare nk'abakinnyi b'umupira, nubwo ngo atigeze aribona. NTAMUHANGA yasabye urukiko ko rwamuhanaguraho ibyaha byose aregwa, ngo kuko kuba yaravuganye n'umuntu witwa SANKARA atazi nurwego ariho mu RNC bitatuma afungwa amezi 7 yose. Urubanza ruzakomeza kuri 28 zuku kwezi.

Paul Kagame Mu kiganiro yahaye abanyamakuru Paul Kagame yavuze ko hari n'abandi basanga itegeko rishobora guhindurwa mu gihe byaba byifujwe n'abaturage baritoye . Gusa aba nabo ngo bakaba bafite inshingano zo kubimwemeza mbere y'uko ahindura uruhande ahagazemo muri iki gihe . Muri iki kiganiro cyamaze hafi amasaha abiri, Prezida Kagame yavuze ko mu gihugu ubu hari impande ebyiri zifite ibitekerezo bitandukanye ku birebana n'igihe umukuru w'igihugu atagomba kurenza ku butegetsi. Hari abo avuga bari ku ruhande rw'uko itegeko ririho rigomba kubahwa uko riri,aba akavuga ko ari bo nawe arimo . President Kagame ariko avuga ko hari n'abifuza ko ingingo igena igihe ntarengwa yahindurwa bityo bakaba bamusaba ko yongera kwiyamamaza mu mwaka wa 2017. Gusa ,nubwo yavuze ko yubaha ibitekerezo byabo ,aba ngo bagomba kumwumvisha impamvu agomba kwemeranywa nabo. Ubu si ubwa mbere havugwa ku ihindurwa ry'itegeko nshinga kugira ngo President Paul Kagame abe yakwemererwa kongea kuyobora U Rwanda . Bamwe mu banyapolitiki barimo n'abashikiranganji bamaze gutangaza ku mugaragaro ko bifuza ko iri tegeko rihinduka kugira ngo Paul Kagame akomeze kuyobora igihugu . Hashize iminsi kandi humvikana amajwi y'abaturage basaba ko umukuru uriho yakomeza kuyobora igihugu hatitawe ku biteganywa n'itegeko nshinga ryo ryavugaga ko atagomba kurenza mandate ya kabiri igomba kurangirana n'umwaka wa 2017.

Ku munsi w'ejo ku wa mbere, abaturage bo mu gace ka Beni baramukiye mu myigaragambyo bamagana ubutegetsi bwa DR Congo n'ingabo za MONUSCO ziri i Beni bazishinja kudashobora kubarinda ubwicanyi bari gukorerwa n'inyeshyamba za ADF. Ibiro ntaramakuru AFP bisubiramo amagambo y'umushinjacyaha wa gisirikare Kumbu Ngoma avuga ko abaturage bane baguye muri iyo myigaragambyo y'ejo, 10 barakomereka n'abasirikare batatu ba leta na bo barakomereka. AFP ivuga ko abigaragambya bari banze gutezuka nyuma y'amasasu yari yarashwe yo kubaburira. Mathias Gillmann, umuvugizi w'inzibacyuho wa MONUSCO, yavuze ko ibiro byayo biri i Beni byangijwe nyuma yo kugabwaho igitero, biba ngombwa ko abakozi bayo bahakoreraga bimurirwa ahandi. Bwana Gillmann avuga ko Leila Zerrougui, intumwa idasanzwe y'umunyamabanga mukuru wa ONU muri DR Congo, yitabiriye inama y'igihugu y'umutekano ku munsi w'ejo yari iyobowe na Perezida Félix Tshisekedi. Bivugwa ko iyo nama yarimo n'abaminisitiri n'abagize ibiro bikuru bya gisirikare. MONUSCO ivuga ko Madamu Zerrougui yavuze ko "yumva uburakari no kubihirwa kw'abaturage" nyuma y'ibitero biheruka by'inyeshyamba za ADF byahitanye abantu. Ariko yavuze ko kwirara ku biro bya MONUSCO ndetse n'iby'ubuyobozi bw'inzego z'ibanze muri ako gace "nta kindi bikora kitari uguca intege ingabo za DR Congo mu rugamba zihanganyemo na ADF". MONUSCO ivuga ko igiye kongera imbaraga mu mikoranire n'inzego zitandukanye zikorana nayo "mu gushakira hamwe umuti w'ibibazo by'abaturage ba Beni". MONUSCO yongeyeho ko itewe impungenge n'ikwirakwizwa ry'amakuru y'ibinyoma no gushishikariza ibikorwa by'urugomo biri gukorwa ku mbuga nkoranyambaga. Igasaba inzego zose gukorera hamwe ngo ituze rigaruke, binashoboke kurwanya ADF n'icyorezo cya Ebola. Abantu bagera kuri 75 bamaze kwicwa kuva ku itariki ya 5 y'uku kwezi mu gace ka Beni, nk'uko bitangazwa n'umuryango utegamiye kuri leta Groupe d'Etude du Congo (GEC) na Human Right Watch. Iyi mibare irimo imibiri y'abantu batandatu babonywe ku cyumweru mu mujyi wa Beni bivugwa ko na bo bishwe na ADF, bikekwa ko ari na bo babaye imbarutso y'iyi myigaragambyo. Ku itariki 30 y'ukwezi gushize kwa cumi ingabo za leta ya DR Congo zatangije imirwano yo kurandura umutwe wa ADF muri aka gace ka Beni, izi nyeshyamba mu kwihimura ziraye mu baturage zirabica.

Umutoza Jose Mourinho (ibumoso) wa Manchester United n'umutoza Rafael Benítez wa Newcastle ubwo bavaga mu kibuga amakipe yombi agiye kuruhuka nyuma y'igice cya mbere cy'umukino Alexis Sanchez ni we watsinze igitego cy'intsinzi ku munota wa 90 ubwo ikipe ye - yari yabanjwe ibitego 2-0 na Newcastle - yigaranzuraga Newcastle, umukino ukarangira ku ntsinzi ya Manchester United y'ibitego 3-2. Ni umukino warangije imikino ine Manchester United yari imaze idatsinda. Amakuru yakomeje guhwihwiswa ajyanye n'ejo hazaza ha Mourinho muri iyi kipe, ariko mbere y'uwo mukino ubuyobozi bw'ikipe bwari bwavuze ko bucyimushyigikiye. Mourinho w'imyaka 55 y'amavuko yabwiye televiziyo BT Sport ati: "Ni bwo bwa mbere mbonye kwibasira umuntu. Nshoboye guhangana nabyo." "Nshoboye kubana nabyo. Bamwe mu bahungu [abakinnyi], nubwo atari bo mugabo uri kwibasirwa, ntabwo bashoboye guhangana nabyo neza." "Marcus Rashford yari ababaye mu kibuga, Scott McTominay yari afite ubwoba mu kibuga. Ndetse n'abakinnyi bakuze bakora amakosa atari asanzwe." Habayeho kumuvugiriza induru ubwo Newcastle - itaratsinda umukino n'umwe muri shampiyona y'uyu mwaka - yarangizaga igice cya mbere ari yo ihagaze neza, ku bitego 2-0 yinjije mu minota 10 ya mbere y'umukino. Ku wa gatanu, Mourinho uri ku gitutu cyuko ari bwo bwa mbere Manchester United itangiye shampiyona nabi cyane mu myaka 29 ishize, yemeye ko iyi kipe itari gukina neza bihagije. Ndetse ku wa gatanu hari amakuru yavugaga ko ashobora kwirukanwa hatitawe kuko yakwitwara mu mukino wamuhuje na Newcastle - nubwo bwose ishami ry'imikino rya BBC ryumva ko ubuyobozi bw'ikipe bucyimushyigikiye.

Ifoto yafatiwe mu kirere igaragaza agace k'iri teme ryo mu Bushinwa ryambukiranya inyanja rya mbere mu burebure ku isi Ubariyemo n'imihanda igana kuri iri teme, iri teme rifite uburebure bwa kilometero 55. Rihuza Hong Kong n'imijyi ya Macau na Zhuhai. Ryuzuye ritwaye agera hafi kuri miliyari 20 z'amadolari y'Amerika. Imirimo yo kuryubaka yagiye inyuzamo igacyerererwa. Ryakabaye ryaratashywe mu mwaka wa 2016. Ubwubatsi bwaryo bwagiye bukomwa mu nkokora n'ibibazo by'umutekano. Abategetsi bavuga ko abakozi 18 bapfiriye mu mirimo y'ubwubatsi bwaryo. Bwana Xi ubwo yagezaga ijambo ku bitabiriye ibirori byo gutaha iri teme kuri uyu wa gatatu Bwana Xi yitabiriye ibirori byo gutaha ku mugaragaro iri teme byabereye i Zhuhao, ari kumwe n'abategetsi ba Hong Kong na Macau. Kuri uyu wa gatatu, hari umubare muto wa za bisi zatangiye kugenda kuri iri teme. Ni iki kidasanzwe kuri iri teme? Rihuza imijyi itatu y'ingenzi iri ku nkengero y'inyanja iri mu gice cy'amajyepfo y'Ubushinwa ari yo Hong Kong, Macau na Zhuhai. Iri teme ryubatse ku buryo nta mitingito y'isi n'imiyaga yarihungabanya. Ryubakishijwe toni ibihumbi 400 z'ibyuma, bivuze ko ibi byuma byifashishijwe mu kuryubaka byakubaka iminara 60 nka Tour Eiffel wo mu Bufaransa. Ni iki abantu bari kurivugaho? Abategetsi b'Ubushinwa bavuga ko biteze ko iri teme rizongera ubukungu, rikinjiza arenga 'tiriyari' imwe y'amadolari y'Amerika buri mwaka. Ariko Tanya Chan, umudepite wo muri Hong Kong, yabwiye ishami rya BBC ritangaza amakuru mu Gishinwa ko afite amakenga ko ibyo bizashoboka, mu gihe atari buri modoka yose yemerewe kurinyuraho usibye izahawe uruhushya. Ku ikubitiro, abategetsi b'Ubushinwa bateganyaga ko imodoka 9200 ari zo zizajya zinyura kuri iri teme buri munsi, gusa nyuma baje kugabanya uwo mubare nyuma yaho hubakiwe indi mihanda muri ako karere. Umushinga wo kuryubaka wagiye unengwa cyane. Bimwe mu bitangazamakuru byo mu Bushinwa byaribatije izina ry'"iteme ry'urupfu". Abantu bagera ku icyenda bapfiriye mu bikorwa byo kuryubaka mu gice cya Hong Kong, kandi abategetsi babwiye ishami rya BBC ritangaza amakuru mu Gishinwa ko hari abandi icyenda nabo bapfiriye mu Bushinwa. Abandi bakozi babarirwa mu magana nabo bakomerecyeye mu bwubatsi bw'iri teme. Habayeho n'impungenge zijyanye n'ibidukikije, aho bamwe mu mpirimbanyi zita ku bidukikije bavuga ko ubwubatsi bw'iri teme bwahungabanyije ubuzima bw'ibinyabuzima byo mu nyanja.

Antonio Conte asaba umugwi kumufatira ingingo ni waba udashimishwa n'ivyo akora Uwo mugwi wabaye uwa mbere mw'ihiganwa riheze utsinzwe wikurikiranya ubugira kabiri mw'ihiganwa rya Premier League urushwa ibitsindo bitatu, ukaba uri mu kibanza ca kane, inota rimwe imbere ya Tottenham. "Mpagaze he? Ha handi," niko yabwiye BBC Radio 5 inyuma y'urukino rwo ku munsi wa mbere. "Nguma hano, ngerageza gukora no kwitanga ukwo bishobotse. Abandemera? Ni bande bandemera? Ukuhe kuremerwa? Uwo mugabo aturuka mu Butaliyano yatsinze ihiganwa agihabwa kumenyereza umugwi ubwa mbere. Muri kino gihe aba Blues bari inyuma ya Manchester City amanota 19, inyuma yaho batsinzwe kandi na Bournemouth 3-0 bari iwabo. Imbere y'urukino, Conte yasavye umugwi wa Stamford Bridge kugira ico umuvuzeko. "Ndakora - ni vyaba bikwiye ni sawa," niko yavuze igihe baheruka gutsindwa. "Ataruko, umugwi urakwiye gufata iyindi ngingo."

Byitezwe ko mu ruzinduko rwe, Melania Trump azibanda ku bikorwa byo gufasha imbabare Mu itangazo yashyize ahagaragara, yagize ati: "Buzaba bubaye ubwa mbere ngeze ku mugabane w'Afurika ndetse mfite amashyushyu yo kugira ibyo niga ku bibazo abana bahura nabyo ku mugane wose [w'Afurika] no kwiga umuco wayo ukize n'amateka yawo." Byitezwe ko mu rugendo rwa Madamu Trump, azibanda ku bikorwa byo gufasha imbabare ndetse no ku "mishinga myinshi y'iterambere iri gukorerwa mu bihugu byinshi." Ntabwo azaba ari kumwe n'umugabo we, Perezida Trump, wanenzwe mu bihe bishize kubera ibivugwa ko yise ibihugu by'Afurika "umwanda", nubwo bwose we yavuze ko atarangwa n'ivangura rishingiye ku ibara ry'uruhu. Kuva yatangira akazi nka Perezida w'Amerika mu kwezi kwa mbere mu mwaka wa 2016, Bwana Trump ntarasura umugabane w'Afurika.

Theodore McCarrick yagirizwa ihohotera rifatiye ku gitsina Theodore McCarrick ni we murongozi mukuru wa mbere yirukanywe mu bupatiri mu mateka ya Ekleziya yo mu gihe ca none. Abarongoye Ekleziya muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika bamenyesha ko amakosa yagirizwa ko yakubaguye umuyabaga imyaka hafi 50 iheze ari ay'ukuri. Bwana McCarrick ubu afise imyaka 88 yari yaramaze gutanga imihoho mu mabanga yiwe, ariko akavuga ko atibuka igihe yakoreye ico caha. Bwana McCarrick yarabaye umusenyeri mukuru wa Washington DC kuva mu 2001 gushika 2006. Kuva aho atangiye imihoho akava mu muryango w'aba kardinali mu mwaka uheze, yaba wenyene mu rusengero rwo mu gisagara ca Kansas. Ni we yari abaye uwa mbere mu gutanga imihoho nk'umukardinali kuva mu 1927. Mbega yagirizwa iki? Kardinali Timothy Dolan, musenyeri mukuru wa New York w'iki gihe, yagiriza Bwana McCarrick ko yakubaguye umwana w'umuyabaga mu gihe yari umupatiri i New York mu myaka ya 1970. Uyo musenyeri mukuru amenyesha ko ikigo cigenga cakoze amatohoza yihwejwe n'abahinga mu vy'amategeko, mu vy'inyifato, n'abavyeyi hamwe n'umupatiri, vyasanze ivyo yagirizwa ari ivy'ukuri. Muri ico gihe, Bwana McCarrick yamenyesheje ko atibuka igihe yakora ivyo yagirizwa, akavuga ko yera. Ariko kuva ico gihe, hari abandi bagabo batari bake bagumye bamwagiriza ko yabafashe ku nguvu mu nzu yari ku nkengera y'ibahari muri New Jersey, mu gihe bariko bigira ubupatiri mw'iseminari. Umwe muri bo yavuze ko yamufashe akiri umwana. Eka ngo yaranakubaguye n'abakuze mu gihe yari musenyeri wa New Jersey nk'uko abasenyeri bo muri iyo leta babibwiye ibimenyeshamakuru vyo muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika. Yinjiye mu rutonde rw'amajana n'amajana rw'abandi bakuru b'Ekleziya bagirizwa ikubagura rifatiye ku gitsina ryagiriwe abana b'abahungu kuva imyaka mirongo n'iyindi. Iyirukanwa ryiwe kandi rije habura iminsi mikeya ngo habe inama iriko itegurwa na Vaticano ijanye n'ukwiga ingene borwanya ikubagurwa ry'abana. Vaticano imenyesha ko Bwana McCarrick yirukanywe burundu kandi ko ari ingingo ntasubirwamwo.

Ibitero by'indege bya Israel kuri Gaza Bwana Biden yabwiye Minisitiri w'intebe wa Israel Benjamin Netanyahu ko Amerika irimo gukorana na Misiri n'ibindi bihugu ku kuntu imirwano yahagarara. Ariko Amerika yongeye gutambamira itangazo ry'akanama k'umutekano k'umuryango w'abibumbye (ONU/UN) risaba ko urugomo ruhagarara. Iyi mirwano ubu yinjiye mu cyumweru cyayo cya kabiri, ikaba nta kimenyetso kinini igaragaza cyuko yaba igana ku musozo. Abantu batari munsi ya 212, barimo abana 61, bamaze gupfira muri Gaza, n'abantu 10, barimo abana babiri, bapfiriye muri Israel. Israel ivuga ko benshi muri abo bishwe muri Gaza ari intagondwa kandi ko umuturage wese w'umusivile upfuye itaba yagambiriye kumwica. Ariko Hamas, umutwe w'intagondwa ugenzura Gaza, urabihakana. Nkuko itangazo ry'ibiro bya perezida w'Amerika bya White House ribivuga, Bwana Biden "yashishikarije Israel kugira umuhate wose ushoboka wo gutuma habaho uburinzi ku baturage b'abasivile b'inzirakarengane". Iryo tangazo ryongeyeho riti: "Abategetsi bombi baganiriye ku ntambwe imaze guterwa mu bikorwa bya gisirikare bya Israel kuri Hamas n'indi mitwe y'iterabwoba muri Gaza". Perezida Biden "yavuze ko ashyigikiye agahenge anavuga ku gukorana kw'Amerika na Misiri n'abandi bafatanya-bikorwa hagamijwe kugera kuri ibyo", nkuko iryo tangazo rikomeza ribivuga. Uru rugomo hagati ya Israel na Gaza rwatumye habaho kwiyongera k'umuhangayiko w'amahanga. Abategetsi batandukanye ku isi n'imiryango itanga imfashanyo, basabye ko hafatwa ingamba zo kwirinda impfu z'abahatuye n'akajagari katewe n'isenywa ry'inyubako n'ibikorwa-remezo. Bwana Biden yavuze ko Israel ikwiye kugerageza kurinda abaturage b'abasivile b'inzirakarengane Ku nshuro ya gatatu, Amerika yatambamiye ibikorwa by'akanama k'umutekano ka ONU byo gusohora itangazo risaba Israel guhagarika igitero cyayo cya gisirikare, ivuga ko ahubwo irimo kubikoraho mu rwego rwayo rwa dipolomasi. Madamu Jen Psaki, umuvugizi wa White House, yabwiye abanyamakuru ati: "Uko tubibara kugeza ubu ni uko kugirana ibyo biganiro mu ibanga... ari bwo buryo bwubaka cyane dushobora gukoresha".

Umugore i Melbourne, Australia yikinze izuba rikaze Ikigo gishinzwe iteganyagihe cyaho cyavuze ko "ubu bushyuhe bukabije" bwarenze ubwabayeho buruta ubundi bagize aho bwageze kuri 40.3C ku itariki 07/01/2013. Ubu bushyuhe bubayeho mu gihe Australia ubu yugarijwe n'amapfa akabije n'inkongi z'imiriro. Abashinzwe iteganyagihe bavuga ko ubushyuhe burenzeho buteganyijwe mu mpera z'iki cyumweru, bivuze ko bashobora kurenza iki gipimo cy'ejo. Kuki ibi biri kuba ubu? Imiyaga ishyushye cyane iri kuva mu burasirazuba ihutera kuri uyu mugabane, ibi byatumye hari ibice bimwe na bimwe byo bigerwaho n'ubushyuhe bukabije. Hari ibice bimwe na bimwe hagati muri Australia ejo byageze ku bushyuhe buri hejuru ya 45C. Uko ubushyuhe bwagiye bwiyongera muri Australia mu myaka ishize: Ibi biraterwa n'ubushyuhe bubusanye bw'inyanja y'Ubuhinde mu burasirazuba bwa Australia - aho idashyushye cyane - no mu burengerazuba aho inyanja ishyushye cyane. Gutandukana kuriho ubu k'ubushyuhe bw'ibi bice byombi by'iyi nyanja niko gukomeye kubayeho kuva mu myaka 60 ishize.

Bijyanye n'ibihano by'umuryango w'ibihugu by'ubumwe bw'Ubulayi, nta ntwaro zizongera kwemererwa kugurishwa zoherezwa muri Venezuela Ishami rya ONU ryita ku burenganzira bwa muntu riravuga ko rifite amakuru yizewe yuko abakora mu nzego z'umutekano muri Venezuela biraye mu duce dutuwe n'abakene bakica abasore, akenshi bakabicira mu nzu zabo. Zeid Ra'ad Al Hussein, umuyobozi w'ishami rya ONU ryita ku burenganzira bwa muntu, yavuze ko urebye nta gukurikiza amategeko biba muri Venezuela. Mu gihe cyashize, Venezuela yagiye yamagana ibirego bya ONU byo guhonyora uburenganzira bwa muntu, ikavuga ko ari "ibinyoma". Venezuela yibasiwe n'amakuba mu bya politiki n'ubukungu. Umwaka ushize, abigaragambyaga batavuga rumwe na leta bishwe barashwe. Ubu Venezuela yugarijwe kandi no guta agaciro bikabije cyane kw'ifaranga ryayo ndetse n'ibura ry'ibiribwa. Mu kwezi kwa gatanu, Perezida Nicolas Maduro wa Venezuela yongeye gutorerwa kuyobora iki gihugu, nyuma yaho abatavuga rumwe na leta banze kwitabira amatora. Abaturage ba Venezuela babarirwa mu bihumbi amagana bamaze guhunga amakuba yugarije igihugu cyabo berekeza mu mahanga.

Ingingo yo guhagarika imfashanyo ku mashirahamwe aharanira irondoka rijanye n'amagara meza yatumye haduka imyiyerekano, aba ni abari mu myiyerekano ni Alabama mu 2019 Amavuriro amwe amwe yigisha ibijanye n'irondoka rijanye n'amagara meza muri Afrika vyabaye ngombwa ko yugara inyuma y'aho mu 2017, uwari umukuru w'igihugu ico gihe Donald Trump ahagarikiye imfashanyo zahabwa amashirahamwe yafasha abantu mu bijanye n'ukudasama imbanyi batipfuza hamwe n'ugukorora inda. Nelly Munyasia, arongoye ikigo c'irondoka rijanye n'amagara meza muri Kenya (Reproductive Health Network Kenya) avuga ko iyi ngingo ya Amerika yiswe "global gag rule" yatumye ishirahamwe ryiwe rinanirwa no gufasha abakenyezi muri ino myaka mikeya iheze. Yabwiye BBC ati: "Abagore n'abakorwa barahasize ubuzima nk'inkurikizi z'iyi ngingo - barya barwaye umugera wa SIDA hamwe na kanseri batari bagishoboye gukurikiranwa, canke abatari bagishoboye kuronswa uburyo bwo kwirinda imbanyi batipfuza hamwe n'impanuro ku bijanye n'irondoka rijanye n'amagara meza, wasanga bagiye gukoresha uburyo butabereye bwo gukorora imbanyi. "Guhindura iyi ngingo bizorokora ubuzima kandi ni ingingo yategerezwa kubandanya". Moses Mulumba wo mu kigo citaho ubuzima, uburenganzira bwa muntu n'iterambere muri Uganda, yavuze ko iyi ngingo yerekanye ingaruka z'ingingo z'agahotoro ku bindi bihugu n'ingaruka zagize ku banyagihugu bo mu bihugu bikenye. Yabwiye BBC ati: "Nk'ingaruka ya 'global gag rule', vyabaye ngombwa ko ishirahamwe ryanje ... rihagarika ibikorwa vyaryo mu kiringo c'imyaka ine iheze, rihagarika umugambi wafashwa na USAID waharanira amagara meza, n'aho ryariko rirakora ibikora inka". Kuvanaho iyi ngingo bivuga ko abagore benshi bazokwitabwaho mu vyerekeye irondoka rijanye n'amagara meza, harimwo kuronswa uburyo bwo kuzibira imbanyi batipfuza, be no gupimwa umugera wa SIDA na kanseri hamwe n'ibindi.

Prezida Nkurunziza arikumwe n'umukuru w'igihugu ca Somalia ku kibuga c'indege i Bujumbura Umukuru w'igihugu c'u Burundi Petero Nkurunziza yabishikirije igihe yariko arasezerana n'umukuru w'igihugu ca Somalia Mohamed Abudallahi Mohamed kuri uyu wa kabiri, inyuma y' urugendo rw'iminsi ibiri uwo mushitsi yaramazemwo mu Burundi. Inyuma y'umubonano yagiranye na Mohamed Abdullahi Mohamed arongoye igihugu ca Somalia,umukuru w'igihugu c'uburundi Petero Nkurunziza yavuzeko abo bategetsi babiri baganiriye ahanini ku bijanye n'imigenderanire y'ibihugu vyompi hamwe n'uruhara rw'ingabo z'uburundi ziri kugarukana amahoro muri Somalia. Petero Nkurunziza yaneguye ingingo yo gutangura gutahukana izo ngabo iherutse gufatwa n'ishirahamwe ry'ubumwe bwa Afrika. Bitegekanijwe ko imbere yuko uku kwezi kwa kabiri guhera, ingabo z'abarundi zizoba zagabanijweko abagera ku gihumbi. Umukuru w'igihugu c'u Burundi Petero Nkurunziza yasavye ko hatunganywa inama yihuta kugira ico kibazo cigwe. Yagize ati: 'Ingingo yafashwe ntiyanezereje abarundi, ndetse mbere ntiyanezereje n'igihugu ca Somalia. Twipfuza ko hoba inama yihuta ihuza ibihugu bifise ingabo muri Somalia, kugira ico kibazo cigwe maze iyo ngingo ihagarikwe'. Abasirikare ba Amisom muri Somalia Umukuru w'igihugu ca Somalia Mohamed Abdullahi Mohamed, nta na kimwe yigeze ashikiriza ku bijanye n'ingingo yo kugabanya abasirikare b'abarundi. Ariko, arashima uruhara rwa bo muri Somalia. Ibihugu bifise abasirikare muri Somalia, ni Kenya, u Burundi, Uganda, Ethiopia na Djibouti.

Ntagali yatanze imihoho mu mabanga mu kwa gatatu kw'umwaka uheze inyuma y'imyaka 43 yari amaze ari umupasitori. Mw'itangazo ryasohowe ku wa 13 z'uku kwa mbere ku rubuga ngurukanabumenyi rw'ishengero rya Anglican, uwamusubiriye, Dr. Stephen Samuel Kaziimba, yavuze ko Ntagali yarenze ibigo aryamana n'umugore afise umugabo, kandi na we nyene akaba yaravyiyemereye. Dr Kaziimba ati: "Yarahemukiye ibiro vy'abepiskopi, arenga indahiro yiwe yo kwimikwa, hamwe n'ivyo yari yiyemeje mu nyifato yiwe." Dr Kaziimba avuga ko ishengero rya Uganda ryiyemeje gukorera mu muco no kwitwararika abo bose bagizweko ingaruka n'ivyabaye, asaba ko abagore bompi bosengerwa, abihana bakihana, abakizwa bagakizwa. Musenyeri mukuru wa Anglican muri Amerika ya Ruguru, Foley Beach, na we nyene yasohoye itangazo aho avuga ko ababajwe n'ivyabaye. Ati: "Stanley ni mwenewacu muri Kristo, kandi ndashima ingene twakoranye mu myaka iheze. Birambabaje cane kwumva ko yatirimutse kw'ibanga". "Ndasaba Imana ko Stanley yobandanya n'inzira yo kwihana, yongere ihe ukwihangana abo bose bakozweko n'icaha ciwe". Uyu yahoze ari umwepiskopi mukuru ntiyabonetse kugira ngo ashobore kugira ico abivugako. Ariko abanya Uganda bazokwama bamwibukira ku majambo yavuze ku vyo yafata nk'ubutabanga mu gihugu. Mu 2019, yasubiwemwo n'ibinyamakuru vyo muri ico gihugu ariko ahanura abantu ko "bokwigumya mu vyipfuzo vyabo mu bijanye n'uguhuza ibitsina". Ishengero Anglican muri Uganda rifise abanywanyi bashika imiriyoni 13.

Umujyi wa Doha muri Qatar Gufungura amarembo ku baturage b'ibindi bihugu bakoroherezwa kubona Visa bahageze, cyangwa bakayisaba nyuma y'igihe biba bigamije guteza imbere ubuhahirane, ubucuruzi cyangwa ubukerarugendo bw'ibihugu. Ikigo cya VisitQatar cyongeye u Rwanda ku rutonde rw'ibihugu 46 abaturage babyo bashobora kwinjira muri Qatar badafite Visa, bakaba bayisaba mu gihe cy'iminsi 30, igihe gishobora kongerwa. Olivier Nduhungirehe, umunyamabanga wa Leta y'u Rwanda muri minisiteri y'ububanyi n'amahanga yabwiye BBC ko ibi "byerekena imibanire myiza y'ibihugu byombi". Avuga kandi ko ibi "bizafasha imikoranire hagati y'abaturage b'ibihugu byombi", kandi ko iki ari icyemezo kigamije guteza imbere ubucuruzi n'ishoramari. Ibihugu bitatu byo muri Afurika; Seychelles, South Africa n'u Rwanda nibyo biri ku rutonde rw'ibihugu biri muri iyi gahunda ya Qatar yo korohereza ababivuyemo kubona Visa. Ibisabwa ku banyarwanda muri iki cyemezo ni uko baba bafite 'passport' ifite nibura agaciro mu mezi atandatu, kuba bafite 'ticket' y'indege izabasubiza iwabo, no kuba berekana aho bazaba bari muri Qatar. Mu muhate wo guteza imbere ishoramari, kuva mu kwezi kwa mbere 2018, u Rwanda rwafunguriye abatuye ibihugu by'isi kuza mu Rwanda bagasaba Visa bahageze. Ibihugu binyuranye bya Afurika bihuriye n'u Rwanda mu miryango itandukanye cyangwa bifitanye nayo amasezerano ababituye bashobora kumara iminsi 90 mu Rwanda badasabwe Visa.

Kapiteni Harry Kane n'umutoza Gareth Southgate ni bo baza kuba bayoboye Ubwongereza mu mukino na Tuniziya kuri uyu wa mbere Kuri uyu wa mbere, Ubwongereza buratangira bukina n'ikipe ya Tuniziya, mu mukino uri bubere ku kibuga cy'i Volgograd. Ubwongereza buri mu itsinda G aho buri kumwe na Tuniziya, Panama n'Ububiligi. Umutoza Southgate yagize ati: "Igihe amatsinda yatangazwaga, buri wese yabonaga ko iri ari itsinda ryoroshye kurusha ayandi yose. Jye ndabona ko ari rimwe mu yakomeye cyane ugendeye ku kuntu twebwe, Tuniziya, ndetse birumvikana n'Ububiligi, duhagaze ku rutonde rwa FIFA". Ku rutonde rwa FIFA, Ububiligi buri ku mwanya wa gatatu mu gihe Ubwongereza buri ku mwanya wa 12, Tuniziya ku mwanya wa 21, naho Panama ikaba ku mwanya wa 55. Umutoza Southgate w'Ubwongereza aravuga ko umukino na Tuniziya bawitondeye, nkuko byajyaga kugenda iyo baba bagiye gukina n'ikipe nka Brezili. Kuva haba imikino y'igikombe cy'isi cy'umupira w'amaguru cyabereye mu Budage mu mwaka wa 2006, Ubwongereza ntiburigera butsinda umukino wabwo ubanza mu irushanwa ryo ku rwego rwo hejuru. Kandi umutoza Southgate aremeza ko n'ubu mu Burusiya, ikipe ye itazoroherwa.

Syria ivuga ko kuguma kw'abasirikare ba Amerika ku butaka bwayo ari agasomborotso Abanyamerika bavuga ko iyo ngingo yasohowe mu ndwi iheze ifise intumbero yo kurwanya umugwi wiyita Leta ya Islam, canke IS. Ariko icegera c'umushikiranganji wa Syria ajejwe imigenderanire n'amakungu, Faisal Mekdad, yabwiye BBC ko ari ikosa rikomeye cane. Amajambo ya bwana Mekdad asohowe mu gihe himirije ibiganiro bishasha vya ONU bitangura uno munsi i Vienne. Ibiganiro vyaheruka nta kintu kiboneka vyashitseko, leta n'imigambwe bitavuga rumwe bakaba bitezwe gusubira guhura amaso mu yandi.

R Kelly yarishikanye ku gipolisi ca Chikago inyuma y'uko yagirijwe ihohotera rifatiye ku gitsina Uyo mucuraranzi w'umuziki wo mu bwoko bwa R&B azwi kw'izina rya Robert Sylvester Kelly, canke R.Kelly, yagirizwa ko amaze imyaka mirongo n'iyindi ahohotera abakenyezi n'imiyabaga itarakwiza imyaka. Abashikirizamanza mu gace ka Cook bagiriza R.Kelly ko, hagati y'imyaka ya 1998 na 2010, yakoze ihohotera rikomeye, mubo yarikoreye ngo hakaba harimwo n'imiburiburi abana batatu bari bafise hagati y'imyaka 13 na 16. Ivyo birego bije inyuma y'ireresi yiswe Surviving R Kelly isohorewe mu ntango z'uyu mwaka, yerekana imyaka mirongo n'iyindi ngo R Kelly yamaze ahohotera abakenyezi batari bake, harimwo mbere ngo n'umukenyezi wiwe. Muri iyo reresi, habonetse abakenyezi bamwagirije ko yabahohoteye, bamwe mbere bakavuga ko batari bwanashikane imyaka yemewe n'amategeko mu gihe batangura kuryamana nawe. Inyuma y'aho, umushikirizamanza wa Repubulika mu gace ka Cook, Kim Foxx avuga ko ivyo birego vyamubabaje, yatumyeko abo bose bafise ico bagiriza R Kelly. Niho abunganirizi mu vy'amategeko barenguka bagiriza uwo muririmvyi ko yahohoteye abakenyezi batari bake. Aho ni nka Gloria Allred avuga ko yaserukiye abashika babiri, hamwe na Michael Avenatti avuga ko yaserukiye abashika batandatu, bose bagiriza R Kelly ko yabahohoteye. R Kelly umuririmvyi w'indirimbo zo mu bwoko bwa R&B avuga ko yera Ejo kuwa gatanu R Kelly yarishikanye ku gipolisi inyuma y'uko umutahe wo kumufata umaze gusohoka. Steve Greenberg asanzwe amuburanira avuga ko yasavye kubanza kwicarana n'abashikirizamanza kugira abereke ko ivyo umunywanyi wiwe yagirizwa atari vyo, ariko ngo baranse. Bwana Greenberg yabwiye itororokanirizo ry'amakuru Associated Press ko uyo mucuraranzi w'imyaka 52 y'amavuko asanzwe aburanira yababajwe cane n'ivyo yagirizwa kandi ko bamubeshera. Umushikirizamanza Foxx amenyesha ko R.Kelly ashobora guciribwa igihano co gupfungwa imyaka ishika 7 ku caha kimwe kimwe.

Intwazangabo mu gisirikare c'umukuru w'igihugu Salva Kiir (i bubamfu) ziri mu zagirizwa Ivyaha bakurikiranwako ngo biri mu mugwi w'ivyaha vy'ingwano, hamwe n'ibikoregwa kiremwa muntu. Uwo mugwi uvuga ko ufise ivyemezo ku bana bategetswe kuraba ingene ba nyina basambanywa ku nguvu n'ingene bicwa. Ico cegeranyo kivuga no ku basivile bahohotewe, n'ibigwati vyasambuwe. Abakoze iryo tohoza bavuga ko bafise ivyemezo ko abasirikare 40 b'ipete ryo hejuru barimwo abakoloneli 5, bakwiye kwegekwako umwumwe ayo mabi. Abagore n'abana bamaze gukora imyiyerekano kenshi basaba ngo ingwano irangire Ingwano yarabandanije muri Sudani Yepfo naho hapfunditswe amasezerano yo kugarukana amahoro mu 2015. Ico cegeranyo kizoshikirizwa akanama ka Onu kajejwe kwubahiriza agateka ka zina muntu mu ndwi iza.

Inteko Rusange ya LONI yateguye inama idasanzwe bisabwe n'ibihugu by'Abayisilamu n'Abarabu Ibikubiye mu nyandiko y'ibyatowe muri LONI ivuga ko ibyemezo byose bireba umujyi wa Yeruzalemu "nta gaciro bifite" kandi bigomba kuburizwamo. Uyu mwanzuro watowe n'ibihugu 128, naho 35 birifata ibindi 9 bitora bitora bishyigikira icyemezo cya Amerika. Bibaye kabone n'ubwo perezida wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika, Donald Trump, yari yatanze ibikangisho avuga ko azahagarika inkunga ku bihugu bitora byemeza umwanzuro wa LONI. Trump yavuze ko Yeruzalemu ari umurwa mukuru wa Isiraheli Mbere y'itora, minisitiri w'ububanyi n'amahanga wa Palestine yshishishikarije amaleta "guterwa ubwoba n'ibikangisho". Minisitiri w'intebe wa Isiraheli, Benjamin Netanyahu, we yavuze ko yamagana umwanzuro wa LONI ndetse avuga ko ngo uru rwego ari "inzu y'ibinyoma". Intumwa ya Palestine Riyad Mansour (iburyo) yari yiteguye gushyigikirwa bikomeye na LONI Ibihugu bigize LONI byatoye gute?

Umugwi wa Chelsea uherutse gutsindira Premier League waronse hafi imiliyoni £151 (imiliyoni $194) Ihiganwa 2016-17 niryo ryabayemwo ivyashara vy'amahera menshi hagati y'ishirahamwe PL n'ibigo vy'imbonerakure (TV), vyatanze amahera imiliyardi $3 ku migwi 20 ya PL ku miliyardi $2 mu 2015-16. Umugwi wa nyuma Sunderland waronse imiliyoni £93.471 - uba utahukanye ayarusha ay'umugwi wabaye uwa mbere mu 2015-16, Leicester watahukanye (imiliyoni £93.219) Ayo mahera ava mu kwerekana inkino, amasezerano atandukanye y'ubudandaji hamwe n'udushimwe.

Antonio Conte yatsindiye igikombe cya FA cya 2018 atsinze Manchetser United, mu mukino we wa nyuma nk'umutoza wa Chelsea Conte w'imyaka 49 y'amavuko asubiye gutoza mu Butaliyani nyuma yo kwirukanwa na Chelsea mu mpera y'umwaka ushize w'imikino. Yamaze imyaka ibiri atoza iyi kipe yo mu Bwongereza, aho yayifashije kwegukana igikombe cya shampiyona n'icya FA. Mbere yaho, yari yaratsindiye ibikombe bitatu bya shampiyona y'Ubutaliyani ya Serie A atoza Juventus. Ku bw'umutoza Spalletti, Inter Milan yasoje iri ku mwanya wa kane muri shampiyona ndetse ibona itike yo gukina Champions League. Conte, wahoze akina hagati mu ikipe ya Juventus n'iy'igihugu y'Ubutaliyani, yagize ati: "Intambwe nshya mu buzima bwanjye iratangiye, ndishimye cyane mu by'ukuri". "Nahisemo Inter kubera icyo iyi kipe ari cyo, kubera ukuntu igira umuhate". "Nashimishijwe n'ukuntu iyi kipe ikorera mu mucyo n'ugushaka kwayo ko gusubiza Inter ku rwego ikwiye kuba iriho". Steven Zhang, Perezida wa Inter Milan, yavuze ko "azi neza ko Antonio Conte ari umwe mu batoza beza cyane" ku isi. Yagize ati: "Nizeye ko azadufasha kugera ku ntego zacu no ku cyerecyezo cyacu, cyamye iteka ari kimwe: kongera kugira iyi kipe imwe mu zikomeye cyane ku isi".

George Stinney, izina rye riracyagarukwaho imyaka 76 nyuma y'uko yishwe Ni umwana w'imyaka 14 wishwe hakoreshejwe intebe y'amashanyarazi ahamijwe icyaha cyo kwica abana babiri b'abazungu b'abakobwa. Gusa nyuma y'imyaka 70 hanzuwe ko yarenganyijwe. Mu kwezi kwa gatatu mu 1944 abana b'abakobwa babiri Betty June w'imyaka 11 na Mary Emma Thames w'imyaka 7 basanzwe bishwe mu gice kibamo abirabura mu mujyi wa Alcolu muri leta ya South Carolina, agace karangwagamo ivanguramoko rikomeye. Umwana w'umwirabura George Stinney w'imyaka 14 ni we wafashwe nk'ukekwa kuko we na mushiki we bari bavuganye n'abo bana mbere. Stinney yaburanishijwe n'inteko y'abacamanza b'abazungu gusa, bavuga ko yabajijwe akemera ko ari we wishe abo bana abakubise umutarimba (fer à béton). Uyu mwana yabajijwe anaburanishwa nta mubyeyi we nta n'umunyamategeko bari kumwe, inyandiko zigaragaza ko yabajijwe akemera ibyo yarezwe nazo ntizigeze zigaragazwa. Mu kwezi kwa gatandatu uwo mwaka, yahamijwe icyaha cyo kwica cyo mu rwego rwa mbere urukiko rwanga kumva ubujurire bwe. Akatirwa urwo gupfa. Amakuru yatangajwe n'ibinyamakuru icyo gihe, avuga ko Stinney yapimaga 43Kg n'uburebure bwa 1,57m ko atakwirwaga mu ntebe yicirwamo abahamijwe ibyaha, n'ibyuma by'iyo ntebe bifata amaguru ntibyamukwiraga. Amakuru avuga ko yicajwe ku gitabo kugira ngo abashe gusa n'ukwiriwe muri iyi ntebe yo kumwica, yicwa ari ku wa gatanu amaze kwemererwa kubonana n'ababyeyi be inshuro imwe gusa kuva yafatwa mu kwezi kwa gatatu uwo mwaka. Nyuma yo kwicwa, umuryango we nawo wahuye n'ingaruka kuko wanyazwe ibyawo, se yirukanwa mu mirimo yakoraga, biba ngombwa ko bimuka aho babaga nk'abahunze. Yararenganye Impirimbanyi z'uburenganzira bwa muntu n'abarwanya ivanguramoko rishingiye ku ruhu, ntibahwemye kuvuga ko George Stinney yarenganyijwe, kandi yahawe urubanza rubogamye. Mu 2014, imyaka 70 nyuma y'uko yishwe, umucamanza muri Amerika yanzuye ko uyu mwana yishwe mu buryo bw'akarengane k'ubucamanza. Abashyigikiye icyo cyemezo bavuze ko urupfu rwe ari ikimenyetso cy'ivanguramoko n'ubwicanyi bikorerwa abirabura muri Amerika, bikihavugwa n'ubu. Umucamanza yavuze ko Stinney yimwe uburenganzira agenerwa n'itegeko nshinga mu kuburana. Ko nta bimenyetso bigaragara abacamanza bashingiyeho bamuhamya icyaha. George Stinney ni we muntu muto wishwe akatiwe urwo gupfa n'ubutabera bwa Amerika mu myaka irenga 100 ishize. Abantu bamwe batangaje ko bishimiye ko nubwo yishwe mu myaka myinshi ishize, ariko amaherezo ubutabera bwatangaje ko yarenganyijwe. Ahashyinguwe uyu mwana muri leta ya Carolina Mu myaka ya 1940, leta ya South Carolina yari izingiro ry'ibikorwa byemewe n'ubutegetsi by'ivanguraruhu rikabije ku birabura byitwaga 'Jim Crow system'. Mu nkubiri y'imyigaragambyo yadutse ubu muri Amerika kubera iyicwa riheruka ry'abirabura bikozwe n'abapolisi b'abazungu, izina rya George Stinney ryongeye kugaruka nk'ikimenyetso kuri bamwe bavuga ko ibi atari bishya. Bamwe mu bigaragambya mu mbwirwaruhame zabo cyangwa ku byapa bari bitwaje, izina rya George Stinney ryongeye kumvikana. Mu myaka 76 ishize, hari ku wa gatanu ku itariki nk'iyi ya 16/06 mu 1944 nibwo George Stinney w'imyaka 14 yishwe hakoreshejwe intebe y'amashanyarazi atakwirwagamo.

Abantu bambaye ibyo kubakingira mu maso nyuma yo kugera ku kibuga cy'indege cy'i Los Angeles muri Amerika ku munsi w'ejo Visi Perezida Mike Pence yavuze ko ubutegetsi bw'Amerika butazashobora kugera ku ntego yabwo yo gutanga ibikoresho miliyoni imwe muri iki cyumweru byo gupima coronavirus. Hagati aho, inteko ishingamategeko y'Amerika yatoye mu buryo bwihuse bidasanzwe yemera inkunga itubutse y'ingoboka yo kurwanya coronavirus. Ku isi hose, abategetsi bemeje ko abantu barenga 92,000 bamaze kwandura iyo virusi. Umubare munini w'abo bayanduye ku isi - ni ukuvuga abantu 80,552 - ni abo mu Bushinwa, aho iyo virusi yatangiriye. Kugeza ubu, abantu 3,042 imaze kubica muri icyo gihugu. Ibikoresho byo gupima coronavirus by'ikigo cy'Amerika cyo kurwanya no kwirinda indwara (CDC, mu magambo ahinnye y'Icyongereza) Ku munsi w'ejo ku wa kane, umubare w'abamaze kwicwa na coronavirus muri Amerika warazamutse ugera ku bantu 12, bose ukuyemo umwe bakaba ari abo muri leta ya Washington. Ubu muri Amerika hari abantu barenga 200 banduye Covid-19 - indwara y'ubuhumekero iterwa n'iyo virusi - muri leta 20 mu zigize icyo gihugu.

Arteta yatwaye ibikombe bibiri vya FA Cup mu myaka itanu yakiniye Aresenal Uwo mugabo w'imyaka 37 yatsindiye igikombe ca FA Cup kabiri mu myaka itanu yamaze akinira Gunners, akaba asubiriye umunye Espagne Unai Emery, yasezerewe mu kwezi guheze. Arteta yakora nk'umumenyereza w'icegera ca Pep Guardiola wa Manchester City, ikibanza yagiyemwo mu 2016 nyuma yo kuja mu zabukuru nk'umukinyi. Areteta yagize ati "dukeneye kuba turiko turahiganirwa ibikombe vyo ku rwego rwo hejuru muri uyu mukino. "Ivyo ni vyo namenyeshejwe neza na neza mu biganiro nagiranye na banyene ikipe Stan na Josh Kroenke hamwe n'abandi barongozi b'iyi kipe". Azotangura icese akazi nk'umumenyereza wa Gunners kuwa Mungu, areke Freddie Ljungberg abandanye nk'umumenyereza mfatakibanza mu rukino rwo ku wa gatandatu na Everton - iyindi kipe Arteta yakiniye. Arsenal ubu ni ya cumi muri Premier League n'amanota 22. Areteta yongeyeko ati "twese turazi ko akazi katurindiriye katoroshe kugira dushike ku vyo twivuza ariko ndizera ko tuzobishobora. "Sinshobora kwihenda ngo mvuge ko ari ibintu tuzoshikako mu munsi umwe, ariko ikipe dufise ubu irimwo abakinyi bafise impano kandi turafise urwaruka rwiza ruriko ruraduga mw'ishure ryacu."

Tottenham ibaye ikipe ya gatatu yo muri shampiyona ya Premier League Jose Mourinho agiye gutoza Uyu Munya-Portugali w'imyaka 56 wahoze atoza Manchester United, amaze gushyira umukono ku masezerano yo gutoza Tottenham kugeza mu mpera y'umwaka w'imikino wa 2022-2023. Daniel Levy, umuyobozi mukuru wa Tottenham, yagize ati: "Jose ni umwe mu batoza b'umupira w'amaguru bageze ku bintu bikomeye cyane". Mourinho yavuze ko "yishimiye cyane" aka kazi. Mourinho nta kazi yari afite kuva yakwirukanwa na Manchester United mu kwezi kwa cumi na kabiri mu mwaka ushize wa 2018. Aje muri iyi kipe kuri ubu iri ku mwanya wa 14 ku rutonde rw'agateganyo rwa shampiyona, kandi imaze imikino itanu ishize idatsinda. Umukino we wa mbere atoza Tottenham uzamuhuza na West Ham United ku wa gatandatu yayisuye. Mourinho yafotowe ku myitozo ye ya mbere ari kumwe na rutahizamu Harry Kane Pochettino, Umunya-Argentine w'imyaka 47 y'amavuko, yagejeje ku mukino wa nyuma wa Champions League iyi kipe yo mu majyaruguru y'umurwa mukuru London w'Ubwongereza mu mwaka ushize. Yatsinzwe na Liverpool kuri uwo mukino. Pochettino yari ayitoje imyaka itanu. Rutahizamu Harry Kane wa Tottenham yashimiye Pochettino wari umutoza we kubera "kumufasha gukabya inzozi ze". Mu butumwa bwo kuri Twitter yagize ati: "...Wari umutoza ukaba n'inshuti yanjye, kandi ndagushimira uwo mubano. Nkwifurije ishya n'ihirwe mu byo ugiye gukurikizaho!" Mourinho wahoze atoza Chelsea, Porto, Real Madrid na Inter Milan, yagiye yanga akazi kenshi k'ubutoza, harimo nko gutoza mu Bushinwa, muri Espanye na Portugali, kuva yakwirukanwa na Manchester United. Aracyatuye i London kandi yatsindiye ibikombe bitatu bya Premier League na kimwe cya FA mu bihe bibiri yatoje Chelsea. Yanatsindiye igikombe cya Europa League na Carabao Cup atoza Manchester United. Mbere yaho yanatoje Porto y'iwabo muri Portugali ayihesha igikombe cya Champions League. Yatoje kandi Inter Milan yo mu Butaliyani ayihesha ibikombe bitatu birimo na Champions League mu 2010 ndetse atorwa nk'umutoza wa FIFA w'umwaka. Yanatoje Real Madrid ayihesha igikombe cya shampiyona ya La Liga ya Espanye mu 2012. Isesengura rya Dan Roan, umukuru w'ishami ry'imikino rya BBC Tottenham nta na rimwe yigeze igura umutoza uhenze cyangwa usaba byinshi nka Mourinho, cyangwa ngo isohore amafaranga menshi mu kugura abakinnyi nk'abo yari amenyereye mu makipe nka Real Madrid na Manchester United. Ariko Tottenham hari aho yageze hakomeye mu myaka micye ishize itozwa na Pochettino. Ubu ifite ikibuga gishya cyayitwaye miliyari imwe y'amapawundi ndetse n'icyo gukoreraho imyitozo, kandi imaze imyaka ine yikurikiranya y'imikino ikina Champions League. Ubu ifite izina rikomeye i Burayi, kandi ifite abakinnyi bafite impano cyane. Mourinho amaze hafi umwaka umwe atakiri mu butoza, ariko yakomeje kugira urugo i London. Ibibazo yagiriye muri Manchester United byatumye atakaza akabyiniriro ke ka 'Special One' (cyangwa umutoza 'udasanzwe'), ariko ibintu byinshi bikomeye yagezeho mu butoza bituma na n'ubu acyubashywe.

Gnégnéri Yaya Touré w'imyaka 35 ahagaritse guconga ruhago nk'umukinnyi ukomeye kuko yatwaye ibikombe byinshi Dmytro Selyuk ushinzwe kumushakira akazi yemeje uyu munsi ko Yaya Touré yahagaritse gukina ariko adasezeye umupira w'amaguru kuko ahita yinjira mu butoza ndetse yabonye ibyangombwa. Bwana Selyuk avuga ko mu ikipe yanyuma yakinnyemo Olympiacos yo mu Bugereki Touré yakinaga animenyereza gutoza. Ati "Nyiri ikipe ya Olympiacos, aho Yaya yatangiriye ibyo gutoza, yari yaramwemereye ko azamuha amahirwe yo kuba umutoza wungirije". Ntabwo byagenze bityo kuko yahavuye adahawe uwo mwanya ariko Selyuk avuga ko bitazabuza Yaya gukomereza mu byo gutoza umupira. Gnégnéri Yaya Touré w'imyaka 35 ahagaritse guconga ruhago nk'umukinnyi ukomeye kuko yatwaye ibikombe bikurikira:

Abagwanyi ba Al Shabaab baracagenzura uduce twinshi twa Somalia Shukri Abdullahi Warsame yagirijwe kurongogwa incuro 11, atabanje kwahukana n'abagabo biwe ba mbere. Yahambwe gushika kw'izosi, aca ategwa amabuye n'abo bagwanyi gushika acikane, mu gisagara ca Sablale mu ntara ya Lower Shabelle. Mu 2014, Al-Shabab yaricishije amabuye uwundi mugore imwagiriza kurongogwa n'abagabo bane mw'ibanga, muri komine ya Barawe ku nkengera zo mu bumanuko bwa Somalia. Soma ibindi bigiye gusa n'ivyo: Al-Shabab yicishije amabuye umuntu yagirijwe ubusambanyi Somalia: al-Shabab yafashe abagore 100

Igitsindo ca penaliti ca Cristiano Ronaldo kigira ica 41 mu mahiganwa y'uno mwaka Ronaldo yinjije iyo penaliti ku munota wa 97, inyuma yaho umukinyi Medhi Benatia ategeye Lucas Vazquez imbere y'umunyezamu. Umunyezamu wa Juve, Gianluigi Buffon yaciye asohogwa n'umuhagarikizi Michael Olivier yigenjeje nabi. Umugwi wa Real umaze gutwara igikombe ca Champions League incuro zitatu mu mahiganwa ane akurikirana, waje mu rukino rwa kabiri utekeye ibitsindo 3-0 vyo mu rukino rwa mbere. Umugwi Juventus, uwa mbere mw'ihiganwa Seria A ryo mu Butaliyano, warashoboye kugaruza ivyo bitsindo, munyuma uja gukugwa mw'ihiganwa ku munota wa nyuma. Real ihambije imigwi ya Liverpool, Roma na Bayern Munich igiye mu gice ca kabiri, kizokinigwa i Nyon mu Buswisi ku munsi wa Gatanu.

Benshi mu barusimvye ntibagira aho bakika umusaya Abantu amajana abiri na mirongo itanu nibo bimaze kumenyekana ko bahitanywe n'ivyondo vyazanywe n'uwo musozi kuwa gatanu. Imfashanyo ya mbere iramaze gushikira abantu batakigira aho bakika umusaya. Umugabo umwe yavuze ko mu muryango wiwe ata wundi n'umwe yarusimvye, ngo nta kintu na kimwe asigaranye kiretse impuzu yahawe n'abagiraneza. Ngo ntagira ico atamira eka mbere nta n'aho gukika umusaya afise. Uwundi atuye aho vyabereye yavuze ko yabonye umugore atwawe n'ivyondo, ananiwe kugumya ukuboko kw'umugabo wiwe.

Polisi icyeka ko uyu mukecuru w'imyaka 71, yapfuye yituye hasi mu 2016. Umukobwa we w'imyaka 47, ashinjwa ko atabashije gufasha nyina igihe ibyo byabaga kuko ngo "yapfuye hashize iminsi" yituye hasi mu buryo butagombaga kumuhitana. Amagufa y'umurambo w'uyu mukecuru bayasanze hasi mu cyumba muri iyi nzu. Umugore n'umukobwa we bo baryamaga mu kindi cyumba. Umukobwa wapfushije nyirakuru afite imyaka 15 ibi biba icyo gihe - akaba yarabanye n'umurambo wa nyirakuru kuva ubwo, kubera iyo mpamvu ubu nyina arashinjwa "gukomeretsa umwana". Uyu mukobwa ubu yashyikirijwe bene wabo ngo bamwiteho ndetse ari guhabwa ubufasha n'urwego rwo kurengera abana muri Amerika. Ibyaha aregwa bimuhamye, nyina ashobora gufungwa imyaka 20 akanacibwa ihazabu y'amadolari 10 000 (ni hafi miliyoni 10 mu mafaranga y'u Rwanda). Polisi ivuga ko uriya mukecuru yari umwe mu bantu bubashywe mu batuye ako gace, akaba yarakoze akazi karimo kuba umunyamabanga ndetse n'umufasha w'abarimu ku ishuri riri aha, akabikora hafi mu gihe cy'imyaka 35.

Jeanine Mabunda niwe mukenyezi wa mbere yari yizigiwe ngo arongore inama nshingamateka ya Congo Ibi bibaye inyuma y'aho inama nshingamateka isohoreye urwandiko rwo kwiyamiriza uyu mukuru w'inama nshingamateka, Jeanine Mabunda, asanzwe acuditse cane na Josepf Kabila, hamwe n'abo bakorana, bakagirizwa uburongozi bubi. Iyi ni intsinzi kuri Perezida Félix Tshisekedi amaze igihe atumvikana n'uwo yasubiriye, Perezida Kabila. Mu ntango z'iyi ndwi, haradutse akaguma mu nama nshingamateka, biba ngombwa ko igipolisi kiza kubanguranya abari bashamiranye. Jeanine Mabunda, umukuru w'iyi nama nshingamateka, ni akadasohoka na Josepf Kabila, akaba yabogojwe n'amajwi 281 kuri 200. Niwe mukenyezi wa mbere yari yizigiwe ngo arongore inama nshingamateka ya Congo, ariko mu nyuma ico cizere bari bamuhaye kikaba cagiye gisubira inyuma. Abashingamateka begamiye ku ruhande rwa Perezida Tshisekedi bamwagiriza ko ahengamira ku ruhande rwa Kabila mu ngingo ziwe, arico gituma yabogojwe. Wewe arahakana ivyo yagirizwa. Aya matora yatumye abashingamateka benshi baja ku ruhande rwa Perezida Tshisekedi. Ubu rero, ni akanya keza kuri we ko gushira mu ngiro imigambi yatangaje ku wa Mungu uheze, harimwo gushinga reta nshasha avuga ko yomworohereza gukorera bikwiye abanyagihugu ba Congo. Iri bogozwa ry'umukuru w'inama nshingamateka ni uruhombo rudasanzwe kuri Perezida Kabila, yashikirije ubutegetsi mu mwaka uheze inyuma y'imyaka 18 arongoye iki gihugu. Hagti aho, n'aho yari yashikirije ubutegetsi amaze gutsindwa mu matora, yagumanye ibibanza vyinshi mu nama nshingamateka y'igihugu, co kimwe no mu nama nshingamateka z'uburere.

Ingufu za nikleyeri zishobora gukoreshwa mu bikorwa by'iterambere, gusa ibihugu bigira impungenge z'ingaruka zava ku mpanuka z'ikoreshwa ryazo Kuva mu 2018 Uburusiya buvugana n'u Rwanda ku gutunganya no gukoresha ingufu za nikleyeri (cyangwa za atomike, za kirimbuzi) mu bikorwa by'iterambere. Umushinga w'itegeko ry'ikoreshwa ry'izo ngufu mu Rwanda wahise ujya mu nteko wamaganywe n'ishyaka Democratic Green Party of Rwanda (DGPR), ariko uza gutorwa uremezwa. Nyuma y'uko guverinoma yemeje ishyirwaho ry'ikigo gishinzwe izo ngufu, umudepite Frank Habineza ukuriye ishyaka DGPR avuga ko "Abanyarwanda badakeneye izi ngufu za kirimbuzi". Yabwiye BBC ati: "N'ubundi twebwe nka DGPR ntabwo dushyigikiye ibintu by'ingufu za kirimbuzi cyangwa ingufu za nikleyeri cyangwa atomique kuko ni ibintu tubona ko bishobora kurimbura Abanyarwanda benshi cyane". Mu 2019 u Rwanda rwasinye amasezerano n'ikigo ROSATOM cya leta y'Uburusiya gishinzwe iby'ingufu za nikleyeri agendanye no kubaka ikigo cy'ibijyanye n'izi ngufu mu Rwanda. Abategetsi icyo gihe bavuze ko u Rwanda ruteganya gukoresha izi ngufu mu bikorwa birimo ubuvuzi bwa kanseri (radiothérapie), ubuhinzi n'ubworozi, amashanyarazi n'ubucukuzi bw'amabuye y'agaciro. Perezida Kagame w'u Rwanda mu biro bya Kremlin mu 2018 ubwo yari yasuye Perezida Putin w'Uburusiya Bwana Habineza avuga ko ku isi ahandi habaye impanuka z'inganda zitunganya izi ngufu ngo zikoreshwe mu bikorwa by'iterambere, zangije byinshi zinashyira ubuzima bwa benshi mu kaga. Bwana Habineza ati: "Nk'iheruka yabaye mu Buyapani yishe benshi kandi yangiza igihugu, no guhangana n'ingaruka zabyo byasabye Ubuyapani miliyari zirenze $20, ni amafaranga menshi cyane". Impanuka y'uruganda rw'ingufu rwa Fukushima yabaye mu 2011 kubera umutingito na Tsunami yatumye izi ngufu zisohoka zikwira hanze, leta yaho yemeje ko umuntu umwe ari we wapfuye iyo mpanuka ikimara kuba. Gusa habarurwa abantu bari barwaye bagera muri za mirongo bapfuye hafi aho bivugwa ko bishwe n'imirasire (radiation) yica yavuye muri urwo ruganda. Bwana Habineza avuga ko bagaragaje ingaruka mbi z'izi ngufu ku gihugu nk'u Rwanda gifite ubuso butoya n'abaturage batuye mu bucucike. Ati: "Twe turacyahagaze aho twari duhagaze na mbere, ntabwo tubishyigikiye kandi tuzakomeza kugaragaza impamvu tutabishyigikiye, ariko dukoresheje uburyo bw'amahoro, kugeza igihe bazabyumvira". Yongeraho ati: "Igihe cyose tuzakomeza kwerekana impungenge zacu kuri izo ngufu za kirimbuzi. "Ntabwo ari ingufu twumva Abanyarwanda bacyeneye cyane, bacyeneye ingufu zisubira, dufite ingufu ziva mu mazi, mu zuba, dufite za gas methane, dufite za 'peat' dufite ubwoko bwinshi bw'ingufu twakoresha tutagiye mu ngufu za kirimbuzi."

Obiang w'imyaka 48 ni rurangiranwa kubera ingene yifata nk'umuntu w'ikirenga. Ni umuhungu wa prezida w'igihugu ca Guinee Equatoriale kiri muri Afrika y'uburengero. Ntiyari muri sentare igihe yagirizwa kunyuruza itunga ry'igihugu. Ubutunzi afise mu Bufaransa buzofatirwa, harimwo inzu y'akarorero iri mu gace ka Avenue Foch mu gisagara ca Paris. Yaciwe kandi n'ihadabu rya miliyoni 30 z'ama Euro. Obiang yagirizwa gukoresha amahera ya reta mu kwinezereza mu gisagara ca Paris mu Bufaransa. Mu bintu yaguze muri ayo mahera harimwo kugura amazu agezweho afise agaciro karenze amadolari imiliyoni 100, ubwato bugezweho bufise uburebure bw'imetero 76, imodoka nyinshi zigezweho nka Bugatti, Ferrari na Rolls Royces. Abajejwe amatohoza mu Bufaransa baza baramaze kumutegeka gusubiza itunga asiyo harimwo inzu ifise agaciro ka miliyoni 30 z'amadolari i California mugace Michael Jackson yabamwo. Se wiwe, Teodoro Obiang Nguema ari ku butegetsi kuva mu 1979 kandi ni we prezida wo muri Afrika amaze imyaka myinshi ku butegetsi.

Ibyagezweho n'ubu bushakashatsi bigaragaza ko bicyenewe gukaraba intoki no guhanagura 'screens' za telefone mu buryo buhoraho Ibi bikubiye mu bushakashatsi bw'ikigo cy'ubuhanga bwa siyansi cya Australia. Bugaragaza ko iyi virusi izwi nka SARS-Cov-2 ishobora kumara igihe kirekire itarapfa kurusha uko byibazwa. Ariko, ibyageragejwe muri ubwo bushakashatsi byageragejwe ari nijoro. Urumuri rwa UV (ultraviolet) rutangwa ahanini n'izuba rwamaze kugaragazwa ko rwica iyo virusi. Impuguke zimwe zanagaragaje gushidikanya ku byago nyakuri byo kwandura Covid-19 bivuye ku hantu hatandukanye ho mu buzima busanzwe. Ahanini, coronavirus ikwirakwira iyo abantu bakoroye, bitsamuye cyangwa barimo kuvuga. Ariko hari na gihamya ko ishobora gukwirakwizwa n'uduce (particles/particules) irimo turi mu mwuka. Birashoboka ko umuntu yayandura akoze ahantu iri nko ku byuma cyangwa plastike, nkuko bivugwa n'ikigo cy'Amerika cyo kurwanya indwara. Ariko byemezwa ko kwandura muri ubwo buryo bidakunze kubaho. Ubu bushakashatsi buvuga iki nyirizina? Amagerageza yo muri 'laboratoire' yakozwe mbere yagaragaje ko virusi ya SARS-Cov-2 ishobora kumara iminsi ibiri kugeza kuri itatu itarapfa iri ku mafaranga y'inoti no ku birahure. Yanagaragaje ko ishobora kumara iminsi igera kuri itandatu iri ku bikoresho bya plastike cyangwa ibyuma bidafatwa n'ingese, nubwo ibyavuye muri ayo magerageza bigenda bitandukana. Ariko, abashakashatsi bo mu kigo cya CSIRO cya Australia basanze ko iyi virusi ifite "imbaraga nyinshi cyane". Bavuga ko imara iminsi 28 itarapfa iri ahantu nko ku birahure byo kuri telefone ngendanwa no kuri plastike n'amafaranga y'inoti, iyo ibyo biri ku gipimo cy'ubushyuhe cya dogere 20C - kijya kungana n'ubushyuhe busanzwe bwo mu nzu - ndetse n'iyo biri ahantu hatari urumuri. Ugereranyije, virusi y'ibicurane yo ishobora kumara aho hantu iminsi 17 itarapfa. Ubwo bushakashatsi bwatangajwe ku kinyamakuru Virology Journal. Bwanatahuye ko virusi ya SARS-Cov-2 imara igihe gito kurushaho itarapfa iyo iri ahantu hari ubushyuhe bwo hejuru kurushaho kurusha ahakonje. Itakaza ubushobozi bwo kwanduza mu masaha 24 iyo iri ahantu hamwe hari ubushyuhe bwa dogere 40C, nkuko ubwo bushakashatsi bubivuga. Inamara igihe kirekire kurushaho akantu hasennye, hatinjirwamo n'amazi cyangwa umwuka, kurusha ku myenda - iyi basanze itamara iminsi irenze 14 igifite virusi yakwanduza. Ntibuvugwaho rumwe Prof Ron Eccles, wahoze akuriye ikigo cyiga ku bicurane cyo kuri Kaminuza ya Cardiff mu Bwongereza, yanenze ubwo bushakashatsi avuga ko kuvuga ko iyi virusi yamara iminsi 28 ahantu itarapfa ari uguteza "ubwoba butari ngombwa mu baturage". Ati: "Virusi zigera ku hantu zinyuze mu gukorora no kwitsamura no ku ntoki zidasukuye kandi ubu bushakashatsi ntabwo bwigeze bukoresha ibyo bivuye ku muntu nk'inzira ikwirakwiza virusi". Yongeyeho ati: "Uko mbyumva ni uko virusi zanduza zimara ahantu gusa amasaha ziri muri uwo mwanda [umucafu mu Kirundi] uvuye ku muntu aho kuba iminsi". Mu bushakashatsi yasohoye ku kinyamakuru The Lancet mu kwezi kwa karindwi, Emanuel Goldman wigisha isomo ry'ubuzima bw'udukoko (microbiology) kuri Kaminuza ya Rutgers muri Amerika, yavuze ko "ibyago byo kwandurira ahantu hadafite ubuzima ari bicye cyane". Goldman yavuze ko ubushakashatsi buvuga ko hari ibyago byinshi byo kwandurira aho hantu bwakozwe mu buryo "burimo gusa gucye n'ibintu byo mu mibereho yo mu buzima busanzwe". Mu cyumweru gishize, Monica Gandhi wigisha ubuvuzi bw'abantu kuri Kaminuza ya California, yavuze ko coronavirus itandurira ku hantu.

Iyo sake yashyigikiwe n'abantu batandukanye ku isi - ndetse ihinduka ikimenyetso cy'ubukangurambaga buharanira kurinda amajwi yo mu cyaro - ubwo yabaga intandaro y'urubanza rushingiye ku rusaku. Ariko mu mwaka ushize wa 2019, urukiko rwanzuye ko isake Maurice irengana ndetse ikomeza kwidegembya muri urwo rugo rwo ku kirwa cya Oléron mu burengerazuba bw'Ubufaransa. Amakuru avuga ko iyo sake yapfuye mu kwezi gushize kwa gatanu, ariko nyirayo atinda gutangaza iyo nkuru. Radio France Bleu yo muri icyo gihugu isubiramo amagambo ya nyirayo Corinne Fesseau agira ati: "Naribwiye nti kubera iyi gahunda ya 'guma mu rugo', abantu basanzwe bafite byinshi bibahangayikishije". "Twaguze isake yindi kandi nayo twayise Maurice - ibika neza rwose nk'iyo yindi. Ariko ntabwo ishobora gusimbura Maurice wacu". Madamu Fesseau yagerageje kugabanya urusaku rwo kubika rw'isake Maurice ya mbere - harimo no gushyira ibiringiti ku nzu yayo Ibibazo by'isake Maurice byatangiye ubwo umugore n'umugabo bari mu kiruhuko cy'izabukuru bafite inzu abantu baruhukiramo aho ku kirwa cya Oléron, bashinjaga iyo sake kubabangamira mu kubika kwayo. Nuko ihita ihinduka nk'icyamamare ukuntu aho mu Bufaransa - aho isake iri mu birango by'igihugu - nyuma inyandiko igamije kuyirengera ishyirwaho imikono n'abantu babarirwa mu bihumbi za mirongo. Madamu Fesseau, umaze imyaka 35 atuye aho i Oléron, byari kumusaba kwimuka cyangwa agacecekesha isake ye Maurice iyo umucamanza aramuka yanzuye ko koko ifite amakosa. Ariko mu kwezi kwa cyenda mu mwaka ushize wa 2019, umucamanza yemeranyije na ba nyirayo, ategeka abari bayireze gutanga impozamarira y'ama-euro 900 (ni arenga 900,000 mu mafaranga y'u Rwanda). Icyo gihe, ibiro ntaramakuru AFP byasubiyemo amagambo ya Madamu Fesseau agira ati: "Ni intsinzi kuri buri wese wari mu kibazo nk'iki cyanjye. Nizeye ko ibi bizaba intangarugero na bo ntibarenganywe".

Paul Rusesabagina yagaragaye mu rukiko yambaye umwenda w'abafungiye muri gereza zo mu Rwanda Hagati ya 2018 na 2019 umutwe wa FLN - ishami rya gisirikare ry'impuzamashyaka MRCD Bwana Rusesabagina abereye umukuru wungirije - wagabye ibitero byaguyemo abantu mu majyepfo ashyira uburengerazuba bw'u Rwanda. Umunyamakuru wa BBC yangiwe kwinjira mu rukiko, gusa bamwe mu banyamakuru batoranyijwe babyemerewe babwiye BBC ibyabaye n'ibyahavugiwe. Bwana Rusesabagina uregwa ibyaha 13, yabwiye urukiko ko ibyakozwe na FLN atabifata nk'ibyoroshye, ariko we yari "ashinzwe ibya politiki gusa" kandi ko ishami rya gisirikare n'irya politiki bya MRCD "buri kimwe gikora mu bwigenge bwacyo". Ubushinjacyaha bwavuze ko nta buryo Bwana Rusesabagina yakwitandukanya n'ibikorwa by'ubwicanyi n'iterabwoba byakozwe na FLN kuko mu gihe byakozwe uyu uregwa yari perezida w'impuzamashyaka MRCD-Ubumwe. Bwana Rusesabagina n'abamwunganira babwiye uru rukiko ko urw'ibanze rwafashe icyemezo cyo kumufunga by'agateganyo rwirengagije impamvu baruhaye zirimo kuba rwaremeje ko Rusesabagina yateye inkunga y'amafaranga umutwe wa FLN kandi nta bimenyetso bibihamya bihari. Rusesabagina yagejejwe ku rukiko mu modoka y'urwego rushinzwe amagereza mu Rwanda, arinzwe cyane Ubushinjacyaha bwavuze ko nta ngingo zifatika zagaragajwe n'uruhande rw'uregwa zatuma urukiko rwisumbuye rukuraho icyemezo cyo kumufunga cyafashwe n'urukiko rw'ibanze. Bwana Rusesabagina yarezwe ibyaha 13, ibyaha atahakanye cyangwa ngo yemere byeruye muri iki cyiciro cyo kuburana ku gufungwa no gufungurwa by'agateganyo. Nyuma yo kumva impande zombi, urukiko rwisumbuye rwa Nyarugenge rwavuze ko ruzatangaza umwanzuro ku bujurire bwa Bwana Rusesabagina tariki 2 z'ukwezi gutaha kwa 10.

Bwana Guaidó avuga ko ibice vyababa 90 kw'ijana vy'Abanyavenezuela bimushigikiye Abategetsi ba gisirikare gushika ubu baracashigikiye Prezida Nicolás Maduro. Mu kwezi kwa mbere kw'uno mwaka wa 2019, Bwana Guaidó yaritangaje ko ari we mukuru w'igihugu mfatakibanza, aho yaciye ashigikirwa n'igihugu ca Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika. Avuga ko ashigikiwe n'abanyavenezuela "hafi ibice 90 kw'ijana". Ejo ku wa Mungu, abategetsi ba Venezuela bamenyesheje ko bashobora kugabanya amasaha yo gukora ku munsi bakugara n'amashure kubera ikena ry'umuyagankuba. Umushikiranganji w'uguhanahana amakuru w'ico gihugu, Jorge Rodriguez, yamenyesheje kuri televiziyo y'ico gihugu ko abakozi bashobora gukora gushika isaha umunani "kugira ngo umuyagankuba ushobore gusaranganywa bikwiye". Bwana Guaidó yabwiye BBC ko icikagurika ry'umuyagankuba n'ikena ry'amazi - ivyatumye ibikorwa bicumbagira mu mavuriro, mu kwunguruza abantu, no mu bindi bisata - vyatumye abanyagihugu bashavurira leta ya Bwana Maduro. Avuga ati: "Hari imyiyerekano mu burere burenga 20 bw'umugwa mukuru Caracas, no mu zindi ntara za Venezuela. "Abanyagihugu basaba ko basubira kuronswa umuyagankuba n'amazi, ariko kandi ko uwivye ubutegetsi, Nicolás Maduro, aburekura, ubwo bukaba aribwo butumwa nyamukuru". Abanyagihugu ba Venezuela bari mu ngorane z'ikena ry'umuyagankuba n'amazi Leta ivuga ko iryo kena ry'umuyagankuba n'amazi ari ingaruka z'imigumuko yateguwe mu ntumbero yo kwirukana Bwana Maduro ku butegetsi. Ariko, Bwana Guaidó avuga ko Prezida Maduro adashobora kuva ku butegetsi kiretse mu gihe igisirikare ca Venezuela comukurako amaboko. "Birakenewe ko igisirikare kidushigikira kugira ngo ibintu bihinduke mu mahoro muri Venezuela mu bice vyose, harimwo no gukingira abari mu myiyerekano kugira ngo ntibaterwe n'imirwi yitwaje ibirwanisho ishigikiwe na leta". Bwana Guaidó aherutse kubuzwa gusubira kurangura amabanga ya leta mu kiringo c'imyaka 15. Yaramiriye kure ibiherutse kuvugwa ko abasirikare b'Abarusiya baherutse gushika muri Venezuela, akabifata nk'"agasotoro" ka Bwana Maduro kugira ngo "agerageze kwerekana ko hari abamushigikiye kandi mu vy'ukuri atabariho". Avuga ati: "Abarusiya nta ngingo iboneka barafata. Ntibarerekana vy'ukuri ko bamushigikiye, kiretse kumbure amatangazo amwe amwe". Ku munsi wa gatandatu, ishirahamwe Croix Rouge (IFRC) ryaramenyesheje ko rigiye gutangura gutanga imfashanyo mu ndwi zibiri ziza, aho umukuru waryo Francesco Rocca avuga ko rishobora guhera ku bantu bashika ibihumbi 650 bakeneye imfungurwa n'imiti. Mu kwezi kwa kabiri kw'uno mwaka, leta yarabujije imfashanyo zari zitanzwe na Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika ko zinjira muri Venezuela, aho leta yavuga ko ari amayeri ya Amerika yo gutera ico gihugu.

Michael Flynn yatanze imihoho ku munsi wa mbere Michael Flynn yatanze imihoho ku munsi wa mbere bitewe nuko yoba yaravuganye n'ubutegetsi bw'Uburusiya, ku bijanye n'ibihano Amerika yabufatiye, imbere yuko Donald Trump aja mu mabanga. Ku munsi wa kabiri, umuvugizi wo mu biro vy'umukuru w'igihugu yavuze ko Bwana Trump yaramaze indwi amenye ko hari ibibazo bikwezwe n'uguhamagara mu Burusiya. Bamwe mu ba républicains ntibashaka kwumva ko hoba umurwi ataho wegamiye wokora itohoza. Ibintu vyagiye hejuru inyuma yaho itororokanirizo ry'amakuru "New York Times" ritangiye amakuru avuga ko abari mu murwi w'iyamamaza rya Trump hamwe n'abo bakorana, bagiranye imigenderanire kuri telefone hamwe n'abategetsi bo hejuru bo mu kigo c'iperereza c'Uburusiya mu mwaka wakurikiye amatora. Ariko ngo ntacemeza ko umurwi w'iyamamaza rya Trump woba warakoranye n'Uburusiya mu kwabura umurwi "Democratic National Committee" canke mu kwivanga mu vy'amatora. Iruhande y'itohoza rya FBI, inama nkenguzamateka hamwe n'umurwi w'inama nshingamateka ujejwe iperereza, bariko bararabira hamwe ingene Uburusiya bwoba bwarivanze mu matora. Ntawuzi ko bino birego bishasha biri mu vyo bazokurikirana. Kubera iki Bwana Flynn yatanze imihoho? Yakinjuye ku birego bivuga ko yavuganye mu kwezi kwa 12 n'uwuserukira igihugu c'Uburusiya ku bijanye n'ibihano Amerika yabufatiye, imbere yuko Bwana Trump yinjira mu mabanga. Uwo mubonano ngo wabaye igihe prezida w'ico gihe Barack Obama yariko arafatira ingingo Uburusiya, kubera amakuru yavugwa ko bwoba bwashatse guhindukiriza amatora ku ntsinzi ya Bwana Trump. Bwana Flynn ngo yoba yarenze itegeko bita "Logan Act" mu gushira imigenderanire ya Amerika mu minwe y'umunyagihugu asanzwe, imbere yuko agenwa kuba umuhanuzi w'igihugu mu vy'umutekano.

Henry yatwaye ibikombe bibiri vy'ihiganwa ryo muri Espagne hamwe na kimwe c'imigwi yabaye iya mbere iwabo amenyerezwa na Pep Guardiola Henry yatanguriye akazi kiwe ko gukina umupira muri Monaco, asubiye muri uwo mugwi inyuma y'iyirukanwa rya Leonardo Jardim. Yavuze ko yize bushasha ingene bakina umupira, igihe yamenyerezwa na Guardiola muri Barcelone mu myaka irenga cumi iheze. Henry w'imyaka 41 avuga ati:"Pep ni we karorero kuri jewe. Ibintu azana bishasha mu rukino; yama ari hejuru mu rukino." Uwo mufaransa Henry yashize umukono ku masezerano yo gushika mu kwezi kwa gatanndatu 2021, akaba yahevye akazi ko kuba icegera c'umumenyereza w'Ububiligi kugira aje muri ico kibanza. Uwo mukinyi yahoze akinira Arsenal yarafashije Monaco gutwara igikombe c'ihiganwa ryo mu Bufaransa mu 1997, akaba ashikiriye uwo mugwi uri mu kibanza ca gatatu uvuye inyuma mw'ihiganwa ry'uyu mwaka. Urukino rwa mbere rwa Thierry Henry ruzobahuza na Strasbourg itariki 20 z'ukwezi kwa cumi, imbere yo guhura n'umugwi wa Brugge inyuma y'imisi ine, mu nkino z'imigwi yabaye iya mbere iwabo ku mugabane wa Buraya. Mu gushimagiza Guardiola yavuze ati:"Nta guca hirya no hino, ni we karorero kuri jewe. Nasubiye kwiga gukina umupira bushasha igihe naja muri Barcelone ari we amenyereza. " "Uri kumwe na Pep, mushobora kuganira ivyerekeye umupira, arashobora no kutaja kuryama mukabandanya muvuga ivyo umupira, ugasinzira ariko wewe akabandanya avuga". "Umuntu yigira ku bandi; baraguha icigwa. Ariko urakenera kandi kuvanga n'ubundi bumenyi bwawe buke ufise." Abajijwe ivyerekeye mugenzi we w'umufaransa Arsene Wenger, yamumenyereje mu mugwi wa Arsenal kuva 1999 -2007, Henry yavuze ati:"Arsene yuguruye vyinshi mu bwenge bwanje, yatumye ntegera ico ari co kuba umukinyi yabigize umwuga, n'ico ari co gutera imbere. "Sinzopfa naravyibagiye. Murazi imigenderanire nari mfitaniye na we, bimwe mu vyo yakoze nzobigumana." Henry yakiniye kandi Juventus na New York Bulls atanguye akazi k'ubumenyereza inyuma yo kuba umukinyi rurangiranwa harimwo gutwara igikombe c'isi akinira umugwi nserukiragihugu c'Ubufaransa mu 1998 hamwe n'ikombe ca Buraya inyuma y'imyaka ibiri. Uwo yahoze ari umukinyi w'imbere yinjije ibitsindo 51 mu nkino 123 z'Ubufaransa, akaba yahagaritse gukina mu kwezi kwa cumi na kabiri mu 2014 aca aja gukora ku mboneshakure imbere y'uko aja mu mugwi w'abamenyereza umugwi nserukiragihugu w'Ububiligi mu 2016.

Amasatura atungiwe mu ruhongore rwa Kagera mu Rwanda Ishirahamwe African Parks ryavuze ko Krisztian Gyongyi, yishwe n'isatura mu ruhongore rwa Kagera mu Rwanda, ariko arakurikirana ibikoko. Ntiryatanze insiguro zirambuye z'ingene uwo muntu yapfuye. Uwurongoye ishirahamwe Africa Parks, Peter Fearnhead, yavuze ko Bwana Gyongyi ari we yarashoboye ibikogwa vyo kugarukana isatura yirabura mu ruhongore...ko yariko arigisha abakingira ibikoko ingene akazi kabo gakogwa". Yavuze ko hagiye umuntu ahambaye cane cane ku bijanye n'igikogwa co gukingira amasatura muri Afrika. Ayo masatura yashitse mu gihugu c'u Rwanda, avuye mu gihugu ca Afrika yepfo mu kwezi guheze. Isatura yirabura iri mu bwoko bw'ibikoko bigeramiwe bishobora kuzimangana muri Afrika. Gushika mu 2007, amasatura yirabura yose yo mu Rwanda yaramaze kwicwa n'abahiga bidaciye mu mategeko ibikoko vyo mw'ishamba.

Abanyarwanda bo mu bwoko bw'Abatutsi ni bo bibasiwe cyane muri jenoside Nyuma yo kurangiza iperereza, ibiro by'ubushinjacyaha buzafata icyemezo cyo kureba niba bwajyana ikirego mu rukiko. Abacamanza barega bamwe mu bagize guverinoma y'u Rwanda iyobowe na perezida Paul Kagame, guhanura indege yari itwaye uwari umukuru w'igihugu, Juvénal Habyarimana. Iyo ndege yayi itwaye na perezida wategekaga Uburundi Cyprien Ntaryamira. U Rwanda rushinja u Bufaransa kugira uruhare muri jenoside. Iri perereza ryateye amakimbirane n'umubano utameze neza hagati y'ibihugu byombi. Muri 2006, u Rwanda rwahagaritse umubano w'imigenderanire. Nyuma y'imyaka itatu wongeye kuzahurwa.

Théophile Ntirutwa mukwa mbere aheruka yabwiye umunyamakuru mu Rwanda ibyamubayeho igihe yafungwaga Byabaye mu ijoro ryo kuwa mbere mu murenge wa Muyumbu hanze gato y'umujyi wa Kigali, kuri boutique y'ubucuruzi ya Théophile Ntirutwa wo mu ishyaka Dalfa- Umurinzi rya Victoire Ingabire. Iri shyaka rivuga ko abantu icyenda bitwaje intwaro bateye iyi boutique ya Ntirutwa mbere ya saa mbiri z'ijoro - amasaha yo gufunga ibikorwa byose ubu mu gihugu - bagategeka abo basanze bari gusohoka gusubiramo. Madamu Victoire Ingabire uyobora ishyaka Dalfa-Umurinzi yabwiye BBC ko Théophile Ntirutwa yahise yihisha muri 'comptoir', akamuhamagara akamusaba kubatabariza kuko batewe n'abantu bafite imbunda. Ati: "Nahise mubwira nti 'yenda ni ukubera ko amasaha yo gufunga yegereje baragira ngo mufunge vuba'. "Yahise akupa nyuma y'iminota micye arongera arampamagara ambwira ngo tubatabarize kuko babantu bamaze kwica umuntu kandi baboshye n'abandi".
