Mu itangazo ryasohowe n'Ishyaka Dalfa-Umurinzi na PS-Imberakuri, aya mashyaka avuga ko hishwe uwitwa Théoneste Bapfakurera kuko abo bateye babajije uwitwa 'Theo' aho muri Boutique, maze uyu uri mubo bayisubijemo ku ngufu wari uri hafi yabo akababwira ko ari we Theo, bamutera ibyuma arapfa. Madamu Ingabire avuga ko nyuma Ntirutwa yakomeje akamubwira ko bakomeza kubatabariza kuko polisi yatinze kuhagera kandi abateye basize babakingiranye banaboshye abantu muri boutique, bakaba bafite ubwoba ko bagaruka. Abatewe nyuma nibo bafunzwe Bamwe mu batuye mu kagari ka Nyarukombe aho byabereye batifuje gutangazwa babwiye BBC ko uwishwe ari umuturage w'aha hafi kandi abantu bamwe bari kuri iyo boutique bafunzwe. BBC yagerageje kuvugana n'urwego rushinzwe iperereza ku byaha mu Rwanda ariko kugeza ubu ntibirashoboka. Madamu Ingabire Victoire avuga ko icyabatangaje ari uko polisi igeze ahabereye ubwicanyi nyuma yagiye no ku rugo rwa Ntirutwa, ruri hafi y'aho akorera ubucuruzi bakarusaka. Ati: "Nyuma na telephone zabo zahise zivaho ntitwongeye kuvugana ariko twe tukibaza tuti: "abantu barajya kubasaka kandi ari bo batewe?" Ejo kuwa kabiri avuga ko aribwo bamenye amakuru ko nyuma yo kubasaka polisi yatwaye Théophile Ntirutwa, umugore we na mushiki we wari kuri boutique na bamwe mu bari kuri boutique. Ati: "Icyatubabaje ni ukubona umuntu wari wahahamutse kubera kubona bicira umuntu muri boutique ye, aho kugira ngo bamufashe ahubwo niwe bafunze, ni imyitwarire ntari nzi ku nzego z'umutekano. "Ikindi Theophile afite abana babiri umwe w'imyaka irindwi undi itanu, nshimye ko Theophile yari aho icyaha cyabereye, ariko se nk'umudamu we wari uri mu rugo we arazira iki? Abo bana batandukanyije na nyina barazira iki?" Théophile Ntirutwa yigeze gufungwa mu 2016 mu gihe kimwe n'abandi bari mu ishyaka FDU-Inkingi nka Boniface Twagirimana, Fabien Twagirayezu, Léonille Gasengayire na Gratien Nsabiyaremye. Ubujura busanzwe cyangwa ubwicanyi bugambiriwe? Madamu Victoire Ingabire avuga ko bo babona ko ari abari bafite umugambi wo kwica kuko bamaze kwinjiza abantu muri Boutique babajije uwitwa Theo, ubabwiye ko ariwe bagahita bamwica. Ati: "Bamaze kwica nta kintu na kimwe bibye, iyo baba bashaka kwiba bari kugira ibyo batwara". Madamu Ingabire avuga ko Ntirutwa yafunguwe mu kwezi kwa mbere nyuma y'uko inkiko zimugize umwere ku byaha yaregwaga. Akavuga ko abayoboke b'ishyaka rye bagiye bicwa kuva yaza gukorera politiki mu Rwanda. Ko mu bihe bya vuba babuze cyangwa bagapfusha abagera kuri batandatu. Ati: "Inzego zibishinzwe ntizigeze zitugaragariza ababishe ngo nibura dusobanukirwe tuti 'uyu yishwe kuko yari afitanye ikibazo n'uyu', noneho tubitandukanye no kwicwa kubera impamvu za politiki, ni ibyo bidutera urujijo". "Inzego zibishinzwe zifite inshingano yo kudusobanurira tukamenya ngo abo bantu bicwa kubera iki? "Ubaze kuva mukwa 10/2018 urasanga hagati y'amezi atatu cyangwa ane hari umuntu wacu wicwa cyangwa ubura".

Ejo ku cyumweru ubwo ishyaka FNL ryemezaga umukandida waryo Bwana Jacques Bigirimana Abo bakandida batangajwe n'amashyaka yabo ni; Gaston Sindimwo wa Uprona -uyu asanzwe ari visi perezida w'u Burundi - Jacques Bigirimana w'ishyaka FNL na Anicet Niyonkuru wa CDP. Aba baje biyongera ku bakandida babiri bigenga; Francis Rohero n'umuvugabutumwa (pasteur) Dieudonné Nahimana. Hari kandi na Léonce Ngendakumana wa FRODEBU, Kassim Abdul wa UPD Zigamibanga, Keffa Nibizi wa Sahwanya FRODEBU Nyakuri, Fidélité Nibigira wa APDR na Gen Maj Evariste Ndayishimiye wa CNDD-FDD. Ishyaka ritavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi rifatwa nka rimwe mu akomeye mu gihugu Congrès National pour la Liberté (CNL) riyobowe na Agathon Rwasa, ntabwo riratangaza uzarihagararira mu matora. Iri shyaka rimaze igihe rivuga ko abanywanyi baryo bakorerwa ibikorwa by'ihohoterwa bigamije kubaca intege mu gihe igihugu kigiye kwinjira mu matora. "Nta kundi tugomba kujya mu matora" Bwana Jacques Bigirimana watanzwe n'ishyaka Force National de Liberation (FNL) - ishyaka rifatwa nk'irishyigikiye iriri ku butegetsi - asanzwe ari umuyobozi waryo n'umuyobozi wa "Office du The du Burundi" (OTB). Anicet Niyonkuru uyobora ishyaka Conseil Des Patriotes, CDP, ugiye kwiyamamaza, yahoze ari umunyamabanga w'ihuriro ry'abanyapolitiki n'amashyaka atavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi CNARED rikorera mu burayi. Mu kwezi kwa munani gushize yabwiye BBC Gahuzamiryango ko bafite ishyaka ryo gutaha bakajya mu matora nubwo ibintu bitaragenda neza ndetse nta kinini cyahindutse mu Burundi. Yagize ati: "Abatavuga rumwe na leta baracyahohoterwa, impunzi nyinshi ziracyari mu buhundiro kandi tukabona ko amatora bamaze kuyategura nta kizayabuza kuba, tukagira tuti abanywanyi bacu ntibakwiye gutora uwo badashaka". Mu kwezi kwa cumi, Bwana Niyonkuru na bamwe mu bandi bari mu ihuriro CNARED batashye mu Burundi. Mu kwezi kwa karindwi umwaka ushize, Fidélité Nibigira w'ishyaka APDR niwe mukandida wa mbere watangajwe n'sihyaka rye Fidélité Nibigira wa APDR, niwe mugore wenyine umaze gutangaza ko ashaka guhatanira uyu mwanya wo gutegeka u Burundi, ni nawe watangajwe mbere y'abandi nk'umukandida n'ishyaka rye. Umukandida w'ishyaka riri ku butegetsi niwe uhabwa amahirwe yo gutsinda amatora, byemezwa kandi na Johnson Shikwati umwarimu w'imiyoborere (governance) muri Kaminuza zo muri Kenya. Bwana Shikwati avuga ko "Iyo urebye uko kwemeza umukandida wa CNDD-FDD byari bitegerejwe, bikwereka uwari utegerejwe uwo ari we, agomba kuba ari we musimbura wa Perezida Nkurunziza". Gusa uyu mwarimu yemeza ko n'umuntu nka Agathon Rwasa mu gihe yakwemezwa n'ishyaka rye, CNL, nk'umukandida, ashobora kuba umwe mu bahabwa amahirwe menshi. Amatora y'umukuru w'igihugu mu Burundi ateganyijwe tariki 20 z'ukwezi kwa gatanu.

Umuntu anywa itabi n'inzoga Ico cigwa casohowe n'ikigo co mu Bwongereza "Health Survey for England", cerekana ko abantu 9 kuri 10 bafise nimiburiburi ikintu kimwe cemeza ko badafise amagara meza. Abatumura agatabi bakanywa ingero zirenze 14 z'inzoga, barya ivyamwa n'imboga bidakwiye, ugasanga baravyibushe kurenza urugero (obèse) canke ugasanga badakora ikarashishi. Muri ico cigwa cakozwe ku mwaka, abantu bakuze 8000 hamwe n'abana 2000 nibo babajijwe ku bijanye n'ingene babayeho. Ico cegeranyo carashize ahabona ko abana bafise abavyeyi bavyibushe kurenza urugero (obèse), bashobora nabo nyene kuvyibuha bakarenza urugero, ubagereranije n'abana abavyeyi babo bafise ibiro bigereranye. Ibice 28% vy'abana ba nyina bafise ibiro birenze urugero, wasanga nabo nyene bavyibushe cane, ubagereranije n'ibice 8% vy'abana ba nyina batavyibushe ngo barenze urugero. Hagataho ibice 24% vy'abana ba se bavyibushe bakarenza urugero, wasanga nabo nyene ari ukwo, ubagereranije n'ibice 9% vy'abana ba se batavyibushe ngo barenze urugero.

Facebook ifise abanywanyi imiliyaridi zibiri Ico kigo kivuga ko izo nkozizikibi zinjiye mu makonti ziciye muri porogaramu yitwa "View As" kugira ngo zigenzure amakonti y'abantu. Vyamenyekanye ku munsi wa kabiri nkuko Facebook ivuga, ica ibishikiriza igipolisi. Ku munsi wa gatanu abanywanyi bibasiwe n'ubwo bugizi bwa nabi, baca basabwa kwugara amakonti yabo bakayugurura gushasha. Iryo kosa ryo kudakingira bikwiye amakonti y'abanywanyi ryatorewe umuti nkuko bivugwa n'icegera c'uwurongoye igisata "Product Management", Guy Rosen, asigura ko amakonti yibasiwe yasubiwemwo co kimwe n'ayandi imiliyoni 40 mu gutangiriza. Facebook ifise abanywanyi imiliyardi zibiri ku kwezi, umutahe wayo wakorotse ibice 3% ku munsi wa gatanu. Ico kigo kivuga ko izindi mbuga nka AirBnB na Tinder, zishobora nazo nyene kwibasigwa. Ni bande bibasiwe n'ico gitero? Ico kigo camenyesheje ko kidashobora kuvuga abo banywanyi imiliyoni 50 abaribo, ariko ngo cabimenyesheje igisata kibijejwe co muri Irlande. Kivuga ko abakoresha Facebook bugaye bagasubira kwugurura amakonti yabo, batiriwe barahindura amajambo y'ibanga bifashisha mu kwugurura (passwords). "Mu gihe twatanguye amatohoza, turacarondera kumenya ko ayo makonti yakoreshejwe, n'amabanga yabuwe. Ntituzi abakoze ivyo bitero naho baba." Yongeye ati: "Amabanga y'umuntu hamwe n'ugutekanigwa, birahambaye kuri twebwe, kandi turababajwe n'ivyashitse." Ico kigo kivuga ko n'uwatanguje Facebook Mark Zuckerberg n'umukozi wiwe Sheryl Sandberg, bari muri ayo makonti imiliyoni 50 yibasiwe. Bino bisigura iki kuri Facebook? Bino bibaye mu gihe Facebook yariko iragerageza kwemeza abanyamategeko bo muri Amerika n'ahandi, ko ishobora gukingira bikwiye amabanga y'abanywanyi. Uwatanguje Facebook Mark Zuckerberg yavuze kuri telefone ya benshi ku munsi wa gatanu, ko afata ico kibazo c'umutekano w'abanywanyi nka nkama mu gihe haguma haba ibitero vy'abagizi ba nabi. Uwitwa Jeff Pollard icegera c'uwurongoye ikigo Forrester, avuga ko mu gihe Facebook ibitse amakuru menshi y'abanywanyi, ko yokwama yiteguriye gutegwa. "Abatera bahiga ahabitswe amakuru, ivyo bikaba vyatumye Facebook ihamwa," niko yavuze. "Bino bisigura ko Facebook ikwiye kugabanya uburyo bwo kwinjira mu makuru y'abantu." Mu kwezi kwa mbere kw'uno mwaka, Mark Zuckerberg yavuze ko bagiye guhindura bimwe bimwe ku bijanye n'amakuru y'umuntu. Facebook ubu ngo izohora ibwira abanywanyi amakuru yo kwizerwa n'ayatari ayo kwizerwa Umuyobozi nshingwabikorwa ari nawe yashinze urubuga gwa Facebook Mark Zuckerberg, amenyesha ko urubuga rwiwe rugiye kuzohora rubaza abanywanyi inkomoko z'amakuru babona bafitiye icizere kuruta izindi. Ivyo ngo bizotuma Facebook imenya aboba ikwiye guha uburenganzira bwa mbere ku bakeneye kwifashisha urwo rubuga mw'itangazamakuru. Abanyamakuru bavuga ko Facebook yifuza guhagarika amakuru y'ibinyoma no gushikuza. Facebook yafashe iyo ngingo, inyuma y'imyumvikano ikomeye hagati yayo n'ibigo vy'itangazamakuru bifise imirongo ngenderwako ikomeye.

Igitego cya Wydad cyatsinzwe ku munota wa 69 gitsindwa na Walid El Karty. Iyi kipe yatsinze kuwa gatandatu ikipe ya Al Ahly yo mu Misiri 1-0 kimwe ku busa mu mukino wo kwishyura; biba bibaye 2-1 mu mikino yombi. Mu mpera z'icyumweru gishize Wydad na Al Ahly byari byanganyirije 1-1 mu mujyi wa Alexandria. Bubaye ubwa kabiri mu mateka ya Wydad yegukana igikombe cya Afurika cy'amakipe yabaye aya mbere iwayo. Ikipe ya Al Ahly yo imaze kwegukana iki gikombe inshuro umunani zose. Igitego cya Wydad cyatsinzwe ku munota wa 69 gitsindwa na Walid El Karty. Usibye miliyoni 2.5 z'amadolari iyi kipe izabona, izanahagararira Afurika mu irushanwa ry'igikombe cy'isi cya FIFA mu rwego rw'amakipe rizabera muri United Arab Emirates mu kwezi gutaha.

Jean Pierre Nimbona (Kidum) avuga ko azi aho yariye uburozi Kidum yari mu Burundi aho mu mpera z'indwi iheze yari yaremesheje igiteramo c'umuziki aririmbira abanyeshure mu rwego rw'ishirahamwe ry'ibihugu bikoresha igifaransa, Francophonie. Ejo kuwa mbere yategerezwa gusubira muri Kenya aho asanzwe aba kandi anategurira umuziki, ariko abajejwe ikompanyi y'indege ya Kenya Airways bamusubiza inyuma kuko yari aremvye. Kidum mu bitaro i Bujumbura Kidum avuga ko yaciye asubira kwa muganga aca yinjizwa ibitaro, akaba yemereye BBC ko abaganga bemeje ko yatamiye amarozi. Avuga kandi ko aho yoba yaraririye ayo marozi ahazi, ariko ko adashobora kuhavuga mu bitangazamakuru ngo ni igikorwa c'abajejwe umutekano. Kidum yatanguye gutangaza ayo makuru ejo ku rubuga hwaniro rwiwe rwa facebook, abandanya gutangaza uko amerewe uno munsi wose. Umviriza ngaha ikiganiro Kidum yahaye BBC

Col Tom Byabagamba ubwo yari avuye mu rukiko mu kwezi gushize kwa gatanu Byari biteganyijwe ko uyu munsi urukiko ruvuga uko rwasanze Col Tom Byabagamba na 'Jenerali' Frank Rusagara n'umushoferi we bafunzwe, kuko barubwiye ko bafunzwe nabi kandi mu buryo bunyuranyije n'amategeko. Mu mwaka wa 2016, Col Tom Byabagamba wahoze akuriye abarinda Perezida Paul Kagame yakatiwe gufungwa imyaka 21, 'Jenerali' uri mu zabukuru Frank Rusagara akatirwa imyaka 20 naho umushoferi we (wa Rusagara), François Kabayiza, akatirwa gufungwa imyaka itanu. Bahamijwe ibyaha birimo guteza imvururu muri rubanda, kwamamaza nkana ibihuha bangisha abaturage ubutegetsi buriho n'icyaha cyo gusuzugura ibendera ry'igihugu - ibyaha abaregwa bahakanaga bakajurira. Gusa bavuze ko ubujire bwabo bwakumvwa habanje kurebwa uko bafunzwe n'uko barwaye ndetse basabwa ko bajurira barekuye by'agateganyo. Uyu munsi urukiko rwavuze ko nyuma yo kugenzura uko bafunze, ibyo rwabonye rubishyira mu buryo bw'ikoranabuhanga buhuriraho abarebwa n'uru rubanza. Iki cyemezo cyahise kinengwa cyane n'abaregwa bavuga ko urukiko rwari rukwiye kuvugira ku mugaragaro ibyo rwabonye. Umunyamakuru wa BBC wari mu rukiko avuga ko icyo cyemezo cyishimiwe n'uruhande rw'ubushinjacyaha burega aba basirikare. Col Byabagamba na Rusagara bavuze ko bafungiye mu kigo cya gisirikare i Kanombe, buri wese ari mu kato mu cyumba cye kirimo camera ihora ibatunzeho, ko nta buzima bwite bagira. Rusagara yavuze ko bibabaje kuba nta banga na rito agirirwa ngo nibura yambare cyangwa akuremo imyenda nta camera imureba, avuga ko nta tegeko riteganya gufunga umuntu muri ubu buryo. Col Byabagamba na Jenerali uri mu zabukuru, Frank Rusagara (wambaye imyenda y'icyatsi kibisi), ubwo bari mu rukiko mu kwezi gushize kwa gatanu Yavuze ko arwaye, atavuzwa neza kandi yanabujijwe uburyo bwo kugera ku mutungo we ngo yivuze neza. 'Jenerali' Rusagara wahoze ari Perezida w'urukiko rwa gisirikare mu Rwanda, yagize ati: "Barabategeka ngo urubanza muruce gutya, ibi ntabwo ari 'Rule of law ahubwo ni rule by law'". Uwari umushoferi we François Kabayiza, nawe bareganwa, uyu munsi bamuzanye mu rukiko bamutwaye mu maboko kuko atabasha kugenda, yavuze ko ubuzima bwe bumeze nabi kuko yangiwe kujya mu bitaro yandikiwe na muganga. 'Inkiko ziragendera ku mabwiriza' - Byabagamba Abunganira abaregwa muri uru rubanza bo bavuze ko abakiriya babo aho bafungiwe hagenzuwe cyane kandi nta buzima bwite bagira, badasurwa n'ababo ndetse rimwe na rimwe nabo bangirwa kubageraho kandi ari abunganizi babo. Aba bunganizi banenze gereza ya gisirikare ibafunze ngo yavuze ko aho aba bafungiye mu kigo cya gisirikare i Kanombe ari ahaguriwe (extension) ya gereza ya girikare ya Mulindi. Bavuga ko ibi nta tegeko na rimwe ribyemeza, kandi gereza itagurirwa muri kilometero eshanu z'ahantu iherereye. (Gereza ya Mulindi ntiyegeranye n'ikigo cya gisirikare cya Kanombe). Col Byabagamba ahawe umwanya n'urukiko, na we yasubiyemo ko afunze nabi, yongeraho ati: "Izi nkiko zigendera ku mabwiriza kurusha uko zigendera ku butabera n'amategeko". Uyu munsi humviswe cyane uruhande rw'abaregwa bakomeza gutanga inzitizi zabo z'uburwayi n'uko bafunzwe nabi mbere y'uko haburanishwa ubujurire bwabo. Urukiko rwavuze ko ku itariki 21 y'uku kwezi kwa gatandatu ruzatangaza umwanzuro niba abaregwa bafunze bidakurikije amategeko nk'uko babivuga ndetse niba barekurwa by'agateganyo nk'uko babisabye. Ubujurire bwabo bugakomeza nyuma y'ibi.

Imyuzure yatewe n'imvura y'isegenya ku Buterere mu gisagara ca Bujumbura mu 2017 Ubushikiranganji bw'umutekano mu Burundi bubicishije ku rubuga rwa Twitter bumenyesha ko abandi indwi bakomeretse, abandi na bo bashika cumi baburirwa irengero. Ivyo vyabaye ku mitumba ya Nyempundu, Gikomero, na Rukombe ya zone Nyakarabo. Ubwo bushikiranganji bumenyesha ko ivyo bitigiri bikiri ivy'imfatakibanza kuko ibikorwa vyo kurondera bikibandanya. Buvuga kandi ko hariho n'amazu ataramenywa igitigiri yatwawe n'iyo mvura. Imvura nyinshi igize iminsi ihitana abantu n'ibintu mu bihugu bimwe vyo mu karere ka Afrika y'ubuseruko. Abahinga mu vy'ikirere baragabisha ko imvura y'isegenya ishobora kubandanya igwa gushika mu mpera z'uku kwezi muri ako karere.

Neymar amaze gutsindira Paris Saint-Germain ibitego 34 mu mikino 37 amaze kuyikinira muri shampiyona kuva yayigeramo mu kwezi kwa munani kwa 2017, ayifasha kugenda yisubiza igikombe cya shampiyona ya Ligue 1 yo mu Bufaransa Manchetser United yemeye amasezerano ya miliyoni 6.2 z'amapawundi ku mwaka yo kugura rutahizamu Mario Mandzukic w'imyaka 33 y'amavuko ukinira Juventus. Uyu mukinnyi ukomoka muri Croatia ashobora kuzagurwa miliyoni 15 z'amapawundi cyangwa akagurwa muri gahunda yo guhinduranya abakinnyi ku mpande zombi akaguranwa rutahizamu Romelu Lukaku, Umubiligi w'imyaka 26 y'amavuko ukinira United. Uyu mukinnyi w'Umwongereza w'imyaka 30 y'amavuko, ubu nta kipe afite akinira nyuma yaho aviriye muri West Ham United. (Mirror) Biteganyijwe ko Tottenham ishyira Josh Onomah, Umwongereza w'imyaka 22 y'amavuko ukina hagati mu kibuga, mu masezerano ya miliyoni 30 z'amapawundi arimo no kugura Ryan Sessegnon, myugariro w'imyaka 19 y'amavuko wa Fulham n'uw'ikipe y'igihugu y'Ubwongereza y'abari munsi y'imyaka 21 y'amavuko. (RMC, via Express) Abdoulaye Doucouré Rutahizamu Neal Maupay w'imyaka 22 y'amavuko ukinira ikipe ya Brentford agiye kwerekeza mu ikipe ya Brighton kuri kontaro y'imyaka ine. (L'Equipe) Brighton izagura Maupay amafaranga menshi ya mbere mu mateka yayo izaba itanze mu kugura umukinnyi. (Gazzetta Dello Sport) Mauro Icardi Josep Maria Bartomeu, Perezida w'ikipe ya Barcelone, yabaye nk'uca amarenga ko iyi kipe ifite igikombe cya shampiyona ya Espanye ishobora kugura n'undi mukinnyi, nyuma yo kwemeza ko Junior Firpo, myugariro w'imyaka 22 w'Umunya-Espanye, yamaze kuyigeramo avuye muri Real Betis. (Sport) Virgil van Dijk, myugariro wa Liverpool, kera kabaye yanyujijweho umupira ubwo ejo ku cyumweru iyi kipe yatsindwaga kuri penaliti na Manchester City, ikayitwara igikombe cya Community Shield muri uwo mukino wari warangiye ari igitego 1-1. Buyoya yahamijwe na sentare mu Burundi uruhara mu kugandagura uwamusubiriye mu 1993, ivyo wewe yiyamiriza Itangazo Bwana Buyoya wenyene yarungikiye BBC rivuga ko abafatiwe ibi bihano bavuga ko bafise uburenganzira bwo kwungururiza mu masentare yo mu gihugu canke mpuzamakungu. Sentare ntahinyuzwa mu Burundi yakatiye Bwana Buyoya - yatwaye u Burundi ubugira kabiri (1987 - 1993 na 1996 - 2003) - hamwe n'abandi bantu 15 umunyororo wo guherayo. Abandi batatu baciriwe gupfungwa imyaka 20 nayo umwe yambitswe izera. Abaciriwe urubanza bose hamwe ni 20 - benshi bahoze ari abasirikare bakuru - bane (4) muri bo ni bo basanzwe bapfunze uwundi yahora yidegemvya mu Burundi, abandi bose baba hanze. Iri tangazo rivuga ko uru rubanza rufise imvo za politiki "na rirya rwatanguye inyuma y'indyane za politike zadutse mu 2015". Rivuga ko urubanza rwabo "rwatanguye mu gihe igihugu cari mu ndyane zishingiye ku kiringo ca gatatu ca Perezida Pierre Nkurunziza cari giteye kubiri n'ibwirizwashingiro". Bavuga ko intumbero y'uru rubanza "kwari ukurondera kwiyegereza abanyagihugu ku mvo za politike n'ubwoko, bitegurira amatora aheruka ya 2020". Bavuga kandi ko uru rubanza rwaciwe kugira ngo "bace imitima abanyagihugu mu gihe bwaca bibuka igandagurwa rya Perezida Melchior Ndadaye", igikorwa cabaye uyu munsi ku wa gatatu. Uru rubanza rwarigeze gutanguzwa mu mpera za 1998, ariko hafatwa abo benshi bavuze ko bari abantu bato bato cane batari kuba ari bo bateguye igandagurwa ry'umukuru w'igihugu. Mu 2019 Leta yasohoye imitahe yo gufata abari abasirikare bakomakomeye hamwe na Bwana Pierre Buyoya, intumwa y'ishirahamwe ry'ubumwe bwa Afrika mu karere ka Sahel, ubu uba muri Mali. Aba bipfuzwa n'ubutungane ntibigeze bafatwa n'igipolisi mpuzamakungu ngo bashikirizwe u Burundi, ntibizwi neza niba icemezo gishasha ca sentare kizotuma bafatwa. Iyi sentare yategetse kandi ko bose hamwe bishura hafi imiliyaridi 103 z'amafranga y'u Burundi, ku bushake bwabo canke ku nguvu. Aba baciriwe urubanza bavuga ko kuva mu ntango batigeze bahabwa uburenganzira bwo guserukirwa na rirya basanzwe "baba hanze kubera imvo z'umutekano wabo". Bavuga ko abashikirizwamanza mpuzamakungu babo "leta yabigije inyuma ibima impusha zo kwinjira mu Burundi kugira ngo bababuranire". Itangazo ryabo rivuga ko urwo ari urubanza ruteye kubiri n'amategeko.

Andrés Manuel López Obrador yemeye ko azohindura cane igihugu Uwo mugabo yahora ari umukuru w'igisagara ca Mexico, akunze guhamagagwa kw'izina Amlo rigizwe n'indome zitangura amazina yiwe yose, ababikurikirana basanga yotsinda ku majwi 53%. Bamwe mu bo bahiganwa baza bamaze kwemerera ko barushijwe. Bwana López Obrador yiyemeje kugwanya ingeso y'ibiturire n'abanyuruza itunga ry'igihugu. Ntiyakunda kuvuga ururimi rumwe na Prezida Donald Trump, akavuga ko imigenderanire na Amerika igiye gukurikiranirigwa hafi. Bamwe mu batavuga rumwe nawe bafise amakenga ko ivyiyumviro vyiwe bishobora kubangamira ubutunzi bwa Mexique, bukamera nk'ubwa Venezuela buguma bukoroka. Bwana López Obrador yakejwe na Jose Antonio Meade (hagati) na Ricardo Anaya (i buryo) Bwana López Obrador avuga ko ari "ijoro rizoja mu mateka", akaba yahamagariye abanya Mexique gusubirana, avuga ko agiye kwicarira amasezerano yapfunditswe ku bijanye n'amasoko ntanganguvu kubera ibiturire biyavugwamo. "Ingeso y'ibiturire niyo yerekana ubutegetsi buriko buratemba. Turemera ata nkeka ko iyo ngeso mbi ari yo ituma ukutangana mu vy'ubutunzi n'imibano, ivyo biturire bigatuma haduka n'ubwicanyi mu gihugu," niko yavuze. Yavuze ko ata muntu numwe yaranzwe n'ingeso y'ibiturire azokingigwa ikibaba, ndetse ko n'abazi ko ari "abavukanyi b'igihe c'ingwano"bazofatwa. Ibiharuro vyifashe gute? Ku biharuro vya nyuma vyashikirijwe n'ikigo kijejwe amatora "Mexican electoral institute", vyerekana ko Bwana López Obrador ari we yatsinze mu kuronka amajwi yikuvye kabiri karenga ay'uwumwegereye. Niyo ntsinzi ikomeye yibonekeje kuva igihe c'amatora co mu myaka yi 1980. Ricardo Anaya, umukandida w'umugambwe w'abagendera ku vyiyumviro vya kera "National Action Party" (PAN), niwe asa n'uwuza gukurikira Bwana López Obrador. Ingene ibitigiri vyifashe muri kino gihe "Ndemera intsinzi yiwe, ndamukeje, kandi ndamwipfurije kuroranigwa ku neza ya Mexique," niko Bwana Anaya yavuze. Umukandida w'umugambwe wari ku butegetsi José Antonio Meade, ari mu kibanza ca gatatu mu bitigiri mfatakibanza, yavuze ko yipfurije uwatsinze "ukuroranigwa cane". Amerika na Mexique Bwana López Obrador yamye atemera politike ya Bwana Trump avuga ko "azomwereka ukuri", avuga ko politike yiwe ku bimukira "ataco inezwe" kandi ko "ishingiye ku macakubiri". Ivyo ntivyabujije ko Bwana Trump amukeza, mu butumwa yarungitse ku buryo bwa Twitter.

Abagore bariko bararira iruhande y'umwe muri 7 bishwe mu gitero giheruka i Beni kuwa 22/09/2016 Abenshi muri bapfuye batwawe, abandi bafashwe n'umutima. Amakuru ava muri Beni avuga ko ibintu vyagiye kuyangara igihe umusirikare yari mu mwambaro usanzwe yatangura kurasa mu kirere. Abaharanira uburenganzira bwabo bavuga ko abantu bagera ku 1000 bamaze kwicwa kuva mu myaka ibiri iheze muri Congo, mu bitero bikekwa ko bikorwa n'umurwi ADF Nalu uturuka mu gihugu kibanyi ca Uganda.

Umunyagihugu ariko aratora muri Amerika Ingo zibiri z'ubuserukizi bw'Uburusiya nazo nyene zugawe, imwe y'i New York hamwe n'iyindi y'i Maryland, niko iryo tororokanirizo ry'amakuru ryabandanije rivuga. Prezida Obama yavuze ko ivyo bikorwa vyo gutoba amatora vyoba vyahimirijwe n'abategetsi bo hejuru bo muri reta y'Uburusiya, kandi ko abanyamerika bose bakwiye kwitegurira ivyo Moscou ishobora guhita ikora. Moscou yahakanye ivyo birego.

Minisitiri Philip Mpango yatangaje izo ngamba - byitezwe ko zitangira gukurikizwa guhera mu ntangiriro y'ukwezi gutaha kwa karindwi - ubwo ku munsi w'ejo ku wa kane yatangazaga ingengo y'imari y'umwaka utaha. Myinshi mu misatsi y'imikorano yambarwa n'abagore muri Tanzaniya itumizwa mu mahanga. Muri iki gihugu, imisatsi nk'iyo ihendutse cyane kuri ubu igura amadolari y'Amerika arenga ane, ariko ishobora no kugeza ku madolari 130 y'Amerika. Bwana Mpango yanakuyeho isonerwa ry'umusoro ku nyongeragaciro ku bikoresho abagore bifashisha mu gihe bari mu mihango. Yavuze ko impamvu ari uko abaguzi babyo nta nyungu baboneye mu igabanuka ry'igiciro kuko abacuruzi batagabanyije igiciro nyuma yo gusonerwa uwo musoro. Abagore benshi muri Tanzaniya bagannye amatsinda atandukanye yo ku rubuga rwa WhatsApp mu kwinubira izo ngamba nshya, bagashinja leta kubahana. Izindi nyongera ku musoro zatangajwe zirimo nk'umusoro kuri za shokola (chocolat / chocolate) n'ibisuguti (biscuits) washyizwe kuri 35 ku ijana (35%), mu gihe wari usanzwe uri kuri 25 ku ijana (25%).

Angelina Jolie, ubwo ku wa gatatu yafotorerwaga mu kumurika filime Maleficent: Mistress of Evil, i London mu Bwongereza Uyu mukinnyi wa filime wo muri Amerika - ukina no muri filime Maleficent: Mistress of Evil - yanavuze ko abakinnyi ba filime b'abagore badakwiye kugaragazwa nk'abantu bafite imbaraga z'umubiri kugira ngo bakunde baboneke ko bakomeye. Aganira n'abanyamakuru mu imurika ry'iyo filime, Jolie yagize ati: "Ntekereza ko, kenshi cyane, iyo hari kubarwa inkuru igira iti, 'uyu ni umugore ukomeye', agomba kuba akubita umugabo, cyangwa agomba kumera nk'umugabo, cyangwa agomba kumera nkaho adacyeneye umugabo". Akomoza ku byo akina muri iyo filime ndetse no kuri Princess Aurora ukinwa na Elle Fanning, Jolie yagize ati: "Twembi ducyeneye cyane kandi dukunda ndetse tukigira ku bagabo". "Rero ntekereza ko ari n'ubutumwa bw'ingenzi ku bakobwa bakiri bato, gutahura ububasha bwabo, ariko bakubaha ndetse bakanigira ku bagabo bari hafi yabo". Elle Fanning (ibumoso) na Angelina Jolie bombi bavuga ko kugaragazwa nk'abafite imbaraga z'umubiri atari byo bikwiye gusobanura ko abagore bakomeye Yongeyeho ati: "Dufite abagore bakomeye, ariko ikintu kitari cyo muri filime kandi gikwiye gukurwamo nanone ni umugore". "Tugaragaza abagore b'ingeri zitandukanye, hagati yacu, ariko nanone dufite abagabo badasanzwe muri filime, kandi rwose iyo ngingo ndashaka kuyishimangira". Filime Maleficent: Mistress of Evil - ikomeza inkuru ya filime Maleficent yo mu mwaka wa 2014 - izasohoka mu Bwongereza mu mpera y'uku kwezi kwa cumi. Irimo abandi bakinnyi nka Ed Skrein, Chiwetel Ejiofor na Michelle Pfeiffer. Ku wa gatatu w'iki cyumweru nibwo iyi filime yamuritswe mu murwa mukuru London.

Ubuzima bw'ako gakobwa katavuga buriko burasubira mu buryo Ako gakobwa, koba gafise imyaka iri hagati y'umunani na 10, katowe mu ndwi ziheze mw'ishamba rya Uttar Pradesh. Abaganga bavuga ko katashobora kuganira kandi ko kari gasigaye gasa n'inkende. Umupolisi mukuru yabwiye BBC y'igihindi ko katowe gakina n'inkende, kigana ivyo zikora, igihe igipolisi kigiriye kugatabara. Abanyagihugu nibo babonye ubwa mbere ako kana mu kirindiro c'ibikoko vyo mw'ishamba ca Katarniaghat, ku rubibe rw'Ubuhindi na Nepal. Umupolisi Suresh Yadav, yavuze ko inkende zateye abapolisi bari kumwe igihe bari bagiye kukavana murizo. Abaganga bavuga ko kaboneka ko kadafungura neza igihe bagashikana gafise imishatsi miremire n'inzara ndende, n'ibikomere ku mubiri. Muri kino gihe amagara yako ngo yifashe neza, ariko ngo bitegekanijwe ko kajanwa mu kigo kirera abana no ku bahinga ngo gashobore gusubizwa mu buzima busanzwe.

Bobi Wine yari agiye kumara ibyumweru bibiri atemerewe kuva murugo Robert Kyagulanyi w'imyaka 38, azwi cane kw'izina ry'umuririmvyi nka Bobi Wine, niwe yari akomeye cane mu bantu 11 bahiganywe na prezida Yoweri Museveni w'imyaka 76. Museveni amaze imyaka 35 ariwe atwara Uganda. Kuva ku munsi w'amatora urugo rwa Bobi Wine rwaciye rukikuzwa n'abajejwe umutekano, nta wasohoka, nta winjira. Noneho, ikinyamakuru Daily Monitor c'aho muri Uganda,muri iyo nyandiko yaco yo kuri twitter kivuga ko ku ncuro ya mbere kuva itariki 14 ukwez kwa mbere, Bobi Wine yavuganye n'abamenyeshamakuru. Ku wa mbere sentare yari yategetse ko abasirikare n'abaporisi bava ku rugo rwa Robert Kyagulanyi. Ariko , nk'uko abanyamakuru babibonye, iyo ngingo ntiyashotse yubahirizwa. Ayo matora yatsinzwe na prezida Yoweri Museveni ku majwi 58.64%. Bobi Wine yaje ubwa kabiri ku majwi 34.83% ariko ntiyemera ivyavuye mu matora.

Perezida Tshisekedi wa DR Congo na Magufuli wa Tanzania Kuri Twitter, minisitiri w'ubwikorezi mu Bwongereza Grant Shapps yavuze ko iyi ngingo igamije kwirinda ikwirakwira ry'ubwoko bushya bw'iyi virus bwo muri South Africa. Yanditse ati: "Abagenzi bose bavuye muri ibyo bihugu, uretse Abongereza n'abandi bafite uburenganzira bwo kuhatura, ntabwo bazemererwa kwinjira". Mu ntangiriro z'uku kwezi, abagenzi 11 bavuye mu bihugu byo muri Africa y'amajyepfo bangiwe kwinjira mu Bwongereza kubera impamvu nk'izi. Mu gihe muri DR Congo hamaze gutangazwa abantu barenga gato 20,000 banduye coronavirus, uko ibintu byifashe muri Tanzania ntibizwi kuko leta nta mibare itangaza. Mu kwa gatandatu umwaka ushize, Perezida John Magufuli yatangaje ko "nta coronavirus iri muri Tanzania" kubera amasengesho y'abaturage. Gusa, ishami ry'umuryango w'abibumbye rishinzwe ubuzima ku isi ryagiye ritangaza impungenge ritewe n'imigirire ya leta ya Tanzania kuri iki cyorezo. Abategetsi muri Tanzania na DR Congo ntacyo baratangaza kuri iki cyemezo cy'Ubwongereza.

Ayo mafoto y'abo bakobwa baja mu miryango yahawe BBC yonyene Abo bakobwa bakiri bato barekuwe mu kwezi kwa cumi inyuma yaho igihugu c'Ubuswise hamwe n'umuryango wo gutabara " International Red Cross" bumvikanye na Boko Haram. Kuva ico gihe, abo bakobwa 21 baciye bajanwa n'ubutegetsi bwa Nigeria mu bunyegero aho bigana ivyabashikiye. Umwe muri abo bakobwa, Asabe Goni, w'imyaka 22, yabwiye itororokanirizo ry'amakuru Reuters ko ari "igitangaro" kubona yagarutse muhira agafasha nyina gutegura ivya Noweli no kuja mu misa ku musi wa Noweli. "Sinibaza ko nogarutse (muhira),"niko yavuze. "Nta cizere nari ngifise co kuja muhira." Bano bakobwa bafotowe mu kwezi kwa gatanu 2014, imisi mike banyurujwe Benshi mu bakobwa banyururijwe Chibok bari abakristu ariko bumvishwa ko bategerezwa kwinjira mu idini rya Islamu no kurongogwa n'ababafashe iyo bari bajanywe. Goni yavuze ko hari abakubiswe banse kurongogwa ariko ngo baragaburigwa gushika igihe indya zikeheye. Ku bakobwa 276 bafashwe, 197 ntibaraboneka, ibiganiro vyo kubarekuza bikaba bibandanya.

Isley Lynn afise ikibazo ca "vaginisme" kuva akiri muto "Si iminsi yose ushobora kugenzura ingene umubiri wawe uja kwigenza. Uba ubifisemwo canke utabifisemwo uruhara." Igihe Isley Lynn yibuka ingene yaranguye ubwa mbere amabanga mpuzabitsina akiri muto, abivuga nk'umuntu atari ubwa mbere abikora. "Nasanze bibabaza cane. Numva umengo ndarangiye. Niyumvamwo amakosa kandi ayo makosa atanturutseko. " Mu gihe benshi muri twebwe bashobora kwegekwako amakosa yo kutavyifatamwo neza igiye baranguye amabanga mpuzabitsina ubwa mbere, ivyashikiye Isley vyo bituruka ku ngorane y'amagara. Isley akwije imyaka 30 muri kino gihe, aracumva ububabare butewe n'igitsina ciwe, akaba yaranditse igikino yise "Skin a Cat" asiguramwo ivyamushikiye. Igikino "Skin a Cat" kivugwamwo umugore yarafise ikibazo ca "vaginisme" Ikigo kijejwe amagara "National Health Service" (NHS) gisigura ijambo "vaginisme" ko ari igihe igistina-gore gisa n'ikigize ubwoba kikiyegeranya iyo hari ikintu kigiye kucinjiramwo. Imitsi yaco iratimba, kandi umugore ntaco aba afise yobihindurako ico gihe. Umukobwa afise iyo ngorane ntashobora gukoresha "tampon", agakoresho ko mu butinyanka (raba ifoto munsi), biramugora kurangura amabanga mpuzabitsina, akumva umengo ariko arasha, akababara cane. Isley avuga ati: "Nakoresheje ubwa mbere "tampon" mfise imyka 10. Sinashobora kuvyihanganira, wamengo nta mwobo uriho, ukamengo ikibanza categerezwa kubamwo umwobo kirimwo uruhome. "Naciye menya ko hari ikintu kitagenda neza, inyuma yaho mbonaniye ubwa mbere n'umuhungu twakundana." Abagira ububabare buturuka ku gistina baragira ingorane iyo bakoresha "tampon" Ivyo vyarakozeko Isley na cane cane mu migenderanire yiwe n'abagenzi. "Numva mfise ubwoba, mbona ko abo duhura bahava biyumvira ngo sindabakunda ca nke ko ndabirengagiza," niko yavuze. Uwo mwanditsi w'ibikino yatowe ko afise ingorane ya "vaginisme" akiri muto, aravugwa hakoreshejwe ibikoresho vyo kwagura igitsina, biracagura kandi bituma imitsi yaco yirekura. Isley avuga ko inyuma yo kugerageza ubwo buryo, yasanze bitamufasha kandi bidashobora kumuzanira umunezero. Kuvura ububabare buturuka mu gitsina-gore, harakoreshwa impanuro ku vy'amabanga mpuzabitsina hamwe n'uburyo bwo kumenyereza umubiri "Umuhinga w'umu "thérapeute" niwe yampagaritse ambaza ko nipfuza kumera nk'abandi. "Nico kiganiro wumva mu gice ca nyuma c'igikino. Uwo mukinyi abazwa ico yipfuza ku bijanye n'ubuzima bwiwe ku vy'amabanga mpuzabitsina. "Abona ko adashobora kugira ubuzima bushingiye ku gitsina ngo aryohegwe nk'abandi bose. Umuhungu n'umukobwa baryamye Biragoye kumenya abagore bafise ikibazo ca "vaginisme" mu gihugu c'Ubwongereza, naho mu cigwa cakozwe bivugwa ko umwe mu bagore 10 bo mu Bwongereza basanga kurangura imibonano mpuzabitsina bibabaza. Ivyo bitigiri bishobora kuba vyaturutse ku zindi mvo - ariko ingorane ya "vaginisme" ikabamwo. ""Vaginisme" si ububabare igihe c'imibonano mpuzabitsina, ahubwo ituruka ku mubiri ingene wigenza ico gihe," niko bisigugwa na Dr Vanessa Mackay akora ku bitaro "Queen Elizabeth University Hospital" vy'i Glasgow. "Biragoye kuvuga igitigiri c'abagore bafise ico kibazo bitewe nuko abagore bababazwa n'imibonano mpuzabitsina batabiserura," niko Dr Mackay abandanya avuga. Uretse imvo zituruka ku gitsina, iyo ngorane ifatiye no mu mutwe, kwumva ubwoba iyo hari umuntu agira yinjire mu gitsina. Hari impanuro zijanye n'imibonano mpuzabitsina zikoreshwa, nkuko bivugwa na Dr Mackay: "Ni uburyo bwo kuganiriza umukobwa kugira ngo ahindure ukwo afata umubiri wiwe. "Gukora ikarashishi ituma imitsi y'igitsina yirekura, hamwe n'ikarashishi umuntu akora aryamye hasi, birafasha kugabanya ikibazo ca "vaginisme". "Hari n'ubuhinga bwo kumenyereza igitsina, aho bacinjizamwo ibikoresho vyabigenewe, bituma kimenyera kwumva ibicinjiramwo." Teresa yagerageje gusinzira ngo agabanye ububabare bwo mu gitsina-gore Teresa w'imyaka 23 nawe nyene yarafise ikibazo ca "vaginisme", avuga ko yahawe uburyo bwinshi bwo kurangiza iyo ngorane. "Umwe mu bampa impanuro yansavye ko ngerageza uburyo bwo kwisinziriza ndi ahantu hatabona, ariko ntivyashobotse. Ndafise ingeso yo kugira amakenga, igihe cose naba ndi aho hantu nagira nti, 'Bino ntibiza gukunda kuri jewe'," niko Teresa avuga. Yabandanije ati: "Icashobotse iwanje ni ibikoresho vyo kwagura igitsina "dilators" aho wiyigisha wenyene ingene wirekura ubikoresheje. "Muri kino gihe ubuzima buraryoshe, nta makenga bikintera. Meze neza, ndanezerewe. Vyari bigoye mu ntango, ariko nibaza ko iyo ubitoreye inyishu bica vyoroha."

Col Malick Diaw yungirije umukuru w'ikigo cya gisirikare cya Kati aho kugumuka kw'abasirikare kwatangiriye Ishami rya BBC Monitoring ryakusanyije amakuru ajyanye n'imyirondoro y'abasirikare bakuru batatu byibazwa ko ari bo bagize uruhare rukomeye muri iyo 'coup d'état'. 1. Col Malick Diaw Yungirije umukuru w'ikigo cya gisirikare cya Kati aho kugumuka kw'abasirikare kwatangiriye. Hari amakuru macye cyane avuga ku buzima bwe, usibye kuba gusa hari amakuru avuga ko aherutse kugaruka mu gihugu avuye mu mahugurwa mu Burusiya. Kuri uyu wa gatatu, yagaragaye ahagaze iruhande rwa Col-Major Ismaël Wagué, wungirije umukuru w'ingabo zirwanira mu kirere, wasomye itangazo mu izina ry'agatsiko kafashe ubutegetsi, wavuze ko ubutegetsi ubu buri mu maboko y'igisirikare. Ubutumwa bwo kuri Twitter bumuvugaho bwagize buti: "Colonel Diaw byemezwa ko ari we wayoboye imigumuko y'abasirikare ku kigo cya Kati, kuri kilometero 15 uvuye i Bamako. "Bivugwa ko yasabye perezida wa repubulika kuva ku butegetsi mbere ya saa munani z'amanywa [saa kumi zo mu Rwanda no mu Burundi]". 2. Col Sadio Camara Col Camara yahoze akuriye ishuri rya gisirikare rya Kati. Urubuga rw'amakuru Mali Tribune rwatangaje ko yavutse mu mwaka wa 1979 (afite imyaka 41), avukira i Kati, mu karere ka Koulikoro mu majyepfo y'igihugu. Yize mu ishuri rya gisirikare rya Koulikoro, arirangiza n'amanota ya mbere. Nuko yoherezwa mu majyaruguru ya Mali aho yakoreye akazi akuriwe na Jenerali El Hadj Gamou kugeza mu mwaka wa 2012. Uko byaje kugera kuri coup d'etat muri Mali Nyuma yaho, Col Camara yabaye umukuru w'ishuri rya gisirikare rya Kati, umwanya yagumyeho kugeza mu kwezi kwa mbere muri uyu mwaka wa 2020 ubwo yajyaga mu mahugurwa mu Burusiya. Ikinyamakuru Mali Tribune cyatangaje ko yagarutse i Bamako mu ntangiriro y'uku kwezi kwa munani aje mu kiruhuko cy'akazi cye cy'ukwezi kumwe. Urubuga rwa internet rw'iki kinyamakuru rugira ruti: "Col Camara yakundwaga na buri wese aho yakoze kandi arubashywe ndetse akundwa cyane n'abasirikare akuriye. Kuri bo, agaragaza gukora igikwiye, kutajenjeka no kugira intego [intumbero]". 3. Jenerali Cheick Fanta Mady Dembele Jenerali Cheick Fanta Mady Dembele akuriye ikigo cyo kubungabunga amahoro cya Alioune-Blondin Béye. Yazamuwe ku ipeti rya Brigadiye Jenerali mu kwezi kwa gatanu mu mwaka wa 2018, ahabwa ubuyobozi bw'icyo kigo mu kwezi kwa cumi na kabiri k'uwo mwaka wa 2018. Jenerali Cheick Fanta Mady Dembele Mbere yuko ashyirwa muri icyo kigo, Jenerali Dembele yari ashinzwe gucyemura amakimbirane n'igenamigambi mu kanama k'umuryango w'ubumwe bw'Afurika k'amahoro n'umutekano gafite icyicaro i Addis-Abeba muri Ethiopia. Jenerali Dembele yize mu ishuri rya gisirikare rya 'École spéciale militaire de Saint-Cyr' ryo mu Bufaransa. Yanize mu ishuri rya gisirikare rya Koulikoro muri Mali. Afite impamyabumenyi ya kaminuza mu mateka yakuye muri Kaminuza ya Paris I Panthéon-Sorbonne yo mu Bufaransa. Afite n'impamyabumenyi y'icyiciro cya gatatu cya kaminuza (master's degree/maîtrise) mu bwubatsi yakuye muri Kaminuza ya gisirikare y'i Munich mu Budage.

John Geddert yatoje ikipe y'abagore ya Amerika ya gymnastics mu mikino olempike ya 2012 i London Ibiro bya Dana Nessel, umushinjacyaha mukuru wa Michigan, byemeje urupfu rwa John Geddert kuwa kane nimugoroba. Mu gitondo cyo kuwa kane, Madamu Nessel yari yatangaje ibirego 24 ashinja John Geddert. Geddert niwe wari umutoza mukuru w'ikipe ya Amerika ya gymnastics mu 2012, yakoranaga bya hafi na muganga w'ikipe Larry Nassar, wahamwe no guhohotera abakinnyi amagana. Mu 2018 Nassar yakatiwe gufungwa imyaka 300 kubera ihohotera rishingiye ku gitsina yakoreye abakobwa barenga 250. Geddert w'imyaka 63, niwe wari nyiri ikigo cy'imyotozo kiri i Michigan aho Nassar yakoraga nka muganga w'inzu y'imikino (gym). Mu rubanza rwa Nassar, abakobwa bamwe bashinje Geddert imyifatire mibi. Byari byitezwe ko kuwa kane nimugoroba yishyikiriza ubushinjacyaha ariko ntiyahageze, nk'uko ibiro by'umushinjacyaha bibivuga. Simone Biles yizera ko kuvuga inkuru z'ihohoterwa bituma n'abandi babasha kuvuga iryo bakorewe Mu itangazo, umushinjacyaha Nessel yagize ati: "Ibiro byanjye byabwiwe ko umurambo wa Geddert wabonetse kuri uyu mugoroba nyuma yo kwiyahura," "Ni iherezo ribi cyane ku nkuru mbi cyane kuri buri wese byarebaga." Ni ibiki bindi tuzi ku biregwa Geddert? Umushinjacyaha Nessel yari yatangaje ibirego 24 bishinja Geddert "ihohotera rikabije mu mvugo, ku mubiri no ku gitsina yakoreye abakobwa benshi bakiri bato". Bibiri muri ibyo byaha birimo gusambanya umukobwa uri hagati y'imyaka 13 na 16. Yashinjwaga kandi ibyaha 14 byo gucuruza abantu birebana no "gukoresha abakinnyi be imirimo y'agahato cyangwa imirimo mu buryo bubi cyane yatumye bakomereka". Geddert "ntiyitaye kuri ibyo bikomere ahubwo yabwiye nabi, yateye ubwoba ndetse akoresha imbaraga z'umubiri mu gutuma abakinnyi bakina ku rwego abishakaho", nk'uko itangazo ry'umushinjacyaha ribivuga. Yashinjwe kandi kubeshya abakoze iperereza mu 2016 ku byaha byaregwaga uwari umuganga w'ikipe ye Nassar. Ni ayahe makuru mashya ku ihohoterwa mu ikipe ya US ya gymnastics? Mu kwezi kwa mbere 2020, iyi kipe ya Amerika yatangaje umugambi wo kwishyura miliyoni $215 ku itsinda ry'abakinnyi bahohotewe na Nassar. Perezida w'ishyirahamwe rya gymnastics muri Amerika Li Li Leung yavuze ko "bemera uburyo bangije bikomeye icyizere mu bakinnyi no muri rubanda, turi kugerageza kugarura icyo cyizere". Ariko bamwe, barimo Simone Biles umukinnyi ufite ibigwi kurusha abandi, bumva iryo shyirahamwe "rigomba kwirengera amakosa yaryo" kubera ibyo bikorwa. Biles w'imyaka 23, umwe mu bakinnyi bahohotewe na Nassar, yasabye ko habaho iperereza ryigenga. Yabwiye ikinyamakuru CBS ati: "Tubazanira imidari. Dukora akazi kacu. Ntimushobora gukora akanyu mwebwe? Ni ibintu biteye asyi."

Umugwizatunga rurangiranwa wo muri Tanzania, Mo Dewji Mu gitondo Mambosasa yavuga ko hari hamaze gufatwa abakozi batatu b'ihoteli Mo Dewji yanyururijweko, bitezwe gusambishwa mu matohoza igipolisi catanguye. Mohammed Dewji yanyurujwe uyu musi mu gaturuturu ariko arashaka kwinonora imitsi nk'uko bivugwa n'ibimyeshamakuru vyo mu gihugu ca Tanzania. Inkuru zitangwa n'ababibonye zivuga ko Mo yashitse mw'ihoteli nziza iri mu karere ka Oysterbay mu gisagara ca Dar es Salaam nk'uko asanzwe abigira buri musi mu gatondo kugira yinonore imitsi. Acururuka imodoka yiwe, abantu batamenyekanye baciye barasa hejuru hanyuma baca batwara uwo mudandaza mu modoka yabo. BBC yavuganye n'umukuru w'igipolisi ca Dar es Salaam kw'itelefone, Lazaro Mambosasa, avuga ko iyo nkuru bayumvise kandi ko bariko barabikurikirana. Mambosasa yasiguye ati:"Twamenye ivyo vyabaye, igipolisi kiriko kirabikurikirana." Umushikiranganji ajejwe ibidukikije Januari Makamba asanzwe ari umugenzi wa Mo Dewji yanditse ku rubuga rwiwe rwa Twitter ko yavuganye na se wiwe, aramubwira ko umuhungu wiwe yanyurujwe. Uwurongoye intara ya Dar es Salaam, Paul Makonda yavuze ko inzego zose zijejwe umutekano ziri ku kazi. Yavuze kandi ko hari n'abantu batatu bamaze gufatwa, ngo bikagaragara ko abanyamahanga babiri ari bo banyuruje Mo Dewji, ko rero atari Abatanzaniya, ngo hazosakwa ahantu hose bamenye aho baciye n'aho baba. Mo Dewji ni muntu ki? Mo Dewji, uretse ko ari umugwizatunga, ni n'umunyepolitike, akaba yarabaye umushingamateka wa Singida imyaka 10 gushika mu 2015 aho yakura meza. Dewji arakunda kandi inkino akaba afise umutahe mu mugwi w'umupira w'amaguru wa Simba wo mu gihugu ca Tanzania. Inkuru zitangwa n'ikinyamakuru Forbes candika ku vyerekeye amahera n'ubutunzi, Mo w'imyaka 43 ni we mugwizatunga wa mbere wo mu buseruko bwa Afrika, akaba ari n'umugwizatunga akiri muto muri Afrika yose. Nk'uko ico kinyamakuru kibandanya kivyandika, Mo afise ubutunzi bw'imiriyaridi 1.5 z'amadolari.

Abiswe Ibihangange Bitatu - uva i bubamfu uja i buryo: Winston Churchill, Franklin Roosevelt na Joseph Staline Aba Nazi bo mu Budagi bariko baratsindwa ku rubuga rw'intambara. Abasirikare b'abarusiya bari basugereje umugwa mukuru Berlin, mu gihe ingabo z'uburengerazuba zari zimaze kwinjira ku butaka bw'Ubudagi ziciye mu burengero. Mw'ibahari Pasifike, ingabo za Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika zari zisugereje Ubuyapani, n'aho nyinshi muri zo zahasiga ubuzima bikomeye. Mu gihe ingabo z'ibihugu vyop mu burengero bw'isi zari zimirije gutsinda intambara, ako karwi kiswe Ibihangange Bitatu - ni ukuvuga umukuru w'igihugu ca Amerika Franklin Roosevelt, umushikiranganji wa mbere w'Ubwongereza, Winston Churchill, hamwe n'umukuru w'igihugu c'Uburusiya Joseph Stalin - bahuriye mu karere ka Yalta, akarere k'Uburusiya kari ku nkengera zikiyaga Cirabura (Mer Noire). Inyuma y'intambara yahitanye ubuzima bw'abantu benshi isi itari bwigere ibona, haciye imyaka 75, abo bategetsi bashaka ko akaga nk'ako katosubira kuba. Ariko, ibihugu vya Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika na Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Abasovieti vyashaka kurondera ingene bikorana hagati yavyo kugira ngo vyiganzire isi. Hagati aho, amasezerano bashitseko muri iyo nama ya Yalta ntiyabujije ko inyuma y'amezi make gusa ivyo bihugu bishasha bibiri vy'ibihangange kw'isi vyisanga mu ntambara y'ukwikekana (Guerre Froide/Cold War). Vyatumye isi nayo yigaburamwo impande zibiri nyene imyaka itari mike, rumwe rwegamiye kuri Amerika, urundi rwegamiye ku Burusiya (ico gihe bwitwa URSS/USSR). Umwigisha wa kaminuza ya Boston muri Amerika, Andrew Bacevich, yabwiye BBC ati: "Nimba intumbero ya Yalta kwari kwubaka umushinge w'amahoro nyayo kw'isi yose inyuma y'intambara, iyo nama yabaye impfagusa". "Bivuye ku migambi itandukanye ya Amerika n'Uburusiya, iyo ntumbero ntiyigeze iganirwako". Ibintu vyari bimeze gute mu kwa kabiri 1945? Mu ntango ya 1945, ubutegetsi bw'aba Nazi bo mu Budagi bwari burongowe na Adolphe Hitler bwariko buratsindwa muri iyo ntambara. N'aho aba Nazi babandanya bihagararako bikomeye cane bakemera gupfira igihugu cabo, intsinzi y'abansi babo ntiyari agaseseshwarumuri. Mu buseruko bw'Ubulayi, Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'abasovieti zari zabahindukiriye zirakubita bikomeye ingabo z'abadagi inyuma y'intambara ikarishe y'imyaka ine yose. Inyuma y'imyaka itatu irenga, Uburusiya bwarakubise bikomeye ingabo z'Abadagi, bukaba bwari busugereje umugwa mukuru Berlin Hagati aho, n'aho igisirikare c'Uburusiya cariko kiratsinda intambara - hafi ¾ vy'abasirikare bobse b'Abadagi bapfiriye mu ntambara yo ku ruhande rw'ubuseruko - ico gihugu cari cononekaye biteye ubwoba. Amakuru avuga ko umurusiya umwe ku ndwi, ni ukuvuga hafi imiliyoni 27 z'abarusiya, bapfiriye muri iyo ntambara - 2/3 bakaba bari abasivire. Hari abahinga bamwe bavuga ko ico gitigiri kirenga kure n'iyo. Ibisagara hamwe n'isi ndimwa yimbuka cane kandi yari itunze igihugu vyari vyononekaye kubera intambara. Amahinguriro, imirima, inyubakwa eka n'amabarabara, vyose vyari vyatabagaye. None abo bategetsi bari bafise intumbero nyabaki? Joseph Staline yari yiteguriye gusubira kwubaka igihugu ciwe. Yagiye i Yalta afise intumbero yo kurondera abokorana nawe mu karere k'ubuseruko bwa Bulaya kugira ngo akingire Uburusiya. Yarondera kandi gucamwo ibice Ubudagi ku buryo butazosubira kuba isoko ry'intambara, yongere kandi aronswe indishi y'akababaro - amahera, ibikoresho hamwe mbere n'abakozi - kugira bimufashe kwubaka igihugu ciwe cari casambutse. Staline yari azi ko adashobora gushika kuri iyo migambi adashigikiwe n'ibihugu vya rutura vyo mu burengero. Winston Churchill yaratahura ivyipfuzo vya Staline. Bompi bari barahuriye i Moscou mu kwa cumi 1944, barumvikana ko bogabangana Ubulaya hagati y'Uburusiya n'ibihugu vyo mu burengero. Yari azi neza kandi ko amamiliyoni y'ingabo z'Uburusiya zari zirukanye Abadagi mu burere bwo hagati n'ubuseruko bw'Ubulaya zasumba kure n'iyo ingabo z'ibihugu vyo mu Burengero - kandi ko ata kintu na kimwe bwoshobora gukora mu gihe Staline yofata ingingo yo kuzigumiza muri ubwo burere. Ubwongereza bwari bwatangaje intambara mu kw'icenda 1939 inyuma y'aho Ubudagi butereye igihugu kigenzi ca Pologne, Churchill akaba yari yiteguye gukora ivyo ashoboye vyose kugira ngo ico gihugu kisubirane ubwigenge bwaco. Hagati aho, Ubwongereza bwakoresheje uburyo bwinshi cane kugira bushike ku ntsinzi ku buryo bwari bugeze aho umwansi ashaka. Churchill yari yiteze ko Amerika izomufasha guhangana na Staline. Hagati aho, Perezida Roosevelt wa Amerika wewe yari afise izindi ntumbero ashira imbere. Yashaka ko Staline yemera ko bashinga ishirahamwe ONU - ishirahamwe rishasha rijejwe kubungabunga amahoro kw'isi inyuma y'intambara. Umwigisha wa kaminuza ya Virginia, Melvyn Leffler yabwiye BBC ko Roosevelt yari acibuka neza ko ukutumvikana hagati y'ibihugu vyari vyarwanirije hamwe Abadagi inyuma y'intambara ya mbere y'isi yose rwatumye Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika ziyonkora muri politike mpuzamakungu mu myaka ya 1920 na 1930. Ati: "Ico Roosevelt yashaka imbere ya vyose, yashaka ko igihugu ciwe kitosubira kwikumira". Yashaka kandi ko Uburusiya butangaza intambara ku Buyapani. N'aho ibintu vyari vyabaye nabi cane ku Buyapani, ingabo zabwo zariko zirakorera ishano abasirikare ba Amerika, aho bari mu ntambara yo kwirukana izo ngabo z'Abayapani mw'ibahari Pacifike. Amerika yari ifise ubwoba bwinshi ko mu gihe yotera Ubuyapani yotakaza abasirikare benshi cane. Yalta habaye iki? Roosevelt yari yipfuje kubonanira ahantu muri Méditerranée na Staline, ariko uyu nawe yasavye ko bobonanira i Yalta kubera yatinya indege. Harabaye ibiganiro mu mirwi kuva ku wa 04 gushika ku wa 11 z'ukwa kabiri ahari hashikiye intumwa za Amerika, ku kirimba ca Livadia, cahoze ari ikibanza c'akaruhuko c'umwami wa nyuma w'u Burusiya, Nicholas II. Iyo nama yabereye ku kirimba ca Livadia Abo bategetsi batatu baheruka kubonanira i Teheran muri Irani mu 1943. Roosevelt yarashaka kwizigira cane Staline gusumba uko yokwizigira Churchill yabona uyu mutegetsi w'Uburusiya nk'umutegetsi yagenda atinyika gusumba. Inyuma y'indwi baganira, abo bategetsi batatu batangarije isi yose ingingo bafashe. Ubudagi bumaze gushira amaboko hejuru ataco busavye, bwategerezwa guca busamburwa. Bumvikanye ko bayicamwo ibice bine, kimwe kimwe muri ivyo bitatu kigatwara icige kimwe, ikindi kigahabwa Ubufaransa. Uko niko kandi n'umugwa mukuru Berlin wategerezwa kugaburwa. Iryo tangazo kandi ryavuga ko Ubudagi bwategerezwa kuriha ivyononekaye vyose muri iyo ntambara, kandi ko hategerezwa gushingwa umurwi i Moscou wo kwiga ivyo butegerezwa kuriha. Abo bategetsi kandi bumvikanye ko mu bihugu vyose bashoboye kubohora hategurwa amatora - harimwo na Pologne yategerezwa kugira iyindi leta "yategerezwa kubamwo abanyapolonye batowe hagati mu gihugu n'abari hanze". Uburusiya bwari bwamaze gushiraho leta mfatakibanza ya gikomunista i Varsovie, bukaba bwari bwemeye ko izosubirwamwo. Hagati aho, icitwa intwaro rusangi kuri Staline cari gifise iyindi nsiguro itandukanye. N'aho yemeye ko hari kuba amatora yari kuba mu bwisanzure mu bihugu vya Bulaya vyabohowe, ingabo ziwe zariko zirafata ibigo bikuru bikuru mu bihugu vya Bulaya yo hagati n'iyo Ubuseruko zibishira mu minwe y'imigambwe ya gikomunista. Vyongeye, abo bategetsi - ku gahato ka Staline - bafashe ingingo yo kwagura imbibe za Polonye amaja mu burengero, maze Uburusiya bwiyagurira akarere. Muri ayo masezerano nyene, ibihugu vya Balte navyo nyene vyategerezwa kwinjira mu bihugu bigize Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Abasovieti. Umuhinga mu vya kahise, Anne Applebaum, yanditse mu nyandiko yiwe yise "Rideau de Fer/Iron Curtain" ko abo bategetsi bafashe ingingo yo kugabangana Ubulayi uko bishakiye". Gushika mu 1989, umugwa mukuru Berlin wari ugabuyemwo ibice bine Roosevelt yari yitwararitse gusumba umugambi wiwe w'ugushinga Ishirahamwe mpuzamakungu ONU, kandi ico yipfuza yaragishitseko. Ivyo bihugu vyose bitatu vyemeranije ko bizorungika intumwa i San Fransisco ku wa 25 z'ukwa kane 1945, gufasha gushinga iryo shirahamwe mpuzamakungu. Igisumbirije, Stalin yasavye ko botegura igitero ku Buyapani inyuma y'amezi atatu Ubudagi butsinzwe. Chruchill yagumye afise amakenga ku kungene ibintu vyari bimeze mu buseruko bw'Ubulayi inyuma y'iyo nama, n'aho bari bagiriraniye amasezerano. Yasavye ingabo ziwe n'iza Amerika kubandanya batera baja mu buseruko uko bashobora kwose imbere y'uko intambara irangira. Inyuma y'aho vyagenze gute? Mu mezi makeya, politike yarahindutse mu buryo butangaje. Roosevelt yahavuye apfa mu kwa kane ahitanywe n'indwara yo kuvirirana mu bwonko, aca asubirirwa na Harry Truman. Mu kwa gatanu, Ubudagi buramanika amaboko ataco burinze gusaba. Hanyuma ku wa 16 z'ukw'indwi, Amerika iragerageza ikirwanisho cayo gishasha yakoze mu mpisho - ikibombe c'ubumara. Ku munsi wakurikiye, Perezida Truman yabonanye na Winston Churchill na Joseph Stalin mu nama yabereye ahitwa Potsdam hanze y'umugwa mukuru w'Ubudagi, Berlin. Clement Attlee (i bubamfu), Harry Truman (hagati) na Joseph Stalin (i buryo) bahiruye i Potsdam intambara irangiye i Bulaya Truman ntiyari azi Staline, kandi yari amaze amezi ane gusa ashitse ku butegetsi. Winston Churchill yari ku butegetsi kuva mu kwa gatanu 1940, yasubiriwe na Clement Atlee mu gihe yari akiri mu nama nyene, inyuma y'amatora yo mu 1945. Muri iyo nama icuka cari gitandukaney n'ica mbere. Abategetsi ba Amerika bumva ko bafise inguvu nyinshi inyuma y'aho baboneye ubukomezi bw'ikibombe cabo c'ubumara bari bahejeje kugerageza. Truman yarinuba cane Staline gusumba uko Roosevelt yamwinuba. We n'abahanuzi biwe babona ko Uburusiya ata shaka bwari bufise ryo gukurikiza ivyari mu masezerano ya Yalta. Mu kiringo kidashika imyaka ibiri, umukuru w'igihugu ca Amerika yatangaje integuro ya Truman (Truman Doctrine), yashaka ko Amerika ikoresha inguvu kugira ngo ibuze Uburusiya kubandanya bukwiragira kw'isi. Intambara y'ukwikekana (Guerre Froide) iba iratanguye. Churchill na Roosevelt, bompi baraneguwe kubona barorohereje Staline mu mubonano wabo i Yalta. Hagati aho, nta kintu kinini Amerika n'Ubwongereza bari gukora kugira bamuhagarike. Staline yari afise ingabo mu karere kose k'Ubulaya bwo hagati n'Ubuseruko. Inyuma y'inama ya Yalta, Churchill yasavye ko hotegurwa igitero ku Burusiya, igitero cari ciswe "Operation Unthinkable" - ariko abasirikare b'Ubwongereza bari bajejwe kugitegura bagiye kubona ko izo zari indoto zo kumurango. Umwigisha Leffler avuga ati: "Ivyo Yalta yakoze ku bijanye n'akarere k'Ubuseruko bw'Ubulayi kwabaye gusa ukwemeza ubutegetsi bwari buhari ico gihe".Inama yo mu ntambara ya kabiri y'isi yose yahinduye isura y'isi

Prezida Putin avuga ko ivyo Otan yagiriza igihugu ciwe ari icitwazo ca Amerika co kwivana muri ayo masezerano Ivyo yabivuze inyuma yahoo ishirahamwe ryishinze kuwaniriza umwansi hamwe Otan rinebaguriye Uburusiya ko burenga ku masezerano abuza gukora ibisase bishika kure cane (INF). Ayo masezerano yashizweko umukono mu 1987 hagati ya Amerika hamwe na URSS yabuza ivyo bihugu vyose ko ari bibiri gukora ibisase bishika hagufi na kure. Prezida Putin yavuze ko ivyo Otan yagiriza igihugu ciwe ari icitwazo co kugira Amerika yivane muri ayo masezerano. Muri iryo jambo ryaciye ku mboneshakure, uwo mutegetsi yavuze ko ibihugu vyinshi bikora ibigwanisho vyahagaritswe gukora hishimikijwe ayo masezerano ya INF. Putin avuga ati:"Ubu biragaragara ko abagenzi bacu Amerika bumva ko ibintu vyahindutse cane ku buryo babona ko na bo bakwiye gutunga ivyo bigwanisho. "Inyishu yacu n'iyihe? Nta nkeka - Natwe tuzokurikiza iyo nzira." Prezida Donald Trump wa Amerikani Mu misi iheze, prezida wa Amerika yaravuze koi co gihugu gishobora kwikura muri ayo masezerano kubera inyifato y'Uburusiya. Abaraba ibintu n'ibindi bavuga ko Uburusiya bufata ingingo yo gukora ivyo bigwanisho nk'umugambi mwiza wo guteza imbere igisirikare c'ico gihugu kandi ko bitazimvye. Aho yashika mu nama n'abashikiranganji b'imigenderanire b'ibihugu bigize ishirahamwe ry'ubumwe bwa Buraya, EU, umutegetsi w'iryo shirahamwe ajejwe imigenderanire Federica Mogherini yahamagariye ivyo bihugu ko ari bibiri gushigikira ayo masezerano, yongerako ko "yabaye inking y'amahoro n'umutekano ku mugabane wa Buraya haraciye imyaka 30 ubu." Otan ivuga iki? Ku musi wa kabiri, ishirahamwe Otan ryaranebaguye ku mugaragaro Uburusiya ko burenga ku ngingo ziri muri ayo masezerano. Mw'itangazo iryo shirahamwe ryashikirije rivuga riti:"Abagize iri shirahamwe bose baremeje ko Uburusiya bwakoze ibigwanisho vyo mu bwoko bwa 9M729, biciye kubiro n'amasezerano ya INF, bikaba bishobora gutera icuka kibi mu runani rwa Euro-Atlantic." Iryo tangazo kandi rivuga ko ibihugu bigize iryo shirahamwe "bishigikiye" ivyo Amerika ivuga ko Uburusiya bwaciye kubiri n'ayo masezeranpo, bigasaba Uburusiya "gufata ingingo yo kuyubahiriza yose uko ari." Uburusiya bwararashe ivyo bisase mu myimenyerezo ya gisirikare Inyuma y'iryo tangazo umushikiranganji w'imigenderanire wa Amerika Mike Pompeo yavuze ko Uburusiya buhawe imisi 60 ngo bube bwatanguye kwubahiriza ayo masezerano kugira Amerika na yo ihagarike imigambi yari ifise. Yavuze ati:"Muri ico kiringo c'imisi 60 ntituzogerageza ibigwanisho vyacu, gukora canke gukoresha ubuhinga ubwo ari bwo bwose." Uburusiya buguma buhakana ko butarenze kuri ayo masezerano.

Nkuko bitangazwa na Kaminuza ya Johns Hopkins yo muri Amerika, kugeza ubu muri icyo gihugu abarenga miliyoni 11,5 bamaze kwandura coronavirus, muri bo abarenga 250,400 yarabishe. Amerika ni cyo gihugu cya mbere ku isi kimaze gutangaza abantu benshi cyane banduye coronavirus ndetse n'abo imaze kwica. Kandi ubwandu nanone bwongeye kwiyongera mu bice bitandukanye by'Amerika, mu cyumweru gishize hari iminsi yaciye umuhigo w'ubwandu bwa mbere bwinshi. Aganira na BBC, Dr Anthony Fauci ukuriye ikigo cy'Amerika cyo kurwanya no gukumira indwara zandura, yavuze ko iki gihugu "kirimo kujya mu cyerekezo kibi muri iki gihe kijegajega cyane". Muri iki gihe, birashoboka ko abantu benshi bagiye kujya bateranira hamwe ari benshi mu ngo zabo kubera ko ubukonje burimo kwiyongera. Umujyi wa New York - umaze igihe ari izingiro ry'iki cyorezo - wategetse ko amashuri yose afungwa guhera kuri uyu wa kane, mu gihe ubwandu burimo kwiyongera. Abategetsi bavuze ko bafashe icyemezo cyo gufunga aya mashuri ya leta ya mbere menshi muri Amerika kubera ko ikigero cy'ubwandu cyarenze 3%. Iki cyemezo kizagira ingaruka ku bana bagera ku 300,000. Dr Fauci yavuze iki nyirizina? Mu kiganiro na BBC, Dr Fauci yaburiye ko ubu bwandu burimo kwiyongera buzatuma abandi bantu bapfa. Ati: "Ni ibintu bikomeye cyane kubera ko hari ibimenyetso bibyemeza". "Rero iyo ubonye habayeho kwiyongera cyane kw'abandura nkuko turimo kubibona ubu by'umwihariko ubwo abantu barimo kurushaho gukorera imirimo imbere mu nzu, [bivuze ko] turi mu bihe bigoye cyane". Yongeye gusaba abantu "kongera umuhate" wo gukurikiza amabwiriza yo kwirinda, nko kwambara agapfukamunwa, kutegerana no kwirinda guterana ari benshi. Dr Fauci yagize ati: "[Amabwiriza] Aroroshye cyane kandi turabizi ko atanga umusaruro. Ariko hari ukuntu hari abamaze kurambirwa Covid-19 - abantu barimo kumva bacitse intege zo gukomeza gukurikiza izi ngamba". Yashishikarije abantu "gukomeza umutsi ikindi gihe gito kubera ko ubufasha buri mu nzira buza" mu buryo bw'inkingo. Mu mpera y'ukwezi kwa gatatu - ubwo Amerika yari igejeje ku bantu 2,200 bishwe na Covid-19 - Dr Fauci yari yaraguje umutwe ko iki cyorezo gishobora kwica Abanyamerika bagera ku 200,000 ndetse ababarirwa muri za miliyoni bandi bakandura iyi coronavirus. Iby'inkingo bigeze he? Ejo ku wa gatatu, imibare yatangajwe n'ibigo Pfizer na BioNTech bikora inkingo, igaragaza ko urukingo ibyo bigo byakoze rwo gukingira iyi virusi rurinda kuyandura ku kigero cya 94% ku bantu bakuru bafite hejuru y'imyaka 65. Mu cyumweru gishize, Pfizer na BioNTech batangaje iby'ibanze byavuye mu bushakashatsi bwabo bigaragaza ko urwo rukingo rurinda kwandura Covid-19 ku kigero cya 90% ndetse bavuga ko nta ngaruka rugira ku buzima. Ibyo byakurikiwe n'amakuru ku rukingo rwakozwe na kompanyi Moderna yo muri Amerika avuga ko rukingira ku kigero kigera hafi kuri 95%, ndetse n'ibindi bitanga icyizere byavuye mu igeragezwa ry'urukingo Sputnik V rwakozwe n'Uburusiya.

Umurwi wa Leta y'iki Islamu, "Islamic State", wemanze ko ariwo wagavye ibitero vyibasiye amasengero y'aba Coptes Iyo ngingo ituma ubutegetsi bushobora gufata umuntu uwariwe wese no gusaka mu mazu y'abanyagihugu. Isabwa kwemezwa n'inama nshingamateka imbere yuko ishigwa mu ngiro. Umugwi wiyita Leta y'Ikislamu, "Islamic State" (IS) niwo wemanze ivyo bitero vya Tanta na Alexandria ku munsi wa Mungu w'ibisandasanda. Uwo mugwi umaze iminsi uhiga amasengero y'aba Coptes mu Misiri, mu minsi iheze ukaba wari wamenyesheje ko ugiye kugwiza ibitero. Inyuma y'ibitero, Bwana Sisi yaragirishjije inama akagwi kajejwe umutekano mu gihugu, bavugana ku bijanye n'ivyo bitero. Yaragabishije avuga ko ingwano kuri uwo mugwi w'aba jihadists "izoba ndende kandi ko izobabaza", kandi ko amategeko yo mu bihe bidasanzwe azoja mu ngiro inyuma yaho "ibikenewe ku bijanye n'amategeko hamwe n'ibwirizwa shingiro" bizoba vyatunganijwe. Abashingamateka benshi barashigikiye Bwana Sisi. Igitero ca mbere cabereye mw'isengero St George i Tanta, igisagara co mu buraruko Hari haheze iminsi umukuru w'igihugu ategetse ko hagomogwa inteko za gisirikara gukingira ibibanza bikomakomeye vy'igihugu.

Ronaldo yakubiswe ikirato mu mutwe n'umukinyi wa Deportivo La Coruna Ariko si ibitego 2 yinjije vyatumye avugwa cane mu bimenyeshamakuru kubera intsinzi batahukanye y'ibitego 7-1 ca Deportivo La coruna. Ariko arava mu kibuga amaze gukomereka, yatse iterefoni umuganga amukurikirana kugira yirabe mu maso akoresheje ikiyo c'iyo telefone. Abamenyeshamakuru bariko barakurikirana urwo rukino babigize urukino, banavuga ko babonye "ibintu vyose ubu" kuri uwo mukinyi, Ronaldo yaciye azunguza umutwe, aboneka ko atanezerejwe n'ico abonye mu kiyo ca telefone canke ubutumwa bw'abamenyeshamakuru. "Ronaldo yatumye haba amakenga ku kungene aboneka ukundi," Reuters ni ko yanditse inyuma y'urwo rukino. "Ivyashitse vyerekanye Ronaldo neza cane gusumba uko vyahora," vyanditswe n'urundi rubuga rw'inkino rwa Benchwarmers. "Ronaldo yiraba mu kiyo ari mu kibuga," umwe mu batanze inkuru kuri BBC Sport ni ko yanditse. Ico gikomere cavuye ku kugongana n'umukinyi wa Deportivo La Coruna Fabian Schar yamukubise ikirato mu mutwe. N'aho bamutwenze ku mbuga ngurukanabumenyi, ico gikomere cari kinini ku buryo haciye hafatwa ingingo ko adasubira mu kibuga. Mu 2011, yigeze kuvuga ko abakunzi b'umugwi bariko barakina bamuzomereye kubera ko "atunze kandi ari umukinyi wo mu rwego rwo hejuru." "Abantu banyumvira akazigo," ni ko yavuze. "Nta yandi majambo mfise yosigura ivyo." Iyo ntsinzi ra Real y'ibitego 7-1 yatumye baca baduga mu kibanza ca kane mw'ihiganwa ryo muri Espagne.

Perezida Hassan Rouhani (uwa kabiri uvuye i bubamfu) ariko yerekwa ibikoresho vyo guhingura uranium, hari ku wa gatandatu Igitero co ku wa Mungu casambuye ivyuma vy'umuyagankuba ku ruganda rwa Natanz, bituma ibikoresho vyo guhingura ubutare bwa uranium biharurwa mu bihumbi vyononekara. Perezida Rouhani yaciye agabisha ababikoze ko urugero rwa uranium rugiye kwongerezwa kubera "ubugome bwanyu". Ariko yashimangiye ko ibikorwa vya Irani vyo guhingura ubutare bw'ubumara "ari ivy'amahoro gusa". Ubufaransa, Ubudagi, n'Ubwongereza vyaciye vyerekana "impungenge nyinshi " kuri iyo ngingo, bikavuga ko Iran "ata kintu na kimwe cosigura ko ikeneye kwongereza uru rugero mu mugambi wa gisivire". Ibi bihugu biri muri ya masezerano yo mu 2015 na Iran, amasezerano ayemerera guhingura uranium gushika ku rugero rwa 3.76% kugira ngo ikore umuyagankuba. Kugira ngo hashobore guhingurwa ikirwanisho c'ubumara hakenewe uranium itunganyije iri ku rugero rwo 90% no kurenga. Iran yatanguye kwongereza uranium itunganyije ishika ku rugero rwa 20%, hari mu kwa mbere mu kwihora ku bihano vyari bisubijweho na Amerika igihe yari irongowe na Donald Trump, inyuma y'aho yiyonkoreye muri aya masezerano haraciye imyaka itatu. Israel ntirashobora kwemeza canke guhakana uruhara rwayo mu gitero co ku ruganda rwa Natanz, ariko isanzwe ibona ko umugambi wa Iran wo guhingura ubutare bw'ubumara ari akaga ku kubaho kwayo kandi aranegura utwigoro twa Joe Biden two kunagura aya masezerano. Iradiyo y'igihugu yatangaje amakuru yahawe n'igendereza avuga ko ico gitero cari igitero cakozwe ku nyabwonko na Mossad, urwego rwa Israel rujejwe igendereza ryo hanze. Abajejwe igendereza rya Amerika babwiye ikinyamakuru New York Times ko igisasu kinini caturitse kigasambura ibikoresho vyatanga umuyagankuba mu cumba co mu kuzimu ku ruganda rwa Natanz cahingurirwamwo uranium. Ku wa kabiri, umukuru w'ikigo c'inama nshingamateka ya Irani kijejwe amatohoza, Alireza Zakani, yavuze ko ibikoresho biharurwa mu bihumbi "vyononekaye canke bigasamburwa mu mwanya muto" kandi ko "igice kitari gito c'ubushobozi bwacu bwo kwimbura ubu butare" casambutse. Ku wa kabiri mw'ijoro, uwuserukira Iran mw'ishirahamwe mpuzamakungu rijejwe inguvu z'ubumara ( International Atomic Energy Agency, IAEA) yatangaje ko Iran yari yatanguye kwongereza uranium gushika ku rugero rwa 60% ku ncuro ya mbere mu kwihora ico gitero. Iran izoshiraho ibindi bikoresho 1000 ku ruganda rwa Natanz vyo gusubiriza ivyasambuwe biri mu bwoko bwa IR-1 vyari bishaje kandi bitakora neza - ibisubirize n'ivyo mu bwoko bwa IR-6 bigezweho, ibi bikazotuma ishobora kwongereza cane uru rugero rwa uranium. Ejo ku wa gatatu, Perezida Rouhani yabwiye inama nshikiranganji ko mu gihe hakirindiriwe icegeranyo ntabanduka c'inzego za Irani zijejwe umutekano za Iran kuri ico gitero, "biraboneka ko ari igitero cakozwe na Israel". Iran ntiyemera ko Israel ari igihugu gifise uburenganzira bwo kubaho mbere ikunze kucita "igihugu c'abanya siyoni". Ati: "Ntushobora kurondera guhungabanya umutekano wa Irani hanyuma ngo ukore icaha i Natanz; tuzoguca amaboko igihe uzoba ukoze icaha". Yongeyeko ati: "Wakoze icaha c'iterabwoba rya nikleyeri; ivyo turiko turakora bijanye n'amategeko". Perezida Rouhani avuga ko ababikoze bashaka kuburizamwo ibiganiro hagati y'abategetsi ba Amerika na Irani i Vienna mu ntumbero yo kurondera kunagura aya masezerano azwi nka Joint Comprehensive Plan of Action (JCPOA). "Turazi ico uriko uragerageza kugira; ushaka ko tuja muri ivyo biganiro turi imbokoboko ariko nagomba ndakubwire ko tugiye muri ibi biganiro dufise inguvu nyinshi". umutegetsi wa Irani yavuze ko ibikoresho vyinshi i Natanz vyononekaye Mu nyuma, indongozi y'ikirenga ya Iran, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, yagabishije abategetsi ba Amerika ko "batari bashatse kwemera ukuri" kandi ko akenshi bagiye batanga ivyiyumviro bitari "binakwiye gufatirwako". Ati: "Ni ngombwa ko ibihano bibanza gufutwa. Mu gihe tuzobona ko ivyo vyakozwe, tuzoheza twubahirize ivyo twiyemeje". Reta z'Ubufaransa, Ubudagi n'Ubwongereza, zivuga ko kwongereza urugero rwa uranium gushika ku bice 60% ari "ikintu gikomeye" kuko ari "intambwe ikomeye mu nzira yo gukora ikirwanisho c'ubumara". "Amajambo ya Iran arababaje cane kubera avuzwe mu gihe ibihugu vyose biri muri aya masezerano hamwe na Amerika vyatanguye mu ntumbero yo kunagura amasezerano. Ivyavuzwe na Irani biteye kubiri n'intumbero yo kwubaka n'ukugarukana umwizero muri ibi biganiro". Umuvugizi w'ibiro vy'umukuru w'igihugu wa Amerika Jen Psaki avuga ko ingingo ya Irani ari "agasotoro".

Muri gahunda yawo harimo kuwandikisha no kuja mu matora y'umukuru w'igihugu mu mwaka uza. Atahutse mu Rwanda mu gihe ibitangazamakuru bimwe vyo muri ico gihugu bimurega kunyuza ku rubuga 'Le Prophete' yanshinze, ivyiyumnviro bibiba amacakubiri no guhakana jenoside. Ivyo ariko Patiri Thomas Nahimana arabihakana. Umva hano hejuru Patiri Thomas Nahimana.

Idris Sultan ni umunyarwenya ukomeye muri Tanzania Idris Sultan yahamagajwe kuwa gatatu ahatwa ibibazo na polisi ndetse arafungwa ariko aza kurekurwa atanze ingwate nk'uko Benedict Alex Ishabakaki umunyamategeko we abivuga. Uyu munsi kuwa gatanu mu gitondo arongera kwitaba polisi. Bwana Ishabakaki avuga ko umukiliya we ari gukurikiranwa hagendewe ku itegeko, ritavugwaho rumwe, ry'ibyaha bikorerwa kuri mudasobwa. Iri tegeko ribuza gukoresha mudasobwa 'wiyitirira umuntu' cyangwa utangaza amakuru atari ukuri. Idris Sultan, wigeze gutsindira irushanwa rya Big Brother Africa, kuwa gatatu yatangaje amafoto abiri yahinduranyije umutwe we n'uwa perezida wa Tanzania. Ifoto imwe yerekana umutwe wa Bwana Magufuli uri ku gihimba gisa n'icya Sultan. Indi foto iriho umutwe w'uyu munyarwenya uri ku mubiri wa Bwana Magufuli yambaye isuti kandi yicaye mu ntebe ya perezida iriho ikirango cy'igihugu. Kuri aya mafoto yanditseho mu giswahili amagambo asobanura ngo: "Twahinduranyije inshingano uyu munsi kugira ngo yishimire isabukuru ye mu mahoro". Kuwa kabiri, Perezida Magufuli yari yujuje imyaka 60 y'amavuko.

Abenshi mu bafatwa n'abahitanwa na malaria ni abo muri Afurika yo munsi y'ubutayu bwa Sahara Ubu bushakashatsi buhuriweho n'ibigo byinshi mpuzamahanga buvuga ko uko utu dukoko turi kwigaranzura uyu muti byari byarabonetse gusa mu bihugu bimwe byo muri Aziya y'amajyepfo ashyira i burasirazuba. Bukavuga ko kuba ibi byarabonetse mu duce tubiri dutandukanyijwe n'intera irenga kilometero 100 mu Rwanda, byashoboka ko n'ahandi ukoreshwa muri Africa ari ko bimeze. Dr Aimable Mbituyumuremyi ukuriye ishami rishinzwe kurwanya malaria mu kigo gishinzwe ubuzima mu Rwanda, yabwiye BBC ko uwo muti ugikomeje gukoreshwa kugeza ishami rya ONU rishinzwe ubuzima ku isi (OMS/WHO) ritanze amabwiriza mashya. Malaria iracyari indwara ihangayikishije ubuzima ku isi, cyane mu bihugu byo mu gace k'imirongo mbariro (tropics/tropiques), mu 2018 abantu barenga miliyoni 228 barayirwaye naho 405,000 irabica. Ni iki nyirizina ubu bushakashatsi bwabonye? Ubu bushakashatsi bwasotse mu kinyamakuru Nature Medicine, bwakorewe ku barwayi mu duce turimo Masaka (Kigali), Ruhuha (mu karere ka Bugesera), Bugarama (mu karere ka Rusizi), Kibirizi (mu karere ka Gisagara) na Rukara (mu karere ka Kayonza). Abashakashatsi bo mu bigo Institut Pasteur bafatanyije Rwanda Biomedical Center, OMS/WHO, Cochin Hospital na Kaminuza ya Columbia (New York, USA) bapimye amraso y'abarwayi bo muri utwo duce. Barebaga niba umuti wa Coartem - ikinini gikubiyemo imiti ibiri artemether na lumefantrine - ukibasha kurwanya udukoko dutera malaria iyo tugeze mu mubiri. Basanze utu dukoko turi kurwanya uyu muti mu barwayi 19 kuri 257 cyangwa se 7.4% muri kimwe mu bigo by'ubuvuzi byakozweho ubu bushakashatsi. Dr Mbituyumuremyi ati: "Ubwo bushakashatsi bwerekanye ko iyo miti ibiri ikubiye muri Coartem umwe muri yo watangiye kugira intege nkeya kuko utwo dukoko twatangiye kugira ikitwa 'resistance' kuri wo". Abakoze ubu bushakashatsi bavuga ko haboneka kwihinduranya kw'utwo dukoko (mutation) bigamije guca intege umuti usanzwe utwica. Umwe mu miti ya artemether-lumefantrine (Coartem) iri gukoreshwa mu Rwanda Bwana Mbituyumuremyi ati: "[Ibyo] Bivuga ko uwo muti ushobora kuba wagira ibyago byo kudakomeza gukora neza hatagize ingamba zishyirwaho". Ubwo umuti wa mbere wa malaria, chloroquine, wakorwaga, abashakashatsi batekerezaga ko malaria izahita icika mu gihe cy'imyaka itari myinshi. Ariko kuva mu myaka ya 1950, udukoko dutera malaria twagiye twihinduranya turwanya imiti itwica. Mu 2008 nibwo muri Aziya y'amajyepfo ashyira i burasirazuba byabonetse bwa mbere ko utu dukoko twatangiye kurwanya uburyo bugezweho bwo kuvura malaria. None hagiye kuba iki? Ubu bushakashatsi buvuga ko nubwo ikigero cyo gucika intege k'uyu muti kikiri hasi ariko ibi ari ukuburira kuboneka neza, gukwiye gutuma inzego zibishinzwe zifata ingamba. Dr Mbituyumuremyi avuga ko uyu muti wa Coartem ukomeje gukoreshwa kuko ukivura ku gipimo kiri hejuru ya 90%, kandi ucyemewe na OMS/WHO. Ati: "Gusa ibi ni nk'impuruza ituma hafatwa ingamba zihariye kugira ngo twitegure ko bibaye ngombwa haboneka undi wo kuwusimbura. Bwana Mbituyumuremyi avuga ko, nubwo imibare igabanuka, ariko harebwe umubare w'abayirwara, abo yica, n'amafaranga ayitangwaho, malaria ikiri ikibazo gihangayikishije u Rwanda. Malaria mu Rwanda/ imibare ya RBC: 2018 - 19: 2019 - 20:

Mr Flynn quit the White House in February Flynn yatanze imihoho ku nguvu inyuma y'aho bimenyekaniye ko yahenze ibiro vy'umukuru w'igihugu ko atabonanye n'uwuserukira Uburusiya muri Amerika imbere y'uko Trump ashika ku butegetsi. Ivyo birego vyashizwe ahabona n'umucamanza yigenga Robert Mueller, nka bimwe muvyo amaze gutora mu matohoza arimwo yerekeye uruhara rw'Uburusiya mu matora yo mu 2016 muri Amerika. Umuhanuzi wa Trump yatanze imihoho Aba républicains bemeje ko haba amatohoza kuri Michael Flynn Yagirizwa "kubesha n'ibigirankana" no " guhindura hamwe gushikiriza amajambo y'ibinyoma".

Miralem Pjanic, uri ibumoso bwa Cristiano Ronaldo muri iyi foto. Byari biteganyijwe ko yerekeza muri Barcelona avuye muri Juventus, nyuma yo kwegukana igikombe cya kane cya shampiyona ya Serie A ari kumwe nayo Yavuze ko no kugura rutahizamu Lautaro Martinez muri Inter Milan nabyo byagizweho ingaruka. Bartomeu yabwiye ikinyamakuru Sport cyo muri Espanye ko hagati y'ukwezi kwa gatatu n'ukwa gatandatu uyu mwaka, amafaranga Barça yateganyaga kwinjiza yagabanutseho miliyoni 200 z'ama-euro. Yagize ati: "Amakipe yose akomeye y'i Burayi yagizweho ingaruka. Ibi ntibizamara umwaka umwe, ahubwo [bizamara] itatu cyangwa ine". Neymar, Umunya-Brazil w'imyaka 28 y'amavuko, yageze muri PSG mu kwezi kwa munani mu 2017 aguzwe miliyoni 222 z'ama-euro - ya mbere menshi ku isi yari aguzwe umukinnyi w'umupira w'amaguru. Ariko Barcelona yari yagerageje kongera kumugura ku mpeshyi ishize. Bartomeu yagize ati: "[Kugura] Neymar? Muri iki gihe, ntibyakunda". "Na PSG ntabwo ishaka kumugurisha". "Barça yavuganye na Inter ku bijyanye na Lautaro, ariko ibiganiro byarahagaze. Uko ibintu bimeze ubu ntabwo byemerera gushora imari itubutse". Bartomeu yakomeje asobanura ko Barcelona yahombye miliyoni 200 z'ama-euro hagati y'ukwezi kwa gatatu n'ukwa gatandatu uyu mwaka. Yongeyeho ati: "Mu mwaka wa 2020-21 twari twiteze kwinjiza miliyari 1,1 z'ama-euro, ariko tuzinjiza 30% by'ayo". Ati: "Niba uko iki cyorezo [cya coronavirus] kimeze bitagenze neza, nta bareba umupira ku kibuga bazabaho, nta basura inzu y'amateka y'ikipe, nta maduka acuruza [iby'ikipe] azafungura kandi hazakomeza kubaho igihombo cy'amafaranga". "Bituma tugomba kutajenjeka na busa mu buyobozi: tugomba kugenzura tukareba ishoramari ry'ingenzi n'irishobora kuba ritegereje". Imyitwarire ya Arturo Vidal iri kwigwaho Bartomeu yanemeje amakuru yuko iyi kipe yatangije ingamba zijyanye n'imyitwarire ku mukinnyi wo hagati Arturo Vidal, kubera ko atagarutse mu ikipe nyuma yo gusoza ibiruhuko. Uyu agiye kwerekeza muri Juventus, bijyanye n'amasezerano yo kugurana abakinnyi arimo na Miralem Pjanic, umukinnyi wo hagati ukomoka muri Bosnia ukinira Juventus. Yagize ati: "Twumvikanye ko mbere yuko Champions League irangira, azakomeza gukinira Barça. Ashobora kudufasha". Bartomeu, Perezida wa Barça guhera mu mwaka wa 2014, yagize ati: "Ariko ntiyagarutse nyuma y'ikiruhuko kigufi cye, rero twamutangijeho dosiye".

Perezida Trump yari mu masengesho yari yatunganijwe muri Maison Blanche/White House ku wa 28/08/2020 Mu nyigisho ziwe yatanze mu kwa gatandatu, Pasitori wo muri Nijeriya, Chris Oyakhilome, umuvugabutumwa azwi cane ku mboneshakure, yagize ati: "Mumusengere [Trump] kuko iyo Imana ishize imbere umwe mu bana biwe, shetani rimwe na rimwe ikora ibishoboka vyose kugira ngo imusambure". Agabisha kandi ko abanegura uyu mukuru w'igihugu akomoka mu mugambwe w'aba Repubulika ariko arondera kwitoreza ikiringo kigira kabiri mu kwa cumi na rimwe banka urunuka abamushigikiye. Uyu mupasitori akunzwe cane kw'isi yose, harimwo na Amerika avuga ati: "Bafitiye ishavu ryinshi Trump kubera arwanira abakristu/abakristo, ico mukimenye. Rero abankwa ni mwebwe abakristu". Ikigo Pew Research gikora ubushakashatsi ku mibereho y'abantu kivuga ko mu gihe Perezida Trump azwi ko ari umutegetsi yacanishijemwo isi, mu bihugu nka Nijeriya na Kenya arakundwa cane nk'uko amatohoza y'iki kigo yavyerekanye mu kwa mbere uno mwaka. Kivuga ko amajambo yavuze mu 2018 yo kugereranya ibihugu vya Afrika "nk'imisarani" bobo ko ata kibazo ateye. Ibi bihugu vyompi bisanzwe bizwi ko bigendera cane ku madini. Mu bumanuko bwa Nijeriya, igihugu ca Afrika gifise abantu benshi, harangwamwo amashengero menshi, mu gihe muri Kenya naho abanyapolitike bakoresha cane amashengero mu gutanga ubutumwa ku banywanyi babo, ari naco gituma amadini afise ikibanza kinini muri ibi bihugu. Pasitori Richard Chogo avuga ko Perezida Trump yarwaniye amateka ndangagaciro y'abakristu Amashengero menshi ya kikristu muri Afrika, asanzwe arwanya cane ivyo gukorora inda, abubakana bahuje ibitsina, bakongera bagashigikira Israyeli, ntibigeze biyumvamwo uwasubiriwe na Trump, umu Democrate Barack Obama, n'aho afise amamuko muri Kenya. Richard Chogo, Pasitori mu rusengero rwa Deliverance ku mugwa mukuru wa Kenya, Nairobi, yabwiye BBC ati: "Ubutegetsi bwa Obama bwarahimirije umugambi w'ukwigenga (liberalisme) hano muri Afrika, kandi uwu mugambi wateje impungenge mu bategetsi bamwe bamwe b'amadini. Rero kabaye agahengwe ku butegetsi bwa Trump yahisemwo gusubiza ibirenge inyuma". Arashimagiza ubutegetsi bwa Trump kubona bwarashoboye guhagarika imfashanyo zahabwa amashirahamwe nka Marie Stopes, yafasha mu buryo bwo kugabanya imvyaro n'ugukoroza inda mu bihugu bitari bike vya Afrika. Iri shirahamwe ryaraneguye iyi ngingo ya Amerika yo guhagarika izi mfashanyo, rivuga ko rishira "ubuzima bw'abakenyezi mu kaga". Impari ku bijanye no gukoroza inda zimaze imyaka n'imiburiburi irenga 40. Kuva ico gihe, abavugabutumwa b'abazungu bagize uruhara rukomeye mu matora ku ruhande rw'aba Repubulika kandi ivyiyumviro vyabo vyarakwiye kw'isi yose, cane cane muri Afrika. Ibi bimeze uku mu gihe Abaporotesanti b'abirabure benshi muri Amerika bashigikiye umugambwe uharanira Demokarasi kandi bakanegura ubutegetsi bwa Trump, nk'uko icegeranyo gishasha ca Pew Research kivyerekana. Emeka Ezeji, umupasitori mukuru mw'ishengero rya Anglicani mu ntara ya Enugu iri mu bumanuko bushira ubuseruko bwa Nijeriya, avuga ko ivyiyumviro vyiwe vya politike bishingiye "ku vyanditswe" gusa. Pasitori Ezeji avuga ko yemera neza ko Trump ariko arakora igikorwa c'intumwa y'Imana Avuga ati: "Abakristu ba Afrika bazi ko umukuru w'igihugu w'umu Repubulika ari we mwiza kuri Amerika no kw'isi". Abandanya asengera Perezida Trump ko yotsinda umukeba wiwe wo mu mugambwe w'abaharanira Demokarasi Joe Biden mu matora ategekanijwe mu kwa cumi na rimwe, kandi ko yari yafashe umwanya iminsi yose wo gusengera uyu mukuru w'igihugu ngo akire igihe aheruka mu bitaro kubera coronavirus. Nk'uko bimeze kuri Pasitori Chogo, na we nyene abona ko "intege nke" za Trump zidategerezwa kurengera "inyungu rusangi". Nk'akarorero, ariyamiriza rya sekeza rya Black Lives Matter (Ubuzima bw'abirabure ni kirumara), isekeza Trump afata ko ari "ikimenyetso c'urwanko", akavuga ko "ryanyazwe intumbero yaryo". Bwana Trump arirata ko ari we mu perezida wa Amerika amaze gufasha Abanyamerika bakomoka muri Afrika gusumba abandi baperezida ba Amerika Yibaza ibibazo vyinshi aho avuga ati: "Abandi bantu atari abazungu nta vanguraruhu bakorerwa? Ubuzima bw'umwirabure abayabaye ubu bwoba ari bwiza ugereranije n'imyaka indwi iheze? Canke umwirabure abayabaye ubu yoba ageramiwe ubu kuri Trump gusumba kuri Obama?" Bwana Trump arirata ko ari we mu perezida wa Amerika amaze gukorera ivyiza vyinshi Abanyamerika bakomoka muri Afrika gusumba abandi baperezida bose mu mateka ya Amerika, kenshi agafatira ku rugero ruto rw'ubushomeri mu myaka itatu ya mbere y'ubutegetsi bwiwe, ico Bwana Ezeji akenguruka cane. Ubunyamabanga bujejwe akazi buvuga ko igitigiri c'abashomeri b'abirabure mu kw'icenda ari co gitigiri gito cane cabayeho kuva butanguye kwegeranya ibiharuro nk'ibi mu myaka ya 1970, n'aho ibi vyahindutse kubera coronavirus. Ariko Pasitori Ezeji avuga ko Bwana Trump agifise igikorwa kinini ategerezwa gukora ku neza ya bose, aha akaba afatira ku mwami Cyrus (Kuro) w'umu perse avugwa muri Biblia ko yari yatoranijwe n'Imana kugira ngo yigarurire Babiloni, maze abanya Isirayeli bari bahunze banona gusubira i Yerusalemu. Avuga ati: "Trump niwe we Kuro wa kino gihe". Bwana Emeka avuga ati: "Imana irabivuze....ni umusuku wanje azorangura ishaka ryanje". Pasitori Juliet Eyimofe Binite ari mu gisagara ca Lagos muri Nijeriya aremeranya nawe. Yabwiye BBC ati: "Yatowe n'Imana". Pasitori Binite avuga ko Imana yamuhaye ubutumwa ko yariko irondera "umusuku" kugira ngo arangure isezerano ryayo Buri ku ndwi, uyu mupasitori w'umugore yama asengera Trump ngo atsinde amatora ku ncuro ya kabiri. Avuga ko Imana yamuhaye ubutumwa imbere y'amatora ya 2016 ko hari umuntu atunze cane yinjiye muri politike kandi ko ashigikiye ubwigenge bw'amadini, abakristu babona ko bubangamiwe. Avuga ati: "Yambwiye ko yariko irarondera umukozi, umuntu w'intungane kubera hari ibikorwa bimwe bimwe abantu beza badashobora gukora". "Dukeneye umuntu ashobora kurwanira agateka k'abemera". Avuga kandi ko Trump ataronka amashimwe akwiriye kuri politike yiwe mpuzamakungu, nk'akarorero amasezerano y'amahoro hagati ya Isirayeli na Emira Zunze Ubumwe z'Abararu (Emirats Arabes Unis). Amashengero manini cane ararwiriye muri Nijeriya - n'aho muri kino gihe coronavirus isaba ko abantu batandukana Pasitori Chogo na we nyene niko abibona: "N'aho woba uri Saddam Hussein cane Muammar Gaddafi, ntihabuze nk'ikintu kimwe canke bibiri vyiza wakoreye abanyagihugu bawe". Avuga ko Trump ashigikiwe ku mugabane wa Afrika kubera ukuntu atarya umunwa, aho avuga ko abategetsi ba Afrika bakeneye kubwirwa mu majambo yeruye kugira ngo bashobore gutunganya ibihugu vyabo. Mu butumwa butandukanye yanditse ku rubuga rwa Twitter, Bwana Trump aherutse kwibutsa abakristu bamushigikiye ko ubwisanzure mu vyo gusenga hamwe n'urugamba rwo kurwanya umugenzo wo gukoroza inda bishobora gukwama mu gihe atotsinda amatora yo mu kwa cumi na rimwe.
