Ariko Pasitori Ezeji afata ibintu yishimikije ubuhanuzi bwa Bibiliya buvuga ibihe vya nyuma. Ati: "Ko azotsinda canke atazotsinda, ico si ikibazo ca Trump, ahubwo ni ikibazo c'ivyo Imana ivuga". "Trump ni nka ca giti co muri Biblia abihweza ibirere bafatirako mu kwihweza ibimenyetso vy'ibihe...aramutse atsinze, tuzoba tugifise igihe co kubaho, nayo akaramuka atsinzwe nta gihe tuzoba tugisigaje".

Neelakantha Bhanu Prakash Ku myaka 20, yatsindiye umudari wa zahabu mu Buhinde w'irushanwa ry'isi ryo gukora imibare vuba vuba mu mutwe. Avuga ko imibare ari "umukino ukomeye wo mu mutwe" kandi ko intego ye ya mbere ari "kurwanya kwanga imibare". Bhanu - izina azwiho cyane - "atekereza imibare buri gihe" kandi ubu niwe muntu uyibara (human calculator) vuba vuba kurusha abandi ku isi. Agereranya imibare yo mu mutwe nko gusiganwa ku muvuduko munini, ko nta muntu ujya ushidikanya abantu bavuduka kurusha abandi, ariko buri gihe bibaza ku mpamvu yo gukora imibare mu mutwe. Yabwiye BBC Radio 1 Newsbeat ati: "Twemera abantu nka Usain Bolt iyo yirutse metero 100 mu masegonda 9.8, ariko ntituvuga impamvu yo kwiruka mu isi irimo imodoka n'indege. "Ni ukugira ngo bibere abantu urugero ko umubiri w'umuntu ushobora gukora ibyo benshi badatekereza - ibyo rero ni kimwe no kubara n'imibare." 'Bisaba ko ubwonko bwawe buhozaho' Ushobora kwibaza ko yavukanye ubu buhanga bukomeye, ariko siko bimeze. Yagize impanuka afite imyaka itanu imuheza ku gitanga umwaka wose kubera igikomere mu mutwe, aho niho urugendo rw'imibare rwatangiriye. Ati: "Ababyeyi banjye bababwiye ko nshobora kuzaba umuntu ufite ikibazo mu mutwe. "Byatumye ntangira gukora imibare mu mutwe ngo ndebe ko nabirokoka, kugira ngo ubwonko bwanjye buhozeho." Bhanu avuga ko kuva mu muryango uciriritse mu Buhinde, bisobanuye gushaka akazi cyangwa gutangira business, bitavuze kujya mu bintu nk'imibare. Ariko kubera uburyo yari yarayinjiyemo, Bhanu ubu ari hafi kurangiza kaminuza mu mibare. 'Siporo ikomeye y'ubwonko' Kimwe n'abantu barushanwa ku rwego rwo hejuru, Bhanu avuga ko ibyo yagezeho yabitewe no kwitegura. Ntabwo ari ibintu bisanzwe nko kwicara ku ntebe ukiga, ahubwo abibona nka "siporo ikomeye y'ubwonko." Agira ati: "Nateguye ubwanjye kutaba umunyamibare wihuse gusa ahubwo n'umuntu utekereza vuba cyane." Akiri muto, Bhanu yashoboraga kwitoza amasaha atandatu cyangwa arindwi ku munsi utabariyemo ayo mu ishuri. Mu gihe cy'amategeko yo kuguma mu rugo, Bhanu yafashije abantu bo mu cyaro mu Buhinde kwiga imibare Ariko kuva yatsinda irushanwa ry'isi agaca umuhigo, ntabwo "akitoza bikomeye" gutyo buri munsi. Ahubwo, avuga ko yitoza mu buryo "budateguye neza ariko butuma ntekereza imibare buri gihe". Ati: "Nitoza numva umuziki uvuga cyane, nganira n'abantu, nkina cricket, kuko aha nibwo ubwonko bwawe buba bwitoza ibintu byinshi icya rimwe". Avuga ko mugihe ari kuvugana n'umuntu ari nko ku nzira, ateranya imibare ya 'plaque/plate number' y'imodoka zose zimuciyeho. Ati: "Iyo ndi kuvugana n'umuntu turebana, mba ndi no kureba inshuro ahumbya amaso - biragoye nk'uko byumvikana - ariko bifasha ubwonko gukomeza gukora." 'Ni ukubera abandi urugero' Kuri Bhanu, intego ye si ugukomeza guca imihigo gusa - nubwo nabyo akunda kubikora. Ati: "Kubara no guca imihigo ni ibintu biba bigamije gusa kwibutsa ko isi ikeneye abanyamibare. Imibare igomba kuba ikintu cyo kwishimisha kuri twe kuko tuyikunda." Intego ye ngo ni "kurwanya kwanga imibare", kuko avuga ko abantu benshi batinya imibare. Ati: "Gutinya biha umurongo ibyo abantu bakurikira, bivuze ko [benshi] badakurikira imibare." Bhanu afite imihigo ine y'isi n'ibindi byinshi yagezeho, umuryango we "utewe ishema nawe". Ashimira umuryango we kumutera akanyabugabo no kumutegeka kuguma hamwe kugira ngo yitoze. Ati: "Nyuma yo gutsinda irushanwa rya mbere mpuzamahanga, marume yansabye ko ngerageza kunyaruka cyane kurusha uwariwe wese wabayeho. "Sinigeze na rimwe ntekereza ko nzagera aho mba umuntu ukora imibare vuba kurusha abandi ku isi".

Bose, Ahed Tamimi (i buryo) na nyina wiwe Nariman baciye bapfungwa Video yerekana Ahed Tamimi akubita ikofe yongera ahenura umusirikare imbere y'inzu yiwe i Nabi Saleh mu mwaka uheze yarakwiragiye henshi. Kubanye Palestine, yabaye intangarugero mu kugwanya ukwigarurira igihugu cabo kwa Israel, ariko abanye Israel benshi na bo bamufata nk'uwashatse guhungabanya umutekano. Yakiriwe n'isinzi ry'abantu bamushigikiye igihe yariko arasubira muhira iwe. Yabwiye iryo sinzi ry'abantu ati:"Urugamba rurabandanya gushika bahavuye." Uwo mwigeme yari afise imyaka 16 ico gihe, yabanje kwagirizwa ivyaha 12 harimwo kugira urugomo, kugomorera abantu ku bajejwe umutekano, kwihagira abasirikare no gutera amabuye. Mu kwezi kwa gatatu, yaremeye ivyaha bine gusa harimwo ico kugira urugomo no kugomorera abantu ku bajejwe umutekano. Ahed Tamimi yafashwe video na nyina wiwe, Nariman, ariko akoma induru anahenagura abasirikare babiri mu kayira kaja iwaboitariki 15 z'ukwezi kwa cumi na kabiri mu 2017. Muri iyo viseo aboneka ahenura umusirikare umwe amukubita n'ikofe anagabisha ko ashobora gukubita uwukurikira. Ahed Tamimi yabwiye sentare ko yakoze ivyo kuri abo basirikare kubera yari yababonye barashe muvyarawe w'imyaka 15 Mohammed mu mutwe uwo musi nyene. Igisirikare ca Israel kivuga ko cari carungitse abasirikare ku muhana wa Tamimi, ahari urwaruka rwaza rurabatera amabuye kugira babahagarike.

Martin Schulz wa SPD na Angela Merkel umushikiranganji wa mbere w'Ubudagi Amezi atatu inyuma y'amatora, Ubudagi n'ubu nta reta bufise. Ivyo biganiro vy'imisi itanu bizoba birimwo n'umugambwe CDU, umugambwe bacuditse wa SCU hamwe na SPD. Merkel ariyamamariza manda ya kane Merkel arashaka manda ya kane mu matora y'Ubudage Benshi babona ko ari akaryo ka nyuma aronse ko gushinga reta igizwe n'urunani rukomeye. Umugambwe wa SPD bafashanije kurongora Ubudagi mu myaka umunani kuri 12 amaze ku butegetsi. Ariko amajwi make yaronse mu matora yo mu kwezi kw'icenda, yatumye umukuru w'umugambwe wa SPD Martin Schulz yaciye aja mu batavuga rumwe na reta. Umukuru wa SPD Martin Schulz ategerezwa gusugurira abayoboke biwe ko kuja hamwe na Merkel bitazotuma aheba imigambi yabo bishinze

Ibimenyetso nk'ibi bya sifilisi bishobora kudapfa guhita bimenywa n'abayirwaye kubera ko biba byoroheje Ariko kuva icyo gihe, iyi ndwara yandurira mu mibonano mpuzabitsina yabaye indwara kuri ubu yibasiye leta eshatu muri esheshatu zigize Australia ndetse yadukira n'akandi karere. Kuva mu mwaka wa 2011, abaganga baravuga ko abana batandatu bamaze gupfa kubera kwanduzwa sifilisi n'ababyeyi babo bavuka. Kuva kandi muri uwo mwaka, abaganga baravuga ko uburyo iyi ndwara ya sifilisi yibasira abaturage bo muri Australia b'abasangwabutaka bwiyongereye cyane. Bava ku bantu 120 bagera ku barenga 2100 bayirwaye. Impuguke mu buzima zavuze ko aka ari akaga kibasiye Australia, bavuga ko iki gihugu gifite "akazi gakomeye" ko guhagarika iyi ndwara. Byagenze gute ngo sifilisi igere kuri iki kigero? Abaganga baravuga ko benshi mu barwaye sifilisi muri Australia ari urubyiruko rw'abasangwabutaka batuye mu turere two ku mpera mu majyaruguru no hagati mu gihugu. Impuguke mu kuvura abasangwabutaka, zirimo n'umwarimu wa kaminuza witwa James Ward, zatanze impuruza mu mwaka wa 2011 mu kinyamakuru cy'ubuzima cya Australia zigerageza gusaba ko sifilisi yahagarikwa mu bice yari yibasiye icyo gihe. Ariko Bwana Ward avuga ko ahubwo iyi ndwara yahise "irenga igaruriro." Iva mu karere kamwe ka Queensland igera ahandi hose muri iyi leta ndetse no mu majyaruguru, uburengerazuba no mu majyepfo ya Australia. Abategetsi bari gukora ubukangurambaga bwo kurwanya sifilisi bifashishije amatangazo yo kuri televiziyo nk'iri Ntibizwi neza icyateye iyi ndwara, nubwo impuguke zivuga ko ku ruhande rumwe yaba yaratewe n'urujya n'uruza rw'abantu. Ariko Bwana Ward avuga ko yatijwe umurindi nuko abategetsi batahise bayihagurukira ku ikubitiro. Yabwiye BBC ati: "Iyo iza kuba yaragaragaye mu rubyiruko, mu bantu batari abasangwabutaka bo muri Australia, iba yarahise igirwa ikibazo cyugarije igihugu." Sifilisi ni indwara bwoko ki? Abaganga baravuga ko kimwe mu biri gutuma bigorana guhangana n'iyi ndwara, ari akato gahabwa abayirwaye. 'Haracyari byinshi byo gukora' Bwana Ward, muganga akaba n'umwarimu wa kaminuza, yavuze ko hakiri kare ngo abe yavuga icyo ibikorwa by'ubukangurambaga biri gukorwa mu kwanya iyi ndwara bizageraho. Ariko yavuze ko ibi bikorwa hari icyo bimaze kugeraho gifatika, harimo nko kwita biruseho ku bagore batwite. Ndetse yavuze ko nta mwana wundi uherutse kwandura sifilisi akivuka - yavuze ko ari "ikimenyetso cyiza cyane." Bwana Ward yongeyeho ati: "Haracyari byinshi byo gukora. Hacyenewe ko turandura iyi ndwara mu gihe gito cya vuba, kandi aka ni akazi gakomeye."

Bwana Trump yagize ati: "Byose biterwa n'Ubushinwa" Mu ruhererekane rw'ubutumwa bwo ku rubuga nkoranyambaga rwa Twitter, Bwana Trump yanavuze ko nta mpamvu abona yatuma Amerika yongera kwitabira imikino yo kwitoza intambara ikorana na Koreya y'epfo - imikino yarakaje Koreya ya ruguru. Mu minsi ishize, umujyanama we mu bya gisirikare yavuze ko iyi myitozo ya gisirikare ishobora gukomeza. Bwana Trump yagize ati: "[Koreya ya ruguru] iri ku gitutu cyinshi cy'Ubushinwa kubera amakimbirane ashingiye ku bucuruzi dufitanye na leta y'Ubushinwa." Ubushinwa bwashinje Bwana Trump "guhindura uwo yegekaho ibirikuba" ku ngingo ijyanye na Koreya ya ruguru. Mu nama yabaye mu kwezi kwa gatandatu yahuje Bwana Trump na Kim Jong-un, umutegetsi wa Koreya ya ruguru, yarangiye Bwana Jong-un asezeranyije "kureka burundu gahunda y'ibitwaro kirimbuzi bya nikleyeri." Nyuma yaho gato, Bwana Trump yavuze ko "nta byago bikiriho bitewe n'ibitwaro kirimbuzi bya nikleyeri bya Koreya ya ruguru." Ariko guhera icyo gihe, ababikurikiranira hafi benshi bavuga ko Koreya ya ruguru itarikwihuta bihagije mu gusenya ahakorerwa ibitwaro kirimbuzi bya nikleyeri n'ibisasu bya roketi. Ubutumwa bwa Bwana Trump yanyujije ku rubuga nkoranyambaga rwa Twitter busa nkaho bwegeka izi ngorane zose ku Bushinwa, ariko yanakomeje ashimagiza umubano afitanye ku giti cye n'abategetsi bombi b'Ubushinwa na Koreya ya ruguru. Iyi mvange iteye urujijo yo kunenga, gushimagiza no gushyiraho igikangisho, ije ikurikira igitutu Amerika ikomeje kotswa ngo igaragaze ibyavuye muri biriya biganiro by'amateka byabaye mu kwezi kwa gatandu byahuje Bwana Trump na Bwana Jong-un bikabera mu gihugu cya Singapuru.

Amber Kyzer yagize ati: "Mbaye nshoboye kumwikuriraho [uwo mugabo] isura ye, nabikora" Amber Kyzer yabwiye urukiko rwo muri leta ya South Carolina ko Tim Jones Jr "atagiriye impuhwe abana banjye, ariko abana banjye baramukundaga". Uwo mugabo w'imyaka 37 y'amavuko, mu kwezi gushize kwa gatanu yahamijwe icyaha cyo kwica abo bana, bari bafite hagati y'umwaka umwe n'imyaka umunani y'amavuko, iwe mu rugo hafi y'umujyi wa Lexington, ku itariki ya 28 y'ukwezi kwa munani mu mwaka wa 2014. Inteko y'abacamanza iri gutekereza ku kuba Jones akwiye kwicwa cyangwa gufungwa ubuzima bwe bwose. Mu rukiko ku munsi w'ejo ku wa kabiri, Madamu Kyzer yagize ati: "Ndumva ibyo abana banjye baciyemo n'uburyo bababaye". "Nk'umubyeyi, mbaye nshoboye kumwikuriraho [uwo mugabo] isura ye, nabikora". "Nguko uko niyumva nk'umubyeyi". Timothy Ray Jones (uri hagati) ubwo yari mu rukiko rw'i Lexington ku itariki ya kane y'uku kwezi kwa gatandatu Madamu Kyzer yabwiye abacamanza ko mu gice kinini cy'ubuzima bwe yarwanyije igihano cy'urupfu. Yavuze ko nubwo yagiye anyuzamo akizera ko ubucamanza "buzakaranga" uyu wahoze ari umugabo we, we abaye ari we uhana atahitamo kumuhanisha igihano cy'urupfu. Ariko Madamu Kyzer yongeyeho ko azubaha icyemezo icyo ari cyo cyose urukiko ruzafata. Yari yahamagajwe n'abunganira Jones ngo atange ibimenyetso. Urukiko rwabwiwe ko abo bana bishwe gute? Kyzer na Jones bashakanye hashize ibyumweru bitandatu nyuma yo guhura mu mwaka wa 2004 ubwo bakoraga mu kigo abana bidagaduriramo kiri i Chicago. Ubwo batandukanaga nyuma y'imyaka icyenda bashakanye, Kyzer yamusigiye abo bana kuko yari afite akazi k'ibijyanye na mudasobwa kamuhemba umushahara w'amadolari ibihumbi 80 buri mwaka ndetse akagira n'imodoka. Kyzer yahuraga n'abo bana buri wa gatandatu muri resitora. Urukiko rwabwiwe ko ku munsi Jones yishe abo bana, umujinya wamurenze ubwo yageraga mu rugo agasanga uwitwa Nahtahn w'imyaka itandatu y'amavuko akina n'umugozi winjiza umuriro w'amashanyarazi mu byuma nka mudasobwa by'ikoranabuhanga. Yahise yica uwo muhungu nuko nyuma afata icyemezo cyo kuniga abandi bana bane ari bo Elaine w'umwaka umwe, Gabriel w'imyaka ibiri, Elias w'imyaka irindwi na Mera w'imyaka umunani. Jones yamaze iminsi icyenda agendana imirambo y'aba bana mu modoka ye Urukiko rwabwiwe ko Jones yahise apfunyika imirambo yabo mu ishashi ya plastike ayishyira mu modoka ye ya siporo, nuko amara iminsi icyenda ayitemberana, mbere yuko ayisiga mu cyaro cyo muri leta ya Alabama. Yaje gutabwa muri yombi muri leta ya Mississipi ubwo umupolisi wo mu muhanda yamuhagarikaga amaze kumva "umwuka w'umuntu wapfuye" uva muri iyo modoka. Jones yavuze ko atishe abo bana, ku mpamvu yuko yari arwaye mu mutwe bikomeye. Abunganizi be mu mategeko bavuga ko yabanaga n'indwara yo mu mutwe ya "schizophrenia" na we atabizi - indwara bavuga ko n'umugore we na we yari arwaye. Bavuga ko yarushijeho kumukomerera ubwo umugore we yamucaga inyuma akajya kuryamana n'umusore bari baturanye.

Mu gihe umubare w'abarwayi ba coronavirus usa nk'uri guhama hamwe cyangwa kugabanuka mu bihugu bimwe by'i Burayi, ibice bimwe by'Afurika nibwo ikibigeramo Ku isi abarenga miliyoni 2,9 bamaze kwemezwa ko banduye coronavirus, nkuko iyo mibare ikomeza ibigaragaza. Iyi ntambwe nshya iteye impungenge itewe mu gihe abo yishe muri Amerika barenze 500,000, Abanyamerika bakaba bakomeje gushegeshwa n'iki cyorezo cya mbere kibi cyane isi ihuye nacyo. Ku itariki ya 11 y'ukwezi kwa mbere uyu mwaka nibwo igitangazamakuru cya leta y'Ubushinwa cyatangaje umuntu wa mbere uzwi ko yishwe na coronavirus. Kuva icyo gihe, ibihugu n'uturere birenga 210 bimaze gutangaza abantu bishwe na Covid-19, indwara yo mu myanya y'ubuhumekero iterwa n'ubu bwoko bushya bwa coronavirus. Kugeza ubu ibihugu bitanu bimaze gutangaza buri kimwe umubare urenga 20,000 w'abishwe na coronavirus, nubwo uburyo buri gihugu kibara abo yishe butandukanye cyane. Amerika, Ubutaliyani na Espagne ni byo byagaragaje umubare uri hejuru cyane w'abo yishe. 'Intambwe ibabaje kandi iteye ubwoba' mu Bwongereza Urwego rw'ubuzima rw'Ubwongereza ejo ku wa gatandatu rwatangaje ko ubu abantu barenga 20,000 bamaze kwicwa na coronavirus mu bitaro byo muri iki gihugu. Priti Patel, umunyamabanga wa leta ushinzwe ubutegetsi bw'igihugu, yavuze ko uwo mubare w'abo imaze kwica mu Bwongereza ari "intambwe ibabaje kandi iteye ubwoba". Yongeyeho ko "igihugu cyose kiri mu kababaro". Kubera ko umubare w'abishwe na coronavirus mu Bwongereza utarimo abapfira mu ngo zabo cyangwa mu nzu zita ku bageze mu zabukuru, umubare w'ukuri w'abo imaze kwica ugomba kuba urenze aho. Ubufaransa, igihugu kitabarira mu mubare w'abo yishe abantu baba mu nzu zo kubitabo nk'abageze mu zabukuru, ejo ku wa gatandatu cyatangaje ko umubare w'abo yishe wiyongereyeho 369. Kuva mu ntangiriro y'ukwezi gushize kwa gatatu, umubare w'abo yishe mu Bufaransa umaze kugera ku 22,648. Ariko abategetsi bo mu rwego rw'ubuvuzi bavuga ko abapfira mu bitaro bari kugabanuka. Ndetse n'umubare w'indembe wongeye kugabanuka ku munsi wa 17 wikurikiranya. Kongera kwiyongera mu bice bimwe na bimwe Muri iki cyumweru, umukuru w'ishami ry'umuryago w'abibumbye ryita ku buzima (OMS/WHO) yavuze ko Covid-19 iri kwiyongera muri Afurika, Uburayi bw'uburasirazuba, Amerika yo hagati n'iy'amajyepfo. Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus yavuze ko nubwo iki cyorezo kigaragara ko ahanini kiri guhama hamwe cyangwa kugabanuka mu Burayi bw'uburengerazuba, mu bihugu bimwe ho ari bwo kigitangira. Yagize ati: "Ndetse no muri bimwe (ibihugu) byibasiwe mu ntangiriro y'iki cyorezo kirimo kongera kwiyongera". Kimwe muri byo ni Singapour, ku ikubitiro cyari cyashimagijwe kubera uburyo cyashoboye guhagarika iyi virusi. Ariko kuva icyo gihe, Singapour ikomeje kwiyongeramo ubwandu bushya bukomoka aho inganda zikorera ndetse no kuryama mu bucucike aho abakozi bo mu nganda barara. Ahandi ku mugabane w'Aziya, abategetsi bo mu Bushinwa ejo ku wa gatandatu nta bishwe na coronavirus batangaje - ukaba ubaye umunsi wa 10 wikurikiranya nta muntu mushya yishe muri icyo gihugu. Ndetse no muri Koreya y'epfo, umunsi w'ejo ku wa gatandatu wabaye uwa kabiri hatabonetse umuntu mushya wishwe na coronavirus.

Abimukira mu myiyerekano imbere y'inyubakwa ya Trump Tower i New York mu ndwi iheze Prezida wa Amerika asaba ko hatangwa amahera yo kwubaka urwo ruhome, gusubizwa inyuma vyihuse abimukira hamwe no gutanga akazi kubaraba uruja n'uruza muri Amerika. Mu kwezi guheze yarahagaritse umugambi Obama yari yarashizeho wakingira abimukira b'urwaruka bashika 690.000. Mu nama nshingamateka, abademokrate biyamirije iyo nteguro y'itegeko. Daca: Trump ashaka gufuta umugambi w'ikigongwe ku rwaruka rw'abimukira Bagiriza Trump ko yisubiyeko kuvyo yari yemeye ko atazoshiramwo umugambi wo kwubaka uruhome muvyo bari bumvikanye ku mategeko mashasha yogenga urwaruka rw'abimukira. Umugambi wa DACA (Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals) washizweho mu 2012 ku butegetsi bwa prezida Obama, uzorangirana n'ukwezi kwa gatatu, ivyo bikaba biteye amakenga kuri kazoza k'abari bakingiwe n'uwo mugambi.

Abimukira batanguye kurundana mu bumanuko bwa Mexique kuva itariki 25 z'ukwezi kwa gatatu Abategetsi bacungera imbibe ba Amerika babwiye abantu bashika 150, benshi bari kumwe n'abana, ko ku rubibe Mexique ihana na Amerika ujabukira i San Diego huzuye. Ntivyari bwamenyekane nimba abo bimukira bo muri Amerika yo hagati batinda bakabareka bakinjira canke ko basubizwa inyuma, ariko uwo mugwi usa n'uwudashaka kuva ngaho. Trump: Uruzitiro hagati ya Amerika na Mexique ruzokoresha izuba Mexique irabura Amerika ko izihimura Abo bimukira batekera imfungurwa hamwe Prezida Trump yavuze ko abimukira bo muri Amerika yo hagati bageramiye umutekano wa Amerika. Prezida wa Amerika yama yiyamye abo bimukira, kuri twitter akaba yavuze ko vyerekana ko bikenewe gukaza amategeko aberekeye. Yahamagariye amareta ahana urubibe na Mexique kurungika abasirikare gukaza umutekano ku rubibe gushika hubatswe uruhome muri ico kibanza. Urwo rukurikirane rw'abimukira rwahagurutse itariki 25 z'ukwezi kwa gatatu mu bumanuko bwa Mexique rugana Amerika, hagufi y'urubibe na Guatemala, hakaba harageze igihe bashika ku 1000. Abo bimukira bagiye n'amamodoka yunguruza abantu, itereni hamwe n'amaguru ibirometero 3.200 gushika ku rubibe Mexique ihana na Amerika, benshi bakaba bavuga ko bahunga ugutotezwa n'ubwicanyi mu bihugu vyabo.

Mu ntango za 2018, ikambi ya Mahama mu Rwanda yaharurwamwo impunzi zingana na 56,738 Iryo shirahamwe ryitaho impunzi kw'isi rimenyesha ko abategetsi barimenyesheje ko izo mpunzi zishwe mu gihe zariko zigerageza kwinjiza imiti bidaciye mu mategeko. U Rwanda ruhaye indaro impunzi z'Abarundi zirenga 70.000, zahunze indyane za politike zaturutse ku matora ya 2015 mu Burundi. Igipolisi c'u Rwanda catangaje giciye ku rubuga rwa Twitter ko ejo ku wa gatandatu, hafi isaha icenda n'igice z'ijoro (03h30), abajejwe umutekano mu gace ka Mahama mu karere ka Kirehe, barashe umurwi w'abantu bariko bagerageza kwinjiza ibiyayuramutwe baciye ku ruzi Akagera. Igipolisi kimenyesha ko babiri muri abo banu bagiye kumenyekana ko zari impunzi ziba mw'ikambi yazo iri aho i Mahama. Mw'itangazo ryaraye risohowe na HCR, rimenyesha ko ribabajwe n'urwo rupfu rigasaba abategetsi gukora amatohoza kugira ngo bamenye neza ingene vyagenze. Iryo tangazo rivuga riti: "HCR irifatanije n'impunzi zo mw'ikambi ya Mahama kandi ririko rikorana n'abayirongoye hamwe n'abaserukira abandi mu kubungabunga umutekano no kuzifata mu mugongo mu gihe bakirindiriye amatohoza ariko akorwa na Leta". U Rwanda ruri mu bihugu vyakiriye impunzi z'Abarundi ziharurwa mu 400.000 zahunze indyane za politike zadutse mu Burundi mu 2015 bivuye ku ngingo ya nyakwigendera Perezida Petero Nkurunziza yo kwitoreza ikindi kiringo nk'umukuru w'igihugu. Ikambi ya Mahama iri mu buseruko bushira ubumanuko bw'u Rwanda Abatavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi bwiwe ico gihe bavuga ko ico kiringo cari giteye kubiri n'ibwirizwashingiro hamwe n'amasezerano y'amahoro ya Arusha yo mu 2000. Ubutegetsi bw'umugambwe CNDD-FDD hamwe n'incuti zabwo bobo bavuga ko ikiringo cavugwa ko ari ica gatatu cari gikurikije amategeko, ivyagiye mbere kwemezwa na sentare y'Umuryango wa Afrika y'Ubuseruko. Mu gihe Abarundi bahungiye muri Tanzania baharurwa 200.000 babandanya bahunguka, abahungiye mu Rwanda bobo gushika ubu ntibarahunguka. Mu majambo agize iminsi ashikirizwa n'umukuru w'igihugu Jenerali-Majoro Evariste Ndayishimiye, abandanya asaba impunzi zose zahungiye mu mahanga guhunguka kugira ngo bafashanye n'abandi Barundi kwubaka igihugu.

Ubwato nk'ubu bukunze kugira impanuka mu nzuzi zo muri Kongo Abajejwe intwaro bavuga ko abantu bashika ijana barokotse, ubwo bwato bukaba bwari bwuzuye ibidandazwa n'abantu. Ivy'iyi mpanuka yabaye ku wa mbere ku birometero nka mirongo itatu werekeza mu muji wa Kisangani, niho bikimenyekana. Vyatumye haba imyiyerekano y'urwaruka rwatwawe n'ishavu mu muji wa Isangi aho ubwo bwato bwari bwerekeje. Bivugwa ko inyubako nyinshi za leta zaturiwe.

Rusesabagina uko yafashwe akagezwa mu Rwanda kugeza ubu ntibivugwaho rumwe, aha yari mu rukiko mu kwezi kwa cyenda Rusesabagina azwi cyane ku isi kubera film 'Hotel Rwanda' - itavugwaho rumwe - ikina inkuru y'uko yarokoye Abatutsi barenga 1,000 muri jenoside. Ubu afungiye mu Rwanda aregwa ibyaha by'iterabwoba, bishingiye ku bitero byiciwemo abantu mu 2018 na 2019 byakozwe n'umutwe wa FLN yemeye ko yashinze. Urwego rushinzwe imfungwa n'abagororwa ruvuga ko Rusesabagina ari muzima, ko "nta n'igicurane arwaye". Itangazo ryasohowe n'umuvugizi wa Hotel Rwanda Rusesabagina Foundation rivuga ko amafoto ya vuba y'itangazamakuru "agaragaza ko ubuzima bwe bumeze nabi." Iryo tangazo rigira riti: "Mu biganiro aheruka kugirana n'umuryango we yababwiye ko agira kuzungerwa, kubabara umutwe, kwitura hasi agata ubwenge, bishobora kuba biterwa n'umuvuduko ukabije w'amaraso utagenzurwa, n'uburyo afunzemo". Rusesabagina yatakaje 6Kg kandi yasabye gushyirwa mu bitaro inshuro eshatu, nk'uko iri tangazo ribivuga. Rusesabagina aracyari kuburana ku ifungwa n'ifungurwa ry'agateganyo, mu mpamvu atanga asaba kurekurwa akaburana adafunze avugamo iy'uburwayi. Pelly Gakwaya Uwera, umuvugizi w'urwego rushinzwe imfungwa n'abagororwa, yabwiye BBC ko ibyo bivugwa n'umuryango we nta kuri kurimo kuko "Rusesabagina ni muzima". Ati: "Icyo nakubwira, Rusesabagina nta n'umuriro afite, nta n'igicurane. Nta kibazo afite habe na gito". Madamu Uwera avuga ko ubuzima bwa Rusesabagina bwitaweho byihariye, kandi avugana n'umuryango we kuri telefone ya gereza nk'abandi bafunze, kuko bitemewe gusurwa kubera Covid. Ati: "Tumuvuza nk'uko tuvuza abandi mu gihe barwaye, we noneho kubera umuvuduko w'amaraso, aravurwa byihariye." Ku wa gatatu, minisiteri y'ubuzima yatangaje ko ku bantu 50 bari batahuweho Covid-19 mu Rwanda 27 muri bo bari muri gereza ya Kigali, aho na Rusesabagina afungiye. Rusesabagina azongera kuburana ubujurire ku ifungwa n'ifungurwa ry'agateganyo tariki 20 z'uku kwezi. Imanza ze ubu ziba hifashishijwe ikoranabuhanga mu kwirinda coronavirus.

Aho hari ikinogo cikekwa ko coba cahambwemwo abantu bashika 100 Iryo tohoza rivuga ko n'imiburiburi abantu bashika 500 bishwe, harimwo imiryango yatuririwe mu mazu yabo be n'umwana w'imyaka ibiri y'amavuka yatawe mu kinogo gisukwamwo imyanda mu tuzu twa surwumwe (fosse septique). Imishamirano ishingiye ku moko yaradutse hagati y'umuryango umwe washatse guhamba umuntu wabo mw'itongo ry'uwundi muryango. Iryo tohoza ryerekana ko iyo mishamirano ishobora gusubira kwaduka umwanya n'umwanya. Abakoze iryo tohoza bamenyesha ko imishamirano yabaye hagati y'amagenekerezo ya 16 na 18 mu kwezi kw'icumi na kabiri kw'umwaka uheze "yari yateguwe kandi ishirwa mu ngiro ihagarariwe n'abarongozi kama". Abo mu muryango w'aba Batende barateye imitumba y'aba Banunu "mu gitero cari gikomeye kandi cakozwe mu bubangutsi, ku buryo batabahaye n'akanya ko guhunga". Iryo tohoza rivuga kandi ko abategetsi b'intara mu gace ka Yumbi, ni mu ntara ya Mai-Ndombe iri mu burengero bw'igihugu, "basa n'abananiwe n'igikorwa bajejwe co gukingira abanyagihugu". Abahasize ubuzima bashobora kuba barenga igitigiri gitangwa c'abantu 535 bari mu cegeranyo cabo. Mu kwezi guheze, ONU yavuga ko yikeka ko hoba hapfuye n'imiburiburi abantu 890. Ryaciye rirungika umurwi w'abagira amatohoza bashoboye gushika ku mutumba umwe gusa mu mitumba ine yatewe. Hariho n'amakuru avuga ko hari ibiziga vyatawe mu ruzi Kongo. Amatora y'umukuru w'igihugu yabaye ku wa 30 z'ukwezi kwa cumi na kabiri kw'umwaka uheze yarungururijwe ku wa 31 z'uku kwezi kwa gatatu muri ako karere ka Yumbi kubera imigumuko. Ni mu gihe Felix Tshisekedi yahoze atavuga rumwe na Joseph Kabila yamaze gutangazwa ko yatsinze ayo matora.

Ibifungurwa vyose bihinguwe mu nyama zituruka muri Afrika y'epfo vyatawe mw'ishimu Igihugu ca Malawi casavye abadandaza batumako inyama muri Afrika y'epfo kuzikura mu maduka yabo. Amaduka yo muri Afrika y'epfo yoyatanguye guta izo nyama. Abagore bibungeze bagiriwe inama yo kwigirwa kure izo nyama zihumanye Ingwara ya Listeriose yari imaze guhitana abantu bagera ku 180 muri Afrika y'epfo mu mwaka uheze. Ishirahamwe mpuzamakungu rimenyesha ko bikekwa ko ari co kiza ca mbere gihitanye abantu benshi mw'isi yose. Ingwara ya Listeriose itegwa n'agakoko ko mu bwoko bwa bacteria kitwa Listeria monocytogenes, kandurira mu bifungurwa vy'inyama canke amata atatetswe neza. Iyo ngwara yigaragaza mu gutera umururumbo, ibimeze nk'ibicurane hamwe no kudahwa ndetse no gucibwamwo.

Kim Jong-un (i bubamfu) na Moon Jae-in bahura itariki 27 ukwezi kwa Kane 2018 Umukuru w'igihugu ca Korea ya ruguru Kim Jong-un na Moon Jae-in wa Korea yepfo, bemeranije gukora ngo bakure mu karere ibigwanisho vya "nucléaire". Televiziyo y'igihugu hamwe n'ikinyamakuru KCNA vyakeje ivyo biganiro hamwe n'intego y'abategetsi yo kuvanaho ibigwanisho vya "nucléaire". Abo bategetsi bahuye haheze amezi y'uruhagarara ubona ko rwotuma haduka ingwano. Koreya zombi zumvikanye kwirinda ivyokwega intambara Amerika 'yarabonanye na Kim Jong Un mw'ibanga' Korea Yepfo isaba ko Korea ya Ruguru igumizwako ibihano Bwana Kim yabaye umukuru w'igihugu wa mbere wa Korea ya ruguru ahonyoje ikirenge ubwa mbere ku butaka bwa Korea yepfo, kuva igihe ingwano hagati y'ivyo bihugu bibiri irangiriye mu 1953. Abanyagihugu ba Korea yepfo bararyohewe babonye ivyo biganiro ku mboneshakure Haheze imyaka myinshi, Pyongyang ivuga ishimitse ko itazovavanura n'umugambi wayo w'ibigwanisho vya "nucléaire", isigura ko vyoyifasha kwikingira agasomborotso ka Amerika. Abo bakuru b'ibihugu babiri bavuga ko bazobandanya ibiganiro na Amerika hamwe n'Ubushinwa, kugira ngo bashobore kurangiza uruhagarara ruri muri Korea zose.

Denis Mukwege yahawe igihembo cy'amahoro cyitiriwe Nobel cya 2018 Bwana Mukwege wahawe igihembo cy'amahoro cyitiriwe Nobel mu 2018, yashimiwe umuhate we mu gufasha no kuvura abagore bafashwe ku ngufu mu ntambara ziba mu burasirazuba bwa Congo. Mu kwezi kwa karindwi, yavuze ko hashize igihe aterwa ubwoba ko azicwa, kubera ko asaba ubucamanza ku byaha byakorewe mu burasirazuba bwa Congo mu myaka yashize. Bwana Mukwege akunze kumvikana asaba ubucamaza ku bwicanyi (1993 - 2003) bwahitanye miliyoni z'abantu buvugwa na 'Mapping Report' yakozwe n'inzobere za ONU. Iyo raporo yavuze ko ingabo z'u Rwanda zabugizemo uruhare, raporo u Rwanda rwahakanye. Bwana Mukwege yumvikana kandi yamagana ubwicanyi bukorwa muri iki gihe cya vuba mu burasirazuba bwa Congo. Mu kwezi gushize, ishyirahamwe ry'abaganga baharanira uburenganzira bwa muntu ryasabye ko Denis Mukwege, umwe mu barigize, ingabo za MONUSCO "zirushaho kumurinda no kongerera umutekano abakozi b'ibitaro bye". Mu myaka yashize, ingabo za MONUSCO ziri muri DR Congo zarindaga ibitaro bya Panzi, ariko nyuma zaje kuhava. Mu ijoro ryo kuwa gatatu, Bwana Mukwege yanditse kuri Twitter ashimira ko kuva kuri uwo munsi mu gitondo "ingabo za UN zongeye koherezwa kuri ibi bitaro kuturinda". Mu kwezi gushize, Michelle Bachelet, umunyamabanga mukuru w'ishami rishinzwe uburenganzira bwa muntu muri ONU/UN, yasabye leta ya DR Congo gukora iperereza kw'iterabwoba ryo kwicwa rikorerwa Denis Mukwege.

Ababibonye bavuga ko abateye bafunze umuhanda werekeza kuri iyo gereza bakabuza abandi bose bakoresha uyu muhanda kuwunyuramo. Binjiriye ku marembo ya gereza barusha imbaraga abarinzi bayo, bituma imfungwa zisohoka. Ibi bibaye mu gihe hakomeje imyigaragambyo ya #EndSARS yo kwamagana urugomo rw'itsinda rya polisi ryari rishinzwe kurwanya abajura muri Nigeria. Polisi muri Nigeria ivuga ko abantu bikinga muri iyo myigaragambyo ya #EndSARS bari gukora ibitero kuri station za polisi muri uwo mujyi. Polisi ivuga ko abigaragambya bakuye imbunda n'amasasu mu bubiko bw'intwaro, bakanafungura abari bafungiye kuri polisi mbere yo gutwika aho bateye. Ubutegetsi bwa leta ya Edo ubu bwatangaje amasaha 24 y'umukwabu udasanzwe muri uwo mujyi nyuma y'ibyo bitero no gutoroka kw'imfungwa muri gereza y'umujyi.

Ishurahamwe mpuzamakungu Onu ryatoye umunyamabanga mukuru waryo- Antonio Guterres Hari hatewe akamo ko uwomusubirira yoba ari umupfasoni, ariko abakenyezi ntibaronse ayo mahirwe. Bitegekanijwe ko Guterres atangura akazi kiwe muri Onu mu kwezi kwa mbere umwaka uza. Guterres yavukiye mu gisagara ca Lisbon mu mwaka wa 1949. Yize ivyigwa vy'ubuhinga muri kaminuza ya 'Superior Tecnico'. Aranginje amashure yiwe mu 1971, yamaze imyaka mike yigisha, aho yakoze mu bigo vy'abakatolika. Mu 1974, yinjiye mu mugambwe w'abasosiyaliste, aca aba umunyepolitike igihe Portugal yariko iravavanura n'intwaro y'umukazo yamaze imyaka itanu. Yatorewe kuba umunyamabanga mukuru w'uwo mugambwe mu mwaka wa 1995, aca aguma muri ico kibsnza gushika mu 2002. Antonio Guterres avuga neza indimi z'icongereza, iki espagnol n'igifaransa. Yagiye muvyo imigenderanire mu 2005, aho yatorerwa kurongora ishami rya Onu rijejwe impunzi UNHCR. Ari muri ico kibanza c'umukuru wa HCR, yaragabanije igitigiri c'abakozi muri iryo shirahamwe, bari ku cicaro gikuru i Geneve, ahubwo ahamagarira abakozi b'iryo shirahamwe kuba hagufi y'ahari impunzi, no kumenya uko bohangana n'ibindi bintu bituma abantu bata izabo. Akanama ka Onu kajejwe umutekano ni ko gatora umunyamabanga mukuru Yarashimagijwe cane ku kungene yahimirije ibihugu bitunze gufasha impunzi zahunze intambara, n'abageramiwe n'ibindi bintu bituma abantu bata izabo. Antonio Guterres afise imyaka 67, akaba afise abana babiri bo ku mugore wa mbere. Umupfasoni wiwe wa mbere yitavye Imana mu 1998. Yasubiye kwubaka ugwiwe mu 2001.

Amabarabara ya Mogadishio akunze kubamwo imiduga myinshi Abashingamateka bahurira ku kibuga c'indege gutora umukuru w'igihugu mushasha. Ku munsi wa kabiri ku mugoroba, abantu bikekwa kuba abo mu murwi ugendera ku vyiyumviro vya Islamu Al-Shabab baragavye ibitaro boresheje ibigwanisho vyo mu bwoko bwa "mortiers"batumbereza mu kibanza ayo matora abera. Abanyagihugu baba mu kigwati ca Arbacow bavuga ko abo ba jihadistes bateye ikirindiro c'abasirikare b'Umuryango w'Ubumwe bwa Africa. Ikibuga c'indege nico kibanza gitekanye kurusha ibindi ku murwa mukuru wa Somalia, amatora akaba yajanywe aho kubera ibibazo vy'umutekano. Abakandida barenga 20 nibo bagwanira ikibanza c'umukuru w'igihugu, batatu ba mbere bakaba bagasabwa kuja mu matora ya kabiri, babiri ba mbere muribo bakaja mu matora ya gatatu ari nayo ya nyuma. Umukuru w'igihugu w'ubu Hassan Sheikh Mohamud ari mu bitoza, bikanugwanugwa ko ashobora kuja muri ayo matora ya nyuma. Uwayatsindiye ategekanywa kumenyekana ku munsi wa gatatu ku mugoroba.

Ariko kuba u Burundi buturanye n'ibihugu byamaze kugaragaramo ubu bwandu twashatse kumenya icyo leta n'izindi nzego z'ubuzima biri gukora. Prudent Nsengiyumva yavuganye na Kazadi Mulombo Walter, umuyobozi mukuru w'ishami rishinzwe ubuzima ku isi OMS, mu Burundi. Yatangiye amubaza ingamba zafashwe (umva ikiganiro bagiranye aho hejuru). Ushobora gusoma kandi:

Vervoort yatsindiye umudari wa zahabu n'uwa feza mu mikino y'abafite ubumuga yabereye i London mu mwaka wa 2012, atsindira n'indi midari ibiri i Rio muri Brazil mu mwaka wa 2016. Yasiganwaga mu kagare k'abafite ubumuga. Yari arwaye indwara idakira yo kudakora kw'imitsi. Uburyo bwo kurangiza ubuzima bw'umuntu urwaye cyane akenshi arwaye indwara idakira mu rwego rwo kumurinda gukomeza kubabara - buzwi nka 'euthanasie'- bwemewe n'amategeko mu Bubiligi. Mu 2008 Vervoort yashyize umukono ku nyandiko ziha uruhushya muganga rw'uko umunsi umwe azamurangiriza ubuzima. Vervoort yabanaga n'imbwa yatojwe ya labrador Zenn yamufashaga Itangazo ryasohowe n'ubuyobozi bw'umujyi avukamo wa Diest rivuga ko Vervoort "yakurikije amahitamo ye [ejo] ku wa kabiri nimugoroba". Indwara Vervoort yari arwaye yamuteraga guhorana ububabare, kurwara igicuri, guhinyagara kw'amaguru ndetse kubera iyo ndwara yasinziraga bigoye. Mu kiganiro cyihariye yagiranye n'umunyamakuru Eleanor Oldroyd mu kiganiro BBC Radio 5 Live mu mwaka wa 2016, Vervoort yagize ati: "Hari ubwo mbabara bikomeye cyane, ngafatwa n'igicuri, nkarira, nkaboroga kubera ububabare. Nkenera imiti myinshi igabanya ububabare [nka], valium, morphine. "Abantu benshi bambaza ukuntu bishoboka ko nitwara neza [mu mikino] nkanamwenyura n'ububabare bwose n'imiti iba irya imitsi yanjye. Kuri jye, imikino, gusiganwa mu kagare - ni uburyo bw'ubuvuzi".

Ikiringo ca mbere ntarengwa cari catanzwe hari gushika ku wa 08 z'ukwa kabiri, ariko ubu abayikoresha bafise igihe co gushika ku wa 15 z'ukwa gatanu uno mwaka kugira ngo bafate ingingo. Iyi kompanyi yaraneguwe imaze gutangaza iyi ngingo isa n'iyerekana impinduka ku bijanye n'amakuru y'ibanga igiye kuza irahereza ikompanyi yegukira, ari yo Facebook. Ivuga ko abantu bafashe ukutari kwo ubu butumwa. Kuva itangaje izi ngingo, amamiriyoni n'amamiriyoni kw'isi yaciye yimukira ku zindi mbuga zo guhanahana amakuru mu buryo bw'ibanga nka Signal hamwe na Telegram. Mu butumwa yacishije ku rubuga rwayo, WhatsApp yavuze ko ubutumwa bw'ibanga bwa muntu bwagumye ari ibanga kandi ko buzoguma mw'ibanga. Yongerako y'uko umugirwa wo guha Facebook amakuru y'ibanga ya bamwe bamwe mu bayikoresha atari ikintu gishasha, kandi ko ataco igiye kwongerako. Ivuga iti: "Izi mpinduka zirimwo uburyo bushasha bw'ingene abantu bashobora guhererekanya amakuru y'ibikorwa vyabo kuri WhatsApp, kandi zigatanga umuco w'ingene twabura amakuru y'ibanga n'ingene tuyakoresha". Mu nkuru yari yasohoye ku bibazo bikunze kubazwa, WhatsApp yari yasiguye ko mu makuru yari isanzwe ihereza amakompanyi yegukira Facebook harimwo: Hagati aho, ibi siko bimeze i Bulaya no mu Bwongereza, hoho hasanzwe hari amategeko atandukanye yo gukingira amakuru y'ibanga y'umuntu.

Facebook ikurikirana ibyo ukorera ahandi kuri Internet Mu gace ka 'settings' Facebook igiye kuhashyira uburyo bwitwa 'Off-Facebook Activity' buzajya bubuza za 'applications' n'imbuga za internet usura guha amakuru yawe Facebook. Facebook ubundi yifashisha amakuru ihabwa n'izindi mbuga usura na 'apps' ukoresha mu kugira ngo imenye ibyo yamamaza ku rukuta (wall) rwawe rwa Facebook iyo uyifunguye. Ukoresheje buriya buryo, uzashobora gusiba ibyo wakoze mbere kuri internet kugira ngo mu gihe kiri imbere bitazagerwaho n'uru rubuga. Umuhanga umwe avuga ko iki gikorwa urebye nta ngaruka nini kizagira ku nyungu Facebook isanzwe ibona. Kugeza ubu, ubu buryo bwatangiye gukora muri Ireland, Koreya y'Epfo na Espagne, gusa intego ngo ni uko bukora n'ahandi hose ku isi. Bwatekerejwe mu gihe kompanyi za Apple na Mozilla zo zatangiye kubuza Facebook n'izindi mbuga kubona amakuru y'abakoresha urubuga runaka baciye ku mbuga (browser) zabo. Facebook irundanya amakuru ivanye ku zindi mbuga nkoranyambaga cyangwa imbuga zindi za internet, kubera ko nyinshi zikoresha ikintu kitwa Facebook Pixel gituma ibasha kubona ibyo ukorera ahandi. Ni yo mpamvu iyo ufunguye urubuga runaka rw'amakuru y'umupira w'amaguru mu gihe cy'iminota 30 cyangwa na nyuma, ku rukuta rwawe rwa Facebook uzabonaho 'posts' zamamaza umupira. 'Off-Facebook Activity' izagufasha guhagarika ibyo izindi mbuga na 'apps' ziha Facebook kuri wowe. Facebook ivuga ko benshi mu bakoresha telefone zigezweho (smartphones) baba bafite 'apps' zirenga 80 kandi bakoresha izirenga 40 buri kwezi, imibare ishobora no kuba irenga. Ubu buryo nibukugeraho nawe nubishaka uzahagarika mu kigero ushaka cyangwa burundu amakuru Facebook ibona ikanakoresha ivanye ku zindi mbuga na 'apps' ukoresha. Ni ngombwa ariko kumenya ko Facebook itazabura gukomeza kubona ayo makuru, icyo izakora ni ukutayakoresha kuri wowe cyangwa ku bandi nk'uko ibivuga. Babyakiriye bate? Bivuze iki kuri 'business' ya Facebok? Abantu icyo bagomba kumenya cyane ni uko ibyo bakora kuri internet bikurikiranwa. Mu kurengera ubu buryo bushya bazanye, Facebook igira iti: "Ni ko internet ikora". Mu buryo bamwe bakemanga, Stephanie Max watekereje akanakora ubu buryo yavuze ko impamvu Facebook ikurikirana ikanegeranya amakuru y'abantu ari ukugira ngo "ibereke amakuru y'ibyo bashaka". Niba miliyoni nyinshi z'abakoresha Facebook zizahitamo gukoresha buriya buryo, bisobanuye ko bizahungabanya ibikorwa byo kwamamaza n'inyungu Facebook ibivanamo. BBC yabajije Stephanie Max ingaruka zabaho mu gihe nka 20% by'abakoresha Facebook bazimije uko ibona ikanakoresha amakuru yabo ivanye ahandi. Yasubije ati: "Ibi ntabwo twabikozeho." Akomeza avuga ko hari gihamya bafite ko abantu benshi bakunda gukoresha Facebook itariho ibintu byinshi, kandi ko nabyo biri mu buryo uru rubuga rukora. Avuga ko byaba bitangaje Facebook itararebye ibyo yahombera muri ubu buryo bushya bwayo, gusa hari ubwo koko ntacyo byaba biyitwaye. Kimwe, bisa nk'aho kubona no gukoresha 'Off-Facebook Activity' bitazabonwa na benshi. Ikindi, umuhanga mu gukurikirana inyungu Facebook ivana mu kwamamaza avuga ko iri guhindura uko yinjizaga mu buryo abayikoresha benshi batakwitaho. Mat Morrison, umuhanga mu bikorwa byo kwamamaza muri kompanyi ya Digital Whiskey, avuga ko abahanga muri byo batagishamajwe no kureba icyo umuntu runaka akunda gukora. Morrison avuga ko ubu ibintu biri guhinduka mu kwamamaza, kompanyi nka Facebook ziri kureba uko zimenya ibikenewe n'abantu benshi cyane. Bivuze ko nubwo hari abakoresha Facebook binubira ko ikurikirana ibyo bakorera no ku zindi mbuga, bakwiye kwibuka ko n'ubundi izakomeza kubona amakuru menshi kuri bo azakoreshwa mu bundi buryo bushya bwo kwamamaza.

Doug McLeod yarekuwe atanze ingwati y'amadolari y'amanyamerika igihumbi Doug McLeod w'imyaka 58 y'amavuko yarahagaritswe mw'ijoro ryo ku wa gatandatu mu karere ka George yagirizwa ihohotera ryo mu rugo (domestic violence). Yagirizwa ko yamukubise mu maso bituma ava umwuna, amuhora ko yatebeje gukura impuzu. Igipolisi kimenyesha ko casanze amaraso hasi mu cumba c'abo bantu. Uyo mugore yoba yabwiye abapolisi ko ata rusehabaniha yabona ko akeneye, kuko yabona ko umukobwa wiwe yashobora kumushikana kwa muganga. Ikinyamakuru Sun Herald kivuga ko icegeranyo cashizwe ahabona cerekana ko igihe igipolisi gishika ku muhana iwe uri ahitwa Lucedale, casanze Bwana McLeod yaborewe afise n'inzoga mu minwe. Kubw'ikinyamakuru Clarion Ledger co muri iyo ntara ya Mississippi, abapolisi bavuga ko basanze umugore wa McLeod be n'uwundi mugore yari mu nzu yabo batekewe n'ubwoba. Uyo mugore wundi yabwiye igipolisi ko umugore wa Bwana McLeod yahungiye mu cumba ciwe yuzuye amaraso mu maso. Baciye bugara umuryango hanyuma Bwana McLeod aguma akubita ku muryango, ababwira ko ashobora "kwica imbwa yiwe" mu gihe batomwugururira. Umugore wa Bwana McLeod avuga ko umugabo wiwe yari yarengeje urugero - kandi yo yari amaze gukora ikintu nk'ico kubera akaborerwe. Amaze kubwirwa ko igipolisi camaze kuronka inkuru y'ihohotera ryo mu rugo, yavuze ati: "Muriko murankinisha?". Bwana McLeod, se w'abana batatu, ntiyashimye kwishura BBC yari imubajije ico avuga kuri ivyo yagirizwa. "Asabwa gutanga imihoho" Bwana McLeod yarekuwe atanze ingwati y'amadolari y'amanyamerika igihumbi. Abashingamateka bagenziwe bo mu mugambwe w'abarepublika muri iyo ntara bavuga ko Bwana McLeod akwiye gutanga imihoho ubwo nyene mu gihe ivyo yagirizwa vyoba ari vyo. Umukuru w'inama nshingamateka ya Mississippi, Philip Gunn, avuga ko yagerageje guhamagara Bwana McLeod ngo bavugane ivyo gutanga imihoho mu gihe ivyo yagirizwa vyoba ari vyo. Avuga ko ivyo yakoze "ata muntu n'umwe yovyemera". Ibiro vy'umukuru w'iyo ntara, Phil Bryant, vyasohoye itangazo, aho bimenyesha ko "ibikorwa vy'ihohotera ivy'ari vyo vyose bihanwa". Umuvugizi wa Bwana Bryant yabwiye itororokanirizo ry'amakuru Associated Press, ko mu gihe ivyo yagirizwa vyoboneka ko ari ukuri, uyo mukuru w'intara yoca yifatanya n'abandi basaba ko yotanga imihoho. David Blount, umusenateri wo mu mugambwe w'aba democrate, nawe nyene asaba ko uyo mushingamateka yotanga imihoho. Bwana McLeod asanzwe afise ihinguriro ry'amapine, ni umushingamatekla w'intara ya Mississippi kuva mu mwaka wa 2012, kandi biboneka ko ashobora kwongera gutorwa n'aho ubu ata wundi bahiganwa. Urunani rwishinze kurwanya ihohotera ryo mu rugo (National Coalition Against Domestic Violence), rumenyesha ko umukenyezi umwe kuri batatu muri Amerika basinzikarizwa ubuzima n'abo bubakanye. Icegeranyo c'urwo rurani co mu mwaka wa 2014 muri iyo ntara ya Mississippi rwerekana ko baronka hafi amatelefone indwi kw'isaha avuga ivy'ihohotera ryo mu rugo muri iyo ntara.

Angeline Usanase bamusanzemo iyi kanseri ariko hakiri kare Ubuvuzi bwayo buracyahenze kandi biracyagoye benshi kubugeraho, iyo iyi ndwara ibonetse bitinze, amahirwe yo kuyirokoka aba macye cyane. Uyu munsi leta y'u Rwanda irafungura ikigo cya mbere gifite imashini yo mu bwoko bwa Radiotherapy ifasha kwica uturemangingo twa Cancer mu mubiri. Nibwo bwa mbere u Rwanda rugiye gutangira gukoresha iyi mashini, abarwayi benshi bajyaga mu mahanga gushaka serivisi zayo. Kanseri y'inkondo y'umura yo ni iya kane muri kanseri zibasira abagore ku isi. Gusa muri Afurika niho ihitana abantu benshi kurusha ahandi, nubwo bwose ari indwara ishobora kwirindwa. U Rwanda rwabigezeho urugero ibindi bihugu biri kugerageza gukurikiza. Angeline Usanase, uba mu mujyi wa Kigali yibuka uburyo ubuzima bwe ubusanzwe bwaziraga umuze bwamuhindutse Hari mu kwa 11/2017 ubwo yabonaga amaraso mu kambaro ke k'imbere. Ntabwo yari amaraso asanzwe. Ku myaka 67 Usanase ntabwo ari ikigero cyo kujya mu mihango. Ati: "Nahise njya kuri centre de santé iri hafi abaganga bangira inama yo kwipimisha kanseri y'inkondo y'umura. "Ibisubizo ni uko basanze nyifite. Byarandenze, sinabashije kubyakira - Numvaga ko ngiye gupfa". Madamu Usanase ariko kuba indwara ye yarabonetse kare kuyivura byaroroshye ndetse arakira. Ubu mu Rwanda abana b'abakobwa bahawe abandi baracyahabwa urukingo rw'iyi ndwara. Kanseri y'inkondo y'umura ni iya kabiri muri kanseri zibasira abagore muri Afurika, ariko niyo yica kurusha izindi nk'uko bivugwa n'ishami ry'umuryango w'abibumbye ryita ku buzima, OMS. Virusi yitwa Human Papilloma Virus (HPV), yandurira mu mibonano mpuzabitsina niyo itera iyi kanseri. Kanseri y'inkondo y'umura iterwa na virusi yitwa HPV Nubwo iyi ndwara ikica benshi muri Afurika kandi urukingo rwayo ruhari, ibihugu 10 gusa bya Africa nibyo bifite uru rukingo muri gahunda yo kurwanya iyi ndwara. Senegal nicyo gihugu cyonyine mu burengerazuba bwa Afurika giha abaturage bacyo uru rukingo, Nigeria yo iracyari kurugerageza ngo izabone kurutanga ku rwego rw'igihugu. Mu karere k'ibiyaga bigari ibintu bimeze neza kurusha ahandi kuko uru rukingo ubu ruri no gutangwa muri Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania na Ethiopia. Ubwoba bw'amarozi U Rwanda rwatangije gahunda y'uru rukingo ku bana b'abakobwa, rushishikariza n'abagore kwisumisha iyi ndwara mu 2011. Mu mwaka wa mbere w'iki gikorwa, ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda buvuga ko bwageze ku bakobwa 9 ku 10 bagejeje igihe cyo gufata uru rukingo, abahanga bavuga ko uru ari urugero rw'igikorwa cyageze ku ntego. Gusa ni igikorwa kitabuze inzitizi. Ethiopia ubu iri mu bihugu 10 bya Africa biri gutanga uru rukingo Ikibazo cy'umuco n'imyumvire ku ndwara nk'izi. Madamu Usanase avuga ko hari abagore batekereza ko iyi kanseri ari indwara y'amarozi bakajya kuyivuza mu baganga ba 'gakondo' aho kujya kwa muganga usanzwe. Abagore bandi bagatinya ko bashobora gukurwamo nyababyeyi mu gihe bayirwaye. Nyamara icyo gikorwa kiri mu bikorwa mu kuvura uyirwaye, ntabwo kiri mu kuyirinda utarayirwara. Dr Francois Uwinkwindi ushinzwe kurwanya kanseri mu kigo gishinzwe ubuzima mu Rwanda RBC avuga ko "kanseri y'inkondo y'umura ari kanseri iriho cyane, ariko ikibazo ari abaza kuyivuza igeze kure". Abategetsi ku rwego rw'ibanze, abajyanama b'ubuzima, amashuri n'ibitangazamakuru byarifashishijwe mu gushishikariza ababyeyi gukingiza abakobwa babo no kubaha amakuru kuri iyi ndwara. Imyaka umunani nyuma ubu uru rukingo ruri mu nkingo zihabwa abana bageze igihe cyo kurufata nk'uko bafata izindi nkingo zisanzwe. Nubwo umusaruro wavuye muri iyi gahunda utaratangazwa mu mibare, ariko ibihugu bindi byakingiye abaturage iyi ndwara kwandura HPV byaragabanutse cyane. Urukingo rwa HPV rwagabanyije cyanwa ubwandu bw'iyi ndwara muri Australia Australia, aho uru rukingo rwatangiye gutangwa mu 2007, bari baratangiye kubona no kwita ku barwaye iyi ndwara kuva mu 1991. Imibare ya kanseri y'inkondo y'umura muri iki gihugu ku mwaka ni abantu barindwi ku bantu 100,000, biteganyijwe ko mu mpera za 2020 iyi mibare izaba iri munsi ya 6/100,000. 'Abagore icyenda buri munsi barapfa' Nyuma y'u Rwanda, ibindi bihugu bya Afurika ubu nabyo biri muri iyi gahunda. Mu kwezi kwa 10, leta ya Kenya yatangije urukingo rwa HPV muri gahunda isanzwe y'inkingo mu gihugu ibifashijwemo n'abaterankunga mpuzamahanga. Leta ya Kenya irashaka gukingira abakobwa 800,000 mu myaka 10 iri imbere. Perezida Uhuru Kenyatta areba igikorwa cyo gukingira umwana w'umukobwa Marleen Temmerman umwarimu ku ndwara zibasira abagore muri Aga Khan University Hospital i Nairobi avuga ko "abagore icyenda bapfa buri munsi muri Kenya" bazize iyi ndwara. Ati: "Iki ni igikorwa kigamije kurwanya ikwirakwira ry'iyi ndwara mu bakobwa no gupima no kuvura abagore bakuru baba bayifite". Mbonje Athman umugore uba mu mujyi wa Mombasa mu burasirazuba bwa Kenya, avuga ko yumva ibihuha ko umwana uhawe urwo rukingo rumuremaza. Urukingo rwa HPV hari abari kuruwanya muri Kenya Ati: "Sindajya gukingiza umukobwa wanjye w'imyaka 10 kubera ibyo numvise. Nta makuru nyayo twigeze duhabwa kuri urwo rukingo" Umuryango wa gikiristu witwa Kenya Catholic Doctors Association (KCDA), wo wasabye ko abantu bamagana uru rukingo ngo kuko nta mpamvu yo kuruha abana b'abakobwa, ukavuga ko bagomba gusa kwirinda ubusambanyi. Mu Rwanda, Madamu Usanase we agira inama abandi ko bajya kwisuzumisha iyi ndwara kuko abakuru batagize amahirwe nk'ay'abana b'abakobwa ubu babona uru rukingo ruhabwa abakiri bato.

Iri tangazo ryo kugabisha ryasohowe n'umukuru w'Inama y'Abepiskopi Katorika muri Tanzania (TEC), Musenyeri Gervas Nyaisonga ku wa kabiri. Ariko , ntirivuga nimba no muri Tanzania hariho abariko barandura bwa bwoko bushasha bwa coronavirus, rigasaba abantu kuba maso bafatiye ku bivugwa mu zindi mpande z'isi. Iri tangazo rya Ekleziya Katorika rivuga riti: "Mu mwaka uheze igihugu cacu carashoboye kurwanya uwu mugera. Abandura baragabanutse mu nyuma turizera ko twatsinze". "Ubu hari iyongerekana rishasha ry'abandura. Ibihugu bitari bike biremeza ko biri mu bihe bitoroshe aho corona iriko iriyongera abantu bagapfa. Igihugu cacu si izinga, ni ngombwa ko twikingira, tukaba maso, tugatakambira cane Imana kugira ngo iturinde". Ekleziya Katorika muri ico gihugu yagiye ifata ingingo zitandukanye kuva mu 2020 igihe iki kiza gitangazwa ko cinjiye muri Tanzania, iri tangazo rigasaba ko izo ngingo zibandanya zikurikizwa. Rishimangira riti: "Duhimirize intambara yo kurwanya umugera wa coronavirus mu gukoresha ibirwanisho vyose vy'umutima, umubiri, ubuhinga no mu kibano. Ntiturambirwe no guhimiriza igisabisho, kwirinda gukorakorana, gukaraba n'amazi n'isabuni igihe cose, gufata ingingo igihe cose twiketse ibimenyetso vyayo, tukirinda kandi no kwegerana". Umunyamabanga mukuru w'Inama y'Abepiskopi, Patiri Charles Kitima, yabwiye BBC igisata c'igiswahili ko vyabaye ngombwa ko Ekleziya isohora iri tangazo ryo kugabisha mu gihe bakirindiriye insiguro z'abahinga zizotangwa na reta ku bijanye n'iki kiza karanda. Leta ya Tanzaniya irongowe na Prezida John Magufuli yemeza ko ata kiza ca coronavirus kiri muri Tanzania Ati: "Duherutse kubona impfu ziyongera. Mu bisagara, twari tumenyereye kugira imisa imwe canke zibiri mu ndwi zo gusabira abapfuye, ariko ubu ni imisi yose. Hategerezwa kuba hari ikintu kitagenda neza". Abategetsi ba Tanzania babandanya bemeza y'uko ata mugera wa coronavirus uri mu gihugu. Inyuma y'iri tangazo, icegera c'umushikiranganji w'amagara y'abantu, Dr Goodluck Mollel, yabwiye ikinyamakuru Mwananchi co muri ico gihugu ko abanyagihugu bobandanya batekanye mu kurindira amabwirizwa bahabwa na reta. Dr. Mollel ati: "Ibi bintu reka tubirekere abahinga. Mu gihe hoba ingorane, reta izobisigura. Abantu bobandanya n'ibikorwa vy'ukugwiza umwimbu". Mu mpera z'indwi iheze, ibinyamakuru vyo muri Danmark vyatangaje ko ingenzi zibiri zari zivuye muri Tanzania zatowe umugera mushasha wa coronavirus wadutse muri Afrika y'Epfo. Mu ndwi iheze nyene, reta y'Ubwongereza yarafashe ingingo yo kubuza ingenzi zivuye nuri Tanzania na Repubulika ya Demokrasi ya Congo kwinjira muri ico gihugu mu ntumbero yo kwirinda ikwirakwira ry'ubwoko bushasha bw'umugera wa Covid-19 bwatowe ubwa mbere muri Afrika y'Epfo. Ibihugu bindi 12 nivyo bimaze guhagarikirwa ingendo muri ico gihugu hagati y'ukwa cumi na kabiri n'intango y'ukwa mbere.

Nyuma ko kugenda kwa Lukaku na Alexis Sanchez, bigaragara nk'uko Ibrahimovic ari imbere ku rutonde rw'abaronderwa na United Uwo mukinyi rurangiranwa w'imyaka 38 yavuye Old Trafford aja mw'ikipe LA Galaxy yo mw'ihiganwa MLS ryo muri Amerika mu 2018, nyuma yo kwinjiza ibitsindo 29 mu myaka ibiri yakiniye United. Kandi ikinyamakuru candikirwa kuri internet co mu Butariyano, TuttoMercatoWeb, kivuga ko United ishobora kumuha akazi mu gihe irondera inguvu mu bakinyi b'imbere. Ibrahimovic yatwaye ibikombe vya Europa League na Carabao Cup akinira United igihe yamenyerezwa na Mourinho, kandi yinjiza igitsindo c'intsinzi mu rukino rwa nyuma na Southampton. United ubu imenyerezwa na Ole Gunnar Solskhaer, imaze iminsi ifise ibibazo vyo kwinjiza ibitsindo, kandi kugerageza kugura Mario Mandzukic wo muri Juventus vyigijwe mu ci riza. Kandi nyuma yo kugenda kwa Romelu Lukaku na Alexis Sanchez muri Inter Milan, Ibrahimovic asa n'uwigaragaje nk'uwuronderwa bwa mbere na United.

Bolt arateganya gusezera ku gusiganwa mu kwezi gutaha mu masiganwa azabera i London Bwabaye ubwa mbere uyu mwaka Usain Bolt abashije kwiruka metero 100 akoresheje amasegonda atageze ku icumi. Yasize Umunyamerika Isiah Young wakoresheje amasegonda 9.98, ndetse n'Umunyafurika y'epfo Akani Simbine wakoresheje amasegonda 10.02. Bwana Bolt w'imyaka 30 y'amavuko, amaze gutsindira irushanwa rya Olympic mu gusiganwa ku maguru inshuro umunani.

Mu mwaka ushize ubwo Liverpool yegukanaga shampiyona ya Premier League, yashoje irusha Man City amanota 18 Virgil van Dijk na Joe Gomez, ba myugariro b'ingenzi ba Liverpool, ntibakinnye mu gice kinini cy'uyu mwaka w'imikino kubera kuvunika mu ivi. Myugariro mugenzi wabo Joël Matip, n'abakinnyi bo hagati Fabinho na Jordan Henderson ndetse n'umukinnyi mushya Diogo Jota, na bo bari mu batarashoboye gukina myinshi mu mikino y'uyu mwaka. Klopp yagize ati: "Hamwe n'imvune zacu ntabwo uyu wari umwaka wo kwegukana igikombe". "Nta mahirwe - ku wo waba uri we wese". "Nubwo ari ikipe nziza, iyo City iza kuba yaragize ba myugariro bayo batatu batakinnye, oya [ntabwo yari kwegukana shampiyona]. Ba myugariro batatu ba [Manchester] United, [na yo] oya". "Twirwanyeho gacye, twemera ingorane tuzitwaramo neza uko dushoboye, kandi nidutsinda ku cyumweru, ndetse nitubona itike ya Champions League, tuzaba twaritwaye neza uko dushoboye muri izo ngorane. Ngayo nguko". Nubwo kugeza kuri Noheli Liverpool yari iyoboye urutonde rw'agateganyo rwa shampiyona, ikibazo cy'imvune cyagezeho kirayishegesha. Ariko yongeye kwisubiraho, itsinda imikino irindwi mu mikino icyenda, bivuze ko nitsinda umukino wayo wa nyuma ku cyumweru izakinira ku kibuga cyayo Anfield yakiriye Crystal Palace, yagakwiye kubona itike yo gukina Champions League. Mu mwaka w'imikino ushize ubwo iyi kipe yegukanaga shampiyona, umutoza Klopp yagiye ashimagiza abakinnyi be ku "gukomera mu mitekerereze" kwabo. Yongeyeho ati: "Biraboneka ko tutari kugera aha ngaha iyo aba bahungu baba bataragaragaje iyo myitwarire. Bafite imyitwarire yihariye cyane". "Aba bahungu ubu bamaze kubigaragaza inshuro nyinshi, ntabwo biba bitewe n'imitekerereze yabo cyangwa imyitwarire iyo hagize ikintu kigenze nabi". "Kunyura mu bihe bigoye bituma murushaho gukomera nk'itsinda rishyize hamwe kandi muri icyo gihe ntabwo twarangaye. Nta kintu cyadutandukanyije". "Yego twagize ibibazo byacu, abakinnyi ntabwo bari bari mu bihe byabo byiza cyangwa mu mwuka mwiza. [Nanjye] Ntabwo nari meze neza, ariko iteka twashatse uburyo bwo gushyira hamwe". "Nta na rimwe twigeze tugira uwo tubyegekaho cyangwa ngo dutungane intoki tuvuga tuti, 'Ni wowe urimo kubitera'. "Rero ku cyumweru uko bizagenda uko ari ko kose, twashoboye kwivana mu bibazo twigeza hano".

Abadepite ba Amerika Rashida Tlaib (ibumoso) na Ilhan Omar Ni Ilhan Omar na Rashida Tlaib bagombaga gusura agace ka West Bank n'uburasirazuba bwa Yeruzalem mu cyumweru gitaha. Aba bagore basanzwe batavuga rumwe na Perezida Donald Trump. Ku mugoroba wo kuri uyu wa kane Bwana Trump yanditse kuri Twitter ko "byaba ari intege nke" kwemera ko binjira muri Israel. Madamazera Omar avuga ko kubabuza kugera muri Israel ari "igitutsi kuri demokarasi n'igisubizo kibi ku bategetsi bari bifuje gusura igihugu cy'inshuti". Bwana Trump yari yatangiye kare kwandika kuri Twitter asaba ko aba badepite batemererwa kwinjira muri Israel. Yanditse ati: "Banga Israel n'abaturage bose b'Abayahudi, nta kintu kandi cyavugwa cyangwa cyakorwa ngo imitekerereze yabo ihinduke". Ba Madamazera Omar na Tlaib bombi bashyigikiye inkubiri yo kurwanya ibikorwa bya Leta ya Israel, ariko bahakana ibyo baregwa na Trump byo kuba banga Abayahudi. Kuki bangiwe kuza muri Israel? Amategeko ya Israel yima Visa umunyamahanga wese wamagana mu buryo bwose ubutegetsi bwa Israel, yaba mu bukungu, umuco cyangwa uburezi. Abategetsi b'iki gihugu ariko mu bihe bishize bavuze ko bagiye gushyiraho irengayobora ku bategetsi bo muri Amerika, mbere yo kwisubiraho kuri iki cyemezo. Madamazera Tlaib we yifuzaga kujya no muri Palestine gusura nyirakuru Muftia Tlaib ubayo Omar na Tlaib urugendo rwabo muri Israel rwagombaga gutangira ku cyumweru, bari bafite n'umugambi wo gusura abaharanira amahoro bo muri Israel n'abo muri Palestine. Madamazera Tlaib we yari afite gahunda yo kuhamara iminsi ibiri irenga kuri gahunda yabo kugira ngo asure nyirakuru uba muri Palestine. Aba ni bantu ki? Bwana Trump - inshuti ya hafi ya Benjamin Netanyahu wa Israel - yashyamiranye n'aba badepite b'abagore avuga amagambo bamwe bise ay'irondaruhu. Bwana Trump yavuze ko aba badepite bagomba gusubira iwabo, mu bihugu ababyeyi babo bakomokamo. Madamazera Tlaib - umudepite wa mbere mu nteko ya Amerika ukomoka muri Palestina - yavukiye i Michigan muri Amerika Naho Madamazera Omar Ilhan wo muri Leta ya Minnesota yavukiye muri Somalia. Bwana Trump amaze iminsi ahanganye n'aba badepite. Ilhan Omar (iburyo) Ambasade ya Amerika muri Israel yasohoye itangazo rivuga ko Amerika "ishyigikiye kandi yubashye icyemezo cya Israel cyo kubuza aba badepite kwinjira". Muri iri tangazo David Friedman ambasaderi wa Amerika muri Israel avuga ko Israel "ifite ubu burenganzira kuri ziriya mpirimbanyi nk'uko yabuza kwinjira abitwaje intwaro zisanzwe Komite ishinzwe ibya rubanda mu nteko ya Amerika yo ivuga ko nubwo idashyigikiye ibitekerezo by'aba bagore birwanya ibikorwa bya Israel ariko "umudepite wese adakwiye kubuzwa gusura no gutembera ku nshuti yacu Israel".

Bruno Tshibala, minisitiri w'intebe ucyuye igihe, ni we washyize umukono kuri aya amategeko-teka mu kwezi kwa cumi na kumwe k'umwaka ushize wa 2018 Mu itangazo yasohoye ku wa mbere, leta ya Kongo yatangaje ko iyi mishahara itagamije "gukungahaza abategetsi". Ayo mategeko-teka abiri, agenera abahoze ari abaminisitiri uduhimbazamusyi tubarirwa mu madolari 2000 y'Amerika, yanenzwe na benshi. Igice kinini cy'abaturage barenga miliyoni 80 batuye Kongo, babayeho mu bucyene. Leta icyuye igihe muri Kongo yavuze ko iyi mishahara igeneye abaminisitiri ari iyo "gutuma bicyenura mu by'ibanze bicyenerwa mu buzima, nk'ibyo kurya, gucumbika no kwivuza". Iryo tangazo ryongeraho ko iyo mishahara iyo "gutuma batandavura". Aya mategeko-teka abiri yashyizweho umukono na Bruno Tshibala, minisitiri w'intebe ucyuye igihe, mu kwezi kwa cumi na kumwe k'umwaka ushize wa 2018, yagarutsweho cyane mu itangazamakuru mu gihe gishize cya vuba. Nkuko bitangazwa n'ibiro ntaramakuru Reuters, irya mbere rigenera abahoze ari ba minisitiri w'intebe umushahara w'ukwezi ungana na 30% by'umushahara wa minisitiri w'intebe kuri ubu. Ribagenera kandi kugenda mu ndege mu mwanya w'icyubahiro inshuro imwe ku mwaka ndetse n'amafaranga y'icumbi angana n'amadolari 5000 y'Amerika buri kwezi. Reuters yongeraho ko irya kabiri ryo rigenera aba bahoze ari ba minisitiri imishahara ingana na 30% by'umushara wa minisitiri kuri ubu ndetse n'amadolari 1000 y'Amerika y'icumbi. Bakanashobora gukora urugendo rw'indege mu mwanya w'icyubahiro, inshuro imwe mu mwaka. 'Birenze urugero' Aya mategeko-teka yanenzwe cyane n'abanyepolitiki muri Kongo. Umujyanama w'uwahoze ari Perezida Joseph Kabila, yavuze ko atajyanye n'"uko igihugu cyacu gihaze mu mibereho y'abaturage no mu bukungu". Patrick Nkanga yanditse ku rubuga nkoranyambaga rwa Twitter agira ati: "Birenze urugero kandi bihendeye ubusa ikigega cy'igihugu". Ariko leta ya Kongo yashyigikiye ayo mategeko-teka, ivuga ko bitareba abacyuye igihe, ko rero abazahabwa utwo duhimbazamusyi ari abari muri leta iriho kuri ubu n'abo mu gihe kizaza. Félix Tshisekedi, Perezida mushya wa Kongo, yarahiriye imirimo ye mu kwezi gushize kwa mbere. Yasimbuye Bwana Kabila, mu isimburana ku butegetsi rya mbere rikozwe mu mahoro kuva iki gihugu cyahoze gikolonizwa n'Ububiligi cyabona ubwigenge mu mwaka wa 1960. Ni amatora yenenzwe cyane, harimo n'amakuru avuga ko Bwana Kabila na Bwana Tshisekedi baba barumvikanye ku gusangira ubutegetsi - nubwo bombi babihakanye. Mu cyegeranyo giheruka ku bijyanye na ruswa cyo mu mwaka wa 2017 cy'umuryango Transparency International, Kongo iza ku mwanya wa 161 mu bihugu 180.

Bastion Square i Buruseri ubu yitwa Patrice Lumumba Square Abantu babarirwa mu magana bagizwe ahanini n'abatuye mu gace kiganjemo Abanyekongo kazwi nka Matongé, bavugije impundu ubwo ahitwa "Bastion Square" hahindurirwaga izina ku mugaragaro. Ubungubu hagiye kwitwa "Patrice Lumumba Square", bikorerwa mu birori byabaye mu mpera y'icyumweru gishize. Bamwe mu bo mu muryango wa Patrice Lumumba, wishwe urw'agashinyaguro azize guharanira ubwigenge bwa Kongo, nabo bari mu bitabiriye ibi birori. Patrice Lumumba yakundaga Afurika ndetse yabaye Minisitiri w'intebe wa mbere wa Repubulika iharanira demokarasi ya Kongo Ububiligi, bwahoze bukoloniza Repubulika y'ubutegetsi bwa demokarasi ya Kongo, bwasabye imbabazi kubera kugira uruhare mu rupfu rwa Bwana Lumumba. Benshi mu bafashe ijambo muri ibyo birori, banenze ukuntu ahandi mu mujyi wa Buruseli hakiri ibibumbano by'amashusho ya Leopold II wahoze ari umwami w'Ububiligi, nubwo bwose ingoma ye yakoze ibikorwa by'ubunyamaswa muri Kongo mu gihe cy'ubukoloni. Hari mu mpera y'ikinyejana cya 19 no mu ntangiriro y'ikinyejana cya 20. Itsinda ry'impirimbanyi zo mu Bubiligi ryashyize aya mafoto ku rubuga nkoranyambaga rwa Twitter zigaragaza ibyapa bishya by'ako gace kitiriwe Patrice Lumumba. Lumumba yahise ashyikirizwa abanzi be, nuko yicirwa muri gereza mu kwezi kwa mbere mu mwaka wa 1961 Ryavuze ko ari ingenzi ko amafoto y'abantu b'ingenzi mu mateka y'Afurika yajya ashyirwa ahantu hahurirwa n'abantu benshi kugira ngo umurage wabo "ugaragare kandi ntiwibagirane" ku bantu bo mu bisekuru bizaza. Bwana Lumumba yakuwe ku butegetsi mu mwaka wa 1960 bigizwemo uruhare n'ibihugu byo mu burengerazuba bw'isi - birimo n'Ububiligi bwahoze bukoloniza Kongo - hashize gusa amezi ageze ku butegetsi. Yahise ashyikirizwa abanzi be, nuko yicirwa muri gereza mu kwezi kwa mbere mu mwaka wa 1961. Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Amerika n'Ubwongereza nabyo byashinjwe kugira uruhare mu iyicwa rya Lumumba, wari ufitanye imigenderanire ya hafi n'icyahoze ari Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Abasoviyeti, kuri ubu ni Uburusiya. Philippe Close, umuyobozi w'umujyi wa Buruseli, yagize ati: "Mu gutaha ku mugaragaro aka gace, ntabwo turimo gusana amateka, ntabwo turimo guhanagura igice cy'amateka". "Uyu munsi, mu gutaha aka gace, nta kintu na kimwe turikwiyibagiza".

Umunya mudeli w'Urwanda Alexia Mupende 'yishwe' kuri uyu wa kabiri Alexia Mupende yari umwe mu banyamideli bamaze kubaka izina rikomeye . Yishwe n'umuntu ukekwaho kuba ari uwari umukozi w'iwabo mu rugo ,gusa impamvu yateye ubu bwicanyi yo ntiramenyekana Igipolisi cy'U Rwanda cyatangaje ko kigishakisha umuntu ukekwaho kwica umunyamideli Alexia Mupende wishwe atewe icyuma mu ijoro ry'itariki ya 8 z'uku kwezi . Itangazo rya polisi ryavuguruje amakuru yari yiriwe acicikana ku munsi wo ku wa Gatatu ko ukekwaho ubu bwicanyi yafatiwe ku mupaka w'igihugu agerageza guhungira mu gihugu cya Uganda . Kuri ubu amafoto y'ukekwa yamaze gukwirakwizwa ahantu hose, igipolisi kikaba cyahamagariye abaturage kugifasha guhiga uyu ukekwaho ubu bwicanyi. Umunyamideli Alexia Mupende w'imyaka 35 yari amaze kubaka izina rikomeye imbere mu gihugu mu kumurika imideli . Urupfu rw'uyu munyamideli rwamaganywe n'abantu benshi biganjemo ibyamamare by'imbere mu gihugu ndetse na bamwe mu bategetsi bamaganye ubu bwicanyi. Alexia Mupende ni Umunyarwandakazi wakuriye mu gihugu cya Kenya akaba yari amaze imyaka 4 yiyemeje kuba no gukorera mu Rwanda . Amakuru avuga ko uyu munyamideli yishwe yiteguraga gukora ubukwe mu kwezi gutaha ndetse n'impapuro z'ubutumire zari zaramaze gusohoka .

Rutahizamu Joshua King yatsinze bibiri mu bitego bine Bournemouth yatsinze Chelsea yari yayisuye ku kibuga cyayo cya Vitality Stadium Ni ibitego byatsinzwe na Joshua King - watsinzemo bibiri, David Brooks na Charlie Daniels. Bournemouth yabaye inyamahirwe mu kurangiza igice cya mbere cy'umukino ari 0-0 ubwo umunyezamu wayo Artur Boruc yakuragamo imipira itanu yari yabazwemo ibitego, akabuza atyo Chelsea - yari yananiwe kumenera mu bakabiri bayo nubwo bwose yari yihariye umukino ku kigero cya 70% - kubona igitego. Intsinzi ya kabiri yikurikiranya ya Bournemouth yatumye izamuka ku rutonde rw'agateganyo rwa shampiyona, ubu ikaba iri ku mwanya wa 10, mu gihe Chelsea ubu yagiye ku mwanya wa gatanu hagendewe ku kuba yaratsinze ibitego bicye ugereranyije na Arsenal kuri ubu yafashe umwanya wa kane. Umutoza Eddie Howe wa Bournemouth, yavuze ko yishimiye uko ikipe ye iri kwitwara muri shampiyona, avuga ko iyi intsinzi iri mu zimaze kumushimisha cyane nk'umutoza kugeza ubu. Yagize ati: "Rwari ijoro ryiza kuri twe kandi byari byiza kubikorera hano imbere y'abafana bacu". Mugenzi we Maurizio Sarri w'ikipe ya Chelsea, we yavuze ko ikipe ye "igomba guhindura imitekerereze". Yagize ati: "... Ushobora gutsindwa, ariko uba ucyeneye [gukomeza] gukina kuko umukino ni twe twari turikuwuyobora mu gice cya mbere". Ku wa gatandatu, Bournemouth izakina na Cardiff City bakinire ku kibuga cya Cardiff City, mu gihe Chelsea iyo izaba yakiriye Huddersfield Town kuri uwo munsi.

Mu mwaka ushize, abaganga bagiye mu myigaragambyo kubera gusaba umushahara muto Ihuriro ry'igihugu ry'abaforomo ryabwiye abanyamuryango baryo bagera ku 45.000 kutajya ku kazi kugeza guveroma ishyize mu bikorwa inyongera y'umushahara yemeranyijeho n'abaforoma mu mwaka ushize. Ntibirasobanuka neza niba abaforomo bose batagiye ku kazi ariko ibitaro byinshi byagizweho ingaruka n'iyi myigaragambyo. Mu gihe cyashize, abaganga na guverinoma bananiwe kumvikana ku kibazo cy'imishahara Guverinoma iravuga ko ishobora kubona igice gito cy'amafaranga yakwa n'abaforomo. Mu mwaka ushize abaganga nabo bagiye mu myigaragambyo mu gikorwa cyahungabanyije ibitaro bya leta cyane mu gihe cy'amezi agera kuri atatu.

Salman Khan yarejejwe mu 2015 ku caha co kugonga umukene ntaho nikora agahwera Yahamwe n'icaha co guhiga kandi bibujijwe imparage zibiri zo mu bwoko bwa blackbuck mu congereza, mu ntara ya Rajasthan iri mu burengero bw'Ubuhindi, aho yari yagiye gukina filime. Amajana y'abapolisi bari bashizwe hanze ya sentare mu muji wa Jodhpur kugira bagumize hamwe abakunzi biwe. Abapolisi benshi bari hanze ya senare kugira bagumize hamwe abakunzi ba Salman Khan Abandi bakinyi ba filime bane bari kumwe bagirijwe ivyaha bito baciye barekurwa. Mu kwezi kwa cumi na kabiri 2015, Salman Khan yahanaguweko icaha co kugonga umuntu akamusiga mw'ibarabara, ico gihe umuntu w'umukene ntaho nikora akaba yarahasize ubuzima. Soma kandi:

Abatoranijwe guhabwa ibi biribwa bagomba kubishyikirizwa mu ngo zabo mu rwego rwo kubabuza kwegerana byatuma banduzanya Abatoranijwe guhabwa ibi biribwa bagomba kubishyikirizwa mu ngo zabo mu rwego rwo kubabuza kwegerana byatuma banduzanya. Umujyi wa Kigali ngo watekereje kubitanga muri ubu buryo kugira ngo hatabaho umuvundo abaturage baje kubifatira ahantu hamwe. Muri rusange habaruwe abantu 3000 babarirwa mu rwego rwa ba nyakabyizi barya ari uko bavuye ku mirimo ibahemba umunsi ku wundi. Aba bagomba guhabwa ibiribwa kuko gahunda ya guma mu rugo yababujije gusohoka mu ngo zabo. Urubyiruko rw'abakorerabushake nibo bahawe inshingano zo kugeza ibi biribwa ku baturage. Na bo batoranijwe nyuma yo gupimwa ngo harebwe ko badafite ubwandu. Umujyi wa Kigali ni wo urebwa n'iyi gahunda kuko ari wo washyizwe mu kato kazamara iminsi 15. Uretse imiryango isanzwe ibona ifunguro ari uko ivuye ku kazi, iyi nkunga y'ibifungurwa ngo igomba no kugera no kubarwariye COVID 19 mu ngo zabo habanje kurebwa abadafite ubushobozi. Ibi biribwa byagenewe abatagishobora kubona ibibatunga kubera "guma mu rugo" Gahunda nk'iyi yaherukaga mu kwezi kwa 4 umwaka ushize ubwo igihugu cyose cyari cyashyizwe muri gahunda ya Guma mu rugo. Iyi gahunda yamaze iminsi 45 yaneguwe n'abatari bake bavuze ko hari aho abaturage bahawe intica ntikize ndetse hakaba n'abavuze ko batabonye na mba. Gusa kuri iyi nshuro ubutegetsi buvuga ko bwiteguye. Umujyi wa Kigali washyizeho umurongo wa telefoni buri wese ukeneye ibiribwa atabyibonera azajya yiyambaza kugira ngo abigezweho iwe mu rugo nk'uko bivugwa n'ubutegetsi.

Uhereye muri Amerika gushika muri Australia, ugahera i Buraya gushika muri Asia, imigwi 20 yo mw'ihiganwa ryo mu Bwongereza izokina inkino zirenga 100 imbere y'uko ihiganwa ritangura. Mu bintu biri ku rutonde harimwo kumenyereza abakinyi, gufasha abakinyi bashasha n'abamenyereza kumenyerana mu mugwi hamwe rero no guteza imbere urudandaza mu migwi. Inkino za kivukanyi Umugwi ufise igikombe co mu mwaka uheze Manchester City bazoja muri Amerika mu rugendo bazokinamwo inkino za kivukanyi n'imigwi yo mu Bwongereza Chelsea na Liverpool. Iyo migwi itatu izoba iri kumwe kandi n'umugwi wa Manchester United, Arsenal na Tottenham muri izo nkino zo gukuranamwo z'igikombe c'isi c'imigwi yabaye iya mbere iwabo. Iryo higanwa rya buri mwaka kandi rizoba ririmwo imigwi yabaye iya mbere muri Espagne, mu Butaliyano, mu Bufaransa n'Ubudagi- Barcelone, Juventus, PSG, na Bayern Munich - hamwe na Benfica hamwe na Athletico Madrid. Liverpool izohura n'iyo migwi ibiri ya Manchester mu misi itatu, mu gihe Chelsea bazoba bariko baratana mu mitwe n'abakeba babo bo mu gisagara ca Londres, Arsenal mu gisagara ca Dublin itariki imwe y'ukwezi kw'umunani. Mu gihe hasigaye indwi zibiri ngo habe urwo rukino, Chelsea izoja mu burengero bwa Australia gukina na Perth Glory. Umugwi umwe gusa uherutse kuja mu cicaro ca mbere mu Bwongereza Cardiff ni wo mugwi wonyene utazoja muri izo nkino za kivukanyi Southampton wabaye umugwi wa mbere wo mw'ihiganwa ryo mu Bwongereza wagize inkino za kivukanyi inyuma yo kunganya ibitego 3-3 n'umugwi wo mu Budagi wa Schalke imbere yo kuja mu Bushinwa aho yatsinze ibitego 3-2 umugwi wa Jiangsu Suning. Impamvu twahisemo kuyaganiraho uyu munsi, ni uko ku wa 5 w'icyumweru gishize ayo masezerano yujuje imyaka 30 yemejwe n'amatora ya kamarampaka yabaye ku itariki 5 ukwezi kwa kabiri mu 1991. Kuba yaratowe n'amajwi angana na 89,21 ku ijana, bigaragaza ko Abarundi bari banyotewe n'ubumwe bw'abanyagihugu. Amasezerano y'ubumwe bw'Abarundi yari agamije kurandura burundu indyane zari zishingiye ku moko n'uturere. Kuva icyo gihe ayo masezerano yabaye imwe mu nkingi zigize itegekonshinga ry'u Burundi. Kuba yaremejwe n'umubare munini gutyo byari bifite ishingiro kubera ubwicanyi bukomeye bwari bumaze kuba mu makomini ya Ntega na Marangara mu ntara za Kirundo na Ngozi mu mwaka 1988. Ubwo bwicanyi ni bwo bwahagurukije incabwenge z'abahutu zandikira ibaruwa ifunguye Majoro Pierre Buyoya wari uyoboye igihugu muri icyo gihe, ziyamiriza ubwicanyi bwari bumaze gukorerwa abahutu, n'abandi bafashwe bagafungwa hirya no hino mu gihugu. Izo mvururu zo muri Ntega na Marangara ntabwo ari zo zonyine zahitanye Abarundi benshi, zishwiragiza abandi mu bihugu bituranye n'icyo gihugu. Mu gushakisha uko yahosha ayo matate, mu kwezi kwa cumi mu 1988, Perezida Pierre Buyoya yahise ashinga leta iyobowe na Adrien Sibomana, irimwo imibare ingana y'abahutu n'abatutsi. Nyuma yaho ashyiraho akanama gashinzwe kwiga amasezerano y'ubumwe bw'Abarundi ari yo yemejwe mu matora ya kamarampaka ku itariki 5 z'ukwezi kwa kabiri mu 1991. Ayo masezerano amaze gushyirwaho ku itariki ya 5 z'ukwa 2 mu 1991, hashyizweho leta y'ubumwe, hashyirwaho indirimbo yo guhimiriza ubumwe bw'Abarundi, hashyirwaho urwibutso rw'ubumwe bw'Abarundi, yewe hanashyirwaho imikino yitiriwe ubumwe bw'Abarundi. Na n'ubu umukuru w'igihugu umaze gutorwa iyo arahirira amabanga ye, avuga ko azubahiriza amasezerano y'ubumwe bw'Abarundi. Ariko nubwo habaye ibyo bikorwa, indyane zishingiye ko moko na politiki zarakomeje, akaba ari yo mpamvu u Burundi bukiri mu bihugu by'Afurika n'isi muri rusange bifite impunzi nyinshi. Kuba u Burundi bufite abanyagihugu bumva ko baba bafite amahoro bari hanze y'igihugu cyabo, bigaragaza ko ubwo bumwe bw'Abarundi bugifite ikibazo. Imvo n'Imvano rero iragerageza gushishoza ireba aho byapfiriye kugira ngo Abarundi batagera kuri ubwo bumwe bigaragara ko benshi bifuza nkuko byemejwe n'amajwi agera hafi kuri 90 ku ijana mu matora ya kamparampaka yo muri 91. Ni iki cyakorwa kugira ngo indahiro abakuru b'icyo gihugu barahirira ku mugaragaro yo gutsimbataza ubumwe bw'Abarundi ntibe mu magambo gusa, maze buri Murundi akibona ko u Burundi bwe ari paradizo ye? Abatumire bacu bose bari mu Burundi, turi kumwe na Adrien Sibomana, wabaye umushikiranganji wa mbere uvuye muri ubwo bushake bwo gushyiraho amasezerano y'ubumwe bw'Abarundi, turi kumwe na Cyprien Mbonimpa wabaye umushikirangaji w'imibano n'amahanga muri iyo leta yari iyobowe na Adrien Sibomana, turi kumwe kandi na Agathon Rwasa, umukuru wa CNL, umugambwe utavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi buriho ubu mu Burundi, akaba yari muri PALIPEHUTU icyo gihe amasezerano y'ubumwe bw'Abarundi ashyirwaho, na we ari mu Burundi. Undi turi kumwe ni Léonce Ngendakumana wo muri Sahwanya Frodebu, umugambwe na wo utavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi buriho ubu mu Burundi, icyo gihe hashyirwaho amasezerano y'ubumwe bw'Abarundi uwo mugambwe wakoreraga mu kinyegero, ariko naho ugiriye ahagaragara ntiwemeraga ayo masezerano. Iki kiganiro mwagiteguriwe kandi murakigezwaho na Félin Gakwaya.

Indege ihagurutse ku kibuga c'indege Mu makuru yashikirije ku buryo bwa telefone, umwe mu bakozi bo kuri ico kibuga c'indege yabwiye BBC, ko uwo muntu yajabutse aca ku kibuga c'indege aho indege zigurukira, aca ahwana n'indege y'ishirahamwe Fast Jet yarigiye i Dar es salaam. Igipolisi ca Mwanza kivuga kw'iryo sanganya ryabaye mw'ijoro isaha zitatu z'itariki 17 ukwezi kwa mbere, ko inyuma yo kuguruka umudereva w'iyo ndege yaciye abimenyesha abajejwe kugenzura uruja n'uruza rw'indege bari hejuru mu munara. Icegera c'umuyobozi w'ishirahamwe rigenzura ibibuga vy'indege muri Tanzania, Richard Mayongela yemeje ivy'iyo mpanuka, yabwiye Radio Free Afrika (RFA) ati: "Naho iyo ndege yagonze uwo muntu tutaramenya izina ryiwe, uravye amategeko umuntu canke ikintu cose kiri mu nzira indege ziguruka zicamwo, bivugwa ko ariwe canke arico cagonze iyo ndege." Gushika ubu ntawuramenya ingene uwo muntu yashoboye kuba ari muri iyo nzira y'indege, imbere yuko ihabwa uruhusha rwo kuguruka. Igipolisi ca Tanzania catanguye itohoza ryo kurondera ido n'ido ry'iryo sanganya. Ikibuga c'indege ca Mwanza cegereye izinga Victoria, kikegerana n'agace abanyagihugu babamwo kandi nta ruzitiro gifise mu gihe kimaze imyaka myinshi gisubigwamwo.

Tundu Lissu yatangaje amashusho ari ku kibuga cy'indege ava muri Tanzania Abakuriye ishyaka CHADEMA babwiye ibinyamakuru muri Tanzania ko Bwana Lissu adahunze igihugu, ahubwo azakomeza guharanira demokarasi n'ubutabera ari mu Bubiligi, aho azaba atuye. Tundu Lissu yagarutse muri Tanzania mbere y'amatora avuye mu Bubiligi, aho yari amaze igihe avurirwa ibikomere nyuma y'uko mu 2017 abantu bataramenyekana bashatse kumwica akaraswa amasasu 16 akarokoka. Nyuma y'amatora, mu cyumweru gishize Bwana Lissu yahungiye mu rugo rwa ambasaderi w'Ubudage i Dar es Salaam, avuga ko ubuzima bwe buri mu kaga. Umuvugizi wa leta ya Tanzania yabwiye BBC ishami ry'Igiswahili ko nta bimenyetso byerekana ko abatavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi ubuzima bwabo bugeramiwe. Ahubwo abashinja kuvuga ko nta mutekano bafite nk'uburyo bwo gushaka gusobanura uko batsinzwe amatora. Lissu na bagenzi be bamwe bo muri CHADEMA na ACT-Wazalendo atavuga rumwe na CCM iri ku butegetsi, nyuma y'amatora bafunzwe igihe gitoya. Polisi yabashinje gutegura imyigaragambyo itemewe, no gushaka gutwika amasoko na sitasiyo za lisansi mu mujyi wa Dar es Salaam. Muri iki cyumweru, Godbless Lema wahoze ari umudepite w'umujyi wa Arusha mu nteko ya Tanzania wo mu ishyaka CHADEMA, yahungiye muri Kenya ari kumwe n'umuryango we. Abatavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi bavuze ko amatora yaranzwe n'uburiganya basaba ko asubirwamo, komisiyo iyashinzwe muri Tanzania yo yavuze ko nta buriganya bwayabayemo.

Kungfu uracari umukino mushasha mu Rwanda Uyu mukino ujya gusa cyane n'uwa karate yombi ikifashishwa umuntu agerageza kwirwanaho . Gusa uretse kwirinda ,uyu mukino ngo ni n'uburyo bwiza butuma urubyiruko rwigenza neza ,rurangwa n'ikinyabupfura kandi ngo ukaba warinda indwara nyinshi uwukina . Bwana NDIZEYE Bosco ,umutoza ku rwego rw'igihugu avuga ko ukina kungfu aba yizeye kwirinda indwara z'umutima .diabete n'izindi zuririra ku mubyibuho ukabije ,. Yemeza kandi ko ,uyu mukino wafashije urubyiruko rwari rwaratwawe n'ibiyobyabwenge kubireka ,ubu rukaba rwarasubiye ku murongo mwiza . Kungfu ni umwe mu mikino Olympique ,u Rwanda ngo rukaba rwiteguye kuwushishikariza abatuarage mu rwego rwo kwuirinda indwara ruhereye cyane cyane mu mashuri.

Urubanza rwa Hamidreza Baqeri Darmani rwacishijwe ku mboneshakure y'igihugu Hamidreza Baqeri Darmani yagiriwe n'amakosa yo gukora inkaratasi za magendo zatumye aronka amadeni ashigikiwe na leta. Yaciye akoresha amasosiyete yamuhaye amatoni 3000000 y'ikaburimbo - ikoreshwa mu gukora amabarabara - igisata cinjiza amahera menshi muri Irani. Darmani w'imyaka 49, abaye umugwizatunga wa gatatu anyonzwe, kuva aho ubutegetsi bufatiye ingingo yo guhasha ibiturire mu mwaka uheze. Mu kwezi guheze Irani yaranyonze umuntu yakora mu budandaji bw'amahera bita 'Sultan des pièces', bamusanganye amatoni abiri y'amahera y'inzahabu. Ku bw'ikinyamakuru Mizan, Darman yagurishije kaburimbo y'imiliyoni 100 z'amadolari ($100m) biciye muri "magendo, inkaratasi z'impimbano n'ibiturire". Yafashwe mu kwezi kwa Munani mu 2014. Amakuru yuko Darmani yishwe yacishijwe ku mboneshakure ya Irani nk'isinema. Abamenyeshamakuru bakorera aho muri Irani bavuze ko ubutegetsi bwipfuza kwerekana ingene buhana abanyonyora ubutunzi bw'igihugu bugeze ahatemba. Ubutunzi bwa Irani bugeze ku manga, imwe mu nsiguro bitewe n'ibihano Amerika iheruka gukomereza igihugu.

Kim Jong-un ku mugongo w'ifarashi y'igitare ku musozi utwikiriwe n'urubura wa Paektu Uruhererekane rw'amafoto yatangajwe n'igitangazamakuru KCNA agaragaza Bwana Kim yapanze ifarashi y'igitare ku musozi Paektu utwikiriwe n'urubura. Ubu si bwo bwa mbere atereye uyu musozi ufite ubutumburuke bwa metero 2,750 kandi abasesenguzi bavuga ko bizwi ko ibyo abikora iyo hari ibintu bikomeye ari hafi gutangaza. Uyu musozi ufite igisobanuro cyihariye muri iki gihugu ndetse wubahwa nk'ahantu se wa Kim Jong-un yavukiye. Inkuru yatangajwe kuri uyu wa gatatu igira iti: "Urugendo rwe ku ifarashi ku musozi wa Paektu ni igikorwa gikomeye gifite akamaro karemereye mu mateka y'impinduramatwara ya Koreya". Cyongeyeho kiti: "Yicaye ku mugongo w'ifarashi, yazirikanye n'imbamutima nyinshi inzira y'urugamba rukomeye yanyuzemo agamije kubaka igihugu gikomeye kurusha ibindi." Mu 2017, yasuye uwo musozi habura ibyumweru bicye ngo ageze ijambo ku baturage rijyanye n'umwaka mushya. Icyo gihe yaciye amarenga ko umubano hagati ya Koreya ya ruguru na Koreya y'epfo ugiye kuba mwiza. Amakuru avuga ko Bwana Kim amaze guterera uyu musozi wa Paektu nibura inshuro eshatu, ndetse ko mu 2018 yawusuye ari kumwe na Perezida Moon Jae-in wa Koreya y'epfo. Mbere, igitangazamakuru KCNA cyari cyatangaje amafoto ya Bwana Kim ari ku gasongero k'uyu musozi, bigaragara nkaho yari yawutereye yambaye inkweto z'uruhu z'umukara. Bwana Kim ku gasongero k'umusozi Paektu Umusozi wa Paektu, w'ikirunga kiruka, uvugwa ko ari wo Dangun yavukiyeho. Dangun ni we washinze ubwami bwa mbere bwa Koreya mu myaka irenga 4,000 ishize. Uyu musozi uri kuri kilometero zibarirwa mu magana uvuye mu murwa mukuru Pyongyang, kandi uri neza neza ku mupaka ugabanya Koreya ya ruguru n'Ubushinwa. Mu ntangiriro y'uku kwezi, abategetsi ba Koreya ya ruguru bagiranye ibiganiro n'abategetsi b'Amerika byabereye mu gihugu cya Suède. Byabaye ibiganiro bya mbere bibayeho by'impande zombi kuva Perezida Donald Trump w'Amerika na Bwana Kim bahuriye by'akanya gato mu karere k'umupaka wa Koreya zombi mu kwa gatandatu. Kim Myong-gil, intumwa nkuru ya Koreya ya ruguru ku bijyanye n'ibya nikleyeri, yavuze ko ibyo biganiro byo muri Suède "bitubahirije ibyifuzo byacu kera kabaye birahagarara". Ariko Amerika ivuga ko "habayeho ibiganiro byiza" icyo gihe. Mbere y'ibyo biganiro, Koreya ya ruguru yarashe igisasu cya misile cyo mu bwoko bushya, cyabaye icya 11 irashe kugeza ubu muri uyu mwaka.

Abanyamuzika b'Abarundi bizera gutorera akoyoko mw'itegeko rikingira ibihangano vyabo Abakora akazi k'umuziki baganiriye na BBC barashima ico gikorwa, ariko ntibabibona kumwe n'amaradio eka mbere n'imiziki y'Abarundi iracavuzwa ukuri kwamye muri ayo maradio. Umuririmvyi w'umusore Hyves Kamikiwe avuza umuziki ndundi yabwiye BBC ko abaririmvyi bamaze igihe kinini imiziki yabo ivuzwa n'abantu batayiriha. Hyves Kamikiwe avuga ko hageze ko abaririmvyi bakamisha ibikorwa vyabo Ariko aramwenyura yagize ati: "Harageze ko dukamisha ibikorwa vy'ubwenge bwacu n'amaboko yacu. Ni umwanya wo kwimbura. Ndanezerewe cane. Mbere iyo ngingo yari yaratevye". BBC yashitse kandi ku muhana w'umutama wa kera, Joseph Torobeka, avuza ibicurarangisho kavukire, akaba ari we yavugije inanga y'ikirundi yamenyekanye cane yitwa "Mubu". Uwo mukukuruke yahoze akorera ubushikiranganji bw'imico kama yizeye ko reta igiye kubibuka ngo kubera bari barushe.
