Bwana Torobeka yagize ati: "Kuva mu myaka ya 70 umuziki wacu uvuzwa mu maradiyo yose ataco baduha. Twarateje imbere igihugu biciye mu ndirimbo zijanye n'imico. Ubu rero twibaza ko reta igiye kugira impuwe idushimire". Joseph Torobeka, yavugije inanga yakunzwe cane yitwa "Mubu", avuga ko kuva mu mwaka 70 indirimbo ziwe zivuzwa ataco ahabwa Itegeko ribuza iki? Iryo tegeko ryagiye mu ngiro mu mpera z'indwi iheze ribuza amaradio, ubunywero, amahoteri, imiduga yunguruza abantu, ubutambiro n'ibindi bibanza, gukoresha ibikorwa mvabwenge nk'imiziki, amareresi n'ibindi, mu gihe bazoba batabirihiye. N'ubwo biri ukwo, mu maradiyo akorera mu Burundi imiziki y'Abarundi baracayivuza ukuri kwamye. Médar Niyonkuru akora ibiganiro vy'imiziki asigura ko bigoye gushira mu ngiro iyo ngingo mu gihe bene imiziki aribo bisabira ko imiziki yabo yovuzwa mu maradiyo ku buntu. Médar Niyonkuru, atunganya ibiganiro vy'umuziki, avuga ko bigoye gushira iryo tegeko mu ngiro mu gihe anyamuziki ari bo bisabira amaradiyo kuvuza indirimbo zabo "Biragoye cane mu gihe ikigo OBDA kiraba ivya droit d'auteur kitarashobora guhemba abanyamuziki. Muri make iyi ngingo ije gusubiza inyuma umuziki w'u Burundi", niko Médar abibona. Mu kigo OBDEA kiraba ibijanye n'ibikorwa mvabwenge bamenyesha ko abegwa bose n'iyo ngingo bategerezwa kuyubahiriza. Nadine Ndayizeye akirongoye avuga ko yaba ama bus yunguruza abantu, amahoteri, ubunywero, n'ibindi bibanza, bazoharurirwa kimwe cose bafatiye ku kungene gikoresha ibivuza umuziki harimwo n'imboneshakure. Ikigo OBDEA kivuga ko iyo ngingo iraba n'indirimbo z'Abanyamahanga Asigura ko ingingo iraba n'ibikorwa vy'abanyamahanga Nadine agira ati: "Zaba izo ndirimbo z'Abarundi zaba iz'abanyamahanga, zose zirarabwa n'iyi ngngo. Umunyamahanga ari mu Burundi azotunganirizwa nk'uko n'Umurundi ari hanze y'igihugu atunganirizwa n'amategeko yo mw'ico gihugu". Ibikorwa vyaranguwe n'abahinga ba kera boba batakiriho navyo nyene bizoshirwa ku ntonde z'ikigo OBDA kugira benevyo batunganirizwe.

Iyi shusho yababaje cyane abakunzi ba Manchester City mu minota ya nyuma y'umukino wayihuzaga naTottenham Kuva ubu buhanga bwatangira gukoreshwa bumaze kwifashishwa mu gufata imyanzuro myinshi ikomeye, -uheruka ni ubwo VAR yafashije umusifuzi kwemeza igitego cya Tottenham bakekaga ko cyatsindishijwe akaboko no kwanga igitego cya Raheem Sterling yatsinze mu minota ya nyuma mu mukino Manchester City yatsinzemo 4 - 3 Tottenham kuwa gatatu ushize. Iyo bitaba VAR, iki gitego cya Sterling cyari kujyana ikipe ya Pep Guardiola muri kimwe cya kabiri cy'irangiza. Ariko byahiriye Tottenham kubera itegeko ry'ibitego ikipe yatsindiye ahatari iwayo. Abantu benshi bahora bibuka imikino mpuzamahanga yabayemo ibintu bitari kubaho iyo VAR iba yaraje mbere. Imikino imwe n'imwe iba yararangiye ari andi mateka. Mu mikino ihuza amakipe yabaye aya mbere i Burayi, ibi bihe bitanu biribukwa cyane: Ijoro ry'agahinda kubera umusifuzi Obredo (Chelsea 1-1 Barcelona, 2009) Umusifuzi Tom Ovrebo wo muri Norvege yababaje cyane abakinnyi n'abakunzi ba chelsea mu 2009 Amakipe yombi yari yanganyije ubusa ku busa i Camp Nou, i London Chelsea yagombaga gukora iyo bwabaga igatsinda Barcelona, ndetse yabonye igitego hakiri kare. Ariko imbere y'abafana bayo umusifuzi wo muri Norvege Tom Henning Obredo yimye Chelsea Penaliti nyazo nibura eshatu. Aka karengane kahindutse agahinda ubwo Barcelona yabonaga igitego mu minota ya nyuma igakomeza kubera igitego cyo hanze, ndetse itwara igikombe ku mukino wa nyuma itsinze Manchester United. Akarengane kuri Nesta (Barcelona 3-1 AC Milan, 2012) Nesta yahawe ikarata y'umuhondo n'umusifuzi mu mukino wahuzaga Milan AC na Barcelone mu 2012 Barcelona nanone yongeye kungukira ku basifuzi ubwo ku mukino wa kimwe cya kane na AC Milan warangiraga mu bibazo. Barcelona yari yabashije kunganya 0 - 0 i Milan, mu kwishyura i Camp Nou igice cya mbere cyarangiye ari 1 - 1. Umusifuzi w'umuholandi Bjorn Kuipers yahaye Barcelona penaliti ya kabiri muri uyu mukino asifuye ikosa rya Alessandro Nesta kuri Sergio Busquets, ndetse bituma uyu myugariro - uri mu bakomeye babayeho - ahabwa ikarita itukura. Nyamara nyuma byaje kugaragara ko umukino wari wahagaze mu gihe basifuye ko Nesta yakoze ikosa. Lionel Messi Penaliti ntiyayihushije agahinda gataha i Milan. Kurarira inshuro ebyiri kwa Ronaldo (Real Madrid 4-2 Bayern Munich, 2017) Ronaldo yatsinze ibitego bitatu harimo n'ibyo mu minota y'inyongera basezerera Bayern mu 2017 Cristiano Ronaldo yatsinze ibitego bitatu harimo n'ibyo mu minota y'inyongera basezerera Bayern. Ariko ikibazo ni uko uyu musore wo muri Portugal muri ibi bitego bye, bibiri byose yari yaraririye. Byababaje kurushaho ab'i Bayern kuko umusifuzi Viktor Kassai wo muri Hongiriya yari yanahaye ikarita itukura Arturo Vidal wacaga ibintu icyo gihe muri Bayern. Real Madrid yarenze hano irakomeza inatwara igikombe ku nshuro ya kabiri muri bitatu yatwaye yikurikiranya. Agahinda k'abongereza i Paris (Bayern Munich 2-0 Leeds United, 1975) Mu 1975 Leeds United (imyenda yera) yimwe igitego mu buryo budasobanutse bimwa na penaliti ebyiri Ntibazibagirwa ko Bayern intsinzi yayihawe n'umusifuzi w'umufaransa Michel Kitabdjian wimye penaliti ebyiri zigaragara Leeds ku makosa yose yari yakozwe n'icyamamare myugariro Franz Beckenbauer. Leeds kandi yimwe igitego bavuze ko habayeho kurarira mu gihe uyu musifuzi Michel yari yabanje kukemeza. Umujinya wahagurukije abafana ba Leeds kuri Parc des Prince barigaragambya cyane ibintu biracika. Usibye gutsindwa umukino, Leeds United yanahagaritswe mu marushanwa y'iburayi imyaka ibiri kubera ibyakozwe n'abafana bayo. VAR iyo ihaba ngo amateka ubu aba yanditse ukundi. Remontada i Catalunya ngo ntiyari ba gushoboka (Barcelona 6-1 PSG, 2017) Mascherano yemeye ko yagushije mugenzi we Di Maria Intsinzi ya Barcelona kuri Paris Saint-Germain mu 2017 izaguma mu mateka - Barca, yakoze 'remontada' irenga ibitego 4 - 0 yari yatsindiwe i Paris. Abakinnyi ba PSG ariko ntibahwemye kuvuga ko ibi Barca yabifashijwemo n'umusifuzi wo muri Turkiya Deniz Aytekin. Uyu mugabo bavuga ko yimye penaliti igaragara PSG ubwo umukinnyi wabo Angel di Maria yagushwaga mu rubuga rw'amahina na Javier Maschelano, aba bombi bakomoka muri Argentine. Nyuma y'umukino Maschelano yagize ati "Ni ukuri koko nagushije di Maria ariko ndumva atariyo mpamvu twasezereye PSG". Umusifuzi Aytekin mu minota ya nyuma cyane y'umukino yahaye penaliti Barca ubwo Luis Suarez bamukozeho gato cyane mu rubuga rw'amahina akagwa nk'igiti batemye. Abakurikira imikino y'amakipe yabaye aya mbere iwayo iburayi bavuga ko ubu haba hari andi mateka iyo VAR iba yaratangiye gukoreshwa kare.

Urubuga rwa internet rwitwa Healthmap.org rukurikiranira hafi buri ndwara ku isi hose: izo ndwara zose zigaragaraza ku ikarita ziriho ku isi muri iki cyumweru Ni ibintu bigaragara ku buryo bworoshye ko kuri ubu dutuye isi turi benshi cyane kurusha mu kindi gihe kigeze kubaho - ubu abatuye isi ni miliyari 7.7 kandi bakomeje kwiyongera. Dukomeje kandi gutura mu buryo bwegeranye kurushaho. Abantu benshi batuye mu buryo bw'ubucucike, ibyo bivuze ko hari ibyago biri hejuru cyane byo guhura n'ibitera indwara. Abantu muri Thailand barimo basigaye bambara ibibapfuka nyuma yaho ba mukerarugendo batandatu bo mu Bushinwa basanganwe coronavirus Indwara ya coronavirus isa nk'iyandura ivuye ku muntu umwe akayanduza undi gutyo gutyo iyo habayeho gukorora cyangwa kwitsamura hakagira umwanda na mucye usohoka. Iyo virusi imara igihe gito ifite ubuzima iyo iri hanze y'umubiri w'umuntu, rero bisaba ko abantu baba begeranye kugira ngo yandure. Mu mwaka wa 2014, icyorezo cya Ebola cyasakaye binyuze mu maraso cyangwa andi matembabuzi ava mu mubiri, gusa abahuye mu buryo bwegeranye ni bo bayanduye. Ariko si virusi zose zandura mu buryo bw'umuntu umwe uyanduza undi. Ndetse na Zika, abantu bandura ivuye mu mibu, nayo irushaho kwandura iyo abantu begeranye. Imibu itera Zika yororokera mu bice by'imijyi aho itungwa n'amaraso y'abantu. Yororoka neza mu bice bituwe mu buryo bw'ubucucike, ahantu hahehereye ndetse n'ahashushye by'akazuyazi. Abatuye Wuhan bararirimba mu guhitisha umwanya Kuva mu 2007 abantu barushijeho gutura mu mijyi kurusha mu byaro. Abantu barenga miliyari enye ubu batuye ku gice kingana na 1% by'ubuso bw'ubutaka bw'iyi si dutuyeho. Kandi imijyi myinshi turi kwimukiramo ntabwo itwiteguye. Rero abantu benshi birangira batuye ahantu h'akajagari aho babura amazi meza ndetse n'uburyo bwiza bwo kuyobora imyanda (sewage system). Rero indwara ikwirakwira byihuse. Turatembera Abakozi batera umuti mu ndege muri Thailand mu mwaka wa 2015 mu kwirinda indwara yo mu myanya y'ubuhumekero ya 'Middle East Respiratory Syndrome' Indege, gariyamoshi n'imodoka, ibyo bivuze ko virusi ishobora kugera mu ntera igera mu cyakabiri cy'isi mu gihe kitageze ku munsi. Mu byumweru bicye bishize coronavirus igaragaraye, habonetse abayicyekwaho mu bihugu birenga 16. Mu mwaka ushize wa 2019, kompanyi z'indege zatwaye abagenzi miliyari 4.5 - mu myaka icumi yabanje zari zatwaye gusa abagenzi miliyari 2.4. Wuhan ni hamwe mu hantu h'ingenzi ho mu Bushinwa hanyura za gariyamoshi zigenda ku muvuduko wo hejuru. Kandi iyo virusi yahagaragaye ubwo Ubushinwa bwiteguraga ubutembere bwa mbere bukozwe n'abantu benshi mu mateka y'isi. Ingendo zirenga miliyari eshatu zikorwa mu Bushinwa mu ntangiriro y'umwaka wo muri iki gihugu. Kimwe mu byorezo bibi cyane byabayeho ni icyitwa influenza - kizwi ku izina rya 'Spanish flu' - cyabayeho kuva mu mwaka wa 1918 kugera mu 1920. Cyadutse i Burayi ubwo nabwo habaga urundi rujya n'uruza runini rw'abantu, intambara ya mbere y'isi iri kurangira. Mu gihe ibyo bicurane byakwiragiraga, abasirikare bari barimo gusubira iwabo mu bihugu baturutsemo, bava ku rugamba, batahana ibyo bicurane. Bajyanye iyo virusi aho baba, mu bantu batari barateguye uburyo bwo kuyirwanya, bituma ubwirinzi bw'umubiri w'umuntu bugubwa gitumo neza neza. Mu gihe cy'icyorezo cya 'influenza' mu mwaka wa 1918, inzu zibikwamo ibikoresho zarahinduwe mu gukomeza gutuma abanduye batanduza abandi Ubushakashatsi bumwe bw'impuguke mu bya virusi, John Oxford, buvuga ko intandaro y'iyo virusi ishobora kuba yari inkambi abasirikare barenga 100,000 bacagamo buri munsi. Ndetse no mu gihe cya mbere y'ingendo zo mu ndege, icyo cyorezo cyakwiragiye hafi muri buri gice cy'isi. Cyahitanye abantu babarirwa hagati ya miliyoni 50 na miliyoni 100. Ariko icyo cyorezo cya 'Spanish flu' cyafashe igihe kiri hagati y'amezi atandatu n'amezi icyenda ngo kibashe gukwirakwira ku isi. Muri iyi si y'ubu aho dushobora kuyitembera yose mu munsi umwe, ubundi bwoko bushya bwa virusi bwo bushobora gukwirakwira byihuse kurushaho. Inyama zariyongereye, inyamaswa zariyongereye, indwara ziriyongera Ebola, SARS, noneho ubu na Wuhan coronavirus, ni ndwara zandura ziterwa na virusi - zandujwe abantu zivuye ku nyamaswa. Ubu bwoko bushya bwa coronavirus busa nk'ubwaturutse mu isoko ry'inyama ry'i Wuhan - amakuru y'ibanze avuga ko ishobora kuba yaravuye ku nzoka zikiri nzima. Muri iyi minsi hafi indwara eshatu muri buri ndwara enye nshya ziterwa n'inyamaswa. Uko abantu bakunda inyama ku isi biri kwiyongera, ubworozi bw'amatungo atanga umusaruro w'ibiribwa ndetse n'ayororerwa kwishimisha buri kwaguka. Niko ibice bimwe by'isi byiyongeramo abakire ndetse bakayoboka n'amafunguro arimo inyama. Ibicurane biterwa na virusi, abantu bakunze kubyandura binyuze mu matungo boroye, rero ubushobozi bwo kuba amatungo yanduye ashobora kugira aho ahurira n'abantu nabwo bwariyongereye. Virusi zo mu bwoko bwa coronavirus zisimbuka ziva mu nyamaswa zo mu gasozi zikajya mu bantu. Mu Bushinwa, amasoko acuruzwamo inyamaswa zikiri nzima ndetse n'acuruzwamo inyama aramenyerewe mu bice bituwe mu bucucike. Ibyo bishobora kuba byasobanura impamvu ibyorezo bibiri biherutse byavuye muri ibyo bice bituwe mu buryo bw'ubucucike. Ikindi, uko imijyi dutuyemo yaguka, turushaho gusatira ibice by'icyaro aho abantu bagira aho bahurira n'inyamaswa zo mu gasozi. Virusi ya 'Lassa fever' nayo ni indi virusi ikwira muri ubu buryo - uko abantu batema amashyamba ngo bahinge kuri ubwo butaka, imbeba zo mu gasozi zahungiye mu ngo zihajyana iyo virusi. Urebye ntabwo twiteguye Nubwo isi isigaye imeze nk'iyabaye umudugudu umwe cyane kurusha mu kindi gihe cyigeze kubaho mbere, ntabwo turagira uburyo buhuriweho nk'isi bwo guhangana n'ibishobora gutera ibyorezo tubisanze aho bituruka. Mu guhagarika indwara yandura, ducungira gusa kuri leta yo muri icyo gihugu iyo ndwara yatangiriyemo. Iyo iyo leta inaniwe, abatuye isi bose bibashyira mu kaga. Nta handi ibyo byagaragaye kurushaho kurusha muri Afurika y'uburengerazuba mu gihe cy'icyorezo cya Ebola, ubwo inzego z'ubuvuzi zo muri Guinea, Liberia na Sierra Leone zananirwaga guhagarika ikwirakwira ryayo. Ebola yishe abantu 11,310 muri Afurika y'uburengerazuba. By'amahire ku batuye isi, iyo ni virusi urebye ikwirakwira gahoro, ariko virusi zo mu myanya y'ubuhumekero nka 'influenza' cyangwa coronavirus zikwirakwira byihuse cyane. Biba bibi kandi kurushaho kuko haba hari ibyago byinshi byuko indwara nk'izo ziba zishobora kwandurira mu bice bituwe n'abakene aho inzego z'ubuvuzi zifite intege nke. Kuba nta mategeko n'ubukangurambaga ku isuku n'isukura, ndetse n'abaturage batuye mu bucucike, byose byongera ibyago by'indwara nk'izo. Kandi nanone byinshi muri ibyo bihugu byugarijwe n'ikibazo cyuko abikomokamo bo mu rwego rw'ubuzima bakomeje kubivamo bajya mu mahanga aho bizeye akazi keza kurushaho (bizwi nka 'brain drain'). Inzego nke cyane z'ubuzima ku isi ni zo ziba zifite ubushake bwo gushora ubushobozi - muri bucye zifite - mu kwitegura indwara zikaze cyane biba bishobora kurangira zitanageze muri ibyo bihugu. Ubwo ibicurane by'ingurube - bizwi nka 'swine flu' - byadukaga, habayeho uburyo bwo gukwirakwiza imiti ku isi, ariko iyo gahunda yaranenzwe bivugwa ko uburyo bwo kubirwanya bwabayemo gukabya kuko byaje kugaragara ko byari ibicurane byoroheje cyane. Nubwo rwose dufite ikoranabuhanga ryo gukora imiti ishobora kurinda zimwe muri izi virusi, ntabwo ibyo biba bihagije kugira ngo kompanyi zikora imiti zumve zashoramo amafaranga gutyo gusa. Niba virusi runaka izica gusa abantu babarirwa mu bihumbi bicye, nta mafaranga izo kompanyi zikora imiti ziba zumva zizabibonamo. Nubwo tuba tuzi ko izo ndwara ziri hafi kutugeraho, kuri nyinshi muri zo ntituba dushobora kumenya ngo zizatugeraho ryari cyangwa hehe, kandi kwaduka kw'indwara zandura hafi buri gihe zitugwa gitumo. Inkuru nziza Umwana w'umukobwa akingirwa Ebola muri DR Congo Nubwo ubu turi kubona indwara nyinshi yanduza abantu benshi kurusha mu bindi bihe byabayeho mbere, abantu bacye ugereranyije na mbere ni bo barwara zikanabahitana. Ibi bikubiye mu bushakashatsi bw'ikigo cya siyansi cya Royal Society cyo mu Bwongereza. Iyo ubukungu bwiyongera byihuse, nkuko twabibonye mu Bushinwa, isuku y'ibanze no kugera ku bikorwa by'ubuvuzi bitera imbere. Ni nako bigenda ku bukangurambaga bwo kwirinda kwandura izo ndwara. Ubuvuzi buba bwiza kurushaho, abantu benshi kurushaho bagera kuri ubwo buvuzi kandi dukomeje no gutera imbere mu buryo bwo kwirinda indwara. Inkingo ziri gukorwa mu buryo bwihuse kurushaho. Nubwo uburyo bwo ku rwego rw'isi bwo guhangana n'ibiza atari shyashya, dukomeje gutera imbere mu buryo bwo gutahura no kugira igikorwa iyo bigaragaye. Igihugu nk'Ubushinwa gishobora kubaka ibitaro birimo ibitanda 1,000 by'abarwayi mu gihe cy'icyumweru kimwe, ikintu cyari kuba ari nk'inzozi gusa mu mwaka wa 1918.

Abasirikare bafashe ubutegetsi kuwa mbere nyuma yo gufata bagafunga umutegetsi Aung San Suu Kyi, amagana y'abadepite n'abandi bo hafi ye. Abasirikare bayoboye iyi coup bashyizeho urwego rw'ikirenga ruri hejuru ya guverinoma. Gusa mu mujyi munini wa Myanmar witwa Yangon hari gututumba ibikorwa bya rubanda byo kwamagana iyi coup d'état. Kuwa kabiri, akanama gashinzwe umutekano ku isi karateranye ariko kananirwa kumvikana ku itangazo rihuriweho nyuma y'uko Ubushinwa bwanze kurishyigikira. Ubushinwa bufite ububasha bwa Veto muri ako kanama, bityo nta tangazo budashyigikiye ryasohoka butabyemeye. Mbere y'ibyo biganiro, Christine Schraner intumwa yihariye ya UN kuri Myanmar yamaganye akomeje ibyakozwe n'abasirikare muri icyo gihugu, nyuma y'uko abo basirikare banze ibyavuye mu matora yo mu kwa 11. Christine yavuze ko "ibyavuye muri ayo matora ari intsinzi isesuye" y'ishyaka rya madamu Suu Kyi. 'Ikibazo bwite cy'igihugu' Elliott Prasse-Freeman inzobere ku gihugu cya Myanmar wo muri National University of Singapore yabwiye BBC ko ibyakozwe n'Ubushinwa "bisa nko gushyigikira ibyakozwe na bariya ba jenerali". Yongeraho ko ibinyamakuru byo mu Bushinwa bivuga ko ibyo Ubushinwa bwakoze muri UN "bisa nko kwerekana ko ibibera muri Myanmar ari ibibazo bwite by'iki gihugu" kandi bibona ibiri kuba ari "ukuvugurura guverinoma". Nubwo Freeman avuga ko itangazo rya UN ritari kugira icyo rihindura ako kanya, "ariko ryari kuba intangiriro y'andi mahanga kugira icyo akora." Akavuga ko ubu bisa n'ibitakibaye. Abategetsi bakuweho bakomeje gufungwa, bacunzwe n'abasirikare Aung San Suu Kyi, wari ukuriye guverinoma ubu yahiritswe, ntarongera kuboneka kuva kuwa mbere mu gitondo yafungwa n'abasirikare. Abandi barimo Perezida Win Myint nabo barafunze. Ishyaka rye NLD ejo kuwa kabiri ryasabye ko arekurwa nta yandi mananiza. Risaba n'abasirikare kwemera ibyavuye mu matora yo mu kwa 11, aho iri shyaka ryagize amajwi arenga 80%. Hagati aho, ibihugu birimo Amerika, Ubwongereza, Umuryango w'Ubumwe bw'Uburayi, Australia n'ibindi byamaganye coup d'etat muri Myanmar. Iki gihugu cyahoze cyizwi kandi nka Burma, cyategetswe n'abasirikare kugeza mu 2011, ubwo guverinoma y'abasiviri yarahiraga. Byifashe bite ubu muri Myanmar? Ubutegetsi bwahawe umugaba w'ingabo Min Aung Hlaing. Abaminisitiri 11 n'ababungirije, harimo ab'ubuzima, imari, ubutegetsi n'ububanyi n'amahanga, barasimbujwe. Mu nama ya mbere y'abaminisitiri yabaye ejo kuwa kabiri, Min Aung Hlaing yasubiyemo ko ntakindi cyashobokaga uretse gufata ubutegetsi Mu gihugu haranzwe n'umutuzo nyuma ya coup d'etat yo kuwa mbere, kuko ingabo zacungaga imihanda minini mu mijyi mikuru mu gihugu, ndetse hashyizweho umukwabu wa nijoro. Iki gihugu gifite amateka maremare y'ubutegetsi bwa gisirikare, kandi abaturage benshi bibuka urugomo rwagiye ruba muri 'coup' zabanje. Gusa kuwa kabiri nijoro mu mujyi wa Yangon hatangiye kumvikana urusaku rw'amahoni y'imodoka n'abakubita ibintu byirangira cyane nk'ibimenyetso byo kwigaragambya. Abaturage muri Yangon bakubita amasafuriya n'amapanu bamagana ihirikwa ry'ubutegetsi Imiryango y'impirimbanyi z'uburenganzira nayo yasabye rubanda kwivumbagatanya, bashinga amahuriro kuri Facebook ngo bategure ibyo bikorwa. Abakozi ku bitaro bigera kuri 70 mu gihugu biravugwa ko bahagaritse akazi bamagana uko guhirika ubutegetsi banasaba ko Suu Kyi arekurwa. Abaganga bamwe bambaye udutambaro dutoya tw'umukara nk'ikimenyetso cyo kwigaragambya bucece. Myanmar muri macye Myanmar ini igihugu gituwe na miliyoni 54 z'abaturage muri Aziya y'amajyepfo ashyira uburasirazuba, gihana imbibi na Bangladesh, Ubuhinde, Ubushinwa, Thailand na Laos. Cyayobowe n'ubutegetsi bw'igitugu bwa gisirikare kuva mu 1962 kugeza mu 2011, ubutegetsi bwamaganywe kenshi n'amahanga bukanashyirirwaho ibihano. Aung San Suu yamaze imyaka myinshi ahirimbanira ko haba impinduka za demokarasi. Kudohora guhoro gahoro byatangiye mu 2010, nubwo igisirikare cyakomeje kugira ijambo rikomeye. Guverinoma ikuriwe na madamu Suu Kyi yagiye ku butegetsi mu 2015 nyuma y'amatora. Ariko hashize imyaka ibiri abasirikare bahize banica ba nyamucye b'abayisilamu b'aba-Rohingya. Ibihumbi amagana byabo bahungiye muri Bangladesh, ibi byatumye kandi madamu Suu Kyi abonwa nabi n'amahanga. Gusa yakomeje kuba umuntu ukunzwe cyane mu gihugu, ndetse ishyaka rye ryatsinze amatora ku bwiganze mu kwa 11/2020. Ariko ubu igisirikare cyaramuhiritse cyongera gufata ubutegetsi.

Ibisigarira vy'indege yari itwaye ba Prezida Juvénal Habyarimana na Cyprien Ntaryamira, yarashwe itariki 06/04/1994 Urwo rubanza rumaze igihe kirekire rwatumye haba ukurabana ribi hagati y'ivyo bihugu bibiri, kubera kwagiriza abagwanyi b'abatutsi bari barongowe na prezida w'iki gihe w'u Rwanda Paul Kagame, ko ari bo bagize ico gitero kuri iyo ndege mu kwezi kwa kane mu 1994. Mw'itangazo ryo kw'itariki icumi z'ukwezi kwa cumi, abashikirizamanza b'Ubufaransa basavye ko ivyagirizwa abantu indwi vyoteshwa agaciro kubera abagira amatohoza batashoboye kwegeranya "ivyagiriji bikwiye". Ubu ingingo ya nyuma izova ku mucamanza ajejwe amatohoza. Ibihugu vy'Ubufaransa n'u Rwanda bisa n'ibihuriye kuri Francophonie kugira imigenderanire inaguke Ababuranira umupfasoni wa prezida Habyarimana, Agathe, bavuze ko 'ingingo' yafashwe n'abashikirizamanza "ibabaje" kandi ko "ifitaniye isano na politike". Igisase ca misile cakoroye indege yarimwo prezida Habyarimana hagufi y'ikibuga c'indege ca Kigali mu kwezi kwa kane mu 1994, haca haduka ubwicanyi bwamaze imisi ijana bwahitanye abantu 800.000, benshi muri bo bakaba bari abo mu bwoko bw'abatutsi. Abahisi Prezida Juvénal Habyarimana na François Mitterrand bari abantu bumvikana U Rwanda rwagumye bwagiriza Ubufaransa kugira uruhara muri genocide mu gushigikira reta y'abahutu, mu kubaha inyigisho abasirikare hamwe hamwe n'urwaruka rwitwaje ibigwanisho rwakoze ubwo bwicanyi. Ubucuti bwagumye bucumbagira gushika mu 2014 aho prezida Kagame yasubiye kwagiriza abasirikare b'abafaransa ko bafise uruhara muri ubwo bwicanyi. Umurwi w'Abafaransa -Survie, usaba Ubufaransa kwemanga uruhara muri jenoside mu Rwanda Ubucuti bwagiye kuba nabi gusumba igihe ubutungane bwo mu Bufaransa bufatiye ingingo mu kwezi kwa cumi mu 2016 yo gusubira gutanguza amatohoza ku woba yararashe iyo ndege, mu gihe mu bayitwara harimwo abafaransa.

Iri barabara Wissmannstraße rryitezwe kwitwa Lucy-Lameck-Straße kuva mu ntango z'umwaka uza Ibarabara a Wissmannstraße ryari ryitiriwe Hermann von Wissmann, ubu rigiye kwitwa Lucy-Lameck-Straße. Uyu mukenyezi ni we mukenyezi wa mbere yahawe amabanga y'ubushikiranganji, akaba ari umwe mu bategetsi bakomeye barwaniye ukwikukira kwa Tanzania. Lucy Lameck yari icegera c'umushikiranganji ajejwe iterambere, yongera kandi aba icegera c'umushikiranganji w'amagara y'abantu, akaba azwi ko yagize uruhara rukomeye mu kurwanira agateka k'abakenyezi muri ico gihugu. Von Wissman niwe yari arongoye intara yitwa German East Africa, ni ukuvuga intara y'Ubudagi yo mu karere ka Afrika y'Ubuseruko, kari kagizwe na Tanganyika, u Burundi n'u Rwanda, mu gihe kari kakiri mu minwe y'abakoloni b'Abadagi. Wissman yagirizwa ko yategetse ubwicanyi bwakorewe abanyagihugu benshi b'aka karere nk'uko vyandikwa n'ikinyamakuru c'Ubudagi, Der Tagesspiegel. Ishirahamwe ryo mu Budagi Berlin Postkolonial, rimwe mu mashirahamwe yaharaniye izi mpinduka, ryishimiye iyi ngingo y'abarongoye ako karere ka Berlin. Mw'itangazo ryasohoye, iri shirahamwe rivuga ko iri sekeza ryashoboye kwambura icubahiro cahabwa "Von Wissmann, maze kigahabwa umukenyezi w'umutanzaniyakazi yarwanije ubukoloni n'ivanguraruhu". Mnyaka Sururu Mboro, umutanzaniya ari mu barongoye ishirahamwe Berlin Postkolonial avuga ati: "Wissmann yari umunyamacakubiri kandi umwicanyi. Lucy Lameck ni ikimenyetso c'uruhara abagore bagize mu kurwanira ukwikukira kw'ico gihugu, ariko rutahawe agaciro". Lucy Lameck ni nde? Yavutse mu 1934 avukira mu gisagara ca Moshi mu cari Tanganyika yegukira Ubwongereza. Yavukiye mu muryango w'abarimyi, mu nyuma yiga ibijanye n'ubuforoma imbere y'uko yinjira muri politike. Arangije ivyigwa vyiwe vy'ubuforoma mu 1950, ntiyashimye kubandanya akazi mu gisata c'ubuvuzi c'abakoloni b'Abongereza, ahubwo yemeye gukora akazi k'ubukarani. Mu nyuma yaragiye kwiga amashure ya kaminuza mu kigo c'ahitwa Ruskin, cegukira ishure kaminuza rya Oxford mu Bwongereza. Lucy Lameck azwi ko yari umunyapolitike yari akomeye muri Tanzania, kuko yabaye umutanzaniyakazi wa mbere yajejwe amabanga y'ubushikiranganji muri leta y'ico gihugu. Mu 1960, yinjiye ubwa mbere mu nama nshingamateka ya Tanganyika, imbere y'uko atorwa kuba umushingamateka mu Nama Nshingamateka igihugu kimaze kwitwa Tanzania mu 1965. Yibukwa nk'intangarugero, umuntu yamaze ubuzima bwiwe bwose aharanira agateka k'abakenyezi muri Tanzania.

Fatou Jallow avuga ko yahunze igihugu cye kubera Yahya Jammeh Ubu bubaye ubundi buhamya bushya bushinja gufata ku ngufu abagore n'abakobwa Yahya Jammeh wavanywe ku butegetsi ku ngufu mu mwaka wa 2017. BBC yagerageje kuvugana na Bwana Jammeh, ubu uba mu uhungiro muri Equatorial Guinea, kuri ibi birego. Umuvugizi w'ishyaka rye yahakanye ibyo uyu mugabo aregwa, mu itangazo yahaye BBC. Iri tangazo rya Ousman Rambo Jatta rigira riti: "Nk'ishyaka n'abaturage ba Gambia barambiwe ibirego bidafite ishingiro bikomeje kuvugwa ku wari Perezida wacu". Uyu mugabo avuga ko Jammeh nta mwanya afite wo gusubiza kuri ibyo birego bibeshya, ko ari umugabo utinya Imana kandi wubaha abagore. Madamazera Jallow we yabwiye BBC ko yifuzaga ko Jammeh, w'imyaka 54, agezwa imbere y'inkiko. Ati: "Nagerageje kenshi guhisha iyi nkuru no kuyisiba ikava muri njye. Ariko mu kuri byarananiye, niyo mpamvu mpisemo kuvuga ubu, kugira ngo Yayha Jammeh yumve ibyo yakoze". Uyu mukobwa avuga yashakaga kubwira iyi nkuru ye urwego rwiswe 'Truth, Reconciliation and Reparations Commission' (TRRC) rwashyizweho na Perezida Adama Barrow watsinze amatora. Yahya Jammeh yagiye ku butegetsi mu 1994 afite imyaka 29 abuvaho ku ngufu nyuma y'imyaka 22 Uru rwego rukora iperereza ku byaha byibasiye uburenganzira bwa muntu byakozwe ku butegetsi bwamaze imyaka 22 bwa Yahya Jammeh, harimo ubwicanyi, iyicarubozo no gufungwa binyuranye n'amategeko. Bwana Jammeh yavanywe ku ngufu ku butegetsi mu kwezi kwa mbere kwa 2017 ubwo ibihugu by'akarere byoherezaga ingabo nyuma yo kwanga kurekura ubutegetsi nk'uko yabisabwaga n'abaturage. Yanze gushyingirwa Fatou Jallow avuga ko yari afite imyaka 18 ubwo yahuraga na Bwana Jammeh mu 2014 amaze gutsinda irushanwa ry'ubwiza rizwi cyane muri Gambia. Avuga ko perezida Jammeh yitwaye nk'umubyeyi akamugira inama, akamuha impano n'amafaranga ndetse anategeka ko iwabo mu rugo rw'uyu mukobwa bahageza amazi meza. Mu mugoroba wo gusangira wateguwe n'abafasha ba Perezida, avuga ko Bwana Jammeh yasabye umuryango w'uyu mukobwa kumumushyingira. Uyu mukobwa ariko avuga ko yabyanze. Nyuma yaje gutumirwa mu muhango w'idini ku rugo rwa Perezida ngo ahaseruke nka 'Miss' watowe, ariko ahageze bamujyana kwa Perezida iwe bwite nk'uko abivuga. Akurikije umujinya Bwana Jammeh yari afite kubwo kwanga ko amurongora ati: "Nahise ntekereza ikigiye kumbaho". Bwana Jammeh ngo yamukubise urushyi maze aramufata amutera urushinge mu kaboko. Ati: "Yahise avanamo igitsina cye mu maso yanjye, arampfukamisha, anyambura ikanzu maze ankorera ibya mfura mbi". Abakobwa 'bakira abantu' Jallow avuga ko ibi birangiye yatashye maze akifungirana mu nzu iminsi itatu ubundi agahitamo guhita ahungira muri Sénégal ituranye na Gambia. Ageze i Dakar muri Sénégal, Jallow yasabye imiryango iharanira uburenganzira bwa muntu gufashwa. Hashize ibyumweru, yemerewe kurindwa ndetse ajyanwa muri Canada aho aba n'ubu. Imiryango ya Human Rights Watch na Trial International ivuga ko Bwana Jammeh yari afite uburyo bwo guhohotera abagore, ndetse hari n'abo yari yarashyize ku rutonde bahembwa na Leta bitwa "protocol girls". Aba ngo bitwaga abafasha bo mu gutegura no gutunganya imihango runaka ariko ngo bari abo gukora imibonano mpuzabitsina na perezida cyangwa abantu be. BBC ntiyabashije kugenzura ibi bivugwa n'iyo miryango, gusa umwe mu bategetsi muri Gambia, wemeye kuvuga adatangajwe umwirondoro we, yemeza ko yari azi "amabi" abera ku biro by'umukuru w'igihugu. Ati: "Abakora porotokole bari biganjemo abakobwa bahabwa aka kazi kugira ngo bashimishe ibyifuzo bya perezida". Jammeh yakundaga kenshi kujya iwabo ahitwa Kanila aho yari afite urugo Uyu yemeza ko hari ubwo yabonye uriya mukobwa Jallow ku biro by'umukuru w'igihugu "mu masaha akuze cyane". Hari undi mukobwa wabwiye Human Right Watch (HRW) ko ubwo yari afit imyaka 23 yahawe akazi muri aba bakobwa akaza gutegekwa gusambana na Perezida Jammeh mu 2015. Uyu mukobwa wasabye kudatangazwa umwirondoro, yavuze ko yamuhamagaje mu cyumba cye "maze atangira kunyambura ambwira ko ankunda, ko azankorera byose njyewe n'umuryango wanjye, ko kandi ibyo ntazabibwira uwo ariwe wese kuko nabona ingaruka". "Nta mahitamo nari mfite. Uwo munsi yansambanyije nta no kwikingira". Byari ikuzo kuri bamwe Undi mukobwa nawe utifuje gutangazwa umwirondoro wakoraga muri 'protocol', nawe avuga ko bari bazi neza ko iyo hari uwo Jammeh ahamagaje nta kindi uretse kuba agiye gusambana nawe. Yabwiye HRW ati: "Bamwe barabishakaga. Bumvaga ari ikuzo kandi bakeneye n'ayo mafaranga". Uyu avuga ko mu 2013 ubwo yari afite imyaka 22, Bwana Jammeh yamuhohoteye bikomeye mu rugo rwe ruri ahitwa Kanila. Ati: "Ijoro rimwe, umwe mu bakozi be yarampamagaye ngo mukurikire, anjyana ku cyumba bwite cya Perezida. Mpageze ansaba kwiyambura". "Yambwiye ko nkiri muto kandi nkeneye kirengera, ko rero ashaka kumenaho amazi yo kundengera." Yahya Jammeh, ugaragara hano ari kumwe n'umugore we Zainab, yatsize amatora ane ya perezida, mbere yuko atungurwa agatsindwa ayo mu mwaka wa 2016 Nyuma yo kumusambanya iryo joro, ubwakurikiyeho ngo Jammeh yatangiye kumukoraho maze ararira, byatumye bamwirukana ku kazi ndetse n'amahirwe yo kwishyurirwa kaminuza yari yemerewe ntiyayabona. Jallow yabwiye BBC ko ashaka ko afungura urubuga maze abagore bose bakorewe ihohoterwa rishingiye ku gutsina bagafungura imitima yabo bakavuga. Ati: "Uko abantu bavuga ibyo banyuzemo ni ko baruhuka". Perezida Adama Barrow wa Gambia avuga ko bategereje raporo y'urwego TRRC kugira ngo batangire gusaba Equatorial Guinea kohereza Jammeh muri Gambia kubazwa ibyo ashinjwa.

IS yatsimbaraye muri Sirte inyum y'aho Col Gaddafi akuriwe akicwa Mw'itangazo batangiye hamwe, abategetsi b'ivyo bihugu bavuga ko bashobora gusaba ko ingingo yo guharira ivomo Libya mu kutayigurishako ibirwanihso yirengagizwa. John Kerry avuga ko leta y' Ubumwe ari yo yonyene abanya Libya bashobora guhurirako mu kurwanya IS Mu nama yabareye i Vienne, umushikiranganji w'imigenderanire wa Leta zunze Ubumwe za Amerika, John Kerry, yavuze ko abo bategetsi bazosaba ishirahamwe ONU gukuraho iyo ngingo yo guharira ivomo Libya, kuko IS ari ikibazo gisha gihanze Libya kandi ari ngombwa ko gihagarara. Mu kwezi guheze leta ya Libya yari yagabishije ko IS ishobora kwifatira igice kinini c'igihugu hamwe itohagarikwa vuba. Icifuzo c'abo bategetsi ariko kibwirizwa kubanza kwemerwa n'umurwi wa ONU ujejwe gufata ibihano imbere yo gushirwa mu ngiro. Umushikranganji wa mbere wa leta y'infatakibanza ya Libya, Fayez Sarraj, aragabisha ko hari ibikigoye imbere, aho yemeza ko gutsinda IS bisaba ubufasha bw'amakungu burenze ubwo kwemerera iyo leta kugura ibirwanisho.. Libya yagumye mu kajagari kuva ico gihugu kibaye ikirimbiro ry'intamabra zagiyemwo n'ingabo z'urwego rwa OTAN, ztanguye zifise intumbero yo gukura ku butegetsi Colonel Muammar Gaddafi mu kwa cumi, kw'umwaka wa 2011. Kugeza ejo bundi, ico gihugu cari gifise leta zibiri zidacana uwaka, kari kugez' ubu kirimwo imirwi yitwaje ibirwanihso iharurw amu majana,m imwe ikorana n'umurwi IS. Ibihugu bitunze bishigikiye leta ihurikiyemwo bose, bifise icizere ko iyo leta izorandua umurwi IS washinze iumizi muri Sirte, intara y'amavuko ya Gaddafi. Uwo murwi umaze kugaba ibitero vy' abiyahuzi ku mariba y'ibitoro mu gihugu

Ghana iriko irigina igitego gitsinzwe na Jordan Ayew Uwo mukinyi wo muri Aston Villa ni we yatanguye kwinjiza umunyegoli wa RDC Ley Matampi. Paul-Jose M'poku wa RDC yaciye asubiza ico gitego ku mupira yateye ari kure cane. Andre Ayew ni we yatsinze igitego kigira kabiri ca Ghana. Bubaye ubugira gatandatu Ghana ija mu gice ca kabiri gishira ica nyuma yikurikiranya, mu gihe bamaze imyaka 35 biruka inyuma y'ico gikombe ca Afrika. Umukinyi wa Hull City, Dieumerci Mbokani (i buryo) yaronse uburyo bwinshi bwo kwinjiza ariko arananirwa

Uburyo bwo gupima ubushuhe ku muntu atawurinze kumwegera Ivyo bipimo byari byoherejwe mu gihugu c'Ubugande, byatangiwe ibisubizo uyu munsi mu gitondo. Kubera ko yari yashizwe mu kato, yahise arekurwa arataha, kimwe n'abandi bose bari bahuye nawe barimo abaganga b'aho yari yagiye kwivuriza. Uyu mugabo yari yakesweho iyi ndwara ubwo yajyaga kwa muganga ibyuma bikagaragaza ko ibipimo by'umubiri we bifite ubushyuhe budasanzwe. Umuriro ni kimwe mu bimenyetso by'indwara ya Ebola. Iyi nkuru y'uko uyu muntu wakekwagaho indwara ya Ebola basanze atariyo ishobora gutuma benshi biruhutsa, kubera ubwoba yari yateye mu bantu. Cyakora nk'uko bitangazwa n'inzego z'ubuzima mu Rwanda, ngo ibi ntibyatuma barera amaboko. Gahunda yo gupima abantu bose binjira mu Rwanda irakomeje, ndetse no gukangurira abantu uburyo iyi ndwara imaze guhitana abatari batari bake mu bihugu bya Africa y'uburengerazuba yakwirindwa.

Uyu ni umwaka wa karindwi w'imikino Yaya Toure akinira ku kibuga Etihad cy'ikipe ya Manchester City Toure yagaragaye nk'uwava muri iyi kipe nyuma yo gukurwa ku rutonde rw'abakinnyi b'ikipe ya Manchester City mu irushanwa rya Champions League. Ndetse atangira guhabwa umwanya wo gukina muri shampiyona mu kwezi kwa cumi na kumwe, nyuma yo kumara igihe kinini adakina. Ariko yarakoze cyane bituma umutoza Pep Guardiola yongera kumugirira icyizere ndetse intsinzi yo ku wa gatandatu, yari umukino we wa 29 muri uyu mwaka w'imikino. Hagati aho, umutoza Guardiola yavuze ko umukinnyi Pablo Zabaleta ari "intyoza." Ibi Guardiola abivuze nyuma yaho Zabaleta, ukomoka mu gihugu cya Argentine akaba akina mu ba kabiri mu ikipe ya Manchester City, ku wa gatandatu avuze ko azava muri iyi kipe mu mpera y'uyu mwaka w'imikino. Bitandukanye na Zabaleta, uzava muri City nyuma yo kuyikinira imyaka icyenda, Toure afite amashyushyu yo gukomeza kuyikinira, mu gihe umutoza Guardiola yemeza ko Toure akwiye guhabwa andi masezerano. City izasezera mu cyubahiro umukinnyi Zabaleta mu mukino wo ku wa kabiri n'ikipe ya West Brom, uzaba ari n'uwa nyuma ikiniye ku kibuga cyayo muri uyu mwaka w'imikino.

Uyu munsi ugize indwi Amerika iri mu myiyerekano y'ukwiyamiriza urupfu rw'umwirabure George Flyod Bariko babona amasanamu y'abamenyeshamakuru bahagarikwa, baterwa ibisasu vya plastiki, canke bagaterwa ivyuka vy'ipiripiri. Ayo masanamu yatangaje cane Abashinwa, kuko abenshi batari bwabone ibintu nk'ivyo bariko barabona. Abihweza ibintu n'ibindi babona ko iyaba ivyo vyabereye mu Bushinwa, uko vyari kugenda kwose ntibabireka ngo vyerekanwe. Imyiyerekano iyo ari yo yose, n'aho yoba ari mito cane, nta binyamakuru vyubahuka kubivuga. Amashirahamwe aharanira agateka ka zina muntu ashira ico gihugu mu myanya ya nyuma nka kimwe mu bihugu bihonyanga uburenganzira bwo kumenyesha no kuronswa amakuru. Ubu rero ibinyamakuru vyinshi vyo mu Bushinwa n'abakoresha imbuga hwaniro baronse akaryo keza kunegura Amerika ko ivyo inenga Ubushinwa ko nayo ari vyo ikora. Leta y'Ubushinwa ivuga ko ihanganye bikomeye n'imigumuko iri muri Hong Kong, ikibaza igituma Amerika irwanya igikorwa c'igipolisi muri Hong Kong, mbere ikavuga ko Ubushinwa buhonyanga ubwigenge bw'abanyagihugu kuva mu mezi aheze. Abashinwa benshi bakoresha urubuga hwaniro Sina Weido babona ko ibiriko biraba muri Amerika vyerekana ko "ubwigenge bwapfuye". Eka n'abaca ku mbuga ngurukanabumenyi nabo nyene bavuga ko "igipolisi ca Amerika cataye ubuntu bwose", mu gihe za radiyo na televiziyo vyegukira leta bivuga ko igipolisi ca Amerika gikubagura birenze abo bita "abari mu myiyerekano bitekaniye".

Perezida Magufuli na minisitiri w'intebe Majaliwa Bwana Majaliwa yavuze ko abo bantu 66 bari mu bitaro mu turere 10 tw'igihugu, yongeraho ko utundi turere 16 nta muntu ufite iki cyorezo uhari. Mu minshi ishize Perezida John Magufuli yari yatangaje ko "nta coronavirus ikiri muri iki gihugu" kubera amasengesho y'abaturage. Mu kwezi gushize, Ambasade ya Amerika yaburiye ko mu mujyi wa Dar es Salaam ibitaro byaho "byuzuriranye" kandi ko ibyago byo kwandura iki cyorezo muri uwo muyi biri hejuru cyane - gusa ntiyatangaje ibyo ishingiraho yemeza ibi. Mu ijambo rye ejo kuwa mbere, minisitiri w'intebe yavuze ko imibare y'abanduye mu gihugu yagabanutse. Asaba abaturage gukomeza ingamba zatangajwe zo kwirinda gukwiza iyi virus. Umubare w'abantu bose hamwe banduye coronavirus muri Tanzania ntabwo uzwi neza. Tariki 29 z'ukwezi kwa kane ubwo baheruka gutangaza imibare leta yavugaga abanduye bose ari 509 na 21 yishe. Tariki 01 z'uku kwezi kwa gatandatu, minisitiri w'ubuzima Madamu Ummy Mwalimu yavuze ko muri Dar Salaam hari abarwayi bane gusa. Amashuri yisumbuye, amakuru na za kaminuza yongeye gufungura tariki 01 z'uku kwezi, imikino nayo yongeye kwemererwa gutangira.

Muri uru ruririmbo uyu musore agaruka ku ruhara iyi radio yagize mu guhuza imiryango muri kahise mu bihe vy'intambara zo muri kano karere. Agatera akamo abanyagihugu baho eka n'abo muri Afrika kwirinda ibibacanishamwo. Ururirimbo "BBC Radiyo yacu" ni rumwe mu ndirimbo zigize urukurikirane umusore Didier Nkengurutse, w'imyaka 32, agiye gusohora mu misi iri imbere. Yaganiriye na BBC maze arasigura icatumye akoresha amafaranga yiwe n'umwanya mukurutunganya. Yagize ati: "Icatumye nandika uru ruririmbo ni urukundo nabonye kuri BBC. Aha mfatira kuvyo nayibonyeko mu ntambara zagiye ziba mu karere k'ibiyaga binini mu myaka iheze aho wasanga imiryango yasanzaye kubera intureka. "Umwana agahunga ukwiwe, abavyeyi bakaja ukwabo. Abamenyeshamakuru ba BCC baraza mu nkambi bagaha ijambo nk'umwana akamenyesha abiwabo ko akiriho akababwira n'iyo bomuronderera. Vyarankozeko". Didier Nkengurutse akora mu gahogo no ku murya, aririmba BBC Radiyo Yacu Kanda ngaha wumvirize indirimbo yose Ururirimbo «BBC radio yacu» nirwo rero ruri kw'isonga ry'urukurikirane Didier Nkengurutse yajanye muri studio, urwo ruririmbo ruri mu mudiho w'ikinyafrika mbere ruza rumaze gutungana. Mu gihe ibihugu vyo mu karere k'ibiyaga binini n'ivyo ku mugabane wa afrika bikunda kurangwamwo inryane, umusore Didier yipfuza kubona abarundi, abanyarwanda n'abanyafrika bose babanye mu mahoro.

Uyu mudepite amaze gufungwa kenshi no guhagarikirwa ibitaramo inshuro nyinshi, akavuga ko yanakorewe iyicarubozo Wine avuga ati: "Iminsi ibiri namaze mfunze nayikoresheje nandika indirimbo ubu ngeneye abo mu nzego z'umutekano". Depite Robert Kyagulanyi Ssentamu uzwi cyane muri muzika nka Bobi Wine kuwa mbere yafashwe na polisi nyuma yo kubuzwa igitaramo cye maze afungirwa iwe iminsi ibiri. Wine utavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi bwa Perezida Museveni yifuza impinduka, anenga ubutegetsi gukenesha no gukandamiza abaturage, gukoresha igitugu no kugirira nabi abatavuga rumwe nabwo. Uyu mudepite amaze gufungwa kenshi no guhagarikirwa ibitaramo inshuro nyinshi, akanavuga ko yakorewe iyicarubozo, ivyo leta ya Uganda yamagana. Perezida Museveni aherutse kubwira abahanzi ko bakwiye gutandukanya umuziki na Politiki. Gusa na we mu bukangurambaga no kwiyamamaza akunda gukoresha muzika. Nyumayo kurekurwa aho yari afungiye iwe, kuri uyu wa kane Bobi Wine yasohoye indirimbo avuga ko 'bashimira abashinzwe umutekano ku kurinda igihugu, ariko abasaba kureka guhohotera uburenganzira bwa rubanda'. Bobi Wine (wambaye ingofero itukura) ubwo yatabwaga muri yombi na polisi ya Uganda Mu myivumbagatanyo iheruka yamagana ko Perezida Museveni yemererwa kwiyamamariza manda ya gatandatu, abantu benshi bahohotewe n'inzego z'umutekano, benshi barakubitwa abandi barafungwa. Muri iyi ndirimbo Bobi Wine ati "Urankorera iyicarubozo kandi ndi umuvandimwe wawe. Sindwana nawe ndiho ndakurwanirira, ibidutsikamiye nibyo bigutsikamiye". Aya mashusho y'urugomo rwakozwe n'abashinzwe umutekano niyo yiganje muri iyi ndirimbo ye nshya. Muri iyi ndirimbo iri mu giswahili n'ikigande abwira "Afande" ati "Urankubitira iki ko tudatandukanye? Urampora iki ko nta kibazo dufitanye? Mbere yo kuba 'afande' uri umuturage". Mu ndirimbo ye avuga ko ibibazo bye ari nabyo bya 'Afande', kandi mubo ari kurwanirira na we arimo, ngo abana be n'umugore we bagire ejo heza. Iyi ndirimbo nyuma y'amasaha macye isohotse yarebwe inshuro ibihumbi mirongo kuri YouTube.

Ibice 62.4% vy'abanyagihugu ba Escobares mu ntara ya Texas, baba munsi y'umurongo w'ubukene, nkuko biri muri rusansuma yakozwe Ico gisagara kiri ku nkengera z'uruzi Rio Grande - urubibe rutandukanya igihugu ca Mexique na Amerika - nticigeze gishigwa ku rutonde rw'ibisagara bikenye muri Amerika kubera ko gifise abanyagihugu bake ( 2512), kubera kandi ko gifatwa nka gito cane bigatuma kidaharugwa iyo hageze rusansuma. Ariko iyo umuntu aravye ibisagara vya Amerika bifise nimiburiburi abanyagihugu 1000, Escobares ifise ibice 62,4 % vy'abanyagihugu bari munsi y'umurongo w'ubukene ku matohoza yakozwe n'ikigo kijejwe rusansuma, Census Bureau. "Hari igihe tubura ico dufungura, ariko Imana iranfasha incuti zikantumira gufungura, ariko sindabikunda," ni ibivugwa na Debora Hernández, umunyagihugu wo muri Amerika, yavutse yongera akurira mu gace katabamwo abungere (cowboys), katabamwo ibitungwa bisanzwe bifasha abanyagihugu kwikenura. Nta congereza avuga kandi ntazi no gusoma. Débora Hernández, umunyamerikakazi yavukiye i Escobares avuga ati: "Hari igihe tubura ico dufungura," "Nari mfise abana indwi, batandatu barapfuye. Ndacafise Berenice, ku bw'Imana muganga yaramurokoye." None abana bawe bishwe n'iki? Avuga yitonze asa n'uwutanyuzwe yishuye ati: "Sinzi, sinigeze mbwigwa icabishe, nta n'inkaratasi bampaye, nibaza ko bishwe n'abaganga." Ntavyo azi. Mu vyukuri ntazi ingene vyagenze. Bashobora kuba bishwe n'ingwara ituruka ku koko, canke ugusamara kwiwe. Ntavyo azi kandi ashobora no kutazigera abimenya kuberako atabitegera. Igihe yarakiri muto, yarajanywe kw'ishuli ry'abana bafise ingorane, araheza amashuli y'intango, ariko avuga ko ata kintu kinini yize. Benshi mu banyagihugu baba i Escobares bafise amamuko yo mu gihugu ca Espagne Mu bisanzwe Débora ntazi neza ingene ivyo kw'isi bizunguruka. Abana n'umugabo adafise akazi kuva mu kwezi kwa cumi, hamwe n'umukobwa wiwe w'imyaka itatu, Berenice. Inzu babamwo irava iyo imvura iguye, indani ubona ibintu bidapanze neza, ariko akizera ko hazogira umunsi ibintu bigahinduka. "Dutegerezwa kuva muri bino ... ahandi ho ntituzoronka ico dufungura." Uretse ivyashara bikoregwa kw'ibarabara rikuru rya 83 (rifatanya Laredo na Harlingen, mu kiyaya ca Rio Grande), nta kandi kazi gashobora kuboneka i Escobares. Biba ngombwa ko abanyagihugu baja kurondera akazi mu bindi bisagara. Uwitwa Homero Rosales agira ati: "Kuri twe dufise inkaratasi, tuja kurondera akazi mu buraruko." Abanyagihugu benshi nka Homero Rosales baja gukorera hanze Abandanya ati: "Ikibi nuko uca uta umuryango ukwezi, abiri canke atatu, ariko bitegerezwa kumera ukwo, dutegerezwa kugenda ... ahandi ho ntitwofungura. Homero afise abana bane, agakora mu gisagara ca Pecos, ku masaha icenda uvuye i Escobares, aho bubaka ibigega vy'ibitoro mu burengero bwa Texas. "Nta wukija kw'ishuli, umuhungu wanje w'imfura turakorana kubera ko ataho yokora hano." Ikarata yerekana aho igisagara ca Escobares kiri Abataja gukora mu bigega vy'ibitoro canke ngo baronke akazi mu bisagara biri hafi, babeshejweho n'uburyo bwa leta kugira ngo baronke ico bafungura. Abandi bakora amezi make, munyuma bagahabwa amahera avuye mu bwishingizi bafashe. Abandi nta nico babivugako. Umwumwe wese agerageza kwigwanako, mu gace usanga ata n'uburyo bwo kwunguruza abantu buhari, ibitaro n'ubundi buzi bwa ngombwa, ku birometero ibihumbi uvuye Wall Street kandi mukoresha idarapo rimwe. Muri Amerika hari imanga nini hagati y'abakene n'abatunze, ibitigiri bitangwa na leta bikavuga ko ibice 12.3% arivyo bigizwe n'abantu bakenye bashika ku miliyoni 40. Ibice 12.3% vy'abanyagihugu ba Amerika bashika imiliyoni 40 baba munsi y'umurongo w'ubukene Mu kiganiro umushakashatsi Rakesh Kochhar yagiranye na BBC yavuze ati: "Abantu benshi bakenye bagwiriranye mu bumanuko bw'igihugu." Ama leta akenye kurusha ayandi ni Mississippi, Louisiana na New Mexico, mu gihe, "abantu bafise amamuko yo muri Espagne hamwe n'abirabure aribo benshi bari mu bakenye," nkuko vyabandanijwe bivugwa na Kochhar. "Ubu turafise imodoka ya kizimyamwoto" Mu myaka 13 irangiye igisagara ca Escobares nticabaho. Mu 2005 niho hashingwa itegeko ko kibaye igisagara, mu gihe imbere yaho abantu bo muri Escobares ata karere na kamwe bakukira ku bijanye n'intwaro. Wovuze ko "ari ubutaka butagira nyenebwo". Ariko kuva igihe abantu bahaba bumviye ko igisagara ca Roma kibanyi kiriko kirondera kwiyomekako Escobares, ibintu vyaciye bihinduka. Igihe babonye ko ataco bazunguka muri uwo mugambi w'abo babanyi, baciye bahagurukira ico kibazo. Escobares cabaye igisagara mu 2005, abanyagihugu babo bagiye hamwe bagasaba ukwikukira ku bijanye n'intwaro "Kubera iki tutogira igisagara cacu?", ukwo nikwo bibaza. Ivyo nivyo bahavuye bakora. Barashushanije ku rukaratasi imbibe z'ico gisagara, barondera kumenya ingene igisagara gitangura. Baridogeye abo babanyi, munyuma batunganya amatora yo kurondera umukuru w'igisagara ca Escobares: Noel Escobar aba ariwe atogwa. "Bitewe nuko twaronse igisagara, ubu turafise ikamyo ya kizimyamwoto, abapolisi batanu n'ikamyo imwe iseha umucafu," nkuko bishikirizwa n'umukuru w'igisagara. Noel Escobar niwe mukuru w'igisagara wa mbere w'igisagara ca Escobares "Twararonse amahera duhawe n'ubutegetsi bw'igihugu cose hamwe n'ideni ngo dukore amabarabara n'imiserege." "Twaronse ivyo vyose ku nguvu zacu," niko uwo mugabo w'imyaka 83 bita "El Mayor" avuga. Mu gisagara ca Escobares havugwa ururimi rw'iki Espagnol, abantu baho bakunze gufungura indya zitwa tacos, bagakunda umuzika witwa ranchera. Wokwibaza ko ari agace ka Mexique kari muri Amerika, aho urubibe rutandukanya ivyo bihugu bibiri ari uruzi, Rio Grande. Escobares iri ku nkengera y'urwo ruzi. Rio Grande ni uruzi rugabura Mexique na Amerika Ku nkengera z'urwo ruzi uhabona imbwa nyinshi, kajugujugu iguma ica mu kirere n'imodoka y'abapolisi igenzura akarere. Mu kirere hari icuma kirereka bita "radar", gikurikirana ibiba vyose. "Murabona hano mpagaze, niho abimukira hamwe n'abinjiza ibiyovyabwenge baca," nkuko Ruperto Escobar avuga. "Rimwe na rimwe urumva urwamo rw'amasasu mw'ijoro." "Iyo amazi agabanutse, abantu bajabuka batambuka." Itongo rya Ruperto Escobar rigarukira ku ruzi Rio Grande Ku bantu batarashika aho hantu, bomenya ko ubwaguke bw'urwo ruzi ari imetero 20 gusa. Ku bijanye n'umugambi wa Perezida Trump, Ruperto agira ati: "Nico gituma nanje nshima ko hokwubakwa uruhome, naho tutavuga rumwe na benshi mu baba hano." Ibice 98% vy'abanyagihugu baba muri Escobares n'abafise amamuko yo muri Espagne hamwe na Mexique. Ubiravye Escobares ntisa naho ari igisagara ca mbere gikenye muri Amerika. Nta bantu batwawe n'ibiyovyabwenge nk'abo usanga mu mabarabara ya Los Angeles, canke ngo ubone abakenye kubera ikumigwa nk'abo usanga i Detroit na Baltimore. Ariko iyo winjiye mu mabarabara buhoro buhoro urabona inzu bita - "trailer- houses" ushobora kwunguruza ugatwara aho wipfuza. Umukozi Raúl Renovato w'imyaka 31 yaje ava mu gihugu ca Mexique afise imyaka 6, aba muri imwe mw'izo nzu hamwe n'umupfasoni wiwe n'abana biwe bane. Agira ati: "Ino si ya Amerika nahora ndota." "Ariko uwipfuza gutera imbere, aratera imbere." Raúl Renovato yavuze ati: "Ino siyo Amerika narota." Raúl akora mw'ishirahamwe riseha umucafu mu gisagara ca Roma, akaba afise umugambi wo kwugurura akazu gato k'uburiro, komuha amahera iruhande y'umushahara. Agira ati: "Ndanezerezwa n'akazi nkora, nta manyanga karimwo." Ako kazi niko katumye agura inzu abamwo yashizemwo n'ivyuma vyo gushusha no gukanyisha inzu. Uburongozi bwa Escobares hamwe n'ibiro vy'igipolisi biri mu nyubakwa yunguruzwa bikenewe "office-trailer", kuberako izimbutse mu kuba yubatswe n'ibikoresho bibayabaye bitazimvye. Inzu zimugwa ziragwiriye cane mu gisagara ca Escobares Iruhande y'ikamyo yo kuzimya umuriro, iyo gutwara umucafu, ikindi ubona i Escobares ni ibiro bijejwe iterambere hamwe n'inyubakwa y'amakoraniro. Umukuru w'igisagara avuga ko hagikenewe vyinshi muri ako gace. Avuga ati: "Dukeneye ko hazi ishirahamwe rikomeye kugira ngo turonke akazi." "Nipfuza kubona Escobares irimwo ivyashara vyinshi, ubuzi, ikibuga co kuruhukiramwo, ibarabara rikuru hamwe n'ubuzi abanyagihugu baba bakeneye." "Uku nikwo mbona kazoza."

Ifoto ya Juvénal Musabyimana yatangajwe n'ingabo za DR Congo Ubutumwa bwo ku rubuga rwa Twitter rw'ingabo za Kongo (FARDC) buvuga ko Musabyimana yishwe ejo ku wa gatandatu nyuma ya saa sita z'amanywa mu gikorwa cy'umutwe w'ingabo zo gutabara byihuse. FARDC ivuga ko ibyo byabereye hagati y'akarere ka Binza na Makoka, muri teritwari ('territoire') ya Rutshuru, muri Kivu y'amajyaruguru. Ntacyo FDLR yari yatangaza kuri ayo makuru. Si byinshi bizwi kuri Musabyimana, gusa amakuru avuga ko yabaye mu ngabo ku butegetsi bwa Juvénal Habyarimana wahoze ari Perezida w'u Rwanda. Mu kwezi kwa cyenda, ingabo za Kongo zatangaje ko zishe Sylvestre Mudacumura wari umukuru w'ibikorwa bya gisirikare bya FDLR, zivuga ko urugamba rutarangiriye aho. FDLR yavuze ko iyicwa rya Mudacumura ryagizwemo uruhare n'ingabo z'u Rwanda (RDF) - ibyo u Rwanda n'ingabo za Kongo byahakanye.

Ngo bagabye icyo gitero bagera muri magana abiri kandi benshi muribo bari bitwaje intwaro zikomeye. Abantu benshi bamaze guhunga. Mu kwezi gushize kwa cumi na kumwe, abapolisi bagera kuri mirongo ine bishwe n'ayo mabandi yiba amatungo. Kuwa gatanu, inteko nshingamateka yasabye leta ya Kenya gushyiraho akanama gashinzwe gukora iperere kuri ubwo bwicanyi bwakorewe abapolisi, ubwicanyi bwabaye ubwa mbere mu mateka y'igihugu.

Barack Obama yaharaniye guca itungwa ry'imbunda mu baturage ariko ntiyabigeraho Bwana Obama nta muntu yavuze mu izina, ariko aya magambo ye y'imbonekarimwe ayavuze mu gihe Perezida Donald Trump w'Amerika yashatse kwikuraho abamunenga ko imvugo ye ijyanye no kurwanya abimukira yateje ibikorwa by'urugomo. Mu ijambo yavuze ejo ku wa mbere, Bwana Trump yamaganye urwango ndetse n'abumva ko abazungu basumba abandi baturage. Yavuze iryo jambo nyuma yaho abantu 31 bapfiriye mu iraswa ryibasiye imbaga i Texas na Ohio. Mu gihe yari ku butegetsi - cya manda ebyiri zemewe n'itegekonshinga ry'Amerika cyo guhera mu mwaka wa 2009 kugera mu wa 2017, Bwana Obama yaharaniye guca itungwa ry'imbunda mu baturage ariko ntiyabigeraho. Mu mwaka wa 2015, yabwiye BBC ko kunanirwa "gushyiraho amategeko yo gutunga imbunda mu buryo bushyira mu gaciro bubungabunga umutekano" ari cyo kintu cyamushavuje kurusha ibindi byose mu gihe yamaze ari Perezida. Bwana Obama yirinze kuvuga ku magambo ya Bwana Trump yateje impaka ajyanye n'abimukira, ariko ejo ku wa mbere yasohoye itangazo. 'Kwamagana imvugo ihembera icyuka cy'ubwoba n'urwangano' Muri iryo tangazo yagize ati: "Dukwiye kwamagana dukomeje imvugo iva mu minwa y'umuyobozi uwo ari we wese ihembera icyuka cy'ubwoba n'urwango cyangwa ituma ivanguramoko rifatwa nk'ikintu gisanzwe kitagize icyo gitwaye". "[Dukwiye kwamagana] Abayobozi baharabika abo tudasa, cyangwa bagaca amarenga ko abandi bantu, barimo n'abimukira, babangamiye imibereho yacu, cyangwa bagafata abandi bantu nk'ikiremwamuntu kidashyitse, cyangwa bagaca amarenga ko Amerika ari iy'ubwoko bumwe bw'abantu". "Nta mwanya bafite muri politike yacu cyangwa mu buzima bwacu. Kandi igihe kirageze ko benshi mu Banyamerika b'umutima mwiza, bo mu bwoko bwose n'imyemerere yose n'abo mu ishyaka rya politike iryo ari ryo ryose, babamagana uko bikwiye bandi batarya iminwa". Mu gihe yiyamamarizaga kuba Perezida, Bwana Trump yavuze ko abimukira baturuka muri Mexico ari abicanyi ndetse bafata abagore n'abakobwa ku ngufu. Mu gihe cya vuba gishize, yateje uburakari ubwo yavugaga ko abagore bane bo mu nteko ishingamategeko y'Amerika batari abazungu "basubira iyo bavuye hangiritse kandi huzuye ibyaha bakahazahura". Yahakanye ko ayo magambo ye yari arimo ivanguramoko.

Abanywa amararo y'abantu muri Malawi ngo baba barondera ubutunzi Abantu bashika umunani baramaze kwicwa mu ndwi nkeyi ziheze bagirijwe kunywa amaraso y'abantu. Ishirahamwe mpuzamakungu ONU ryarakuye abakozi baryo mu bice bimwe vy'igihugu kubera imvo z'umutekano. Vyibazwa ko hari abakoresha amaraso y'abantu mu bikorwa vy'ubupfumu kugira baronke ubutunzi. Ico gihuha bivugwa ko catanguriye mu gihugu kibanyi ca Mozambique, gikwiragira mu bice vyinshi vya Malawi. Soma andi makuru kuri Malawi:

Birakekwa ko uyu mugabo yahanutse mu ndege ya Kenya Airways yarimo yururuka ku cyumweru i London Umurambo w'uyu mugabo wabonywe ku cyumweru nimugoroba. Birakekwa ko yahanutse mu gice cy'amapine y'indege ya Kenya Airways yari ivuye i Nairobi igeze i London nk'uko polisi ibivuga. Uturiye ikibuga cy'indege, yavuze ko uyu muntu yaguye kuri metero imwe gusa hafi y'umuturanyi we warimo yota izuba. Uyu mugabo utifuje gutangazwa, yavuze ko yumvise ikintu kituye hasi agahita arebera mu idirishya riri hejuru akabona umurambo w'umuntu n'amaraso yuzuye hose mu busitani. Ati: "Nahise nsohoka, umuturanyi wanjye nawe yahise asohoka kuko yari afite ubwoba bwinshi". Polisi yavuze ko igiye gukora iperereza, ariko kugeza ubu urupfu rw'uyu muntu ivuga ko itarushidikanyaho. Kenya Airways yatangaje ko indege bivugwa ko uyu mugabo yahanutsemo yagenzuwe bagasanga nta kibazo na kimwe yagize. Gusa ubwo yari imaze kugera hasi ngo basanze igikapu, amazi n'ibiryo mu mwanya ubamo amapine y'indege. Umurambo we wabonywe mu busitani buri hafi y'uyu muhanda wa Offerton Road, mu karere ka Clapham Umuvugizi w'iyi kompanyi yavuze ko urugendo rwa Nairobi - London rureshya na kilometero 6,840 rumara amasaha umunani n'iminota 50, ko bibabaje kuba umuntu yarugiyemo mu buryo budakwiye. Ati: "Birababaje kuba umuntu yihishe ku ndege akahaburira ubuzima. Kenya Airways iri gukora iperereza kuri iki kibazo". Urupfu nk'uru si ubwa mbere rubaye ku kibuga cy'indege cya Heathrow i London. Mu 2015, hari umugabo basanze hejuru y'inzu yapfuye naho mugenzi we amerewe nabi cyane mu gihe bombi bari bihishe ku ndege ya kompanyi ya British Airways yari ivuye Johannesburg ijya i London. Mu 2012, undi mugabo basanze yapfuye ari mu gice kibikwamo imizigo mu ndege ubwo yari igeze Heathrow ivuye Cape Town muri Afurika y'Epfo.

Trump yiyemeje gufatira ingingo ruhasha Syria kubera ibitero vy'ubumara "Dufise uburyo bwinshi bwa gisirikare," ni ko yabwiye abamenyeshamakuru. Yongeyeko ko ingingo yo kwishura kuri ico gitero iza gufatwa mu 'mwanya muto'. Inkuru zivuga ko abantu mirongo biciwe muri ico gitero, ariko igitigiri nyaco ntikiramenyekana. Ingwano ikomeye muri Syria yatumye abantu bahunga ari benshi Trump kandi yaraganiriye ivyerekeye ico gitero na mugenzi we w'Ubufaransa, Emmanuel Macron ku musi wa mbere ku mugoroba, abo bategetsi bose bemeranya kwishura kuri 'ico gitero'. Uwuserukira Amerika muri Onu, Nikki Haley yavuze ko abashigikiye igisirikare ca Syria bafise 'amaraso y'abana ba Syria' mu biganza vyabo. Umushikiranganji wa mbere w'Ubwongereza, Theresa May yavuze ko "yiyamirije yivuye inyuma" ico bitero "c'ububisha" kivugwa ko ari ico ubumara, anasaba ko abafashe mu mugongo Bashar al-Assad bobibazwa. Amajambo yo kwiyamiriza ico gitego y'ibihugu vya Buraya yakurikiye inama y'ikitaraganya y'akanama ka Onu kajejwe umutekano kw'isi, aho Amerika n'Uburusiya bateranye amajambo kubera ico gitero c'i Douma. Ingabo za Turukiya zafashe agace ka Afrin muri Syria Uwuserukira Amerika muri Onu, Nikki Haley yavuze ko abashigikiye igisirikare ca Syria bafise 'amaraso y'abana ba Syria' mu biganza vyabo. Uwuserukira Uburusiya muri Onu Vassily Nebenzia yavuze ko ikivugwa ko ari igitero c'ubumara categuwe. Umupfasoni Haley yasavye ko hotorwa umugwi woja kugira amatohoza kuri iryo koreshwa ry'ibigwanisho vy'ubumara muri Syria ku musi wa kabiri. Ariko Uburusiya bwavuze ko budashobora gushigikira iyo ngingo kuko harimwo ibice bidashobora gushigikirwa.

Ico gitero kibaye amafungo ya ramazani agira arangire Igipolisi cabwiye BBC ko iyo bombe yaturikiye kw'irembo ry'ibanki New Kabul Bank, ahitwa Lashkar Gah. Abasivile hamwe na bamwe mu bajejwe umutekano bari mu bahitanywe n'iyo bombe. Nta muntu canke umugwi uremanga ico gitero, ariko abatalibani hamwe n'umugwi wa leta y'iki Islamu "Islamic State" nibo bamaze bagaba ibitero muri ano mezi ya vuba. Umuyobozi bw'ibitaro vya Lashkar Gah, Mawladad Tabedar, yabwiye BBC ko igitigiri c'abapfuye canke bakomeretse gishobora kuduga.

Nicky (ibubamfu) na Laura (iburyo) bompi bahanganye na kanseri y'ibere yo mu gice ca 4 Abongerezakazi Nicky Newman na Laura Middleton-Hughes, bompi b'imyaka 31, bafise kanseri igeze ku rugero rugira kane. Bisigura ko igeze ku rugero rwo gukwiragira mu bindi bice vy'umubiri nk'amagufa, amahaha, igitigu (canke umwijima mu Kinyarwanda) canke ubwonko. Igihe Nicky wo mu karere ka Guildford yabwirwa ko kanseri yiwe idashobora gukira kubera yari igeze ku rugero rwo hejuru, avuga ko vyatumye agira "ubwoba budasanzwe". Abo bagore bompi bizeye ko iryo shirahamwe ryabo rikorera ku rubuga ngurukanabumenyi rizofasha abandi bazoronka inkuru mbi nk'iyi guhangana nayo. Laura ava i Norwich avuga ko gushinga iryo shirahamwe vyabahaye "akaryo keza k'ukuganira ku vyerekeye kanseri yacu". Ati: "Twempi tubona ko dufise kazoza kadatomoye, ariko turafise kazoza kandi tuzobaho uko nyene". "Rero mu gihe twoshobora gufasha n'umuntu n'umwe gusa kwumva amahoro, akumva ko ari umuntu nk'abandi, ico kirahagije". Abo bagore bompi, bakorana n'umugambi wiswe Stand Up To Cancer. Ni umugambi w'isekeza ry'ukwegeranya amahera watunganijwe n'ikigo co mu Bwongereza ca Cancer Research UK kijejwe kurwanya kanseri, hamwe na televiziyo Channel 4. Nicky yagiye kumenya ko afise ikivyimba mw'ibere igihe yari yagiye kwivuza ari kumwe n'umugabo wiwe. Avuga ko yari yavyiketse n'imbere y'uko abimubwira, aravye ingene muganga yahindutse mu maso. Ibipimo vyo mu cuma birerekana umubiri wa Nicky ufise utudomagu twera twerekana ingene iyo kanseri yakwiragiye mu mubiri Mu gihe yariko arapimwa, yavuze ko yumva ababara mu mugongo, ariho yaca arungikwa ku muhinga afotora mu mubiri. Ati: "Umuganga yambwiye ati: 'Sha nta kundi, ntaco nshobora kugufasha'. Vyaciye bintera ubwoba bwinshi". Ariko, yaciye amuha umuti witwa Palbociclib wari uherutse kwemerwa n'ikigo NHS kijejwe amagara y'abantu mu Bwongereza. Imiti bariko barafata ishobora kuba yaratumye iyo ndwara itabandanya ikwiragira mu mubiri, ariko ikaba yatumye batazigera bavyara. Nicky avuga ko igihe yava kwa muganga, yari ababajwe cane n'uko atazoronka akaryo ko kwitwa umuvyeyi gusumba kurwara kanseri. Mugenziwe Laura yagiye kumenya ko arwaye kanseri yo mw'ibere mu mwaka wa 2014 mu gihe yari mu karuhuko bakamutora ikivyimba. Baciye bamukura ibere rimwe baranamuvura, kandi arakira neza. Hagati aho, mu kwezi kwa kane 2016, niho yumva ububabare ku rutugu i buryo bwaguma bwongerekana, baca bamurungika gucishwa mu cuma agapimwa. Niho basanga afise ikivyimba ku mutwe w'igufa bita 'humerus' rifatanya urutugu n'inkokora. Ati: "Nagize ubwoba budasanzwe, 2016 wambereye umwaka mubi, umwaka mubi n'ukuri!" Laura afise ibimenyetso vya kanseri y'amabere vyakwiragiye mu ruti rw'umugongo, mu magufa afatanye narwo no mu gice c'urukenyerero n'amayunguyungu. Avuga ati: "Hagati aho, ndashima ko imiti ndiko ndafata iriko iramfasha kubandanya mbaho".

Abaharurwa mu majana bavugwa ko boba bamaze kuhasiga ubuzima, nayo abandi baharurwa mu bihumbi bakaba barateshejwe izabo n'iyi ntambara Avuga ko igisirikare kizogerageza kutagirira nabi abasivire anasaba abanyagihugu bo muri ico gisagara kuguma mu ngo zabo, Atangaje ibi inyuma y'uko ikiringo yari yahaye abarwanyi ba Tigray ngo babe bamanitse amaboko kirangiriye ejo ku wa gatatu. Umugambwe TPLF usanzwe urongoye Mekelle urarahira ukarengwa ko utegerezwa kubandanya intambara. Abantu baharurwa mu majana nibo bavugwa ko boba bamaze kuhasiga ubuzima, nayo abandi baharurwa mu bihumbi bakaba barateshejwe izabo mu gihe ingabo za Ethiopia zimaze kwigarurira ibisagara bitari bike vya Tigray vyari mu minwe ya TPLF. Biragoye kwemeza amakuru ku bijanye n'iyi ntambara kubera amaterefone n'itumatumanako muri Tigray vyugawe. Intumwa zitatu z'umuryango w'Ubumwe bwa Afrika zashitse ku mugwa mukuru wa Ethiopia Addis Abeba kugira ngo zigerageze kwumvikanisha impande zompi, ariko Ethiopia ntiyerekwa ivy'ibiganiro, ikavuga ko iyi ntambara ari ikibazo ca Ethiopia bwite, kandi ko leta yiwe yiyemeje kugarukana ubutegetsi muri Tigray. Izi ntumwa zitatu ntizizokwemererwa gushika muri Tigray. Umushikiranganji wa mbere Abiy avuga iki? Yategetse igisirikare ca Ethiopia gukora igitero kuri Mekelle - igisagara gituwemwo n'abantu 500,000 - mu "gice ca nyuma" c'urugamba rw'igisirikare ca Ethiopia kuri TPLF. Bwana Abiy avuga ko bizokorwa mu "bwitonzi bwinshi" kugira ngo bakingire abasivire kandi ko "bazokwigora uko bashoboye kwose" kugira ngo ntihagire vyinshi vyononekara i Mekelle. Ku ma stations y'igitoro hibonekeza imirongo miremire y'amamodoka atondeye igitoro muri kino gisagara ca Mekelle gifise abantu 500,000 Asaba abanyagihugu ba Mekelle n'ababa mu micungararo yaho gusubiza ibirwanisho, bakaguma mu ngo zabo, kandi bakigira kure y'ibirindiro vya gisirikare. Avuga ko ibigo ndangakahise n'ivyegukira amadini, hamwe n'uburere butuwemwo n'abanyagihugu bitazoterwa. TPLF yishura iki ? Umukuru w'uyu mugambwe ukomeye muri ako karere, Debretsion Gebremichael, avuga ko ingabo za Tigray "ziteguye gupfira ibanga mu gukingira" uburenganzira bwabo bwo kurongora ako karere. Abarwanyi ba TPLF basanzwe bakomoka mu murwi witwara gisirikare n'iyindi mirwi y'abarwanyi bo muri ako karere bigishijwe cane ivya gisirikare, boba baharurwa mu b250.000. Abihweza ibintu n'ibindi bafise ubwoba ko iyi ntambara ishobora gukwira hose. Amashirahamwe y'abagiraneza afise ubwoba ko iyi ntambara ishobora guteza ibibazo vy'ubutabazi no guhungabanya akarere k'ihembe rya Afrika. Ishirahamwe mpuzamakungu ONU ritewe impungenge z'uko hashobora kwaduka intambara ikomeye mu gihe ingabo za Ethiopia zotera Mekelle, rikanagabisha ko hashobora kuba n'ivyaha vyo mu ntambara. Umurwi w'igihugu ujejwe agateka ka zina muntu uragiriza umuhari w'urwaruka wa Tigray ko ari wo wakoze ubwicanyi mu ntango z'uku kwezi aho abasivire barenga 600 bishwe. Uyu murwi uvuga ko uyu muhari ufadikanije n'abarwanyi b'ako karere, wishe abantu baba mu gisagara ca Mai-Kadra ariko batavuga ko ntara ya Tigray mu kubacumita, kubakubita ibibando no kubaturira gushika aho bapfa. Ariko TPLF yoyo irahakana ko ata ruhara ibifisemwo, isagaba ko haba amatohoza mpuzamakungu yigenga.

Misa yitabiriwe n'abatari bacye nubwo yabaye ku wa mbere ku munsi w'akazi Buri mwaka ku itariki ya 3 y'ukwezi kwa gatandatu, ni umunsi w'abahowe Imana b'i Bugande. Abakristu gatolika benshi bahurira aho biciwe i Namugongo, harimo n'abavuye mu mahanga benshi. Padiri Jean Damascène Maniraho, umunyamabanga mukuru wungirije w'inama y'abepiskopi mu Rwanda, yabwiye BBC ko Abanyarwanda "bisanzwe ko uyu munsi bajyayo [muri Uganda] ari benshi". Uyu munsi ariko abava mu Rwanda ntibagiyeyo kubera amakimbirane ya politiki amaze igihe hagati y'ibihugu byombi. Umunyamakuru wa BBC Patricia Oyella uri i Kampala avuga ko umutegetsi wo mu karere ka Kisoro yavuze ko abakristu 160 bavuye mu Rwanda mu gitondo cyo ku cyumweru bangiwe kwambuka umupaka, benshi bagatabaza inshuti n'abavandimwe babo bari muri Uganda. Olivier Nduhungirehe, umunyamabanga wa leta muri minisiteri y'ububanyi n'amahanga y'u Rwanda, yavuze ko ayo makuru y'Abanyarwanda bangiwe kwambuka bajya gusenga ntayo azi. Uwo munyamakuru wa BBC uri i Kampala avuga ko umwanya wagenewe Abanyarwanda nta wari uwurimo. Abategura aya masengesho bavuze ko hari Abanyarwanda babiri biyandikishije - umubare wagabanutse cyane ugereranyije n'ababarirwa mu magana basanzwe bitabira. Mu kwezi kwa kabiri uyu mwaka, abategetsi b'u Rwanda basohoye itangazo bavuga ko "bagira inama" Abanyarwanda yo kutajya muri Uganda kubera umutekano wabo. I Kigali basomewe misa itari isanzwe Kuko batabashije kujya muri Uganda, abakristu gatolika basomewe misa - itari isanzwe ibaho - yabereye muri Kiliziya ya Mutagatifu Karoli Lwanga i Kigali. Iyi misa yitabiriwe n'abantu benshi nubwo yabaye ari mu masaha y'akazi, harimo benshi basanzwe bajya Namugongo ubu babujijwe kujyayo n'ikibazo cya politiki y'ibihugu byombi. Abari basanzwe bajya mu misa muri Uganda kuri uyu munsi berekeje i Kigali Padiri Nshagaye Gérard wo kuri Paruwasi ya Mutagatifu Karoli Lwanga i Kigali yavuze ko paruwasi yabo yari isanganywe umuco wuko uyu munsi bajya i Bugande kwizihiza uyu munsi mukuru. Yagize ati: "Ubu rero twabonye ko bidashoboka kubera ko Abanyarwanda ubu batari kujya mu gihugu cy'Ubugande biba ngombwa ko twebwe tubikora hano iwacu". Avuga ko Abanyarwanda basanzwe bajyaga muri uru rugendo nyobokamana mu buryo bwinshi. Ko hari abagendaga mbere bakabanza gusura ibice biranga amateka y'abahowe Imana i Bugande bategereje iyi tariki, hakaba n'abagenda hasigaye umunsi umwe bagiye kwizihiza uyu munsi. Abakristu barababaye Umukristu wifuzaga kujya muri uru rugendo muri Uganda yabwiye BBC ati: "Birababaje kubona ifungwa ry'umupaka ritubuza ubwisanzure bwo kujya gusenga". Undi mukristu utifuje ko izina rye ritangazwa avuga ko amaze kujya Namugongo inshuro 13 zikurikiranya mu myaka ishize, ubu akaba ababaye cyane kuba bitamushobokeye kubera ibibazo ibihugu byombi bifitanye. Avuga ko yahisemo kuza mu misa yabereye muri Kiliziya ya Mutagatifu Karoli Lwanga i Kigali kuko hari na bimwe mu bisigazwa by'uyu mutagatifu.

Ntibisobanutse neza urusengero uyu mugabo yiregeyemo Yatawe muri yombi na polisi yo mu mujyi wa Mombasa wegereye inyanja. Ibinyamakuru byo muri Kenya biravuga ko nyuma yo kwatura kw'uwo mugabo utaramenyekana, yemera ko yahoze mu mutwe w'abarwanyi ba kiyisilamu wa Al Shabab, pasiteri yahise abimenyesha inzego za polisi. Igihe yari mu rukiko ku wa Kabiri, abategetsi basabye ko afungwa iminsi 10 kugira ngo polisi irangize iperereza ryayo. Uwo mugabo yavuze ko yagarutse muri Kenya mu minsi ishize avuye muri Somaliya kandi ko afite amakuru ashobora gufasha inzego z'umutekano gukumira ibitero by'iterabwoba. Ikinyamakuru cyo muri Kenya kitwa, The Standard, cyanditse inkuru irimo irimo amagambo yavuzwe n'abashinjacyaha, bavuga ko uregwa afite ubushake bwo gufasha abakora iperereza abaha amakuru yatuma bata muri yombi abarwanyi ba Al Shabab. Abashinjacyaha banze gutangaza umwirondoro w'uwo mugabo cyangwa umupasiteri wamureze ndetse n'urusengero yaturiyemo. Mu mategeko y'idini rya Gatolika, abapadiri babujijwe kuzimura ubwirege bw'abayoboke mu muhango wo kwicuza ibyaha ufatwa nka rimwe mu masakaramentu arindwi agize inkingi z'idini. Ariko ayo mategeko ntabwo areba abapasiteri bo mu yandi madini atemera umuhango wo kwicuza mu ibanga. Abanyamakuru bavuga ko gahunda zo kugorora abantu bahoze mu mutwe wa Al Shabab zashyizweho mu majyaruguru y'uburengerazuba bwa Kenya.

Amerika n'ibihugu bikomeye by'i Burayi byasabye Iran kongera gukurikiza amasezerano ajyanye na nikleyeri yo mu 2015 Muri ayo masezerano yashyizweho umukono mu 2015, Iran yasezeranyije kugabanya gahunda yayo ya nikleyeri na yo igakurirwaho ibihano byo mu rwego rw'ubukungu. Ariko Donald Trump wahoze ari Perezida yakuye Amerika muri aya masezerano mu mwaka wa 2018, bituma Iran igabanya ku byo yari yiyemeje. None ubu Amerika yamenyesheje ko ifite ubushake bwo gusubira muri ayo masezerano, muri iki gihe cy'ubutegetsi bwa Perezida Joe Biden. Ku wa kane, ubutegetsi bwa Biden bwatangaje ukwiyemeza kongera kuganira na Iran kwa mbere guhamye cyane kugeza ubu, muri ayo masezerano azwi nka 'Joint Comprehensive Plan of Action' (JCPOA). Ned Price, umuvugizi w'ibiro by'ububanyi n'amahanga by'Amerika, yavuze ko Amerika yemeye ubutumire bw'umuryango w'Ubumwe bw'Uburayi (EU/UE) bwo guhura na Iran mu biganiro. Enrique Mora, umudipolomate wo ku rwego rwo hejuru wa EU, wemeye gutumiza ibyo biganiro, yavuze ko iki ari "igihe gikomeye" kuri ayo masezerano. Leta ya Iran ntabwo irasubiza mu buryo bweruye kuri icyo gitekerezo cy'isubukurwa ry'ibiganiro cyatanzwe na EU. Ariko, mu butumwa bwo kuri Twitter, Minisitiri w'ububanyi n'amahanga wa Iran Mohammad Javad Zarif yaciye amarenga ko igihugu cye cyakurikiza byuzuye ibikubiye muri ayo masezerano ari uko gusa ibihano by'Amerika bivanyweho. Bimeze gute muri iki gihe? Iran yongereye igitutu ku butegetsi bwa Biden, ikangisha ko mu minsi iri imbere izabuza ubugenzuzi bw'amahanga ku hantu ikorera ibikorwa bya nikleyeri niba Amerika idakuyeho ibihano yayifatiye. Iran ivuga ko gahunda yayo ya nikleyeri igamije amahoro. Imaze igihe yongera ububiko bwayo bwa uranium itunganyije. Iyi uranium itunganyije ishobora gukorwamo ingufu z'amashanyarazi (cyangwa umuyagankuba mu Kirundi), ariko ishobora no gukorwamo ibisasu bya nikleyeri. Mu gusubiza Iran, Amerika n'ibihugu by'inshuti zayo by'i Burayi - Ubwongereza, Ubufaransa n'Ubudage - byasabye Iran kwirinda kuburizamo ubugenzuzi ku ho ikorera ibikorwa bya nikleyeri. Byayiburiye ko ibyo iteganya gukora "byayikoraho". Ku wa kane, ibyo bihugu bine byavuze ko bihuriye ku kwiyemeza ko Iran idashobora "na rimwe gukora intwaro kirimbuzi ya nikleyeri".

Joanna Mamombe mu 2019 yari yafunzwe ashinjwa gushaka guhirika ubutegetsi bw'akarere abamo nyuma yo gukorana ikiganiro n'abanyamakuru Ishyaka Movement for Democratic Change (MDC) ryari ryatangaje ejo kuwa kane ko umwe mu barihagarariye mu nteko Joanna Mamombe n'abakuriye urubyiruko rw'iri shyaka Cecilia Chimbiri na Netsai Marov bafashwe kuwa gatatu bari mu myigaragambyo. Iyi myigaragambyo yari iya mbere muri Zimbabwe yo kwamagana uburyo hari abantu bari kwicwa n'inzara kubera ingamba zo guhagarika ubuzima busanzwe mu bice bimwe. Ishyaka MDC uyu munsi ryatangaje ko aba bagore batatu babonetse bakubiswe cyane bajugunywe ku nzira bakaba bahise bajyanwa kwa muganga. Rivuga ko polisi yageze aho babasanze. Bashakishijwe kuri 'stations' za polisi zitandukanye barababura kuko bakekaga ko bafunzwe nk'uko umunyamakuru wa BBC muri Zimbabwe abivuga. Umuryango wa Amnesty International wari watangaje ko leta ariyo ikwiye kubazwa ishimutwa ry'aba bantu bo mu ishyaka ritavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi. Zimbabwe yafashe ingamba zo guhagarika ubuzima busanzwe mu bice bimwe na bimwe mu rwego rwo kwirinda ikwirakwira rya coronavirus, izi ngamba zizarangira ku cyumweuru.

Abayisenga Venant wo mu ishyaka DALFA ritaremerwa n'ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda Madamu Ingabire avuga ko aho Bwana Abayisenga yari agiye hari mu ntera itageze no kuri kilometero ebyiri uvuye aho atuye i Remera mu mujyi wa Kigali. Ngo hashize isaha, abari mu rugo batangiye kubona ko atinze kuko ubundi nta wurenza saa kumi n'imwe atarataha muri urwo rugo, nuko bagerageza kumuhamagara kuri telefone ze ebyiri ariko ntizicemo. Bigeze saa kumi n'ebyiri ataje ngo nibwo batanze impuruza bavuga ko bamubuze - kugeza n'uyu munsi. Madamu Ingabire avuga ko n'abo mu muryango w'Abayisenga batazi aho ari. Agira ati: "Twavuganye na RIB [urwego rw'ubugenzacyaha mu Rwanda] itubwira ko dutanga ikirego, ejo [ku cyumweru] umwavoka yagiye kugitanga, ubwo nyine turategereje". BBC yagerageje kuvugana na RIB ariko kugeza ubu ntibyashobotse. 'Bimaze kuba agakabyo' Madamu Ingabire avuga ko iburirwa irengero ry'abarwanashyaka be ari "ibintu bimaze kumenyera, ariko nagira ngo namagane nkomeje". Ati: "Bimaze kuba agakabyo. Ni ukuvuga ko buri mezi ane, haba hari umuntu wo muri 'opposition' ugomba kwicwa cyangwa ugomba kuburirwa irengero...kuva ku itariki ya 8 z'ukwa cumi 2018..." "Kuko bimaze kuba umuco, ndagira ngo mbyamagane, abantu babikora bahagarike uwo mugambi. Ntabwo bangiriza 'opposition' barangiriza igihugu kuko abo bica ni abana b'Abanyarwanda na bo bagomba kubaho, bafite uburenganzira bwo kubaho". Madamu Ingabire avuga ko agace atuyemo katagendwa cyane kuburyo "kuba abantu baterura umuntu bakamujyana ntihagire n'umuntu n'umwe urabukwa ni ibintu byoroshye cyane". Gusa yibaza ukuntu inzego z'umutekano z'u Rwanda zishimwa n'amahanga zikajya kugarura umutekano mu kindi gihugu, "ariko kuba Abanyarwanda nta mutekano bafite, umuntu adashobora kugenda ahantu h'ibirometero bibiri ngo ashobore kugaruka iwe mu rugo, ni ikibazo gikomeye". Abayisenga 'yigeze gushimutwa' Venant Abayisenga ari mu barwanashyaka 11 b'ishyaka rya FDU-Inkingi ryari rikuriwe na Victoire Ingabire wari warafunzwe mu 2017, bashinjwaga ibyaha birimo "gushaka kugirira nabi ubutegetsi buriho bifashishije intambara". Mu kwezi kwa mbere uyu mwaka bamwe muri bo, barimo Bwana Abayisenga na Théophile Ntirutwa - uherutse "kurokoka igitero cy'ubwicanyi" agahita afungwa - bagizwe abere n'ubucamanza bararekurwa. Bwana Abayisenga wahoze akuriye FDU-Inkingi mu burengerazuba nyuma akajya muri DALFA-Umurinzi, yabwiye kimwe mu binyamakuru mu Rwanda ko ubwo yafatwaga mu 2017 yashimuswe n'abantu bambaye nk'abasiviri ari ku Gisenyi aho yigaga muri kaminuza agapfukwa mu maso bakamujyana i Kigali ahitwa kwa Gacinya aho yakorewe iyicarubozo. Madamu Victoire Ingabire ubu ukuriye ishyaka DALFA-Umurinzi ritaremerwa n'amategeko mu Rwanda, yagiye agaragaza ko hari abafatanya na we muri politiki bagiye bicwa abandi bakaburirwa irengero mu bihe bya vuba bishize. Mu kwezi kwa gatatu 2019, Anselme Mutuyimana, wari 'assistant' wa Madamu Ingabire i Kigali, yagiye gusura iwabo ntiyahagera, mu gitondo abantu batora umurambo we mu ishyamba rya Gishwati. Mu kwezi kwa karindwi 2019, Eugène Ndereyimana wari uhagarariye ishyaka FDU-Inkingi ryari rikuriwe na Madamu Ingabire yabuze avuye iwe mu rugo, ntaraboneka kugeza ubu. Icyo gihe umuvugizi wa RIB yabwiye BBC ko barimo bakora iperereza ku ibura rye. Mu 2016, uwo Ndereyimana yasimbuye witwa Habarugira Jean Damascène wari uhagarariye FDU-Inkingi iburasirazuba, yatwawe n'umuntu wari umaze kumuhamagara nyuma haboneka umurambo we, bamwishe nkuko Madamu Ingabire yabivuze. Mu kwezi kwa cyenda 2019, Syldio Dusabumuremyi wari umuhuzabikorwa ku rwego rw'igihugu w'ishyaka FDU-Inkingi yishwe atewe ibyuma aho yacururizaga i Shyogwe mu majyepfo y'u Rwanda. Mu kwa cumi 2018, Boniface Twagirimana wari umuyobozi wungirije wa FDU-Inkingi, gereza ya Mpanga aho yari afungiye yavuze ko yatorotse kugeza ubu yarabuze. Mu kwezi kwa gatatu 2016, Illuminée Iragena, wari umurwanashyaka wa FDU-Inkingi, yaburiwe irengero ari kujya ku kazi aho yakoraga ku bitaro by'umwami Faisal mu mujyi wa Kigali nkuko iryo shyaka ryabitangaje.

Amabisi Apolong nta cuma gifasha kugendesha imodoka "volant" zizoba zifise Baidu yasohoye iryo tangazo inyuma yaho rikoreye amabisi 100 ya Apolong mw'ihinguriro ryayo riri mu ntara ya Fujian, mu bumanuko bushira uburengero bw'igihugu. Iryo hinguriro ryavuze ko izo bisi zizokoreshwa ivyashara mu bisagara vy'Ubushinwa, ariko ngo ntiryibaza kuzigurisha hanze. Iryo shirahamwe riri muri menshi ahiganwa kugurisha imodoka zitwara zo ku rugero rwa kane "level-4 autonomy". Izo modoka zisigaje intambwe imwe ngo zigere ku rugero rwa gatanu rw'imodoka zishobora guca mu bintu vyose vyoshika mw'ibarabara, birimwo amabarabara mabi hamwe n'igihe c'ikirere kibi. Uwurongoye ikigo Baidu, Robin Li, yashikirije iyo migambi yiwe mu nama iba ku mwaka ku bijanye n'Ubwenge Buhingugwa [Artificial Intelligence(AI)] yabereye i Beijing. Ibisi Apolong ni nk'ica gatatu ca bisi nini itwara abantu Yagize ati: "Umwaka w'i 2018 ugiye kurangwa n'igurishwa ry'imiduga yitwara. "Muri kahise, Ubushinwa bwagurishije ibidandazwa bizimbutse mu makungu. Muri kazoza, Ubushinwa buzogurisha mu makungu ibidandazwa bikozwe hisunzwe ubuhinga AI. Amasezerano na Softbank Ibisi Apolong ishobora gutwara abantu 14, kandi yatunganijwe n'umuhinga w'imiduga w'umwenegihugu. Nta ntebe y'umushoferi ifise, nta kigendesho (volant) ifise canke ibihonyozo (pédales) bifasha gutwara imodoka. Igendeshwa n'umuyagankuba, igashobora kugenda ibirometero 100 igihe ibatiri ryujujwe umuriro amasaha abiri, ku muvuduko w'ibirometero 70 kw'isaha. Ishirahamwe Baidu ritegekanya gukoresha iyo miduga ahantu hugaye nko ku bibuga vy'indege hamwe no mu bibanza bikunze kujamwo abakerarugendo. Iryo hinguriro rivuga ko abo bagiye gukorana bazozikoresha mu bisagara vya Beijing, Shenzhen, Wuhan no mu bindi bisagara vy'Ubushinwa. Softbank ivuga ko igiye kugerageza bisi za Apolong mu mabarabara ya Tokyo Rivuga ko hari amasezerano ryapfunditse n'ibanki yo mu Buyapani Softbank Group, ashobora gutuma izo modoka zinjira no mu mabarabara ya Tokyo. Mw'itangazo Softbank yasohoye, ivuga ko igiye kugerageza imodoka 10 za Apolong mu Buyapani mu ntango yo mu 2019. Ikigo SB Drive camuka kuri Softbank caraguze imiduga myinshi yigendesha, kiyikuye mw'ishirahamwe ryo mu Bufaransa, Navya. Softbank yaragerageje bisi ya Navya ku kibuga c'indege mu ntango z'uno mwaka Amabisi ya Navya arakoreshwa ku kibuga c'indege Charles de Gaulle, mu kibanza co kuruhukiramwo Queen Elizabeth Olympic Park c'i Londres, no mu mabarabara ya Las Vegas. Ayandi mashirahamwe nka Easymile yo mu Bufaransa, Intellibus yo muri Australia na KT yo muri Korea yepfo, arafise nayo nyene amabisi yitwara yikoreye. Umwigisha wa kaminuza ya Leeds y'ivyo kwunguruza abantu n'ibintu mu Bwongereza, Natasha Merat yavuze ko mu minsi ya vuba, imiduga nka mweniyo ishobora kuzoba ikundwa cane n'abanyagihugu kurusha iyitwagwa n'abashoferi.

Hagire hatangazwe ko Ebola yaheze muri Kongo Iyi ni intambwe itewe inyuma mu gihe hari haciye indwi zitari nkeyi ata wundi muntu yanduye uwo mugera, hakaba mbere hari hitezwe ko ku munsi wa mbere hatangazwa ko ico kiza kitakirangwa muri Kongo. Ikiza ca Ebola catanguye mu kwezi kwa munani 2018, kikaba kiza ubwa kabiri mu vyahitanye abantu benshi. Abantu barenga ibihumbi bibiri barahasize ubuzima. Abanyamakuru bavuga ko abajejwe intwaro bafise ikibazo gikomeye mu gisata c'amagara, mu gihe bahanganye ica rimwe na Ebola, coronavirus hamwe n'agasama. Urashobora kuraba n'ibi:

Imibonano mpuzabitsina hagati y'abagabo basa, canke abagore basa (homosexuality) ni icaha muri Tanzania Icegera c'umushikiranganji wa Tanzania Hamis Kigwarangalla, n'ubwo atavuze igihe azobikorera, yatangaje ku rubuga rwiwe rwa Twitter ko azokwandagaza abahuza ibitsina babisangiye/ abo bita aba 'Homosexuels'. Abagiriza ko mu guhuza ibitsina kwabo bakora ibinyuranye n'amategeko, ndetse bakagurisha bakongera bakamamaza ibikorwa n'abahuza ibitsina babisangiye, bifashashaje uburyo bw'itumatumanako, ivyo vyose ngo bikaba biciye kubiri n'amategeko. Ubutumwa bwa Dr Kigwangalla, avuga ko guhuza ibitsina hagati y'ababisangiye atari imero ivukanwa Mu mpera z'iyi ndwi uwo mutegetsi yateranye amajambo n'uwundi muntu akoresha twitter, yamwagirije urwanko no kubuza abandu uburenganzira bwo gukoresha internet. Imwe mu nyishu yatanze, ico cegera c'umushikiranganji, asanzwe ari n'umuganga, yavuze ko abahuza ibitsina babisangiye ari nk'impararo y'abanyamuji, ko iyo avuka ata bakora ivyo bahari. Amajambo ya Hamis Karwangalla akwirikiye ingingo ya leta ya Tanzania yo kwugara amavuriro agera ku 40, atanga imiti yo gupfupfahaza SIDA, inyuma yo kuyagiriza ko ahimiriza abantu kuja muri uyu mugwi w'abahuza ibitsina babisangiye, ibibonwa nk'icaha mu mategeko ya Tanzania gihanishwa umunyororo w' imyaka 30.

Mu kiganiro cyateguwe n'ikigo cyo kurwanya ibyorezo cy'Umuryango w'Ubumwe bwa Africa cyo kurwanya ibyorezo cyo kuganira ku buryo Africa yakora inkingo n'imiti byayo, benshi mu bahawe ijambo bemezaga ko ibyo bishoboka. Perezida Paul Kagame w'u Rwanda yavuze ko yaganiriye n'abakora inkingo za Covid-19 bifashishije ubuhanga bwa messenger RNA (mRNA) mu ntego yo kureba niba ubwo buhanga Africa yabukoresha. Yavuze ko abahanga bashobora no kureba ku gufatanya ubwo buhanga n'ubundi bwifashishwa n'abakoze urukingo rwa Johnson&Johnson. Ati: "Igitekerezo ni uburyo natwe twagira ubu bushobozi ku mugabane wacu...bityo Africa ikava ku gutera imbabazi kandi ibyo ntawe twabirenganyiriza, tukava ku bitaradufashije tukajya kubyo twakora dushoboye ubwacu." Kagame avuga ko u Rwanda rwiteguye gutanga umusanzu warwo muri uwo muhate wa Africa wo gukora urukingo rwa Covid-19. Perezida Tshisekedi ukuriye umuryango w'Ubumwe bwa Africa avuga ko hejuru ya 80% y'inkingo Africa ikoresha ziva ahandi, akavuga ko bituma n'Abanyafurika bakemanga izo nkingo. Ati: "Hari ubushobozi n'impamvu yo gushora imari mu nkingo n'imiti...ariko ibyo bizasaba ubushake n'ubutegetsi, politiki n'ubufatanye bukomeye bw'inzego nyinshi n'abashakashatsi ba Africa..."
