Urukingo ruzakorwa gute? Tshisekedi yavuze ko ubu atangije umugambi uzasaba ubufatanye bw'ibihugu bya Africa wo "gukora inkingo zayo, imiti n'ibikoresho byo gupima indwara". Avuga ko ibi biri mu byumvikanyweho n'abakuru b'ibihugu mu mugambi waguye wo kuvugurura inzego z'ubuzima muri Africa ngo bagere ku ntego z'igihe kirekire za 2063. Mu gukora urukingo rwa Covid-19 n'izindi, Tshisekedi yavuze ko hatekerejwe ku ngingo zirimo; ahantu hatanu muri Africa zakorerwa, gukusanya imari isabwa, kuzana ikoranabuhanga ryo kuzikora muri Africa, n'izindi. Ati: "Sinshidikanya ko ibyo bizagerwaho kuko hari ubushobozi bw'abantu, ubwenge n'ubufatanye Africa yifitemo hamwe n'abafatanyabikorwa bayo". Dr Tedros Ghebreyesus ukuriye ishami rya ONU rishinzwe ubuzima OMS/WHO yavuze ko OMS izaha Africa ubufasha mu bya tekiniki n'inama mu gukora urukingo rwayo rwa Covid-19 n'izindi nkingo.

Ni imyigaragambyo yo kwamagana Perezida Abdelaziz Bouteflika uri ku butegetsi guhera mu mwaka wa 1999, ufite gahunda yo gushaka kongera kwiyamamaza kuri manda ya gatanu Polisi yarashe imyuka iryana mu maso ku bigaragambya mu murwa mukuru Alger. Abategetsi bavuze ko abigaragambya barindwi n'abapolisi barenga 50 bakomeretse, naho abandi bantu 45 batabwa muri yombi. Imyigaragambyo yamagana leta iba gacye cyane muri Algeria, ariko myinshi yarabaye kuva Bwana Bouteflika yakwemeza ko azongera kwiyamamaza mu matora ya perezida ateganyijwe kuba mu kwezi gutaha kwa kane uyu mwaka. Kuva yarwara indwara y'imitsi yo mu bwonko mu mwaka wa 2013, Bwana Bouteflika aboneka gacye cyane mu ruhame, ndetse kuri ubu arigukorerwa ibizamini byo kwa muganga mu Busuwisi. Ubwo bagendaga mu mihanda yo mu murwa mukuru Alger ku wa gatanu, bamwe mu bigaragambya bari bafite ibyapa byanditseho ngo "kurekera aho bisobanuye kurekera aho". Abandi bashimangiraga ko bashaka kwigaragambya mu mahoro. Umugore umwe mu bigaragambyaga wari uri kumwe n'umugabo we n'abana, yabwiye ibiro ntaramakuru AFP ati: "Imyaka 20 irahagije". Bouteflika agendera mu kagare k'abarwayi kandi yagiye aburizamo inama z'akazi zo mu bihe bishize bya vuba Ibiro ntaramakuru Reuters byo byasubiyemo amagambo ya Ali Selmi, na we wigaragambyaga, agira ati: "Uyu ni umunsi w'ibyishimo, ntabwo ari uw'imyigaragambyo. Turikwishimira kongera kuvuka kwa Algeria". Bamwe mu bigaragambyaga bateye amabuye hafi y'inyubako y'ibiro bya Bwana Bouteflika, nuko basubizwa inyuma na polisi yarasaga imyuka iryana mu maso. Ababibonye bavuze ko habayeho gukomereka ku mpande zombi. Imyigaragambyo kandi yanabereye mu yindi mijyi myinshi yo muri Algeria nyuma y'amasengesho y'abayisilamu yo ku wa gatanu. Bwana Bouteflika yageze ku butegetsi mu mwaka wa 1999. Ashimirwa kuba yararangije intambara yasubirishanagamo abatuye iki gihugu bigereranywa ko yahitanye abantu barenga ibihumbi 100. Abonwa nk'ushobora gutsinda amatora yimirije Mu mwaka wa 2011, muri Algeria habaye imyigaragambyo yo kwinubira ibiciro by'ibiribwa ndetse no kubura akazi. Hari mu myigaragambyo migari yabaye mu burasirazuba bwo hagati guhera mu mpera y'umwaka wa 2010 - imyigaragambyo yamenyekanye ku izina rya Arab Spring. Ariko icyo gihe, Bwana Bouteflika yahise akuraho amategeko yo mu bihe bidasanzwe iki gihugu cyari kimaze imyaka hafi 20 kigenderaho - aba yubahirije atyo icy'ingenzi abigaragambyaga basabaga. Nyuma yo kurwara indwara y'imitsi yo mu bwonko, yongeye gutsinda amatora yanenzwe n'abatavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi, ndetse asesa ikigo cy'ubutasi cy'iki gihugu agisimbuza ikindi kimuyoboka. Abanenga Bwana Bouteflika bavuga ko ubuzima bwe butameze neza butuma adashoboye kuzuza inshingano ze nka Perezida. Nubwo hari abamunenga, Bwana Bouteflika abonwa na benshi ko ari we ufite amahirwe menshi yo gutsinda aya amatora ateganyijwe kuba mu kwezi gutaha kwa kane.

Coalition des Patriotes pour le Changement (CPC), ihuriro ry'inyeshyamba leta ivuga ko uriri inyuma ari uwahoze ari perezida Francois Bozize, niryo ryatangaje agahenge k'amasaha 72 nk'uko bivugwa na Corbeau News. Bwana Bozize yakomeje guhakana ko atari we uri inyuma y'iyi mitwe y'inyeshyamba. Iki kinyamakuru kivuga ko mu ijoro ryo kuwa gatatu habaye imirwano yashyamiranyije izi nyeshyamba n'ingabo za leta mu majyepfo y'igihugu, ndetse ko zafashe imijyi ya Beloko na Cantonier iri mu majyaruguru. Ejo kuwa gatatu, Perezida Faustin-Archange Touadéra na Emmanuel Macron w'Ubufaransa, baganiriye ku bibazo biri muri iki gihugu, Ubufaransa buvuga ko "bwamagana abashaka guhungabanya Centrafrique." Nyuma yo kuganira kwabo indege z'intambara z'Ubufaransa zahise zitangira kugenda hejuru y'ikirere cya Centrafrique, ibi biri mu bwumvikane bagiranye nk'uko itangazo ry'ibiro bya perezida w'Ubufaransa ribivuga. Mu cyumweru gishize, ibihugu by'Uburusiya n'u Rwanda byohereje abasirikare amagana muri Centrafrique, bagiye kurengera ubutegetsi bwa Touadera. Touadera, wahoze ari minisitiri w'intebe kubwa Bozize akaba n'umwalimu w'imibare, yatsinze amatora mu 2016, ubu ari kwiyamamariza manda ya kabiri Ejo kuwa gatatu, ingabo za UN ziri muri iki gihugu zatangaje ko ingabo za Leta zisubije umujyi wa kane mu gihugu wa Bambari wari wigaruriwe n'izi nyeshyamba. Agahenge k'inyeshyamba za CPC karoroshya ibintu, gusa haracyari impungenge z'ibizaba mu gihe leta ishimangira ko amatora ya perezida n'abadepite ateganyijwe ku cyumweru agomba kuba nta kabuza. Hagati aho, leta Tchad yahakanye ibyo ivugwaho mu binyamakuru ko yaba yarohereje abasirikare bayo gufasha inyeshyamba ngo zikureho ubutegetsi buriho muri Centrafrique. Mahamat Zene Cherif, minisitiri w'itumanaho wa Tchad yabwiye radio Liberte FM yaho ko "Abanyapolitiki ba Centrafrique bananiwe kubona igisubizo cy'ikibazo bafite batagomba kugira Tchad urwitwazo". Mu 2013 ubwo Bozize yakurwaga ku butegetsi ku ngufu, yashinje Tchad gufasha inyeshyamba zamuhiritse. Centrafrique ni igihugu gikize ku mutungo kamere wa diyama, zahabu, petrol na uranium ariko ni kimwe mu bifite abaturage bakennye cyane ku isi. Nta mahoro arambye kuva ku bwigenge Centrafrique ntabwo yagize amahoro arambye kuva mu myaka ya 1960 yabona ubwigenge. Mu 2013 yaguye mu kaga ubwo inyeshyamba z'Abayisilamu zitwa Seleka zafataga ubutegetsi zihiritse Bozize mu gihugu gituwe ahanini n'Abakiristu. Itsinda ry'inyeshyamba ziyise anti-balaka zahagurukiye kurwanya Seleka. Ku gitutu cy'amahanga, mu 2014 Seleka yahaye ubutegetsi guverinoma y'inzibacyuho, gusa ubwicanyi bwarakomeje mu gihugu nubwo hari ingabo za ONU n'iz'Ubufaransa. Umwami w'abami Jean-Bedel Bokassa bivugwa ko ari umwe mu banyagitugu bategekesheje inkoni y'icyuma ku buryo bukabije muri Africa Amatariki y'ingenzi mu mateka ya Centrafrique: 1880 - Ubufaransa bwafashe aka gace, buhagira akarere kabwo k'ubucuruzi. 1960 - Iki gihugu cyabonye ubwigenge, David Dacko aba perezida, ashyiraho ubutegetsi bw'ishyaka rimwe. 1965 - Dacko yahiritswe ku butegetsi n'umukuru w'ingabo, Jean-Bedel Bokassa, wahise yiyita umwami w'abami "w'Ubwami bwa Africa yo hagati". 1979 - Bokassa yahiritswe ku butegetsi n'abashyigikiwe n'ingabo z'Ubufaransa. 1981 - Umukuru w'ingabo Andre Kolingba yafashe ubutegetsi. 1993 - Ange-Felix Patasse yatsinze amatora, arangiza ubutegetsi bw'abasirikare bw'imyaka 12. 2003 - Uwari ukuriye ingabo Francois Bozize yashinze inyeshyamba maze afata ubutegetsi ku ngufu. 2009 - Ingabo za leta ye zahanganye n'inyeshyamba. UN yemeza kohereza ingabo zayo zo kugarura amahoro. 2012 Ugushyingo - Umutwe w'inyeshyamba wa Seleka vuba vuba wafashe amajyaruguru n'ibice byo hagati mu gihugu, amaherezo n'umurwa mukuru, Bozize arahunga. 2013 - Ubwicanyi bukomeye mu gihe abarwanyi bishingikirije ku madini ya Isilamu n'Abakiristu bashyamiranye. 2014 - Michel Djotodia - wari uyoboye Seleka yahiritse Bozize - yavuye ku butegetsi. Catherine Samba-Panza ashyirwa ku butegetsi bw'inzibacyuho. 2015 - Referendumu ku mpinduka mu itegekoshinga, yakurikiwe n'amatora ya mbere y'umukuru w'igihugu. 2016 - Amatora y'umukuru w'igihugu, intsinzi yegukanywe na Touadera, wahoze ari minisitiri w'intebe kubwa Bozize.

CNDD-FDD, ishyaka riri ku butegetsi mu Burundi, ryahise rigaragaza ubwo butumwa kuri Twitter, ntibyari bihagije kubyemera kuri bamwe. Nyuma gato, urundi ruhande, minisiteri y'ububanyi n'amahanga y'u Rwanda, narwo rwashyize ubwo butumwa kuri Twitter. Tariki 13/04/2015 nyuma yo kubonana kwa Perezida Pierre Nkurunziza na Paul Kagame mu mujyi wa Huye, hakurikiye igerageza rya coup d'état mu Burundi, hakurikiraho umubano mubi hagati y'ibihugu byombi kugeza ubu. Timothy J. Oloo, umwarimu wa siyansi politiki muri kaminuza muri Kenya na Tanzania, avuga ko ubutumwa bwa leta runaka bwo gushimira uwatsinze amatora ahandi busobanuye byinshi muri politiki. Avuga ko by'umwihariko ku kibazo cya politiki y'u Rwanda n'u Burundi ari "ikimenyetso cy'ubushake bw'impinduka". Bwana Oloo agira ati: "Twabonye ubushyamirane bwa politiki bukomeye bw'ubutegetsi bw'ibi bihugu byombi, twarabibonye muri EAC [East African Community], twumvise ko ingabo zabo zagiye zirwana, hagiye habaho kubangamirana kw'inyungu za politiki kandi n'ubu birakomeje. "Ni ubushyamirane budasanzwe turi kubona... Mu mateka, ubutegetsi muri aka karere hagiye habaho ko bushyamirana ariko ugasanga hamwe na hamwe abaturage ntibibagiraho ingaruka zikomeye nkuko tubyumva ubu hagati y'u Rwanda n'u Burundi. "Urugero rwa vuba naguha ni uguhangana buri wese abona hagati ya Kenya na Tanzania, kandi bimaze igihe, ariko abategetsi nibaza ko nta mutegetsi w'uruhande rumwe wakwifuza ko bigera aho bibangamira bikomeye abaturage bo hasi". Bwana Oloo avuga ko nta muntu uzi ibya politiki watungurwa n'ubutumwa u Rwanda rwoherereje u Burundi kuko nta munyapolitiki utazi igihombo kiba mu kubana nabi, cyane cyane n'igihugu gituranyi. Kuki ubu ku itorwa rya Ndayishimiye? Bwana Olooo akomeza agira ati: "Politiki ni nk'umukino w'umupira w'amaguru, haba igihe cyiza cyo gusatira, gusubira inyuma, gukina witonze, guhindura uburyo ukina n'ibindi". Ati: "Muri politiki umuntu mushya akenshi bisobanuye impinduka, uko byagenda kose, nubwo tutakwirengagiza imbaraga twumvise ko Nkurunziza azakomeza kugira mu ishyaka riri ku butegetsi, ariko umuntu mushya aba ari mushya ntabura kimwe, bibiri cyangwa bitatu bishya azana. "Iyo haje umuntu mushya rero ni igihe cyiza abakina politiki bashobora guhindura uburyo bakinaga". Perezida Kagame (ibumoso) na Perezida Nkurunziza mu bihe byashize Mbere gato y'amatora yo mu kwezi gushize mu Burundi, umuryango utegamiye kuri leta International Crisis Group watangaje ko ufite ibimenyetso ko Evariste Ndayishimiye ari umuntu ufunguye ku kumva abandi ugereranyije na Bwana Nkurunziza. Nelleke van de Walle wungirije uyobora uyu muryango muri Afurika yo hagati yabwiye abanyamakuru ko baganiriye n'abadipolomate bamwe bababwira ko "baganiriye na Evariste, bakavuga ko babona ko we yiteguye kuzahura umubano n'amahanga". Madamu Walle yagize ati: "Dutekereza ko kongera kubana n'amahanga, n'ibihugu bituranyi, [Evariste] aramutse atowe byakorwa kurusha uko bimeze ubu". Gusa Onesphore Sematumba, umusesenguzi wa politiki y'aka karere, yavuze ko Ndayishimiye atowe impinduka yakora zaterwa n'ububasha yagira imbere y'uwo yaba asimbuye. Yagize ati: "Ni byo Evariste we arafungutse, ariko ntabwo twizeye neza ko aramutse atsinze yahita ahindura ibintu... Bizaterwa n'uburyo azabasha gukorera muri 'system' ya CNDD-FDD...". Ni inde uhombera mu kibazo? Mu ibaruwa yandikiwe leta y'u Burundi, leta y'u Rwanda ivuga ko "iboneyeho kumenyesha ko yifuza kuvugurura imibanire y'amateka yaranze ibihugu byombi bivandimwe". Leta z'ibihugu byombi si ubwa mbere zishyamiranye, amateka avuga ko hagiye habaho ubushyamirane n'intambara zikomeye hagati y'ubwami bw'u Burundi n'ubw'u Rwanda. Ariko guhura kw'imico, ururimi, guhahirana, gushyingirana, gutabarana,... ni byo byakomeje gutuma abaturage batandukanyijwe n'Akanyaru bitana abavandimwe, abavukanyi, abazimyamuriro... Ubushyamirane bumaze imyaka itanu hagati y'ubutegetsi bwombi bwahagaritse bimwe mu byabahuzaga nko guhahirana, gushyingirana, gutabarana, kugenderanira. Mwarimu Timothy Oloo ati: "Nta mutegetsi cyangwa umunyapolitiki muri leta uhombera mu bushyamirane, uhembwa arakomeza agahembwa ariko umuturage uciriritse wacuruzaga hakurya y'umupaka akabona inyungu agatunga urugo rwe, ubuzima bwe n'abe nibaza ko bwahababariye. "Ni yo mpamvu buri gihe abanyapolitiki baba bagomba gukora ibishoboka mu guhosha amakimbirane vuba, ndetse n'igihe haba hari ibyo batumvikanaho bagakora ku buryo bitagira ingaruka mbi zikabije ku buzima bw'umuturage". Kuki bitakozwe na Kagame? Mu buryo butandukanye, ba Perezida Magufuli, Tshisekedi, Kenyatta, Macky Sall, Paul Biya, Mohamed Farmajo, umwami wa Maroc, uwa Arabia Saoudite n'abandi, ku giti cyabo bashimiye Bwana Ndayishimiye ku ntsinzi ye. Ibaruwa yagaragajwe ya minisiteri y'ububanyi n'amahanga y'u Rwanda, ntigaragaza uwayanditse, ntiriho umukono n'izina bya minisitiri, ivuga muri rusange ko ari ubutumwa bwa guverinoma y'u Rwanda. Ku mbuga nkoranyambaga, bamwe bakemanga ubushake bw'impinduka guverinoma y'u Rwanda ivuga ko yifuza muri iyo baruwa, mu gihe ubwo butumwa butatanzwe n'umukuru w'igihugu ubwe. Bwana Oloo avuga ko uko byakozwe kose abibona nk'intambwe nziza yatewe mu gushaka ko "ku mutegetsi mushya watowe amakimbirane adakomeza". Ati: "Ntabwo wakwitega ko ibintu bihita bihinduka ako kanya, ntekereza ko ku Rwanda hakirimo kwifata ngo barebe uko ibintu bigenda ku mutegetsi mushya, biriya mbibona nko kumwereka ubushake ngo bapime niba na we abufite, ni intambwe nziza muri politiki, ubu umupira uri mu ruhande rwa Ndayishimiye".

Ignace Nkaka (ibumoso) na Lt Col Nsekanabo Jean Pierre uzwi nka 'Abega', ubwo bari mu rukiko mu kwezi kwa mbere 2020 Me Milton Nkuba wunganira Nkaka yabwiye urukiko ko umukiriya we uruhare rwe mu bikorwa bya FDLR "rwari rutoya cyane" ngo kuko we nta byemezo yafataga. Bamwe mu barwanyi bari bakuriye umutwe wa FDLR mu myaka yashize batashye ku bushake, basubizwa mu buzima busanzwe, abandi bashyirwa mu gisirikare cy'u Rwanda. Mu myaka yakurikiye intambara na jenoside mu Rwanda umutwe wa FDLR ukorera mu mashyamba y'uburasirazuba bwa DR Congo wagiye ugaba ibitero byiciwemo abantu benshi mu Rwanda. Mu rukiko ruburanisha imanza z'iterabwoba ruri i Nyanza mu majyepfo y'u Rwanda, Nkaka wamenyekanye ku izina rya Fils La Forge Bazeye akiri umuvigizi wa FDLR, yavuze ko ibitero byayo abarwanyi bawo babikoraga ntawe bagishije inama. Ubushinjacyaha bwavuze ko ibyo Nkaka ubu avuga ntaho bihuriye n'uko yaburanye yemera ibyaha byo gukora iterabwoba hashingiwe ku nyungu za politiki, no kugaba ibitero ku baturage no kwica abantu. Ubushinjacyaha bwavuze kandi ko nta muntu wo muri FDLR watashye ku bushake bwe warezwe mu rukiko ibyaha bisa n'ibyo Ignace Nkaka ubu aregwa, bityo atakwigereranya nabo. Ignace Nkaka areganwa na Lt Col Jean Pierre Nsekanabo wari ushinzwe iperereza mu mutwe wa FDLR, ubu bombi barangije kuvuga ibya nyuma ku rubanza rwabo rumaze hafi imyaka ibiri. Bombi bafashwe mu ntangiriro za 2019 bari mu rugendo berekeza muri Uganda nk'uko Ubushinjacyaha bwabivuze. Mu iburanisha uyu munsi Ubushinjacyaha bwavuze ko aba bombi bagomba no gusobanurira urukiko uko bafashwemo n'ubutumwa bari bavuyemo mu gihugu cya Uganda. Urukiko rwavuze ko urubanza rwabo ruzakomeza tariki 08/04/2021 humvirizwa imyanzuro y'Ubushinjacayaha kuri uru rubanza, mbere y'uko urukiko rubakatira.

Hari intambara ikomeye hagati ya Eritrea ,Team Rwanda na Bike Aid yo mu Budage Abahiganwa 73 bari mw'ibarabara riva Kigali ryerekeza mu gisagara co mu burengero ca Karongi, kiri ku birometero 125. Imigwi y'Urwanda iri imbere ariko bakaba bagenda babangabanganywe n'abo mu gihugu ca Eritrea. Umwe mu migwi y'Urwanda wa RwandAir Muri iryo higanwa, Urwanda ruserukiwe n'imigwi itatu, Team Rwanda, Benediction team na Amis Sportif. Hari intambara hagati ya Eritrea ,Team Rwanda na Bike Aid yo mu Budage bariko bagenda babisikana ku mwanya wa mbere ariko benshi bari mu mu mugwi umwe, bamwe bose bakaba bashaka gusiga abandi muri uwo mugwi. Umugwi w'igihugu ca Eritrea

Uhereye ibumoso: Egide, Agnès, Térence na Christine ubwo bari bagiye kuburanishwa mu ntangiriro z'uku kwezi Térence Mpozenzi, Agnès Ndirubusa, Egide Harerimana na Christine Kamikazi bari bakatiwe gufungwa imyaka ibiri n'amezi atandatu bahamijwe "ubufatanyacyaha mu guhungabanya umutekano w'igihugu". Icyaha baregwa ko bakoze ubwo habaga igitero cy'inyeshyamba i Bubanza mu burengerazuba bw'u Burundi. Mu iburanisha riheruka, kimwe mu bimenyetso ubushinjacyaha bwavuze buheraho ni ubutumwa umwe mu baregwa yandikiranye kuri WhatsApp n'umunyamakuru mugenzi wabo wahungiye mu mahanga ubwo bariho bajya gutara iyo nkuru, bavugana kuri icyo gitero. Antoine Kaburahe washinze ikinyamakuru Iwacu aba banyamakuru bakorera, ubu uba mu mahanga, yabwiye BBC ko icyemezo cy'urukiko rw'ubujurire kibateye umubabaro. Ati: "Twari dufite icyizere ko bazarekurwa kuko ibyo baregwa bidafite ishingiro, bari bagiye kukazi kabo i Bubanza kuko hari habaye igitero. "Tubona nta kosa bakoze kuko bafunzwe bataranatangira gukora, iyo bavuga basi ko babarega ibyo bakoze bavuye kuri 'terrain'". Bwana Kaburahe avuga ko ari 'umubabaro mwinshi kubona abanyamakuru bafunzwe amezi arindwi nta byaha bifatika baregwa'. Avuga ko bazakora ibiteganywa n'amategeko y'u Burundi byose, ko ubu bagiye kuregera urukiko rw'ikirenga. Ati: "Abenshi baratubwira ngo ni uguta umwanya ntacyo bizatangaza, ariko tuzakora inzira zose ziteganywa n'amategeko dusaba ubutabera".

Abantu batari bake barafata ingendo n'amato mu kiyaga Kivu Mu butumwa yacishije ku rubuga hwaniro rwa Twitter, Bwana Tshisekedi yanditse ati: "Ndababajwe cane n'ubwato bwazamye kw'igenekerezo rya 15 z'ukwezi kwa kane mu kiyaga Kivu. Igitigiri mfatakibanza ni abantu 150 babuzwe irengero". Bwana Tshisekedi avuga ko ariko abikurikiranira hafi kugira ngo ababifisemwo uruhara bamenyekane kandi bahanwe. Arongera agahoza imiryango yaburiye ababo muri iyo mpanuka. Delphin Mbirimbi, ari mu baharanira agateka ka muntu mu ntara ya Kivu y'ubumanuko, yabwiye itororokanirizo ry'amakuru Reuters ko ubwo bwato bwazamiye mu kiyaga Kivu, hafi ya territoire ya Kalehe, buvuye mu ntara ya Kivu y'uburaruko bihana urubibe. Avuga ko ibiziga bitatu ari vyo vyari bimaze gutorwa, abantu 33 bararokorwa, abandi 150 baraburwa irengero. Impanuka zihitana abantu zirarwiriye muri ico gihugu kinini, kigizwe n'amashamba manini ariko kikagira amabarabara make kandi ahanini ameze nabi. Ingenzi zo muri ico gihugu zikaba zifashisha amato, akenshi arenza ibitigiri c'abo yategerezwa gutwara.

Umupfasoni Bensouda yahoze ari umushikiranganji w'ubutungane wa Gambia Umushikiranganji ajejwe imigenderanire wa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika, Mike Pompeo, yagiriza iyi sentare ko "yagerageje gushira Amerika mu murwi w'ibihugu bica imanza zidakurikije amategeko". Muri kino gihe, iyi sentare ifise icicaro i La Haye iriko ikora amatohoza ku ngabo za Amerika ku vyaha vyo mu ntambara zoba zarakoze muri Afghanistani. Amerika ntiyigeze yerekwa iyi sentare kuva ishingwa, kandi ni kimwe mu bihugu bitari bike bitigeze bitera umukono kw'ishingwa ryayo ngo vyemeze ko biyinjiyemwo. Balkees Jarrah, umuhanuzi mukuru mw'ishirahame ryigenga Human Rights Watch, ariyamiriza ivyo bihano, akavuga ko ari "ikintu giteye isoni gisuzuguza Amerika mu gihe yiyemeje guha ubutungane abakorewe ivyaha". Aciye ku rubuga rwa Twitter, umupfasoni Jarrah yanditse avuga ko ibi bihano vya Amerika biteye kubiri n'ibihano bisanzwe bifatwa na Amerika, ibihano bifatwa mu ntumbero yo guhana abahonyanze uburenganzira bwa muntu be n'abakoresha ububasha bafise mu guhohotera abanyagihugu, ariko ubu bikaba bifatiwe abajejwe gukurikirana abakoze amabi y'intambara. Iyi sentare yashizweho na ONU mu 2002 mu ntumbero yo gutohoza no guhana abakoze ihonyabwoko, ivyaha vyo guhonyanga agateka ka zina muntu hamwe n'ivyaha vyo mu ntambara, ikagira uruhara mu gihe abayobozi b'ibihugu badashobora canke biboneka ko batazohana ababikoze. Gushika ubu, ibihugu 123 nivyo bimaze gutera umukono ku masezerano ashiraho iyo sentare, harimwo n'Ubwongereza. Hagati aho, Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika, co kimwe n'ibihugu vy'Uburusiya, Ubushinwa n'Ubuhindi, vyaranse kwinjira muri iyo sentare, mu gihe ibihugu bimwe bimwe vya Afrika navyo biyagiriza ko yashinzwe kugira ngo icire imanza Abanyafrika. None ibi bihano ni nyabaki? Mu kwa gatandatu, Perezida Donald Trump yarasohoye itegeko bwirizwa riha uburenganzira Amerika gufata amatungo y'abakozi ba CPI be no kubima impusha zo kwinjira mu gihugu (visas). Avugana n'abanyamakuru ejo ku wa gatatu, Bwana Pompeo avuga ko umupfasoni Bensouda na Phakiso Mochochoko, umuyobozi w'igisata kijejwe ubucamanza, kwuzuzanya n'ugufashanya, bafatwa n'ibi bihano. Mu gihe yagiriza CPI ko ari "urwego rwapfuye nabi kandi rwamunzwe n'ibiturire", asigura ko abo bose "babandanya bashigikiye aba bantu nabo nyene bashobora kuzofatirwa ibihano". Bwana Pompeo avuga ko umupfasoni Bensouda na Phakiso Mochochoko, umuyobozi w'igisata kijejwe ubucamanza, kwuzuzanya n'ugufashanya, bafatwa n'ibi bihano Ubushikiranganji bujejwe imigenderanire bwa Amerika kandi bwarahagaritse gutanga impusha ku bakozi ba CPI bafise uruhara mu "gukora amatohoza ku banyamerika". Igihe Perezida Trump asohora iryo tegeko bwirizwa mu kwa gatandatu, CPI yararyiyamirije ivuga ko ari "irindi terabwoba n'ibikorwa vy'agahato" ikorewe. Mw'itangazo yasohoye, CPI yavuze ko "Kurwanya CPI ari ukurwanya inyungu z'abakorewe amabi y'agahomerabunwa, mu gihe kuri benshi muri bo iyi sentare ari yo mirukiro ya nyuma kugira batunganirizwe". Fatou Bensouda ni nde? Umupfasoni Bensouda yahoze ari umushikiranganji w'ubutungane wa Gambia, igihugu yamukamwo, akaba yasubiriye Luis Moreno-Ocampo nk'umushikirizamanza mukuru wa CPI, kuko yari asanzwe ari icegera ciwe mu kiringo cose yamaze. Yarabaye kandi umuhanuzi mukuru muri sentare yashinzwe na ONU yo gucira imanza abagize uruhara mw'ihonyabwoko ryo mu Rwanda mu 1994. Mu gihe yaguye akarere k'ibikorwa vya CPI kugira ngo ashobore gukora amatohoza no mu bindi bihugu birangwamwo imishamirano - mbere iki kikaba ari co cashavuje Amerika - Afrika niyo imuraje ishinga cane cane. Kugeza ubu imanza zose CPI imaze guca ni iz'Abanyafrika gusa - uwa mbere yaciriwe urubanza akaba ari umukuru w'umurwi w'inyeshamba muri Repubulika y'Intwaro Rusangi ya Kongo, Thomas Lubanga, kubera ivyaha vy'intambara mu 2012. Hagati aho, umupfasoni Bensouda amaze gutsindwa akatari gake. Aha twovuga nk'ingingo yo kweza uwahoze ari Perezida wa Cote d'Ivoire, Laurent Gbagbo ku vyaha vy'intambara mu mwaka wa 2019, hamwe n'ihagarikwa ry'ibirego vyo guhonyanga agateka ka zina muntu vyari vyagirijwe umukuru w'igihugu ca Kenya Uhuru Kenyatta mu 2014. None kuri Amerika CPI iriko itohoza iki? Mu ntango z'uno mwaka, CPI yatanguye gukora amatohoza ku vyaha vy'intambara vyakozwe na Amerika n'ibindi bihugu mu ntambara yo muri Afghanistani. Iyi sentare irafise ububasha bwo gusohora imitahe yo guhagarika abagirizwa canke kubarengutsa mu gihe abashikirizamanza begeranije ivyemezo bikwiye kandi batoye n'abagirizwa. Ico gihe, niho bashobora gufata ingingo yo kwuguruza urubanza muri sentare iyo bafise ivyemezo bikwiye. Iki gihe, Bwana Pompeo yiyemeje gukingira Abanyamerika kugira ngo ntibakorweko amatohoza, avuga ko "ari umugambi w'incamugongo uteguwe n'urwego rutabifitiye ububasha, urwego rushingiye ku nyungu za politike, ariko rukiyita ko rwemewe n'amategeko". Mu 2016, CPI yarasohoye icegeranyo cavuga ko hari ivyemezo ko igisirikare ca Amerika cakoreye iyica rubozo impfungwa zari zipfungiwe mu busho bwo mu kinyegero bwegukira ikigo CIA. Amabi yakozwe n'abarwanyi b'abatalibani, leta ya Afghanistani hamwe n'abasirikare ba Amerika kuva mu kwa gatanu 2003 yitezwe kwigwa neza n'iyo sentare. Igihugu ca Afghanistani gisanzwe kiri muri iyo sentare ariko abategetsi baco nabo nyene bariyamiriza ayo matohoza.

Doudou Diène arongoye umurwi wa ONU ujejwe amatohoza ku Burundi avuga ko hari Abarundi babandanya kuba mu bwoba kubera bashobora kwikekwa Imbere y'uyu murwi ejo ku wa kabiri i Geneve, Doudou Diène arongoye abakoze ayo matohoza yavuze ko hari abarundi batekewe "n'ubwoba buvuye ku rwikeko, rushobora gutuma umunyagihugu w'umurundi uwo ari we wese ashobora kwisanga ari mu bibazo". Uyo munyamategeko aremera ko "Uburundi nubwo butari mu gihe c'intambara", ariko akagabisha ko "icuka kiri mu gihugu giteye amakenga". Uwuserukira Uburundi muri uwo murwi wa ONU Geneva yavuze ko ibivugwa n'uyu mugwi "bigamije gutyoza igihugu" kandi ko ari "icegeranyo c'ibinyoma". Uwo murwi umenyesha ko kuva mu kwa gatanu kw'umwaka wa 2018 Uburundi burangwa n'ihonyangwa ry'agateka ka zina muntu aho hari abicwa, abanyuruza, abahagarikwa bagapfungwa bitajanye n'amategeko, ukubabarizwa igufa no kuburabuzwa". Aba bakoze itohoza bavuga ko abakorerwa ibi ari abatavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi mbere n'imiryango yabo canke abanse kwinjira mu mugambwe uri ku butegetsi CNDD-FDD canke mu murwi w'urwaruka Imbonerakure ukukira uwo mugambwe. Bwana Diène amenyesha ko abantu bategekwa gutanga intererano zirenze, harimwo izo gutegura amatora ya 2020, "mu gihe bahanzwe n'ubukene bugenda bwiyongera". Bwana Diène avuga ariko ko intererano yategerezwa gutangwa n'abakozi ba reta ubu yahagaritswe nk'uko Prezida Petero Nkurunziza yabitangaje mw'ijambo yashikirijwe ku wa 30 z'ukwezi guheze kwa gatandatu kuko ayo bakeneye yabonetse. Perezida Petero Nkurunziza w'Uburundi yatangaje ko ataziyamamaza mu matora ya 2020 Mu gihe Uburundi bwitegurira amatora ya 2020, uyo murwi usaba ko amakungu yokwama arikanuye, haba mu nteguro yayo no mu matora nyezina. Avuga ko ata matora nyayo kandi yizewe ashoboka mu gihugu, mu gihe ari umugambwe uri ku butegetsi wonyene wiganziye urubuga, kandi ushaka kwiyitiranya n'inzego z'igihugu. Uwo murwi uvuga uti: "Hagize uwerekana ibijanye n'ihonyangwa ry'agateka ka zina muntu mu Burundi, aca afatwa nk'uwushaka guhungabanya inzego". 'Icegeranyo c'ibinyoma' Ambasaderi Rénovat Tabu aserukira Uburundi muri uwo murwi wa ONU i Geneve, avuga ko ayo majambo agamije gutyoza igihugu kandi ko ashingiye ku cegeranyo c'ibinyoma. Avuga ati: "Uwo murwi waguye mu mutego w'abanyapolitike". Kubwiwe, amatora yo mu mwaka wa 2020 ariko ategurwa hisunzwe urupapuro rw'inzira n'umurwi ujejwe amatora uri "ku kivi". Mu minsi iheze umugambwe CNL utavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi urongowe na Agathon Rwasa watangaje ko abanywanyi bawo mu gihugu cose bakorerwa amabi atandukanye.

Abafana benshi cyane baje kureba umukino wa nyuma wa Kobe Bryant Yatsinze amanota 60 wenyine, afasha ikipe ye ya LA Lakers kwigaranzura Utah Jazz bari bahanganye mu mujyi wa Los Angeles. Bryant w'imyaka 37, yamaze imyaka yose y'imikinire muri Lakers, atwara ibikombe bitanu bya shampiyona ya NBA ndetse anaba umukinnyi wa gatatu watsinze amanota menshi mu mateka ya basketball. Amatike y'umukino we wa nyuma yagurishijwe amadolari agera ku 27.500. Bryant yatsinze amanota 23 mu gace ka kane k'umukino bituma ikipe ye ikuramo ikinyuranyo cy'amanota 15 itsinda umukino. Nyuma y'umukino, yabwiye ikivunge cy'abafana ko "bitangaje" kurangiza umukino muri ubwo buryo. Bryant yatangiye gukina muri NBA afite imyaka 17, akirangiza amashuri yisumbuye Yakiniye ikipe ya LA Lakers ubuzima bwe bwose Bryant yavuze ko atari yarigeze atekereza ko ashobora gukina neza cyane ku mukino we wa nyuma Yagize ati: "Urazi, nari naniwe cyane pe, ariko natekereje ko ngomba gukomeza ngahanyanyaza kubera ko abafana bari batangaje kandi ntekereza ko icyo ari cyo nzibuka kurusha ibindi." Ibyamamare mu ma filimi i Hollywood, abaririmbyi b'injyana ya Rap ndetse n'ibyamamare mu mikino, bose bari bitabiriye uyu mukino muri sitade ya Staples Center yari yakubise yuzuye i Los Angeles. Urwego rutwara abantu muri gari ya moshi i Los Angeles rwahinduye izina rya sitasiyo iri hafi ya sitade ya Staples Center yitirirwa uyu mukinnyi bayita "Kobe station" kuri uwo munsi. Ibirango biriho izina rya Kobe Bryant byagurishijwe cyane mu iduka riri kuri sitade ya Staples Center Abafama banditse ubutumwa busezera kuri Kobe Bryant ku rukuta rwa sitade ya Staples Center Inzu ikorerwamo imyidagaruro n'ibiganiro ya Los Angeles yacanywemo urumuri rutaka amabara ya Lakers. Cyakora abanyamakuru bavuga ko Bryant adakundwa n'abafana bose. Imikinire ye yaranzwe no kutagenda neza ku buryo buhoraho kandi muri 2003 yarezwe gufata umugore ku ngufu, ndetse yaje kumvikana nawe bitarinze kujya mu rukiko. Kobe Bryant wakuriye muri leta ya Philadelphia yatangiye gukina muri NBA akirangiza amashuri yisumbuye ku myaka 17. Yabaye umukinnyi muto kurusha abandi wakinnye muri NBA, igihe ikipe ye yakinaga na Dallas afite imyaka 18, amezi abiri n'iminsi 11.

Ishengero Katolika ryagirizwa kuvanga politike n'ijambo ry'Imana Amwe mu madini nka Ekleziya Katolika yoyo ivuga ko bigisha iyobokamana ariko ryerekeye n'ivyo abantu barimwo. Mw'ijambo ryiwe yashikirije yibuka imyaka ine amaze atowe n'abanyagihugu ubwabo ku ncuro ya kabiri, Bwana Nkurunziza avuga ko bokwirinda "kugwa mu mutego w'abahanuzi b'ibinyoma n'inyigisho zikomoka hanze" avuga ko zitajanye n'ivy'Imana. Bwana Nkurunziza avuga ati: "Si ivy'imbeshere, bamwe mu bakozi b'Imana baraguye, abandi barakomereka bongera bakomeretsa abayoboke babo; babera umuzimagiza abo bajejwe aho kubabera urumuri n'icitegererezo". Ntadoma urutoke kw'idini iri canke ririya, gusa Ekleziya Katolika ni yo ikunze kwagirizwa ko yivanga mu vya politike. Bavuga ko ibi ibikora cane cane mu gihe ishikiriza aho ihagaze ku biraba ubuzima bw'igihugu mu butumwa bukunda gusomwa mu masengero yose ya Katolika mu gihugu. Abasenyeri ba Katolika bobo bamenyesha ko ata nyigisho za politike batanga, ahubwo ko bigisha iyobokamana ariko ryerekeye n'ivyo abantu barimwo "kuko iyobokamana rirangukira mu buzima bw'abantu". Mu ndwi iheze, mu birori vy'uguhimbaza umunsi mukuru wa Assomption, Pascal Nyabenda arongoye inama nshingamateka, yasavye abarongoye Ekleziya Katolika kuguma hagati na hagati, ntiberekane aho bahagaze mu vya politike kuko ngo bitsitaza abakirisu. Mu kumwishura, Umuvugizi w'inama y'abepiskopi mu Burundi, Yohakimu Ntahondereye, yamenyesheje ko bazovuga ijambo ry'Imana uko riri ata gucisha iruhande, "n'aho hari aho rigera rikababaza".

Viviane Uwizeye avuga ko bamwe mu bo babana bakiyirwaye nabo yizeye ko bazakira Uyu ni umuntu wanduye coronavirus mu Rwanda wamenyakana bikavugwa cyane ku mbuga nkoranyambaga. Yabwiye BBC ko ari we wahamagaye abashinzwe ubuzima ubwo yari amaze iminsi afite bimwe mu bimenyetso bya Covid-19 birimo inkorora n'umutwe kugira ngo bamusuzume. Avuga ko bamusanze iwe mu rugo tariki 16/04/2020 bagafata ibipimo, bakamubwira ko ibisubozi abibona hagati y'amasaha 24 na 48. Ati: "Bavuye mu rugo uwo munsi nimugoroba naje kuremba ntangira kubura umwuka, nibwo baje kunjyana kwa muganga CHUK banshyira ku mwuka, bareba ko wenda naba mfite izindi ndwara ariko ntibazibona". Umunsi wakurikiyeho nibwo yamenyeshejwe ko basanze yaranduye coronavirus. Avuga ko yari inkuru iteye ubwoba. Minisiteri y'ubuzima ivuga ko kugeza ejo kuwa gatatu mu Rwanda hamaze kuboneka abantu 287 banduye coronavirus, muri bo 164 bamaze kuyikira ntawe irica. Mu minsi irindwi ishize habonetse abantu 19 bashya banduye Covid-19, iyi minisiteri ivuga ko muri bo batatu(3) ari bo bayanduriye imbere mu gihugu, abandi biganjemo abashoferi b'amakamyo yambukiranya imipaka. Tariki 18/04/2020 Madamu Uwizeye, umubyeyi w'abana babiri, yajyanywe ku ivuriro rya Kanyinya riri hanze gato y'umujyi wa Kigali, aho bakurikirana abrwaye coronavirus mu Rwanda. Icyo gihe minisiteri y'ubuzima yatangaje ko ari we murwayi bafite urembye, Viviane Uwizeye nawe yabwiye BBC ko koko muri iryo vuriro icyo gihe ariwe murwayi wari urembye. Ati: "Nitaweho cyane, bakoresheje imbaraga zishoboka bampa imiti ishoboka itsinda ry'abaganga ryarazaga rikareba icyo rigomba kunkorera. Ni njyewe wari urembye kuri urwo rwego". Vivine Uwizeye (wambaye ingofero) ajya akora ibikorwa byo kumurika imideri Madamu Uwizeye yabwiye BBC ko mu 2011 yatowe nka Miss Rwanda mu marushanwa y'abagore n'abakobwa babyibushye. Nta yandi marushanwa araba nk'ayo bityo avuga ko akiri Miss Rwanda muri iki kiciro. Nubwo ari munini nta ndwara zikunze kugendana n'umubyibuho kwa muganga bamusanzemo nk'uko abivuga, yemeza ko biri mu byafashije umubiri we gusohora iyi virus mu mubiri. Avuga ko abaganga bavura ibimenyetso by'iyi ndwara umubiri nawo ukarwana n'iyi virus, maze bitewe n'ubwirinzi bwawo ukabasha kuyitsinda. Ku kigo yavurirwagaho i Kanyinya, avuga ko abarwayi bahura n'abaganga b'indwara zo mu mutwe babafasha kutagira ihungabana kubera ibyo bari kumva ko iki cyorezo kiri kwica abantu benshi. Serivisi zose abariyo bahabwa avuga ko nta kiguzi baca umurwayi , akavuga ko abona ko leta yabyiteguye neza. Ibyumweru bibiri nyuma yo gukira Mu ntangiriro z'uku kwezi nibwo ibipimo bya mbere byagaragaje ko yakize iyi ndwara. Ati: "Icyo gihe uba winjiye mu kindi kiciro cyo gupima neza ko wakize. Madamu Uwizeye avuga ko kuva icyo gihe kugeza ejo tariki 13/05/2020 asezererwa mu bitaro yasuzumwe inshuro enye (4) kugira ngo bemeze neza ko yakize. Uwizeye avuga kuri Covid-19 ati: "Utayivuje kare yaguhitana, ariko nanone nkurikije uko nari ndembye mpamya ko uwagera kwa muganga wese hakiri kare yahava yakize". Uwizeye avuga ko iyi ndwara igoranye mu rwego rw'uburyo yandura kuko atazi neza uko yayanduye, gusa akeka ko yayanduye akoze ahantu iyi virus iri nawe akiyanduza. Avuga ko nubwo yayikize, kwa mugana bamubwiye ko akomeza akirinda ko yakongera kuyandura. Miss Vivy nk'uko bakunze kumwita, avuga ko mu babana nawe mu rugo harimo abanduye Covid-19 bakiri kuvurwa kandi yizeye ko nabo bazakira.

Abaganga bari kuvura ebola muri Uganda mu mwaka uheze Ubushikiranganji bujejwe amagara muri Uganda buvuga ko abantu batandatu bariko bapimwa indwara izwi mu Congereza kw'izina rya Crimean-Congo Haemorrhagic Fever (CCHF). Ngo abandi bantu batatu bapfuye, bikibazwa ko bahitwanywe n'iyo ndwara, yandukira mu kuribwa n'inyondwe. Mu mwaka uheze Uganda yabonetsemwo ibiza bibiri vya Ebola, hamwe n'ikindi kiza gisa nayo kizwi kw'izina rya Marburg.

Abari mu myiyerekano muri RDC bahanganye n'abajejwe umutekano Abari mu myiyerekano bariko barasaba ko prezida Joseph Kabila atanga imihoho. Abarongoye imigambwe itavuga rumwe na reta barahiye bararengwa ko bategerezwa kugira iyo myiyerekano n'aho bayibujije. Ku mugwa mukuru Kinshasa, igipolisi carashe ivyuka vyokera mu majana n'amajana y'abantu bari imbere y'inzu ibamwe ibamwo umukuru w'urunani rutavuga rumwe na reta, Felix Tshisekedi, nk'uko bivugwa na AFP. Abatavuga rumwe na reta baguma bashira inkuru ku rubuga rwa Twitter zivuga uko imyiyerekano iriko iragenda. Tchisekedi yahamagaje iyo myiyerekano yasubiwemwo na AFP avuga ko yasavye abantu kwihereza amabarabara "mu kwerekana ko barambiwe n'ubwo butegetsi bashaka ko buvaho". Amatora muri RDC yimuriwe mu mwaka wa 2019 RDC: Amatora ashobora kwigizwa inyuma imyaka ibiri Abatavuga rumwe na reta bashaka reta mfatakibanza kuva itariki 31 z'ukwezi kwa cumi na kabiri. Ariko akanama kajejwe amatora karamenyesheje mu ntango z'ukwezi kwa cumi na rimwe ko amatora azoba inyuma y'umwaka itariki 23 z'ukwezi kwa cumi na kabiri mu 2018. Itariki y'amatora yagumye itera amatati- prezida Kabira akaba yarahakanye kuva ku butegetsi inyuma y'ikiringo ciwe ca kabiri mu kwezi kwa cumi na kabiri mu 2016, n'aho habaye ukumwiyamiriza.

Umugwi w'umupira w'amaguru All Black FC wiyaguye winjizamwo abenegihugu ba Hong Kong n'izindi nkehwa Muri Hong Kong, abanyagihugu baho ni gake bakina umupira n'abimukira. Ntibitangaje kumbure kubona ica gatatu c'abashinwa bo muri Hong Kong batemera kwicarana n'abantu atari abo mu moko yabo iyo bari mu ngendeshwa zo kwunguruza abantu, canke iyo babana begeranye imiryango, canke iyo abana babo bigana n'ababo bimukira, nkuko itohoza ryakozwe n'ishirahamwe riharanira ubwiyunge Hong Kong Unison rivuga. Urukino rw'umupira w'amaguru rwoba rufise inguvu zikwiye mu kugwanya iyo nyifato? Kuva mu 2016, umugwi w'umupira w'amaguru w'impunzi - All Black FC - uragerageza gutorera inyishu ico kibazo mu gufasha abakinyi bakamenyerana na bagenzi babo bo muri Hong Kong, gurtyo bigatuma abanyafrika bagira isura nziza aho baba. Uwatanguje uwo mugwi Medard Privat Koya, aturuka muri Repubulika ya Centrafrique, yahora ari umukinyi rurangiranwa w'umupira w'amaguru. Mu gihe abakinyi biwe bose bari mu barondera ubuhungiro, uwo mugwi warugururiye imiryango abashinwa hamwe n'izindi nkehwa zo muri Hong Kong. "Urukino rw'umupira w'amaguru rurashobora gutuma tuja hamwe," niko avuga. "Dushobora guhanahana ivyiyumviro, tukanafashanya." Biradufasha n'ingene dukoresha umwanya - kuberako impunzi zitemerewe gukora muri Hong Kong naho zoba zabaye imyaka myinshi muri ico gisagara. Benshi mu bakinyi ntibashobora kuronka akazi muri Hong Kong Darius, impunzi ituruka mu gihugu ca Togo, yashitse muri Hong Kong mu myaka itanu iheze. Niwe "capitaine" w'umugwi, avuga ko umupira w'amaguru utuma aronka ico akora mu gihe batarekuriwe gukora. " Mu vyukuri biragoye. Umuntu aca yiyumvira ko ariko arapfa buhoro buhoro mu gihe umara imyaka itanu canke indwi y'ubuzima bwawe urindiriye. Uca utangura kwibaza ico uzovamwo muri kazoza? "Uravye igihe cose umara ata kazi kandi ata kintu uriko uriga, uriyumvira akazi uzoshobora gukora n'uwuzokaguha?" niko Darius avuga. Igihe yinjiriye muri uwo mugwi, vyatumye agira icizere. "Hari umugwi w'abantu nkukira, tugwanira hamwe kandi abantu bakatwubaha baravye ivyo dukora," niko avuga. Ku bakinyi bafise impano muri uwo mugwi, ukwo kuja kwidagadura vyatumye bashika kure. Muribo hari abatowe mu mashirahamwe y'umupira w'amaguru, bagashobora no kurondera impusha zituma bakora muri Hong Kong. Capitaine Darius (hagati) hamwe n'uwatanguje umugwi Medard (i buryo) bipfuza ko umugwi wofasha abakinyi "Abantu bafata amafoto, abandi bakanyegeza amazuru" Medard biramuha ingoga kubona abenegihugu hamwe n'abandi badaturuka muri Afrika binjira mu mugwi All Black FC. Vyerekana ko ivyo baharanira vyubashwe, niko avuga. Darius avuga ko bigora impunzi kuronka inzu yo gupanga kuko ba nyenamazu baterekwa abanyamahanga. Solomon Nyassi, umunya Gambia w'imyaka 26, yabwiye BBC yo mu Gishinwa ko umunsi wa mbere ashika muri Hong Kong, ko abantu bamuciye iruhande, baciye bafuka amazuru n'ibiganza. Avuga ko rimwe na rimwe iyo ariko aratembera mw'ibarabara, ko iyo ahuye n'abakerarugendo b'abashinwa baca bamukikuza bamusaba ngo bifotoze hamwe, ivyo bigatuma abura ico afata n'ico areka. Solomon yahuye ubwa mbere na mugenziwe w'umukobwa w'imyaka 20, Louise Chan ku rukino rwa All Black FC. We yemera ko abagabo b'abanyafrika bahumuye kandi bamana intego, umuryango wiwe ukaba ushigikira iyo migenderanire yabo mu gihe abandi batabitegera. "Abanyagihugu ba Hong Kong barugaye mu mitwe," niko Louise asanzwe afise imangazini y'impuzu avuga. "Hari abantu bandungikira ubutumwa bavuga ibihuhwa ku banyafrika, ivyo bigatuma mbabara." Umukinyi Solomon na mugenziwe Louise baravuzwe mu duce tumwe tumwe Ivyiyumviro bidafise ifatiro bibonekera ku kibuga. Darius avuga ko abanya Hong Kong bibaza ko abanyafrika bakina bavunana. Hari n'abavuze amajambo mabi ku mugwi. "Twama dusaba abakinyi bacu kwigenza neza," niko umukinyi mukuru avuga. "Ukwo biri kwose, dutegerezwa kuguma dutekanye. Ntidukwiye kwemera ko badutera ubwoba." "Nta vy'amoko mbona" Doug Tze, umugabo w'umunya Hong Kong w'imyaka 34, akina muri All Black FC kuva mu kwezi kw'indwi mu 2017. Avuga ko yumva umengo ntiyakiranywe igishika ubwa mbere. Ariko ngw'inyuma yaho agiriye akigoro akamizako, Doug avuga ko abo banyafrika babaye abagenzi gushika aho basigaye basohokana. "Nta macakubiri ndababonamwo, ndababonamwo abakinyi beza," niko avuga. Umugwi All Black FC mu rukino uhura na Biu Chun Rangers, ukina mw'ihiganwa rikuru rya Hong Kong Kevin Fung, ari mw'ishuli ry'umupira w'amaguru ariko yaheruka guhurira n'abakinyi ba All Black FC mw'ihiganwa, yemera ko abo bakinyi b'abanyafrika bashobora kubera akarorero imvukira za Hong Kong. "Barakunda umupira cane, bakamizako kandi bagakora cane. Ariko abakinyi b'abanya Hong Kong barambigwa n'ingoga," niko Kevin avuga. "Abenegihugu ba Hong Kong bitaho kurusha akazi n'ivyigwa. Bagaha umupira w'amaguru akanya gato." Kubera ico, arakekeranya ko umupira w'amaguru ushobora gutuma ikibazo c'amacakubiri ashingiye ku rukoba kirangira, abantu bakabana mu mwumvikano. "Muri rusangi, urukino rw'umupira w'amaguru ntirukundwa na benshi," niko abibona. "Muri Hong Kong hari amahiganwa make. Inkino ntizimenyekanishwa cane. Nta muntu yitwararika ivy'umupira w'amaguru. Gutora inyishu y'ikibazo c'amacakubiri ashingiye ku rukoba biciye mu mupira w'amaguru bisa n'ivyogorana." Umugwi All Black FC nawo nyene uvyumva ukwo. Kugira ubandanye intego wishinze yo guhindura inyifato, abakinyi bawo baritanga mu bikogwa bimwe bimwe nko kuja kuramutsa abantu bashaje mu ntumbero yo kwimenyekanisha cane mu kibano. "Birahindura ivyiyumviro vy'abenegihugu," niko Darius avuga. "Nta kintu biradushikanako muri kino gihe ariko bitanga inzira ku ruvyaro rwimirije, aho uzosanga inkehwa, abimukira hamwe n'impunzi babonwa ukundi muri kazoza."

Ku munsi wa kabiri, abasirikare b'igihugu bishe abagwanyi 14 mu mishamirano yabereye mu karere ka Mayo-Binka Ku munsi wa kabiri, abasirikare b'igihugu bishe abagwanyi 14 mu mishamirano yabereye mu karere ka Mayo-Binka, ku birometero vyinshi uvuye mu gisagara ca Bamenda. Avugana na BBC, umuvugizi w'ubushikiranganji bwo kwivuna abansi bwa Cameroun, Koloneli Didier Badjeck, yavuze ko abo bagwanyi bariko batwara ibiziga vya bagenzi babo batatu ku maziko, munyuma bagwa mu mishamirano n'igisirikare aho baciye bicwa. Ku munsi wa mbere, abo bagwanyi bateze umutego igisirikare ahitwa Nkambe, baburamwo bagenzi babo batandatu, bituma igitigiri c'inyeshamba zishwe muri iyi minsi ibiri kija kuri 29. Ikarata yerekana igisagara ca Bamenda Koloneli Badjeck yavuze ko abasirikare 200 bamaze gupfira mu ngwano, igitigiri kiri hejuru y'ic'abasirikare bamaze gupfa mu ngwano ya Cameroun ku bagwanyi ba Boko Haram mu myaka ine. Abo bagwanyi batanguye ingwano bipfuza gushinga igihugu gishasha bazita Ambazonia, mu gihe bidoga bavuga ko abanyagihugu baba mu gace kavugwamwo icongereza bakumigwa mu buzima bw'igihugu.

Muri ico gitero, abandi babiri bakomeretse bakaba bariko baravurirwa mu mavuriro yegereye aho vyabereye. Abajejwe umutekano barimwo abasirikare, abapolisi n'abajejwe gucungera amashamba bari mu gikorwa c'uguhiga izo nkozi z'ikibi zikekwa ko ari izo mu muhari wa Al-Shabab. Iyo modoka yariko iva mu gisagara ca Mombasa yatewe igeze mu karere ka Lamu aho abari muri yo babonye abagabo bayihagarika ubwo nyene baca batangura kuyirasa. Abakoze ico gitero ntibaramenyekana ariko mu gihugu kibanyi ca Somalia, umurwi w'intagondwa za Al-Shabaab umaze igihe ukora ibitero mu gihugu. Abajejwe umutekano bavuga ko bongereje inguvu kugira ngo bashobore gufata abo bakoze ico gitero iyo bahungiye mu mashamba.. Igihugu ca Kenya gisanzwe cararungitse ingabo zaco muri Somalia gufashanya n'izindi ngabo z'umuryango wa Afrika (AMISOM) kurwanya uyo muhari w'intagondwa. Kenya yarakomeje ibikorwa vy'ugucungera umutekano inyuma y'aho hari amakuru y'igisata c'igenderza yavuga ko al-Shabab yariko itegura ibitero muri ino minsi mikuru ya Noweli n'Umwaka mushasha.

Amabendera azururutswa kugeza hagati mu gihe cy'iki cyunamo, nkuko yabitangaje. Bwana Hamad yapfuye nyuma gato ya saa tanu z'amanywa zaho kuri uyu wa gatatu mu bitaro bya Muhimbili i Dar es Salaam aho yari amaze hafi ibyumweru bitatu arimo kuvurirwa, nkuko Perezida Mwinyi yabivuze mu itangazo rigufi kuri televiziyo. Perezida Mwinyi nta mpamvu yavuze y'urupfu rwe, ariko ishyaka ACT Wazalendo rya Bwana Hamad ryatangaje mu mpera y'ukwezi kwa mbere ko bamusanzemo coronavirus we n'umugore we. Icyo gihe bamwe mu bo bakorana mu biro na bo byatangajwe ko babasanzemo iyi virusi. Perezida wa Tanzania John Magufuli yatanze ubutumwa bwo kwihanganisha umuryango we n'abaturage ba Zanzibar. Uburwayi bwe bwamenyekanye hashize iminsi Perezida Magufuli yihanangirije abashinzwe iby'ubuvuzi ko batakwihutira kuzana inkingo za Covid-19 badafite ibyemezo, avuga ko zishobora kugira ingaruka ku buzima. Bwana Hamad, cyangwa Maalim Seif nkuko yari amenyerewe cyane muri Zanzibar, yabaye umutegetsi wa mbere muri Tanzania wo ku rwego rwo hejuru cyane utangaje ku mugaragaro ko bamusanzemo Covid-19. Kuva mu mpera y'ukwezi kwa kane mu 2020, Tanzania yahagaritse gutangaza amakuru ajyanye na Covid-19, mu kwezi kwa gatandatu k'uwo mwaka Perezida Magufuli avuga ko itakiharangwa. Mu bihe bya vuba bishize ariko, Kiliziya Gatolika yo muri Tanzania yavuze ko hari ibimenyetso ko Covid-19 yongeye kwiyongera mu gihugu, ishingiye ku bwinshi bwa misa zo gusabira abapfuye isigaye isoma ku munsi. Bwana Hamad yari umuntu ukomeye cyane muri politiki y'abatavuga rumwe na leta muri Zanzibar no muri Tanzania muri rusange. Kugeza ubwo yapfaga, yari Visi Perezida wa mbere muri leta y'ubumwe bw'igihugu yavuye mu matora rusange yo mu kwezi kwa 10 mu mwaka ushize.

Abantu bariyongereye cane mu micungararo ya Tnganyika mu myaka ya 1990 kubera impunzi nyinshi Ikiyaga Tanganyika ni co kinini muri Afrika kandi ifi z'aco zikaba zigaburira abantu benshi mu bihugu bigikikije. Ariko igitigiri c'ifi caragabanutse cane, mu gihe abarovyi bo baguma bongerekana. Ikwiyongera kw'abarovyi ni ko abantu bahora bibaza ko kwatumye ifi zigabanuka. Ifi zo mu kiyaga Tanganyika zibeshejeho abantu benshi Ariko ubushakashatsi bushasha bwerekana ko vyavuye ku kwiyongera k'ubushuhe. Ico kiyaga Tanganyika gikikijwe n'Uburundi , Congo , Tanzania, na Zambia n'isoko rikomeye ry'ibifungurwa n'akazi kuri milioni z'abantu mu karere. Kugira bagerageze gutahura igituma umwimbu w'ifi uguma ugabanuka muri ico kiyaga, abashakashatsi bihweje urugero rw'ivyiretse hasi hamwe n'ibisigarira vy'amafi muri ico kiyaga c'akamaro ntangere. Ivyo batoye n'uko ukwongerekana kw'ubushuhe mu myaka ijana iheze gutuma bigorana ko amazi yo hejuru n'ayo hasi mu kiyaga avagangana. Ivyo bisigura ko ingaburo ziri hasi zitaba zigishika hejuru gutyo amafi ntasubire kuronka ivyo arya bikwiye. Abanditse ico cegeranyo bavuga ko ivyo vyatanguye n'imbere y'uko haba uburovyi bwa cane n'ukuvuga hagati mu kinjana ca 20 canke mu myaka y'igihumbi n'amajana icenda na 50. Uretse ku vyo kurya no ku buzi, iryo gabanuka rirashobora no kugira ingaruka ku bwinshi budasanzwe bw'ibinyabuzima biri muri ico kiyaga. Abarovyi bakoresha amatara atuma ifi zitozito zibegera ari na zo nyinshi muri ico kiyaga. Umwe mu bashakashatsi yavuze ko gifise ubwoko bw'inyabuzima atahandi bisangwa gushika ku ncuro 50 kuruta mu mazinga ya Galapagos ariko ko ata bantu benshi babizi. Hamwe amakungu atokwikangura ngo ahagurukire igeramirwa ry'ico kiyaga riturutse ku kw'iyongera kw'ubushuhe, vyinshi mw'itunga ico kiyaga kibitse bishobora kugenda akagirire.

Kevin De Bruyne yahaye akazi gakomeye abakinnyi ba Liverpool Mu cyumweru gishize, Liverpool yegukanye igikombe cya shampiyona mu myaka 30 ishize ubwo Man City yanganyaga na Chelsea, ariko igarutse mu kibuga mu ijoro ryakeye irahababarira. Nijoro, Liverpool yabanje guhabwa icyubahiro na City mbere y'umukino kuri Etihad Stadium ariko umukino ntiyawuboneyemo icyubahiro. City yayoboye umukino kuva rugikubita ndetse itsinda ibitego bitatu mu gice cya mbere cy'umukino. Umubiligi Kevin De Bruyne yafunguye amazamu ya Liverpool kuri penaliti nyuma y'uko Raheem Sterling agushijwe mu rubuga rw'amahina, ndetse Raheem nyuma gato yungamo icya kabiri. Umukinnyi wo hagati ukiri muto Phil Foden nawe yagaragaje ko afite imbere heza atsinda icya gatatu mbere gato y'uko igice cya mbere kirangira. City yatsinze igitego cya kane mu gice cya kabiri ubwo Alex Oxlade-Chamberlain wa Liverpool yanyereje umupira ukajya mu izamu ry'ikipe ye nyuma y'igitutu cya Raheem Sterling. City ni yo yegukanye shampiyona ebyiri ziheruka, irusha inota rimwe Liverpool mu ya 2018-19, ariko ubu ikaba yararushijwe cyane na Liverpool. Raheem yishimira igitego kuri uyu mukino Ni inshuro ya gatatu gusa mu myaka 11 y'imikino ishize umutoza Pep Guardiola adatwara igikombe cy'aho ari gutoza yaba muri City, muri Barcelona cyangwa muri Bayern Munich. Umukino wo mu ijoro ryo ku wa kane, wari witezwe cyane mu Bwongereza ariko warangiye nta nkuru kuri Liverpool ndetse City itanze ubutumwa ko umwaka utaha ishobora kuzaba ikaze. De Bruyne yerekanye ko ari umukinnyi guhagarika bitoroshye kubera amacenga no kunyaruka, Phil Foden nawe yerekana ko ashobora kuba umusimbura mwiza wa David Silva uri gusohoka muri City. Riyad Mahrez winjiye asimbuye nawe yari azi ko atsinze icya gatanu n'umutwe ariko umusifuzi aracyanga nyuma yo kubaza video assistant referee (VAR) ikamwereka ko yabanje gukora umupira n'akaboko. Imihigo iracyashoboka Liverpool icyeneye kongera kubyuka vuba vuba mu mikino itandatu isigaye, kugira ngo uyu mwaka w'imikino ukomeze uyigendekere neza. Alan Shearer wahoze ari umukinnyi w'Ubwongereza, mu nyandiko ye kuri BBC yavuze ko Liverpool yatwaye igikombe cya City ubu ikaba inashaka gutwara n'imihigo yayo. Ibi ni ibyo Liverpool ishobora kugeraho n'ubundi: 'Ntibari baje hano kutwishima hejuru' Umutoza wa Man City Pep Guardiola yagize ati: "Ndishimye. Ndashima ikipe yanjye, twatsinze ikipe ya mbere n'uburyo ikomeye. "Nabonye icyubahiro twabahaye uburyo bari bishimye. Amasura yabo yerekana ko ari aba mbere koko. "[Ariko] Ntibari baje hano kutwishima hejuru. Banyoye inzoga nyinshi barangije baza hano guhatana. "Ibyo rero byaduhaye amahirwe yo kubakubita 4 - 0, byari ingenzi cyane kandi kuri twe mu gihe twitegura Arsenal na Real Madrid." 'Man City irakomeye cyane' Umutoza wa Liverpool Jurgen Klopp yabwiye Sky Sports ati: "Mu mutwe, banyarukaga kuturusha. Twananiwe guhindura ibintu. "Iyo ukina na Man City uba ufite ibibazo bikomeye. Twagize amahirwe ariko ntitwayabyaza umusaruro. Ibivuyemo rero turabyakiriye". Klopp avuga ko batari bashyize ibitekerezo byose kuri uyu mukino ariko ko ikipe ye ntako itagize kuko yakinaga n'ikipe ikomeye kandi babashije gutwara igikombe. "Man City irakomeye. Nabonye uko bakinnye uyu mwaka, ntabwo bakinnye umukino mubi."

Bwana Fayulu ashishikariza abikuye mu masezerano kongera kuyakurikiza Ni nyuma yaho babiri mu bakuru b'abatavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi bari bashyize umukono kuri ayo masezerano - Félix Tshisekedi na Vital Kamerhe - bisubiyeho bakavuga ko batakiyakurikije kubera ko abayoboke b'amashyaka yabo bayamaganye. Bwana Fayulu, umudepite uzwi cyane nk'umushoramari n'umunyemari kurusha uko azwi nk'umunyapolitiki - yagenwe bitunguranye ku cyumweru nk'umukandida uhuriweho nyuma y'ibiganiro byari bimaze iminsi bibera i Genève mu Busuwisi. Yavuze ko ayo masezerano atasenyutse burundu, ashishikariza abayavuyemo kongera bakayakurikiza. Ibiro ntaramakuru AFP bisubiramo amagambo ya Bwana Fayulu ubwo yaganiraga na televiziyo TV5Monde ku wa kabiri agira ati: "Amasezerano aracyariho". "Ndashishikariza abavandimwe banjye kurenga amarangamutima ashingiye ku burwanashyaka ahubwo bagaha agaciro inyungu ziyaruta z'igihugu". "Nta na rimwe igihe kiba cyarenganye umuntu ukora igikwiye". Bwana Fayulu yongeyeho ati: "Ni uruhe rugero turi guha abana na rubanda, cyane twebwe tutavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi iteka tuba tuvuga ko ubutegetsi bwa [Perezida] Kabila butubahiriza itegeko-nshinga?" Bwana Tshisekedi, umukuru w'ishyaka UDPS, avuga ko yikuye muri mu masezerano y'i Genève nyuma yo gusanga abarwanashyaka ba UDPS batayashyigikiye Umutegetsi wo mu ishyaka UDPS rya Bwana Tshisekedi uri i Buruseli mu murwa mukuru w'Ububiligi - ari naho Bwana Tshisekedi yagiye nyuma y'inama y'i Genève - yabwiye AFP ati: "Kuri ubu ibiganiro byararangiye". Ikusanyabitekerezo ryatangajwe mu mpera y'ukwezi gushize kwa cumi n'ikigo Congo Research Group cyo muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Amerika, ryagaragaje ko Bwana Tshisekedi na Bwana Kamerhe bakurikiranaga ku mwanya wa mbere n'uwa kabiri mu bahabwa amahirwe menshi ko bashobora gutsinda amatora ya perezida. Iryo kusanyabitekerezo ryagaragaje ko bari bakurikiwe na Emmanuel Ramazani Shadary, umukandida w'urugaga rw'amashyaka ari ku butegetsi muri Kongo.

Iyi ndege yaguye muri kilometero imwe hanze y'umuhanda wayo Abantu 23 bakomerekeye muri iyi ndege, yaguye moteri zayo zazimye ndetse n'amapine yavuyeho, nk'uko abategetsi babitangaza. Ni indege y'ubwoko bwa Airbus 321 ya kompanyi ya Ural Airlines yari igiye ahitwa Simferpol mu kirwa cya Crimea maze igihaguruka igonga itsinda ry'inyoni zo mu bwoko bw'inuma bitera ikibazo moteri zayo. Ikinyamakuru cya Leta cyise kugwa kw'iyi ndege "igitangaza cy'i Ramensk". Ural Airlines yatangaje ko iyi ndege yangiritse bigaragara, ku buryo itazongera kuguruka. Iyi kompanyi ivuga kandi ko hatangiye iperereza ku byabaye. Iyi ndege yari itwaye abagenzi 233, abayitwaye n'abakozi bayo, bivugwa ko yagonze izi nyoni zikajya muri moteri zayo maze abayitwaye bagahita bahitamo kuyimanura igitaraganya. Umwe mu bari muri iyi ndege utatangajwe umwirondoro yavuze kuri televiziyo y'igihugu ko indege imaze guhaguruka yicundugutuye mu buryo bukomeye. Yagize ati: "Hashize nk'amasegonda atanu, amatara yahise atangira kwaka twumva n'umwuka w'ikintu gihiye. Maze indege iragwa buri wese asohoka akiza amagara ye". Ikigo cy'ubwikorezi bwo mu kirere Rosaviatsia kivuga ko iyi ndege yaguye ahantu mu murima ku ntera ya kilometero imwe uvuye mu muhanda wayo w'ikibuga cy'indege mpuzamahanga cya Zhukovsky. Abagenzi n'abakora mu ndege bayisohotsemo iigtaraganya Abagenzi bahise bavanwa muri iyi ndege, bamwe bajyanwa mu bitaro kuvurwa abandi basubizwa ku kibuga cy'indege. Minisiteri y'ubuzima mu Burusiya ivuga ko abana batanu bari mu bashyizwe mu bitaro kubera iyi mpanuka, ikavuga kandi ko abakomeretse hari abarembye n'abatarembye. Kirill Skuratov, umuyobozi wa Ural Airlines, avuga ko abagenzi bifuza gukomeza urugendo rwabo bashyirwa mu zindi ndege. Kugongana kw'indege n'inyoni birasanzwe mu ngendo zo mu kirere, muri Amerika honyine buri mwaka habarurwa uku kugongana inshuro ibihumbi. Gusa inshuro nkeya cyane nibwo biteza impanuka. Iyi ndege yaguye muri kilometero imwe uvuye mu muhanda wayo

Bwana Erdogan yongeye gutsinda amatora ya perezida yabaye mu kwezi gushize Muri iyo myaka ibiri y'ibihe bidasanzwe, abantu babarirwa mu bihumbi amacumi batawe muri yombi, abandi nabo birukanwa ku kazi. Ariko leta ubu noneho yafashe umwanzuro wo guhagarika icyo gihe cy'ibihe bidasanzwe nyuma yaho yari yaragiye icyongera ishuro zirindwi, buri gihe ikacyongera amezi atatu. Turukiya mu matora y'umukuru w'igihugu Ingabo za Turukiya zafashe agace ka Afrin muri Syria Indege ya Turukiya yataye inzira igeze hasi Uyu mwanzuro wo gusoza igihe cy'ibihe bidasanzwe ufashwe nyuma yaho Perezida Recep Tayyip Erdogan wa Turukiya yongeye gutorerwa kuyobora iki gihugu. Mu gihe cyo kwiyamamaza, abakandinda batavuga rumwe na leta bari bavuze ko ikintu cya mbere bari guhindura iyo baramuka batowe cyari ukurangiza igihe cy'ibihe bidasanzwe. Imibare ya leta ya Turukiya ndetse n'iy'imiryango itegamiye kuri leta, igaragaza ko abantu barenga ibihumbi 107 birukanwe ku mirimo ya leta kuva igihe cy'ibihe bidasanzwe cyatangira. Abarenga ibihumbi 50 nabo barafunzwe. Benshi mu birukanwe ku kazi baregwa gukorana n'umuyobozi mu idini ya isilamu Fethullah Gulen, uri mu buhungirimo muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Amerika, wigeze kuba akorana bya hafi na Bwana Erdogan. Turukiya ishinja Bwana Gulen n'abayoboke be kuba ari bo bari inyuma yo kugerageza guhirika ubutegetsi bwa Bwana Erdogan. Bwana Gulen ahakana ibi aregwa. Mu igerageza guhirika ubutegetsi ryabaye muri Turukiya mu mwaka wa 2016, inteko ishingamategeko yateweho ibisasu n'indege ya gisirikare. Abantu barenga 250 nabo barishwe.

Olomide kandi arakurikiranwa mu Bufaransa ku caha co gufata ku nguvu bane mu bakobwa batamba mu mugwi wiwe Yari yahamagawe kwitaba mu butungane ku wa gatanu, ariko ntiyaje. Uwumufasha kumuronderera isoko muri Zambia, Mark Mumbalama, yasavye ubucamanza kumuha uwundi mwanya ukwiye. Avuga ko yagize ingorane zo kurungikira umutahe uwo muririmvyi hakiri kare. Ariko Gilbert Phiri, aburanira uwitwaye yasavye ko hasohoka umutahe mpuzamakungu, avuga ko n'imbere y'aho atigeze yitaba ubutungane. Umucamanza Mwandu Sakala yemeye ivyo asaba. Yavuze ati:"Natanze uruhushwa rwo kurungika umutahe wo kumufata." Koffi Olomide, umuririmvyi wo muri RD Congo yagirizwa gukubita umuntu afata amafoto w'umunyarwanda, Nepomuscene Ndayisenga, mu giteramo cabereye mw'ihoteli y'i Lusaka muri Zambia itariki 28 z'ukwezi kwa cumi na kabiri mu 2012. Uwitwaye yagiriza uwo muririmvyi w'imyaka 62 yamukubise mu maso. Avuga ko "yamuvunye urutoke rukuru amena na kamera yiwe." Koffi Olomide ashobora gucibwa urubanza rwo gupfungwa cane gutanga amande. Mu kwezi kw'indwi guheze, igihugu ca Zambia caramubujije guhonyora ku butaka bwaco aho yategerezwa kuja kuremesha igiteramo. Yari yasavye imbabazi abicishije ku mboneshakure y'igihugu ya Zambia. Koffi Olomide arakurikiranwa kandi mu Bufaransa ku caha co gufata abakoba bane mu bamutambira ku nguvu, hakaba haratanzwe n'umutahe mpuzamakungu wo kumufata.

Avugira mu iduka ryo mu ibagiro, Guverineri Pete Ricketts wa leta ya Nebraska, wo mu ishyaka ry'abarepubulikani, yavuze ko igikorwa cya leta ya Colorado ari "igitero kitaziguye ku mibereho yacu". Yatangaje itariki ya 20 y'ukwezi kwa gatatu - umunsi umwe n'uwo Colorado yise uwo kutarya inyama - nk'umunsi wo kutabura inyama ku isahani. Yavuze ko inyama z'inka ari zo za mbere ziribwa cyane muri Nebraska. Urwego rw'ubuhinzi muri iyo leta ni rwo ruha akazi umuntu umwe muri buri bantu bane bafite akazi, kandi abafite inzuri z'amatungo b'aho buri mwaka bagurisha inyama z'agaciro ka miliyari 12 z'amadolari, nkuko bivugwa na Steve Wellman ukuriye urwego rw'ubuhinzi muri leta ya Nebraska. Mu kiganiro n'abanyamakuru mu mujyi wa Omaha, wa mbere mu bunini muri Nebraska, Guverineri Ricketts yavuze ko Nebraska izagira umunsi wo gushishikariza abantu kurya inyama wo guhita uvuguruza icyemezo kidashoboka cyo kutarya inyama cyemejwe muri Colorado mu kwezi gushize. Umunsi wo kutarya inyama (cyangwa "MeatOut Day"), watangijwe mu mwaka wa 1985 n'umuryango uharanira uburenganzira bw'amatungo. Ugamije kumenyesha abantu inyungu ziri mu kurya indyo ishingiye ku bimera. Itangazo rya leta ya Colorado - risaba abahatuye kutarya inyama ku itariki ya 20 y'ukwezi kwa gatatu - rivuga ko "kuvana ibikomoka ku matungo mu mafunguro yacu bigabanya ibyago byo kurwara indwara zitandukanye", zirimo iz'umutima, kanseri na diyabete. Iri tegeko ryongeraho riti: "Ifunguro rivuye mu bimera rifasha mu kurinda ibidukikije rigabanya imyuka yacu ihumanya, mu kubungabunga amashyamba, ibibaya, n'aho inyamaswa ziba, ndetse rigabanya guhumana kw'amazi magari". Guverineri Jared Polis wa leta ya Colorado arya inyama, ariko umugore we amaze igihe kirekire atarya ikintu na kimwe gikomoka ku matungo cyangwa ku nyamaswa (vegan). Mu kiganiro n'abanyamakuru ku wa mbere, Guverineri wa Nebraska yongeyeho ati: "Ubaye ushaka guca inyama z'inka mu gihugu cyacu, waba urimo kubangamira kwihaza mu biribwa kwacu, ikintu cy'ingenzi mu ndyo yuzuye, kandi waba urimo gusenya urwego rwa hano muri leta yacu rw'ingenzi cyane". Buri mwaka, leta ya Nebraska itangaza ukwezi kwa gatanu nk'ukwezi kwahariwe kurya inyama z'inka (Beef Month) ndetse ikanagurisha 'plaques' z'ibinyabiziga zizwi nka "Beef State". Ubu si ubwa mbere Bwana Ricketts yamaganye iyo leta bahana imbibi mu burengerazuba, by'umwihariko yamagana amategeko ya Colorado yemera ikoreshwa ry'urumogi. Mu cyumweru gishize, yavugiye mu kiganiro n'abanyamakuru ati: "Niba wemeje mu mategeko ikoreshwa ry'urumogi, ugiye kwica abana bawe". Yasubizaga ku bijyanye n'umushinga w'itegeko mu nteko ya Nebraska watuma urumogi rukoreshwa mu rwego rw'ubuvuzi. Bwana Polis ntabwo arasubiza ku bijyanye n'itegeko rya Guverineri wa Nebraska ryo kurya inyama.

Messi na Rojo bariko barigina igitego c'intsinzi Iyo umukinyi w'inyuma wa Manchester United Rojo atigira imbere hagufi y'igoli rya Nigeria hanyuma ngo atere umupira ahawe na Gabriel Mercado, Argentine yari ivuye mw'ihiganwa rikuru ry'umupira w'amaguru kw'isi. Lionel Messi yatsinze igitego ciza cane ca mbere, yaciye asimbira ku mugongo wa Rojo kubera umunezero, baca biginana n'abandi bari inyuma y'ikibuga. Igikombe c'isi 2018: Croatia yatsinze Nigeria 2-0 Argentine mu mayirabiri y'igikombe c'isi yose Bagize amahigwe inyuma yo gukina nabi mu gice ca kabiri ku buryo Mascherano yakoze n'ikosa ryatumye haba penalite ya Nigeria yatewe na Victor Moses akinira umugwi wa Chelsea mu Bwongereza, baca baranganya. Lionel Messi yatahukanye ikirato c'inzahabu mu gikombe c'isi co mu 2014 Umukinyi rurangiranwa wa Argentine Lionel Messi, muri uru rukino yari afise akazi katoroshe kubera ukutumvikana kuri hagati y'abakinyi n'umumenyereza Jorge Sampaoli yavuze, " Ndashimiye abantu bose bari ngaha, mu kwitanga, n'abari mu gihugu ca Argentine bagumanye natwe igihe cose." Na yo umukinyi rurangiranwa akaba na kizigenza w'umugwi wa Nigeria John Obi Mikel yavuze,"Twakoze ico dushoboye. Mu gice ca kabiri twagwanye cane. Nta kundi. Uwu ni umugwi ukiri muto, mu myaka ine iri imbere, benshi muri bo bazoba bakomeye mw'ihiganwa nk'iri. Ndishimiye aba basore hamwe n'igikorwa twakoze. Nibaza ko twakinye neza cane. Dukwiye kubandanya." Imirwi ya Afrika yanditse amateka mu gikombe c'isi ca 2018 Messi abaye umukinyi wa gatatu wa Argentine ashoboye gutsinda mu bikombe bitatu vy'isi (2006, 2014 na 2018) inyuma ya Maradona (1982, 1986 na 1994) hamwe na Gabriel Batitstuta (1994, 1998, 2002). Uru rukino rwari rwitezwe n'abantu benshi cane Igice c'igitigiri c'ibitsindo vyiwe 6 vyo mu gikombe c'isi yabitsinze Nigeria. Nta nkeka ko inyuma y'uru rukino, ibintu bibiri bizobandanya kuvurwako harimwo amagara ya Diego Maradona, uretse inyifato yiwe ku kibuga, bivugwa ko yaciye ajanwa kwa muganga inyuma y'urwo rukino. Uko imigwi ikurikirana mu manota inyuma y'urukino rwa nyuma mu mugwi D Ikindi kintu kizovugwa cane n'uko Nigeria yari ikwiye kuronka penalite aho Rojo yatera umupira n'umutwe hanyuma ukamukorako ku kuboko imbere y'uko umuhagarikizi Cuneyt Cakir yifashishirije video agaca afata ingingo ko ata kosa ririmwo. Ubu Argentine bazoca bahura n'Ubufaransa bwa mbere mu mugwi C, mu gihe uwatsinze mu mugwi D Croatia bari mu kibanza ca mbere inyuma yo gutsinda Islande 2-1, bazohura na Danmark.

Kizza Besigye (ibumoso) na Bobi Wine ni abanyapolitiki bakomeye muri Uganda batavuga rumwe na perezida Museveni Bobi Wine yagaragaje kuri Twitter amafoto avuga ko ari ay'abasirikare bagose urugo rwe. Ati: "...byose mu gutsikamira ijwi rya rubanda igihe umwami w'abami agiye kwiyimika bwa gatandatu". Ishyaka Forum for Democratic Change rya Besigye naryo ryatangaje ko abasirikare bagose urugo rw'uyu muyobozi waryo. Mu ijoro ryo kuwa mbere, bivugwa ko abasirikare bateye urugo rw'umunyamakuru Ssesanga Batte wa BBS TV bakamuta muri yombi. Batte ni umunyamakuru wa politiki wagiye akurikirana ibyo kugota ingo z'abanyapolitiki batavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi muri Uganda. Abanyamakuru bagenzi be batangije inkubiri ku mbuga nkoranyambaga bise #FreeSsesangaBatte basaba ko arekurwa nta yandi mananiza. Hagati aho, ikinyamakuru ChimpReports kivuga ko mu ijoro ryacyeye i Kampala abantu bataramenyekana bateye imodoka n'inyubako zimwe na zimwe bafite ibintu biturika. Igisirikare kivuga ko cyafunze abantu bagera kuri 40 bakekwaho imigambi yo guhungabanya ibirori by'irahira rya Perezida Yoweri Museveni, nk'uko ikinyamakuru Daily Monitor kibivuga. Kuwa mbere, ambasade ya Amerika muri Uganda yaburiye ko hashobora kuba imyigaragambyo irimo urugomo mu gihe cyo kurahira, isaba Abanyamerika bahaba "kwitegura guhindura gahunda zabo z'ingendo no kwizigamira ibiryo n'ibyangombwa nkenerwa". Abantu barenga 4,000, barimo abakuru b'ibihugu 11 n'abari abakandida ku mwanya wa perezida, baratumiwe muri ibi birori bizaba ejo kuwa gatatu. Amatora yabaye tariki 14 z'ukwezi kwa mbere yabayemo urugomo rwatwaye ubuzima bw'abantu.

Abakinyi b'Intamba mu Rugamba basanzwe bari mu gihugu ca Qatar mu kwitegurira CAN 2019 Umurwi Fennecs wa Algeria niwo watanguye kwinjiza igitsindo ca mbere, ariko inyuma y'iminota itandatu Uburundi buragombora. Uru rukino ni urwo gufasha imigwi yompi kwitegurira ihiganwa rya CAN 2019 rizotangura mu ndwi iza. Abakinyi b'Intamba mu Rugamba ntibatewe ubwoba n'igihagararo c'abakinyi ba Algeria basanzwe ari ibihangange nka ba Mahrez, Feghouli na Brahimi. Urwo rukino ntirwashoboye kwerekanwa ku mboneshakure kubera umumenyereza wa Algeria yanse ko yerekanwa. Mu gice ca mbere, abakinyi ba Algeria baragerageje gusatira bikomeye izamu ry'Intamba mu Rugamba ariko zaravyifashemwo neza ku buryo ico gice cagiye kurangira ari ubusa ku bundi. Ibintu vyagiye guhinduka mu gice ca kabiri, aho ku munota wa 68 umukinyi Baghdad Bounedjah wa Fennec yatsinze igitsindo ca mbere c'uwo murwi. Abakinyi b'Intamba ntibasimbwe n'umutima. Ku munota wa 74, Uburundi bwaronse igitsindo canditswe ku munyegori wa Algeria, Raïs M'Bolhi, nk'uko bivugwa n'urubuga rw'inkino livescore.com, urukino ruca rurangira ata murwi usumbije uwundi. Intamba mu Rugamba zimaze iminsi mu gisagara ca Doha muri Qatar mu myiteguro ihiganwa rya CAN 2019.

Uno mwaka uzohera abasirikare 1000 ba AMISOM bakuwe muri Somalia Biri mu mugambi uzotuma igitigiri c'abasirikare b'umugwi AMISOM kigabanukako abasirikare igihumbi, uno mwaka niwahera. Kuri ubu AMISOM ifise abasirikare barenga ibihumbi mirongo ibiri bahanganye n'umugwi w'abarwanyi ba ki Islam, Al-Shabab. Intumbero ni uko impera n'imperuka igikorwa co gucungera umutekano wa Somalia, kizoshirwa mu minwe y'abasiriakare b'igihugu. Haciye amezi abiri abantu amajana atanu bahitanywe n'igisasu ku murwa mukuru Mogadishu, bikerekana ko igikorwa co kuhacungera umutekano kitoroshe. Soma izindi nkuru zijanye n'iyi: Uganda ngo yaburiye abasirikare 19 i Janale Urubanza rw'abasirikare ba AMISOM Abasirikare ba Uganda bagiye kuva muri Somalia

Samia Suluhu Hassan atambuka imbere y'akarasisi nyuma yo kurahira nka perezida wa Tanzania Ijambo rye ryibanze mu kuvuga ibigwi no guhoza abasizwe n'uwo asimbuye John Magufuli watabarutse, yavuze ko yagize amahirwe yo kumuba iruhande ati: "Twiteguye gukomereza aho yari agejeje." Yavugiye ijambo rye aho yarahiriye mu cyumba kirimo abantu benshi, barimo Ali Hassan Mwinyi perezida wa gatatu na Jakaya Kikwete perezida wa kane wa Tanzania. Mama Samia yavuze ko uwo asimbuye yari umuntu ugamije impinduka nyabyo kandi "waganishaga igihugu aheza. Bamwe mu batavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi bavuze ko ubutegetsi bwa John Magufuli bwaranzwe n'ibikorwa birimo kunyaga igihugu ubwisanzure. Fatma Karume, umunyamategeko utavugarumwe na politiki za Magufuli, yavuze ko yumva "atazibukirwa ku bikorwa byiza." Madamu Karume yagize ati: "Kuva yagera ku butegetsi igihugu cyarahindutse, gihinduka igihugu kibabaye, ubwisanzure bwacu twarabunyazwe." Mama Samia uyu munsi yagize ati: "Nagize amahirwe yo kumuba iruhande, yarandeze kandi aranyobora bihagije". "Igihugu cyacu gifite amateka meza mu buyobozi n'ubumwe, byubatswe n'abatubanjirije kandi na Perezida Magufuli yakurikije, nababwira ngo ntibagire ubwoba tuzabikomeza." Perezida mushya wa Tanzania yavuze ko iki ari "igihe cyo kureka ibidutandukanya", bagashyira imbere ubumuntu bwabo. Ati: "Si igihe cyo kureba ibyahise, ni igihe cyo kureba ibizaza, si igihe cyo gutungana intoki ni igihe cyo gufatana amaboko tukajya imbere. "Ni igihe cyo guhozanya amarira tukubaka ejo hazaza ha Tanzania, tukubaka Tanzania nziza Magufuli yifuzaga". Gahunda yo gushyingura Magufuli Mama Samia yatangaje ko igihugu kiri mu cyunamo cy'iminsi 21, anavuga uko imihango yo gusezeraho no gushyingura John Magufuli iteganyijwe.

Edouard Philippe, minisitiri w'intebe w'Ubufaransa, yavuze ko uburakari bw'abaturage bugomba kwitabwaho Bwana Philippe yavuze ko uburakari bw'abaturage bugomba kwitabwaho, avuga ko izo ngamba zo kongera uwo musoro zakurikizwa ari uko zibanje kugibwaho impaka nyazo hamwe n'abo bireba. Yabitangarije kuri televiziyo nyuma yo gukorana inama n'abadepite bo mu ishyaka riri ku butegetsi rya La République en Marche. Yavuze ko uko guhagarika mu gihe cy'amezi atandatu bireba inyongera ku musoro ku bikomoka kuri peteroli, izamuka ry'ibiciro by'amashanyarazi n'umwuka wa gas ndetse no ku magenzura akaze akorerwa ku modoka zishobora gusohora imyuka ihumanya ikirere. Bwana Philippe ubwo yerekezaga aho yatangarije ihagarikwa ry'icyo cyemezo cy'inyongera y'umusoro ku bikomoka kuri peteroli wari uteganyijwe gutangira mu kwezi kwa mbere umwaka utaha Yagize ati: "Abafaransa bambaye amajaketi y'umuhondo bakunda igihugu cyabo. Natwe dusangiye nabo izo ndangagaciro". Ibikorwa byo kwangiza byaragaragaye mu gihe cy'imyigaragambyo mu murwa mukuru Paris Ariko yavuze ko ibikobwa by'urugomo bigomba guhagarara. Yagize ati: "Inshingano y'ibanze ya leta ni ugutuma habaho ituze muri rubanda, ariko tugomba kurwanya ikintu cyose gishyira mu kaga ubumwe bw'igihugu". Yongeyeho ko indi myigaragambyo yabaho mu bihe biri imbere yagombye kumenyeshwa ubutegetsi ku mugaragaro kandi igakorwa mu mahoro. Bwana Philippe yongeyeho ko guhera ku itariki ya 15 y'uku kwezi kwa cumi na kabiri kugera ku itariki ya mbere y'ukwezi kwa gatatu umwaka utaha, hazabaho kugisha inama abaturage ku misoro no ku ikoreshwa ry'imari y'igihugu. Iyi myigaragambyo yibasiye imijyi ikomeye y'Ubufaransa, ndetse yangiza byinshi mu mpera z'ibyumweru bitatu bishize. Iyi myigaragambyo izwi nka "gilets jaunes" cyangwa "amajaketi y'umuhondo", yamaze gukura ubu ikaba ibonwa nk'igaragaza uburakari bamwe mu Bafaransa bafitiye leta yabo. Abigaragambya babambira ahabitse ibikomoka kuri peteroli. Ubutumwa bwo kuri iyi jaketi bugira buti: "Macron ni umugambanyi, abaturage barashonje" Abantu batatu bamaze gupfa kuva iyi myigaragambyo yatangira ikabamo n'ibikorwa by'urugomo no kwangiza ibikorwa rusange cyangwa iby'abantu ku giti cyabo - cyane cyane nk'igihe amashusho yamenwaga ku wa gatandatu ushize ku nyubako ya Arc de Triomphe iri hafi n'ibiro bya perezida bya Champs-Élysées. Ni ibikorwa byamaganwe na benshi. "Amajaketi y'umuhondo" yitwa gutyo kubera ko abigaragambya bigabije imihanda bambaye imyenda y'ibara rigaragara cyane ry'umuhondo risabwa kuba muri buri modoka itwara abagenzi, bijyanye n'amategeko yo mu Bufaransa. Imbuga nkoranyambaga zagize uruhare mu kuyimenyekanisha kurushaho, kandi ifite abayishyigikiye bo mu mashyaka atandukanye yo mu Bufaransa. Perezida Marcon (ibumoso) yari yasezeranyije ko atazagamburuzwa n'iyo myigaragambyo Hashize imyaka ibiri Emmanuel Macron atowe nka Perezida w'iki gihugu, ahanini kubera amavugurura menshi yasezeranyaga muri manda ye. Ariko gukundwa n'Abafaransa kwe kwaragabanutse cyane mu mezi ya vuba ashize. Bwana Macron ashinja abatavuga rumwe na we kuba ari bo bari inyuma y'iyi myigaragambyo mu rwego rwo kuburizamo amavugurura y'ubutegetsi bwe.

Kompanyi zitandukanye ku isi ziri mu mirimo yo gutunganya urukingo rwa Covid-19 João Doria, guverineri wa leta ya São Paulo, yavuze ko guverinoma yabo yemeje kugura doze miliyoni 46 z'urukingo rwa CoronaVac. Yavuze ko gahunda yo gukingira ishobora gutangirana n'ukwezi kwa mbere mu 2021, yahita iba umuhate wa mbere ku isi muri ubu buryo wo kurwanya iki cyorezo. Brazil ni kimwe mu bihugu ku isi byazahajwe cyane na coronavirus. Abantu miliyoni 5.3 barayanduye - ni igihugu cya gatatu gifite benshi nyuma ya USA n'Ubuhinde - kandi ni icya kabiri inyuma ya USA mu gupfusha benshi, hafi 155,000 bamenyekanye kugeza ubu, nk'uko bivugwa na Kaminuza y'ubushakashatsi ya Johns Hopkins. Nirwemezwa n'abashinzwe ubuzima muri iki gihugu, urukingo CoronaVac - rukorwa na Sinovac Biotech yo mu Bushinwa - ruzaba ari rumwe mu nkingo ebyiri zishyizwe muri gahunda yo gukingira muri Brazil. Brazil inateganya gutera abantu urukingo ruri gutunganywa na Kaminuza ya Oxford yo mu Bwongereza ifatanyije na kompanyi ikora imiti AstraZeneca. Bwana Doria mbere yari yarashimagije igeragezwa ry'urukingo rw'Ubushinwa, avuga ko ateganya ko ruterwa bamwe mu baturage ba São Paulo. Ubu uru rukingo ruri gusuzumwa n'ikigo cy'ubushakashatsi cya leta ya São Paulo Ku wa mbere, icyo kigo cyavuze ko uru rukingo, ruterwa umuntu ari doze ebyiri, babonye rukora neza mu igeragezwa ku bantu benshi. Gusa, cyaburiye ko ibyo babonye ari iby'ibanze, ko bakomeje gusuzuma. Ko amakuru arambuye ku buziranenge bwarwo bazayatangaza isuzuma rirangiye. Igerageza ry'uru rukingo mbere y'uko ruterwa abantu riri gukorwa kandi muri Turkiya na Indonesia.

Usain Bolt, umuntu wenyine usiganwa mu kwiruka ku maguru wabashije gutsindira imidari itatu ya zahabu mu mikino ya Olympike, yatakaje umwe muri iyo midari kubera ko umwe mu bo bakinanaga yahamwe no gukoresha imiti itemewe imwongerera ingufu. Umuryango mpuzamahanga w'imikino ya Olympike watse igihugu cya Jamaica umudari wa zahabu yari yabonye mu kwiruka metero ijana mu itsinda ry'abantu bane mu mikino ya Olympike yabereye i Beijing mu mwaka wa 2008. Nesta Carter, umwe mu bari bagize ikipe ya bane, byagaragaye ko yakoresheje imiti itera ingufu yo mu bwoko bwa Methylhexaneamine, ibi bikaba byagaragaye mu kongera gusuzuma bimwe mu bipimo byafashwe muri iyo mikino. Rero igihugu cy'ibirwa bya Trinidad na Tobago nicyo kigiye guhabwa umudari wa zahabu hanyuma Ubuyapani bubone umudari w'umuringa.

Amakamyo atwaye ibiribwa n'imiti ubu ari mu gace byafatirwamo ko mu mujyi wa Cúcuta muri Colombia Kuri ubu izi modoka ziparitse hafi y'iteme rya Tienditas, kugeza ubu rigifunzwe n'abasirikare ba Venezuela. Perezida Nicolás Maduro wa Venezuela, ushyigikiwe n'igisirikare, yavuze ko atazemera ko iyi mfashanyo yinjira muri iki gihugu. Juan Guaidó, umukuru w'abatavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi witangaje ko ari perezida w'agateganyo wa Venezuela ku itariki ya 23 y'ukwezi gushize kwa mbere, yaburiye ko Abanya-Venezuela benshi bugarijwe n'ibyago byo gupfa niba nta mfashanyo y'amahanga ibonetse. Ku wa kane, amakamyo atwaye ibiribwa n'imiti yageze mu gace ko kubifatiramo kari mu mujyi wa Cúcuta muri Colombia. Izi modoka zari ziherecyejwe n'amapikipiki ya polisi ya Colombia. Igisirikare cya Venezuela cyatambitse mu muhanda ikamyo itwara ibikomoka kuri peteroli mu kubuza ko amakamyo atwaye ibiribwa n'imiti yambuka iteme rya Tienditas Ntibyahise bimenyekana niba iyi mfashanyo itangirwa hakurya y'umupaka. Mbere yaho, igisirikare cya Venezuela cyari cyatambitse ikamyo itwara ibikomoka kuri peteroli n'imodoka zitwara imizigo ku iteme rya Tienditas, rihuza umujyi wa Cúcuta wo muri Colombia n'umujyi wa Ureña wo muri Venezuela. Perezida Maduro (ibumoso) wa Venezuela na Bwana Guaidó (iburyo) witangaje nka perezida w'agateganyo w'iki gihugu Bwana Maduro yanze iyi mfashanyo y'amahanga, avuga ko yacira inzira igikorwa cya gisirikare cy'Amerika cyo kumuhirika ku butegetsi. Hagati aho, Mike Pompeo, umunyamabanga wa leta y'Amerika, ari gusaba ko iri teme ryongera gufungurwa, avuga ko "ubutegetsi bwa Maduro bugomba kureka imfashanyo ikagera ku baturage bari kwicwa n'inzara". Bamwe mu bategetsi bo muri Venezuela na bo basabye igisirikare kureka iyi mfashanyo igahita. Bwana Guaidó ni umukuru w'inteko ishingamategeko ya Venezuela, akaba avuga ko itegekonshinga ry'iki gihugu rimwemerera kuba afashe ubutegetsi by'agateganyo iyo perezida uriho afatwa nk'uriho mu buryo bunyuranyije n'amategeko. Bwana Guaidó amaze gushyigikirwa n'ibihugu birenga 40, birimo Amerika na byinshi mu bihugu byo muri Amerika y'epfo n'i Burayi. Bwana Maduro we aracyashyigikiwe n'Ubushinwa n'Uburusiya.

Icegera ca mbere c'umukuru w'igihugu Gaton Sindimwo (uwa gatatu uvuye i bubamfu) hamwe n'umushikiranganji w'umutekano Alain Guillaume Bunyoni Inyuma ya Kenya n'Ubuganda, ico gikorwa catangujwe n'icegera ca mbere c'umukuru w'igihugu Gaston Sindimwo, asigura ko kizanye akarusho. Bwana Sindimwo yamenyesheje ko kizoba gifise ikiringo c'imyaka cumi, mu gihe igihari muri kino gihe kitarenza imyaka itanu. Ico gitabo gishasha kizoba gifise impapuro 52 n'agashusho (logo) kerekana igihugu cakorewemwo, nkuko umushikiranganji ajejwe umutekano mu gihugu Alain Guillaume Bunyoni yavuze. Amakuru ava mu rwego PAFE rukora izo mpapuro, avuga ko "Ibitabu vyahahora biguma bikora, ariko uwundorera gishasha azohabwa ico kiranga ubumwe bwa Afrika y'ubuseruko". Ikiguzi c'ico gitabo gishasha kikaba kizoba kiragumye ku mafaranga FBU 235 000 ariko agashobora guhindugwa, nkuko ubutegetsi bwabishikirije. Ikindi n'uko, "Abafise impapuro zahahora, bashobora kuzomenyeshwa ko bazihindura, ni leta yabona ko bikenewe". (PAFE) Burundi, igitabu gishasha c'inzira ca EAC Abanyagihugu baganiriye na BBC bumvise ayo makuru, basavye ko ikiguzi kitoduzwa. Inama igira iya 17 y'abakuru b'ibihugu bigize umuryango wa Afrika y'ubuseruko EAC, niyo yashizeho umugambi w'ico gitabo c'inzira kimwe. Imyaka indwi irarangiye abarundi batanguye gukoresha ibitabo vy'inzira vyatunganijwe hakoreshejwe amakanda y'intoki (uburyo bwa biometrique). Mu gihe ibindi bihugu vy'umuryango bija vyaratandukiye na karangamuntu yo mu bwoko bwa 'biometrique', Uburundi buracagendera ku ndangamuntu zisanzwe ariko ubutegetsi bukaba bwavuze ko bufise umugambi wo kuzihindura.

Umukuru w'igihugu wa mbere wa Uganda, Edward Mutesa yava mu bwoko bw'a Baganda Umukuru w'igihugu wa mbere, Edward Mutesa, ava mu bwoko bw'a Baganda n'umushikiranganji wa mbere wiwe, Apollo Milton Obote, mu mitwe yabo bari bafise intumbero zitandukanye ku bijanye n'ingene igisirikare cari kigiye gukingira ukwikukira kwa Uganda cokwubakwa. Abasirikare benshi ico gihe bava mu buraruko (mu majyarugugu) bwa Uganda aho Obote yakomoka. Abo mu bwoko bw'a Baganda Mutesa yari asanzwe avamwo, nta bibanza bari bafise mu gisirikare. Nico gituma Mutesa yashaka ko abategetsi ba gisirikare b'abakoloni b'Abongereza boguma mu gihugu kuko yatinya ko mu gihe bogenda ibibanza vyabo vyari guca bifatwa n'abasirikare bava mu buraruko, ibi navyo akabona ko vyaca biha inguvu umushikiranganji wa mbere Obote. Milton Obote Nk'uko abanditsi batandukanye kuri kahise bavyandika, haradutse imigumuko y'abasirikare mu 1964, aho abasirikare basaba kwongererezwa imishahara, bagashaka kandi ko abazungu hamwe n'abandi bantu b'urukoba rutandukanye n'urwabo ari nabo bakorana n'abo bazungu babaviraho, ivyashize mu bibazo bikomeye Mutesa maze Obote nawe afatiraho kugira ngo akingire inyungu ziwe. Iyo migumuko niyo yatumye Idi Amin aduzwa ipete akaba Jenerali, mu gihe yari akunzwe cane n'abasirikare ico gihe. Ni uyu nyene Idi Amin yahavuye ahinduka Obote agatembagaza ubutegetsi bwiwe igihe yari amaze kuba umukuru w'igihugu wa Uganda. Amin nawe yaje kwomorwa ku butegetsi n'igisirikare ca Tanzania gifatanije n'imirwi yarwanya ubutegetsi bwa Uganda. Inyuma y'aho, Uganda yarongowe na Tito Okello atembagaje ubutegetsi bwa gisivire bwa perezida Godfrey Binaisa. Okello yaje kuva ku butegetsi yirukanywe na Yoweri Museveni atsinze intambara. Ng'aka rero akahise gatoya ku bijanye n'ikibazo c'amoko mu gisirikare na politike za Uganda. Iragi ryasizwe n'ubukoloni Uganda ifise amoko arenga 20. Muri ayo yose, ubwoko bw'a Baganda nibwo bufise abantu benshi, abize benshi kandi batunze cane gusumba ayandi moko yose muri ico gihugu. Ubu bwoko bushinze imizi hagati mu gihugu kandi mu gice gifise isi ndimwa y'akanovera gahagije, kandi ibikorwa vyinshi vy'ubutunzi bikaba ari ho vyiganje. N'imbere y'uko Uganda ironka intahe y'ukwikukira, abo mu bwoko bw'a Baganda bari bafise amashure, amavuriro n'ibindi bigo vyinshi vy'ubuzima bw'igihugu. Ico gihe, igihe Uganda yatwarwa n'Abongereza, bari bafise ibintu vyinshi bafatirako mu kurondera abo baha inyigisho za gisirikare. Kimwe muri bikuru bikuru baraba cari kamere ndemanwa ya muntu, ariko bataravye ubushobozi bwo mu mutwe, canke ubwenge mu yandi majambo. Kamere ndemanwa ya muntu abakoloni bashaka yari iy'abava cane cane mu buraruko bwa Uganda, nko mu moko y'aba Langi (bwa Obote), aba Acholi n'aba Lugbara ari bwo nyina wa Idi Amin yavamwo. Ni nako abo bakoloni nyene bakoze muri Tanganyika, mu gukundwakaza abantu bava mu ntara ya Mara kubera ingene bari baremwe hamwe n'ubutwari bwabo ico gihe. Museveni yashitse ku butegetsi akoresheje abarwanyi bakomoka mu Burengero iyo asanwe yamuka, ari nabo bafise mu minwe igisirikare ca Uganda ubu Ku bantu bo mu bwoko bw'a Baganda, akazi k'igisirikare nti kari akazi k'iteka n'icubahiro, ntibagakunda. Inkurikizi yavyo ni uko ubu bwoko bufise ikibanza gito cane mu gisirikare ca Uganda gushika n'ubu. Iyi nayo ni ingorane.
