Idi Amin amaze kwirukanwa, Museveni yarakoresheje ububasha bwiwe yari afise nk'umushikiranganji wo kwivuna abansi maze yinjiza mu gisirikare abantu benshi bava mu burengero bwa Uganda ari ho asanzwe akomoka. Benshi muri bo ni Abahima kandi akaba yaranashizemwo n'impunzi z'abanyarwanda zari izo mu bwoko bw'Abatutsi. Nk'uko Museveni yabikoze, umukuru wa gisirikare wo mw'ihuriro UNLA (Uganda National Liberation Army), David Oyite Ojok, wewe yinjije mu gisirikare abantu benshi bava mu bwoko bwiwe bw'aba Acholi. Indyane hagati mw'ihuriro UNLA mu ntango z'imyaka ya 1980 zatumye Museveni na Ojok bacanamwo, maze bituma uyu asigaye ari umukuru w'iki gihugu muri kino gihe yivumbura agasubira mw'ishamba n'umuhari wiwe wa gisirikare Popular Resistance Army (PRA) wari ugizwe ahanini n'abantu bava mu burengero bwa Uganda. Ico gihe, ibintu ntivyari vyifashe neza mu gisirikare ca reta. N'aho benshi muri co bava mu buraruko bwa Uganda, abari bakundwakajwe cane bari abo mu bwoko bw'aba Langi ari bwo Obote yakomokamwo, mu gihe abo mu bwoko bw'aba Acholi bahabwa ibibanza vyo hasi. Ico cuka kibi mu gisirikare ca reta, nico nkomoko y'ugusenyuka kw'ubutegetsi bwa Tito Okello Lutwa yabaye umukuru w'igihugu wa Uganda mu kiringo c'amezi atandatu atarenga ntarenguke, kuva kw'igenekerezo rya 29 ukwezi kw'indwi 1985 kushika ku wa 26 z'ukwa mbere 1986. Isenyuka ry'ubu butegetsi ryabaye inyuma y'urupfu rw'umukuru w'ibiro bikuru vya gisirikare Ojok yari akunzwe cane n'abasirikare. Ojok yapfiriye mw'isanganya rya kajugujugu. UPDF (igisirikare ca Uganda ubu) muri politike za Uganda Amaze gushika ku butegetsi mu1986, isura y'igisirikare yaciye ihinduka mu buryo bugaragara cane. Inzego nkuru nkuru hafi zose zaciye zishirwa mu minwe y'abo mu bwoko bw'aba Hima - ibi bikaba ari ibintu bidatangaje kuko kuva Museveni atanguje intambara nibo bari bamushigikiye. Museveni yaciye ahindura igisirikare citwa NRA, izina ry'inyeshamba, maze acita Ingabo z'Abanyagihugu ba Uganda, (Uganda People's Defence Force, UPDF). Ingene cari cubatse casa neza na neza n'igisirikare ca Tanzania. Ururimi rukoreshwa cane muri UPDF ni Igiswahili. Hanze y'igisirikare, igiswahili si ururimi rukoreshwa cane. Kandi mu bantu bo mu bwoko bw'a Baganda, uru rurimi rugereranywa n'amabi y'agahomerabunwa bigeze gukorerwa n'abasirikare. Mohoozi Kainerugaba w'imyaka 45, ni imfura ya Museveni afise ipete rya Liyetena Jenerali mu gisirikare ca Uganda, niwe arongoye ingabo zicungera se wiwe n'umuryango wiwe UPDF yaragerageje kuba igisirikare c'igihugu gihuriwemwo n'abanya Uganda bo mu moko yose, n'aho hari ababona ko kiri mu minwe y'abo mu bwoko bw'aba Hima. Mu butumwa bwiwe yacishije ku rubuga rwa Twitter, Timothy Kalyegira, umwe mu bantu bakomeye banegura ubutegetsi bwa Museveni, yarigeze kubaza igituma kuva mu 1986, abantu bahabwa amabanga yo kuba abavugizi b'igisirikare bama bava mu karere kamwe gusa k'ico gihugu - mu Burengero. Hampande y'ivyo, uretse Jenerali Katumba Wamala na Jenerali Jeje Odongo, hafi abakuru ba gisirikare bose ba UPDF bava mu burengero bwa Uganda. Abandi baciye muri ayo mabanga yo kurongora UPDF ni Mugisha Muntu, James Kazini na Aronda Nyakairima. Uwurongoye UPDF muri kino gihe ni Jenerali David Muhoozi - na we nyene ava mu Burengero. Igisirikare muri politike Bivuye kuri kano kahise ka Uganda, biribonekeza neza ko ari ibintu bitoroshe na gato ko uwuzosubirira Perezida Museveni, igihe ni cagera, yoba umuntu adafise kahise k'igisirikare. Nico gituma gushika ubu hari amakenga menshi ko Robert Kyagulanyi azwi kw'izina rya 'Bobi Wine', asanzwe ariko ariyamamaza kurongora iki gihugu, adashobora gutsinda Museveni mu matora ategekanijwe mu kwezi kuza. Bobi Wine ahanganye bikomeye na Museveni mu matora yimirije ariko amahirwe yo kumutsinda ari ku kiyiko Kuva Uganda ironse intahe y'ukwikukira, nta mukuru w'igihugu w'umusivire arigera abisikanya n'uwundi biciye mu matora. Eka nta n'umukuru w'igihugu w'umusirikare arigera ava ku butegetsi ku neza. Kubera ingene igisirikare ca Uganda cubatse, aho abafise amabanga akomakomeye bava mu Burengero bwa Uganda, uwohabwa amahirwe yotegerezwa kuba afise ibintu bibiri: ubwa mbere abe ari umusirikare akomeye kandi abe uwuva muri ico gice c'igihugu. Nico gituma gushika ubu izina ry'umuntu umwe gusa niryo riza nk'uwushobora kuba ariko arategurwa gusubirira Perezida Museveni, haba mu nzira y'amatora canke mu guhabwa ubutegetsi. Uyu muntu avugwa cane ko ariko ategurwa kuba umukuru w'igihugu mu myaka iri imbere, ni Liyetena Jenerali, Muhoozi Kainerugaba, imfura ya Perezida Yoweri Kaguta Museveni.

Byari ibyishimo ku bashyigikiye iryo tegeko Itegekonshinga ry'iki gihugu mu 2017 ryari ryemeje ibi ariko bitegereza ko inteko ishingamategeko ibanza kubitorera, yari yahawe imyaka ibiri yo kubyigaho. Amagana y'abaharanira uburenganzira bw'abakundana bahuje ibitsina muri iki gihugu, uyu munsi bakoraniye imbere y'inteko mu murwa mukuru Taipei bategereje umwanzuro. Bateye hejuru mu byishimo byinshi ubwo bari bamenyeshejwe ko inteko ishingamategeko yemeje iri tegeko. Gusa uruhande rw'abashyigikiye uko ibintu byahoze mbere rwo rwarakajwe n'iki cyemezo. Hatagerejwe ko Perezida Tsai Ing-wen wa Taiwan asinya kuri iri tegeko rikajya mu bikorwa. Bateye hejuru mu byishimo byinshi ubwo bari bamenyeshejwe ko inteko ishingamategeko yemeje iri tegeko Jennifer Lu uyobora ishyirahamwe ry'abaharanira uburenganzira bungana kuri bose mu byo gushyingiranwa, yabwiye ibiro ntaramakuru Reuters ko urugamba rutarangiye kuko ubu bagiye no gukomeza guhangana n'ivangura rikorerwa ababana bahuje ibitsina. Abaturage benshi ba Taiwan mu matora ya kamarampaka yagiye aba kuri iyi ngingo, bagaragaje ko bifuza ko "gushyingiranwa" gukomeza kuba hagati y'umuntu w'igitsina gabo n'uw'igitsina gore gusa. Byabaye ngombwa ko abashinga mategeko batora itegeko ryihariye rinyuranye n'asanzwe ryemerera abahuje ibitsina gushyingiranwa. Ahandi byifashe bite? Uretse gushyingirwa, no kuryamana kw'abahuje ibitsina hari ibihugu bigihanwa nk'icyaha, mu bihugu byinshi ku isi birimo n'ibya Afurika kuryamana kw'abahuje ibitsina atari icyaha. Gushyingira abahuje ibitsina ntibyemewe mu Bushinwa, igihugu gituranye na Taiwan, kimwe no mu bihugu bindi byose bya Aziya. Muri Afghanistani, Irani, Qatar, Arabie Saoudite, Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Abarabu (United Arab Emirates) na Yemeni, kuryamana gusa kw'abahuje ibitsina bihanishwa urupfu. Amategeko henshi ku isi yemera gushyingira gusa abadahuje ibitsina, gusa hari ibihugu by'i Burayi n'Amerika byemera gushyingirwa kw'abahuje ibitsina. Muri Afurika, igihugu kimwe, Afurika y'Epfo, ni cyo gusa cyemera gushyingira abahuje ibitsina.

Jenerali Delphin Kahimbi yari asanzwe yarafatiwe ibihano n'umuryango w'ubumwe bw'Uburayi Jenerali Delphin Kahimbi yari asanzwe yarafatiwe ibihano n'umuryango w'ubumwe bw'Uburayi (EU/UE) ku birego byo guhonyora uburenganzira bwa muntu ubwo yayoboraga ibikorwa bya gisirikare byo kurwanya inyeshyamba mu burasirazuba bw'igihugu mu myaka ya 2000 ndetse no mu gihe yari amaze ayobora ubutasi bwa gisirikare. Kahimbi yari yashyizweho na Joseph Kabila wahoze ari Perezida wa Kongo. Uwamusimbuye ku butegetsi, Félix Tshisekedi, yari amaze igihe yotswa igitutu na Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Amerika ngo akurikirane Jenerali Kahimbi ku birego byo guhonyora uburenganzirwa bwa muntu. Mu kiganiro kuri telefone, umugore we, Brenda Kahimbi, yabwiye Reuters ati: "Yari yagize ikibazo cy'umutima ari mu rugo nuko aza gupfa hashize akanya gato tugeze ku bitaro". Abantu babiri bakora mu nzego z'umutekano za Kongo babwiye ibiro ntaramakuru Reuters ducyesha iyi nkuru ko Kahimbi yari aherutse guhagarikwa ku mirimo ye ashinjwa gushaka guhisha intwaro ngo ahungabanye umutekano w'igihugu. Perezida Tshisekedi yari amaze igihe yotswa igitutu n'Amerika ngo akurikirane Jenerali Kahimbi Muri uku kwezi, Kahimbi yari yarabujijwe kuva mu gihugu, nkuko abo bantu babiri bo mu nzego zishinzwe umutekano n'abandi babiri bakora mu rwego rw'abinjira n'abasohoka babibwiye Reuters. Igisirikare cya Kongo cyemeje amakuru y'urupfu rwa Kahimbi ariko nticyemeza icyaruteye kandi nticyavuga ku byo yaregwaga cyangwa amakuru yuko yari yarahagaritswe ku mirimo ye. Mu itangazo ryatanzwe mu buryo bwa videwo, Don de Dieu Kilumba, uhagarariye urwego rukuru rwa gisirikare rwa Kongo, yagize ati: "Uburyo bwose bwakoreshejwe hagamijwe gutanga umucyo kuri iki gihombo kibabaje". Yongeyeho ko hatangiye iperereza ku rupfu rwe. Mu kwezi kwa cumi na kabiri mu mwaka wa 2016, Kahimbi yashyizwe ku rutonde rw'umuryango wa EU rw'abategetsi ba Kongo bafatiriwe imitungo ndetse batemerewe kugirira ingendo mu bihugu bigize EU. Mu gusubiza ku makuru yuko Kahimbi yahagaritswe ku mirimo ye, ambasaderi w'Amerika muri Kongo, Mike Hammer, ku wa kane yanditse ku rubuga rwa Twitter ati: "Nkuko tutahwemye kubivuga, abamunzwe na ruswa, bahonyora uburenganzira bwa muntu cyangwa bagahungabanya ibikorwa bya demokarasi bakwiye kubiryozwa".

Abimukira baharugwa mu bihumbi baramaze kugwa mu kiyaga ca Méditerranée bagerageza kuja i Buraya Inteko zirongowe n'umusirikare w'ipete rya "Amiral" zishigikije ubwato bw'ingwano bagiye gufasha abanya Libiya gushira mu ngiro ingingo zategetswe n'ishirahamwe mpuzamakungu Onu mu masezerano yapfundikiwe mu gisagara ca Tripoli. Abantu benshi mu bagize inama nshingamateka bavuze ko bizeye ko ibindi bihugu vya Buraya, bizokwifatanya nabo muri ico gikorwa co guhagarika urugwirirane rw'abimukira baca mu kiyaga ca Méditerranée. Abakozi bo mu bushikiranganji bwo kwivuna abansi bavuze ko ubwato bwa gisirikare "Comandante Borsini", bumaze kugera mu mazi ya Libiya bufise uruhusha bwo gusuma urusaku muri ako karere. Umugwi w'abagwanyi wo mu buseruko bwa Libiya wagabishije ko uzokwivuna ico wise agasotoro k'igihugu c'Ubutaliyano.

Berlinah Wallace yakanye ko yishe Berlinah Wallace ngo yoba yavuze ati "Ntashoboye kukuronka, nta wundi azokuronka" asuka iyo acide kuri Mark van Dongen mu nzu iwe i Bristol, mu kwezi kw'icenda mu 2015, haheze amayinga urukundo rwabo rwari rumaze imyaka itanu ruheze. Yapfiriye aho avuka mu Bubiligi inyuma y'amezi 15, hakoreshejwe uburyo bwa "euthanasie"(uburyo bwo kwica umuntu atiriwe arababara). Abaganga baremeye ko Bwana van Dongen arangirizwa ubuzima mur'ubwo buryo, mu gihe yari yatimvye kuva kw'izosi uja hasi, atari agifise ukuguru kw'ibubamfu, ijisho ry'ububamfu ritari rikibona hamwe n'igice kinini c'ijisho ry'uburyo, inyuma yaho aterewe iyo acide bigatuma abaho mu bubabare umuntu atokwihanganira. Umukenyezi Wallace, 48, yiga rimwe na rimwe ivyo gushona yakuriye mu ntara ya Gauteng muri Afrika Yepfo, yahakanye ko yishe uwo muhungu, nuko yamusutseko ubwo bumara. Urwo rubanza ruzobandanya.

Capitaine Herman Nsengimana, watangajwe nk'umuvugizi mushya w'umutwe wa FLN urwanya ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda Iri tangazo ryashyizweho umukono na Paul Rusesabagina, uyobora MRCD. Paul Rusesabagina aherutse gutangaza ko iri shyaka n'umutwe waryo w'inyeshyamba FLN, "bataciwe intege" n'ifatwa rya Sankara. Mu cyumweru gishize, Minisitiri w'ububanyi n'amahanga w'u Rwanda, Dr Richard Sezibera, yatangaje ko Callixte Nsabimana uzwi nka Sankara ari mu maboko ya leta y'u Rwanda, avuga ko azagezwa imbere y'ubucamanza mu gihe cya vuba. Ntabwo yasobanuye uburyo yafashwemo. Major Sankara yakunze kumvikana avugira umutwe wa FLN, yigamba ibitero mu bice byegereye ishyamba rya Nyungwe. Iri tangazo rishya rya MRCD ryo ku itariki ya gatanu y'uku kwezi kwa gatanu, rivuga ko Capitaine Herman Nsengimana wasimbuye Major Sankara "afite uburambe mu kazi gasanzwe ka Gisilikali, akaba kandi yarakoranye bya hafi" n'uyu asimbuye. Rigira riti: "Tumuhaye izi nshingano tuzi neza ko azagera ikirenge mu cy'uwo asimbuye". Muri videwo igaragara ku rubuga rwa interineti, Nsengimana Herman avuga ko ari umuvandimwe wa Niyomugabo Gérard waburiwe irengero mu mwaka wa 2014 mu Rwanda, yari amaze igihe agaragaza ibitekerezo by'uko adashyigikiye leta y'u Rwanda. Si byinshi bizwi kuri uyu muvugizi mushya wa FLN, gusa avuga ko nyuma y'ibura ry'umuvandimwe we, yavuye mu Rwanda ajya muri uyu mutwe urwanya leta y'u Rwanda.

Gutwara abagenzi muri taxi ni bwo buryo bukunze gukoreshwa cyane muri Afurika y'epfo Aba bagabo bishwe bari abo mu ntara ya Gauteng. Bari bari kwerekeza mu mujyi wa Johannesburg ku wa gatandatu ubwo imodoka barimo ya taxi yaraswagaho. Aba bagabo, cyo kimwe na bagenzi babo bane bakomeretse bikomeye, bari bavuye gushyingura mugenzi wabo mu karere ka Kwa-Zulu Natal. Ntibiramenyekana impamvu bishwe nubwo bwose ubushyamirane hagati y'abatwara abagenzi muri taxi mu mihanda yo muri Afurika y'epfo bwigeze guteza urugomo mu gihe cyashize. Kuri miliyoni 55 z'abaturage batuye Afurika y'epfo, uburyo bwo gutwara abagenzi mu modoka za taxi ni bwo bukoreshwa n'umubare munini.

Flibanserin ikorwa n'ihinguriro ryo mu gihugu mu Misiri Hashize imyaka flibanserin, uzwi cane nka 'viagra y'abagore', wemewe ubwa mbere muri Leta zunze Ubumwe za Amerika. "Numvise ikizunguzungu no kujanwa nk'uwuri mw'itiro, kandi umutima wariruka cane", uko niko Leila, umwe mu bagore bo mu Misiri bakoresheje ico kinini avuga. Leila (siryo zina ryiwe kuko atashimye kurishira ahabona kubera kuganira ku mibonano mpuzabitsina abifata nk'ikizira) n'umukenyezi w'imyaka irenga 30. Inyuma y'imyaka icumi yubatse, ariko yahisemwo kugura ako 'gasabiko' kubera amazinda yo kwumva ukwo gakora. Bisanzwe bimenyerewe ko umuti wa viagra ukoreshwa n'abagabo bafise ikibazo co kubarukwa, ariko kumva ko uwo muti wanakorewe abagore hari abo bigora gutegera.

Abaharurwa mu majana barakomerekeye muri iyo nyamugigima Abaharurwa mu majana barakomeretse abandi baharurwa mu bihumbi nabo barata izabo. Indonesia ifise kahise karanzwe na za nyamugigima n'ibihuhusi vya tsunami, aho iyaheruka yari nyamugigima ya 2018 yahitanye abantu barenga 2000 mu 2018. Ejo ku wa gtanu, abantu umunani nibo bapfuye igihe ibitaro vyitwa Mitra Manakarra biri ahitwa Mamuju vyabomoka ,nk'uko abategetsi babivuga. Hafi 60 barashoboye kurokorwa bavanwa muri ivyo bitaro. Umuvugizi w'igiporisi muri ako karere, Syamsu Ridwan, yabwiye BBC ati: "Vyabaye mu kanya isase, nko mu misegonda cumi gusa". Avuga ko umuyagankuba muri ivyo bitaro wacitse igihe iyo nyamugigima iba. Abategetsi bavuga ko igitigiri c'abapfuye gishobora kurenga kure n'iyo mu gihe ibikorwa vy'ubutabazi no kurondera abandi bikibandanya. Ejo ku mugoroba, abajejwe ubutabazi bari bakirondera aboba bagihema, ariko ivyo bikorwa bikaba bibangamiwe n'icikagurika ry'umuyagankuba hamwe n'amaterefone ngendanwa adakora. Umukuru w'ico gihugu asaba abanyagihugu kuguma batekanye, nayo abajejwe ubutabazi akabasaba kwongereza inguvu mu bikorwa vyo kurondera aboba bagihema. Iyo nyamugigima yatanguriye ku birometero bitandatu uvuye mu igisagara ca Majene mu buraruko bushira ubuseruko bw'igihugu, ikaba yashitse ku birometero 10. Indonesia ifise kahise karanzwe na za nyamugigima Inyubakwa z'ibitaro vya Mamuju zarabomotse Ireresi yakwiragijwe ku mbuga hwaniro yerekana amazu yabomaguritse n'umukobwa yazibiriwe mu bihomoka ariko aratabaza. Dr. Gayatri Marliyani, umuhinga mu bijanye n'isi (géologue) kuri kaminuza ya Gajah Mada mu ntara ya Yogyakarta, yabwiye BBC ko "ibintu vyifashe nabi cane". Avuga ko ibiro vya buramatari biri mu mazu yabomotse, kandi ko inyubakwa z'ibitaro n'amahoteri zitari nke zononekaye. Agabisha kandi ko ikiza ca coronavirus gishobora kubangamira utwigoro two kugarukira ku bahuye n'iyi nyamugigima.

Dr Tedros avuga ko urubyiruko rugeramiwe cyane n'ubwandu bushya Dr Tedros, uyobora ishami ry'umuryango w'abibumbye rishinzwe ubuzima ku isi (OMS), yavuze ibi mu nama mpuzamahanga yo kurwanya SIDA yatangiye i Kigali uyu munsi ku wa mbere. Ubwandu n'impfu mu bana kubera SIDA byagabanutse ku gipimo kirenze 50% muri Afurika, ibi Dr Tedros avuga ko ari ibyo kwishimira. Avuga ko ku isi abantu miliyoni 37,9 (2018) bafite virus itera SIDA 80% babizi kandi 60% muri bo bafata imiti igabanya ubukana, gusa bigikomeye muri Afurika kuko 75% by'abo banduye bose ari ho bari. Ati: "Hano urubyiruko ni rwo rugeramiwe cyane, by'umwihariko abakobwa b'abangavu baba ari batatu kuri bane mu bwandu bushya". Dr Tedros avuga ko abakiri bato benshi bataba bifuza gusuzumwa virusi ya SIDA, ibi ngo bituma hari benshi muri bo batazi ko banduye bityo badafata imiti igabanya ubukana. Dr Tedros avuga ko hagikenewe imbaraga nyinshi mu gukangurira abakiri bato gukoresha uburyo buriho bwo kwirinda SIDA nk'agakingirizo. Asaba ubutegetsi bw'ibihugu bya Afurika kugira icyerekezo gihamye mu kurwanya SIDA no gufasha abaturage ibijyanye n'ubuzima byose, avuga ko ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda ari urugero rwiza. Perezida w'u Rwanda Paul Kagame yavuze ko hari ibintu bitatu byatumye u Rwanda rutera intambwe nziza mu kurwanya SIDA; kurwanya ipfunwe, ubufatanye n'abandi n'ubushake bwa politiki. Icya mbere ngo ni ukurwanya ipfunwe ('stigma') ku banduye. Ati: "Iyo bije ku ndwara zandurira mu mibonano mpuzabitsina, guceceka, guhezwa n'ipfunwe nabyo birica nk'uko na virus yica. "Isoni zica intege abanduye HIV ntibiyakire ngo bemere ibyababayeho maze bahabwe ubuvuzi bukenewe kugira ngo babeho ubuzima busanzwe". Bwana Kagame avuga ko intambwe u Rwanda na Afurika byateye byayifashijwemo n'abafatanyabikorwa nka Global Fund, PEPFAR n'abandi ashimira uruhare rwabo. Bwana Kagame asaba ubutegetsi bw'ibihugu nabwo gushyiraho akabyo bigashyira amafaranga muri serivisi z'ubuzima ku baturage kuko ari umusingi w'ubuzima burambye bw'igihugu. Perezida Filipe Nyusi avuga ko nubwo igihugu cye kicyugarijwe ariko hari intambwe bamaze gutera Perezida Filipe Nyusi wa Mozambique wari muri iyi nama, yavuze ko igihugu cye kiri mu bya Afurika bicyugarijwe na SIDA bityo yaje muri iyi nama gukomeza kwigira ku bandi. Bwana Nyusi ati: "Hafi miliyoni y'abaturage iwacu ntibona imiti igabanya ubukana, bityo turacyabura abavandimwe bacu bicwa na SIDA". Avuga ariko ko hari ingamba zikomeye bafashe zatumye ubu abagera kuri miliyoni 1,3 bari gufata imiti kandi impfu z'abicwa na SIDA zagabanutse ku kigero cya 23% kuva mu 2013.

Ekleziya Katolika mu Burundi ibona amakenga, Evariste Ndayishimiye (i buryo) akabagiriza ko bagomba gucanishamwo Abarundi Mw'ijambo ryasomwe kuri uyu wa Mungu 22/09/2019 mu masengero yose ya Katolika mu Burundi, Inama nkuru y'Abepiskopi b'i Burundi bavuga ko batewe amakenga n'ibikorwa bimwe bimwe babona ko bihagaritse imitima Abarundi batari bake. Abategetsi b'u Burundi bagize iminsi batarabana ryiza n'abarongoye Ekleziya Katolika, bakabagiriza ko bivanga muvya politike, bakanabasaba ko batogira uruhande begamiyeko. Abasenyeri bobo bavuga ko bazokwama bavuga ukuri "n'aho hari aho bishika kukababaza". Mw'iryo tangazo, inama nkuru y'abepiskopi b'i Burundi iragabisha ko mu ntara zitari nke hibonekeza "agatima kabi k'ukuburabuza n'uguhohotera imigambwe imwe imwe n'ugutoteza abanywanyi bayo", mu gihe yemerewe gukorera ku mugaragaro. Bavuga ko ivyo vyiyongera ku mvugo, ku nzandiko n'inyifato "vy'iterabwoba bishobora kubuza amatora kugenda neza". Abo basenyeri bavuga kandi ko hari ubugizi bwa nabi burimwo ubwicanyi bufatiye ku mvo za politike bwibonekeza mu ntara zimwe zimwe. Bati: "Ahatari hake bukorerwa abatavuga rumwe na Leta, kandi ahenshi, ubutungane ntibubanguka ngo bwerekane ko buriko burahana inkozi z'ikibi bukurikije amategeko". Abo basenyeri kandi baratewe amakenga n'ico bita "ugushaka kwitiranya umugambwe uri ku butegetsi n'igisata kijejwe intwaro", bakavuga ko hari ibice bimwe bimwe aho urwaruka ruri muri uyo mugambwe womenga rugomba gusubirira inzego zishinzwe umutekano. Basaba inzego zirongoye igihugu gushinga n'ukwubahiriza amategeko, cane cane irirekurira imigambwe myinshi gukora. CNDD-FDD iti abo bagomba kuvyimvya imitima y'Abarundi Iryo jambo yasohoye ku wa 13 z'uku kwezi kw'icenda ryagiye gukwiragizwa ku mbuga hwaniro imbere y'uko risomwa kuri uyu wa Mungu, rikaba ryarashavuje umugambwe CNDD-FDD uri ku butegetsi. Mu gihe yari muri komine Mugongomanga mu ntara ya Bujumbura ejo ku wa gatandatu, umunyamabanga mukuru w'umugambwe CNDD-FDD, Evariste Ndayishimiye, yabwiye abanyagihugu ko ata yindi ntumbero inama y'abepiskopi ifise atari uguteranya abarundi. « Abungere ba Ekeleziya Katorika bashaka gusubira kuvyimvya imitima y'Abarundi, nkuko babigize mu mwaka wa 2015, imbere y'amatora». Kuri we, iyo amatora yegereje, haba hageze ko bashikiriza amajambo y'ugucanishamwo Abarundi. Evariste Ndayishimiye aranegura kandi ko abungere ka Katolika babona ko amatora ateguwe hakiri impunzi zikiri hanze "kuko babona ko ikibazo catumye bahunga kitaratorerwa umuti". Bwana Ndayishimiye abona ko iyo atari ingorane kuko kuri we, n'ayandi matora yabaye mu myaka yaheze yatunganijwe impunzi zikiri hanze, akababazwa n'uko ko ata tangazo abo bungere ba Ekleziya Katolika bigeze basohora. "Mu matora yo mu 1993, 2005, 2010, impunzi zose zari zarahungutse? Mwarigeze mwumva itangazo ngo amatora ntashoboka mu masengero kubera impunzi zose zitarahunguka"? Ku bwiwe abavuga ko amatora ashobora kutagenda neza, ni abantu badakunda amatora bashako ko abarundi basubira mu "ntwaro za dyogora duhure". Iryo jambo risohotse iminsi mikeya inyuma y'aho umukuru w'inama nshingamateka, Pascal Nyabenda, asabiye abarongoye Ekleziya ko boreka kwerekana aho bahengamiye mu bijanye na politike muri kino gihe. Hari ku munsi mukuru wa Assomption i Mugera imbere y'isinzi ry'abakirisu bari bavuye mu mihingo yose y''igihugu. Musenyeri Yohakimu Ntahondereye, umuvugizi w'inama y'abepiskopi mu Burundi, nawe ati: "Kubera rivuga ukuri, ijambo ry'Imana hari aho rigera rikababaza, rikamera nka wa mugera w'ukumena igihute, kandi ntidushobora gucisha iruhande".

Bamwe muri aba baforomokazi bagiranye ikiganiro n'abanyamakuru ku wa gatanu, batebya bavuga ko bacuze umugambi hamwe wo guhabwa ikiruhuko ku munsi mukuru wa Noheli Bangana na 10% by'abaganga bose bakora mu ishami ryita ku ndembe muri ibi bitaro. Aba baforomokazi bavuze ko abarwayi nabo batangiye kubona ko bidasanzwe ko umubare ungana gutya w'abaganga utwite mu gihe kimwe. Mu kiganiro n'abanyamakuru cyabaye ku wa gatanu, bamwe muri aba bagore bateye urwenya bavuga ko hashobora kuba hari ikintu batazi cyabiteye cyangwa ikaba ari gahunda bose bahuriyeho yo gushaka uko bahabwa ikiruhuko ku munsi mukuru wa Noheli. Uwitegura gutanga abandi kubyara, byitezwe ko azabyara mu kwezi gutaha kwa cyenda, mu gihe uwitegura kubyara nyuma byitezwe ko azabyara mu kwezi kwa mbere mu mwaka utaha wa 2019. Rochelle Sherman, usigaje ukwezi n'iminsi micye ngo abyare, yagize ati: "Sintekereza ko mbere twari twigeze tubona ukuntu dutwite turi benshi. Twabitahuye tumaze gutangiza itsinda ryo kuri Facebook." "Ni nkaho hari igihango twari twagiranye ko twese tugiye gusama." Jolene Garrow, mugenzi we bakorana, yashimiye abo bakorana ku kazi babahaye umusanzu mu gukora imirimo abagore batwite badashobora gukora - nko kuvura abarwayi barwaye indwara zanduza nk'igituntu cyangwa kuvura abarwayi barwaye kanseri. Mu cyumweru gitaha, abandi bakozi bakora kuri ibi bitaro bazakorera aba baforomokazi batwite umunsi mukuru wo kwitegura kubyara, mbere yuko batangira ikiruhuko cyabo cy'ibyumweru 12 gihabwa umubyeyi wabyaye.

Inama uru rubyiruko rwari rwatumiwemo kuri Kigali Convention Centre ntabwo yabaye Abo basabira kurekura ni Charles Kinuthia n'abakozi be babiri barimo umwe w'umugore - ubu hashize ukwezi bafunze by'agateganyo muri gereza nkuru ya Kigali i Mageregere. Charles Kinuthia azwi na bamwe muri Kenya nk'utegura inama z'ubujyanama buganisha ku bukungu zitwa 'Wealth Fitness International'. Mu nkubiri ya #KagameFreeKenyans, abanyakenya bamwe barinubira kuba Charles Kinuthia na bagenzi be i Kigali inama yabo yabaye icyaha mu gihe ngo bazikora n'ahandi ku isi. Bagaragaza amafoto ya zimwe muri izo nama yakoze i Dubai, i Lagos, i Addis Ababa, n'izo yateganyaga i Nairobi, Kuala Lumpur, Doha na Abu Dhabi, bakavuga ko Kigali itari umwihariko. Tariki 25 z'ukwezi gushize ibihumbi by'urubyiruko byagiye kuri Kigali Convention Centre - inzu nini y'inama mu Rwanda - ruvuga ko rwatumiwe mu nama yiswe 'wealth and fitness summit'. Bavuze ko iyi nama bagombaga kuyiboneramo ubumenyi ariko bagahabwa n'amadorari 197 y'Amerika yo kwitabira (arenga 177,000 Frw). Abaje muri iyi nama babwiye BBC ko basabwe kwishyura nibura 4,500 Frw kugira ngo bemererwe kuyitabira. Bahageze iyi nama ntiyabaye kandi ntibasubizwa amafaranga yabo. #KagameFreeKenyans bavuga ko izi nama Charles Kinuthia azikora n'ahandi Ni ugutegereza impera z'ukwa cyenda Charles Kinuthia na bagenzi be batawe muri yombi. Mu rukiko rwa Kagarama bashinjwe ibyaha byo: gukoresha inama itemewe no kwiha iby'abandi bakoresheje ubushikanyi. Abaregwa bahakanye ibi byaha bavuga ko icyo bateguye itari inama ahubwo yari amahugurwa, kandi bagombaga kwishyuza abayitabiriye, ahubwo abayitabiriye bumvise nabi ubutumwa bahawe. Hagati mu kwezi kwa karindwi mu rukiko rw'ibanze rwa Kagararama i Kigali no mu bujurire aba banyakenya bakatiwe gufungwa by'agateganyo, mu gihe hagikorwa iperereza. Iri fungwa ryabo ryahuriranye n'ikiruhuko cy'ubucamanza kiriho mu Rwanda, kizarangira mu mpera z'ukwezi kwa cyenda bakaburana mu mizi.

Igisirikare ca Lubanga categeka abana b'abahungu kuja kurwana mu buseruko bwa Kongo Bivugwa ko ari ubwa mbere abana bahawe inshumbusho muri ubu buryo n'iyi sentare. Mu 2012 bwana Lubanga yahamwe n'icaha co kunyuruza abana b'abahungu n'abakobwa, bamwe bafise imyaka indwi gusa. Abahungu bategekwa kurwana mu ntara ya Ituri iri mu buseruko bwa Republika Iharanira Demokrasi ya Kongo, abakobwa bagakoreshwa nk'abacakara bo gusambanya. Thomas Lubanga niwe azoriha inshumbusho yagenywe n'abacamanza Bwana Lubanga yakatiwe igipfungo c'imyaka cumi n'ine, niwe azotegerezwa kuriha iyo nshumbusho. Amashirahamwe y'abagiraneza akorana n'abo bana avuga ko benshi binubwa n'imiryango yabo hamwe n'ikibano, bamwe mbere bakirukanwa.

Abantu babarirwa mu magana bo mu madini atandukanye bakoze ikiriyo cyo kwibuka abaguye muri iki gitero Byemezwa ko iki ari cyo gitero kibi cyane cyibasira Abayahudi kibayeho mu mateka ya vuba y'Amerika. Robert Bowers w'imyaka 46 y'amavuko, ashinjwa kurasa muri uru rusengero ruzwi nka Tree of Life cyangwa Igiti cy'Ubugingo ugenecyereje mu Kinyarwanda, ubwo hari mu gihe cy'amasengesho yo ku isabato. Ashinjwa ibyaha 29, birimo no gukoresha imbunda hagambiriwe kwica. Abashinjacyaha bavuga ko bazanamushinja ibyaha by'urwango. Uyu ucyekwaho ubu bwicanyi, nibumuhama, ashobora guhanishwa igihano cyo kwicwa. Perezida Donald Trump w'Amerika yavuze ko iki gitero ari "igikorwa kibi cy'ubwicanyi bwibasira imbaga." Abantu batandatu - barimo abapolisi bane - bakomerecyeye muri iki gitero cyabaye ku wa gatandatu. Uyu ucyekwaho kugaba iki gitero na we yakomerecyeye mu kurasana na polisi. Abantu babarirwa mu magana bo mu madini atandukanye bo muri ako gace icyo gitero cyabereyemo ndetse n'abandi baturutse mu bindi bice bya Pittsburgh, nyuma yaho bateranye, bakora ikiriyo cyo kwibuka abaguye muri icyo gitero cyabereye mu gace ka Squirrel Hill. Byagenze gute? Ba kabuhariwe mu gutabarana ibakwe aho rukomeye b'Amerika ubwo bavaga aho icyo gitero cyabereye Mu gitondo cyo ku wa gatandatu, abasengera kuri uru rusengero bari bateranye, mu muhango wo kubatiza wari uteganyijwe kuri uwo munsi. Agace ka Squirrel Hill ni kamwe mu dutuwe n'Abayahudi benshi muri leta ya Pennsylvania, kandi uyu munsi wa gatandatu ni umwe mu y'icyumweru kuri uru rusengero haba hari urujya n'uruza rwinshi rw'abantu. Urusengero rwa Tree of Life cyangwa Igiti cy'Ubugingo ugenecyereje mu Kinyarwanda, rw'i Pittsburgh Polisi yatangaje ko ahagana saa tatu n'iminota 54 ku isaha y'aho ari bwo yatangiye kwakira ubutumwa bw'abavugaga ko hari umuntu uri kurasa mu rusengero, nuko nyuma y'umunota umwe ihita yoherezayo abapolisi. Amakuru avuga ko Bwana Bowers, umuzungu w'umugabo, yinjiye mu rusengero mu gitondo mu gihe cy'amasengesho afite imbunda imwe nini njya-rugamba n'izindi eshatu ntoya. Robert Jones, umukozi w'urwego rw'iperereza ry'imbere muri Amerika rwa FBI, yavuze ko umugabo warasaga yari yamaze kwica abantu 11 mu gihe cy'iminota igera hafi kuri 20 ndetse ko yari atangiye gusohoka mu rusengero ubwo yagwaga muri ba kabuhariwe mu gutabarana ibakwe aho rukomeye b'Amerika. Nuko ngo asubira mu rusengero agerageza kwihisha polisi. Nyuma yo kurasana yaje kwishyikiriza polisi, ubu akaba ari mu bitaro aho ari kuvurirwa ibyavuzwe ko ari ibikomere byinshi yagize. Wendell Hissrich, ukuriye umutekano wa rubanda i Pittsburgh, yabwiye abanyamakuru ati: "Iki ni kimwe mu bitero bibi cyane maze kubona. Nagiye nkora ahantu habaye impanuka z'indege. Ni bibi cyane." Bwana Hissrich yavuze ko mu bishwe nta bana barimo. Ni iki tuzi kuri uyu ucyekwaho kugaba iki gitero? Ibitangazamakuru byo muri Amerika byatangaje ko yavugiraga hejuru ati, "Abayahudi bose bagomba gupfa" ubwo icyo gitero cyabaga. Ubutumwa bwo ku mbuga nkoranyambaga bw'umuntu witwa Robert Bowers, nabwo bwatangajwe ko bwuzuyemo amagambo agaragaza urwango rw'Abayahudi. Robert Bowers, ucyekwaho kugaba iki gitero Mu kiganiro n'abanyamakuru, Bob Jones wa FBI yavuze ko bisa nkaho Bwana Bowers atari azwi n'abategetsi mbere y'icyo gitero. Yongeyeho ko bitazwi impamvu yateye iki gitero, ariko avuga ko abategetsi batekereza ko uyu ucyekwa yaba yari wenyine. Umunyamakuru wa BBC Dan Johnson uri i Washington avuga ko iki gitero kibaye mu gihe cy'ubushyamirane muri iki gihugu, nyuma y'icyumweru cyaranzwe n'ubutumwa burimo ibisasu bwohererejwe abanenga Bwana Trump, na mbere y'amatora rusange y'ingenzi yo mu kwezi gutaha kwa cumi na kumwe.

Abanyururu 50 baregwa iterabwoba Kuri iyi nshuro nanone impaka zongeye kuvuka ku rukiko rufite ububasha bwo kuburanisha abaregwa dore ko barimo ab'ikigero gito cy'imyaka batemerewe kuburanira mu nkiko zisanzwe. Abaregwa biganjemo ababoneka ko bakiri bato binjiye mu rukiko barinzwe cyane. Begeragezaga kumwenyura no gusuhuza abo mu miryango yabo nubwo bitashobokaga kubegera . Mu gihe byari bitegerejwe ko urubanza rutangira kuburanishwa, abaregwa n'ababunganira bongeye kuzamura inzitizi zigomba kubanza gukurwa mu nzira mbere y'uko urubanza rukomeza. Ku isonga havuzwe urukiko rufite ububasha bwo kuburanisha bamwe mu baregwa. Batatu mu baregwa ngo bafite ikigero cy'imyaka iri munsi y'ibemerera kuburanira hamwe n'abakuze kandi itegeko risaba ko abana bagomba gukurikiranirwa mu rukiko rwihariye . Abunganira abaregwa basabye ko abakurikiranywe babanza gutandukanywa, abana bakoherezwa imbere y'umucamanza ubyemerewe . Ikindi cyazamuye impaka ni icyifuzo cy'ubushinjacyaha busaba ko urubanza rwabera mu muhezo ngo kuko uru rubanza rufitanye isano n'umutekano w'igihugu . Icyo cyifuzo ariko cyatewe utwatsi n'abaregwa bose, bavuze ko ibyaha bakurikiranywe bikomeye bityo ko bigomba kuburanirwa ahabona bikaba byaba isomo ku bandi . Ikindi abaregwa ngo basanga bagomba kuburanira mu ruhame kugira ngo imiryango yabo yumve ibyaha bamwe bavuga ko byahimbwe . Icyo kibazo cy'iterabwoba cyatangiye kuvugwa mu Rwanda mu myaka 2 ishize dore ko ari bwo bwa mbere cyari cyumvikanye mu gihugu. Imodoka zugajwe ubuyungiro nizo zitwara abanyururu mu kwirinda ngo ntibatoroke Rugikubita umwe mu bayobozi b'idini ya Islamu yiciwe mu mujyi wa Kigali, igipolisi kivuga ko yashakaga gutoroka. Yaregwaga gushakisha abarwanyi bo kohereza mu mutwe wa Islamic State muri Syria na Irak . Bidateye kabiri, abandi bantu 3 biciwe mu mujyi wa Rusizi na bo bivugwa ko bari mu mugambi wo kwiyunga n'imitwe y'iterabwoba ikorera mu mahanga . Uru rubanza rw'iterabwoba rwakunze gusubikwa bya hato na hato.Inshuro nyinshi rwigizwaga inyuma ubushinjacyaha bukavuga ko hafashwe abandi bantu kandi bakekwa mu mugambi umwe . Ntibyoroshye kumenya igihe nyacyo ruzatangira kuburanishwa ubudasubira inyuma cyakora umucamanza we akaba yamaze kugaragaza ko igihe cyari kigeze ko atangira kumva uru rubanza aruhereye mu mizi .

Agace uwo muntu yabonetsemo muri Uganda Iyi minisiteri yatangaje ko tariki 12/04/2020 uyu yari yashyizwe mu kato avuye muri Tanzania ageze mu karere ka Rakai, akarere kari mu majyepfo ya Uganda gahana imbibi n'intara ya Kagera ya Tanzania. Minisiteri y'ubuzima ya Uganda ivuga ko uyu asanzwe ari impamzu iba mu nkambi ya Nakivale iri mu karere ka Isingiro mu majyepfo ashyira uburengerazuba bwa Uganda. Iyi minisiteri ivuga ko uyu yageze muri Uganda nta bimenyetso bya Covid-19 agaragaza agashyirwa mu kato. Ivuga ko ubu agiye kujyanwa mu bitaro bya Masaka. Ntibizwi neza niba uyu muntu w'impunzi yarageze muri Uganda avuye mu nkambi y'impunzi muri Tanzania, ahari impunzi z'Abarundi zirenga ibihumbi 160. Muri Uganda ho habarurwa impunzi z'Abarundi 48,232 nk'uko imibare ya UNHCR yo mu kwezi gushize ibivuga. Imiryango mpuzamahanga itandukanye yagiye itangaza impungenge ifite mu gihe iki cyorezo cyagera mu nkambi z'impunzi ziri mu bihugu bitandukanye muri Afurika. Leta ya Uganda yafashe ingamba zo gusubiza iwabo abantu batari abaturage ba Uganda basanzemo iki cyorezo, hari abashoferi b'amakamyo babiri basubijwe iwabo muri Kenya na Tanzania. Kugeza ubu, abantu 58 nibo bamaze kumenyekana ko banduye coronavirus muri Uganda, minisiteri y'ubuzima ivuga ko 38 muri bo bakize.

Fatou BENSOUDA, umushikirizamanza mukuru wa ICC Muri uku kwezi honyene, Uburundi, Afrika y'epfo na Gambia vyose vyatangaje ko bigiye kuva muri yo sentare mpuzamakungu mpanavyaha ifise icicaro i La Haye mu Buholande. Ivyo bihugu bivuga ko iyo sentare mapanavyaha mpuzamakungu iingemiyer ku Banyafrika, kuko ngo imanza hafi zose imaze kuburanisha ari izo kuri uwo mugabane. Umupfasoni Bensouda yabwiye ikigo c'itangazamakuru co mu Buholande -NRC y'uko iyo sentare ifise ico yatakaje, ariko ngo izokomeza ikore ku manza zo ku mugabane wa Afrika. Yahamagariye Ubumwe bwa Afrika gukomeza gukorana n'iyo sentare.

Uwo ni umugirwa kenshi ukorwa kugira ngo bashobore kurokora ubuzima bw'abavyeyi n'abana babo Ubwo bushakashatsi bwakozwe n'ishure kaminuza Queen Mary ry'i Londres mu gihugu c'Ubwongereza, buzwi ko ari bwo bushakashatsi bukomeye butari bwigere bubaho kuri ico kibazo. Abashakashatsi bakoze ivyigwa vyabo ku bakenyezi bibungenze imiliyoni 12. Bavuga ko basanze ibitigiri vy'abashobora kwitaba Imana bivuye ku kuvyara babanje gukorwa birengeye cane uko bavyibaza mu bihugu bikiri mu nzira y'amajambere. Akenshi na kenshi, abavyeyi bagiye kwibaruka bashobora gukorwa kugira ngo barokore ubuzima bwabo n'ubw'abana babo. Ariko, ico cigwa cerekana ko mu bice vyinshi, cane cane mu karere ka Afrika iri munsi y'ubugaragwa bwa Sahara, uwo mugirwa uhitana abavyeyi batari bake. Igitigiri c'abakenyezi bahasiga ubuzima muri ico gice c'isi kirengeye incuro ijana igitigiri co mu bihugu biteye imbere nk'Ubwongereza. Ico gigwa cerekana kandi ko icumi kw'ijana vy'abana bitaba Imana mu gihe canke umwanya muto inyuma y'uko bavutse abavyeyi babo babanje gukorwa . Abakoze ico cigwa - catangajwe mu kinyamakuru c'Ubwongereza, The Lancet - bahamagarira abavyeyi muri ivyo bihugu ko bosaba bakama bakorwa n'abaganga babifitiye ubumenyi buhagije kugira ngo iryo korwa rishobore kugenda neza.

Urubyiruko rwinshi rwatanze amafaranga ngo rujye muri iyi nama Bamwe muri uru rubyiruko bavuga ko buri umwe yishyuraga 4,500Frw yo kwiyandkisha akoresheje telefone (Mobile Money), abandi bishyuye kuri Internet, abandi bishyuye uyu munsi bageze aho inama yagombaga kubera. Aba bavuga ko iyi nama yiswe 'wealth and fitness summit' bagombaga kuyiboneramo ubumenyi ariko bagahabwa n'amadorari 197 y'Amerika yo kwitabira (arenga 177,000 Frw). Basanze babeshywe, byatumye abayobozi barimo Minisitiri w'urubyiruko, polisi n'umuyobozi w'ubugenzacyaha mu Rwanda (Rwanda Investigation Bureau, RIB) bahita bajya gukurikirana iki kibazo, banaganira n'uru rubyiruko. Umwe muri uru rubyiruko yavuze ko bibabaje kubona inama itumizwa ahantu nka Kigali Convention Centre abayobozi ntibabashe kumenya ko abo bantu ari abatekamutwe. BBC yamenye amakuru y'uko icyumba cyari cyateguriwe iyi nama muri iyi nyubako abaje muri iyi nama bari barenze ubushobozi bwacyo. Felix Namuhoranye komiseri mukuru wungirije wa polisi y'u Rwanda yavuze ko aba bantu batumije uru rubyiruko banyuze mu nzira zitemewe ariko bagiye kubakurikirana, amafaranga bariganyije agasubizwa abayatanze. Komiseri Namuhoranye ati: "Inzego z'umutekano muvuga ngo zari kutubwira nazo zishatse zakubwira ngo nawe wari kuzibwira kuko ni wowe wamenye ibi byose mbere, kuko hari uwakubwiye ngo ngwino umpe amafaranga". Rose Mary Mbabazi, minisitiri w'urubyiruko, yababwiye ko ibi bikwiye kubabera isomo ko ubutekamutwe buriho. Ati: "Mwajyaga mubyumva mu biganiro mukumva ko mwe bidashobora kubabaho, ubu rero byashobotse. Harimo ikibazo cyo gukunda kubona ibintu bya vuba vuba". Minisitiri Mbabazi abwira abatekewe umutwe ko ibi bikwiye kubabera isomo Yemeza ko uko ikoranabuhanga ritera imbere ari nako abarikoresha mu butekamutwe biyongera. Asaba urubyiruko kuba maso. Abajijwe niba iki atari ikimenyetso cy'ubushomeri bukabije mu rubyiruko, minisitiri yavuze ko abenshi mu bakorewe ubu butekamutwe atari abashomeri ahubwo ari abanyeshuri. Batashye bijejwe ko bagiye gukurikirana ababashutse bakabatwara amafaranga

Amerika yanse gushira ahagaragara abo iryo tegeko ryega, ariko ivuga ko ikimenyetso gikomeye ico gihugu gushatse kwrekana ko gishaka gufasha mu kugwanya igiturire no gushigikira amatora yizewe na bose. Igihugu ca RDC citeguriye amatora yagiye arasiba mu kwezi kwa cumi na kabiri, aho hazotorwa uwuzosubirira prezida Joseph Kabila. RDC: Igipolisi caburijemwo imyiyerekano itarekuwe n'amategeko Uburaya na Amerika bafatiye ibihano RDC RDC: Amatora ashobora kwigizwa inyuma imyaka ibiri Ikiringo ciwe ca kabiri ari co ca nyuma carangiye mu 2016 ariko benshi bakeka ko ashaka kuguma ku butegetsi.

Impuguke nyinshi zivuga ko kugera ku nkingo mu buryo butarimo ubusumbane ari ingenzi kugira ngo abatuye isi bagire ubudahangarwa kuri iki cyorezo Ibihugu byinshi bicyennye cyane byasabye ishami ry'umuryango w'abibumbye ryita ku buzima (OMS/WHO) kubifasha. Ariko ibihugu bikize cyane birimo gusubiza inyuma ibisabwa n'amategeko mpuzamahanga byafasha ibihugu bicyennye kugera kuri ibi. Ibi bikubiye muri kopi y'inyandiko y'ibiganiro kuri iyo ngingo yatangajwe bitifuzwaga, ikubiyemo umwanzuro wa OMS kuri iki kibazo. Muri ibyo bihugu bikize cyane harimo Ubwongereza, Amerika n'ibihugu bigize umuryango w'Ubumwe bw'Uburayi (EU/UE). Diarmaid McDonald, wo mu kigo Just Treatment giharanira ko abarwayi bagera ku miti mu buryo bungana, yagize ati: "Aho twashobora kuvuga kuburyo bwatuma byorohera kurushaho ibihugu gutubura inkingo nyinshi kurushaho n'imiti myinshi kurushaho mu gihugu, haba harimo na gahunda zatera inkunga kandi zikorohereza ibyo. Ubwongereza buri ku rundi ruhande kuri iyo ngingo rwo kugerageza gukura mu nyandiko ubu busabe bureba ibi bindi byashoboka". Umuvugizi wa leta y'Ubwongereza avuga ko "icyorezo cyibasiye isi gisaba igisubizo gihuriweho n'isi kandi Ubwongereza buri imbere buyoboye, burangaje imbere ibikorwa byo gutuma inkingo n'ubuvuzi bya Covid bigerwaho mu buryo bungana ku isi". Uyu muvugizi yavuze ko Ubwongereza ari kimwe mu bihugu bitanga imfashanyo nyinshi cyane muri iyo gahunda y'ibihugu by'amahanga yo gutuma uyu mwaka ibihugu bicyennye bigerwaho na doze zirenga miliyari imwe z'inkingo za coronavirus. Ikibazo cyo kwibaza niba cyangwa ryari leta zikwiye kugira uruhare mu gutuma imiti iba ku giciro giciriritse, kimaze igihe kirekire. Ariko, ubushobozi bw'ibihugu bitandukanye bwo kubona inkingo n'imiti bwagaragajwe cyane n'iki cyorezo. Impuguke nyinshi zivuga ko kugera ku nkingo mu buryo butarimo ubusumbane ari ingenzi mu kwirinda ubwandu n'impfu ndetse no kugira ngo abatuye isi bagire ubudahangarwa kuri iki cyorezo. Ariko ubushobozi bw'isi bwo gukora inkingo ubu bugera hafi kuri kimwe cya gatatu (1/3) cy'ubushobozi bucyenewe, nkuko bivugwa na Ellen t'Hoen, impuguke mu mategeko ajyanye n'imiti n'umutungo bwite mu by'ubwenge (intellectual property). Madamu Ellen yagize ati: "Izi ni inkingo zikorerwa mu bihugu bikize kandi muri rusange zikagumanwa n'ibyo bihugu bikize". Yongeyeho ati: "Ibihugu biri mu nzira y'amajyambere birimo kuvuga biti ducyeneye kubonaho, atari gusa ku nkingo, ahubwo no ku burenganzira bwo gutubura izi nkingo". OMS ibikoraho iki? Mu gukora urukingo, ntucyenera gusa uburenganzira bwo gukora ibintu birugize (birindwa n'amategeko), ahubwo unacyenera n'ubumenyi bujyanye no gukora inkingo kubera ko ikoranabuhanga ryazo rishobora kuba ari urusobe. OMS nta bubasha ifite bwo kurenga kuri ubwo burenganzira bwo kuzikora - ariko irimo kugerageza guhuza ibihugu ngo harebwe uburyo bwo kongera inkingo. Ibiganiro birimo no kuba hakoreshwa ibikubiye mu mategeko mpuzamahanga ngo barenge kuri ubwo burenganzira, mu gufasha ibihugu kugira ubushobozi bwa tekinike bwo gukora inkingo. Ariko, urwego rw'abakora imiti ruvuga ko gukuraho ubwo burenganzira byabangamira ubushobozi bwo gushora imari mu buvuzi bwa Covid-19 n'izindi ndwara. Mu ntangiriro y'uku kwezi, abahagarariye urwego rukora imiti rw'Amerika bandikiye Perezoda Joe Biden bamumenyesha impungenge ibyo bibateye. Kompanyi zikora imiti zivuga ko zanatanze inkunga y'amafaranga ndetse zigatanga imiti mu gufasha guhangana n'iki cyorezo. Ariko, impirimbanyi zivuga ko amafaranga yavuye mu baturage agera hafi kuri miliyari 125 z'amadolari y'Amerika yatanzwe mu gukora imiti n'inkingo za Covid-19, ko rero abaturage bakwiye kubigiramo umugabane. Izi mpirimbanyi zivuga ko mu gihe iki cyorezo kizaba kirangiye, hari amafaranga menshi azaboneka. Madamu Ellen agira ati: "Biragaragara ko hari gahunda z'igihe kirekire zo kongera igiciro cy'izi nkingo ubwo icyiciro cyihutirwa cyane cy'iki cyorezo kizaba kirangiye. Rero iyo ni indi mpamvu ibihugu biri mu nzira y'amajyambere birimo kuvuga biti ducyeneye kubona ubushobozi bwo kuba ubwacu twakora izi nkingo ubu".

Flynn (hagati) bivugwa ko yavuganye n'uwuswrukira Uburusiya muri Amerika imbere y'uko agenwa mu mabanga yarimwo Flynn bivugwa ko yaganiriye ku vyerekeye ibihano Amerika yafatiye Uburusiya n'uwuserukira ico gihugu muri Amerika imbere y'uko Donald Trump ashikira ubutegetsi. Ibinyamakuru vyo muri Amerika vyari vyanditse ko ubushikiranganji bw'ubutungane bwagabishije ibiro vy'umukuru w'igihugu kuvyo Flynn yavuganye n'abategetsi b'Uburusiya mu mpera z'ukwezi guheze. Bavuze ko Flynn ashobora kwagirizwa ko akorera mu kwaha kw'Uburusiya. Abategetsi bakuru b'umugambwe w'abademokrate bari bateye akamo basaba ko Flynn akurwa mu mabanga yiwe. Itororokanirizo ry'amakuru rya Associated Press na Washington Post avuga ko ubushikiranganji bw'ubutungane muri Amerika bwari bwagabishije ku bintu Flynn yavuganye n'uwuserukira Uburusiya muri Amerika. Ntivyemewe n'amategeko muri Amerika, ko umuntu asanzwe yisuka muvyerekeye imigenderanire n'ibindi bihugu. Bivugwa ko ikiganiro hagati ya Flynn n'uwuserukira Uburusiya muri Amerika cabaye mu mpera z'umwaka uheze, imbere y'uko Flynn agenwa mu mabanga ku ntwaro ya Trump. Flynn ni Lt gen ari mu karuhuko k'iza bukuru. Ubwa mbere yabanje guhakana ko atigeze avugana n'uwo aserukira Uburusiya muri Amerika ivyerekeye ibihano babafatiye, mbere n'icegera 'umukuru w'igihugu Mike Pence aranamuvuganira. Inkuru zivuga ko umukwe wa Trump, Jared Kushner (i buryo) ariko ararondera uwusubira mu kibanza ca Michael Flynn(i bubamfu) Flynn yabwiye abakozi bo mu biro vy'umukuru w'igihugu ko bishoboka ko yoba yaravuganye n'uwo aserukira Uburusiya muri Amerika ivyerekeye ivyo bihano. Ikinyamakuru ca Washington Post kivuga ko icegera c'umushikirizamanza mukuru Sally Yates yabwiye ibiro vy'umukuru w'igihugu ko umuhanuzi mukuru ajejwe umutekano mu gihugu "yishize mu ngorane" mu kuvugana n'abarusiya imbere y'uko avyemererwa n'amategeko. Mu kwezi guheze, umupfasoni Yates yarirukanywe mu kazi na Trump kubera yanse gushigikira ingingo yo kubuza abantu baturuka mu bihugu indwi vya Islam kwinjira muri Amerika. Uwuserukira Uburusiya muri Amerika Sergei Kislyak (i buryo), ari kumwe na prezida w'ico gihugu ico gihe Dmitry Medvedev hagufi ya Moscou mu kwezi kwa mbere mu 2009 Flynn yarafashwe ifoto ari kumwe na prezida w'Uburusiya Vladimir Putin mu kwezi kwa cumi na kabiri mu 2015

Abarwanyi b'umuhari Libyan National Army (LNA) bahanganye n'abarwanyi ba leta ya Libya ishigikiwe na ONU Amakuru ava mu bigo vy'ubuvuzi avuga ko abantu icenda ari bo bishwe muri ico gitero cabaye mu gisagara ca Sabha kiri mu bumanuko bw'ico gihugu. Mw'itangazo wacishije mbuga ngurukanabumenyi, uyo murwi IS uvuga ko wishe canke ukomeretsa abantu 16 muri ico gitero, wongera kandi urekuza abapfungwa bari bapfungiwe mw'ibohero. Itororokanirizo ry'amakuru Reuters ryaronse inkuru zitangwa n'igisirikare zivuga ko hari ibohero ryari hagati mw'iyo nkambi ryaturiwe, ariko hakaba ata nsigura zatanzwe. Umutegetsi muri ico gisagara, Hamed al-Khaiyali, yamenyesheje Reuters ko hari n'umusoda umwe yaciwe umutwe muri ico gitero. Ikigo c'ubuvuzi co muri ico gisagara ca Sabha casohoye itangazo, aho kimenyesha ko abantu icenda aribo bahitanywe n'ico gitero. Jenerali Haftar yashinze ikirindiro mu buseruko bw'igihugu ca Libya. Mu kwezi kwa mbere kw'uno mwaka, umurwi wiwe Libyan National Army (LNA) watanguje intambara mu bumanuko bw'ico gihugu, avuga ko ashaka kwomora "imirwi y'iterabwoba n'inkozi z'ikibi" muri ako karere. Mu kwezi guheze kwa kane naho, Jenerali Haftar yategetse ingabo ziwe gutera umugwa mukuru Tripoli aho ubu zihanganye n'abarwanyi bashigikiye leta y'ubumwe muri ico gihugu, isanzwe ishigikiwe n'amakungu be n'ishirahamwe ONU. Umushikiranganji wa mbere wa Libya, Fayez al-Serraj, yararahiye ararengwa ko ategerezwa kurwanira umugwa mukuru, akagiriza Jenerali Haftar ko ategura guhirika ubutegetsi. Igihugu ca Libya kirangwamwo intambara n'indyane za politike kuva aho Muammar Gaddafi yari akirongoye akuriwe ku butegetsi akicwa, inyuma y'imyaka itari mike yari amaze ku butegetsi.

Papa Francis iki cyemezo yari yaragikomojeho mbere Mu bihe bishize ibi byari byakomojweho na Papa Francis ko byaba ari byiza guha uruhushya abagabo bubatse kuba abapadiri mu duce twihariye nka Amazon. Iri tegeko batoreye bitegerejwe ko Papa Francis - utegeka kiriziya gatolika ku isi - naryemeza, rizahita rihindura amateka ya kiliziya atemerera umupadiri kuba afite umugore. Uduce tumwe na tumwe mu bihugu bya Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, Guyana, Peru, Suriname na Venezuela kubona umupadiri ngo birakomeye. Bivugwa ko 85% by'uduce tumwe na tumwe muri ibi bihugu batabona misa buri cyumweru, ngo hari n'ababona umupadiri rimwe mu mwaka. Iri tegeko rishya ryatowe ryiswe "viri probati" rizemerera abagabo bakuru b'abagatolika kandi bafite ingo zikomeye ndetse bubashywe aho batuye kugirwa abapadiri. Kwemerera abagabo bafite abagore kuba abapadiri bitandukanye no kwemerera abapadiri kurongora. Izi mpinduka ngo ntacyo zizahindura ku itegeko risanzweho ku bapadiri, batemerewe gushaka umugore. Vaticani yatumijeho abasenyeri 184 bo muri Amerika y'Epfo na bamwe mu bo mu bindi bice by'isi mu nama ya Synode aho batoreye kuri iri tegeko. Abagore 35, biganjemo ababikira, nabo bari batumiwe ariko ntabwo bari bemerewe gutora. Abasenyeri muri Amerika y'Epfo baharaniye cyane ko iri tegeko ritorwa kugira ngo bakemure ikibazo cy'ubucye bw'abapadiri. Biteganyijwe ko mu mpera y'uyu mwaka Papa Francis azemeza iri tegeko rikajya mu bikorwa. Muri iki gihe haba impaka zinyuranye mu bayoboke ba kiliziya gatolika ku kuba abapadiri batemerewe gushaka abagore kubera imyitwarire ya bamwe muri bo inyuranyije n'iri tegeko. Hari bamwe bavuga ko bigeze aho bikwiye ko kiliziya yemerera n'abagore kuba abapadiri batura ibitambo bya misa. Komisiyo yashyizweho na Papa mu 2016 ngo yige kuri ibi nta mwanzuro yatanze. Hari bamwe bavuga ko Kiliziya ikwiye guhindura amategeko yayo kuko abapadiri ba kera bari bemerewe gushaka, ndetse ngo n'abapapa ba mbere babaga bafite abagore. Kiliziya gatolika ni idini rimaze imyaka igera ku 2,000, ifite abayoboke barenga miliyari imwe.

Ubushakashatsi bwimbitse bwakozwe na BBC bwasanze abantu benshi bakabiriza ubushobozi bwabo mu gutahura amakuru y'ibinyoma Bikubiye mu bushakashatsi bwiswe Beyond Fake News, bugamije guhashya amakuru y'ibinyoma. Ubu bushakashatsi buvuga ko ikwirakwira ry'amakuru y'ibinyoma rishobora no gushyira mu kaga amakuru mpamo kubera ko amakuru y'ibinyoma atuma rubanda itera icyizere amakuru y'ukuri. Mu gusesengura ubutumwa bwo ku mbuga nka WhatsApp na Facebook, ndetse no kubaza amatsinda y'abantu bo muri Nigeria, Kenya no mu Buhinde, aba bashakashatsi bagaragaza ibitera amakuru y'ibinyoma. Ubu bushakashatsi bunadufasha kumva isano iri hagati y'amakuru y'ibinyoma na politiki ku mbuga za interineti. Kuki ari ingenzi kumenya ibijyanye n'amakuru y'ibinyoma? Kuki abantu bayobywa n'amakuru y'ibinyoma? Ubwo BBC yaganiraga n'amatsinda y'abantu muri Nigeria no muri Kenya, yasanze benshi bakabiriza ubushobozi bwabo bwo gutahura amakuru y'ibinyoma. Nubwo bwose benshi bumva ingaruka zo guhanahana amakuru y'ibinyoma, akenshi usanga ibyo babizi mu magambo gusa. Abashakashatsi basanze isano iri hagati y'iyobya mu makuru n'ibintu nko kuyobya mu matora no muri demokarasi bikomereye abantu kubyumva neza. Itsinda ry'abashakashatsi basanze imbamutima ari zo zigenga abantu iyo bari mu guhanahana amakuru. Umwe mu bakoreweho ubushakashhatsi wo muri Nigeria yagize ati: "Nyuma yo kureba amakuru, yankoze ku mutima, rero nagombaga kuyasangiza abandi". Abashakashatsi bavuga ko Nigeria na Kenya bifite ibipimo biri hasi ku bijyanye no usobanukirwa amakuru yo ku mbuga za interineti, aho usanga urubuga nka Facebook rushobora gufatwa nka interineti ya bamwe ndetse ibintu byose birushyizweho bishobora gufatwa nk'"ukuri". Inkuru z'ibinyoma zica igikuba ku bijyanye n'ubuzima, nk'iyi nkuru, akenshi zirahanahanwa Ariko abaturage bo muri Nigeria no muri Kenya, bitwara neza kurusha abo mu Buhinde ku bijyanye no kwigenzurira ubwabo niba inkuru iteje urujijo yaba ari ukuri, aho babikora bifashishije ibintu bitandukanye nk'imbuga zo gushakisha nka Google cyangwa bakazigenzura babaza abandi bantu baziranye. Zimwe mu nkuru z'ibinyoma biragoye kuzitahura ugereranyije n'izindi. Mu gihe abantu bari mu rugero bagenzura inkuru nshya zijyanye na politiki by'umwihariko muri Nigeria, bagenzura gacye iyo ari inkuru ihamya ikintu cyiza kijyanye na bo. Nk'urugero, ishobora kuba nk'inkuru ivuga ku bwoko runaka bwo muri Kenya, cyangwa ivuga ku kibazo cy'imiterere ya politiki mu karere ka Niger Delta gakize ku bikomoka kuri peteroli ko muri Nigeria. Ariko urubyiruko rwita gacye ku moko n'amadini ugereranyije n'abantu bakuze, rero bo babigenderaho gacye iyo bahanahana amakuru y'ibinyoma. Ni iyihe mpamvu yindi itera abantu guhanahana amakuru y'ibinyoma? Akenshi bita cyane ku wohereje ayo makuru kurusha kumenya aho yakomotse ku ikubitiro. Bashobora cyane kwizera ko inkuru ari ukuri kubera ko uwayohereje ari umuntu bizera ko yatanga amakuru y'impamo, bitandukanye n'"umuntu upfa gukwirakwiza inkuru gutyo gusa". Guhanahana amakuru binatuma hari agaciro inshuti ziguha. Kuba uwa mbere ugejeje inkuru ku bo muri mu itsinda rimwe, kwereka abandi ko utacikanwe uzi aho ibintu bigeze cyangwa gutangiza ikiganiro, bituma abakoresha imbuga nkoranyambaga bumva bamerewe neza. Rimwe na rimwe, abantu bihutira gukwirakwiza amakuru batazi niba ari ukuri. Gusoma biragoye, ariko gukwirakwiza amakuru biroroshye. Abashakashatsi basanze benshi badasoma mu buryo bwimbitse amakuru yo ku mbuga za interineti cyangwa ngo bayasome bashungura bumva icyo ashatse kuvuga. Kandi benshi bakwirakwiza amakuru bagendeye gusa ku mutwe w'inkuru cyangwa ifoto, batabanje kuyumva neza bo ubwabo. Kuri bamwe, bumva ari inshingano yabo nk'abaturage. Bagakwirakwiza amakuru, batitaye ku kuri kwayo, kubera ko bashaka kuburira abandi no kubagezaho amakuru agezweho. Umwe mu babarirwa mu macumi bakoreweho ubushakashatsi, yabwiye BBC ati: "Wenda hari umuntu utari uyazi [amakuru], nkayakwirakwiza kugira ngo hatagira ikintu kiba ku nshuti yanjye". Iyi ni inkuru yo mu ruhererekane rw'inkuru za BBC zo guhangana n'iyobya mu makuru n'amakuru y'ibinyoma - ikibazo cyugarije isi giteje ingorane n'uburyo dufatamo isi dutuye. Mushatse kubona inkuru zindi kuri iyi ngingo cyangwa mushatse kumenya ibijyanye n'uru ruhererekane rw'inkuru, mwasura urubuga rwa www.bbc.co.uk/fakenews cyangwa mukaba mwareba ibimaze kuranga uyu mwaka muri Afurika bijyanye n'amakuru y'ibinyoma A year in fake news in Africa . Akenshi abakoresha imbuga za interineti bemera bashimitse ko amakuru anigwa cyangwa adakwirakwiza mu buryo bungana, bagashaka kugira uruhare mu kuyakwirakwiza kuri bose. Abandi bahitamo gusoma amakuru y'imbuga zizwi ko ari iz'amakuru y'ibinyoma kubera ko gusa bumva bibanejeje. Florence, umwe mu bakoreweho ubushakshatsi muri Kenya, yagize ati: "Nubwo bwose atari amakuru y'ukuri, jye nikundira amazimwe". Ni gute nshobora kumenya amakuru y'ibinyoma? Niba utazi niba inkuru runaka ari impamo, urubuga rwa interineti Africa Check ni ahantu heza wo gutangirira ugenzura ukuri kw'iyo nkuru. Africa Check n'izindi mbuga ziri gushyiraho ikusanyirizo ry'amakuru abantu bakwifashisha mu gukora inkuru mpamo. Ariko igihe inkuru yabereye n'umuvuduko mu kugenzura inkuru y'ibinyoma cyangwa iyobya mu makuru, bishobora kuba imbogamizi. Muzirikane ko ibitekerezo byo mu gice cyahariwe ibitekerezo byo mu bitangazamakuru ndetse no kuri Facebook bidashobora kwizerwa iteka, kubera ko ari ahantu amakuru y'ibinyoma agirwaho impaka akanakuririzwa. Abashakashatsi basesenguye ibitangazwa ku mbuga zo muri Afurika bavuga ko ubutekamutwe mu bijyanye n'akazi n'amafaranga ari aho bikunze gusangwa. Uko ibintu bimeze ubu, abakoresha imbuga za interineti benshi bavuga ko bashingira ku cyo umutima-nama wabo ubabwiye mu kumenya niba inkuru "yumvikana" nk'iy'ukuri, no kuba hari ahandi hantu bashobora gusanga yatangajwe. Umugore witwa Mariya wo muri Kenya yagize ati: "Ndeba ku mitwe y'inkuru. Iyo nsanze ireshya cyane, biba bishoboka ko ari ibinyoma". Chijioke wo muri Nigeria we yagize ati: "Igihe cyose nsomye ikintu ku mbuga za interineti z'abantu ku giti cyabo, ndakigenzura, nkakireba muri Google, nkasoma nk'inkuru ebyiri". Ariko ubu buryo bubiri ntabwo bwonyine bwatuma utagwa mu mutego w'amakuru y'ibinyoma. Abashakashatsi bakoresheje ingero ebyiri mu kwerekana inkomoko n'uburyo amakuru y'ibinyoma yakwiragiye: Kugenzura amakuru bishobora kugorana. Abakora ku rubuga Africa Check bavuga ko biterwa n'ubucye bw'amakuru yo kwizerwa, y'ukuri kandi adafite uruhande abogamiyeho - bisobanuye ko kuyobya mu makuru byoroshye kurushaho. Ni ayahe makuru y'ibinyoma ubu bushakashatsi bwabonye? Guhangayika kuri mu gihugu cyangwa ibigambiriwe, akenshi bisangwa mu butumwa bukubiyemo amakuru y'ibinyoma. Muri Nigeria, aho 19% by'abaturage nta kazi bafite, ubutekamutwe bujyanye n'akazi bwihariye ikigero cya 6.2% cy'inkuru z'ibinyoma zo kuri WhatsApp. Hafi 3% by'inkuru z'ibinyoma zikwirakwizwa kuri WhatsApp zijyanye n'iterabwoba n'igisirikare - bihuye neza n'ibirimo guhangayika kw'abaturage kujyanye n'umutekano mucye n'urujijo bitewe n'imitwe y'inyeshyamba igendera ku mahame akaze y'idini ya kisilamu. Ubutekamutwe bushingiye ku mafaranga n'ikoranabuhanga bigira uruhare rungana na kimwe cya gatatu cy'amakuru y'ibinyoma akwirakwizwa mu biganiro byo kuri WhatsApp muri Kenya. Abashakashatsi bavuga ko iyobokamana ryihariye ikigero kiri hafi ya 8% by'amakuru y'ibinyoma. Itsinda rya BBC, mu gusesengura amakuru ya Facebook ajyanye no kwamamaza n'ajyanye n'ibyo buri muntu akunda, ryasanze abakoresha uru rubuga rwa Facebook akenshi bananirwa gutandukanya amakuru y'ibinyoma n'amakuru y'ukuri. Ikwirakwiza ry'amakuru ayobya rihagaze gute ku mbuga bwite no ku mbuga zihuriweho? Igisubizo kuri iki kibazo ni yo ntego ya nyuma igambiriwe n'umushinga Beyond Fake News wa BBC. Kugeza ubu, uyu mushinga umaze gusesengura amakuru yo mu nkuru ibihumbi 8 zo muri Kenya na Nigeria, usesengura amapaji ibihumbi 3 yo kuri Facebook n'ibyo abantu bakunda kuri uru rubuga, uyu mushinga umaze kandi gukorana ibiganiro byimbitse n'abantu 40 bo muri ibihugu byombi. Ndetse wanasesenguye ubutumwa burenga ibihumbi 2. Abakoresha imbuga nkoranyambaga bo muri Kenya na Nigeria babwiye BBC ko bemeza ko amakuru ya byacitse n'amakuru y'ibinyoma yandikwa ku mbuga za interineti hagamijwe gusa kuyakoreramo amafaranga. Imitwe y'inkuru ya byacitse ikoreshwa na bimwe mu bitangazamakuru bisanzwe, ndetse no gutanguranwa kuba aba mbere mu gutangaza inkuru hatabanje kugenzura, biri gutuma bigorana kumenya itangazamakuru ry'ukuri n'amakuru agamije kuyobya. Ariko amakuru yo kuri televiziyo, yo agaragara nk'agoye gushyiramo ibinyoma kuko asaba "kugaragaza isura" y'ubara inkuru kandi agateruranwa uburyo burimo ubuhanga bugoye kwigana.

Papa yariko aramutsa abana n'abandi bari bakoraniye muri ico kibanza hanyuma agize ngo aragiye, umukenyezi umwe muri bo amukwega ukuboko n'inguvu nyinshi gushika n'aho ahakwa kumugwisha hasi. Ivyo vyatumye Papa ahindukira agerageza kumwikura vyanka, aca amukubita urushi ku kuboko ashavuye abona kumurekura. Niho mu nyuma Papa yemera ko vyanse ko yihangana aremera ko nawe nyene acumura nk'ikiremwamuntu nk'abandi. Umukirisu ariko akwega Papa Francis n'inguvu Ati: "Kenshi biranka ko twihangana. Naje birashobora kunshikira. Nico gituma nsavye imbabazi ku vyashitse nijoro". Ivyo vyatangaje benshi kuko imbere y'aho, mu gihe yashikiriza ijambo ry'ukwipfuriza umwaka mushasha abakirisu, yariyamirije ihohotera rikorerwa abakenyezi.

Simon Sirro, avuga ko abapfumu 45 bava mu ntara ya Simiyu, hamwe na 20 bava mu ntara ya Njombe bari mu minwe y'igipolisi Ivyo bibaye inyuma y'uko hishwe abana bashika 10 mu ntara za Njombe na Simiyu mu mpera z'ukwezi kwa mbere. Umukuru w'igipolisi muri Tanzania, Simon Sirro, avuga ko abapfumu 45 bava mu ntara ya Simiyu, hamwe na 20 bava mu ntara ya Njombe bari mu minwe y'igipolisi aho bariko babazwa ku bwicanyi bwakorewe imiyabaga mu bumanuko bwa Tanzania. Uyo mukuru w'igipolisi avuga ko uruhigi ku bapfumu bagirizwa ubwo bwicanyi bujanye n'imigirwa y'ibintazi rwagiye gukomera mu ndwi iheze. Igipolisi kivuga ko gikurikirana cane cane abavuzi b'imiti kama batiyandikishije. Avugana n'abamenyeshamakuru, Simon Sirro avuga ati: " Ubu bwicanyi bwavuye ku bintu vyinshi, ariko imigirwa y'ibintazi niyo ahanini buvako. Nico gituma nategetse ko uwo wese avura akoresheje imiti kama, yaba uwanditswe canke uwutanditswe, bose bategerezwa kugirwako amatohoza". "Uwo tuzosanga yagirwa n'icaha, azokurikiranwa n'ubutungane". "Ariko inyuma y'aho, twategetse abarongoye abandi kwandika gushasha abavuzi b'imiti kama, tugasaba n'izindi nzego nk'abanyepolitike n'abarongoye amadini, gufasha muri ico gikorwa". Mu ntango z'uno mwaka, niho haboneka amakuru yavuga ko hari abana bo mu ntara za Njombe na Simiyu bishwe banacibwa n'ibihimba vy'umubiri. Imigirwa y'ibintazi irakomeye mu bice bimwe bimwe vya Tanzania, aho hari abemera ko hari ibihimba bimwe bimwe vy'umubiri bishobora kubazanira amatungo. Ba nyamwema ni bamwe mu mirwi y,abantu bahigwa cane n'abagizi ba nabi babica canke bakabaca ibikonjo hamwe n'ibindi bihimba vy'umubiri.

Bamwe mu Bapfasoni bo muri Congo barakoresha imiti igarukana ubusugi Gutakaza ubusugi birazwi ko bishoboka, ariko ntawari azi ko ushobora kubusubirana. Ivyo ni ibintu bisanzwe ariko muri Congo kwumva ko umuntu yasubiranye ubusugi bwiwe. Hari n'abapfasoni bemeza ko bamaze gukoresha iyo miti, kandi ko mu gihe c'imibonano mpuzabitsina bababara cane nk'abagifise ubusugi. Kenshi ngo ikoresha abigeme baba badashaka ko abakunzi babo bamenya ko barenze ibigo. Iyo miti yo kugarukana ubusugi, ishobora kugira ingaruka ku magara y'abapfasoni ngo kuko bashobora kwandura ingwara. Ni icaha gikomeye muri repubublika iharanira intwaro rusangi ya Congo gugurisha imiti itemewe n'amategeko, harimwo n'uwu muti ugarukana ubusugi. Ariko reta ya koko ivuga ko itazi neza ko uwo muti uri muyibujijwe. Abakoresha imiti y'ikirundi bo, amategeko ya kongo arabarekurira gukoresha mwene iyo miti.

Iran yagerageje missile zishika kure mu ntango z'uku kwezi Ivyo bihugu vyavuze ko iryo geragezwa ritandukanye n'ivyo bumvikanye n'amakungu. Ivyo bumvikanye biri mu masezerano agenga ibirwanisho vy'ubumara hagati ya Onu na Iran, yasaba Iran kutagira igeragezwa rya missile zishika kure, zifise ubushobozi yo gutwara ibirwanisho vy'ubumara. Mw'ikete ryabonywe na Reuters, abategetsi ba Amerika, Ubwongereza, Ubufaransa n'Ubudago barerekanye amakenga bafise kubijanye n'ivyo Iran yitwaza koi zo missile zishobora kugeramira Israel. Ivyo bihugu bine basavye akanama ka Onu kajejwe umutekano, kuvugana ingingo zikwiye gufatwa. Ariko iryo kete ntiridoma urutoke koko ko iryo geragezwa rinyuranije n'amasezerano ari hagati ya Onu na Iran. Izo missile zari zanditsweko:"Ni ngombwa Israel ibangamigwe" bikaba vyari vyanditswe mu Kiyahudi.

Ibyifuzo by'abigaragambya byuko habaho leta igizwe yose n'abasivile ntabwo byahindutse Inama ya gisirikare yafashe ubutegetsi muri Sudani ivuga ko iri huriro ry'amashyaka ya gisiviri rizafata bibiri bya gatatu by'imyanya y'inama nshingamategeko y'ubutegetsi bw'inzibacyuho. Iyi nama ya gisirikare iyoboye Sudani kuva Omari al-Bashir yahirikwa ku butegetsi n'igitutu cy'imyigaragambyo ya rubanda. Imyigaragambyo yakomeje yamagana ubutegetsi bw'abasirikare. Amasaha macye mbere yo gutangaza ubu bwumvikane ku munsi w'ejo ku wa kabiri, abantu batanu n'ushinzwe umutekano umwe bapfiriye mu bushyamirane hagati y'abigaragambya n'inzego z'umutekano mu murwa mukuru Khartoum. Mu kiganiro n'abanyamakuru gihuriwemo n'impande zombi, Liyetona Jenerali Yasser al-Atta, umuvugizi w'akanama ka gisirikare, yavuze ko mu masaha 24 ari imbere impande zombi ziza gushyira umukono ku masezerano y'ibyo bumvikanye. Haracyari amakenga Avuga ko bumvikanye ku butegetsi bw'inzibacyuho buzaba buriho mu gihe bategura amatora. Biteganyijwe ko ihuriro ry'amashyaka rimaze igihe riyoboye imyigaragambyo rizafata bibiri bya gatatu by'imyanya 300 y'inteko ishingamategeko y'ubu butegetsi bw'inzibacyuho. Indi ifatwe n'amashyaka atari mu ihuriro. Umunyamakuru wa BBC Alastair Leithead avuga ko abigaragambya i Khartoum bakiranye iyo nkuru amakenga, bakavuga ko imyigaragambyo imbere y'ibiro bikuru bya gisirikare bazayikomeza kugeza bizeye neza ko impinduka nyayo iri kuba muri Sudani. Mbere yaho, abasirikare bari bifuje ko bamara imyaka ibiri ari bo bayoboye inzibacyuho - ibintu byatumye abaturage bakomeza kwigaragambya babyamagana. Imyigaragambyo - imaze kugwamo ababarirwa muri za mirongo - yahereye mu kwezi kwa 12 umwaka ushize, ituma igisirikare gihirika ku butegetsi Bwana Bashir yari amazeho imyaka hafi 30.

Iyi nkubi y'umuyaga yibasiye Zimbabwe yari yabanje gucura inkumbi mu gihugu bihana imbibi cya Mozambique Uyu muyaga wiswe Idai watumye umuriro w'amashanyarazi ubura ndetse n'itumanaho rirahagarara mu bice bimwe byo mu ntara ya Manicaland ihana imbibi n'iguhugu cya Mozambique. Abantu bagera kuri 40 baburiwe irengero. Abantu bataye ingo zabo bahungira mu bice bihanamye by'umusozi bategereje kurokorwa, ariko imiyaga ikaze yakomye mu nkokora ingendo z'indege nto za kajugujugu ziri kwifashishwa mu butabazi. Ubwo uyu muyaga watangiraga guhuha muri Mozambique ku wa kane w'iki cyumweru, wahitanye abantu bagera kuri 19. Mbere yuko utangira, imyuzure yibasiye ibice bitandukanye by'icyo gihugu yari yamaze guhitana abandi bagera hafi kuri 70. Minisiteri y'itangazamakuru ya Zimbabwe yatangaje ko umujyi wa Chimanimani mu ntara ya Manicaland uri mu icuraburindi. Iyi minisiteri yongeyeho ko igisirikare cy'iki gihugu ari cyo kiyoboye ibikorwa by'ubutabazi. Biteganyijwe ko umubare w'abahitanywe n'iyi nkubi y'umuyaga ushobora kwiyongera, mu gihe abategetsi bakomeje kugenzura ibyo yangije. Jacob Mafume, umuvugizi w'ishyaka ritavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi bwa Zimbabwe rya Democratic Change, yavuze ko "amakuba akomeye yadutse" mu burasirazuba bw'iki gihugu. Iyi nkubi y'umuyaga yanibasiye Mozambique aho imiyaga yahuhaga ku muvuduko w'ibirometero 177 ku isaha. Ishyira mu icuraburindi ingo z'abaturage barenga ibihumbi 500 bo mu mujyi wa Beira ukora ku cyambu, ukaba ari umwe mu mijyi minini cyane y'iki gihugu. Imihanda yaho yarengewe n'imyuzure ndetse n'ikibuga cy'indege kirafungwa. Mu bihe byashize, Mozambique yibasiwe n'inkubi z'imiyaga ikomeye, harimo uwiswe Eline wo mu mwaka wa 2000 wahitanye abantu 350 naho abandi ibihumbi 650 bagata izabo. Iyo nkumbi y'umuyaga yashenye inzu muri Mozambique Uyu mujyi wa Beira akenshi wakunze gushegeshwa n'imiyaga. Wari warashyizeho ibikorwa-remezo bitandukanye byo kubuza ko amazi azamuka bitewe n'imihindagurikire y'ikirere.

Arturo Vidal ni we watsinze icyo gitego kimwe rukumbi muri uwo mukino, ku mupira yari aherejwe na Lionel Messi. Real Valladolid yari yabakiriye iwayo yabonye amahirwe yo kuba yakwishyura, ariko igenda iyapfusha ubusa ndetse n'umunyezamu Marc-André ter Stegen ayibera ibamba. Real Madrid, ifite umukino itarakina, kuri uyu wa mbere irerekeza ku kibuga cya Granada ku mukino wayo ukurikiyeho. Iyo Barcelona iza kuba yananiwe gutsinda, Real y'umutoza Zinedine Zidane yari kuba ifite amahirwe yo kwegukana igikombe kuri uwo mukino ukurikiyeho. Uko ibintu bihagaze kugeza ubu, Real ifite amanota 80, ikaba irusha Barça inota rimwe ndetse inayirusha kwitwara neza mu mikino yabahuje. Mu buryo butunguranye, umutoza Quique Setién ntabwo yashyize Luis Suárez ku rutonde rw'abakinnyi 11 yabanje mu kibuga, ahubwo aha amahirwe Riqui Puig w'imyaka 20 ukina hagati. Kandi nubwo Barça yinjiye mu mukino neza ndetse ikawiharira, iyi kipe na kapiteni wayo Messi bagiye bakendera uko mukino wakomezaga. Nubwo urebye Real Valladolid yatumye Messi atigaragaza muri uwo mukino, uyu Munya-Argentine w'imyaka 33 ntibyamubujije gutera indi ntambwe ikomeye. Yabaye umukinnyi wa mbere muri shampiyona ya La Liga uhereje bagenzi be imipira 20 yavuyemo ibitego mu mwaka umwe w'imikino, kuva Xavi bakinanaga yabigeraho mu mwaka wa 2008 - 2009.

Muri ayo matora, prezida Museveni ni we yatahukanye intsinzi n'amajwi 58.38 mu gihe uwo bari bahanganye Robert Kyagulanyi yaronse amajwi 35.08. Umugambwe wa NUP wamenyesheje ko uyu musi uza gutanga ibirego muri sentare nkuru ya Uganda. Mu gisata c'ubutungane bariyamiriza inkuru zakwiragijwe ku mbuga ngurukanabumenyi zivuga ko sentare nkuru yanse kwakira ivyo birego. Icegera c'umunyamabanga mukuru w'umugambwe wa NUP, John Nambesh asanzwe ari n'icegera c'uwurongoye intara yo mu buseruko, avuga ko bafise ivyemeza bikwiye vyo kwerekana ko amatora aheruka yabayemwo ubusuma. Abandi bari bitoje mu kibanza c'umukuru w'igihugu na bo nyene bariyamirije ku mugaragaro ivyayavuyemwo, harimo Patrick Amuriat w'umugambwe wa FDC, Gen Mugisha Muntu wo mu mugambwe wa ANT, Norbert Mao wa DP hamwe n'uwitoza ku giti ciwe Gen Henery Tumukunde. Abantu 11 baritoje mu kibanza c'umukuru w'igihugu mu kwezi kwa mbere, aho prezida Museveni yatangajwe ko ari we yatahukanye intsinzi, aba aronse akaryo ko kubandanya gutwara igihugu ca Uganda mu kiringo kigira gatandatu.

Pik Botha yigeze kuba umushikiranganji w'imigenderanire ya Afrika Yepfo n'amakungu, ku ntwaro karyanishamiryango ya "apartheid" Umuhungu wiwe, Piet, niwe yemeje ibinyamakuru vya Afrika Yepfo ko se yitavye Imana mw'ijoro. Bwana Botha yarabaye umushikiranganji muri leta ya mbere ya Prezida Nelson Mandera, aho yahayagiza uwo mukuru w'igihugu ko aje kunywanisha abanyagihugu. Ariko imiliyoni z'abanyagihugu bo muri Afrika Yepfo bafata uwo mugabo yari umushikiranganji w'imigenderanire n'amakungu imbere y'i 1994, ko ariwe yashigikira imbere y'amakungu intwaro y'agahotoro, yakogwa n'inkehwa z'abazungu ku birabure. Ku bandi yafatwa nk'umuntu aharanira ukwishira n'ukwizana, uravye intagondwa z'abazungu bari kumwe. Harageze igihe, aba niwe mushikiranganji w'imigenderanire n'amakungu amaze igihe kirekire muri ayo mabanga, igihe yarakwije imyaka 17 muri ako kazi. Mu bisanzwe amazina yiwe ni Roelof Frederik Botha. Izina yataziriwe Pik, rituruka ku kungene asa n'igikoko citwa "penguin", bita pikkewyn mu kirimi c'igi Afrikaans. Ubu birashobora kudatangaza, ariko vyabaye ngombwa ko uwo mugabo asa n'uwita mu 1986, igihe abwiriye leta igizwe n'abazungu gusa ko hazogera igihe Afrika Yepfo ikarongogwa n'umwirabure. Harageze igihe Botha asa n'uwushigikira politike ya "apartheid" igihe avuga ati: "Bamwe mu bagenzi banje bakomeye ni abirabure." Hari n'ikindi kintu yavuze ntazigera nibagira, ngo: "Afrika Yepfo ni nk'imparage. Nta kuvuga ngo uyirashe ku murongo wera canke wirabura, igikoko cose kirapfa."

Amatora aherutse kuba muri RDC muri rusange yaramaganywe. Abasesenguzi bavuga ko mu myaka itatu ishize, ibihugu byo muri Afurika muri rusange byasubiye inyuma mu rwego rw'amategeko n'uburyo politiki yitabirirwa. Nic Cheeseman, umwarimu wa demokarasi muri Kaminuza ya Birmingham avuga ko magingo aya umubare w'ibihugu bifite demokarasi idakora neza (15) ujya kungana n'uw'ibihugu bitegekeshwa igitugu (16) ku bihugu 54 bigize umugabane wa Afurika. Igihugu cya Nigeria kizabamo amatora rusange kuwa gatandatu kiri mu bihugu bifite demokarasi idakora neza. Nubwo bwose bimeze gutyo, 68% by'abatuye Afurika bavuga ko bifuza kuba mu bihugu birimo ukwishyira ukwizana nkuko bitangazwa n'ubushakashatsi bwakozwe na Afrobarometer mu bihugu 34 byo muri Afurika. Uyu mubare ariko waragabanutse gahoro kubera ko wari 72% muri 2012. Icyamamare mu muziki Salif Keita avuga ko nta demokarasi iri muri Afurika Emmanuel Gyimah-Boadi umukuru w'ikigo cya Afrobarometer avuga ko abanyafurika biteze byinshi kuri demokarasi; bashaka ko ibintu bikorwa mu mucyo kandi ntibashaka ruswa. Yongeraho ko biri mu nyungu z'abaterankunga ba Afurika gushyigikira ibi abanyafurika bashaka. Icyamamare mu muziki cyo muri Mali, Salif Keita, we rwose nta demokarasi abona na gato muri Afurika. Aherutse kuvuga ko uyu mugabane ukenewe umunyagitugu ugira ubuntu nk'Ubushinwa. Bwana Keita arabaza ati: "Kugirango habeho demokarasi, abantu bagomba kumenya icyo aricyo, nose abantu bashobora kumva demokarasi bate mu gihe 85% bo mu gihugu iki n'iki batazi gusoma no kwandika?" "Nkunda Trump" Leta zunze ubumwe za Amerika ubusanzwe zakundaga gushyigikira ko muri Afurika haba demokarasi, ariko ubu iki gihugu kisigaye cyarabaye ntibindeba kuva aho Perezia Trump agiriye ku butegetsi muri 2017. Igihe yatangazaga politiki ye kuri Afurika atinze cyane mu mpera z'umwaka wa 2018, abasesenguzi benshi bahise babona ko hari ibintu abamubanjirije batindagaho cyane bitarimo. Ibyo nabyo akaba ari uguteza imbere demokarasi, gushyigikira amatora akozwe mu bwisanzure nta buriganya hamwe n'uburenganzira bw'abanyapolitiki n'impirimpanyi z'uburenganzira bw'ikiremwamuntu. Politiki ya Trump kuri Afurika ntirimo guteza imbere demokarasi Iyo politiki ya Trump ahubwo yibanze ku kurwanya iterabwoba, kugabanya amafaranga agenda ku ngabo za ONU kuri Afurika no kwamagana ibikorwa by'Uburusiya n'Ubushinwa muri Afurika. Bwana Cheeseman agira ati: "Iyo abategetsi bo muri Afurika babonye umutegetsi nka Trump usa n'ushimishwa no kuramukanya n'abategekesha igitugu, aba ari ikimenyetso kuri bo ko bashobora kwiba amatora ntihagire ubibaryoza". Perezida wa Uganda Yoweri Museveni uziyamamariza kuyobora igihugu ku nshuro ya gatanu muri 2021 yigeze kuvuga ati: "Nkunda Trump". Yanavuze kandi ko Trump ariwe perezida mwiza Amerika imaze kugira. Muri 1991, Benin na Zambia byabaye ibihugu bya mbere byo muri Afurika byategekwaga n'ishyaka rimwe rukumbi byemeye demokarasi ihuriweho n'amashyaka menshi maze amatora atsindwa n'abatavuga rumwe na leta. Ubwo haba hatangiye inkubiri ya demokarasi muri Afurika nyuma y'isenyuka ry'icyahoze ari Repubulika zunze ubumwe z'abasoviyete. Nyuma y'imyaka hafi 30, Benin ifatwa nka kimwe mu bihugu icyenda birimo demokarasi isesuye ku bihugu 54 bigize Afurika. Zambia yo yasubiye inyuma ijya mu bihugu birimo demokarasi icagase nkuko bivugwa n'icyegeranyo cyo muri 2019 cy'ikigo Freedom House. Umubare w'ibihugu birimo demokarasi isesuye biracyari bimwe ugereranyije n'imyaka 10 ishize. Ibihugu birindwi - Senegal, Ghana, Benin, Namibia, Botswana, South Africa na Mauritius biracyari mu mwanya byarimo. Tunisia yo yateye intambwe iva kuri demokarasi icagase mu gihe Mali na Lesotho byo byafashe icyerekezo kinyuranye n'icyo gihugu. Angola na Ethiopia, nubwo biri mu bihugu bitarimo ubwisanzure, biravugwa ko byateye intambwe itunguranye nyuma yaho biboneye abayobozi bashya umwaka ushize. Ikoranabuhanga n'amatora Ihererakanya ry'ubutegetsi binyuze mu matora ni kimwe mu bigenderwaho kugirango umenya niba igihugu kigendera kuri demokarasi. Hari n'ibihugu bimwe bikoresha ikoranabuhanga kugirango byerekane ko amatora yizewe ariko muri rusange ibi ahubwo byatumye abantu barushaho kutayagirira ikizere. Nanjala Nyabola, wanditse igitabo kitwa Digital Democracy, Analogue Politics avuga ko nko mu matora yo muri Kenya muri 2017 nubwo yakoreshejwemo ikoranabuhanga kugirango berekane ko yakozwe mu mucyo ngo ntabwo abantu bayagiriye ikizere. Akomeza avuga ko hari abasanga demokarasi yo muri Afurika yagombye kugira ibindi igenderaho; aha agatanga urugero rw'imyitwarire y'amahanga yemeye ibyavuye mu matora aheruka muri Repubulika ya demokarasi ya Congo. Ibihugu byinshi bikoresha ikoranabuhanga kugirango amatora yizerwe Perezida Joseph Kabila yakoresheje amatora ari mu yakuruye impaka kurusha ayandi muri Afurika. Bamwe bavuze ko ayo matora yibwe. Martin Fayulu, waje ku mwanya wa kabiri, yanze kwemera itsinzi ya Felix Tshisekedi. Avuga ko ariwe watsinze ayo matora agendeye ku mibare y'indorerezi za Kiliziya gatolika zigera ku 40000 zari hirya no hino mu gihugu. Amatora nk'ayo mu Rwanda? Muri uyu mwaka, ibihugu 15 byo muri Afurika birateganya gukoresha amatora ku nzego zinyuranye. Uburyo azakorwamo byitezwe ko bizatuma abantu bakomeza kwibaza niba demokorasi ikora koko muri Afurika. Abanyafurika benshi baba biteguye gutora umurongo igihe kirerekire kugirango batore. Jon Temin, ushinzwe Afurika mu kigo Freedom House, avuga ko politiki ya Amerika kuri Afurika ituma hari ikintu gihinduka ariko ngo si cyo kintu k'ingenzi gituma demokarasi isubira inyuma kuri uyu mugabane. Icyegeranyo giheruka cy'iki kigo kivuga ko demokarasi ku isi imaze imyaka 13 igenda isubira inyuma. Bimwe mu bihugu bya Afurika ngo biri mu byabigizemo uruhare. Perezida w'Urwanda, Paul Kagame, afatirwaho urugero rw'umuyobozi ufite leta ikora neza itaremerewe n'umutwaro w'imikorere itagondeka kandi igenda buhoro by'inzego za demokarasi. Perezida w'U Rwanda Paul Kagame Bwana Cheeseman avuga ariko ko kwinjiza ishyaka riri ku butegetsi mu bukungu bw'igihugu nko mu Rwanda bishobora gutuma ruswa yiyongera kandi hakabaho n'isesagura aho guteza imbere ubukungu bw'igihugu. Yongeraho ko ibindi bihugu byo muri Afurika biramutse bigerageje kwigana Urwanda, ngo birashoboka cyane ko byabihenda cyane maze ntibigire inyungu nyinshi bibivanamo. Impirimbanyi ya demokarasi yo muri Ghana, Nansata Yakubu, avuga ko nubwo ibintu bitagenze neza mu bihugu nka Repubulika ya demokarasi ya Congo, ngo ibikorwa byo gushyigikira demokarasi ntabwo byagombye guhagararira ku matora. Steven Friedman, umwarimu wa politiki muri kaminuza ya Johannesburg, we avuga ko icyagombye kwitabwaho ari uguha abaturage ijambo mu bibazo byinshi bibareba aho kugereranya uko buri gihugu kiyobowe ugereranyije n'ibihugu byo mu Burayi na Amerika. Inkuru nziza nuko demokarasi ikomeje gushyigikirwa. Ariko aho ikibazo kiri ni uko idashobora kugerwaho mu gihe abanyafurika batemerewe kubaho mu mahoro no mu bwisanzure kandi ntibitabire amatora akozwe mu mucyo nta buriganya.

Aciye ku buhinga bwa videwo, Perezida Vladimir Putin yaremesheje kuri uyu wa kane ikiganiro n'abamenyeshamakuru asanzwe agira buri umwaka Yagiriza Navalny ko akorana n'inzego z'igendereza za Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika. Mu kiganiro yahaye abamenyeshamakuru, Perezida Putin yavuze ko "atari amatohoza", ko ahubwo ari "amayeri afise intego yo kurwanya abategetsi bo hejuru". Urubuga ngurukanabumenyi rukora amatohoza rwo mu Bwongereza, Bellingcat, ruri kumwe n'ibindi binyamakuru, ruravugamwo abakozi mu kigo kijejwe igendereza c'Uburusiya (FSB). Navalny yarahatswe guhitanwa n'isumu mu kwa munani uno mwaka, akaba yaramaze indwi zitari nke ariko avurirwa mu cumba c'indembe mu bitaro vy'i Berlin mu Budagi. Abahinga bo mu bihugu vy'uburengero bw'isi bavuga ko isumu yo mu bwoko bwa Novichok yo mu Burusiya ari yo yakoreshejwe - bakavuga ko iyi ishobora kuba yavuye mu kigo cegukira reta. Perezida Putin avuga ko ivyatangajwe n'ikinyamakuru Bellingcat na bigenzi vyaco ku wa mbere "vyashize ahabona gusa ibitangwa n'inzego z'igendereza za Amerika". Ati: "Ibi bisigura ko uyu murwayi wo mu bitaro vya Berlin [Navalny] afashwe mu mugongo n'inzego z'igendereza za Amerika. Kuri ivyo, ni ngombwa ko inzego z'igendereza z'Uburusiya zitegerezwa kumukurikirana". Yakengereye Navalny mu kuvuga ati "mbega ni iki ku bandi?" N'agatwengo, yavuze ko iyaba abategetsi b'Uburusiya bashaka kumuha isumu "kumbure baba barahejeje igikorwa". Alexei Navalny yavuye mu bitaro mu kwezi kw'icenda inyuma y'ukwezi kurenga yari amaze avurwa Navalny yagiriza ubutegetsi bwa Perezida Putin ko burangwa n'igiturire, amatohoza yiwe akaba yatumye amamiriyoni y'abantu bamukurikira ku mbuga hwaniro. Asubiye kubazwa ku bijanye n'ikibazo ca Navalny, yavuze ati: "Turiteguriye amatohoza. Nta cemezo turaronka ku mugaragaro". Avuga kandi ko Uburusiya butarigera buronka amakuru ku bijanye n'iki kirwanisho c'ubumara kivugwa. Mu kiganiro n'abamenyeshamakuru kuri televiziyo, Perezida Putin - ari ku butegetsi kuva mu 2000 - yavuze ko atarafata icemezp co gusubira kwitoreza kurongora ico gihugu mu 2024. Imigenderanire na Amerika iracumbagira Abajijwe ku matora yo muri Amerika, Perezida Putin yavuze ko imigenderanire y'Uburusiya na Washington "yaguye mu mporero" ya politike yo hagati mu gihugu muri Amerika. Ati: "Turizeye ko umukuru w'igihugu wa Amerika aherutse gutorwa [Joe Biden] azotorera umuti ibi bibazo kuko asanzwe afise uburambe muri politike yo hagati mu gihugu na mpuzamakungu". Uwabajije iki kibazo yamubajije igituma muri iki gihe aba "hackers" b'Abarusiya batafashije Donald Trump, nk'uko bavugwa ko babikoze mu 2016 - ivyiyamirizwa na Putin avuga ko ari "agasotoro". "Nta ba hackers b'Abarusiya bafashije Perezida Trump, kandi ntibivanze muri ayo matora, ibi vyose ni amarementanya kugira ngo batobe imigenderanire yacu na Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika". Abajijwe ko hashobora kwaduka "iyindi ntambara y'ukwikekana" (Guerre Froide/Cold War), Putin yagirije Amerika ko ari yo yatumye amasezerano yo kugabanya ibirwanisho ruhonyanganda asambuka. Avuga ko yiteguriye gusubira kuganira na Amerika kuri za misire z'ubumara mu mwaka uza. Ati "mu gihe ayo masezerano yohera nta kindi kizoba gisigaye". Hagati aho, avuga ko Uburusiya bwakoze misire rutura Avangard - "ikirwanisho ata handi kirangwa". Ariko yongera ko y'uko amafaranga Uburusiya bushira mu gisata ca gisirikare ari make cane ugereranije n'aya Amerika, co kimwe no mu bindi bihugu bindi bine.

Umunyamabanga wungirije wa Amerika ushinzwe ibiro by'ibirebana na Afurika Tibor Nagy avuga ko Amerika yiteze ko Rusesabagina afatwa kimuntu Bwana Nagy yatangaje ko ejo ku wa gatatu yabonanye na Mathilde Mukantabana, ambasaderi w'u Rwanda muri Amerika, bakaganira ku ifatwa rya Paul Rusesabagina. Paul Rusesabagina yerekanywe na leta y'u Rwanda ku wa mbere w'iki cyumweru i Kigali afunzwe. Ubugenzacyaha bw'u Rwanda bwavuze ko yafashwe hashize igihe "ashyiriweho impapuro mpuzamahanga zisaba ko afatwa agashyikirizwa ubutabera", kandi ko yafashwe "binyuze ku bufatanye mpuzamahanga". Nta makuru arambuye yatangajwe n'u Rwanda ku gihe, igihugu, n'uburyo yafashwemo. Uruhande rw'umuryango we n'impuzamashyaka MRCD abereye umukuru wungirije bavuga ko "yashimuswe", ko bamuheruka bwa nyuma ageze i Dubai muri Emira Zunze Ubumwe z'Abarabu (UAE). Bavuze kandi ko yagiye i Dubai avuye muri Amerika mu mujyi asanzwe afitemo urugo wa San Antonio muri leta ya Texas. Bwana Nagy yanditse kuri Twitter ko :"Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika ziteze ko leta y'u Rwanda izafata kimuntu, hakurikijwe amategeko, kandi igatanga ubucamanza butabera kandi mu mucyo kuri Bwana Rusesabagina." Igitangazamakuru CNN cyo muri Amerika, cyatangaje ko amakuru cyahawe n'umutegetsi kitavuze wo muri UAE ari uko Bwana Rusesabagina ku wa kane "yageze akanava" muri icyo gihugu "mu buryo bwemewe n'amategeko".
