CNN ivuga ko yabwiwe n'uwo mutegetsi wo muri UAE ko Bwana Rusesabagina yavuye muri iki gihugu mu masaha ya nyuma ya saa sita z'ijoro ryo ku wa kane "mu ndege bwite igiye muri icyo gihugu cyo muri Afurika y'iburasirazuba". Uwo mutegetsi yavuze ko nta masezerano u Rwanda rusanzwe rufitanye na UAE yo guhana abakekwaho ibyaha. Bwana Rusesabagina yamenyekanye cyane kubera film izwi cyane ku isi ya Hotel Rwanda yakinwe hashingiwe ku nkuru y'abemeje ko yabarokoye bahungiye muri Hôtel des Mille Collines i Kigali muri Jenoside mu Rwanda. Bwana Rusesabagina usanzwe ufite uburenganzira bwo gutura muri Amerika, aregwa n'u Rwanda ibyaha byo "kuyobora umutwe n'ihuriro ry'imitwe y'iterabwoba yitwara gisirikare igizwe n'abahezanguni...". Uregwa, ubwo yerekwaga abanyamakuru i Kigali, ntiyahawe umwanya wo kuvuga ku byo aregwa cyangwa uko yafashwe.

Mu ijambo rye rya mbere imbere ya rubanda nyuma y'uko Perezida Joe Biden agiye ku butegetsi, Trump yakomoje ku kwiyamamaza kuri uwo mwanya mu 2024. Yaneguye cyane uwamusimbuye, avuga ko politiki ya Amerika yavuye kuri "Amerika mbere na mbere ikaba Amerika bwa nyuma". Iri jambo yaritangaje nyuma y'uko hashize ibyumweru bicye urubanza rwo kumukurikirana ruhagaritswe. Kuboneka muri iki gikorane cy'abarepubulikani bakomeye ku mahame ya cyera i Orlando ku cyumweru byerekanye ko agifite ijambo rikomeye muri iri shyaka. Abakomeye ku mahame ya cyera y'iri shyaka bishimiye kongera kubona Trump Trump aracyabujijwe gukoresha imbuga nkoranyambaga, zirimo Facebook na Twitter, kubera uko yitwaye mu myigaragambyo ku ngoro y'inteko ishingamategeko ya Amerika. Kuva yava muri White House ubu atuye ku rugo rwe ruzwi nka Mar-a-Lago muri Florida. Ni iki Trump yavuze nyirizina? Abantu benshi bamuhaye amashyi y'urufaya n'akaruru k'ibyishimo ubwo yari ageze kuri hoteli byabereyemo. Benshi muri bo nta dupfukamunwa bari bambaye. Uyu mugabo w'imyaka 74 yagize ati: "Mpagaze imbere yanyu ngo mbabwire ko akazi twatangiranye mu myaka ine ishize katararangira. "Turi hano uyu mugoroba ngo tuganire ejo hazaza - ejo h'ishyaka ryacu, ejo h'igihugu cyacu." Yahakanye ibitekerezo bivuga ko azashinga irindi shyaka - abyita ko ari "fake news". Atebya, yagize ati: "Ntibyaba ari byiza, tuvuze ngo reka dutangize ishyaka rishya maze tugabanye amajwi yacu maze ntituzatsinde? "Dufite ishyaka ry'abarepubulikani. Rigiye kongera kwiyunga no gukomera kurusha ikindi gihe cyose mbere". Nubwo yatsinzwe mu kwezi kwa 11, akananengwa cyane mu kwezi kwa mbere kubera gushyigikira abigaragambya, Trump aracyakunzwe cyane mu bamutoye. Ikusanyabitekerezo rya US poll mu cyumweru gishize, ryerekanye ko 46% by'abatoye Trump n'ubundi bakongera bakamutora ashinze ishyaka rye. Abamushyigikiye bari bazanye igishusho cye cya zahabu muri icyo gikorane cy'ishyaka ryabo Muri iyo nama kandi Trump yasubiyemo ibyo yakomeje kuvuga bidafite ishingiro ko yatsinzwe mu kwa 11 kuko yibwe amajwi, avuga ko ashobora kugaruka mu 2024. Ati: "Ubundi murabizi ko batsinzwe kuri uriya mwanya. Ariko ntawamenya - nshobora no guhitamo kubatsinda bwa gatatu, sibyo?" Raba ingene Trump yavuye muri Maison Blanche/White ubwa nyuma nk'umukuru w'igihugu

Joel Mutabazi yakatiwe gufungwa burundu ariko yajuriye Birimo iterabwoba no gukorana n'imitwe y'ingabo itemewe na Leta. Mutabazi wahoze mu itsinda ryihariye ry'abasirikare barinda umutekano wa prezida Paul Kagame ahakana ibyaha byose aregwa akavuga ko ari ibyacuzwe n'ubushinjacyaha. Yahise ajuririra icyemezo cy'urukiko mbere yo kwiyambura impeta za gisirikare akazirambika ku meza yari ahagaze imbere. Undi wakatiwe gufungwa burundu mu baregwanwaga na Mutabazi ni uwitwa Camarade. Abandi bo bahawe ibihano bito bitandukanye umwe agirwa umwere. Mutabazi yaburanaga nta munyamategeko afite. Yahamijwe ubwicanyi n'umugambi wo gushaka kugirira nabi prezida Paul Kagame. Mu gisa no kutishimira ibihano yahawe, Mutabazi yabwiye umucamanza wamukatiye ati ''Imana ibahe umugisha''.

The Singapore summit was the first such meeting for a sitting US president Iryo tangazo risohowe inyuma yaho Bwana Trump abonaniye n'umuhuza mu biganiro wa Korea ya Ruguru, Kim Yong-chol ku biro White House. Yari yitezwe gushikiriza Bwana Trump ikete rya Kim Jong-un. Nta ntambwe iboneka yashitsweko ku vyo bumvikanyeko mu biganiro vy'i Singapour vyo mu kwezi kwa Gatandatu kurangiye ku vyerekeye ibigwanisho ruhonyanganda. Ntivyamenyeshejwe aho iyo yindi nama izobera. Binugwanugwa ko ishobora kubera mu gihugu ca Vietnam. Urugendo rwa Kim Yong-chol i Washington ni ikimenyetso ko hari ibikogwa ku bijanye n'ikibazo c'ibigwanisho vya "nucléaire", nkuko bivugwa n'umumenyeshamakuru wa BBC, Barbara Plett Usher. Ntawuramenya ikiri mw'ikete ryarungitswe na Kim Jong-un ariko abantu bibaza ko ryoba ririmwo insiguro z'ingene iyo nama ya kabiri yogenda, nkuko uwo mumenyeshamakuru abandanya avuga. Perezida Trump avuga ko arindiranye igishika ivyo biganiro. Umunyamabanga wiwe ku bijanye n'itangazamakuru Sarah Sanders, yavuze inyuma y'uwo mubonano wo mu biro White House ko hari intambwe mu biganiro bijanye no kugabanya ibigwanisho ruhonyanganda ariko yongera ati: "Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika zizobandanya zishira umukazo n'ibihano kuri Korea ya Ruguru."

Umudagi w'imvukira Joel Matip (i buryo) ntarasubira gukinira umugwi wa Cameroun kuva mu gikombe c'isi yose mu 2014 Bagiye kwiga umwanya CAN yoberaho ntize irahura n'amahiganwa y'umupira w'amaguru yo ku mugabane wa Buraya. Kino ni ikibazo gikomeye ku bakinyi b'abanyafrika bakina mu migwi ya Buraya. Umukinyi wa Liverpool Joel Matip ari mu bakinyi indwi ba Cameroun bari bashikirije ko bataja mw'ihiganwa rya CAN uno mwaka. Umugwi wa Cameroun waruhiye gutsinda iryo higanwa.

Sophia akoresha ikoranabuhanga rya 'artificial intelligence' rituma ku kigero runaka abasha kumenya, kumva, kuvuga, gusubiza, kugenda no gutekereza ku rwego rugereranyije, nk'abantu. Ku mbuga nkoranyambaga abantu benshi mu Rwanda batangariye iyi 'robot', mu kiganiro na yo yababwiye ko yishimiye kuba iri i Kigali. Iyi 'robot' yakozwe mu 2016 na kompanyi yitwa Hanson Robotics yo muri Hong Kong ifite ubushobozi bwo kwerekana amaragamutima yayo mu maso, kwitegereza, kubona abantu ikabamenya, kuganiriza abantu ku kigero runaka ndetse ishobora kugendesha amaguru intera ntoya. Ikiganiro gito Sophia yagiranye n'uwari uyoboye inama(MC) BBC ikesha umunyamakuru wigenga witabiriye iyi nama: Sophia: Mwaramutse, mwakoze kuntumira! MC: Uzi aho uri? Sophia :Yego rwose, ndi mu mujyi ukomeye wa Kigali mu Rwanda mu burasirazuba bwa Africa MC: Waje ute? Sophia : Naje mu ndege banshyize mu ivarisi...Ariko nzavugisha abanzanye ubutaha nzicare ku idirishya. MC: Sophia, uzi indimi zingahe? Sophia: Nzi cyane cyane icyongereza... n'igishinwa gikeya, ariko nzi n'indamukanyo zimwe na zimwe mu zindi ndimi. Urashaka kuzumva? MC: Yego yego.. Sophia: Mu gifaransa baravuga ngo Bonjour, Mu cyarabu; Salam alekum, Mu giswahili; habari zenu Mu kinyarwanda; muraho neza MC: hagati aho wambaye neza... Sophia: Urakoze cyane, nanjye nabikunze. Ni umukenyero wakozwe na Moshions (inzu y'imideri mu Rwanda). MC: Ni byiza... ndabizi rero hari ibyo wateguye kutugezaho ngaho umwanya ni uwawe. Sophia yatangiye ijambo rye, avuga ko yishimiye kuba ari muri iyi nama irimo abantu benshi n'abakuru b'ibihugu, igamije kuganira kuri ejo hazaza h'ikoranabuhanga muri Africa. Avuga ko ubu abantu bitabagoye kubona ko 'artificial intelligence' iri guhindura ubuzima bwabo neza mu bukungu, ubuvuzi, ubuhizi n'ibindi byinshi. Ati "Hano mu Rwanda mukoresha uburyo bwo kwishyura ingendo mudatanze cash n'abantu bakabone serivisi za leta kuri murandasi n'ibindi...ni ibintu byiza". Yemeza ko ubuhanga mw'ikoranabuhanga bukorerwa muri Africa butanga umusaruro n'ahandi ku isi kuko hari na bimwe mu bice bimugize (Sophia) byakorewe i Addis Ababa muri Ethiopia. Kuri we, ngo iyi ni intangiriro gusa. Avuga ati: "Nizeye ko dufatanyije, abantu na za robot, twagera ku byiza byinshi n'imibanire myiza ku isi". Sophia akoresha ikoranabuhanga rya 'artificial intelligence' rituma ku kigero runaka abasha kumenya, kumva, kuvuga, gusubiza, kugenda no gutekereza ku rwego rugereranyije, nk'abantu.

Barack Obama wahoze ari Perezida w'Amerika, ari kumwe na Dr Auma umwe muri bashiki be kuri se na inakuru wa Auma Bwana Obama yaherukaga gusura iki cyaro mu mwaka wa 2006 ubwo yari akiri senateri. Yageze muri Kenya ku wa gatandatu. Byitezwe ko atangiza ku mugaragaro ikigo cy'urubyiruko cyashinzwe na mushiki we. Iki kigo cyitwa Sauti Kuu Foundation, kizajya gikorerwamo imyidagaduro ndetse cyigishe n'imyuga ijyanye n'ubumenyingiro. Uru rugendo muri Kenya rwa Bwana Obama ruciye bugufi ugereranyije n'urwo aheruka kuhagirira mu mwaka wa 2015 ubwo yari akiri Perezida w'Amerika. Ku cyumweru, yagiranye ibiganiro na Perezida Uhuru Kenyatta wa Kenya. Ibitangazamakuru byo muri Kenya biratangaza ko hashyizweho umugozi ukumira abantu kugera aho Bwana Obama ari mu rwego rw'umutekano, ariko ibi ntibyabujije abacuruzi gukomeza gucuruza ibicuruzwa byibutsa uru rugendo, birimo n'amabendera y'Amerika. Indi ngingo yavugishije menshi Abanyakenya, ni inkuru yasohotse mu binyamakuru byo muri Tanzaniya. Ivuga ko Bwana Obama n'umuryango we bamaze iminsi umunani muri pariki izwi cyane ya Serengeti yo muri Tanzaniya, mbere yo kwerekeza muri Kenya. Bamwe mu Banyakenya babona iyi nkuru y'ibinyamakuru byo muri Tanzaniya nk'ishyari Abanyatanzaniya bagiriye Kenya. Ku wa gatatu, Bwana Obama azerekeza muri Afurika y'epfo aho azatanga ikiganiro ngarukamwaka mu munsi mukuru witiriwe Mandela wahoze ari Perezida w'iki gihugu.

Eden Hazard niwe yinjije igitsindo c'intsinzi ku munota wa 85 bahura na Liverpool itariki 27 Ukwezi kw'i Cenda mu 2018 Umugaba wa Tottenham Daniel Levy yemeye gutanga imiliyoni 225 z'amapawundi (£225m) ku mukinyi wo hagati, Christian Eriksen w'imyaka 26, aturuka muri Danemark naho Real Madrid nayo nyene iriko iramurondera. (Guardian) Umunyezamu wa Burnley Joe Hart w'imyaka 31, akurikiranwa n'umugwi Preston wipfuza uwo mukinyi yahora mu mugwi w'igihugu c'Ubwongereza ku mukopo. (Talksport) Umukinyi wo hagati wa Barcelone, Denis Suarez w'imyaka 25, aranezerewe no kuja muri Arsenal mu kwezi kwa Mbere. (Mirror) Umukinyi w'inyuma hagati wa Burnley, Dunne w'imyaka 21 arondegwa na Sunderland ku mukopo. (Mail) Arsenal iriko irondera gushira ku buyobozi bw'umupira w'amaguru umukinyi wayo wo hagati wa kera, Edu. Uwo mugabo yakukurutse aturuka mu gihugu ca Brésil, akaba yasezereye gukina mu 2010. (Standard)

Ambasaderi Gordon Sondland yavuze ko amabwiriza yayahawe na Rudy Giuliani, umunyamategeko wa Bwana Trump. Iryo perereza riri kugenzura niba Bwana Trump yarafatiriye inkunga ya gisirikare igenewe Ukraine ngo ibanze ikore iryo perereza bivugwa ko yayisabaga. Bwana Trump ahakana avuga ko nta kibi yakoze. Gushaka inkunga y'amahanga yo kwifashisha mu matora ku mukandida wiyamamaza binyuranyije n'amategeko muri Amerika Bwana Biden ni umwe mu bahabwa amahirwe menshi yo kuzahagararira ishyaka ry'abademokarate nk'umukandida mu matora ya perezida yo muri Amerika mu mwaka utaha wa 2020. Bwana Sondland, ambasaderi w'Amerika mu muryango w'ubumwe bw'Uburayi (EU), yabwiye inteko ishinga amategeko y'Amerika ko Bwana Giuliani hari ibyo yashakaga ko ubutegetsi bwa Ukraine bukora. Gordon Sondland, ambasaderi w'Amerika muri EU, ubwo yarahiraga mbere yo gutanga ubuhamya bwe Avuga ko Bwana Giuliani yashatse ko Perezida Volodymyr Zelensky wa Ukraine atangaza ku mugaragaro iperereza ku "bibazo bya ruswa" bashinja Biden. Bwana Giuliani yavuze by'umwihariko kompanyi Burisma - yari ifite mu nama nyobozi yayo Hunter, umuhungu wa Biden, umukandida perezida wo mu ishyaka ry'abademokarate. Mu gihe yaba ahamwe n'icyo cyaha ku bwiganze bw'amajwi mu nteko ishinga amategeko, Bwana Trump yaburanishwa ku bijyanye no kweguzwa mu nteko ishinga amategeko umutwe wa sena. Ariko icyo gihe byasaba ko bibiri bya gatatu by'abagize iyo sena yiganjemo abo mu ishyaka rye ry'abarepubulikani batora babishyigikiye kugira ngo yeguzwe ku butegetsi.

Bwana Kushner niwe agiye kurongora umurwi ugenzura ibikogwa vyo mu biro kwa Prezida Jared Kushner niwe yisabiye kuvugana n'umugwi w'inama nshingamateka ujejwe iperereza "Senate Intelligence Committee", niko ibiro vy'umukuru w'igihugu, White House, vyavuze. Wihweza nimba Uburusiya bwarivanze mu matora aheruka mu mwaka uheze, muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika. Ibigo bijejwe iperereza muri Amerika biziko Uburusiya bwabuye amabanga igihe c'amatora, mu ntumbero yo gufasha Bwana Trump ngo atsinde Hillary Clinton. Uburusiya bwarahakanye ivyo bwegekwako, Prezida Trump we yivugira ko ari amakuru y'ibinyoma "fake news".

Perezida Museveni ari mu nama ya mbere yahuje intumwa z'Uburundi i Kampala Ubundi ibyo biganiro byagombaga gutangira ku itariki 2 z'ukwezi gutaha. Bwana Willy Nyamitwe, umujyanama wa Perezida Nkurunziza mu rwego rw'itumanaho, aremeza ko u Burundi bumaze kumenyeshwa icyo cyemezo. Itangazo ryasohowe n'umuhuza, riravuga ko akeneye kubanza kungurana ibitekerezo n'impande zibifitemo uruhare. Itangazo ryavuze ko icyo cyemezo cyagezweho nyuma yo kungurana ibitekerezo hagati ya Bwana Benjamin Mkapa n'umunyamabanga mukuru w'umuryango w'ibihugu by'Afurika y'uburasirazuba, Bwana Liberat Mfumukeko. Iryo tangazo ryavuze ko ibiganiro bishyizwe mu cyumweru cya 3 cy'ukwezi gutaha.

Yahoze ari umukuru w'iperereza ry'u Rwanda Bavuze ko ijosi rya Karegeye ryari ryabyimbye kandi ko ashobora kuba yanizwe. Esuwime yuzuyeho amaraso n'igitambaro byaje kuvumburwa ahantu hihishe mu cyumba cya hotel aho umurambo we wabonetse ejo kuwa gatatu. Bwana Karegeya yabaga muri Afrika yepfo aho yari yarahungiye mu myaka 6 ishize, amaze kugirana ibibazo n'uwo bakoranaga prezida Paul Kagame. Ihuriro nyarwanda RNC ryavuze ko Karegeya yishwe.

Kizito Mihigo mu kiganiro n'umunyamakuru Benedict Moran mu kwezi kwa mbere mu 2020 Muri iyo videwo Kizito agira ati: "Nibakomeza kunyangira, mbikubwiye hagati yanjye nawe, nta yandi mahitamo nzagira atari ukugerageza gusohoka mu buryo butemewe". Ni videwo iri mu rurimi rw'Igifaransa, yatangajwe n'ikinyamakuru Mail&Guardian cyo muri Afurika y'epfo, ikubiyemo ikiganiro bivugwa ko yagiranye n'umunyamakuru Benedict Moran. Ubwo Kizito yafatirwaga mu karere avukamo ka Nyaruguru hafi y'umupaka n'u Burundi, ubugenzacyaha bw'u Rwanda (RIB) bwamushinje ibyaha birimo "kwambuka umupaka mu buryo bunyuranyije n'amategeko na ruswa". Muri iyo videwo bitangazwa ko ari iyo mu kwezi kwa mbere mu 2020, Kizito avuga ko yari arambiwe imibereho yo gushyirwa mu kato n'ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda. Avuga ko umwuga we nk'umuhanzi atari agishoboye kuwukora uko bikwiye - ingingo anagarukaho mu gitabo cyasohotse nyuma y'urupfu rwe, avugamo ko kimwe mu byari bisigaye bimubeshejeho ari ukwigisha abana umuziki. Mu mwaka ushize, polisi y'u Rwanda yabwiye BBC ko ibivugwa muri icyo gitabo "atari ukuri", ko ari "propaganda [amakuru ayobya] y'umwanditsi". Muri iyo videwo, Kizito akomeza agira ati: "Nahitamo kubaho nabi mu bibazo aho kubaho ntisanzuye imbere muri jyewe, aho gukora ibyo bashaka ariko numva muri jyewe ari nkaho ndi ku ngoyi...ntari jyewe nyakuri". "Intego yanjye si iyo gusingiza ubutegetsi. Akazi kanjye nk'umuhanzi w'umukristu, kandi iteka nakomeje kubivuga, ni ukuririmba ubutumwa bwomora, bukiza imitima yakomeretse, butanga icyizere, ariko bunizeza ubwiyunge nyabwo". "...ubwo ni ubutumwa bw'umuhanzi utagomba kugengwa n'ishyaka runaka rya politike cyangwa ikigo [runaka]". "Ariko ibyo ndimo kukubwira, birabujijwe hano. Ntabwo umuntu ashobora kugira ukwishyira akizana. Ntanze nk'urugero, ntabwo umuntu ashobora gukora akuye inganzo mu kwemera kwe kwa gikristu ngo atange ubutumwa bugenewe bose". Mu kwezi gushize, Minisitiri w'ubutabera Johnston Busingye yabwiye inama y'umuryango w'abibumbye izwi nka 'Universal Periodic Review' (UPR) ko mu burenganzira bwubahirijwe mu Rwanda harimo ubwo gutanga ibitekerezo. Kizito atanga urugero rw'indirimbo yasohoye mu kwezi kwa gatandatu mu 2019 akayitura Papa Francis ngo kubera ukuntu ashishikariza abemera bo mu madini atandukanye kugirana ibiganiro. Kubera iyo indirimbo, avuga ko hari abamubwiye ko "agiye kurebwa nabi kubera kuririmba Papa aho kuririmba Perezida". Kizito agira ati: "Barabimbwira kenshi bati 'uzongera gukora mu bwisanzure ari uko perezida akuvuzeho ijambo ryiza'". Mu 2018 Kizito yari yafunguwe hamwe n'abandi bagera ku 2,000 ku mbabazi za Perezida Paul Kagame, nyuma yo gukatirwa igifungo cy'imyaka 10 ahamwe n'ibyaha birimo ubugambanyi, iterabwoba no gushaka guhirika ubutegetsi. Mu gitabo cye avuga ko yahatiwe kubyemera ngo aticwa, kandi ko ngo izo mbabazi zari ikinamico kuko yari amaze amezi yarazibwiweho. Bijyanye n'izo mbabazi, ntiyari yemerewe kuva mu gihugu kandi yagombaga kwitaba polisi mu buryo buhoraho. Ati: "Ntekereza ko nzagerageza nkareba uko nsohoka mu gihugu, wenda nyuze mu gihugu duturanye. Ndabizi ko bigoye cyane nta byangombwa mfite, ariko iyo nta yandi mahitamo umuntu afite, nemera ko ari cyo gisubizo nzaba nsigaranye". "Ariko reka twizere ko mu minsi micye iri imbere, nzumva inkuru nziza ko ibisabwa byavuyeho, nkashobora wenda kongera gutembera". "Hari igihe nibaza niba mfite umutekano, kuko nta kintu na kimwe kimbwira ko aba bantu nta migambi mibisha bakimfitiye". Kizito Mihigo - wamenyekanye mu ndirimbo zikanguria abantu amahoro, ubwiyunge n'imbabazi - yapfuye afite imyaka 38, mu rupfu rutavugwaho rumwe. Ubushinjacyaha bw'u Rwanda bwanzuye ko yapfuye yiyahuye - ibihakanwa n'imiryango imwe iharanira uburengenzira bwa muntu n'itsinda ry'abavuga ko barokotse Jenoside yo mu Rwanda baba mu mahanga, basabye ko hakorwa iperereza ryigenga.

Imyambaro n'ibikoresho izi nyeshyamba zivuga ko zavanye mu birindiro bya RDF Ibitero by'izi nyeshyamba byaherukaga kuvugwa cyane mu mwaka ushize mu turere twa Nyaruguru na Nyamagabe. Ku mbuga nkoranyambaga izi nyeshyamba zigaragaza mu mashusho zambaye imyambaro, amakatira ya gisirikare n'ibikoresho zivuga ko ari ibyo zambuye ingabo z'u Rwanda mu mirwano yo kuwa gatanu. Umuvugizi w'ingabo z'u Rwanda avuga ko ibi ntacyo babivugaho, ariko ko umutekano mu gace kavugwa urinzwe neza. Herman Nsengimana umuvugizi w'izi nyeshyamba yabwiye BBC ko kuwa gatanu nijoro bagabye igitero mu gace ka Bweyeye, umurenge wo mu karere ka Rusizi wegereye ishyamba rya Nyungwe, ku birindiro by'ingabo z'u Rwanda. Bwana Nsengimana yavuze ko bateye ibirindiro bya RDF biri ahitwa Nyamuzi muri Bweyeye bakirukana ingabo mu birindiro byazo ari naho bafatiye imyenda n'ibikoresho berekana. Agace ka Nyamuzi muri Bweyeye aho FLN ivuga yagabye igitero ku birindiro bya RDF Muri iyo mirwano avuga ko bishe abasirikare 20 ba RDF barimo abo berekana ku makarita, nabo umwe muri bo agapfa. Ibyo berekana ni ukuri? Ati: "None urabihakana uhereye kuki? video wabonye n'imyenda ya RDF wabonye twambaye urakeka ko twaba twayikuye he? Biriya byangombwa, amakarita n'ibikoresho byabo urumva twarabikuye he?" Nsengimana avuga ko bamaze kuvana RDF mu birindiro byabo nabo batabigumyemo bahise basubira mu byabo nyuma y'imirwano. Avuga ko batwaye ibikapu birindwi birimo ibyangombwa n'imyambaro, ibikombe binini bitatu bibika amasasu n'imbunda umunani. Lt Col Innocent Munyengango umuvugizi w'ingabo z'u Rwanda avuga ko ibishyirwa kuri social media ntacyo yabivugaho. Avuga ko ibyo biri ku mbuga nkoranyambaga nawe yabibonye ariko atarabona umuntu n'umwe bafashe mubo bavuga bafashe. Col Munyengango ati: "Iyo hari icyabaye nitwe ba mbere tuvuga ibyabaye, tukavuga tuti habaye ibi byagenze bitya, iyo tutabikoze rero ni uko tutaba dushaka kuvuga kuri buri kintu cyose kigiye hanze". Umva hano ikiganiro umuvugizi wa FLN yahaye BBC

Mufti w'u Rwanda Sheikh Salim Hitimana Mu ntangiriro z'igisibo gitagatifu cy'abayisilamu, umuyobozi w'inama ya Papa ishinzwe ibiganiro n'andi madini - yashyizweho n'umushumba wa Kiliziya Gatolika ku isi - yandikiye ibaruwa imiryango ya kisilamu ku isi ibabwira ko yifatanyije na bo muri iki gisibo. Ibaruwa y'iyi nama y'i Vaticani - BBC yabonye - ikubiyemo ubutumwa busaba ubufatanye, koroherana, guha abantu ubwisanzure mu guhitamo, ubwisanzure mu bitekerezo no kubitanga. Igira iti: "Kugira ngo abakristu n'abayisiramu - nk'abavandimwe - dukorere hamwe tugana ku cyiza". Mu nyigisho ya none kuri sitade ya Kigali, Mufti w'u Rwanda, Sheikh Salim Hitimana, yashimye iby'ubu butumwa bwa Vaticani busaba ubworoherane no kubana mu mahoro kw'abadahuje ukwemera. Ni ubwa mbere mu isengesho ry'umunsi nk'uyu w'irayidi i Kigali bari bagarutse ku butumwa bwa Kiliziya Gatolika. Nyuma y'isengesho, Mufti w'u Rwanda yabwiye BBC ati: "Mu byo navuze harimo ibyo nakuye muri ubu butumwa bwa nyirubutungane Papa bugendereye gusaba amadini atandukanye gufasha isi n'abantu kubona ituze no gusenga Imana batekanye". Abayisiramu bitabiriye isengesho ry'irayidi nubwo hagwaga imvura i Kigali Mu butumwa bwanditse, Zubel Sebarashi, umuyisiramu witabiriye iri sengesho i Kigali, yabwiye BBC ko we yatunguwe no kumva Mufti yigisha ku butumwa bwa Vaticani kuko ari ubwa mbere yari abibonye. Avuga ati: "Natunguwe, amadini ndabona bashaka kuzayahuza akaba rimwe". Musenyeri Antoine Kambanda, umuyobozi wa Kiliziya Gatolika mu Rwanda, avuga ko intambwe Papa Francis yateye yo guhuza amadini akaganira, yafunguye amarembo bituma ubu aya madini ari kunoza umubano.

Trump yavuze ko abimukira bo muri Mexique ari inkozi z'ikibi kandi bafata abapfasoni ku nguvu Ibiro vy'umukuru w'igihugu bivuga ko imigambi y'uko haba ibiganiro hagati y'abo bagabo babiri iriko irahera gutegurwa. Iyo nama iza kuba umwanya muto imbere y'uko Trump ashikiriza ijambo ryerekeye abimukira badakurikije amategeko. Mu myiyamamazo yiwe, Trump yavuze ko abanye Mexique binjira muri Amerika ari 'inkozi z'ikibi' kandi 'bafata abapfasoni ku nguvu'. Prezida wa Mexique, Pena Nieto Yiyemeje kwubaka uruhome rubuza abimukira gusubira kwinjira muri ico gihugu. Umva amwe mu majambo ya Trump kuri Mexique Prezida Pena Nieto yaranatumiye n'uwundi yitoza mu kibanza c'umukuru w'igihugu ku ruhande w'abademocrates, umupfasoni Hillary Clinton.

Umuririmvyi Délégué Général Yagirizwa ivyaha vyo "gukwegera abantu mu buhumbu no guhungabanya imico y'ikirundi". Ibi bifatiye ku masanamu y'ururirimbo gw'iwe yise "Delegue General" bavuga ko rurimo ibiterasoni. Igipolisi kivuga ko kizokurikirana n'abandi bose bakinye muri iyo sanamu nk'abanyeshure nk'uko bivugwa n'ibimenyeshamakuru mu Burundi. Amakuru y'uko uyu muririmvyi afunzwe yavuzwe bwa mbere ku wa mbere w'iyi ndwi ku mbuga hwaniro. Ururirimbo rwiwe rurimwo urwaruka ruboneka nk'abanyeshure bakinira mu cumba c'ishure bambaye impuzu z'ishure. Uru ruririmbo rwasohotse mu kwezi gushize k'umunani, ubu kuri Youtube, aho rukigaragara kugeza mu gitondo uyu munsi, rumaze kurabwa inshuro zirenga 25,000. Abakinye muri iyi ndirimbo polisi nabo ngo izobabaza Ubwo yerekanwa n'igipolisi, uyu muririmvyi yumvikanye avuga ko asaba ikigongwe kuko yakoze iyi ndirimbo abakuru bakamubwira ko ari amakosa. Mu gihe we ayikora ngo yumva ko ibiyirimwo ari ibintu bibaho. Ku mbuga hwaniro, abantu bamwe bavuga ko uru ruririmbo nta kidasanzwe kirimwo kitabonetse mbere cotuma Olegue Baraka n'abagenzi biwe bafunzwe ubu. Abandi bavuga ko akwiriye guhanwa kuko ayo masanamu ahushanye n'imico y'ikirundi.

Los Angeles Lakers yatwaye igikombe cya NBA cya 2020 mu kwezi kwa 10 Nta kipe yasuye White House ku gihe cy'ubutegetsi bwa Donald Trump, ibintu ubusanzwe byari umuco. Perezida Trump yahagaritse gutumira ikipe zatwaye igikombe cya NBA mu myaka ya vuba nyuma y'uko abakinnyi benshi bavuze ko nta wifuza kujyayo kubonana nawe. Ibinyamakuru muri Ameirka ariko ubu biravuga ko Lakers yaba yifuza gusura Biden nyuma y'igihe azaba yahawe ubutegetsi tariki 20 z'uku kwezi. Cleveland Cavaliers niyo kipe ya nyuma iheruka gusura Perezida uri mu mirimo, Barack Obama, nyuma y'uko bari begukanye igikombe cya 2016. Golden State Warriors (2017 na 2018) hamwe na Toronto Raptors (2019) ntabwo zagiye gusura Trump. Birashoboka ko Lakers yazasura White House ubwo bazakina na Washington Wizards iri iwayo, mu gihe amabwiriza yo kwirinda Covid-19 cyangwa Biden ubwe bitababuza. Doncic v Jokic no gutsindwa kwa Lakers Donkic (ibumoso) na Jokic (iburyo) bigaragaje cyane ku mukino wa Dallas Mavericks na Denver Nuggets Mu ijoro ryo kuwa kane Lakers yari iwayo kuri Staples Center yatsinzwe umukino wa gatatu mu mikino icyenda imaze gukina kuva iyi 'season' yatangira, ku manota 109 ku 118 ya San Antonio Spurs. LeBron James yatsinze amanota 27 ariko 28 ya LaMarcus Aldridge wa Spurs yatumye iyi kipe itsinda umukino wa kane mu munani imaze gukina. Ahandi, Seth Curry wa Philadelphia 76ers - umuvandimwe wa Stephen Curry wa Golden State Warriors - bamusanzemo Covid-19 kuwa kane. Ikipe ye iri imbere mu gice cy'iburasirazuba ariko yaraye itsinzwe ku nshuro ya kabiri muri iyi 'saison' ku manota 109 ku 122 ya Brooklyn Nets. Mu mukino waranze ijoro ryacyeye, Luka Doncic yatsinze amanota 38 muri Mavericks ubwo batsindaga hongeweho iminota Nuggets nayo yari ihagaze bwuma ifashijwe na Nikola Jokic watsinze amanota 38. Umunyaseribiya Jokic n'umunyasloveniya Doncic nibo bigaragaje cyane muri uyu mukino warangiye Dallas itsinze Denver amanota 124 ku 117.

Afurika y'epfo yafunze imipaka yayo yo ku butaka ku itariki ya 11 y'ukwezi kwa mbere, hamaze gutahurwa ubwoko bushya bwa Covid Ni icyemezo cyafatiwe mu nama y'abaminisitiri ku wa gatandatu. Afurika y'epfo yashegeshwe bikomeye n'inkubiri ya kabiri y'ubwandu bw'iki cyorezo bufitanye isano n'ubwoko bushya bw'iyi ndwara. Imaze gutangaza abanduye Covid-19 bagera hafi kuri miliyoni 1,5, muri bo yishe abarenga 47,000 - ba mbere benshi yishe muri Afurika, nkuko imibare ya Kaminuza ya Johns Hopkins yo muri Amerika ibigaragaza. Ku isi, abantu barenga miliyoni 108 batangajwe ko banduye coronavirus kuva yakwaduka mu mpera y'umwaka wa 2019, muri bo abarenga miliyoni 2,3 yarabishe, nkuko imibare ya Kaminuza ya Johns Hopkins ikomeza ibigaragaza. Leta y'Afurika y'epfo yavuze iki nyirizina? Ku wa gatandatu, leta yatangaje ko ahantu hatandukanye h'imipaka ihuza iki gihugu na Zimbabwe, Botswana, Mozambique, Namibia, Lesotho na Eswatini hagiye gufungurwa. Aaron Motsoaledi, Minisitiri w'ubutegetsi bw'igihugu, yagize ati: "Kugenzurana umuhate kandi mu buryo buboneye abantu banyura ku mipaka yacu ni igice cy'ingenzi cya gahunda rusange y'igihugu yo guhangana n'ibyago mu kurwanya ikwirakwira rya Covid-19". Ariko uyu minisitiri yaburiye ko abantu bose bashaka kwambuka imipaka bagomba kwerekana icyemezo cyuko bapimwe ntibabasangemo Covid-19 kandi icyo cyemezo kikaba ari icy'ibipimo biherutse gufatwa mu gihe cya vuba. Bwana Motsoaledi yavuze ko we ubwe azasura imipaka ine ikoreshwa cyane kurusha iyindi akirebera uko abagenzi bagenzurwa. Ku itariki ya 11 y'ukwezi kwa mbere ni bwo Afurika y'epfo yafunze imipaka iyihuza n'ibihugu by'ibituranyi, nyuma yuko hatahuwe ubwoko bushya bwa Covid-19. Kuva icyo gihe ibihugu bimwe byahagaritse ingendo zose ziva cyangwa zijya muri Afurika y'epfo.

Bwana Putin yatowe ku majwi arenga 76% y'amajwi yose Yavuze ko bagiye guhura "muri kazoza ka vuba"ngo bavugane ingene bogabanya ibigwanisho, bavugane kuri Ukraine na Syria. Bwana Putin yasubiye gutogwa ku majwi arenga 76% vy'amajwi yose, ku kiringo c'imyaka itandatu. Nta muntu w'ijunja bari bahanganye mu gihe uwukomeye atavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi, Alexei Navalny yabujijwe kwitoza. Abahagarariye amatora bo mu muryango w'ibihugu vya Buraya bavuze ko naho amatora yatunganijwe neza, ko abantu batashoboye gutora ukwo biyumva. Bwana Trump yavuze ko uguhiganwa mu bigwanisho hagati ya Amerika n'Uburusiya ko bitagishobora kugenzugwa, ariko ngo ntibazemera ko hagira umuntu atunga ibigwanisho bishaka kungana n'ivyo bafise". Vladimir Putin yabonanye amaso mu yandi na Trump mu nama yo mu Budagi mu kwezi kw'indwi 2017 Igihe amuhamagara, Bwana Trump ntiyigeze avuga ku kibazo cateye uruhagarara hagati y'Uburaya na Moscou - uguha ubumara umusumyi w'urusaku wa kera Sergei Skripal hamwe n'umukobwa wiwe Yulia mu Bwongereza. Ubwongereza bwegeka ico gitero ku Burusiya, nabwo bugahakana ko ata ruhara bugifisemwo. Umukenguzamateka John McCain avuga ko umukuru w'igihugu ca Amerika adakwiye gukeza umuntu atwaza igikenye Umukenguzamateka John McCain avuga ko umukuru w'igihugu ca Amerika adakwiye gukeza umuntu atwaza igikenye Umukenguzamateka wa Amerika, John McCain yaneguye Bwana Trump kuri ako kamo ka telefone. "Umukuru w'igihugu ca Amerika ntatwara isi irangwamwo umwidegemvyo akeza abatwaza igikenye ngo batsinze amatora atariyo. Mu gukora ivyo na Vladimir Putin, Prezida Trump yatutse umurusiya wese yabujijwe uburenganzira bwo gutora mu matora yisanzuye n'ay'ukuri, mu gutunganiriza igihugu kazoza, atuka n'abarusiya bakunda igihugu bihevye mu kuja mu myiyerekano biyamiriza intwaro ya Putin," niko McCain yavuze mw'itangazo yasohoye. Uwurongoye umuryango w'ibihugu vya Buraya, Jean-Claude Juncker yanditse nawe nyene ikete ryo gukeza indongozi y'Uburusiya ku munsi wa kabiri, asaba ko boguma bafashanya na Kremlin mu gukomeza umutekano. "Namye mvuga ko imigenderanire myiza hagati y'Uburaya n'Uburusiya ikenewe ku mvo z'umutekano w'umugabane wacu," niko yavuze mw'ikete yacishije kuri Twitter. Uwurongoye umugambwe "Conservative Party" wo mu Bwongereza uri mu nama nshingamateka ya Buraya, MEP Ashley Fox, yavuze ko ikete rya Bwana Juncker ritey'isoni n'iseseme, mu kuba ritashize ahabona uruhara rw'uburusiya ku gitero cagabwe kuri Bwana Skripal n'umukobwa wiwe. Uwurongoye leta y'Ubudagi, Angela Merkel ari mu bategetsi ba mbere ba Buraya bakeje n'igishika Bwana Putin ku munsi wa mbere, avuga ko bikwiye ko baguma bavugana ku ngorane z'ibihugu vyabo n'iz'amakungu, mu kugerageza kuzironderera inyishu. Umukuru w'igihugu c'Ubufaransa Emmanuel Macron yipfurije Bwana Putin kuroranigwa mu Burusiya butera buja imbere, ariko asaba Moscou gutanga umuco ku gitero co kurondera kwica umusumyi w'urusaku wa kera mu Bwongereza.

Batinya Ebola ariko batinya cyane kwicwa n'inzara mu gihe batagiye gushakisha ibibatunga. Barabanza gukaraba intoki mu buryo bushya bwahashyizwe Ejo kuwa kane uyu mupaka wafunzwe mu gihe kigera ku masaha umunani guhera mu gitondo, bihagarika ubuzima n'imibereho y'abantu ibihumbi bawunyuraho ku mpande zombi. Umwe mu bakozi bashinzwe uyu mupaka avuga ko ku munsi unyurwaho n'abantu bari hagati ya 55,000 na 60,000. Ubwoba ni bwose ko indwara ya Ebola, imaze kugaragara ku bantu bane mu mujyi wa Goma, yakwambuka uyu mupaka ikinjira muri Gisenyi kuko iyi mijyi ifatanye, uretse umupaka wubatswe n'ibihugu. Ku mupaka uzwi nka 'petite barrière', mu buryo bugaragara hongerewe imbaraga nyinshi mu gucunga ko buri muntu wese unyuze kuri uyu mupaka apimwe umuriro - kimwe mu bimenyetso bya Ebola - kandi akarabye intoki. Uyu munsi, abaturage bambuka ni benshi cyane nk'ibisanzwe, kubera ko iyi mijyi yombi ishingiye cyane ku bikorwa by'ubuhahirane n'ubucuruzi hagati yayo. Kuri uyu mupaka hashyizwe uburyo bushya bwo gukaraba intoki ku bantu bose bahanyuze. Abaca ku mupaka bigaragara ko bishimiye gusuzumwa no gukaraba intoki mbere yo kwambuka nk'uko umunyamakuru uri ku mupaka abivuga. Minisitiri w'ubuzima mu Rwanda bagiriye inama abaturage kutajya i Goma ahavugwa Ebola Ubwo umupaka wari wafunzwe ejo kuwa kane, umwe mu bawukoresha witwa Ernest Mvuyekure yabwiye BBC ko atinya inzara kurusha Ebola. Yagize ati:"... turya ari uko tuvuye hariya hakurya...Turabona ikibazo cya Ebola ariko n'imibereho ni ikibazo, uburwayi bwo umuntu yajya kwivuza cyangwa agapfa ariko atishwe n'inzara". Umupaka wongeye gufungurwa byabaye inkuru nziza kuri benshi, Gloriose Uwayezu ucuruza inyama yabwiye BBC ko yishimye cyane nubwo yaguye mu gihombo mu masaha wamaze ufunze. Yagize ati: "ubu inyama twari turi kuzigurisha igihumbi (1000F) na magana inani, kandi i Goma [ikilo] tukigurisha bitatu... Twari dufite agahinda ariko dushimye Imana ko mufunguye umupaka". Ebola imaze guhitana abantu barenga 1,800 mu gihe cy'umwaka umwe imaze yadutse nanone mu ntara ya Kivu ya ruguru ya repubulika ya demokarasi ya Kongo. Uyu mupaka unyurwaho n'abantu bari hagati ya 55000 na 60000 ku munsi

Indege y'indwano F-16 y'Ububirigi Abategetsi ba gisirikare b'Ububirigi bavuga ko abadereva babiri bariko banyonga iyo ndege bapirutse hafi y'igisagara ca Lorient mu ntara ya Bretagne. Ibimenyeshamakuru vy'u Bufaransa bivuga ko iryo sanganya ryabereye hirya rwose mu buseruko bw'iyo ntara, hafi y'ahitwa Pluvigner. Uyo mudereva bashoboye kumukura kuri urwo rutsinga, eka n'uwundi nawe nyene bakaba bamaze gutora aho ari. Amakuru avuga ko bose bameze neza. Ibimenyeshamakuru vyo mu Bufaransa bivuga ko izo ntsinga zifise 'volts' zingana na 250.000. Ikinyamakuru c'Ubufaransa, Le Télégramme, cerekanye isanamu iri kure isa n'iyerekana umusirikare arwanira mu kirere yenena (canke 'anagana' mu Kinyarwanda) ku ntsinga z'umuyagankuba hafi y'umunara muremure. Ayandi masanamu yerekana umwotsi wirabura wava hafi y'aho iryo sanganya ryabereye, be n'igisenge c'inzu cononekaye. Abategetsi bavuga ko ata birwanisho vyari muri iyo ndege.

Iyamuremye yagejejwe mu Rwanda mu 2016 yoherejwe n'Ubuholandi Mu 2016, Bwana Iyamuremye yoherejwe mu Rwanda n'Ubuholandi ngo aburanishwe ku byaha bya jenoside. Mu rubanza mu mizi, urukiko rwamaze kumva abatangabuhamya b'ubushinjacyaha bavuze ko Bwana Iyamuremye yari mu mutwe w'interahamwe kandi yagize uruhare mu bitero byishe abatutsi mu ishuri rya ETO - Kicukiro mu mjyi wa Kigali. Bwana Iyamureme uhakana ibyo ashinjwa, nawe yasabye ko abatangabuhamya batatu bamushinjura bumvwa n'ubwo bari mu Bubiligi. Urukiko rwagombaga kwemeza uko abo batangabuhaya bazumvwa. Urukiko rwanzuye ko kohereza itsinda ryarwo mu Bubiligi bitakunda kubera ibihe biriho by'icyorezo cya Covid-19, bityo abo batangabuhamya bazumvwa batagaragajwe umwirondoro kuri Skype ku itariki ya 5 z'ukwezi kwa 11. Urukiko gacaca rwa Niyobe muri Kicukiro mu mujyi Wa Kigali mu 2007 rwahamije Bwana Iyamuremye icyaha cya jenoside rumukatira imyaka 19 y'igifungo. Gusa icyo gihano cyabanje guteshwa agaciro mbere y'uko urubanza rwe ruburanishwa mu mizi muri uru rukiko nk'uko bigenwa n'itegeko rikuraho inkiko Gacaca. Bwana Iyamuremye w'imyaka 45 avuga ko Jenoside yabaye afite imyaka 19, yatawe muri yombi mu 2013 mu Buholandi aho yakoraga akazi ko gutwara abakozi ba ambasade za Isiraheli na Finlande.

Abasirikare bagumutse nibo bafashije umukuru w'igihugu kuja ku butegetsi mu 2011 Abagumutse barashe mu micungararo y'ikirimba c'umukuru w'igihugu mu gisagara ca Abidjan, aho ubuzi n'amashule vyugaye. Abasirikare b'igihugu bariko baja mu gisagara ca Bouake, cafashwe ku munsi wa Mungu n'abasirikare bagumutse basaba kurihwa udushirukabute twabo. Abo basirikare nibo bagwanye bashira ku butegetsi umukuru w'igihugu Alassane Ouattara. Ubutegetsi busigura ko igiciro ca cacao cakorotse, catumye budashobora kubishura amahera bwari bwarabemereye. Umukuru w'ingabo Jenerali Sékou Touré yiyemeje kurangiza iyo migumuko. Mw'itangazo yarungitse ku munsi wa Mungu, Jenerali Touré yavuze ko benshi mu bagumutse bumvise akamo yabateye ko guhagarika iyo migumuko. Abasirikare b'igihugu bagomowe kubera hari bamwe mu bagumutse birengagije ako kamo, niko yavuze.

Mama Andre avuga ko ata bwoba yagize amenye ko yanduye Covid Lucile Randon, yiswe izina ry'ikibikira rya Mama Andre mu 1944, yamenyekanye ko yanduye coronavirus ku wa 16 z'ukwa mbere ariko nta bimenyetso na bimwe yagaragaje. Yabwiye ibinyamakuru vyo muri ico gihugu ko ata n'uko yari azi ko yayanduye. Yaciye yitaramura mu nzu y'abakukuruke iri ahitwa Toulon mu bumanuko bw'Ubufaransa, ariko ubu aboneka ko yakize neza. Mama Andre, ubu akaba atabona kandi agendera kw'igare y'abamugaye, ariko yitegurira guhimbaza ivuka ryiwe ejo ku wa kane - n'aho azohimbaza uwo musi ari kumwe n'abantu bake cane, gusumba uko vyahora. Umuvugizi w'ikigo c'abakukuruke ca Sainte Catherine Labouré, David Tavella, avuga ati: "Yaragiriwe amahirwe menshi". Yabwiye ikinyamakuru Var Matin ati: "Ntiyambajije ibijanye n'amagara yiwe, ahubwo yambajije ibijanye n'imibereho yiwe. Nk'akarorero, yaripfuje kumenya nimba amasaha yo gufungura no kuryama bigiye guhinduka". Ku myaka 116, Mama Andre nta n'uko yari azi ko yanduye coronavirus "Ntiyigeze yerekana ko atinya iyi ndwara. Ahubwo yari afitiye impungenge abandi basanzwe babana muri ico kigo". Mamar Andre yavutse ku wa 11 z'ukwa kabiri mu 1904. Mu gihe azwi ko ari we muntu wa mbere ashaje ku mugabane wa Buraya, azwi kandi nk'umuntu agira kabiri ashaje kw'isi yose, nk'uko biri ku rutonde rw'ikigo Gerontology Research Group's (GRG) gisanzwe gikora ubushakashatsi bwo kurondera abantu bashaje kw'isi. Abajijwe n'ikinyamakuru co mu Bufaransa BFM nimba yari afise ubwoba bwo kuba yaranduye Covid, Mama Andre yishuye ati: "Oya, nta bwoba nari mfise, kubera ntatinya gupfa". "Ndanezerewe no kuba kumwe na mwe, ariko nipfuza ko mba ndi ahandi hantu - kumwe na mukuru wanje, sokuru wanje na nyokuru wanje".

Igitego cya Reiss Nelson mu gice cya kabiri cyari icya kabiri atsindiye Arsenal muri shampiyona kuva yatsinda birindwi mu ikipe ya Hoffenheim yari yaratijwemo mu mwaka ushize Arsenal yatsinze Leeds 1-0 mu irushanwa ry'igikombe cya FA. Leeds yihariye umukino mu gice cya mbere, Patrick Bamford, atera ishoti yakubise umutambiko w'izamu muri amwe mu mahirwe 15 ya Leeds United mu gice cya mbere. Ariko Arsenal yakinnye bishimishije mu gice cya kabiri ndetse Reiss Nelson aza kubona igitego cyatumye Arsenal ikomeza mu cyiciro gikurikira imaze gutsinda umukino wa kabiri wikurikiranya. Arsenal, izwi nka Gunners, izahura na Bournemouth mu kiciro gikurikiyeho muri uku kwezi kwa Mbere. Umunyezamu wa Arsenal Emiliano Martinez yavuze ko Arteta yari "yarakaye cyane" mu kiruhuko ndetse rutahizamu Alexandre Lacazette yabwiye BBC One ati: "Umutoza yasakuje cyane" Ntiyari yishimye kubera ko twari tuzi ko bari bukine [Leeds] gutya kandi ntitwakurikiza ibyo yavuze." Arsenal yakiniraga ku kibuga cyayo yihariye igice cya kabiri inabonamo amahirwe yashoboraga kuvamo ibitego, arimo n'ishoti rya Lacazette ryakubise umutambiko w'izamu. Nyuma y'umukino Arteta yagize ati: "Noneho ubu ndishimye cyane ariko twabonye amakipe abiri atandukanye--imwe mu minota 30, n'indi nyuma yayo." "Nagerageje kubabwira [abakinnyi] icyari kibategereje ariko ndatekereza ko nyuma y'iminota 32 twari tumaze kuburizamo umupira umwe gusa. mu kiruhuko twahinduye imitekerereze yacu, ubushake no kwishyira hamwe noneho turahinduka." "Rimwe na rimwe bagomba kubyibonera ukuntu bikomeye. Narebye imikino myinshi ya Leeds, bahangaye ikipe yose bakinnye buri minsi itatu. Byari byiza ko abakinnyi banjye bababara mu kibuga." Umutoza wa Leeds, iyoboye urutonde rwa shampiyona y'icyiciro cya kabiri, Marcelo Bielsa, arafata uyu mukino nk'amahirwe adafatiranye, cyane cyane kubera imikinire myiza mu gice cya mbere. Ariko rero biramufasha gushyira imbaraga mu kugarura Leeds mu cyiciro cya mbere ikarangiza imyaka 16 yose imaze yarasubiye mu cyiciro cya kabiri. Arsenal yatwaye FA inshuro 13 yagize ijanisha rya 37,2% by'umupira inatera ishoti imwe gusa mu izamu gice cya mbere ndetse yashoboraga kuba yatsinzwe mbere y'ikiruhuko. Umukinnyi warushije abandi-- Alexandre Lacazette (Arsenal) Alexandre Lacazette (lbumoso) yari ayoboye ikipe ya Arsenal nka kapiteni, yakinnye neza cyane mu gice cya kabiri atuma ikipe ye itsinda. Leeds izakoresha iyi mikinire mu kugaruka mu cyiciro cya mbere Leeds ifite intera y'amanota icyenda irusha ikipe ya gatatu, Brentford kandi iri gushaka kwirinda ibyayibayeho mu mwaka ushize aho yari iyoboye urutonde ariko ikananirwa kujya mu cyiciro cya mbere. Leeds yakinnye nk'ikipe yo mu cyiciro cya mbere ifite n'abafana bayo bari bayiherekeje i London bagera ku 8.000 mu guhangara imwe mu makipe ya mbere atandatu akomeye azwi nka "big six". Bamford yateye amashoti atatu mu minota 10 ya mbere y'umukino mbere yo gutera ku mutambiko w'izamu. Hakurikiye iki? Arsenal izasura Crystal Palace muri shampiyona y'icyiciro cya mbere (Premier League) ku wa gatandatu (12:30 ku isaha mpuzamasaha, GMT), mu gihe Leeds yo izakira Sheffield Wednesday mu cyiciro cya kabiri saa 15:00.

Imyiyerekano yo kwiyamiriza ivangura rikorerwa abatari abazungu imaze igihe muri Amerika Emily Gil umwigeme w'imyaka 18 avuga ko yateguye iyi myiyerekano mu ntumbero yo gushigikira imyiyerekano yo kwiyamiriza ivangura rishingiye ku rukoba be no kugaragaza ikibazo c'amazu azimvye. Ariko yagiye gutangara mu nyuma abonye umukuru w'akarere muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika amurungikiye fagitire. Umukuru w'akarere ka Englewood Cliffs yabwiye radio televiziyo CBS ikorana na BBC ko yariko arafuta ibirego uyo mwigeme yagirizwa. Emily Gil avuga ko iyi myiyerekano yateguye muri ako karere ku wa 25 z'ukw'indwi yamaze hafi iminota 90 gusa, kandi ko yari yitabwe n'abantu bake cane, bari hagati ya 30 na 40. Avuga ko atari azi ko yari gufava atangishwa ihadabu gushika aho aboneye arungikiwe urwandiko rumutegeka kuriha. Yabwiye CBS ati: "Jewe naratangaye mbonye urwandiko runtegeka kuriha amande mu gihe nakoze ivyo mpabwa n'amategeko". Umukuru w'akarere ka Englewood Cliffs Mario Kranjac avuga ko ako karere gafise uburenganzira bwo gutoza amahera ku bikorwa vyihariye vyakoreshejwe igipolisi. Ati: "Twama twarihishije .... Ibikorwa vy'ugusiganwa ku makinga, canke vyo kwiruka, eka ibikorwa ivyo ari vyo vyose bituma igipolisi cacu gikoreshwa". Mu nyuma yahavuye avuga ko ariko arafuta iyo hadabu yaciriwe uyo mukobwa, akavuga ko yashaka "kwemeza ko uburenganzira buri muntu ahabwa n'ibwirizwashingiro bwubahirijwe". Avuga ko ata kibazo afitaniye n'iyo myiyerekano kandi ko yariko arakora uko ashoboye kwose kugira ngo atorere umuti ikibazo c'amazu azimvye.
