Bwana Munene (hagati, wambaye umupira w'umutuku) ari kumwe na bamwe mu bakodesha inzu ze Leta z'ibihugu nyinshi ziri kugerageza uburyo bwo gufasha abaturage bazo muri ibi bihe bikomeye, gusa hari abantu ku giti cyabo nabo bashyiraho akabo mu gufasha abandi. Bwana Munene, afite abapangayi 15 bakodesha inzu ze, ubu yabasoneye ubukode bw'amezi ane ndetse abadafite ibiribwa muri bo babikeneye cyane arabibaha. Yabwiye BBC ati: "Maranye igihe kinini n'abapangayi banjye, benshi muri bo bakora ubucuruzi buciriritse, imirimo yo gupagasa, n'abarimu mu mashuri abanza, ni abantu binjiza amafaranga macye. "Igihe rero iki cyorezo cyateraga nabonye ko bari kugorwa cyane, nanjye ntekereza icyo nabafasha kuko tumaranye igihe kinini, bamwe ndetse imyaka 10". Muri Kenya hari ba nyir'inzu bamwe bagiye bazikuraho imiryango cyangwa ibisenge kuko abazikodesha bananiwe kubishyura muri ibi bihe bikomeye, kandi batanabashije kwimukira ahandi. Michael Munene avuga ko kera na we agikodesha yajyaga ahura n'ingorane nk'izi zo kubura ubwishyu ba nyir'inzu ntibamworohere, ubu yiyemeje kutagira nka bo. Ati: "...Hari n'igihe bamfungiranaga mu nzu kuko nananiwe kwishyura, rero ndumva neza ibibazo barimo byo kutabasha kunyishyura". "Narabahamagaye dukorana inama, ndababwira nti, 'kuva ubu ndashaka ko mushyira imbaraga mu kubona ifunguro ry'imiryango yanyu n'iby'ibanze mukenera, ayo mwanyishyuraga muyaguremo ibyo mukeneye'". Bwana Munene yasoneye abakodesha inzu ze ubukode bw'ukwezi kwa gatanu, ukwa gatandatu, ukwa karindwi n'ukwa munani y'uyu mwaka. Kugeza ubu muri Kenya abantu 14,168 bamaze kwandura coronavirus, muri bo 250 yarabishe, nkuko imibare ya Kaminuza ya Johns Hopkins ibigaragaza.

Bwana Biden yavuze ko bari babizi ko bishobora gufata igihe kumenya ibyavuye mu matora, ati: "Ndi hano kubabwira ko twizeye ko turi mu nzira igana ku gutsinda aya matora". Yongeyeho ko "birangira ari uko buri jwi rimaze kubarwa". 'Ibintu bishobora guturika' - Minisitiri w'ingabo mu Budage Minisitiri w'ingabo w'Ubudage yatangaje ko Perezida Donald Trump yashyize igihugu cye mu "rugamba rw'ibyemewe n'amategeko" nyuma yo kuvuga ko yatsinze. Madamu Annegret Kramp-Karrenbauer uyu munsi yabwiye ikinyamakuru cyo mu Budage ZDF ati: "Ibi ni igihe ibintu bishobora guturika". Yavuze ko inzobere zaburiye ko hashobora kuba "impagarara ku itegekonshinga" muri Amerika mu gihe Trump yakwanga kwemera ibyavuye mu matora abaye yatsinzwe. Imibanire y'Ubudage na Amerika yagiye izamo imikuku mu gihe cya Trump. Ariko Ubudage, inshuti y'igihe kirekire ya Amerika, bwagiye buvuga ko bwizeye ko iyo mibanire izagenda neza nyuma y'aya matora, k'uwuzatsinda wese. Ibitangazamakuru ahandi biravuga iki kuri aya matora Iyi ni imwe mu mitwe y'inkuru y'ibinyamakuru, n'ibyo abanyamakuru bavuze mu bihugu binyuranye ku munsi w'amatora muri Amerika. "Ubusazi mu matora ya Amerika", niko umunyamakuru wa Televiziyo mu Burusiya yateruye inkuru ye. "Ibintu birakomeye cyane. Biden na Trump barashyiditse, buri wese ari gutegura ijambo ry'intsinzi", Inter TV yo muri Ukraine. "Intsinzi ya Trump muri Florida yahambye ikizere cy'intsinzi y'Abademokarate", umutwe w'inkuru w'ikinyamakuru Folha de Sao Paulo muri Brazil. Kuri Press TV yo muri Iran ho bavuze ko hashobora kuba "intambara muri Amerika", aho umunyamakuru yavuze ko, ku ndorerezi mvamahanga, ayo matora "ateye ubwoba cyane". "Abanyamerika bafite ubwoba batoye bambaye udupfukamunwa, amaduka bayazitiye", umutwe w'inkuru wa Express Tribune cyo muri Pakistan. "Iyi ni nyina w'intambara zose, n'Abanyamerika barabizi", umutwe w'inkuru y'umwanditsi w'igitekerezo bwite muri Le Monde cyo mu Bufaransa. Trump bamupfubirije ibirori Umunyamakuru wa BBC Tara McKelvey i Washington avuga ko ibirori byari byatangiye muri White House aho Trump yari yatumiye abantu be n'inzoga zo kwishimira intsinzi zateguwe. Mu cyumba kimwe, Perezida Trump yari kumwe na bamwe, barimo bareba ibiva mu matora bibaza ikigiye kuba, ariko biteguye kwishima. Mu cyindi cyumba cy'iyo nyubako abandi batumirwa benshi nabo biteguye ariko bo batangiye ibirori. Ubwo Trump yababwiraga ko yatsinze Biden bishimye, nubwo bwose bari batishimye bisesuye, kuko bazi ko ibyavuye mu matora bya burundu bitaramenyekana. Trump yavuze ko yatsinze, ariko ko yanibwe Mu ijambo yavugiye muri White House, Perezida Donald Trump yavuze ko we azi ko "mu by'ukuri yamaze gutsinda aya matora" ndetse ko "biteguye kwishima mu buryo bukomeye". Ku rundi ruhande ariko Trump yavuze ko habaye "kwiba amajwi guteye isoni muri iki gihugu". Avuga ko ibi azabiregera mu Rukiko rw'Ikirenga. BwanaTrump ariko nta gihamya yagaragaje yerekana ibi avuga ko yibwe amajwi kandi yatsinze amatora. Trump kandi yanditse kuri Twitter ko ahagaze neza, ati: "ariko bari kugerageza kwiba amatora, ntituzabibemerera". Ubutumwa bwa Perezida Trump ariko bwahise bushyirwaho ikimenyetso kiburira n'urubuga rwa Twitter ko "bushobora kuba buyobobya ku matora". Leta ebyiri zemeje gukoresha urumogi Leta zimaze kuba 13 zemeye gukoresha urumogi muri US Abaturage muri leta za New Jersey na Arizona batoye bashyigikira ikoreshwa ry'urumogi mu buryo bwo kwishimisha ku barengeje imyaka 21, nk'uko ibinyamakuru byaho bibivuga. Arizona na New Jersey zabaye leta za 12 na 13 muri 50 zigize Amerika zemeje ikoreshwa ry'urumogi muri ubu buryo. Muri New Jersey iri tegeko baritoye ku kigero cya 67%. Muri aya matora akomatanyije - aya perezida, amatora ku mategeko atandukanye muri za leta, ay'abadepite n'abasenateri - leta za Montana na South Dakota nazo ziratora ku ikoreshwa ry'urumogi. Gusa, ikoreshwa ry'urumogi mu kwishimisha rirakomeza kuba ritemewe n'amategeko, ku rwego rwa leta zose zunze ubumwe za Amerika. Si Biden na Trump gusa Aba ni bo bari buvemo umwe uri butorerwe gutegeka Amerika kuko ari bo bari imbere cyane mu matora, ariko hari n'abandi nubwo bari inyuma cyane mu majwi. Madamu Jo Jorgensen, umwalimu muri Kaminuza ya Clemson University ahagarariye ishyaka 'Libertarian Party', naho Bwana Howie Hawkins ahagarariye ishyaka 'Green Party'. Madamu Jo uri mu bakandida Aba bombi ariko kugeza ubu bari inyuma cyane, kugeza ubu nta n'uragira ijwi rimwe (electoral vote) muri 270 aba akenewe ngo umuntu atsindire kuba perezida wa Amerika. Gusa nko mu majwi asanzwe ya rubanda, Madamu Jo kugeza ubu amaze gutorwa n'abarenga miliyoni 1.3. Perezida mushya wa Amerika uza gutorwa biteganyijwe ko azarahira tariki 20 z'ukwezi kwa mbere 2021. Biden aramutse atsinze yaba ari we wa mbere mu myaka 28 ishize utsinze perezida uri ku butegetsi, kuva mu 1992 ubwo Bill Clinton yatsindaga George H. W. Bush. Philadelphia yafashe akaruhuko ko kubara amajwi y'iposita Mu gihe henshi ku isi, no muri Amerika by'umwihariko, bategereje ibiva muri aya matora y'umukuru w'igihugu gikomeye kurusha ibindi ku isi, birumvikana nk'ibitangaje ko hari abari kubara amajwi bafashe akaruhuko. Abashinzwe amatora muri Philadelphia bavuze ko bafashe akaruhuko mu kubara amajwi yoherejwe ku iposita muri iri joro (muri Amerika), bakaza gutangaza amakuru mashya saa tatu za mu gitondo zaho (biraba ari saa kumi uyu munsi ku isaha yo mu Rwanda). Bari bamaze kubara amajwi 76,000 mu majwi agera ku 350,000 yoherejwe muri ubwo buryo. Ibi bifite icyo bivuze kuko abatora Biden benshi bakoresheje iposita kurusha abatoye Trump. Philadelphia iri muri leta ya Pennsylvania, imwe muri za leta z'ingenzi cyane kugira ngo umukandida atsinde. Umudepite wa mbere wavutse mu myaka ya 1990 Madison Cawthorn w'imyaka 25, azwi cyane nk'umuntu w'intyoza mu kuvuga, biteganyijwe ko atorerwa guhagararira leta ya North Carolina mu nteko, nk'uko bivugwa n'ibiro ntaramakuru Associated Press. Madison wo mu ba Repubulikani azajya gufata umwanya wa Mark Meadows wagiye kuba umwe muri ba somambike ba Trump. 'Africa' - 'umwobo w'umwanda' ubu ni 'icyubahiro gikomeye' Perezida Trump ntavugwaho rumwe muri Africa, hari Abanyafurika berekana ko bamushyigikiye nubwo badatora, hari n'abifuza ko yatsindwa aya matora. Mu 2018 Trump yatunguye benshi ubwo yumvikanye yita ibihugu bya Africa 'umwobo w'umwanda'. Mu ijoro ryacyeye, Trump yashyize kuri Twitter amashusho y'abantu bari mu myigaragambyo yo kumushyigikira muri Nigeria, yandikaho ko ari "icyubahiro gikomeye" kuri we. Bamwe bahise bamubaza bati: "Wa 'mwobo w'umwanda' aka kanya uwuhinduye 'icyubahiro cyawe'?" Itiyo y'amazi yacyerereje kubara amajwi Ibyavuye mu matora muri leta ya Georgia - harimo n'ibyo mu murwa mukuru wayo Atlanta - biratinda kuboneka nyuma y'uko umuyoboro w'amazi uri mu cyumba cyabitswemo amajwi ucitse nkuko bivugwa n'ikinyamakuru cy'i Atlanta, Journal-Constitution. Abategetsi bavuze ko amajwi yari ari muri icyo cyumba atangiritse ariko ko ibi byatumye ibikorwa byo kubara amajwi bikerererwaho amasaha ane. 'Electoral college' ni iki? Perezida wa Amerika ntabwo atsinda kuko rubanda bamuhundagajeho amajwi ari benshi. Ahubwo, abakandida bahatanira kubona amajwi menshi y'ikitwa 'electoral college'. Ayo ni amajwi abarirwa buri leta mu zigize USA hashingiwe ku mubare w'abayihagarariye mu nteko, nawo ushingira ahanini ku mubare w'abayituye. Leta zimwe zigira amajwi menshi ya 'electoral college' (nka California igira 55), izindi zikagira macye (nka Alaska igira atatu). Kugira ngo umukandida atsinde bimusaba nibura kugira amajwi 270 ya 'electoral college' kuko yose hamwe ari 538. Mu 2016, Trump yagize bene aya majwi 304 naho mukeba we Hillary Clinton abona 227 - nyamara Madamu Hillary yari yarushije Trump amajwi ya rubanda hafi miliyoni eshatu. Uko bihagaze ubu... birakomeza guhinduka...

Perezida wa Ferwafa, Vincent Nzamwita (iburyo) ashimangira ko u Rwanda rufite ubushobozi bwo kwakira igikombe cy'isi cyo mu mwaka wa 2019 cy'abatarengeje imyaka 17 Perezida wa Ferwafa, Vincent Nzamwita, ashimangira ko u Rwanda rufite ubushobozi bwo kwakira irushanwa nk'iryo. Yabwiye BBC ati: "Twamaze kwandikira Fifa tuyisaba kwakira iryo rushanwa kandi baratwanditse banatwoherereza inyandiko z'ubusabe". Yongeyeho ati: "Twihaye itariki ya 25 y'uku kwezi kwa munani ngo tube twamaze koherereza Fifa ibisabwa hanyuma dutangire kwitegura gukora ubusabe". Nzamwita yavuze ko kwakira irushanwa nk'igikombe cy'isi bitatuma gusa u Rwanda rumenyekana, ahubwo byanatuma n'akarere ruherereyemo ndetse n'umugabane w'Afurika nabyo bimenyekana. Mu mwaka ushize, u Rwanda rwakiriye imikino y'irushanwa rya CHAN, rihuza amakipe agizwe n'abakinnyi bakina muri shampiyona zo ku mugabane w'Afurika. Icyo gihe abantu barenga ibihumbi 200 baturutse hirya no hino muri Afurika, berekeje mu Rwanda gushyigikira amakipe yabo. Igikombe cy'isi cy'abatarengeje imyaka 17 cy'uyu mwaka kizatangira mu Buhinde ku itariki ya 6 y'ukwezi kwa cumi. Kizitabirwa n'ibihugu 24. Afurika izaba ihagarariwe n'ibihugu bya Ghana, Guinea, Mali na Niger.

Mu mwaka ushize Mohamed Salah yatsinze ibitego 32 muri shampiyona y'umupira w'amaguru mu Bwongereza izwi nka Premier League Salah, Umunyamisiri y'imyaka 26 y'amavuko, yageze mu ikipe ya Liverpool ku mpeshyi ishize avuye mu ikipe ya AS Roma yo mu Butaliyani. Icyo gihe yaguzwe miliyoni 34 z'amapawundi. Amaze gutsindira Liverpool ibitego 44 mu mikino 52 amaze kuyikinira. Salah ku ntebe y'abasubirizi mu rukino na Urugway Mohamed Salah, umukinyi wa mbere mwiza muri Afrika Mohamed Salah, umukinyi wa BBC w'umupira w'amaguru wa Afurika 2017. Muri kontaro ye nshya, izarangira mu mwaka wa 2023, nta ngingo irimo ivuga ku byo yasabwa mu gihe yaba ashatse kuyivamo. Umutoza Jurgen Klopp wa Liverpool yagize ati: "Ibi biragaragaza neza cyane ibintu bibiri - ukuntu yemera Liverpool n'ukuntu Liverpool imwemera". Salah ni we watsinze ibitego byinshi mu mwaka wa shampiyona ushize mu Bwongereza. Yatsinze ibitego 32 - byinshi bimaze gutsindwa n'umukinnyi umwe mu mikino 38, atsindira atyo urukweto rwa zahabu. Uko yitwaye kwanatumye anatsindira ibindi bihembo bibiri mu mwaka ushize. Igitangwa n'ishyirahamwe ry'abakinnyi bakina umupira w'amaguru by'umwuga ndetse n'igitangwa n'ishyirahamwe ry'abanyamakuru bandika ku nkuru z'umupira w'amaguru.

Bamwe mu bahinga bavuga ko Galaxy Note 7 ari telefone ya mbere nziza Android ikoze Iyo ngingo ifashwe inyuma y'imisi mike inyuma y'aho kompanyi ya Samsung yo muri Korea y'epfo, imenyeshereje ko ihagaritse gukora no kugurisha izo telefone kubera ibikunze gushika ko zisha. Ikigo ca reta kijejwe ibikoresho vyinjira mu Rwanda kivuga ko iyo ngingo yo kubuza kwinjiza izo telefone, yafashwe ku mpamvu z'umutekano. "Kubera umutekano, abaguze izo telefone ku gatwe kabo mu bindi bihugu basabwa kuzizimya, bazisubize aho baziguriye," izo ni zo nkuru zitangwa n'icegera c'umukuru w'ico kigo Maj Patrick Nyirishema. Samsung yahanuye abaguze izo telefone kuzizimya no kudasubira kuzikoresha.

Shakira na Jennifer Lopez nibo baririmvyi bari bitezwe mu mwanya w'akaruhuko ka Super Bowl. Mu rukino rwari rurindiriwe cane rwa Super Bowl muri Amerika ejo ku wa Mungu, abaririmvyi rurangiranwa babiri Shakira hamwe na Jennifer Lopez bari barindiriwe n'abantu isinzi bitezwe muri ico gihe. Bwari bwo bwa mbere muri kahise k'urukino Super Bowl rurorerwa n'abantu benshi gusumba izinki nkino muri Amerika abaririmvyi babiri bompi bakomoka muri Amerika y'Epfo baririmba mu gihe c'akaruhuko. Iryo higanwa ryabereye ku kibuga ca Hard Rock mu gisagara ca Miami c'intara ya Floride rikaba ryariko rihuza imirwi ya Kansas City Chiefs na San Francisco 49ers. Ishirahamwe ry'umupira w'amaguru wa Amerika (NFL) rimenyesha ko urwo rukino rufise abafana bashika mu miliyoni 30.2 bakomoka muri Amerika y'Epfo canke bavuga ururimi rw'iki Espanyole, bakaba barengako imiliyoni zibiri ku bari bazwi mu 2017. Imbere y'uko batangura ico giteramo, Jennifer Lopez yabwiye Shakira ati: "Reka twereke isi ico aba bakowa babiri bakomoka muri Americas y'epfo bashoboye". Kuva bimenyekanye ko ivyo bihangange bizoririmba mu rukino rwa nyuma rw'iryo higanwa rigira 54 ry'umupira w'amaguru wa Amerika, rwabonetse ko ari rwo rukino rwa nyuma rukomeye ku ba nya Amerika y'Epfo. Wari umunezero urenze urugero inyuma y'aho ivyo bihangange mu muziki berekaniye ubuhinga bwabo kuri ico kibuga i Miami, aho baririmvye nyinshi mu ndirimbo zakunzwe cane. Mu kiganiro n'abamenyeshamakuru mu ndwi iheze, Shakira yari yavuze ko ico giteramo cari nk'umunsi mukuru uzoba ugizwe n'ukwerekana imico n'imigenzo bitandukanye". Cabaye igiteramo herekaniwemwo imidiho itandukanye kuva kuri za Salsa, tukaja kuri za reggae, za hip-hop gushika mbere no ku midiho ifise inkomoko ya Afrika. Shakira niwe yatanguye kuririmba ku kibuga ca Hard Rock i Miami Harageze igihe mbere baririmbira hamwe zimwe mu ndirimbo zabo zabiciye bigacika, harimwo na ya ndirimbo Waka Waka ya Shakira yafatwa nk'indirimbo ndanga mahiganwa y'igikombe c'isi yose yo mu 2010. Muri ico giteramo baboneyeko no kwibuka umukinyi w'umupira w'amaboko Kobe Bryant yapfuye mu ndwi iheze mw'isanganya rya kajugujugu ari kumwe n'umukobwa wiwe n'abandi bantu batanu. Mu nyuma Jennifer López arakurikira Imbere y'uko kiba, Lopez yamenyesheje ko yari yamye yipfuza kwibuka uyo munonotsi kuva umukunzi wiwe Alex Rodriguez amumenyesaheje ivyari bihejeje gushika. "Nari mu myimenyerezo nsubiramwo indirimbo igihe Alez aje kundaba akorora amosozi, ambwira ati: 'Ntushobora kwibaza ibintu bihejeje gushika'. Ntiyavyumva". Ati: "Ndibaza ko ivyashitse bikorako benshi kuko bitwibutsa ingene ubuzima ari amazi aseseka ntibayore". Ivyo bihangange bavuze ko ico giteramo cerekana "ubumwe n'urukundo hagati y'abantu b'imico itandukanye" Hasigaye amasaha makeya ngo ihiganwa ritangure, abo baririmvyo Shakira na J. Lo babanje guhanahana ubushimwe batsindiye. Hari haciye imyaka itari mike iyo mikono yakira abaririmvyi rurangiranwa nka ba Michael Jackson , Justin Timberlake canke Lady Gaga imbere y'uko uno mwaka iryo higanwa riterwa iteka n'abo baririmvyi bakomoka muri Colombia na Porto Rico. Umuririmvyi akomoka muri Amerika y'Epfo yaheruka guterwa iryo teka ni Gloria Estefan, yatanguye mu 1992 asubira mu 1999.

Angelina Jolie n'umukinyi w'isinema avugwa ko ahembwa amahera menshi cane muri Amerika Iryo jambo arishikiriza ikoraniro ryatunganijwe n'igisirikare c'Ubwongereza mu kurondera ingene hohagarikwa amabi ashingiye ku gitsina igihe c'ingwano. Angelina Jolie yahukanye n'abakinyi b'isinema Jonny Lee Miller na Billy Bob Thornton, muri kino gihe akaba aheruka kuvana n'umugabo wiwe wa gatatu, umukinyi w'isinema Brad Pitt, mu kwezi kw'icenda 2016.

Mu rukiko i Nyanza, Phocas Ndayizera (ubanza imbere iburyo) areganwa n'abandi 12 gutegura iterabwoba Ndayizera yabwiye urukiko ko yemeye gushyira umukono ku nyandikomvugo zimushinja uruhare mu byaha by'iterabwoba kubera 'iyicarubozo' yakorewe. Ashinjwa kuba ku isonga y'itsinda ry'abantu 12 nabo baregwa ibyaha nk'ibye. Yavuze ko yababoneye bwa mbere mu rukiko. Ubushinjacyaha burega Ndayizera na bagenzi be 'umugambi wo gusenya inyubako za Leta' mu rwego rwo kwerekana ko igihugu kitarimo umutekano. Ubushinjacyaha bwahawe ijambo mbere bwareze Phocas Ndayizera wigeze kuba umunyamakuru wigenga (stringer), n'abo bareganwa 12 kuba mu mugambi w'iterabwoba rigamije guhungabanya umutekano w'igihugu. Buvuga ko Phocas yari akuriye itsinda ryo mu Rwanda ryarahabwaga amabwiriza n'uwitwa Cassien Ntamuhanga uburanishwa nk'udahari kubera ko atari mu Rwanda. Nyanza ku rukiko bamwe mu miryango y'abaregwa bari baje kumva iburanisha ryahise risubikwa rigitangira mu rubanza rwa mbere Ubushinjacyaha bwavuze ko Bwana Ndayizera yafatanywe ibiturika byitwa 'Dynamites' byagombaga kwifashishwa mu gusenya inyubako za Leta nk'ibiraro, inkingi z'amashanyarazi ndetse n'ibigega by'ububiko bw'ibikomoka kuri peteroli. Ubushinjacyaha kandi bwongeyeho ko ngo ibi biturika byari byoherejwe na Ntamuhanga. Ndayizera kandi aregwa gushakisha itsinda ry'abagombaga kumufasha barimo uwitwa Eliakim Karangwa, impuguke mu by'ikoranabuhanga wagombaga guteranya ibi biturika ngo bigere ku mugambi wabyo. Urukiko rwabajije ubushinjacyaha uko bwemeza ko ibyafashwe byagombaga guturitsa inyubako za Leta kandi hatarakozwe igenzura ry'impuguke muri uru rwego. Byavuzwe ko ibyafashwe byashyikirijwe Ministeri y'ingabo ngo ibigenzure, hakaba hashize umwaka urenga icyegeranyo kitaratangazwa. 'Kwemera kubera iyicarubozo' Mu kwiregura, Ndayizera yahakanye inyandiko zose zakozwe mu gihe cy'ubugenzacyaha. Anavuga ko yemeye kuzishyiraho umukono kubera ibikorwa by'iyicarubozo yagirirwaga. Yavuze ko azi Ntamuhanga bakiri bato ndetse n'igihe yakoraga umwuga w'itangazamakuru. Cyakora ahakana imikoranire iyo ari yo yose igamije gukora icyaha. Uretse Karangwa Eliakim, yavuze ko bari batangiranye imishinga y'ishoramari rishingiye ku ikoranabuhanga, Ndayizera yavuze ko abandi bagize itsinda ry'abaregwa yababoneye bwa mbere mu rukiko. Bwarinze bugoroba nta wundi ubonye umwanya wo kwiregura, urubanza rukaba rugomba gukomeza ku itariki ya 5 z'ukwezi gutaha kwa kabiri.

Uburyo bushasha bwo kuriha taxi moto mu Rwanda bukoresha telefone ngendanwa ukarihisha ubuhinga bwa mobile money Ikigo YegoMoto cazanye ubwo buhinga mu Rwanda kivuga ko buzorohereza abatwara izo moto hamwe n'ingenzi zizikorako. Igiciro uko gihagaze, ku birometero vya mbere bibiri umukiriya ariha amafaranga 300 y'u Rwanda, nayo ibirimetero bikurikira bikarihwa 110 ku kirometero. Umuyobozi wa YegoMoto, Karanvir Singh, avuga ko ubwo buryo buzokworosha vyinshi cane cane ku bijanye no kuriha. Bwana Singh agira ati: "Ntukenera guciririkana n'uwutwara moto, uriha ayo icuma kikubwiye gifatiye ku birometero wagenze. "Ntibizoba ngombwa kwitwaza amakashi kuko umuntu azoja ariha akoresheje uburwo bwa telefone ngendanwa buzwi nka mobile money. "Umwanya wahora utakazwa, ungana n'iminota nka cumi, umukiriya arindiriye ko bamusubiza ubu ntuzosubira gutakazwa." Bwana Singh avuga kandi ko umutekano w'abakiriya uzokwiyongera kuko ibiranga buri munyonzi wa taxi moto bizoba bizwi, anyarutse cane canke ntafate neza umukiriya bizomenyekana. Karanvir Singh, umuyobozi wa YegoMoto, avuga ko ubu buryo bushasha buzokwongera umutekano w'ingenzi Ariko hari utunenge Abatwara taxi moto bakoresha uburyo bwa YegoMoto bavuga ko abakiriya batarabumenyera kandi basa n'ababwidogera. Umwe mu bavuganye na BBC yavuze ko ashobra kumara indwi yose akora ariko umuntu umwe gusa akaba ari we yemera gukoresha ubwo buryo. Abikora kuri taxi moto mu kwiyunguruza nabo bavuga ko ata karusho kanini babone, mbere bamwe bakavuga ko buzimvye. Umwe mubo BBC yaganiriye nabo yagize ati: "Ku rugendo rwa hafi ubu buryo ni bwiza. Ariko ugiye kure usanga igiciro gikuba kabiri ayo wahora uriha. "Nk'ubu mvuye ngaha (ntiyavuze aho ariho) ngiye mu muji, nashobora kwumvikana n'umumotari nkamuha 800 canke 1000. Ariko ukoresheje YegoMoto uca uriha 1400 canke 1500". Mu mezi icenda ari imbere abanyonzi bose ba taxi moto bagomba kuba binjiye mu buryo bushasha bwa YegoMoto Moto zose zigomba kubukoresha Ikigo YegoMoto kivuga ko kimaze kwakira abanyonzi ba taxi moto 700, nyuma y'ibikorwa vyo kugerageza ubu buryo bushasha. Ariko ikigo kigenzura ibikorwa vy'inyungu rusangi ku gihuru, RURA, kivuga ko mu kiringo kitarenze amezi icenda buri muyonzi wa taxi moto agomba kuba yarinjiye muri ubu buryo bushasha. YegoMoto niyo yahawe iri soko ku kiringo c'imyaka itanu.

Igihugu ca Centrafrique kimaze igihe kigerageza kuva mu ngwano Uwo murwi uharanira agateka ka kiremwa muntu uhangayikishijwe nuko ubwo bwicanyi bwakozwe hasanzwe hari abasirikare ba Minusca, umurwi wa Onu ufasha kugarukana amahoro muri Repuburika ya Centrafrique. Ku bwa HRW, ubwo bwicanyi bwabaye itariki 12 Ukwezi kwa 12 i Bakala, igisagara kiri mu bumanuko bw'igihugu. Abagwanyi b'umurwi "Union pour la Paix en Centrafrique" (UPC) bishe abantu 25 bababwiye ngo baze kw'ishule mu nama, HRW niko yavuze. Kare kuri uwo munsi nyene, bishe abantu indwi bari bavuye kwimba inzahabu, niko yabandanije ivuga. Igihugu ca Repuburika Centrafriquaine kimaze igihe kigerageza kuva mu bwicanyi bwatanguranye n'ingwano ivuye ku hirika ry'ubutegetsi mu 2013

Koffi Olomide azwi cyane no mu kwambara imyenda ihenze cyane no gukunda ubuzima bw'iraha Ibi bitandukanye n'amakuru yo mu cyumweru gishize yavugaga ko umuririmbyi Olomide yahita atabwa muri yombi akigera muri Zambia. Ibi bije kandi bikurikira inkuru yari yasohotse mu kinyamakuru Times of Zambia cya Leta ya Zambia, irega ko Bwana Olomide yakubise umunyamakuru ufotora ubwo aheruka muri Zambia. Anaregwa guhohotera bamwe mu babyinnyi be ashaka kubakoresha imibonano mpuzabitsina ku gahato no kubakoresha mu gihugu cy'Ubufaransa kandi nta byangombwa bibemerera kuhakorera bafite. Iyo nkuru yatumye Bwana Olomide w'imyaka 62 y'amavuko ashaka abunganizi mu mategeko bo kumuvugira mu butegetsi bwa Zambia kugira ngo yisobanure. None ubu umuvugizi wa polisi ya Zambia, Esther Katongo, aravuga ko Bwana Olomide yemerewe kwinjira muri Zambia nta kibazo. Yavuze ko nta mpapuro za polisi mpuzamahanga Interpol zihari zisaba kumuta muri yombi, kandi ko nta na dosiye yindi y'ibyaha afite muri Zambia. Madamu Katongo yongeyeho ati: "Ikirego cyo gukubita cyatanzwe kuri polisi n'umunyamakuru cyarahagaritswe kubera kubura ibimenyetso." Bwana Olomide uzwiho kwambara imyenda ihenze cyane no kubaho mu buzima bw'iraha, si ubwa mbere atavugwaho rumwe. Mu mwaka wa 2016, videwo yamugaragaje atera imigeri umugore wo mu babyinnyi be, ubwo yageraga muri Kenya. Ako kanya yahise yirukanwa muri Kenya. Mu mwaka wa 2012, nabwo yahamijwe n'urukiko muri Kongo icyaha cyo gukubita umwe mu bamufasha gutunganya umuziki we. Icyo gihe urukiko rwamuhanishije igihano gisubitse cyo gufungwa amezi atatu. Urukiko rwabwiwe ko ubushyamirane bwe n'uyu Diego Lubaki wamufashaga mu gutunganya umuziki, bwatewe no kwishyuza umwenda Bwana Olomide yari amubereyemo ungana n'ibihumbi 3 na 700 by'amadolari y'Amerika. Mu mwaka wa 2008, Bwana Olomide yashinjwe gukubita imigeri umunyamakuru ufata videwo wa televiziyo yigenga RTGA yo muri Kongo, hanyuma akanamena kamera ye mu gitaramo cyaberaga mu murwa mukuru Kinshasa. Bivugwa ko bapfaga uburenganzira bwo gufata amashusho. Icyo gihe, byasabye ko umukuru w'inteko inshingamategeko ya Kongo yinjira muri ayo makimbirane, yunga Bwana Olomide na nyiri televiziyo yari yakubitiwe umunyamakuru.

Abakinnyi ba Rayon Sport bishimira intsinzi ku kivuga cya Kirehe FC Rayon yagitwaye mukeba wayo APR FC iyirushije amanota arindwi kuri uyu mukino itsinze nubwo APR yo isigaje imikino ibiri ya shampiyona. Ku kibuga cya Kirehe FC iburasirazuba, ibitego bine bya Rayon byatsinzwe n'abakinnyi Michel Sarpong ukomoka muri Ghana na Jules Ulimwengu w'i Burundi bombi batsinze bibiri bibiri. Rayon - igira abafana benshi mu Rwanda - iki ni igikombe cya cyenda cya shampiyona yegukanye kuva yashingwa mu myaka y'i 1968. Kuva mu 1994 ikipe y'ingabo ya APR FC niyo yegukanye ibikombe byinshi, 17, ari nayo yaherukaga icy'umwaka ushize. Naho kuva icyo gihe Rayon yatwaye birindwi.

Ministiri Longondo yatangaje ko uyu muntu w'umugabo, yageze mu gihugu agaragara nk'udafite ikibazo cy'ubuzima Radio Okapi y'umuryango w'abibumbye muri Congo isubiramo amagambo ya minisitiri w'ubuzima Eteni Longondo avuga ko uwo ari Umubiligi ubu wahise ashyirwa mu kato. Ati: "Ndashaka kubwira abaturage ba Congo ko muri iki gitondo (ku wa kabiri) twabonye umurwayi wa mbere ufite coronavirus. Ni Umubiligi umaze iminsi aje ino twarimo dukurikirana. Ibizamini bya laboratoire byemeje ko afite iyi ndwara". Ministiri Longondo yatangaje ko uyu muntu w'umugabo, yageze mu gihugu agaragara nk'udafite ikibazo cy'ubuzima ariko bakamusuzuma. Yatangaje ko hafashwe ingamba kugira ngo abantu bose babonanye na we babashake basuzumwe kandi bashyirwe mu kato mu kurinda ko iyi ndwara ikwirakwira. Umunyamakuru wa BBC i Kinshasa muri Congo avuga ko uyu murwayi yageze ku kibuga cy'indege cya Kinshasa mu minsi ibiri ishize, agashyirwa mu kato kugira ngo asuzumwe. Avuga ko uyu murwayi ubu ari kuvurirwa mu kigo cyahoze gikurikirana abarwayi ba Ebola cyahinduwe icyo gukurikirana abakekwaho coronavirus kiri mu burasirazuba bw'umujyi wa Kinshasa. DR Congo ifite ibibuga by'indege bine bikoreshwa cyane, kuri byo hongerewe uburyo bwo gusuzuma umuriro abinjira, uburyo bwanakoreshwaga mu gihe gishize havugwa Ebola. DR Congo ibaye igihugu cya 11 kibonetsemo coronavirus, yabonetse henshi mu bantu bavuye mu bihugu by'Uburayi na Aziya. Bwana Longondo yasabye Abanyekongo kudakangarana, ahubwo "bafata ingamba z'isuku, kutegera umuntu ukorora, gukaraba intoki kenshi no kwivuza igihe bumvise ibimenyetso". Abantu barenga 100 ubu bamaze kwandura coronavirus muri Africa:

Uyu munsi Dogiteri Leonard Nduwayo arasubiza ibyabajijwe na Daniel Uwimana. Yabajije niba coronavirus ishobora kwandurira mu muyaga duhumeka, nukuvuga umuntu uyirwaye ata kintu yakozeho? Iki kiganiro muzajya mucyumva muri wambere n'uwagatatu.

Prezida Magufuli yategetse ko hubakwa uruhome rukingira amabuye y'agaciro ya Tanzanite Urwo ruzitiro ruzokingira uduce A,B,C na D tw'ibirometero 81, 99 mu karere ka Mererani bacukuriramwo ayo mabuye. Dogiteri Magufuli yategetse ivyo ku munsi wa gatatu, ari mu birori vyo gutanguza ibarabara rya kaburimbo ry'ibirometero 26, riva ku kibuga c'indege "Kilimanjaro International Airport"(KIA) gushika Mirerani. Yavuze ko iyo ngingo ifise intego yo kugenzura no kurereka abiba amabuye y'agaciro ya Tanzanite. "Nipfuza kurwo ruhome rwubakwa ubu nyene kugira ngo dukingire ayo mabuye ariyo yonyene adutungishije. Ruzogira irembo rimwe hamwe n'ibikoresho bifasha kurereka, bigashobora kubona aboba bariko bariba," niko yavuze. Prezida Magufuli avuga ko bizofasha kuzamura agaciro k'iryo buye ku soko mpuzamakungu. "Narababajwe n'ivyo umugwi urimwo umukuru w'inama nshingamateka Job Ndugai wakoze itohoza washitseko. Barerekana ingene ubwo butunzi bufasha bake. Sinipfuza ko vyosubira gushika," niko yabandanije avuga.

Mu kwezi kwa gatandatu mu 2017 ubwo Perezida Trump yatangazaga ko akuye Amerika mu masezerano ya Paris Mu kwezi kwa gatandatu mu 2017 ni bwo Perezida Donald Trump yatangaje ko akuye Amerika muri aya masezerano. Ariko uko amategeko y'umuryango w'abibumbye (ONU/UN) ateye, bivuze ko icyemezo cye cyagiye mu bikorwa uyu munsi, hashize umunsi umwe amatora y'Amerika abaye. Amerika ishobora gusubira muri aya masezerano mu gihe kiri imbere, perezida wayo aramutse abishatse. Aya masezerano ya Paris yashyizweho mu 2015 mu kongerera imbaraga ibikorwa bya za leta kubera inkeke zitewe n'imihindagurikire y'ikirere. Afite intego yo guhamisha igipimo cy'ubwiyongereye bw'ubushyuhe bwo ku isi muri iki kinyejana bukaba munsi ya dogere 2C hejuru y'ibipimo byariho mbere y'inganda. Ndetse no gushyigikira ibikorwa byo gutuma kwiyongera k'ubushyuhe bizageraho ntiburenge na dogere 1,5C. Kwikura muri aya masezerano kw'Amerika bivuze iki nyirizina? Amerika ubu yihariye 15% by'imyuka ihumanya ikirere ku isi, kandi ni igihugu cya mbere mu bukungu ku isi. Rero, iyo igihugu nk'iki kibaye ari cyo cyonyine cyikuye mu masezerano nk'aya yo gushaka gucyemura ikibazo cyugarije isi cy'imihindagurikire y'ikirere, bitera kwibaza niba hari uwo kwizera. John Kerry wari umunyamabanga wa leta y'Amerika ubwo yashyiraga umukono ku masezerano ya Paris, akikiye umwuzukuru we w'umukobwa, muri ONU Mu myaka itatu ishize, intumwa z'Amerika zagiye zitabira ibiganiro bya ONU ku mihindagurikire y'ikirere, mu gihe ubutegetsi bw'Amerika bwagiye bukoresha ako kanya mu kwamamaza ikoresha ry'ingufu kamere (fossil fuels). Andrew Light, wahoze ari umutegetsi mukuru ku butegetsi bwa Perezida Barack Obama mu bijyanye n'imihindagurikire y'ikirere, yagize ati: "Birumvikana ko kutabamo [muri ayo masezerano] bihesha isura mbi Amerika". "Ubu bubaye ubwa kabiri Leta Zunze Ubumwe [z'Amerika] zibaye iza mbere mu gushyira imbaraga mu masezerano mashya ku mihindagurikire y'ikirere - harimo na Kyoto [mu Buyapani] tutigeze na rimwe twemeza, naho ku masezerano ya Paris, twayavuyemo". "Rero, ndatekereza ko byumvikana ko hari ikibazo". Birimo kubonwa gute? Nubwo hari hashize igihe byitezwe, haracyari Abanyamerika benshi bumva bahemukiwe n'igihugu cyabo kuba kivuye muri aya masezerano. Abo Banyamerika bamwe bemeza ko imihindagurikire y'ikirere ari ikibazo gikomereye isi, ko rero Amerika yakabaye iyoboye urugamba rwo guhangana nacyo. Helen Mountford, wo mu kigo World Resources Institute, yagize ati: "Icyemezo cyo kuva mu masezerano ya Paris nta shingiro cyari gifite ubwo cyatangazwaga ndetse n'uyu munsi nta shingiro gifite". "Mbivuze mu buryo bworoshye kumva, Amerika yagakwiye kugumana n'ibindi bihugu 189 byashyize umukono ku masezerano, atari ukuyavamo yo yonyine".

Umumenyereza wa Liverpool Jugen Klopp ntazohindura umukenyuro wiwe wa 4-3-3 mu rukino rwa kuwa gatandatu, kandi kubera imvune nta buryo bwinshi afise bwo guhindagura abakinyi. Bihushanye na Zinedine Zidane wa Real Madrid, kuko we afise ikibazo gikomeye co kumenya abakinyi azohitamwo i Kiev canke umukenyuro azokoresha, ariko azobikora yisunze ingene Liverpool yakenyuye. Zidane yarahuye n'ibihe aho ikipe yiwe yagize ingorane mu mahiganwa aheze ariko, cane cane i Buraya, yaravyifashemwo neza. Yashikanye Real Madrid mu rukino rwanyuma bitavuye ku kwibanda ku buryo bumwe bwo gukina, ahubwo bivuye ku kuraba, urukino ku rundi, ukuntu uwo baza guhura yakenyuye, kandi igihe cose akaronka uburyo bwo kubanesha. Akoze ivyo, agahindura umukenyuro wa Real bivanye n'uwo baza gukina uwo ari we, yarerekanye ko atari umumenyereza apfa kurungika abakinyi biwe mu kibuga akababwira ngo bakore ivyo bashoboye, naho bafise ubuhinga bukomeye umwe wese ku giti ciwe. Ikipe ya Liverpool yatanguye urukino rwo kwishura rw'ica kabiri c'ihiganwa na Roma niyo vyitezwe ko itangura urukino i Kiev Real igomba kurusha ubwinshi inkuba zitatu za Liverpool zikina imbere Hamwe mu hantu hazobera urugamba rukomeye ni ku ruhande rw'iburyo rwa Liverpool, aho Muhamed Salah azoba ahanganye n'umunye Brezil wa Real, myugariro Marcelo, asanzwe ariwe mukinyi w'inyuma anasatira cane kurusha abandi kw'isi. Marcelo akorera vyinshi cane Real, ariko kumushoboza gukora vyinshi bishoboka adatumye inyuma hasigara hagaragara, bizogira ingaruka nini ku kuntu Zidane azohitamwo ikipe yose ashira mu kibuga. Yamye yiyubara cane iyo yahura n'amakipe akina umukino wo kwivyukiranya mu gusatira nka Liverpool, kandi ivyo arashobora kubisubiramwo. Zidane ashobora kwibaza ko Marcelo aza gusatira, ashobora gukingira ikipe yiwe mu kuyironsa uwundi myugariro wo hagati nka Mateo Kovacic canke Casemiro mu mukenyuro wa 4-4-2 nk'uko yabigize mu rukino rwa kabiri yatsinzemwo Paris St-Germain muri 16 zanyuma. Bashobora kugumya inyuma bagatuma Real isatira iciye mu mpande, ariko ingaruka yavyo kuri Zidane ni uko bisigura ko yoca abura ikibanza ashiramwo Toni Kroos na Lukas Modric mw'ikipe. Zidane yakoresheje umukenyuro wa 4-4-2 i Paris mu rukino rwa kabiri muri 16 basigaye mw'ihiganwa akina na Paris St-Germain. Gareth Bale yari kw'ibenci, ari kumwe na Kroos na Modric. Yakoresheje kandi umukenyuro wa 4-4-2 mu rukino rwa kabiri rw'ica kabiri c'ihiganwa atsinda Bayern Munich, Kroos na Kovacis bakina hagati na Asensio na Modric baja i bubamfu n'iburyo Uwundi mukenyuro ni 4-1-4-1 Zidane yakoresheje aho yatsindira Bayern Munich iwayo mu ca kabiri c'ihiganwa. Niyawusubira, ashobora gushira Casemiro imbere ya bane b'inyuma kugira abakingire kuko arazi ubunyarutsi bwa Liverpool. Ariko ategerezwa gufasha abakinyi biwe b'inyuma kuko, bitagenze uko, nimba Marcelo agomba kuja gusatira bisigura ko azoba asize batatu inyuma bahanganye n'abasatirizi batatu ba Liverpool aribo Salah, Roberto Firmino na Sadio Mane, canke "Imyampi itukura ya Liverpool" nk'uko babatazira. Liverpool yinjije ibitsindo 40 mu nkino 12 za Champions League uno mwaka, kandi Salah (10), Frimino (10) na Mane (9) binjijemwo 29 uko ari batatu. Igiteye ubwoba buri kipe ihuye na Liverpool ni abo batatu, cane cane Mane na Salah, kuko baranyaruka cane ku buryo naho umukinyi w'inyuma yoba ari mwiza gute, ubunyarutsi bwabo butegerezwa kumuteza ibibazo. Mu guhangana n'ico kibazo, Real itegerezwa kubarusha igitigiri uko vyongeda kwose, bivanye n'umukenyuro Zidane azoba yahisemwo. Benzema yishizwe kw'ibenci igihe Real yatinda 2-1 i Munich mu rukino rwa mbere rw'ica kabiri cihiganwa, Ronaldo akina wenyene imbere mu mukenyuro wa 4-1-4-1. Warnock agira ati "Zidane ntatinya kwicarika abakinyi bakomeye". "Bitandukanye na bamwe mu bamubanjirije kumenyereza Real, atora ikipe iza kumuha intsinzi, ntaraba ico abantu baza kuvuga." Bale ni kirumana nimba Zidane ahisemwo yuko ubunyarutsi bushobora kunesha Liverpool. Liverpool nayo nyene itegerezwa kwikwiza ku ruhande rwayo rw'iburyo. Salah ategerezwa kuguma kure imbere, ariko ivyo bica bituma Trent Alexander-Arnold aca aguma adakingiwe inyuma i buryo. James Milner niyaba ata mvune ashobora gukina, nokwizera ko yokina haruguru i buryo bwo hagati kugira bareke Salah agume imbere arondereze mu kibanza ico ari co cose Marcelo yosiga inyuma, ariko hakaba inkinzo imbere ya Alexander-Arnold. Ivyo bishobora kutaba ingorane ihambaye kuko, bivanye n'ikipe Zidane aza guhitamwo, Real irashobora kutanyaruka co kimwe na Liverpool mu gusatira.

Umuvyeyi n'umwana bapfuye haheze amasaha umuganga ahejeje kubaga Inyuma y'ico gikorwa co kuvyaza umuntu abanje kubagwa (césarienne), basanze umwana yapfuye, umuvyeyi nawe acikana haheze umwanya muto. Igipolisi kivuga ko casuzumye uwo muganga gikoresheje igipimo bahumekeramwo, gisanga uwo mugabo yari aborewe. Kiriko kirakora itohoza ryo kumenya kw'izo mpfu zoba zatewe n'ugusamara canke ko zishingiye ku mvo z'amagara. Dr PJ Lakhani ni umuganga wo ku rwego rwo hejuru afise ubuzobere, amaze imyaka 15 akora mu bitaro vya leta vy'i Sonavala. Abaganga bariko bavura abagore mu Buhindi Umuvyeyi Kamini Chachi, yari yazanywe ku bitaro ku munsi wa mbere ku mugoroba afise ububabare butewe n'imbanyi. Ikinyamakuru co muri ako gace cavuze ko umuryango wari urindiriye hanze wabwiwe ko umwana yacikanye, mu gihe nyina nawe yariko aravirarana. Kibandanya kivuga ko umuryango wafashe ingingo yo kumujana ku bitaro vy'abigenga ariko apfira mu nzira. Igipolisi kandi cabwiye BBC ko Dr Lakhani yagihamagaye asaba ngo kimufashe afise ubwoba ko umuryango w'uwo mugore wohava umugirira nabi wumvise ivy'izo mpfu. "Twasanze aborewe igihe dushikiye munyuma turamufata," niko umupolisi HR Goswami yavuze. Ibitaro vyagenye umugwi ugiye gutohoza icatumye izo mpfu.

Ukwambikana impeta Ubushakashatsi bwakoze mu myaka irenga 13 ku bantu barenga ibihumbi amajana atandatu, bafise ubwoko bw'ingwara y'umutima butatu, bwerekanye ko abubakanye arusha abandi ku bice 16 kubaho gusumba abatubatse. Abafise ingwara y'igisukari hamwe niyo umurindi w'amaraso, bari bameze neza. Abahinga bemera ko, n'aho badashobora kuvyemeza neza, ko abubakanye mu munezero basobora kubaho neza gusumba.

Raila Odinga ntazokwitaba amatora ya prezida muri Kenya Odinga avuga ko ashaka amatora mashasha hakurikijwe ivyasabwe na sentare ntahinyuzwa. Ayo matora yo kuwa 26 azoba ari ayo gusubiramwo ayabaye mu kwezi kw'umunani, inyuma y'aho sentare ntahinyuzwa muri Kenya ifutiye ivyari vyayavuyemwo. Odinga avuga ko avuye muri ayo matora kugira ahe akaryo akanama kajejwe gutegura amatora IEBC umwanya ukwiye wo guhindura ibikenewe kugira ayo matora azobe meza. Kenya: Amatora azokogwa naho abatavuga rumwe na Leta batoyitaba Sentare ntahinyuzwa ya Kenya iramenyesha igituma amatora asubirwamo Abo mu runani rutavuga rumwe na leta ya Kenya, NASA, bakikuje uwubarongoye, Raila Odinga Akanama kajejwe gutegura amatora kari katangaje ko prezida Uhuru Kenyatta ari we yatsinze amatora. IEBC yari yavuze ko Uhuru Kenyatta yari yatsinze amatora y'umukuru w'igihugu aronse amajwi imiliyoni 14.

Ni itegeko rireba n'abasura inteko ishingamategeko ya Tanzaniya Bwana Ndugai yabwiye umunyamakuru wa BBC Aboubakar Famau uri muri Tanzaniya ko yatanze iryo tegeko nyuma yaho minisitiri wungirije w'ubuzima Faustine Ndugulile yari yagaragaje impungenge z'ibibazo by'ubuzima biterwa n'izo nzara n'ingohe bitari karemano. Yavuze ko iryo tegeko rireba n'abasura inteko ishingamategeko y'iki gihugu. Bwana Ndugai yavuze ko kandi abadepite b'abagore babujijwe no kwambara amajipo magufi n'amapantalo azwi nka koboyi mu gihe bari mu nteko ishingamategeko.

Reveriyano Ndikuriyo, umunyamabanga mukuru mushasha wa CNDD-FDD, yiyemeje kutazobahemukira abagumyabanga Ni inyuma y'ikoraniro kaminuza ridasanzwe ryabereye ku mugwa mukuru wa poritike, Gitega, ku wa Mungu 24/01/2021. Umukenguzamateka Ndikuriyo asubiriye Evariste Ndayishimiye yari ajejwe ayo mabanga kuva mu 2016 igihe haba isubirwamwo ry'inzego zirongoye uyo mugambwe. Mu butumwa yacishije ku rubuga rwiwe rwa Twitter, umushingamateka Ndikuriyo yashimiye Perezida Evariste Ndayishimiye bagendanye, hamwe n'abanywanyi b'umugambwe wiwe bamwizeye. Yiyemeje kutazobahemukira. Umukenguzamateka Reveriyano Ndikuriyo yavukiye muri komine Kayogoro y'intara ya Makamba. Reveriyano Ndikuriyo yahoze ari mu banywanyi ba CNDD-FDD igihe wari ukiri umuhari warwanya ubutegetsi mu ntambara yadutse mu Burundi inyuma y'igandagurwa rya Perezida Melchior Ndadaye mu 1993. Uyo muhari umaze gutera igikumu ku masezerano yo guhagarika intambara, umukenguzamateka Ndikuriyo yarasubijwe mu buzima busanzwe akaba yararanguye amabanga atandukanye mu gihugu. Kuva mu 2004 yabaye buramatari w'intara ya Makamba asanzwe avukamwo, gushika mu 2007 aho abereye umushingamateka gushika mu 2010. Mu 2010, yatowe kuba umukenguzamateka, amabanga yasubiye gutorerwa mu 2015 mu matora yabayemwo impari nyinshi, maze aca atorwa kuyirongora gushika mu 2020. Muri kino gihe, asanzwe arongoye ishirahamwe ry'umupira w'amaguru mu burundi, FFB kuva mu 2013.

Aba basirikare ngo bahakanye ibyaha ariko ntibashobora gusobanura uko bageze mu gace kabereyemo ibyaha Umucamanza yashimangiye icyifuzo cy'ubushinjacyaha ko hariho impamvu zituma hakekwa ko abaregwa bakoze ibyaha bakurikiranyweho. Abaregwa ariko bo bakomeje guhakana uruhare mu byo bashinjwa bagashimangira ko batageze mu gace byemezwa ko bakoreyemo ibyaha. Mu cyemezo cye, umucamanza yavuze ko inyandiko mvugo z'abaregwa ndetse n'abatangabuhamya zerekanye ko hari impamvu zikomeye zishinja babiri mu baregwa uruhare mu gusambanya abagore ku ngufu. Abo ni Private Ndayishimiye Patrick w'imyaka 27 na Fidele Nishimwe we w'imyaka 23. Ku ikubitiro abahohotewe ngo ntibashoboye kumenya imyirondoro y'abasirikare kuko bari bakuye amazina ku myambaro yabo y'akazi. Gusa ubwo bajyanwaga mu kigo cya gisirikare cya Kami kiri hafi aho abaturage bahohotewe ngo bashoboye kwerekana amasura y'ababakoreye ibyaha. Aba basirikare ngo bahakanye ibyaha ariko ntibashobora gusobanura uko bageze mu gace kabereyemo ibyaha kandi atari ho bari bagenwe gukorera akazi k'irondo. Urukiko ngo rwabonye kandi n'ibimenyetso by'uko aba basirikare bakubise bakanakomeretsa abagabo mbere y'uko basambanya abagore babo. Ku bandi basirikare 3 Gatete Francois, Gahirwa John na Theoneste Twagirimana, umucamanza asanga nta bimenyetso bikomeye byerekana ko babaye abafatanyacyaha mu cyaha cyo gusambanya abagore ku gahato nk'uko babiregwa n'ubushinjacyaha. Gusa asanga hari ibimenyetso bikomeye byerekana ko barenze ku mategeko y'izamu ndetse no guhishira ibyaha byakozwe na bagenzi babo. Hari n'umusivili uregwa Mu baregwa hari n'umusivili Donath Ntakaziraho, umucamanza avuga ko nta bimenyetso bikomeye bimuhamya ubufatanyacyaha mu gusambanya abagore ku gahato. Gusa uyu munyerondo, ngo ibimenyetso bikomeye bimugaragaza nk'umufatanyacyaha mu byaha byakozwe n'abasirikare byo gukubita no gukomeretsa. Ku ikubitiro abahohotewe ngo ntibashoboye kumenya imyirondoro y'abasirikare kuko bari bakuye amazina ku myambaro yabo y'akazi Umwanzuro w'urukiko utegeka ko abaregwa uko ari batandatu bagomba kuguma mu munyururu mu gihe cy'iminsi 30 mu gihe hategurwa urubanza rwabo mu mizi. Ibi byaha bivugwa ko byakozwe n'abasirikare babarizwaga muri batayo ya 53 iba mu kigo cya gisirikare cya Kami byamenyekanye mu kwezi kwa 3. Aha hari mu gihe cy'amategeko akarishye yabuzaga abaturage gusohoka mu mazu kubera ingamba zo kwirinda icyago cya COVID 19. Abaturage ngo baketse ko aba basirikare bari mu kazi ko kureba ko ingamba zubahirizwa ariko batungurwa no kubona ibyaha babakoreye. Ni inkuru yaciye igikuba muri aka gace karangwamo imiturire y'akajagari aho abaturage bari bamaze igihe bahatirwa kwimuka baregwa kuba mu gace kabashyira mu kaga.

Ubu bushakashatsi buvuga ko kuri buri bantu 1000, abo babaga bafite ibyago biri hasi inshuro 10 byo kurwara umutima n'ibyago biri hejuru inshuro zirenga eshatu byo kurwara imitsi yo mu bwonko, ubagereranyije n'abarya inyama. Ubu bushakashatsi bwasohotse ku kinyamakuru cy'ubushakashatsi ku buvuzi cyo mu Bwongereza cya British Medical Journal. Bwakorewe ku bantu 48,000 mu gihe kigera ku myaka 18. Ariko ubu bushakashatsi ntabwo bwashoboye kugaragaza niba ibyo byago byaratewe n'indyo yabo cyangwa ikindi kintu giturutse ku mibereho yabo. Impuguke mu ndyo zavuze ko uko amahitamo y'indyo yaba ameze kose kuri buri muntu, kurya ibiryo binyuranye ari byiza cyane ku buzima. Ni iki ubu bushakashatsi bwongeye ku byari bisanzwe bizwi? Bwasesenguye amakuru yo mu bundi bushakashatsi bwa EPIC-Oxford, ubundi bukomeye bwakozwe mu gihe kirekire bwibanda ku ndyo n'ubuzima. Kimwe cya kabiri cy'abakoreweho ubu bushakashatsi, batoranyijwe hagati y'umwaka wa 1993 na 2001, baryaga inyama. Abarenga gato 16,000 ntibaryaga inyama cyangwa ntibarye ikintu icyo ari cyo cyose gikomoka ku matungo cyangwa inyamaswa. Abandi 7500 bavugaga ko batarya inyama ariko barya ifi (bazwi ku izina rya 'pescatarian'). Babajijwe indyo barya ubwo bitabiraga ubu bushakashatsi ndetse bongera kubibazwa no mu mwaka wa 2010. Umwirondoro ujyanye n'uburwayi bagiye bagira, kunywa itabi ndetse n'imyitozo ngororangingo nabyo byibanzweho. Bose hamwe, abantu 2,820 basanganwe indwara y'umutima yo mu bwoko bwa "coronary heart disease" (CHD) ndetse n'abantu 1,072 barwaye indwara y'imitsi yo mu bwonko - barimo 300 barwaye imitsi yo mu bwonko ibatera kuvirira imbere mu bwonko. Uko kuvirira imbere bibaho iyo umutsi w'amaraso wacitse intege uturitse ubundi ukavirira mu bwonko. Abatarya inyama ariko barya ifi basanzwe bafite ibyago biri hasi ku kigero cya 13% byo kurwara umutima wo mu bwoko bwa CHD ubagereranyije n'abarya inyama, mu gihe abatarya inyama n'abatarya ikintu icyo ari cyo cyose kiva ku matungo cyangwa ku nyamaswa bo bafite ibyago biri hasi ku kigero cya 22%. Ariko abo barya indyo zishingiye ku bimera basanzwe bafite ibyago biri hejuru ku kigero cya 20% byo kurwara imitsi yo mu bwonko. Abashakashatsi bavuga ko ibyo bishobora kuba biterwa no kugira ikigero kiri hasi cy'intungamubiri ya B12 (igaragara nko mu magi, inyama, amata y'amacunda...), ariko bavuga ko hacyenewe gukorwa ubundi bushakashatsi ngo hagenzurwe ikibitera. Biranashoboka ko iyo sano yaba idaterwa gusa n'indyo z'abantu, ahubwo igaterwa n'ibindi bitandukanye bitewe n'imibereho itandukanye y'abantu batarya inyama. None byaba bivuze ko kutarya inyama n'icyo ari cyo cyose gikomoka ku nyamaswa atari byiza ku buzima? Dr Frankie Phillips wo mu ishyirahamwe ry'indyo ry'Ubwongereza, avuga ko atari ko bimeze, kuko ubu bushakashatsi bwari bushingiye ku kwitegereza cyangwa kugenzura ababukoreweho. Ati: "Barebye ibyo abantu barya, nuko barabagenzura mu gihe cy'imyaka, rero ni ibyo babonye, ntabwo ari ubushakashatsi bw'impamvu n'icyabiteye". "Ubutumwa umuntu wese yakuramo, ni uko ari ibintu byiza gutekereza mbere ku cyo uri burye, ndetse no kurya ibiryo bitandukanye". Indyo itandukanye ni ingenzi, atari ukurya gusa "inyama n'ibirayi buri joro" Madamu Phillips agira ati: "Abarya inyama ntabwo bakunze kugira indyo itandukanye, kuko bashobora kuba barya inyama n'ibirayi buri joro kandi ntibarye imboga na nkeya". None ni iki gikwiye kuba kiri ku isahani yanjye? Ikigo cy'ubuzima cy'Ubwongereza (NHS), mu mabwiriza yacyo yo kurya neza (Eatwell Guide), gitanga iringaniza ry'ibiryo ukwiye kurya, hatitawe ku byo wowe utarya: Ariko abantu batarya inyama cyangwa ikintu icyo ari cyo cyose gikomoka ku matugo cyangwa inyamaswa, na bo bakwiye kwitwararika bakarya mu buryo buhagije ibirimo intungamubiri zimwe na zimwe. Nk'urugero, abantu barya inyama, banywa amata bakarya n'ifi akenshi baba bafite intungamubiri ya B12 mu ngano ihagije - iyi ntungamubiri (vitamin B12) ikaba ari ingenzi mu kugira amaraso meza ndetse n'imikorere myiza y'ubwonko. Ariko, abatarya ikintu icyo ari cyo cyose kiva ku matungo cyangwa ku nyamaswa, bashobora kubura iyo ntungamubiri, nubwo B12 inagaragara mu biribwa nk'ibinyampecye bifatwa nk'ifunguro rya mu gitondo ndetse no mu misemburo imwe. Intungamubiri ya "fer" inagaragara mu buryo butoroshye mu biribwa bishingiye ku bimera, rero abahitamo kutarya inyama bacyeneye kurya ibiryo nk'umugati ukubiyemo intungamubiri zitandukanye (wholemeal bread/pain complet), imbuto zikaranze,... Ndetse no mu kwezi gushize kwa munani, abatarya ikintu icyo ari cyo cyose gikomoka ku matungo cyangwa inyamaswa basabwe kumenya ko bagomba kurya mu buryo buhagije ibirimo intungamubiri yitwa "choline" (igaragara nko mu bishingiye ku magi, ku mata,...), iyo ntungamubiri ikaba ari ingenzi ku mikorere y'ubwonko.

Dr Getachew Tessema, se w'umudereva Yared Getachew, ata ishavu kuri Boeing Dr Getachew Tessema avuze ivyo umunsi umwe inyuma y'aho iryo hinguriro ry'indege rya Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika ryemereye ubwa mbere ko ubuhinga bw'iyo ndege buyituma idahagarara (anti-stall system) aribwo bwatunye ikoroka. Ku munsi wa kane w'iyi ndwi, umukuru w'ikompanyi Boeing, Dennis Muilenburg, yavuze ko "ababajwe n'ubuzima bw'abantu bwhasigaye". Yavuze ati: " Twebwe muri Boeing turababajwe n'abantu batakaje ubuzima mu masanganya y'indege za 737 kandi turiko turiko dukora tudahengeshanya kugira ngo ibara nk'iryo ntirize risubire". Mbega se w'uyo mudereva avuga ngw'iki? Dr Tessema agandariye umuhungu wiwe, Yared Getachew yari afise imyaka 29, akaba yari inzobere amaze kugendesha indege ku masaha arenga ibihumbi umunani. Yared yategura kwubakana n'uwundi mudereva nyene w'indege muri uno mwaka. Se wiwe amaze kwumva ivy'iryo sanganya, yaciye araba, ajanwa mu bitaro, kuko vyamugoye gutahura ivyari bihejeje kuba. Yabwiye umumenyeshamakuru wa BBC Emmanuel Igunza ati: "Jewe ndishimira umuhungu wanje n'uyo mudereva wundi". "Gushika ku munota wanyuma baragerageje uko bashoboye ariko biranka ko bayisubiza ku murongo". "Simbabajwe n'uko yari umudereva w'indege. Yapfuye ari ku kazi kiwe". Dr Tessema ata ishavu kw'ikompanyi Boeing, akibaza igituma itaciye ihagarika indege zo mu bwoko bwa 737 Max inyuma y'isanganya ryo mu gihugu ca Indonesia. "Kubera iki baziretse zikaguruka? Kubera bariko bahiganwa n'abandi. Bashatse kwunguka vyinshi. Ubuzima bwa kiremwa muntu ntaco buvuze kuri bamwe bamwe". Dr Tessema avuga ko ashobora kwitwara, ariko akavuga ko azorindira kugira ngo avugane n'incuti n'abagenzi imbere y'uko afata ingingo. Iyo ndege yo mu bwoko bwa Boeing 737 Max yakorotse haciye umwanya mutoyi ihagurutse, abantu 157 bose bari muri yo akaba ata n'umwe yarokotse. Amatohoza y'intangamarara yatangajwe ku munsi wa kane w'iyi ndwi n'abategetsi ba Ethiopia avuga ko abadereva b'iyo ndege bakurikije "incuro nyinshi" ibitegekanijwe na Boeing imbere y'uko iyo ndege ikorokera mu bumanuko bw'umugwa mukuru, Addis Ababa. Abadereva bariko bagerageza kugarura izuru ry'iyo ndege ryariko rimanuka bivuye kuri ubwo buryo buyituma idahagarara bwagize ikibazo. Umushikiranganji w'igihugu ca Ethiopia ajejwe gutwara abantu n'ibintu, Dagmawit Moges, yavuze ko abadereva bagerageje gukora uko bashoboye ariko "biranka ko bagarura iyo ndege". Iryo sanganya ryaje inyuma y'amezi atanu gusa iyindi ndege yo muri ubwo bwoko bwa Boeing 737 Max y'ikompanyi Lion Air yo mu gihugu ca Indonesia igize isanganya ryahitanye abantu 189 - naho nyene bikaba vyavuye ku ngorane z'ubwo buhinga buyituma idahagarara.

Abdul Hasan avuga ko iyo miti yo kwongereza ubunini bw'igitsina ituma yiyumva ko ari uwundi mugabo abushitse Abagabo babiri babwiye BBC igutuma ata soni bibatera guca muri iyo nzira. Abdul Hasan w'imyaka 27, ariteza izo nshinge kenshi zo gutuma igitsina ciwe kiba kinini bigatuma aboneka neza. Ubu yatanguye gukora ivyo kugira kabe nk'agashimwe azogirira umugenzi wiwe w'umwigeme. Amaranye imyaka umunani n'uwo mukobwa ariko aracibaza nimba azomushimisha bahuje igitsina. Igihe ca nyuma yakoresheje izo nshinge, umukunzi wiwe w'umwigeme ngo yararyohewe ijana kw'ijana, nk'uko uwo mugabo akoresha umuti mu kuvyimbisha igitsina ciwe yabivugiye mu kiganiro ca Victoria Derbyshire kuri BBC. Yongeyeko ati: "Nibajije ko ata muntu wundi ashobora kubabara kubero ivyo, hari impamvu nyinshi zituma nkoresha ubwo buryo." Imiti yo kwongereza ubunini bw'igitsina ni urusukirane rwa aside batera hakoreshejwe urushinge batera musi y'igitsina. Ntibikenera kubanza kubagwa kugira ico gikorwa kibe, kuko gishobora kuba mu masaha make kwa muganga ku ma Euro 3000 rimwe gusa. Uwo muti wakozwe kugira wongereze ubunini bw'igitsina, umuhungu agaragare neza. Mu bisanzwe hiyongerako isantimetero imwe canke zibiri, ariko kandi bivana n'umuti baguteye ingene ungana. Umuntu awutewe rimwe ushobora kumara amezi 18, kandi iyo miti ifise amategeko make bijanye. Asif Muneer wo mw'ishirahamwe ry'abaganga babaga ahaca umukoyo mu Bwongereza, avuga ko adashobora guhanura abantu gukora ivyo. Ivyo bikorwa ahanini mu kwongereza ubunini bw'igitsina ariko ntivyongereza uburebure, aho rero ntibiheza ngo bifashe mu guhuza ibitsina. Muneer avuga ko hari benshi bipfuza kumenya ingene iyo miti ikora inyuma yo kubona abantu rurangiranwa berekana ingene bibagisha ku mbuga ngurukanabumenyi. 'Nta kintu co guhisha' Umuntu awutewe rimwe ushobora kumara amezi 18. Ku ruhande rwiwe, Abdul avuga ko kutagira imibonano mpuzabitsina ari vyo vyatumye ashaka ko bamuha miligarama 10 z'uwo muti. Igitsina ciwe gifise ubunini n'uburebure bikwiye ariko avuga ko yaravye abandi bagabo uko bameze bariko batambuka batambaye mu nzu yo kwinonora imitsi. Avuga ko incuro ya mbere yakoresheje uwo muti wo kwongereza ubunini bw'igitsina, vyatumye yiyemera cane n'aho yari afise ubwoba bw'ingaruka zavyo. Yavuze ati: "Igihe nakoresha uwo muti, naciye ntangura kwiyemera. Nta co nasubiye kunyegeza." Uwo mugabo yavuze kandi ko inyuma y'imisi myinshi yiyumva neza ari mu kibanza gikoraniyemwo abantu benshi. Yavuze ati: "Narahindutse, ubu mbonye ahakoraniye abantu sintinya kubajamwo." Amakompanyi abiri akomeye akora imiti mu Bwongereza, yihweza ivyerekeye guhuza ibitsina, yabwiye ikiganiro ca Victoria Derbyshire kuri BBC ko hiyongereye ubushakashatsi ku nshinge zituma igitsina kiba kinini. Ubu hari ubushakashatsi bwinshi buharurwa nko ku 700 buri kwezi ugereranije n'imyaka itanu iheze, aho ivyo biharuro vyari bike cane mu mezi cumi. Asif Muneer wo mw'ishirahamwe ry'abaganga babaga ahaca umukoyo mu Bwongereza, avuga ko adashobora guhanura abantu gukora ivyo. Muneer kandi avuga ko hari abagabo bitera inshinge bonyene kugira baronke igitsina kinini bakoresheje amavuta asanzwe nka vaseline, bakaba batazi ingaruka zavyo. Benshi baraja kwa muganga ariko inyuma y'imisi mike baraza kwivuza ingaruka mbi zito zito ziba zashitse. Umugabo umwe w'imyaka 36, Stuart, yibaza ko abagabo bose bashobora kuronka igitsina kinini babishatse. Avuga ati: "Sinibaza ko nkeneye gukoresha umuti n'aho nipfuza kwiyemera gusumba." Stuart aranezerezwa no kwongereza ubunini bw'igitsina ciwe "Nari kunezerwa cane iyo igitsina canje caba ari kinini gusumba." Stuart yarashimye uko kuntu igitsina kigirwa kinini utarinze kubagwa inyuma yo kubona itangazo ryo kumenyekanisha ryerekeye uwo muti. Ivyo abantu bemera ku gitsina kinini Ubushakashatsi bwakozwe mu 2015 muri kaminuza imwe yo mu gisagara ca Londres, bwibanze ku bunini n'ubuebure bw'ibitsina vy'abagabo barenga 15.000 kw'isi yose. Mu bisanzwe igitsina gitegerezwa kugira isantimetero 13 mu gihe cahagurutse neza. Ni ibice 5 gusa kw'ijana vy'abagabo bari bafise igitsina kirenza santimetero 16.002, mu gihe ibice 0.14% bari bafise igitsina gito cane gusumba uko bisanzwe, n'ukuvuga centimetero 7.6. Ufatiye ku bunini na ho, mu bisanzwe igitsina kiba gifise umuzunguruko wa santimetero 9 kitarahaguruka, kimaze guhaguruka na ho kigira santimetero 11.6. Stuart yaciye afata ingingo yo kwiteza milimetero 15 z'umuti, ari na co gipimo ca nyuma umuntu ashobora guterwa kwa muganga. Umugenzi wa Stuart ntiyagishijwe inama ku ngingo yo kwongereza ubunini bw'igitsina ciwe. Umukunzi wa Stuart avuga ko afise ubwoba ko ico gitsina kizohava kiba kinini cane. Stuart yavuze ati: "Ndanezerewe cane kuko ndabona ko cabaye kinini." Abdul we yavuye kuri santimetero 10 aja kuri 11.5. Umuganga ahanura abagabo kurindira indwi zine imbere yo gukora imibonano mpuzabitsina ku neza yabo, ivyo Abdul akaba avyubahiriza. Iyo miti bashobora kuyikuramwo, igitsina kigasubira kungana uko cahora ariko urinze kuriha ayandi mahera.

Impuzu n'ibirato vya Mitumba bikunzwe n'abantu bafise amikoro make Ukubuza izo mpuzu n'ibirato ni bimwe muvusabwe mu ntumbero yo guteza imbere amahinguriro y'impuzu mu karere ka Afrika y'ubuseruko. Amareta ya Afrika yo mu buseruko yagumye yamirira kure iyinjizwa ry'impuzu n'ibirato vyambawe, ko ari vyo bituma amahinguriro y'impuzu n'inshato yugara. Izo mpuzu kenshi zirakunzwe n'abantu cane cane bafise amikoro make kubera zigurwa make. Hanyuma kandi zitanga akazi ku bantu badafise imitahe minini. Abo bategetsi kandi baraganira ivyerekeye kugabanya igitigiri c'amamodoka yakoze yinjira mu aka karere, mu ntumbero yo gufasha amahonguriro akora imodoka yo mu karere ka Afrika y'ubuseruko. Abaprezida Paul Kagame(Rwanda), Uhuru Kenyatta(Kenya) na Yoweri Museveni( Uganda) nib amaze gushika Arusha muri iyo nama. Icipfuzo ca Sudan y'epfo na Somali co kwinjira muri uwo murynago na co nyene kiraza kwihwezwa. Muri iyo nama, abo bategetsi vyitezwe ko baza gutanguza igitabo c'inzira ibihugu vya Afrika y'ubuseruko bihuriyeko vyose gikozwe ku buhinga bwa none(electronique).

Prezida Macron yavuze ko gutorera inyishu "ibibazo bigoye vya kahise...bishobora gufata igihe" Mu kiganiro n'abamenyeshamakuru ari kumwe na mugenziwe w'u Rwanda, Paul Kagame, bwana Macron yagize ati: "Umushikiranganji w'imigenderanire y'u Rwanda n'amakungu afise ibisabwa vyose vyotuma aja muri ayo mabanga. Nzomushigikira." Yavuze kandi ko yiyemeje gukomeza imigenderanire n'u Rwanda, ashimira Kagame yemera ko hari vyinshi bokorana. Prezida Kagame nawe yavuze ati: "Twizeye kuguma dukorana, haba ku rwego rw'ibihugu vyacu bibiri canke ku mugabane wa Afrika." Prezida Kagame yaheruka mu Bufaransa mu 2011 Imigenderanire y'ivyo bihugu ukwo ari bibiri ntiyifashe neza mu gihe u Rwanda rwagiriza Ubufaransa kugira uruhara muri jenoside yo mu 1994, ariko Ubufaransa bukabihakana. Ubutungane bw'Ubufaransa nabwo bwagirize bamwe mu ntwazangabo zikorana vya hafi na Prezida Kageme, kugira uruhara mw'iraswa ry'indege ya Prizuda Habyarimana, ikintu bivugwa ko catumye jenoside itangura. Abantu barenga 800.000 bagizwe ahanini n'Abatutsi baraguye muri ubwo bwicanyi. Iyo nama yabaye ku munsi wa gatatu, ibaye iya gatatu hagati ya bwana Kagame na bwana Macron uno mwaka.

Holden Matthews yoba yashikirijwe abategetsi na se wiwe asanzwe ari icegera c'umukuru w'inyamiramabi Holden Matthews w'imyaka 21 y'amavuko yahagaritswe ku munsi wa gatatu yagirizwa ivyaha bitatu bijanye n'uguturira amasengero. Nta bantu bahasize ubuzima canke ngo bakomereke igihe ayo masengero yaturirwa, ariko ivyo vyibutsa ibihe bibi igihe abantu bariko barwanira agateka ka muntu. Buramatari w'intara ya Louisiana, John Bel Edwards, avuga ko ivyo "bikorwa vy'ubugome" vyibutsa "akahise kabi karanzwe n'iterabwoba". Uyo mutegetsi wo mu mugambwe w'abaharanira demokarasi avuga ko ico kibi cakozwe " n'umuntu yataye akaranga", yongerako ati: "Urwanko ntiruri mu mico ya Louisiana". Butch Browning, arongoye urwego rujejwe kurwanya imiriro y'ivyaduka muri iyo ntara ya Louisiana, yabwiye abanyamakuru ejo ku wa kane ko icaha kimwe kimwe mu vyaha bitatu uyo musore yagirizwa bishobora kumutuma acirirwa umunyororo w'imyaka 15 kuri kimwe kimwe. Bobby Guidroz, umukuru w'inyamiramabi muri paruwase ya Saint Landry muri iyo ntara, avuga ko icegera ciwe, Roy Matthews, ariwe se w'uyo musore Holden Matthews, "ata kintu na kimwe yari azi ku vyakozwe n'umuhungu wiwe" kandi ko "yababaye cane" yumvise iyo nkuru. Bwana Guidroz avuga ko Roy Matthews we nyene ubwiwe ari we yafashije kugira ngo umuhungu wiwe afatwe, mu kumushikana ahantu igipolisi cashobora kumufata "ata ngorane". Ayo masengero yaturiwe, n'ayo mu gisagara citwa Opelousas muri iyo ntara ya Louisiana, hari ku magenekerezo ya 26 z'ukwa gatatu, ya 2 na 4 z'uku kwezi kwa kane. Ibisigarira vy'urusengero rwa paruwase St. Landry rwaturiwe Uyo yagirizwa gukora ico caha akaba aba muri ico gisagara kirimwo abantu ibihumbi 16. Amasengero St Mary Baptist Church, Greater Union Baptist Church na Mount Pleasant Baptist Church yarahiye atatokombezwa n'uwo mucanwa. Ishirahamwe ryitaho iterambere ry'abantu bafise urukoba rutera - National Association for the Advancement of Colored People (NAACP) - ribona ko iturirwa ry'ayo masengero "ari nk'iterabwoba" rikorerwa abantu badafise urukoba rwera. Abategetsi bavuga ko atacotuma bibaza ko ico kibi coba gifitaniye isano n'irindi turirwa ry'urusengero rurwiriyemwo abazungu ryabaye ku wa 31 z'ukwezi kwa gatatu ruherereye mu karere k'amasaha makeya y'urugendo uvuye aho muri ico gisagara.

Igitangazamakuru cya leta cyatangaje ko Kim yaburiye ko hirindwa kwihutira koroshya ingamba zo kurwanya Covid-19 Mu ijambo yavugiye mu nama ya biro politike y'ishyaka ritegeka Koreya ya ruguru, Bwana Kim yavuze ko iki gihugu "cyakumiriye kuza kwa virusi mbi" ndetse gishobora "kugumishaho ituze". Mu mezi atandatu ashize, Koreya ya ruguru yafunze imipaka yayo ndetse ishyira mu kato abantu babarirwa mu bihumbi ubwo iyi virusi yari itangiye gukwirakwira ku isi. Iki gihugu kivuga ko nta muntu n'umwe wanduye coronavirus ukirangwamo, nubwo abasesenguzi bavuga ko ibyo bisa nk'ibidashoboka. Bivugwa ko Bwana Kim, muri iyo nama yo ku munsi w'ejo ku wa kane, "yasesenguye byimbitse ibikorwa byagezweho na gahunda idasanzwe y'amezi atandatu yo kwirinda icyorezo". Yavuze ko intsinzi mu kurwanya iki cyorezo "yagezweho kubera ubuyobozi bureba kure bw'akanama gakuru k'ishyaka" riri ku butegetsi. Ariko yashimangiye akamaro ko kugumishaho "kuba maso ku kigero cyo hejuru gishoboka... nta koroshya ingamba zo kurwanya icyorezo". Yongeyeho ko icyorezo cya coronavirus kikigaragara mu bihugu bituranyi. Kuri uyu wa gatanu, ibiro ntaramakuru KCNA bya leta ya Koreya ya ruguru byatangaje ko "yakomeje kuburira ko guhutiraho mu koroshya ingamba zo kurwanya icyorezo byateza akaga umuntu adashobora kwiyumvisha kandi katakwikurwamo". Agapfukamunwa ni itegeko muri Koreya ya ruguru Mu mpera y'ukwezi kwa mbere, Koreya ya ruguru yihutiye guhangana na coronavirus - ifunga imipaka yayo ndetse nyuma yaho ishyira mu kato abanyamahanga babarirwa mu magana, mu murwa mukuru Pyongyang. Yanashyize mu kato abaturage bayo bwite babarirwa mu bihumbi za mirongo ndetse ifunga amashuri. Kuri ubu Koreya ya ruguru yongeye gufungura amashuri, ariko yagumishijeho itegeko ribuza abantu guterana mu kivunge. Yanategetse kwambara agapfukamunwa mu ruhame, nkuko inkuru y'ibiro ntaramakuru Reuters yo ku itariki ya mbere y'uku kwezi kwa karindwi ibivuga, isubiramo amagambo y'umutegetsi wo mu ishami ry'umuryango w'abibumbye ryita ku buzima (OMS/WHO). OMS inavuga ko iki gihugu - gituwe n'abaturage barenga gato miliyoni 25 - kugeza ubu kimaze gupima coronavirus abantu 922 gusa - amakuru akavuga ko bose basanze ari bazima. Koreya ya ruguru, ihana urubibi rurerure n'Ubushinwa, yakomeje kuvuga ko nta muntu n'umwe urahaboneka wanduye coronavirus. Ariko, Oliver Hotham, umwanditsi mukuru w'urubuga NK News rw'amakuru kuri Koreya ya ruguru by'umwihariko, mu ntangiriro y'uyu mwaka yabwiye BBC ko ibyo bishoboka ko atari ukuri. Yagize ati: "Ni ibintu bigoye cyane ko byashoboka ko nta muntu n'umwe wanduye uhari kuko ihana urubibi n'Ubushinwa na Koreya y'epfo". "[By'umwihariko ku mupaka n'Ubushinwa], kubera ingano y'ubucuruzi bwambukiranya umupaka... Rwose simbona ukuntu byashoboka ko bashoboye kuyirinda". "[Ariko] rwose bafashe ingamba z'ubwirinzi hakiri kare, [rero] ntekereza ko bishoboka ko bashoboye kwirinda ko icyorezo cyibasira benshi".

Abanyeshuli barajwe hanze kubera amanota mabi Abo bigeme biga kw'ishuli ryisumbuye ryo muri West Pokot mu buraruko bwa Kenya, bakuwe mu buraro n'umukenyezi ayobora ishuli abahora amanota mabi, nkuko amakuru yo muri ako karere avuga. Impera ya Twitter ubutumwa, 1 Benshi muri abo bigeme baronka imfashanyo y'amahera y'ishuli ava mu gisata co guteza imbere umupira w'amaguru, ayo mahera akaba yatangwa ata kuraba ingene abo banyeshuli bakoze mu vyigwa, niko ikinyamakuru Daily Nation ca Kenya kivuga.

Ifoto igaragaza Hiroshima nyuma yo guterwaho igisasu kirimbuzi cya nikleyeri - imwe mu nshuro ebyiri gusa intwaro kirimbuzi za nikleyeri zakoreshejwe mu ntambara mu mateka y'isi kugeza ubu Ingabo z'Amerika zashakaga guha isomo no gutsinda vuba ingabo z'Ubuyapani muri iyi ntambara ya kabiri y'isi, Hiroshima ukaba wari umujyi w'inganda n'ibirindiro by'igisirikare bikomeye. Hiroshima hari ibirindiro bya diviziyo eshatu zikomeye za gisirikare. Ariko hari n'abaturage ibihumbi amagana. Indege yiswe Enola Gay yagenze ahantu hareshya n'urugendo rw'amasaha atandatu iherekejwe n'izindi esheshatu zose z'intambara. Igisasu kirimbuzi cyiswe 'The Little Boy', mbere yuko cyurizwa indege Enola Gay yari itwawe n'umupilote w'intambara, Brigadiye Jenerali Paul Warfield Tibbets Jr., yarekuye igisasu bise 'The Little Boy' cyari gifite ibiro 64 by'ubumara bwa uranium, cyafashe amasegonda 44 ngo kigwe kuri uyu mujyi kivuye ku butumburuke bwa metero 580. Iyi nyubako yarokotse icyo gisasu kirimbuzi, kuri ubu yagizwe inzu ndangamurage Abantu bagera ku 80,000 bahise bahasiga ubuzima - ni hafi 30% by'abari batuye i Hiroshima icyo gihe - naho abandi babarirwa ku 70,000 barakomereka. Abandi ibihumbi amagana bazize ingaruka z'iki gisasu cy'ubumara kirimbuzi bunyuranye nyuma y'amezi n'imyaka myinshi. Hiroshima yarimo inyubako 90,000 mbere y'icyo gisasu, ariko izigera gusa ku 28,000 ni zo zasigaye nyuma yaho. Paul Tibbets wari utwaye indege yarekuriye iki gisasu kuri Hiroshima, yapfuye mu 2007 afite imyaka 92 ageze ku ipeti rya Brigadiye Jenerali Hiroshima yakurikiwe na Nagasaki nayo yamanuriweho ikindi gisasu nk'iki hashize iminsi itatu - ku itariki ya 9 y'ukwa munani mu mwaka wa 1945. Nyuma yaho gato, ku itariki ya 15 y'ukwa munani muri uwo mwaka, Ubuyapani bwatangaje ko bwemeye ko butsinzwe intambara ndetse burahira kutazongera kugira igisirikare no guhirahira bujya mu ntambara kugeza ubu. Intambara ya kabiri y'isi irangira ityo.

Uko intebe zari zigabanganywe, 643 zimaze gutsindigwa Mu gihe hagisigaye intebe ziri ku rushi, amatora yo ku munsi wa kane yerekanye ko umugambwe w'aba "Travaillistes" ariwo wungutse intebe. Mu gihe hari intebe 650, umugambwe ugenzura ibikogwa vy'inama nshingamateka utegerezwa kugira niburiburi intebe 326. Mu gihe umugambwe w'umushikiranganji wa mbere Theresa May udashobora gushikana ico gitigiri, imigambi y'uwo mukenyezi ishobora kugora gutunganya, na cane cane ikibazo gihanze igihugu co kuva mu muryango w'ubumwe bwa Buraya, gikenera gucishwa mu nama nshingamateka. Abazi utuntu n'utundi, basanga imigambwe ishobora kuja hamwe ariko ivyo uwurongoye umugambwe w'aba "Travaillistes" akaba yavyanse. Jeremy Corbyn yaciye asaba Theresa May gutanga imihoho ariko we avuga ko umugambwe wiwe uzobungabunga inzego. Umupfasoni May ngo ntategekanya gutanga imihoho, nkuko Laura Kuensberg ajejwe ibibazo vya politike muri BBC avuga. Ku munsi wa gatanu mu gitondo, umushikiranganji wa mbere yavuze ati: "Muri kino gihe ikintu gikuru kurusha ibindi nuko inzego z'igihugu zibungabungwa." Intebe umugambwe w'aba "Conservateurs" wa Theresa May warufise zagabanutse Theresa May ategekanya kuja ku kirimba c'umwamikazi, ngo asabe uruhusha rwo gutunganya leta naho umugambwe wiwe wabuze amajwi akenewe.

Prezida Yoweri Museveni wa Uganda yashengeje abanditse ko yakingiwe Covid-19 mu mpisho Daily Monitor casubiyemwo inkuru yanditswe n'ikinyamakuru Wall Street ko prezida Museveni n'abamwegereye bicandagishije mu mpisho Covid-19, imbere y'uko abandi banyagihugu baronka urwo rucanco. Ico kirego ca prezida yatanze muri sentare nkuru kivuga ko iyo nkuru y'ico kimenyeshamakuru yanditswe mu ntumbero yo kumukorera ikibi n'ibigirankana. Ico kirego kiravuga kandi ko iyo nkuru, yanditswe itariki 23 z'ukwezi kwa kabiri, cerekana prezida nk'umuntu atisonera yiha uburenganzira hamwe n'akagwi gafise amahigwe yo kuba kamwegereye, gucandagwa imbere y'abakozi bo muvyo amagara y'abantu bari imbere mu kugwanya ico kiza hamwe n'imigwi igeramiwe gusumba iyindi. Mw'ijambo yashikirije igihugu incuro zibiri zitandukanye mu ndwi zibiri ziheze, prezida Museveni yasavye ico kinyamakuru gusaba ikigongwe ku rupapuro rwa mbere rwaco. Ico kinyamakuru carisiguye kuri iyo nkuru mu ntango z'iyi ndwi. Mw'ijambo yashikirije ku mboneshakure ku musi w'Imana, prezida yavuze ko acihweza urucanco bokoresha muri nyinshi zimaze kwemezwa. Museveni yongeyeko ko ashaka ko ikirangamisi co gutanga incanco gitangurira ku bantu bageramiwe kurusha abandi, nk'abakozi bo muvyo amagara y'abantu. Uganda iramaze kuronka incanco 860.000 za AstraZeneca, kandi abantu barenga 4.000, benshi muri bo bari mbere mu kugwanya coronavirus, baramaze gucandagwa.

Icyorezo ni igihe indwara ikwirakwira mu bihugu byinshi ku isi kandi mu gihe kimwe Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, umukuru wa OMS, yavuze ko umubare w'abamaze kuyandura hanze y'Ubushinwa umaze kwiyongera inshuro zikubye 13 mu by'umweru bibiri bishize. Yavuze ko "ahangayikishijwe bikomeye" no "kuba nta gikorwa kigaragara" kuri iyo virusi. Icyorezo ni igihe indwara ikwirakwira mu bihugu byinshi ku isi kandi mu gihe kimwe. Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus yavuze ko umubare w'abamaze kuyandura hanze y'Ubushinwa umaze kwiyongera inshuro zikubye 13 mu by'umweru bibiri bishize Ariko Dr Tedros yavuze ko n'ubu igihe kitararenga ngo za leta zo ku isi zigire icyo ziyikoraho. Ati: "Ibihugu byose bishobora guhindura umujyo w'iki cyorezo". Yavuze ko leta zigomba "gukora mu buryo bungana ibyo kurinda ubuzima, kugabanya ihungabana no kubaha ubuzima bwa muntu". Ati: "Turigusenyera ku mugozi umwe mu gukora ibikwiye dutuje kandi turinda abaturage batuye isi. Ni ibintu bishoboka".

Impunzi z'Abarundi mu nkambi ya Mahama mu Rwanda Iyo nkunga izafasha mu gutanga ibiribwa n'ubufasha mu by'imirire ku mpunzi zirenga 60,000 z'Abarundi ziri mu nkambi ya Mahama mu burasirazuba bw'u Rwanda. Itangazo rya PAM rivuga ko iyo nkunga ije yiyongera ku yandi ma-euro 500,000 yatanzwe n'akanama k'Uburayi gashinzwe iby'imfashanyo yo gutabara imbabare mu ntangiriro y'uyu mwaka wa 2019. Iyo nkunga yo mu ntangiriro y'uyu mwaka yari igenewe gukomeza kuzitaho mu nkambi no mu bigo zakirirwamo, nkuko PAM ivuga. Edith Heines, ukuriye PAM mu Rwanda, yavuze ko "ashimira cyane abaturage batanga imisoro b'i Burayi ngo bafashe kandi bahindure ubuzima bw'impunzi mu nkambi ya Mahama". Yongeyeho ko iyi nkunga "iziye igihe, mu gufasha kwirinda igabanywa rya 'rations' [ingano y'ifunguro impunzi zigenerwa] muri uku kwezi ndetse no gusubizaho amafaranga impunzi zigenerwa mu kubahiriza uburenganzira bwazo bwo kugura ibyo bashaka kurya [by'amahitamo yabo]". PAM ivuga ko abana n'abagore bagize 75% by'umubare w'impunzi zose ziri mu nkambi ya Mahama. Mu bufasha iha izo mpunzi, ivuga ko ikoresha uburyo buvanze bw'inkunga y'ibiribwa n'amafaranga. Ivuga kandi ko iri gukorana na leta y'u Rwanda n'indi miryango ishamikiye kuri ONU mu gufasha impunzi kwigira zirushaho guhahirana n'abaturage baturiye inkambi. Inkambi y'impunzi z'Abarundi ya Mahama yashinzwe mu kwezi kwa kane mu 2015. Hari nyuma y'imidugararo yakurikiye icyemezo kitavuzweho rumwe cya Perezida Pierre Nkurunziza w'u Burundi cyo kwiyamamaza kuri manda ya gatatu.

Umuryango w'abaganga batagira imipaka ukoresha abaganga n'abandi bakozi bakora indi mirimo babarirwa mu bihumbi, kandi benshi baba ari ba kavukire b'ibihugu ukoreramo Bamwe mu bagore bahoze bakorera uyu muryango bavuze ko iyo myitwarire yari isakaye ahantu henshi muri uwo muryango w'abaganga batagira imipaka. Umwe muri bo yavuze ko umwe mu bayobozi bakuru b'uwo muryango yavuze ko byashobokaga gutanga imiti ku barwayi ari ingurane yo kwemera ko baryamana. Umuryango w'abaganga batagira imipaka wavuze ko utihanganira "ihohotera, ishyira ku nkecye no kwaka indonke". Gukoresha indaya birabujijwe mu mategeko akaze agenga imyitwarire mu muryango ufasha w'abaganga batagira imipaka. Aba bagore bamennye ayo mabanga basabye ko imyirondoro yabo idashyirwa ahagaragara kugira ngo badashyirwa mu kato n'indi miryango nterankunga y'amahanga, imwe muri yo ikaba ishobora guhanahana abakozi. Ibi birego bireba abakozi b'uyu muryango w'abaganga batagira imipaka bakora indi mirimo - batari abaganga cyangwa abaforomo. Umwe mu bakozi bahoze bakorera uyu muryango hanze y'ibiro by'i London mu Bwongereza, yavuze ko yigeze kubona umwe mu bayobozi bakuru azanye abakobwa aho yari acumbitse muri Kenya. Yagize ati: "Abo bakobwa bari bato cyane kandi byavugwaga ko bari indaya". Ngo byarabonekaga ko bari baje gukora uburaya. Yongeyeho ati: "Uwo twakoragana na we wari umaze igihe acumbitse aho ngaho yavuze ko ibyo yari asanzwe abibona". Umuryango w'abaganga batagira imipaka ni umwe mu miryango nterankunga minini ku isi. Ukoresha abaganga n'abandi bakozi bakora indi mirimo babarirwa mu bihumbi, kandi benshi baba ari ba kavukire b'ibihugu ukoreramo.
