(Sun on Sunday) Umugwi Real Madrid ufise imiliyoni 200 z'ama euros uzokoresha mu kwezi kwa mbere, ukaba urondera kugura abakinyi batatu. (Marca - in Spanish) Umukinyi w'Ubwongereza na Borussia Dortmund akina imbere ku ruhande, Jadon Sancho w'imyaka 18, yavuze ko "ata vyiyumviro vyo guhindura afise" igihe abajijwe ko yohava yimukira mu wundi mugwi. (Sunday Express, via Bild) Inyifato yarahindutse muri Arsenal kuva umumenyereza Unai Emery asubiriye Arsene Wenger, nkuko bivugwa n'umukinyi wo hagati w'imyaka 29 aturuka muri Arménie, Henrikh Mkhitaryan. (Sunday Telegraph)

Iyo myiyamamazo izotangura k uwa 19 z'uku kwa gatandatu, itariki bakunze kwita "Juneteenth". Mu 1921 igisagara ca Tulsa ni kimwe mu bisagara vyabereyemwo ubwicanyi bukomeye bw'abirabure muri kahise ka Amerika. Ayo makuru atangajwe inyuma y'imyiyerekano imaze indwi zirenga zibiri yo kwiyamiriza ivanguramoko yadutse inyuma y'urupfu rw'umwirabure George Floyd, mu gasho k'igipolisi. Basigura igituma bahisemwo iyo tariki, abategura imyiyamamazo ya Trump bavuga ko umugambwe wiwe w'abaharanira Repubulika wishimira uruhara wagize mu gutsinda intambara yo mu 1865 be no mu kurangiza ubucakara. Imyiyamamazo ya Trump yari yahagaritswe mu kwezi kwa gatatu kubera ikiza ca coronavirus. Ariko arondera gusubira kwitoreza ikiringo ca kabiri mu matora ategekanijwe mu kwa cumi na rimwe uno mwaka, ariko umu Democrate Joe Biden ntamuha agahengwe kuko imyihwezo y'amatora yerekana ko ari imbere yiwe. Mu gihe coronavirus ibandanya yiha inkumbi muri ico gihugu, abajejwe imyiyamamazo ba Trump babona ko abo bahanganye batazohava bamunegura ko yakoranije abantu, kuko no mu myiyerekano iheruka hibonekeje isinzi ry'abantu. Mu gihe atangaza ikibanza azokwugururiramwo iyo myiyamamazo, Bwana Trump yafatiye ku gitigiri gito c'abanduye uwo mugera muri Oklahoma - aho hamaze kwandura abantu 7,500 bonyene, igitigiri gito cane ugereranije n'izindi ntara muri Amerika. Ati: "Tugiye gutangura imyiyamamazo. Iya mbere izobera muri Oklahoma, mu gisagara ca Tulsa, Oklahoma. Igisagara ciza cane kandi abantu barayirindiranye igishika. Bakoze igikorwa gikomeye cane mu kurwanya Covid, murabizi namwe, muri iyo leta ya Oklahoma". Avuga ko azoca abandaniriza mu ntara za Florida, Texas na Arizona, ariko akaba atamenyesheje ingingo zizofatwa kugira ngo bikingire bongere bubahirize ya ngingo y'ukutegerana. Hampande y'vyo, ejo kuwa gatatu Trump yararahiye ararengwa ko adashobora guhindura amazina y'amakambi y'igisirikare yerekana intwari zo muri kahise, amenshi muri yo akaba ari ivyibutso vy'ubucakara. Kubera iki iyo tariki n'ikibanza biteye impari? Juneteenth ni umunsi mukuru wo kwibuka ihagarikwa ry'ubucakara. Si umunsi mukuru uhimbazwa n'igihugu cose, ariko Abanyamerika bakomoka muri Afrika barawuhimbaza cane. Bibuka aho hasohoka itegeko riha ubwigenge Abanyamerika bakomoka muri Afrika bari abacakara mu ntara ya Texas. Texas niyo ntara ya nyuma mu ntara zari zishize hamwe kugira ngo ziyonkore yashikirijwe iryo tegeko ku wa 19 z'ukwa gatandatu 1865. Hari inyuma y'intambara yari yadutse mu 1861 ivuye ku ntara zo mu bumanuko zari zatangaje ko ziyonkoye kuri Leta zunze Ubumwe za Amerika kubera zitashaka ko ubucakara buhera. Mu guhitamwo ico gisagara ca Tulsa navyo nyene bifise insiguro. Igisagara cya Tulsa cy'abirabura cyaratwitswe cyane Mu kwa gatanu n'ukwa gatandatu 1921, akarwi nk'inkorabara kagizwe n'abazungu karateye igice ca Greenwood kizwi nka "Black Wall Street", cabamwo abirabure kandi cariko kiratera imbere cane. Ako karwi kari kitwaje inkoho n'amagerenade, kica abantu bagera ku 300 kanasambura amazu y'idandarizo n'imihana ashika 1,000. Asubirwamwo n'ikinyamakuru co muri Amerika Bloomberg, Katrina Pearson umuhanuzi wa Trump, yasohoye itangazo aho asigura icatumye iyo tariki ariyo bahitamwo, mu kuvuga ati: "Umugambwe wa Abraham Lincoln watsinze iyo ntambara, aba Repubulika barishimiye cane uwo munsi mukuru wa Juneteenth". Yongera ko kandi y'uko Trump "ari we mu perezida amaze gukorera ivyiza vyinshi abirabure gusumba abandi ba prezida bose". Ariko abajejwe imyiyamamazo ya Biden baneguye iyo ngingo, aho umuhanuzi wiwe mukuru, Kamau Marshall, yise Trump ko ari umunyamacakubiri. None ibindi vyabaye ni ibiki? Urupfu rwa Bwana Floyd mu kwezi guheze, umwirabure ata kirwanisho yari afise, inyuma y'aho umupolisi w'umuzungu amunize yamupfukamye kw'izosi muri Minneapolis, rwatumye haduka imyiyerekano yibukije kahise kabi ka Amerika karanzwe n'ivanguramoko rishingiye ku rukoba. Ejo ku wa gatatu, Bwana Trump yanditse ubutumwa bwiwe ku rubuga rwa Twitter ko amazina y'amakambi ya gisirikare yiswe amazina y'intwazangabo "ari kimwe mu murage Amerika yasigaranywe, kahise kerekana intsinzi n'ubwigenge". Mu nyuma niho Kayleigh McEnany ajejwe kumenyesha amakuru mu biro kwa perezida yamenyesha ko ukwiyumvira guhindura ayo mazina "ari indoto yo ku murango" ku bwa Perezida Trump. Ayo majambo ya Trump aje inyuma y'aho hari amakuru avuga ko abategetsi bakuru ba gisirikare bashigikiye iciyumviro c'uko ayo mazina yohindurwa, inyuma y'aho imyiyerekano yaturutse ku rupfu rwa George Floyd izuriye akaboze. Kuri benshi, ivyibutso vy'amaleta yiyunze ngo yiyonkore kuri Amerika vyerekana akahise kabi karanszwe n'ivanguramoko rishingiye ku rukoba. Ivyo vyibutso vyariziziwe n'abari mu myiyerekano inyuma y'urupfu rwa George Floyd. Mw'ijoro ry'ejo ku wa gatatu, icibutso ca Jefferson Davis, umukuru w'izo ntara zari ziyonkoye kuri Amerika carabomowe n'abari mu myiyerekano mu gisagara ca Richmond co mu ntara ya Virginia. Muri ako kanya nyene, abari mu myiyerekano mu gisagara kiri hafi yaho ca Portsmouth barateye inyubakwa irimwo ibishusho bine vyose vyerekana ivyibutso nk'ivyo, vyose barabibomora, nk'uko bivugwa n'ibinyamakuru vyo muri ako karere.

Malaria iterwa n'umubu ufise imigera yayo Malaria ni indwara ishobora kuvurwa igakira kandi ishobora kwirindwa, ariko ibandanya ihitana abantu batari bake: ishirahamwe rijejwe amagara y'abantu kw'isi, OMS, rivuga ko uko iminota ibiri iheze iyo ndwara yica umwana, abantu barenga imiliyoni 200 ku mwaka nabo bakayandura. Mu myaka icumi iheze, hakomeje guterwa intambwe mu kurwanya malaria, ariko kuva mu mwaka wa 2015, ibitigiri vyagumye hahandi. Icegeranyo c'ishirahamwe OMS kuri malaria kw'isi casohotse mu mwaka wa 2018, cerekana ko ibitigiri bitamanutse biboneka hagati y'imyaka ya 2015 na 2017. Malaria iravugwa igakira kandi ikirindwa Mu gihe igenekerezo rya 25 z'ukwezi kwa kane ari umunsi mpuzamakungu wahariwe kurwanya malaria, ng'ibi ivyo ukeneye kumenya kuri iyo ndwara: Ibimenyetso Kumeneka umutwe, kurura mu kanwa n'ukwumva imbeho ni vyo bimenyetso vya mbere vya malaria Ibimenyetso vya malaria ni - kumeneka umutwe, kurura mu kanwa n'ukwumva imbeho - akenshi bigatangura mu minsi 10 gushika 15 inyuma y'ukuribwa n'umubu utera malaria. Ivyo bimenyetso birashobora kwibonekeza ku rugero rudateye ubwoba, ku buryo bishobora kugorana kumenya ko ari malaria, ariko mu gihe umurwayi ativujije mu kiringo c'amasaha 14, malaria irashobora kumusinzikaza, mbere agashobora n'ukuhasiga ubuzima. Ni bande babangamirwa? Abana bari munsi y'imyaka itanu nibo bakarirwa cane Mu mwaka wa 2017, hafi igice c'abantu baba kw'isi bari mu ngorane z'ugushobora kwandura malaria. Abana bari munsi y'imyaka itanu nibo bakarirwa: mu mwaka wa 2017, ibice 61 kw'ijana (ibihumbi 266) vy'abahitanywe n'iyo ndwara bari abana. Iyindi mirwi, nk'abakenyezi bibungenze canke abantu bafise abasoda bake mu mubiri, iri mu mirwi ishobora kwandura. Ni ibihe bice vy'isi bibangamiwe? Abenshi mu bafatwa n'abahitanwa na malaria bava mu karere ka Afrika yo munsi y'ubugaragwa bwa Sahara Ibiharuro bitangwa na OMS vyerekana ko abenshi mu bafatwa n'abahitanwa n'iyo ndwara bava mu burere bwa Afrika yo musi y'ubugaragwa bwa Sahara. Ariko n'ibice vyo muri Aziya y'ubumanuko bushira ubuseruko, ubuseruko bw'ikiyaga Méditerranée, uburengero bw'ibahari Pacifique hamwe no mu bice vya Amerika, birashobora kubangamirwa na malaria. Mu mwaka wa 2017, ibihugu bitanu vyagize abantu bangana hafi igice c'abarwaye iyo ndwara kw'isi : Nigeria (25%), Republika y'Intwaro Rusangi ya Kongo (11%), Mozambike (5%), Ubuhindi (4%) hamwe na Uganda (4%). Ingene yandukira Imibu ifise imigera ya malaria irandukiza iyo ndwara Akenshi, malaria yandukira umuntu igihe ariwe n'umubu w'ingore witwa Anophèle - hari ubwoko burenga 400 bw'iyo mibu, muri bwo hafi 30 bukaba bushobora gutera malaria. Imibu yose itera malaria iryana hagati y'umugoroba n'ubucagucagu. Iyo mibu y'ingore ita amagi mu mazi, hakavamwo ibinyo arivyo bizovamwo imibu iyo bikuze; iyo mibu y'ingore rero irondera amaraso kugira ngo ishobore gukora amagi. Ingene twoyirinda Gukoresha umusegetera urimwo umuti ni bumwe mu buryo nyabwo bwo kwikingira malaria OMS isaba gukingira abantu bose bashobora kwandura malaria hakoreshejwe uburyo nyabwo. Uburyo bubiri bwo gukinga malaria - gukoresha umusegetera urimwo umuti be n'ugupompa mu mazu - nibwo buryo nyabwo. Kuryama mu musegetera urimwo umuti bishobora gutuma imibu idashikira umuntu. Ugupompa umuti wica imibu mu mazu y'uburaro n'izindi nyubakwa vyokorwa nka rimwe canke kabiri mu mwaka. Malaria irashobora kandi kwirindwa mu gufata neza imiti irwanya malaria ku bafata ingendo, abakenyezi bibungenze be n'abana. Gupima no kuvura malaria Kwipimisha n'ukwivuza hakiri kare bituma iyo ndwara ishobora kurwanywa Malaria irashobora kuvurwa kandi igakira - iyo malaria yiketswe ishobora gupimwa ikemezwa mu minota 30 canke munsi yayo hakoreshejwe ibipimo vy'ugupima imigera (hakoreshejwe ivyuma vyabigenewe canke mu buryo bunyaruka ). OMS ivuga ko iyo umuntu yipimishije kandi agafata imiti hakiri kare, bigabanya malaria, bikarinda impfu zitewe na malaria kandi bikagabanya ukwandukira kw'iyo ndwara. Umuti mwiza uriho - cane cane kuri malaria iterwa n'umugera P. falciparum - ushingiye kuri artemisinin uvanganijwe n'iyindi (ACT). Imigera irinda imiti yica imibu n'imiti ihabwa abarwaye Umuntu yokwama yipimisha kugira ngo barabe nimba imiti igifise inguvu y'ukurwanya malaria Ishirahamwe OMS riragabisha ko biboneka ko imibu y'ingore igenda irinda gusumba imiti yica imibu n'imiti y'abarwaye - ivyo bigasubiza inyuma utwigoro two kurwanya malaria. Ingorane ikaba ari uko ibikoreshwa mu kurwanya iyo ndwara bishobora gushika ahantu ntibibe bigikora. Ibiharuro biri mu cegeranyo giheruka gusohoka vyerekana ko mu bihugu 68, imibu yagiye irinda n'imiburiburi umwe mu bwoko bw'imiti itanu isanzwe ikoreshwa mu kurwanya imibu mu kiringo ca 2010-2017. Iyindi ngorane igenda igaruka ikaba ari imiti itagishobora kuvura malaria. OMS ivuga ko gukingira ubushobozi bw'imiti ari ngirakamaro mu kuvura n'ukurwanya iyo ndwara - igasaba ko hokwama ibikorwa vyo gucungera iyo ndwara mu bihugu yiziziye. Intumbero ikaba ari ukugira ngo mu gihe bibonetse ko umuti utagishoboye kuvura iyo ndwara, bimenyekane hakiri kare cane kugira ngo hatorwe inyishu ningoga kandi nyayo.

Mu mujyi iyo kipe ikomokamo mu majyepfo ya Bresil, abafana bateraniye kuri sitade kugirango berekane akababaro kabo. Umukuru w'ishyirahamwe ry'umupira w'amaguru ku isi Gianni Infantino n'umukinnyi w'icyamamare Pele bombi bavuze ko umupira w'amaguru uri mu kiriyo. Ikipe ya Chapecoense yari igiye muri Colombia gukina n'ikipe ya Atletico Nacional of Medellin. Abantu 75 bapfuye igihe indege barimo yagiriraga impanuka mu karere k'imisozi mu gihe ikirere kitari kimeze neza. Udusanduku tubika amakuru y'ukuntu indege igenda bita black blox twose twabonetse.

Mu 2008, Leta ya Amerika yashize al-Shabaab ku rutonde rw'imirwi y'iterabwoba. Mw'itangazo yasohoye, Africom imenyesha ko abandi bantu babiri bakomeretse. Umuhari Al-Shabaab wowo umenyesha ko muri ico gitero cabaye ku kirindiro citwa Simba wishe abasirikare ba Amerika 17 n'abandi ba Kenya icenda, iturira indege indwi n'imodoka za gisirikare zitanu. Ejo ku wa Mungu mu gaturuturu, abarwanyi b'umuhari ugendera ku vyiyumviro bikaze vy'idini rya Isilamu, Al-Shabaab, barateye ikirindiro kiri ahitwa Lamu gituwemwo ingabo za Amerika na Kenya. Mw'iryo tangazo, AFRICOM itangaza ko catangujwe n'igisasu c'ubwiyahuzi cakurikiwe n' amasasu y'inkoho ntonto. Africom ivuga ko abo barwanyi binjiye gatoya mw'ikambi yayo ariko ko ingabo za Kenya n' iza amerika zaciye zibasubiza inyuma. Ikinyakamuru Assiciated Press ca Amerika catangaje ko indege zibiri, kajugujugu zibiri n'amamodoka atari make yaturiwe muri ico gitero. Imbere y'aho, ingabo za Kenya zari zatangaje ko zatoye ibiziga bitanu vy'abo barwanyi. Umumenyeshamakuru w'ijwi rya Amerika yerekanye kuri Twitter amasanamu yariko akwiragizwa na Al-Shabaab binjiye mw'iyo kambi. Amerika imenyesha ko izobandanya ikurikirana abagize uruhara muri ico gitero hamwe na Al-Shabaab, barondera kugirira nabi Abanyamerika n'inyungu za Amerika. Africom iti: "Tuzobandanya kurwanya Al-Shabaab ntironke agahengwe ngo itegure ibitero ku Banyamerika, ku banyagihugu ba Afrika y'Ubuseruko hamwe no ku ncuti za Amerika". Abategetsi bakuru ba Al-Shabaab bariyemeje ko bazokwama bunze ubumwe n'umuhari al-Qaeda, bakaba bavugwa ko baronkejwe inyigisho muri uyo muhari, mbere bakaba baranarwanye muri Afghanistani. Mu 2008, Leta ya Amerika yashize al-Shabaab ku rutonde rw'imirwi y'iterabwoba. Itangazo rya AFRICOM rimenyesha ko Al-Shabaab yipfuza gukora ibitero ku butaka bwa Amerika be no ku banyamerika aho bari hose, ariko ko ibitero vya Amerika kuri uyo muhari bitawukundiye.

Agitu Gudeta yatanguye gukora iforomaji n'impene 15 inyuma yo guhungira mu Butaliano mu 2010 Umukozi aturuka muri Ghana yafashwe ku mvo zijanye no gusambanya uwo mugore ku nguvu no kumwica kubera ''amafaranga'', nk'uko bitangazwa n'itororokanirizo ry'amakuru ryo mu Butaliano Ansa. Nta buryo bwigenga buraboneka bwo guhinyuza iyi nkuru. Yari yahunze umugwa mukuru wa Ethiopia ,Addis Ababa, mu 2010 inyuma yo kuja mu myiyerekano yo kwiyamiriza ''ukunyaga amatongo'' kwarakaje abategetsi. Ubutaliano yabugize iwabo ahingura iforomaji y'impene n'ibikoresho vyo kwigira mwiza mw'iraro ryari ryarahebwe muri Trentino. Mu kiganiro yahaye itororokanirizo ry'amakuru Reuters mu 2018, Agitu yavuze ko yari yatanguye urudandazwa rwiwe n'impene 15. Yari ageze ku mpene 180 mu 2018 igihe yaba umuntu rurangiranwa. Bivugwa ko yagize ati: "Narubatse izina ryanje ndamenyekana, nta cambereye intambanyi".

Ikibanza c'akavunamusase Bearadise carahiye kirarangira Ivyo bisigarira vy'abantu vyatowe mu gisagara cahiye kirarangira ca Paradise, mu buraruko bwa leta ya Californie. Niburiburi abantu 228 baracabuzwe irengero, mu gihe umuriro waturutse mw'ikambi uguma utema utongora. Niburiburi amacumbi 7200 yarasambutse, ayandi 15500 akaba ageramiwe. Uwo muriro uramaze kwonona vyinshi kurusha uwigeze kwibasira Griffith Park mu 1933, wishe abantu 31. Avugira mu nama n'ibigo vy'itangazamakuru ku wa mbere ku mugoroba, umukuru w'igipolisi ca Butte County, Sheriff Kory Honea yemeje ico gitigiri c'abapfuye n'igitigiri gitangwa c'ababuzwe irengero. Umuriro wateye Londres haraheze imyaka 350 wariganywe Mu bumanuko bw'iyo leta, iyindi miriro y'ishamba igeramiye ubuzima n'amatungo. Umuriro Woolsey Fire umaze kwica abantu babiri, wonona n'amahoteli ari ku nkengera n'ayari i Malibu. Abanyagihugu barenga 300000 bo muri ako karere, vyabaye ngombwa ko bahunga ingo zabo, baja mu tundi duce. Perezida Donald Trump yavuze ko habaye "impanuka ikomeye" muri iyo leta, bituma abanyagihugu bahabwa imfashanyo ivuye muri leta nkuru y'igihugu. Abantu bapfuye gute? Igisagara ca Paradise n'imicungararo yaco nivyo vyibasiwe n'uwo muriro w'ikambi - umuriro mwinshi cane - watanguriye mw'ishamba riri hafi yaho, ku munsi wa kane. Bimwe mu biziga vyatowe mu miduga, aho abayigendesha baturiwe n'umuriro unyaruka bariko barahunga mw'ijoro. Hari abantu bahiriye mu miduga bariko bahunga mw'ijoro Sorrell Bobrink, aba mu gisagara ca Paradise, yashoboye guhunga n'umwana wiwe mu modoka, yabwiye BBC ko yavyuwe yongera aburigwa n'umugenzi. Benshi mu bantu 26000 baba mu gisagara ca Paradise barataye ingo zabo zasambutse Ivyo yabonye ngo ni nk'"isinema y'umuhero w'isi atari bwabone", yongera avuga ko atibutse ko ariko agendesha imodoka mw'ijoro nk'uwuja mu rupfu canke mu bukiriro, mu gihe mu kirere hari hasigaye hirabura. "Nacisha imodoka mu muriro - vyari bibishe kubona. Bwari ubwa mbere mbona ibintu bishisha nk'ivyo mu buzima," niko yabwiye igisata ca BBC Newsday. "Vyari biteye ubwoba, twarahahamutse igihe kirekire. Abo tubana barahahamutse - numva ntoraba ayo ma videwo kuko nabiciyemwo." Ishuli California Distinguished School naryo nyene ryaribasiwe n'uwo muriro Benshi mu bapfuye n'abatama hamwe n'abatamakazi canke abantu bari bafise ikibazo co kwiyunguruza, basanga bigoye kuva aho bari. Uretse abantu, igipolisi catoye n'ibisigarira vy'imbwa, igisirikare kikaba catunganije uburuhukiro mu miduga aho abantu baja kuraba ibisigarira vy'ababo. Bivugwa ko uwo muriro waturiye amahegitare 45000, ariko ukaba umaze kuzimwa ku bice 25%, nkuko bivugwa n'abo mu gisata co kugwanya umuriro. Kubera iki iyo miriro ari mibi cane? Mu mateka y'imiriro y'ishamba yo muri Californie, iyo miriro itangura mu ci igashika muri Nyakanga, ariko abahinga bakavuga ko ishobora gushika mu mpera z'umwaka. Abahinga n'ubutegetsi bavuga ko igwirirana ry'ino miriro rituruka no kw'ihindagurika ry'ibihe. Bulamatari wa leta ya Californie Jerry Brown yagize ati: "Bino si ibisanzwe bishasha, ni ibidasanzwe bishasha". Ibihumbi vy'abazimyamwoto bamwe bavuye mu duce dutandukanye twa Amerika, barungitswe gufasha kuzimya uwo muriro. Igitigiri c'abantu cari kimaze igihe kiguma ciyongera, mu duce kera tutagira abantu

Umwimbu wifashe neza mu ntara ya Kirundo, ahantu inzara yahora yomora abantu Iyo ntara ikunze kubamwo inzara ivuye kw'ibura ry'imvura, uyu mwaka ifise umwimbu mwinshi cane ku buryo nk'ibiciro vy'ibifungurwa bimwe bimwe vyagabanutse cane rwose. Kubera ko abanyagihugu bakunze guca babishora, mu mwaka ukurikira bagaca bicwa na kigoyi, harafashwe ingingo zitandukanye harimwo kubabikira uwo mwimbu mu bigega rusangi hamwe no kudapfa kubishora mu kaguriro. Cyriaque Muhawenayo yarishikiye mu Kirundo kuraba uko bavyifashemwo Ariko n'aho uwo mwimbu ari mwinshi, kenshi na kenshi iyo umwimbu ubonetse gutyo, bamwe mu banyagihugu barakunda kuwumarira mw'isoko, budakeye kabiri bagaterwa na kigoyi. Abajejwe intwaro ubu ico kibazo baracicariye, abanyagihugu bose bakaba bahimirizwa kuwubika mu bigega rusangi vyubatswe mu mazone yose ari mu ntara ya Kirundo. Abanyagihugu bahirimizwa kubika umwimbu wabo mu bigega rusangi Umuhanuzi wa Buramatari ajejwe ubutunzi n'iterambere, Mutabazi Alain Tribert, avuga ko bamaze kuvyijukira, mbere bakaba bamaze kubitsa amatoni atari make.

Inkofero ya Bobi Wine isanzwe yambarwa n'abanywanyi biwe ifatwa na leta ko ari iya gisirikare Bivugwa ko impapuro zari muri iyo ngoro zatwawe co kimwe n'inkofero ikoze nk'iya gisirikare hamwe n'ibirato vya gisirikare nyene. Na ya ma kamera afata amasanamu ya CCTV nayo nyene yatwawe. Bobi Wine avuga ko vyabaye ngombwa ko akinjura ku mvo z'umutekano wiwe. Umwe mu bahanuzi ba Bobi Wine yabwiye BBC ko abo bapolisi n'abasirikare baterekanye impapuro zibaha uruhusha igihe binjira muri iyo ngoro begeranya impapuro n'imyambaro. Umuvugizi w'igipolisi ca Uganda, Fred Enanga, yabwiye BBC ati: 'Turi mu gikorwa co kurwanya ikoreshwa ry'imyambaro ya gisirikare ikoreshwa mu buryo bunyuranye n'amategeko". Iki gikorwa camaze amasaha make, Bobi Wine akaba yagirije abajejwe umutekano ko bagiye batwaye imiliyoni zitandatu z'ibikumu yari yegeranije kugira ngo yemererwe kwitoreza ikibanza c'umukuru w'igihugu. Ibi bikumu ni nkenerwa kugira ngo umurwi ujejwe gutegura amatora umwemerere guhiganwa. Umuvugizi w'uyu murwi avuga ko igihe ntarengwa gitegekanijwe kurangira ku wa gatanu gishobora kwongerwa mu gihe abahiganwa bobisaba. Mu kwezi kw'icenda umwaka uheze, leta yaremeje ko inkofero itukura isa n'iyo Bobi Wine n'abanywanyi biwe bambara ari ivya gisirikare. Ibi bivuze ko umuntu uwo ari we wese ayitunze canke akayambara bidaciye mu mategeko ashobora gukurikiranwa. Bwana Enanga yavuze ko iki gikorwa kibandanya kandi ko abajejwe umutekano bazosaka no mu bundi burere harimwo n'ingoro z'umugambwe National Unity. Bobi Wine avuga ko abajejwe umutekano w'igihugu bamurwanya co kimwe n'umugambwe wiwe mu gihe ari mu myiteguro yo guhangana na Perezida Yoweri Museveni mu matora ategekanijwe mu mwaka uza wa 2021. Hagati aho, umuvugizi w'igipolisi ashimangira ko iki gikorwa ata sano gifitaniye na politike.

Aho Ubudagi bwaherukira gushika kure muri iryo higanwa rya Confederations Cup naho bwahejeje ari ubwa gatatu Lars Stindl niwe yinjije igori ry'iyo ntsinzi mu bakinyi b'imyaka iri munsi ya 21 mu gice ca mbere, inyuma y'ikosa rya Marcelo Diaz. Abakinyi ba Chili Arturo Vidal na Angelo Sagal bose bacishije umupira hejuru y'igori mu minota ya nyuma. Umukinyi w'Ubudagi Timo Werner yarakubiswe inkokora na Gonzalo Jara, agira Imana ahabwa ikarata y'umuhondo naho umuhagarikizi yari yifashishije uburyo bwa "video assistant referee (VAR). Intsinzi yo mu gihugu c'Uburusiya yashitsweko umugwi udafise abakinyi bose bari bafashije gutsinda Argentine i Rio mu myaka itatu iheze, aho bari babaye aba mbere. Umunyezamu Manuel Neuer, abakinyi bo hagati Mesut Ozil na Toni Kroos, n'uw'imbere Thomas Muller, ntibakinishijwe barindirijwe ihiganwa ry'igikombe c'isi yose mu mwaka uza.

Ikiza ca Ebola n'umutekano muke biri mu vyatumye hafatwa iyo ngingo Akanama kajejwe amatora (CENI) gasigura ko kafashe iyo ngingo kubera ikibazo c'umutekano muke hamwe n'ikiza ca Ebola. CENI yasohoye n'ikirangaminsi gishasha c'amatora. Ibitigiri mfatakibanza vy'amatora y'umukuru w'igihugu ategekanijwe itariki 30 Ukwezi kwa 12, bizotangwa itariki 6 Ukwezi kwa Mbere, ibitigiri ntabanduka bitangwe itariki 15 z'Ukwezi kwa Mbere. Umukuru w'igihugu mushasha azorahizwa itariki 18 z'Ukwezi kwa mbere. Abasesenguzi mu vya politike baribaza ico amatora yo mu kwezi kwa Gatatu azoba amaze, mu gihe amatora nyamukuru azoba yarangiye mu kwezi kwa Mbere.

Ibihimba vya ba nyamweru bikoreshwa n'abapfumu muri Tanzania mu gukora imiti bivugwa ko itera amahirwe Igipolisi kivuga ko bamwe muri abo bafashwe basanganywe insato z'ibikoko hamwe n'imiti. Leta iriko irihweza kuronsa ba nyamweru udukoresho two guhamagaza ababatabara bashobora kwambara ku kuboko. Ishirahamwe mpuzamakungu ONU rivuga ko ba nyamweru bashika mirongo indwi na batandatu bamaze kwicwa muri Tanzania mu myaka cumi n'itanu iheze. Bivugwa ko ibice vy'imibiri yabo bitera amahirwe, bigakoreshwa n'abapfumu. Mu gihugu kibanyi ca Malawi, igipolisi caho kivuga ko cafashe umugabo yagirizwa gushaka kwica umunyamweru.

Ingabo zijejwe umutekano w'igihugu (National Guard) ku ngoro y'amakoraniro Capitol ya Amerika Ingabo zijejwe umutekano w'igihugu (National Guard) zarungitswe ku bwinshi kugira ngo batuze imigumuko isa n'iyo mu ndwi iheze ishobora kwaduka. Ikigo kijejwe igendereza mu gihugu, FBI, kiragabisha ko hashobora kuba imyiyerekano y'abanywanyi ba Trump irimwo abitwaje ibirwanisho mu ngoro z'amakoraniro mu mareta yose 50. Hagati aho, abakorana na Biden bafise integuro zo guhindura ingingo zikomeye zafashwe n'ubutegetsi bwa Trump. Ibinyamakuru vya Amerika vyaronse urwandiko ruvuga ko haciye amasaha make gusa ashitse muri Maison Blanche/White House, azoca atangura gufata ingingo zo kwerekana ko ubutegetsi bw'uwo asubiriye burangiye burundu. Zimwe mu ngingo yiteze gufata: Igisagara hafi cose ca Washington DC kizokwugarwa imbere y'ibikorwa vyo kurahira bitegekanijwe ku wa gatatu, mu gihe ibihumbi n'ibihumbi vy'ingabo zijejwe umutekano w'igihugu zarungitsweyo. Amabarabara atari make aja kuri Capitol, ahabereye ya migumuko yahitana ubuzima bw'abantu, arazibiye. Abakora mu biro kwa Biden bari bamaze gusaba abanyamerika kwirinda kuja ku mugwa mukuru w'igihugu mu birori vyo kurahira kubera ikiza ca Covid-19. Abategetsi b'akarere basaba bantu kuzokurikirana ibi birori bari kure. Vyitezwe ko uyu musi wa Mungu uba umusi udasanzwe ku bategura imyiyerekano, inyuma y'aho abanywanyi ba Trump hamwe n'imbuga ngurukanabumenyi z'imirwi y'intagondwa z'abazundu zihamagariye imyiyerekano izoba irimwo n'inkoho kuri uyu musi. Hagati aho, hari imirwi imwe imwe yabwiye abantu bayo ko batokwitabira iyi migumuko, ikavuga ko abajejwe umutekano barikanuye cane, abandi nabo bakavuga ko iyi ari imitego batezwe n'igiporisi. Ejo ku wa gatandatu, igiporisi ca Capitol cavuze ko hari umugabo akomoka muri Virginia yari yitwaje ikirwanisho yahagaritswe kuri bariyeri ku wa gatanu, afise n'imiburiburi inkoho imwe n'amasasu 509. Ariko uyo mugabo azwi kw'izina rya Wesley Allen Beeler yahavuye arekurwa, akaba yabwiye ikinyamakuru Washington Post ko ata ntumbero yari afise yo kwinjiza ikirwanisho i Washington, aho avuga ko yahoze akora mw'ikompanyi yigenga icungera umutekano. Ati: Vyabaye ngombwa ko nishikana kuri iyo bariyeri mbonye ko natakaye kubera mva ruguru. Naraberetse ikarata inyemerera kwitabira ibirori vyo kurahira nari nahawe". Amabariyeri ariko arubakwa ku ngoro y'amakoraniro ya Amerika imbere y'ibirori vyo kurahira kwa Joe Biden na Kamala Harris ku wa 20 z'uku kwa mbere Izi ngingo ruhasha zo gucungera umutekano zafashwe inyuma y'aho muri ino ndwi Perezida Donald Trump abogorejwe ku ncuro ya kabiri, ibitari bwigere bibaho mu mateka ya Amerika. Ubu arindiriye gucirirwa urubanza n'inama nkenguzamateka, ku birego vy'uko "yakokeje imigumuko", inyuma y'akaguma kabaye kuri Capitol gatewe n'imirwi y'abanywanyi biwe. Bakoze ivyo bafise intumbero yo kubuza ibikorwa vy'inama nshingamateka na nkenguzamateka vyo kwemeza intsinzi ya Joe Biden mu matora y'umukuru w'igihugu aheruka. Hari abatari bake bamaze guhagarikwa kubera ico gitero cakozwe kuri Capitol. Ingene amareta atandukanye ariko aritegura Amareta mu gihugu cose ariko arafata ingingo zitandukanye zo kwicungera, haba mu kuzibira amadirisha y'ingoro z'amakoraniro canke mu kudatanga impusha z'amakoraniro. Ba buramatari ba Maryland, New Mexico na Utah bose batangaje amategeko yo mu bihe bidasanzwe bikeka ko hashobora kuba imigumuko ku ngoro zayo z'amakoraniro. California, Pennsylvania, Michigan, Virginia, Washington hamwe na Wisconsin ni zimwe mu zagomoye ingabo zijejwe umutekano w'igihugu, mu gihe Texas yoyo yugaye ingoro y'amakoraniro yayo kuva ejo ku wa gatandatu gushika inyuma y'ibirori vyo kwimikwa. Ku ngoro y'amakoraniro ya Michigan iri i Lansing hubatswe uruzitiro rw'imetero zibiri Nk'uko bivugwa n'uwurongoye igisata kijejwe umutekano muri Texas, amakuru atangwa n'igisata kijejwe igendereza avuga ko "intagondwa" zishobora kwitera mu myiyerekano itegekanijwe kugira ngo "bakore ibikorwa vy'ubugizi bwa nabi". Mu kiganiro yagiranye n'abanyamakuru ku wa kane, Buramatari wa Reta ya Virginia, Ralph Northam, yavuze ati: "Nimba utegura kuza hano canke gushika i Washington ufise intumbero mbi mu mutima wawe, vyokubera vyiza usubiye inyuma ubu nyene ugataha muhira. Nta kibanza ufise hano, kandi nta kibanza ufise ku mugwa mukuru w'igihugu cacu. Wihenze ugashika ng'aha hakagira ico ukora, Virginia izoba iri magabo". Abihweza ibintu n'ibindi babona ko amareta yabaye ikiririmbiro mu matora ashobora kubamwo imigumuko. Imwe muri zo ni Michigan, bikaba vyabaye ngombwa ko yubaka uruzitiro rw'imetero hafi zibiri ku ngoro yayo iri ahitwa Lansing. Ku wa gatanu, umukuru w'igiporisi muri iyo reta, Joe Gasper, yavuze ati: "Turiteguriye ikintu kibi ico ari co cose coshika, ariko tubandanya twizera ko abazoshaka gukora imyiyerekano ku ngoro y'amakoraniro yacu bazoyikora mu mutekano". Yongerako y'uko gushika n'imiburiburi hagati mu kwa kabiri, iyi nyubakwa izokwongererezwa abaporisi. Mu kw'icumi, abagabo batandatu barafashwe bagirizwa ko bariko barategura kunyuruza buramatari w'iyo reta, Gretchen Whitmer, wo mu mugambwe w'abaharanira Demokarasi. Uyo murwi wategura kwegeranya "abagabo 200" kugira batere ibiro vy'iyo reta maze banyuruze abantu, nk'uko abajejwe igendereza babivuze. Mu bindi vyabaye ejo ku wa gatandatu, urubuga rwa Facebook rwatangaje ko ruzohagarika vy'agateganyo amatangazo yamamaza ibikoresho vy'inkoho hamwe n'ibindi bikoresho vya gisirikare muri Amerika. Ruvuga ko rwamaze guhagarika amatangazo yamamaza inkoho n'amasasu, ibi bikavugwa n'umuvugizi wa Facebook, Liz Bourgeois. Iyi ngingo ifashwe inyuma y'aho abakenguzamateka batatu n'abashikirizamanza bane basabiye Facebook "kwirinda gushira imbere inyungu zayo ha gushira imbere inyungu z'igihugu".

Ku munota w'umunani, Nicolas Pepe yatsinze igitsindo ca mbere ca Arsenal Muri urwo rukino, Manchester United, yatanguye neza, ariko ibintu bikaba vyaje guhinduka mu nyuma kuva ku munota w'umunani, aho Nicolas Pepe yatsinda igitsindo ca mbere ca Arsenal ku mupira yari ahawe na Sead Kolasinac. Igice ca mbere cagiye kurangira biboneka ko Arsenal ariyo yiganziye cane umupira, ifise ibitsindo bibiri ku busa bwa Man U, kuko ku munota wa 42 , Sokratis Papastathopoulos yatsinze igitsindo ku mupira wari utewe na Pepe mu mfuruka z'ikibuga. Arsenal yari imaze gukinira ku kibuga cayo inkino indwi zose ariko ata na rumwe ishobora gutsinda, aho vyaboneka ko yari ifise ingorane. Kuva Arteta afashe uwo murwi mu minwe, biraboneka ko hari icahindutse kuva mu nkino zitatu amaze gukinisha, zibiri zose adashobora gutsinda, ivyatuma hari abibaza nimba koko ariwe mumenyereza yari akwiriye kumenyereza Arsenal. Ku munsi wa Mungu uheze, Arsenal yatsindiwe ku kibuga cayo n'umurwi wa Chelsea, mu rukino abatari bake babona ko yari gushobora gutsinda. Mu nkino zibiri z'imbere y'aho, yanganije n'imirwi ya Everton hamwe na Bournemouth, ariko mu rukino rwa Everton akaba yari umurorerezi gusa. Mu rukino rwa nijoro abakinyi ba Arsenal baraboneka ko bari bashashaye intsinzi imbere y'umurwi wa Manchester United. Eka na Mezut Ozil yari agize iminsi atavyifatamwo neza yakinye n'ishaka ridasanzwe, akaba mbere ariwe yagize ibirometero vyinshi gusumba abandi bakinyi ba Arsenal muri urwo rukino, aho yagize ibirometero 11.54. Mikel Arteta yashimiye abafana urukino rurangiye kubona babandanije batera intege Arsenal Mi gice ca kabiri ibintu ntivyoroshe kuri Arsenal kuko abakinyi ba Ole Gunnar Solskjær basatiriye bimwe biteye ubwoba Arsenal, ariko baravyifashemwo neza cane ntivyabagendera nk'ibiheruka igihe Chelsea ibakubita ibitsindo bibiri vyose mu minota indwi ya nyuma. Manchester United yakinye ibuze umukinyi wayo ruremesha Paul Pogba, aboneka ko atorohewe kubera imvune imutumye amara amezi atatu yose adatanguzwa mu kibuga. Urwo rukino ruheze, umumenyereza wa Manchester United yamenyesheje ko uyo mukinyi akomoka mu Bufaransa yakomeretse ku jisho ry'ikirenge bigashobora kumutuma amara ikiringo c'indwi hagati ya zitatu na zine adahonyoye mu kibuga. Kuva mu mwaka wa 2017 inyuma y'imyaka ishika 20, Arsenal ntirigera isubira kurangiza ihiganwa iri muri zine za mbere, bikayituma idashobora gukina mw'ihiganwa ry'imirwi yabaye iya mbere i Bulaya (Uefa Champions League). Ibizigizi abakunzi bayo bari bafise mw'ihiganwa ry'umwaka uheze vyaje kuvamwo amarira aho mu rukino rwa nyuma rwa Europa League batsindiwe bikomeye na Chelsea 4-0. Uko gutsindwa kwarababaje cane abakunzi ba Arsenal kuko iyo ikaramuka itsinze urwo rukino iba iri muri Champions League. Mu gihe hasigaye inkino 17 ngo ihiganwa ry'Ubwongereza rirangire, Arsenal izoshobora kurangiza iri muri zine za mbere mu gihe ubu iri mu kibanza ca cumi n'amanota 27 gusa?

Neymar w'imyaka 26 yabazwe ukuguru mu kwezi kwa gatatu n'umuganga w'umugwi nserukiragihugu wa Brezil, yavuze ko atazosubira gukora ku mupira mu kiringo c'amezi atatu. Abakinyi bane bo mu mugwi wa Manchester City, Ederson, Danilo, Fernandinho na Gabriel Jesus ni bamwe mu bakinyi bakina mw'ihiganwa ryo mu Bwongereza bari kuri kuri urwo rutonde. Abandi ni umukinyi w'imbere wa Liverpool Roberto Firmino hamwe n'umukinyi wa Chelsea Willian. Neymar yiteze gusubira gukina mu gikombe c'isi Umukinyi w'inyuma mu ruhande rw'iburyo muri PSG Dani Alves ntazoja muri izo nkino inyuma kubabara kw'ivi mu ndwi iheze. Brezil bari mu mugwi E, bakaba bari kumwe na Costa Rica, Serbia n'Ubuswisse, urukino rwabo rwa mbere rukazoba ku musi w'Imana itariki 17 z'ukwezi kwa gatandatu. Neymar ni we mukinyi amaze kugurwa amahera menshi cane kw'isi Abakinyi ba Brezil Abanyezamu: Alisson (Roma), Ederson (Manchester City), Cassio (Corinthians). Abakinyi b'inyuma: Danilo (Manchester City), Fagner (Corinthians), Marcelo (Real Madrid), Filipe Luis (Atletico Madrid), Thiago Silva, Marquinhos (both PSG), Miranda (Inter Milan), Pedro Geromel (Gremio). Abakinyi bo hagati : Casemiro (Real Madrid), Fernandinho (Manchester City), Paulinho (Barcelona), Fred (Shakhtar Donetsk), Renato Augusto (Beijing Guoan), Philippe Coutinho (Barcelona), Willian (Chelsea), Douglas Costa (Juventus). Abikinyi b'imbere: Neymar (PSG), Taison (Shakhtar Donetsk), Gabriel Jesus (Manchester City), Roberto Firmino (Liverpool).

Perezida w'Uburundi Pierre Nkurunziza Kuva amenyesheje ko agiye kwitoza, abantu baharurwa mu majana baramaze gupfa bazira impari za politike. Kofi Annan avuga ko perezida Nkurunziza aterekana ko yifuza ibiganiro Bwana Annan yavuze ko perezida Nkurunziza ata kimenyetso yerekana ko azokwemera ibiganiro vy'ukuri. Uwahoze ari umunyamabanga mukuru w'ishirahamwe mpuzamakungu ONU yasabiye kandi umugabane wa Afrika infashanyo y'amafaranga, cane cane igihugu ca Ethiopia, cugarijwe n'uruzuba. Yavuze ko Afrika isa n'iyibagiwe kubera amaso y'amakungu ari kuri Syria n'Uburasirazuba bwo hagati.

Guta ubwenge mu gihe kirekire akenshi biterwa no gukomereka mu bwonko Yitwa Munira Abdulla, akaba yari afite imyaka 32 y'amavuko ubwo yakoraga impanuka. Yakomeretse bikomeye mu bwonko ubwo imodoka yari arimo yagonganaga na bisi mu nzira avuye kuvana umuhungu we ku ishuri. Uyu mwana we Omar Webair wari ufite imyaka ine y'amavuko, yari yicaranye na nyina mu ntebe z'inyuma mu modoka, we akaba ntacyo yabaye kuko nyina yahise amubumbatira mu maboko. Madamu Abdulla - wari utwawe na muramu we - yarakomeretse bikomeye ajya muri coma, umwaka ushize akaba ari bwo yatangiye kuva muri coma mu bitaro byo mu Budage. Umuhungu we Omar yatangarije ikinyamakuru The National cyo muri UAE iby'ubuzima bwa nyina n'uko ubu amerewe nyuma y'imyaka avurwa. 'Yarambumbatiye arandengera' Ku wa mbere, Omar yabwiye icyo kinyamakuru ati: "Sinigeze mutererana kuko nahoraga ntekereza ko umunsi umwe azakanguka". "Impamvu ntangaje ibi ni ukugira ngo abantu ntibagate icyizere cyo kubaho, ntibakumve ko bapfuye mu gihe bageze hariya". Yongeyeho ati: "Mama twari twicaranye inyuma. Abonye impanuka ije ambumbatira mu maboko ye andengera ngo ntakomereka". Omar ntacyo yabaye uretse agasebe yagize ku mutwe, ariko nyina wari wakomeretse bikomeye yamaze amasaha ataravurwa. Uyu mugore yaje kuvurirwa mu gihugu cyabo, nyuma yoherezwa mu bitaro i London mu Bwongereza, aza gusubizwa iwabo akorerwa ubuvuzi bunyuranye ngo akomeze guhumeka nubwo yari muri coma. Yakangutse ahamagara umwana we Mu mwaka wa 2017, yoherejwe mu bitaro byo mu Budage abagwa ibice by'umubiri ngo bimere neza ndetse ahabwa imiti yatuma yoroherwa kandi agakanguka. Mu mwaka ushize wa 2018, umuhungu we Omar hari umunsi yashyamiranye n'abo kwa muganga ari mu cyumba nyina arwariyemo. Icyo gihe ngo nyina yahise atangira kugaragaza ibimenyetso ko ari kumva ndetse atangira gushaka kuvuga. Omar yagize ati: "Nuko hashize iminsi itatu, nakanguwe no kumva umuntu ari kumpamagara". "Yari mama! Yarimo ahamagara izina ryanjye, numva ndi nko kuguruka kubera ibyishimo. Imyaka yose yari ishize ndota izi nzozi, izina ryanjye ni ryo jambo rya mbere yavuze". Nyuma y'imyaka 27 uyu mugore yagarutse ibuntu, yasubiye iwabo aho akivurwa cyane cyane ibijyanye no kurambura umubiri we, ubu kandi abasha kuganira byoroheje.

Nicole reflects on her experience with premature menopause since she was diagnosed more than ten years ago. Hari haciye imyaka ubutinyanka butaza ku bwinshi, ariko igihe ndabibwiriye abavuzi mu gihugu canje ca Nouvelle Zélande, bansiguriye ko bituruka ku binini (pilules) naza ndafata. Igihe ukwezi kurangiriye nkabona singiye mu butinyanka, nagiye kuraba muganga nezerewe nzi ko nasamye imbanyi. Nari maze umwaka nubatse urwanje, kandi twama tuvugana n'umugabo ivyo kurondera umwana. Ico gihe bapima baraba ko nibungenze, basanze atarivyo. Umuganga yaciye ampima amaraso munyuma ansaba kugaruka uwundi munsi, aho yambwiye ko urugero rw'imisemburo y'umubiri ("hormones") wanje rutameze neza. Naciye ndungikwa kuraba umuhinga w'ama "hormones" asanga naciye imvyaro imbere y'igihe. Sinibaza ukuntu udusaho tw'amagi ("ovaires") tutashobora kuba tugikora kuri iyo myaka, naguye mu gahundwe. Nicole umunsi w'ubugeni Nibaza ko abahinga bakwiye kuja baraburira abantu ku bijanye no gushobora canke kudashobora kuvyara. Igihe bivugwa ko ubushobozi bw'umugore bwo kuvyara burangira inyuma y'imyaka 50, biroroshe kutamenya ko hashobora kwaduka ingorane imbere y'ico gihe. Sinarinzi ko ubushobozi bwo kurondoka bw'umugore butangura kugabanuka ku myaka 30. Twafashe ingingo yo gukoresha uburyo bwo guhuriza amagi hanze "in vitro fertilization", inyuma yaho umugenzi yemeye kuduha igi ryiwe. Twari dufise icizere tuzi ko turonse inyishu y'ikibazo cacu ariko navyo nyene ntivyakunda. Inyuma y'umwaka uwundi mugenzi yaremeye kudufasha, ariko ngumana amakenga menshi. Twagerageje kabiri ubwo buryo ariko biranka ko imbanyi ifata, munyuma tubura uburyo n'inguvu zo kugerageza ubugira gatatu. Sinashobora kwiyumvira kurondera umwana wo kurera. Ico ciyumviro camvuyemwo igihe ijoro rimwe mpuye n'umugenzi afise uruyoya aheruka kwibaruka, iciyumviro co kurondera uwo ndera caciye kigenda. Ménopause ni iki? Ménopause ni igihe umugore ageramwo, agatangura kutaja mu butinyanka. Imbere yuko ico gihe ca Ménopause gishika, ubutinyanka buragabanuka ku mezi canke imyaka. Ibindi bimenyetso ni kwumva ubushuhe, ukudatekanigwa mu mirimo, ukumeneka umutwe, ukutipfuza kurangura amabanga mpuzabitsina, agashavu no kudatora itiro. Ménopause ishika hagati y'imyaka 45 na 55. Umwe ku bagore 100 bari munsi y'imyaka 40 niwe aca imvyaro hataragera. Nicole n'umugabo baragerageje kurondera umwana biranka Bisa naho abaganga benshi batazi ibijanye no guca imvyaro igihe kitaragera. Naravuganye n'abagore benshi bavuga ko ubutinyanka bwabo butakiza ku gihe, iyo babishikirije abaganga, babasaba kuja kwitura abahinga. Kuva igihe batoye ko "ménopause" yanyinjiranye naciye ntangura kuja ku miti yo guhindura "hormones". Ndashima iyo miti kuko naho ngeze mu myaka 40 biragoye kuvuga ko wafashwe n'ivyo bihe vyo gushuha, vyo kutiyumba neza, hamwe n'agapfungu ko mu mutwe kazanwa na "ménopause". Usanga bigoye kuvuga ibintu nka mwenivyo. Kutama ugura ibikoresho vy'isuku kira kwezi bifise akarusho, ariko vyamfashe igihe ngo menye iciza cavyo. Kubona ububasha bwo gushobora kurondonka bumpagarana giturumbuka vyarambabaje, ariko vyatumye menya ko umunezero nya munezero uri mu kugira amagara meza, mu buto n'uko vyose vyama bigenda neza. Ivyo twaciyemwo vy'ubugumba vyaradukozeko, bituma dutangura ubuzima bushasha, ariko biradukomeza umwumwe ku giti ciwe na ka muryango. Vyaduhaye ivyigwa, bituma twiga kwirengera, twiyumvira imihezagiro twaronse, bituma twitaho abandi no guhangana n'ubuzima twiyuguruye. Dushobora kuba tudafise vyose, ariko turafise ivyo dukeneye vyose.

ONU ivuga ko buri munota hakomereka umunyasiriya umwe mu masaha 48 ashize Ashikiriza ijambo mu kanama ka Onu kajejwe umutekano kw'isi ku ntambwe ibiganiro vy'amahoro biteyeko, Staffan de Mistura yavuze ko agahengwe kemeranijwe mu kwezi kwa kabiri " kakiriho bidafashe". Intambara muri Syria yarongerekanye muri iyi misi ya vuba, n'aho hasanzwe hari amasezerano yo kuyihagarika. Abantu boba bashika 20 boba barishwe kuri uyu wa Gatatu bahitanywe n'ibitero vy'indege za reta ku bitaro no mu mazu abantu babamwo avyevyegereye mu buseruko bwa Alepp. Muri abo bapfuye harimwo abana hamwe n'umuganga umwe rukumbi yari asigaye avura ingwara z'abana muri ico gice c'igisagara kiri mu minwe y'abarwanya reta, nk'uko abanyagihugu bari ku rugamba ku gushaka kwabo babimenyesheje itororokanirizo ry'amakuru rya AFP. Ukwongerekana kw'imigwino muri ico gisagara kinini ca Syria gushitse mu gihe hari inkuru zivuga ko ingabo za reta zishigikiwe n'izo Uburusiya, biteguriye gukora ibindi bitero bikomeye.

Igiporisi kivuga ko aba bagore batatu bahagaritswe ejo ku wa mbere kubera batutse abaporisi Igiporisi kivuga ko aba bagore batatu bahagaritswe ejo ku wa mbere inyuma y'imyiyerekano yabereye ku nyubakwa ya reta ku mugwa mukuru Harare. Itangazo ryasohowe n'igiporisi rivuga riti: "Igiporisi ca Zimbabwe kiremeza ipfungwa rya Joanna Mamombe [umushingamateka], Netsai Marova na Cecilia Chimbiri i Harare inyuma y'imyiyerekano hanze y'inyubakwa nshasha ya reta". "Aba bagore batatu bari mu modoka yo mu bwoko bwa Toyota itari ifise imparati bagiye bakurikira imodoka y'igiporisi yarimwo abaporisi bari bagiye gukurikirana iyo myiyerekano, bagenda barabatuka, ivyatumye bahagarikwa". Mu kwa gatandatu kw'umwaka uheze, aba bagore, bose abanywanyi b'uumgambwe Movement for Democratic Change (MDC), bari bahagaritswe, inyuma yo kubesha ko baborejwe igufa mu gasho. Bavuze ko ingabo z'igihugu zabanyuruje zibakuye mu minwe y'igiporisi, zirabakubita zongera zibafata ku nguvu, maze zibategeka umwe umwe kunywa amasobe ya mugenziwe. Igiporisi carahakanye ibi birego, ariko abahinga ba ONU basavye ko ubutungane bwokurikirana "abakoze iki caha c'agahomerabunwa". MDC yanditse ku rubuga rwa Twitter ko iri hagarikwa ryerekana ko reta yakajije umurego "mu ntambara yo kurwanya abatavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi". Hagati aho, reta y'Ubwongereza itangaza ko yafatiye ibihano abategetsi bane b'urwego rw'umutekano ba Zimbabwe, ikabagiriza guhonyanga agateka ka zina muntu, harimwo kwica abari mu myiyerekano. Umushikiranganji w'umutekano, Owen Ncube, hamwe n'abarongoye igiporisi, urwego rw'igendereza hamwe n'uwahoze ari umukuru w'ingabo zijejwe gucungera umutekano w'umukuru w'igihugu, bagiye guhagarikirwa amatungo yabo ari mu Bwongereza. Ntibemerewe kandi no kwinjira muri ico gihugu. Ubwongereza bwagiriza aba bantu kugandagura abari mu myiyerekano yabaye inyuma y'amatora yo mu 2018, hamwe n'imigumuko yadutse mu mwaka wakurikiye. Mu butumwa yacishije ku rubuga rwa Twitter, umuvugizi wa reta ya Zimbabwe, Nick Mangwana, yavuze ko ata n'umwe muri aba bategetsi bafatiwe ibihano amatungo mu Bwongereza canke yari afise umugambi wo gufata urugendo aja muri iki gihugu.

Hashize imyaka itanu abagizweho ingaruka n'umubano mubi bahora bahanze amaso ko abategetsi bongera kubana neza, nabo ubuzima bwabo bugasubira uko bwahoze Onesphore Sematumba, umusesenguzi wa politi yo mu karere k'ibiyaga bigari wo mu ishyirahamwe International Crisis Group, avuga ko hari dipolomasi y'ibanga iba iri gukorwa bashaka uko umubano waba mwiza Ijambo riheruka kuvugwa na Perezida mushya Evariste Ndayishimiye, ko u Burundi "butazagirana imigenderanire n'igihugu gikoresha uburyarya", ryatumye hari abongera kwibaza aho ibintu bigana. Vincent Biruta ushinzwe ububanyi n'amahanga bw'u Rwanda yavuze ko mu byo perezida mushya w'u Burundi yavuze u Rwanda rwabibonyemo "kudashaka umubano". Bwana Sematumba avuga ko abantu badakwiye kwitega impinduka z'ako kanya ku mutegetsi mushya w'u Burundi, ariko ko nawe azi kandi yavuze ko kubana nabi n'abaturanyi bitakomeza. Yabwiye BBC ati: "Perezida mushya ni umwe mu bategetsi bakuru ba CNDD-FDD, mbere yo kuba perezida yari umunyamabanga mukuru wa CNDD-FDD, ni ukuvuga ngo ntabwo yaje ahindura ibintu ngo akore politiki zisa n'izisebya 'system' yariho yose." Bwana Sematumba avuga ko "mu ijambo rikomeye Ndayishimiye yavuze atigeze avuga igihugu cy'u Rwanda mu magambo", ariko ko yaciye amarenga. Ati: "[Urebye]... yavuze ko hari ibintu bitaganirwaho; 'niba mushaka ko tugenderana mubanze muduhereze bariya bantu bavugwa mu mugambi wa coup ya 2015 noneho turebe uko twaganira'". "Ni ijambo ryakomeje kuvugwa muri politiki y'u Burundi kuva nyine mu 2015, perezida mushyashya [rero] ari mu murongo usanzwe wa 'discours' politiki y'u Burundi yo kuvuga ngo 'yego tuzaganira n'abaturanyi ariko hari umurongo utukura tutarenga'". None amaherezo ni ayahe? Mu myaka itanu ishize, nubwo imipaka hagati y'ibihugu byombi itafunzwe kubera iki kibazo, ariko umubano mubi w'ubutegetsi bwombi wazambije bigaragara ubuhahirane, n'imigenderanire hagati y'Abarundi n'Abanyarwanda, bahujwe na byinshi bagatandukanywa urebye n'uruzi rw'Akanyaru gusa. Ibi byagize ingaruka mbi ku buzima bw'imiryango ibihumbi y'abantu bari batunzwe n'ibikorwa byambukiranya Akanyaru, aba bahora bahanze amaso ko abategetsi bongera kubana neza, nabo ubuzima bwabo bugasubira uko bwahoze. Bwana Sematumba avuga ko nubwo mu biboneka ari nkaho nta biganiro bibaho byo kuzahura umubano w'ubutegetsi bwombi, ariko ngo hari ibikorwa. Ati: "Ahubwo hari intambwe zindi zikorwa muri dipolomasi, twakwita dipolimasi y'ibanga, buriya baravugana ku nzego wenda zo hasi, za gisirikare, hari abantu bakora kugira ngo uriya mubano ube mwiza. "Icyo tuvuga, kandi na perezida Ndayishimiye nawe azi neza - kandi yarabivuze - [ni uko] iriya politiki y'ubwigunge yo kubana nabi n'abaturanyi ntabwo yayikomeza manda yose y'imyaka irindwi."

Biteganyijwe ko Lisa Montgomery ahabwa igihano cy'urupfu ku itariki ya 8 y'ukwezi kwa cumi na kabiri Mu mwaka wa 2004, Lisa Montgomery yishe anize umugore utwite wo muri leta ya Missouri, amusatura inda ashimuta umwana we. Biteganyijwe ko Montgomery, w'imyaka 52, aterwa urushinge rw'ingusho ku itariki ya 8 y'ukwezi kwa cumi na kabiri. Umugore waherukaga guhabwa igihano cy'urupfu agihawe na leta y'Amerika ni Bonnie Heady. Yapfiriye mu cyumba cyashyizwemo umwuka w'uburozi muri leta ya Missouri mu mwaka wa 1953, nkuko bitangazwa n'ikigo cyo muri Amerika gikusanya amakuru ajyanye n'igihano cy'urupfu, Death Penalty Information Center. Igihano cy'urupfu kuri Brandon Bernard wafatanyije n'abandi mu mwaka wa 1999 kwica abavugabutumwa babiri, nacyo giteganyijwe gutangwa mu kwezi kwa 12. Umushinjacyaha mukuru w'Amerika William Barr yavuze ko ibyo byaha byari "ubwicanyi burimo ubugome budasanzwe". Mu mwaka ushize, ubutegetsi bwa Perezida Donald Trump bwavuze ko bugiye gusubukura gutanga ibihano by'urupfu ku rwego rwa za leta. Lisa Montgomery ni nde? Mu kwezi kwa cumi na kabiri mu mwaka wa 2004, Montgomery yatwaye imodoka ava muri leta ya Kansas ajya mu rugo rwa Bobbie Jo Stinnett, muri leta ya Missouri, bivugwa ko agiye kugura ikibwana cy'imbwa, nkuko itangazo ry'ibiro by'ubutabera by'Amerika ribivuga. Iryo tangazo rigira riti: "Amaze kugera imbere mu rugo, Montgomery yibasiye Stinnett - wari utwite inda y'amezi umunani - aramuniga kugeza ataye ubwenge". Ryongeraho riti: "Akoresheje icyuma cyo mu gikoni, Montgomery yahise agitera mu nda ya Stinnett, bituma yongera kugarura ubwenge". "Hakurikiyeho kugundagurana, nuko Montgomery aniga Stinnett kugeza apfuye. Montgomery yahise akura umwana mu mubiri wa Stinnett, uwo mwana aramutwara, ndetse agerageza kujijisha ko ari uwe bwite". Mu mwaka wa 2007, inteko y'abacamanza yasanze ko Montgomery ahamwa n'icyaha cyo gushimuta cyo ku rwego rwa leta cyavuyemo urupfu. Nuko iyo nteko - nta n'umwe uvuyemo - imukatira igihano cy'urupfu. Ariko abanyamategeko ba Montgomery bavuga ko akiri umwana yagize kwangirika k'ubwonko kubera gukubitwa, ndetse ko atameze neza mu mutwe, ko rero adakwiye guhabwa igihano cy'urupfu.

Irani yari oramutse yibuka umunsi haduka intambara hagati ya Irani na Iraki yabaye kuva mu 1980 gushika mu 1988 Perezida Hassan Rouhani avuga ko ingabo mvamahanga zamye "zitera umubabaro n'ubukene". Amerika ivuga ko igiye kurungika izindi ngabo mu gihugu ca Arabia Saoudite inyuma y'igitero giherutse kuba ku bigo bicukura igitoro, ivyo bihugu vyompi bikaba vyagirije Irani ko ari yo yagikoze. Uno mwaka kuva utanguye waranzwe n'icuka kibi hagati ya Amerika na Irani, kuva aho Perezida Donald Trump wa Amerika afatiye ingingo y'ukwiyonkora mu masezerano yasaba Irani guheba umugambi w'uguhingura ibirwanisho vy'ubumara, nayo igatezurirwa ibihano yafatiwe. Ibintu vyagiye gusubira kwunyuka igihe habereye ibitero vya drone n'ibisasu vya misile ku bigo bicukura igitoro vy'ahitwa Abqaiq na Khurais ku wa 14 z'uku kwezi kw'icenda. Abarwanya ubutegetsi bw'igihugu ca Yemen bitwa Houthi nibo biyitiriye ico gitero, ariko Amerika na Arabia Saoudite - umwansi wa mbere wa Irani muri ako karere - vyagiriza Irani ko ari yo yagikoze, ivyo ico gihugu ciyamiriza civuye inyuma. Bwana Rouhani yavuze iki? Ijambo ryiwe yarishikirije mu birori vy'ukwibuka umunsi haduka intambara hagati ya Irani na Iraki yabaye kuva mu 1980 gushika mu 1988, ibirori vyaranzwe n'amadefire y'igisirikare ku mugwa mukuru wa Irani no mu bindi bisagara vy'igihugu. Mw'ijambo ryiwe ryaciye kumboneshakure y'ico gihugu yavuze ati: "Ingabo mvamahanga zishobora gutera ingorane n'umutekano muke ku banyagihugu bacu no mu karere kacu". Avuga ko muri kahise zateye akaga, akazisaba kuguma iwabo. "Nimba koko bafise umutima, ni bareke kugira akarere kacu ikiririmbiro ry'ibirwanisho ... Uko muzogenda mureka kwivanga mu biraba akarere kacu n'ibihugu vyacu, niho numutekano uzogenda usasagara". Kubera iki Amerika ishaka kurungika ingabo muri ako karere? Ubushikiranganji bw'ukwivuna abansi bwa Amerika, Pentagon, bwatangaje ku munsi wa gatanu ko buzorungika ingabo nkeya muri Arabia Saoudite kubera yabisavye, zikazoba ahanini zigizwe n'abajejwe kurwanira mu kirere be no gukinga ibitero vya misire. Umunyamabanga ajejwe kwivuna abansi, Mark Esper, avuga ati: "Tuzokora ibishoboka vyose kugira ngo turungike mu maguru masha ibikoresho vya gisirikare". Iryo tangazo ryariyamirijwe cane n'igisata kijejwe gukingira ubutegetsi bwa ki isilamu, Revolutionary Guard Corps, igisata c'igisirikare ca Irani, gifatwa na Amerika nk'umurwi w'iterabwoba. Umukuru w'ico gisata, Jenerali-Majoro Hossein Salami avuga ati: "Uwo ari we wese ashaka ko igihugu ciwe kiba ikiririmbiro ry'intambara, n'abandanye. Ariko muhagabire, agasotoro ntikazoguma ari agasotoro. Tuzokurikirana uwo ari we wese azodusotora".

We n'abandi bantu umunani baregwana bahamijwe ibyaha by'intambara bifitanye isano n'iburizwamo ry'imyigaragambyo y'amahoro yamaganaga ubutegetsi bwa Colonel Gaddafi hashize imyaka ine. Abdallah al-Senussi, wahoze ari umukuru w'urwego rushinzwe iperereza, na Al-Baghdadi al-Mahmudi wahoze ari ministri w'intebe nabo bahawe igihano cyo gupfa. Uwunganira mu mategeko Saif al-Islam mu rukiko mpuzamahanga mpanabyaha yabwiye BBC ko urwo rubanza rudakurikije amategeko. Ari ONU cyangwa se umuryango uharanira uburenganzira bw'ikiremwamuntu, Amnesty International, byose byavuze ko uru rubanza rudakurikije ibisabwa mu rwego mpuzamahanga.

Abanyeshuri bo muri Madagascar barimo gushishikarizwa kunywa umuti watangajwe na perezida OMS ivuga ko Abanyafurika bakwiye kubona imiti yabanje guca mu mageragezwa nyayo kabone niyo yaba ari imiti gakondo. Iri tangazo rya OMS rije nyuma yaho perezida wa Madagascar atangaje umuti gakondo avuga ko uvura Covid-19, indwara yo mu buhumekero iterwa n'ubu bwoko bushya bwa coronavirus. Uvuga kuri uwo muti wa Madagascar, umuryango w'ubumwe bw'Afurika (UA/AU) wavuze ko ushaka kubona amakuru ashingiye kuri siyansi ajyanye "nuko ntacyo wakwangiza ku buzima ndetse no ku bushobozi bwawo". Uwo muti wahawe izina rya Covid-Organics, wageragerejwe ku bantu batageze kuri 20 mu gihe cy'ibyumweru bitatu, nkuko umwe mu bajyanama ba perezida wa Madagascar yabibwiye BBC. Uko wageragejwe binyuranye n'amabwiriza ya OMS ajyanye n'igeragezwa ry'imiti. Ayo mabwiriza ya OMS ashobora kumara igihe kirekire aho igishobora kuvamo umuti gipimwa mu byiciro bine, kigeragerezwa ku barwayi bacye nyuma kikageragerezwa ku bantu benshi ku rwego rw'igihugu. Nubwo hari ibyo bisabwa, ibihugu bimwe byo muri Afurika, birimo nka Guinea-Bissau, Equatorial Guinea, Liberia na Tanzania, byamaze gutumiza uwo muti wa Covid-Organics wo muri Madagascar. Uva mu kimera kitwa 'artemisia' - cyo mu bwoko by'inyabarasanya, mu Kinyarwanda - kivamo ibikoreshwa mu muti uvura malaria. Icyo kimera gikomatanywa n'ibindi bimera byo muri Madagascar. Mu cyumweru gishize, Perezida Andry Rajoelina wa Madagascar yavugiye mu nama yakozwe mu buryo bw'iyakure bwo kuri internet abwira abategetsi bo muri Afurika ibijyanye n'uwo muti. Nyuma y'iyo nama, AU yasabye ko yakwerekwa andi makuru ajyanye na Covid-Organics, akagenzurwa n'ikigo nyafurika cyo kurwanya no kwirinda indwara (CDC). Mu itangazo ryayo, OMS yashimye uko guhanga udushya dushingiye ku miti gakondo n'ibimera, ariko ivuga ko utwo dushya "dukwiye kugeragezwa ngo harebwe umumaro watwo ndetse niba nta ngaruka twakira ku buzima". Iryo tangazo ryongeyeho riti: "Abanyafurika bakwiriye gukoresha imiti yageragejwe ku bipimo bimwe nkuko bigenda ahandi hose ku isi". OMS ivuga ko gupima no gushakisha abahuye n'abanduye ari bwo buryo bwiza cyane bwo guhagarika ubwandu bwa coronavirus, kugeza igihe urukingo ruzabonekera Ejo ku wa mbere, hemewe inkunga irenga miliyari 8 z'amadolari y'Amerika agenewe gufasha mu gukora urukingo rwa coronavirus. Anagenewe kandi gukora ubushakashatsi mu buvuzi n'umuti by'iyi ndwara ya Covid-19. Imishinga y'ubushakashatsi ibarirwa muri za mirongo, mu bice bitandukanye by'isi, kuri ubu iri kugerageza kubona urukingo rwayo. Nyinshi mu mpuguke zivuga ko bishobora gufata kugeza hagati mu mwaka utaha wa 2021 - ni ukuvuga igihe kiri hagati y'amezi 12 na 18 uhereye igihe iyi virusi yagaragaye bwa mbere - ngo urukingo ruboneke rutangire gukoreshwa. Ibihugu byinshi byo muri Afurika byakoranye ibakwe mu kugerageza kwirinda ikwirakwira ry'ubwandu bwa coronavirus. Izo ngamba byafashe zirimo nka gahunda ya 'guma mu rugo' ndetse n'imikwabu yo kutarenza igihe runaka abantu bakiri hanze. Ariko izo ngamba ubu zatangiye kudohorwa mu bice bimwe na bimwe, mu gihe za leta zigerageza gushyira ku munzani inyungu zo mu rwego rw'ubuzima no ku rwego rw'ubukungu. Kudohora ingamba za gahunda ya 'guma mu rugo' byongereye gushaka ko mu buryo bwihutirwa haboneka imiti ya Covid-19. Kugeza ubu muri Madagascar hamaze kwemezwa abarwayi 151 ba Covid-19 ndetse nta muntu irica muri icyo gihugu, nkuko ikigo CDC cyo kurwanya no gukumira indwara muri Afurika kibivuga. Perezida wa Madagascar yari yategetse ko abatuye imijyi itatu mikuru yaho baguma mu rugo, ariko ubu izo ngamba zaradohowe, nkuko ibiro ntaramakuru AFP bibitangaza.

Bafatiwe mu kabari bivugwa ko gakunda kujyamo aba LGBTQ Patrick Onyango, umuvugizi wa polisi ikorera i Kampala, avuga ko abandi 73 bagifungiye kuri stasiyo ('station') ya polisi kandi ko bashobora kugezwa mu rukiko. Polisi ivuga ko ibiyobyabwenge birimo n'urumogi byasanzwe muri ako kabari, ariko impirimbanyi ziharanira uburenganzira bw'abantu b'amahitamo mpuzabitsina atandukanye zivuga ko abo bantu ari bo bari bagambiriwe. Izo mpirimbanyi zivuga ko ntacyo polisi yakoze ngo itandukanye abafite ibyo biyobyabwenge bitemewe n'abari bari muri ako kabari bahasohokeye gusa byo kwinezeza. Imibonano mpuzabitsina y'ab'igitsina kimwe inyuranyije n'amategeko nkuko bikubiye mu mategeko mpanabyaha ya Uganda. Leta ya Uganda yahakanye ibyavuzwe mu kwezi gushize kwa cumi ko iri guteganya itegeko rishya ryo guhana kurushaho aba LGBTQ.

Abari mu myiyerekano barabandanya kwugariza ibiro bikuru vya gisirikare vya Sudani ku mugwa mukuru Khartoum Inyuma y'aho Perezida Omar al-Bashir akuriwe ku butegetsi, haciye indwi zitatu, inama nkuru y'umutekano n'amahoro y'uwo muryango yahaye iminsi 15 abasirikare bari bafashe ubutegetsi kugira ngo babe babushikirije abasivire. Ku wa 24 z'ukwezi kwa kane guheze naho, uwo muryango wari wahaye abo bategetsi ba gisirikare amezi atatu kugira ngo babe bakoze impinduka zishingiye kuri demokrasi. Ubu naho, bahaye iminsi 60 abo bategetsi batembagaje ubutegetsi bwa Bwana Bashir kugira ngo babushikirize abasivire. Itororokanirizo ry'amakuru AFP rimenyesha ko mu gihe bitogenda uko, igihugu ca Sudani kizoca gikurwa mu muryango wa AU. AFP isubiramwo amajambo yavuzwe n'akanama kajejwe amahoro n'umutekano k'uwo muryango, aho kavuga ko " gashimangiye y'uko ubutegetsi bw'imfatakibanza burongowe n'igisirikare butazigera bwemerwa kuko buteye kubiri n'ivyipfuzo vy'abanyagihugu". Kongerako ko ubwo butegetsi bwa gisirikare "buteye kubiri n'intwaro rusangi, ukwubahiriza agateka ka zina muntu be n'uburenganzira bw'abanyagihugu ba Sudani". Abategetsi ba gisirikare bagize iminsi babonana n'abarongoye imyiyerekano be n'abatavuga rumwe n'ubutgetsi kugira ngo bigire hamwe ingene hoshingwa intwaro mfatakibanza gushika habaye ubutegetsi bushingiye ku ntwaro rusangi. Igihugu ca Sudani kirangwamwo imyiyerekano yatanguye mu kwezi kwa 12 kw'umwaka uheze wa 2018, ivuye ahanini ku biciro vy'ibitoro n'umukate vyaguma biduga. Iyo myiyerekano yagiye kuvamwo iyo kwiyamiriza intwaro ya Perezida Bashir yari amaze imyaka hafi 30 ku butegetsi, bamusaba ko yotanga imihoho. Niyo yatumye kw'igenekerezo rya 11 z'ukwezi kwa kane guheze, igisirikare c'ico gihugu gifata ingingo y'ugutembagaza ubutegetsi bwa Bwana Bashir, ariko gushika ubu imyiyerekano irabandanya, aho abayirimwo basaba abasirikare gushira ubutegetsi mu minwe y'abasivire.

Air Tanzania yatanguye ingendo muri Afrika y'Epfo mu kwezi kwa gatandatu uno mwaka wa 2019 Iyo ndege, Airbus 220-300 yategerezwa kuva i Johannesburg muri Afrika y'Epfo ku wa gatanu ija mu gisagara ca Dar es Salaam muri Tanzania. Ntivyashotse bimenyekana icatumye iyo ndege ihagarikwa, kubera abategetsi ba Afrika y'Epfo ata nsiguro batanze. Hagati aho, uwuserukira igihugu ca Tanzania muri Afrika y'Epfo avuga ko iyo ndege yahagaritswe kw'itegeko ritanzwe na Sentare nkuru y'igihugu mu gisagara ca Johannesburg. Abanyagihugu batari bake ba Tanzania babandanya bibaza icatumye Sentare nkuru y'igihugu ca Afrika y'Epfo ihagarika iyo ndege. Kuri bo, hariho icinyegeje inyuma, bagasaba ko kimenyekana. Hagati aho, uwahoze ari umurimyi w'ico gihugu avuga ko iyo ndege yahagaritswe kubera leta ya Tanzania itashoboye kumuriha indishi y'imiliyoni 33 z'amadolari nk'indishi y'akababaro yategerezwa kumuriha. Uwumuburanira, Roger Wakefield, yabwiye BBC ko ayo mafaranga yari yemewe inyuma y'aho leta ya Tanzania ifatiye amatongo yegukira uyo murimyi wo muri Afrika y'Epfo. Umuvugizi wa leta ya Tanzania yabwiye BBC ko ababuranira leta ya Tanzania bamaze gushika muri Afrika y'Epfo ku mvo z'amatohoza. Ivyo bibaye haciye hafi amezi abiri Air Tanzania itanguye ingendo muri ico gihugu ca Afrika y'Epfo. Umukuru w'igihugu ca Tanzania, John Magufuli, yafashe iya mbere mu kugerageza kuvyura iyo kompanyi yegukira leta, mu ntumbero y'uguteza imbere igisata c'ingenzi n'uguhindura ico gihugu kikagira ikibanza gikomeye mu vyerekeye kwunguruza abantu n'indege. Amamiliyoni atari make aramaze gukoreshwa n'ubutegetsi bwa John Pombe Magufuli mu ntumbero y'ukuvyura Air Tanzania Igihe ashika ku butegetsi mu mwaka wa 2015, Air Tanzania yari ifise indege imwe rudende. Kuva ico gihe, amamiliyoni n'amamiliyoni yaratanzwe mu ntumbero y'ukugura izindi ndege, ubu ikaba yarashoboye kugura izindi nshasha umunani. Sibwo bwa mbere Air Tanzania ifatirwa indege. Mu mwaka wa 2017, ishirahamwe ry'ubwubatsi ryo muri Canada, Stirling Civil Engineering, ryarafashe indege nshasha, Bombardier Q400, muri ico gihugu mu rubanza rw'imiliyoni 38 z'amadolari y'amanyamerika. Iyo ndege Q400 yagiye kurekurwa mu kwezi kwa gatatu 2018, inyuma y'aho umushikiranganji wa mbere wa Tanzania n'umushikirizamanza mukuru w'ico gihugu bagiriraniye ibiganiro n'iryo shirahamwe vyatumye irekurwa. Nta nsiguro zatanzwe ku bijanye n'ivyo bumvikanye kugira iyo ndege irekurwe.

Kizigenza wa Croatia Modric ni we yateye korone yavuyemwo igitego ca mbere Etpbo aheruka kuja muri Stoke City avuye mu mugwi wo muri Portugal wa Feirense ku miliyoni 6.5 z'amapawundi ku musi wa mbere, yiyinjije ku mupira uvuye muri korone utewe na Modric mu gice ca mbere c'urukino. Impuzu Nigeria izambara mu gikombe c'isi zose zagurishijwe kw'isoko Iwobi azahanwa nibyemezwa ko amakuru yo kwishimisha mbere y'umukino ari yo Mu nyuma, ku munota wa 71, Modric yinjije panalite - inyuma y'aho William Troost-Ekong akiniye nabi Mandzukic. Abakinyi ba Nigeria ntibasatiriye cane Nigeria ntibasatiriye cane igoli rya Croatia n'aho Dejan Lovren yakuyemwo umupira wari utewe na Alex Iwobi imbere y'uko baja kuruhuka. Iyo ntsinzi itumye Croatia ija mu kibanza ca mbere mu mugwi D, inyuma y'aho Islande inganirije na Argentine 1-1.

Abagore bagiye mu myiyerekano bafise ibipapuro biriko ibiharuro kugira berekane ubwicanyi bushika ijana bwakorewe abagore uyu mwaka mu Bufaransa Wari umubiri w'umugore wishwe amaze gukorerwa iyicarubozo. Umugabo we ahakana kumwica. Yitwa Salomé afite imyaka 21, ubu ashobora kuba agize umugore wa 100 wishwe muri uyu mwaka mu Bufaransa mu byo bita 'femicide' - ubwicanyi abagore bakorerwa n'abagabo cyangwa abo babana nk'abagabo cyangwa bene wabo. Ubwicanyi nk'ubu ku bagore si ubwa none kandi si ubwo mu Bufaransa gusa, igitabo cy'ibarurishamibare mu Rwanda cya 2018 kivuga ko abagera kuri 37 bishwe n'abo bashakanye. Mu Bufaransa, umunsi umwe mbere y'uko Salomé aboneka, umukecuru w'imyaka 92 yari yakubiswe n'umugabo w'imyaka 94 kugeza apfuye. Hashize amasaha, ubutegetsi bw'Ubufaransa bwatangaje ingamba zikomeye zo kurengera abagore ku rugomo bakorerwa. Ibindi bihugu by'iburayi nabyo bisanzwe bifite amategeko akarishye kuri iki cyaha kitagira imipaka n'ikiciro cy'abantu. Perezida Emmanuel Macron yatangije umurongo wa telephone wihariye wo gutanga amakuru kuri ibi byaha, amaze kumva bamwe bamuhamagara nibwo yamenye ukuri kw'ibiriho. Umugore umwe umaze imyaka ibarirwa mu binyacumi ahohoterwa n'umugabo we gito yaje kugira ubutwari bwo kumuta. Yasabye polisi kumuherekeza akajya gufata bimwe mu bye ariko umupolisi aranga, avuga ko akeneye urwandiko rw'ubutabera ngo abikore. Yaribeshyaga, gusa uyu murongo wa telephone wa Macron nawe ntabwo ari urwego rw'amategeko, wohereza usabye ubufasha ku itsinda rindi rifasha. Perezida Macron ibi ntiyari abizi, arabaza ukoresha uyu murongo mu izina rye niba ibi bibaho, undi ati: "Bibaho, kenshi ahubwo". Ubwicanyi bwo mu ngo bukorerwa kenshi abagore bukozwe n'abagabo babo cyangwa abo babana nk'abagabo babo. Imibare iheruka yerekana ko mu Bufaransa ariho iri hejuru cyane mu Burayi. Viviana Waisman wo mu muryango Women's Link Worldwide asobanura ko ihohoterwa rikorerwa abagore atari ikintu cyo gushyira mu mibare gusa. Agira ati: "Ihohoterwa ku bagore ni ikintu ndengamipaka, kandi kitagira urwego rw'abantu runaka gisiga. Kibasira abagore n'abakobwa mu miryango yose, kenshi kandi ntabwo kivugwa, nticyashyirwa mu mibare". Igitabo cy'ibarurishamibare cy'u Rwanda (statistical year book) cya 2018 kivuga ko mu 2016 abantu 47 bishwe n'abo bashakanye, naho mu 2017 hishwe 37, iyo ni imibare y'ikigo cy'u Rwanda gishinzwe iperereza ku byaha. Ihohoterwa rikorerwa abagore mu ngo mu Rwanda no mu Burundi ni ibibazo byugarije imiryango myinshi nk'uko imiryango inyuranye itegamiye kuri za Leta yagiye ibigaragaza. Kimwe n'ahandi, ibarurishamibare rishobora kutavuga ukuri kose, ariko mu Burayi Romania na Ireland ya ruguru bafite ikibazo. Ubwicanyi ku bagore muri ibi bihugu naho buravugwa cyane, mu 2017 umugore witwa Connie Leonard muri Ireland yishwe n'uwari umugabo we imbere y'abana be, ndetse nabo arabakomeretsa. Umwaka ushize mu Burundi, umupolisi witwa Nduwimana Prime yishe umugore wiwe amurashe akomeretsa n'uruhinja yari ahetse, uyu yakatiwe gufungwa burundu. Bitandukanye n'ahandi, Ireland ya ruguru ntabwo igira igihano ku "kwibasira" uwo mubana cyangwa mwashakanye. 'Umuryango uracyashyira ikosa ku mugore' Finland, ifatwa nk'igihugu giteye imbere cyane mu buringanire bw'ibitsina byombi, nayo iri mu bihugu bifite umubare munini w'abagore bicirwa mu ngo n'abo babana. Paivi Naskali umuhanga mu nyigisho z'uburinganire muri kaminuza ya Lapland muri Finalnd avuga ko amategeko yo muri ibi bihugu arengara abagore muri rubanda ariko atabarengera mu rugo. Modesta Kairyte wo mu kigo gifasha abagore bahohotewe muri Lithuania avuga ko ihohoterwa rikorerwa abagore rihita rishakirwa igisobanuro mu myitwarire. Ati: "Sosiyete iracyahita ishyira ikibazo ku mugore. Ni ikintu giteye isoni gikomeje". Umugore wahohotewe aranengwa ngo kuki atahunze mbere uwo babana yarabonaga ko amuhohotera. Yanahunga mbere y'ihohoterwa kandi akanengwa ngo yananiwe kubaka nk'uko Modesta abivuga. Avuga ko hakiri imyumvire ikwiriye muri rubanda ko byaba byiza umugore yihanganye akaguma aho kuko ari byiza ku bana. Modesta agira ati: "Nyamara ubushakashatsi bugaragaza ko abana babaho mu rugo ruhoramo uhohoterwa bibagiraho ingaruka mbi cyane ku buzima bwabo bwose". Umuhigo mu kwica no kurengera muri Espagne Espagne ikunda gufatwa nk'urugero mu Burayi mu gushyiraho amategeko akarishya agamije kurengera abagore ku ihohoterwa rishingiye ku gitsina. Mu 2004, iki gihugu cyatoye itegeko rishyiraho urukiko rwihariye rw'iri hohoterwa n'ingengo y'imari yihariye yo gufasha abahohotewe. Ariko mu kwezi kwa gatandatu muri Espagne habaruwe umugore ugira uw'1000 wishwe kuva batangira kubarira bene ubu bwicanyi mu 2003. Beatriz Arroyo w'imyaka 29, mu kwa gatandatu yahisemo gutandukana n'umukunzi we ngo atangire ubuzima bwe. Abagore muri Espanye bariyambitse bisiga ibisa n'amaraso nk'abantu bishwe kugira bamagane ubwicyanyi bukorerwa abagore bukomeza bwiyongera Yagiye kuba mu igorofa rya gatanu muri 'appartment' mu mujyi wa Valencia, uyu mukunzi we yamusanzeyo aramuniga aramwica, bucyeye nawe asimbuka muri iryo gorofa ariyahura. Beatriz niwe wari ubaye umugore w'1000 wishwe byahise bitera abagore benshi kwigaragambya ndetse bijya mu mateka bise 'machista'. Raporo ivuga ko muri aba bagore 1000 bamaze kwicwa mu myaka 16 ishize, 607 bishwe n'abagabo babo, 225 bishwe n'abo bahoze babana, 168 bari mu nzira za gatanya(divorce). Iruhande rw'amategeko n'urukiko rwihariye, imibare y'abagore bamaze kwicwa muri Espagne kugeza ubu muri uyu mwaka irenze inshuro ebyiri abishwe mu 2018. Hari gukorwa iki? Hakorwa iki? Minisitiri w'intebe w'Ubufaransa Edouard Philippe muri iki cyumweru yatangaje ko hatanzwe miliyoni zitanu z'ama euro yo guhashya ubwicanyi ku bagore, ko ubutegetsi buzatanga inzu 1000 zo gucumbikira abakorewe cyangwa abashobora gukorerwa ihohoterwa. 'Stations' 400 za polisi nazo ngo zizakorerwa igenzura ry'uko zakurikiranye ibibazo nk'ibi. Mu Rwanda hashyizweho umurongo wihariye wa polisi wo gutabaza ku bibazo by'ihohoterwa rishingiye ku gitsina(3512), hashyizweho kandi ikigo gishamikiye kuri polisi cyo gufasha abakorewe ihohoterwa n'abashobora kurikorerwa (Isange One Stop Center). Mu Bufaransa hagiye gushyirwaho akuma ko kwambika umuntu ukekwaho kuba yahohotera umugore runaka kagatuma adashobora kwegera uwo mugore. Inkiko nazo zigiye kujya zibuza abagabo gusura abana mu gihe bahohoteye ba nyina. Umurongo wo guhamagara Perezida Macron kuri iki kibazo warishimiwe cyane ubwo watangizwaga. TV France ivuga ko ku munsi uyu mugorongo (3919) uhamagarwaho inshuro hagati ya 200 na 300. Imiryango iharanira uburenganzira bw'abagore ariko ivuga ko hakiri byinshi bikenewe gukorwa. Madamu Modesta Kairyte avuga ko ihohoterwa rigaragara ryo ku mubiri ari naryo rivugwa, ari umusaruro uva ku ihohoterwa rimaze igihe kinini ryo mu mutwe no mu bukungu. Avuga ko icyakorwa ari uko abantu batangira kwigishwa bakiri abana imibanire mu kubahana n'ubworoherane n'abo badahuje igitsina.

Bivugwa ko urubuto rwa durian - rujya gusa n'inanasi - rugira umutobe uryohereye, ariko rukaba rufatwa nanone nk'urwa mbere runuka cyane ku isi Hasanzwe toni zirenga ebyiri z'uru rubuto rwa durian, rufatwa nk'urwa mbere runuka cyane ku isi, ziri mu gice cyagenewe kubika imizigo y'abagenzi muri iyi ndege ya kompanyi Sriwijaya Air, yerekezaga mu murwa mukuru Jakarta ivuye i Bengkulu. Abagenzi basabye ko izo mbuto zikurwa mu ndege, bamwe ndetse benda kurwana n'abakozi bo mu ndege. Kera kabaye, iyi kompanyi y'indege yavuye ku izima yemera gukura imifuka y'izo mbuto muri iyo ndege. Nuko indege ibona guhaguruka mu masaha ya saa tanu n'iminota 40 z'amanywa ku isaha yo muri Indonesia, icyerereweho isaha imwe ku gihe ubundi yagombaga guhagurukiraho. Amir Zidane ukoresha urubuga nkoranyambaga rwa Facebook, yafotoye izo mbuto ubwo zakurwaga mu ndege abagenzi bamaze kwigaragambya Kompanyi y'indege ya Sriwajiya Air nyuma yavuze ko nta tegeko yishe mu kuba yashakaga gutwara izo mbuto zinuka muri iyo ndege. Mu itangazo ryasohowe na Retri Maya, umuyobozi mukuru ushinzwe itangazamakuru muri iyo kompanyi, yagize ati: "Nta tegeko ribuza gutwara imbuto za durian mu ndege igihe cyose zapfunyitswe neza bijyanye n'amabwiriza yo kugenda mu ndege...Indege nyinshi zirabikora [zitwara izi mbuto]". Uru rubuto rufite amahwa rwa durian ruraribwa cyane henshi ku mugabane w'Aziya, ariko ntiruvugwaho rumwe - hari abarukunda, hakaba n'abarwanga. Umunuko ukaze warwo utuma mu bihugu bimwe na bimwe rutemererwa gupakirwa ngo rujyane n'abantu mu buryo bwo gutwara abantu n'ibintu, ndetse rukaba rubujijwe muri za hoteli no mu ndege. Amir Zidane ukoresha urubuga nkoranyambaga rwa Facebook, akaba na we yari umugenzi muri iyo ndege, yatangaje videwo igaragaza uburyo imifuka y'izo mbuto yakuwe muri iyo ndege ku wa mbere. Anies Wardhana, umukuru w'ikibuga cy'indege cya Bengkulu, yahamirije igitangazamakuru Detik cyo muri icyo gihugu ko koko icyo kibazo cyabayeho. Bwana Wardhana yavuze ko mu ndege harimo ibiro birenga 2025 by'izo mbuto, avuga ko mu bihe biri imbere iki kibuga cy'indege kigiye "kugenzura" ibipakirwa mu ndege ku buryo "bitabangamira abagenzi".

Umushikiranganji Pascal Barandagiye (hagati) avuga ko menshi mu mashirahamwe akorera mu Burundi atigeze yubahiriza ingingo iyategeka gucisha muri banki nkuru y'igihugu amafaranga yayo. Muri iyo nama ihuza amashirahamwe ataho yegamiye muri politike, umushikiranganji w'intwaro yo hagati mu gihugu Pascal Barandagiye avuga ko ingingo yafashwe n'inama nkuru y'umutekano mu ndwi iheze iraba ayo mashirahamwe yose akorera mu Burundi atarivuyemwo. Avuga ko vyaragaragaye ko meshi muri ayo mashirahamwe abaho kw'izina gusa. Yongeye ati: "Menshi muri ayo mashirahamwe ivyo akora ntibihuye n'umugambi mukuru w'iterambere w'imyaka 10 uherutse gushikirizwa n'umukuru w'igihugu." Pascal Barandagiye yibutsa ko mu mwaka uheze ayo mashirahamwe yari yahawe ikiringo c'amezi atandatu ngo abe yisunze amategeko y'igihugu. Amashirahamwe akorera mu Burundi asabwa kwiyandikisha bushasha Ikindi umushikiranganji yagiriza ayo mashirahamwe, ngo n'uko menshi muri yo atigeze yubahiriza ingingo iyategeka gucisha muri banki nkuru y'igihugu amafaranga yayo. Barandagiye yagize ati: "Ivyo nje kuvuga si ijambo gusa (discours). Ahubwo nje kubashikiriza canke kubamenyesha ingene ibintu vyifashe. "Sinje ngo twumvikane ingene ingingo y'inama nkuru y'umutekano yohagarikwa. Irya ngingo ni ntasubirwamwo. Nje kubereka ivyo musabwa kugira mwisunge amategeko. Irya ngingo yafashwe kugira akajagari muri kino gisata gahere". Pascal Barandagiye avuga ko ikiringo c'amezi atatu catanzwe ari ico kwihweza amashirahamwe azoba ari mu mategeko. Yongerako ati: "Kuva kw'itariki imwe ukwezi kwa 10 dufata ko ata shirahamwe na rimwe riri mu Burundi. Mutegerezwa kuza kuyandikisha bushasha. Abatazoza bazoca bafutwa burundu". Bamwe mu baserukiye amashirahamwe akorera mu Burundi bitavye iyo nama Mu kwiyandikisha gushasha, ayo mashirahzmwe asabwa kuza yitwaje amasezerano bagiriraniye n'ubushikiranganji bw'imigenderanire. Bategerezwa kandi kwerekana ko ivyo bakora bijanye na wa mugambi w'igihugu w'iterambere. Ikindi basabwa, n'ukwiyemeza kwubahiriza amategeko mu bijanye n'inzira amafaranga ayo mashirahamwe akoresha acamwo, ni ukuvuga mw'ibanki nkuru ya republika (BRB). Ikindi, bategerezwa kwisunga no kwubahiriza uburinganire bw'ibitigiri vy'amoko mu bakozi nk'uko bitegekanijwe n'ibwirizwa shingiro.

Imbwa n'injangwe ntibizongera kuribwa mu mujyi wa Shenzhen uri mu ntara ya Guangdong mu burasirazuba bw'Ubushinwa Ni nyuma y'uko icyorezo cya coronavirus bivuzwe ko cyakomotse ku nyama z'inyamaswa, byatumye abategetsi mu Bushinwa bahagarika kurya no kugurisha bene izo 'mbonekarimwe'. Shenzen ariko yo yateye indi ntambwe, igera no ku guca kurya imbwa n'injangwe. Iri tegeko rizatangira gukurikizwa tariki 01/05/2020. Imbwa zigera kuri miliyoni 30 ziricwa buri mwaka muri Aziya ngo bazirye nk'uko bivugwa n'ikigo Humane Society International (HSI). Gusa mu Bushinwa, hari umubare munini w'Abashinwa batarya imbwa. Ubutegetsi bw'umujyi wa Shenzhen buvuga ko "imbwa n'injangwe byacuditse n'abantu kurusha izindi nyamaswa, kandi hari n'ahandi bibujijwe kurya izi nyamaswa nko muri Hong Kong na Taiwan". Iki cyemezo cyishimiwe na HSI iharanira uburenganzira bw'inyamaswa. Dr Peter Li wo muri iki kigo yagize ati: "Iyi ni intambwe nziza ishobora guhagarika ubucuruzi bubi butuma mu Bushinwa hicwa imbwa zigera kuri miliyoni 10 n'injangwe miliyoni 4 buri mwaka". Gusa mu Bushinwa nanone ubu bemeje ikoreshwa ry'urugingo ruzwi nka 'bile' rw'inyamaswa z'ibirura (bears) mu kuvura abarwaye coronavirus. Urwo rugingo rugizwe n'amatembabuzi ava mu mwijima w'ikirura, rusanzwe rukoreshwa mu buvuzi gakondo mu Bushinwa. Rimwe mu masoko y'inyama mu Bushinwa Abo mu miryango iharanira uburenganzira bw'inyamaswa bamaganye iki cyemezo, bavuga ko uyu atari umuti wemejwe n'abahanga ko uvura iyi virusi. Kugeza ubu, abanduy eiyi virusi ku isi barasatira miliyoni imwe, abo imaze kwica bararenga 47,000 nk'uko bivugwa na kaminuza y'ubushakashatsi ya Johns Hopkins. Mu Bushinwa abanduye iyi ndwara ni 81,589 naho abo yishe ni 3,318, ni imibare itangwa n'ikigo cya leta y'Ubushinwa gishinzwe ubuzima. Abahanga mu bushakashatsi mu by'ubuzima ntibarabona umuti cyangwa urukingo rw'iyi virusi bise Covid-19.

Umugore w'umukuru w'Amerika Michelle Obama wakoresheje ijambo umugabo we avugira kuri radio buri cyumweru, yavuze ko ibyabaye muri Nigeria ari igikorwa cy'umwihariko. Yavuze ko buri munsi abakobwa bo kw'isi yose bahura n'amakimbirane iyo bagiye gushyira mu bikorwa ibyo biyemeje gukora kandi ko uburezi ariyo mahirwe aruta ayandi bafite imbere. Abahinga bo mu bihugu by'iburayi bari muri Nigeria gufasha mu gikorwa cyo gushakisha abo bana.

Mugesera w'imyaka 67, ni impuguke mu by'indimi akaba yari umwarimu wa Kaminuza Mu bujurire, Mugesera yihannye umwe mu bacamanza ariko uru rukiko rutesha agaciro icyifuzo cye ruvuga ko kidashingiye ku mategeko. Dr Mugesera na we yahise aregera urukiko rw'ikirenga avuga ko iki cyemezo kivuguruza itegeko nshinga ry'igihugu. Kuri iyi nshuro Mugesera yabwiye urukiko ko adashobora kuburana mbere y'uko hatangazwa icyemezo cy'urukiko rw'ikirenga kuri iki kirego cye. Mu gihe umucamanza yari ahamagaye umuburanyi ngo atangire kuvuga ku bujurire bwe, Leon Mugesera yibukije ko yatanze ikirego mu rukiko rw'ikirenga yinubira kuba icyifuzo cye cyo kwihana umucamanza cyarateshejwe agaciro. Mugesera avuga ko yihannye umucamanza wo mu rukiko rw'ubujurire kuko hari ahandi yamufatiye icyemezo kitamunyuze. Inteko irimo umucamanza yikomye ni na yo yasuzumye ubu busabe ndetse inabutesha agaciro. Nk'uko abibona, ibi binyuranije n'itegeko nshinga kuko umucamanza yinubiye ari na we wafashe umwanzuro asabwa kubahiriza. Yasabye ko hategerezwa icyemezo cy'urukiko rw'ikirenga yaregeye. Rukemeza niba icyemezo cyafashwe n'urukiko rw'ubujurire kivuguruza itegeko nshinga, nk'uko bivugwa na Mugesera. Birashoboka kandi ko rwasanga icyemezo cy'urukiko cyubahirije amategeko urubanza rugakomeza inteko idahindutse. Mu bujurire, Leon Mugesera arasaba ko igifungo cya burundu yakatiwe mu mwaka wa 2016 gikurwaho. Yahamijwe icyaha cyo 'guhamagarira abaturage kwica' Uyu mugabo yahamijwe icyaha cyo guhamagarira abahutu gutsemba abatutsi hashingiwe ku mbwirwaruhame yatangiye mu gace akomokamo ka Gisenyi mu ntangiro z'imyaka ya 90. Yagejejwe mu Rwanda mu mwaka wa 2012 yoherejwe n'igihugu cya Canada nyuma y'imyaka myinshi yari ahamaze mu buhungiro. Mugesera w'imyaka 67, ni impuguke mu by'indimi akaba yari umwarimu wa Kaminuza. Mu mwaka wa 1992 ni bwo Mugesera yavuze imbwirwaruhame aregwa, icyo gihe akaba yari vice prerezida w'ishyaka ryari ku butegetsi rya MRND muri Prefecture ya Gisenyi akomokamo. Mugesera yakomeje guhakana ibyaha aregwa. Kuri we ijambo aregwa, akunze kumvikana asa n'ugaragaza ko atari umwimerere, ryavuzwe mu bihe bikomeye bya politiki y'ubwisanzure ritagomba gufatwa nk'urwango yari afitiye abatutsi.

Gynette w'imyaka 20 gusa, ni kizigenza w'umurwi w'umupira w'amaguru Faufila-PF, ni umusatirizi mu muri Aigre noir ya Volleyball, akaba n'icegera ca kizigenza mu murwi wa Basketaball wa Muzinga. Avuga ko akiri muto yatanguye gukina umupira abonye wose. Umumenyereza amuzi avuga ko bidasanzwe kubona abakinyi nk'uyu, bashobora no kubifatikanya n'amashure. 'Ngorore' ukunda cane umupira w'amaguru, yishimira cane ko yamaze kuduza ibendera ry'u Burundi mu makungu, kandi ngw'arakeneye gushika kure kuruta. Mu 2013, mu ihiganwa mpuzamakungu rya Volley beach, umurwi nserukiragihugu w'u Burundi yarimwo wararonse ikibanza ca kabiri. Gynette ariko ubu yabaye ahagaritse amahiganwa muri Basketaball kubera "utubazo duto duto turi mu gisata kijejwe amahiganwa ku rwego rw'igihgu" twatumye amahiganwa adindira umwaka wose. Kubishikako ntivyari vyoroshe? Yakuriye mu Ngagara mu mujyi wa Bujumbura aho yahora abona abasirikare bakina mu mugwi wa Muzinga. Ati: "Bahejeje gukina baca batwigisha gukina umupira". Mu nyuma niho yagiye agerageza iyindi mikino. Ati: "Ukwo mbonye umukino nagira nti 'Reka ndabe ko ntashobora uwu nawo kandi'." Umupira w'amaguru niwo avuga ko akunda cane mu yindi mikino akina Gynette Kamwemwe avuga ko kubera imigenzo itorohereza rimwe na rimwe Abarundikazi ubwa mbere abavyeyi biwe batagomba ko aja gukina kuko bikeka ko vyomubuza kwiga. Avuga ko mu nyuma bamuretse kuko babona ko atunganya neza umwanya wa buri kimwe, akabasha kubikora vyose. Daniella Niyibimenya, umumenyereza mu mupira w'amaguru, avuga ko Kamwemwe afise impano yo kumenyera n'ingoga umukino uwariwo wose. Yemeza ko bidakunze kuboneka ko abigeme bakina imikino itandukanye ku rwego rukuru nka 'Ngorore'. Aha yakinira umurwi nserukiragihugu mu ihiganwa mpuzamakungu rya Volleball muri Kenya Niyibimenya avuga ko igihambaye ku banyeshule bakina imipira itandukanye vyama bikenewe ko bakuriranwa cane kugira amahiganwa ntabasubize inyuma mu vyigwa. Ashima ko Gynette Kamwemwe yisigura neza muri kaminuza yigamwo.

Nicolas Sarkozy yigeze gutwara igihugu c'Ubufaransa Igipolisi kiriko gitohoza ku bivugwa ko yaronse ayo mahera bidaciye mu mategeko, yiyamamariza amatora yo mu 2007. Igipolisi carigeze kumusambisha muri kahise. Uwigeze kuba umufasha wiwe, Alexandre Djouhri, aheruka gufatigwa mu gisagara ca Londres. Bwana Sarkozy yarananiwe kugaruka ku butegesti mu 2012. Amakuru ava mu gisata c'ubutungane avuga ko ariko arasambishirizwa ahitwa Nanterre, mu bwinjiriro bw'igisagara ca Paris mu burengero. Mu 2013 Ubufaransa bwaratanguje itohoza ku birego bivuga ko yahawe na Kadhafi amahera yo kwiyamamaza bidaciye mu mategeko mu 2013, ariko Bwana Sarkozy yavuze ko ata kibi yakoze. Abatanze amakuru bavuga ko umushikiranganji yaracuditse na Bwana Sarkozy, Brice Hortefeux, ariko arasambishwa n'igipolisi kuri uno wa kabiri. Ivyo birego vyaturutse ku mugwizatunga w'umufaransa afise amamuko yo muri Libani, Ziad Takieddine, hamwe na bamwe mu bari mu butegetsi bwa Kadhafi.

Claude Karerwa Ndenzako yavuze ko impungenge u Rwanda rwashikirije ku bijanye n'u Burundi zose zatangiwe inyushu, nk'ikibazo c'uko u Burundi bwoba bucumbikiye abashaka gutera u Rwanda, ngo haraje umugwi utohoza usanga badahari. U Burundi ngo buracarindiriye ko u Rwanda rutanga abashatse gutembagaza ubutegetsi mu 2015 bahungiyeyo, hamwe no kureka kwivanga muri politike yabwo. Umuvugizi wa Prezida w'u Burundi, Bwana Ndenzako, yabandanije avuga ko hari intambwe imaze guterwa ngo kuko u Rwanda rwaretse impunzi zishaka gutahuka zikabikora. Aha hari nyuma y'ijambo umukuru w'igihugu Evariste Ndayishimiye yaheruka gushikiriza mw'ikoraniro ry'umugambwe uri ku butegetsi CNDD FDD, aho wari uramutse utora umunyamabanga mukuru mushasha, uwo nawe akaba ari Reverien Ndikuriyo, yahoze ari umukuru w'inama nkenguzamateka. Prezida Ndayishimiye yavuze ko afise icizere cinshi y'uko u Burundi n'u Rwanda bizosubira kunywana nk'ibihugu vy'ibivukanyi. Kurikirana aho hejuru ikiganiro Claude Karegwa yagiranye na Florentine Kwizera. Urashobora gushima gusoma n'ibi:
