Mugabe yeguye Abantu babarirwa mu bihumbi bisutse mu mihanda ya Harare bari mu byishimo bamaze kumva ko Robert Mugabe, yeguye ku mwanya w'umukuru w'igihugu. Robert Mugabe, wari umaze imyaka 37 k'ubutegetsi, yamenyesheje ko yeguye abinyujije mu rwandiko rwasomwe n'umuyobozi w'inteko nshinga mategeko ya Zimbabwe, ubwo abadepite bari bamaze gutangira ibiganiro byo kumukura k'ubutegetsi. Robert Mugabe yavuze ko yemeye kuva k'ubutegetsi k'ubushake bwe. Muri Zimbabwe biginye iherezo ry'ubutegetsi bwa Mugabe Mugabe yari yanze kurekura ubutegetsi n'ubwo mu cyumweru gishize ingabo z'icyo gihugu zari zatangaje ko zafashe ubutegetsi. Igikorwa cy'abasirikare cyashyigikiwe n'imyiagarambyo y'abaturage. Zimbabwe: Mugabe araganira n'umukuru wa gisirikare kuri kazoza kiwe Muri Zimbabwe baracaganira kw'itanga ry'imihoho kwa Mugabe Igisirikare cyafashe ubutegetsi Bwana Mugabe amaze kwirukana visi perezida Emmerson Mnangagwa. Umuyobozi w'inteko nshinga mategeko yavuze ko batangiye ibikorwa byo gushyiraho perezida mushya wa Zimbabwe. Birashoboka ko Bwana Mnangagwa ariwe uzasimbura Mugabe. Bwana Terence Mukupe, umudepita wo mu ishyaka ZANU PF, yavuze ko hari abadepite bari hafi kurira bamaze gusomerwa ibarwa yo kwegura Robert Mugabe yanditse. Yavuze ko Mugabe, washinze ishyaka ZANU PF, agikunzwe. Morgan Tsvangirai, umuyobozi w'ishyaka ritavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi, yavuze ko ubu ari igihe cyo gushyiraho amategeko agenga amatora asesuye. Ishyirahamwe ritabogamiye kuri leta, the Platform for Concerned Citizens, ryasabye ko habaho ibiganiro mu rwego rw'igihugu bizahuriramo amashyaka yose.

Abasirikare ba Pakistani muvyo ico gihugu kivuga ko ari ibisigarira vy'indege y'Ubuhindi yakorowe Pakistani ivuga ko yakoroye indege zibiri z'ingwano bivuye ku mishamirano iturutse ku ntara ya Kashmir ivyo bihugu bibiri bipfa. Pakistani ivuga kandi ko yafashe umudereva umwe mu gihe indege imwe yagwa muri ico gihugu. Igihugu c'Ubuhindi naco kimenyesha ko catakaje indege y'ingwano MiG21 kandi ko n'umudereva wayo yabuzwe irengero. Ivuga ko iriko ikora itohoza ku makuru avuga ko yoba yarafashwe. Pakistani irahakana kandi amakuru avugwa n'igihugu c'Ubuhindi ko coba cakoroye indege yayo. Ivyo bitero vyo mu kirere hejuru y'umurongo ugabura ivyo bihugu wiswe "Line of Control" (LoC) ni ivya mbere bibaye kuva intambara yo mu mwaka wa 1971 yadutse. Bikurikiye igitero c'intagondwa cabaye muri uku kwezi kwa kabiri mu karere ka Pulwama kari mu gice c'intara ya Kashmir kigenzurwa n'Ubuhindi. Cahitanye abasirikare 40 b'Ubuhindi, kikaba ari co gitero ca mbere gikomeye ku gisirikakare c'ico gihugu mu myaka 30 iheze hadutse imigumuko mu ntara ya Kashmir mu gihugu c'Ubuhindi. Umurwi ushigikiwe n'igihugu ca Pakistani niwo wakoze ico gitero. Umunyamakuru wa BBC Soutik Biswas, ari i New Delhi mu mugwa mukuru w'Ubuhindi, avuga ko icihutirwa ku bihugu vy'Ubuhindi na Pakistani ari uguhagarika iyo mishamirano ibintu bitarayangara. Muri Pakistani, umushikiranganji wa mbere Imran Khan yashikirije ijambo abanyagihugu aho asaba ko iyo mishamirano ihagarara hakugururwa ibindi biganiro. Igihe haherukira imishamirano hagati y'Ubuhindi na Pakistani Igitero c'intagondwa cabaye ku wa 14 z'ukwa kabiri uno mwaka i Pulwama mu gice ca Kashmir kigenzurwa n'Ubuhindi, ni co ca mbere cari gihitanye abasirikare benshi cane mu myaka ibarirwa muri mirongo iheze N'aho buri gihugu kivuga ko kigenzura intara yose ya Kashmir, kimwe kimwe cose kigenzura gusa ibice vyayo, mbere bikaba bimaze kurwana incuro zibiri kuva bironse intahe y'ukwikukira mu mwaka wa 1947 vyikuyeko intwaro y'Ubwongereza. Imishamirano ya nyuma hagati y'ivyo bihugu bibiri yabaye mu kwezi kw'icenda umwaka wa 2016, mu gihe Ubuhindi bwakora igitero bwise "ibitero vy'indege bidahusha" (surgical strikes) ku barwanyi bari mu gice kigenzurwa na Pakistani c'intara ya Kashmir- naho Pakistani yahakanye ico gitero kivugwa ko cakozwe n'Ubuhindi. Ubuhindi bwakoze ivyo bitero bwihora ku gitero cari cakozwe ku ngabo zabwo mu gace ka Uri mu gice kigenzurwa n'Ubuhindi c'intara ya Kashmir, kikaba cahitanye abasirikare 19. Mu ntango z'uyo mwaka mu kwezi kwa mbere, igitero camaze imisi ine ku ngabo zirwanira mu kirere z'igihugu c'Ubuhindi ziri mu gace ka Pathankot - igisagara kiri ku rubibe mu ntara ya Punjab mu Buhindi - cahitanye abasirikare b'Ubuhindi indwi n'intagondwa zitandatu. Muri ivyo bihe vyose, ivyo bihugu vyarashoboye guhagarika iyo ntambara yatumye haba agahengwe gushika habaye ico gitero mu gace ka Pulwama. Ico gitero cemanzwe n'umurwi Jaish-e-Mohammad ugendera ku matwara akaze y'idini rya islamu uri mu gihugu ca Pakistani. N'aho Pakistani yahakanye ko ataruhara yagize muri ico gitero, abategetsi b'Ubuhindi bariyemeje ko bazokora ivyo bashoboye vyose ngo "bigizeyo burundu Pakistani". Ingene ibintu bimeze mu Buhindi Abasirikare b'Ubuhindi hafi y'ibisigarira vy'ikivugwa ko ari indege y'igisirikare kirwanira mu kirere c'Ubuhindi, inyuma y'uko ikorokeye mu karere ka Budgam mu gice kigenzurwa n'Ubuhindi c'intara ya Kashmir Umumenyeshamakuru wa BBC i New Delhi, Vineet Khare, avuga ko kuva habaye igitero ca Pulwama, "ishavu riraniga mu Buhindi, aho abanyagihugu bihereje amabarabara bakije amabuji basaba ukwihora". Mu ndwi ziheze, uyu mumenyeshakuru avuga ko imvugo yiganje mu binyamakuru no mu majambo ashikirizwa n'abanyepolitike yagumye isaba gukingira inyungu z'igihugu. Ariko mu gihe himirije amatora muri ico gihugu, uyu mumenyeshamakuru avuga ko ata leta n'imwe y'Ubuhindi yokwipfuza kugaragara nk'aho ifise intege nke canke ko yananiwe n'ukurwanya 'iterabwoba'. "Umunezero wari mwinshi ku mbuga hwaniro ku musi w'ejo aho bumviye ko Ubuhindi bwakoze ibitero vy'indege ku birindiro vy'abo bita Jaish muri Pakistani". Ubushikiranganji bw'uguhanahana amakuru bwa Pakistani bwashize ahabona ireresi buvuga ko yerekana umudereva w'indege w'ubuhindi yafashwe Ariko uwo munezero wahindutse amakenga inyuma y'aho Pakistani itangarije ko yafashe abadereva b'indege b'abahindi babiri - n'aho umushikiranganji w'imigenderanire y'Ubuhindi n'ayandi makungu yamenyesheje ko umudereva umwe gusa mu bakoze ico gitero ariwe yabuze irengero. Umumenyeshamakuru Khare avuga ati: "Uwo munezero waciye uhera mu gihe ireresi y'uyo mudereva yasohorwa na Pakistani". Vyinshi mu binyamakuru vyo hanze bibandanya vyitondera amakuru ashikirizwa na buri gihugu, amakuru yo kubeshuza, be n'ivyagirizi ku makuru y'ibinyoma. Ingene Pakistani ibona ibiriko biraba Imran Khan, umushikiranganji wa mbere wa Pakistani, yashikirije ijambo abanyagihugu kuri televiziyo Umushikiranganji wa mbere wa Pakistani yasavye ko haba ituze hagatangura ibiganiro n'Ubuhindi, avuga ko yaba we canke umushikiranganji wa mbere w'Ubuhindi ata n'umwe yipfuza ko ibintu biyangara bihweje ibirwanisho ivyo bihugu bifise. Avuga ati: "Ari nka hamwe ivyo vyoshika, yaba jewe canke Narendra Modi, nta n'umwe yobihagarika. Dutegerezwa kwicara tukaganira ..." Umumenyeshamakuru wa BBC Tahir Imran, avuga ko uko ibintu bimeze ahanini muri Pakistani "vyerekana ishaka ryo gukunda igihugu. Ku mbuga hwaniro no mu bimenyeshamakuru hagaragara igisa n'ukurengwa n'igishika". Avuga ati: "Hari benshi bihagararako kandi bashaka intambara, n'aho bamwe basaba ituze n'ukwigumya". Imran avuga ko amakuru y'ibinyoma abandanya ahanahanwa ku mbuga hwaniro, rimwe na rimwe akanakoreshwa n'amateleviziyo. Avuga ko hari amakenga ku bishobora gushika, ariko ko abenshi babona ko iyo mishamirano ishobora guhagarara. Imran abandanya avuga ko impande zompi zisaba kwigumya.

Sibwo bwa mbere havuzwe amakuru atandukanye ku buzima bwa Kim Jong-un Amakuru yavuga ko Kim Jong-un yoba "aremvye cane", "yataye ubwenge" canke "yoba ariko atora mitende inyuma yo kubagwa" yamye ari amakuru atashoboye kwemezwa. Hagati aho, ibiro vy'umukuru w'igihugu ca Koreya y'Epfo bimenyesha ko ata kintu na kimwe kiva muri Koreya ya Ruguru cerekana ko uyo mutegetsi w'ico gihugu w'imyaka 36 yoba "aremvye cane". Eka si nabwo bwa mbere ibihuha ku bijanye n'amagara yiwe vyaduka, ariko mu nyuma bikaza kubeshuzwa. None ayo makuru yatanguye kuvugwa ryari? Kim Jong-un ntiyashoboye kwitaba ibirori vyo guhimbaza ivuka rya sekuru wiwe vyabaye ku wa 15 z'uku kwa kane. Ni ibirori biri mu minsi mikuru ikomeye ihimbazwa uko umwaka utashe, aho abanyagihugu bibuka ivuka vy'uwatanguje igihugu cabo. Kim Jong-un ntiyari bwigere na rimwe asiba ivyo birori - kandi bikaba biboneka ko ata kintu na kimwe cari kumutuma atavyitaba. Kubona atashoboye kwitaba ivyo birori vyatumye haduka ibihuha n'ibibazo vyinshi ata muntu n'umwe ashobora gutorera inyishu. Kim Jong-un aheruka kuboneka mu binyamakuru vya leta ku wa 12 z'uku kwa kane "ariko agenzura umurwi w'indege z'intambara" . Nk'uko vyama, amasanamu yamwerekanye amerewe neza. Ikizwi ni uko yarongoye inama ikomeye n'abanyepolitike umunsi umwe imbere y'aho, nk'uko yerekanywe n'ibinyamakuru vya leta. Ariko kuva ico gihe, ntarigera asubira kuboneka. Ivyo binyamakuru vya leta ntivyigeze bimenyesha nimba yaritabiriye canke atitabiriye ibikorwa vy'igerageza vya vya bisasu vya misire ryabaye mu ndwi iheze. Mu bisanzwe yama yerekanwa ahagarariye ibikora nk'ibi. Vyari bisanzwe binagoye kumva amakuru kuri Koreya ya Ruguru, ubu hoho rero ibintu vyarunyutse inyuma y'aho ico gihugu cugariye imbibe zaco mu mpera z'ukwa mbere kubera ikiza ca coronavirus. Amakuru ya mbere avuga ivy'indwara yiwe Amakuru yavuga ivy'indwara ya Kim Jong-un yatanguye kuvugwa ku wa kabiri n'ikinyamakuru gica ku rubuga ngurukanabumenyi kiri mu minwe y'abahunze Koreya ya Ruguru. Umuntu atashatse kwivuga izina yabwiye ikinyamakuru Daily NK ko bisanzwe bizwi ko uyo mutegetsi asanzwe afise ingorane z'umutima kuva mu kw'umunani kw'umwaka uheze "ariko ko ibintu vyunyutse inyuma y'ingendo z'urutavanako yakoze ku musozi wa Paektu". Iyo nkuru yaciye itangura kuvugwa cane n'ibinyamakuru mpuzamakungu ariko bigasubiramwo ivyavuzwe n'ico kinyamakuru gusa. Ibinyamakuru bitandukanye vyagumye bifise iyo nkuru gushika aho bironkeye ayandi yavuga ko inzego zijejwe igendereza muri Koreya y'Epfo na Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika zariko zirakurikirana ayo makuru. Niho mu nyuma hasohoka inkuru ikomeye muri Amerika yavuga ko umukuru w'igihugu ca Koreya ya Ruguru aremvye cane inyuma y'ukubagwa umutima. Hagati aho, itangazo ryasohowe na leta ya Koreya y'Epfo hamwe n'amakuru ava mu biro vy'igendereza mu Bushinwa - yabwiye itororokanirizo ry'amakuru Reuters ko ayo makuru atari yo. Ni nkererwa ko abantu bamenya ko gushika ubu ata muntu n'umwe arigera abeshuza ko Kim Jong-un yabazwe canke atabazwa umutima. Amatangazo asohorwa na Koreya y'Epfo hamwe n'u Bushinwa asa n'ayabeshuza ko uyo mutegetsi wa Koreya ya Ruguru yoba aremvye. Abanyagihugu ba koreya ya ruguru basanzwe badahabwa amakuru yerekeye amagara y'umukuru w'igihugu cabo. Sibwo bwa mbere "amara igihe ataboneka" Mu 2014, Kim Jong-un yarigeze kumara iminsi 40 ataboneka kuva mu ntango z'ukw'icenda - ivyatumye havugwa vyinshi, harimwo n'ayavuga ko yari yakuwe ku butegetsi n'abandi banyapolitike bakomeye. Mu nyuma niho yerekanwa afise akabando ko kwishimikiza. Ibinyamakuru vya leta ico gihe vyaremeje ko yari afise ikibazo c'amagara, ariko ntivyashoboye kubeshuza ibihuha vyavuga ko yari arwaye 'goutte'. Mbega hoba hategurwa iki ku vyerekeye uwushobora kumusubirira? Nimba hari igishobora gushikira umukuru w'igihugu ca Koreya ya Ruguru, ntibiboneka neza uwoshobora kumusubirira. Kim Jong-un yaramaze imyaka itari mike ategurwa na se wiwe kurongora igihugu. Ingoma yo mu muryango wa Kim yaboneka ko yari yabungabunzwe. Mushiki wa Kim, Kim Yo-jong, asa n'uko ari we ashobora guhabwa ayo mahirwe. Hampande y'uko ari mu muryango wa Kim, niwe avugwa cane mu binyamakuru. Mu kwezi guheze,yarashikirije igihugu ijambo ubwa mbere, kandi niwe muntu yagumye aboneka cane kandi kenshi ari kumwe na musazawe mu makoraniro akomeye. Hagati aho, ubu ikiriho ni ugutegereza nimba Koreya ya Ruguru ishobora kugira ico ivuze kuri kino gihuhusi c'amajambo avugwa ku magara y'umukuru wayo. Ukuri ni uko ku bijanye n'amakuru ku bategetsi ba Koreya ya Ruguru, akenshi ni uko hama harimwo igipfungu.

Abagore bigaragambya muri Sudani Mu itangazo yasohoye, umuyobozi w'inama ya gisirikare iyoboye Sudani ubu, Jenerali Abdel Fattah al-Burhan, yavuze ko "bahagaritse ibiganiro ndetse n'ibyo bemeranyijweho mbere byose n'abahagarariye abigaragambya". Yavuze ko mu gihe cy'amezi icyenda hazaba amatora azarebererwa n'indorerezi zo mu gihugu n'izo mu mahanga. Batangaje ibi nyuma yo kunengwa n'amahanga - arimo Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Amerika n'umuryango w'ubumwe bw'Uburayi - yamaganye ihohoterwa rikorerwa abigaragambya bivugwa ko rimaze guhitana abagera kuri 30 kugeza ubu. Umuryango w'ubumwe bw'Afurika wamaganye iri hohoterwa unasaba ibindi bihugu kwirinda kwivanga mu bya Sudani. Abantu banyuranye muri Sudani barakajwe no kuba ibihugu bya Arabia Saoudite, Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Abarabu na Misiri biri gufasha inama ya gisirikare iyoboye Sudani. Inzego z'umutekano za Sudani zakomeje kugaragara zishinga ibirindiro mu nkengero y'ibiro bikuru bya gisirikare by'iki gihugu Iyi nama ya gisirikare hamwe n'abigaragambya bari barumvikanye inzibacyuho y'imyaka itatu ngo hajyeho ubutegetsi bw'abasiviri, ariko bananirwa kumvikana abazaba bagize ubuyobozi bwayo. Yafashe ubutegetsi mu kwezi kwa kane ubwo igitutu cy'imyigaragambyo y'abaturage cyari kimaze guhirika ku butegetsi Omar al-Bashir yari amazeho imyaka 30. Abaturage bakomeje gusaba ko abasirikare barekura ubutegetsi bakabuha abasiviri. Mu minsi micye ishize, imyigaragambyo yarushijeho gukara no gutuma ubuzima mu gihugu busa n'ubuhagarara. Abigaragambya mu murwa mukuru Khartoum batwitse amapine bagerageza gukumira inzego z'umutekano za Sudani

Mu gihe Robert Mugabe yokwitaba uwo mugwi, buzoba bubaye ubwa mbere abonetse ku mugaragaro kuva atanze imihoho Mugabe yagirije amashirahamwe yo hanze yimba ubutare ko "anyonora" kandi "yibisha amayeri" mu kiganiro yatanze ku mboneshakure y'igihugu mu 2016. "Amakompanyi yarivye akoresheje amayeri ubutunzi bwacu," ni ko yavuze, yongerako ko mu kigega ca reta caronse amahera make agera ku miriyaridi 15 z'amadolari. Ntibiramenyekana ko uwo mugabo w'imyaka 94 azokwemera kwitaba uwo mugwi. Robert Mugabe yeguye ku mabanga ya prezida wa Zimbabwe Mnangagwa yavuze ko ubuzima bw'igihugu bubandanya inyuma ya Mugabe Yahatiwe gutanga imihoho mu kwezi kwa cumi na kabiri mu mwaka uheze, inyuma y'aho igisirikare kimuhagarikiye mu mabanga, ariko akaba yagumanye uburusho bwose buhabwa uwahoze ari umukuru w'igihugu. Hagati aho, Ubwongerez bwavuze ko "buzoshigikira bwivuye inyuma" ukugaruka kwa Zimbabwe muri Commonwealth, bivuye ku biganiro vyabereye i Londres hagati ya Boris Johnson ajejwe imigenderanire n'amakungu hamwe na mugenzi we wa Zimbabwe Sibusiso Moyo. Gen Moyo ni we yamenyesheje ko igisirikare cafashe ubutegetsi mu kwezi kwa cumi na rimwe, vyatumye Mugabe atanga imihoho.

Palau Hotel iri ahitwa Koror Palau, ikirwa kigoswe n'inyanja ya pasifika y'ubururu butsitse, ni ahantu hagendwa cyane n'abakerarugendo. Hoteli Palau ya mbere yahafunguye mu 1982 niyo yatangiye kubakira. Mu 2019, abakerarugendo 90,000 bagiye kuri iki kirwa, abo ni inshuro eshatu z'abaturage b'iki gihugu. Mu 2017 imibare ya FMI yerekanye ko ubukerarugendo bwinjije 40% ku musaruro mbumbe w'iki gihugu. Mbere ya Covid byari byifashe bite Kuva mu mpera z'ukwezi kwa gatatu iki kirwa cyafunze imipaka yacyo. Ni kimwe mu bihugu 10 ku isi bitaravugwamo uwanduye Covid-19 (uvanyemo Korea ya ruguru na Turkmenistan). Nubwo iyi virus itaragera muri Palau ariko yangije byinshi, amahoteli na za restaurants nta muntu ubijyamo, amaduka yarafunzwe, hoteli zabaye ahantu ho gushyira abantu mu kato. Ibihugu bitarimo abanduye Covid-19 Brian Lee ukuriye Palau Hotel agira ati: "Inyanja hano ni nziza cyane kurusha ahandi hose kw'isi" Mbere ya Covid iyi hoteli ye ibyumba byayo byahoranaga abantu ku kigero kiri hagati ya 70 na 80%, ariko ibintu bifunzwe ntacyo yasigaranye. Abakozi be 20 yarabagumanye, agabanya amasaha bakoraga anabashakira indi mirimo nko kuvugurura, gukora amasuku n'ibindi. Ariko ibyo ntibabikora iteka ryose. Ati: "Nshobora gukomeza gukora andi mezi atandatu, ariko nyuma yayo sinzaba nkibishoboye, nzafunga". Brian ntacyo ashinja leta kuko ifasha abaturage basanzwe ndetse yabashije kurinda iyi ndwara kwinjira muri iki kirwa. Ati: "Numva barakoze akazi gakomeye". Gusa niba hoteli ya mbere kuri iki kirwa yugarijwe no gufunga, hari ikigomba gukorwa. Perezida w'iki gihugu aheruka gutangaza ko ingendo z'ingenzi z'indege zizasubukurwa tariki 01 z'ukwezi gutaha kwa cyenda. Inzira y'ikirere ya Taiwan, ahaturuka abakerarugendo benshi, nayo biranugwanugwa ko izafungurwa. Kuri Brian arumva ari cyera cyane. Ati: "Ntekereza ko bakwiye gutangira gufungura, yenda bagashyiraho uburyo bwo kurinda kw'abava mu bihugu nka New Zealand n'ahandi, naho ubundi nta warokoka hano". Muri kilometero 4,000 uvuye hano ugana mu burasirazuba muri iyi nyanja ngari, hari ibirwa bya Marshall nabyo bitarageramo iki cyorezo. Ariko kimwe na Palau, kuba nta virus ntibisobanuye ko nta cyangiritse. Ibi birwa nabyo bitunzwe ahanini n'ubukerarugendo bw'abava muri Aziya, mu bihugu byo muri ako karere no kuri 'Mainland' (leta zunze ubumwe za Amerika). Hoteli Robert Reimers imwe mu zikomeye muri iki gihugu ibyumba byayo byabaga birimo abantu ku kigero cyo hagati ya 75% na 88% mbere ya Covid, ariko kuva mu kwezi kwa gatatu imipaka yafungwa bari hagati ya 3% na 5%. Abakozi bo muri Vanuatu bategereje ubu bwato mu 2019 - ikintu ubu kidashobora kuba kuko imipaka ifunze Muri ibi birwa biteganyijwe ko imirimo igera kuri 700 izahagarara kubera Covid-19. Nibwo bwa mbere kuva mu 1997. Muri iyo mirimo 258 ni iyo muri hoteli na restaurants. Usibye ubukerarugendo no kwakira abantu, uburobyi mu birwa bya Marshall bwarazahaye cyane kubera ingamba zo kwirinda iki cyorezo. Iki gihugu cyategetse ko amato ava mu bihugu birimo Covid-19 atagomba kugaruka muri iki gihugu, amato azanye ibintu by'ingenzi nk'ibitoro n'ibicuruzwa agomba kujya mu kato iminsi 14 mbere yo kwinjira. Ingaruka ziraboneka, kohereza amafi mu mahanga avuye muri iki gihugu byagabanutseho 50%. Muri macye, ushobora guheza iyi virus kure ariko ntiwayinesha. Covid-19 ikugeraho mu buryo bumwe cyangwa ubundi. Sophia ukuriye hoteli Robert Reimers yizeye ko ibintu bizasubira nka mbere umwaka uhata. Ariko se bitagenze bityo? Ati: "Ubwo nyine ntabwo bizashoboka kuri twe."

Bimwe mu bikoresho byifashishwa mu gupima Covid-19 mu buryo bwihuse Leta y'ico gihugu kandi yaciye itegeka ko ivyari vyamaze gutangura gukoreshwa mu ntara zitandukanye bivanwayo. Ivyo bikoresho bitanga inyishu z'ibipimo mu minota hafi 30, bigashobora kwerekana abantu bashobora kuba baramaze kwandura. Ivyo birafasha abategetsi kumenya igitigiri c'abanyagihugu baba baranduye uwo mugera mu karere kanaka. Ubushinwa buriyamiriza ibivugwa n'Ubuhindi. Mw'itangazo ryasohowe uno munsi, Ji Rong avugira ibiro vy'ubuserukizi bw'Ubushinwa mu Buhindi avuga ati: "Ikintu nyamukuru dushira imbere mu bidandazwa vy'ubuvuzi u Bushinwa bugurisha ni uko biba bikwije ivya ngombwa". "Sivyiza na gato kandi nta n'iteka bitanga kubona hiyadukiza abantu bubahuka kuvuga ko ibidandazwa biva mu Bushinwa 'vyapfuye' mbere ugasanga bamaze no kuvyishiramwo". Ivyo bikoresho vyo gupima mu buryo bubangutse, mu bisanzwe ntibishobora gupima coronavirus ubwayo, ari co gituma abahinga bafise amakenga ku bijanye n'ikoreshwa ryavyo. Intara zitari nke zagumye zisaba zishimitse ikigo c'igihugu kijejwe gupima indwaramu Buhindi, Indian Medical Research Council (ICMR), ko cozirekurira zigakoresha ivyo bikoresho, bitumwe n'uko abanyagihugu bari bafise amakengako igihugu cabo ata kintu kinini kiriko kirakora kugira ngo gipime abantu baco. Mu ntango, ICMR yagumanye amakenga, ariko ivamwo iragondozwa, iratumako ivyo bikoresho mu makompanyi abiri. Hagati aho, haciye akanya gato gusa, intara zaciye zitangura kwidoga zivuga ko ivyo bikoresho vyari bifise urugero ruto cane rungana n'ibice 5% rwo gutanga inyishu zo nyazo. Izo ntara zimenyesha kandi ko zakoresheje ivyo bikoresho mu gupima abari basanzwe bazwi ko bamaze kwandura ariko inyishu z'ibipimo zisohotse zikerekana ko "ata mugera bafise". Mu nyuma n'ikigo ICMR kikaba cagiye kumenyesha ko ivyo bikoresho bidakwije ivya ngombwa. Ico kibazo cagiye kwunyuka ejo ku wa mbere, inyuma y'aho sentare nkuru igiriye umwihwezo w'amafaranga yarishwe kuri ivyo bipimo ica imenyesha ko leta yatanze amafaranga y'umurengera. Hagati aho, abategetsi babwiye ibinyamakuru vyo muri ico gihugu ko leta "atarufaranga na rumwe izotakaza" kubera ko umuzigo wose wahagaritse imbere y'uko banariha amahera.

Trump yavuze ko ibivugwa kuri GCHQ vyobazwa fox News atari ibiro vyiwe Ikigo c'iperereza rw'Abongereza GCHQ (Government Communications Headquarters) catanguye gushigwa mu majwi kuri tereviziyo, ko coba carabuye Trump mu gihe co kwiyamamaza kwiwe. Ayo majambo yaturutse kuri tereviuziyo Fox News, yasubiwemwo n'umuvugizi wo biro vy'umukuru w'igihugu Maison Blanche, Sean Spicer, ko ico kigo c' Abongereza GCHQ coba caratumwe na Barack Obama akiri perezida, gusuma urusaku kuri Trump. Abajijwe kuri ico kibazo, peerzida Donald trump yavuze ko ataco afise abivugako, kijany n' uko vyoba ari ukuri canke atari vyo, kuko amajambo yasubiwemwo n'ibiro vyiwe yaturutse Fox News, ko rero bikwiye kubazwa Fox News. Icegera c'umukuru wa NSA, Richard Ledgett, we yavuze ko ivyo birego bitagira ishingiro, ko ata nyungu Ubwongereza bwoba bubironderamwo. Imigenderanire hagati ya perezida Trump n'ibigo vy'iperereza vya Leta zunze Ubumwe za Amerika yakomeje gutosekara kuva mu matora yo mu kwa 11 umwaka uheze.

Perezida Macron avuga ko hari ibyago byuko igihugu cyarengerwa ubushobozi Bwana Macron yavuze ko bijyanye n'izi ngamba nshya, zitangira ejo ku wa gatanu, abantu bazemererwa gusa kuva mu rugo bagiye ku kazi k'ingenzi cyane cyangwa ku mpamvu zijyanye n'ubuvuzi. Ubucuruzi butari ubw'ingenzi cyane - nka za 'restaurants' n'utubari - buzafunga, ariko amashuri n'inganda bizakomeza gufungura imiryango. Imibare y'abicwa na Covid-19 ku munsi mu Bufaransa muri iki gihe ni yo ya mbere iri hejuru cyane muri iki gihugu ibayeho kuva mu kwezi kwa kane. Ku wa kabiri, mu Bufaransa hatangajwe abantu bashya 33,000 banduye coronavirus. Kugeza ubu mu Bufaransa hamaze gutangazwa abantu barenga miliyoni 1,2 bose hamwe banduye coronavirus, muri bo abarenga 35,000 imaze kubica nkuko imibare ya Kaminuza ya Johns Hopkins yo muri Amerika ibigaragaza. Bwana Macron yavuze ko igihugu gifite ibyago byo "kurengerwa ubushobozi muri iyi nkubiri ya kabiri y'ubwandu mu buryo budashidikanywaho izaba mbi cyane kurusha iya mbere" Hagati aho, Ubudage bugiye gushyiraho 'guma mu rugo' yihutirwa itazaba ikaze cyane nk'iyi yo mu Bufaransa, ariko irimo gufunga za 'restaurants', inzu z'imyitozo ngororangingo ndetse n'inzu za cinema. Kuki Ubufaransa bubikoze ubu? Mu ijambo ryanyuze kuri televiziyo ejo ku wa gatatu, Bwana Macron yavuze ko Ubufaransa bugomba "gufata za feri [freins/brakes] n'imbaraga" mu kwirinda ko "burengerwa n'ukwiyongera kw'icyorezo". Yagize ati: "Virusi irimo kuzenguruka ku muvuduko n'uburyo bw'iteganya ryo hasi cyane butigeze buteganya". Yongeyeho ko kimwe cya kabiri cy'ibitanda bivurirwaho indembe mu bitaro byose byo mu Bufaransa ubu byose biryamyeho abarwaye Covid-19 gusa. Perezida Macron yavuze ko bijyanye n'izi ngamba nshya, abantu bazajya basabwa kuzuza inyandiko basobanura impamvu bashaka kuva mu rugo, nkuko byari bimeze mu gihe cya 'guma mu rugo' ya mbere yo mu kwezi kwa gatatu. Guteranira hamwe kw'abantu birabujijwe. Bwana Macron yagize ati: "...Muzashobora kuva mu rugo ari uko gusa mugiye ku kazi, guhura na muganga, gufasha mwene wanyu, kugura ibicuruzwa by'ingenzi cyane cyangwa kugenda n'amaguru hafi y'urugo". Ariko yasobanuye ko serivisi za rubanda n'inganda bizakomeza gufungura imiryango, yongeraho ko ubukungu "butagomba guhagarara cyangwa kuzahara". Bwana Macron yongeyeho ko gusura abari mu nzu zita ku bageze mu zabukuru - byari bibujijwe muri 'guma mu rugo' ya mbere yatangiye mu kwezi kwa gatatu ikamara amezi abiri - ubu none byemewe. Izi ngamba nshya zizakurikizwa kugeza ku itariki ya mbere y'ukwezi kwa 12 kandi zizajya zongera gusuzumwa buri byumweru bibiri. Perezida Macron yavuze ko agifite "icyizere ko imiryango izashobora kongera guhura kuri Noheli".

Buhari ngo yagwanye intambara ya Biafra, abayisabira kwiyonkora batanazi ingaruka yateye. Imvukira zo mu karere ka Biafra ziri mu muhari wo kurondera ubwingenge bw'iyo ntara y'ubumanuko bushira ubuseruko bashaka ko kiyonkora ku gihugu ca Nigeria. Bwana Buhari avuga ko yarwanye intambara ya Biafra mu myaka 50 iheze, kandi ko abo bifuza ko ako karere kiyonkora ari bato cane ku buryo batibuka ingaruka mbi z'ico kibazo. Ariko rero yemeye ko bamwe mu banyagihugu baho bari bafise impamvu zumvikana z'ivyo baharanira. Yibukije ko ruswa arico kibazo gikomereye Nigeria kurusha ibindi muri kino gihe.

Prezida wa Eritrea Isaias Afwerki ariko aragendera Ethiopia ubwa mbere kuva bitanye mu mitwe bipfa urubibe mu 1998. Urwo rugendo rufise intumbero yo gutsimbataza imigenderanire inyuma y'aho ivyo bihugu bibiri bimenyeshereje ko intambara yarangiye. Amasezerano yo guhagarika intambara y'urubibe bihana yabaye hagati ya 1998-2000 ntiyigeze ashirwa mu ngiro na rimwe, kandi hagumye hari imishamirano hagati y'ivyo bihugu bibiri kuva ico gihe. .Ethiopia: "Dushaka urukundo, nta ngwano" na Eritrea .Ethiopia na Eritrea mu nzira yo kwumvikana .Umushikiranganji wa mbere wa Ethiopia yarahiye Ivyo bihugu kandi vyaremeranije gusubira kugiriranira ubucuti mu guhanahana ababiserukira hamwe no mu budandaji. Prezida Isaias Afwerki na Abiy Ahmed bariko bararamutsa abaje kumwakira Urugendo rwa prezida Afwerki n'imwe mu ntambwe zigana ku gusubiza hamwe hagati y'ivyo bihugu bibiri vyahora vyankana urunuka. Kuva ashitse ku butegetsi mu kwezi kwa kane, umushikiranganji wa mbere wa Ethiopia Abiy Ahmed yaramenyesheje ibintu vyinshi agiye guhindura, anavuga ko bagiye gusubira kugiriranira imigenderanire na Eritrea. Mu misi iheze, Abiy yaragiye ku mugwa mukuru wa Eritrea, ashira umukono ku masezerano yo kurangiza intambara.

Mbere Arabie Saoudite yahakanye ibirego by'uko iki gikomangoma Mohammed bin Salman na we ubwe yaba yaragize uruhare mu iyicwa rya Bwana Khashoggi Ubwo ku wa gatatu yagezaga ijambo ku bitabiriye inama y'iminsi itatu ku ishoramari mu murwa mukuru Riyadh, Mohammed bin Salman yavuze ko "icyaha cyakozwe cyababaje abaturage bose ba Arabie Saoudite" ariko ko atakwemera na rimwe ko iki gihugu gishyamirana na Turukiya mu buryo ubwo ari bwo bwose. Mbere, Arabie Saoudite yahakanye ibirego by'uko iki gikomangoma Mohammed bin Salman - mu by'ukuri akaba ari we mutegetsi wa Arabie Saoudite - na we ubwe yaba yaragize uruhare mu iyicwa rya Bwana Khashoggi. Mohammed bin Salman yavuze ko iyicwa ry'uyu munyamakuru ari "icyaha ndengakamere kidashobora gutangirwa impamvu iyo ari yo yose", nuko asezeranya ko "abagikoze bazabiryozwa...kera kabaye hazabaho ubutabera." Yavuze ko habayeho ubufatanye bwiza na Turukiya, ariko yongeraho ati: "Abantu benshi bari kugerageza kuba barusahurira mu nduru muri iki gihe kibabaje turimo, ngo bateze ubushyamirane hagati ya Arabie Saoudite na Turukiya. None ndashaka kubaha ubu butumwa: nta na rimwe ibyo muzabigeraho." "Nta bushyamirane buzigera bubaho." Igikomangoma Mohammed bin Salman (iburyo) ku wa kabiri yaganiriye na Salah (ibumoso), umuhungu wa Bwana Khashoggi, mu murwa mukuru Riyadh Aya ni yo magambo ya mbere igikomangoma Mohammed bin Salman avuze ku mugaragaro kuva Arabie Saoudite yakwemera ko Bwana Khashoggi yiciwe muri ambasade y'iki gihugu iri muri Turukiya. Bwana Khashoggi yapfuye ubwo yajyaga mu nyubako y'ibiro by'uhagarariye Arabie Saoudite i Istanbul muri Turukiya, ku itariki ya 2 y'uku kwezi kwa cumi. Icyo gihe yari yagiye gushaka ibyangombwa bimwemerera gukora ubukwe n'umukobwa wo muri Turukiya, nyuma yo gutandukana n'uwari umugore we. Arabie Saoudite yegetse iyicwa rye ku ntasi zayo "zataye umurongo". Perezida Recep Tayyip Erdogan wa Turukiya yavuze ko iyicwa ry'uyu munyamakuru wanengaga ubutegetsi bwa Arabie Saoudite, ari "ubwicanyi bufitanye isano na politiki" bwateguranywe ubwitonzi n'abakozi b'ubutasi bwa Arabie Saoudite bafatanyije n'abandi bategetsi b'iki gihugu. Muri iyi nama y'iminsi itatu ivuga ku ishoramari, abategetsi ba Arabie Saoudite bagerageje kugaragaza ko nta gikuba cyacitse muri iki gihugu, ariko Khalid al-Falih, minisitiri w'ibikomoka ku ngufu [z'amashanyarazi] ku wa kabiri yemeye ko habayeho "akaga" katewe n'ikibazo cya Bwana Khashoggi. Ku wa kabiri, igikomangoma Mohammed bin Salman w'imyaka 33 y'amavuko ufatwa nk'umutegetsi mukuru w'iki gihugu cya mbere ku isi mu kohereza mu mahanga ibikomoka kuri peteroli, yabigenje nka se, umwami Salman. Yakoranye inama n'abo mu muryango wa Bwana Khashoggi. Bamwe bashima amavugurura Mohammed bin Salman yakoze mu gihugu, ariko hari n'abamunenga cyane kubera uko iki gihugu cyitwara mu kibazo cya Yemen na Qatar, ndetse hari na bamwe basaba ko yasimburwa ku butegetsi kubera ikibazo cya Bwana Khashoggi, mu gihe hacyekwa ho hari uko yabigizemo uruhare.

Mu ntangiriro z'ukwezi kwa gatandatu ubwo bashyinguraga umuntu wa mbere wishwe na Covid-19 mu Rwanda Brazil niyo iza inyuma y'ibindi, Leta zunze ubumwe za Amerika nazo ziza mu bihugu 10 bya nyuma bihagaze nabi imbere y'iki cyorezo. Lowy Institute ivuga ko yashingiye ku bipimo bitandatu ikora ubwo bushakashatsi n'ingereranya ry'ibihugu, ibyo birimo ingano yo gupima iyi virusi ku mubare w'abaturage, imibare y'abandura, imibare y'abapfa, gusesengura amakuru atangwa n'izindi. Iyi raporo igira iti: "Ubishyize hamwe, ibi bipimo byerekana niba ibihugu bihagaze neza cyangwa nabi mu guhangana n'iki cyorezo" Inyuma ya New Zealand ya mbere - igihugu cyabashije guhashya rwose iki cyorezo kubera gahunda za 'guma mu rugo' no gupima benshi - Vietnam, Taiwan, Thailand, Cyprus, u Rwanda, Iceland, Australia, Latvia na Sri Lanka nibyo biza muri 10 bya mbere. Mu kwezi kwa gatatu umwaka ushize, u Rwanda rwatangaje 'guma mu rugo' (lockdown) mu gihugu hose mbere y'ibindi bihugu byo muri Africa yo munsi y'ubutayu bwa Sahara, icyo gihe hari hamaze kuboneka 17 gusa banduye Covid. Bamwe mu batavugarumwe n'ubutegetsi mu Rwanda, n'abantu ku giti cyabo, bagaragaje ko izi ngamba zari zikomeye cyane kandi zagize ingaruka mbi ku mibereho y'abatunzwe no guca inshuro. Mu mezi yakurikiyeho, ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda bwashimwe n'amahanga kwitwara neza no kwifashisha ikoranabuhanga rigezweho mu guhangana n'iki cyorezo. Imibare y'abandura n'abapfa nayo yakomeje kuba hasi. Imiryango yo mu gihugu no mu mahanga iharanira uburenganzira bwa muntu yo yanenze ubutegetsi gukoresha imbaraga z'umurengera mu kubahiriza amabwiriza yo kwirinda iki cyorezo, kuko hari n'abishwe. Inkubiri ya kabiri ya coronavirus yazamuye imibare y'abandura n'abapfa ku isi. Mu Rwanda, muri uku kwezi gusa abanduye Covid-19 bashya barenze 1/3 cy'abanduye 14,166 bose hamwe kugeza ubu. Naho abishwe n'iki cyorezo muri uku kwezi konyine barenze 1/2 cy'abo yishe 183 bose hamwe kuva yahagera, nk'uko biboneka mu mibare itangazwa na minisiteri y'ubuzima. Mu kwezi kwa gatanu 2020, izi ni zimwe muri 'robots' minisiteri y'ubuzima yavuze ko zaje gufasha abaganga kuvura Covid-19 Raporo ya Lowy Institute itondekanya ibi bihugu ishingiye kuri ibyo bipimo bitandatu igatanga amanota ku 100, u Rwanda rufite 80%, ikindi gihugu cya Africa kiri hafi kuri urwo turonde ni Togo ya 15. Ku rutonde rw'ibihugu 98 byakozweho ubu bushakashatsi Brazil ya nyuma ifite amanota 4%, naho Leta zunze ubumwe za Amerika ya 94 ikagira 17%. Muri Brazil Covid-19 imaze kwica abagera ku 220,000 naho muri America imaze kwica abarenga 430,000. Ibi bihugu byombi mu gihe cy'iki cyorezo byayobowe n'abategetsi boroheje iki cyorezo. Ba perezida Jair Bolsonaro na Donald Trump bombi barwanyije kwambara agapfukamunwa na gahunda za 'guma mu rugo', nyuma nabo ubwabo baje kurwara Covid-19. Ibihugu nk'Ubushinwa, Tanzania, Burundi n'ibindi ntibiri kuri uru rutonde kuko "nta mibare bitanga" nk'uko iki kigo kibivuga. Iyi raporo ivuga ko nta gihugu cyatsinze intambara yo kurwanya iki cyorezo kuko ikomeje, ahubwo ari uburyo bwo kukirwanya butandukanye. Igira iti: "Ibihugu bimwe byakirwanyije neza kurusha ibindi - ibindi byitwara nabi... Muri rusange ibihugu bifite abaturage bacye n'inzego zikomeye bifite amahirwe mu guhangana n'iki cyorezo." Abanduye Covid-19 ku isi ubu bamaze kurenga miliyoni 100, hafi miliyoni 2.2 imaze kubica.

Yahya Jammeh yahunze igihugu nyuma yo gutsindwa amatora none ubu aba mu buhungiro muri Guinee Equatoriale. Iki cyemezo cy'urukiko kirareba konti za banki hafi 90, amazu arenze 130 ndetse n'ibigo by'ubucuruzi 14. Uyu muministri yavuze ko ibi byabaye ngombwa ngo kubera ko bimaze kugaragara ko Bwana Jammeh yabikuje atabiherewe uruhushya amafaranga arenga miliyoni 50 z'amadolari yari ku makonti ya leta. Yongeyeho ko ibi ashobora kuba ari igitonyanga mu nyanja. Yahya Jammeh yahunze igihugu nyuma yo gutsindwa amatora none ubu aba mu buhingiro muri Guinee Equatoriale.

Umwe mu bagore bo muri Iran bari bageze ku kibuga cy'umupira bwa mbere mu buzima bwabo Mu mwaka wa 1979, nibwo abagore bo muri Iran baherukaga gukandagira ku kibuga cy'umupira w'amaguru bagiye kureba umukino. Ariko ku wa gatatu ubwo ikipe y'igihugu cyabo cya Iran yakinaga n'ikipe ya Espanye mu mukino w'igikombe cy'isi cya 2018 kiri kubera mu Burusiya, abafana b'abagore muri Iran bagiye ku kibuga cya Azadi mu murwa mukuru Tehran kureba uwo mukino barebera ku byapa binini bigaragaza amashusho y'umukino uri kuba. Nyuma y'uwo mukino, abayobozi b'ikibuga cy'umupira w'amaguru cya Azadi bavuze ko "nta kibazo gihari" ku bagore bazifuza no kureba umukino Iran izakina na Portugal ku wa mbere mu gikombe cy'isi. Amafoto abo bagore bifashe bakoresheje telefoni zabo zigendanwa yakwiragiye ku mbuga nkoranyambaga. Ndetse ku rubuga rwayo rwa Twitter, ikipe y'igihugu ya Iran yashyizeho ifoto igaragaza umugore uri mu myanya abafana bicaramo ku kibuga afite ibendera ry'igihugu cya Iran. Mu kwezi kwa gatanu abagore batanu bo muri Iran bashoboye kwinjira mu kibuga cy'umupira w'amaguru cya Azadi biyoberanyije nk'abagabo Mu kwezi kwa gatanu, abagore batanu bo muri Iran bashoboye kwinjira mu kibuga cy'umupira w'amaguru cya Azadi. Ariko icyo gihe bari biyoberanyije nk'abagabo, bishyizeho ubwanwa n'imisatsi nk'iby'abagabo. Nubwo nta tegeko ririho ribuza abagore kugera ku bibuga by'imikino muri iki gihugu cya Iran gitsimbaraye ku migenzo ya kera, abakuru b'idini banze koroshya amabwiriza ndetse akenshi abapolisi babuza abagore kugera ku bibuga by'imikino. Mu bihe byashize, abagore bahaniwe kujya kureba imikino. Nko mu kwezi kwa gatatu k'uyu mwaka wa 2018, abagore 35 barafunzwe bazira kugerageza kureba umukino w'umupira w'amaguru. Mu Burusiya, abagore bo muri Iran bagiye kureba imikino y'igikombe cy'isi imbona nkubone na bo bishimiye kubasha kureba umukino w'umupira w'amaguru ku nshuro ya mbere. Byitezwe ko abagore bazashobora kwitabira indi mikino y'igikombe cy'isi izerekanwa muri Iran. Ariko hari benshi bemeza ko bishoboka ko uru ruhushya rwo kureba imikino y'umupira w'amaguru rutazakomeza ku mikino ya shampiyona y'umupira w'amaguru muri Iran yimirije gutangira.

Alex Morgan (ibumoso) yatsinze ibitego bitanu wenyine Iyi kipe ifite igikombe giheruka, mu gice cya mbere yari yatsinze ibitego 3 - 0, mu minota 10 gusa ya mbere y'igice cya kabiri bahise batsinda ibitego bine, bongera gutsinda ibitego bitandatu mu mino 16 ya nyuma. Alex Morgan yatsinze ibitego bitanu wenyine naho Rose Lavelle na Samantha Mewis batsinda ibitego bibiri buri umwe, Lindsey Horan, Megan Rapinoe, Mallory Pugh na Carli Lloyd batsinda kimwe kimwe. Amerika yahise ivanaho umuhigo wari ufitwe n'Ubudage bwanyagiye Argentine 11 - 0 mu gikombe cy'isi cya 2007. Abakinnyi ba Thailand si bo barose ifirimbi ya nyuma ivuga, bamwe muri bo nka Suchawadee Nildhamrong ntibihanganye ahubwo barize. Hari abakinnyi ba Amerika bagiye kwihanganisha bagenzi babo kubera akaga babateje. Amerika imaze gutsindwa umukino umwe gusa mpuzamahanga kuva mu kwezi kwa karindwi 2017 ndetse ikaba imaze gutsinda imikino irindwi yikurikiranya, itsindamo ibitego 36 byose hamwe, ikaba itaratsindwa igitego na kimwe muri itanu muri yo. Ikipe ya Thailand ubu ni ubwa kabiri igeze mu gikombe cy'isi. Ubwo iheruka guhura na Amerika mu 2016 mu mukino wa gicuti, nabwo Amerika yabapfunyikije ibitego 9-0. Umutoza wayo Nuengruethai Sathongwien yavuze ko mu mikino ibiri basigaranye mu matsinda bagiye kugerageza kuzanzamuka bakitwara neza nyuma y'uku gutsindwa bikabije. Ku itariki 16 y'uku kwezi kwa gatandatu, Amerika izahura na Chili naho Thailand ihure na Suède - muri iki gikombe cy'isi kiri kubera i Paris mu murwa mukuru w'Ubufaransa.

Perezida Trump na Perezida wa Korea yepfo Moon Jae-in (iburyo). Yavuze ko hari ibyo Korea ya ruguru igomba kubanza kuzuza kugirango ngo ashobore guhura n'umukuru wayo ngo ariko nibitaba bashobora kuzahura mu nyuma. Ibyo Perezida Trump yabitangaje igihe yakiraga umukuru wa Korea yepfo Moon Jae-in mu biro bye bya White House. Korea ya ruguru yavuze ko ishobora kuburizamo uwo mubonano niba Leta zunze ubumwe za Amerika zikomeje gutsimbarara ko icyo gihugu gihara nta mananiza umugambi wacyo wo gushaka gukora intwaro za nucleaire. Kim Jong-un (ibumoso) igihe yahuraga na Perezida wa Korea yepfo mu kwezi kwa kane. Trump nta bisobanuro yatanze ku byo Amerika ishaka ko leta ya Korea ya ruguru ibanza gukora. Iyi nama hagati y'abo bakuru b'ibihugu bombi yari iteganijwe ku itariki ya 12 z'ukwezi gutaha muri Singapore. Yabanjirijwe n'inama hagati y'abakuru ba Korea zombi mu kwezi kwa kane.

Uburyo igisasu kinini bita MOAB (Nyina wa vyose) giturika Nta kuravugwa ku vyerekeye nimba imihana yo hafi yaho yarashikiriwe n'ico gitero. Abategetsi ba gisirikare ba Amerika na Afghansitani babujije abanyamakuru canke abandi banyagihguu basanzwe kuja ahaturikiye ico gisasu. Umugaba w'ingabo za Leta zune Ubumwe za Amerika ziri muri Afghanistani, General John Nicholson, yavuze ko igisasu gikuru ca vyose mu bitari ivyo mu bwoko bwa nuclaire catewe gitumberejwe ibabanza bizwi neza.

U Burundi buvuga ko "butazosubira kwihanganira agasomborotso k'u Rwanda" Umunyamabanga wa leta y'u Burundi akaba n'umuvugizi wayo, Prosper Ntahorwamiye, yavuze ko u Burundi ''buzofata ingingo zikwiye kuko budashobora kwihanganira ibitero vyisubiriza n'agasomborotso'' bikorwa n'u Rwanda. Bwana Ntahorwamiye yavuze ivyo inyuma y'igitero cabaye mw'ijoro ryo kuwa 16 rishira 17 muri uku kwezi kigahitana abantu n'ibintu muri komine Mabayi iri mu ntara ya Cibitoke mu burengero bw'u Burundi. Ku ruhande rw'u Rwanda, Amb. Olivier Nduhungirehe, avuga kuri ico gitero, yavuze ko ivyo ari ivyagiriji bisanzweko bidafise ishingiro. Inyuma y'ico gitero, Maj Emmanuel Gahongano ayobora ibiro bishinzwe amakuru mu ngabo z'u Burundi, yatangaje ko abateye baturutse mu Rwanda bakanasubirayo. Umuvugizi wa Leta y'u Burundi yagabishije amakungu ko atagikozwe k'uco yise ''agasomborotso k'u Rwanda ku Burundi'' umutekano mu bihugu vyo mu karere k'ibiyaga binini ushobora guhungabana. Prosper Ntahorwamiye yagize ati Leta isubiye ''gusaba ishirahamwe mpuzamakungu ONU, umuryango w'ubumwe bwa Afrika, akarere k'ibiyaga binini n'umuryango wa Afrika y'ubuseruko kuva mugacerere''. Ngo iyo miryango itegerezwa gufasha mw'iyubahirizwa ry'amasezerano mpuzamakungu y'akarere ajanye n'umutekano, amahoro n'iterambere. Yavuzeko Leta y'u Burundi yasavye ubunyamabanga bw'ishirahamwe rihurikiyemwo ibihugu bigize akarere k'ibiyaga binini gutohoza uruhara rw'u Rwanda mu gitero cabaye italiki 10 mu kwezi kw'indwi 2015 muri komine Kabarore mu ntara ya Kayanza. Imigenderanire hagati y'u Rwanda n'u Burundi imeze nabi kuva mu 2015 Ariko ngo iryo shirahamwe ryamenyesheje ko ivyo birego vy'u Burundi ku Rwanda ata fatiro vyari bifise. Kuva mu 2015 inyuma y'imyiyerekano y'abiyamiriza gusubira kwitoza kwa Pierre Nkurunziza n'uguhakwa guhirika ubutegetsi vyakurikiye, imigenderanire hagati y'ivyo bihugu ntiyifashe neza. U Burundi bwagumye bwagiriza u Rwanda gufata mu mugongo imigwi ihungabanya umutekano mu Burundi, u Rwanda narwo rukavuga ko hari abarudurumbanya bafashwa n'ingabo z'u Burundi. Buri gihugu gihakana ivyo cagirizwa n'ikindi, ariko ibitero vy'abitwaje ibirwanisho yaba ku butaka bw'u Rwanda canke bw'u Burundi biramaze kuba.

Uhereye ibumoso; Christine, Agnès, Térence na Egide imbere y'urukiko uyu munsi Térence Mpozenzi, Agnès Ndirubusa, Egide Harerimana na Christine Kamikazi bakatiwe gufungwa imyaka ibiri n'amezi atandatu bahamijwe "ubufatanyacyaha mu guhungabanya umutekano w'igihugu". Antoine Kaburahe umukuru w'ikinyamakuru Iwacu, yanditse kuri Twitter ashimira umuryango w'ubumwe bwa Afurika ko wohereje abawuhagarariye gukurikirana uru rubanza i Bubanza. Clément Retirakiza, wunganira abanyamakuru baregwa yabwiye BBC ko bashima ko mu iburanisha uyu munsi abacamanza bahaye umwanya ungana impande ziburana. Ati: "Twe twabwiye abacamanza ibyo twaneguye urubanza rwa mbere, tubiburanaho n'umushikirizamanza...Turebye uko byagenze turabona ko sentare ishobora kubarekura". Bwana Retirakiza avuga ko icyo bashingiraho ari uko bagaragaje ko aba banyamakuru bafunzwe bariho bakora umwuga wabo bemerewe n'amategeko. Ati: "Kujya i Musigati (aho bafatiwe) ni urugendo rw'umwuga bakoze rwemewe n'amategeko y'igihugu n'amategeko mpuzamahanga u Burundi bwasinye. "Turizera rero ko abacamanza bazasoma neza amategeko nk'uko tuyatahura". Aba banyamakuru baregwa ubufatanyacyaha mu guhungabanya umutekano w'igihugu igihe habaga igitero cy'inyeshyamba i Bubanza mu burengerazuba bw'u Burundi, igitero cyigambwe n'umutwe wa RED-Tabara. Mu iburanisha, kimwe mu bimenyetso ubushinjacyaha buheraho bushinja abaregwa ni ubutumwa umwe mu baregwa yandikiranye kuri WhatsApp n'umunyamakuru mugenzi wabo wahungiye mu mahanga ubwo bariho bajya gutara iyo nkuru, bavugana kuri icyo gitero. Urukiko rwavuze ko uru rubanza ruzasomwa nyuma y'iminsi 30.

Abategetsi bavuga ko amatohoza akibandanya kuri iri duka ry'inkoho rya Jefferson Umukuru w'igiporisi w'akarere vyabereyemwo avuga ko "uwarashe ubwa mbere" yishe abantu babiri, bituma abandi bari muri iyo duka nabo batangura kurasa n'inkoho bari bafise. Aba bantu babiri hamwe n'uyo muntu yatanguye kurasa bishwe, imyidondoro yabo ikaba itarashirwa ahabona. Abategetsi bavuga ko amatohoza abandanya ku catumye haduka uko kurasana kw'iduka ry'inkoho rya Jefferson, muri karitiye iri ku mpera z'igisagara ca Nouvel Orléans/New Orleans. Umukuru w'igiporisi mu karere ka Jefferson Joseph Lopinto yabwiye abanyamakuru ati: "Biboneka ko abantu batari bake baciye batana mu mitwe n'uyo muntu yatanguye kurasa". "Ku vyo ntahura, hari benshi barashe hano, bamwe bafise kuba bari abakiriya, abakozi canke abasanzwe begereye hano nyene". "Turiko turagerageza kwegeranya amakuru yose, kimwe ku kindi". Tyrone Russell yari kuri iryo duka igihe uku kurasana kwaduka ku mugoroba w'ejo ku wa gatandatu. Yabwiye itororokanirizo ry'amakuru Associated Press ati: "Twumvise amasasu n'induru. Abaporisi bashitse baciye baduherekeza turasohoka. Nabona ibiyo vyamenaguritse vyasanzaye ahantu hose ...vyari biteye ubwoba". Uyu mukuru w'igiporisi avuga ko aba bantu babiri bakomeretse bariko baravurwa kandi ko bameze neza.

Bwana Kabuga azasubira mu rukiko ku wa gatatu aburana ku kuvanwa mu Bufaransa, ibyo uruhande rwe rutifuza, mu gihe urwego rwasigaye rurangiza imirimo yasizwe n'urukiko mpuzamahanga rwa Arusha rusaba ko ajyanwa muri gereza y'ishami ryarwo i La Haye mu Buholandi. Koloneri Emeraux yabwiye ikinyamakuru Financial Times ko mu ntangiriro y'uyu mwaka aribwo bahawe amakuru na polisi y'Ubwongereza ko Kabuga ashobora kuba ari mu Bufaransa cyangwa mu Bubiligi. Polisi y'Ubwongereza yari imaze kubona ko umwe mu bana (ni umuntu mukuru) ba Bwana Kabuga buri gihe yavaga mu Bwongereza akajya mu Bubiligi no mu Bufaransa nk'uko iki kinyamakuru kibivuga. Bifashishije ikoranabuhanga rya telefone bakurikiranye ingendo z'uyu muntu i Asnières-sur-Seine aho Bwana Kabuga yafatiwe, bakurikirana n'abandi bantu bo mu muryango we bahagendaga. Ubwo mu Bufaransa bahagarikaga ubuzima busanzwe (lockdown) kubera coronavirus, umwe muri bo we yakomeje kujya aho Kabuga yari acumbitse. Koloneri Emeraux avuga ko bemejwe neza ko uwafashwe ari Kabuga nyuma y'ibipimo yakorewe bahereye ku bindi bipimo bya DNA (ADN) byari byarafashwe ubwo yacikaga abamuhigaga amaze kuvurirwa mu Budage mu 2007. Ati: "Kuri twe, abantu bashakishwaga kurusha abandi ku isi ni babiri. Hari [Osama] Bin Laden ubu wapfuye... inyuma ye hari Félicien Kabuga wari nimero ya kabiri". Kugeza ubu ntiharamenyekana abafashije Kabuga kwihisha ubutabera mu myaka 26 ishize, Koloneri Emeraux avuga ko na bo batazi neza igihe Bwana Kabuga yagereye mu Bufaransa. Muri Kenya aho bivugwa ko yahungiye nyuma ya Jenoside, umunyamakuru William Manuhe wagerageje kumushyikiriza ubutasi bw'Amerika bwa FBI yishwe mbere gato y'uko abigeraho nk'uko mukuru we yabibwiye BBC. John-Allan Namu, undi munyamakuru wo muri Kenya wagerageje gukurikirana aho Bwana Kabuga yari yihishe, na we yabwiye BBC ko yahuye n'ibibazo kugeza ubwo ari we ujya mu bwihisho. Aba bombi bemeza ko Kabuga yari akingiwe ikibaba n'abantu bakomeye. Bwana Namu avuga ko abari bamukingiye ikibaba atari abo muri Kenya gusa ahubwo no mu yandi mahanga yagendagamo. Nyuma y'ifatwa rya Kabuga, Ahishakiye Naphtal, umunyamabanga nshingwabikorwa wa IBUKA, umuryango uharanira inyungu z'abarokotse Jenoside mu Rwanda, yabwiye BBC ko "muri iyi myaka y'ubutegetsi bwa Emmanuel Macron mu Bufaransa hari byinshi byahindutse" mu gukurikirana abaregwa jenoside.

Tariki 27 z'ukwezi gushize kwa munani imodoka zatwaye icyiciro cya mbere cy'impunzi zivuye i Mahama zitahutse mu Burundi Hazaba hashize ibyumweru bibiri icyiciro cya mbere cy'izo mpunzi - zari hafi 500 - gitahutse. Nibwo bwa mbere hari habayeho gucyura impunzi biteguwe kandi byumvikanyweho n'ibihugu byombi. Ku wa kane w'icyumweru gishize hongeye kuba inama yahuje intumwa z'ibihugu byombi na UNHCR ku gucyura icyiciro cya kabiri cy'impunzi, ari nayo yemeje itariki ya 10 z'uku kwezi. Elise Villechalane, umuvugizi wa UNHCR mu Rwanda, avuga ko bari "kuzuza ibisabwa ku bantu hafi 550" ngo bazahaguruke ku wa kane. Mu butumwa yandikiye BBC, Madamu Villechalane yagize ati: "Birumvikana ko hari abashobora kutaba babyujuje ngo bagende, hari n'abashobora kwisubiraho ku munota wa nyuma ariko tugomba gucyura abagera kuri 500. "Umubare wa nyuma uzamenyekana kuri uwo munsi abantu buriye imodoka". UNHCR ivuga ko mbere yo gutahurwa, izi mpunzi zibanza gusuzumwa coronavirus. Ubwo impunzi za mbere zacyurwaga zivuye i Mahama, UNHCR yavuze ko hatahuwe hafi 500 kuko ikigo cy'agateganyo kiri ku ruhande rw'u Burundi ari wo mubare kibasha kwakira. Icyo gihe umuvugizi wa ministeri y'umutekano mu Burundi yabwiye BBC ko biteguye "kwakira impunzi zigera ku 1,200" icya rimwe kuko bateguye ibigo bibiri byabasha kubakira. 3,000 bashaka gutaha Kugeza ubu impunzi 3,637 zigizwe n'imiryango 958 zimaze kwiyandikisha muri iyi nkambi ngo zitahe UNHCR ibivuga. Kuzicyura byakurikiye amagambo ya Perezida Ndayishimiye washinje u Rwanda "gufata nk'ingwate impunzi z'Abarundi", ibyo minisitiri w'ububanyi n'amahanga w'u Rwanda yahakanye avuga ko "atari rwo rufite impunzi nyinshi z'Abarundi mu karere". Inkambi ya Mahama ibamo impunzi zirenga 60,000 Ubwo impunzi za mbere zacyurwaga, mu buryo budasanzwe, ku mupaka wa Nemba ku ruhande rw'u Rwanda hari umunyamabanga uhoraho muri minisiteri y'ibikorwa by'ubutazi naho ku ruhande rw'u Burundi hari ba minisitiri w'ubuzima n'uw'ubutegetsi bw'igihugu. Madamu Villechalane yabwiye BBC ko kugeza ku wa gatanu w'icyumweru gishize mu nkambi ya Mahama "hari hamaze kwiyandikisha hafi impunzi 3,000" zishaka gutaha. Inkambi ya Mahama ibamo impunzi zirenga 60,000 z'Abarundi, izindi zirenga 10,000 mu mijyi ya Kigali na Huye nk'uko UNHCR ibivuga.

Mu 1988 no mu 2008 Joe Biden yaripfuje kurongora US, iyi nshuro yaremewe guserukira abademokarate Ni we perezida wa kabiri wo mw'idini gatolika ubayeho mu mateka ya Amerika, nyuma ya John F Kennedy. Uyu yahoze ari icegera ca Barack Obama, ni we yagenywe n'umugambwe w'abaharanira demokarasi, Democratic Party, kugira ngo awuserukire mu matora y'uyu mwaka. Ku banywanyi biwe, ni umuhinga mu bijanye na politike mpuzamakungu, akaba yaramaze imyaka itari mike i Washington, afise akarimi gasosa. Ni umuntu akundwa cane mbere ashobora no gushikira abanyagihugu bato bato, akaba kandi n'umuntu yashoboye guhangana n'ibibazo bigoye vy'ubuzima bwiwe. Ku bamunegura, ni wa muntu abona ko atawumusumvya uburambe, ibi bikamutuma aba umuntu yoroshe kugwa mw'ikosa, bamwagiriza kandi ko ari wa muntu akunda cane abagore. Imvuzi ya cane? Joe Biden yinjiye muri politike bamwe mu batora muri kino gihe bataranavuka Biden ni umuntu amenyereye cane imyiyamamazo - yatanguye guhiganirwa kuba umukenguzamateka mu 1973 (haciye imyaka 47), hanyuma atangura kwiyamamaza kuba umukuru w'igihugu mu 1988. Ni umuntu amenyereye kuryosharyosha abatora, ariko kandi ni wa muntu umwanya wose ashobora gutuma ibintu biyangara, ijambo rimwe gusa ibintu bikaba nabi. Igihe yiyamamariza kuba umukuru w'igihugu ubwa mbere (iri rigize gatatu), yaratwawe n'igihababu arayoba ari imbere y'isinzi ry'abantu, ivyatumye mbere imyiyamamazo ihera itaranatangura. Biden ni umuntu amenyereye cane gushikiriza amajambo mu makoraniro, ariko ni wa muntu akunda kuyoba Mu makoraniro, yatanguye avuga ati: "Ba sokuruza banje barakoze mu butare bw'ibizuku - nyiramugengeri mu Kinyarwanda - (mines de charbon) mu karere k'uburaruko bushira ubuseruko bwa Pennsylvania", kandi ko yashavujwe n'uko batigeze baronka akaryo ko kuronka ubuzima bipfuza. Hagati aho, nta n'umwe muri basekuruza biwe yigeze akora muri ubwo butare - iri ni iryungane yivye (co kimwe n'ayandi atari make) mw'ijambo ry'umunyapolitike w'Umwongereza Neil Kinnock, wewe yari afise abavyeyi bimba ubwo butare bw'ibizuku. Iki ni co ca mbere muri vyinshi vyagiye kwitwa "amabombe ya Joe". Mu kwirata ku vyerekeye ivyo yakoze muri politike mu 2012, yateye ibibazo isinzi ry'abantu igihe avuga ati: "Mwa bantu mwe, nagomba ndababwire ko nzi abaperezida umunani bose, batatu muri bo twagiranye imigenderanire idasanzwe", aho nyene aba yitaye mw'isanganya kuko abantu batahuye ko yakoranye imibonano mpuzabitsina nabo, aho gutahura ko bari abagenzi pfa mpfe biwe. Biden yari icegera ca Barack Obama kuva mu 2009 gushika mu 2017 Mu gihe yari icegera ca Perezida Obama mu 2009 yarababaje abantu igihe avuga ko "bashobora kunanirwa ku rugero rw'ibice mirongo itatu kw'ijana" mu bijanye n'ubutunzi. Kumbure kandi ni amahirwe yagiriwe yo gutorwa ngo yiyamamarize hamwe n'umukuru w'igihugu wa mbere w'umwirabure, ariko yari yamuvuze mu buryo butabereye, ko ari "Umunyamerika wa mbere akomoka muri Afrika avuga neza, asa neza, afise isuku akaba umusore w'intore". N'aho yavuze aya majambo, yarashigikiwe cane n'abirabure benshi muri ino myiyamamazo, ariko rero yagiye kuvyonona igihe yari mu kiganiro n'umunyamakuru w'umwirabure Charlamagne Tha God akavuga amajambo yabaye akaga kuri we, mu kuvuga ati: "Nimba ufise ikibazo co kumenya ko uri uwanje canke uwa Trump, aho ntuba uri umwirabure". Aha yavuze uku kugira ngo yerekane ko umwirabure wese ategerezwa kumutora. Biden karamuciyemwo ari mu kiganiro gishikirizwa na Charlamagne Tha God Iri jambo ryonyene ryaratumye ibinyamakuru bimudugako, ariko abajejwe imyiyamamazo yiwe baragerageza gusukamwo mabisi mu kugerageza kwerekana ko atashatse kuvuga y'uko Abanyamerika bafise amamuko muri Afrika bategerezwa gutora we. Biroroshe cane gutahura igituma umunyamakuru wa NY Magazine yanditse mu mwaka uheze ko "abajejwe imyiyamamazo ya Biden basa n'abitayeho gusumba kugerageza kumubuza kuvuga ivyo atateguye". Umukambwe mu vy'imyiyamamazo Biden ni umuntu ashoboye gukoranya abantu bato bato, ibidashobokera abanyapolitike benshi Biden ni umuntu ashoboye gukoranya abantu bato bato akabatera akarimi gasosa ata n'ijambo yateguye ahejeje agaca abajamwo - bakaramukanya bagatwenga, akifotozanya nabo kurya kw'abanyamuziki bari mu bafana babo. John Kerry yigeze kuba umunyamabanga wa leta mbere aranahiganirwa kwiyamamariza kurongora ico gihugu, yabwiye ikinyamakuru New Yorker magazine ati: "Arabakwega akabiyegereza, maze akabahobera, eka agatera inkuru nabo, ni umunyapolitike w'amayeri menshi". Ariko rero uko kwiyorosha kwiwe ni ingorane kuri we. Ibirego Biden aramaze kwagirizwa n'abagore benshi ku nyifato yiwe Mu mwaka uheze, abagore umunani baragirije Biden ko yabakuyakuye, akabagwa mu nda no kubasoma mu buryo butabereye, mbere n'ibinyamakuru vyo muri Amerika birerekana amareresi yerekana ingene yagumbira cane abagore mu makoraniro rusangi - rimwe na rimwe akaboneka umengo ariko yimotereza n'imishatsi yabo. Mu kwishura kuri ivyo vyamuvuzweko, Bwana Biden avuga ko muri kamere yiwe ata buryarya ashiramwo iyo ariko aganira n'abantu. Ariko mu kwa gatanu, Tara Reade yaramwagirije ko yamufatiye ku ruhome akamufata ku nguvu igihe yakora mu biro iwe nk'uwurongoye abakozi bo mu biro iwe, haraciye imyaka 30. "Believe survivors" rwarabaye ururirimbo ruharawe kuva mu myaka mike iheze Biden arahakana ico kintu yagirijwe mbere n'abajejwe imyiyamamazo banasohoye itangazo ryavuga riti: "Ni ukuri ibi bintu ntivyigeze biba". Abanywanyi b'umugambwe w'aba Démocrates mu kuvugira umukandida wabo bazokubwira ko hari n'abagore barenga cumi bagirije amenya Perezida Trump ko yabafashe ku nguvu, ariko biragoye gufata nk'ibisanzwe ibintu nk'ibi. Kuva isekeza #MeToo (Na jewe nyene) ritanguye, aba Démocrates - harimwo na Biden, barashimangira ko igihugu gitegerezwa guha iteka abagore, kandi ukugerageza kurenza uruho rw'amazi ku vyo aregwa biratera ingorane abaharanira agateka ka muntu. Mu kiganiro aheruka guha televiziyo, Reade yavuze ati: "Abamuserukira baramvuzeko amajambo mabi cane mbere banambwira nabi ku mbuga hwaniro". "We ubwiwe ntiyigeze antuka, ariko rero hari ikintu c'uburyarya iyo mu myiyamamazo bagenda bavuga ngo vyaragiye ku murongo - ntavyagiye ku murongo". Abajejwe imyiyamamazo ba Biden barahakana ibi bivugwa n'uyu mugore. Kwirinda ayandi makosa nk'ayo Hillary Clinton yari umuntu w'inzobere cane rwose, ariko yarakubiswe hasi na Donald Trump mu matora y'umukuru w'igihugu yo mu 2016 N'aho muri kahise hari ivyagoranye, abanywanyi ba Biden barizeye ko amayeri yiwe yo kwiyegereza abantu bato bato azomutuma atagwa mu mitego bagenziwe bo mu mugambwe w'aba Démocrates bagiye bagwamwo muri kahise mu gihe bariko biyamamariza kurongora igihugu. Aramenyereye cane Washington - mu myaka irenga 30 ari umukenguzamateka hamwe n'imyaka umunani yamaze ari icegera ca Perezida Obama - gusa ibi si ukuvuga ko hari ikintu vyama bifasha. Mu myiyamamazo yiwe mu 2008, Obama yemereye abanyagihugu ihinduka, ariko Biden bizomugora gukora nka we Akarorero ni nka Al Gore (imyaka umunani ari umushingamateka, iyindi myaka umunani ari umukenguzamateka, imyaka umunani kandi ari icegera c'umukuru w'igihugu), John Kerry (imyaka 28 ari umukenguzamateka) na Hillary Clinton (imyaka umunani ari 'Première Dame/First Lady, imyaka umunani ari umukenguzamateka). Aba bose barananiwe no gutsinda abo bahiganwa bo mu mugambwe w'aba Repubulika wasanga ari inzobere, mu mahiganwa aheruka. Abanywanyi ba Biden bizeye ko ukwiyorosha kwiwe kuzotuma atamera nk'abo bandi. Kahise karekare Biden yatanguye kwiyamamariza kuba umukuru w'igihugu mu 1987 Biden yagiye agira uruhara canke akagira ico ashikiriza mu bihe bikomeye mu myaka mirongo iheze, kandi ibi bishobora kuba bitaboneka neza muri politike ya kino gihe. Mu myaka ya 1970, yarashigikiye ivanguramoko mu karere ko mu bumanuko bw'iki gihugu, mu kurwanya ingingo yo kuvanga abana badasangiye urukoba mu mashure ya leta mu ntumbero yo kubanywanisha. Iki carabandanyije gukoreshwa mu kumurwanya muri iyi myiyamamazo iheze. Abo mu mugambwe w'aba Repubulika barakunda kwibutsa amajambo yavuzwe na Robert Gates, umushikiranganji wo kwivuna abansi ku ntwaro ya Obama, aho yavuze ati "biragoye kudakunda" Biden ariko "yarakoze nabi kuri politike mpuzamahanga hafi yose, n'umutekano w'igihugu mu myaka mirongo ine iheze". Ibibazo vyo mu muryango Umugore wa mbere wa Biden, Neilia, yapfiriye mw'isanganya ry'imodoka ari kumwe n'umwana wiwe w'umukobwa Kuri Biden, kimwe mu bituma atitandukanya cane n'abandi ugereranije n'abandi banyapolitike ni uko yakozweko cane n'ikintu kitubabaza twese - urupfu. Mu gihe yariko yitegura ngo arahire, haciye akanya gato atowe ubwa mbere nk'umukenguzamateka, umugore wiwe Neilia n'umukobwa wiwe Naomi bapfiriye mw'isanganya ry'imodoka, abahungu biwe babiri nabo, Beau na Hunter, barakomereka. Umuhungu wa Biden Beau yarabaye umushikirizamanza mukuru wa Delaware ararwana no muri Iraki ari umusirikare Mu nyuma Beau yagiye kwicwa n'ikivyimba co mu bwonko mu 2016, afise imyaka 46. Uku kubura abantu benshi biwe ba hafi bakiri bato vyatumye Biden yibonwamwo n'Abanyamerika benshi - bakabona ko n'aho akomeye muri politike kandi atunze, yashikiwe n'amahano asanzwe abashikira nabo nyene. Gusa ibivugwa ku wundi muhungu wiwe, Hunter, bitanga iyindi shusho. Ubutegetsi, ruswa n'ububeshi? Hunter Biden yarateje urubwa se wiwe mu bikorwa vyiwe vya politike Hunter yabaye umushingwamanza imbere y'uko yigira agasuguru ko mu ci. Umugore wiwe wa mbere yagiye kwahukana nawe amwagirije kunywa ibiyovyabwenge, inzoga nyinshi no kurara mu bubare bw'abamalaya, mbere aza kwirukanwa no mu gisirikare bamaze kumupima bagasanga anywa urumogi. Yaremereye ikinyamakuru New Yorker magazine ko umurwizatunga umwe w'Umushinwa yigeze kumuha ubutare bwa diamant/diamond, mu nyuma uyu murwizatunga yagiye kwagirizwa n'Ubushinwa ko yatanze igiturire. Ukungene Hunter yagiye avanga ivy'igihugu n'ibijanye n'ubuzima bwiwe (mu mwaka uheze yarongoye umugore wa kabiri, haciye indwi imwe gusa babonanye) aho nyene akegeranya amafaranga menshi cane, vyaratumye se wiwe avugwako ibintu bibi. Abanyamerika benshi barashobora kwumvira impuhwe umuntu yahanganye n'ibibazo vy'ibiyovyabwenge, ariko kubona yaciye azezwa amabanga yamutumye arundarunda amafaranga menshi vyerekana ingene politike ishobora kuba isoko ry'amaronko ku banyapolitike nka ba Biden. Mu bijanye n'imigenderanire Biden afise uburambe muri politike mpuzamakungu Nk'umuntu afise uburambe muri politike mpuzamakungu, ikintu ico ari co cose coza gicafuza Biden cogira ingaruka mbi cane kuri we. Yahoze arongoye komite ijejwe imigenderanire mu nama nkenguzamateka, mbere akaba yirata ko yashoboye "kubonana hafi n'abategetsi bose bakomeye kw'isi muri iyi myaka 45 iheze". Hari abantu bashobora kumubona ko ari ntahompagaze. Mu 1991, yahakanye itegeko ryo kugomora ingabo mu ntambara yo mu kigobe c'Abarabu, ariko mu 2003 aza kwemeza itegeko ryo gutera Iraki, ariko mu nyuma akaba yahavuye anegura uruhara rwa Amerika muri ico gihugu. Ingingo yo guhakana itegeko rigomora ingabo mu ntambara ya mbere yo mu kigobe c'Abarabu izwi ko ari imwe mu vyatumye atarondera kwitoza mu 1992 Nk'umuntu asanzwe agumana amakenga, yarahanuye Obama ko atorungika ingabo muri ca gitero cahitana Osama Bin Laden. Igitangaje, ni uko bisa n'uko uwari arongoye al-Qaeda atiyumvira cane Biden. Impapuro zatowe na CIA ikanazisohora zerekanye ko Bin Laden yategetse ingabo ziwe kwica Obama, zikihoza icegera ciwe, kuko yabona ko "Biden atari ashoboye kumusubirira, ivyari guca bita Amerika mu kaga". Ivyiyumviro vya Biden ntivyakirwa neza na benshi mu rwaruka mu mugambwe w'aba Démocrates, kuko bobo bashaka umuntu yiyamiriza intambara mu buryo bwenyuje, kurya kwa ba Bernie Sanders canke Elizabeth Warren. Ariko Biden wewe yaragiye ku ruhande rw'abashimagije Perezida Trump igihe yica wa mu jenerali wa Irani Qasem Soleimani mu gitero ca drone mu kwa mbere uno mwaka. 'Nonezerwa ndamutse mpfuye ntabaye Perezida' Abihweza ivy'amatora bama bahaye amahirwe menshi Biden gusumba Perezida Trump muri rino higanwa ryo kurongora Amerika. Aba bompi barateranye amajambo ku bijanye n'imyiyerekano yo kwiyamiriza amabi igipolisi gikorera Abanyamerika b'abirabure, hamwe no ku bijanye n'ingene leta yifashe muri ca kiza karanda ca coronavirus. Eka mbere n'ikibazo c'udupfukamunwa carabaye ica politike, aho Biden wewe aboneka yambaye agapfukamunwa, mu gihe Trump wewe yafashe inzira itandukanye. Ariko uretse ivyo guterana amajambo no kwerekana ko ufise abantu benshi mu myiyamamazo, ibibazo bikomeye vyovyo biriho. Mu myaka mike iheze, igihe yariko yiyumvira nimba yokwiyamamariza kuba umukuru w'igihugu, Biden yacishijemwo ati: "Nonezerwa ndamutse mpfuye ntabaye Perezida". Ariko ibintu si uko bikimeze.

Citoyenne Kezimana uzwi ku izina rya Cathy umwe mu bakandida ba CNL baherutse gufungwa Ku bikorwa byo kwiyamamaza mu Burundi, ifungwa rya madamu Kezimana ni kimwe mu biri kuvugwa cyane ku mbuga nkoranyambaga kuva mu ijoro ryakeye. Ishyaka CNL rivuga ko ritazi ibyo ashinjwa. Ishyaka CNDD-FDD riri ku butegetsi na CNL ritavuga rumwe na leta niyo ahanganye cyane muri aya matora azaba kuwa 20 z'uku kwezi, umwuka mubi hagati y'abanywanyi bayo uraboneka mu gihugu. Mu kiganiro n'abanyamakuru ejo kuwa kabiri umushikirizamanza mukuru (procureur general) w'u Burundi Sylvestre Nyandwi yavuze muri rusange ko mu cyumweru cya mbere cy'ibikorwa byo kwiyamamaza habonetse ubugizi bwa nabi bufite impamvu za politiki. Bwana Nyandwi yavuze ko ibyo bikorwa byabonetse mu ntara za Kirundo, Ngozi, Kayanza, Gitega na Bujumbura, ahakomeretse abantu benshi kandi hamaze gupfa umuntu umwe, wiciwe muri komine Ntega mu ntara ya Kirundo. Bwana Nyandwi avuga ko parike iri gukora iperereza ku byakozwe kugira ngo ababikoze babiryozwe, akabwira abayoboye amashyaka ko kwiyamamaza nta budahanganwa bibaha imbere y'amategeko. 'Abagirirwa nabi ni aba CNDD-FDD' - minisiteri y'umutekano Mbere y'ibikorwa byo kwiyamamaza, ishyaka CNL ryagiye rivuga ibikorwa bibi bikorerwa abanywanyi baryo, mu kwezi gushize ryavuze ko abagera kuri 200 bafunzwe abarenga 10 bakicwa. Pierre Nkurikiye umuvugizi wa minisiteri y'umutekano yabwiye radio na televiziyo by'u Burundi ko urugomo n'ubwicanyi mu kwiyamamaza biri gukorwa n'abanywanyi ba CNL babikorera aba CNDD-FDD, ndetse hamaze kwicwa babiri muri bo. Bwana Nkurikiye yavuze ibyaha birimo amagambo ahamagarira urugomo, gukora urugomo, gufatanwa imbunda, gutukana no kubeshya bikorwa n'abari kwiyamamaza hamwe n'abanywanyi ba CNL. Nkurikiye yagize ati: "Ibyo byatumye hari benshi ubu bafunzwe ngo babazwe ibyo byaha". Yavuze ko aba-CNL bashimuse abo muri CNDD-FDD i Muremera, Butaganzwa, mu Kayanza, i Kiremba mu ntara ya Ngozi, Masanganzira mu ntara ya Ngozi, Gahombo mu Kayanza n'ahandi. Ati: "i Karambo muri Komine Matongo mu Ntara ya Kayanza aho ho ni umunywnayi wa CNL wakubiswe uwa CNDD, aha ni ibidasanzwe, byabaye 03/05/2020". Bwana Nkurikiye avuga ko kugeza ubu hamaze kwicwa abanywanyi babiri ba CNDD-FDD biciwe muri Rumonge tariki 29/04 na Ntega mu Kirundo tariki 03/05/2020. Ati: "Ibyo bikorwa bibi byakozwe n'aba-CNL muri iki cyumweru cya mbere cyo kwiyamamaza byatumye hapfa abantu babiri hakomereka 18 ba CNDD-FDD "Ku rundi ruhande rwa CNL umuntu umwe yarashimuswe umunani(8) barakomereka, polisi ubu yafunze 64 ba CNL bakorwaho iperereza". BBC yagerageje kuvugana na minisiteri y'umutekano ku ifungwa rya Cathy Kezimana ariko kugeza ubu ntibirashoboka. CNL yo ivuga iki? Manirambona avuga ko abanywanyi ba CNL bafungwa nyuma bagahimbirwa ibyaha bamaze gufungwa Térence Manirambona umuvugizi w'ishyaka CNL avuga ko ibyatangajwe n'umuvugizi wa Minisiteri y'umutekano byabatangaje kuko ubundi inzego z'umutekano "zigomba kubahiriza bose". Ati: "Kuvuga ngo aba-CNL bari gukora ibikorwa bibi biradutangaza kuko nitwe twagaragaje kuva mbere ibiri kudukorerwa ariko ntacyakozwe. "Kuva dutangiye kwiyamamaza hari abanywanyi bacu babiri banyurujwe, umwe wa wa Cankuzo undi w' Nyabihganga mu ntara ya Mwaro, kugeza n'ubu ntawurababona". Bwana Manirambona avuga ko hari aba-CNL benshi bakomerekeye mu mirwano bavuye muri 'meeting' bagategwa ku nzira n'abo muri CNDD-FDD. Ati: "Ibyo byose biraba abategetsi babirebera ahantu henshi. Turafata kenshi Imbonerakure zaje guhungabanya ibikorwa byacu tukazishyikiriza abashinzwe umutekano ariko ibyo ntibabivuga". Bwana Manirambona avuga ko hamaze gufungwa aba-CNL benshi muri ibi bihe byo kwiyamamaza, akavuga ko bafatwa mbere yo kugira ibyaha baregwa. Ati: "Na Madamu Kezimana twumvise ko bamufashe avuye kwiyamamaza ubu ari ku ibohero rya Mpimba, ariko ntabwo turabwirwa ibyo ashinjwa". I Ntega ahiciwe umuntu byagenze bite? Umwe mu bayoboye ishyaka CNL ku rwego rw'Intara ya Kirundo utifuje gutangazwa amazina yabwiye BBC ko ibyabaye i Ntega ari urugomo rwavuye ku bo muri CNDD-FDD. Muri komine ya Ntega mu ntara ya Kirundo kuri centre ya Mugendo ku cyumweru hariho habera kwiyamamaza kw'ishyaka CNL. Uyu yabwiye BBC ko kwiyamamaza birangiye hano bamwe mu banywanyi ba CNL bagombaga gutaha bajya mu bice bitandukanye baturutsemo. Avuga ko igice kimwe cy'abari gutaha kigeze ku musozi wa Rukore cyasanze batezwe n'Imbonerakure (urubyiruko rw'ishyaka CNDD-FDD). Ati: "Bahise batana mu mitwe, habaye urugomo rudasanzwe. "Uwapfuye ni umuntu warashwe umwambi kandi uwo nta mugambwe yari arimwo, ni umuntu wari uvuye gupagasa wagendaga ariko bamwikwegeraho bavuga ko ari uwa CNDD-FDD". Uyu avuga ko uretse uwo warashwe umwambi agapfa abandi ari abarakomeretse ku mpande zombi. Avuga ko nyuma y'iyi mirwano polisi yafashe abantu benshi bo mu ishyaka CNL ikabafunga. Ibikorwa byo kwiyamamaza bigeze ku munsi wa 10 birakomeza uyu munsi mu bice bitandukanye by'u Burundi, biteganyijwe ko bizarangira tariki 17 z'uku kwezi.

Cristiano Ronaldo Uyo musatirizi wa Juventus amaze gutsindira umurwi nserukiragihugu wa Portugal ibitsindo 98 akaba ashobora kuba umukinyi agize kabiri atsinze ibitsindo vyinshi mu murwi nserukiragihugu kw'isi. Ronaldo niwe mukinyi amaze gutsinda ibitsindo vyinshi mu murwi nserukiragihugu. Niwe kandi mukinyi wa mbere ku mugabane wa Bulaya amaze gutsinda ibitsindo vyinshi mu murwi nserukiragihugu. Gushika ubu, uwahoze ari umukinyi w'imurwi nserukiragihugu wa Irani, Ali Daei, niwe mukinyi amaze gutsinda ibitsindo vyinshi kw'isi mu murwi nserukiragihugu, agakurikirwa na Cristiano Ronaldo arondera gushikana ibitsindo 100.

Isoko rya Kayumbu mu Rwanda Financial Times ivuga ko imibare yerekana izamuka ry'ibiciro ku masoko hagati ya 2010 na 2014 isobanura izamuka ry'ubukene Kuva mu 2000 Perezida Paul Kagame yajya ku butegetsi byagiye bitangazwa ko ubukungu buzamuka buri mwaka ku kigero niburacya 7%, ibi byatumye banki y'isi yiyemeza guha inkunga u Rwanda y'arenga miliyari enye(4) z'amadorari yo guteza imbere ubuzima, uburezi n'ubuhinzi. Mu myaka ibarirwa mu icumi ishize, abatavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda barimo n'abahoze mu butegtsi, bagiye bagaragaza ibyo banenga muri iri zamuka ry'ubukungu n'imibare y'ubukene, bamwe muri bo barishwe, abandi barafunzwe. Bwana Kagame yatorewe manda ya gatatu mu 2017 n'amajwi 99%. Mu 2018, inkunga ya Banki y'isi yikubye inshuro zirenze ebyiri igera ku kigero itigeze igeraho, miliyoni 545 z'amadorari y'Amerika. Gusa, isesengura ry'ikinyamakuru Financial Times (FT) ku ibarurishamibare ritangwa n'ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda rivuga ko iyo mibare atari yo nibura inshuro imwe, bigatuma hakemangwa iby'iterambere ridasanzwe ry'ubukungu n'ubunyakuri mu mubano w'ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda n'umuterankunga mukuru wabwo. Leta y'u Rwanda ivuga ko ubukene bwakomeje kugabanuka kuva mu 2001 muri iki gihugu gituwe n'abantu miliyoni 12. Ariko isesengura rya FT ku mibare y'ikigo cy'ibarurishamibare cy'u Rwanda rivuga ko ubukene bwiyongere mu gihe kitari gitoya. Abanyapolitiki batavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda bavuga ko, uko ubukene buhagaze mu gihugu biteye inkeke bitandukanye n'ibivugwa na Leta n'abaterankunga bayo. Financial Times isubiramo amagambo ya Diane Rwigara, umunyapolitiki utavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi wafunzwe amezi 12 nyuma y'uko yashakaga kwiyamamaza kuyobora u Rwanda, aho agira ati: "[Leta] irashaka kwerekana ko turi gutera imbere bityo igahisha mu by'ukuri uko ibintu bimeze". "Iyo uje hano nk'umushyitsi, ibintu byose usanga biteguye ngo utangare, ariko ukuri k'ubuzima kurahishe. Bigusaba kububamo ngo ubyemere". FT ivuga ko mu 2015 hari umubare muto w'abahanga bakemanze imibare y'igabanuka ry'ubukene n'iterambere ry'ubukungu itangwa na leta y'u Rwanda, bituma mu 2016 u Rwanda rusubiramo isesengura ryarwo na Banki y'isi itangaza ibyarivuyemo umwaka ushize. Ibyo abo bahanga bari babonye, bimwe byatangajwe muri "Review of African Political Economy". Hari abemeje ko ibyo bakoze ari ubushakashatsi bwigenga, gusa byamaganywe na leta y'u Rwanda n'abo muri banki y'isi. Umushakashatsi avuga ko abahinzi mu Rwanda bategetswe guhinga igihingwa kimwe ahantu runaka bigatuma batakaza ijambo ku giciro cyacyo ku isoko FT yakoze isesengura ry'ibyatangajwe n'abo bahanga, ingingo zirenga 14,000 n'ibiganiro n'abo bahanga bo muri za kaminuza ibona ko izamuka ry'ibiciro mu Rwanda risobanuye ko ubukene bwiyongereye hagati ya 2010 na 2014. Leta y'u Rwanda na Banki y'isi bahakana ibyabonywe na Financial Times (FT), bashimangira ko imibare yabo ari yo y'ukuri. Yusuf Murangwa, umuyobozi w'ikigo cy'ibarurishamibare mu Rwanda ati: "Ibyo u Rwanda rwakoze mu kugabanya ubukene...nta gushidikanya ko ari byo. Byaragenzuwe". Bwana Murangwa avuga ko izamuka mu rwego rw'imari, kwiyongera kw'imisoro n'ibindi biranga ubukungu bitari gushoboka iyo ubukene buba nabwo bwariyongereye mu gihugu. David Himbara, wahoze ari umuyobozi w'ishami rishinzwe ingamba na politiki mu biro bya Perezida Kagame kugeza bagize ibyo bapfa mu 2010 agahunga, avuga ko ikigero cy'ubukene mu gihugu ari imwe mu mibare 'itunganywa' n'ubutegetsi. Ikinyamakuru FT gisubiramo amagambo ye agira ati: "Umubare wose kuri Kagame ufite icyo uvuze, yaba muri politiki cyangwa mu bukungu, ubwo nibwo buryo ahuzamo abaterankunga ntibite ku ihohotera akora ahubwo bagahanga amaso ku iterambere ry'bukungu. Agomba rero gukomeza kubereka ko imibare ari myiza". Ikigo cy'ibarurishamibare mu Rwanda, gisesengura ibipimo by'ubukene gishingiye ku bushakashatsi ku mibereho y'ingo. FT ivuga ko iki kigo kigereranya igiciro cy'ibitunga ingo (ziba zakoreweho ubushakashatsi) n'umurongo w'ubukene. Kuva mu 2001, ibyatangajwe mu bushakashatsi bw'imibereho y'ingo n'ubundi, bigaraza ko buri gihe habagaho igabanuka ry'ubukene, ubushakashatsi bwa kane bwo mu kwezi kwa munani 2015 buvuga ko imibare y'ababa mu bukene yavuye kuri 44,9% by'abaturage ikagera kuri 39,1% mu 2015. Iyi mibare yahise igibwaho impaka. Gupima ikigero cy'ubukene, kimwe nko kubara ibindi biranga ubukungu, ni umwitozo usaba inzira zinyuranye zirimo nk'isuzuma ku bintu bitandukanye kuva ku bitunga abaturage igiciro n'agaciro kabyo kugera ku buryo igiciro cyabyo cyagiye gihinduka mu gihe n'ahantu runaka. Kubera ibi, ibarurishamibare ry'u Rwanda ryiyemeje kuzamura urwego rw'ibyo rikoresha mu gupima umurongo w'ubukene kuva mu 2001. Iki kigo kivuga ko kuzamura uru rwego byari bikenewe kuko n'abantu uko baryaga n'uko babagaho byahindutse. Mu gihe ibihugu byinshi bihindura bikazamura urwego bikoresha mu gupima ubukene, ikigo cyo mu Rwanda ntabyo cyakoze mu bushakashatsi bwabanje nk'uko FT ibivuga, bigatera kwibaza niba ibishingirwaho ari ukuri mu igeraranya ry'ubukene mu 2011 no mu 2014. Mu gusubiza iki, ikigo cy'ibarurishamibare cy'u Rwanda cyasesenguye ibyavuye mu bushakashatsi bwacyo nanone mu 2016, gitangaza raporo nshya kivuga ko cyakoresheje igipimo cy'igiciro cyo kubaho mu kugaragaza neza iby'igereranya ry'ubushakashatsi bwa 2011 n'ubwa 2014 mu by'ibiciro. Ibyavuyemo, ntibitandukanye n'ibindi - ubukene bwaragabanutse - Bwana Murangwa avuga ko icyo babonye ari uko ubukene bwagabanutse ahubwo ku kigero cya 6,9% hagati ya 2011 na 2014. Isesengura rya FT kuri iyi mibare rinyuranya n'ibyabonetse, rikavuga ko ribonamo uburyo buhoraho bwo gushaka kuvuga imibare itari yo kuva mu 2015. Bandikiye uwahoze ari perezida wa Banki y'isi bamubwira 'itunganywa' ry'imibare y'ubukene mu Rwanda FT ivuga ko yabonye bishoboka gusa kuvuga ko ubukene bwagabanutse ku kigero cya 6,9% mu myaka itatu mu gihe igipimo cy'igiciro cyo kubaho gitangazwa n'ikigo cy'ibarurishamibare mu Rwanda cyari kuba ari 4,7%. Mu buryo bworoshye kumva, ubukene bwari kuba bwaragabanutse kuri icyo gipimo kinini gutya mu gihe igiciro cyo kubaho ku ngo 40% zikennye cyane cyari kuba cyarazamutse ku rwego rwa 4,7% hagati y'ukwezi kwa mbere 2011 n'ukwa mbere 2014. Ubukene bwaba ahubwo bwarazamutse kuri 6,6% Abahanga bo muri za kaminuza bane babajijwe na FT bavuga ko ibiciro mu bice by'icyaro mu Rwanda byazamutse ku kigero kirenze cyane 4,7% hagati y'iriya myaka ivugwa, kandi nacyo kikaba gifatwa nk'igipimo gitoya cyafashwe kugira ngo gitange imibare yifuzwa y'igabanuka ry'ubukene ritabayeho. Sam Desiere, umushakashatsi mukuru muri Kaminuza ya Leuven mu Bubiligi yize ku mibare y'ubukene mu Rwanda, avuga ko ikigereranyo cy'igiciro cyo kubaho cyazamutse nibura kuri 30% hagati ya 2011 na 2014 ashingiye ku isesengura yakoreye imibare iri mu bushakashatsi ku mibereho y'ingo. Ibyo avuga byatanga imibare ivuga ko ubukene mu Rwanda bwazamutse ku gipimo cya 6,6%. Bwana Desiere agira ati: "Uko ibiciro ku masoko bizamuka, niko ubukene bwiyongera". Bwana Murangwa ahakana ibyo gutanga imibare itari yo ku bipimo by'ubukene mu Rwanda, akavuga ko kuvuga ko ubukene mu Rwanda bwiyongereye hagati ya 2011 na 2014 ari ukwibeshya. Iki kigo cy'igihugu cy'ibarurishamibare kivuga ko bidakwiye gukoresha igipimo cy'igiciro cy'ubuzima gusa mu kwerekana ko imibare yacyo hagati ya buriya bushakashatsi bwombi atari yo. Abahawe akazi na letay'u Rwanda bavuga iki? Ukutabogama kw'inzira zikoreshwa n'abahanga mu bukungu mu kwerekana no kugereranya ibipimo by'ubukene bituma bikomera cyane kugera ku mwanzuro udashidikanywaho. Gusa n'abahawe akazi na Leta y'u Rwanda nk'abahanga (consultants) bashidikanya ingingo y'ababahaye akazi ku igabanuka ry'ubukene. Ubucuruzi bwambukiranya imipaka hagati y'u Rwanda na Congo: Abashakashatsi bavuga ko ibiciro ku masoko byazamutse ku kigero cya 30% hagati ya 2010 na 2014, bivuze ko ubukene bwazamutse, butamanutse Kompanyi yitwa Oxford Policy Management (OPM) yo mu Bwongereza yahawe akazi n'ikigo cy'u Rwanda cy'ibarurishamibare ngo igifashe kurangiza isesengura mu 2015 nk'uko yabikoze no ku bundi bushakashatsi ku mibereho y'ingo bwabanje. Ikipe ya OPM yasanze ubukene bwarazamutse ku gipimo nibura cya 6%, gusa ibi Leta y'u Rwanda yarabyanze nk'uko umwe mu bakozi b'iyi kompanyi utifuje gutangazwa na FT abivuga. Mu gihe icyo gihe mu kwezi kwa 12 amatora y'ivugurura ry'itegeko nshinga yari yegereje, abategetsi ngo bari ku gitutu cyo kugaragaza iterambere mu mibare, kuko imibare y'izamuka ry'ubukene itari kwihanganirwa nk'uko umukozi wa OPM abivuga. Nyuma y'ibyumweru mu biganiro ku buryo bushya Leta yifuzaga, OPM yahagaritse amasezerano kandi ntiyasinya kuri raporo ya nyuma nk'uko uyu mukozi abivuga. OPM yemereye Financial Times ko mu 2015 koko yari yahawe akazi ko gusesengura ibyavuye mu bushakashatsi ku mibereho y'ingo n'ikigo cy'ibarurishamibare cy'u Rwanda ariko banze kugira ibindi barenzaho bisunze ibanga bavuga ko bagirira abakiriya babo. Muri Banki hari ababiona ukundi Imbere muri Banki y'isi naho hari ibitekerezo binyuranye ku mibare y'ubukene mu Rwanda. Mu gihe ibiro by'iyi banki mu Rwanda bishyigikiye imibare ya Leta, abakozi batanu b'iyi banki banditse ibaruwa isa n'iburira ubuyobozi bw'iyi banki. Bimwe mu biyirimo ni ubwa mbere bitangajwe. Mu ibaruwa yo ku itariki 01/12/2015 bandikiye Jim Yong Kim wayoboraga Banki y'isi, umuyobozi wungirije ushinzwe Afurika n'abayishinzwe muri Kenya, Eritrea n'u Rwanda, bagira bati: "Ibikorwa bimwe biheruka biraganisha ku byago byo gutakaza ikizere kw'iyi banki niba ibikorwa byayo mu Rwanda bigumye mu murongo birimo". Aba bakozi mu ibaruwa yabo biyise "Professionals for Truth in Aid" bavuga ko "hari ukubeshya mu mibare itangwa n'ubutegetsi no kunanirwa gutanga imibare nyayo bweruye". Iri tsinda ntabwo ryigeze risubizwa, naryo ryarekeye aho. Umwe mu banditsi iyi baruwa yabwiye FT ati: " Twayohereje tutavuze imyirondoro yacu kuko twatinyaga kwihorera kuri twe [kwa leta y'u Rwanda]". Banki y'isi ivuga ko itakwemeza ubuziranenge bw'iriya baruwa ndetse niba yarakiriwe n'abo yandikiwe kuko yoherejwe inyujijwe mu buryo bwashyizweho na banki bwo gutanga amakuru mu ibanga. Imibare y'abategetsi ivuga ko ku butegetsi bwa Perezida Paul Kagame ubukungu buzamuka ku kigero cya 7% buri mwaka, abandi bavuga ko ubutegetsi bwebuhisha imibare y'ukuri Ibajijjwe ku mpungenge za OPM ku kuri kw'imibare y'ubukene mu Rwanda, Banki y'isi ivuga ko "yari izi ibyo biganiro [hagati ya OPM n'ikigo cy'ibarurishamibare cy'u Rwanda] ariko itazi ibyumvikanyweho na leta n'uwo yahaye akazi". Banki y'isi ishyigikira uruhande rwa leta y'u Rwanda mu mibare ivuga ku bukene, mu kwezi kwa cyenda 2018 no mu kwezi kwa kane uyu mwaka iyi banki yashyigikiye raporo ya Leta ku isesengura ry'ubukene yitwa Revisiting the Poverty Trend in Rwanda, ishimangira igabanuka ryabwo. Mu nyandiko iyi banki yanditse ko "nta bimenyetso yabonye by'amakosa cyangwa kubeshya". Leta y'u Rwanda yishimira ko urwego rw'ubuhinzi n'ubworozi bwongereye umusaruro kuva mu 2008 bigatuma imibereho y'imiryango yo mu cyaro itera imbere. Gusa, Madamu An Ansoms, porofeseri mu masomo y'iterambere muri kaminuza ya Louvain mu Bubiligi avuga ko muri gahunda yo guteza imbere ubuhinzi n'ubworozi iterwa inkunga na banki y'isi abahinzi bategetswe guhinga ibihingwa bimwe ahantu runaka. Ibi ngo byongereye umusaruro ariko "binahungabanya ibiciro ku masoko" ku bihingwa abahinzi batahinze. Prof Ansoms avuga ko izamuka ry'ibiciro by'ibintu binyuranye byakenesheje abahinzi batoya mu bice byinshi by'icyaro aho yakoreye ubushakashatsi hagati ya 2010 na 2014. Ikinyamakuru Financial Times gisubiramo amagambo ye agira ati: "Nubwo abahinzi bagurirwaga ibigori byabo ku giciro cyiza, ijambo ryabo ryari rito ku giciro ugeranyije n'ibyo bahingaga mbere".

Ibikona muri Australia biba binini cyane kandi bigasagarira abantu Abategetsi muri aka gace bo bavuga ko kurasa iki gisiga byari ngombwa kandi atari umwanzuro wahutiweho, kubera uburyo cyasagariraga abantu. Iki gikona kimaze igihe gisagarira rubanda rw'ahitwa Hills Shire mu mujyi wa Sydney, ibinyamakuru byaho bivuga ko hari n'abajyanywe mu bitaro cyabakomerekeje. Ibikona byo muri iki gihugu ni ubwoko butandukanye n'ibyo tuzi mu karere kacu. Nubwo nabyo byitwa ibikona. Mu gihe cyo kurinda kwabyo, ibyaho bigira amahane bigasagarira abantu bageze aho biri, gusa amategeko yaho arabirengera akabuza rubanda kubyibasira. Iki cyo ariko cyari 'kasha', kuko i Hills Shire abantu barenga 40 bagaragaje uburyo cyabagiriye nabi. Umwe mu baturage ba hano yafashwe n'uburwayi bw'umutima ubwo cyari kimaze kumutera ijanja nk'uko bivugwa n'igitangazamakuru cya Leta ABC cyo muri Australia. Umutegetsi muri aka gace yabwiye ABC ko iki gikona "cyateraga abantu bidasanzwe kandi cyakundaga kuza hasi kenshi" gishaka gucakira abantu mu maso. Bari baragihimbye "Windsor Road Monster" kubera imyaka myinshi kimaze cyarimonogoje. Cyagereranywa na Saruhara rwa Nkomokomo cyo muri wa mwandiko w'Ikinyarwanda - ku bigiye mu bitabo bya kera - nacyo ngo cyari cyaratumye amayira atagendwa umwami atakigemurirwa kubera ubukana bwacyo. Umuntu umwe yanditse ku mbuga nkoranyambaga avuga uburyo iki gikona cyamushwaratuye bikomeye mu maso. Undi nawe ati: "Sindabona igikona giteye ubwoba gutya". Inshuro nyinshi ababishinzwe bagerageje kugitega ngo bagifate birabananira, kugeza ubwo ikigo gishinzwe inyamaswa gitanze uburenganzira ngo bakirase gipfe. Byababaje benshi Ubutegetsi buvuga ko nta kundi byari kugenda, abakunzi b'ibisiga bo barakajwe n'iki gikorwa cyo kucyica. Igitangazamakuru kibanda ku nyamaswa 'Wildlife magazine' gisubiramo amagambo y'inzobere mu biguruka Darryl Jones avuga ko gutega no gufata igikona ari ibintu byoroshye, bityo atishimiye ko cyishwe. Mu gihe ibi bikona byaho byaturaze amagi ngo bigira amahane cyane Emma Hurst, umudepite wo mu ishyaka ry'ubutabera ku nyamaswa, yavuze ko kiriya gikona ibyo cyakoraga ari ukurengera abana bacyo.
