Ati: "None ubu abana bacyo nabo bashobora kwicwa n'inzara cyangwa kwicwa n'izindi nyamaswa". Uyu mudepite agaya cyane umwanzuro w'ubutegetsi bw'aha hantu wo kwica iki gisiga. Ibikona byo muri Australia abantu benshi baho barabikunda nubwo bijya bibasagarira, iki cyo kikaba cyari gifite umwihariko wacyo ujya gusa n'uw'igisiga kinini Saruhara rwa Nkomokomo. Saruhara rwa Nkomokomo 'umwami w'ibishwi n'ibisiga' nacyo cyishwe n'umugaragu w'umwami witwaga Ngarama kuko cyari cyaratumye hari inzira zitagendwa amaturo ntagere ku mwami. Saruhara rwa Nkomokomo yo yishwe abavuganira n'abarengera inyamaswa bataraza. Na Internet yari itarabaho!!

Trump yaramwandikiye undi ayijugunya mu myanda Muri iyo baruwa yo ku itariki ya 9 y'uku kwezi kwa cumi, yohererejwe nyuma yaho ingabo z'Amerika ziviriye muri Syria, Bwana Trump yabwiye Bwana Erdogan ati: "Wikwikomeza. Wiba umusazi!" Abakozi bo mu biro bya Perezida wa Turukiya babwiye BBC ko iyo baruwa "yateshejwe agaciro yose uko yakabaye" na Bwana Erdogan. Kuri uwo munsi iyo baruwa yamugezeho, Turukiya yatangiye kugaba ibitero bya gisirikare muri Syria ku barwanyi bayobowe n'aba-Kurdes. Muri iyo baruwa, Perezida Trump agira ati: "Reka tugirane amasezerano meza! Ntabwo wifuza kuzaryozwa kwica abantu ibihumbi, kandi ntabwo nanjye nshaka kuzaryozwa gusenya ubukungu bwa Turukiya - kandi nabikora". "Uzibukwa neza mu mateka nuramuka ibi ubikoze neza kandi mu buryo bwa kimuntu. Uzibukwa mu mateka igihe cyose nka shitani ibintu byiza nibitabaho". Nk'igisubizo, abakozi bo mu biro bya Perezida wa Turukiya bagize bati: "Perezida Erdogan yabonye iyo baruwa, ayitesha agaciro yose uko yakabaye ayijugunya mu myanda". Muri iyo baruwa, Perezida Trump yabwiye Bwana Erdogan ati: "Reka tugirane amasezerano meza!" Perezida Trump ari kotswa igitutu bikomeye kubera gukura ingabo muri Syria, bamwe bakavuga ko byahaye uruhushya Turukiya rwo kugaba ibitero bya gisirikare hakurya y'umupaka muri Syria. Benshi mu bamunenga ni abo mu ishyaka rye ry'abarepubulikani. Perezida Trump ari kunengwa bikomeye kubera gukura ingabo muri Syria Mu buryo budakunze kubaho, ejo ku wa gatatu abadepite 129 bo mu ishyaka rye ry'abarepubulikani bifatanyije na bagenzi babo b'abademokarate mu nteko bamagana icyo gikorwa cyo kuhava ingabo. Abo bagize inteko ishingamategeko y'Amerika banafashe umwanzuro uhuriweho usaba Perezida Erdogan guhagarika ako kanya ibitero bya gisirikare muri Syria ku barwanyi bayobowe n'aba-Kurdes.

Jeanne Bovine ikarita ye imaze kugurwa n'abasaga 5,000 mu Rwanda Ahahurira abantu benshi mu Rwanda ubu basabwa kwandika imyirondoro yabo y'ibanze kugira ngo gukurikirana abashobora kuba barahuye n'abanduye bishoboke (Contact tracing). Ishemaryayo w'imyaka 26, akuriye kompanyi ya Calm Geek yize 'software engineering' muri kaminuza y'u Rwanda, avuga ko yakoze iyo software kugira ngo acyemure icyo kibazo. BBC yamusanze i Kibeho mu majyepfo, hamwe mu habera amakoraniro manini y'abasenga mu Rwanda. Ni hamwe mu hantu amaze kugeza ikoranabuhanga rye. Ati: "Umuturage ufite iyi karita iyo agiye kwinjira ahantu ayitunga ku mashini [iyisoma] amakuru akaba ariyanditse mu gihe bayakenerera bakayabona. Na wamusekirite upima umuriro ntiyirirwe yandika". Iyi karita ijyaho amakuru y'ibanze ya nyirayo, ikozwa ku tumashini dusoma ibiyiriho dushyirwa ku marembo y'ahahurira abantu benshi nk'insengero, banki cyangwa amasoko. Umwaka ushize leta yafunze amasoko abiri manini mu mujyi wa Kigali kubera ubwiyongere bwa Covid-19, Ishemaryayo avuga ko ibi bitari kuba iyo iri koranabuhanga riba rikoreshwa. Ati: "Ikarita yanjye yari kubereka ngo ese ko dushyize abacuruzi muri 'Guma mu rugo' abandi bahageze baje guhaha bahageze bate? Bari kumenya umubare nyirizina n'abahageze batarinze gukora icyo nakwita nka sampling". Ishemaryayo avuga ko ikarita ze imwe igura 300Frw kandi imaze kugera ku bantu basaga 5,000 cyane cyane ku nsengero. Ishemaryayo avuga ko inzego zibishinzwe zamwemereye gukoresha ikoranabuhanga rye kandi ko yiteguye guhabwa icyangombwa ntakuka cyemeza ko ibyo akora byizewe. Ubu yemerewe gushyira iri koranabuhanga rye mu isoko rizwi nko 'Ku mashyirahamwe' mu gace ka Nyabugogo i Kigali, aha hahurira abarenze ibihumbi bitanu ku munsi. Avuga kandi ko afite icyizere ko ikoranabuhanga rye rizaba rikoreshwa n'abarenga milioni imwe mu mpera z'uku kwezi kwa gatatu.

U Burundi bwumvikanye na Tanzania ku kubaka Standard Gauge Railway Uyu ni umushinga uhenze cyane bamwe babona nk'inzozi ariko abategetsi bifuza ko ukorwa kuko bivugwa n'abahanga ko uzagabanya igiciro cy'ubwikorezi ku gipimo cya 40%. Tanzania iri gukora umushinga munini w'inzira ya gari ya moshi zinyaruka kandi zigezweho (SGR) iva ku cyambu cya Dar es Salaam igana Morogoro, Dodoma, Tabora, Isaka, Mwanza na Kigoma. Ibihugu by'u Burundi n'u Rwanda bidakora ku nyanja birifuza gufatira kuri aya mahirwe iyi nzira ikagera iwabyo, ibi bihugu bihendwa n'igiciro cy'ubwikorezi ku bicuruzwa biva ku cyambu cya Dar. Mu kwezi kwa mbere 2018 i Dar es Salaam Perezida John Pombe Magufuli wa Tanzania na Perezida Paul Kagame bumvikanye ko u Rwanda ruzafatira uyu muhanda i Isaka ukagera i Kigali. Mu cyumweru gishize, ba minisitiri bashinzwe ubwikorezi muri Tanzania, Burundi na DR Congo bahuriye i Kigoma nabo bumvikana ko ibi bihugu bizafatira uyu muhanda i Kigoma ukagera i Gitega na Bujumbura ugakomeza mu burasirazuba bwa DR Congo. Kuva Isaka na Kigali ni inzira izaba ireshya na 532Km, ni umushinga wa miliyari $3. Miliyari $2,3 ku ruhande rwa Tanzania na miliyari $1,3 ku Rwanda ruzubaka ahareshya na 138Km. Mu kwezi kwa kane uyu mwaka, uwari umunyamabanga wa Leta ushinzwe ubwikorezi Eng. Jean de Dieu Uwihanganye yabwiye abadepite ko ibihugu byombi biri gushaka amafaranga yo kubaka iki gice. Igice cya mbere cy'uyu ushinga wumvikanyweho mu cyumweru gishize hagati ya Tanzania, Burundi na DRC, kizava ahitwa Uvinza mu ntara ya Kigoma kigana i Gitega mu Burundi ku ntera ya 240Km. Isack Kamwelwe minisitiri ushinzwe ubwikorezi muri Tanzania yabwiye ikinyamakuru The East African ko igiciro cy'uyu mushinga kitaratangazwa ariko buri gihugu kiziyishyurira kubaka igice cyacyo. Umushinga munini wa gari ya moshi igezweho (SGR) wa 1,457 km muri Tanzania, ugizwe n'ibice bitandatu kuva ku cyambu cya Dar es Salaam ugana iburengerazuba. Biteganyijwe ko uzatwara iki gihugu miliyari $6.5 iki gihugu kizavana mu mutungo wacyo, abaterankunga, abikorera n'inguzanyo z'amabanki. Umunyamakuru wa BBC muri Tanzania avuga ko ubu hari kubakwa igice cya mbere cy'uyu mushinga cya Dar es Salaam - Morogoro. Umushinga nk'uyu wari guhuza icyambu cya Mombasa (Kenya) na Kigali uciye i Kampala biboneka ko wahagaritswe kubera ubushyamirane bwa politiki hagati y'u Rwanda na Uganda. Muri aka karere ibihugu bifite inzira zigezweho za gari ya moshi (Standard Gauge Railway) ni Kenya na Ethiopia.

Bwana Trump yanze kwitaba inteko iri kwiga ku kumweguza Umujyanama mu biro bya Amerika yandikiye inteko y'abacamanza ko Bwana Trump adashobora kwitaba icyo gikorwa ngo gikorwa mu buryo "bubogamye". Mu cyumweru gishize, Bwana Trump yasabwe n'abagize iyi nteko kuyitaba akisobanura cyangwa akareka gukomeza kwinuba yamagana ibiri gukorwa. Ibiro bya perezida wa Amerika ntabwo byatangaje niba Trump azitabira kumva ibyo kumweguza ku nshuro ya kabiri, bivuga ko niyongera gutumizwa bazasubiza ubwo butumire ukwabwo. Ibiro bya perezida wa Amerika bivuga ko ibiri gukorwa "bikorwa mu buryo bubogamye". Byatangaje kandi ko ubutumire bwa perezida bwo kwitaba iyi nteko ku wa gatatu w'iki cyumweru babubonye bitinze bityo Bwana Trump ntabone umwanya uhagije wo kwitegura iyi nteko. Ku wa gatatu hazaba iki? Igikorwa cyo kumva iyi nteko kizaba ku wa gatatu ni indi ntambwe mu iperereza rikomeje rigamije kweguza Bwana Trump. Iri rishingiye ku biganiro kuri telefone hagati ya Bwana Trump na Perezida wa Ukraine Volodymyr Zelensky. Muri icyo kiganiro, Bwana Trump asaba Bwana Zelensky gukora iperereza kuri Joe Biden, ubu uri imbere mu ishyaka ry'abademokarate mu kwiyamamariza kuyobora Amerika, n'umuhungu we Hunter Biden, wakoreye kompanyi y'iby'ingufu muri Ukraine yitwa Burisma. Iperereza rigamije kureba niba Bwana Trump atarakangishije Ukraine kuyambura ubufasha mu bya gisirikare ihabwa na Amerika niba idakoze ibyo yifuza ku batavuga rumwe na we. Bwana Trump ibi bimuhamye bishobora kumuviramo kweguzwa ku mwanya ariho. Trump ariko yahakanye ko nta kibi yakoze kandi yamaganye iki gikorwa kiri gukorwa.

Ico gitero cabaye ku wa Mungu mw'ijoro cagira kabiri mu ndwi zidashika zibiri kandi n'ubwa mbere, ico gipolisi cari catunze agatoki uruhande rw'u Burundi. Umviriza umuvugizi w'ubushikiranganji bw'u Burundi bujejwe intwaro yo hagati mu gihugu, Terence Ntahiraja, avuga ko ivyo atarivyo namba.

Minisitiri w'ububanyi n'amahanga w'u Rwanda, Richard Sezibera Umuryango w'abanyamakuru batagira umupaka washinzwe mu 1985, uharanira ubwisanzure bw'itangazamakuru. Buri mwaka usohora raporo ivuga uko ubwo bwisanzure buhagaze ku isi. Mu kiganiro na BBC, Bwana Sezibera yavuze ko yemera ubwisanzure bw'itangazamakuru n'akamaro mu iterambere ry'ibihugu k'itangazamakuru rinenga ibitagenda. Raporo y'uwo muryango yo muri uyu mwaka ivuga ko mu Rwanda ibinyamakuru byinshi bihitamo gukora mu buryo butabangamira ubutegetsi cyangwa bigakoreshwa n'ubutegetsi mu migambi yabwo inyuranye. Ivuga kandi ko hari ibikorwa bikomeye byo "kubuzwa gukora inkuru runaka" (censorship) cyangwa "kwibuza kuzikora" (self-censorhip), kuko hashingiwe kuri Jenoside ibinyamakuru binenze Leta cyangwa bihaye umwanya abayinenga bishobora kuregwa "ivangura". Bwana Sezibera, ejo ku wa kane wari mu nama mpuzamahanga ku bwisanzure bw'itangazamakuru i Londres, yabwiye BBC ko abona uwo muryango atari wo wakora urwo rutonde. Ati: "Ntekereza ko urutonde rwiza rwakorwa n'abaturage ari nabo itangazamakuru rikorera. Waza mu Rwanda ukabaza abantu, ukabaza n'itangazamakuru. Ni igihugu cy'ubwisanzure". Bwana Sezibera we yemeza ko mu Rwanda itangazamakuru rigira uruhare runini mu kugaragaza ruswa, ko rigaragaza imikorere mibi ya Leta kandi rinenga Leta ndetse rizabikomeza. Kuri ruswa, icyegeranyo cya 2017 kitwa 'Rwanda Bribery Index' cy'umuryango Transparency International Rwanda kivuga ko ruswa igaragazwa cyane ari iyo mu nzego ziciriritse n'abantu boroheje. Mu kwezi kwa gatanu uyu mwaka, urwego rw'umuvunyi mu Rwanda rwagaragaje ko abantu benshi bahamwe n'icyaha cya ruswa ari abahinzi, abashoferi n'abamotari. Bwana Sezibera yabajijwe uko yemeza ko mu Rwanda hari ubwisanzure bw'itangazamakuru kandi BBC Gahuzamiryango yarafunzwe kuvugira kuri FM, asubiza ko BBC itafunzwe mu Rwanda kuko yemerewe kuhatara amakuru. Kuva mu 2015, Abanyarwanda ntibashobora kumva BBC Gahuzamiryango kuri FM kuko yafunzwe hashingiwe ku mashusho mbarankuru yatambutse kuri BBC TV arimo ibitarashimishije ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda.

Ibyemezo by'inama y'abaminisitiri mu Rwanda bitangazwa bwa mbere kuri internet ariko rubanda rusanzwe benshi bibageraho babyumvise kuri radio. Nta kindi kiri kuvugwa nyuma y'ibyumweru hafi bitandatu Abanyarwanda imbere mu gihugu batemerewe gusohoka mu ngo. Nta bundi ibihe nk'ibi byabayeho mu mateka yanditse mu Rwanda. Abasohoka ni abahabwa uruhusya na polisi bagiye kwivuza, kugura ibiribwa no gushaka serivisi z'imari cyangwa abagiye gutanga izo serivisi, ni amabwiriza akomeye yo kwirinda coronavirus. Ijoro ryakeye, benshi baraye bategereje itangazo ry'ibyemezo by'inama y'abaminisitiri bizeye ko bushobora gucya bagasohoka, siko byagenze. Kugeza ubu ntibizwi niba iyo nama yateranye cyangwa iterana uyu munsi, ntakiratangazwa. Kuwa mbere mu kiganiro yagiranye n'abanyamakuru Perezida Paul Kagame yavuze ko bashobora koroshya amabwiriza ariho, ariko avuga ko byose bazagendera ku buryo ibintu byifashe. Ibintu byifashe bite? Mu minsi itandatu (18 - 23/04) habonetse abantu bashya 11 bashya banduye coronavirus. Icyo gihe ikizere cyari cyazamutse kuri bamwe ko u Rwanda ruri kunesha iki cyorezo. Mu minsi itandatu ishize (24 - 29/04) mu Rwanda habonetse abantu 71 bashya banduye coronavirus, impungenge zongeye kuba nyinshi. Izamuka ry'iyi mibare minisiteri y'ubuzima ivuga ko rikomoka mu "batwara amakamyo yambukiranya imipaka n'abakorana nabo". Hamwe mu hantu ubundi haba ari urujya n'uruza rw'abantu n'imodoka ku Kimironko mu mujyi wa Kigali muri ibi bihe bidasanzwe Iki kibazo cyatumye ejo Perezida Museveni wa Uganda ahamagara bagenzi be bo mu karere kuko Uganda nayo ivuga ko yabonye ubwandu bwinshi bw'abatwara amakamyo muri iyi minsi. Amakamyo y'ubwikorezi bw'ibintu yemerewe kwambukiranya imipaka muri ibi bihe bidasanzwe ibihugu by'akarere byafunze imipaka ku ngendo zisanzwe. Imibare yo mu minsi itandatu ishize itera bamwe impungenge ku mwanzuro bategereje ari benshi cyane mu Rwanda. Abantu bo bifashe bate? U Rwanda ni igihugu gifite umubare munini w'abaturage batunzwe n'imirimo iciriritse. Ubuhinzi burimo 37%, hafi 17% bakora mu nganda, hafi 45% bari mu rwego rwa serivisi naho abagera kuri 3% ni abakozi ba leta nk'uko bivugwa na raporo ya leta ya 2019 ku mirimo mu Rwanda. Igice kinini ni abatunzwe no kurya ari uko bakoze uwo munsi. Bamwe mu baturage mu Rwanda bagaragaje ingaruka zikomeye bagizweho n'amabwiriza yo guhagarika ubuzima busanzwe, harimo ubukene no gusonza bikomeye. Leta yatangije kandi ikomeje ibikorwa byo guha ibiribwa abagizweho ingaruka kurusha abandi, ariko kugeza ubu benshi baracyagaragaza ko bitabageraho cyangwa bidahagije. Amashyaka atavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi mu Rwanda atabariza abantu bashonje kubera aya mabwiriza, agasaba leta gufungura igihugu abantu bagasubira gushakisha imibereho. Umwanzuro witezwe ni uwuhe? Ibihugu bitandukanye ku isi bimaze iminsi byoroshya amabwiriza nk'aya yahagaritse ubuzima busanzwe, muri ibyo harimo iby'iburayi bikizahajwe n'iki cyorezo. Muri Afurika ibihugu birimo Ghana, Africa y'Epfo, Nigeria na Zimbabwe byatangaje ko mu minsi iri imbere bitangira koroshya amabwiriza akomeye nk'aya byari byarafashe. Muri yo harimo gufungura ibikorwa bimwe na bimwe nk'inganda, ingendo za hafi mu gihugu, imirimo yo mu biro, ubucuruzi butari ubw'amasoko manini cyane, n'ibindi. Bamwe mu Rwanda bagaragaza ko biteze cyane ko ibikorwa bimwe na bimwe cyane cyane ibishingiye kuri serivisi bishobora gufungurwa n'imyanzuro y'abaminisitiri bategereje. Bikekwa ariko ko amashuri, insengero, imikino ihuza abantu benshi n'inzu z'imyidagaduro bishobora gukomeza gufungwa. Bitandukanye no mu bindi bihugu muri iki gihe cy'icyorezo aho imyanzuro nk'iyi itangazwa hakanavugwa igihe izatangira kubahirizwa, biboneka ko iya leta y'u Rwanda ihita itangira gukurikizwa uwo munsi cyangwa bucyeye.

Umutwe wa al-Shabab Abo bagore bafatiwe mw'isoko ryo mu mujyi wa Buale uri mu bilometero biri hafi 300 uvuye i Mogadishu ku murwa mukuru. Amakuru aturukayo aravuga ko kubera ubushyuhe abagore bahisemo kwambara imyenda yoroheje ijyanye n'umuco wabo, aho kwambara imyenda ya kiyisilamu bita niqab itwikira umubiri wose no mu maso ugasigaza utwenge duto tubiri two ku maso gusa. Baje kurekurwa ariko bababwira ko nibongera gufatwa batambaye iyo myenda bashobora kuzakubitwa inkoni mu ruhame.

Aung San Suu Kyi niwe mutegetsi mukuru wa Myanmar Televiziyo ya gisirikare yatangaje ibihe bidasanzwe bigomba kumara umwaka umwe mu gihugu, hamwe no guhererekanya ubutegetsi. Iyi coup d'état ibaye nyuma y'ubushyamirane hagati y'ubutegetsi bwa gisiviri n'abategeka ingabo nyuma y'amatora atavugwaho rumwe. Myanmar, igihugu kizwi kandi nka Burma, cyategetswe n'ubutegetsi bwa gisirikare kugeza mu 2011 ubwo habagaho impinduka za demokarasi. Imodoka za polisi zitonze umurongo mw'ibarabara rya Sule Pagoda muri Yangon mu gihe ama televisiyo atashobora gutanga ibiganiro Uyu munsi kuwa mbere, igisirikare cyavuze ko kigiye guha ubutegetsi umugaba mukuru w'ingabo Min Aung Hlaing, kubera "uburiganya mu matora". Abasirikare bari ku mihanda ari benshi mu murwa mukuru, Nay Pyi Taw, n'umujyi munini wa Yangon. Mu matora yo mu kwezi kwa 11, ishyaka rya Aung San Suu Kyi ryatsinze amatora ribona imyanya ihagije yo kuba yayobora guverinoma. Leta zunze ubumwe za Amerika zamaganye uku guhirika ubutegetsi zivuga ko binyuranyije na demokarasi. Antony Blinken ushinzwe ububanyi n'amahanga bwa Amerika yasabye abo basirikare bafashe ubutegetsi kurekura abategetsi bafunze. Umukuru w'ingabo Min Aung Hlaing niwe wafashe ubutegetsi Marise Payne ushinzwe ububanyi n'amahanga wa Australia yavuze ko basaba abasirikare "kubaha ubutegetsi bugendera ku mategeko", no "kurekura nta yandi mananiza abategetsi ba gisiviri bafunze binyuranyije n'amategeko". Byifashe bite muri icyo gihugu? Internet n'itumanaho rya telephone ku mirongo myinshi byavanyweho mu mijyi mikuru, mu gihe televiziyo ya leta MRTV yavuze ko ifite ibibazo bya tekiniki ubu ikaba yafunze. Itumanaho ryose riganisha ku mujyi n'imbere mu murwa mukuru wa Nay Pyi Taw ryavanyweho, ubu biragoye kumenya ibiri kuhabera. Mu mujyi munini muri iki gihugu wa Yangon, imirongo ya telephone na internet biboneka ko byaciwe intege aho benshi mu batanga izo serivisi bari kuzikuraho. Abantu batonze imirongo kurondera amafaranga ku mashini muri Yangon no mu bindi bisagara Televiziyo ya BBC World News kimwe n'ibindi bitangazamakuru mpuzamahanga byavanyweho, ndetse n'ibindi byinshi byo mu gihugu. Hari amakuru ko abantu bo mu mujyi wa Yangon bari kwihutira kuri za ATM gufata amafaranga yabo mu gihe byitezwe ko haba ihungabana ry'ifaranga mu minsi iri imbere. ATM zimwe na zimwe ntabwo ziri gukora kandi abaturage ntibazi neza niba banki ziri bufungurwe. Byagenze bite mu matora? Ishyaka NLD rya Aung San Suu Kyi ryatsinze n'amajwi 83% mu matora yo mu kwa 11 yabonetse nka referandum yo gushyiraho ubutegetsi bwa gisiviri. Yari amatora ya kabiri gusa kuva mu 2011 ubutegetsi bwa gisirikare buvuyeho. Gusa abasirikare bakomeje kwamagana ibyavuye mu matora, banaregera urukiko rw'ikirenga barega Aung San Suu Kyi na komisiyo y'amatora. Ubwoba ko hashobora kuba guhirika ubutegetsi bwariyongereye mu minsi ishize kuko abasirikare bavuze ko bagiye "kugira icyo bakora" kuri ubwo bujura. Komisiyo y'amatora yanenze ibyavuzwe n'abasirikare. Aung San Suu Kyi ni inde? Ni umukobwa wa General Aung San intwari yaharaniye ubwigenge bw'icyo gihugu. Uwo yishwe ubwo uyu mukobwa we yari afite imyaka ibiri gusa, mbere gato y'uko Myanmar ibona ubwigenge ku bakoloni b'Abongereza mu 1948. Aung San Suu Kyi hari ubwo yari ikirango cy'uburenganzira bwa muntu - impirimbanyi yaretse ubwisanzure bwe agahangana n'abajenerali bategetse iki gihugu imyaka myinshi. Mu 1991, yahawe igihembo cy'amahoro cyitiriwe Nobel, mu gihe yari afungiwe mu rugo, ashimwa nk'urugero rudasanzwe "rw'imbaraga z'abadafite imbaraga". Uwaranzwe n'amahoro yageze ate mu rubanza rwa jenoside? Madamu Suu Kyi yamaze imyaka 15 afunze hagati ya 1989 na 2010. Mu kwezi kwa 11/2015 yayoboye ishyaka National League for Democracy (NLD) ryatsinze amatora ku bwiganze, yari abaye bwa mbere muri iki gihugu mu myaka 25. Itegekoshinga rya Myanmar ryamubuzaga kuba perezida kuko afite abana bafite ubwenegihugu bw'andi mahanga. Ariko uyu mugore w'imyaka 75 ubu, niwe mutegetsi mukuru w'iki gihugu. Gusa kuva yagera ku butegetsi, ubutegetsi bwe bwaranzwe no kwibasira ba nyamucye b'abayisilamu bo mu bwoko bw'aba Rohingya. Mu 2017 ibihumbi amagana by'aba Rohingya bahungiye mu baturanyi muri Bangladesh kubera guhigwa kwabo kwavuye ku bitero byagabwe kuri station za polisi mu gace ka Rakhine. Ibihugu by'amahanga byahoze bishyigikiye Madamu Suu Kyi byamushinje kureberera amabi akorerwa aba-Rohingya bamwe bise jenoside. Imbere y'urukiko mpuzamahanga mpanabyaha mu 2019, abamuburanira bavuze impamvu igisirikare cyakoresheje imbaraga bituma benshi batakariza ikizere Suu Kyi wigeze kuba ikirango cy'amahoro. Mu gihugu cye ariko, Suu Kyi arakunzwe cyane mu baturage nyamwinshi b'aba Buddhist bagirira impuhwe nkeya aba Rohingya.

Isanamu yasohowe n'ikinyamakuru ca Koreya ya ruguru ivugwa ko ari iy'iyo misire Iyo misire - ishobora gutwara ibisasu vy'ubumara - igize iya 11 igeragejwe muri uno mwaka. Ariko rero ikidasanzwe, ni uko iyi ishobora gutererwa munsi y'inyanza. Iyo ntambwe irakomeye cane kuko yerekana ko Koreya ya ruguru ishobora guterera misire kure y'ubutaka bwayo. Nk'uko abategetsi bo muri Koreya ya ruguru babivuga, iyo misire yitwa Pukguksong-3 yaguye ku birometero 450, ariko ikaba yatewe amaduga aho yageze ku burebure bwa kirometero 910 uja hejuru. Iyo iza guterwa mu buryo busanzwe bw'amakika, bivugwa ko yari gushika ku birometero 1900, bigaca biboneka ko yoshikira Ubuyapani na Koreya y'epfo. Iyo misire yagiye kugwa mu kiyaga c'Ubuyapani (Mer du Japon), Ubuyapani bukavuga ko ari mu karere kabwo. Iryo geragezwa ribaye inyuma y'amasaha make gusa Koreya ya ruguru ivuze ko ibiganiro ku mugambi wayo w'uguhingura ubutare bw'ubumara bishobora gutangura hagati yayo na Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika. Iyo misire yaterewe mu kiyaga ejo ku wa gatatu isaha imwe z'ijoro, hafi ku birometero 17 uvuye ku nkengera y'ikiyaga winjira hagati mu mazi. Kuri uyu wa kane, itororokanirizo ry'amakuru rya Koreya y'Uburaruko KCNA ryamenyesheje ko iyo misire yakozwe mu ntumbero "y'ukwikingira ibitero vyova hanze, n'ugukomeza inguvu z'ukwivuna umwansi". Ryavuze kandi ko "ata ngaruka iyo misire yagize ku mutekano w'ibihugu bibanyi". Nta masanamu yafashwe yerekana umukuru w'igihugu ca Koreya ya ruguru Kim Jong-un ahagarikiye iryo geragezwa nk'uko vyagenze mu mageragezwa yaheruka. Ingaruka ku biganiro na Amerika? Imbere y'uko iyo misire iterwa, Koreya ya ruguru na Amerika vyari vyemeje ko ibiganiro ntangamarara ku mugambi wa Koreya w'uguhingura ubutare bw'ubumara bishobora kuba "hagati mu ndwi iza". Inyuma y'iryo gerageza, ibiro vy'umunyamabanga wa Leta wa Amerika vyagabishije Koreya ya ruguru "kwirinda agasotoro". Amerika isaba kandi ico gihugu gufata "icemezo nyaco c'ukwitaba ibiganiro nyezina" mu ntumbero y'uguhagarika umugambi wayo w'ugukora ibirwanisho vy'ubumara. Ibiganiro hagati y'ivyo bihugu vyarahagaze kuva aho umubonano hagati ya Donald Trump na Bwana Kim i Hanoi muri Vietnam mu kwezi kwa kabiri uno mwaka urangiriye ataco bashitseko. Abahinga babona ko iryo geragezwa ribaye mu gihe himirije ibiganiro ryakozwe n'ibigirankana. Harry Kazianis, umukozi w'ikigo Center for the National Interest mu gisagara ca Washington DC, yabwiye itororokanirizo ry'amakuru AFP ko Koreya y'Uburaruko ishaka kwerekana neza igihagararo cayo muri ivyo biganiro imbere y'uko binatangura. Inama nkuru ijejwe umutekano mw'ishirahamwe mpuzamakungu ONU yarabujije Koreya ya ruguru gukoresha misire ziraswa kure. Ico gihugu kandi kikaba caranafatiwe ibihano na Amerika hamwe na ONU kubera umugambi waco wo guhingura ibirwanisho vy'ubumara. Hari amakuru avuga ko mu biganiro vyimirije, Amerika ishobora gusaba ko ibihano ONU yafatiye Koreya ya ruguru bihagarikwa mu kiringo c'amezi 36. Muri ico gihe, Koreya ya ruguru nayo igasabwa kwugara ikigo ca Yongbyon gihingura ibirwanisho vy'ubumara, igaheba kandi n'uguhingura ubutare bwa Uranium.

Iyandikishe kuri podcast: Ushobora kwiyandikisha kuri RSS feed muri telefone yawe ukoresheje porogaramu iyo ariyo yose yakira podcast kuri Android cyangwa IOS. Ushobora kandi kubigeraho ukoresheje amarembo anyuranye atuma winjira muri interineti nka Google Chrome cyangwa se Mozilla Firefox ukongeraho uduporogaramu duto dushamikiyeho:

Ivyo biri mw'itangazo ryaraye risohowe na Antoine Kambanda, Umwepiskopi mukuru wa Diyoseze nkuru ya Kigali akaba n'icegera c'Inama y'Abepiskopi Gatolika mu Rwanda, aho amenyesha ingingo zafashwe mu makoraniro zizofasha abakirisu babo kudakoranako ngo bahave bandukizanya. Ibihugu bishika umunani ku mugabane wa Afrika bimaze gutangaza ko uwo mugera wamaze kubishikamwo, leta z'u Burundi n'u Rwanda zikaba ziherutse gutangaza ingingo zafashe mu ntumbero yo kwirinda no gukinga uwo mugera. Mw'iryo tangazo, Inama y'Abepiskopi Gatolika mu Rwanda isaba abakirisu "guhana amahoro ya Kristu ku mutima gusa ata guhana ibiganza canke guhoberana". Isaba kandi ko "mu gihe co gusangira (guhazwa mu Kinyarwanda) ari ugutega ibiganza, atagutega ururimi". Iyo nama yafashe kandi ingingo yo gukura "amazi y'umugisha" (amazi ahezagiye mu kirundi) mu twombo yashirwamwo mw'isengero, maze abakirisu bakaja barayakoramwo mu kugira urumenyetso rw'umusaraba. Basaba abakirisu kudasubira gukora aho yahora ashirwa kuko atakirimwo "kugeza igihe ikibazo kizoba gikemutse". Muri iryo tangazo, Inama y'Abepisikopi Gatolika mu Rwanda, yemereye abakirisitu ko izobandanya ikurikirana uko bimeze, ikazofata n'izindi ngingo zo kwikingira ni vyaba ngombwa. Gushika ubu, ibihugu birenga 80 biramaze guterwa n'uwo mugera watanguriye mu gisagara ca Wuhan c'intara ya Hubei mu Bushinwa. Ku mugabane wa Afrika, ibihugu vya Togo, Nigeria, Senegal, Misiri, Algeria, Tuniziya, Afrika y'Epfo na Cameroon nivyo bimaze guterwa n'uwo mugera. Mu ntumbero yo kurwanya uwo mugera, ibihugu vy'u Rwanda n'u Burundi biherutse gutangaza ingingo vyafashe mu ntumbero yo gukinga ko ishika muri vyo. U Burundi bwatangaje ko ingenzi zivuye mu bihugu vy'u Bushinwa, Koreya y'epfo, Iran, Ubutaliyani, Ubudage, Ubufaransa, Ubuyapani na Espanye zizobanza gushirwa mu kibanza categuwe ukwazo nyene mu kiringo c'iminsi 14. Nayo mu Rwanda, leta isaba abanyagihugu "kugabanya ingendo zitari ngombwa" mu bihugu birangwamwo coronavirus, yongera kandi itangaza n'ingingo zitandukanye harimwo n'izo isuku, kugira ngo birinde kwandura.

Umukinnyi wo hagati wa Liverpool, Naby Keita, ubwo yahabwaga ubuvuzi bwihuse mu mukino wa Champions League ikipe ye yatsinzwe na Barcelone Uyu mukinnyi w'imyaka 24 y'amavuko ukomoka muri Guinea Conakry, ntabwo azongera kubasha gukina mu gihe gisigaye ngo uyu mwaka w'imikino urangire, ndetse hari impungenge niba azabasha gukina imikino y'igikombe cy'Afurika izatangira ku itariki ya 21 y'ukwa gatandatu mu Misiri. Umutoza Jurgen Klopp wa Liverpool yavuze ko ari "amahirwe macye", ko uyu mukinnyi "yavunitse ku rwego rwo hejuru". Klopp yongeyeho ati: "[Ni] inkuru mbi kuri twe no kuri we mu gihe imikino y'igikombe cy'Afurika iri hafi gutangira". Keita byabaye ngombwa ko avanwa mu kibuga nyuma y'iminota 24 mu gice cya mbere cy'uwo mukino ubanza wabereye ku kibuga Nou Camp cya Barcelone, Liverpool yatsinzwemo ibitego 3-0. Ntabwo azakina umukino wo kwishyura uzabera ku kibuga Anfield cya Liverpool ku itariki ya karindwi y'uku kwezi kwa gatanu, ndetse n'imikino ibiri ya shampiyona Liverpool isigaje gukina izayihuza na Newcastle United na Wolves.

Icegera ca kabiri c'umukuru w'igihugu Joseph Butore Babishikirije kuri uno wa gatatu igihe icegera ca kabiri c'umukuru w'igihugu, Joseph Butore, yashikiriza inama nshingamateka na nkenguzamateka ivyo ubushikiranganji bukukira ibiro vyiwe bwaranguye mu gice ca kabiri c'umwaka uheze. Bavuga ko umuntu aterera ku bushake bwiwe. Joseph Butore amenyesha ko ico kibazo ataco yari bwumve. Abo bashingamateka n'abakenguzamateka bemeza ko hari abakozi ba reta bari baranditse basaba ko batokatwa amafaranga ku mishahara yabo kubera imvo zitandukanye, ariko ngo ivyo basavye ntivyafatiweko. Umushingamateka Mbonigaba Noé ni umwe mubashikirije amakenga. « Mu bushikiranganji bw'ikigega ca reta n'ubw'intwaro yo hagati mu gihugu bari bashize umukono kw'itegeko rijanye n'intererano y'amatora. Vyarateye impari gushika n'aho bafata ingingo yuko umuntu aterera ku bushake bwiwe ko n'uwudakeneye gukatwa yokwandika akabimenyesha. Ariko ubu turumva imyidogo ahatari hake yuko abasavye ko batokatwa vyarenzweko barabakata. Nagira nsabe umuco » nikwo Mbonigaba Noé avuga. Icegera ca Kabiri c'umukuru w'igihugu, Joseph Butore, ati ayo makuru ndayumviye aha. « Jewe nukuri abo bantu baterera ku gahato jewe ntawe nzi. Urwo rutonde rw'abanditse basaba kudakatwa jewe ntarwo ndumva", nikwo Butore avuga. Kuri uyu wa kabiri ab'episkopi katolika bo mu Burundi bari bashoye itangazo bamenyesha aho bahagaze ku bijanye n'intererano y'amatora. Bagira bati "hari abantu baturubikwa bagahatirwa guterera kabiri gatatu kandi benshi ata n'amikoro manini bafise". Ikindi, abo bungere b'ekleziya katolika biyumvira yuko vyobaye vyiza ababijejwe babanje kwerekana ibiharuro vy'uburyo bukenewe ukwo bungana, bakavuga n'ubumaze kuboneka, gurtyo bakerekana n'ubugikenewe ukwo bungana kugira umuntu aterere ico ashoboye azi intambwe igezweko". Uno musi, Icegera ca kbairi c'umukuru w'gihugu yari aramutse ashikiriza imbere y'inama nshingamateka na nkenguzamateka icegeranyo c'ivyaranguwe n'ubushikiranganji 12 bukukira ibiro vyiwe. Mu bindi bibazo vyagarutsweko harimwo ikijanye n'ubukene bw'imiti bwibonekeza mu gihugu c'uburundi hamwe n'ic'ubukene bw'amavuriro mu ntara ya Kirundo. Ku kijanye n'ubukene bw'imiti Joseph Butore yamenyesheje ko reta iriko irakora ukwo ishoboye kugira ibintu bije mu buryo. Ku ngorane yo mu kirundo nayo yishuye ko kigiye kwigwa vuba.

Luca Attanasio na Vittorio Lacovacci, umupolisi w'Umutaliyani wamurindaga, n'umushoferi w'Umunyecongo barishwe ubwo abantu bitwaje intwaro bateraga uruhererekane rw'imodoka za UN. Indege ya gisirikare y'Ubutaliyani yageze ku kibuga cy'indege cya Ciampino i Roma ivuye i Goma izanye amasanduku abiri yambitswe ibendera ry'Ubutaliyani, yakirwa na Minisitiri w'intebe Mario Draghi. Abategetsi muri DR Congo bashinje umutwe urwanya ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda wa FDLR kuba ko ari wo wakoze ubwo bwicanyi. Uyu mutwe wo warabihakanye. Ambasaderi yakoraga iki muri ako gace? Attanasio wari uhagarariye Ubutaliyani muri DR Congo kuva mu 2017, yari mu rugendo rw'akazi hamwe n'ishami rya UN rishinzwe ibiribwa ku isi PAM/WFP. Yari agiye kureba gahunda yo kugeza ibiribwa ku mashuri muri Rutshuru, nk'uko WFP ibivuga. Inshuti ye, Umutaliyani w'inzobere mu by'ibirunga Dario Tedesco, yabwiye ibiro ntaramakuru Reuters ko bombi bari bafitanye gahunda yo kuzamuka ikirunga cya Nyiragongo nyuma y'urwo rugendo ku wa mbere. Pariki ya Virunga - ku ruhande rwa DR Congo - ni imwe muri pariki zifite ibibazo by'umutekano mucye muri Africa. Tedesco avuga ko ku cyumweru bari basangiye na we ifunguro rya nimugoroba. Ati: "Yemeraga ibyo yakoraga kandi uru ntirwari rukwiye kuba urugendo rwe rwa nyuma."

Vicoire Ingabire yarekuwe itariki 15 z'ukw'icenda Itangazo ryasohowe n'ibi biro rivuga ko Ingabire yari yahamagawe kugira ngo amenyeshwe ko ibimaze iminsi bitangazwa na we cyangwa byavugwaga mu zina rye, bishobora gukurikiranwa nk'ibyaha. Ibi biro byavuze ko uyu mutegarugori yemeye ko hari bimwe mu bitangazwa bimwitirira, kandi bishobora kwanduza izina rye. Inkuru y'ihamagazwa rya Madamu Victoire Ingabire yamenyekanye kuva mu masaha ya mu gitondo, binyuze ku mbuga nkoranyambaga zitandukanye. Yaje gushimangirwa n'ibiro by'ubugenzacyaha, mu itangazo byashize ahagaragara ku gicamunsi. Iri tangazo rivuga ko amagambo amaze iminsi atangazwa na Victoire Ingabire cyangwa se abandi bavuga ko bayatangaza mu izina rye ashobora gufatwa nk'ibyaha bikurikiranwa n'amategeko. Aya ni nko kuba Ingabire avuga ko yari imfungwa ya politiki ndetse no kuba hari n'abandi bari muri gereza yita imfungwa za politiki. Ibiro by'ubugenzacyaha bivuga ko kuvuga imfungwa za politiki kandi abantu bagikurikiranwe cyangwa barahamijwe ibyaha ari ugukwirakwiza ibinyoma kandi bikaba bihanwa n'amategeko. Nk'uko bivugwa muri iri tangazo, Ingabire ngo yemeye ko hari bimwe bivugwa mu izina rye bikozwe n'abamwiyitirira kandi bikaba bishobora kumwanduriza izina. Urwego rw'igihugu rw'ubugenzacyaha ruvuga ko Ingabire yarwemereye ko agiye kwitwararika ibibujijwe n'amategeko, kandi ko ari gutegura uruzinduko rw'abana be mu Rwanda. Twagerageje kuvugana na Madamu Ingabire ntibyadushobokera. Gusa, mu butumwa bugufi, umuvugizi we Anselme Mutuyimana yabwiye BBC ko Ingabire yavuye amahoro mu biro by'ubugenzacyaha ariko ntiyagira ikindi arenzaho. Hari hashize iminsi, umukuru w'igihugu Paul Kagame abaye nk'uwihanangirije uyu munyapolitiki wari umaze kurekurwa n'imbabazi z'umukuru w'igihugu. Mu ijwi ryumvikanyemo uburakari ubwo yarahizaga abagize inteko ishingamategeko, Paul Kagame yavuze ko Ingabire atitonze mu magambo yasanga yasubiye muri gereza. Ibi byavuzwe bikurikira impaka nyinshi zavutse nyuma y'irekurwa ry'uyu munyapolitiki. Mu gihe benshi bavugaga ko yarekuwe nyuma yo gusaba imbabazi, Ingabire we yakomeje kuvuga ko yasabye kurekurwa ariko ko atasabye imbabazi kuko zisabwa n'uwemera ko yakoze icyaha.

Umukuru w'igihugu ca Etiyopiya Mulatu Teshome Ashikiriza ijambo mu nama y'inteko zijejwe amateka, avuga no ku bijanye n'amategeko leta igiye gushinga, Prezida Mulatu Teshome yamenyesheje ko uruhusha rwo kwinjira mu gihugu "visa" rugiye gukurwaho ku banyafrika bose. Impera ya Twitter ubutumwa, 1 Umuryango w'Ubumwe bwa Afrika wasavye ko ibihugu vyose vya Afrika vyohagarika gusaba "visa" ku banyafrika bose kuva mu 2018. Gushika ubu, igihugu ca Seychelles nico conyene kidasaba "visa" ku banyafrika - no ku bandi banyagihugu b'ibihugu vyose vyo kw'isi - nkuko biri kuva kera. Mu cegeranyo gishasha bivugwa ko abanyafrika bashobora gutembera ata "visa" mu bice 22% vy'ibihugu vya Afrika.

Perezida Hassan Rouhani avuga ko ibihugu vy'Ubulayi bitegerezwa gusubira kwubahiriza ivyo vyiyemeje Bwana Johnson avuga ko afata nka nkama ivyavuzwe na Trump, aho abona ko amasezerano yo mu 2015 afise "akanenge", aca asaba ko yosubirwamwo. Bwana Rouhani wewe agabisha ko "ivyo Trump yakoze vyose kwabaye ukurenga ku vyo yiyemeje". Perezida Trump yivumbuye muri ayo masezerano mu 2018 aca asubizaho ibihano Amerika yari yafatiye Irani, mu ntumbero yo kuyigondoza ngo isubire mu bindi biganiro kugira haboneke amasezerano mashasha. Trump yipfuza ko ayo masezerano mashasha yohagarika burundu umugambi wa Irani wo guhingura ubutare bw'ubumara be n'uwo guhingura ibirwanisho ruhonyanganda birasa kure. Ibihugu bitanu bisigaye muri ayo masezerano, arivyo Ubufaransa, Ubwongereza, Ubudagi, Ubushinwa n'Uburusiya, vyipfuza ko ayo masezeano abandanya. Ariko, kuva Amerika yongereje ibihano kuri Irani mu kwa gatanu 2019, ico gihugu caciye gitangura kurenga ku vyo cari cemeye bijanye n'uguhingura ubutare bwa Uranium. Irani ivuga ko ica nyuma muvyo yari yiyemeje yagikuyeho mu ntango za kuno kwezi, haciye iminsi Jenerali Qasem Soleimani agandaguwe na Amerika muri Irak. Amasezerano yo mu 2015 yatumye Irani igabanya ibikorwa vyayo bijanye n'uguhingura ubwo butare bw'ubumara, itako yemerera n'abagenduzi b'ishirahamwe mpuzamakungu rijejwe inguvu z'ubumara, IAEA, kuja muri ico gihugu, naco gikurwako ibihano. Igihe itangura kuyahonyanga, Irani yavuga ko ayo masezerano yayiha uburenganzira "bwo kurenga kuvyo yiyemeje" mu gihe "urundi ruhande rurenze kuvyo rwiyemeje". Mu ngingo zikomeye Irani yafashe ni ukwubaka ibindi bikono bikomeye vyo guhingura ubutare bwa Uranium Ibihugu vy' Ubufaransa, Ubwongereza n'Ubudagi bigabisha ko ivyo Irani iriko irakora "biteye kubiri n'ibiri muri ayo masezerano" kandi ko bizogira ingaruka mbi zikomeye. Bivuga ko bifise ishaka ryo kwubahiriza ayo masezerano kandi ko bifise icizere ko umuti w'ico kibazo ushobora gutorwa biciye mu biganiro. Mw'ijambo ryiwe kuri televiziyo ejo ku wa gatatu, umukuru w'igihugu ca Irani yaraneguye ivyo bihugu ko vyananiwe n'uguhagararira ayo masezerano. Ati: "Igisigaye ni uko musubira kuvyo mwiyemeje". "Mu minsi iheze, narabwiye abategetsi b'ibihugu bibiri vya Bulaya ko atavyo dukora bidashobora guhinduka, kandi ko vyose muvyo dukora mu bijanye n'uguhingura ubutare bw'ubumara bihagarariwe na IAEA". Yongeyeko ati: "Mukaramuka mufashe inzira itari yo, bizobagirira ingaruka mbi. Hitamwo rero inzira nyayo, iyo nayo ni ugusubira kwubahiriza amasezerano". Bwana Rouhani kandi yaraneguye Ubwongereza busaba ko ayo masezerano yosubirizwa. Ati: "Jewe si nzi ivyo umushikiranganji wa mbere w'Ubwongereza yiyumvira. Ivyo Trump yakoze vyose kwabaye uguhonyanga ivyo yiyemeje, kandi bikaba biteye kubiri n'amategeko mpuzamakungu". Bwana Johnson yabwiye BBC ku wa kabiri ko "ikintu gikomeye" kuri ayo masezerano ari uko Amerika iyabonamwo "akanenge". Ati: "Nimba ari ukuyaheba, reka tuyasubirize, kandi tuyasubirize n'amasezerano ya Trump. Perezida Trump afise uruhara ntangere. Reka rero dukorere hamwe hanyuma turonke amasezerano ya Trump". Ubutegetsi bwa Perezida Trump buvuga ko bwiteguye kuja mu biganiro "atakirinze gusabwa", ariko Irani yoyo ivuga ko ibiganiro bishoboka gusa mu gihe ibihano vya Amerika vyokurwaho burundu. Umushikiranganji wa Irani ajejwe imigenderanire, Mohammad Javad Zarif, yabwiye abamenyeshamakuru ku mugwa mukuru w'Ubuhindi Delhi ejo ku wa gatatu ko ibihugu vya Bulaya vyisuzuguza imbere ya Amerika. Hagati aho, yavuze ko ayo masezerano ku mugambi wayo w'ubugingura ubutare bw'ubumara "atarapfa".

Bivugwa ko uyu muririmbyi aregwa ibyaha 13, birimo kwereka abana amashusho y'urukozasoni ndetse no gutambamira ubucamanza, nkuko bitangazwa n'ibiro by'umushinjacyaha w'i Chicago. Asanzwe yarahakanye ibirego birenga 20 by'ihohotera rishingiye ku gitsina. Amakuru avuga ko R. Kelly w'imyaka 52 yatawe muri yombi na polisi y'i New York ifatanyije n'abakora mu rwego rw'umutekano w'imbere muri Amerika. Mu gihe cy'imyaka 20, R. Kelly - izina rye y'ukuri ni Robert Sylvester Kelly - yagiye ashinjwa ibyaha bitandukanye bijyanye n'ihohotera rishingiye ku gitsina. Byamenyekanye cyane kubera itangazwa ry'uruhererekane rwa filime mbarankuru yiswe 'Surviving R. Kelly' cyangwa 'kurokoka R. Kelly' ugenekereje mu Kinyarwanda. Iyo filime ikubiyemo amakuru y'ibirego by'uko yatangiye gushakisha abana b'abangavu kuva yatangira umuziki nk'uwabigize umwuga. Mu kwezi kwa kabiri, uyu muririmbyi wo mu njyana ya R&B yashinjwe ibyaha 10 by'ihohotera rikaze rishingiye ku gitsina. Yahakanye ibyo aregwa, arekurwa by'agateganyo. Mu kwezi kwa gatanu ashinjwa ibindi byaha 11 by'ihohotera rishingiye ku gitsina, bijyanye no gufata ku ngufu umwana w'imyaka iri hagati ya 13 na 16 y'amavuko - ibyaha yahakanye mu kwezi gushize. Ntibiramenyekana niba ibyo birego bishya bifitanye isano n'ibyo birego bindi. R. Kelly yaburanishijwe inshuro imwe ku birego by'ihohotera rishingiye ku gitsina, mu mwaka wa 2008 urukiko rwanzura ko ari umwere ku birego byo kwereka abana amashusho y'urukozasoni. Ikiganiro Newsbeat cya BBC cyagerageje kuvugana n'abahagarariye R. Kelly, cyo kimwe na polisi y'i New York ndetse n'ibiro by'umushinjacyaha i Chicago, ariko ntibirashoboka.

Imiryango ya Kiliziya irafunze kuri iki cyumweru kuri Paruwasi ya Mutagatifu Karoli Lwanga i Nyamirambo mu mujyi wa Kigali Mu kiganiro na Radio Rwanda, Minisitiri Anastase Shyaka w'ubutegetsi bw'igihugu na Dr Ngamije Daniel w'ubuzima bavuze ko izo ngamba zirimo ifungwa ry'ahantu hasanzwe hahurira abantu benshi. Bavuze ko amashuri guhera ku y'incuke kugeza kuri za kaminuza ndetse n'insengero zose zifungwa guhera uyu munsi. Igitambo cya misa yo kuri iki cyumweru cyanyuze kuri radio na televiziyo by'igihugu. Bwana Shyaka yavuze ko abakuru b'amadini na bo bumvise uburemere bw'ikibazo u Rwanda n'isi bihanganye nacyo. Ati: "Twabyumvaga kimwe, nta kubyumva ukubiri kwabayeho". Muri izo ngamba kandi, Bwana Shyaka yavuze ko aho bishoboka abakozi bagenda bakorera mu rugo, imikino n'ubukwe bigasubikwa ndetse abagize ibyago byo gupfusha umuntu bagashyingura mu bundi buryo bwihariye. Ishyirahamwe ry'umupira w'amaguru mu Rwanda (FERWAFA) ryatangaje ko imikino igiye kujya iba nta bafana bari ku bibuga, naho ishyirahamwe ry'umukino w'intoki wa basketball (FERWABA) risubika imikino. Minisitiri Shyaka yavuze ko abakuru b'amadini bumvise uburemere bw'ikibazo u Rwanda n'isi bihanganye nacyo Minisitiri Shyaka yanasabye "kwirinda ubucucike muri za restaurants n'amasoko", no kujya ku isoko hari icyo abantu bagiye kuhagura atari ugupfa kuhajya gusa kureba uko ryaremye. Ati: "Ugahaha utaha, ntakuhiziringa". Muri gahunda zo gutwara abantu mu modoka za rusange, Minisitiri Shyaka yavuze ko nta kugenda abagenzi bahagaze bizongera kubaho, ko abagenzi bose bazajya bagenda bicaye. Yasabye inzego z'ibanze n'iz'umutekano gufasha mu iyubahirizwa ry'izo ngamba. Naho Dr Ngamije, Ministiri w'ubuzima, yavuze ko izo ingamba zikomeye zizafasha cyane mu guhangana na coronavirus, atanga urugero rw'ahandi avuga ko zatanze umusaruro nko muri Hong Kong na Singapour. Minisitiri Ngamije yasabye abantu kwirinda umuco wo guhana umukono mu gusuhuzanya Ashingiye ku kuba uwo murwayi bayisanzemo yaramugaragayeho hashize iminsi itanu ageze mu Rwanda, Bwana Ngamije yagize ati: "Umuntu ashobora kuba nta bimenyetso afite kandi ayifite mu mubiri. Ni ho bigorera rero". "Ni ukwirinda kuramukanya...Guhana imikono ni bwo buryo bwa mbere bwo gukwirakwiza iyo ndwara". Yasabye kandi ko umuntu watangira kugaragaza ibimenyetso byayo birimo nk'inkororora n'ibicurane yahamagara kuri nimero ya telefone itishyurwa ya 114, aho kwihutira kujya ku bitaro cyangwa ikigo nderabuzima kimwegereye. Abanyeshuri baratangira gutaha Abanyeshuri bo ku ishuri ryisumbuye ry'abakobwa rya Muramba mu burengerazuba bw'u Rwanda, basubira mu masomo ya nijoro bari mu nzu y'uburiro (ifoto yo mu bubiko) Minisiteri y'uburezi mu Rwanda yatangaje ko abanyeshuri batangira gusubira iwabo guhera kuri iki cyumweru, babimburiwe n'abo mu mashuri yo mu ntara y'amajyepfo no mu mujyi wa Kigali. Naho ejo ku wa mbere hatahe abiga mu mashuri yo mu majyaruguru, uburasirazuba no mu burengerazuba. Minisiteri y'uburezi ivuga ko ayo mashuri afunzwe mu gihe nibura cy'ibyumweru bibiri, bibarwa guhera ejo ku wa mbere, kandi ko ari yo izishingira ikiguzi cy'ingendo z'abo banyeshuri.

Ubushakashatsi bwabo bugaragaza ko abantu bari koroherwa ubu bwoko bushya bwa coronavirus nkuko boroherwa ibicurane bisanzwe. Bwasohotse ejo ku wa kabiri mu kinyamakuru cy'ubushakashatsi mu buvuzi cya Nature Medicine journal. Gutahura utunyangingo nyirizina tw'ubwirinzi bw'umubiri turwanya Covid-19 byanafasha mu gukora urukingo rw'iki cyorezo, nkuko impuguke zibivuga. Ku isi ubu harabarurwa abarenga 200,000 bamaze kuyandura naho abarenga 8,000 imaze kubica. Profeseri Katherine Kedzierska, umwe mu bakoze ubwo bushakashatsi, yagize ati: "Ibi twagezeho ni ingenzi kuko ni bwo bwa mbere twumvise mu by'ukuri uburyo ubwirinzi bwacu bw'umubiri burwanya ubu bwoko bushya bwa coronavirus". Ubu bushakashatsi bw'abo bahanga muri siyansi bo mu kigo Peter Doherty Institute for Infection and Immunity cyo kuri Kaminuza ya Melbourne (University of Melbourne), bwashimagijwe n'izindi mpuguke. Umwe muri izo mpuguke zindi yavuze ko ari "igikorwa cy'ingenzi kigezweho". Ni iki cyavumbuwe? Hari abantu benshi bakize Covid-19, bivuze ko byari bisanzwe bizwi ko ubwirinzi bw'umubiri w'umuntu bushobora kwica burundu iyo virusi. Ariko ubu noneho ku nshuro ya mbere, ubushakashatsi bwavumbuye amoko ane y'utunyangingo turwanya Covid-19. Twatahuwe bakurikirana umurwayi wari urwaye byoroheje iyo virusi kandi utari usanzwe afite ubundi burwayi. Uwo mugore w'imyaka 47 y'amavuko wo mu mujyi wa Wuhan mu Bushinwa, yari yagiye ku bitaro byo muri Australia. Yayikize mu gihe cy'iminsi 14. Profeseri Kedzierska yabwiye BBC ko itsinda ry'abashakashatsi bagenzi be basuzumye "uburyo bwose uko bwakabaye bw'uko ubwirinzi bw'umubiri burwanya iyo virusi" muri uwo murwayi. Iminsi itatu mbere yuko uwo mugore atangira koroherwa, utunyangingo twihariye twabonywe mu maraso ye. Ku barwayi b'ibicurane cyangwa 'influenza', utwo tunyangingo nabwo nubundi tugaragara muri icyo gihe mbere yuko abarwayi bakira, nkuko Profeseri Kedzierska yabivuze. Ifoto y'imbere mu gatuza igaragaza ibihaha by'uwo murwayi bigenda bivamo iyo virusi nyuma yaho utwo tunyangingo tugaragariye Madamu Kedzierska yabwiye BBC ati: "Twashimishijwe cyane n'ibyo twagezeho mu bushakashatsi bwacu - n'ukuntu mu by'ukuri twashoboye gufata ifoto yuko utunyangingo tw'ubwirinzi bw'umubiri tugaragara muri uwo murwayi mbere yuko atangira koroherwa". Yongeyeho ko byafashe ibyumweru bine abahanga muri siyansi barenga icumi ngo bagere kuri iryo sesengura. Ibi birafasha iki? Gutahura igihe utunyangingo tw'ubwirinzi bw'umubiri tuhagerera bishobora gufasha "guteganya aho iyo virusi izaca". Ibi bivugwa na Profeseri Bruce Thompson, umukuru w'ishami rya za siyansi z'ubuzima kuri Kaminuza ya Swinburne University of Technology yo muri Australia. Profeseri Thompson yabwiye BBC ati: "Iyo uzi igihe ibikorwa bitandukanye byo guhangana nayo bibera, ushobora guteganya aho ugeze ukira iyo virusi". Greg Hunt, Minisitiri w'ubuzima wa Australia, yavuze ko ibyavuye muri ubwo bushakashatsi binashobora "kwihutisha" urukingo ndetse n'uburyo bwo mu gihe kiri imbere bwo kuvura abarwaye Covid-19. Profeseri Kedzierska yavuze ko ubu igikurikiyeho kuri we n'abo bahanga muri siyansi bagenzi be ari ugutahura impamvu uko ubwirinzi bw'umubiri w'umuntu burwana n'iyo virusi bigira intege nke kurushaho ku bo yashegeshe. Ati: "Ubu rwose ni ikintu cy'ingenzi gusobanukirwa n'ikibura cyangwa igitandukanye ku barwayi bapfuye cyangwa abo yashegeshe - kugira ngo tumenye uburyo twabarinda". Mu kwezi kwa mbere uyu mwaka, icyo kigo cya Peter Doherty Institute for Infection and Immunity cyabaye icya mbere gishoboye kwigana muri 'laboratoire' uko iyo virusi iteye, cyo hanze y'Ubushinwa. Kuva icyo gihe, cyahawe indi nkunga y'inyongera na leta ya Australia ndetse n'imfashanyo ivuye ahandi hatandukanye, harimo n'iyo cyahawe na Jack Ma, umuherwe wo mu Bushinwa utunze abarirwa muri za miliyari z'amadolari y'Amerika.

ONU ivuga ko uko ibintu bimeze ubu ari byo bibi cyane bibayeho mu karere ko mu ihembe ry'Afurika mu myaka 25 ishize Minisiteri y'ubuhinzi ya Somalia yavuze ko utwo dukoko, turya ibihingwa byinshi, duteje "ibyago bikomeye ku kwihaza mu biribwa kwa Somalia gusanzwe gufite intege nke". Hari ubwoba ko uko ibintu bimeze ubu bishobora kudahagarikwa mbere y'igihe cy'isarura ryo mu kwezi kwa kane. Umuryango w'abibumbye (ONU) uvuga ko izo nzige ari zo nyinshi cyane zibasiye Somalia na Ethiopia mu myaka 25 ishize. Hagati aho, mu gihugu gituranyi cya Kenya ho mu myaka 70 ishize ntabwo hari bwabeho igitero cy'inzige gikomeye cyane nk'igihari ubu, nkuko bitangazwa n'ishami rya ONU ryita ku biribwa n'ubuhinzi (FAO). Raba video y'iyi nkuru Zaje ziva mu gihugu ca Yemen, ikiguri kimwe gishobora kubamwo imiliyoni 200 yazo. Ariko Somalia ni cyo gihugu cya mbere cyo mu karere gitangaje ko kiri mu bihe bidasanzwe kubera igitero cy'inzige. Kuba Somalia ifite umutekano ujegajega bivuze ko indege zidashobora kwifashishwa mu gutera umuti wica izo nzige ziwuterera mu kirere. Mu kwezi kwa mbere, FAO yasabye imfashanyo y'amahanga mu kurwanya inzige mu karere ko mu ihembe ry'Afurika. Zishobora kuguruka kilometero 150 FAO yaburiye ko umubare wazo muri ako karere ushobora kuzaba wamaze kwikuba inshuro 500 mu kwezi kwa gatandatu. Izo nzige zageze mu burasirazuba bw'Afurika zivuye muri Yemen zinyuze hejuru y'inyanja itukura, nyuma yaho imvura nyinshi yaguye mu mpera y'umwaka wa 2019 itumye habaho ibihe byiza ngo zororoke. Inzige zishobora gukora urugendo rwa kilometero 150 mu munsi umwe. Ku munsi, buri nzige nkuru ishobora kurya ibiryo bingana n'uburemere bwayo. Mu kwezi kwa cumi na kabiri, igico cy'inzige cyatumye indege itwara abagenzi ita inzira yayo muri Ethiopia. Icyo gihe, inzige zigabije moteri z'iyo ndege, ibirahuri byayo n'izuru ryayo, ariko iyo ndege yashoboye kugwa mu mahoro ku kibuga cyo mu murwa mukuru Addis-Abeba.

Me Vedaste Habimana, umuhesha w'inkiko wagurishije inzu ya UTC Iyi nzu y'umuherwe Tribert Rujugiro yagurishijwe miliyari zitagera kuri zirindwi mu gihe nyirayo avuga ko yayubatse ku gaciro kari hafi ya miliyari 20. Umuhesha w'inkiko Vedaste Habimana ni we watangije icyamunara yavuze ko yakoze mu izina ry'ikigo cy'imisoro n'amahoro. Hiyandikishije abantu cyangwa ibigo 13 ariko abumvikanye mu ipiganwa barushanwa ibiciro ni batatu gusa. Uko byagaragaye nta piganwa rihambaye ryabaye ndetse n'abigaragaje batanga ibbiciro basaga n'intumwa zoherejwe n'abandi. Hari abo umunyamakuru wa BBC yabonye binyabya mu modoka y'umukara y'ibirahure byijimye yari hafi y'ahaberaga cyamunara, mbere yo kugaruka bazanye ibiciro bishya. Inyubako ya UTC iri mu zikomeye z'ubucuruzi mu murwa mukuru Kigali Ikigo Kigali Investment Company ni cyo cyegukanye iyi nyubako cyemeye kwishyura igiciro kiruta ibyatanzwe n'abandi cya 6.877.150.000. Ku giciro cy'ibanze cyari cyatangajwe hiyongereyeho miliyoni zitarenga 230. Ikigo cy'igihugu cy'imisoro cyavugaga ko inyubako ya UTC igifitiye ibirarane bigera kuri miliyari na miliyoni 200 by'amafranga y'u Rwanda. Aya ni macye ugereranyije n'ayagurishijwe iyi nyubako mu cyamunara. Bwana Rujugiro avuga ko iyi nyubako yamutwaye akayabo ka miliyoni 20 z'amadolari. Kanid ko ubutegetsi bushaka kuyitwara 'kugira ngo bumukeneshe'. Hashingiwe kuri iyi mibare agaciro yatanzweho kari munsi ho miliyari zigera ku icumi. Nubwo iyi nyubako yagurishijwe, haracyibazwa ikizakurikira .Amakuru yakomeje gusakara mu minsi yashize ni uko iyi nzu ishobora no gusenywa ,ku mpamvu z'uko imyubakire yayo itubahirije ibisabwa n'igishushanyo mbonera (Master Plan) cy'umujyi wa Kigali.

Abanya Ethiopia baba mu bindi bihugu nabo nyene barakoreye imyiyerekano iyo bari yo kwiyamiriza ubutegetsi Yavuze ko ibohero rikomeye, Maekelawi, rikwiye kwugagwa rigahindugwamwo inyubakwa yo kubikamwo ibiranga akahise. Bwana Desalegn yavuze ko iyo ntambwe ishobora gufasha mu biganiro bitegekanijwe mu gihugu cose, inyuma y'imyiyerekano y'abagwanya ubutegetsi yamaze imyaka irenga ibiri. Abantu bagiye mu myiyerekano baharugwa mu bihumbi barafunzwe, amajana baricwa. Umumenyeshamakuru wa BBC akorera muri Ethiopia, avuga ko ari ubwa mbere leta yemera ko hari abanyororo bafungiwe politike, ikigongwe c'uno munsi kikaba catangaje benshi.

Intumwa za leta ya Zimbabwe zimaze igihe muri Singapour aho zagiye kureba uko Bwana Mugabe w'imyaka 95 y'amavuko amerewe Bwana Mnangagwa yavuze ko Bwana Mugabe w'imyaka 95 y'amavuko "waharaniye ubwigenge bw'igihugu cyacu" amaze igihe avurwa indwara itatangajwe kandi ko agenda yoroherwa. Mu itangazo Bwana Mnangagwa yasohoye ejo ku wa mbere, yongeyeho ati: "Bitandukanye no mu gihe cyashize ubwo uyu wahoze ari perezida yamaraga hafi ukwezi kumwe gusa [yitabwaho], kuri iyi nshuro bwo abaganga basanze yaguma kwitabwaho mu gihe kirekire kurushaho guhera mu kwezi kwa kane uyu mwaka ubwo yajyaga kwisuzumisha nkuko bisanzwe". Mu kwezi kwa cumi na kumwe k'umwaka ushize, Perezida Mnangagwa yavuze ko Bwana Mugabe adashoboye kugenda kubera ubuzima bwe butameze neza no kubera ko ageze mu zabukuru. Ubwo leta ya Zimbabwe yatangazaga mu kwezi kwa kane uyu mwaka ko yagiye kwivuriza muri Singapour, yavuze ko yitezwe gusubira muri Zimbabwe hagati mu kwezi kwa gatanu. Bwana Mnangagwa yavuze ko mu cyumweru gishize yohereje intumwa muri Singapour ngo zirebe uko Mugabe amerewe. Avuga ko "kubera ukuntu ari kugenda yohorerwa Mugabe ashobora gusezererwa [mu bitaro] mu gihe cya vuba". Urwego rw'ubuvuzi muri Zimbabwe rusa nk'urwatembagaye ndetse abifite bakunze kujya kwivuza mu gihugu gituranyi cy'Afurika y'Epfo cyangwa mu yandi mahanga ya kure. Mu gihe cy'imyaka igera kuri 37 yamaze ku butegetsi, Bwana Mugabe hafi inshuro zose yivuje yagiye kwivuriza muri Singapour. Bwana Mnangagwa, wageze ku butegetsi mu kwezi kwa cumi na kumwe muri 2017 abifashijwemo n'igisirikare, yaje gutorwa nka Perezida mu matora ataravuzweho rumwe yabaye mu kwezi kwa karindwi k'umwaka ushize.

Jacob Zuma yagirizwa uruhara mu kurya ibiturire ariko yagiye ararusimba mu matora menshi yo kumukura ku butegetsi Sentare ijejwe kwubahiriza ibwirizwa shingiro yavuze ko umukuru w'inama nshingamateka afise uburenganzira bwo gutegegeka ishirwa mu ngiro ry'iyo ngingo. Yaheruka kuvuga ko ata bubasha abifitiye. Imigambwe itavuga rumwe na reta yizeye ko amatora abereye mu mwiherero, abashingamateka bo mu mugambwe wa ANC prezida Zuma akomokamwo, bashobora kumukurako amaboko. Aramaze kurusimba kenshi mu matora yo kumwirukana ku butegetsi. Prezida Zuma amaze kwagirizwa ibintu vyinshi, uhereye ku biturire ukaja no kwishingwa rya reta nshasha yaranzwe n'iyirukanwa mu mabanga yiwe umushikiranji w'ikigega ca reta yubashwe cane. Ashikiriza iyo ngingo ya sentare, umukuru w'intahe Mgoeng Mgoeng yavuze ko yishimikije ingene ubutegetsi butegerezwa gutandukana, ari umukuru w'inama nshingamateka ategerezwa gufata ingingo y'ingene amatora ategerezwa kugenda. Umukuru w'inama nshingamateka, Baleka Mbele, ni umutegetsi akomeye wa ANC, akkaba yaravuze ko amategeko agenga inama nshingamateka atarekura ko amatora abera mu mwiherero. Amakete ya email yagiriza Prezida Zuma ku biturire ANC irihweza ikibazo c'uko Zuma yoba ashaka kwibera Dubai Iyindi tariki woberako amatora yo gukura prezida ku butegetsi igiye gusubira kwihwezwa. Ku vyerekeye amatora yo kuba batakimwizeye, Prezida Zuma aramaze gutsindwa mu manza nyinshi, harimwo urwo kumutegeka kuriha amahera ya reta yakoresheje mu gusubiramwo inzu yiwe i Nkandla. Ariko igenwa rya reta nshasha ni ryo ryamukozeko cane, aho hariho n'abo mu mugambwe wiwe bamuhamagariye gutanga imihoho. Ikiringo ciwe kizorangira mu 2019, kandi ANC yiteguye gutora uwuzomusubirira mu mpera z'uyu mwaka.

Madamu Manigirubuntu ateruye umwana yibarutse mu gihe yari no mu kizamini Mu mpera z'ukwezi gushize Madamu Manigirubuntu warangije kaminuza, we n'abandi benshi bagiye gukora ikizamini cy'akazi ko kwigisha muri komine Bwambarangwe mu ntara ya Kirundo. Umunsi w'ikizamini wahuriranye n'umunsi yari atwite inda y'imvutsi, mu ntege nke z'umubiri muri icyo gihe, Manigirubuntu yarihanganye ajya mu kizamini nk'uko yabibwiye BBC Gahuzamiryango. Ati: "Bari batubwiye ko dushobora gutangira ikizamini saa mbili za mugitondo, izo saha zageze natangiye gufatwa no kuribwa ndavuga nti naho yaba ari inda ndategereza". Yarihanganye akomeza kwitegura ategereje ikizamini bigera saa yine z'amanywa kitaraza, ayo masaha batangiye kubashyira mu myanya bicaramo, ariko we ibise birushaho. Arakomeza ati: "Bigeze saa yine n'igice kwihangana byaranze ntuma umuntu ngo andebere uwantwara kuri moto akangeza kwa muganga". Madamu Manigirubuntu kwa muganga nyuma yo kubyara Uwo yatumye yabuze moto maze ku bw'amahirwe aho hahinguka ushinzwe amashuri muri komine Kirundo. "Yasanze abandi badamu banshungereye nabize intuguta, ahita antwara kuri moto ye angeza kwa muganga. Igihe bariho bansuzuma umwana yahise avuka, byamaze nk'iminota itanu". - Manigirubuntu. 'Muganga, ndebera umu-bebe ndagiye' Avuga ko yahise abwira muganga ko yariho akora ikizamini kandi agomba gusubirayo nubwo yumvaga atameze neza mu mugongo. Ati: "Naravugaga nti ibyo aribyo byose ninjyewe uzi aho ubushomeri bungejeje reka ngende [mu kizamini] niyemeje ibiza gukurikira. Mbwira muganga nti mundebere umu-bebe ndagiye". Kwa muganga yahatindijwe no kumutunganya gusa kuko yahavuye n'umwana atamwonkeje, asubira ku kizamini abo yasize bamubonye baratangara cyane nk'uko abivuga. Manigirubuntu warangije muri Kaminuza y'u Burundi afite abana babiri Ikizamini cyongeye gutinda gutangwa maze arongera afata moto nanone asubira kwa muganga konsa umwana. Ati: "Nonkeje nk mu minota 15 barampamara barambwira bati ikizamini kiraje, ndongera mfata moto baranyemerera kuko nari nkererwewe gato ndicara ndakora ndetse natanze abandi kurangiza". Madamu Manigirubuntu avuga ko yarangije ikizamini yamaze gutangira kumererwa nabi no gutengurwa, bamujyanye kwa muganga ashyirwa mu bitaro yitabwaho asubirana imbaraga. Tariki 12 z'uku kwezi hasohotse amanota, Emilienne Manigirubuntu yabwiye BBC ko yatsinze iki kizamini akaba yizeye ko azahabwa akazi yahataniye akimara kwibaruka.

Afashe kopi y'ikinyamakuru gifite umutwe w'inkuru ugira uti "Trump yagizwe umwere", yagize ati: "Hari ibintu bibi nakoze mu buzima bwanjye, nabyemera...ariko ibi ni cyo kibivuyemo". Mu ijambo yavugiye mu biro bya perezida w'Amerika bya White House, yagize ati: "Twaciye mu bintu bibi cyane, ku bw'akarengane. Nta kintu na kimwe kibi twakoze. Byari ububisha, byari birimo amanyanga". Mbere yaho, yari yanenze abari bashatse kumweguza bitwaje imyemerere ishingiye ku idini. Bwana Trump, avugira mu gice cy'ibiro bye cyizwi ku izina rya East Room cyuzuye abamushyigikiye n'abagize leta, yagize ati: "None ubu dufite iryo jambo ryiza. Nta na rimwe nigeze ntekereza ko ryakumvikana neza". "Ryitwa 'kugirwa umwere byuzuye'". Bwana Trump yashimiye abunganizi be mu mategeko n'abagize inteko bo mu ishyaka ry'abarepubulikani Mu kwezi kwa 12 Bwana Trump yegujwe n'inteko ishingamategeko umutwe w'abadepite - yiganjemo abademokarate - kubera gukoresha nabi ububasha ahabwa n'umwanya we no kubangamira inteko mu kazi kayo. Ariko ku wa gatatu w'iki cyumweru yagizwe umwere, nyuma y'urubanza rwamaze ibyumweru bibiri muri sena igenzurwa n'abo mu ishyaka rye ry'abarepubulikani, nta batangabuhamya bahari. Bwana Trump yanakoresheje ijambo rikakaye mu kuvuga ku iperereza ry'urwego rw'ubucamanza rw'Amerika ku kureba niba ibikorwa bye byo kwiyamamaza mu 2016 byarafashijwe n'Uburusiya. Ati: "Byose byari umwanda. Ibi ntibikwiye na rimwe kugira undi perezida bibaho".

Umukuru w'igihugu wa Amerika, Donald Trump, ari mu bategetsi bashushanywa cyane kw'isi mu buryo busekeje cyangwa busebeje Bimwe mu byaha bigengwa n'ayo mategko harimo icyo gukoza isoni abayobozi b'icyo gihugu mu nkuru zishushanyije cyangwa se zanditse. Umunyamakuru uhamwe n'icyo cyaha azahanishwa igifungo kiri hagati y'umwaka 1 n'imyaka 2 n'ihazabu igeze kuri miliyoni 1 y'amafaranga y'u Rwanda. Ingingo zikubiye mu gitabo gishya cy'amategeko ahana mu Rwanda zigomba gutangira hushyirwa mu bikorwa nk'uko zasohotse mu igazeti ya leta mu mpera z'icyumweru gishize. Mu mategeko mashya hari ingingo zimwe na zimwe zerekeranye n'isebanya zavanywemo, ku birebana n'itangazamakuru zegurirwa urwego rushinzwe kwigenzura hagati y'abanyamakuru rukaba arirwo rukiranura ibyo bibazo. N'ubwo ibyo byishimirwa n'ishyirahamwe ry'abanyamakuru mu Rwanda, ARJ, ariko umunyamabanga mukuru w'iri shyirahamwe Gonzaga Muganwa avuga ko uru rwego rugitewe impungenge na zimwe mu ngingo zigaragara muri iki gitabo gishya. Gusebya Prezida Kagame mu kumushushanya bizahanishwa igifungo cy'imyaka itanu cyangwa irindwi, n'ihazabu y'amafaranga miriyo 5 cyangwa 7 y'amanyarwanda Gushushanya cyangwa kwandika ibigaragara ko bikoza isoni abayobozi bizafatwa nk'icyaha gihanishwa igifungo kigera ku myaka 2 n'ihazabu y'amafaranga arenga miliyoni y'amanyarwanda. Bamwe mu banyamakuru bigenga bavuganye na BBC basanga akazi kabo kagiye guhura n'ibibazo. Mu ngingo zindi zikakaye harimo itegeko rihana ryihanukiriye uzasebya umukuru w'igihugu, ivuga ko uzahamwa n'icyo cyaha azahanishwa igifungo kiva ku myaka 5 kugeza ku myaka 7 n'ihazabu y'amafaranga y'u Rwanda kuva kuri milioni 5 kugeza kuri milioni 7. Iri naryo ishyirahamwe ry'abanyamakuru mu Rwanda ryari ryaratakambye ko ryavanwa mu mategeko. U Rwanda rushyirwa mu myanya ya nyuma n'ibyegeranyo bitandukanye mu kubahiriza ubwisanzure bw'itangazamakuru ,ibyegeranyo ariko binyomozwa na Leta.

Sassou Nguesso yagiye ku butegetsi bwa mbere mu 1979 Perezida Denis Sassou Nguesso azahatana n'abandi bantu barindwi barimo uwahoze ari minisitiri w'imari Mathias Dzon, na Guy Brice Parfait Kolélas, umuhungu w'uwahoze ari minisitiri w'intebe. Sassou Nguesso w'imyaka 77 arashaka gutegeka kuri manda ya kane. Ihuriro ry'amashyaka atavugarumwe n'ubutegetsi Union Panafricaine pour la Démocratie Sociale (UPADS), rivuga ko ritazitabira amatora. Mu 2015, itora rya kamarampaka ryahinduye itegekoshinga rivanaho ingingo y'imyaka ntarengwa y'umukuru w'igihugu. Sassou Nguesso aheruka gutsinda amatora ya 2016, amatora yavuzwemo urugomo n'ubujura bw'amajwi. Sassou Nguesso ni perezida wa gatatu muri Africa umaze igihe kirekire ku butegetsi (hafi imyaka 37), nyuma ya Paul Biya wa Cameroun na Teodoro Obiang Nguema wa Equatorial Guinea. Ari ku butegetsi muri iki gihugu kuva mu 1979, uvanyemo imyaka itanu yabuvuyeho nyuma yo gutsindwa amatora mu 1992. Mu 1997 yagarutse ku butegetsi nyuma y'intambara ngufi mu gihugu aho yari ashyigikiwe n'ingabo za Angola. Sassou Nguesso yahoze ari koloneri mu ngabo, yatojwe n'Abafaransa mu gisirikare kirwanira mu kirere. Ageze ku butegetsi bwa mbere mu 1979 - 1992 yahagaritse umubano na leta y'Abasoviyeti, aha ikaze kompanyi z'Abafaransa n'ibindi bihugu by'iburengerazuba mu bikorwa byo gucukura no gutunganya ibitoro muri Congo.

Uru rukingo rwakozwe na kompanyi Merck rwakoreshejwe mu guhangana na Ebola muri DR Congo nubwo rutari rwagahawe uruhushya rwo gukoreshwa Urwo rukingo, rwakozwe na kompanyi Merck yo muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Amerika ikora imiti, rwagaragajwe ko ari ingirakamaro mu kurinda abantu virusi ya Ebola. Ishami ry'umuryango w'abibumye ryita ku buzima (OMS) rivuga ko inkingo za mbere zemewe zo muri ubwo bwoko zizatangira gukoreshwa hagati mu mwaka utaha wa 2020. Abantu barenga 2,000 bamaze kwicwa na Ebola muri DR Congo naho abarenga 3,000 bamaze kuyandura muri icyo gihugu, mu cyorezo cya Ebola cyahadutse mu mwaka ushize. Ikigo gishinzwe iby'imiti cy'i Burayi - European Medicines Agency - cyemeye ko urwo rukingo ruba rutangiye kugurishwa mu gihe hagitegerejwe ko rwuzuza ibindi bisabwa. Ni rwo rukingo rwa mbere rubayeho ku isi rwa Ebola. Biteganyijwe ko mu byumweru bicye biri imbere urwo rukingo ruzemererwa gucuruzwa mu buryo busesuye rumaze kuzuza ibyo bindi bisabwa. Izi ni intambwe zikomeye zitewe mu kwerekeza ku rukingo ruramira ubuzima bw'abantu, atari gusa mu bihugu byari byararwemereye ko rukoreshwa mu buryo bw'ubushakashatsi. Uku kwemerwa kwarwo ntabwo guhindura ukuntu ruri gukoreshwa mu guhangana na Ebola muri DR Congo, aho abantu barenga 230,000 bamaze gukingirwa. Ariko bivuze ko ubu noneho isi iri hafi kubona umuti wemewe mu buryo busesuye wo kurinda ikwirakwira rya Ebola mu gihe kizaza.

Polisi yoherejwe ku nteko y'intara ya Nairobi gutatanya abashingamategeko bayo bariho bagerageza kweguza ubakuriye, mu gikorwa cyarimo akaduruvayo nk'uko ibinyamakuru byaho bibivuga. Habayeho guhangana hagati y'aba n'abapolisi, nyuma aba bapolisi bane bafotowe bakubita Patricia Mutheu uri mu bahagarariye abaturage muri iyo nteko ya Nairobi. Urwego rureberera polisi ya Kenya rwatangaje ko "rwavuganye na bamwe mu bantu bari aho ibi byabereye". Ntiharamenyekana ibyabanjirije gukubita uyu mugore, ababikoze ntibarumvwa. Gukubita uyu mugore cyanenzwe n'abantu benshi muri Kenya ku mbuga nkoranyambaga, bamagana urugomo rw'abapolisi ku baturage. Itangazo rya ruriya rwego rureberera polisi rivuga ko "iperereza ry'ibanze riri kureba uruhare rwa bariya bapolisi bari boherejwe kuri iyi nyubako ya leta". Impera ya Twitter ubutumwa, 1 Amnesty International ishami rya Kenya, ryasabye ko aba bapolisi bakubise uwo mugore bakurikiranwa. Madamu Patricia Mutheu yumvikanye abwira ibitangazamakuru muri Kenya ko yababajwe no gukubitwa n'abapolisi barimo umukuru wabo, bamusanze aho akorera kandi atabarwanyije.

Icyo cyemezo cyatangarijwe muri Argentina nyuma y'amatora yabaye mw'ibanga y'abagize akanama mpuzamahanga k'imikino ya Olympic. Mw'itora rya nyuma, Tokyo yabonye amajwi 60, Istanbul ibona 36. Madrid yavuyemo mu matora ya mbere. Umushikiranganji wa mbere w'Ubuyapani, Shinzo Abe yabwiye abagize ako kanama ko ibibazo by'uruganda rwa nuclear rw'i Fukushima bitazahungabanya imikino izabera i Tokyo. Tokyo iheruka kwakira iyo mikino mu mwaka w'i 1964. Umunyamakuru wa BBC yavuze ko Tokyo yiyerekanye neza cyane ku nshuro ya nyuma uretse ko yarisanzwe igaragara ko ariyo ifite amahirwe yo kwegukana uwo mwanya.

Abadepite mu Rwanda bavuga ko nta rwitwazo na rumwe rukwiye guhabwa uwasambanyije umwana Mu karere ka Nyagatare mu burasirazuba bw'u Rwanda umwaka ushize gusa habaruwe abana 1,200 bari hagati y'imyaka 14 na 18 batewe inda. Muri aba ngo hakurikiranywe abatarenga 100 gusa kuko abandi bahishiriwe nk'uko byavuzwe muri iyi nama. Umunyamabanga mukuru wungirije w'urwego rw'ubugenzacyaha Madame Isabelle Kalihangabo avuga ko mu myaka itatu ishize hakiriwe ibirego bigera ku 9,000 by'abana basambanyijwe ku ngufu. Abahagarariye izi nzego babwiye abadepite ko gusambanya abana ku gahato biza ku isonga mu byaha bikorerwa abana bakiri bato. Iyi mibare nayo ni iy'ibi byaha byashoboye kuvugwa kuko hari ibitavugwa, muri iyi nama bashinje ababyeyi n'abayobozi b'inzego z'ibanze kubihishira n'ababikora. Madamu Kalihangabo ati: "Usanga hari ababyeyi bumvikana n'abasambanyije abana cyangwa, hari n'aho dusanga ubuyobozi bumwe na bumwe bw'ibanze nabwo bufatanya n'abakoze ibyo byaha". Gutinya kuvuga ibyabakorewe Umubyeyi umwe wo mu karere ka Nyagatare yabwiye BBC ko hari abana b'abakobwa batinya kuvuga ibyabakorewe kuko aribo banegurwa. Uyu mubyeyi ati: "Nta n'impamvu umukobwa atahisha ko yasambanyijwe, kuko niwe utungwa agatoki. "Bati 'ni wowe wagiye hanze, ni wowe wambaye ipantalo, ni wowe ijipo yawe yari ngufiya'... icyaha kijya ku mukobwa, ku buryo igihe cyose asubira inyuma agatinya kugaragaza ko yasambanyijwe". Umubyeyi umwe wo mu karere ka Nyagatare yabwiye BBC ko hari abana b'abakobwa batinya kuvuga ibyabakorewe kuko aribo banegurwa Abadepite bavuga ko nta rwitwazo rukwiye kubaho ngo umwana w'umukobwa asambanywe ku ngufu. Depite Ruku Rwabyoma ati: "Umukobwa afite kwambara icyo ashaka uko kireshya kose, si uguha uburenganzira ushaka kumufata ku ngufu ngo n'uko yambaye agateyiteyi gatoya, cyangwa ngo ni uko yagiye gusenya wenyine. "Umukobwa afite uburenganzira bwo juyjya aho ashaka hose muri iki gihugu igihe cyose nta umukozeho, ni uburenganzira bwe. Dukwiriye guhindura imyumvire." Hari abadepite bifuje ko hajyaho itegeko rihana abarezi (abarimu) basambanya abo barera ku ngufu kuko bari mu bashinjwa ibi byaha. Basabye ko umwarimu wahamwa n'icyaha cyo gusambanya umwana yigisha yajya ahabwa akato mu burezi nk'icyemezo cyiyongera ku cyemezo cy'urukiko.

Wenders (ibumoso) yamaze ibicamunsi bine abaza ibibazo Papa i Vaticani Mu myaka 50 Wim Wenders amaze akora ibikorwa byo kuyobora filime, yakoranye n'abantu bakomeye nka Mel Gibson, Alicia Vikander n'itsinda ry'umuziki wa roke rya U2. Ariko uyu Mudage Wenders yongeye kumenyekana biruseho ku rwego rw'isi ubwo yemeraga ubutumire buturutse i Vaticani mu biro bya Papa Francis ngo akore filime kuri Papa. Iyi filime yitwa Papa Francis: Umugabo udatezuka ku ijambo rye, cyangwa se mu Cyongereza Pope Francis: A Man of His Word, ikubiyemo amashusho na videwo Bwana Wenders yafashe mu biganiro yagiranye na Papa Francis ndetse n'amashusho na videwo yifashishije abikuye mu ngendo zitandukanye za Papa. Igaragaza Papa Francis avuga ashimitse yigaruriye imbaga y'abamukurikiye mu buryo undi mukinnyi wa filime adashobora kwigerezaho. Nonese mu bicamunsi bine yamaze aganira na Papa Francis, hari ibyo Bwana Wenders yaba yarasanze ahuriyeho n'abandi bantu bakomeye yigeze kuganira nabo? Bwana Wenders - wanayoboye filime nka Paris, Texas, Wings of Desire na Buena Vista Social Club - yagize ati: "Papa agaragara cyo kimwe n'abandi bakinnyi ba filime bakomeye nakoranye nabo." Bwana Wenders yavuze ko Papa yari "arakaye cyane" ubwo yavugaga ku ngingo y'abapadiri bakorera abana ihohotera rishingiye ku gitsina "Ariko we biva imbere ku mutima we, ku myemerere ye n'ukwemera kwe, ndetse n'ugushaka kwe ko kutuganiriza twebwe twese." Bwana Wenders w'imyaka 72 y'amavuko, yongeyeho ati: "Ntabwo [Papa] ameze gutya kubera ko yiyemera. Ni umuntu wicisha bugufi mu buryo butangaje - umugabo ucisha bugufi by'ukuri." "Si ibyo aba yigirisha. Aba ashaka kuganira na buri wese ahuye na we, kandi bakaganira by'ukuri." Bwana Wenders avuga ko ubushake bwa Papa Francis w'imyaka 81 y'amavuko bwuko ubutumwa bwe bugera ku bantu benshi bashoboka, ari bwo bwatumye agaragara muri filime bwa mbere. Yavuze ko mu by'ukuri atari uko Papa yari asanzwe areba filime yayoboye. Bwana Wenders yagize ati: "Mfite gihamya ko Papa ibya filime atabizi." "Ikintu cya mbere yambwiye cyari, 'Numvise bakuvugaho ibintu byiza, ariko reka nkwisegureho rwose kuko nta filime n'imwe yawe ndareba.''' Intambwe ya mbere rero yo gukora iyi filime yatewe na Musenyeri Dario Vigano, ushinzwe itumanaho i Vaticani akaba n'umuntu ukunda kureba filime cyane. Musenyeri Vigano ubu yamaze kwegura ku mirimo ye nyuma yo kunengwa kubera guhindura by'uburiganya ibaruwa yanditswe n'uwo Papa Francis yasimbuye, Benedicto wa XVI. "Twumvise uburakari muri we" Bwana Wenders yavuze ko ubwo Papa yavugaga ku ngingo y'abapadiri bakorera abana b'abahungu ihohotera rishingiye ku gitsina, atigeze arya amagambo. "Yavuze ku ihohoterwa rikorerwa abana b'abahungu adaca ku ruhande, ndetse icyo gihe ni bwo yari arakaye cyane." "Twumvise uburakari muri we - avuga ko yakwishimira kugira icyo akora kirushijeho kuri iyi ngingo ariko ko ari akazi akora we wenyine gusa." Filime Pope Francis: A Man of His Word, igaragaza Papa asura Brezili, Afurika na Israeli Mu kwezi kwa gatanu uyu mwaka nibwo filime Pope Francis: A Man of His Word yerekanwe bwa mbere mu iserukiramuco ry'i Cannes mu Bufaransa. Muri iyi filime, Papa Francis anavuga ku bindi bintu bitatu by'ingenzi kuri we: ubutaka, umurimo n'umugabane w'isi dutuye. Avuga ko abatuye isi nibatabungabunga ibidukikije, iyi si afata nk'inzu izakomeza kwangirika. Bwana Wenders yari kumwe n'umugore we Donata ubwo iyi filime yerekanwaga bwa mbere mu kwezi kwa gatanu uyu mwaka Kiliziya Gatolika ifite abayoboke bagera kuri miliyari 1 na miliyoni 200 ku isi. Bivuze ko iyi filime yayobowe na Bwana Wenders abantu benshi bazayireba. Bwana Wenders yizeye ko n'abatari abakirisitu nabo bazagira icyo bayigiramo. Yagize ati: "Iyi ni filime yerekeye ku mugabo ushaka ko kiliziya iganiriza buri wese, atari gusa abanyagatolika n'abakirisitu." "Ntabwo ari ubutumwa bugenewe abakirisitu gusa. Ni ubutumwa bugenewe abantu bose bagambiriye icyiza - ngabo abantu ashaka kuganiriza."

Igitero co ku wa 28/10/2017 i Mogadishu Abo bantu bagirizwa ko bari mu mugwi w'abagwanyi bagavye igitero kw'ihoteli Nasa Hablod Two itariki 28 ukwezi kw'icumi 2017, nkuko vyanditswe ku mbuga ngurukanabumenyi ya Goobjoog. Iyo sentare yavuze ko abo bagabo bari mu mugwi ugendera ku vyiyumviro vya Islamu, Al-Shabab ugwanya leta. Umucamanza Hassan Ali Noor Shute yavuze ko abo bagabo batatu - Farhan Mohamed Samatar, Abdinasir Daqane Hassan na Abshir Mohamed Hajji Bule - bemeye ivyo baregwa imbere y'iyo sentare ya gisirikare. Uwo mucamanza yaciye abakatira igihano co kwicwa n'umugwi w'abarasa, ariko bakaba bagishobora kwunguruza. Ico gitero co kw'ihoteli ya Nasa Hoblod Two catwaye abantu 20 gikomeretsa abandi 40.

Umukuru w'akanama k'ishirahamwe ry'ubumwe bwa Afrika yarashinze umugwi ugira amatohoza kw'ikubagurwa ry'abapfasni inyuma yo kuronka ikete ryo mw'ibanga rimumenyesha ubwo bugizi bwa nabi Benshi mu bakorewe ayo mabi, n'abafise amasezerano y'umwanya muto, urwaruka rwitanga radasavye impembo hamwe n'abasanzwe bahakora barondera akazi kamaho nk'uko ico cegeranyo kibandanya kibivuga. Congerako ko ababikora "bifata nk'uko ari bo 'bugurura imiryango' canke 'bavuga rikijana". Ayo matohoza yatangujwe ku mugaragaro mu kwezi kwa gatanu, kandi abakozi bose bari bafise ico batishimira basabwe gutanga inkuru mw'ibanga. Uwo mugwi udasanzwe washizweho n'umukuru wa AUC Moussa Faki, inyuma yo kwandikirwa ikete ryo mw'ibanga rimubwira ivyerekeye ubwo bugizi bwa nabi. Uwo mugwi wasanze hari abantu 44 boba barakubaguwe kandi ko n'abapfasoni bakiri bato bagiye "bagura akazi mu gutanga umubiri wabo". Ico cegeranyo nta ho kivuga amazina yaboba barabikoze. Ico cegeranyo kivuga ko abari inyuma y'iryo kubagurwa "bemerera abo bapfasoni bakiri bato ko bazobaha ubuzi". Ababajijwe bavuze ko kwitwarira ababakubaguye kenshi na kenshi ata co vyatanga kubera ata ngingo zafatwa kuko mu rwego rwa AUC ata mategeko ahari yo kubigwanya. Uwo mugwi kandi wasanze hakoregwa ibindi vyaha nk'igiturire, iterabwoba hamwe n'ivangura. Mr Faki says a policy on sexual harassment at work will be set up. Faki yavuze ko hagiye gushirwaho amategeko agenga ikubagurwa ku kazi Ikinyamakuru co muri Afrika y'epfo ca Mail&Guadian kivuga ko ayo matohozwa yakozwe inyuma y'aho abapfasoni 37 bakorera ishirahamwe ry'ubumwe bwa Afrika bashiriye umukono ku rwandiko rwiyamiriza ikubagurwa muri ako kanama. Akanama k'ubumwe bwa Afrika gafise icicaro ku mugwa mukuru wa Ethioipia, Addis Abeba, kavuga ko, karavye ivyo katoye hamwe n'ibivugwa bikomeye, gashobora gushiraho "amategeko agenga ikubagurwa akingira ababikorewe, akanafatira ingingo ruhasha ku woba yabikoze wese." Faki kandi ashobora gushiraho umugwi wihweza ivyo vyamaze kumenyekana hanyuma utange intumbero y'icokorwa.

Samuel Mugisha w'imyaka 21 y'amavuko yasize abo bari bahanganye mu rugendo rwo kuva i Kigali kugera mu mujyi wa Huye Samuel Mugisha w'imyaka 21 y'amavuko yasize abo bari bahanganye mu rugendo rwo kuva i Kigali kugera mu mujyi wa Huye mu majyepfo y'u Rwanda hareshya na kilometero 120. Yakoresheje amasaha 3, iminota 8 n'amasegonda 56, arusha uwa kabiri n'uwa gatatu ikinyuranyo cy'amasegonda 20. Uwizeye Jean Claude nawe wo mu Rwanda yaje ku mwanya wa kabiri akaba yasize Hailemichael Mulu wo muri Ethiopia amucaho ubwo bari bageze hafi y'umurongo wa nyuma. Mugisha Sameul amaze gutsinda agace ka kabiri ka Tour du Rwanda Mu bandi bigaragaje cyane ni Dorio Antonio wo muri Angola na Beneke Calvin wo mu gihugu cya Ethiopia. Umukinnyi wo mu gihugu cya Algeria Lagab Azzedine wari wabaye uwa mbere ubwo iryo siganwa ryatangiraga, uyu munsi yaje ku mwanya wa 41 akaba arushwa n'uwa mbere harimo ikinyuranyo cy'iminota 3. Ejo kuwa kabiri Ku munsi w'ejo abasiganwa bazakora urugendo rw'ibirometero 199 kuva mu mujyi wa Huye berekeza mu mujyi wa Musanze. Iri rushanwa rya Tour du Rwanda 2018 rihuje amakipe 16 aturuka mu bihugu byinshi byo ku isi birimo ibyo ku migabane y'Uburayi na Amerika. Afrika iserukiwe n'ibihugu nka Kenya, Ethiopia, Algeria, Angola, Afrika y'epfo na Cameroon. Eritrea ntiyabonetse Ku nshuro ya mbere igihugu cya Eritrea ari nacyo cya mbere muri Afrika ntikitabiriye iri rushanwa ngo kubera impamvu z'amikoro macye. Irushanwa rya Tour du Rwanda rihuje amakipe 16 aturuka mu bihugu byinshi byo ku isi Irushanwa rya Tour du Rwanda ry'uyu mwaka niryo rya nyuma ryo mu kiciro kizwi nka 2.2 kuko ryongerewe agaciro n'ishyirahamwe ry'umukino w'amagare ku isi UCI rishyirwa mu kiciro cyo hejuru cyane cya 2.1. Icyo ni nacyo kiciro gikomeye muri Afrika, ibi bikavuga ko n'ibihembo byagenerwaga abasiganwa bizikuba cyane.

Biden avuga ku isomerwa rya Chauvin, ati: 'Umurimo wacu nturangiye' Ariko yaburiye ati: "Ntabwo dushobora kugarukira hano". Uwari umupolisi w'umuzungu Derek Chauvin yafashwe amashusho apfukamye ku ijosi rya Bwana Floyd, Umunyamerika ukomoka muri Afurika, mu gihe kirenga iminota icyenda, biteza imyigaragambyo yo kwamagana irondaruhu yitabiriwe n'imbaga y'abantu. Ku wa kabiri, yahamwe n'icyaha cy'ubwicanyi bwo mu cyiciro cya kabiri, ubwicanyi bwo mu cyiciro cya gatatu no kwica umuntu. Gukatira Chauvin igihano bishobora kuba mu mezi abiri ari imbere, ndetse birashoboka ko yamara imyaka ibarirwa muri za mirongo ari muri gereza. Byitezwe ko azajurira. Mu kiganiro cyo kuri telefone ubwo yahamagaraga abo mu muryango wa Bwana Floyd nyuma yuko bitangajwe ko Chauvin ahamwe n'icyaha, Perezida Biden yumvikanye agira ati: "Nibura ubu hari ubutabera bucye". Mu ijambo ryaciye kuri televiziyo nyuma yaho gato, Bwana Biden yavuze ko icyemezo nk'icyo cy'urukiko ari "imbonekarimwe cyane". Yagize ati: "Ntabwo dushobora kuva muri iki gihe cyangwa ngo turebe ku ruhande twibwira ko umurimo urangiye. Tugomba kukireba nkuko twabigenje tureba ya minota icyenda n'amasengonda 29". Visi Perezida Kamala Harris yashishikarije abagize inteko ishingamategeko gutora bemeza umushinga w'itegeko ugamije kuvugurura ibijyanye na polisi muri Amerika. Madamu Harris yagize ati: "Uyu mushinga w'itegeko ni umwe mu murage wa George Floyd. Uyu ni umurimo umaze igihe kirekire cyane utegerejwe [ngo ukorwe]". Guhamwa n'icyaha byakiriwe gute kundi? Abantu bateraniye hanze y'icyumba cy'urukiko no mu masangano y'imihanda mu mujyi wa Minneapolis aho Bwana Floyd yiciwe, bishimira icyo cyemezo cy'urukiko. Abantu bateye hejuru mu byishimo, abashoferi bavuza amahoni y'imodoka ndetse hari n'abantu bahagaritse urujya n'uruza rw'ibinyabiziga, bavugira hejuru bati: "George Floyd" n'"Ibirego bitatu byose", bakomoza ku birego bitatu Bwana Chauvin yahamwe na byo. Kenneth Nwachi, w'imyaka 21, yagize ati: "Ni umunsi mwiza muri Minneapolis. Ni umugisha". Umwe mu bahatuye yabwiye ibiro ntaramakuru Associated Press ko yumva afite ishimwe ku mutima kandi aruhutse, mu gihe undi we yagize ati: "Hari ubutabera runaka burimo kuza". Imbaga y'abantu yanateraniye no mu yindi mijyi yishimira icyemezo cy'urukiko. Abantu bateraniye i Minneapolis bishimira icyemezo cy'urukiko ari na ko baha icyubahiro George Floyd Ariko banavuze ko hakiri byinshi byo gukora. Ni gacye cyane abapolisi muri Amerika bagiye bahamwa n'icyaha cy'impfu zibereye mu maboko yabo - iyo byabaga binabayeho ko baregwa. Iki cyemezo cy'urukiko ahanini kiri kubonwa nk'ikigaragaza ukuntu ubucamanza bw'Amerika buzajya bwitwara ku manza nk'izo mu gihe kiri imbere. Mu kiganiro n'abanyamakuru cyateguwe n'umuryango wa Floyd, umuvandimwe we Philonise Floyd yagize ati: "Uyu munsi, dushoboye kongera guhumeka". Ben Crump, wunganira mu mategeko umuryango wa Floyd, yavuze ko guhamwa n'icyaha kwa Chauvin kubaye "igihe cy'impinduka ikomeye mu mateka" y'Amerika. Yanditse kuri Twitter ati: "Ubutabera bugezweho mu buryo bubabaje bwashyize buraboneka". Itsinda ryunganira Chauvin nta cyo riratangaza ku cyemezo cy'urukiko, ariko byitezwe ko rikijuririra. Mbere gato y'icyo cyemezo cyo ku wa kabiri, umupolisi muri leta ya Ohio yishe arashe umwirabura w'umukobwa w'imyaka 16 ubwo uwo mupolisi yari atabajwe byihutirwa kuri telefone ku hari habaye kugerageza gutera icyuma.

Uhereye ibumoso ujya iburyo: Depite Bobi Wine na Dr Kizza Besigye Itangazo ryashyizweho umukono n'aba bagabo bombi ryasohotse ku munsi w'ejo ku gatatu, rivuga ko imitwe ya politiki bombi bayoboye "ifite intego imwe yo kubohora Uganda igitugu n'ikandamiza". Bityo bakavuga ko nubwo badahuriye mu mutwe umwe wa politiki, ariko "bagomba guhuza imbaraga kuko intego yabo ari imwe n'uwo barwanya ari umwe". Depite Bobi Wine ni umunyamuziki wamamaye muri Uganda, akaba yarinjiye muri politiki ahangana na Perezida Museveni afite intero ko "ingufu zifite rubanda n'ubutegetsi ari ubwa rubanda". Mu bihe byashize, Bwana Wine yagiye afungwa, akanavuga ko yakorewe iyicarubozo - ikirego inzego z'umutekano za Uganda zihakana. Ubu aracyakurikiranywe n'ubucamanza kubera ibyaha ubutegetsi bumurega birimo no kugumura rubanda, we akavuga ko azira ibitekerezo n'ibikorwa bye bya politiki. Bwana Besigye we yahoze ari Colonel mu ngabo za Uganda, akaba yaranabaye muganga wihariye wa Bwana Museveni. Gusa yaje kuva ku ruhande rwe, ubu akaba amaze kwiyamamaza inshuro enye mu matora ya perezida wa Uganda agatsindwa. Na we akaba yaragiye afungwa ku mpamvu yita iza politiki. Perezida Museveni w'imyaka 74 y'amavuko, mbere ntiyari yemerewe kwiyamamaza amaze kurenza imyaka 75 y'amavuko Aba banyapolitiki basabye abari mu mitwe yabo ya politiki - "People's Government" wa Dr Besigye na "People Power" wa Bobi Wine - n'ababashyigikiye "guhuza imbaraga kugira ngo bavaneho ubutegetsi bumaze imyaka 33 bw'ishyaka NRM na Museveni". Mu itangazo ryabo bashinja ubutegetsi bwa Perezida Museveni ibirimo gufunga binyuranyije n'amategeko, iyicarubozo, kuburizamo ibikorwa byemewe n'amategeko, gucecekesha itangazamakuru, kubangamira uburenganzira bwa muntu n'ubwisanzure mu gutanga ibitekerezo. Ntacyo ubutegetsi bwa Uganda - bwagiye buhakana ibirego nk'ibyo mu gihe cyashize - bwari bwatangaza ku mugaragaro ku kwishyirahamwe kwabo. Mu kiganiro n'abanyamakuru ku munsi w'ejo ku wa gatatu, Depite Betty Nambooze, umuvugizi w'umutwe wa People's Government, yavuze ko basanganywe intego yo gukura Perezida Museveni ku butegetsi mbere y'amatora ya perezida azaba mu 2021, nkuko bivugwa n'ikinyamakuru Daily Monitor kitegamiye kuri leta. Madamu Nambooze avuga ko nibiba bitarashoboka icyo gihe, mu matora y'umukuru w'igihugu bazashaka umukandida umwe uhagararira iyi mitwe agahatana na Perezida Museveni.

Abaregwa uko ari cumi n'umwe basabirwa kurekurwa by'agateganyo Kimwe n'ababanje, babiri ba nyuma bireguye uyu munsi mu rukiko na bo bahakanye umugambi wo kurwanya ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda ariko bemera ko bari mu gice kitavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi. Umunyamakuru wa BBC avuga ko mu baje kumva uru rubanza mu cyumba cy'urukiko mu karere ka Nyanza hari haje na Madamu Victoire Ingabire uyobora iri shyaka FDU-Inkingi. Abaregwa bose baregwa ko bari mu mugambi wo gushinga umutwe witwara gisirikare utemewe n'amategeko.
