Uretse kwinjira mu gisirikare aba baregwa kandi gukusanya inkunga y'amafranga yo gufasha uyu mutwe ndetse no gushakisha abayoboke hirya no hino mu gihugu. Evode Mbarushimana wireguye bwa mbere uyu munsi agaragazwa n'ubushinjacyaha nk'uwari umuhuzabikorwa w'umugambi wo guhungabanya ubutegetsi mu ntara y'amajyepfo y'u Rwanda. Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko inama zicura imigambi yo kubangamira ubutegetsi zaberaga iwe mu rugo zikitirirwa 'ibimina' byo guhana amafranga. Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko aya mafranga yakusanywaga yari ayo gufasha gushinga umutwe witwara gisirikare. Uwashinje mugenzi we avuga ko yabikoze ku ngufu Mbarushimana aregwa kandi kuba ku isonga y'ibikorwa byo gushakisha abarwanyi ndetse akanabafasha kugera mu gihugu cya Kongo Kinshasa aho uyu mutwe wari watangiye gukorera. Evode Mbarushimana yemera ko ari umuyoboke w'ishyaka FDU Inkingi ariko nta mwanya yari afite mu buyobozi bwaryo nk'uko bivugwa n'ubushinjacyaha. Nk'umuyoboke avuga ko yari afite uburenganzira bwo gushakira ishyaka abayoboke nk'uko n'andi mashyaka abikora kandi ibyo bitari bigamije gushinga umutwe wa gisirikare. Mu baje kumva uru rubanza mu cyumba cy'urukiko mu karere ka Nyanza hari haje na Madamu Victoire Ingabire uyobora iri shyaka FDU-Inkingi Umucamanza yamwibukije ariko ko hari umwe mu bo bareganwa wamushinje. Uwavugwaga ni uwitwa Papias Ndayishimiye, wasabye urukiko gutesha agaciro inyandiko zishinja Mbarushimana kuko ibyo yemeye gusinyira yabikoreshejwe ku gahato ubwo yari mu bugenzacyaha. Undi ngo afunze kuko FPR ishaka kumwumvisha Nsabiyaremye Gratien na we wireguye yari umwarimu mu mashuri yisumbuye mu ntara y'uburengerazuba. Yabwiye urukiko ko afunze kubera ko ishyaka FPR riri ku butegetsi rishaka kumwumvisha kuko yayobotse FDU Inkingi itavuga rumwe na ryo. Aya magambo yabaye nk'arakaje umucamanza wahise amutegeka gusaba imbabazi bitaba ibyo akamburwa ijambo. Umucamanza yavuze ko nta mpamvu yo kuzana FPR mu rukiko kuko atari yo yatanze ikirego. Nsabiyaremye yemera ko yari umuyoboke wa FDU Inkingi ndetse ko azi n'ihuriro ry'amashyaka P5. Gusa na we yavuze ko iri huriro ryari rigamije guhangana n'ubutegetsi mu nzira za politiki ko ritari rigamije inzira y'intambara. Iburanisha ry'uyu munsi ryumvikanyemo impaka nyinshi zirebana n'ibimenyetso by'amajwi n'ubutumwa bwanditse byatanzwe n'ubushinjacyaha. Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko hari ibimenyetso by'amajwi n'ubutumwa bugufi abaregwa bifashishije bakora ibyaha. Abaregwa basaba ko ibi bimenyetso bigaragazwa bitaba ibyo bigafatwa nk'ibidahari, ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko bitoroshye kuboneka. Uru rubanza ruzongera gusubukurwa mu kwezi kwa karindwi, humvwa abunganira abaregwa mbere y'uko ubushinjacyaha bubasabire ibihano.

Donald Trump yari yatangaje ko ata musirikare n'umwe yapfuye canke ngo akomereke muri ico gitero ca misire ca Irani Umuvugizi w'ubwo bunyamabanga avuga ko gushika ubu, abashika 17 aribo bakiriko baravurwa. Perezida Donald Trump wa Amerika yari yatangaje ko ata musirikare wa Amerika n'umwe yigeze agira ingorane muri ico gitero ca Irani co ku wa 08 z'uku kwa mbere, mu kwihora igandagurwa ry'umusirikare mukuru wa Irani. Bwana Trump akaba yavuze ivyo ashaka gusigura ingingo yafashe yo kudasubiza ico gitero. Hagati aho mu ndwi iheze, Pentagon yari yamenyesheje ko abasirikare 11 bariko bavurwa kubera ibibazo vyo mu mutwe bagize bivuye kuri ico gitero. Abajijwe uko kuvuguruzanya mu gihe yari mu nama yerekeye ubutunzi kw'isi mu Buswisi, Bwana Trump yishuye ati: "Narumvise ko hari abari bamenetse umutwe, n'ibintu ataco bivuze, ariko mvuga nti, kandi ndavyemeza, si ibintu bikomeye". "Si mfata ko ari ububabare bukomeye nk'ubwo nabonye". Pentagone ivuga ko ata musirikare n'umwe yapfuye muri ico gitero ca Irani c'igisasu ca misire ku kirindiro ca Ain al-Asad, kuko hafi bose bari mu buraro bwo mu kuzimu igihe ivyo bisasu vyaterwa. Ejo ku wa gatanu, umuvugizi w'ubunyamabanga bujejwe kwivuna abansi, Jonathan Hoffman, yabwiye abamenyeshamakuru ko abasirikare umunani mu bagize ibibazo batahukanywe muri Amerika kugira ngo babandanye bavurwa, mu gihe abandi icenda nabo batwawe mu Budagi. Donald Trump yari yatangaje ko ata musirikare n'umwe yapfuye canke ngo akomereke muri ico gitero ca misire ca Irani 16 bavuriwe muri Irak uwundi umwe nawe muri Koweit imbere y'uko abo bose 17 basubira ku bikorwa vyabo, k'uko abategetsi babivuga. Bwana Hoffman avuga ko umunyamabanga ajejwe kwivuna abansi, Mark Esper atashotse aronka amakuru y'uko hoba hari abasirikare bari bagize ibibazo mu minsi yakurikiye ico gitero. Ishirahamwe ry'abakukuruke bahoze barwana mu ntambara za Irak na Afghanistani, riranegura ubutegetsi bwa Trump kubona butashotse bumenyesha ko hari abasirikare bagize ibibazo. Paul Rieckhoff, uwatanguje iryo shirahamwe avuga ati: "ico ni ikintu gikomeye. Leta ya Amerika yategerezwa guha Abanyamerika amakuru ku vyerekeye ubuzima bw'abana babo. Nta kindi kintu gisumba ico". Igisirikare ca Amerika kimenyesha ko izo ngorane zikunda gushika mu burere bw'intambara. Ejo ku wa gatanu, abanyagihugu ba Irak ibihumbi n'ibihumbi barihaye amabarabara ku mugwa mukuru Baghdad biyamiriza abasirikare mvamakungu baharurwa mu 5000. Inama nshingamateka ya Irak iherutse gusaba abarwanyi mvamakungu bose - harimwo n'abanyamerika - kuva muri ico gihugu.

Abashigikiye ayo matohoza bakoraniye i Canberra ku musi wa gatanu Akanama kajejwe gukora ayo matohoza, 'The royal commision' , urwego rukomeye rukora amatohoza, rwumvirije abantu barenga 8.000 bakorewe ayo mabi. Abagirizwa harimwo amashengero, amashure hamwe n'imigwi y'abinonora imitsi mu myaka irenga mirongo ibiri. Mubisabwa birenga 400, ico cegeranyo gihamagarira ishenegero gusubiramwo kwihweza amategeko agenga ukudashinga urwabo ku bapatiri. "Abana ibihumbi n'ibihumbi barasabanijwe ku nguvu mu burongozi bwinshi muri Australia. Ntituzopfa tumenye igitigiri nyaco," ni ko ico cegeranyo kibivuga. Cardinal Pell yishuye ku bibazo vy'abana bakubaguwe n'abapadiri Kuva mu 2013, ako kanama gahsinzwe kugira amatohoza kashikirije ubutegetsi bubishinzwe abantu barenga 2.500. Ico cegeranyo ca nyuma cashizwe ahabona kuri uyu wa gatnu, congeyeko ibisabwa 189 kubisanzwe vyarasabwe ubwa mbere bishika 220 kandi vyamaze gushirwa ahabona. Ivyasabwe ubu bigiye kwihwezwa n'inzego zijejwe amategeko. Umushikiranganji wa mbere Malcolm Turnbull yavuze ko " akaga ku gihugu" kashizwe ahagaragara.

Igandagurwa rya Jackson Simbananiye riri kuvugwako vyinshi mu Burundi Amakuru y'inyuruzwa ryuwo murwizatunga azwi cane i Bujumbura yakora mu rudandaza rw'amafaranga yatanguye kumenyekana hafi isaha z'ibiri z'ijoro, bivugwa ko yari avuye muri sauna. Umuryango wiwe umenyesha ko gushika ubu batazi icatumye yicwa kandi ko ata ngorane yari afitaniye n'abantu. BBC yagerageje kuvugana n'igipolisi c'Uburundi ntivyashoboka. Gusa igipolisi cyabwiye abamenyeshamakuru mu Burundi ko Bwana Simbananiye yanyurujwe n'abagizi ba nabi bataramenyekana, ikiziga ciwe cigatorwa mu gatondo uyu munsi ku ibarabara yagandaguwe hakoreshejwe umugozi. Igipolisi cimenyesha ko itohoza ryatanguye kandi umuntu umwe akekwa yafashwe. Umwe mu bari mu muryango w'umuhisi Simbananiye yabwiye BBC ko bahawe amakuru ko umuntu wabo atwawe n'abantu batazwi bari mu muduga atashe avuye mu nyubakwa y'ukwiyubikira bita SONA. Ati: "Mu nyuma niho bukeye twaza twumva ko bamutoye ikiziga muri 'caniveau' kw'ibarabara bita Avenue de la mort mu Nyakabiga', akavuga ko yishwe anizwe. Avuga y'uko ata bindi bazi uretse ko barindiriye ico abajejwe amatohoza bazobabwira. Avuga ko muri rusangi ata kibazo yari afitaniye n'abantu. Ati: "Twebwe gushika ubu nta muntu twari bwumve ngo bashwanye, oya n'ukuri". Umuhisi Kirahwata yari mu bantu bazwi cane mu gusagara ca Bujumbura muri urwo rudandaza rwo kugura no kugurisha amafaranga. Yaheruka gufatwa ari kumwe n'umuhungu wiwe be n'umukozi n'abajejwe umutekano mu kw'icenda kw'umwaka uheze yagirizwa kurenga ku mategeko agenga urudandaza rw'amafaranga. Uyu mugabo yabanje kuba umuntu ukomeye mu mugambwe Frodebu nyuma aja muwa CNDD-FDD.

Abakozi basaba ko uburyo amahera yo guterera mu matora atozwa vyosubirwamwo Bamwe mu bakozi ba reta bavuga ko itunganywa ry'ingene iyo ntererano itozwa rikirimwo utunenge ngo kubera ivyafatiweko bitarasigurwa neza. Ibirori vyo guhimbaza uwo munsi vyabereye mu ntara ya Rutana aho umukuru w'igihugu n'umutambukanyi wiwe bari bifadikanije n'abakozi. Ariko ijambo bijanye Petero Nkurunziza yari yaraye arishikirije, amenyesha ko ku nguvu z'Abarundi ubwabo, igihugu gishoboye kwitunganiriza amatora kitarinze gutega amashi imfashanyo ziva ahandi. Bwana Nkurunziza yagize ati: "Turashimiye Abarundi bose bumvise akamo twabateye ko guterera amatora kugira twitunganirize amatora meza tutarinze kuzera inze. "Turakeje umugwi w'abagwizatunga baterereye imiliaridi zirenga zitatu. Ni ikimenyetso kitabesha cerekana ko Abarundi dushoboye." Umukuru w'igihugu n'umutambukanyi wiwe bari bifatanije n'abakozi mu ntara ya Rutana Abakozi basanga harimwo akarenganyo N'ubwo biri ukwo, mu runani mpuzamasendika, Cosybu, baracafise amakenga ku kungene iyo ntererano ikatwa ku mishahara y'abakozi. Tharcisse Gahungu arurongoye, ari mu birori vyari bihagarikiwe n'umukuru w'igihugu mu Rutana, yavuze ko ata muco wigeze utangwa ku bijanye n'urugero rw'ingene iyo ntererano ikatwa. Yagize ati: "Biragoye kwumva ingene umukozi ahembwa ibihumbi 200 atanga intererano y'2000 ku kwezi, uwufata ibihumbi amajana abiri n'ijana, urumva amurusha ijana rimwe, atanga ibihumbi bitanu ku kwezi, akanganya n'uwuhembwa ibihumbi 500 ku kwezi kuko nawe nyene atanga ibihumbi bitanu." "Ibaze namwe ingene uwufata ibihumbi amajana atanu n'ifaranga rimwe aca atanga ibihumbi 30 ku kwezi co kimwe n'uwufata umuliyoni. Mbega aho hoba hafatiwe kuki ? Turasavye rero urwego rushinzwe ibiganiro mu kazi ruduhuze na reta." Ubushomeri Ikindi umukuru wa COSYBU yagarutseko ni ikibazo c'ubushomeri buhanze Abarundi, akagira ati reta nikore uko ishoboye kugira na dukeya tuboneka idusabikanye Abarundi ata nkunzi. Uwuserukiye abakozi asaba ko ubuzi buhari leta yoza irabusabikanya Asaba kandi ko ingendo yo kwaka ibiturire mu gisata co gutanga ubuzi yoranduranwa n'imizi. Mw'ijambo umukuru w'igihugu yashikirije kuri uyu wa mbere avuga ko ikibazo c'abakozi reta igifise ku mutima. Yatangaje ko muri uyu mwaka wa 2018 itegekanya guha akazi abantu barenga 1600 mu bisata nyamukuru bitandukanye harimwo n'ic'indero. Avuga ko muri uyu mwaka urangiye abantu barenga ibihumbi 7 aribo baronse ubuzi mu bisata vy'ubutare n'agataka no mu bushikiranganji bw'ibikorwa vya reta.

Johnson Sakaja, ugaragara muri iyi foto yo mu mwaka ushize wa 2019, ni senateri uhagarariye akarere k'umujyi wa Nairobi Yafashwe mu rukerera rwo ku wa gatandatu, asanzwe ari kunywera mu kabari, hashize amasaha umukwabu wa saa tatu z'ijoro watangiye. Bijyanye n'uwo mukwabu, nta muntu uba wemerewe kuba ahatari iwe guhera saa tatu z'ijoro kugeza saa kumi za mu gitondo. Uyu senateri yari yamaze gusaba imbabazi Abanya-Kenya ndetse yegura ku mwanya wo mu kanama gakomeye ko mu nteko gashinzwe kugenzura uko iki gihugu kirwanya Covid-19. Yari yanavuze ko yiteguye kwirengera ibikorwa bye. Bwana Sakaja ahagarariye akarere k'umurwa mukuru Nairobi. Senateri Sakaja yafungiwe by'akanya gato ku biro bya polisi byo mu mujyi wa Nairobi, mbere yuko afungurwa amaze gutanga amafaranga y'ingwate. Byagenze gute? Videwo iri guhererekanywa ku mbuga nkoranyambaga yagaragaye ku cyumweru, yerekana Bwana Sakaja w'imyaka 35 ari muri kasho ya polisi aterana amagambo n'abapolisi nyuma yo gutabwa muri yombi. Senateri Sakaja yasabye imbabazi Havugwa iki ku mategeko yo kwirinda coronavirus? Abanya-Kenya bamaze igihe binubira ko amategeko akaze yo kurwanya coronavirus ashyirwa mu bikorwa mu buryo butandukanye bitewe n'uwo uri we. Binubira ko abanyapolitiki bayarengaho ku mugaragaro bagakoresha za mitingi zitabirwa n'imbaga kandi izo mitingi zaraciwe. Polisi ya Kenya nayo yanenzwe gukubita, gukomeretsa no kwica Abanya-Kenya mu gihe cy'iyubahirizwa ry'ayo mategeko. Zimwe mu ngamba zikaze zibuza guterana mu nsengero no kubuza ingendo mu duce tw'ingenzi tw'izingiro rya coronavirus, kuri ubu zakuweho, nubwo coronavirus ikomeje kwiyongera mu gihugu. Kugeza ubu muri Kenya abanduye coronavirus bageze ku 13,771, muri bo 238 imaze kubica.

Buramatari wa Texas, Greg Abbott , avuga ko Texas yakoze ibirengeye ivyo yategerezwa gukora mu gufasha abarondera ubuhungiro Iyo ngingo isigura ko Texas izoba ibaye intara ya mbere ifashe iyo ngingo. Mu mwaka uheze, Perezida Donald Trump yarateye igikumu kw'itegeko bwirizwa riha uburenganzira bwo kwikura muri uwo mugambi. Ejo ku wa gatanu, Bwana Abbott wo mu mugambwe w'aba Repubulika, yavuze ko Texas yakoze "ibirengeye ivyo yategerezwa gukora mu gufasha abarondera ubuhungiro". Amashirahamwe ajejwe gufasha impunzi yaneguye iyo ngingo, amwe muri yo akavuga ko "ari ingingo ibabaje cane". Intara ya Texas ifise ibitigiri binini vy'impunzi mu bisagara vyayo bikuru bikuru. Mu 2018, Texas yahaye indaro igitigiri kinini c'impunzi gusumba izindi zose, kigera kuri 1697 - ariko kikaba caragabanutse cane uravye umwaka w'imbere y'aho, aho yakiriye izigera kuri 4768. Mu nsiguro yatanze mu bunyamabanga bwa leta bujejwe imigenderanire, Bwana Abbott avuga ko iyo ntara yipfuza kwitaho "kubo itunze, harimwo impunzi, abimukira hamwe n'abadafise uburaro - mu yandi majambo abanya Texas bose". Nico catumye bwana Abbott avuga ko adashobora kwakira izindi mpunzi mu 2020, yongera ko ariko ko iyo ngingo "itabuza impunzi kwinjira" muri Amerika. Bwana Abbott avuga ko impunzi zisanzwe ziba mu zindi ntara zifise uburenganzira bwo kwimukira muri Texas zibishatse. Hagati aho, ibigo bijejwe abimukira bivuga ko zitazoba zifise uburenganzira bwo kuronswa ivya nkenerwa bihabwa abimukira, nk'ibiraba uburaro. Ubutegetsi bwa Perezida Trump bufise umugambi wo kugabanya igitigiri c'abimukira binjira muri ico gihugu. Hari abanya Afrika benshi batakaza ubuzima bwabo bariko barondera kwinjira muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika Trump yaragabanije igitigiri c'impunzi zemerewe kwinjira muri Amerika gushika ku 18000 mu mwaka wa 2020, igitigiri gito kitari bwabeho. Impunzi zishika 30.000 zarahawe ubuhungiro muri Amerika mu mwaka uheze. Igitigiri gito cane c'impunzi zemerewe kwinjira muri ico gihugu caheruka mu mwaka wa 2002 inyuma y'igitero co kw'igenekerezo rya 11 ukwezi kw'icenda 2001, aho abagera ku 27.000 bo nyene aribo bahawe indaro. Mu mwaka wa 2017, Trump yatanguye umugambi wo kugabanya igitigiri c'abimukira n'impunzi binjira muri Amerika. Yaranafashe ingingo agihagazeko, yateye mbere n' icuka kibi, yo kubuza abanyagihugu b'ibihugu bimwe bimwe harwiriyemwo ibihugu vy' aba Isilamu, kwinjira muri Amerika. Iyo ngingo yerekeye abanyagihugu bo mu bihugu indwi, bitanu muri vyo bikaka ari ivy'aba isilamu: Iran, Libya, Somalia, Syria na Yemen, ibindi bibiri bikaba ari Koreya y'Uburaruko na Venezuela. Ikinyamakuru Associated Press gitangaza ko ubutegetsi bwa Trump bubandanya burondera ingene bufatira iyo ngingo ibindi bihugu, n'aho ubutungane buguma bumutera igitsure.

Bwana Isaac Munyakazi (imbere hagati) uyu munsi yaje kureba aho abo banyeshuri bazigishirizwa icyongereza Isaac Munyakazi, umunyamabanga wa Leta ushinzwe amashuri y'incuke, abanza n'ayisumbuye uyu munsi yasuye ikigo bagiye gutangira kwigishirizwamo icyongereza bitegura kuzigira mu Rwanda. Bwana Munyakazi avuga ko abo bagiye gutegurwa bakazatangirana n'abandi umwaka w'amashuri mu Rwanda mu kwezi kwa mbere. Bamwe mu babyeyi b'aba banyeshuri baganiriye na BBC mu cyumweru gishize bavuze ko nubwo amashuri yabo yaboneka mu Rwanda, ubushobozi bwo kuyishyura batabufite. Aba babyeyi bagaragaza ko amashuri hakurya i Goma, aho bigisha mu gifaransa, babasha kuyishyura mu bushobozi bwabo mu gihe ayo mu Rwanda kuri bo ahenze. Umwe mu babyeyi witwa Ézéchiel Rwibasira yavuze ko bakurikirana amakuru bakumva ko muri DR Congo Ebola isa n'itagihari. Yagize ati: "Icyo dusaba abategetsi ni uko batudohorera, abana ubu benshi ntibiga, abandi babacumbikishije [i Goma]natwe biratuvunnye". "Nibatudohorere bafungure imipaka abana bongere bige bagenda bagaruka". Bwana Munyakazi avuga ko igihugu kigomba kurinda abaturage bacyo icyo cyorezo [Ebola] bityo izi ari ingamba zo kugikumira. Avuga ko ibi bari gukora babisabwe n'ababyeyi kandi ngo bizeye ko n'abatarandikisha abana babo bazakomeza kuza muri iyi gahunda. Bwana Munyakazi yavuze ko aba banyeshuri bazigishwa icyongereza maze bakaziga ibijyanye n'ibyo bigaga i Goma mu mashuri yo mu Rwanda.

Abantu baharurwa mu majana bariyegeranije mw'ijoro ryo ku wa Mungu bakora imyiyerekano Umuryango w'uyu musore yagandaguwe uvuga ko azwi kw'izina rya Daunte Wright, akaba afise imyaka 20. Umukuru w'igisagara ca Brooklyn Center yaciye afata ingingo yo kubuza uruja n'uruza mu gisagara cose mu masaha y'ijoro gushika isaha cumi na zibiri z'agatondo mu masaha yo muri ako karere, asaba abanyagihugu "gutaha muhira ku mutekano wabo". Hari icuka kibi cane muri Minneapolis mu gihe urubanza rw'uwahoze ari umupolisi yagirizwa kwica George Floyd rubandanya. Buramatari wa Minnesota, Tim Walz avuga ko ariko arakurikiranira hafi ingene ibintu bimeze, yongera asengera umuryango wa Wright. None ibintu bimeze gute aho vyabereye? Ejo ku wa Mungu, abantu baharurwa mu majana bagenda baririmba izina rya Daunte Wright baciye biyegeranya hanze y'ibiro vy'igiporisi mu gisagara ca Brooklyn Center, ku birometero bike uvuye hagati mu gisagara ca Minneapolis uja mu buraruko. Icuka kibi cadutse igihe igiporisi cashirako umwambaro wo mu gihe co kurwanya imigumuko n'igihe imodoka zibiri zashika zigaca ziterwa amabuye, nk'uko bivugwa n'itororokanirizo ry'amakuru Reuters. Abari muri iyo myiyerekano banditse ivyandiko hasi n'ingwa bongera batsa n'amabuji, ariko igiporisi mu nyuma kikaba cabategetse kuvaho, ireresi ikerekana abo baporisi bariko batera vya vyuka bikoroza amosozi n'ama grenades yo gushwiragiza abari mu myiyerekano. Ibinyamakuru bikorera muri ako karere bivuga ko habaye n'ibikorwa vyo gusahura mu turere tutari duke, Mike Elliott arongoye igisagara ca Brooklyn Center agaca atangaza ingingo yo kubuza uruja n'uruza aciye ku rubuga rwa Twitter. Yanditse ati: "Dushaka ko umutekano w'abantu bose wubahirizwa. Ndasavye ko mwese muba mu mutekano kandi ndasavye ko mutaha muhira". Abari mu myiyerekano bariyegeranije imbere y'ibiro vy'igiporisi i Brooklyn Center, baririmba izina rya Daunte Wright Bamwe mu basirikare b'igihugu ba (Minnesota National Guard) bari basanzwe bararungitswe gucungera urubanza rwa Derek Chauvin yagirizwa urupfu rwa George Floyd, barungitswe mu gisagara ca Brooklyn Center. Brooklyn Center yugaye inyubakwa z'amashure yose ihagarika n'ivyigwa hamwe n'ibindi bikorwa kuri ayo mashure kuri uno wa mbere, nk'uko bivugwa n'ibinyamakuru bikorera muri ako karere. None ni ibiki vyashikiye Daunte Wright neza na neza? Mw'itangazo casohoye, igiporisi ca Brooklyn Center kivuga ko cahagaritse umugabo yari yarenze amategeko y'ibarabara ku muhingamo w'ejo ku wa Mungu, kandi ko yari asanzwe afise umutahe wo kumuhagarika. Igiporisi kivuga ko abaporisi bagerageje kumuhagarika yaciye asibimra mu modoka. Niho umwe mu baporisi yaca amurasa, ariko abandanya anyonga imodokari yiwe agenda aca ku zindi, imbere y'uko ayita ku yindi modoka. Mu nyuma niho yatangazwa ko yapfuye. Umugore yari muri iyo modoka yakomeretse buke buke. Igiporisi kivuga ko abo baporisi bari bambaye bafise camera zabo kandi ko na kamera y'imodoka nayo nyene yariko irakora. Nyina wiwe Katie avuga kpo umuhungu wiwe yamuhagamaye igihe imodoka yiwe yahagarikwa akamubwira ko yahagaritswe kubera "ibimotesho vyari kuri retroviseur". Avuga ko mu nyuma yumvise uruhagarara terefone ica iracika. "Haciye umunota, nahamagaye hanyuma umukunzi wiwe bari kumwe muri iyo modoka aca avuga ko yarashwe....umuhungu wanje yari aryamye hasi yapfuye". Avuga ko abo baporisi basize ikiziga c'umuhungu wiwe kiryamye hasi, yongerako ati: "Nta n'umwe azotubwira na kimwe. Nta n'umwe azotuvugisha...navuze nti ndabasavye mukure ikiziga c'umuhungu wanje hasi". Umukuru w'igisagara Elliott yavuze ko ivyabaye ari "agahomerabunwa", buramatari Walz nawe ati : "Reta yacu iragandariye uwundi mwirabure yishwe n'abajejwe kwubahiriza umutekano". Hari icuka kibi mu gihe harindiriwe kumenya ingene urubanza rw'uwagirizwa kwica George Floyd rwagenze, iyo modoka y'igiporisi yononekariye i Brooklyn Center Igisagara ca Minneapolis gisanzwe kirangwamwo icuka kibi inyuma y'urupfu rwa wa mwirabure George Floyd rwatumye haduka imyiyerekano mu gihugu,, ahanini yakozwe mu mahoro n'aho hari ahandi yabayemwo imigumuko, inyubakwa zimwe zimwe zirononekara.

Larry na Darcy Fardette bahaye ishikanwa abavugabutumwa benshi Biboneka nk'ibisanzwe kandi nk'ibitumvikana, ariko Coontz arazi neza abantu biwe. Acisha ubutumwa bwiwe ku mboneshakure zigisha ijambo ry'Imana, akenshi na kenshi mw'ijoro, aho yirukirwa n'abantu badafise ubumenyi bukwiye ku vyerekeye amahera kandi banyotewe guhinduka. Umunsi umwe yavuze ati: "Ndazi amategeko agenga ubwishingizi (assurance), imitahe n'ivyankenerwa, eka ivyo vyose bigenga Wall Street", hanyuma aravye muri kamera yongerako ati: "Imana yampamagaye... nk'umucunguzi ku vyerekeye amafaranga". Igikomeye, agereranya amafaranga n'"urutete" - urutete rw'amadorari 273, urutete rw'amadorari 333, urutete "ruzokwimbuka", bivanye n'ikiganiro. Avuga ko mu gihe abamukurikira "bateye" rumwe, narwo ruzobagarukako rwungutse. Ni umutahe mu kwemera kwabo no muri kazoza kabo. Mu mwaka wa 2011, umwe muri abo bakunzi b'imboneshakure yari Larry Fardette, ico gihe akaba yaba mu ntara ya California. Larry yakurikiye abavugabutumwa benshi nka Coontz baciye ku mboneshakure, bari bazwi nk'abavugabutumwa b'ivyizigiro, bavanga n'ibigirankana amatungo n'ijambo ry'Imana. Ariko yasanze Coontz ari umwizigirwa. Yabemerera inyungu bidatevye. Yasa n'umuntu w'umwimbu. Larry nawe yari akeneye umwimbu unyaruka. Umuryango wa Fardette wari mu gihe kigoye. Umukobwa wa Larry yari arwaye, mu gihe na we nyene yari afise ingorane z'amagara. Ibikorwa vy'ukwisununura vyari mu ngorane, hanyuma mu kwongera umunyu mu gisebe, imodoka yiwe yunguruza abantu n'iyindi y'ugutemberamwo zapfiriye rimwe kandi adashobora n'ukuzikoresha. Aho ishirahamwe ryegeranya imicafu rimuhereye amadorari 600 kuri iyo modoka yatwara abantu, yararaba amafagitire n'ivyiyumviro vyinshi agaca yibuka ubutumwa bw'ihumure bwa Coontz. Kumbure yabona ko yari gutanga ayo mahera nk'"urutete"? Yaciye yibuka igiharuro kidasanzwe Coontz yasubiyemwo kenshi: amadolari 273. Cari igiharuro uyo muvugabutumwa yakoresha kenshi. Umunsi umwe yavuze ati: "Imana yarampaye igitangaro gikomeye mu buzima bwanje ku munsi umwe, kandi ibiharuro kabiri, indwi na gatatu vyarimwo". Ubu rero Larry yatahuye ko ivyo Coontz yabemerera vy'uko ishikanwa y'amahera atanze yashobora kwunguka ata shingiro vyari bifise. Ariko ico gihe, amajambo y'inkoramutima yaramuha icizere. Nta yindi nzira yabona. Yaratanze isheke (chèque) zibiri: imwe y'amadorari 273 iyindi y'amadorari 333 nk'uko vyasabwa. Hanyuma rero yarindiriye ibitangaro. Abavugabutumwa baca ku mboneshakure ntibakivugwa cane nk'uko bavugwa mu myaka ya za 1980 na 1990, aho abatari bake babaye rurangiranwa bakanatunga baciye ku mboneshakure zariko zivuka ku bwinshi. Todd Coontz yarengukishijwe imbere y'ubutungane yagirizwa kudatanga amakori Gusa ntaho baroye. N'inyuma y'ibiganiro vyinshi mu bimenyeshamakuru, imihimbiri yamye ivuka. Bamwe mbere baranatunze. Abenshi muri bo bacisha ubutumwa bwabo ku mbuga hwaniro. Abenshi muri abo basaba amahera baca mu citwa ubutumwa bwiza buzana itunga, bushingiye ku kwemera ko amagara yawe n'itunga ryawe birabwa n'Imana, kandi ko Imana ikwipfuriza kuronka itunga. Abemera bahimirizwa kugaragaza ukwemera kwabo babicishije mu gutanga amahera, bazi ko bazosubizwa - akenshi biciye mu kuronka amatungo canke gukizwa indwara. Ku bemera, ni uburyo bwo gusigura indwara n'ubukene. Ivyo birashobora gutanga inguvu n'umwizero mu gihe umuntu yihebuye. Kenshi abayatanga si ukuvuga ko batazi ubutunzi bw'abo bavugabutumwa - n'aho kumbure bataba bazi ingene bungana - ariko bafata ubwo butunzi nk'ikimenyetso c'isano hagati yabo n'Imana. Nimba amahera batanze nk'urutete yarabungukiye, kumbure na wewe arashobora kukwungukira? None gute mu gihe naho intete zitungutse? Bamwe babwirwa ko ukwemera kwabo kudakomeye canke ko hari icaha/igicumuro banyegeje. Kuri Larry, kenshi utuntu dutoya aronse - nk'umubanyi amutabaje ingabire kanaka, canke hagize nk'uwemerera umugore wiwe, Darcy, amasaha yiyongereye y'akazi - yadufata nk'icemezo ko biriko bija mu ngiro. Avuga ko yoba yarahaye abo badandaji amafaranga ashika ku bihumbi 20 vy'amadorari. Amwe aha, ayandi hariya. Haciye imyaka, yatanguye gushira vyose hamwe. Urutonde ni rurerure cane nk'urw'abakinyi bose, harimwo n'ababaye rurangiranwa mu babayeho neza- abantu nka ba Kenneth Copeland na Creflo Dollar, basavye abanywanyi babo kubagurira indege zabo bwite. Ubuzima bwa Larry ntako bwari kwifata. Ubu we na Darcy baba mu gisagara gito citwa Cullman, mu ntara ya Alabama, urugendo hafi rw'isaha mu buraruko bw'igisagara ca Birmingham co muri iyo ntara. Icumba cabo c'ukuruhukiramwo (salon) gifise akameza kamwe n'intebe zine. Ku ruhome hari ubutumwa bwo muri bibiriya ngo: "Ntimukagire ibibatera amaganya", dusanga mubanyafilipi 4:6. N'ijwi ry'ivyizigiro, Larry avuga ati: "Ubuzima ntibworoshe ariko dufise imihezagiro. Dufise ivyo dufungura, dufise utuyabu tubiri tudukunda. Umugore wanje arakora rimwe na rimwe mu mangazini, kandi nanje ndahabwa imfashanyo y'abatishoboye". Aho amariye "gukurikira inzira ya Yezu/Yesu" yabaye umukunzi ruhebwa w'imboneshakure zigisha ijambo ry'Imana cane cane ikiganiro citwa "praisathons", cari kigizwe n'ibikorwa vy'ugutoza amahera, aho abavugabutumwa batari bake bavugishwa. We ubwiwe yivugira ko "yatwawe ubwenge" n'abo bavugabutumwa. Yabona ko ari abagenzi biwe. Abenshi muri abo bapasitori bari bafise amanomero ababakeneye babaronderako. Inyuma y'igisabisho, asabwe amahera, Larry yayatanga n'umunezero mwinshi - n'aho ata bintu vyinshi yari afise yotanga. We yari azi ko ayo mahera agiye gukoreshwa mu migambi, kandi akibaza ko mu gihe azoba ari mu ngorane azofashwa. Mu mwaka wa 2013, igihe cari kigeze Amagara y'umukobwa wiwe yari amaze igihe arwaye yari yageze aho umwansi ashaka. Larry yari yamwemereye ko azomufasha, ariko "intete" ntizari zungutse. Yaranditse ikete ry'inkoramutima ry'impapuro zitanu yandikira amashengero atandukanye yari yagiye atereramwo uko imyaka yagenda, ayasaba imfashanyo. Ubu avuga ati: "Twari abizigirwa muri ayo mashengero. Batwita incuti, abagenzi, umuryango. Twibaza ko bashobora kudufasha". Muri iryo kete, yasigura ingene ubwishingizi butashobora kumurihira amahera yari akenewe mu kumuvura. Umuganga umwe yamubwiye ko boba bararindiriye ko apfa. Yanditse ati: "Jewe nka se wiwe, nta bushobozi mfise. Nashaka kubasaba ko mwomfasha kurokora ubuzima bw'umwana wanje". Inyishu zaraje. Zimwe zaca ku mbuga ngurukanabumenyi, izindi zigaca muri posita. Ariko zose zari izimuhakanira. Yibuka zimwe zavuga nk'uku: "Ishengero ryacu ntiritwemerera kugufasha". Aribuka uwundi yamubwiye ati: "Urazi ko turonka amatelefone atandatu canke indwi atubwira ibibazo nk'ibi, ari nka hamwe twogufasha, twotegerezwa gufasha bose". Gushika mu ci ry'umwaka wa 2014, Larry na Darcy bari baherewe n'udufaranga twabo twose. Bari bagurishije utwo batunze twose kugira bashobore kuva muri California baje i Florida kuba hamwe n'umukobwa wabo, bavamwo bisanga batagira aho bakika umusaya. Mu mubabaro w'ukubona yananiwe n'ugufasha umukobwa wiwe, Larry ntiyatahura ingene yatawe mu rudubi. Bagiye gutahura haciye umwaka wose, bamaze gukurikira ikiganiro citwa Last Week Tonight c'umunyamakuru John Oliver, mu mwaka wa 2015. Larry avuga ati: "Si nari bwigere ndaba John Oliver. Nta n'uwo nari bwigere numva". Ariko icamukoze ku mutima ni agakino karwanya abo bavugabutumwa b'abacangero bicira amahera. Larry na Darcy barababaye cane, bibuka amazina yose. Bavuga ko bumva umengo Imana irabahumuye. Azunguza umutwe, Larry yagize ati: "Twarabaye ibijuju". Ivyashikiye umuryango wa Larry, vyatumye bimenyekana ko hari abavugabutumwa benshi bameze nka Todd Coontz buzuza imifuko yabo baciye mu nyigisho z'ijambo ry'Imana. Larry yagiye gufashwa n'uwo yahamagaye kuri telefone atoye ku rubuga ngurukanabumenyi yitwa Pete Evans wo mw'ishengero ryitwa Trinity Foundation, ariwe yaciye ashinga urubuga ngurukanabumenyi mu ntumbero y'ukumufasha kurondera imfashanyo. Yashoboye kwegeranya amadorari ashika 2000. Avuga ati: "N'aho ari make ugereranije n'ayo bari bakeneye, yarabafashije". Pete Evans yinjiye ishengero Trinity Foundation mu myaka ya za 1970 Todd Coontz yahavuye arengutswa imbere y'amategeko, aho yaciriwe urubanza rwo gupfungwa imyaka itanu, ariko atari kubera ivyo bikorwa vyiwe vy'ubuvugabutumwa, ariko yagirizwa ko atatanze ikori ku bindi bikorwa yari asanzwe akora vyamwinjiriza amahera. N'ishavu ryinshi, Larry avuga ati: "Twaciye mu nzira zigoye. Aba ni abacangero bironderera amahera gusa". Umukobwa wabo ni muzima, ariko inyuma y'aho Larry ananiriwe n'ukumurihira kugira ngo yivuze, baciye bankana n'ubu bakaba bavugana gake kabaho. Uyo muryango uvuga ko bipfuza kumenyesha abandi ivyababayeko kugira ngo babafashe kwiyumvira neza bakibaza iyo amahera yabo ajanwa.

Rayon Sports yatsinze ikipe ya Yanga yo muri Tanzania igitego 1-0, igitego cyabonetse mu gice cya mbere gitsinzwe na Bimenyimana Bonfils Caleb. Nyuma y'iyo ntsinzi abantu ibihumbi n'ibihumbi bigabije amabarabara yo mu mujyi wa Kigali babyina kandi barata ibigwi by'iyo kipe ifite abakunzi benshi mu Rwanda. Mu wundi mukino wo muri iryo tsinda rya kane ikipe ya USM Alger yatsinze Gor Mahia yo muri Kenya ibitego 2-1, bityo irangiza ari iya mbere n'amanota 10 mu gihe Rayon Sports yarangije ari iya kabiri n'amanota 9. Ikiganiro na Juma Para wakiniye Rayon Sports na Etincelles mu myaka ya za 80. Tombora y'uko amakipe azahura mu mikino ya 1/4 izaba ku itariki 3 z'ukwezi gutaha kwa cyenda. Rayon Sports yabaye iya kabiri mu itsinda rya 4 ikazatombora imwe mu makipe 3 yabaye aya mbere muyandi matsinda ariyo Raja Cassablanca yo muri Maroc, RS Berkane yo mu Misiri cyangwase Enyimba yo muri Nigeria.

Abakinnyi ba Mexique mu kiruhuko cyo kugabanya ubushyuhe, mu mikino y'igikombe cy'isi cya 2014 yabereye muri Brezili Impuzamashyirahamwe y'umupira w'amaguru muri Afurika (CAF) yo, bijyanye n'amabwiriza y'ishyirahamwe ry'umupira w'amaguru ku isi, FIFA, iteganya ibiruhuko bibiri muri buri mukino. Ariko iri shyirahamwe Fifpro rirengera inyungu z'abakinnyi ryo rishaka ko icyo gihe gikubwa inshuro ebyiri. Biteganyijwe ko ubushyuhe mu Misiri muri iki gihe cy'imikino ya CAN buzagera kuri dogere 40C. Ishyirahamwe Fifpro rigira riti: "Ubuzima n'umutekano by'abakinnyi bigomba kuza imbere y'ibindi byose". "Buri mukino wose ukinwe mu bushyuhe burenze dogere 34C, biba bivuze ko hari ibyago byinshi cyane byo gukomereka kubera ubushyuhe". Byiyongera ku mabwiriza ya CAF yo gutanga ibiruhuko byo gufata icyo kunywa nk'amazi n'ibindi byo kugabanya ubushyuhe ku munota wa 30 n'uwa 70 w'umukino, Fifpro isaba ko abakinnyi bakwiye no kuruhuka ku munota wa 15 no ku wa 60 wa buri mukino. Irindwi mu mikino yo mu matsinda, irimo n'ufungura iri rushanwa Misiri yaraye itsinzemo Zimbabwe igitego 1-0, irabera ku murwa mukuru Cairo, i Alexandria no muri Suez - ahantu hatatu mu hashyuha cyane kurusha ahandi muri iki gihugu. Ikiruhuko cya mbere cyemewe na FIFA cyo kugabanya ubushyuhe cyabaye mu mikino y'igikombe cy'isi yabereye muri Brezili mu mwaka wa 2014, mu mukino wa kimwe cy'umunani wahuje Ubuholandi na Mexique. Ariko gahunda y'ikiruhuko nk'icyo yari yarabanje kwangwa mu gikombe cy'isi cyo muri 2002 cyabereye mu Buyapani no muri Koreya y'epfo, ndetse habayeho n'ibibazo by'ubushyuhe mu gikombe cy'isi cyo mu mwaka wa 1994 cyabereye muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Amerika.

Izi nkingo zageze muri iki gihugu kuwa mbere mu gitondo zizanywe n'indege ya Air Zimbabwe zishyikirizwa leta n'uhagarariye Ubushinwa muri iki gihugu. Ubushinwa bwahaye Zimbabwe izo doze 200,000 nk'impano. Ziyongera kuri doze 600,000 zatumijwe ngo zishyurwe na leta zizahagera mu kwezi gutaha. Minisiteri y'ubuzima ya Zimbabwe yatangaje kuri Twitter amashusho y'indege yazanye izi nkingo ihageze: Uyu munsi biteganyijwe ko Perezida Emmerson Mnangagwa ageza ijambo ku gihugu mu gihe bari busoze iminsi ya 'guma mu rugo'. Muri iki gihugu coronavirus imaze kwica abaminisitiri batatu muri leta, abantu barenga 35,000 barayanduye naho abagera ku 1,400 yarabishe, nk'uko minisiteri y'ubuzima yaho ibivuga. Zimbabwe, ituranye na Africa y'Epfo aho ubwoko bushya bwa coronavirus bwateye kwiyongera kw'abandura. Africa y'Epfo yahagaritse gukingira nyuma y'inyigo yabonye ko urukingo rwa AstraZaneca bari bagiye gukoresha rudakingira neza ubwoko bushya bwabonetse muri icyo gihugu.

Bigora abakora mu bikorwa by'ubuzima kugera mu burasirazuba bwa Kongo Leta yemeje ko nta shiti 28 muri bo bazize virusi ya Ebola. Inkingo n'imiti ya Ebola ikiri mu igeragezwa, ni byo biri kwifashishwa mu gukumira ko Ebola isakara no mu bice itarageramo. Ariko abategetsi bateganya ko umubare w'abarwayi ba Ebola uziyongera. Ibigo bibiri biri kuvurirwamo Ebola muri Kivu y'amajyaruguru birenda kurengerwa ubushobozi mu gihe ikigo gishya cyo kuvuriramo Ebola kiri hafi kubakwa mu ntara bituranye ya Ituri. Abakora mu bikorwa by'ubuzima bari gukurikirana abantu 1500 bagize aho bahurira n'abarwayi ba Ebola. Ariko ni akazi kagoye kubera ibikorwa by'umutekano mucye byongeye kubura mu burasirazuba bwa Kongo, ahakorera imitwe myinshi y'inyeshyamba.

Abakinyi ba Serengeti Boys ba Tanzania bariko barigina igitego Muri urwo rukino, umugwi wa Serengeti Boys umenyerezwa na Oscar Milambo, ni wo watanguye kwinjizwa igitego ca mbere, hanyuma baragombora imbere yo gutsinda igitego c'intsinzi. CECAFA-17: Umugwi wa Zanzibar wirukanywe mw'ihiganwa CECAFA y'abatarenza 17 yatanguye mu Burundi Ibitego vya Serengeti Boys vyinjijwe na Jaffar Juma ku munota wa 21 hamwe na Kelvin Paul ku munota wa 62 y'urukino. Bazihura mu rukino rwa nyuma rw'ihiganwa n'uwuzoba yatsinze hatagi ya Uganda na Somalia.

Saido Berahino ni we kapiteni w'Intamba mu Rugamba z'u Burundi Uyu kapiteni w'ikipe y'igihugu y'u Burundi Intamba mu Rugamba w'imyaka 26 y'amavuko, kuri ubu nta kipe yari afite akinira nyuma yo gutandukana n'ikipe ya Stoke City ku wa gatatu. Constantin Mutima uhagarariye Berahino yari yamenyesheje ejo ku wa gatanu ko umwanya n'umwanya yashoboraga gusinya "mu ikipe ye nshyashya yo mu Bubiligi iri mu cyiciro cya mbere". Anenga ibyavuzwe n'uwo bahoze bakinana Mutima yahakanye amakuru bimwe mu bitangazamakuru byo mu Bwongereza byatangaje aho Glen Johnson wahoze akinana na Berahino muri Stoke, yavuze ko yari umukinnyi udashobotse. Johnson yavuze ko Berahino ari umukinnyi utitanga, kandi usiba imyitozo nta mpamvu. Kuri ibi, Mutima yavuze ko amagambo nk'ayo adakwiye ku bantu bahoze bakinana, ko "Saido atari umwana mubi", ko abavuga ibyo ari abagamije "kumwicira ejo hazaza he mu mupira w'amaguru". Undi bakinanye yamwifurije amahirwe Ravel Morrison wahoze akinana na Berahino muri Stoke ariko mu kwezi gushize akerekeza muri Sheffield United, yanenze amagambo ya Johnson kuri Berahino. Ikinyamakuru The Guardian gisubiramo amagambo ya Morrison agira ati: "Ni gute wavuga amagambo nk'ayo ku karubanda. Berahino, nkwifurije amahirwe mu ikipe yawe nshya..." Berahino yari asigaje imyaka itatu kuri kontaro yashyizeho umukono muri Stoke mu mwaka wa 2017, ikipe yagezemo avuye muri West Bromwich Albion aguzwe miliyoni 12 z'amapawundi. Bivugwa ko yavuye muri Stoke ahawe arenga miliyoni ebyiri z'amapawundi. Ayivuyemo ayitsindiye ibitego bitanu gusa mu mikino 56 yayikiniye - uwa nyuma akaba yarawukinnye mu kwezi kwa kabiri akina na West Bromwich Albion. Mu kwezi kwa gatanu, yahamwe n'ikosa ryo gutwara imodoka yanyoye yarengeje igipimo cyemewe, acibwa amande y'amapawundi ibihumbi 75 ndetse abuzwa gutwara imodoka mu gihe cy'amezi 30. Hari mbere yuko ayobora Intamba mu Rugamba nka kapiteni mu mikino y'igikombe cy'Afurika cy'ibihugu iheruka kubera mu Misiri, imikino u Burundi bwari bwitabiriye bwa mbere, bugasezererwa butarenze icyiciro cyo mu matsinda.

Umuhana wose usabwa 2000 ku mwaka Ryatangurijwe mu nama yahuje abasitanteri n'ababuramatari, yabereye muri zone ya Gatumba intara ya Bujumbura. Nk'uko vyashikirijwe muri iyo nama imihana isabwa guterera mu Burundi bwose iharurwa mu miliyoni zibiri n'ibihumbi 150, umuhana wose usabwa 2000 vy'amafaranga y'amarundi ku mwaka. Urwaruka rugeze gutora ni umuliyoni, bagasabwa amafaranga 1000 c'amarundi ku mwaka ku muntu umwe. Nestor Bimenyimana ari mu mugwi ushinzwe kwegeranya intererano niwe yashikirije udutabo bazorihirako. Yagize ati: "Udutabo canke udu carnets tw'amafaranga ibihumbi bibiri bibiri tugiye gutangwa tugera ku bihumbi 43. "Utw'igihumbi gihumbi natwo ni ibihumbi 20, kamwe kose gafise impapuro 50. Nukuvuga ko agatabo karihirwako ibihumbi bibiri bibiri kazovamwo ibihumbi ijana". Amakenga... Ba buramatari na ba musitanteri bashikirije amakenga, buramatari w'intara ya Makamba, Gad Niyukuri, akaba ari umwe muri bo. Yagize ati: "None ko abakozi ba reta basanzwe bakatwa amafaranga y'intererano ku mushahara buri kwezi, nitwashika ku mihana yabo bakavuga ko bariha tuzobigenza gute?" Kuri iyo myitwarariko, Therence Ntahiraja, umwunganirizi w'umushikiranganji w'intwaro yo hagati mu gihugu yatanze inyishu ati: "Aya ni amafaranga yo ku ngo. "Nuguharura ingo zose ata na rumwe ruvuyemwo. Twinjiye mu vyo gusobanura vyohava bigorana". Isekeza ryatangurijwe mu nama yahuje abasitanteri n'ababuramatari, yabereye muri zone ya Gatumba intara ya Bujumbura Ntahiraja avuga ko isekeza ritanguye ubu mu kw'indwi kubera ari ho abanyagihugu bariko barimbura ivy'impeshi. Kuva mu ntango z'uwu mwaka intererano yahora itangwa n'abakozi ba reta, amashirahamwe n'inganda gusa. Mu ntango z'ukwezi kwa 6, ubushikiranganji bw'ikigega ca reta bwatangaje ko bwari bumaze kwegeranya imiriyaridi 17 mu gihe hakenewe izigera ku 70.

Ibi vyabereye imbere y'ibiro vy'umurwi w'ishirahamwe mpuzamakungu ONU ujejwe agateka ka zina muntu ku mugwa mukuru Kampala, aho umushingamateka Robert Kyagukanyi azwi kw'izina rya Bobi Wine yari agiye kubonana n'uyo murwi ngo awereke ingene agateka ka zina muntu gahungabana mu gihugu. Ishirahamwe ONU ririyamiriza ico gitero. Jenerali Muhoozi avuga ko mu misi ibiri iri imbere bagiye gufatira ibihano abo basirikare bataye umurongo nk'uko bitangazwa na televiziyo NBS yo muri ico gihugu. Ibi bibaye mu gihe impungenge zibandanya ziyongera ko reta ya Uganda iriko iratoteza abatavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi inyuma y'intsinzi ya Perezida Yoweri Museveni mu matora aheruka yabayemwo impari nyinshi. Amareresi yerekana abasirikare ba Uganda bariko biruka ku bamenyeshamakuru babakubita n'inkoni. Bari barindiriye ko Bobi Wine abonana n'abarongoye uyo murwi kugira ngo asabe ko haba amatohoza kw'ihonyangwa ry'agateka ka zina muntu avuga ko ribandanya muri ico gihugu. Aciye ku rubuga rwa Twitter, Bobi Wine yanditse ati: "Uyu munsi twagiye ku biro vy'umurwi w'ishirahamwe mpuzamakungu ONU ujejwe agateka ka zina muntu i Kampala kugira ngo dutange urwandiko rwo kwiyamiriza inyuruzwa ribandanya, iyicarubozo n'ubwicanyi bukorerwa abnywanyi bacu. Igisirikare caari kirindiriye. Hanze y'irembo ry'ibiro vy'uyu murwi, bateye kandi bakubita abanyamakuru n'abatowe! "N'agasuzuguro kenshi cane, bateye uwo ari we wese bashobora gushikira agakubitwa ata kigongwe. Bamenaguye ibiyo vy'imodoka zari zaduherekeje. Abatari bake bajanywe mu bitaro. Ariko Museveni ntashobora kuduhatira kwishikana". Bamwe mu bamenyeshamakuru bakomeretse cane mbere bamwe berekanwa bariko barava amaraso mu mutwe bafise n'ibikomere. Jen. David Muhoozi avuga ko ivyabaye bibabaje, ata nsiguro bifise kandi ko atari bari batumwe gukora. Ati: "Abamenyeshamakuru ntibashobora na rimwe kuba abansi b'igihugu. Muri abafatanyabikorwa bakomeye cane". Avuga ko abakomeretse bazovuzwa. Igipolisi coco gitangaza ko abajejwe umutekano bariko basanzaza ikoraniro ritemewe n'amategeko, kikavuga ko bibabaje kubona hari abanyamakuru bakomerekeye muri ico gikorwa. Umugambwe wa Bobi Wine, National Unity Platform (NUP), umenyesha ko hari abanywanyi bawo batari bake babuzwe irengero ukavuga ko hari nababorejwe igufa aho bapfungiwe. Bobi Wine w'imyaka 38, umunyamuziki yahindutse umunyapolitike, niwe yari akomeye cane mu bantu 11 bahiganywe na prezida Yoweri Museveni w'imyaka 76 mu matora aheruka muri ico gihugu yabaye ku wa 14 z'ukwa mbere 2021. Ayo matora yatsinzwe na prezida Museveni ku majwi 58.64%, nayo Bobi Wine aza ubwa kabiri ku majwi 34.83% ariko ntiyemera ivyavuye mu matora, akavuga ko yabayemwo ubusuma, ibihakanwa n'umurwi ujejwe amatora muri Uganda. Kuva ku munsi w'amatora, haraciye iminsi urugo rwa Bobi Wine rukikujwe n'abajejwe umutekano, ata wasohoka, ata winjira. Yagiye gusohoka kw'itegeko rya Sentare nkuru y'ico gihugu yahavuye itegeka ko abasirikare n'abapolisi bava ku rugo rwiwe, maze nawe ashobora kuvugana n'abanyamakuru.

Amakuru avuga ko iyi ndege yaguye ku kibuga by'indege by'igitaraganya hashize akanya gato ihagurutse Amashusho yagaragajwe ku mbuga nkoranyambaga yarimo abagenzi basohoka vuba vuba mu ndege ya kompanyi ya Aeroflot irimo ishya. Mu bapfiriye muri iyi ndege, harimo abana n'abakozi bo mu ndege nkuko bivugwa n'ibiro ntaramakuru Interfax bya leta y'Uburusiya. Yelena Markovskaya, uri mu itsinda riri gukora iperereza ku cyabiteye, yavuze ko indege yarimo abantui 73, muri bo abagenzi 33 barokotse abakozi b'indege bane nabo bararokoka. Abantu batanu bari mu bitaro. Abarokotse bavuga ko iyo ndege yakubiswe n'inkuba, ariko Aeroflot, kompanyi y'igihugu, yatangaje ko iyi ndege hashize akanya ihagurutse byabaye ngombwa ko igaruka ku kibuga kubera ibibazo bya tekiniki yagize, bitatangajwe. Iyi mpanuka yatumye indege zari zigiye kugwa kuri iki kibuga zoherezwa ku bindi bibuga by'indege. Byagenze bite? Iyi ndege yo mu bwoko bwa Sukhoi Superjet-100, yari yerekeje mu wundi mujyi wo mu Burusiya, abayitwaye bagaragaje ko igize ikibazo hashize umwanya muto ihagurutse. Nyuma y'iminota 30 ihagurutse yahise igaruka ku kibuga by'igitaraganya, imaze kugera hasi moteri zayo zifatwa n'inkongi nkuko itangazo rya Aeroflot ribivuga. Abakozi b'iyi ndege bagerageje gusohora abagenzi vuba vuba mu gihe cy'amasegonda 55. Bose ntibashoboye gusohoka, iyi kompanyi yasohoye urutonde rw'abantu barokotse iyi nkongi ivuga ko ikomeza gutanga amakuru mashya aboneka. Ibiro ntaramakuru Interfax bisubiramo amagambo y'uwabihaye amakuru ariko bitatangaje izina, avuga ko iyi ndege yafashwe n'inkongi nyuma yo kugwa nabi yihonze hasi. Ko inkongi itahereye mu kirere nkuko byari byavuzwe mbere. Ibinyamakuru bindi mu Burusiya nabyo bivuga ko iyi ndege itabashije kugwa neza. Umuyobozi w'agace ka Murmansk aho iyi ndege yaguye, yatangaje ko imiryango y'ababuze ababo n'abarwaje ababo kubera ibi byabaye iza guhabwa ubufasha bw'amafaranga. Bamwe mu bari muri iyi ndege batanze ubuhamya ku mbuga nkoranyambaga z'uburyo barokotse. Mikhail Savchenko, umwe muri bo, yatangaje ko yabashije "gusimbuka akava muri iyi ndege" igifatwa n'inkongi iri mu muhanda wayo. Patrick Horlacher wari ku kibuga cy'indege agiye gufata indi ndege, yabwiye BBC ko "biteye ubwoba" kubona ibyabaye. Ubu hatangijwe iperereza ku cyateye ibyabaye kuri iyi ndege. Naho mu karere ka Murmansk yabereyemo batangije icyunamo cy'iminsi itatu.

Zlatan Ibrahimovic ntiyakinyi inkino 10 z'ihiganwa ry'uno mwaka kubera imvune yo mw'ivi Uwo mukinyi w'imyaka 35 yemeye amasezerano y'umwaka umwe ariko ashobora kwongegwa uwundi mwaka. Ntiyashoboye kwongegwa ikiringo inyuma yaho avunikiye mw'ivi akava mu mahiganwa mu kwezi kwa kane guheze. Uretse uwo mukinyi hari abandi benshi bazorekugwa nk'umukinyi w'inyuma wa Chelsea John Terry, umunyezamu wa Man City Willy Caballero, uwukina imbere ku ruhande Jesus Navas hamwe n'abakinyi b'inyuma Gael Clichy na Bacary Sagna. Ibrahimovic yakinye inkino 46 mu mahiganwa yose uno mwaka, yinjiza ibitsindo 28, afasha umumenyereza Jose Mourinho gutwara ibikombe vya Community Shield, League Cup na Europa League.

Umugwi wagavye igitero waje uva mu ntara ya Zamfara, ahameze iminsi hari umugwi ufise ibirwanisho bikomeye wiba inka Uwo mugwi w'abitwaje ibirwanisho wagiye uranaturira amazu aho waciye hose muri ico kigwati. Abajejwe intwaro bavuga ko abo bateye baje bava mu ntara ya Zamfara iri hafi, ahamaze kugabwa ibitero vyinshi mu mezi aheze bigabwe n'abasuma b'inka bafise ibirwanisho bikomeye. Benshi baguye muri iki gitero cabereye mu kigwati ca Birnin Gwari bari mu mugwi w'abacungera umutekano, washinzwe n'ababa muri ico kigwati. Abahatuye basaba igisirikare kuza kubafasha nyuma y'ibitero vyinshi bimaze kugabwa ku bigwati bitandukanye. Leta y'umukuru w'igihugu Muhammadu Buhari yaratunzwe agatoki cane yagirizwa kudakora ibihagije ngo igarukane umutekano.

Ubwo yakinaga muri Real Madrid, Fernando Hierro yatwaye igikombe cya Champions League inshuro eshatu Hierro yari yahawe akazi ko kuba atoza ikipe ya Espanye nyuma yaho uwari umutoza wayo Julen Lopetegui yirukaniwe habura iminsi ibiri ngo igikombe cy'isi gitangire. Ariko mu mikino ya kimwe cy'umunani cy'irangiza, ikipe ya Espanye yatwaye igikombe cy'isi cyo mu mwaka wa 2010, yasezerewe kuri penaliti n'Uburusiya bwakiriye icy'uyu mwaka. Mu gikombe c'isi Ronaldo yatsinze ibitego 3 mu rukino rwa Portugal na Espagne Real Madrid iri kwiga ku kuba yagurisha Cristiano Ronaldo muri Juventus Nkuko ishyirahamwe ry'umupira w'amaguru muri Espanye ryabitangaje, Hierro w'imyaka 50 y'amavuko yavuze ko yafashe umwanzuro wo "kugerageza amahirwe mu bindi". Nyuma yo gusezererwa gutunguranye kwa Espanye mu gikombe cy'isi, Hierro yavuze ko ari we ukwiye kubazwa ukuba ikipe ya Espanye itarashoboye gukomeza. Yagize ati: "Twese twagerageje gukora uko dushoboye ariko nyine umupira w'amaguru ni umupira w'amaguru." Yongeyeho ati: "Sintekereza ko wavuga ko ikipe ya Espanye ibyayo birangiye. Gutsinda no gutsindwa ni ibintu bibaho."

Abapfasoni bo muri Congo bariko barakaraba mu mazi yashizwemwo imiti mu karere ka Mangina Ibi bivuzwe inyuma y'inama idasanzwe y'ikitaraganya yabereye mu gisagara ca Geneve yo kuganira ingene iyo ngwara yifashe mu gihugu ca RD Congo. Ijambo bumvikanyeko rya nyuma muri iyo nama n'uko hakwiye gukorwa ibishoboka vyose mu kugwanya iyo ngwara idasanzwe. Ibihugu vya Uganda, u Rwanda, Uburundi na Sudan y'epfo vyasabwe gufata ingingo zo kwiyubara zihuta kubera uko iyo ngwara yakwiragiye, kuko ibintu bishobora guhinduka umwanya uwo ari wo wose uva muri aka kanya. Vyaragaragaye ko ingwara ya Ebola yiyongereye mu gihugu ca RD Congo mu gihe hari n'intambara zibandanya zituma abanyagihugu bihebura, ivyo vyose bitera ingorane mu twigoro two kugwanya iyo ngwara. Intambara zibera muri ako karere zituma bitoroha kugwanya iyo ngwara. Ibihugu vy'u Rwanda, u Burundi na Uganda birageramiwe cane: Iyo ngwara ishobora kuba itageramiye amakungu, ariko ishami rya Onu rijejwe amagara y'abantu kw'isi OMS rivuga ko hari ukugeramirwa mu bihugu vy'u Burundi, u Rwanda, Uganda na Sudani y'epfo, kandi bikaba vyamenyeshejwe ko vyokwama bigavye. Ariko none ivyo bisigura iki ku ngingo zitegerezwa gufatwa? Mbe ivyo bihugu bimaze gukora iki gushika ubu? Uganda: Dr Yonas Woldemariam aserukira OMS mu gihugu c'Ubugande yabwiye BBC ko yemera ko ico gihugu citeguye bikwiye ariko ivyo bitotuma bagira ubwoba. Gusika ubu hari umugambi mwiza urongowe n'ubushikiranganji bw'amagara y'abantu, bakaba bararungitse abakozi bakwiye bavuye muri OMS n'ahandi basanzwe bafashanya. Mu gihugu no mu turere twose haragenzurwa buri ndwi kugira barabe aho batejeje kwitegura n'ibindi bikenewe. Yasiguye ko nk'akarorero baguma baraba ingene abantu bajabuka imbibe, uko bagenzura abinjira mu gihugu, ingene abaganga bimurirwa ahandi, no kuraba ko abantu bafise uburyo bwo gutabaza mu gihe hagize ikintu ico ari co cose kibonetse giteye amakenga. Avugira mu karere kari ku rubibe rwa RD Congo, Yonas yavuze ko n'aho biri uko, ni ngombwa ko ivyo vyose bikomezwa, no kwongererezwa inguvu kandi abafise uruhara bose mu kugwanya Ebola bagume bafashanya. Umuganga ariko aratera urucanco rwa Ebola umukozi wa Oxfam mu kwezi kw'umunani 2017 Rwanda: Ubushikiranganji bw'amagara y'abantu bwaravuze ko reta yiteguye neza kugwanya uburyo bwose bushoboka bwo kwandura ingwara ya Ebola. Haza haratanguye igenzurwa ry'abantu binjira mu gihugu kubera iyo ngwara ya Ebola yateye mu gihugu ca RD Congo. Intumbero n'uko umuntu wese yiketsweko Ebola amenyekana hakiri kare hanyuma ashirwe mu kibanza cabigenewe. Ingenzi n'abashitsi binjira mu gihugu barapimwa ubushuhe bakanabazwa ibibanza bamaze kujamwo, bakanagenzura neza ibindi bimenyetso vyose vyerekana umugera wa Ebola. Ubu haratewe akamo ku banyagihugu ngo ntibaje mu bibanza birangwamwo iyo ngwara, no kumenyesha ibimenyetso vyose bibaza ko bijanye n'iyo ngwara hakiri kare . Burundi: Uburundi ni bwo buboneka ko bugeramiwe gusumba kubera uruja n'uruza rw'abantu ku mbibe bavuye mu Rwanda no muri Uganda. Ubushikiranganji bw'amagara y'abantu buvuga ko bafise ibikoresho vyo guhangana n'iyo ngwara mu gihe yokwaduka. Harashizwe inguvu cane mu guhanahana amakuru no kwigisha abanyagihugu kugira bamenye ibimenyetso n'ingene bokwirinda uwo mugera udasanzwe. Haratangujwe isekeza ryo kwimura abakozi bo muvyo amagara y'abantu. Kuva hadutse ingwara ya Ebola yadutse, Uburundi nta bushobozi buraronka bwo gupima umugera wa Ebola, bakaba baja gupimisha mu gihugu ca Uganda iyo bikenewe. Umuganga ariko aratera urucanco rwa Ebola umukozi wa Oxfam mu kwezi kw'umunani 2017 Sudani y'epfo: Sudani y'epfo n'ikindi gihugu gisugerejwe citaweho cane na OMS. Ivyo kubera ukuntu ico gihugu cegeranye n'akarere kabonetsemwo umugera wa Ebola. Ishami rya Onu rijejwe amagara y'abantu kw'isi OMS rivuga ko ico gihugu co muri Afrika cikukiye vuba kimaze kwongereza uburyo bwo kwitegurira kugwanya iyo ngwara. Ubushikiranganji bw'amagara y'abantu bufashanije na OMS, ikigo kijejwe kugwanya ingwara z'ivyaduka (CDC) hamwe n'abandi basanzwe bakorana baratanguje igikorwa kwigisha abantu ivyerekeye iyo ngwara. Harimwo no gutanguza imigwi y'abantu bo mu bisata bitandukanye bafise n'ubumenyi butandukanye, kwigisha abategetsi batandukanye b'igihugu hamwe n'abatanga imfashanyo. Ibiharuro vyerekana ko ku bantu cumi banduye Ebola muri RD Congo, batandatu bapfa.

Igihe asubira mu Bufaransa ejo k uwa gatanu, Sophie Pétronin, niwe yabwiye abategetsi b'Ubufaransa ko hari umugore atavuze izina yagandaguwe Umushikiranganji w'imigenderanire Ignazio Cassis ariyamiriza ubu bwicanyi, akavuga ko abategetsi bakiriko bararondera aho ibisigarira vyiwe vyoba biri. Bamenye ko yishwe igihe Sophie Pétronin, umukozi w'ishirahamwe ry'abagiraneza ry'Abafaransa abimenyeshereje abategetsi b'u Bufaransa. Umupfasoni Pétronin w'imyaka 75 yari yanyurujwe mu kwa cumi na kabiri mu 2016 akaba yagiye kurekurwa muri ino ndwi. Niwe mufaransa wanyuma yari akiri mu minwe y'abamunyuruje kw'isi yose. Abataliyano babiri hamwe n'uwahoze arongoye abatavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi bwa Mali, Soumaïla Cissé, nabo nyene barekuwe muri ino ndwi. Aba barekuwe leta nayo irekuye abarwanyi bagendera ku vyiyumviro bikaze vy'idini rya Isilamu barenga 100, bazwi ko bafitaniye imigenderanire n'umurwi al-Qaeda. Ibiro vy'umukuru w'igihugu vya Mali ntibiramenyesha ingene aba bantu bari banyurujwe barekuwe. Ingabo za Mali ziri kumwe n'ingabo mpuzamakungu zimaze igihe zirwanya umurwi ugendera ku vyiyumviro bikaze vya Isilamu mu buraruko bw'iki gihugu kuva mu 2012. Ubuswisi buvuga iki? Mw'itangazo bwasohoye, ubushikiranganji bw'imigenderanire bw'Ubuswisi bumenyesha ko uyu mugore atavuzwe izina "ashobora kuba yishwe n'abari bamunyuruje...haraciye hafi ukwezi". Rivuga ko abategetsi "bariko barakora ivyo bashoboye vyose kugira ngo bamenye ingene yishwe hamwe n'aho boshobora gutora ibisigarira vyiwe", kandi ko ubu bushikiranganji busaba ikiziga ciwe. Ku wa kane, ibiro vy'umukuru w'igihugu vya Mali vyamenyesheje ko umupfasoni Pétronin hamwe na Bwana Cissé yari yanyurujwe mu kwa gatatu ariko ariyamamaza mu matora y'abashingamateka, baciye banyarukanwa mu bitaro vy'i Bamako, mu ndege ya gisirikare bari kumwe n'aba bataliyano babiri. Aba Bataliyano barekuwe bari Pierluigi Maccalli, umupatiri yari yanyurujwe mu 2018, hamwe na Nicola Chiacchio, yafashwe yagiye gutembera muri ako karere. Mu gatondo ko ku wa kane, abategetsi ba Mali batangaje ko barekuwe abanyapolitike batari bake hamwe n'abasirikare bari bahagaritswe igihe haba itembagazwa ry'ubutegetsi muri iki gihugu. Mu kw'umunani, Perezida Ibrahim Boubacar Keïta yarakombowe n'igisirikare, ariko nta kintu kinini kizwi ku bijanye n'ibiganiro vyo guhanahana impfungwa.

Inama ya G2o yarangiye Amerika itumvikanye n'abandi Ibindi bihugu vyose vya G20 vyemeje kiretse Amerika ko amasezerano y'i Paris ntasubigwamwo. Perezida Trump yaronse n'iyindi ntsinzi mu rudandazwa. Mw'itangazo abagize umugwi G20 bashoye barangiza inama, bemeranije kugwanya ingeso yo kwikwegerako no kwiyugarana ku masoko y'urudandazwa. Ariko bemeza ko buri gihugu gishobora gufata ingingo zo kwikingira mu rudandazwa mu gihe hakoreshejwe amategeko yemewe ajanye no kwikingira mu rudandazwa. Abihweza utuntu n'umutundi bavuga ko ayo majambo aha uburenganzira Trump bwo gukomeza umugambi wiwe wo gushira imbere inyungu z'igihugu ciwe bise "America First".

Ikipe y'umupira w'amaguru y'abana bahoze mw'ibarabara bo mu Burundi, yatahukanye ikibanza ca gatau mu gikombe c'isi U Burundi bwatsinze igihugu ca Indonésia ibitsindo 3-1, igitsindo ca mbere cinjijwe n'umwana yitwa Christian Ndihokubwayo, ica kabiri cinjijwe na Assumani Massudi, kizigenza w'uwo mugwi w'Imboneza FC, hanyuma ica gatatu cinjizwa na Arnaud Ndahabonimana. Mu gice ca kabiri gishira ica nyuma, u Burundi bwari bwakuwemwo na Uzbekistan butsinzwe igitego 1-0. U Burundi bwari bwatanguye ihiganwa neza aho bwatsinze Indonesia 2-0, butsinda Brezil ibitego 4-1, hanyuma bwongera buratsinda kandi igihugu ca Bielorussie ibitego 3-0. Iryo higanwa ryitabwe n'abana bo mw'ibarabara barenga 200 bavuye hirya no hino kw'isi ubu bakaba bakoraniye i Moscow. Mu nkino zibanza Uburundi bwitwaye neza bukaba bwaratsinze Brezil ibitego 4-1 Abakobwa n'abahungu baje baserukira imigwi 24 nserukirabihugu y'abana baba mw'ibarabara, mu rwego rwo gukangurira abantu ko abo bana na bo bakeneye kwitabwaho co kimwe n'abandi bana bose. Urukino rwa nyuma (final) ruja guhuza igihugu ca Pakistan na Ouzbekistan.

Umushikiranganji w'ikigega c'u Burundi Domitien Ndihokubwayo Uburundi bukeneye imiliyaridi 70 z'amafaranga y'amarundi kugira amatora yimirije yo muri 2020 agende neza. Ariko ayamaze kuboneka biciye mu ntererano y'abanyagihugu hamwe n'akigoro ka reta angana n'imiliyaridi 17 zirenga gato, ni kuvuga ibice 24,5 kw'ijana. Vyashikirijwe n'umushikiranganji w'ikigega ca leta Domitien Ndihokubwayo kuri uno wa kabiri, akizera ko ayakenewe yose azoboneka ata mfashanyo y'amakungu igiyemwo. Amenyesha ko abamaze guterera ari abakozi ba leta hamwe n'amashirahamwe. Abakozi ba leta bose hamwe, bamaze gukwiza amafaranga agera ku miliyaridi 2 n'imiliyoni 600 zirenga gato z'amarundi. Intererano y'amashirahamwe nayo irenga gato imiliyaridi 6. Umushikiranganji Ndihokubwayo, yavuze ayamaze kuboneka ingene angana harimwo n'ayo leta imaze gutanga. « Turamaze kwegeranya amafaranga agera ku 17 205 774 667 z'amafaranga y'amarundi. Muti none ayakenewe angana gute ? ibiharuro mfatakibanza vyerekana ko hakenewe imiliyaridi 70 z'amarundi », nikwo umushikiranganji abisigura. Uwo mutegetsi amenyesha ko abanyagihugu badafise imishahara bataratangura gusabwa intererano, asigura ko hakiri ivya nkenerwa bazorihirako bitaratungana neza. Kimwe mu bibazo vyabajijwe kwari ukumenya ingene amafaranga asigaye azoboneka mu gihe abanyagihugu bavuga ko bugarijwe n'ubukene. Uwo mushikiranganji yatanze inyishu agira ati: « Tugeze ku miliyaridi 17. Mu 70 hasigaye mirongo itanu na zitatu. Hariho 12 reta yategekanije muri muri uyu mwaka zizokwiyongerako. Mbere iriko iraraba ko yozongereza kugira umunyagihugu ntahasinzikarire cane", nikwo abandanya asigura. Abari mu matora kamarampaka y'ibwirizwa shingiro rizofasha gutunganya amatora yo mu 2020 Amafaranga akenewe mu matora ya 2020 abangabanganwa n'ayakoreshejwe muri 2010 hamwe na 2015. Muri 2010 hakoreshejwe imiliyoni 43 z'amadolari, mu marundi arenga gato imiliyaridi 70. Muri 2015 naho hakoze ayagera ku miliyaridi 80.

Abari mu myiyerekano basaba igisirikare basaba ko kirekura ubutegetsi Ibrahim yaciye kandi agenwa kurongora igisata kijejwe igendereza mu gisirikare. Yarahiye ejo ku munsi wa kane imbere ya Abdel Fattah al-Burhan, umukuru w'inama ya gisirikare, be n'icegera ciwe Mohamed Hamdan Dagalo. Liyetena Jenerali Mohamed Hamdan Dagalo yafashe akanya ko kumenyesha ko ari nkenerwa ko ubutunzi bw'igihugu bunagurwa kandi ko ubusumbasumbane hagati y'abanyagihugu buvanwaho. Mu gihe yagiriza abatavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi ko aribo batumye ibiganiro vy'ugushinga inama nkuru y'igihugu bihagarara, Bwana Dagalo amenyesha ko igisirikare "arico nkingi y'abanyagihugu gushika habaye amatora mu bwisanzure atagira akanenge, gutyo tugasubira mu makambi yacu". Ikinyamakuru Suna kimenyesha ko Bwana Mustafa yatanze imihoho ku munsi wa gatatu kubera ibibazo vy'amagara. Mu kwezi kwa kane guheze, abajenerali batatu baratanze imihoho inyuma y'aho abari mu myiyerekano babagirije ko bafitaniye ubucuti bwa hafi na Omar al-Bashir yari aherutse gukurwa ku butegetsi. Hagati aho, igikomangoma Mohammed Bin Salman wo mu gihugu ca Arabia Saoudite yabonanye na Jenerali Mohamed Hamdan Dagalo, icegera c'umukuru w'inama ya gisirikare irongoye Sudani vy'imfatakibanza. Nk'uko bimenyeshwa n'itororokanirizo ry'amakuru rya leta ya Arabia Saoudite (Saudi Press Agency), uwo mubonano wibanze "ku gufashanya hagati y'ivyo bihugu vyompi". Ibihugu vya Arabia Saoudite na Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Abarabu ( Emirats Arabes Unis) zaremereye igihugu ca Sudani imiliyaridi 3 z'amadolari, zo gufasha inama ya gisirikare yakuye ku butegetsi Omar al-Bashir ku wa 11 z'ukwezi kwa kane uno mwaka wa 2019.

Kuwa gatanu ushize umukobwa yasimbutse mu igorofa ya kane i Kigali apfa kuwa gatandatu, aha yariho afashwa n'abaganga akimara kwiyahura Tariki 10 z'ukwa cyenda buri mwaka isi izirikana umunsi wo kurwanya kwiyahura. Imibare y'ishami ry'umuryango w'abibumbye ryita ku buzima (OMS) ivuga ko abantu miliyoni imwe biyahura ku isi buri mwaka, bivuze ko buri masegonda 40 hari umuntu wiyahura. Dr Darius Gishoma umuganga w'inzobere mu buvuzi bw'indwara zijyanye n'imitekerereze (Clinical Psychology) avuga ko umuntu yiyahura ageze ku kiciro cya kane(4) nyuma y'ibindi bitatu abantu baba batabonye, cyangwa babonye ntibiteho. OMS ivuga ko mu 2016 mu Burundi abantu 30 ku bantu 100,000 aribo biyahuye. Ivuga ko muri uwo mwaka mu Rwanda abantu 22 ku bantu 100,000 naho biyahuye. Igitabo cy'ibarurishamibare cy'u Rwanda cya 2018 kivuga ko abiyahuye mu 2013 ari 24, mu 2014 hiyahura 10, mu 2015 hiyahura 24, mu 2016 hiyahura 22, naho mu 2017 hiyahuye 10. Aba ni abiyahura bikamenyekana ko biyahuye bakabarurwa, gusa ibibanziriza kwiyahura byinshi biba mu ibanga ku ushaka kubikorwa cyangwa uri kubigerageza. Umuntu yiyahura bigeze he? Dr Gishoma, umuganga akaba n'umwalimu muri kaminuza y'u Rwanda mu gashami kajyanye n'ubuzima bwo mu mutwe, agereranya umuntu wiyahuye n'umuntu uri 'guporomoka'. Uyu ngo agenda afata utwatsi tugacika maze abantu bakazamubona yafashe akatsi ka nyuma kakamucika akagenda. Kwiyahura ngo bica mu byiciro bine. Dr Gishoma ati: "Icya mbere ni igitekerezo, yumva ko kubera ibibazo afite aramutse atariho ububabare bwagabanuka. Igice cya kabiri ni ugushaka uburyo; hejuru y'igorofa, kwishyira mu mugozi, kwiroha mu mazi, kunywa umuti wica n'ibindi... Uyu muganga avuga ko ikiciro cya gatatu ari ukugerageza, umuntu wiyahura ngo ashobora kubanza kubigerageza kenshi ntapfe ariko rimwe akazabikora bigakunda. Ati: "Akenshi kwiyahura ni ibintu biba bimaze igihe kinini umuntu ari kumwe nabyo, yarababaye agashaka ibisubizo. Abantu rero dukunda kubibona igihe cyarenze". None ko twese tugira ibibazo? Dr Gishoma avuga ko abantu benshi cyangwa bose bahura n'ibibazo koko mu buzima, gusa ngo usanga bamwe baba bafite ibisubizo bitatu, bibiri se cyangwa kimwe. Ati: "Hari undi ugera aho nta na kimwe gishoboka, uyu iyo muganiriye akubwira ko yageze ahantu nta gisubizo na kimwe ari kubona kandi arimo kumva akababaro karenze ako abasha kwihanganira. "Uyu rero ashobora kwiyahura atari uko ashaka gupfa ahubwo ari ukugira ngo ako kababaro kagabanuke, nibwo agera ku kiciro cya kane". Scholastique Hatangimana wasimbutse mu igorofa ya kane rwagati mu mujyi wa Kigali kuwa gatanu bivugwa ko iruhande rw'umubiri we bahasanze inyandiko ikubiyemo ibibazo byamuteye kwiyahura. Bamwe mu bamuzi bagiye batanga ubuhamya ko bari bazi ko hari ibibazo yagize mu mateka ye ariko batari bazi ko ari ku rwego rwo kwiyahura. Umuntu nubwo yaba afite abo babana n'inshuti agera ku gihe cyo kwiyahura yumva ari wenyine Dr Gishoma avuga ko ibyo abantu babona umuntu yiyahuye ari ibiba bimaze igihe kinini. OMS muri rusange ivuga ko ku isi abantu 10 ku bantu 100,000 ari bo biyahura. Dr Gishoma avuga ko ibi bisobanuye ko abantu benshi babasha gukemura ibibazo bahura nabyo batiyahuye. Ati: "Abiyahura nabo ariko si ibigwari nk'uko njya numva bamwe babivuga ahubwo ni ikintu cyasanishwa n'uburwayi nk'agahinda gakabije (Depression). Ushaka kwiyahura yabonwa ate? yafashwa ate? Abantu benshi biyahura ngo babanza kugera aho bumva ari bonyine nubwo yaba akikijwe n'abantu 5,000 cyangwa se abana n'abantu, ariko we ngo aba yumva nta muntu bari kumwe. Dr Gishoma avuga ko ari ngombwa cyane ko amatsinda y'abantu, imiryango n'inshuti baganira cyane ku mbamutima zabo (emotions) kugira ngo umuntu amenye uko undi amerewe. Ati: "Iyo umuntu ababaye ukamuba hafi nyuma y'icyumweru ashobora gutangira kureba ku buryo bwagutse, akabona ibindi bisubizo mu gihe yabonaga nta na kimwe". Avuga ko inshuti, imiryango n'amatsinda y'abantu bagomba kwitondera no kudafata nk'ibisanzwe kumva umuntu avuga ko ashobora kwiyahura. Uyu ngo aba ari ku kiciro cya mbere, icya kabiri cyangwa icya gatatu mbere yo kugera ku cya nyuma. Kwa muganga ngo hari imiti batanga igabanya buhoro 'Depression', muganga kandi ngo ashobora guha umurwayi gahunda zo kuganira nawe akagenda amufasha kubona ibisubizo cyangwa gusubira mu buzima no mu bantu. Muganga kandi ngo agerageza gushaka umuntu wamubera urufatiro kuburyo atuma yongera kugira ibyiringiro mu buzima bwe. Bigirana isano n'amateka mabi? Ubushakashatsi bwa kaminuza y'u Rwanda bwitwa 'Rwanda Mental Health Survey Report' bwasohotse mu kwezi kwa kabiri uyu mwaka buvuga ko hagati ya 25% na 37% by'ababajijwe bafite ibibazo byo mu mutwe. Ikigero cy'indwara y'agahinda gakabije mu gihugu kiri kuri 11,9% y'ababajijwe nk'uko iyi raporo ibivuga. U Rwanda kimwe n'u Burundi ni ibihugu byaciye mu ntambara n'ubwicanyi bwatwaye abantu benshi, by'umwihariko Jenoside mu Rwanda. Ikiciro cya kane cyo kwiyahura nicyo abantu benshi babona ariko biba byabanjirijwe n'ibindi byiciro bitatu Dr Darius Gishoma avuga ko ikintu cyose cyica umuntu, umuryango, kibuza ubuzima kubaho cyongera ibyago byo kwiyahura. Avuga ko hari ubushakashatsi bugenda bukorwa, bwerekana ko koko hari isano hagati y'ibyabanje n'ibyabaye ku muntu no kwiyahura. Ati: "Usanga nka Jenoside yarabanje itwara umuryango we, nyuma yaho agerageza kubaka ubuzima ariko haza ibindi byago bisenya n'utwo yubatse. Bigatuma igihe kimwe avuga ati 'kuki imyaka yose ngenda mbabara gusa?', akaba ashobora kubifata nk'igisubizo [kwiyahura]". Dr Gishoma ariko avuga ko amateka akomeye nubwo ashobora gutera kwiyahura ariko atari ko bigenda buri gihe. Ati: "Kuko dufite abantu benshi cyane baciye mu bikomeye kandi babasha kubisohokamo". Wari uzi ko? Kwiyahura cyangwa kugerageza atari icyaha gihanwa n'amategeko mu Rwanda? Ingingo ya 116 y'amategeko ahana mu Rwanda ivuga ko "umuntu wese ushishikariza undi kwiyahura, umufasha cyangwa utuma yiyahura" iyo abihamijwe afungwa hagati y'imyaka itatu n'itanu. Amategeko ya Uganda, Botswana, Malawi, Ghana, Tanzania na Kenya ntabwo ahana kwiyahura ariko ahana kugerageza kwiyahura.

Abantu babarirwa muri za mirongo bagizwe n'abadepite, abo mu miryango yabo n'abakora muri White House, bitabiriye umuhango wo mu busitani bwa Rose Garden Mu gihe ubu Bwana Trump ari mu bitaro, hakomeje kwibazwa ukuntu we na Melania Trump banduye iyi virusi. Ubusitani bwari bwuzuye imbaga bwa Rose Garden bwo muri White House ni bwo burimo kugarukwaho cyane. Hari mu muhango wo ku wa gatandatu w'icyumweru gishize ubwo Bwana Trump yatangazaga ku mugaragaro ko agennye Amy Coney Barrett, ubogamiye ku barepubulikani, nk'umucamanza wo mu bagize urukiko rw'ikirenga wo gusimbura Ruth Bader Ginsburg wapfuye mu kwezi gushize. Ishami ry'umuryango w'abibumbye ryita ku buzima (OMS/WHO) rivuga ko ubusanzwe bifata guhera ku minsi itanu kugeza kuri itandatu gutyo mbere yuko ibimenyetso bitangira kugaragara ku wanduye coronavirus. Amashusho yo muri uwo muhango agaragaza bacye mu bawitabiriye ari bo bambaye agapfukamunwa. Uko intebe zari ziteye ntabwo byubahirizaga intera ya metero ebyiri hagati y'intebe imwe n'iyindi. Bamwe barasuhuzanyaga n'intoki ndetse abandi bakanahoberana. Abantu barindwi mu bagiye muri uwo muhango, ubu bamaze kwemezwa ko banduye coronavirus - nubwo bwose bitazwi ahantu n'igihe bayanduriye. Usibye Perezida Trump n'umugore we Melania, abandi banduye ni: Bwana Trump na Madamu we babasanzemo coronavirus nyuma yuko Hope Hicks, umuyobozi ushinzwe ibikorwa byo gutangaza amakuru bya perezida, yanduye iyo virusi. Ntabwo we yari yitabiriye uwo muhango wo mu busitani bwa Rose Garden. Abantu batari munsi ya barindwi mu bitabiriye uyu muhango babasanzemo coronavirus Amabwiriza y'ikigo cy'Amerika cyo kurwanya indwara asaba gusiga intera ya metero ebyiri hagati yawe n'abantu batari abo mu rugo ubamo, no gupfuka izuru ryawe n'umunwa mu gihe hari abantu bari iruhande rwawe. Abantu babarirwa muri za mirongo barimo abadepite, abo mu miryango yabo n'abakora muri White House, bitabiriye uwo muhango wo mu busitani bwa Rose Garden. Abanduye coronavirus muri abo, bari bicaye mu myanya y'imbere muri ubwo busitani bwari bwuzuye imbaga y'abantu. Senateri Mike Lee (uri hagati), nyuma baje gusangamo Covid-19, ahobera bamwe mu bitabiriye uwo muhango Perezida Trump yari ahagaze iruhande rwa Amy Coney Barrett ubwo uyu mucamanza yavugaga ijambo. Madamu Barrett nta coronavirus bamusanzemo ejo ku wa gatanu, nkuko umuvugizi wa White House yabivuze. Visi Perezida Mike Pence n'umugore we Karen na bo nta coronavirus babasanzemo. Bwana Pence yari yicaye hakurya y'inzira yo hagati y'intebe, yitegeye Madamu wa Trump. Umucamanza mukuru William Barr yari yicaye mu murongo umwe w'intebe visi perezida yari yicayemo. Umuvugizi w'ibiro by'ubutabera by'Amerika ejo ku wa gatanu yavuze ko Bwana Barr nta coronavirus bamusanzemo. Ibikorwa bimwe byo muri uwo muhango wabaye ku wa gatandu w'icyumweru gishize, byabereye imbere mu nzu muri White House, nkuko ifoto umunyamakuru wa CNN yatangaje kuri Twitter ibigaragaza. Kugeza ubu muri Amerika abantu barenga miliyoni 7,3 bamaze gutangazwa ko banduye coronavirus, nkuko imibare ya Kaminuza ya Johns Hopkins yo muri icyo gihugu ibigaragaza. Ni bo ba mbere benshi ku isi. Iki gihugu kandi gifite umubare wa mbere munini ku isi w'abo coronavirus imaze kwica, ubu muri Amerika bararenga 208,000.

Perezida Trump ashinja OMS kubogamira ku Bushinwa Yavuze ko OMS "yananiwe inshingano zayo z'ibanze" mu guhangana n'icyorezo cya coronavirus. Ashinja uru rwego rwa ONU guhishira ikwirakwira ry'iyi virus nyuma y'uko ibonetse bwa mbere mu Bushinwa, akavuga ko ibyo ikwiye kubibazwa. Bwana Trump mu cyumweru gishize yashinje OMS kubogamira ku Ubushinwa. Icyemezo cya Trump biteganyijwe ko kibanza guca mu nteko ya Amerika mbere y'uko kijya mu bikorwa. Muri Amerika, Trump yanenzwe imikorere y'ubutegetsi bwe mu guhangana n'iki cyorezo. Trump yabwiye abanyamakuru ati: "Ndi gutegeka abo dukorana ko bahagarika amafaranga mu gihe turi kwiga ku ruhare rwa OMS mu kunanirwa bikabije no guhishira ikwirakwira rya coronavirus". Yongeraho ati: "OMS yananiwe inshingano zayo z'ibanze kandi igomba kubibazwa". Mu gusubiza ku byari bimaze kuvugwa na Trump, Umunyamabanga mukuru w'Umuryango w'Abibumbye António Guterres yavuze ko "ubu atari cyo gihe" cyo guhagarikira inkunga OMS. Leta ya Amerika niyo muterankunga mukuru wa OMS, umwaka ushize yayihaye miliyoni $400, ari munsi gato ya 15% by'ingengo y'imari yose ikoresha. Mu mwaka w'imari wa 2018-2019, Ubushinwa bwahaye OMS inkunga ya miliyoni $76 nk'umusanzu wayo na miliyoni $10 nk'inkunga y'ubushake nk'uko biri mu makuru atangwa na OMS. Mu kwezi kwa gatatu OMS yatangaje ko ikeneye miliyoni $675 yo kurwanya iki cyorezo, ndetse birateganywa ko ishobora gusaba andi miliyari imwe y'amadorari. Bwana Trump yagize ati: "Mu gihe cy'iki cyorezo, twibajije cyane niba ubuntu bwa Amerika bwarakoreshejwe neza uko bishoboka". Leta zunze ubumwe za Amerika, ubu nicyo gihugu kibasiwe na Covid-19 kurusha ibindi ku isi aho abantu 608,377 bayanduye naho abagera ku 25,981 ikaba imaze kubahitana.

Akazi mu bitaro vya reta ntikakozwe Inkuru zitangwa n'ibimenyeshamakuru bitandukanye zivuga ko bishoboka ko abo bagwayi bikitse mu kiza mu gutoroka kuko abakozi bo kuri ivyo bitaro bahagaritse akazi. Igipolisi kiriko kirarondera abo bagwayi batorotse. Ikinyamakuru ca Nation kivuga ko abatorotse bashika 50 mu gihe The Standard co candika ko bashika ijana. Abaganga n'abaforoma bahagaritse akazi hose muri Kenya basaba reta kubariha amahera yemeye kubongera ku mishahara hamwe n'utundi turusho mu masezereno yashizweko umukono mu kwezi kwa gatandatu 2013. Uko kutumvikana vyagize ingaruka mbi ku bitaro vyose vya reta harimwo ibitaro vya Kenyetta na Moi mu gisagara ca Eldoret. Abakozi bakuru bakuru mu bushikiranganji bw'amagara y'abantu bagize inama yihuta ku musi w'Imana bagerageza guhagarika iyo yegereyegere ariko nta co bashitseko.

Fabien Neretse niwe wa mbere ahamijwe na sentare yo mu Bubirigi icaha ca jenoside yo mu Rwanda Bwana Neretse w'imyaka mirongo indwi n'umwe y'amavuko yafatiwe mu Bufaransa mu 2011. Mu kuburanywa kwiwe kwose ntiyigeze yemera ivyagiriji na bimwe mu vyashikirijwe vyose n'ubushinjacaha. Yahamwe kandi n'ivyaha vyo mu ntambara bijanye n'ubwicanyi bw'abantu cumi n'umwe mu gihe c'intambara mu Rwanda. Umwunganizi wa Bwana Neretse yavuze ko ku myaka yiwe, igihano yahawe ari nk'urupfu ruje buke buke Umwunganizi wa Bwana Neretse yabariye sentare ko umuntu w'umwere adashobora kwemera ivyaha. Yavuze kandi ko kubera imyaka yiwe, iki gihano yakatiwe gisa nk'urupfu ruje buke buke kandi rubi cane. Ububirigi buramaze guhamya abandi bantu umunani ivyaha vyo kwica vyakorewe mu gihugu bwahoze bukoronije, ariko Neretse niwe wa mbere ahamijwe jenoside.

Ikibazo c'ubwatsi bw'inka giteje ikibazo hagati ya Kenya na Tanzania Ashikiriza ijambo ari mu ntara ya Kagera ari mu rugendo rw'akazi, Magufuli yavuze ko Tanzaniya atari icibare co kuragiriramwo ibitungwa vy'ibihugu bibanyi, ko azofata ingingo zikomeye kubera ivyo bitungwa. Muri iyo nzira nyene, yasavye ibihugu bibanyi gufata ingingo nka mwenizo igihe ibitungwa vya Tanzaniya vyoba vyinjiye muri ivyo bihugu bidaciye mu mategeko. "Tanzaniya si icibare co kuragiriramwo ibitungwa vy'ibihugu bibanyi, nico gituma twafashe ingingo yo gufata ivyo bitungwa tukabifatira ingingo twisunze amategeko, nico kimwe n'igihe ibihugu bibanyi vyoba bifashe ibitungwa bivuye muri Tanzaniya, vyobifatira ingingo zishingiye ku mategeko y'ivyo bihugu", niko Magufuli yavuze ashimitse. Prezida wa Tanzania John Pombe Magufuli agabisha ibihubu bibanyi Ayo majambo ya Magufuli asohotse mu gihe hari ukutumvikana ku vyerekeye urubibe Tanzaniya isangiye na Kenya ku bijanye n'ibitungwa bikurikira ahari ivyibare. Mu ndwi zitatu ziheze, ubutegetsi bwa Tanzaniya bwarafashe inka zirenga 1000 zivuye muri Kenya, munyuma sentare yaho itegeka kw'izo nka zogurishwa icamunara amahera avuyemwo akaja mu bigega vya leta, igihe ba nyenezo batoba barishe amande y'imiliyoni 500 za Tanzaniya. Mu ndwi yahera naho, izindi nka 4000 zivuye muri Tanzaniya zafatiwe mu kigwati c'aba Maasai ahitwa Kajiado, hafi y'umugwa mukuru Nairobi. Mu minsi iheze naho ubutegetsi bwa Tanzaniya bwafashe ingingo yo guturira inkoko 6400 z'agaciro ka miliyoni 12 za Tanzaniya, ngo zikekwa ko zohava zikwiragiza ingwara y'akamangu, ivyo bikaba vyateye impari mu bigo biharanira agateka k'ibikoko.

Onu ivuga ko umwigeme umwe kw'icumi asiba ishure ari mu butinyanka muri Afrika Umushikiranganji ajejwe ikigega ca reta muri Tanzania Philip Mpango yashize ahabona ivyo kuri uyu wa gatanu, nka bimwe bigiye guhinduka ku mahera reta itegekanya gukoresha. Vyizewe ivanwaho ry'ibice 18% vy'amakori yahora ava kuri ivyo bikoresho vya nkenerwa vy'abapfasoni bari mu butinyanka bizotuma bashobora kubironka na cane cane abigeme. Akaruhuko k'umusi umwe kubari mu butinyanka kakweze impari muri Zambia Imihango y'umukobwa itangira ryari? Icegeranyo c'igisata ca Onu kijejwe inyigisho kivuga ko umukobwa umwe kw'icumi asiba ishure musi y'ubugaragwa bwa Sahara igihe aba ari mu butinyanka. Bivugwa ko bamwe mu bakobwa batakaza ibice 20 % mu kwiga kubera ivyo, bigashobora no kubatuma baheba ishure burundu.

Shinzo Abe yahamagaje amatora mu ntango y'ukwezi kw'icenda Shinzo Abe yahamagaje amatora rusangi kugira Ubuyapani buhangane n'ibibazo bibuhanze harimwo n'igihugu ca Korea ya ruguru. Ibimenyeshamakuru bivuga ko urunani rwa Abe rwatahukanye ibibanza bibiri vya gatatu mu nama nshingamateka. Ivyo rero biha akaryo Abe gusubiramwo ibwirizwa shingiro ry'inyuma y'ingwano ya kabiri y'isi yose. Umushikiranganji wa mbere yarateye akamo ko igisirikare cosubirwamwo, ingingo iteye impari avuga ko bikenewe ko umutekano w'igihugu ukwiye kwongerezwa. Inyuma y'ayo matora Abe yavuze:"Nk'uko navyemeye, intumbero yanje ikomeye n'uguhangana na Korea ya Ruguru." Ibimenyeshamakuru bivuga ko urunani rwa Abe rwatsinze ibice bibiri kuri bitatu vy'inama nshingamateka

Uyu nyakwigendera, Dolal Idd, w'imyaka 23 yari yiketswe ko yari mu makosa ariho yahagarikwa n'igiporisi ku wa gatatu. Ababibonye ubwa mbere hamwe n'igiporisi bavuga ko Idd ari we yatanguye kurasa, hanyuma abaporisi barivuna. Igisagara ca Minneapolis caramaze amezi atari make kirangwamwo imyiyerekano inyuma y'urupfu rwa Floyd ari mu gasho k'igiporisi. Iyi myiyerekano yarakwiragiye muri Reta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika yose aho abari muri yo biyamiriza ingene igiporisi kibakubagura. Floyd yapfuye inyuma y'aho anigiwe n'umuporisi yamupfukamye mw'izosi mu kiringo c'iminota icenda yose. Iyi reresi yerekana ubu bwicanyi bwabaye ku wa gatatu yagiye gushirwa ahabona mu masaha yo ku mugoroba wo ku wa kane, ikaba yafashwe na kamera yari yambawe n'umwe mu baporisi. Yerekana imodoka z'abaporisi zizibira imodoka yera kuri station y'igitoro, hafi y'ahapfiriye George Floyd. Imbere y'uko hatangura kuvuga amasasu harimwo ayarashwe n'aba baporisi, bumvikana baboroga ngo "hagarika imodoka yawe, shira amaboko hejuru, shira amaboko hejuru!" Umugore yari kumwe na Idd muri iyo modoka, co kimwe n'abo baporisi nyene, ntaco babaye, nk'uko bitangazwa n'igiporisi. Umukuru w'igiporisi i Minneapolis, Medaria Arradondo, avuga ko batoye inkoho aho ivyo vyabereye. Ati: "Maze kuraba iyi reresi iriko irazunguruka, yerekana ko uyu muntu yari muri yo ari we yarashe ubwa mbere abaporisi akoresheje inkoho yiwe". Bukeye bwaho, abantu, harimwo na se wa Idd, Bayle Gelle, baciye bakoranira ahabereye ubu bwicanyi, ivyatumye haba ubwoba ko hashobora kwaduka iyindi myiyerekano. Gelle yabwiye ikinyamakuru CBS News ati: "Yari yiyicariye mu modoka, hanyuma aca araswa amasasu, ataco bamuhora". "Kubera iki turi ng'aha?... N'ukubera ibara ry'urukoba rwacu. Ni umwirabure. Dukeneye kumenya igituma umuhungu wanje nakunda cane yarashwe akicwa". Urupfu rwa George Floyd rwatumye haduka imigmuko mu gisagara ca Minneapolis harimwo n'ibi biro vy'abaporisi vyaturiwe, hari mu kwa gatanu 2020 Umukuru w'igisagara, Jacob Frey, avuga ko yiyemeje gukurikirana ivyabaye kugira amenye ukuri hanyuma ubutungane bukore. Mw'itangazo yasohoye yavuze ati: "Turazi ko hari umuntu yatswe ubuzima kandi ko ukwizerana hagati y'abanyagihugu n'igiporisi kwatitutse". "Kugarukana uku kwizerana bizovana n'uko ibintu bigiye ahagaragara". Urupfu rwa George Floyd mu kwa gatanu rwatumye haba abasaba ko igisata c'igiporisi muri ico gisagara gisubirwamwo canke mbere kigafutwa, ariko ibi ntaho vyashitse.

Bamwe mu barwanyi ingabo za DR Congo zashyikirije iz'u Rwanda Aba barwanyi barimo abo mu mutwe wa CNRD/FDLR n'abo muri FLN nk'uko Major Jean Louis Tshimwang wo mu buvugizi bw'ingabo muri Kivu y'Epfo yabibwiye abanyamakuru. Aba barwanyi, bari kumwe n'abana 11, bashyikirijwe ingabo z'u Rwanda ku mupaka wa Rusizi ya mbere ejo kuwa mbere. General Major Alex Kagame uyobora ingabo z'u Rwanda mu ntara y'Iburengerazuba yabwiye abanyamakuru ko iki gikorwa kizaha amahoro abaturage b'ibihugu byombi. Yagize ati: "Turi gukorana, turi inshuti, ibihugu byacu bibanye neza kimwe n'ingabo zacu". Ephrem Kayumba uyobora Akarere ka Rusizi yabwiye BBC ko ataramenya amakuru y'abo barwanyi bagejejwe mu Rwanda, ko ayo azi ari ay'abazanywe mu minsi micye ishize. Ati: "Abaje ejo bundi ni imiryango yabo, ni abana n'abagore. Niba hari abaje uyu munsi [kuwa mbere] ntabwo ndabimenya". Mu ntangiriro z'uku kwezi, ingabo za DR Congo zatangaje ko zafashe abarwanyi 1,000 bo muri iyi mitwe irwanya ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda mu gace ka Kalehe muri Kivu y'Epfo. Icyo gihe Faustin Twagiramungu, umuvugizi w'impuzamashyaka MRCD itavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda ifite umutwe w'inyeshyamba muri Congo, yabwiye BBC ko ibyakozwe kandi bikomeje ari ubwicanyi ku mpunzi. Bwana Twagiramungu yavuze ko ingabo z'u Rwanda zifatanyije n'iza DR Congo zakoze ibitero ku mpunzi z'Abanyarwanda mu mpera z'ukwezi gushize. Umuvugizi w'ingabo za DR Congo muri Kivu y'Epfo Kapiteni Dieudonné Kasereka yabwiye BBC ko "ibikorwa bya gisirikare biri gukorwa hose mu burasirazuba bikorwa n'igisiriakre cya leta cyonyine". Yavuze ko mu mirwano y'ingabo n'inyeshyamba abaturage batatanye, bagafata inyeshyamba. Inyeshyamba z'Abarundi, Abanyarwanda n'Abanya-Uganda ziba mu burasirazuba bwa DR Congo zishinjwa ibikorwa byo guhungabanya umutekano mu karere. Ibikorwa byihariye byo kurwanya iyi mitwe y'abanyamahanga bimaze amezi abiri bitangijwe n'ingabo za DR Congo.

Mekelle, umurwa mukuru wa Tigray, ni umujyi utuwe n'abantu bagera hafi ku 500,000 Debretsion Gebremichael ukuriye Tigray People's Liberation Front (TPLF), yanavuze ko abarwanyi be bisubije undi mujyi. Leta ya Ethiopia ihakana ibyo avuga, igashimangira ko TPLF yatsinzwe. Amakuru avuga ko abantu babarirwa mu magana biciwe muri iyi mirwano imaze hafi ukwezi. Abantu babarirwa mu bihumbi bataye ingo zabo, mu gihe umuryango w'abibumbye (ONU/UN) n'imiryango itanga imfashanyo bavuga ko bahangayikishijwe n'imibereho y'abaturage b'abasivile. Ku wa mbere, Minisitiri w'intebe wa Ethiopia Abiy Ahmed yabwiye inteko ishingamategeko ko nta muturage n'umwe w'umusivile wishwe kuva ingabo za leta ya Ethiopia zagaba igitero kuri Tigray mu ntangiriro y'ukwezi kwa 11. Mu gihe imirongo yose ya telefone na internet yaciwe, ntibishoboka kugenzura mu buryo budafite aho bubogamiye ibivugwa na buri ruhande. Mu yandi makuru, TPLF yavuze ko yarekuye abasirikare ba Ethiopia barenga 4,000 yari yafashe bunyago kuva TPLF yagaba igitero ku kigo cya gisirikare mu ntangiriro y'ukwezi kwa 11. Icyo gitero cyabaye imbarutso y'igitero cy'ingabo za Ethiopia kuri Tigray. Umunyamabanga wa leta y'Amerika Mike Pompeo yahamagaye kuri telefone Bwana Abiy, amushishikariza guhagarika "imirwano no kugirana ibiganiro byubaka mu rwego rwo gucyemura amakuba". TPLF yavuze iki? Mu butumwa yandikiye ibiro ntaramakuru Reuters ku cyumweru, umukuru wa TPLF yavuze ko ingabo ze zahanuye indege y'intambara y'ingabo za Ethiopia ndetse zifata umupilote. Mu bundi butumwa bwo ku wa mbere, Bwana Debretsion yavuze ko TPLF iri "hafi kugera i Mekelle, irwana". Aho Debretsion Gebremichael n'abandi bakuru ba TPLF baherereye ntabwo hazwi Yanavuze ko TPLF yisubije umujyi wa Aksum (Axoum) iwambuye ingabo za leta ya Ethiopia.
