Ku wa mbere, Fisseha Asgedom wahoze ari ambasaderi wa Ethiopia muri ONU akaba afite aho ahuriye na TPLF, yabwiye BBC ko amakuru atangwa na leta ya Ethiopia ko ingabo zayo zirimo kwidegembya muri Tigray ari "urwenya". Yagize ati: "Leta y'i Addis Ababa [umurwa mukuru wa Ethiopia] yatangaje ko yafashe Mekelle nuko nyuma y'amasaha atandatu itangaje ibi itera ibisasu kuri Mekelle... Ni amakuru yo kuyobya. Kubera iki badashobora koherereza amahanga za videwo nke [z'ibyo bavuga]?" Leta ya Ethiopia ivuga iki? Ku wa gatandatu, Bwana Abiy yatangaje ko Mekelle yigaruriwe n'ingabo za leta ya Ethiopia, avuga ko icyo ari "icyiciro cya nyuma" cy'igitero cy'ingabo za leta kuri Tigray. Ku wa mbere, Abiy Ahmed yabwiye inteko ishingamategeko ikorera i Addis Ababa uko ibintu bihagaze Mu kiganiro na BBC ku wa mbere, Minisitiri wa Ethiopia ushinzwe ibikorwa bya demokarasi Zadig Abraha yahakanye ibivugwa na TPLF ko yafashe umujyi wa Aksum ndetse igahanura indege y'intambara y'ingabo za Ethiopia. Yanavuze ko TPLF "itarimo kurwana intambara y'ibitero-shuma [guerrilla]", ariko ko "barimo kwiruka bakiza ubuzima bwabo". Yongeyeho ati: "Abasirikare babo bo hasi batatanye. Buri wese arimo kumanika amaboko". Redwan Hussein, umutegetsi wo hejuru wa Ethiopia muri leta ya Tigray, yavuze ko ingabo za leta zigengesereye zirinda ko abaturage b'abasivile bagira aho bahurira n'igitero cyazo. Yavuze ko abasirikare "bagose gusa imijyi ubundi bakomereza mu yindi. Uko ni ko dukora kuburyo nta muturage upfira mu gitero cyacu kugeza ubwo twageze i Mekelle".

Abakandida; Ndayishimiye, Sindimwo, Ngendakumana, Nahimana, Rohero, Rwasa na Ndayizeye Uru ni urutonde rw'abakandida indwi bazokwitoza muri ayo matora y'umukuru w'igihugu, hamwe n'imigabo n'imigambi yabo. Ingene bakurikirana muri ino nkuru bijanye na nimero baronse mw'itombola yakozwe n'umugwi w'igihugu wigenga ujejwe amatora, CENI. Evariste Ndayishimiye azoserukira CNDD-FDD mu matora ni inde? Evariste Ndayishimiye Evariste Ndayishimiye ni umunyamabanga mukuru w'umugambwe uri ku butegetsi CNDD-FDD kuva mu kwezi kw'umunani 2016, aho uwo mugambwe usubiriyemwo itunganywa ryawo, asubirira Pascal Nyabenda yari umukuru wawo. Yavukiye muri komine Giheta y'intara ya Gitega mu mwaka wa 1968. Azwi nk'umwe mu bari intwazangabo zikomeye muri uwo mugambwe ucitwa umuhari, mu ntambara yadutse mu Burundi inyuma y'igandagurwa rya Perezida Melchior Ndadaye yari amaze amezi atatu ku butegetsi. Ndayishimiye ari mu bacitse kw'icumu mu bwicanyi bwakorewe abanyeshure b'Abahutu kuri kaminuza y'u Burundi mu kwa gatandatu 1995, bituma ahamvya abandi barwanyi b'umuhari, ico gihe wari ucitwa CNDD ishami ryawo rya gisirikare rikitwa FDD, urongowe na Leonard Nyangoma yawutanguje mu 1994. Uyo muhari, mu nyuma wagiye kwitwa CNDD-FDD, umaze kwinjira mu masezerano y'amahoro ya Arusha yo mu 2000 ugashira ibirwanisho hasi mu 2003, Jenerali Ndayishimiye yarakoze mu biro bikuru vya gisirikare, mu nyuma aragenwa nk'umushikiranganji w'intwaro yo hagati mu 2006-2007, imbere y'uko agenwa kuba umuhanuzi wa gisirikare mu biro vy'umukuru w'igihugu. Imigambi yiwe ishingiye ku bintu bikuru bikuru bikurikira: Imigambi yiwe nyamukuru ishimikiye ku gukomeza inzego z'umutekano no kwivuna abansi, gukomeza igisata c'ubutungane, intwaro ibereye, imibereho y'abanyagihugu, ibijanye n'amagara y'abantu, gutegekaniriza kazoza abenegihugu, indero, kurwanya ubushomeri, uburaro bwiza, ibidukikije, imico kama n'inkino. Imigambi y'ubutunzi ishingiye ku burimyi n'ubworozi, ubutare n'agataka, ubudandaji, ingenzi n'amahinguriro, hamwe no kwunguruza abantu n'ibintu. Evariste Ndayishimiye ategura kandi gukomeza imigenderanire no gufashanya n'amakungu, aho avuga ko ishingiye ku kwuzuzanya n'ugutsimbataza umwumvikano hagati y'u Burundi n'amakungu be n'amashirahamwe atandukanye. Gaston Sindimwo azoserukira UPRONA mu matora ni inde? Gaston Sindimwo Gaston Sindimwo ni icegera ca mbere c'umukuru w'igihugu kuva agenywe, hari ku wa 20 z'ukwa munani 2015 ku butegetsi bwa Petero Nkurunziza, inyuma y'amatora yateye amahane mu Burundi. Yavukiye muri karitiye Bwiza mu gisagara ca Bujumbura mu mwaka w'1965, akaba kandi ari umunyamabanga mukuru w'umugambwe w'abadasigana UPRONA, imbere y'aho akaba yari umunyamabanga w'icegera c'uwo mugambwe. Imigambi yiwe ishingiye ku bintu bikuru bikuru bikurikira: Mu vya politike, yemerera abarundi guteza imbere intwaro rusangi, kurwanya ibiturire, ashigikire ubwigenge bw'urwego rw'ubucamanza, yongere anagure ubucuti bw'u Burundi n'ayandi makungu. Yemerera Abarundi kandi gukomeza inzego z'umutekano. Mu vy'ubutunzi, imigambi yiwe ihagaze ku gusubiramwo intererano ihabwa amakomine, ku gutunganya gushasha ivy'amabanki cane cane ku bijanye n'ingurane, ashigikire uburimyi n'ubworozi, yubake amabarabara, gushigikira amahinguriro, kunagura igisata c'ingenzi, umuyagankuba, ubutare n'indero. Nayo ku bijanye n'imibano, akaranga n'imico, imigambi yiwe ihagaze ku kworohereza abarundi mu vyo ubuvuzi be no mu gushigikira imico n'akaranga k'u Burundi harimwo gusubiza iteka Ikirundi. Léonce Ngendakumana azoserukira Sahwanya FRODEBU mu matora ni inde? Léonce Ngendakumana Léonce Ngendakumana ni umunyapolitike wo mu mugambwe Sahwanya-Frodebu, umugambwe wa Perezida Melchior Ndadaye yagandaguwe mu 1993 haciye amezi atatu gusa ashikirijwe intwaro inyuma yo gutsinda amatora yo ku wa 01 z'ukwa gatandatu 1993. Léonce Ngendakumana yavukiye mu ntara ya Bujumbura mu mwaka wa 1954. Yatanguye ibikorwa vya politike akiri muto, akaba yabitanguriye mu muhari witwa BAMPERE washinzwe na Ndadaye mu Rwanda mu mwaka wa 1976. Mu nyuma yahavuye yinjira mu muhari w'abakozi witwa UBU washinzwe mu 1979. Bwana Ngendakumana ari mu batanguje umugambwe Sahwanya Frodebu mu 1986 mu mpisho. Mu matora yo mu kwa gatandatu 1993, yaratowe ngo abe mu bashingamateka ba Frodebu baserukira intara ya Bujumbura. Mu 1995, yabaye umukuru w'Inama Nshingamateka, mu bihe bitari vyoroshe na gato, gushika mu 2002. Mu matora yo mu 2005, Bwana Ngendakumana yarongeye aratorwa nk'umushingamateka w'umugambwe Frodebu n'aho watsinzwe n'umugambwe CNDD-FDD. Mu mwaka wa 2014, igihe yari arongoye urunani rw'imigambwe itavuga rumwe na leta rwari rwiswe ADC-Ikibiri yaraciriwe igihano co gupfungwa umwaka, yagirijwe gutyoza no gukwiza urwanko rufatiye ku moko inyuma y'ikete yandikiye mu kwezi kwa kabiri uwari umunyamabanga mukuru wa ONU ico gihe, Ban Ki Moon. Iryo kete yanditse kw'izina rya ADC-Ikibiri, Leonce Ngendakumana yagabisha ONU ko mu Burundi hashobora kuba ihonyabwoko kubera urwaruka rw'umugambwe CNDD-FDD yavuga ko rwariko ruhabwa ibigwanisho nayo iradiyo television yegereye uwo mugambwe Rema FM akayagiriza kwitwara nka RTLM yo mu Rwanda imbere y'uko ibara rigwa mu 1994. Léonce Ngendakumana, avuga ko ashaka kugarukira demokarasi, intwaro ibereye n'agateka ka zina muntu, gukingira Abarundi bose,Uburundi n'ababubamwo, aho avuga ko azogarukira igisata c'umutekano yisunze intumbero ya Melchior Ndadaye. Imigambi yiwe ishingiye ku bintu bikuru bikuru bikurikira: Avuga kandi ko azogarukira imigenderanire myiza hagati y'u Burundi n'amakungu mu gukuraho icuka kibi kihari, ko azorwanya ubushomeri n'ubukene. Avuga ko azokomeza igisata c'amagara y'abantu, indero y'abana n'abanyeshure hamwe n'agateka k'abarezi. Léonce Ngendakumana avuga kandi ko afise umugambi wo kugarukana abarundi bose bavyipfuza bahunze igihugu cabo, be no kugarukira agateka n'iterambere ry'abakenyezi. Agira ati: "Utora nabi ugatwarwa nabi, upfa uko utoye ugapfa uko utwawe, hanyuma watora neza ugatwarwa neza". Nahimana Dieudonné yitoza ku giti ciwe ni nde? Nahimana Dieudonné Nahimana Dieudonné yavukiye muri komine Gasorwe mu ntara ya Muyinga mu mwaka w'1974, akaba agiye guhiganirwa ikibanza c'umukuru w'igihugu ku giti ciwe. Mu vyo yaranguye, haciye imyaka 25 atanguje umuhari w'urwaruka rw'imboneza mw'ikanguro ryo mu mitima mu mico no mu mibereho, witwa NEW GENERATION. Yari awurongoye gushika mu mwaka w'2019. Ari mu batanguje kandi yahora arongoye Ihuriro ry'amashirahamwe y'urwaruka ruri mu bikorwa: Réseau des organisations des Jeunes en Action - REJA mu majambo ahinahinye. Yatanguje igikorwa cigisha ivy'uburongozi kigashigikira imigambi ifise intumbero yo kwigisha uburongozi nkorerabandi citwa Dieudonne Nahimana Foundation - DNF. Nahimana Dieudonné Yaronse ubushimwe butari buke, harimwo: Imigambi yiwe nk'umukandida azokwitoza ku giti ciwe ishingiye ku: Bimwe mu vyamutumye ashaka kwitoza nk'uwigenga, avuga ko ababazwa n'amacabubiri, ka mwana wa mama, igiturire no kwikunda avuga ko vyagiye vyibonekeza ku barongozi, bikaba vyarazingamitse igihugu. Avuga ko ashaka guha ikibanza ca mbere urwaruka. Ibindi ashira imbere ni: Francis Rohero azokwitoza ku rwego rw'umukuru w'igihugu nk'uwigenga ni inde? Francis Rohero Francis rohero yavutse ku wa 16 z'ukwa mbere mu mwaka wa 1972, avukira muri Zone Rohero, karitiye Rohero iri mu gisagaraca Bujumbura, abavyeyi biwe bose bakaba bamuka muri komine Bugendana y'intaraya Gitega. Francis Rohero yavutse ari umwe mu muryango. Abavyeyi biwe Rohero Majoric, hamwe na Rohero Hélène Ntawuyankira, bubakanye ku wa 19 z'ukwa 11 mu 1970, maze bibaruka umwana wa mbere, Francis, kuwa 16/01/1972. Haciye amezi ane gusa, se wiwe, ico gihe yari icegera c'umukuru w'igisata c'ingenzi, yaragandaguwe muri bwa bwicanyi bwo mu 1972, gutyo arerwa na nyina wiwe ari we mwana w'ikinege. Francis Rohero yagiye guhereza amashure yisumbuye kw'iseminari y'i Buta i Bururi, mu nyuma yinjira iseminari nkuru ya Burasira hanyuma iya Bujumbura, imbere y'uko yinjira kuri kaminuza y'u Burundi, nayo nyene yahavuye ahunga atarangije mu 1997 kubera indwano. Yahungiye muri Kameruni, akaba ariho yagiye kurangiriza ivyigwa vya kaminuza. Avuga yuko nyina wiwe yamureze amwigisha kwirinda igikenye, inyigisho yamye agendera no kuva kw'ishure i Buta, mu gihe igihugu cose carangwamwo amacakubiri hagati y'Abahutu n'Abatutsi. Avuga ko yigiye cane ku bantu karuhariwe muri kahise mu bijanye no kwirinda igikenye, nka Gandhi, Martin Luther King n'abandi, cane cane Yezu Kristu. Amaze guhunguka, Francis Rohero arazwi cane mu biganiro yakunda gushikiriza ku maradiyo yerekana ingene ibintu bikwiye kugenda ku neza y'u Burundi n'Abarundi, rimwe na rimwe ntibamutahure, ari naco catumye aruhira gutanga imihoho akava muri CNDD-FDD mu 2006 Inyuma y'aho niho yatanguje ico yise "Mouvement Orange" nk'inzira yoza aracishamwo ivyiyumviro vyiwe. Ivyiyumviro vyiwe vyatumye mu kwa cumi na rimwe 2018 apfungwa, aho yamaze indwi yose mu gasho, ariko agahava apfungurwa igipolisi kimaze kubona ko ata kabi kiwe. Imigambi yiwe nk'umukandida azokwitoza ku giti ciwe ishingiye ku: Mu kwezi kw'icumi 2019, niho yamenyesha ko ashaka kwitoza kuba umukuru w'igihugu, imigambi yiwe nyamukuru ikaba ihagaze ku gukomeza intwaro ibereye abicishije mu gutunganya gushasha ubutegetsi, gukomeza inzego z'umutekano no kuzironsa ivyo zikeneye, gutunganya igisata c'ubutungane, kworohereza ibinyamakuru kugira ngo bakore mu mwidegemvyo, aho avuga ko azokuraho amategeko yose abuza abamenyeshamakuru gukora bisanzuye. Avuga kandi ko ashaka gukomeza imigenderanire myiza y'u Burundi n'amakungu, gutunganya gushasha amategeko, aho avuga ko azonahindura ibwirizwashingiro kugira ngo hajeho iryubahiriza bose. Afise kandi n'imigambi ijanye no kurwiza umwimbu no gukomeza ubutunzi bw'igihugu (ikigega, uburimyi n'ubworozi, ubudandaji n'ibindi), gukomeza imico kama, indero, amagara y'abantu... hamwe kandi n'ibijanye no gutumatumanako n'ukwiyunguruza, n'ibindi. Agathon Rwasa azoserukira CNL mu matora ni inde? Agathon Rwasa Agathon Rwasa arongoye umugambwe Congrès National de Liberté, CNL, inyuma y'igihe kitari gito yatswe uburongozi bw'umugambwe FNL. Yavukiye muri komine Kiremba y'intara ya Ngozi mu mwaka wa1964. Mu 1988 biturutse ku bwicanyi bwa Ntega na Marangara, yararokotse ahungira mw'ikambi ya Kirwa iri mu ntara ya Tabora muri Tanzania, ari naho yinjiriye mu muhari PALIPEHUTU wari washinzwe na Rémy Gahutu mu 1980, uja guhinduka PALIPEHUTU-FNL mu mahinduka yabaye muri uwo muhari mu 2001, amahinduka yatumye awurongora asubiriye uwari umukuru wawo, Cossan Kabura. Agathon Rwasa mu nyuma yinjiye mw'ishami rya gisirikare rya FNL ryegukira PALIPEHUTU, ari naho yahavuye aja ku rugamba rwashirwa imbere na PALIPEHUTU. Inyuma y'aho atahiye mu gihugu mu 2008 inyuma y'ibiganiro na PALIPEHUTU-FNL, Agathon Rwasa yarongoye umugambwe FNL kuva mu 2009 gushika mu 2010 inyuma y'aho umuhari PALIPEHUTU-FNL uhinduriye izina kugira ngo wisunge amategeko y'u Burundi abuza imigambwe ishingiye kw'ivangura. Muri ico gihe yahawe kurongora ishirahamwe INSS ryo kuziganiriza kazoza abakozi. Inyuma y'amatora yabaye mu 2010 Agathon Rwasa yarahunze yagiriza leta ko yashaka kumugandagura kubera yiyamirije ivyari bihejeje kuva muri ayo matora, ariko yakwa uburongozi bw'uwo mugambwe mu buryo burimwo igipfungu, uhabwa Jacques Bigirimana, uwo mugambwe muri kino gihe ukaba ari pfa mpfe na CNDD-FDD. Amaze kugaruka mu gihugu mu 2013, Agathon Rwasa yinjiye mu nama nshingamateka mu matora yo mu 2015 yaranzwe n'ukutumvikana gukomeye biturutse ku ngingo ya CNDD-FDD yo gushira imbere Petero Nkurunziza ngo yitoze mu kiringo kigira gatatu abatavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi bavuga ko cari giteye kubiri n'amategeko. N'aho urunani Amizero y'Abarundi rwari ruhurikiyemwo abigenga rutagiye muri ayo matora, Agathon Rwasa n'abiwe bafashe ingingo yo kwinjira mu nama nshingamateka. Inyuma y'ugukwegana amashati hagati y'ubushikiranganji bw'intaro yo hagati nawe ku kibazo c'ugushinga umugambwe, ku wa 14 z'ukwa kabiri 2019 umugambwe wiwe CNL wahavuye wemererwa gukorera ku mugaragaro, akaba ari nawe yagenywe ngo azowuserukire mu matora y'umukuru. Imigambi yiwe ishingiye ku bintu bikuru bikuru bikurikira: Imigambi ashira imbere ishingiye ku guteza imbere uburimyi n'ubworozi, kunagura indero mu mashure yaba matomato, ayisumbiye na kaminuza, aho nk'akarorero avuga ko azogarukana uburaro mu mashure yisumbuye. Agathon Rwasa kandi ashira imbere ukunagura ibisata vy'ubuvuzi n'amagara y'abantu, gutunganya ibisagara n'uburaro, amasoko ntanganguvu, ubutare n'agataka, kwiyunguruza no kwunguruza abantu n'ibintu, intwaro ibereye, imigenderanire, ubutunzi, ibidukikije, be no kwitaho no gukomeza inzego z'umutekano. Domitien Ndayizeye azoserukira urunani Kira-Burundi mu matora ni inde? Domitien Ndayizeye Domitien Ndayizeye niwe arongoye urunani KIRA BURUNDI akaba ari nawe azokwitoza mu kibanza c'umukuru w'igihugu kw'izina ry'urwo runani. Yavukiye muri komine n'intara ya Kayanza mu mwaka wa 1953. Mu buzima bwa politike Domotien Ndayizeye yarabaye mu muhari MEPROBA washinzwe inyuma y'ubwicanyi bwa 1972, aho yari mu buhungiro mu gihugu c'u Rwanda, azezwa amabanga atandukanye. Mu nyuma yahavuye yinjira mu mugambwe Sahwanya Frodebu mu 1992. Amaze guhunguka, mu kw'icenda 1993, Bwana Ndayizeye yarajejwe amabanga atandukanye haba mu mugambwe Frodebu canke mu butegetsi bw'igihugu. Mu gihe u Burundi bwari mu ntambara yadutse inyuma y'aho umugwi w'abasirikare ico gihe ugandaguriye umukuru w'igihugu Melchior Ndadaye, Bwana Ndayizeye yarapfunzwe incuro zibiri. Ubwa mbere, yapfunzwe kuva mu kwa kabiri 1995 aza kurekurwa mu kwa gatatu 1996, yagirijwe ko yari yifananije n'umuhari CNDD warwanya ubutegetsi. Yasubiye gupfungwa mu kwa kabiri aho yamaze indwi imwe mu gasho k'igipolisi kijejwe umutekano mu gihugu (police de Sécurité Publique, PSP), yagirizwa guhungabanya umutekano w'igihugu, bitumwe n'uko umugambwe Frodebu wiyamirije itembagazwa ry'ubutegetsi bwa Sylvestre Ntibantunganya ryakozwe na Petero Buyoya ku wa 25 z'ukw'indwi 1996. Domitien Ndayizeye yaragize uruhara mu biganiro vy'amahoro vyatanguye mu 1998 birangira mu 2000. Ivyo biganiro ni vyo vyatumye aronswa amabanga y'ukurongora igihugu mu buryo bw'imfatakibanza, aho yabaye icegera c'umukuru w'igihugu kuva 01/11/2001 gushika ku wa 30/04/2003. Uwo munsi nyene niho yaca arahira kuba umukuru w'igihugu, amabanga yaranguye gushika ku wa 26 z'ukwa munani 2005. Hagati aho, inyuma y'ukugira uruhara mw'ishirwa mu ngiro ry'amasezerano hagati ya leta n'umuhari CNDD-FDD, harimwo n'iyinjizwa ry'abarwanyi bawo mu nzego z'umutekano w'igihugu, ubutegetsi bwa CNDD-FDD bwaramupfunze kuva kuwa 21/08/2006 gushika ku wa 17/01/2007, aho we n'abo bari bapfunganywe bagirijwe ko bari bateguye gutembagaza ubutegetsi. Imigambi yiwe ishingiye ku bintu bikuru bikuru bikurikira: Mu migambi yiwe, Domitien Ndayizeye mu vyerekeye ubutunzi n'iterambere ategura guteza imbere uburimyi n'ubworozi, guhimiriza urwaruka kwijukira gukora utwabo mu bisata bitandukanye, gusubiramwo itunganywa ry'amakori, guteza imbere ibisagara bitobito, kurwiza amasoko ntanganguvu n'ibindi. Nayo mu vyerekeye imibano, Domitien Ndayizeye ategura gusubiramwo inyigisho, ibijanye n'imishahara, kurwiza ubuzi, gusubiramwo ivyo ubuvuzi n'ibindi. Mu bijanye na politike, Domitien Ndayizeye ategura gusasagaza intwaro ibereye, guhagararira ubutungane bubereye, gukomeza ubuhinga bw'inzego z'umutekano, no kunagura imigenderanire.

Maradona yari umwe mu bakinyi b'umupira w'amaguru bakomeye isi imaze kubona Uyu yahoze ari rutahizamu wo hagati wa Argentine akanaba umumenyereza, yarabazwe ubwonko kandi bigenda neza, igihe yagira ikibumbe c'amaraso mu bwonko mu ntango za kuno kwezi kwa cumi na rimwe. Vyaciye bitangazwa ko azovurwa ku kibazo yari afise co kwihebera inzoga. Maradona yari umwe mu bakinyi bakomeye isi imaze kubona, akaba yarabaye kapitene wa Argentine igihe yatwara igikombe co mu 1986, akina ku buryo buteye igomwe kandi bucibukwa n'ubu. Mu rwandiko rwashizwe ku mbuga hwaniro, ishirahamwe ry'umupira w'amaguru muri Argentine ryavuze ko "tubabajwe cane n'urupfu rwa rurangiranwa wacu", ryongerako riti: "Uzokwama mu mitima yacu." Maradona yakiniye Barcelona na Napoli mu gukinira amakipe kwiwe, atwara ibikombe vya Serie A mu Butariyano. Yinjije ibitsindo 34 mu nkino 91 za Argentine, ayiserukira mi bikombe vy'isi bine. Maradona yaranakoze akazi ko kumenyereza amakipe y'umupira w'amaguru Maradona yashikanye igihugu ciwe mu rukino rwa nyuma mu gikombe c'isi co mu Butaliyano mu 1990, igihe batsindwa n'Ubudage bw'Uburengero, imbere y'uko asubira kuba kapitene mu gikombe c'isi muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika mu 1994, ariko aza gusubizwa muhira kubera gufata imiti yongera inguvu. Mu muce wa kabiri w'ugukina kwiwe, Maradona vyaramugoye kwihanganira ikiyovyabwenge ca cocaine aranahagarikwa gukina amezi 15 nyuma yo gusanganwa mu maraso ico kiyovyabwenge mu 1991. Yagiye mu bukukuruke mu mupira w'amaguru mu 1997, ku munsi yakwiza imyaka 37 y'amavuko, mu kiringo ca kabiri akinira ikipe ikomeye yo muri Argentine, Boca Juniors. Uyu yahoze ari rutahizamu wo hagati wa Argentine akanaba umumenyereza yarabazwe ubwonko kandi bigenda neza Nyuma yo kumenyereza igihe gito amakipe abiri muri Argentine igihe yari agikina, Maradona yagenywe kuba umumenyereza w'ikipe y'igihugu mu 2008 aca ava muri ako kazi nyuma y'gikombe c'isi co mu 2010, igihe ikipe yiwe yatsindwa n'Ubudage mu ca kane c'ihiganwa. Mu nyuma yaje kumenyereza amakipe muri United Arab Emirates na Mexique, anamenyereza Gimnasia y Esgrima, ikipe ikomeye cane muri Argentine, gushika ku gihe c'urupfu rwiwe.

Bangladesh ifise ikibazo co gufasha impunzi nyinshi zihunga intambara muri Myanmar Ivyo kurya, amazi hamwe n'imiti biriko birakeha cane mu gihe impunzi zibandanya gushika. Zihunga ubwicanyi buri mu gihugu ca Myanmar, nyuma y'ibikorwa vya gisirikare vyo guhiga abarwanyi bimaze guhitana abantu amajana, ibigwati navyo bikaba vyaraturiwe. Leta ya Myanmar yanse icifuzo co guhagarika imirwano cashikirijwe n'umugwi w'abarwanyi n'Abaislam bo mu bwoko bwa Rohingya. Umugwi Arakan Rohingya Salvation Army watangaje ko uhagaritse ibikorwa vya gisirikare ikiringo c'ukwezi kumwe kugira imfashanyo ishobore gushikira abayikeneye.

Igice cy'iyo videwo, BBC yahisemo gushyiramo igihu, kigaragaza bamwe mu bitabiriye umuhango w'irahira basezeranya kurwanya "abanzi" b'u Rwanda Abo banenga leta y'u Rwanda bavuga ko ari nka "Koreya ya ruguru" yindi. Bamwe mu Banyarwanda baba mu mahanga babwiye BBC ko imihango nk'uwo wabereye i London ugaragazwa n'iyo videwo, imenyerewe cyane kandi ko iba igamije kubibamo ubwoba no guhatira kubaha ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda. Umugabo umwe yavuze ko benewabo (abo mu muryango we) bari mu Rwanda bashimuswe ndetse ko bishoboka ko bishwe, nk'uburyo bwo kumuhana kuko yanze gukorana na leta y'u Rwanda. Abategetsi b'u Rwanda bahakanye ibi birego bavuga ko atari ukuri kandi ko nta gihamya bifite. Muri iyo videwo, yahererekanyijwe vuba aha kuri WhatsApp, abantu barenga 30 bagaragara bahagaze mu cyumba cy'inama cyakubise kikuzura cyo muri ambasade y'u Rwanda mu Bwongereza. Bamanitse ukuboko kw'iburyo, baba basubiramo amagambo y'ubarahiza ko bemeye kuyoboka ishyaka FPR riri ku butegetsi. Basubiramo mu Kinyarwanda bati: "Nindamuka mpemutse [cyangwa] nkoze ibinyuranye n'imigabo, imigambi, amategeko bigenga FPR Inkotanyi, nzaba mpemukiye buri Munyarwanda, nzabambwe nk'umugome wese", bakanasezeranya kurwanya "abanzi b'u Rwanda, aho bazaba bari hose". Kuba ishyaka FPR rikoresha iyo nyubako ya ambasade y'u Rwanda - iri hafi ya 'station' ya gariyamoshi ya Marylebone i London - mu ndahiro bigaragara ko ari iy'ubuyoboke bwa politike, nabyo ubwabyo biteye kwibaza. 'Baterwa ubwoba' Ariko, nubwo bamwe mu bitabiriye uwo muhango - byumvikana ko wabaye mu mwaka wa 2017 - bashobora kuba ari abayoboke b'ishyaka riri ku butegetsi babihisemo ku bushake, ubu baba mu mahanga, abandi babwiye BBC ko hari benshi bawitabiriye ku gahato. Umuntu umwe - nkuko iperereza ryacu ryabitahuye - wari uri muri uwo muhango, ariko wadusabye kudatangaza izina rye kubera ubwoba ko yagirirwa nabi, yagize ati: "Ndabizi neza ko benshi mu bantu barimo barahira babikoze batabyemera. Twarimo kubeshya kugira ngo twirengere twe n'imiryango yacu yasigaye mu Rwanda". David Himbara, wahoze ari umujyanama mukuru wa Perezida Paul Kagame w'u Rwanda, yagize ati: "Ibi ni byo biba ahandi hantu hose. Byabaye akamenyero. Uhitamo kubikora [kurahira] cyangwa kwitwa umwanzi. Uba kimwe cyangwa ikindi". Afite ubwenegihugu bwa Canada, akaba ari umwarimu wa kaminuza n'impirimbanyi iharanira uburenganzira bwa muntu, avuga ko ubuzima bwe bwakomeje kugenda bushyirwa mu kaga n'inzego z'umutekano z'u Rwanda. René Mugenzi, Umunyarwanda ufite ubwenegihugu bw'Ubwongereza w'impirimbanyi y'uburenganzira bwa muntu uherutse guhamywa n'inkiko mu Bwongereza kwiba agafungwa, yagize ati: "Benshi bajyayo kuko batewe ubwoba. Batekereza ko nibatajyayo, hari ikizaba ku muryango wabo [mu Rwanda]". Ati: "Ugomba kubamo [muri FPR]. Niyo waba ntaho ubogamiye... bacyeka ko ushyigikiye imitwe itavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi". Ibajijwe kuri uwo muhango w'"indahiro", ambasade y'u Rwanda mu Bwongereza yasubije, kuri email, ivuga ko ababa mu mahanga bakoresha icyumba cyayo cy'inama mu bikorwa bitandukanye bijyanye n'umuco kandi ko kwitabira kurahirira ubuyoboke bwa FPR byemewe n'amategeko ndetse "byose babikora ku mahitamo yabo ubwabo kandi nta n'umwe ubihatirwa". 'Abavandimwe banjye barashimuswe' Ariko, BBC yumvise amakuru y'ibimenyetso bishya byuko leta y'u Rwanda usibye no gushaka gukanga ababa mu mahanga babonwa nkaho batayiyobotse, ahubwo inashaka guhana abantu nk'abo yibasira benewabo basigaye mu Rwanda. Amafoto yatanzwe n'umuryango ya Jean Nsengimana (ibumoso) na Antoine Zihabamwe (iburyo), bamaze umwaka urenga baraburiwe irengero Noël Zihabamwe, utuye muri Australia, n'imbamutima yabajije ati: "Mu rwego rwo kuntera ubwoba, bashimuse abavandimwe banjye babiri. Nta na rimwe bari barigeze bajya muri politike. Bari bari ku butaka bw'u Rwanda. Kubera iki bibaviramo ingaruka nk'iyo ikomeye kandi nta kintu na kimwe bakoze?" Bwana Zihabamwe ni umuntu ukomeye mu Banyarwanda baba mu mujyi wa Sydney, yageze muri icyo gihugu nk'impunzi mu 2006, ashaka guhunga icyo yabonaga ko ari urubuga rwa politike rurushaho kurangwa no kunigana ijambo abatavuga rumwe na leta no kubakandamiza. Avuga ko kuba yaranze gushyigikira leta y'u Rwanda itegekwa na FPR byahise bituma umudipolomate w'u Rwanda wari wasuye icyo gihugu yahungiyemo amukangisha ku mugaragaro ko azicwa, hari mu mpera y'umwaka wa 2017, icyo gihe abimenyesha abategetsi ba Australia. Ibyo byakurikiwe n'icyo avuga ko ari ishimutwa ry'abavandimwe be babiri, Jean Nsengimana na Antoine Zihabamwe, amakuru avuga ko bafashwe n'abapolisi babasohoye mu modoka ya bisi hafi y'iwabo i Karangazi mu kwezi kwa cyenda mu 2019, kugeza ubu bakaba batarongera kuboneka. Bwana Zihabamwe yagize ati: "Akenshi bakoresha ubu buryo bwo gushimuta cyangwa kwica abo mu muryango. Ibi bigomba guhagarara. Tumaze kubirambirwa". Bwana Zihabamwe, ubu wibwira ko abavandimwe be bishoboka ko bapfuye akaba yahisemo kubivuga ku mugaragaro, nubwo yemeza ko bishobora kumugiraho ingaruka zikomeye n'abandi bo mu muryango we, yongeyeho ati: "Turifuza kubona leta y'u Rwanda isubizaho uburenganzira bwemewe muri demokarasi ku baturage bose, ikareka ubwicanyi bugambiriye [abantu], gushimuta, guta muri yombi binyuranyije n'amategeko ndetse n'ibikorwa byo gutera ubwoba abahoze ari abaturage bayo, nkanjye, barimo kuba mu mahanga". "Kuki badashobora kumenyesha umuryango aho imirambo yabo iri, kugira ngo dushobore kubashyingura? Hari Abanyarwanda benshi bari hanze batakaje cyangwa babuze ababo bakunda". Yabwiye BBC ati: "Ndashaka kuvuga namagana akarengane. Ducyeneye ubuyobozi bushobora kuvuganira buri wese, atari gusa [abantu] bamwe". 'Nta shingiro ry'ibirego' Ambasade y'u Rwanda i London yahakanye ibirego bya Bwana Zihabamwe ivuga ko ari ibintu bitari ukuri "binaniwe kandi byongeye gukoreshwa" ndetse ko ari "amayeri aciriritse y'abanenga politike baba bashaka gusa kubona uko bavugwa mu bitangazamakuru". Ariko ibirego nk'ibi bifatwa nk'ibirimo ukuri n'abashakashatsi benshi, imiryango iharanira uburenganzira bwa muntu ndetse n'abadipolomate bahagarariye ibihugu by'amahanga, bavuga ko abategetsi b'u Rwanda bagaragara nk'abakoze imibare ko - nubwo bituma banengwa na leta zimwe z'ibihugu by'i Burayi n'Amerika - ibyo bikorwa, birimo n'ubwicanyi bwinshi bugambiriwe bwakorewe hanze y'igihugu, nta na rimwe bigaragara ko byakwangiza umubano w'u Rwanda n'amahanga mu buryo burambye. Leta y'u Rwanda yashimagijwe henshi mu mahanga ndetse ihabwa inkunga y'amafaranga, mu myaka ibarirwa mu macumi ishize, kubera gahunda yayo itanga umusaruro cyane, yayifashije kurwanya ubukene ndetse igatuma u Rwanda ruba mu bihugu bifite ubukungu bumeze neza kuri uyu mugabane. Umuntu umwe, wasabye ko tutamuvuga izina kugira ngo ashobore kutuvugisha yisanzuye, yagize ati: "Uko babyumva ni - dushobora gukora icyo dushaka, kwica uwo dushaka". Ibya Paul Rusesabagina, washimwe mu mahanga - inkuru ye yakozwemo filime y'i Hollywood yiswe 'Hotel Rwanda' - kubera gucumbikira akarokora abantu muri hoteli muri Jenoside yo mu Rwanda mu 1994, byatumye u Rwanda runengwa mu mahanga uyu mwaka nyuma yuko afashwe akajyanwa mu Rwanda mu buryo butavugwaho rumwe, akaregwa ibyaha by'iterabwoba. Urupfu, rwabaye mu ntangiriro y'uyu mwaka, muri kasho ya polisi, rwa Kizito Mihigo, umuhanzi w'indirimbo za 'gospel' (n'iz'ubumwe n'ubwiyunge), narwo rwateje uburakari bwinshi. Umuhanzi Kizito Mihigo, wari ufite imyaka 38, yasanzwe muri kasho ya polisi yapfuye, mu ntangiriro y'uyu mwaka Kizito, izina benshi bari bamuziho, yari yagerageje kwambuka umupaka w'u Rwanda mu buryo bunyuranyije n'amategeko, nkuko abategetsi babivuze. Bavuze ko yiyishe - ibintu bihakanwa na benshi baba hanze y'u Rwanda ndetse n'abasesenguzi benshi. Sarah Jackson, umuyobozi mukuru wungirije w'umuryango uharanira uburenganzira bwa muntu Amnesty International mu karere k'uburasirazuba bw'Afurika, yagize ati: "Niba uri Umunyarwanda, bivuze ko biba birimo umutekano kurushaho kwicecekera". "Abategetsi b'u Rwanda bafite amayeri menshi bakoresha mu kuburizamo ababanenga mu gihugu no hanze, uhereye ku gutera ubwoba no gufunga mu buryo bunyuranyije n'amategeko, kuburirwa irengero, iyicarubozo, ndetse no gutahukana mu Rwanda abatavuga rumwe na leta bavanywe mu bindi bihugu hadakurikijwe uburyo bwemewe bwo guhererekanya abacyekwaho ibyaha... ndetse no gutera ubwoba n'abo mu muryango". Ambasade y'u Rwanda i London yavuze ko ibirego nk'ibyo nta shingiro bifite, kandi ko bikwirakwizwa n'abantu "mbarwa batavuga rumwe na leta... mu rwego rwo guhindanya isura n'urugendo rukomeje rw'iterambere ry'u Rwanda". 'Igitugu' Mu matora yo mu mwaka wa 2017, Perezida Kagame yatowe n'amajwi agera hafi ku 99%. I London, Abdul Karim Ali, umutegetsi wo mu ishyaka 'Rwanda National Congress' (RNC) ritavuga rumwe na leta y'u Rwanda, yagize ati: "Uhitamo kuyoboka FPR cyangwa... ugahinduka umwanzi wa leta. Ubusanzwe tuyigereranya na Koreya ya ruguru". Muri Canada, Bwana Himbara avuga ko ingengabitekerezo ya leta y'u Rwand ari iy'"igitugu - guverinoma ishaka kugenzura ibintu byose by'Abanyarwanda, niyo haba ari hanze y'igihugu". Ambasade y'u Rwanda i London yavuze ko ikintu cy'ingenzi leta irimo kwibandaho ari ugukura Abanyarwanda mu bukene no gushyiraho ubuzima n'amahirwe kuri bose. Yagize iti: "Icyo ambasade yibandaho si abantu mbarwa batavuga rumwe na leta bahora iteka bakwiza amakuru y'ibinyoma mu rwego rwo guhindanya isura n'urugendo rukomeje rw'iterambere ry'u Rwanda".

Moto kuri ubu ntizemerewe gutwara abagenzi kubera kwirinda ikwirakwira ry'ubwandu bwa coronavirus Moto ya Hussein Walugembe yafashwe ku wa mbere mu karere ka Masaka kari mu majyepfo ashyira uburengerazuba bw'igihugu, kuri kilometero hafi 134 uvuye mu murwa mukuru Kampala. Bijyanye n'ingamba zo kurwanya ikwirakwira ry'ubwandu bwa coronavirus, leta ya Uganda yabujije za moto - zizwi cyane hano ku izina rya 'boda boda' - gutwara abagenzi. Ubu zemerewe gukora hagati ya saa kumi n'ebyiri n'iminota 30 za mu gitondo na saa kumi n'imwe z'umugoroba, kandi zigomba gutwara imizigo gusa. Polisi ya Uganda ivuga ko Bwana Walugembe yari yatije moto inshuti ye, ikaza gufatwa iyitwayeho umugenzi ku wa mbere w'iki cyumweru. Amakuru avuga ko Bwana Walugembe yagezeho arakarira polisi nyuma yo kujya ku biro byayo inshuro nyinshi asaba ko moto ye irekurwa. Ejo ku wa kane, yifungiranye mu cyumba cyo ku biro bya polisi, nuko aritwika akoresheje imyambi yo mu kibiriti na 'essence' yahishe mu icupa ry'amazi. Abapolisi bo kuri ibyo biro bagerageje kuzimya uwo muriro bakoresheje amajerikani y'amazi. 'Kwakwa ruswa' Umupolisi wari uri kumwe na we yarakomeretse byoroheje ndetse impapuro nyinshi na za mudasobwa birashya. Bamwe mu bamotari babwiye ibitangazamakuru byo muri Uganda ko abapolisi barimo baka mugenzi wabo ruswa ingana n'amadolari 40 y'Amerika (ni agera hafi ku 40,000 mu mafaranga y'u Rwanda) ngo babone kurekura moto ye. Nyuma y'uko kwitwika, Paul Kangave, umukuru wa polisi muri ako karere, yavuze ko iperereza ryatangiye ku bapolisi bose bakora mu muhanda. Yavuze ko itsinda rya polisi ryita ku myitwarire ya kinyamwuga rizagenzura ibirego byuko abapolisi baka ruswa ku binyabiziga byafashwe byarenze ku ngamba zo kurwanya coronavirus. Gutwara abagenzi kuri moto ni kimwe mu bikorwa by'ingenzi bibeshejeho urubyiruko rubarirwa mu bihumbi muri Uganda, benshi muri bo kuri ubu batagikora. Mu kwezi kwa gatanu, leta ya Uganda yatangiye kudohora ingamba zo kurwanya coronavirus, ariko igumishaho izijyanye na za moto. Mu mpera y'ukwezi gushize kwa gatandatu, Perezida Yoweri Museveni yavuze ko moto zishobora kurushaho gukwirakwiza coronavirus ziramutse zemerewe gutwara abagenzi muri iki gihe. Kugeza ubu, muri Uganda hamaze kwemezwa abantu 911 banduye coronavirus, muri bo 849 barayikize ndetse nta muntu n'umwe irica, nkuko imibare ya Kaminuza ya Johns Hopkins yo muri Amerika ibigaragaza. Benshi muri abo banduye batangajwe ko ari abashoferi b'amakamyo bakora ingendo ndende ndetse n'abagiye bahura na bo.

Jenerali Nyamvumba wari umugaba w'ingabo na Vincent Biruta washinzwe ububanyi n'amahanga Imwe mu mpinduka zikomeye ni aho Jean Bosco Kazura yavanywe ku buyobozi bw'ishuri rya gisirikare rya Musanze akazamurwa ku ipeti rya Jenerali w'inyenyeri enye akanagirwa umugaba w'ingabo z'u Rwanda. Jenerali Kazura - wari usanzwe ku ipeti rya Jenerali Majoro - uyu mwanya awusimbuyeho Jenerali Patrick Nyamvumba wari uwuriho kuva mu 2013. Mu buryo butunguranye, Jenerali Patrick Nyamvumba yajyanywe muri guverinoma, ashingwa minisiteri ubu yitwa minisiteri y'umutekano mu gihugu, minisiteri iherukaho ku gihe cya Musa Fazil Harerimana. Mu ngabo kandi Jenerali Fred Ibingira wari wasimbuwe umwaka ushize ku mwanya w'umugaba w'ingabo z'inkeragutabara yawusubijweho, asimbura uwari wamusimbuye Lieutenant General Jacques Musemakweli. Lt Gen Musemakweli yagizwe umuyobozi w'urwego rushinzwe ubugenzuzi bw'ingabo z'u Rwanda. Urwego rushya rwemejwe n'Inteko Ishinga Amategeko mu myaka ibiri ishize. Muri guverinoma naho, habaye impinduka aho Vincent Biruta wari minisitiri w'ibidukikije kuva mu 2017 ubu yagizwe minisitiri w'ububanyi n'amahanga asimbuye Dr Richard Sezibera. Dr Sezibera amaze amezi arenga atatu atagaragara mu mirimo ye, abategetsi b'u Rwanda bagiye batangaza ko adahari kubera impamvu bwite, hari amakuru yavuzwe ko amaze igihe arwaye. Vincent Biruta ari muri guverinoma y'u Rwanda mu myanya yo hejuru itandukanye kuva mu 1997 aho yabaye minisitiri w'ubuzima, minisitiri w'imirimo ya leta, minisitiri w'ubwikorezi n'itumanaho, perezida w'inteko, perezida wa sena, minisitiri w'uburezi, minisitiri w'umutungo kamere, na minisitiri w'ibidukikije. Mu zindi mpinduka zabaye guverinoma Dr Jeanne d'Arc Mujawamariya wari ambasaderi w'u Rwanda mu Burusiya yagizwe minisitiri w'ibidukikije. Jenerali Majoro Jean Bosco Kazura yasimbutse ipeti rya Lieutenant General agirwa Jenerali w'inyenyeri enye Minisitiri wa siporo agirwa Aurore Mimosa Munyangaju wahoze ari umuyobozi mukuru wa kompanyi y'ubwishingizi SONARWA, iyi minisiteri yatandukanyijwe n'iy'umuco. Edouard Bamporiki wari umuyobozi w'itorero mu Rwanda yahawe umwanya mushya; umunyamabanga wa leta wa minisiteri y'urubyiruko n'umuco, minisiteri iyoborwa na Rose Mary Mbabazi. Ignatienne Nyirarukundo wahoze ari umudepite ubu yagizwe umunyamabanga wa leta wa minisiteri y'ubutegetsi bw'igihugu ushinzwe imibereho myiza y'abaturage asimbuye Alvera Mukabaramba uherutse kugirwa umusenateri. Dr Rose Mukankomeje wari umaze igihe avanywe ku buyobozi bw'ikigo REMA gishinzwe ibidukikije, muri izi mpinduka yagizwe umuyobozi mukuru w'inama nkuru y'amashuri makuru na kaminuza, HEC. Tito Rutaremara yasimbuye Dr Iyamuremye Augustin, uherutse kuba Perezida wa sena y'u Rwanda, ku mwanya w'umuyobozi mukuru w'urwego rw'igihugu ngishwanama rw'inararibonye.

Iyi fi yavumbuwe mu mwaka wa 2014 Kuboneka kw'iyi fi ifite uburebure bwa metero ebyiri n'igice kimwe kumije abahanga muri siyansi, ubu bari kwibaza ukuntu yageze aho hose ivuye mu mazi ubundi isanzwe ibamo. Uwimenyereza umwuga kuri Kaminuza ya California ni we warabutswe iyo fi mu cyanya cy'iyi kaminuza cya Coal Oil Point Natural Reserve. Byafashe abashakashatsi iminsi mbere yuko bashobora gusobanukirwa iki kiremwa, ubundi cyavumbuwe mu mwaka wa 2014. Amafoto yerekana iyi fi ibyibushye yagaragaye bwa mbere ku ipaji yo ku rubuga nkoranyambaga rwa Facebook y'iki cyanya cya Coal Oil Point Natural Reserve, nuko impuguke zo mu bice bitandukanye byo ku isi zakuranwa mu gufasha kumenya ubwoko bw'icyo kiremwa. Iyi fi yiswe "hoodwinker", cyangwa inyamayeri ugenecyereje mu Kinyarwanda, kubera ko yavumbuwe imaze imyaka myinshi cyane ikwepa abashakashatsi. Marianne Nyegaard, umuhanga mu bumenyi bwerekeranye n'inyanja ari na we wavumbuye iyo fi akanayita izina, yabwiye televiziyo CNN ko "yenze guhubuka ku ntebe" ubwo yabonaga amafoto agaragaza iyo fi ku mwaro. Yagize ati: "Ubwo amafoto agaragara neza yabonekaga, natekereje ko nta gushidikanya [ko ari iyo fi]. Biteye amatsiko icyatumye iyi fi yambukiranya umurongo muhimbano ugabanya isi mo kabiri wa équateur". Iyi fi ni ngari cyane kandi iranyerera cyane ku mubiri wayo kurusha andi mafi yo mu bwoko bumwe na yo. Ipima toni zigera kuri ebyiri - ni ukuvuga ibiro 2000. Amakuru avuga ko amafi y'ubu bwoko akunze kuba mu mazi y'akazuyazi, nko ku nkombe zo ku bihugu bya Chili na New Zealand. Indi fi yo muri ubu bwoko ariko ifite iforoma itandukanye, yabonetse kabiri ku nkombe yo mu burengerazuba bwa Scotland mu cyumweru kimwe mu kwezi kwa cyenda k'umwaka ushize wa 2018.

Mu cyumweru gishize ubwo Antonio Guterres yavuzaga inzogera y'amahoro i New York Ushyirwaho nyuma y'intambara ya mbere y'isi mu 1945, intego yawo ya mbere yari ukubungabunga amahoro n'ubwubahane hagati y'ibihugu by'isi, nyuma y'icyago cyari kirangiye. Nyuma y'imyaka 75, intego UN yihaye uyu munsi ni "Ahazaza twifuza, UN dushaka: kwiyemeza nanone ubufatanye bw'ibihugu". Jenoside yo muri Cambodge, Jenoside yo mu Rwanda, jenoside yo muri Darfur, ubwicanyi n'intambara mu burasirazuba bwa Congo, intambara kuri Iraq, intambara ya Libya, Somalia n'andi makimbirane yabaye n'ari kubaho ubu, bitera benshi kwibaza akamaro k'uyu muryango. Ubutabazi no kwita ku mpunzi, imbaraga mu guhangana n'indwara z'ibyorezo, ibikorwa byo kubungabunga amahoro ahari intambara, gufasha ibihugu mu bikorwa by'iterambere biciye muri UNDP n'ibindi, biha abandi icyizere bikabereka n'akamaro ka UN. Kuki UN hano ikora ibi hariya igakora ibindi? ONU n'amashami yayo bibeshwaho n'imisanzu y'ibihugu binyamuryango, impano z'imiryango mpuzamahanga cyangwa iz'abantu ku giti cyabo. Martin Jimbere, umurundi w'inzobere mu by'ububanyi n'amahanga, yabwiye BBC ko uko ONU yubatse byerekana neza ko ari umuryango wa benshi ariko ugengwa na bacye bafite imbaraga, bityo n'ijambo rya nyuma. "Nta gikorwa cy'ubutabazi bukomeye, guhagarika intambara, gutera intambara cyangwa ikindi nk'ibyo cyabaho ku isi biriya bihugu bitanu bihoraho muri conseil de sécurité bitacyemeje" Bwana Jimbere akomeza avuga ko nubwo UN ari umuryango w'ingirakamaro mu bikorwa byinshi ku isi, ariko ibikorwa byayo bitari mu nyungu z'ako kanya cyangwa z'igihe kirekire z'ibihugu biyifitemo ijambo rinini bidashyirwamo imbaraga zikomeye. Inama iba hifashishijwe ikoranabuhanga iteganyijwe uyu munsi tariki 21 iremeza impinduka mu magambo y'amwe mu mahame shingiro ya UN. Mu nama y'umutekano, ahafatirwa ibyemezo bikomeye ijambo rinini rifitwe na batanu [ibihugu] Nk'ahagiraga hati: "mu masezerano yayo, ari nayo fatiro ry'itegeko mpuzamahanga, [UN] yemeje ko ibihugu byose - byaba binini cyangwa bito - bikwiye kugira ubusugire bungana ku butaka bwabyo, ubwigenge bwa politiki, n'uburenganzira bwo guhitamo kw'abaturage babyo." UN ubu ivuga ko iyi nteruro yasubiwemo ikazaba igira iti: "Amasezerano ya UN, ariyo fatiro ry'itegeko mpuzamahanga, yemeje ihame ryo kungana k'ubusugire bw'ibihugu byose, n'uburenganzira bwo guhitamo kw'abaturage babyo." Iki gika ubu cyongewemo interuro ivuga ngo "UN yemeje ko ibihugu byose bizirinda gukanga cyangwa gukoresha imbaraga ku butaka cyangwa kuri politiki yigenga y'ikindi gihugu, cyangwa mu bundi buryo bunyuranyije n'intego za UN." Umunsi w'amahoro UN yahisemo kwizihiza iyi sabukuru yayo y'imyaka 75 ku itariki nk'iyi y'ukwezi kwa cyenda aho isi izirikana umunsi mpuzamahanga w'amahoro. Bwana Jimbere avuga ko amahoro kw'isi ashoboka gusa igihe ibihugu bifite ijambo rinini kurusha ibindi muri UN byashaka ko agerwaho. Agira ati: "Muri Cambodge, mu Rwanda, muri Darfur n'ahandi...twese twarabonye icyo UN ari cyo. Ubu muri Iraq, muri Libya, Syria, Somalia, RD Congo... naho turi kubona icyo UN ari cyo. "ONU nyine irongera ikatwiyereka mu yindi shusho nziza yo gufasha impunzi, kurengera abana, kurwanya ibyorezo, kudushakira incanco (inkingo), reka no mu bikorwa by'iterambere". Byinshi mu bibangamira amahoro y'isi bikorwa iri shyirahamwe ribireba Bwana Jimbere avuga ibikorwa byo gukora intwaro no kuzigurisha, intambara n'ubwicanyi bibaho UN irebera, byerekana ko amahoro ku isi agengwa n'abafite imbaraga n'ijambo kuri uwo muryango. "Kandi ni nabo bahindukira bagakora ibyo byitwa byiza byo gufasha abahungabanyijwe n'uko kubura kw'amahoro" - Nijimbere. Ahazaza twifuza" Ubushyamirane bw'ibihugu bikomeye, kurushanwa kugira imbaraga mu ntwaro n'ikoranabuhanga, inyungu z'ubukungu, ibyorezo bikorwa cyangwa bitewe no kwangiza kw'abantu, ubuhezanguni no gutsimbarara...ni bimwe mu byugarije isi. Nijimbere ati: "Gukorera mu nyungu z'abafite ijambo rikomeye kwa UN n'indimi ebyiri mu bikorwa byayo, bituma hari benshi bagishidikanya ku bushobozi bw'uwo muryango mu kurengera isi." Gusa avuga ko hari icyizere mu rubyiruko rw'ejo hazaza mu gihe rwakumvira ubutumwa butangwa ku isi buhamagarira amahoro, kwirinda ubuhezanguni, ubworoherane no kwanga ivanguramoko. Mu butumwa bwatanzwe na Antonio Guterres umunyamabanga mukuru wa UN kuri uyu munsi yavuze ko bafunguye urubuga rwo "guhuza abatuye isi ngo baganire ku kubakira hamwe amahoro". We avuga ko nubwo ubu isi iri mu bihe bigoye by'icyorezo, azi neza ko "twese hamwe dushoboye kandi tuzubaka isi y'ukuri, irambye kandi y'uburinganire."

Nta wundi mukinnyi uratsinda ibitego byinshi kurusha Lewandowski kugeza ubu muri uyu mwaka wa 2019 Yabigezeho ubwo ikipe ye ya Bayern Munich yajyaga ku mwanya wa mbere ku rutonde rw'agateganyo rwa shampiyona nyuma yo gutsinda Union Berlin ibitego 2 - 1. Igice cya kabiri cy'uwo mukino kigitangira, uyu rutahizamu w'imyaka 31 y'amavuko ukomoka muri Pologne yatsinze igitego cye cya 19 kugeza ubu muri uyu mwaka w'imikino. Icya mbere cy'iyi kipe cyari cyatsinzwe na myugariro w'Umufaransa Benjamin Pavard, mu gice cya mbere cy'umukino. Rutahizamu w'Umudage Sebastian Polter yaje gutsindira ikipe ye ya Union Berlin igitego kimwe mu gice cya kabiri, ariko umukino uza kurangira gutyo ku ntsinzi ya Bayern. Mu wundi mukino, Borussia Dortmund yahise ijya ku mwanya wa gatatu nyuma yo kunganya 0 - 0 na Schalke. Intsinzi ya Bayern yatumye irusha inota rimwe Freiburg, iyi nayo ikaba yageze ku mwanya wa kabiri nyuma yo gustinda RB Leipzig ibitego 2 - 1. Borussia Monchengladbach na Wolfsburg zishobora gusubira mu myanya ibiri ya mbere niziramuka zitsinze imikino yazo yo kuri iki cyumweru. Nta wundi umurusha ibitego muri uyu mwaka Muri uyu mwaka, nta wundi mukinnyi uratsindira ikipe ye ibitego byinshi kurusha Lewandowski. Igitego yaraye atsinze cyatumye yuyuza ibitego 37 mu mikino yose amaze gukina kugeza ubu muri uyu mwaka wa 2019. Ibyo biruta ibyo Lionel Messi, Cristiano Ronaldo na Kylian Mbappe bamaze gutsinda. Igitego yatsinze mu mukino wahuje Bayern na Union Berlin cyakuyeho umuhigo wari ufitwe n'Umunye-Gabon Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang - kuri ubu ukinira Arsenal - watsinze muri buri mukino mu mikino umunani ibanza ya shampiyona mu mwaka wa 2015 - 2016 ubwo yakiniraga Borussia Dortmund. Byose hamwe, Lewandowski amaze gutsinda ibitego 19 mu mikino 14 amaze gukina mu marushanwa yose muri uyu mwaka w'imikino, harimo no muri buri mukino muri 13 ishize ya Bayern. Aho atatsinze ni mu mukino umwe gusa ubwo Bayern yatsindwaga 2 - 0 na Dortmund mu gikombe cy'Ubudage cya Super Cup , ku itariki ya gatatu y'ukwezi kwa munani. Yanatsinze ibitego bitatu mu mukino ikipe y'igihugu cye cya Pologne yakinnye na Latvia mu ntangiriro y'uku kwezi kwa cumi, mu gushaka itike yo gukina imikino y'igikombe cya Euro yo mu mwaka utaha wa 2020.

Bamwe mu bakuru b'ibihugu bya Africa bakingiwe mu ruhame inkingo zageze ku bihugu byabo, kugira ngo bagaragaze ko bazizeye. Mu ijambo yavuze kuri televiziyo ku cyumweru nijoro, Yoweri Museveni yavuze ko atarakingirwa kuko yaretse bagahera ku bakora mu buvuzi, we akomeje "kwirinda kandi akirinzwe n'umubiri". Museveni yavuze ko n'umugore we Janet Museveni atarakingirwa. Mu kwezi gushize, minisitiri w'ubuzima Jane Aceng yahakanye amakuru ko perezida n'abantu bari hafi ye bakingiwe mu ibanga, mbere y'uko gukingira bitangira kumugaragaro mu gihugu. Yasubizaga amakuru yari yatangajwe n'ikinyamakuru cyo mu gihugu Daily Monitor n'icyo muri Amerika the Wall Street Journal. Mu ijambo rye ku cyumweru, Museveni yavuze ko icyo kinyamakuru kigomba gusaba imbabazi "mu nyuguti nini ku rupapuro rwa mbere" cyangwa "akazagikurikirana". Museveni kandi yavuze ko "tuzakora urukingo rwacu kandi nizera ko ruzaba ruruta zimwe muri izi". Uganda iteganya gukingira 49% by'abayituye mu buryo buzakorwa mu byiciro. Mu ntangiriro z'uku kwezi nibwo yakiriye doze 864,000 za AstraZeneca muri gahunda ya Covax, ikaba itegereje kuzabona doze miliyoni 2.6 mu kwezi kwa gatandatu.

Perezida Emmerson Mnangagwa ari ku butegetsi guhera mu kwezi kwa cumi na kumwe mu mwaka wa 2017 Aba bakozi bagejejwe imbere y'urukiko rwo ku murwa mukuru Harare ku munsi w'ejo ku wa gatatu bashinjwa ko bagiye mu birwa bya Maldives mu nyanja y'Ubuhinde bagatozwa ibikorwa by'iterabwoba no kugumura rubanda. Abaregwa bahakana ibyaha baregwa. Ubutegetsi buvuga ko aba bakozi bitabiriye ayo mahugurwa yateguwe n'itsinda ry'abantu bo mu gihugu cya Serbia. Aba bakozi batawe muri yombi ku kibuga cy'indege cya Harare basubiye mu gihugu. Abategetsi bavuga ko aba bantu batojwe gukoresha imbunda, kwegeranya rubanda ngo irwanye ubutegetsi no gucika uwashaka kubafata. Polisi ivuga ko hari abandi bari muri uwo mugambi batarafatwa. Aba batanu bahakana ibyo baregwa, abanyamategeko babo bakavuga ko ubutegetsi bwa Perezida Mnangagwa buri kwibasira imiryango irengera uburenganzira bwa muntu ndetse n'abatavuga rumwe na bwo. Emmerson Mnangagwa wahoze yungirije Robert Mugabe, yafashe ubutegetsi mu kwezi kwa cumi na kumwe mu mwaka wa 2017 nyuma y'imyivumbagatanyo y'abaturage yatumye ingabo zihirika Robert Mugabe.

Mu myaka cumi yikurikiranya, Aliko Dangote wo mur Nigeria ni we muntu atunze cane ku mugabane wa Afrika, akaba afise ubutunzi buharurwa ku miriyaridi 12.1 z'amadolari. Ubwo butunzi bwiyongereyeko amadolari imiriyaridi 2, ugereranije no mu mwaka uheze bivuye kw'iduga gushika ku bice 30 kw'ijana vy'igiciro c'isima ya Dangote nk'uko vyandikwa na Forbes. Bamwe mu bagore bakomeye batangazwa n'ikinyamakuru FORBES Umuntu agira kabiri mu butunzi muri Afrika ni Nassef Sawiris wo mu Misri, ubutunzi bwiwe bwinshi ni ibice bitandatu kw'ijana y'umutahe afise muri Addidas. Mu kibanza ca gatatu haza Nicky Oppeheimer wo mu gihugu ca Afrika y'epfo, yarazwe umutahe wo muri kompanyi ya Debeers, akaba yari anahagarariye iyo kompanyi gushika mu mwaka wa 2012 aho yaca agurisha ibice 40 kw'ijana vy'umutahe w'umuryango wiwe kuri kompanyi yimba ubutare ya AngloAmerican ku miriyaridi 5.1 z'amadolari. Umuntu agira kabiri mu butunzi muri Afrika ni Nassef Sawiris wo mu Misri, ubutunzi bwiwe bwinshi ni ibice bitandatu kw'ijana y'umutahe afise muri Addidas. Uwundi yatunze cane muri uyu mwaka ni umudandaza wundi w'isima, Abdulsamad Rabiu. Imitahe yiwe muri kompanyi ikora isima ya BUA PLC, yashizwe ku rutonde kw'isoko ry'abagurisha imitahe muri Nigeria mu kwezi kwa mbere, yaduze igiciro biteye ubwoba mu kiringo c'uyu mwaka uheze. Vyatumye ubutunzi bwa Rabiu bwongerekana ku bice 77 kw'ijana, gushika ku miriyaridi 5.5 vy'amadolari. Ikintu gikomeye cane n'uko Rabiu n'umwana wiwe bafise ibice 97 kw'ijana vy'iyo kompanyi bagaca batuma imenyekana cane. Umuvugizi w'isoko ry'imitahe muri Nigeria yabwiye Forbes ko ikompanyi y'isima ya BUA ishitse ku ntambwe ya kabiri - ko Forbes igabanya agaciro k'imitahe mu gihe iyo mitahe yagurishijwe ku banyagihugu ifise agaciro kari muri y'ibice 5 kw'ijana. Umugwizatunga wenyene ava mu karere k'ubuseruko bwa Afrika ari kuri urwo rutonde rwa Forbes ni umudandaza wo muri Tanzania, Mohammed Dewji, aza mu kibanza ca 13. Dewji afise ubutunzi bufise agaciro k'imiriyaridi 1.6 z'amadolari, nk'uko vyandikwa n'ico kinyamakuru c'ubutunzi ca Forbes. Aliko Dangote ni we mutunzi wa mbere ku mugabane wa Afrika ku ncuro ya cumi yikurikiranya Urutonde rw'abantu batunze cane kw'isi mu mwaka wa 2021: 1. Aliko Dangote afise ubutunzi bungana na miriyaridi 12.1 $ 2. Nassef Sawiris afise ubutunzi bungana na miriyaridi 8.5 $ 3. Nicky Openheimer afise ubutunzi bungana na miriyaridi 8 $ 4. Johann Rupert afise ubutunzi bungana na miriyaridi 7.2 $ 5. Mike Adenuga afise ubutunzi bungana na miriyaridi 6.7 $ 6. Abdulsamad Rabiu afise ubutunzi bungana na miriyaridi 5.5 $ 7. Issad Rebrad afise ubutunzi bungana na miriyaridi 4.8 $ 8. Naguib Sawiris afise ubutunzi bungana na miriyaridi 3.2 $ 9. Patrice afise ubutunzi bungana na miriyaridi 3 $ 10. Koos Bekker afise ubutunzi bungana na miriyaridi 2.8 $ Mu gihe bamwe bongereje ubutunzi bwabo ku miriyaridi n'imiriyaridi, ubutunzi bw'abagwizatunga babiri bari ku rutonde rwo mu mwaka wa 2020, bwaragabanutse gushika baje musi y'umuriyaridi umwe. Abapfasoni babiri bonyene ni bo bari ku rutonde rw'abatunzi bakomeye mu mwaka wa 2020, ubu bakorotse ntibakiri kuri urwo rutonde. Nk'uko bivugwa na Forbes, ubutunzi bwa Folonrusho Alakija wo muri Nigeria, afise ikompanyi yo kwimba igitoro bwaramanutse musi y'umuriyaridi umwe kubera igiciro c'ibitoro camanutse. Ubutunzi bwa Isabel Dos santos bwaragabanutse cane kubera imanza afise muri sentare Isabel dos Santos, kuva mu 2013 yari umupfasoni atunze cane ku mugabane wa Afrika, ubutunzi bwiwe bwaragabanutse kubera ingingo nyinshi zitandukanye zitumbereye ivyo atunze muri Angola na Portugal. Abo bagwizatunga batunze cane ku mugabane wa Afrika bava mu bihugu indwi bitandukanye. Afrika y'Epfo na Misri bifise abagwizatunga batanu, bigakurikirwa na Nigeria ifise batatu hamwe na Maroc ifise babiri.

Mu burasirazuba bwa DR Congo harwanira imitwe irenga 25 harimo iy'abo mu Burundi, Rwanda na Uganda Abahagarariye ingabo za DR Congo, Burundi, Rwanda, Tanzania na Uganda kuwa kane no kuwa gatanu bahuriye i Goma baganira ku kurandura imitwe yitwaje intwaro mu burasirazuba bwa Congo. ADF irwanya ubutegetsi bwa Uganda. Red-Tabara, Forebu, FNL irwanya ubutegetsi bw'u Burundi. FDLR, RUD-urunana, FLN irwanya ubw'u Rwanda, yose ikorera mu burasirazuba bwa Congo. Kuri iyi mitwe n'indi hiyongeraho imitwe y'abaMai-Mai irenga 10 n'amatsinda y'abarwanyi banyuranye b'abanyecongo nabo bakorera muri aka gace ko kuva i Beni kumanuka kugera za Uvira. Omar Kavota, impirimbanyi y'uburenganzira bwa muntu mu burasirazuba bwa Congo aherutse kubwira BBC ko umutwe wa FDLR, kimwe n'iyindi inyuranye, biba muri Congo kubera ubucuruzi butemewe bw'amabuye y'agaciro. "Ibi nibyo bituma iyi mitwe ibona imbaraga, kongeraho ibikorwa byo guhohoterwa no gusahura abaturage, nta kindi gitumye iyi mitwe imaze imyaka myinshi hano" - Bwana Kavota. Ibi bigaragaza intege nke z'ubutegetsi n'ingabo z'igihugu mu kuyirandura, gusa Perezida Felix Tshisekedi yazanye amatwara mashya kuri iyi mitwe, cyane cyane iyo mu mahanga. Mu ntangiriro z'uku kwezi abarwanyi bateye mu majyaruguru y'u Rwanda Bisa n'aho ashaka ko ubutegetsi bw'ibihugu bufite imitwe iburwanya muri DR Congo bubigiramo uruhare. Nta ngabo z'amahanga zigoma kuharwanira General Léon Richard Kasonga umuvugizi w'ingabo FARDC za Congo yabwiye abanyamakuru kuwa gatanu ko muri ubwo bufatanye ingabo z'amahanga zitazaza ku butaka bwa DR Congo. Ati: "Mumenye ko iyo mitwe yambukiranya imipaka ikora ibibi. Tuzafatanya kubakurikiranira ku mipaka, ibyo ntibisobanuye ko duhamagaye ingabo ngo zize ku butaka bwa Congo". Mu cyumweru gishize abarwanyi bateye mu majyaruguru y'u Burundi mu ntara ya Bubanza barwana n'ingabo za Leta abaturage bava mu byabo, leta ivuga ko bavuye muri DR Congo. Umutwe wa Red-Tabara - ubarizwa muri Kivu y'Epfo - niwo wigambye iki gitero. Mu ntangiriro z'uku kwezi abarwanyi bateye mu majyaruguru y'u Rwanda bica abaturage 14 Mu ntangirizo z'uku kwezi abarwanyi bateye mu majyaruguru y'u Rwanda, bicyekwa ko baturutse muri DR Congo, leta yavuze ko bishe abaturage 14, ingabo za leta nazo zikica 19 zikanafata batanu. Bamwe bibaza ubushobozi bw'ingabo za DR Congo zifite ubu, mu gihe zitabashije kurandura iyi mitwe mu myaka myinshi ishize. Ku mbuga nkoranyambaga hari ababona ko ubu bwimvikane bwaba burimo ibitaravuzwe aho ingabo z'ibindi bihugu zishobora kuba zarumvikanye n'iza Congo ko zinjira muri iki gihugu zigatanga ubufasha.

Ishami rya ONU rivuga ko malaria imaze guhitana abantu 1800 kuva mu kwa mbere, leta ikavuga ko ari 1400 Muri iki cyumweru, ishami rya ONU rishinzwe ubutabazi ryatangaje ko mu Burundi malaria imaze guhitana abantu 1800 kuva uyu mwaka utangiye, ikavuga ko iyi mibare irenze ikigero cy'uko indwara yitwa icyorezo. Ishami ry'umuryango w'abibumbye ryita ku buzima (OMS) naryo ryemeza ko kuva mu cyumweru cya mbere cy'ukwezi kwa mbere kugera mu mpera y'ukwezi gushize kwa karindwi, abantu barenga miliyoni eshanu mu Burundi barwaye malaria - ni hafi 1/2 cy'abatuye iki gihugu. Mu kiganiro n'abanyamakuru, Minisitiri w'ubuzima Dr Thaddée Ndikumana yasobanuye ko malaria mu Burundi ubu atari icyorezo agereranyije n'imibare yo mu 2017 ubwo iyi ndwara ubutegetsi bwemezaga ko yabaye icyorezo. Dr Ndikumana yavuze ko mu 2017 mu Burundi abandi miliyoni 4,9 barwaye malaria ikica abantu 4,300 mu mezi atandatu, naho kugeza ubu muri uyu mwaka abayirwaye ari miliyoni 4,3 naho abo yishe ari 1,400, nkuko bivugwa n'ikinyamakuru Nawe cyo mu Burundi. Iyo indwara itangajwe nk'icyorezo mu gihugu hafatwa ingamba zikomeye kandi zidasanzwe mu kuyirwanya. Indwara ya Ebola iheruka gutangazwa nk'icyorezo gihangayikishije isi, nubwo ivugwa mu burasirazuba bwa Kongo aho imaze guhitana abarenga 1800 kuva mu kwezi kwa munani umwaka ushize.

Umukinyi Kroos yatabaye Ubudagi mu gutsinda igitsindo ca kabiri ku munota wa 95 Muri urwo rukino rwabereye ku kibuga ca Sochi ku munsi wa gatandatu, abadagi bari basigaye ari cumi gusa mu kibuga, binjije igitsindo ca kabiri mu minota ya nyuma y'igice ca kabiri, igitsindo cinjijwe na Toni Kroos ku munota wa 95. Abo bakinyi bamenyerezwa na Joachim Low baronse amanota atatu mu mikino ibiri, bakaba banganya na Suède, ariko bakaba inyuma ya Mexique yabatsinze ku manota atatu inyuma yaho itsindiye Korea Yepfo 2-1 mu rukino rwatanguye. Ubudagi buzoca buhura na Korea Yepfo ku munsi wa gatatu, mu gihe umugwi wa Mexique ari nawo wa mbere uzoba uhura na Suède uwo munsi nyene.

Amerika ifise abasirikare 7200 bakorera ku mugabane wa Afrika muri kino gihe Muri kino gihe abasirikare 7200 ba Amerika nibo bari ku mugabane wa Afrika. Itangazo ryavuye mu biro bikuru vya gisirikare, Pentagone, rivuga ko muri Afrika y'uburengero ahakorera intagondwa nyinshi z'aba Islamu, "ugufasha mu buhinga bwa gisirikare" bizosubirigwa no gutanga impanuro, gufasha, guhererekana amakuru y'iperereza". Komanda Candice Tresch, umuvugizi wo muri Pentagone, yabwiye Reuters ko kugabanya abo basirikare bizotuma ata gusubira guhangana n'imigwi y'intagondwa mu bihugu vyinshi nka Somalia, Djibouti na Libya. Umutegetsi wa Amerika atipfuje ko izina ryiwe rimenyekana yavuganye na Reuters, yavuze ko kugabanya izo nteko bizotangura mu myaka itatu, bigahera mu bihugu vya Kenya, Cameroun na Mali. Abajijwe ko ukwo kugabanya inteko kwoba gukurikiranye n'igitero cagabwe mu gihugu ca Niger mu kwezi kwa cumi mu 2017 aho abasirikare bane ba Amerika bishwe, uwo mukozi wo mu rwego rwa gisirikare yavuze ko ivyabaye ico gihe ata ruhara vyagize mu gufata iyo ngingo, nkuko amakuru ava mw'iradiyo Ijwi rya Amerika avuga. "Ibiganiro bijanye n'iyi ngingo vyatanguye gukogwa imbere y'ico gitero," niko uwo mukozi yavuze. Umushikiranganji wo kwivuna abansi muri Amerika, James Mattis yipfuza kuziganya amahera yakoreshwa ku mugabane wa Afrika, mu ndyane zokwaduka muri kazoza hagati y'ico gihugu n'Uburusiya hamwe n'Ubushinwa, niko ibinyamakuru vya Amerika bivuga.

Mu 2012 Taylor yakatiwe gufungwa imyaka 50 n'urukiko rushyigikiwe na ONU AFP ivuga ko Taylor w'imyaka 72 yavuze ko icyorezo cya coronavirus mu Bwongereza gishyize mu kaga gakomeye ubuzima bwe, agashaka kwimurirwa "mu gihugu kindi gitekanye". Urukiko rwihariye rwasigaye rurangiza imirimo yasizwe n'urukiko rushyigikiwe na ONU/UN ku byaha byakorewe muri Sierra Leone, rwavuze ko atasobanuye ibihugu afata ko bitekanye. Rwongeyeho ko ishami ry'umuryango w'abibumbye ryita ku buzima (OMS/WHO) nta gihugu na kimwe ku isi ryari ryatangaza ko cyarangiyemo Covid-19. Mu 2012 Taylor yakatiwe gufungwa imyaka 50 n'urukiko rushyigikiwe na ONU rwashyiriweho guca imanza ku byaha by'intambara muri Sierra Leone rw'i The Hague (La Haye) mu Buholandi. Yahamwe n'ibyaha byo gutera inkunga no kureberera inyeshyamba zo muri Sierra Leone mu ntambara yo kuva mu mwaka wa 1991 kugera mu 2002.

Diamond i yaciye i Kigali mu rugendo agiye i Bujumbura aganira n'abanyamakuru Diamond, ubundi witwa Nasibu Abdul Juma, ari mu nzira ajya i Bujumbura mu Burundi aho afite igitaramo uyu munsi kuwa gatanu. Mu rugendo rwe yahagaze i Kigali agirana ikiganiro n'abanyamakuru bamubajije ibibazo bitandukanye kuri muzika akora no ku buzima bwe busanzwe. Umwaka ushize umugore wamamaye ku mbuga nkoranyambaga mu Rwanda uzwi cyane nka Shaddy Boo yagaragaje amafoto ari kumwe na Diamond bari aho abahanzi bitegurira (back stage), uyu muhanzi atambaye umwambaro hejuru. Shaddy Boo nyuma yahakanye ko akundana n'uyu muhanzi, icyo gihe wari ufite umugore wo muri Uganda nawe uzwi cyane mu myidagaduro witwa Zarinah Hassan "Zari", nyuma bombi baje gutandukana. I Kigali uyu munsi, Diamond yabajijwe iby'umubano we na Shaddy Boo wo mu Rwanda. Yasubije ati: "Ni nka mushiki wanjye, kimwe n'abandi bashiki banjye bo mu Rwanda, namumenye biciye kuri 'manager' we, yigeze gutumirwa mu birori bimwe hariya iwacu, ni uko muzi gusa". Umwaka ushize Shaddy boo yerekanye ifoto ari kumwe na Diamond yagarutsweho kenshi n'abakurikira imyidagaduro ko baba bakundana kandi Diamond yubatse Uyu muhanzi ukunda kwiyita Simba, yavuze ko we n'umugore bakundana ukomoka muri Kenya witwa Tanasha mu kwezi gutaha biteguye kubyara umwana w'umuhungu. Diamond, ubu ukunzwe cyane mu ndirimbo ye igezweho 'Kanyaga', yavuze ko yubahiriza inshingano ze nk'umubyeyi ku bana afitanye na Zari batandukanye. Ibanga rye Diamond ni umuhanzi wo muri Tanzania umaze imyaka irenga itanu akunzwe cyane muri aka karere. Yabwiye abanyamakuru ko ibanga rye ari ugushyira udushya mubyo akora no kumenya ibyo abantu bashaka. Uyu muhanzi arahita akomeza urugendo rwe agana i Bujumbura aho afite igitaramo mu ijoro ry'uyu munsi. Ejo kuwa gatandatu azagaruka mu Rwanda aho naho afite igitaramo cya muzika.

Cyrille Ndayirukiye yari apfunzwe kuva mu 2015 General Ndayirukiye yafatwa nk'uwuza ubugira kabiri inyuma ya General Godefroid Niyombare mu bari kw'isonga ry'umugambi wo gutembagaza ubutegetsi mu 2015, Niyombare we yashoboye guhunga atarafatwa. Inkuru y'uko General Cyrille Ndayirukiye yamaze urw'abagabo yatanguye guhanahanwa ku mbuga hwaniro ku wa gatandatu. Yari apfungiwe mw'ibohero rya Gitega kuva afashwe mu kwezi kwa gatanu mu 2015 inyuma yo kugerageza gutembagaza ubutegetsi ku wa 13 z'uko kwezi nyene. Umwe mu ncuti ziwe za hafi adashaka kumenyekana izina yabwiye BBC ati: "Twese twakiriye ivyo batubwiye ko vyabaye giturumbuka.Twavyakiriye uko babitubwiye. Ntayindi source dufise". Uyu avuga ko babwiwe ko Gen Ndayirukiye yazunguriwe ariko aranikira impuzu ahejeje kumesa wenyene ku wa gatandatu. Aho yokwikubise hasi ariko ngo hari uwamusamye, ubwo nyene ngo aca aragarara uruhande rumwe, mu nyuma y'isaha icenda z'umuhingamo aca aracikana. BBC yagerageje kuvugisha abajejwe ibohero ya Gitega, ntibirashoboka gushika ubu. Isoko ryegereye umuryango wiwe ryabwiye BBC ko ikiziga ciwe kuwa mbere cajanywe i Bujumbura aho umuryango uriko uritunganya ngo uzomushingure mu kiringo c'indwi zibiri. Umugore wiwe n'umwana wiwe umwe rudende basanzwe baba mu Bubirigi. General Ndayirukiye ni inde? General Cyrille Ndayirukiye yokwije imyaka 67 y'amavuka mu mezi arenga gato abiri. Yaciye ku nzego zose zo gutwara igisirikare c'Uburundi kuva ku makambi gushika ku biro bikuru no ku bushikiranganji bwo kwivuna abansi. Yaranakoze mu buserukizi bw'Uburundi mu gisata c'ibijanye na gisirikare mu Bubirigi, muri Libya no muri Ethiopia. Yanategetse kandi ingabo zama ziteguriye gufasha mu bikorwa vy'amahoro mu bihugu vya Afrika y'Ubuseruko East AfricanStand By Force. Igihe yaja mu mugambi wo kugeregeza gutembagaza ubutegetsi bwa prezida Pierre Nkurunziza mu 2015, General Cyrille Ndayirukiye yari umujenama w'umushikiranganji wo kwivuna abansi, General Pontien Gaciyumbwenge. Nawe yagirijwe kuba muri uwo mugambi ariko we ashobora guhunga atarafatwa. Yemanze kugerageza gutembagaza ubutegetsi Mu rubanza yaburanye atawumwunganira mu mategeko, Ndayirukije yakomeje kuvuga ko ata butugane nyabwo yigeze ahabwa kuko bamwankiye abo yahisemwo kumwunganira, ntihanumvirizwa abo yavuga ko bari bafise vyinshi bobazwa vyotanga umuco kuri uwo mugambi. Yavuga abantu batatu: uwari umushikiranganji wo kwivuna abansi, uwari umukuru w'ibiro bikuru vya gisirikare n'ubu akiri muri ico kibanza, n'uwari umukuru w'ibiro vy'iperereza.Avuga ko nabo bari muri uwo mugambi ariko mu nyuma bakamuhemukira. Yemanze kandi ico gikorwa. Mw'ikete yandikiye umukuru w'intahe y'urubanza rwiwe yanditse ati: "Reka nsubiremwo kubivuga ko ivyo uwanditse iri kete yakoze vyabaye yavyiyumviriye kandi azi igituma. Iyo umutegetsi, naho yoba kizigenza, atanze amategeko aja mu nzira yo guhonyanga amategeko no gushira igihugu mu kaga, n'umusirikare canke umuporiri wa mbere mu kwuhaba afise uburenganzira bwo kwanga ayo mategeko ku neza nkuru y'igihugu". Igeregezwa ryo gutembaza ubutegetsi ryabaye mu nkuruma y'inyuma y'aho umuhisi Prezida Pierre Nkurunziza atangarije ko azokwitoreza kurongora igihugu ubugura gatatu mu mpera z'ukwa kwa kane mu 2015. Vyateye impari mu gihe hari bamwe babona ko ari uguhonyanga amasezerano ya Arusha. Vyakurikiwe n'intureka yaguyemwo abantu batari bake abandi barahunga.

Imishamirano yadutse mu Burundi bimaze kumenyekana ko prezida Pierre Nkurunziza azosubira kwitoza Uburundi buvuga koi co cegeranyo cuzuyemwo ububeshi, kandi bakavuga ko babibwiwe n'abantu. Willy Nyamitwe ashinzwe kumenyekanisha amakuru mu biro vy'umukuru w'igihugu aramirira kure ico cegeranyo. "Wewe wofata gute umuntu yaje kugira amatohoza, atagira ayo matohoza ahubwo aca yisunga ivyo yabwiwe n'abantu ngo bamwe bamwe bo ngaha mu Burundi, abandi ngo bagiye kubasanga mu Rwanda, abandi mu Buganda. Murumva rero ko ivyo abantu bababwira bidashobora kuba ibintu vy'ifatiro kugira ngo ugire icegeranyo cumvikana," uko ni ko Willy Nyamitwe avuga. Uwo ajejwe kumenyekanisha amakuru mu biro vy'umukuru w'igihugu aribaza kandi ingene icegeranyo ata ho cegamiye c'impapuro 25, ata na hamwe kivuga uruhara rw'Urwanda mu guhungabanya amahoro mu Burundi. Ico cegeranyo kandi ngo nta co kivuga ku bantu bishikanye n'abafashwe bagiye baravuga ababatumye, n'ico bashaka gushikako. Willy Nyamitwe avuga ko icegeranyo ca Onu ata co kivuga kuvyo Uburundi bwashikirije Willy Nyamitwe avuga ko :"Abarasa mu makaritiye barazwi, abica abantu bagata ibiziga vyabo mu mabarabara barazwi, abashatse gutembagaza reta barazwi, abiyemereye bo nyene ku maradiyo no ku mboneshakure ko ari bo batera amagrenade hirya no hino yishe abantu batari bake barazwi. Ariko nta na hamwe muri ico cegeranyo ushobora kubona amazi yabo." Abahinga b'ishirahamwe mpuzamakungu Onu barungitswe mu Burundi kugira amatohoza, basaba ko hogira igikorwa kuco bise ihungabanya ryeruye kandi rigwiriye ry'uburenganzira bw'ikiremwa muntu. Icegeranyo c'uwo mugwi w'abahinga cerekana ko uburenganzira bwa kiremwa muntu bwoba bwarahungabanijwe bikomeye, cane cane n'abari mu nzego za reta. Ubugizi bwa nabi bwatanguye mu kwezi kwa kane umwaka uheze, igihe prezida Nkurunziza yashigwa imbere n'umugambwe wiwe wa CNDD-FDD, ngo asubire kwitoza kurongora Uburundi.

Mu ntango vyibajijwe ko Covid-19 yamutse mw'isoko ryo muri Wuhan Babiri muri bo bari bamaze gufata urugendo - umwe aza yamaze gusubira inyuma, uwundi aracari aho arindiririye indege mu kindi gihugu. OMS ivuga ko vyatumwe n'ikibazo co kuronka impusha zo kwinjira(visa). Ayo matohoza arindiriwe kuva kera yari yemewe n'abategetsi b'Ubushinwa mu kwezi kwa 12 inyuma y'amezi menshi babivugana na OMS. Uwo mugera watowe ubwa mbere muri Wuhan mu mpera za 2019 ucaduka, bikaba vyibajijwe ko wazananye mw'isoko. Umukuru wa OMS Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus ''yababajwe cane'' n'uko Ubushinwa butaheraheje ibijanye no gutanga impusha z'uko abo bantu bashika muri ico gihugu''kandi babiri muri bo bari bamaze gufata urugendo hanyuma abasigaye na bo bakaba basivye ku munota wa nyuma''. Yabwiye abamenyeshamakuru i Geneve ku wa kabiri ati:''Ubushinwa bwari bwanyemereye ko buriko burakora ibikenewe vyose kugira abo bantu bashikeyo vuba hashoboka'', asigura ko yari yavuganye n'abategetsi bo hejuru b'Ubushinwa abumvisha ko ''ubwo butumwa buza imbere kuri OMS no ku makungu''. OMS yari imaze amezi n'amezi itegura kurungika umugwi w'abantu 10 b'abahinga mpuzamakungu mu Bushinwa kugira baje gutohoza ivy'uko ikiza camutse ku gikoko n'ingene uwo mugera wahejeje ugashikira abantu. Mu kwezi guheze vyari vyatangajwe ko ayo matohoza azotangura mu kwezi kwa mbere mu 2021. Covid yamutse he? Babiri mu bagize uwo mugwi mpuzamakungu bari bafashe urugendo bagana Ubushinwa ku wa kabiri nk'uko bimenyeshwa na OMS. Covid-19 yatowe ubwa mbere mu gisagara ca Wuhan co mu ntara ya Hubei yo mu Bushinwa, mu mpera za 2019. Vyatanguye kwibazwa ko uwo mugera wandurutse mw'isoko rigurisha ibikoko vyo mw'ishamba vyo kubaga. Aho ni ho vyibazwa ko uwo mugera ariho wava ku bikoko ukandukira abantu. Ariko hari impari nyinshi ku mamuko y'uwo mugera. Hari abahinga bibaza ko isoko atari yo mamuko yawo, ko gusa ariho wagwiriraniye. Hari ubushakashatsi buvuga ko imigera ya corona ishobora kwandukira abantu imaze imyaka igendagenda ivuye ku buhungarema atawurayitora. Ariko ntibizwi igikoko yoba yaraciyeko kugira abantu bandukirwe.

Rurangiye rugize abere uwahoze ari umushoferi wa general Nyamwasa Richard Bachisa ndetse n'Umucuruzi Pascal Kanyandekwe. Urukiko ngo rwasanze nta bimenyetso bitaziguye byerekana ko Kanyandekwe ari we wacuze uyu mugambi na nyuma y'uko umucamanza avuze ko bigaragara ko Pascal Kanyandekwe yari azi umugambi wo guhitana ubuzima bwa General Nyamwasa . Umucamanza yavuze kandi ko ubushinjacyaha butashoboye kwerekana ku buryo budashidikanywaho ko Bwana Bachisa yaba yaragize ubuifatanyacyaha mu mugambi wo guhitana shebuja. Abandi bane bahamijwe icyaha cyo kugerageza kwica ndetse no gutunga imbunda namasasu ku buryo butemewe . Umucamanza yavuze ko asanga abaregwa baraguririwe kandi ko iki gitero cyari gihishe inyuma inyungu za politiki kubera ko abaregwa batari bazi General Kayumba kandi ko bishyuwe akayabo kugira ngo bamwice . Umwe mu bahamijwe icyaha bivugwa ko ari we warashe General Nyamwasa. Amakuru agaragazwa na Telephone igendanwa yashyikirijwe urukiko ngo yerekana ko hariho ibimenyetso bihagije byerekana ko abaregwa bahuye inshuro nyinshi bavuga ko kuri uyu mugambi wo kwica . General Nyamwasa yavuze ko yishimiye umwanzuro w'urukiko ngo kuko bigaragaje uwatumye abo bantu ko ari leta y'u Rwanda nkuko yari yarabivuze. Biteganijwe ko igenwa ry'ibihano ku bahamijwe ibyaha rizatangira ku itariki ya 10 zukwezi gutaha .

Gupima abantu benshi vyatangujwe kuwa mbere i Bujumbura Nibwo bwa mbere mu Burundi hari hafashwe ibipimo vyinshi ku munsi umwe mw'isekeza ryatangujwe ryo kuraba uko iciza Covid-19 gihagaze mu gihugu. Umuvugizi w'ubushikiranganji bw'amagara y'abantu mu Burundi, Dr Jean-Bosco Girukwishaka, abicishije ku rubuga rwa Twitter, amenyesha ko ivyo bipimo vyafashwe mu bigo bitatu vyo gupimiramwo uyo mugera no mu bitaro bitandukanye, mu gisagara ca Bujumbura. Iryo sekeza ryatanguriye i Bujumbura bikaba bitegekanijwe ko kuva mu ndwi iza kizobandaniriza mu zindi ntara zo hagati. Dr Girukwishaka avuga ko ku munsi ugira kabiri w'iryo sekeza, abashika "593 aribo bafashwe ibipimo" , bakaba barindiriye inyishu. Avugana na BBC Gahuzamiryango ejo ku wa kabiri, Bwana Girukwishaka yavuze ko iri sekeza rizomara amezi atatu rizofasha leta kumenya ingene ikiza ca coronavirus cifashe mu gihugu cose. U Burundi buzwi ko buri mu bihugu bitafashe ingingo ruhasha mu ntumbero yo kurwanya ikwirakwira ry'umugera wa coronavirus, harimwo ingingo zo kuguma mu rugo, nk'uko vyagenze mu bindi bihugu vyo mu muryango wa Afrika y'Ubuseruko. Hari amashirahamwe amwe amwe yagiriza leta ko igiharuro vyatangwa na leta ku bijanye n'uwo mugera bitari vyo, ibirego vyiyamirijwe. Umukuru w'igihugu mushasha Evariste Ndayishimiye wewe aherutse gutangaza ko agiye kurwanya bikomeye iki kiza gushika gitujijwe. Mw'ijambo yashikirije igihe abagize leta yiwe barahira, ku wa 30 z'ukwa gatandatu guheze, Perezida Ndayishimiye yatangaje icese ko agiye guhagurukira uwo mugera gushika utujijwe. Mu gihe ico gikorwa kibandanya, ubushikiranganji bw'amagara y'abantu busaba abanyagihugu kubandanya bakurikiza ingingo zafashwe mu ntumbero yo kwikingira, izo nazo hakaba harimwo gukaraba igihe cose, kwirinda gukorana mu minwe canke kugwana mu nda, hamwe no kwisiga ya miti yica imicafu. Ubushikiranganji bw'amagara y'abantu kandi busaba ishirahamwe Atrabu ryo kwunguruza abantu kwama bapompa imiduga yabo, abakiriya nabo bagasabwa kwambara udupfukamunwa.

Uko kwemezwa n'umukozi wo muri OMS gutumye ibihugu byo muri Afurika biba birindwi bimaze gutahura ukwo kwihinduranya kwa coronavirus kuzwi nka B.1.617. Ubushakashatsi bw'ibanze bugaragaza ko ubu bwoko bwa Covid-19 bukwirakwira byoroshye cyane kurusha andi moko y'iyi virusi. Ibibazo byanyu kuri covid-19: Wamenya gute ubwoko bwayo wanduye? Dr Nsenga, uhuza ibikorwa bya OMS byo kurwanya Covid-19 muri Afurika, yavuze ko nta yandi makuru afite ku mubare w'abashya babonetse banduye ubwo bwoko bwa Covid-19 bo muri DR Congo, Algeria na Nigeria. Yavuze kandi ko nta n'amakuru afite ku ngendo baba baherutse gukora. Ibihugu bine byo muri Afurika byari bisanzwe byaremeje ko byagaragawemo ubwoko bwa Covid-19 buzwi ku izina rya B.1.617, abo byabusanganye bose bakaba bari bafite aho bahuriye n'ingendo za vuba aha mu Buhinde. Ibyo bihugu ni: OMS iherutse gushyira mu cyiciro cy'"ubwoko [bwa Covid] buteje impungenge ku isi" uko kwihinduranya kwa coronavirus kwabonetse bwa mbere mu Buhinde mu kwezi kwa cumi mu 2020. Ubwo bwoko burimo gukorwaho ubushakashatsi ngo hamenyekane niba ari bwo nyirabayazana yo kwiyongera kw'impfu mu Buhinde, ubu bufite ibitaro byarengewe ubushobozi bwo kwakira abarwayi n'ahatwikirwa imirambo harimo kuzura.

Abiy Ahmed yabaye Minisitiri w'intebe wa Ethiopia nyuma yaho uwo yasimbuye yeguye ku butegetsi uyu mwaka Umufuka wari urimo bimwe mu bice bya Sophia watakariye ku kibuga cy'indege cya Frankfurt mu Budage mu cyumweru gishize. Ibi byatumye hatabaho igikaniro n'abanyamakuru cyari giteganyijwe kubera mu nzu ndangamurage ya Ethiopia iri mu murwa mukuru Addis Abeba, ku wa gatanu ushize . Umukinyi wa filime wo muri Nigeria agiye kwubakana n'igipupe Umupolisi w'iki "robot" yatanguye akazi i Dubai Ikirobo cakoreshejwe mu kubaga amaso ubwa mbere kw'isi BBC ntiramenya ibyo Minisitiri w'intebe wa Ethiopia na Sophia baganiriyeho kuri uyu munsi. Ariko bizwi neza ko ikirobo Sophia kitifitemo ibisubizo biba byaramaze kukibikwamo. Ahubwo ikirobo cy'umukobwa Sophia gikoresha imashini igisobanurira hanyuma kigasubiza gishingiye kukureba ibyo umuntu aba ashatse kuvuga. Abinyujije ku rubuga rwe rwa Twitter, Fitsum Arega, umuyobozi w'ibiro bya Minisitiri w'intebe wa Ethiopia yavuze ko ari impamo koko ko kuri uyu wa mbere ikirobo cya mbere kijya gusa n'umuntu cyitwa Sophia cyahuye na Bwana Abiy, Minisitiri w'intebe wa Ethiopia. Minisitiri w'intebe Abiy ngo yishimiye ko abakora mu kigo cy'ibijyanye n'ikoranabuhanga muri Ethiopia bari mu bakoze Sophia. Ndetse yasezeranyije ko Ethiopia izakomeza guteza imbere ibikorwa byo guhanga udushya no gushyiraho amahirwe y'akazi ku bantu b'intyoza. Ikirobo Sophia cyatangiye gukora mu mwaka wa 2015. Cyamamagaye cyane nyuma yaho cyari kibaye ikirobo cya mbere kibonye ubwenegihugu, ubwo Arabia Saudite yagihaga ubwenegihugu mu mwaka ushize wa 2017.

Kompanyi izwi cyane ya SportPesa iri mu zahagaritswe Mu ibaruwa yandikiwe kompanyi y'iby'itumanaho Safaricom, iyi minisiteri ivuga ko izi kompanyi "zitujuje ibisabwa kugira ngo zongererwe uburenganzira". Gusa iyo baruwa ntisobanura neza ibyo bisabwa. Ntacyo izi kompanyi ziratangaza ku mugaragaro. Kompanyi ya Safaricom yatangaje ko yanze amabwiriza yahawe na Leta yo guhagarika ibikorwa by'izi kompanyi byifashisha serivisi z'ibigo by'itumanaho. Safaricom ivuga ko guhagarika izi kompanyi bifite ingaruka ku bantu barenga miliyoni 12, isaba ubutegetsi kubanza gukora ubukangurambaga mu itangazamakuru mbere yo gufata uyu mwanzuro. SportPesa irazwi ku isi nk'umwe mu baterankunga b'amakipe yo muri shampiyona y'umupira w'amaguru mu Bwongereza. Izina ry'iyi kompanyi riri ku mwambaro w'ikipe ya Everton. Abantu benshi bashaka gutega bakoresha telefone ngendangwa bishyura banashyiraho intego zabo. Ubutegetsi bwa Kenya bwasabye Safaricom guhagarika 'codes' z'izi kompanyi z'imikino y'amahirwe ('betting') zifashishwa kuri telefone muri 'betting'. Ibikorwa bya 'betting' byabaye ubushabitsi bukomeye muri Kenya kubera ikoranabuhanga riteye imbere ryorohereza abantu kugera kuri izi serivisi. Abantu banyuranye bagiye bagaragaza impungenge batewe no kuba umubare munini w'urubyiruko uri kwiringira gushora amafaranga muri iyi mikino y'amahirwe.

Noura Hussein yaciriwe gupfungwa imyaka itanu Uwumuburanira Abdelaha Mohamad avuga ko Noura Hussein w'imyaka 19 yaciye ahabwa igihano co gupfungwa imyaka itanu. Nyina wiwe, Zainab Ahmed, yabwiye BBC ko anezerejwe n'uko ubuzima bw'umwana wiwe burokotse. Abantu benshi rurangiranwa barashigikiye isekeza ryo ku mbuga ngurukanabumenyi, #JusticeforNoura (ubutungane kuri Noura) ryasaba ko arekurwa. Mu kwezi guheze, sentare ya ki Islam yari yamuciriye urubanza rwo gupfa, inyuma yo kwemera ko yishe umugabo wiwe Abdulrahman Mohamed Hammad. Umupfasoni Hussein avuga ko umugabo wiwe yakoresheje bavyara biwe avuga ko bamumufatiye kugira amufate ku nguvu. Igihe yashaka gusubira kumufata ku nguvu ku musi ukurikira yaciye amucumita imbugita aca arapfa. Kurongorwa ku myaka 16 Umupfasoni Hussein yategetswe kurongorwa afise imyaka 16 ku mugabo wiwe yari muvyara we amusumvya imyaka 16. Icegeranyo ca Onu co mu 2017 c'igisata kiraba ibibondo UNICEF kivuga ko ica gatatu c'abana bo muri Sudani barongorwa batarashikana imyaka 18. Mw'itangazo ryaryo, ishirahamwe riharanira agateka ka zina muntu, Amnesty International, ryavuze ko iyo ngingo ari inkuru nziza, ariko ko igipfungo c'imyaka itanu atari akwiye kugihabwa na co nyene. Ryasavye ico gihugu gusubiramwo amategeko agenga ukwubakana, ugufata ku nguvu uwo mwubakanye kugira ababikorewe bareke kuba ari bo bahanwa. Avugana na BBC, nyina wa Hussein yavuze ko umwana wiwe yasa n'uwihebuye inyuma y'aho umugabo wiwe amufatiye ku nguvu. Kwiyahura Zainab Ahmed yavuze ko yari yafashe ingingo yo kwicumita wenyene mugihe yosubira kumufata ku nguvu. Inyuma y'urupfu rw'umugabo wiwe, umupfasoni Hussein yaciye ahungira iwabo kubabwira ivyamushikiye. Kubera ugutinya ko babihorerako, se wiwe yaciye ajana umuryango wiwe ku gipolisi aho yaciye afatirwa. Urubanza yaciriwe rwarateye induru hirya no hino kw'isi, abantu rurangiranwa nka Naomi Campbell na Emma Watson bakaba baranditse ubutumwa kuri Twitter bwo gushigikira umupfasoni Hussein.

Mu ndwi iheze, inama nshikiranganji yafashe ingingo ko Sudani y'Epfo izohindura ibihe vy'amasaha, bagasubira inyuma isaha imwe kuva ku wa 01 z'ukwa kabiri 2021. Ibihe vy'amasaha vy'iki gihugu (fuseau horaire) bizohinduka. Imbere y'aha, yari imbere amasaha atatu ufatiye kw'isaha mpuzamakungu (GMT +3), ariko rero kuva ubu izosubira inyuma isaha, ufatiye kuri GMT nyene (GMT +2). Izi mpinduka zivuze ko niba uyu munsi aka kanya i Juba ari saa moya za mugitondo, guhera ku wa mbere w'indwi iza ku isaha nk'iyi hazoba ari saa kumi n'ebyiri za mugitondo. Imbere y'uko yiyonkora kuri Sudani, yari imbere amasaha atatu ufatiye kw'isaha mpuzamakungu, co kimwe n'ibindi bihugu nka Kenya, Uganda na Tanzania vyo mu karere ka Afrika y'Ubuseruko. Ibi vyumvikana ko Sudani y'Epfo igihe kuba ku masaha amwe n'Uburundi n'u Rwanda. Wodkan Saviour Lazaru wo mw'ishirahamwe riharanira amahoro (Support Peace Initiative Development Organisation), yabwiye BBC ko iri hinduka ari iciyumviro kibi. Ati: "Twaramaze kwinjira mu muryango w'ibihugu vyo muri Afrika y'Ubuseruko, kandi tumenyereye dukoresha isaha yo muri Afrika y'Ubuseruko, iyi nayo ikaba iri imbere amasaha atatu ufatiye kw'isaha mpuzamakungu (GMT +3)". "Izi mpinduka zivuga ko abanyagihugu benshi bazota umutwe kuko batazomenya ico bafata n'ico bareka - kubera bizogira ingaruka mbi ku masaha y'akazi, igihe batondera n'igihe bagodokera". "Jewe nosaba ko reta yosubiramwo iyi ngingo ikareka guhindura amasaha, maze Sudani ikaguma iri imbere amasaha atatu (GMT +3). Hagati aho, umunyeshure Samuel Marial ariko yiga ibijanye n'umwuga wo kumenyesha amakuru kuri kaminuza ya Juba, yakirije yompi iyi ngingo. Ati: "Jewe ndashimye cane iyi ngingo kuko niko vyahora bimeze kera. Aya masaha menshi azogira ingaruka nziza. Jewe nk'umunyeshure, nzoba mfise umwanya ukwiye wo gushika kw'ishure. Aya masaha mashasha arorohereza abanyeshure". Ariko, Deborah Arach, umugore yubatse akaba kandi yiga mu mwaka wa kane kuri iyo kaminuza ya Juba, wewe siko abibona. Ati: "Jewe si nshima izi mpinduka. Nk'umugore, zizonkorako kubera ibikorwa vyo mu rugo bizoca bingora, ntibizonyorohera kubikora imbere y'uko nja kw'ishure". "Bamwe muri twebwe twubatse tuzogira ibibazo n'abagabo bacu kuko bashobora kubona ko twataye ibikorwa vyo mu rugo".

Intumwa z'abashikiranaganji b'imibano ba EAC mu Burundi Ivyo vyaraye busubiye gusabwa n'umugwi w'umutekano w'ishirahamwe ry'ubumwe bwa Afrika mu nama yaryo yasozerewe ejo muri Afrika y'epfo. Abatavuga rumwe na leta y' Uburundi bavuga ko bashima inama Uburundi bwagiriwe n'abakuru b' ibihugu vya Afrika bari mu nama muri Afrika y'epfo ejo. Kubona ikibazo co kwitoza mu kiringo ca gatatu kwa perezida Pierre Nkurunzia, umwe mu batavuga rumwe na Leta, Sylvestre Ntibantunganya, yabwiye BBC ko ico n'ubwo kitadomweko urutoke, ivyo abo bategetsi babwie abarundi vyose ko bizoca mu biganiro, n'ico kibazo kirimwo, kuko ngo ataho babuza ko kizoganirwako. Sylvestre Ntibantunganya, akomeza avuga ko atawokwitwaza ikiringo gisigaye ku nzego zihari ngo avuge ko ivyasabwe n'abo bategetsi ba Afrika bitorangira gushirwa mu ngiro.

Aya makuru avuga ko ku munsi wa Mungu abantu batatu bitwaje inkoho bateye mu rusengero rwa Querentia Ministry muri Wierdapark maze baca batangura kwambura abariko barasenga. Umwe mu bariko barasenga yitwa Pieter van der Westhuizen, asanzwe afise uburenganzira bwo gutunga no gutemberana inkoho, yashoboye kwica babiri muri abo bagabo mu gihe uwundi yashoboye gutoroka. Impera ya Twitter ubutumwa, 1 Ikinyamakuru News24 kivuga ko Bwana Der Westhuizen ari mwenewabo na nyakwigendera w'umukinnyi w'ikipe y'igihugu ya Rugby azwi cane witwa Joost van der Westhuizen. Mu majambo yiwe yasubiwemwo n'iradiyo yigenga, JacrandaFM, umuvugizi w'igipolisi ca Gauteng, Mathapelo Peters, yavuze ati: "Hari itangazo twaronse ry'uwo mukiristu avuga ko yarashe abo bikekwa ko bari abasuma kandi rizoshikirizwa abarongoye inzego z'ubucamanza". Ayo makuru avuga ko umupasitori w'urwo rusengero yakomeretse buke kandi akaba yaciye avurirwa aho nyene.

Abantu bashika 1000 bihaye amabarabara mu gisagara ca Juba basaba kw'ingwano yohagarara Inyuma y'ugutemberera ico gihugu ku kiringo c'iminsi 12, bavuze k'ubukene hamwe n'amabi ashingiye ku gitsina basanzeyo bigoye kuvuga. Abagabo bakiri bato barafashwe ku nguvu, ahandi nabo basabwa gusambanya ku nguvu bamwe mubo mu miryango yabo, abasigaye barorera. Abasirikare benshi barafashe ku nguvu umugore w'imyaka 60, bamurekura bazi ko yapfuye. Abanyagihugu barashonje gushika aho barya amababi y'ibiti, kubera ko ata bifungugwa bafise. Abo bahinga babwiwe ko abantu bose batunze inkoho muri Sudani Yepfo, bigatuma igitigiri c'abapfa ciyongera, ivyo basigura nk'ubwicanyi bukogwa mu gacerere. Ubwo bwicanyi bwadutse inyuma y'umunsi umwe impande zose zishize umukono ku masezerano yo guhagarika ingwano. Amasezerano yose yapfunditswe yo kurangiza ingwano imaze imyaka ine ntiyubahirizwa.

Umutegetsi mushasha Emmerson Mnangagwa yemeye " Akazi, akazi, akazi" ariko abaraba ibintu n'ibindi bavuga ko gusubiza itoto ubutunzi bwa Zimbabwe ari akazi katoroshe Amahera reta ikoresha hamwe n'ideni ry'amahera y'agaciro Zimbabwe ifise n'umurengera, ku buryo ico gihugu gikeneye kubisubiramwo, nk'uko uwuserukira iryo shirahamwe muri ico gihugu Gene Leon yabibwiye itororokanirizo ry'amakuru rya Reuters.
