Umutegetsi mushasha agiye kwimikwa, Emmerson Mnangagwa yiyemeje guteza imbere ubutunzi no kugwiza "akazi , akazi ,akazi". Ico gihugu cigeze kuba gifise ubutunzi bukomeye ubu kibonwa nk'igiseke kigaragara mu karere. "Uko ubutunzi bwifashe muri Zimbabwe biracagoye cane," ni ko Leon yabwiye Reuters. Emmerson Mnangagwa yagarutse muri Zimbabwe Zimbabwe ngo igiye gutangura ibihe bishasha vya Demokarasi Yavuze ko amahera menshi reta ikoresha ategerezwa gusubirwamwo kandi ico gihugu gitegerezwa guhangana n'ideni ry'umurengera cafashe. "Ingingo zo kugabanya igihengeri kinini zitegerezwa kwihutirwa, gusubiramwo ubutunzi bikihutirwa, hanyuma imigenderanire n'amakungu ikiyongera kugira Zimbabwe ironke imfashanyo y'amahera." ni ko Leo yavuze.

Bwana Siddiqi yakubiswe cyane cyane n'umuryango yari yaje gushakamo umugeni Asif Rafiq Siddiqi uri hagati mu myaka 30, abitabiriye ubukwe bahise batangira kumusunika no kumuhata inshyi, banamuciraho ishati n'ipantaro nyuma y'ibyari bimaze kuvugwa n'uyu mugore. Uyu mukwe wari mu birori yakijijwe n'abantu bamugiriye impuhwe. Gushaka abagore barenze umwe ntabwo byemewe muri Pakistan. Gusa, umugabo ashobora gushaka abagore bagera kuri bane, ariko abyemerewe n'abagore be ba mbere. Bigaragara ko Bwana Siddiqi ibi byamunaniye, ariko umugore we mushya n'umuryango we bamenye aya makuru ari uko umugore we wa mbere yitumiye mu birori mu mujyi wa Karachi. Mu mashusho yafashwe, mwenewabo w'umugeni yumvikana abaza uyu mugore ati: "Ni ibiki mushiki wanjye?" Uyu mugore witwa Madiha Siddiqi ntiyazuyaje yahise arasa ku ngingo. Ati: "Uyu ni umugabo wanjye, ni nawe se w'uyu mwana. Yari yambwiye ko agiye i Hyderabad akazamarayo iminsi itatu". Yari kumwe n'umwana w'umuhungu bivugwako ari uwabo. Umuryango wahise umwinjiza mu kindi cyumba aho yagiye gutanga amakuru arambuye. Yarakomeje ababwira ko abaherekeje uyu mugabo ari nyirabukwe na baramukazi be bari bamubeshye ko nyina arwaye. Madamu Siddiqi ati: "Ntabwo mwari muzi ko ari umugabo wanjye? Ese ntanatekereza kuri uyu mwana urengana." Yari afite n'undi wa kabiri Uyu mugore yavuze ko yashakanye n'uyu mugabo mu 2016, nyuma y'uko bahuriye muri kaminuza iri i Karachi aho Bwana Siddiqi yakoraga. Abari baje mu bukwe bamaze kumenya amakuru bahise bashoka uyu mugabo, barasunika ari nako bamukubita inshyi. Ubukwe bwahagaritswe n'umugore uvuga ko bashakanye mbere Ku mashusho, uyu mugabo yahungiye munsi y'imodoka ya Bus, humvikana amajwi y'abantu bavuga bati: "Vamo cyangwa tuyitwike". Yahise avamo akurura inda, ariko abantu bamwe bagerageza kumukiza umujinya w'abashaka kumugirira nabi kurushaho. BBC yagerageje kuvugana na Bwana Siddiqi cyagwa abo mu muryango we ariko ntibaboneka. Rao Nazim, utegeka station ya polisi iri aho hafi yabwiye BBC ko nta kirego giciye mu buryo busanzwe barashyikirizwa. Ati: "Ni ikibazo kireba umuryango, abafite ikibazo bazajya kubikemurira mu miryango". Gusa yatangaje ko uyu mugabo mu 2018 yashakanye mu ibanga n'umugore wa kabiri witwa Zehra Ashraf w'umwarimukazi muri kaminuza muri Karachi. Ko ndetse uyu mugore we wa mbere yamenye iby'ubu bukwe yandikiwe ubutumwa kuri telephone n'uyu mukeba we. Madamu na Bwana Siddiqi mbere bari barahakanye iby'uyu mugore wa kabiri, ariko nyuma uyu mugabo yemeye ko yamushatse. Madamu Ashraf ni nawe wabwiye mukeba we Madamu Siddiqi ko umugabo we agiye kubashakiraho undi mukeba, amuha n'amakuru y'aho biri kubera.

Dr Ndimubanzi ushinzwe ubuzima rusange n'ubuvuzi bw'ibanze avuga ko Ebola itaragera mu Rwanda ariko hakenewe ubushobozi bwinshi mu kuyikumira Ebola imaze igihe ivugwa muri Kongo Kinshasa aho imaze guhitana abantu barenga 1,500 kuva mu kwezi kwa munani umwaka ushize. Muri uku kwezi yageze no muri Uganda aho yahitanye abantu babiri. Minisiteri y'ubuzima mu Rwanda yamurikiye iyi ngengo y'imari ibigo mpuzamahanga n'imiryango nterankunga ndetse n'ishami ry'umuryango w'abibumbye ryita ku buzima, OMS. Iri shami rivuga ko u Rwanda rugomba gukomeza kwirinda no kwitegura igihe cyose Ebola yaba igeze mu gihugu kuko iri mu gihugu gituranyi, nkuko umunyamakuru wa BBC Jean Claude Mwambutsa uri i Kigali abivuga. Umunyamabanga wa Leta muri minisiteri y'ubuzima yavuze ko ayo mafaranga yose ari ayo gukoresha mu gihe cy'amezi atandatu asigaye ngo uyu mwaka urangire. Aya ngo naboneka azajya mu bikorwa by'ubukangurambaga mu turere 15 tw'igihugu twugarijwe no kugerwamo na Ebola, gupima iyi ndwara ahahurira abantu benshi, no kurinda abavura Ebola. Dr Patrick Ndimubanzi, umunyamabanga wa Leta ushinzwe ubuzima rusange n'ubuvuzi bw'ibanze muri minisiteri y'ubuzima, avuga ko iyi ndwara itaragera mu Rwanda ariko kwirinda bisaba ubushobozi. Abajijwe niba ingano y'amafaranga u Rwanda rwifuza itagaragaza ko hari ubwoba budasanzwe ko Ebola yagera no mu Rwanda, Dr Ndimubanzi yavuze ko bidateye ubwoba. Ati: "Kwitegura byose bisaba amafaranga. Tugomba kwitegura, tukagenda tubishyira mu bikorwa uko ubushobozi bubonetse". Abaterankunga banyuranye bagaragarijwe ingengo y'imari u Rwanda rukeneye ngo rwirinde Ebola Abaterankunga batumijwe ntibavuze inkunga bemeye muri iyi nama. Ikigo cy'Ubwongereza gishinzwe iterambere mpuzamahanga, DFID, ni cyo gusa cyatangaje ko cyemeye kurekura miliyoni imwe y'amadolari. Aya ariyongera kuri miliyoni 2,6 z'amadolari Ubwongereza bwari bwaremeye gutanga, yose hamwe abe miliyoni 3,6 z'amadolari agenewe gukumira no kwitegura Ebola.

Ubaye umunsi wa kabiri wikurikiranya iki gihugu gica umuhigo wari usanzweho ku munsi w'ubwandu bwinshi bushya. Ku wa kane, muri Amerika hatangajwe abarwayi bashya barenga 91,000. Muri Amerika hamaze gutangazwa abantu bose hamwe barenga miliyoni 9 banduye coronavirus, nkuko imibare ya Kaminuza ya Johns Hopkins ibigaragaza. Muri bo abarenga 229,000 imaze kubica. Umurepubulikani Donald Trump n'umudemokarate Joe Biden bazakiranurwa n'amatora yo ku wa kabiri. Leta 21 - muri 50 zigize Amerika - zirimo kugaragaramo ukwiyongera kw'iki cyorezo, zimwe mu izo kirimo kwibasira cyane zikaba amajwi yazo ari yo yitezweho kuba ingenzi cyane mu kugena uzatsinda amatora y'uyu mwaka. Muri leta ya Wisconsin iba ari isibaniro mu matora, ibitaro byo mu mujyi wa Green Bay byaburiye ko mitingi ya Perezida Trump y'ejo ku wa gatanu muri uwo mujyi ishobora gutuma ubu bwandu bushya burushaho kwiyongera. Mu itangazo rihuriweho ibitaro byinshi byasohoye, byagize biti: "Ubu ni bwo ari ingenzi cyane kurusha mu kindi gihe cyabayeho kwirinda ibivunge by'abantu, cyane cyane hano i Green Bay muri Wisconsin, aho turimo kubona kumwe mu gukwirakwira kwihuse cyane kwa Covid-19 muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe [z'Amerika]". Ejo ku wa gatanu, mbere yuko mitingi yateganyije ziba, Bwana Trump yanditse kuri Twitter ati: "Gupima kurushaho bihwanye no kwiyongera kw'abasanganwa ubwandu. Dufite uburyo bwa mbere bwiza cyane bwo gupima. Impfu [ziri] HASI CYANE". Muri mitingi za Trump zo mu bihe bya vuba bishize, abazitabiriye barapimwe ndetse bahabwa udupfukamunwa. Zanakorewe hanze mu kwirinda icyorezo cya Covid-19. Ariko muri izo mitingi ntabwo hubahirijwe guhana intera hagati y'umuntu umwe n'undi, ndetse bamwe mu bashyigikiye Trump bakomeje kutambara udupfukamunwa. Bwana Biden na we yakomeje ibikorwa bye byo kwiyamamaza, uretse ko mitingi ze zo zikurikiza amabwiriza yo guhana intera, nk'urugero agahitamo ko abazitabira bamwe baguma mu modoka zabo.

Nico kiyago ca mbere hagati ya Vladimir Putin (i bubamfu) na Joe Biden Mu bindi bavuganye harimwo ibijanye n'imyiyerekano y'abatavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi ibandanya mu Burusiya hamwe n'amasezerano ya nyuma hagati ya Amerika n'Uburusiya ku bijanye n'ibirwanisho vy'ubumara. Perezida Putin yakeje umukuru w'igihugu mushasha wa Amerika ku ntsinzi yiwe mu matora aheruka, nk'uko biri mw'itangazo rya reta y'Uburusiya. Bompi bumvikanye kuzobandanya bavugana. Rimwe na rimwe, uwahoze ari umukuru wa Amerika Donald Trump yagiye atesha agaciro ubutegetsi bwiwe imbere y'Uburusiya akagirirzwa ko yubaha Putin birenze urugero. Ariko Barack Obama nawe yahoze arongoye Amerika- ico gihe Biden akaba yari icegera ciwe - yagirizwa ko yananiwe no gutera igitsure Uburusiya igihe bwigarurira Crimea, bugatera ubuseruko bwa Ukraine, bukanivanga no mu bibera muri Syria. None White House na Kremlin bivuga iki kuri iki kiyago kuri terefone? "Perezida Biden yarasiguye neza ko Amerika izokoresha ubushobozi bwayo bwose mu gukingira inyungu z'igihugu ku bikorwa bizoba bikozwe n'Uburusiya mu guhungabanya Amerika canke ibihugu bigenzi vyayo", nk'uko biri mw'itangazo rya Amerika. Urwandiko rwerekana ivyo bavuganye ejo ku wa kabiri inyuma y'umutaga ruvuga ko aba bakuru b'ibihugu bompi bavuganye ku bijanye n'igitero ku nyabwonko za kompanyi SolarWinds cagirijwe Uburusiya. Bavuze kandi ku makuru avuga ko Kremlin yemereye agashimwe abazokwica abasirikare ba Amerika muri Afghanistani, hamwe kandi n'isumu yahawe uwutavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi bw'Uburusiya, Alexei Navalny. Urwandiko rwa Kremlin narwo ruvuga ibijanye n'iki kiganiro nta na hamwe rwigeze ruvuga ko hari ibibazo vyashikirijwe na Perezida Biden bigatera impari, bikaba bizwi ko muri kahise Biden yahoze yita Perezida Putin ko ari "umuhimbiri wa KGB". Abategetsi b'Uburusiya bavuga ko umukuru w'igihugu cabo yavuze ko "imigenderanire myiza hagati y'Uburusiya na Amerika izoba ari ku nyungu z'ibi bihugu vyompi n'isi yose, mu gihe bose bazomenya ko bompi bafise igikorwa kidasanzwe co kubungabunga amahoro n'umutekano kw'isi". Itangazo rya Kremlin ryongeyeko riti: "Muri rusangi, ikiganiro hagati y'abarongoye Uburusiya na Amerika cari gishingiye ku bucuruzi n'ukuvugana ukuri". Aba bategetsi babiri basa n'abumvikanye kunagura amasezerano yo mu gihe ca Obama yo kugabanya ibirwanisho ruhonyanganda vy'ubumara. Aya masezerano yorangiye mu kwezi kuza, Perezida Trump akaba yari yarahiye ararengwa ko adashobora gusubira kuyaterako igikumu. Iki kiyago na Kremlin mu gihe Antony Blinken yagenywe na Perezida Biden ngo abe umunyamabanga wa reta ajejwe imigenderanire yari ahejeje kwemezwa n'inama nkenguzamateka ku majwi 78-22.

Eric Kabendera ubu arashinjwa ubugizi bwa nabi Eric Kabendera wandika inkuru zicukumbuye amaze ibyumweru bibiri afunze, ubu akurikiranyweho ibyaha byo kunyereza imisoro, gukorana n'abagizi ba nabi n'iyezandonke. Agifatwa yashinjwaga kwiha uburenganzira nk'umuturage wa Tanzania kandi atari we. Iki cyaha cyaje kuvanwa mu byo yaregwaga. Abahagarariye Amerika n'Ubwongereza muri Tanzania batangaje ko bahangayikishijwe no kudakurikiza amategeko y'ikurikiranabyaha bikomeje gukorwa mu butabera muri Tanzania. Batangajeko by'umwihariko bahangayikishijwe n'urugero ruheruka rwa Eric Kabendera ahakozwe "ibidasanzwe mu kumufata, kumufunga no kumushinja ibyaha". Izi ambasade kandi zivuga ko yabanje no kwimwa uburenganzira bwo kubona umwunganizi we mu bihe bya mbere byo kumufunga, ibi ngo bikaba binyuranyije n'amategeko. Abahagarariye Amerika n'Ubwongereza muri Tanzania basabye Leta gutanga ubutabera hakurikijwe amategeko nk'uko ngo biri mu masezerano mpuzamahanga anyuranye burenganzira bwa muntu Tanzania yasinye . Eric Kabendera azagaruka mu rukiko tariki 19 z'uku kwezi kwa munani.

Abagore bakurikira impanuro kwa muganga Muri ivyo ubushakashatsi bwatoye, bisigura ko ikinini kimwe gishobora gukingira ku ngwara zibiri ziri mu zishobora kubangamira ubuzima bw'umuvyeyi n'ubw'umwana. Mu gihe gikingira abagore bibungenze kuri malaria, ikinini "sulphadoxine-pyrimethamine" (SP) basanze gifasha gukingira ku ngwara za mburugu, "chlamydia", "trichomoniasis" na "bactéries" zitera igitsina-gore, niko ishule "London School of Hygiene & Tropical Medicine" ryavuze. Hari abana 880 000 bapfira mu nda hamwe n'imiliyoni 1.2 y'abana bapfa bavutse ku mwaka mu karere ka Afrika ko mu bumanuko bwa Sahara, benshi muri abo bana bakicwa n'ingwara zitera abavyeyi. Abakoze ubwo bushakashatsi bizeye ko uwo muti wo gukingira abagore bibungenze mu turere tugwiriyemwo malaria, ugiye gukwiragizwa kubera bino vyatowe.

Ikarata ya Portugal Uwo muriro wadutse ahitwa Vila Nova da Rainha, watanguye igihe ibirika yo gushusha amazi yaturika, niko umukuru w'igisagara yavuze. Abantu barenga 60 nibo bari muri ico kibanza, bakurikira urukino rw'amakarata, abandi baraba umupira kuri TV. Uwo muriro waturiye idari, uca ukwira hose, abantu baratekegwa n'ubwoba. Vila Nova da Rainha yegereye igisagara ca Tondela, ku birometero 260 mu buraruko bushira ubuseruko bwa Lisbone. Umukuru w'igisagara ca Tondela, José António Jesus, yabwiye ikinyamakuru Público ko uwo muriro watumye haduka ivyotsi vyinshi vyo mu bwoko bwa "monoxyde de carbone". Niburiburi abantu 35 bababaye, batandatu cane, benshi bafise ingorane zo guhema, nkuko itangazamakuru ryaho ryavuze. Abahagiriye ingorane bajanywe ku bitaro i Lisbone na Porto, nkuko ikinyamakuru Diário de Notícias cavuze.

Umuyobozi uhagarariye itsinda ryakoze icyegeranyo, Lori Lightfoot, yavuze ko icyo cyegeranyo ari "umusingi w'impinduka" Itsinda ry'abantu bashyizweho nyuma y'imyigaragambyo yamagana irasa rikorwa na polisi, ryavuze ko bamwe mu bapolisi "badaha agaciro ubuzima bw'abantu batari abazungu". Iryo tsinda ryavuze ko urwego rwa polisi rwibasira abo mu bwoko bw'Abirabura n'aba Hisipaniya kandi rugakoresha imbaraga zirenze izemewe n'amategeko ndetse abapolisi bakabiceceka. Icyegeranyo gisaba ko haba impinduka zikomeye zigera ku 100. Iryo tsinda ryasanze ko 74% by'abantu babarirwa mu majana barashwe n'abapolisi mu myaka ya vuba ishize, bari Abirabura, n'ubwo Abirabura bagize 33% gusa by'abaturage bose muri Chicago. Incamake y'icyegeranyo, cyasabwe n'umuyobozi w'umujyi wa Chicago, Rahm Emanuel, isobanura ko ubwoba ndetse no kutagirira icyizere igipolisi bifite ishingiro. Umuyobozi mukuru mushya wa Polisi, Eddie Johnson, nawe akaba ari Umwirabura ubwe, yarahiriye kurandura ivanguraruhu rirangwa mu gipolisi. Nyuma yo kurahirira imirimo mishya yabwiye abanyamakuru ati: "Dufite ivanguraruhu muri Amerika. Dufite ivanguraruhu i Chicago. Ubwo rero birumvikana ko dufite n'ivanguraruhu mu rwego rwacu. Intego yanjye ni ukurandura iryo vangura." Umuyobozi wa polisi Eddie Johnson yasezeranyije kurandura ivanguraruhu rirangwa muri polisi ya Chicago Urwego rwa polisi mu mujyi wa Chicago ni urwa gatatu mu bunini muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika. Umuyobozi uhagarariye itsinda ryakoze icyegeranyo, Lori Lightfoot, yavuze ko icyo cyegeranyo ari "umusingi w'impinduka" ndetse yasabye polisi n'abayobozi kuzahura imibanire myiza hagati y'igipolisi n'abaturage. Yabwiye abanyamakuru ati: "Akababaro n'uburakari abaturage b'uyu mujyi batweretse...ni ikintu gikwiye kumvwa, bikwiye kwitabwaho. Kandi niba tugomba gutera intwambwe, bigomba gukurikizwa." Itsinda ryakoze ubugenzuzi ku myitwarire y'igipolisi n'urwego rugenzura abapolisi ryasanze "rwasenyutse" ndetse risaba ko rusimbuzwa "urundi rushya kandi rukorera mu mucyo". Emanuel yagize ati: "Nta shiti ko dufite akazi kenshi ko gukora" yongeraho ko abantu bagomba kugira icyizere mu rwego rusuzuma imyitwarire ya polisi. Yavuze ko agitegereje gusobanurirwa n'abakoze ubugenzuzi ndetse no kubona icyegeranyo cyose, mbere yo gutanga ibindi bisobanuro birambuye. Greg Livingston, impirimbanyi y'uburenganzira bwa kiremwamuntu yavuze ko icyi cyegeranyo "kibyutsa imitekerereze kuri iki kibazo kandi gicana urumuri mu mwijima." Iraswa ry'ingimbi Laquan McDonald muri Chicago ryateye imyigaragambyo Imibare yatangajwe mu kwezi gushize yerekanye ko ubwicanyi muri Chicago bwazamutse ku kigero cya 84% mu mezi ya mbere y'umwaka wa 2016 ugereranyije n'umwaka ushize. Uyu mujyi wagaragayemo irasa rigera ku nshuro 575 n'ubwicanyi 125 ugereranyije n'irasa 290 ndetse n'ubwicanyi 68 mu gihe kimwe mu mwaka wa 2015. Umuyobozi wa polisi, Johnson, ufite imyaka 27 y'uburambe mu kazi, yatangiye imirimo ye mu gihe cy'umujinya wa rubanda utewe n'iraswa ry'umwana w'ingimbi Laquan MacDonald, wishwe n'umupolisi w'umuzungu. Iraswa rye ryateye impagarara z'imyimyigaragambyo ndetse rituma minisiteri y'ubucamanza itangiza iperereza mu bikorwa by'irasa bikorwa n'urwego rwa polisi ya Chicago.

Imikino ya nyuma y'igikombe cya Afurika cy'ibihugu guhera muri 2019 izajya ikinwa n'amakipe 24. Komite nyobozi y'impuzamashyirahamwe y'umupira w'amaguru muri Afurika, CAF, ibyo yabyemereje mu nama yabereye kuri uyu wa kane i Rabat mu murwa mukuru wa Maroc. Guhera muri 1996 imikino ya nyuma y'iri rushanwa yakinwaga n'amakipe 16. Icyemezo cyo kumenya niba amezi iyo mikino ikinwamo azahindurwa ikavanwa mu kwa mbere n'ukwa kabiri igashyirwa mu kwa gatandatu n'ukwa karindwi kiracyategerejwe. Kongera umubare w'amakipe akina imikino ya nyuma y'igikombe cya Afurika cy'ibihugu bishobora gutera ibibazo igihugu cya Cameroon gikomba kuyakira muri 2019. Byabaye ngomba muri kino cyumweru ko ministri ushinzwe imikino muri icyo gihugu anyomoza amakuru yavugaga ko imyiteguro yo kuyakira yakerewe.

Michelle Umuhoza, umuvugizi w'uru rwego rukurikirana ibyaha ati: "Umuhoza Jackie yafashwe ejo tariki 27 akurikiranyweho icyaha cy'ubugambanyi n'ubutasi". Nta makuru arambuye Madamu Umuhoza yatanze, yavuze ko ibi biri gukorwaho iperereza. Jackie Umuhoza w'imyaka 25, ni umukobwa w'umuvugabutumwa (pastor) w'Umunyarwanda Deo Nyirigira bivugwa ko aba mu mujyi wa Mbarara muri Uganda aho afite urusengero. Bwana Nyirigira yavuzwe kenshi mu binyamakuru bibogamiye ku ruhande rwa leta y'u Rwanda bimushinja kuba umuhuzabikorwa mu gace ka Mbarara w'umutwe wa RNC urwanya ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda. Jackie Umuhoza n'abavandimwe be baba mu Rwanda, umwe mu bo mu muryango wabo utifuje gutangazwa yabwiye BBC ko aba bavandimwe hashize igihe kinini bambuwe ibyangombwa byabo byose n'inzego z'umutekano. Amategeko ahana mu Rwanda avuga ko ibyaha bifatwa nk'ubugambanyi cyangwa ubutasi birimo; kumena ibanga rya leta, gushakisha ibanga rya leta ugambiriye kurimena, gukora ibyo ugamije gushyira imbere inyungu z'ikindi gihugu n'ibindi. Iki cyaha gihanishwa igifungo kitarenga imyaka 15 iyo igihugu kiri mu mahoro, cyangwa imyaka itarenga 25 mu gihe cy'intambara nk'uko ingingo ya 192 y'iri tegeko ibivuga. Hari amakuru avugwa ko Jackie Umuhoza yafashwe we n'abavandimwe be babiri, ibi ariko Madamu Michelle Umuhoza uvugira RIB yavuze ko ibyo atari byo ko uwafashwe ari Jackie Umuhoza gusa. Mu kwezi kwa gatatu hari amakuru yavuzwe ko aba bavandimwe bafashwe bagafungwa bakekwaho ibyaha bifitanye isano n'ibivugwa ku mubyeyi wabo, amakuru ataremejwe n'ubutegetsi. Ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda bushinja ubwa Uganda gufasha umutwe wa RNC, gufata no gufunga binyuranyije n'amategeko Abanyarwanda bamwe baba muri Uganda no kubakorera iyicarubozo. Ubutegetsi bwa Uganda bushinja ubw'u Rwanda gukora ibikorwa by'ubutasi ku butaka bwa Uganda. Kuva aya makimbirane ya politiki y'ibihugu byombi atangiye, ni ubwa mbere ubutegetsi mu Rwanda bufashe umuturage bumushinja ubutasi, bushobora kuba bufitanye isano n'aya makimbirane.

Abasirikare bari mu bikorwa vyo kurondera iyo ndege mu karere ka Aberdares Uwo mushikiranganji yavuze ko abantu cumi bari mu ndege Cesna 208 yari imaze iminsi ibiri yarabuzwe irengero bose bitavye Imana. Ku bw'uwo mutegetsi umugwi w'abatabazi b'ikigo kigenzura ibikoko vyo mw'ishamba Kenya Wildlife Service, nibo batoye iyo ndege basanze ari ibimanyu kuri uno wa kane mu gitondo mu karere ka Aberdares ku birometero 80 mu buraruko bw'umugwa mukuru Nairobi. Amashusho yayo yerekanywa n'ikinyamakuru Nation: Impera ya Twitter ubutumwa, 1 Abandi bashitse muri ico kibanza iryo sanganya ryabereyemwo, ni abaganga hamwe n'abakozi b'ikigo c'umusalaba utukura "Croix Rouge". Bamwe mu bari mu bikorwa vy'ubutabazi bari kumwe n'abamenyeshamakuru mw'ishamba rya Aberdares Ubutegetsi buvuga ko impanuka y'iyo ndege yoba yatewe n'igicu kibi mu gihe hari haguye imvura nyinshi irimwo n'igipfungu, ariko ngo bwatanguje n'itohoza. Abadereva babiri hamwe n'ingenzi umunani nibo baguye muri iyo mpanuka, umushikiranganji Maringa akaba yahojeje imiryango yabuze. Iyo ndege yabuzwe irengero kuri "radar" ku munsi wa kabiri ku muhingamo, haheze isaha irenga ivuye mu gisagara ca Kitale, mu burengero bw'igihugu ija i Nairobi.

Abantu batari bacye bamunenze abandi baramutuka ku mbuga nkoranyambaga kubera gukoresha indirimbo yitwa Doom ya Coucou Chloe, irimo amagambo ya kisilamu azwi nka Hadith. Rihanna yavuze ko gukoresha iyo ndirimbo byari "amakosa" kandi "mu by'ukuri, amakosa yo kutita ku bintu". Hadith ni urwunge rw'amagambo bivugwa ko yavuzwe n'Intumwa Muhammad. Igitabo gitagatifu cya Isilamu, Korowani, kivuga ko amagambo ya Hadith ari amwe mu matagatifu cyane mu yandi yose ya Isilamu. Umwe mu mirongo iyagize w'Icyarabu wakoreshejwe muri iriya ndirimbo uvuga ku munsi w'imperuka. Coucou Chloe wahimbye iyo ndirimbo yasabye imbabazi avuga ko atari azi ko indirimbo ye irimo imirongo ya Isilamu. 'Isilamu si ukurata ubwiza' Ibikoresho by'ubwiza n'imyambaro ikorwa n'uruganda Fenty rwa Rihanna byakunzwe gushimwa ko byita ku runyurane rw'amoko y'abatuye isi. Ariko bamwe mu basilamu bakundaga ibyo akora, bibajije impamvu yakoresheje iriya ndirimbo mu kumurika utwambaro tw'imbere mu kiganiro cyaciye kuri za televiziyo ku wa gatanu w'icyumweru gishize. Hodhen Liaden w'imyaka 26, asanzwe yandika ku bwiza ndetse akerekana ko akunda ibikorwa bya Fenty ya Rihanna, ariko yavuze ko ubu ibintu bishobora guhinduka kuri we. Yabwiye ikiganiro Newsbeat cya BBC ati: "Isilamu si ukurata ubwiza, ukwemera si ukurata ubwiza." Hodhen avuga ko yakundaga gukoresha ibicuruzwa bya Fenty ariko kubera ikosa bakoze ngo ashobora guhindura ibitekerezo. Ndetse avuga ko ashobora guhagarika gukoresha ibikoresho bamuhaye ku buntu kugira ngo abamamarize ku mbuga nkoranyambaga. Hodhen avuga ko ashobora guhagarika kugura ibicuruzwa bya Fenty Hodhen si we wenyine ibi byarakaje. Arooj Aftab wamamaza imideri kuri internet yabwiye BBC ko mbere y'uko Rihanna na Coucou Chloe basaba imbabazi, yarebye ibyo bakoze "akumva ameze nk'urwaye". Ati: "Iriya ni Hadith bashyize mu ndirimbo aho abagore babyina bambaye utwenda tw'imbere. "Isilamu iriyubaha cyane - [biriya] bihabanye nayo. Nibaza ko buri Musilamu afite kumva ko yatutswe." Arooj avuga ko abonye iriya ndirimbo ikoreshwa na Fenty yumvise "abaye nk'urwaye" 'Amafoto ateye isoni' Si ubwa mbere Rihanna ashinjwe kwifata nabi imbere y'idini ya Isilamu. Mu 2013, yategetswe kuva ku musigiti wa Abu Dhabi ubwo yari amaze kuhifotoreza "amafoto ateye isoni". Ibikorwa byo kumurika imideri nabyo hambere byagiye bishinjwa "kutifata neza" imbere ya Isilamu. Mu kwezi kwa munani, Kanye West yanenzwe kwita inkweto agurisha za Yeezy Boost amazina y'abamalayika bo muri Isilamu - Israfil na Asriel.

Umujandarume arinze imodoka bivugwa ko yazanye Kabuga ku rukiko ejo ku wa kabiri Bwana Kabuga, uregwa ibyaha bya Jenoside, uyu munsi yagejejwe mu rukiko rw'i Paris mu Bufaransa hafi y'aho yafatiwe kugira ngo haburanwe ku kumwimurira ahandi. Nibwo bwa mbere yari abonetse mu ruhame mu myaka irenga 20 ishize, yari yicaye mu igare ry'abamugaye, yambaye ipantaro ya 'jeans', umupira wo kwifubika w'ubururu n'agapfukamunwa. Bwana Kabuga yavuze gusa yemeza ko umwirondoro wasomwe ari uwe nk'uko bivugwa na Reuters. Serge Brammertz umushinjacyaha w'urwego rwasigaye rurangiza imirimo yasizwe n'urukiko mpuzamahanga rwa Arusha yatangaje ko Kabuga yafashwe bisabwe n'uru rwego bityo ko ari rugomba kumufunga. Kabuga w'imyaka 84 yafashwe kuwa gatandatu mu gitondo mu nzu ntoya yari acumbitsemo, abatuye hafi aho batangaje ko ari umusaza wabagaho mu ibanga, utavugishaga abantu kandi wari urwaye. Abunganizi mu mategeko ba Kabuga ejo basohoye itangazo rivuga ko batifuza ko hari ahandi yoherezwa. Biteganyijwe no mu iburanisha rya none bashimangira ibi. Emmanuel Altit umufaransa uri mu bunganira Kabuga mu rukiko uyu munsi kuwa gatatu Uruhande rwa Kabuga rwasabye ko iri buranishwa ryimurwa. Urukiko rwemeye ubusabe bw'uruhande rw'uregwa ruvuga ko irindi buranisha rizaba tariki 27 z'uku kwezi kwa gatanu. Reuters ivuga ko Kabuga asohoka mu rukiko yazamuye akaboko afunze igipfunsi imbere ya benshi mu bo mu muryango we bari imbere y'urukiko. Félicien Kabuga ashobora koherezwa i La Haye mu Buholandi mbere yo kujyanwa i Arusha muri Tanzania aho ruriya rwego ruburanishiriza imanza z'abakekwaho uruhare muri jenoside mu Rwanda. Bwana Kabuga ashinjwa ibyaha birimo gucura umugambi wa jenoside, yiciwemo Abatutsi basaga 800,000 n'Abahutu batari bashyigikiye jenoside.

Ishuri rya gisirikare rya West Point rifite amateka maremare kandi ateye ishema ahera mu bihe byo mu ntangiriro y'Amerika Ni kumwe mu gukopera gukomeye kubayeho kuri iryo shuri mu myaka ibarirwa muri za mirongo ishize. Abanyeshuri barenga 70 bashinjwe kurenga ku mahame y'iri shuri - azwi nka Cadet Honor Code - ubwo bari mu kizamini cy'imibare, barimo kwiga mu buryo bw'iyakure mu kwirinda coronavirus. Benshi muri abo ba 'cadets' bemeye ko bakopeye muri icyo kizamini cyo mu kwezi kwa gatanu. Abarimu bigisha abo banyeshuri bagize amakenga ubwo babonaga ibintu bidasanzwe barimo gukosora ibizamini by'imihiriko (calcul). Aba 'cadets' 72 muri abo bavugwa ko bakopeye biga mu mwaka wa mbere, mu gihe undi umwe we yiga mu mwaka wa kabiri. 55 bemeye ko bakopeye boherejwe muri gahunda y'amezi atandatu yo kubagira inama, ndetse bazakomeza kuba muri gahunda y'igeragezwa mu gihe cyabo cyose gisigaye cy'amasomo ku ishuri West Point, nkuko bivugwa n'ibitangazamakuru byo muri Amerika. Bamwe mu bavugwagaho gukopera bararetswe habuze ibimenyetso cyangwa kubera ko bavuye mu ishuri, mu gihe abandi benshi bo bazitaba inteko igizwe n'abanyeshuri bagenzi babo ngo barebe niba bazahanwa cyangwa bazirukanwa. 'Byaherukaga mu 1976' Amategeko y'imyitwarire agenga iri shuri azwi nka Cadet Honor Code, yanditse mu buryo budasibika ku rwibutso rwo kuri iryo shuri. Agira ati: "Umunyeshuri [cadet] ntabwo azabeshya, ntabwo azakopera, ntabwo aziba, cyangwa ngo yihanganire ababikora". Mu itangazo yahaye ikinyamakuru USA Today, Liyetona Jenerali Darryl Williams ukuriye iri shuri yagize ati: "Uburyo bw'indangagaciro bwo muri West Point burakomeye kandi burakora nkuko bwagenwe". "Muri iki cyorezo [cya Covid-19] twafashe icyemezo ku bushake cyo gushimangira ibyo tugenderaho mu myigire. Turimo gutuma abanyeshuri baryozwa ibyo tugenderaho bijyanye n'imyigire". Ibiro ntaramakuru Associated Press bitangaza ko uku ari ko gukopera gukomeye cyane kubayeho ku ishuri West Point kuva mu mwaka wa 1976. Icyo gihe abanyeshuri 153 barirukanwe cyangwa baregura bava ku masomo kubera gukopera mu kizamini ku bijyanye n'ubuhanga bw'amashanyarazi (cyangwa umuyagankuba mu Kirundi), ibi bizwi nka 'electrical engineering'. Nyuma yuko hari abinubiye uko iperereza kuri iryo kopera ry'icyo gihe ryari ryakozwe, benshi muri abo banyeshuri bongeye kwemererwa kwiga kuri iryo shuri banemererwa gusoza amasomo yabo. Ishuri rya gisirikare rya West Point riri mu ntera igera hafi kuri 100km mu majyaruguru y'umujyi wa New York. Rizwiho kuba ryarizwemo na bamwe mu ba jenerali bazwi cyane bo mu ngabo z'Amerika, barimo nka Douglas MacArthur na Dwight Eisenhower barwanye intambara ya kabiri y'isi.

Abantu bihaye amabarabara biyamiriza prezida Joseph Kabila Abo basenyeri bavuze ko batiteguye kubandanya barongora ibiganiro ataho bishika, nkuko umumenyeshamakuru wa BBC Thomas Fessy yabishikirijwe. Bavuga ko abarondera kwumvikana batokwibagira intego nkuru-ukuringaniza amatora imbere y'impera y'umwaka uza ariko imbere yaho Prezida Joseph Kabila asabwa kugena umushikiranganji wa mbere mushasha imigambwe itavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi ivuga ko yokwihitiramwo. Ikindi ni uko umurwi ujejwe gukurikirana ivy'itunganya ry'amatora utegekanywa muri ayo masezerano utarashingwa. Abakurikiranira hafi ingorane ziri muri Congo bafise amakenga ko Bwana Kabila ashobora kutubahiriza amasezerano canke agateba kuyashirisha mu ngiro, bigatuma igihugu cinjira mu rundi ruhagarara rwa politike.

Abakobwa ntibarekuriwe gucukura amabuye y'agaciro Pili Hussein yakuriye mu muryango munini cane mu gihugu ca Tanzaniya. Ni umukobwa w'umworozi afise amararo menshi. Se wa Pili afise abagore batandatu, akaba ari umwe mu bana 38. "Papa yamfata nk'umuhungu, akansaba kuraba ibitungwa, sinigeze nkunda ubwo buzima," niko yavuze. N'igihe amaze kurongogwa ntiyigeze agira akanyamuneza ku buryo ku myaka 31 yaciye ava ku mugabo. Igihe yariko ararondera akazi, yisanze yashitse mu gasagara gatoyi ka Mererani muri Tanzaniya, munsi y'umusozi Kilimanjaro, aho amabuye y'agaciro bita "tanzanite" acukurigwa. Abungere b'aba Maasai nibo batoye amabuye y'agaciro ya "tanzanite" mu 1967 "Sinigeze nja kw'ishule, ku buryo ata kundi nari kugira," niko Pili avuga. "Abakobwa ntibarekuriwe gucukura amabuye y'agaciro, nca ninjira murako kazi nigize umugabo, nk'umuntu afise inguvu. Nafashe ipantalo ndende, ndazigegenamwo amakabutura, nca nsa n'abagabo. Uko niko nabigenjeje." Mu kwiyoberanya cane, yaciye ahindura n'izina. "Banyita Uncle Hussein, ntawe nabwira ko izina ryanje ari Pili. Nuno munsi ugiye mw'ikambi undondera, ubaza uti, Uncle Hussein." Pili yakora amasaha 10-12 ku munsi, acukura amabuye y'agaciro, mu binogo vy'uburebure bw'imetero amajana uja mu kuzimu. Pili n'abo bakorana barashobora gushika ku metero 600 mu kuzimu "Narashobora gushika ku metero 600 mu kuzimu, turondera amabuye y'agaciro. Nabikorana ubutwari nk'abandi bagabo. Nari nkomeye cane, nkakora nkashika ku vyo abandi bagabo bashikako." "Nigenza nk'inguge," niko avuga. "Sinashobora kugwana, sinavuga neza, nitwaza imbugita nk'umu Maasai. Nta washobora kumenya ko ndi umukobwa, kuko ivyo nakora vyose nabikora nk'umuhungu." Pili yaguye ku mabuye abiri ya "tanzanite" aba ariyo amutungisha Inyuma y'umwaka yaciye atunga, aguye ku mabuye manini ya "tanzanite". Amahera aronse yaciye ayubakiramwo amazu se wiwe, mama wiwe hamwe n'ihasa ry'umukobwa bavukana. Ayandi ayagura ibikoresho, aca arondera abamukorera muri ako kazi ko gucukura amabuye y'agaciro. Haheze igihe kirekire Pili yahavuye amenyekana, bitewe n'umugore yitwaye mu gipolisi avuga ko bamwe mu bacukura amabuye y'agaciro bamufashe ku nguvu, Pili aca arafatwa. "Igihe igipolisi kiziye, abagabo bari bafashe uwo mukobwa ku nguvu baciye bavuga bati, "uwo niwe mugabo yabikoze," munyuma nca njanwa ku biro vy'igipolisi," niko Pili yavuze. Yaciye abona ko akwiye kuvuga ukuri. Yasavye igipolisi kurondera umugore yomusuzuma, kugira ngo yerekane ko atari we yabikoze, munyuma baramurekura. Abacukuzi bari bamaranye igihe ntivyaboroheye kuvyemera, ntibategera ingene bashobora kumara igihe kingana uko babeshwa. "Ntibashoboye kwemera n'igihe igipolisi kibabwiriye ko ndi umukobwa," niko yavuze. "Ntivyari vyoroshe kwemera gushika mu mwaka wi 2001 igihe babonye ndongowe, nkubaka urugo."

Manchester United imaze kubona amanota atatu gusa mu manota icyenda yashoboraga kuba yarabonye kugeza ubu muri uyu mwaka w'imikino wa Premiere League Iyi ntsinzwi ni byo bitego byinshi Mourinho atsindiwe mu rugo mu mateka y'ubutoza bwe, kandi ubu amaze gutsindwa imikino ibiri muri itatu amaze gukina muri shampiyona ya Premiere League y'uyu mwaka. Yagize ati: "Jye jyenyine natsindiye ibikombe bya Premiere League byinshi kurusha ibyo abandi batoza 19 bose hamwe batsindiye. Natwaye bitatu bo batwara bibiri." Yasubije umunyamakuru wamubazaga ikibazo ati: "Mpa icyubahiro, mpa icyubahiro, mpa icyubahiro wa mugabo we." Igitego cy'umutwe cya Harry Kane n'ibindi bibiri bya Lucas Moura ku kibuga Old Trafford cya Manchester United byatumye Tottenham ikomeje gutsinda muri shampiyona y'uyu mwaka, ubu ikaba yicaye ku mwanya wa kabiri ku rutonde rw'agateganyo rwa shampiyona. Muri iki cyumweru nabwo Mourinho yari mu kiganiro n'abanyamakuru cyabayemo amakimbirane ubwo yageraga aho cyabereye habura iminota 30 ku isaha nyirizina cyari gutangiriraho. Icyo gihe yavuze ko abanye neza na Ed Woodward, umuyobozi wungirije w'iyi kipe, hanyuma ahita asohoka hashize gusa iminota 4 n'amasegonda 19. Uyu Munya-Portugali yatsindiye igikombe cya Premiere League inshuro nyinshi kurusha abatoza bandi bose bo muri Premiere League muri iki gihe. Yatwaye ibikombe bitatu mu nshuro ebyiri yatoje Chelsea, mu gihe Pep Guardiola na Manuel Pellegrini buri umwe yatwaye igikombe kimwe muri Manchetser City. Mourinho yagize ati: "Murashaka gukora igitangaza ku ikipe yanjye yakinnye neza cyane kandi ubirebeye ku kuntu umukino wagenze twakinnye neza cyaneeeeee none murigushaka kugerageza guhindura iki kiganiro [n'abanyamakuru], muti 'reka byose tubyegeke kuri uyu mugabo'." Abajijwe impamvu yakinnye yugarira muri uyu mukino na Tottenham, Mourinho yagize ati: "Munyihanganire. Mugomba kumbwira ikintu cy'ingenzi kurusha ibindi kuko jyewe ntacyo nzi." "Iyo ntsinze imikino nza hano inshuro nyinshi kandi ntimwishimira ko ntsinda imikino ubundi mukavuga ko ikintu cy'ingenzi kurusha ibindi ari uburyo bwo gukina."

Amasanamu yatanzwe n'ikigo c'Ubushinwa kijejwe ibirere (National Space Administration) yerekana iri bendera ritukura ry'inyenyeri zitanu ririko rirahungabana ku kwezi. Aya masanamu yafashwe na kamera y'ikigendajuru Chang'e-5 imbere y'uko kiva ku kwezi ku wa kane gitwaye amabuye gikuye ku kwezi. Abashinwa bari bamaze gushikayo ku ncuro zibiri zose nta na bamwe bari bwigere bashobora kurishingayo. Amerika niyo yatanguye gushinga ibendera ku kwezi igihe ikigendajuru Apollo 11 cashikayo mu 1969. Kuva ico gihe, ayandi mabendera atanu niyo yashinzweyo mu kiringo c'imyaka itatu gusa, ni ukuvuga gushika mu 1972. Mu 2012 ikigo kijejwe ibirere co muri Amerika, Nasa, cerekanye amasanamu kigaragaza ko rimwe muri ayo mabendera atanu ya Amerika rigihungabana, ariko abahinga basubiwemwo n'ibinyamakuru bavuga ko risa n'iryacuye kubera imishwarara y'izuba. Ubushinwa buvuga iki kuri uru rugendo rwo ku kwezi? Ikinyamakuru ca reta Global Times kivuga ko ibendera ry'Ubushinwa ku kwezi ryibutsa "umunezero udasanzwe" waranze Abanyamerika bakoze izi ngendo muri Apollo. Ikigendajuru Chang'e-5 cashitse ku kwezi cururukira mu buraruko bushira uburengero bwako. Iri bendera ry'Ubushinwa ni iryo riri i buryo Iri bendera ry'Ubushinwa rifise ubwaguke bw'imetero zibiri n'uburebure bwa sentimetero 90, ariko rikaba ripima hafi kirogaramu imwe (1kg). Uwuhagarariye ibi bikorwa, Li Yunfeng, yabwiye ikinyamakuru Global Times ko iri bendera ryasizwe ibintu bikenewe kugira rishobore kurinda imbeho. Cheng Chang ahagarariye uwo mugambi avuga ko "ibendera risanzwe ritoshobora kurinda imbeho yo ku kwezi". Umuhinga w'ikirere wa Amerika Buzz Aldrin ari iruhande y'ibendera rya mbere rya Amerika ryashinzwe ku Kwezi mu 1969 Ayandi mabendera ya Amerika yarashoboye gushingwa ku kwezi, uyu ni umuhinga w'ikirere wa Amerika, James Irwin ariko aramutsa ibendera ku kwezi mu 1971 Uru rugendo rw'ikigendajuru Chang'e-5 ku kwezi rubaye urwa gatatu rw'Ubushinwa rugenze neza mu kiringo c'imyaka indwi.

'Baba Lao', indirimbo y'umuhanzi ukomeye muri Afurika Diamond Platnumz, yasubiwemo ubu ishimagiza Perezida Magufuli Mu kwiyamamaza kw'ishyaka riri ku butegetsi 'Chama Cha Mapinduzi' (CCM), amagambo y'indirimbo baheruka gusohora zakunzwe cyane barayahinduye bagamije gushimagiza Perezida John Magufuli. Mu matora yo ku wa gatatu, uyu mukandida wa CCM azaba arimo guhatanira manda ya kabiri y'imyaka itanu. Umuhanzi uzwi cyane mu njyana ya 'pop' Diamond Platnumz yasubiyemo indirimbo ye yamamaye cyane ya 'Baba Lao' - ijambo ry'Igiswahili ugenekereje rivuze 'Umukoresha wabo' cyangwa 'Ubakuriye'. Ubu iyi ndirimbo yahindutse 'Magufuli Baba Lao'. Ntabwo ishimagiza gusa Perezida Magufuli, ahubwo inashimagiza Visi Perezida Samia Suluhu na Minisitiri w'intebe Kassim Majaliwa ndetse n'abandi bategetsi, n'ishyaka rya CCM. Abatavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi na bo bafite abahanzi bifashisha mu bikorwa byabo byo kwiyamamaza. Aya mayeri - yo kureshya abatora b'urubyiruko (cyangwa urwaruka mu Kirundi) - urebye ntabwo atunguranye kubera ko hafi bibiri bya gatatu bya miliyoni 59 zituye Tanzania ni abafite munsi y'imyaka 25. Nanone kandi amateka agaragaza ko ari ibintu bikunze kubaho ko abahanzi bakora indirimbo zivuga kuri politike, nkuko bivugwa na Dr Vicensia Shule wigisha kuri Kaminuza ya Dar es Salaam akaba n'inzobere mu bijyanye n'ubuhanzi burimo kubyina. Yagize ati: "Abahanzi n'abanyamuziki bagize uruhare mu kurwanira ukwibohora kwa Tanzania ndetse bikomeza kuba gutyo na nyuma y'ubwigenge. Bakoreshwa n'abanyapolitike". 'Kuyoboka ni ingenzi' Ariko Dr Shule ntiyemera ko uku gushimagiza abanyapolitike abahanzi bose bagukora babikuye ku mutima. Ibi ahanini biterwa n'amategeko akaze yashyizweho muri iyi myaka itanu ishize agamije gutuma abahanzi baguma ku murongo - ndetse na perezida usaba ko ayobokwa. Diamond Platnumz afite inzu itunganya umuziki ndetse akagira na radio na televiziyo Mu kwezi kwa karindwi uyu mwaka, Perezida Magufuli yatumye abakeba be babiri b'igihe kirekire - Diamond Platnumz na Ali Kiba - bitabira mitingi ya CCM mu murwa mukuru Dodoma. Iyo nama yari igamije gusoza amakimbirane yose bari bafitanye. Harmonize, undi muhanzi ukomeye, na we yitabiriye iyo mitingi, nubwo yari amaze igihe na we ashwanye na Diamond Platnumz nyuma yo kuva mu nzu itunganya umuziki ya Diamond. Amagambo ya Bwana Magufuli muri iyo mitingi yasubiwemo mu bitangazamakuru agira ati: "Numva meze neza iyo mbonye Ali Kiba yicaye iruhande rwa Diamond. Iyo ubonye Harmonize, wavuye kwa Diamond, amushimagiza mu ruhame, ubwo ni bwo bumwe nshaka". 'Imyitwarire irimo gukunda iraha' Ariko Diamond Platnumz si buri gihe yagiye abona ibintu kimwe n'abategetsi - ndetse mu myaka micye ishize byabaye ngombwa ko abasaba imbabazi inshuro nyinshi. Ibihe bibi cyane yagiranye na bo byabaye mu mwaka wa 2018 ubwo yarengaga ku mategeko akaze arimo no kugenzura "imyitwarire irimo gukunda iraha" y'abahanzi - amagambo yakoreshejwe na minisitiri muri leta ya Tanzania icyo gihe. Ayo mategeko amaze imyaka ariho, ariko ubu ni bwo akanama k'ubuhanzi ka Tanzania ('Baraza la Sanaa la Taifa', BASATA) karimo gutuma ashyirwa mu bikorwa uko yakabaye. Akenshi aka kanama gaca mu gihugu indirimbo zifatwa nk'izirimo urukozasoni cyangwa zifatwa nk'izirimo gutukana. Mu kwezi kwa kane mu 2018, Diamond Platnumz yahaswe ibibazo na polisi nyuma yo gutangaza videwo kuri Instagram asomana n'umugore. Amezi umanani nyuma yaho, yabujijwe kongera gukorera ibitaramo ku butaka bwa Tanzania nyuma yo gukina indirimbo akanama BASATA kabujije kavuga ko ishishikariza imibonano mpuzabitsina. Iyo ndirimbo - yitwa Mwanza - yari irimo amagambo yo mu Giswahili avuze umuntu "ufite ubushake bwo gukora imibonano mpuzabitsina", ndetse ababyinnyi bagaragara muri videwo bigana ikorwa ry'imibonano mpuzabitsina. Byageze aho Diamond Platnumz akangisha ko agiye kuva muri Tanzania kubera kurakazwa cyane n'icyo yavuze ko kwari ukwumwibasira. Ariko nyuma ibyo kuva muri Tanzania yabivuyemo, mu kwezi kwa 12 mu mwaka wa 2018 yandika ku mbuga nkoranyambaga asaba "imbabazi" akanama BASATA. Bishoboka ko iki ari igikorwa kirimo gushyira mu gaciro Diamond yakoze, cyane ko afite ibikorwa by'ubucuruzi bikomeye mu gihugu birimo inzu itunganya umuziki ye, na radio na televiziyo. 'Kugira ubwoba' Rero mu kanama BASATA ni ho abahanzi bagenzurirwa bikomeye ku bijyanye n'ubwisanzure bwo kugira icyo batangaza, kandi muri iyi myaka itanu ishize abahanzi bize ko batagomba kujenjeka mu gukurikiza ibyo basabwa. Umuraperi Nay wa Mitego (ibumoso) yakiriwe n'abamushyigikiye mu 2017 ubwo yari arekuwe nyuma yo gufungwa No mu kwezi kwa cyenda, radio ya Diamond Platnumz yakuwe ku murongo mu gihe cy'icyumweru kubera gutangaza ibyafashwe nk'urukozasoni. Dr Shule ati: "Hari impamvu zishobora kubibatera [gushimagiza ubutegetsi] ngo barengere inyungu zabo bwite". Abahanzi bamwe, akenshi n'imiryango yabo, baba bafite amikoro macye, yo kubona icyo kubatunga gusa. Madamu Shule yongeraho ati: "Bamwe bishimiye kubikora [gushimagiza ubutegetsi], kugira ngo bagaragare gusa... Ariko hari ikibibatera cy'ingenzi cyane kurushaha ibindi - ubwoba". Bamwe bashobora kwizera ko bashobora kwiturwa na Perezida Magufuli, akaba yanabashyira mu myanya ya leta. Babu Tale, 'manager' wa Diamond Platnumz banashinganye inzu itunganya umuziki ya 'WCB music label', yitabiriye ibikorwa byo kwiyamamaza ndetse byitezwe ko aba depite wa CCM kubera ko nta muntu bahatanye mu karere yiyamamariza guhagararira. 'Bataririmbiye ubutegetsi, baba nk'abatavuga rumwe nabwo' Hari n'abandi bahanzi barimo gushaka kubona imyanya ya politike muri aya matora, benshi muri bo ku itike y'ishyaka CCM, barimo n'umuraperi MwanaFA. Dr Shule ati: "Abahanzi bategekwa kuririmba bitewe n'impamvu zitandukanye". "Benshi muri bo birumvikana ko baba batabishaka. Ariko bataririmbiye ishyaka riri ku butegetsi, babonwa nk'abashyigikiye abatavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi". "Kandi niba bari mu batavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi, bazababarira mu ngaruka bizabagiraho... abatavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi barazahaye rwose". Urugero ni nk'umuraperi Roma Mkatoliki, wamenyekanye kubera indirimbo ze zinenga leta, uvuga ko mu kwezi kwa kane mu 2017 yashimuswe n'abagabo atamenye bitwaje intwaro, akorerwa iyicarubozo nuko ajugunywa hafi y'inyanja i Dar es Salaam hashize iminsi itatu. Mu mwaka ushize, yarihanangirijwe kubera indirimbo ye inenga leta, radio zahisemo kutayicuranga. No mu mwaka wa 2017 umuraperi Nay wa Mitego yarafunzwe kubera indirimbo ye yari irimo amagambo nka: "Haba hakiri ubwisanzure mu gutanga ibitekerezo mu gihugu?" Bisa nkaho yanze kuba ingaruzwamuheto, ndetse ubu ari mu bikorwa byo kwamamaza ishyaka 'Chama cha Demokrasia na Maendeleo' (CHADEMA) ritavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi. Ariko nta ndirimbo ye irahagarikwa mu myaka itatu ishize - ndetse bisa nkaho yahisemo kujya anenga ubutegetsi mu buryo bwo kuzimiza kuburyo biba bigoye gutahura icyo ari kunenga nyirizina. Mu ndirimbo ye aheruka gusohora, yise 'Mungu Yuko Wapi?' bivuze ngo 'Imana iri hehe?' agaragaza ko afite amakenga niba koko Imana ibaho ndetse akibaza niba akiyemera. Muri iyo ndirimbo, yibaza impamvu Imana ituma abanyagitugu babaho bakihindura ibigirwamana. Muri iki gihe, guhitamo kwiyima ubwisanzure mu gutanga ibitekerezo byahindutse ikintu abantu bakora ngo barebe ko bwacya kabiri. Ndetse mu by'ukuri Nay wa Mitego uwamubaza, ashobora kukubwira ko indirimbo ye bishoboka cyangwa bidashoboka ko hari aho yari ihuriye n'igihugu.

Abantu barenga 2200 barahitanywe na Ebola mu karere k'uburaruko bushira ubuseruko bwa Congo Ivyo bimenyeshwa n'ishami rya ONU ryitaho amagara y'abantu kw'isi (OMS/WHO) risubiramwo ivyatangajwe na Dr Longondo Eteni, umushikiranganji w'amagara y'abantu wa Congo. Ivyo bimenyeshejwe haciye iminsi 40 ata wundi murwayi wa Ebola abonetse mu ntara ya Kivu y'uburaruko hamwe na Ituri, zose ziri mu buraruko bushira ubuseruko bwa Congo. Umurwayi wa nyuma yaheruka kuvugwa ku wa 06 z'ukwa kane. Umukuru w'ishirahamwe OMS muri Afrika Dr Matshidiso Moeti, avuga ko iyo ndwara yarwanijwe muri ako karere kubera ugukorana hagati y'inzego zitandukanye be n'abanyagihugu. Mu kiganiro yagiranye n'abamenyeshamakuru biciye ku buhinga bwa none, Dr Moeti yavuze ati: "Iki ni icizere ko ugufatana mu nda be n'ubuhinga bigiye hamwe indwara z'ivyaduka zishobora kuranduranwa n'imizi". Kugira ngo ikiza gitangazwe ko carangiye, hategerezwa kuba haciye iminsi 42 kuva umuntu wa nyuma avuye mu bitaro amaze gupimwa agasanga ntakirwaye. Ikiza ca Ebola cadutse mu kwa munani 2018 ni co cagira kabiri gikomeye aho abarenga 3400 banduye nayo abarenga 2200 kirabahitana, inyuma y'ico mu 2014 muri Afrika y'Uburengero. Nico ca mbere kandi cadutse mu karere karimwo intambara, aho ibitero birenga 420 vyakozwe n'imirwi y'inyeshamba ku bigo vy'amavuriro, ivyatumye utwigoro two kurwanya ico kiza tugenda ducumbagira. Iyo nkuru ije nk'ihumure mu gihugu kandi gihanganye na wa mugera coronavirus hamwe n'ikiza c'agasama kitari bwigere kiboneka kw'isi nzima. Hagati aho, haravugwa ko Ebola yibonekeje mu bindi bice vy'igihugu - ku ncuro ya 11 mu mateka y'ico gihugu - mu buraruko bushira uburengero. Ku wa 01 z'uku kwa gatandatu, niho leta y'ico gihugu yatangaza umurwayi wa mbere wa Ebola mu ntara ya Mbandaka.

Kompanyi zarukoze - Pfizer na BioNTech - zavuze ko uyu ari "umunsi ukomeye kuri siyanse n'abantu". Zivuga ko urukingo rwabo rwasuzumiwe ku bantu 43,500 mu bihugu bitandatu kandi nta bibazo rwateye abaruhawe. Mu mpera z'uku kwezi, izi kompanyi zirateganya gusaba uburenganzira bwo gukoresha uru rukingo mu buryo bwihutirwa. Urukingo ruboneka nk'uburyo buruta ubundi bwarinda abantu iki cyorezo, no kuba mu ngamba cyatumye abantu bashyirwamo. Hari izindi nkingo zibarirwa muri mirongo ziri mu byiciro bya nyuma by'igerageza, gusa uru nirwo rwa mbere rwerekanye ibyarivuyemo. Uru rukingo rugizwe n'ibice bimwe mu bigize iyi virus byahinduwe, bigatoza umubiri kurwanya iyi Covid-19 igihe igeze mu mubiri. Umuntu aterwa doze ebyiri zarwo, mu gihe cy'ibyumweru bitatu. Igerageza, ryakorewe muri Amerika, Ubudage, Brazil, Argentine, Africa y'Epfo na Turkiya - ryerekanye ko rurinda umuntu ku rugero rwa 90% iminsi irindwi nyuma yo gufata doze ya kabiri. Kompanyi ya Pfizer yo muri Amerika, ivuga ko izashobora gukora doze miliyoni 50 mbere y'uko uyu mwaka urangira, na doze miliyari 1,3 mbere y'uko 2021 irangira. Gusa hari imbogamizi ziri mu bikoresho kuko uru rukingo rukenera kubikwa ahantu hakonje ku gipimo kiri munsi ya 80C. Haribazwa kandi ibibazo birimo ubwirinzi uru rukingo rutanga igihe bumara. Dr Albert Bourla ukuriye Pfizer yagize ati: "Turi hafi guha abatuye isi igisubizo gikenewe cyane mu gufasha kurangiza ibi bihe by'akaga mu buzima ku isi." Prof Ugur Sahin, umwe mu bashinze BioNTech yo mu Budage, we yavuze ko ibyo bagezeho ari "intambwe ikomeye". Isesengura ryatanzwe n'izi kompanyi si irya burundu. Rishingiye ku bakoreweho igerageza 94 ba mbere banduye Covid-19 . Amakuru yatanzwe ashobora guhinduka isesengura ry'ibyavuye mu bushakashatsi bwose rirangiye. Izi kompanyi zivuga ko zizaha abagenzuzi b'inkingo amakuru ahagije ku buziranenge bw'uru rukingo mu cyumweru cya gatatu cy'uku kwezi kwa 11.

Ibiziga vy'izo mpinja vyaciye bihambwa hafi y'aho vyatowe Rigize umunani hatorwa ibintu nk'ivyo muri ano mezi aheze. Abategetsi bibaza ko iyo mibiri itabwa mu nzuzi z'ico gisagara bivuye ku ngeso yo gukorora imbanyi, ingendo itemewe nka hose mu gihugu ca Kenya. Buramatari w'intara ya Nairobi, Mike Sonko, asaba ko hoba amatohoza kuco yise "ibintu biteye ubwoba". Iyo mibiri yabonetse mu gihe abakozi batari bake bariko basukura uruzi Nairobi ruboneka ko rucafuye cane, rushika mu karere ka Korogocho, imwe mu makaritiye manini ari ku mugwa mukuru. Basanze imibiri y'izo mpinja itekeye mw'isashe, umwe muri izo mpinja akaba yari agihema ariko ntiyashoboye kurokoka. Umuvugizi wa buramatari, Elkana Jacob, yabwiye ikiganiro Focus on Africa ca BBC ko ibiziga vy'izo mpinja vyaciye bihambwa hafi y'aho vyatowe, inyuma y'aho igipolisi kimenyeshereje ko abavyeyi bazo batashoboye kumenyekana. Buramatari Sonko yibaza ko ibitaro n'amavuriro ari vyo bita iyo mibiri mu nzuzi iyo bihejeje gukuramwo imbanyi. Yahaye abakozi biwe ikiringo c'indwi zibiri kugira ngo babe bakoze amatohoza kuri ivyo bintu. Hampande y'izo mpinja, ibiziga umunani vy'inzoya n'ibindi bine vy'abakuze vyaratowe muri ico gikorwa co gusukura inzuzi zo mu gisagara.

Chris Smalling (Uwa gatatu i buryo) amaze gatatu yikurikiranya gutsinda mu nkino zo mw'ihiganwa ryo mu Bwongereza, inyuma yo gutsinda rimwe gusa mu nkino 101 z'imbere y'aho. Mourinho amaze guhindura abakinyi indwi kuva inyuma y'aho Manchester United itsindiwe iri ku kibuga cayo n'umugwi uri mu yanyuma wa West Brom. Chris Smalling hamwe na Romelu Lukaku yari ahejeje kugombora ni bo batsinze ku kibuga ca Vitality, baca batuma uwo mugwi urusha amanota ane yose Liverpool iza mu kibanza ca kane mu nkino zine zisigaye. Manchester United yatsinze Manchester City 3-2 Manchester United na Chelsea batsinzwe mw'ihiganwa ryo mu Bwongereza Mourinho yavuze ko urwo rukino ari akaryo keza ku bakinyi ku kuja ku rutonde rw'abazohangana na Tottenham mw'ihiganwa ry'igikombe ca FA, ari na ko karyo kanyuma konyene basigaranye ko gushobora gutahukana igikombe uyu mwaka.

Umutabazi wamugezeho avuga ko atabashije guhita amumenya kubera ukuntu yari yarazonzwe Ikinyamakuru TMZ cyariho kizamura kwizerwa kwacyo mu kwandika amakuru yihuse y'imyidagaduro cyanditse ko uyu muhanzi ari muri Coma. Michael Jackson, ni izina rikomeye mu mateka ya muzika ku isi, abantu benshi ntibahise bizera ukuri kw'aya makuru. Ian Youngs yibutsa ko hari hashize igihe bivugwa ko uyu mwami w'injyana ya Pop arwaye kanseri y'uruhu, nubwo nyuma uruhande rwe rwabihakanye. Muri iryo joro abanyamakuru benshi ku isi bahise batangira gukurikirana cyane iby'ubuzima bwa Jackson. Ibiro bya BBC i Los Angeles byahamagaye abavugizi, inshuti n'abakorana na Jackson ariko nta n'umwe wagize icyo yemeza, bamwe barakuragaho telephone zabo. Nyuma gato, TMZ yahise yandika ko Michael Jackson yapfuye. Ian Youngs avuga ko yatunguwe akiyumvira umwanya. Jackson nubwo yari yarashinjwe ibirego birimo gusambanya abana bato nta washidikanyaga ko ariwe muhanzi wa Pop wari imbere y'abandi bose mu myaka 30 ishize. Iby'ubuzima bwe byari bimaze iminsi bizwi ko atameze neza, ariko iby'iri joro nta makuru afatika isi yabashije kubona. Hari hashize ibyumweru bicye avuye mu bitaramo i Londres, ndetse kuri iyi tariki ya 25 mu masaha y'igicuku yari yakoze imyiteguro i Lod Angeles ya konseri zindi nk'uko ikinyamakuru 83Minutes kibivuga. Gupfa kwe bisa n'ibyatunguranye, gusa muganga we nyuma yemeje ko Michael Jackson yari amaze imyaka myinshi adashobora gusinzira kereka ahawe imiti imusinziriza. Dr Conrad Murray, umuganga we bwite wahembwaga $150,000 ku kwezi, yari amutegereje mu rugo atashye. Mu cyumba cye habaga harimo amacupa y'ibinini, uducupa tw'imiti banywa cyangwa bitera, inshinge n'ibindi. Dr Murray yabwiye polisi ko yari amaze iminsi aha Jackson umuti witwa propofol - umuti uterwa abagiye kubagwa ku bitaro - mu majoro 60 kugeza tariki 22 z'ukwa gatandatu 2009 kugira ngo abashe gusinzira. Mu masaha ya mu gitondo kare tariki 25 z'ukwa gatandatu, Dr Murray yahaye Jackson indi miti kugira ngo asinzire, ariko iyi miti avuga ko itakoze kuko Jackson yari afite igishyika cya konseri zindi yateguraga. Byageze saa yine z'igitondo Jackson atarasinzira. Dr Murray yabwiye polisi ko Jackson yamwinginze ngo amuhe 'amata' kugira ngo asinzire - aha ngo yasobanuraga propofol ijya gusa n'amata. Dr Murray mu rukiko mu 2011 Uyu muganga yaremeye amutera uyu muti mu mutsi ahagana saa yine n'iminota minrongo ine. Dr Murray avuga ko yari afite ibikoresho byose bituma abasha gukurikirana umutima, umwuka mu maraso n'ibindi kuri Jackson, ndetse ko yamugumye iruhande nyuma gato akajya kwiyuhagira. Agarutse ngo yasanze Jackson adahumeka. Gusa iby'amasaha yavuze bishidikanywaho hagendewe ku majwi ye yafashwe kuri telephone aho yavugaga ko ibyo byabayeho mbere gato ya saa sita z'amanywa. Uyu muganga avuga ko yakurikijeho kugerageza gusubiza umwuka uyu muhanzi. Avuga ko atashoboraga guhamagara 911 (ubutabazi) kuko nawe yariho akora ubutabazi, gusa ko yahamagaye umwe mu bashinzwe umutekano wa Jackson. Ubutabazi babuhamagaye 12:21 ku isaha y'aho. Dr Murray avugwaho ko yabanje gusaba uyu ushinzwe umutekano kuvana mu cyumba ibikoresho by'imiti byose. Abana ba Jackson Prince na Paris bari mu rugo ibi byose biba, ariko bahiye ubwoba. Ubwo abatabazi bageraga mu rugo bavuga ko batabashije kumenya Jackson. Yagaragaraga nk'umuntu wazonzwe, unanutse cyane. Arebye uko yari ameze, umutabazi Richard Senneff yavuze ko yabonaga ari nk'umurwayi w'indembe igeze mu minsi ya nyuma. Bahise bamujyana ku bitaro biri hafi (UCLA medical center) aho bakomereje ibikorwa byo kumugarurira umwuka. Hashize isaha imwe n'iminota 13 bemeje ko byarangiye. Abafana be n'abanyamakuru bari bamaze kugera ku bitaro. Saa munani n'imino 44 z'amanywa TMZ niyo yatangaje inkuru bwa mbere ko Jackson yapfuye, hari saa sita na 44 z'ijoro mu Rwanda n'i Burundi. TMZ niyo yatangaje inkuru bwa mbere Abenshi kw'isi bari bagikeneye kumenya niba koko Michael Jackson byarangiye, abantu basuye Internet mu buryo budasanzwe. Google yageze aho itabasha gutanga amakuru (results) ku bayibajije Michael Jackson kuko uburyo (software) ikoresha bwibeshye ko kuyibaza kenshi iri jambo ari igitero bwagabweho. Twitter, Los Angeles Times, TMZ, Wikipedia na Messenger zose zagize ibibazo bya tikiniki kubera abazisuye benshi uwo mugoroba. Kugeza saa tanu n'igice z'ijoro z'ijoro (ku isaha ngengamasaha), umunyamakuru wa BBC Richard Bacon, yabwiye abakurikira BBC ko afite amakuru ahagije yemeza urupfu rw'iki cyamamare. Abafana ba Jackson imbere y'ibitaro bategereje inkuru ye Hashize imyaka ibiri, Dr Conrad Murray yahamijwe icyaha cy'ubwicanyi butagambiriwe afungwa igihe kituzuye neza imyaka ibiri muri ine yakatiwe. Iby'urupfu rwa Jackson n'iby'ibyaha yashinjwaga byavuzweho byinshi mu myaka 10 ishize, muzika ye nayo izaguma mu mitima ya benshi.

Igipolisi kivuga ko Kizito Mihigo yiyahuye aho yari asanzwe apfungiwe mw'ibohero ry'i Remera i Kigali ku wa mbere mu bucagucagu Lewis Mudge, aserukira iryo shirahamwe muri Afrika yo Hagati, avuga ko afise amakenga menshi ku bivugwa ko uyo munyamuziki yiyahuye kandi yari mu minwe y'ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda. Ejo ku wa mbere, umuvugizi w'igipolisi c'u Rwanda, yasohoye itangazo aho yavuga ko Kizito Mihigo yiyahuye mu masaha icumi n'imwe y'ubucagucagu aho yari apfungiwe kuri 'station' y'igipolisi ca Remera. Kubwa Bwana Mudge, Kizito Mihigo azize kuba yari umuntu yasaba ubutungane butunganiriza impande zose inyuma ya jenoside yo mu Rwanda mu 1994. Avugana n'ikiganiro Newsday ca BBC, Bwana Mudge yavuze ati: "Kizito Mihigo ntiyari umuririmvyi w'indirimbo z'Imana gusa, kuri benshi yaserukira abantu bagerageza kwerekana urundi ruhande rw'u Rwanda, cane cane ku bijanye na jenoside imyaka 26 iheze". Ati: "Kizito yahagaritswe ubwa mbere mu 2014 inyuma y'ururirimbo yasohoye asaba ko ubutungane bwokora ku mpande zose ku bijanye na jenoside, avuga aboba kumbure baragandaguwe n'umugambwe FPR uri ku butegetsi, hamwe kandi n'Abatutsi bacitse kw'icumu be n'abagandaguwe muri ubwo bwicanyi". Yibutsa ko Kizito Mihigo yabanje kuburirwa irengero, "mu nyuma mu 2015 ari imbere y'ubucamanza yagirijwe ivyaha vy'agahomerabunwa harimwo kugerageza kugandagura umukuru w'igihugu". Avuga ko kuva arekurwa mu 2018 ku kigongwe c'umukuru w'igihugu yari acungishijwe ijisho gushika aho afatiwe yagirizwa ko yariko agerageza gutoroka. Avuga ko amakuru y'uko yiyahuye yababaje abantu benshi cane basanzwe bakurikiranira hafi ibibera mu Rwanda bakabona ko harimwo igipfungu (canke urujijo mu Kinyarwanda), ari naco gituma basaba amatohoza yigenga. Ikiganiro na HRW ku rupfu rwa Kizito Mihigo Ati: "Twebwe mw'ishirahamwe Human Rights Watch biraduhagaritse umutima, tukaba dufise amakenga menshi ko hashobora kuba hari ibintu bidasobanutse ku vyerekeye urupfu rwiwe, tugasaba ko haba amatohoza ataho yegamiye". Human Right Watch itangazwa n'ukwumva ko Kizito Mihigo yiyahuye kandi yari mu maboko y'ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda bwari bumucunze bukanategerezwa no kumukingira mu gihe yohura n'ibibazo. Bwana Mudge avuga ko atari ubwa mbere abantu basanzwe bari mu maboko y'abajejwe umutekano mu Rwanda bicwa, canke bagapfa mu buryo budatahuritse, canke bakanyuruzwa. Atanga akarorero ko mu 2018 aho avuga ko hari umunyapolitike Boniface Twagirimana atavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi yari akomeye yazimiye kandi yari asanzwe ari mw'ibohero, "abarongoye ibohero bakaba bagiye gusohora itangazo bavuga ko yagerageje gutoroka, ariko kuva ico gihe akaba ata n'uwumuca ikanda". Lewis Mudge aserukira HRW muri Afrika yo Hagati avuga ko atari ubwa mbere abantu basanzwe bari mu maboko y'abajejwe umutekano mu Rwanda bicwa Mu 2014, Kizito Mihigo yasohoye ururirimbo yise "IGISOBANURO CY'URUPFU", aho yavugamwo ko ari uburenganzira bw'abo bose bapfuye, ku mpande zose, mu gihe ca jenoside yo mu 1994 mu Rwanda ko bategerezwa kwibukwa, hamwe n'abo FPR yagirizwa kwica. Kubw'iwe, ubwo bwicanyi ntibwigeze bwerekanwa neza. Ati: "Kuva imyaka 26 yose iheze, ivyo vyaha biguma ari ikinyegezwa, bikaba bitoroshe kubivugako mu Rwanda, nk'uko ivyabashikiye Kizito bivyerekana inyuma y'aho asohoreye iyo ndirimbo". Hampande ya Human Rights Watch, ishirahamwe Amnesty International naryo nyene rimenyesha ko ryababajwe n'urwo rupfu, rigasaba ko amatohoza yimbitse yokorwa. Mw'itangazo ryasohoye nijoro, Amnesty International rivuga riti: "Ukuri gutegerezwa kumenyekana. Amatohoza ategerezwa kwerekana ukuri kwose, harimwo nimba hari ababigizemwo uruhara, kandi nimba imigirwa yo mw'ibohero n'imibereho yaho vyaragize uruhara mu rupfu rwa Kizito Mihigo". Kizito Mihigo bivugwa ko yafashwe n'abanyagihugu ku wa kane w'indwi iheze ari kumwe n'abagabo babiri, aho bavugwa ko bariko bagerageza kujabuka umupaka baja i Burundi, baca bashikirizwa inzego z'umutekano. Yagirijwe ko yariko agerageza kwambuka mu buryo bunyuranyije n'amategeko, kandi ko yari agiye kwifatanya n'imitwe y'iterabwoba irwanya igihugu c'u Rwanda. Yagirizwa kandi n'icaha ca ruswa. Abatavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda basanzwe baba hanze y'ico gihugu bo bavuga ko yishwe.

Abaserukira Papa i Myanmar baguma bamusaba kudahirahira ngo akoreshe ijambo Rohingya Abaharanira agateka ka zina muntu bari basavye Papa gukoreshwa iryo jambo mu kwibutsa akaga abo bantu barimwo. Abategetsi bakuru mw'idini rya Katolika i Myanmar bamusavye kudahirahira ngo akoreshe ijambo "Rohingya". Myanmar yagirizwa guhonya ubwoko, aho aba Rohingya 620.000 bamaze guhungira muri Bngladesh kuva mu kwezi kw'umunani. Reta ya Myanmar ntiyera iryo jambo rya 'Rohingya' ryiswe abantu b'aba "Bengalis". Imbere y'uko ashikiriza ijambo Papa Francis yabonanye na Aung San Suu Kyi Ivuga ko ari abimukira baje bava muri Bangladesh badakurikije amategeko, ko rero badakwiye gushirwa ku rutonde rw'ubwoko buri muri ico gihugu. Ariko n'aho ataduduriyeko ijambo "Rohingya", ijambo rya Papa ryari rikomeye cane mu kuvuganira agateka k'ubwo bwoko. Myanmar yemeye gutahukana aba Rohingya bahunze ico gihugu Onu: Myanmar ifise umugambi wo kwomora inkehwa z'aba Rohingya Onu yavuze ko uko igisirikare ca Myanmar gifata aba Rohingya ari nko kugira ihonyabwoko, ariko Aung San Suu Kyi arabihakana.

Mu kwezi gushize, Perezida John Magufuli yatangaje ko nta coronavirus ikirangwa muri Tanzania, kubera amasengesho y'abaturage Ku wa gatanu, Minisitiri w'ubuzima Ummy Mwalimu yavuze ko ubu mu gihugu hari ibigo 11 gusa bigikora, mu bigo 85 byose hamwe byari byashyiriweho gushyira mu kato abarwayi ba Covid-19. Minisitiri Mwalimu yagize ati: "Turashima Imana ko coronavirus iri kugana ku musozo muri Tanzania". Yongeyeho ko abantu badakwiye kwirara kuko bishoboka ko habaho ubwandu bwa kabiri mu gihugu. Madamu Mwalimu yavuze ko abaturage ubu bashobora gukomeza kugana ibyo bigo kwivuza indwara zisanzwe kuko bitazongera gukoreshwa nk'iby'akato ku barwayi ba Covid-19. Kuri ubu ikigero cy'ubwandu, umubare w'abarwayi n'impfu zitewe na coronavirus byose ntibizwi uko bihagaze muri Tanzania kuko leta idatangaza iyo mibare mu buryo buhoraho. Imibare iheruka gutangazwa na leta ni iyo mu kwezi gushize kwa gatandatu. Icyo gihe Minisitiri w'intebe Kassim Majaliwa yabwiye inteko ishingamategeko ko mu gihugu hari abantu 66 gusa barwaye coronavirus. Muri iki gihe, amashuri yose, za kaminuza n'inzego zimwe nk'urwego rwo gutwara abagenzi mu ndege ndetse n'urw'ubukerarugendo, byongeye gufungurwa. Imikino nayo yarasubukuwe, hafatwa ingamba nko guhana intera, hanashyirwaho uburyo bwo gukaraba intoki mu kwirinda ikwirakwira ry'ubwandu bwa coronavirus. Uko Tanzania yitwaye mu guhangana n'iki cyorezo cya coronavirus ntibivugwaho rumwe. Aho gushyiraho ingamba zikaze za "guma mu rugo" (lockdown) - zifashishijwe na benshi mu baturanyi b'iki gihugu - leta ya Tanzania yahisemo gushyira imbere gusigasira ubukungu hafatwa ingamba zirimo kudohora. Ariko, abanenga leta ya Tanzania bavuga ko izo ngamba zirimo koroshya mu buryo bukabije urebye ubukana bw'iki cyorezo, bakanashinja leta gukorera mu bwiru (mu ibanga).

Eric Kabendera bwa mbere azanywe imbere y'urukiko i Dar es Salaam Bwana Kabendera yatawe muri yombi mu ntangiriro z'icyumweru gishize i Dar es Salaam, polisi yatangaje ko akekwaho ko hari uburenganzira yihaye nk'umunyatanzania kandi ari umunyamahanga. Eric Kabendera, asanzwe yandika inkuru zicukumbuye ku binyamakuru mpuzamahanga bitandukanye, birimwo "The Guardian" cyo mu Bwongereza. Uyu munsi kuwa mbere, uyu munyamakuru wandika inkuru zicukumbuye yagejejwe imbere y'urukiko aregwa ibyaha bishya nk'uko umunyamakuru wa BBC uri mu rukiko abivuga. 1. Kuyobora itsinda ry'abagizi ba nabi 2. Kutishyura imisoro 3. Iyezandonke Inyandiko y'urukiko igaragaza ko Kabendera ashinjwa ko hagati y'ukwezi kwa mbere 2015 n'ukwezi kwa karindwi 2019 yagiye afatanya n'abandi bantu (batari mu baregwa) mu bikorwa bigize icyaha byo kwigwizaho inyungu. Araregwa kandi ko hagati y'icyo gihe atishyuye, nta mpamvu atanze, imisoro ya miliyoni 173 z'amashiringi ya Tanzania ku kigo cyaho gishinzwe imisoro. Araregwa kandi iyezandonke mu kwakira amashiringi miliyoni 173 kandi azi neza ko ayo mafaranga ari ayo gukoreshwa mu bikorwa bigize ibyaha no kutishyura imisoro. Kabendera ntabwo yahawe umwanya wo kwisobanura kuri ibi birego. Amaze kuregwa ibyaha bitanu Kuva yatabwa muri yombi mu cyumweru gishize uyu munyamakuru amaze kuregwa ibyaha bitanu bitandukanye, bibiri muri byo byavanywe mu byo aregwa. Umunyamategeko we Jebra Kambole yavuze ko ibyo aregwa bishingiye ku mwuga we w'itangazamakuru kandi ari gukora ibishoboka ngo azarekurwe. Bwana Kambole yagize ati: "Afatwa bwa mbere yabwiwe ko hari impungenge ku bwenegihugu bwe, ashyikirizwa ibiro by'abinjira n'abasohoka abaha 'passport' ye' maze ashyikirizwa polisi nayo imubaza ku cyaha cyo guteza imvururu". Kuva icyo gihe ntiyongeye kugira icyo abazwa kindi, uyu munsi bazanye ibirego bitatu bishya, nk'abamwunganira tubona ko ari ibirego bamugeretseho kubera aazi akora mu itangazamakuru". Eric Kabendera arakomeza gufungwa, azagaruka mu rukiko tariki 19 z'uku kwezi kwa munani.

Igihe urubanza rwariko ruracibwa, abantu isinzi bari bagandagaje imbere ya sentare Ahmad al-Khair w'imyaka 36 yapfiriye mu gasho mu kwezi kwa kabiri inyuma y'aho afatiwe kubera yitabiriye imyiyerekano yo kwiyamiriza leta y'uwahora ari umukuru w'ico gihugu, Omar al-Bashir. Urwo ni urubanza rwa mbere ruciriwe abagize uruhara mu gukubagura abari muri iyo myiyerekano yamaze amezi atari make atuma Bwana Bashiri abogozwa ku butegetsi. Ubushingwamanza buvuga ko igihano c'urupfu kuri abo bantu arico gihano kibereye. Urwo rubanza rumaze gusomwa, umucamanza yabajije mwenewabo wa al-Khair, Sa'd, nimba abona ko abo bantu 29 bobabarirwa - ariko yishuye ko ashaka ko bicwa. Umwunganirizi w'abo bantu muvyo amategeko avuga ko azokwunguruza urubanza. Sentare yasanze Ahmad Al-Khair yarakubiswe, anaborezwa igufa n'abari barongoye agasho ko mu ntara ya Kassala gushika asandabe. Urubanza rwa Al-Khair rwarakurikiranywe cane muri Sudani, ni mu gihe ihagarikwa ryiwe ryatumye imyiyerekano yo kwiyamiriza bwana Bashi ikomera. Igihe urubanza rwariko ruracibwa, abantu isinzi bari bagandagaje imbere ya sentare ya Omdurman ku mugwa mukuru Khartoum kugira biyumvire urwo bamucira. Abantu bashika 170 nibo bahasize ubuzima igihe abashigikiye ubutegetsi bariko barwanya iyo myiyerekano yo kwiyamiriza Bwana Bashir yahavuye akurwa ku butegetsi n'igisirikare. Iyicwa ry'uwo mwigisha ryatumye imyiyerekano ifata iyindi sura Mu ntango za kuno kwezi, yaraciriwe umunyororo w'imyaka ibiri yagirizwa igiturire. Sentare yategetse ko ico gihano akirangiriza mu citwa ikigo c'uguhindura imibereho kubera ashaje cane. Uwo rubanza rwari rwerekeye amahera angana n'imiliyoni 25 z'amadolari y'abanyamerika yahawe n'igikomangoma wa Arabia Saoudite Mohammed bin Salman. Bwana Bashir yavuze ko ayo mahera yari yayahawe nk'agashirukabute n'umuryango w'ico gikomangoma. Bwana Bashiri arashobora kwagirwa n'ibindi vyaha, harimwo ibifitaniye isano n'itembagazwa ry'ubutegetsi mu mwaka wa 1989 ariryo ryamushikanye ku butegetsi, ihonyabwoko no kwica abari mu myiyerekano.

Kugeza urukingo rwa coronavirus mu bice bitandukanye byo ku isi bizaba ari "ubwikorezi bwa mbere bugoranye cyane bubayeho" Ishyirahamwe mpuzamahanga rw'ubwikorezi mu ndege (IATA) ryavuze ko bizasaba ibingana n'indege 8000 zo mu bwoko bwa Boeing 747. Nta rukingo rwa Covid-19 ruraboneka kugeza ubu, ariko IATA yamaze gutangira gukorana na kompanyi z'indege, ibibuga by'indege, inzego z'ubuzima zo ku isi n'inganda zikora imiti ku buryo urwo rukingo rwazagezwa mu bice bitandukanye byo ku isi. Izo ndege zicyenewe, ni mu gihe bifatwa ko buri muntu wo ku isi yacyenera doze (dose) imwe gusa y'urukingo. Alexandre de Juniac, umuyobozi mukuru wa IATA, yagize ati: "Gutwara inkingo za Covid-19 mu mutekano bizaba ari bwo butumwa buranze iki kinyejana mu rwego rw'ubwikorezi mu ndege. Ariko ibyo ntibizaba hatabayeho kubitegurana ubushishozi hakiri kare. Kandi igihe cyo kubikora ni iki". Mu gihe kompanyi z'indege zimaze igihe zibanda ku gutwara imizigo, muri iki gihe gutwara abantu byajemo ingorane kubera kwirinda coronavirus, gutwara inkingo mu ndege byo ni urusobe kurushaho. Ntabwo ari indege zose zifite ubushobozi bwo gutwara inkingo kuko gutwarwa imiti bicyenera ahantu hafite igipimo cy'ubushyuhe buri hagati ya dogere 2C na 8C. Gutwara inkingo zimwe bishobora gusaba ubukonje bwa dogere 0C, ibyo bikaba byatuma hari indege nyinshi zidafite ubushobozi bwo kuzitwara. Glyn Hughes, ukuriye ubwikorezi bw'imizigo mu ishyirahamwe IATA, yongeyeho ati: "Tuzi neza uburyo bikorwamo. Icyo ducyeneye gukora ubu ni ukongera ubushobozi bukagera ku rwego ruzaba rucyenewe". Yavuze ko ingendo z'indege mu bice bimwe byo ku isi, birimo nka bimwe byo muri Aziya y'amajyepfo ashyira uburasirazuba, zizaba ari ingenzi kuko aho hantu nta bushobozi bwo gukora inkingo buhari. Kurugeza muri Afurika bizasaba iki? Ishyirahamwe IATA rivuga ko kugeza muri Afurika urukingo rwa Covid-19 - rubaye rubonetse - muri iki gihe "bitashoboka" kubera ko nta bushobozi buhari bwo gutwara imizigo, ingano y'akarere k'Afurika n'urusobe rw'ibibazo byo kwambuka imipaka. IATA ivuga ko ubu bwikorezi buzasaba "gukorwa neza bijya gusa nk'igikorwa cya gisirikare", ndetse bisabe ko habaho ahantu hahehereye hazabikwa izo nkingo. Inkingo zigera hafi ku 140 ku isi ziri mu cyiciro cy'ibanze cyo gukorwa, naho izibarirwa muri za mirongo ubu zirimo kugeragerezwa ku bantu. Muri izo ziri kugeragerezwa ku bantu harimo n'urwa Kaminuza ya Oxford yo mu Bwongereza rumaze kugera mu cyiciro cya nyuma cy'igeragezwa. Ishyirahamwe IATA ryasabye za leta z'ibihugu gutangira ubu gutegurana ubushishozi kugira ngo zitegure neza igihe inkingo zizaba zimaze kwemezwa zinatangiye gukwirakwizwa ku isi. Usibye gutegura uburyo zitabwaho kandi zigatwarwa mu bipimo by'ubushyuhe bya ngombwa, umutekano nawo ni ikindi kibazo. IATA yongeyeho iti: "Inkingo zizaba ari ibicuruzwa bifite agaciro gakomeye cyane. Hagomba gutegurwa uburyo imizigo yazo ibikwa mu mutekano ntivogerwe kandi ntiyibwe".

Abanyagihugu ba Mali bakiranye urweze itembagazwa ry'ubutegetsi bwa Perezida Ibrahim Boubacar Keïta mu kwezi guheze Umuvugizi wabo Moussa Camara avuga ko iyi leta mfatakibanza ishobora kurongorwa n'umusivire canke umusirikare. Iyi ngingo yashitsweko inyuma y'ibiganiro vyamaze iminsi itatu hagati y'aba bategets ba gisirikare ku ruhande rumwe, hamwe n'abatavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi be n'amashirahamwe adaharanira ivyicaro vya politike ku rundi ruhande. Ibi biganiro vyari vyerekeye ingene ubutegetsi bwa Mali bwosubira mu minwe y'abasivire. Uwahora ari umukuru w'iki gihugu aherutse kubogozwa, Ibrahim Boubacar Keïta, yashoboye kuva mu gihugu mu ndwi iheze. Ku wa 05 z'uku kwezi kw'icenda, niho bwana Boubacar Keïta yurira indege imushikana muri Emira Zunze Ubumwe z'Abarabu agiye kwivuza, inyuma y'aho afatiwe n'indwara yo mu mitsi ifatira mu bwonko (AVC/stroke), nk'uko bivugwa n'abategetsi ba gisirikare. Uwahoze ari umukuru w'ibiro vyiwe avuga ko ashobora kumara iminsi 15 hanze. Perezida Ibrahim Boubacar Keïta yabanje gupfungwa n'igisirikare mu nyuma aza kurekurwa Inyuma y'itembagazwa ry'ubu butegetsi, abategetsi b'ibihugu vy'akarere ka Afrika y'Uburengero basavye ko ubutegetsi busubira mu minwe y'abasivire vuba bwango. Mu ntango, abategetsi ba gisirikare batembagaje ubutegetsi bwa IBK bavuga ko bashaka gushinga ikiringo mfatakibanza c'imyaka ibiri. Koroneri Assimi Goita arongoye ako karwi k'abasirikare batembagaje ubutegetsi avuga ati: "Twiyemeje imbere yanyu ko ataco tutazokora kugira ngo dushire mu ngiro ivyo twashitseko mu ntumbero imwe rudende yo gukingira inyungu z'abanyamali". Perezida Keita yabogojwe ku wa 18 z'ukwa munani inyuma y'imyiyerekano yo kwiyamiriza ubutegetsi bwiwe bwagirizwa ruswa, isesagurwa ry'ubutunzi bw'igihugu hamwe n'impari ku bijanye n'amatora y'inama nshingamateka. Ibogozwa ryiwe ryariyamirijwe n'amakungu, ariko hagati mu gihugu abanyamali benshi bakaba baryakiranye umunezero. Bwana Keita yabanje gupfungwa n'igisirikare, ariko mu nyuma ararekurwa. Iri bogozwa ryari rigize kane muri ico gihugu co muri Afrika y'Uburengero kuva kironse intahe y'ukwikukira mu 1960 inyuma y'imyaka itari mike kiri mu minwe y'abakoloni b'abafaransa. Igisirikare ca Mali cabogoje IBK ku wa 18 z'ukwa munani inyuma y'imyiyerekano yo kwiyamiriza ubutegetsi bwiwe Ibogozwa ryaheruka ryari iryo mu 2012 ryatumye imirwi igendera ku vyiyumviro bikaze vy'idini rya Isilamu iboneraho akaryo ko kwifatira akarere k'uburaruko bwa Mali kubera umutekano muke warangwa mu gihugu. Vyabaye ngombwa ko igirisikare c'u Bufaransa kija gufasha ico gihugu kwisubiza akarere kari kafashwe, ariko ibitero vyovyo n'ubu biracabandanya. Mu ntango, abatembagaje ubutegetsi bavuze ko bazobandanya bubahiriza amasezerano mpuzamakungu yo kurwanya imirwi y'abarwanyi bagendera ku vyiyumviro bikaze vya Isilamu. Ibihumbi n'ibihumbi vy'abasirikare b'u Bufaransa, b'umuryango w'ibihugu vya Afrika hamwe n'ab'ishirahamwe ONU bari muri ico gihugu mu ntumbero yo kurwanya abo barwanyi.

Odion Ighalo wa Nigeria acisha umupira ku munyegoli Jonathan Nahimana w'Intamba mu Rugamba Ku nshuro ya mbere mw'ihiganwa nk'iri, benshi bari bazi ko bitaza kworoha kuko gutangura uhura n'ikipe y'igihangange muri Afrika nka Nigeria wari umurimo utoroshe. Ariko Intamba zari zifitiye icizere kidasanzwe, catanguye kwigaragariza mu kiganiro umumenyereza Olivier Niyungeko yahaye abanyamakuru ku wa gatanu, aho yavuga ko Intamba zitaje kurorera gusa. Mbere yanavuze ko ku rwego nk'uru rw'umukino, amakipe yose aba angana. Ivyo kandi niko vyagaragaye mu ntango z'urukino, Nigeria itangazwa n'abakinyi b'inyuma b'Intamba mu Rugamba ku kuntu bazibirira hamwe mu kwigenza neza kudasanzwe ku makipe atamenyereye amahiganwa nk'aya. Ntivyahereye kandi ku kuzibira gusa kuko iyo itaba umunyegoli wa Nigeria, ku nshuro zirenga zitatu zose mu gice ca mbere, Nigeria yari kuba yinjijwe. Kapiteni Saido Berahino agerageza gukingira umupira ngo atawutwarwa na Wilfred Ndidi wa Nigeria Abakunzi ba Nigeria bari mu kibuga, warabona ko batanguye kugira utubazo kuko abasatirizi babo ataco bariko barerekana, igice ca mbere gihera bose banganya. Vyaje guhinduka ku munota wa 77 aho Nigeria yashobora guca mu ryahumye abakinyi b'inyuma b'Intamba ikaronka igitsindo, abakunzi ba Nigeria hamwe n'abakinyi bose barigina cane ubona yuko basa n'abavuye kure. Ubudasa bwavuye hehe? Nigeria vyaraboneka ko imenyereye gukina ku rwego rwo hejuru. Kandi ntibitangaje ku ikipe imaze gukina muri iri higanwa inshuro 17, ikaba imaze no gutwara iki gikombe inshuro zishika zibiri, ubwa nyuma bukaba bwari mu 2013. Ariko icerekanye ubudasa muri uru rukino, ni ubuhinga bw'abakinyi babiri ba Nigeria b'inararibonye, Odion Jude Ighalo akina mu Bushinwa, na Ahmed Musa akina muri Arabie Saudite, bahanahanye umupira n'ubuhinga bwinshi bashobora guca mu ryahumye abakinyi b'inyuma b'Intamba. Ni abakinyi binjiye mu gice ca kabiri bazi neza ico baje gukora, kuko kuva binjiye Nigeria yahinduye isura imbere, ibintu vyibonekeje ko wari umukenyuro w'umumenyereza Gernot Rohr. Ikindi naco ni uko ba rutahizamu b'u Burundi baterekanye ''amanyama'' akenewe kugira basatire cane mu gutera imipira iremereye, kuko uvyihweje, umunyegoli wa Nigeria ntihari kubura ikimuca mu jisho. Kuri ico umumenyereza Niyungeko nawe yaremeye ko akeneye gukorana cane na barutahizamu biwe ku kuntu bategerezwa kwitwara imbere y'igoli. Ku bwiwe ngo ni mu mutwe, si ikibazo c'ubuhinga. Imbere hameze hate? Muri rusangi uyu mukino warahaye icizere cane ikipe y'Intamba, kuko gutsindwa kimwe gusa na Nigeria mu mukino wa mbere mw'ihiganwa nk'iri ari ikintu cofatwa nk'intambwe ikomeye ku Ntamba. Gusa iyi kipe ikeneye kwongera ugushaka hamwe n'igikenye mu mikino ikurikira, kuko uravye ingene ikipe ya Madagascar, nayo iri mw'iri higanwa ku nshuro ya mbere, yavyitwayemwo ihura na Guinea (2-2), harimwo ubudasa bukomeye cane kuko abasore bayo warabona ko ata gufyina kurimwo. Barakoresheje inguvu n'ugushaka kwinshi bahakura ibitsindo bibiri. Uku niko Intamba mu Rugamba zitegerezwa kuvyitwaramwo nizaba zishaka kubandanya muri iri higanwa. Ibishobisho vy'urukino rwa mbere bitegerezwa kuhava, umukino wa kigabo ugakurikira.

Mu mikino ya kimwe cya kabiri, Uganda yari yatunguye Tanzania yakiriye iri rushanwa iyitsinda ibitego 3-1 Ahmad, Perezida w'ishyirahamwe ry'umupira w'amaguru muri Afurika, na we ari mu barebye uwo mukino wa nyuma wabereye muri Tanzania - iki gihugu ni cyo kizanakira imikino y'umwaka utaha y'iki gikombe cy'Afurika cy'ibihugu cy'abari munsi y'imyaka 17 y'amavuko. Samson Kasozi wa Uganda ni we wafunguye amazamu n'umutwe ku munota wa 15 mbere yuko Abdul Wahad Iddi asongamo ibindi bibiri mu gice cya kabiri cy'umukino bikaba ibitego 3-0. Igitego cya Ethiopia cy'impozamarira yakibonye mu minota ya nyuma y'umukino gitsinzwe kuri penaliti na Wondimagegn Bunaro. Mu mikino ya kimwe cya kabiri, Uganda yari yatunguye Tanzania yakiriye iri rushanwa iyitsinda ibitego 3-1, mu gihe Ethiopia yari yasezereye u Rwanda kuri penaliti 4-2 nyuma yaho umukino wari warangiye amakipe yombi anganya 2-2. Tanzania - isanzwe ifite itike yo kwitabira imikino yo mu mwaka utaha kuko ari ho izabera - yatsinze u Rwanda kuri penaliti yegukana umwanya wa gatatu. Moses Magogo, umukuru w'ishyirahamwe ry'umupira w'amaguru muri Uganda, yagize ati: "Turishimye kuba bubaye ubwa mbere ikipe yacu y'abari munsi y'imyaka 17 y'amavuko ishoboye kubona itike yo kwitabira igikombe cy'ibihugu. Iyi tike iragaragaza ko turi gukora akazi neza mu guteza imbere urubyiruko." Iyi tike ije ikurikira iy'ikipe y'abakuru ya Uganda, yashoboye kwongera kwitabira imikino y'igikombe cy'Afurika cy'ibihugu mu mwaka ushize wa 2017 - nyuma y'imyaka 39 yari ishize itabasha kucyitabira. Igikombe cy'Afurika cy'ibihugu cy'abari munsi y'imyaka 17 y'amavuko kizabera muri Tanzania mu mwaka wa 2019 guhera ku itariki ya 12 kugera ku ya 26 y'ukwezi kwa gatanu. Amakipe ane ya mbere azahita abona itike yo kwitabira imikino y'igikombe cy'isi muri icyo cyiciro izabera muri Peru mu kwezi kwa cumi k'umwaka uzakurikira wa 2020.

Prezida Trump asanganira abanyororo barekuwe na Korea ya ruguru Avugana n'abamenyeshamakuru ku kibuga c'indege za gisirikare Andrews Air Force Base, Bwana Trump yavuze ko Kim Hak-song, Tony Kim na Kim Dong-chul ari "abantu b'igitangaza"; ngo vyari bikwiye kugira ico afasha ngo bapfungugwe. Babiri muri abo bagabo bigisha kuri kaminuza yatangujwe n'abakirisu muri Korea ya ruguru, uwa gatatu nawe ni umupasitori. Korea ya Ruguru yarekuye abanyororo batatu ba Amerika Amabi Warmbier yakorewe muri Korea ya ruguru Koreya zombi zumvikanye kwirinda ivyokwega intambara Barekuwe igihe c'urugendo rw'umushikiranganji w'imigenderanire ya Amerika n'amakungu, Mike Pompeo, i Pyongyang aho yariko araheraheza integuro y'inama itegekanijwe hagati ya Bwana Trump n'indongozi ya Korea ya ruguru Kim Jong-un. Umushikiranganji w'imigenderanire ya Amerika n'amakungu Mike Pompeo ahura n'indongozi ya Korea ya ruguru Kim Jong-un Kim Hak-song, Tony Kim na Kim Dong-chul bari bapfunzwe bagirizwa ibikogwa bigwanya igihugu, bashigwa mu makambi y'abakoreshwa. Bwana Trump yatangaje irekugwa ry'abo bagabo ku buryo bwa Twitter ku munsi wa gatatu.

Ishirahamwe rya OTAN Umubonano hagati ya Otan n'Uburuyiya wasivye inyuma y'aho Uburusiya bwogaruriye akarere ka Crimee mu mwaka wa 2014. Intambara zo mu buseruko bwa Ukraine na zo nyene zaragize uruhara rukomeye muri uko kurabana ribi. Umuvugizi wa Otan, avuga ko uwo mubonano udasigura ko ibintu vyasubiye mu buryo, ariko ko ari ikimenyetso ko ibiganiro bikenewe. Uwo mubonano ubaye inyuma y'ibintu vyinshi vyabereye mw'ibahari Baltic aho Amerika iguma yidogera ibikorwa vy'indege za gisirikare z'Uburusiya. Uburuziya burahakana bukarengwa ko butarenze kw'itegeko na rimwe, kandi ko gushira abasirikare ba Otan mu buseruko bwa Buraya itabaye ingingo nziza.

Ku itariki ya 16 y'ukwezi gushize kwa mbere, Visi Perezida El Aissami wa Venezuela (uri hagati) yasuye ahitwa Ahlatci hatunganyirizwa zahabu i Çorum, muri Turukiya Kuri ubu, Turukiya ifatwa nk'iyibanze iteje impungenge mu bihugu bikorana ubu bucuruzi na Venezuela. Bikomeje kurushaho gucyekwa ko iyi zahabu yoherezwa muri Turukiya birangira igeze muri Iran, ibintu byaba birenze ku bihano yafatiwe na Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Amerika. Perezida Recep Tayyip Erdogan wa Turukiya, yashyigikiye bikomeye Perezida Nicolás Maduro wa Venezuela, ukomeje kotswa igitutu n'abo batavuga rumwe muri politiki ngo yegure ku butegetsi. Ubucuruzi bwa zahabu hagati ya Venezuela na Turukiya burahinda. Mu mwaka ushize wa 2018, Venezuela yohereje muri Turukiya zahabu ifite agaciro kagera hafi kuri miliyoni 900 z'amadolari y'Amerika, bivugwa ko igiye kuhatunganyirizwa hanyuma igasubizwa muri Venezuela, nubwo nta mibare ihari yerekana iyahasubijwe. Bwana Erdogan (ibumoso) yagaragaye ashyigikiye Bwana Maduro mu kwezi kwa cumi na kabiri k'umwaka ushize wa 2018, mu murwa mukuru Caracas wa Venezuela Rero hari ugucyeka gukomeje kwiyongera ko imwe muri iyi zahabu yaba inyura muri Turukiya ikagera muri Iran, ibintu byaba birenze ku bihano yafatiwe n'Amerika. BBC yabwiwe ko Turukiya yaburiwe bundi bushya ku kuba yaba irenga kuri ibyo bihano. Ikindi, Turukiya ubu ibonwa na leta z'i Burayi n'Amerika nk'imbogamizi ikomeye cyane kurusha izindi kugeza ubu ku bijyanye n'ubu bucuruzi, yiyongera ku Burusiya na United Arab Emirates, amakuru avuga ko nabyo byakira iyo zahabu. Indege z'abantu ku giti cyabo zo mu Burusiya na Turukiya zigaragara nk'izerecyeje mu murwa mukuru Caracas wa Venezuela mu minsi ishize ya vuba. Turukiya ikomeza gushimangira ko ubucuruzi bwayo bukurikiza amahame agenga ubucuruzi mpuzamahanga.

Yavuze iki kandi kuki? Yagize ati: "Ngiye kubabwira iby'igihembo cy'amahoro cya Nobel. Nakoze akazi, nkiza igihugu, nyuma numva ngo umuyobozi w'icyo gihugu ubu niwe wahawe igihembo cy'amahoro cya Nobel kuko yakijije icyo gihugu. "Naravuze nti: "Reka! Ese ntacyo nabikozeho? ariko murabizi, ni ko bikorwa. Uko biri kose nakoze iby'ingenzi...nabujije ko haba intambara ikomeye, hari abo nakijije." Amashusho y'ibyo yabwiraga abantu bari i Toledo muri Ohio aho yariho yiyamamariza kuwa kane nimugoroba yashyizwe kuri Twitter: Ni inde yavugaga? Nubwo nta zina yavuze ry'uwahawe icyo gihembo cy'amahoro cyangwa igihugu, nta gushidikanya ko Bwana Trump yavugaga minisitiri w'intebe wa Ethiopia Abiy Ahmed. Bwana Abiy w'imyaka 43, niwe muyobozi wa guverinoma ukiri muto muri Afurika. Yagiye ku butegetsi mu kwa kane 2018 hashize amezi igihugu kiri mu myigaragambyo yatumye uwo yasimbuye yegura. Bwana Abiy yazanye impinduka zigamije ubwisanzure, arekura ibihumbi by'abatavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi bari bafunze areka n'abari barahunze ubutegetsi bagaruka iwabo. Bwana Abiy ashimirwa impinduka ziganisha ku mahoro yazanye Yaretse itangazamakuru rikora mu bwisanzure anashyira abagore mu myaka imwe n'imwe ikomeye. Mu kwezi kwa 10 umwaka ushize byatangajwe ko yatsindiye igihembo cy'amahoro kitiriwe Nobel, umutegetsi w'igihugu wenyine wagitsindiye kuva mu 2016 Bwana Trump yajya ku butegetsi. Kuki ari we wagitsindiye? Komite itanga ibi bihembo yavuze ko Bwana Abiy yashimiwe "umuhate we mu gukemura ibibazo by'umupaka n'igihugu gituranyi Eritrea". Ibi bihugu byabaye mu ntambara ikomeye hagati ya 1998 na 2000 yaguyemo abantu ibihumbi bibarirwa muri mirongo. Nubwo mu 2000 ibihugu byombi byasinye amasezerano yo guhagarika imirwano, byagumye mu bihe by'intambara hagati yabyo kugeza mu 2018 ubwo Abiy na Perezida Isaias Afwerki wa Eritrea basinye amasezerano y'amahoro.
