Umupfasoni Yarmysh ati: "Umwanya wose mu gitondo c'uno munsi abamenyeshamakuru baguma bambaza ngo 'nivyo koko ko Alexie ategura gusubira mu Burusiya'?" "Nsubiye kubimenyesha buri wese: nta yindi nzira yigeze yiyumvirwa". Iri tangazo ryaje haciye akanya gato Bwana Navalny yanditse ubutumwa bwiwe kuri Instagram. Yanditse ati: "Ndabaramutsa, uyu ni Navalny. Ndabakumbuye cane. N'ubu nta kintu kinini kirahinduka, ariko ejo narashoboye guhema jenyene umunsi wose". "Jewe jenyene, na kindi kintu nifashishije, nta na wa muringoti mu muhogo wanje. Vyarandyoheye cane". Hanze y'ibitaro ariko aravurirwamwo, hariho abapolisi bakeya, nk'uko bivugwa n'umumenyeshamakuru wa BBC yari ahari. Avuga ko ku bwinjiriro hari abapolisi babiri bafise inkoho, hamwe n'imodoka y'igipolisi ihamaze igihe. Hari amakuru atangazwa n'ibimenyeshamakuru vy'Ubudagi ariko ataremezwa neza, avuga ko hanze y'icumba arwariyemwo hoba hari imirongo y'abapolisi, eka n'igitanda ciwe ngo kikaba gicungerewe. Hagati aho, Uburusiya bwanse umubonano hagati ya Bwana Navalny na Bwana Putin, mu gihe uyu munyapolitike atavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi yoramuka akize. Itororokanirizo ry'amakuru Interfax risubiramwo amajambo y'umvugizi w'ibiro vy'umukuru w'igihugu Dmitry Peskov avuga ati: "Ntitubona akamaro k'uwo mubonano, rero nizeye ko umubonano nk'uwo utazobaho". Ingene yahawe iyo sumu Bwana Navalny ni umunyapolitike ahanganye cane na Perezida Putin, akagiriza ubutegetsi bwiwe ko burangwa n'igiturire. Abanywanyi ba Bwana Navalny bemeza ko yahawe icayi kirimwo iyo sumu igihe yari ku kibuga c'indege ca Tomsk ku wa 20 z'ukwezi kw'umunani. Yagiye gufatwa ari mu ndege, biba ngombwa ko iyi ndege yururuka vyihuta ku kibuga c'indege c'ahitwa Omsk. Inyuma y'iminsi ibiri, abategetsi b'Uburusiya bashoboye kwemera ko arungikwa mu Budagi. Mu 2018, iyi sumu ya Novichok yarakoreshejwe mu gushaka kwica uwahoze akora mu biro vy'igendereza vy'Uburusiya Sergei Skripal, n'umukobwa wiwe mu gisagara ca Salisbury mu Bwongereza. Aba bompi bararokotse ariko uwundi mugore yakorakoye iyo sumu, Dawn Sturgess wewe yahavuye yitaba Imana. Ubwongereza bwaragirije urwego rwa gisirikare rujejwe igendereza mu Burusiya ko ari rwo rwakoze ico gitero. Ibihugu 20 vyaciye vyirukanye abakora mu biro vy'ubuserukizi hamwe n'abakora mw'igendereza vy'Uburusiya barenga 100. Hagati aho, Moscou ivuga ko ata ruhara yigeze igira muri ivyo vyashikiye Bwana Navalny.

Minisitiri w'intebe yavuze ko Perezida Magufuli atari kwigaragaza gutyo gusa ngo nuko abantu babishaka Minisitiri w'intebe Kassim Majaliwa yagize ati: "Banyatanzania nimutuze, perezida wanyu arahari, afite ubuzima bwiza, arimo gukora". Yabivugiye mu masengesho yo ku wa gatanu mu musigiti wo mu mujyi wa Njombe mu majyepfo ya Tanzania. Hashize igihe hari uguhwihwisa ko Perezida Magufuli arwaye Covid-19 kandi ko yavuriwe muri Kenya akaza kujyanwa no mu Buhinde. Bwana Majaliwa yagize ati: "Afite [Perezida Magufuli] umurundo w'amadosiye. Ubu iyo ari ho [mu biro] ari anyura mu madosiye, muravuga muti 'Ararwaye, niyigaragaze'. Agendeye kuri gahunda yanyu bwite cyangwa kuri gahunda ye y'akazi?" Ati: "Perezida afite gahunda ye bwite y'akazi kandi ntabwo ashobora kwigaragaza ku mabwiriza yanyu". Bwana Majaliwa nta kindi kimenyetso yatanze cyo kunganira ibyo yavuze. Leta ya Tanzania imaze igihe ishinjwa gukerensa ubukana bwa coronavirus.

Imodoka n'amazu byangijwe n'imvura, ahantu hasigara hatwikiriwe n'imyanda n'icyondo Mu myaka irenga 30 ishize mu Buyapani, aba ni bo bantu benshi cyane bapfuye biturutse ku mvura. Ubu abakora mu bikorwa by'ubutabazi baracukura mu cyondo no mu mazu no mu bintu byagiye bitembagara, bashakisha ababa bashoboye kurokoka. Ababarirwa mu macumi baracyaburiwe irengero. Ubuyapani buragabisha ku bucuti bwa Korea ya ruguru Ubuyapani mu matora rusange y'igitaraganya Abantu bagera kuri miliyoni 2 bavanywe mu byabo, bahungishwa imigezi yo muri aka karere yuzuye ikarengera inkengero zayo. Abategetsi babaye bakiririye mu mashuri n'ibibuga by'imikino abakuwe mu byabo n'imvura. Haracyari ibyago ko imisozi yahirima, aho udusonga tw'imisozi twajendamye kubera imvura tukaba dushobora guhirima. Kosuke Kiyohara w'imyaka 38, utaramenya irengero rya mushiki we n'abana be babiri b'abahungu, yabwiye ibiro ntaramakuru AFP ati: "Nabwiye ab'iwanjye ngo babe bitegura inkuru y'incamugongo." Minisitiri w'intebe w'Ubuyapani Shinzo Abe yaretse urugendo yateganyaga kugirira mu mahanga kugira ngo abashe guhangana n'akaga katewe n'imyuzure. Abantu barenga ibihumbi 70, barimo abazimya inkongi n'abasirikare, bari gukora mu bikorwa by'ubutabazi. Abantu barenga ibihumbi 70 ni bo bari gukora mu bikorwa by'ubutabazi mu gice cy'uburengerazuba bw'Ubuyapani Ingo zibarirwa mu bihumbi zarengewe n'imyuzure bituma zitabona amazi meza n'umuriro w'amashanyarazi Kuva ku wa kane ushize, ibice by'uburengerazuba bw'Ubuyapani byaguyemo imvura ikubye gatatu imvura isanzwe ihagwa mu kwezi ka karindwi kose Nubwo imvura itagikomeje kugwa cyane ihozaho, abategetsi baburiye ko ishobora kongera ikagwa cyane giturumbuka, ndetse ivanze n'inkuba n'ihirima ry'imisozi Abantu barenga gato ibihumbi 12 bari mu bigo bahungishirijwemo biri muri perefegitura 15 Haracyari amakuru aburira ko imyuzure yindi yaba mu duce nubundi twibasiwe cyane, turimo na perefegitura ya Okayama mu majyepfo y'Ubuyapani. Ariko amakuru y'iteganyagihe aravuga ko mu minsi micye iri imbere ikirere kizatangira gucisha macye, ibintu byitezweho gufasha abakora mu bikorwa by'ubutabazi.

Abireguye uyu munsi barimo abari abarwanyi bo mu rwego rwo hasi Abisobanuye uyu munsi barimo General Nsanzubukire Felicien wemeye ko yabaye mu mutwe utemewe ndetse akabisabira imbabazi. General Major Felicien Nsanzubukire yavuze ko yari afite ipeti rya S/Lt mu ngabo z'u Rwanda mbere yo guhunga ubutegetsi bwa Habyarimana buhiritswe. Uyu musirikare waburanye bigaragara ko afite intege nkeya ndetse akorora cyane ni umwe mu baregwa ibyaha bikeya. Aregwa ibyaha bibiri: icyo kuba mu mutwe w'ingabo utemewe yemera ndetse akagisabira imbabazi ndetse n'icyo kuba mu mutwe w'iterabwoba yahakanye. Yemeye ko yabaye mu mutwe w'ingabo utemewe kuko yari umwe mu bayobozi b'umutwe wa FDLR n'uwa CNRD. Amateka ye mu gisirikare ngo yatumye yisanga muri iki cyaha ariko ngo ntiyigeze agira umugambi wo kugirira nabi igihugu. Yavuze ko asaba imbabazi kuri iki cyaha ariko asanga yaragombaga gusubizwa mu busima busanzwe nk'uko byakorewe abandi nka we batabanje kujyanwa mu nkiko. Yavuze ko atigeze aba mu mutwe wa FLN ufatwa nk'uwiterabwoba kuko yemeza ko yafashwe mu mwaka wa 2017, igihe we avuga ko uyu mutwe wari utaravuka. Abarwanyi bo ku rwego rwo hasi Abandi bireguye uyu munsi barimo abari abarwanyi bo mu rwego rwo hasi bemeye uruhare bagize mu bitero byagabwe ahatandukanye mu Rwanda. Aba barimo Jean Claude Byukusenge, Ntibiramira Innocent na Shaban Emmanuel. Aba bemeye uruhare bagize mu bitero byagabwe ahatandukanye mu karere ka Rusizi. Uru rubanza rwitiriwe Paul Rusesabagina Ngo hari aho barasaga amasasu mu kirere byo batagambiriye ahantu runaka kuko babaga bashaka kugaragaza ko umutwe wa FLN uri mu gihugu kandi ufite imbaraga. Aba bavuga ko bemeye kujya muri ibi bikorwa bemerewe Amafranga kuko nyuma ya buri gitero buri wese yahabwaga amadolari 100 y'Amerika. Bavuze kandi ko bagabye ibitero bya grenades bitagize uwo bihitana ndetse ngo banatwitse amamodoka. Umwunganizi wabo mu mategeko, Ngamije Kirabo, yasabye urukiko ko rwazazirikana ukwemera icyaha kw'aba bantu ndetse n'amakuru baruhaye rutari kubona ahandi. Uwitwa Joseph Ntabanganyimana cyangwa Combe Kalume Matata we aregwa kuba yarambukije abarwanya bava muri Congo bagabye igitero mu Rwanda. Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko uyu mugabo yakoze iki cyaha yifashishije ubwato ndetse akaba ari nawe wabarangiye amayari batari guhuriramo n'abasirikare. Ntabanganyimana uvuga ko yari umushoferi w'amakamyo mu mujyi wa Bukavu, yateye utwatsi ibivugwa n'ubushinjacyaha. Yavuze ko hari aho abo yafashije kugura ubwato ndetse agasinya ku masezerano y'ubugure ariko ko atazi icyo ubwato bwakoreshejwe nyuma. Ubushinjacyaha ariko buvuga ko yemeye icyaha ndetse ko yanashyize umukono ku nyandiko mvugo y'ibazwa. Aha ariko Ntabanganyimana avuga ko atazi kwandika no gusoma. Bwana Rusesabagina yanze kwongera kwitaba urukiko avuga ko atabona ubutabera Ngo yemeye gutera igikumwe ariko atazi ibyanditse kuko yari amaze umwaka wose afunze mu buryo bubi cyane. Ku rutonde rw'abaregwa haracyari abantu 9 batariregura mbere y'uko ubushinjacyaha bugaruka bubasabira ibihano. Paul Rusesabagina witiriwe uru rubanza we yamaze gutangaza ko atazongera kugaruka mu rubanza kuko yumva nta butabera yizeye. Biteganijwe ko urubanza ruzakomeza mu cyumweru gitaha, ku itariki ya 13 n'iya 14 z'ukwezi kwa gatanu.

Umunya-Bulgaria Kristalina Georgieva ayobora IMF kuva mu mwaka wa 2019 Bakoresheje intero yo ku mbuga nkoranyambaga (hashtag) ya #StopLoaningKenya, Abanyakenya bamwe barimo guhererekanya 'link' ikubiyemo iyo nyandiko y'ubusabe (petition). Ari nako batanga impamvu nta yindi nguzanyo Kenya ikwiye guhabwa. Impaka ku nguzanyo zatangiye hashize iminsi IMF yemeje inguzanyo ya miliyari 257 z'amashilingi (arenga miliyari 2 z'amadolari y'Amerika) igenewe Kenya mu guhangana na Covid-19. Umwenda (ideni) wa leta ya Kenya wiyongereyeho arenga trillion imwe y'amashilingi mu mwaka umwe ushize, nkuko bitangazwa n'ikinyamakuru Daily Nation cyo muri icyo gihugu. Ku mbuga nkoranyambaga, Abanyakenya basubiyemo amagambo yo mu itangazo rya Perezida Uhuru Kenyatta avuga ko iki gihugu buri munsi gitakaza miliyari ebyiri z'amashilingi muri ruswa. BBC ntibazwa ibivuye ku zindi mbuga. Minisitiri w'imari wa Kenya Ukur Yatani yashyigikiye iyo nguzanyo avuga ko ari ingenzi ku kuzahura ubukungu bwashegeshwe na Covid-19. Ubwo busabe bwo ku mbuga za internet bwakomeje gushyirwaho imikono n'Abanyakenya, aba banatangaje ibitekerezo ku mbuga nkoranyambaga za IMF bayisaba ko isaba leta ya Kenya ikabanza kwishyura amadeni yafashe mbere.

Inteko ya Tanzania ibamo abadepite barenga 380 Atavuze izina ry'uwo munyapolitiki, uwungirije umukuru w'Inteko Tulia Ackson yavuze ko uwo mudepite aheruka mu mujyi wa Dar es Salaam, ko ashobora kuba ariho yavanye iyi virus. Bwana Ackson yaburiye bagenzi be kwirinda kujya muri uyu murwa mukuru w'ubucuruzi ubu ufatwa nk'izingiro rya coronavirus muri Tanzania. Hagati ya tariki 18 n'ejo tariki 20 z'uku kwezi muri Tanzania habonetse abanduye Covid-19 bashya 84, na batatu bashya yishe, abanduye bose bahise bava ku 170 bagera kuri 254. Imirimo y'inteko yatangiye mu byumweru bitatu bishize nubwo yitabirwa n'abadepite bacye ugereranyije n'abasanzwe, abandi bagakoresha 'video conference'. Mu minsi ishize, umukuru w'iyi nteko Job Ndugai yaharaniye ko iterana avuga ko nubwo hari icyorezo, imirimo ya ngombwa cyane mu gihugu igomba gukomeza. Kimwe na Perezida John Magufuli, Bwana Ndugai ntiyemeranya n'ingamba zikomeye zo guhagarika ubuzima busanzwe (lockdown) , zafashwe mu bihugu bitandukanye ku isi na bimwe muri Afurika. Icyo gihe yagize ati: "Ntabwo twakora gusa ibyakozwe n'ibihugu by'iburayi. Biragoye cyane...twakwica abantu bacu. Hari abatunzwe no guca inshuro, bityo tugomba kureba iwacu uko bimeze tugafata ingamba zidukwiye". Gusa ubu kubera uko ubwandu buhagaze, bamwe mu banyapolitiki bagenzi be barasaba ko imirimo y'Inteko ihagarara, abayigize bose bagasuzumwa, abanduye bakajya mu kato. Zitto Kabwe wo mu ishyaka ACT-Wazalendo ritavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi yanditse ati: "Abadepite bose bajye mukato, bapimwe n'abo bahuye bashakishwe. Kuva ku ntangiriro twabagiriye inama yo guhagarika imirimo y'inteko. Biteye akaga". Bamwe mu badepite bo mu mashyaka atavuga rumwe na leta mu minsi ishize basabye ko umujyi wa Dar es Salaam ushyirwa mu bihe byo guhagarika ubuzima busanzwe kuko ariho habonetse abantu benshi banduye. Imam yafunze umusigiti Kuwa kane, ni umunsi udasanzwe ku ngengabihe ya kisilamu kuko hazatangira ukwezi gutagatifu kwa Ramadhan. Muri Tanzania, nubwo insengero z'imisigiti byemerewe gukomeza imirimo yabyo, Imam Said Haroun wo ku musigiti wa Msasani muri Arusha yategetse ko ufungwa. Said Haroun avuga ko agamije kurengera ubuzima bw'abagana uyu musigiti muri iki gihe coronavirus iri gukwirakwira ndetse yamaze kugera muri Arusha.

Nyuma y'imyaka irenga 100 inkuru ivugwa mu binyamakuru y'uko uyu muhungu w'umunyafurika yamurikwaga hamwe n'inkende, nibwo inzu y'inyamaswa (Zoo) ya Bronx muri New York yabyicujije. Ikigo kitwa Wildlife Conservation Society cyasabye imbabazi ku byakorewe Ota Benga, ibi byaje bikurikiye imyigaragambyo yamagana iyicwa ry'umwirabura George Floyd ryongeye kugaragaza neza ivanguraruhu muri Leta zunze ubumwe za Amerika. Mu muhango wo gusubira mu mateka, Cristian Samper, ukuriye Wildlife Conservation Society yavuze ko ari ingenzi "kwibuka amateka ya WCS, n'irondaruhu ryaranze ikigo cyacu". Yemeye ko iki kigo, ari nacyo gitegeka iriya nzu y'inyamaswa, gishyira ku mugaragaro ibyabaye byose byavuzwe mu itangazamakuru Iburayi na Amerika kuva tariki 09/09/1906 - umunsi Ota Benga yerekanywe bwa mbere n'iyo zoo - kugeza igihe yayivaniwemo tariki 28/09/1906. Gusa uko gusaba imbabazi bibaye nyuma y'imyaka myinshi yo kuvunira ibiti mu matwi. 'Yari umukozi wa zoo' Aho gufata ibyabaye nk'isomo, Wildlife Conservation Society yamaze imyaka irenga 100 idasobanura cyangwa ifasha gukwiza inkuru zitavuga cyangwa ziyobya ku byakorewe Ota Benga. Mu gihe benshi bari batangiye kunenga ibyo iyi zoo ikorera Ota Benga, muri uwo mwaka wa 1906 ibaruwa yo mu bushyinguranyandiko bwayo ivuga ko yari umukozi w'iyo nzu y'iyamaswa. Uko bigaragara, ubwo bucakura bwakomeje kwemerwa gutyo imyaka myinshi yakurikiyeho. Ota Benga yari inde? Aho biva: Spectacle: The Astonishing Life of Ota Benga Mu 1916, nyuma y'urupfu rwa Ota Benga, inkuru ya New York Times yahakanye ibyemezwaga muri rubanda ko yamuritswe hamwe n'inyamaswa. Iyi nkuru igira iti: "Ni akazi [yakoraga] katumye hazamuka amakuru ko yari afungiye muri pariki nka kimwe mu bintu bimurikwa mu ruzitiro rw'inkende." Icyo kinyamakuru, cyahakanyaga inyandiko nyinshi zari zaranditswe imyaka 10 mbere mu binyamakuru byo muri Amerika n'Iburayi. Ota Benga (iburyo) yafotowe mu "imurika ry'isi" ry'i St Louis mu 1904 aho we na bagenzi be bamuritswe nk'abantu bo mu bwoko bw'"impunyu" Nyamara, New York Times ubwayo yari yaranditse inkuru zirenga 10 kuri iki kibazo, iya mbere ya tariki 09/09/1906 ifite umutwe ugira uti: "Umuntu wo mu ishyamba mu ruzitiro rumwe n'inguge". Nyuma mu 1974, William Bridges, wari umukozi mukuru muri iyi nzu y'inyamaswa ya Bronx yavuze ko mu by'ukuri ibyabaye bitamenyekana. Mu gitabo cye yise The Gathering of Animals, yibaza nkana ati: "Ota Benga 'yamuritswe' - nk'inyamaswa idasanzwe?", ikibazo nk'umuntu wari ukuriye ubushyinguranyandiko bw'iyi nzu, ubwe yari mu mwanya mwiza wo gusubiza. Arakomeza ati: "Kuvuga ko yari afungiye mu ruzitiro kugira ngo bamurebe mu gihe cy'amasaha bisa n'ibitarashobokaga". Yirengagije ku bushake ibimenyetso bihamya ibi, bibitswe n'iyo nzu. Inyandiko y'uyu mugabo ku imurika ryabaye ku gihe cya Ota Benga, yanashyizwe mu nyandiko zisohorwa na Wildlife Conservation Society ubwayo. Bwana William Bridges kandi yaranditse ati: "Muri iki gihe gishize ikintu cyavugwa, ni uko ibyakozwe byose bitari bigamije inabi, kuko Ota Benga yari ateye amatsiko rubanda rwa New York." 'Ubucuti bw'abashimuswe n'ababashimuse' Hejuru y'ibi byari byaravuzwe, hiyongereyeho igitabo cyasohotse mu 1992 cyanditswe gifatanyijwe n'umwuzukuru wa Samuel Verner, umugabo wagiye muri Congo yitwaje intwaro nyinshi agashimuta Ota Benga n'abandi ngo bazerekanwe mu imurika ry'isi rya St Louis mu 1904. Iki gitabo, mu buryo butumvikana cyo kivuga inkuru y'ubucuti hagati ya Verner na Ota Benga. Ibinyamakuru bimwe byasubiyemo ibivugwa n'icyo gitabo cy'uyu mwuzukuru wa Verner wavuze ko Ota Benga - wagiye wanga cyane uburyo yari afashwe - yishimiye kwiyerekana imbere y'abatuye New York. Mu gihe kirenga imyaka 100, ikigo n'abantu bakoresheje Ota Benga, n'ababakomokaho, basibanganyije ibyabaye bakwirakwiza inkuru zitari ukuri kuri ayo mateka. Yewe n'ubu, Bwana Cristian Samper yasabye imbabazi ku kumurika Ota Benga "iminsi myinshi", ntiyavuze ko ari ibyumweru bitatu yamaze afungiwe mu nzu y'inkende. Wildlife Conservation Society, ifite Bronx Zoo, yavuze ko yamagana bimwe mu bibi byabaye mu mateka yayo Iyi zoo ubu yashyize kuri Internet inyandiko kuri icyo gihe, igizwe n'amabaruwa y'ibyakorwaga buri munsi kuri Ota Benga n'abagabo bari baramufunze. Amenshi muri ayo mabaruwa avugwa mu gitabo cyanjye [Pamela Newkirk] cyitwa Spectacle: The Astonishing Life of Ota Benga, cyasohotse mu 2015. My myaka itanu kuva gisohotse, abategetsi ba Bronxy Zoo banze kwicuza ibyabaye no gusubiza ibyo abanyamakuru bababazaga. Mu gihe kandi nagize amahirwe yo gusura inzu y'inguge aho Ota Benga yamurikirwaga anafungiye, kuva ubwo iyo nzu yahise ifungwa ntihagira abandi bayigeraho. 'Icyumba cyiza mu nzu y'inkende' Ubu, Bwana Samper agira ati: "Turicuza cyane ko abantu benshi n'ibisekuru bababajwe n'ibyo bikorwa cyangwa no kuba twarananiwe kubyamagana." Yamaganye kandi Madison Grant na Henry Fairfield Osborn bamwe mu bashinze iyi nzu, bombi bagize uruhare rukomeye mu kumurika Ota Benga. Grant we nyuma yanditse igitabo yise The Passing of The Great Race, igitabo kivuga kuri siyansi yo gushimagiza ubusumbane bw'amoko y'abantu, cyaje no gushimwa cyane na Adolf Hitler. Gusubiza Ota Benga muri Congo abamujyanye muri Amerika bavugaga ko byaba bihenze cyane Gusa Bwana Samper ntiyigeze avuga kuri William Hornaday washinze Bronx Zoo, akanafungirana Ota Benga ahari amagufa mu gushaka kwerekana ko arya abantu, ndetse wavugaga ko Ota Benga afite "icyumba cyiza mu nzu y'inkende". Ibyabaye ni isomo ku bantu bakigira ibitekerezo ko hari ubwoko bw'abantu buruta ubundi. Amahame shingiro ya Bronx Zoo yagize uruhare mu gukwirakwiza ivanguraruhu risumbanyisha amoko y'abantu ririho n'ubu. Kimwe mu byifuzwa ni uko Wildlife Conservation Society yakwitirira ishuri ryayo Ota Benga, wagize ibyago n'umurage udashobora gutandukanywa na Bronx Zoo.

Byari ibyishimo kuri benshi mu bahoze ari abarwanyi b'umutwe wa FDLR basoje amahugurwa yabo mu kigo cya Mutobo Umuyobozi ukuriye urwego rushinzwe gusubiza mu buzima busanzwe abahoze ari abasirikare, Seraphine Mukantabana, niwe yabitangaje. Yavuze ko urwego rw'ubugenzacyaha bwatangiye gukurikirana bamwe muri abo barwanyi ba FDLR baherutse gutaha mu Rwanda boherejwe na Repubulika ya Demokrasi ya Kongo. Abagera kuri 600 nibo bashoje inyigisho zigendanye n'uburere mboneragihugu zibategurira gusubira mu buzima busanzwe. Byari ibyishimo kuri benshi mu bahoze ari abarwanyi b'umutwe wa FDLR basoje amahugurwa yabo mu kigo cya Mutobo mu majyaruguru y'u Rwanda, benshi bishimira ko bavuye mu buzima bita ko bugoye bahozemo mu mashyamba ya Kongo. Buri umwe wese aragenerwa ibihumbi 60 by'amanyarwanda azamufasha gutangira ubuzima busanzwe. Mu maso ya bamwe hagaragaramo umwijima, urwego rw'ubugenzacyaha RIB ngo bumaze iminsi bukora iperereza Ariko ntambwo byari ibyishimo gusa... Nubwo bimeze gutyo ariko, mu maso ya bamwe hagaragayemo umwijima ngo kuko urwego rw'ubugenzacyaha RIB rumaze iminsi rukora iperereza kuri bamwe ku byaha bya jenoside baba bakekwaho gukorera mu Rwanda muri 94. Abari abarwanyi b'umutwe wa FDLR bagera kuri 600 nibo bashoje amahugurwa agendanye n'uburere mboneragihugu yibanda cyane ku mateka y'u Rwanda. Bigishwa uburyo kuri ubu igihugu kiyobowe, ubumwe n'ubwiyunge, kubashishikariza kubumbatira umutekano ku mirenge aho baturuka ariko kandi bagasabwa guhamagarira abo basize muri Kongo gutahuka.

Tanzania yarahagaritse gutangaza ingene ikiza ca coronavirus yifashe mu gihugu Bamwe mu bo bakorana mu biro nabo nyene baratowe umugera, nk'uko bivugwa n'umugambwe wiwe ACT Wazalendo mw'itangazo. Hamad ari mu bitaro, bikwavugwa ko amagara yiwe aguma atera imbere. Uwo mugambwe utavuga rumwe n'uwuri ku butegetsi wasavye aba Tanzania gukurikiza ingingo zo kwirinda kwandura no gukiwirakwiza uwo mugera. Iyo nkuru imenyekanye haheze iminsi prezida wa Tanzania John Pombe Magufuli agabishije abajejwe amagara y'abantu ko batokwihutira kuzana inkingo za Covid-19 badafise ivyemezo,avuga ko zishobora kubangamira amagara y'abantu. Kuva mu kwezi kwa gatandatu, reta ya Tanzania ntihora ibiharuro bijanye na coronavirus kuva umukuru w'ico gihugu atangaje ko kitakirangwamwo uwo mugera. Mu minsi iheze ariko Eklezia Katorika yaragabishije ko hari ibimenyetso ko uwo mugera wasubiye kugwirirana mu gihugu iravye ubwinshi bw'imisa y'abpfuye isigaye isomwa buri munsi

Ahmed al-Rabie na Liyetona Jenerali Abdel Fattah Abdelrahman Burhan, nyuma yo gushyira umukono ku masezerano Aya masezerano abaye intango y'inama nshya iyoboye igihugu, ihuriwemo n'abasivile n'abasirikare b'abajenerali, izategura amatora n'ubutegetsi bwa gisivile. Mohamed Hamdan 'Hemeti' Dagolo, ubonwa ahanini nk'umutegetsi ukomeye wa Sudani, yasezeranyije kuzakurikiza ibikubiye muri ayo masezerano. Kuva uwahoze ari Perezida Omar al-Bashir yahirikwa n'igisirikare ku gitutu cy'abigaragambya mu kwezi kwa kane, Sudani yakomeje kurangwamo imyigaragambyo n'ibikobwa byibasira abigaragambya. Ayo masezerano yashyizweho umukono ku munsi w'ejo ku wa gatandatu na Jenerali Dagolo na Liyetona Jenerali Abdel Fattah Abdelrahman Burhan ku ruhande rw'inama ya gisirikare. Na Ahmed al-Rabie ku ruhande rw'urugaga ruhuriyemo abigaragambya bashaka ubwisanzure n'impinduka zishingiye kuri demokarasi. Ba Minisitiri w'intebe wa Ethiopia n'uwa Misiri na Perezida wa Sudani y'Epfo, ni bamwe mu bategetsi bitabiriye uwo muhango. Ahmed al-Rabie na Jenerali Hamdan 'Hemeti' Dagolo bashyira umukono ku masezerano Ku mihanda yo mu murwa mukuru Khartoum, habaye ibikobwa byo kwishimira ayo masezerano. Abantu babarirwa mu bihumbi bateraniye hanze y'icyumba yashyiriweho umukono, bazunguza amabendera ya Sudani ndetse bakora ibimenyetso bigaragaza amahoro. Abaturage ba Khartoum n'abo mu bindi bice by'igihugu bagiye mu modoka za bisi no muri za 'gariyamoshi' bitabiriye uwo muhango. Bijyanye n'aya masezerano, inama y'igihugu - igizwe n'abasivile batandatu n'abajenerali batanu - izayobora igihugu kugeza hateguwe amatora. Impande zombi zemeye kujya zisimburana ku buyobozi by'iyo nama mu gihe cy'inzibacyuho kirenga gato imyaka itatu. Biteganyijwe ko minisitiri w'intebe ugenwe n'abasivile ashyirwaho mu cyumweru gitaha. 'Hemeti' yavuze iki? Mu kiganiro yagiranye n'umunyamakuru wa BBC Zeinab Badawi cyatambutse mbere yuko ayo masezerano ashyirwaho umukono, 'Hemeti' yagize ati: "Tuzakurikiza buri nyuguti igize aya masezerano". Yongeyeho ati: "N'iyo aya masezerano atahaba, tugomba gukorera muri uyu murongo kuko ari mu nyungu z'igihugu". "Bityo rero tugomba kugera ku masezerano, tukayakurikiza kandi tukayashyigikira". 'Hemeti' ni umuyobozi w'umutwe w'abarwanyi bagabwa aho rukomeye wegamiye ku butegetsi (RSF). Wakomotse ku ntagondwa z'aba Janjaweed zishinjwa gukora Jenoside mu karere ka Darfour mu burengerazuba bwa Sudani. Abantu benshi bateraniye hanze y'ibiro bikuru by'uyu mutwe wa RSF rwagati muri Khartoum, bacuranga indirimbo z'impinduramatwara ndetse bashwaza abasirikare byo kubishimaho, nkuko bitangazwa n'ibiro ntaramakuru Reuters.

Bamporiki wari ukuriye RNC muri icyo gihugu, yishwe ku cyumweru nimugoroba ahitwa Nyanga Township muri Cape Town, yari amaze amasaha macye avuye i Johannesburg. Polisi ya Africa y'Epfo yabwiye BBC ko iperereza ry'ibanze rituma "yizera ko impamvu y'ubu bucanyi ari ubujura". Itangazo ryasohowe na RNC rivuga ko abategetsi bakuru mu Rwanda bagiye bigamba uruhare mu bwicanyi ku Banyarwanda batavugarumwe nabo baba mu mahanga. BBC yagerageje kuvugana na leta y'u Rwanda ku bivugwa na RNC ku rupfu rwa Bamporiki, kugeza ubu ntibirashoboka. Etienne Mutabazi, umuvugizi w'ishyaka RNC, yabwiye BBC ati: "Ku wa gatandatu yari yaraye i Johannesbourg, twariho twibuka bagenzi bacu bandi nabo bishwe cyangwa bazimiye, noneho ku cyumweru nibwo yafashe indege asubira Cape Town, yagezeyo nko mu ma saa tanu. "Umuntu w'umunyagihugu w'umusore w'imyaka nka 20 aza kumuhamagara amubwira ko ashaka igitanda, kuko Bamporiki yari afite iduka ry'ibikoresho byo mu rugo." Mutabazi avuga ko ku wa gatandatu uwo mukiliya yaje ku iduka rya Bamporiki, ariko akanga kugura igitanda atamubonye ndetse abwira abo yahasanze ko "ashaka ko ari Bamporiki uzakimujyanira iwe." Ni ubujura n'ubwicanyi bisanzwe? Mu modoka imwe, Bamporiki wari umaze amasaha ageze i Cape Town, umukozi we, hamwe n'uwo mukiliya bajyanye igitanda aho umukiliya atuye ari naho yarasiwe agapfa. Polisi ya Africa y'Epfo ivuga ko uwari kumwe nawe we yabashije guhunga adakomerekejwe. Polisi ivuga ko nta muntu irafata kugeza ubu aregwa ubu bwicanyi, ivuga ko uwapfuye yavanywe mu modoka akaraswa, naho abaregwa kwica bagatwara imodoka. Polisi yabwiye BBC ko iperereza ry'ibanze riyiha "impamvu yo kwizera ko impamvu y'ubu bwicanyi ari ubujura". Mutabazi we avuga ko batabona ibi nk'ubujura busanzwe, ati: "Twe turavuga ko ari ibintu byateguwe, turavuga ko Bamporiki bamuhotoye". Avuga ko ibi bisa n'iby'abandi Banyarwanda bo muri RNC bishwe cyangwa bakarokoka ubwicanyi muri icyo gihugu; Kayumba Nyamwasa, Frank Ntwari na Kennedy Gihana, hamwe na Col Patrick Karegeya wishwe mu 2013, na Camir Nkurunziza - we wari utakiri muri RNC - wishwe mu 2019. Mutabazi ati: "Bamwe mu babigizemo uruhare barazwi bavuzwe amazina mu manza, abandi polisi mpuzamahanga yashyizeho impapuro zo kubafata ubu bari i Kigali. "Urumva rero ni ibintu bikorwa byateguwe mbere y'igihe, waza kureba nyuma y'amaperereza n'imanza zabaye ugasanga byose byateguriwe mu Rwanda. Twe turavuga ko ari leta y'u Rwanda ibifitemo inyungu". Itangazo ryasohowe n'ishyaka rya RNC kuwa mbere rivuga ko "abategetsi bakuru mu Rwanda barimo na Perezida Paul Kagame bagiye bigamba uruhare mu bwicanyi no gufata no kohereza abantu mu buryo budasanzwe". BBC yagerageje kuvugisha leta y'u Rwanda ku bivugwa na Mutabazi, kugeza ubu ntibirashoboka. Leta y'u Rwanda mbere yagiye ishinjwa kwica cyangwa gukurikirana abatavuga rumwe nayo muri Africa y'Epfo, ibirego yo yagiye ihakana. Mu 2014, kwibasira abatavuga rumwe na leta y'u Rwanda muri icyo gihugu byateje umwuka mubi hagati y'ibi bihugu, batatu mu bahagarariye u Rwanda barirukanywe, n'u Rwanda rubigenza gutyo ku bahagarariye Africa y'Epfo i Kigali.

Hagati hari laboratoire y'i Wuhan, imwe muri nkeya ku isi zemerewe gukora ubushakashatsi kuri virus zikomeye zishobora abantu bashobora kwanduzanya Ku cyumweru nibwo Bwana Pompeo yavuze ibyo, ariko ntiyavuga ibirenzeho. Iyi ndwara yabonetse bwa mbere mu Bushinwa mu mpera z'umwaka ushize, ubu imaze kwica abantu bagera ku 250,000 ku isi. Mu nyandiko y'ibanze y'ikinyamakuru Global Times cy'uyu munsi kuwa kabiri, iki kinyamakuru kivuga ko Bwana Pompeo ari "umubeshyi". Ishami ry'umuryango w'abibumbye ryita ku buzima WHO rivuga ko ibyo Amerika ivuga ari "ugukwiza ibihuha" kuko nta shingiro ryabyo iri shami rya ONU rirabona. Icyo kinyamakuru cyavuze iki? Inyandiko z'ibanze z'ibinyamakuru bya leta mu Bushinwa kenshi zigaragaza ibyo leta itekereza, gusa kugeza ubu nta mutegetsi w'Ubushinwa uragira icyo asubiza ku byavuzwe na Pompeo. Ejo kuwa mbere, ikinyamakuru Global Times cyashinje Bwana Pompeo "kuvuga ibitari byo no guhimba ibimenyetso", uyu munsi cyakomeje kumuvugaho. Cyanditse kiti "Mu gukwiza ibinyoma, Pompeo arashaka kwica inyoni ebyiri akoresheje ibuye rimwe" "Icya mbere, yizeye gufasha Trump gutsinda amatora mu kwa cumi na kumwe....icya kabiri, Pompeo yanga ubutegetsi rusange bw'Ubushinwa, by'umwihariko, ntiyareka Ubushinwa butera imbere". Iyi nyandiko y'ibanze yemera ko hari "ibibazo kun tango" mu buryo Ubushinwa bwahanganye n'iki cyorezo, ariko ko "imikorere muri rusange yari myiza bihagije ngo itsinde ikibazo". Ivuga kandi ko "byumvikana uburyo iyi virus yagiye ikwira mu bantu mu bindi bice". Global Times sicyo kinyamakuru cyonyine cyo mu Bushinwa cyanenze ibyavuzwe na Bwana Pompeo. Ikinyamakuru People's Daily cyavuze ko Pompeo "nta bimenyetso" afitiye ibyo avuga, naho CCTV ishinja abanyapolitiki ba Amerika "umugambi mubisha". Mike Pompeo yavuze iki? Mu kiganiro n'igitangazamakuru ABC ku cyumweru, Bwana Pompeo yavuze ko hari "ibimenyetso byinshi" ko coronavirus yavuye mu kigo Wuhan Institute of Virology. Yagize ati: "Mwibuke ko Ubushinwa bufite amateka mu kwanduza isi, kandi bafite n'amateka yo gukoresha laboratoire zitujuje ibisabwa". Bwana Pompeo, wahoze akuriye ikigo gishinzwe ubutasi mu mahanga cya Amerika (CIA) - yavuze ko adatekereza ko iyi virusi yakozwe n'abantu cyangwa yahinduwe bya gihanga. Laboratoire y'i Wuhan isanzwe iri muri nke zemerewe gukora ubushakashatsi ku zindi coronavirus zibasira uducurama. Mike Pompeo yemeza ko hari ibimenyetso byinshi ko iyi virus yavuye muri laboratoire ya Wuhan Mu kwezi gushize, Perezida Trump yabajijwe niba hatarabaye uburangare iyo virus igasohoka iciye mu musore wimenyereza umwuga n'umukobwa w'inshuti ye. Bwana Trump ibi bivugwa ntiyabyemeje, gusa yagize ati: "Turarushaho kumva iyo nkuru." Mu cyumweru gishize, yongeye kubazwa niba hari ibimenyetso yabonye bimwemeza ko iyi virus yavuye muri laboratoire i Wuhan. Trump yarasubije ati: "Yego, ndabifite". Arenzaho ko nta makuru arambuye yatanga "kuko atabyemerewe". Inzobere zivuga iki? Ejo kuwa mbere, Michael Ryan ushinzwe ibikorwa by'ubutabazi muri OMS/WHO yavuze ko "nta makuru cyangwa ibihamya" Amerika itanga bigaragaza inkomoko y'iyi virus. Yagize ati: "Bityo ku ruhande rwacu, ibi birakomeza kuba ari ibihuha". Mu cyumweru gishize, ikigo kiri mu bishinzwe ubutasi muri Amerika (US intelligence community) cyanzuye ko iyi virus atari "igikorwa cy'umuntu cyangwa cyahinduwe n'umuntu". Gusa iki kigo cyavuze ko gikomeza kugenzura niba iyi virus yaravuye mu "guhura kw'abantu n'inyamaswa ziyifite, cyangwa yaravuye ku mpanuka muri laboratoire y'i Wuhan".

Nyamara kuri Charlotte Mukantwari na Gabin Ndayizigiye bo mu ntara ya Kirundo mu majyaruguru y'u Burundi, nta gisibya yagombaga kubaho ku rukundo rwabo - kabone niyo byaba ari mu bitaro. Nyuma yaho Gabin akoreye impanuka mu ntangiriro y'icyumweru gishize ari nacyo cy'ubukwe bwabo, yibajije byinshi. Yabwiye BBC ati: "Maze kubona ngize iyo 'accident' [impanuka]..., nashoboye kwibaza nti, 'Ni Shitani idashaka ko uwo munsi uba?' Numvaga nyine ko uwo munsi w'itariki ya kane [y'uku kwezi kwa karindwi], ari umunsi wanjye mu buzima,..twateguranye na we, ugomba kuba". "Utabaye nari kumva ari nkaho Imana yantereranye". No kuri Charlotte kandi na we ngo iyo gahunda y'ubukwe bwabo ntiyari gusiba. Ati: "Jyewe ukuntu mukunda, ni ukuri nubwo hari haciyemo ibyo bibazo bya 'accident', ariko nakomezaga mbona ko bitasibira". Mu gusezerana kwabo mu bitaro, Charlotte avuga ko yasezeranyije umugabo we Gabin kuzamukunda iteka, yaba arwaye cyangwa ari muzima. Gabin na we amusezeranya ko bazabana mu byiza cyangwa mu bibi, yaba arwaye cyangwa ari muzima. Byageze aho gute? Gabin avuga ko we na Charlotte bari bamaze imyaka bakundana kandi bariyemeje kubana nk'umugore n'umugabo. Nuko habura iminsi ine ngo ubukwe butahe, Gabin akora impanuka agongwa n'imodoka bimuviramo kuvunika ukuguru. Ati: "Nisanze ndyamye mu muferege, ukuguru kubyimbye, abari bandwaje batinya no kubimubwira [Charlotte], ko yabimenya ko nababaye cyane nk'uko, ariko bageraho barabimubwira ahita aza". Charlotte avuga ko yari yakomeje kumutelefona ngo amubaze niba yageze imuhira nyuma yuko bari bahuye, telefone ya Gabin igacamo ariko ntihagire uyitaba. Nyuma yo kubimenya Charlotte yamugezeho, afatanya n'abamurwaje. Gabin avuga ko yabonaga ko ari nkaho ubukwe bwabo butakibayeho, ariko atangazwa n'ibyo Charlotte yamubwiriye mu bitaro. Ati: "Yakomezaga kubona aho ndyamye, akabona ukuguru kwamaze gucika, ariko agakomeza kunganiriza akambwira [ati], 'Nk'ubu Imana yaguha koroherwa, ntitwareba ko iyo gahunda ishoboka?'" "Yarabimbajije nk'uko turi kumwe turi babiri, biranantangaza cyane mu gihe abandi bakobwa ashobora kuba abona ko mbaye nk'ikimuga, ko bidakwiye ko yanguma i ruhande". Nyuma Gabin ngo yagejeje icyo gitekerezo kuri padiri mukuru wo muri paruwasi yabo mu Kirundo, amubwira ibyabaye by'iyo mpanuka, undi amubwira ko amategeko ya Kiliziya Gatolika yemera ko n'aho bahasezeranira. Nuko ubuyobozi bw'ibitaro butegura icyumba cyo gusezeraniramo kwabo, butegura n'akagare k'abarwayi ko kumufasha kuva ku gitanda cyaho arwariye. Gabin avuga ko byabaye nk'igitangaza ku bantu bari bari kuri ibyo bitaro. Nubwo padiri yari yabahishe isaha nyirizina yo gusezeraniraho, mu kwirinda akavuyo kashoboraga guterwa n'imbaga yahururiye ubwo bukwe bwabo, ngo ntibyabujije ko nubundi ubukwe bwabo bwitabirwa n'imbaga. Ati: "...Umunsi mukuru ugenda neza, baduha umugisha, twambikana impeta, duhita dusubira haruguru mu cyumba ndwariyemo". Charlotte avuga ko umunsi Gabin yakize bazashimira Imana cyane, ariko ko nta bundi bukwe buzabaho kuko nta wusubiramo ubukwe. Kuri Gabin we, ateganya ko nibabona urubyaro, igihe umwana wabo azaba yabatijwe ari wo mwanya bazahuza imiryango yabo. Ati: "... Tuzabyibukiranya byose, ube umunsi mukuru umeze neza, n'imiryango yose batubone twese turi hamwe dukomeye".

Avuga ko yononywe mu mutwe n'intagondwa, amaze kugera muri Kaminuza. Ibyo Alia Ghanem, yabiganiriye umumenyamakuru w'ikinyamakuru The Guardian, wamusanze iwe mu mujyi wa Jeddah, muri Arabiya Saudite. Alia Ghanem yavuze ku bijyanye no mu bwana bw'umuhungu we. Yavuze ko yakundaga kwiga, kandi yari azi ubwenge mu ishuri. Ariko yabwiye ikinyamakuru the Guardian ko Bin Laden yatangiye guhinduka ageze mu myaka 20 y'amavuko. Bin Laden yiciwe ahitwa Abbottabad muri Pakistani n'abasirikare kabuhariwe ba Amerika. Ngo yahindutse undi muntu amaze kugwa mucyo nyina yita agatsiko ubwo yari muri kaminuza yo mujyi wa Saudi i Jeddah. Yongeraho ko yahoraga amuburira kwitandukanya nako. Hakekwa ko Bin Laden ariwe wateguye igitero cyo ku italiki ya 1/09/2001 muri Leta Zunze ubumwe za Amerika, ndetse n'ibyagabwe ahandi. Ariko umubyeyi we avuga ko atigeze amubwira ibyo yakoraga kubera ko yakundaga nyina cyane. Nta marangamutima yagaragaje yo kwicuza ku bantu umuhungu wishe.

Lee Man-hee niwe pasitori mukuru w'urusengero Shincheonji Church of Jesus akaba ari nawe yarutanguje Lee Man-hee arongoye ishengero Shincheonji Church of Jesus yapfukamye arasaba imbabazi mu kiganiro n'abanyamakuru. Ibice vyababa 60% mu bantu barenga 4000 banduye uwo mugera muri ico gihugu ni abanywanyi b'urwo rusengero. Uno munsi ku wa mbere, Koreya y'Epfo - igihugu kivugwamwo uwo mugera ku mubagane wa Aziya inyuma y'Ubushinwa - yatangaje abandi bantu 476 bashasha banduye, bituma igitigiri c'abandi bashika ku 4.212. Abashikirizamanza basavye ko Bwana Lee akorwako amatohoza ku rwangara rukomeye yoba yaragize bituma uwo mugera ukwiragira hose. Uyo mupasitori w'imyaka 88 ati: "N'aho atariyo ntumbero twari dufise, abantu benshi baranduye. Twarakoze uko dushobora kwose, ariko vyaranse". Muri abo bantu banduye, 3081 bava mu gisagara ca Daegu kiri mu bumanuko bushira ubuseruko, kandi muri abo, ibice 73% bose bafitaniye isano n'urwo rusengero ruri hafi y'aho. Ku mugwa mukuru Seoul, umukuru w'igisagara yasavye abanyagihugu baba muri ico gisagara kirimwo abantu imiliyoni 10 gukorera muhira kandi bakirinda ibibanza bihuriramwo abantu benshi. Kubera iki urwo rusengero Shincheonji Church of Jesus rutungwa agatoki? Abanywanyi b'urwo rusengero bazwi ko bandukiranije mbere baragenda no hagati mu gihugu banduza n'abandi atawubaciye n'ikanda. Urwo rusengero rwagirizwa ko rwanyegeje amazina y'abanywanyi barwo, bituma bigorana kurondera aboba baranduye. Hagati aho, umuvugizi w'urwo rusengero Kim Shin-chang yabwiye BBC ko bari bahaye abategetsi urutonde rw'abakirisu babo, abanyeshure hamwe n'inyubakwa. Bwana Kim ati: "Twari twatinye gutanga izi ntonde kubera twatinyirira umutekano w'abanywanyi bacu". Bwana Lee abwira abantu ko ari we muzo wa kabiri wa Yesu/Yezu, akiyita ko "ari wa mu pasitori bemererwa" yanditswe muri Bibiliya ko azoza gutora abantu 144.000 akagenda abatwaye mw'ijuru. Bwana Kim yabwiye BBC ko muri Koreya y'Epfo, urwo rusengero Shincheonji Church of Jesus rufatwa nk'akarwi kiyonkoye haba mu gihugu cane mu bakirisu, ari naco gituma barushira ku ruhande, bakaruhohotera canke bakarutyoza. Abantu hafi 90.000 nibo bamaze kumenyekana ko banduye umugera wa corona mu bihugu 57 kw'isi, mu gihe abarenga 3000 bamaze gupfa, nk'uko bimenyeshwa n'ishami rya ONU rijejwe amagara y'abantu, OMS/WHO.

Iyo ndege y'imetero hafi 77 yabaye irarindirijwe kuguruka kubera ibibazo vy'ubuhinga. Iyo kompanyi iriko ica ku giti no ku mabuye kugira ngo isubize itoto ishusho yayo inyuma y'aho indege zayo 737 Max zihagarikiwe mu mwaka uheze bivuye ku masanganya ruhonyabantu abiri yahitanye abantu 346. Iyo ndege yageragerejwe hafi y'igisagara ca Seattle ikaba yamaze amasaha ane mu kirere. Muri ino ndwi, iryo gerageza ryarahagaritswe incuro zibiri kubera umuyaga mwinshi. Vyitezwe ko haba ayandi magerageza imbere y'uko iyo ndege itangura gukora mu mwaka uza, muri kompanyi yunguruza abantu Emirates. Iyo ndege izokwunguruza abantu ipima hafi imetero 77, ikaba yari yitezwe ko yotanguye gukoreshwa uno mwaka ariko ikaba yabaye irarindirijwe kubera ibibazo vy'ubuhinga. Wendy Sowers ajejwe ivyo kugurisha iyo ndege 777X avuga ati: "Ico ni ikintu gikomeye dukoze nk'ihinguriro". Boeing ivuga ko imaze gushora izishika 309 - ku giciro c'imiliyoni zirenga 442 z'amadolari imwe imwe. Iyo ndege izobangabanganwa n'indege ya Airbus A350-1000 ifise ubushobozi bwo gutwara abantu 360. Iyo ndege yizobanza kugeragezwa ku zindi ncuro zitari nke kugira ngo ishobore kwemererwa gutangura gukora mu mwaka uza na Emirates Boeing imaze igihe mu bibazo kuva ya masanganya abiri ya 737 Max, yabaye mu kiringo c'amezi atanu - irya mbere muri Indonesia mu kwa cumi 2018, irindi muri Ethiopia mu kwa gatatu kw'umwaka uheze. Iriko ikorwako amatohoza menshi kuko yagirizwa ko yashize imbere amaronko mu kwihutira kugurisha izo ndege kubakiriya bazo kandi hari hakiri uduhaze. Muri kino gihe iriko yita ku rutare kugira ngo izo ndege zemererwe gusubira mu kirere. Gushika ubu, Boeing imaze guhomba amafaranga arenga imiliyaridi 9 z'amadolari y'abanyamerika bivuye kw'ihagarikwa ry'indege za 737 Max, indege zari zimaze kwinjiriza Boeing amafaranga menshi cane kuva ibaho.

Inama yabo yaganiriye ku kibazo cy'abatwara amakamyo bivugwa ko bakwirakwiza iyi ndwara mu karere muri iyi minsi Mu bihugu bigize aka karere kugeza ubu hamaze kuboneka abantu 1,798 banduye coronavirus yavuzwe bwa mbere mu karere muri Kenya tariki 12/03/2020. Iyi nama yari iyobowe na Perezida Paul Kagame w'u Rwanda uyoboye uyu muryango, yitabiriwe kandi na Uhuru Kenyatta wa Kenya, Yoweri Museveni wa Uganda na Salva Kiir wa Sudani y'Epfo. EAC ntabwo yatangaje impamvu John Pombe Magufuli wa Tanzania na Pierre Nkurunziza w'u Burundi batayitabiriye. Aba bategetsi bitabiriye inama bemeranyijwe gusangira amakuru y'ibiva mu bipimo bya Covid-19 hagati ya za minisiteri zishinzwe ubuzima, ubucuruzi, ubwikorezi, n'ibikorwa bireba uyu muryango. Itangazo ryasohowe n'uyu muryango rivuga ko bemeranyijwe kandi "gukomeza gukurikirana abatwara amakamyo n'abakorana nabo no guhana amakuru yabo". Abatwara amakamyo yambukiranya imipaka muri iyi minsi bagaragajwe na bimwe mu bihugu bigize EAC nk'abakwirakwiza iki cyorezo mu ngendo bakora bajya cyangwa bava ku byambu bya Mombasa na Dar es Salaam. Aba bategetsi mu nama yabo bategetse inzego z'ubuzima "gutegura uburyo buhuriweho n'akarere bwo gusuzuma no kwemeza ko abatwara amakamyo ari bazima mbere yo guhaguruka kandi bagasuzumwa buri byumweru bibiri, bagaha raporo abakuru b'ibihugu". Iyo nama yayobwe na Bwana Kagame uyoboye uyu muryango muri uyu mwaka Iyi nama yabo yabonye ko ibikorwa by'ubuhinzi, ubucuruzi, inganda, ubukerarugendo, kwakira abantu n'imyidagaduro biri kuzahazwa n'iki cyorezo. Biyemeza ko ibihugu bigiye gufatanya korohereza ibikorwa bitandukanye muri izi nzego, nk'ubuhinzi, mu gutunganya no kugeza umusaruro wazo ku masoko y'akarere. Banzuye kandi kugira ibyihutirwa; gukora ibikoresho byakorerwa mu karere byo kurwanya coronavirus nk'udupfukamunwa, 'sanitizers', amasabune, ibiribwa bitunganyije, 'ventilators' n'ibindi no koroshya ko bigezwa ku masoko y'akarere. Abanduye coronavirus mu bihugu byo muri EAC kugeza ubu:

Umuhango wo kongera gutangiza kompanyi y'indege Uganda Airlines wabaye ejo ku wa kabiri Ejo ku wa kabiri, Uganda yakoze umuhango wo kumurika iyi kompanyi y'indege y'igihugu, nyuma y'imyaka 18 yari ishize idakora. Urugendo rwayo rwa mbere - rw'umuhango wo kongera kuyibyutsa rwakozwe n'indege yo mu bwoko bwa Bombardier CRJ900 - narwo rwavuye i Kampala rwerekeza kuri Jomo Kenyatta International Airport i Nairobi. Ni urugendo rwamaze hafi iminota 45. Urugendo rw'uyu munsi narwo iyi ndege yarushoje neza. Urwo rugendo rw'ejo ku wa kabiri, ku ikubitiro rwari ruteganyijwe gutangira ku isaha ya saa tanu n'iminota 10 z'amanywa ku isaha yo muri Uganda, rwakerereweho isaha imwe. Abagenzi bari muri iyo ndege ahanini bari abategetsi bo muri leta ya Uganda ndetse n'abanyamakuru. Iyi kompanyi ije isanga izindi zikorera muri aka karere nka Ethiopian Airlines, Kenya Airways, RwandAir na Air Tanzania. Izi ndege nyinshi zijya mu byerekezo bimwe. Bamwe bibaza ku bushobozi bw'izi ndege bwo kubona abagenzi bahagije no kunguka kwazo. Uganda Airlines mu itangizwa ryayo, leta yavuze ko yizeye ko izabona abagenzi no kunguka kuko Abanya-Uganda bagenda ari benshi kandi bategaga indege z'abandi none ubu bafite iyabo. Abanya-Uganda bishimiye kongera gukora kwa kompanyi y'igihugu y'indege, ariko bagaragaza n'amakenga bibaza niba izakora neza. Iyi kompanyi yari yarafunze imiryango kubera kumara imyaka icungwa nabi, ruswa ndetse n'ifatirwa ry'imitungo yayo ikagurishwa ubwo byari bimaze kugaragara ko ubukungu bwayo bucumbagira.

General Ahmed Gaid Salah (i buryo) yatangaje benshi mu gihe yakorana vya hafi na bwana Bouteflika (i bubanfu) General Ahmed Gaid Salah, asanzwe ari icegera c'umushikiranganji ajejwe kwivuna abansi, yasavye ko hakurikizwa itegeko ryo mw'ibwirizwa shingiro rya Algeria. Iryo tegeko ryemera ko hatangazwa yuko ikibanza c'umukuru w'igihugu atawukirimwo mu gihe uwuri ku butegetsi akitswe n'amagara. Imyiyerekano yo kwiyamiriza Prezida Bouteflika yatanguye mu kwezi guheze, atangaje ko azokwitoza mu kiringo kigira gatanu Imyiyerekano yo kwiyamiriza uwo mukuru w'igihugu w'imyaka mirongo umunani n'ibiri yatanguye mu kwezi guheze amaze kumenyesha ko azokwitoza ikiringo kigira gatanu. Imyiyerekano yarabandanije inyuma y'aho Bwana Buteflika ahinduriye akavuga ko azova ku butegetsi hamaze kugira ibihindurwa mw'ibwirizwa shingiro.

Muri iki cyumweru Kenya yakiriye inkingo zo muri gahunda ya Covax Catholic Doctors Association of Kenya isaba abafite ibimenyetso bya Covid gukoresha uburyo bwo kwiyuka (steam) cyangwa imiti nka hydroxychloroquine na ivermectin - imiti itaremejwe na WHO/OMS ko ivura abarwaye Covid-19. Iryo tsinda ryavuze ibi mu gihe Kenya imaze kwakira doze zirenga miliyoni imwe z'urukingo rwa Oxford-AstraZeneca. Uhagarariye OMS muri Kenya yabwiye abanyamakuru ko ibyatangajwe n'itsinda ry'aba baganga nta shingiro bifite kuko urukingo rwagenzuwe n'abahanga mbere yo kwemezwa. Iri tsinda ry'abaganga ryo rivuga ko uru rukingo n'izindi zikiri "mu igerageza". Kiliziya gatolika muri Kenya yahakanye ibivugwa n'iryo tsinda ry'abaganga, ivuga ko ishyigikiye urwo rukingo. Arkepiskopi Anthony Muheria yagize ati: "Papa Francis niwe ukuriye Kiliziya, kandi yavuze mu buryo bweruye ku rukingo. Biremewe ko tuzifata...Birakwiye ko zigenzurwa nk'izindi nkingo zisanzwe kandi ibyo minisiteri y'ubuzima niyo igomba kubikora". Mu 2019 Kiliziya gatorika muri Kenya yanze ko abakobwa baterwa urukingo rurinda kanseri y'inkondo y'umura (HPV), no mu 2014 yamaganye gahunda yo gukingira tetanus.

Umurundikazi Francine Niyonsaba yabaye uwa mbere mw'ihiganwa rya Diamond League i Birmingham mu Bwongereza Mu zindi nkino za Diamond League zabereye Maroc n'Ubutaliyano yagiye aba uwa kabiri. Mu kwezi kwa gatatu uyu mwaka, Francine Niyonsaba yatahukanye ikibanza ca mbere mu kwiruka imetero 800 mu nzu, mw'ihiganwa ryabereye i Portland ahoya gize 2'00''01. Inyuma y'iryo higanwa, uwo munotsi yaciye afata akayira yerekeza muri Amerika kubandanya imyimenyerezo.

Umurambo wa Bwana Mugabe urajyanwa mu nzu y'umuryango we iri i Harare Azashyingurwa ku cyumweru nyuma y'igikorwa cya leta cyo gusezera ku murambo we kizaba cyabaye ku wa gatandatu. Ariko, haracyashidikanywa ku hantu uyu wategetse Zimbabwe mu gihe cy'imyaka 37 azashyingurwa. Indege yihariye itwaye umurambo wa Bwana Mugabe yageze ku kibuga cy'indege cyo ku murwa mukuru Harare ahagana ku isaha ya saa cyenda n'igice zaho (ari nayo saha yo mu Rwanda no mu Burundi). Yari amaze amezi yaragiye kwivuriza mu bitaro byo muri Singapour. Urukurikirane rw'imodoka zanditseho "RG Mugabe" kuri 'plaques' ('number plates') zazo zabonywe hafi y'inzira indege zigwamo ku kibuga, nuko imbaga y'abantu, bamwe bambaye imyenda iriho ishusho y'uyu wahoze ari perezida, bategereza ko indege ihagera. Grace, umugore wa Bwana Mugabe, na we yari muri iyo ndege, nkuko Leo Mugabe, mwishywa wa Bwana Mugabe, yabivuze. Umurambo we urajyanwa mu nzu y'umuryango izwi ku izina rya "Blue Roof" iri i Harare. Umurambo wa Mugabe ubwo wari uherekejwe ujyanywa ku kibuga cy'indege cyo muri Singapour Mbere yaho kuri uyu wa gatatu, umurambo we wari wavanywe mu bitaro ujyanwa ku kibuga cy'indege cyo muri Singapour uherekejwe n'abapolisi n'izindi modoka nyinshi. Gahunda yo kumushyingura iteye gute? Ejo ku wa kane ndetse no ku wa gatanu, biteganyijwe ko umurambo wa Bwana Mugabe ushyirwa mu kibuga cy'imikino itandukanye cya Rufaro Stadium i Harare, mu gace kitwa Mbare. Ni naho yarahirijwe nka Minisitiri w'intebe wa mbere wa Zimbabwe nyuma yaho iki gihugu cyahoze gikolonizwa n'Ubwongereza kiboneye ubwigenge mu mwaka wa 1980. Leta ya Zimbabwe izamusezeraho ku wa gatandatu ku kibuga cy'imikino cy'igihugu kijyamo abantu 60,000 kiri i Harare. Mugabe afatwa nk'intwari yaharaniye ubwigenge bwa Zimbabwe Ariko umunyamakuru wa BBC Shingai Nyoka uri i Harare avuga ko Bwana Mugabe, na n'ubu yapfuye, atavugwaho rumwe nkuko byari bimeze akiri muzima. Nyuma y'urupfu rwe, ubutegetsi bwa Perezida Emmerson Mnangagwa bwatangaje ko ari "intwari y'igihugu" kubera uruhare yagize mu gufasha Zimbabwe kubona ubwigenge. Ndetse umwanya we mu irimbi ry'intwari ry'igihugu urateganyijwe. Ariko amakuru avuga ko Bwana Mugabe atifuje ko abamuhiritse ku butegetsi ari bo bazayobora imihango yo kumushyingura. Rero birashoboka ko yashyingurwa mu rugo rwo mu cyaro cyo ku ivuko, mu muhango wihariye.

Merkel arasura inkambi y'impunzi ya Gaziantep iri hafi y'umupaka wa Syria na Turikiya Uru ruzinduko rubaye mu gihe hari abatangiye kwibaza niba amasezerano Uburayi bwagiranye na Turikiya ku kibazo cy'abimukira akurikije amategeko. Ayo masezerano amaze ukwezi yubahirizwa ateganya ko abimukira bageze mu Bugereki batujuje ibyangombwa byo gusaba ubuhingiro bahita basubizwa muri Turikiya. Imprimbanyi ziharanira uburenganzira bw'ikiremwamuntu ziravuga ko Turikiya atari igihugu kirimo umutekano uhagije ku buryo cyasubizwamo impunzi ziturutseyo. Abategetsi ba Turikiya baburiye Uburayi ko ayo masezerano ashobora kuba impfabusa niba abanyaturikiya bashaka gusura Uburayi batavaniweho impushya zitwa viza (visa).

Iki gitero cyigambwe n'umutwe wiyita leta ya kisilamu Ahandi, ibitero bito byabaye ndetse habaho no gukozanyaho mu ndorerezi z'amashyaka, babiri bahasiga ubuzima naho abandi benshi barakomereka. Abatora bari guhitamo hagati y'ishyaka rya Imran Khan, wahoze ari icyamamare mu mukino wa kriketi, ndetse n'irya Nawaz Sharif, wahoze ari Minisitiri w'intebe akava kuri uyu mwanya mu buryo buteye isoni. Bwana Sharif watsinze amatora aheruka, ari gukurikirana aya matora ari muri gereza. Yafunzwe ashinjwa ibirego bya ruswa bikubiye mu iperereza ryasohowe mu nkuru za Panama Papers. Ariko ibikorwa byo kwiyamamaza byaranzwe n'impungenge z'uko aya matora yabamo uburiganya n'ibikorwa by'urugomo. Akanama k'uburenganzira bwa muntu muri Pakistani karavuga ko hagiye habaho ibikorwa "bigaragara" byo kugerageza gukora uburiganya ku biva muri aya matora. Nubwo umutekano wakajijwe mu gihugu hose - abasirikare barenga ibihumbi 370 boherejwe kurinda ibiro by'amatora bitandukanye, ibikorwa by'urugomo byanze bibaca mu rihumye. Umugore watoreraga ku biro by'itora byo mu murwa mukuru Islamabad Abategetsi baravuga ko igitero cyo mu mujyi wa Quetta, mu ntara ituje ya Balochistan, cyari igitero cy'ubwiyahuzi cyari kigambiriye guhitana abapolisi bari bari ku muryango w'ibiro by'itora. Mu ntangirio y'uku kwezi, igitero cyabereye mu gace ka Mastung gaturanye n'ahabereye icy'uyu munsi, cyishe abantu 149. Kiba kimwe mu bitero by'ubwiyahuzi bikoresheje ibisasu cyaguyemo abantu benshi cyane mu mateka ya Pakistani. Cyigambwe n'umutwe wiyita leta ya kisilamu. Aya matora y'uyu munsi ni ingenzi kubera ko buraba bubaye ubwa kabiri leta iyobowe n'abasivili iba ihaye ubutegetsi indi leta nayo iyobowe n'abasivili, nyuma yo kurangiza manda yayo yose. Mu mateka y'iki gihugu angana n'imyaka 71, cyamye kiyoborwa bya hato na hato n'ubutegetsi bwa gisirikare.

Kardinal Christian Tumi ari mu bashimuswe ejo kuwa kane Musenyeri George Nkuo umushumba wa diyoseze ya Kumbo mu ajyaruguru yabwiye BBC ko kardinali Tumi ari kumwe n'umwami wo muri ako gace Nso Sehm Mbinglo I, n'abo bari kumwe, bashimuswe n'abantu bitwaje intwaro. Kardinal Tumi n'uyu mwami wa gakondo w'aho, bari mu nzira basubira mu mujyi wa Kumbo bavuye mu majyepfo mu murwa mukuru Yaoundé. Abantu bitwaje intwaro baharanira ubwigenge bw'ako gace nibo bakekwaho gushimuta aba bantu. Musenyeri Nkuo avuga ko abakiristu Gatolika n'abaturage benshi ba Kumbo kuwa gatanu bafashe urugendo n'amaguru berekeza aho bakeka ko uyu mu kardinali yaba afungiwe. Mu mezi ashize, hari umuryango wo mu bwoko bw'aba Fon wiciwe abana babiri - bikozwe n'abo bikekwa ko ari abarwanyi baharanira ubwigenge - wahise uhunga ako gace ka Kumbo. Kardinali Tumi, niwe wabasabye ko batahuka, mu nzira bagaruka iwabo abaherekeje, nibwo bahise bashimutwa. Kiliziya Gatolika ifite abakardinali 219, muri abo 29 ni abo mu bihugu 25 bya Africa. Kardinal Christian Tumi Wiyghan w'ikigero cy'imyaka 90, asanzwe ari umushumba w'icyubahiro wa diyosezi ya Duala mu burengerazuba bwa Cameroon.

Uhuru Kenyatta arongoye igihugu ca Kenya kuva mu 2012 Bitegekanijwe ko ibiringo vya Bwana Kenyatta birangira mu mwaka wa 2022. Avugana n'ikinyamakuru Financial Times, Perezida Uhuru yaranse kugira ico avuze ku makuru ajanye "n'inzego za politike zisanzwe zitahari". Hagati aho, amenyesha neza ko adashobora kubandanya ari umukuru w'igihugu mu gihe azoba arangije ibiringo vyiwe bibiri, aho avuga ko ivyo bitegekanywa n'ibwirizwashingiro hamwe n'abanyagihugu ba Kenya. Ati: "Abakenya basanzwe bazi neza ko umukuru w'igihugu yemerewe ibiringo bibiri kuva mu 2002 igihe iryo tegeko ritangura kuja mu ngiro. Nta mukuru w'igihugu n'umwe yigeze arenga kuri iryo tegeko, rero na jewe sinshobora kuba umukuru w'igihugu wa mbere yokora ivyo". Perezida Kenyatta avuga ko Kenya iriko itegura amatora ya kamarampaka mu minsi ya vuba, nk'uko abivuga, kugira ngo ingingo zimwe zimwe zo mw'ibwirizwashingiro zihindurwe, ibishigikiwe mbere n'abariteguye. Haraciye igihe William Ruto (i bubamfu) atitabira ibikorwa bibera mu biro vy'umukuru w'igihugu Kuva icegera ciwe, William Ruto, atanguye igikorwa co kwitegurira kwiyamamariza amatora yo mu 2022, ikibazo nyamukuru cavyutse kwabaye ukumenya nimba koko Bwana Kenyatta azorangiza ibiringo vyiwe bibiri nk'umukuru w'igihugu atashoboye kurangura ivyo yari yemereye Abakenya. Haraciye amezi atari make ico cegera ciwe atitabira ibikorwa bibera mu biro vy'umukuru w'igihugu, mbere akaba yarashizwe ku ruhande mu manama y'Inama nkuru y'igihugu ijejwe umutekano, kandi ari umwe mu bayigize. Igihe kimwe, Bwana Ruto yumvikanye ariko avuga ko hari amanyanga yo kurondera kumubuza ko yosubirira perezida Uhuru Kenyatta n'akarwi kiwe. Mu kwa gatatu, yanditse ku rubuga rwiwe rwa twitter ati: "Hariho akarwi k'abantu bari ku ruhande rwiwe bagenda bigamba ko mu minsi ntazoba nkihari". "Kandi kubera ko ako karwi kadashobora kugena umuntu n'umwe, karashobora no kwica, ariko Imana yonyene yo mw'ijuru iriho". Igihe Perezida Kenyatta atanguza urugamba rwo kurwanya ba kaboko, Bwana Ruto avugwa ko yidoze avuga ko yari inzira yo gutoteza abategetsi bazwi ko bamushigikiye. Perezida Kenyatta arongoye igihugu ca Kenya kuva mu 2012, akaba yasubiye gutorwa mu matora yabayemwo impari mu 2017. Mu 2022 niho bitegekanijwe ko azorangiza ivyo biringo vyiwe nk'uko ibwirizwashingiro rya Kenya ritibegekanya.

Perezida Alpha Condé arimo gushaka manda ya gatatu itavugwaho rumwe Uwo mutegetsi utatangajwe izina yabwiye AFP ko iyo mipaka yafunzwe ku mpamvu z'umutekano. Botche Candé, Minisitiri w'ubutegetsi bw'igihugu wa Guinée-Bissau, yavuze ko uwo mupaka wafunzwe guhera ku cyumweru, ariko minisitiri mugenzi we wo muri Guinée-Conakry ntiyabyemeje. Perezida Alpha Condé wa Guinée-Conakry, w'imyaka 82, arimo gushaka manda ya gatatu itavugwaho rumwe, mu matora rusange ateganyijwe kuba ku itariki ya 18 y'ukwezi gutaha kwa cumi. Bwana Condé yishyingikirije itegekonshinga rishya abasha kwemererwa kurenza manda ebyiri ntarengwa kuri perezida.

Gahunda zo kurwanya ibyorezo muri Afurika ziyoborwa na OMS Kubera ibyo, Matshidiso Moeti umukuru wa OMS/WHO muri Africa yasabye leta ya Amerika kwisubiraho ku cyemezo cya Bwana Trump. Leta ya Amerika, umuterankunga mukuru wa OMS, yari iherutse kwemerera uyu muryango ushinzwe ubuzima ku isi miliyoni $151 mu gihe cy'imyaka ibiri. Kuri iyi nkunga, OMS yari imaze kubona miliyoni $50, gusa icyemezo cyo guhagarika iyi nkunga giteye impungenge ibikorwa bya OMS muri Afurika. Imwe muri gahunda zahungabana cyane ni iyo gukingira indwara mu bihugu byinshi. Hari gahunda zikomeje zigamije guca indwara y'imbasa muri Afurika, mu gihe kandi hari ibihugu 12 ubu bicyugarijwe n'iyi ndwara. OMS niyo iyobora ibikorwa byo gutanga amabwiriza n'imibare mu gukurikirana ibikorwa by'ubuzima ku isi. Inzego z'ubuzima muri Afurika ziri mu zifite intege nke zungukira cyane muri ibi bikorwa OMS iheruka kubona miliyoni $300 yo gushyira mu bikorwa byo kurwanya coronavirus muri Africa mu mezi atandatu ari imbere, kuri uyu mugabane harabarwa abantu 17,000 bamaze kwandura iki cyorezo.

Abajejwe umutekano bamaze imyaka barerekana n'intagondwa z'aba Isilamu Muri ico gitero ca Sikire hafi y'igisagara ca Arbinda, bivugwa ko amaduka hamwe n'ibindi bidandazwa vyibwe ibindi bigaturigwa. Abagwanyi bo mu ntagondwa z'aba Isilamu bamaze igihe bagaba ibitero vy'ubwicanyi muri ako karere mu myaka ya vuba. Abashikiranganji bo kwivuna abansi hamwe n'umutekano ba Burkina Faso barakuwe muri leta mu ntango ya kuno kwezi, inyuma y'igitero cagabwe mu buraruko bw'igihugu.

Perezida Trump yabeshywe avugana n' umunyarwenya kuri telefoni ubwo yari mu ndege ye izwi nka Air Force One John Melendez ukora akazi ko gusetsa abantu yari yiyise senateri Bob Menendez. Yavuze ko yitabwe na Jared Kushner, umukwe wa Perezida Trump, ndetse akaza no guhamagarwa na Perezida Trump ubwe. Bwana Melendez yavuze ko yabahamagaye yiyita senateri Menendez ndetse ubundi akiyita uwo bakorana. Umukozi mu biro bya perezida w'Amerika yabwiye televiziyo CNN ko "rimwe na rimwe imirongo [ya Perezida] iba ifunguye cyane bigatuma amakosa nk'aya abaho". Trump yisubiyeko ku ngingo yo gutandukanya abavyeyi n'abana b'abimukira Trump arahatira Kenya gufata imitungo ya Sudani y'epfo Trump yatse amakori ya 25% Ubushinwa Senateri Menendez ni uwo mu ishyaka ry'abademokarate akaba ari uwo muri leta ya New Jersey. Amaze igihe aharanira ko habaho impinduka ku ngingo ijyanye n'abimukira. Mu byumweru bishize bya vuba, leta y'Amerika yaranenzwe cyane kubera gahunda yayo yo gutandukanya abimukira b'abana n'ababyeyi babo ku mupaka wa Mexico. Bwana Melendez, unakoresha akazina ka Stuttering John iyo ari mu bitaramo byo gusetsa abantu, yafashe amajwi y'ikiganiro yagiranye na Perezida Trump nuko ayatangaza ku rubuga rwe rwa interineti. Muri icyo kiganiro, ijwi byibazwa ko ari irya Bwana Trump ryumvikana rishimira cyane Bwana Menendez kubera ukuntu yagizwe umwere mu rubanza yari akurikiranyweho ibyaha bya ruswa mu mwaka wa 2017. Ayo majwi abiri yumvikana ku rubuga rwa interineti rwa Bwana Melendez, yanavuze ku kuba hagiye kubaho icyuho kubera ko umukuru w'urukiko rw'ikirenga Anthony Kennedy yafashe icyemezo cyo kwegura ku mirimo ye muri uku kwezi kwa karindwi. Ijwi bivugwa ko ari irya Perezida Trump rivuga ko rizagena umucamanza mushya wo kumusimbura "mu gihe kiri hagati y'iminsi 10 na 14 iri imbere". Ibitangazamakuru muri Amerika bitangaza ko nyuma yaho ibiro bya perezida w'Amerika byahamagaraga mu biro bya senateri Menendez ku ngingo ijyanye n'ikiganiro yari yagiranye na Bwana Trump ku wa kane, abakozi bo mu biro bya senateri Menendez baguye mu kantu bakamera nk'abakubiswe n'inkuba. Uwahamagaye yiyoberanyije yavuze ko byashobokaga ko umugambi we washoboraga kuba waratahuwe. Bwana Melendez yabwiye televiziyo CNN ati: "Byari kuba bihagije gusa ko bambaza ishyaka senateri Menendez abarizwamo cyangwa leta abereye senateri. Ntacyo nari kubona mbasubiza kuri ibyo. Ariko nta na kimwe bigeze babimbazaho."

Alpha Condé yatowe bwa mbere mu 2010 Uru rukiko rwemereye n'abandi bakandida 11, barimo na Cellou Dalein Diallo uri mu bahabwa amahirwe wo mu batavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi. Hashize amezi hari imyigaragambyo yo kwamagana ko Bwana Condé yongera kwitoza nyuma y'uko asabye ko itegekoshinga rihindurwa muri referendum yabaye mu kwezi kwa gatatu, kugira ngo abashe kwiyamamariza manda ya gatatu. Abantu bagera kuri 30 bamaze gupfira muri iyo myigaragambyo. Bwana Condé, wabaye imyaka myinshi mu ruhande rutavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi, yatowe bwa mbere ku mwanya w'umukuru w'igihugu mu 2010, aho yijeje demokarasi no kurwanya ruswa. Yatorewe manda ya kabiri mu 2015. Kuwa kabiri, Perezida wa Nigeria Muhammadu Buhari yasabye abategetsi b'ibihugu bya Afurika y'iburengerazuba kubaha ingingo z'itegekoshinga kuri manda z'umukuru w'igihugu - avuga ko kunyuranya nazo aribyo soko y'ibibazo bya politiki n'akaga muri ako karere.

Luka Modric yafashije Real Madrid gutwara igikombe cya Champions League ku nshuro ya gatatu yikurikiranya, anafasha Croatia kugera ku mukino wa nyuma w'igikombe cy'isi cyabereye mu Burusiya uyu mwaka Modric w'imyaka 33 y'amavuko, mu kwezi kwa gatanu uyu mwaka yafashije Real Madrid gutwara igikombe cya Champions League ku nshuro ya gatatu yikurikiranya, mbere yuko afasha ikipe y'igihugu cye cya Croatia kugera ku mukino wa nyuma w'igikombe cy'isi cyabereye mu Burusiya uyu mwaka. Mu mwaka wa 2007, umukinnyi Kaka wahoze akinira AC Milan n'ikipe y'igihugu ya Brezili yabaye umukinnyi wa nyuma utsindiye iki gihembo mbere yuko Messi na Cristiano batangira kugenda bagisimburanaho. Cristiano werekeje muri Juventus avuye muri Real Madrid ku mpeshyi y'uyu mwaka, yaje ku mwanya wa kabiri. Rutahizamu Messi w'ikipe ya Barcelona yaje ku mwanya wa gatanu, mu gihe rutahizamu Antoine Griezmann wa Atletico Madrid yaje ku mwanya wa gatatu naho rutahizamu Kylian Mbappe wa Paris Saint-Germain we akaza ku mwanya wa kane - bombi bakaba barafashije Ubufaransa gutwara igikombe cy'isi cy'uyu mwaka. Iki gihembo cya Ballon d'Or gisoje umwaka waranzwe n'intsinzi kuri Modric, wanatowe nk'umukinnyi w'umugabo wahize abandi mu bihembo by'ishyirahamwe ry'umupira w'amaguru ku isi, FIFA, akanatsindira igihembo cy'umupira w'amaguru wa zahabu nk'umukinnyi wahize abandi mu gikombe cy'isi cy'uyu mwaka. Aganira na BBC Sport, Modric yatuye iyi Ballon d'Or abandi bakinnyi bose batayitsindiye mu gihe cy'imyaka 10 ishize yihariwe na Messi na Cristiano. Yagize ati: "Wenda mu bihe byashize hari abakinnyi bamwe bashoboraga kuba baratsindiye Ballon d'Or nka Xavi, Andres Iniesta cyangwa [Wesley] Sneijder, ariko ubu abantu noneho kera kabaye bari kubona undi muntu". "Iki gihembo ngituye abakinnyi bose bishoboka ko bari bakwiye kugitsindira ariko ntibagitsindire. Kuri jye, uyu wabaye umwaka mu by'ukuri udasanzwe". "Biragoye ko navuga mu magambo uko numva merewe mu mutima wanjye. Ni ikintu kidasanzwe kuri jye..." Modric yavuze ko Cristiano na Messi ari "abakinnyi badasanzwe", yongeraho ati: "Kuba ngitsindiye, bivuze ko mu kibuga nakoze ikintu rwose kidasanzwe muri uyu mwaka, ni yo mpamvu umwaka [w'imikino] wa 2017-2018 wabaye umwaka wanjye". Modric yari umwe mu bakinnyi umunani ba Real Madrid bari bari ku rutonde rugufi rw'abakinnyi 30 batoranywagamo utsindira Ballon d'Or y'uyu mwaka. Ada Hegerberg yatsindiye igikombe cya Champions League inshuro eshatu Ada Hegerberg w'imyaka 23 y'amavuko akaba rutahizamu wa Lyon n'ikipe y'igihugu ya Norvège, ni we watsindiye igihembo cya mbere cya Ballon d'Or mu bagore. Mbappe w'imyaka 19 y'amavuko, we yabaye uwa mbere utsindiye igihembo cya Kopa Trophy, gihabwa umukinnyi wahize abandi mu bari munsi y'imyaka 21 y'amavuko kandi agatoranywa n'abigeze gutsindira igihembo cya Ballon d'Or. Dore urutonde rw'abakinnyi 10 ba mbere: 1. Luka Modric (ukinira Real Madrid na Croatia) 2. Cristiano Ronaldo (ukinira Juventus na Portugali) 3. Antoine Griezmann (ukinira Atletico Madrid n'Ubufaransa) 4. Kylian Mbappe (ukinira Paris Saint-Germain n'Ubufaransa) 5. Lionel Messi (ukinira Barcelona na Argentine) 6. Mohamed Salah (ukinira Liverpool na Misiri) 7. Raphael Varane (ukinira Real Madrid n'Ubufaransa) 8. Eden Hazard (ukinira Chelsea n'Ububiligi) 9. Kevin de Bruyne (ukinira Manchester City n'Ububiligi) 10. Harry Kane (ukinira Tottenham n'Ubwongereza) Ballon d'Or ni iki? Ni igihembo cyatangiye gutangwa buri mwaka guhera mu 1956 n'ikinyamakuru France Football cyo mu Bufaransa, Umwongereza Stanley Matthews akaba ari we wabimburiye abandi mu kugitsindira. Cyahabwaga gusa abakinnyi bakomoka i Burayi kugera mu mwaka wa 1995 ubwo cyagurwaga kigashyirwamo n'umukinnyi uwo ari we wese ukina mu ikipe y'i Burayi. Mu mwaka wa 2007, ni bwo noneho cyabaye ikireba abakinnyi bose b'umupira w'amaguru ku isi. Urutonde rugufi rw'abakinnyi 30 batoranywamo utsindira Ballon d'Or rutegurwa n'abanyamakuru b'ikinyamakuru France Football, nuko ugitsindira agatorwa n'abanyamakuru bo ku isi, buri gihugu kigahagararirwa n'umunyamakuru umwe. Kuva mu mwaka wa 2010 kugera mu wa 2015, cyahujwe n'ibihembo bya FIFA, ariko biza gutandukanywa nuko mu mwaka wa 2016 FIFA yongera kugira ibihembo byayo bwite.

Rfi ivuga ko iradiyo yabo kuva ku wa mbere itumvikana neza Rfi irahakana ivyo Florence Morice yagirizwa mw'itangazo yasohoye mu gitondo. Rfi yarakurikiranye amatora, kandi irumvirizwa hirya no hino mu bihugu bivuga ururimi rw'igifaransa. Ariko ivuga ko kuva ku wa mbere ku mugoroba iyo radio itasubiye kwumvikana neza. Kuri uyu wa kabiri, ibihugu vya rutura harimwo ishirahamwe ry'ubumwe bwa Buraya na Amerika, vyahamagariye abategetsi ba Congo ko boreka kuza barahagarika ibimenyeshamakuru. Internet yarahagaritswe kuva ku wa mbere, abantu bakaba badashobora kurungika ubutumwa kuri telephone. Amatora y'umukuru w'igihugu yabaye kuri uyu w'Imana, ubu bakaba bakibandanya guharura. Umuhanuzi wa Perezida Kabila muvyo imigenderanire, Barnabe Kikaya Bi Karubi, yabwiye itororokanirizo ry'amakuru rya AFP ko akanama k'igihugu kajejwe umutekano kafashe ingingo ko "ari ngombwa" guca intereneti kugira akanama kajejwe gutegura amatora kabanze gaheze guharura no kwegeranya amajwi. Kuri uyu wa kabiri AFP yavuze iti:"Hari abantu bagenda barakwiragiza ibiharuro bitari vyo vyavuye muri ayo matora. Ibi vyatumye haba imigumuko." Ivyavuye mu matora vyitezwe ko bija ahabona itariki 6 z'ukwezi kwa mbere.

Ukwo nikwo ibabi ry'ikigori riba iyo ryahuye n'ako gakoko Ministeri yavuze ko ibi ari icyorezo cyadutse kandi ko bishobora kugira ingaruka zikomeye ku musaruro w;ubuhinzi ndetse bikaba byagira ingaruka zikomeye ku biribwa . Utu dukoko ngo twamaze kwigaragaza mu bice binyuranye by'igihugu cyane cyane udusanzwe tuzwimo ubuhinzi bw'ibigori nk'amajyaruguru y'igihugu . Ministeri y'ubuhinzi ivuga ko utu dukoko twadutse mu kwezi gushize ,tugaragara mu bice byose by'igihugu. Umurimyi afite kamwe muri utwo dukoko Uduce bigaragara ko twibasiwe cyane ni udusanzwe duhingwamo ibigori byinshi nk'amajyaruguru n'uburasirazuba. Ngo ntibirashoboka kumenya aho utu dukoko twateye duturuka ariko ngo birashoboka cyane ko twaturutse mu bihugu bituranye n'U Rwanda byari bimaze igihe bivugwamo udukoko twa nkongwa . Inzego z'ubutegetsi zivuga ko ziteguye gukoresha imbaraga zose kugira ngo iyi nkongwa idasanzwe ikumirwe. Rose Mureshyankwano, umuyobozi w'intara y'amajyepfo Kuri ubu nta rugero ruzwi rw'ibimaze kwangizwa n'utu dukoko kuko twadutse ibigori bigitangira kumera .Abategetsi bavuga ko kuba bafatiranye bishobora gutuma iyi nkongwa itangiza umusaruro ngo bibe byatera inzara ,cyakora ku ruhande rw'abaturage ho icyoba kirigaragaza.

Inama nshingamateka y'Uburundi Bavuga ko bituma inyigisho zitituka, bikaba vyashikirijwe kuri uno wa gatatu aho umushikiranganji w'indero yari aramutse yishura ku bibazo vy'abo bashingamateka. Janvière Ndirahisha amenyesha ko ahanini ubukene bw'ibikoresho buterwa n'ikibazo c'uburyo bw'amafaranga budakwiye. Bamwe mu bashingamateka bagarutse ku ngingo iherutse gufatwa yo gukora rusansuma rw'abakozi ba reta bafise impamyabushobozi za kaminuza, baronse biciye mu nyigisho zo ku mugoroba. Umushikiranganji Janvière Ndirahisha amenyesha ko bamutahuye nabi. « Nashikirije amakenga ko hibonekeza utunenge twinshi muri ico gikorwa bisabwa gutunganywa neza. Iyumvire nk'umukozi aba mu Ruyigi ugiye ubona akuzaniye impamyabushobozi yaronse mu vyigwa vy'umugoroba ugasanga yize kuwa mbere, kuwa kabiri, kuwa gatatu, gushika kuwa gatandatu ! ivyo ntibitahuritse », nikwo Janvière asigura. Ikindi abashingamateka bagarutseko n'ihagarikwa ry'abigisha rikorwa n'inzego z'umutekano rimaze imisi ryibonekeza mu bice bitandukanye vy'igihugu. Aho umushikiranganji Ndirahisha yishuye ko adashobora kwisuka mukazi k'ubutungane.

Michel Kafando intumwa yihariye ku Burundi y'umunyamabanga mukuru wa ONU ejo yatangaje ko ubutumwa bwe bwarangiye, mu butumwa bwe yakiriwe rimwe na Perezida Nkurunziza mu 2017 Michel Kafando, wahoze ari Perezida wa Burkina Faso, yavuze ko mu Burundi hakomeje kuzamuka "kutoroherana muri politiki, no kubangamira uburenganzira rusange". Bwana Kafando yashimye ko leta yashyizeho ibiganiro bihuza amashyaka ya politiki, abategetsi n'abashinzwe umutekano. Ati: "Iki ni igikorwa gikwiriye gushimwa no gushyigikirwa". Bwana Kafando avuga ko yizeye ko amatora ari gutegurwa azagenda neza, yibutsa ko amatora ateguwe nabi "buri gihe ahinduka imvano y'amakimbirane". Kafando yemeza ko mu gihugu ubukungu bukomeje kuzahara, ariko abantu bakwiye kwemera ko umutekano mu Burundi hose uri kumera neza. Ati: "Nubwo hano na hariya hakivugwa guhohotera uburenganzira bwa muntu, biranakwiye ko guverinoma ishyigikirwa muri iyi ntambwe yo kugarura umutekano kuri bose no guca kudahana". Kafando avuga ko kubera ibi hari ibihumbi byinshi by'impunzi zikomeje gutahuka iwabo ku bushake. Bwana Kafando yaboneyeho kumenyesha inama ishinzwe umutekano ku isi, ubu iyobowe na Afurika y'Epfo, ko misiyo ye nk'intumwa yihariye ya ONU ku Burundi irangiye. Mu myaka ibiri n'igice amaze muri ubu butumwa, Kafando yakiriwe inshuro imwe na Perezida Pierre Nkurunziza, hari mu kwa gatandatu 2017 hashize iminsi micye ahawe ubu butumwa. Ibice bibiri ku Burundi muri iyi nama Abategetsi mu Burundi bavuga ko bidakwiye ko iki gihugu kigaruka kuri gahunda z'inama z'umuryango w'abibumbye kuko babona ibintu mu gihugu bimeze neza. Ambasaderi Albert Shingiro uhagarariye u Burundi muri UN ejo nawe yumviswe n'inama ishinzwe umutekano ku isi Abahagarariye ibihugu binyuranye muri iyi nama y'umutekano ku isi batanze ibitekerezo ku byavuzwe na Michel Kafando. Côte d'Ivoire ishima intambwe imaze guterwa, ikanizera ko ibibazo bisigaye nabyo bizakemurwa. Uhagarariye Ubudage yavuze ko bikwiye ko iyi nama igomba gukomeza gukurikirana ibintu mu Burundi kuko bitameze neza ndetse bikomeje byashyira mu kaga umutekano mu karere. Nicolas de Rivière uhagarariye Ubufaransa yavuze ko amatora ya 2020 mu Burundi ari gutegurwa mu mwuka mubi, asaba ko uburenganzira bwa muntu bwubahirizwa kugira ngo n'ibindi bigerweho. Uhagarariye Ububiligi yashimye intambwe imaze guterwa mu Burundi ariko avuga ko hakiri urugomo n'ibikorwa bibi ku kiremwamuntu bikwiye gukomeza gukurikiranirwa hafi. Uhagarariye Ubushinwa yasabye umuryago mpuzamahanga kubaha ubwigenge bw'u Burundi no guhitamo kw'abaturage babwo. Avuga ko ibibera mu Burundi birebwa n'ubutegetsi bw'igihugu n'Abarundi ubwabo. Uhagariye Uburusiya yasabye ko amahanga areka kwivanga mu bibazo by'u Burundi Ibi bivugwa kandi n'uhagarariye Uburusiya wavuze ko nta kamaro abona mu kuba iyi nama ikomeza kugaruka ku kibazo cy'u Burundi, asaba ko babuvana kuri gahunda z'iyi nama. Uhagarariye Uburusiya avuga ko ibintu bitifashe nabi mu Burundi ku kigero cyo kugarukwaho buri gihe muri gahunda z'iyi nama ishinzwe umutekano ku isi. Yemeza ko ibibazo biriho Abarundi ubwabo bazabibonera ibisubizo. Madamu Kelly Craft uhagarariye Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika yavuze ko igihugu cye gikurikiranye ibibera mu Burundi n'uko bizagenda mu gihe kiri imbere. Asaba n'ibindi bihugu kubigenza gutyo. Avuga ko bakurikiye cyane cyane itegurwa ry'amatora y'umukuru w'igihugu ya 2020, ko impunzi zitahukanwa ku bushake ndetse n'iyubahirizwa ry'uburenganzira bwa muntu. Madamu Craft uhagarariye Amerika yavuze ko igihugu cye kiri gukurikiranira hafi ibyo mu Burundi Albert Shingiro uhagarariye u Burundi mu muryango w'abibumbye, yabwiye inama y'umutekano ku isi ko nta bibazo byo kubangamira uburenganzira bwa muntu biri mu gihugu cye. Avuga ko umutekano ari wose mu gihugu, impunzi nyinshi ziri gutahuka, amatora ya 2020 ari gutegurwa neza kandi azagenda neza. Bwana Shingiro yemeza ko nta mpamvu yo gutuma umuryango w'abibumbye ukomeza kuganira ku Burundi kuko ibivugwa muri izi nama ngo bidashingiye ku kuri kw'ibiriho mu gihugu.

Kuwa gatatu urukiko rusesa imanza mu Bufaransa rwemeje iyoherezwa rya Bwana Kabuga kuri uru rukiko rwa ONU rufite ikicaro i Arusha, Tanzania n'ishami ryarwo i La Haye mu Buholandi. Amategeko y'Ubufaransa ateganya ko iki kemezo, kitajuririrwa, gishyirwa mu bikorwa mu gihe kitarenze ukwezi. Umwunganizi we Emmanuel Altit yabwiye BBC ko bagiye gusaba ruriya rwego ko umukiriya we atoherezwa i Arusha ahubwo yakoherezwa i La Haye. Umucamanza Iain Bonomy ukomoka muri Scotland/Ecosse niwe uzaba ukuriye iyo nteko, azafatanya na Graciela Susana Gatti Santana wo muri Uruguay na Elizabeth Ibanda-Nahamya wo muri Uganda. Itangazo rivuga ishyirwaho ry'aba bacamanza ntirisobanura igihe urubanza rwa Bwana Kabuga ruzatangirira. Bwana Kabuga w'imyaka 85 (we avuga ko afite 87) ni umuntu washakishwaga cyane mu baregwa uruhare muri jenoside mu Rwanda. Urukiko rwa Arusha rwavuze ko ashakwa n'ubutabera bwa mbere mu 1997 nk'uko rubivuga, yafashwe mu kwezi kwa gatanu hafi y'i Paris, nyuma y'imyaka 23. Mu rukiko rw'i Paris, yavuze ko ibyaha aregwa ari "ibinyoma".

Ibendera Ibyo bihugu uko ari bitatu birarega Qatar kudashyira mu ngiro amasezerano yo gucungera umutekano basinye umwaka ushize, avuga ko ntawukwiye kwivanga mu bibazo by'ikindi gihugu birimo no gushyigikira ihutaza ry'itangazamakuru. Qatar iragaragara nkaho ishyigikiye umutwe wa Muslim Brotherhood ugaragara nkaho uteye umutekano mucye muri Arabia Saudite no muri Emirates Arab Unis. Ibitangazamakuru bya Al Jazeera bifashwa na Qatar birebwa nk'urwikekwe na Arabia Saudite. Qatar yavuze ko itunguwe kandi ibabajwe n'icyo cyemezo.

Kuva mu 2013, Ubufaransa bwararungitse ingabo muri Mali gufasha igisirikare c'iki gihugu kurwanya imirwi y'abarwanyi bagendera ku vyiyumviro bikaze vya Isilamu Itangazo ryasohowe n'ivyo biro rivuga ko iryo sanganya ryabaye ku mugoroba wa nijoro ku wa mbere. Perezida Emmanuel Macron w'ico gihugu avuga ko "yababajwe cane" n'iryo sanganya. Aciye ku rubuga rwiwe rwa Twitter, Bwana Macron yanditse ati: "Izo ncungu 13 zari zirajwe ishinga n'intumbero imwe gusa: kudukingira. Mfatanije umubabaro n'incuti n'abagenzi babo". Mu 2013, Ubufaransa bwarungitse ibihumbi vy'abasirikare muri Mali inyuma y'aho abarwanyi bagendera ku vyiyumviro bikaze vy'idini rya Isilamu bigaruriye igice kitari gito c'uburaruko bw'ico gihugu. Igisirikare ca Mali carisubije ico gice ariko imvururu zirabandanya, mbere zikaba zaratandukiriye n'ibindi bihugu muri ako karere. Abasirikare 4500 b'abafaransa nibo barungitswe gufasha ingabo z'ibihugu vya Mali, Mauritania, Niger, Burkina Faso na Tchad mu kurwanya abo barwanyi. Icateye iryo sanganya ryo ku wa mbere ntikiratomoka, ariko amakuru atangwa n'ubushikiranganji bw'ukwivuna abansi bw'Ubufaransa yashikiriye itororokanirizo ry'amakuru AFP avuga ko ari kajugujuru zibiri zagonyanye. Mu ntango za kuno kwezi, hari uwundi musirikare w'Ubufaransa, Brigadier Ronan Pointeau, yahitanywe n'igisasu caturikiye hafi y'imodoka yiwe. Isanganya ry'ejo ku wa mbere niryo rya mbere rinini rihekuye Ubufaransa kuva bugiye gufasha igihugu ca Mali. Abasirikare 38 b'abafaransa nibo bamaze kwicwa muri Mali kuva mu 2013.

Odion Ighalo yimukiye mu murwi wa Manchester United, ivyatangaje benshi mu bakunzi biwe. Kuva kuwa kane, yaravuzwe cane - kandi ubu hoho, bifise ishingiro. Richard Arnold arongoye umurwi Manchester United, niwe yatanguye yishimira ko amasezerano umurwi wiwe wagiranye na Ighalo yatumye iba inkuru ya mbere mw'isi ku bakoresha urubuga rwa 'Twitter'. Ivyo vyashitse umunsi umwe wa 'Brexit' n'urubanza rw'ugukura canke kugumiza icizere kuri Perezida Trump. Ariko, abadakunda umurwi wa Manchester United bo babona atari ngombwa ko iba inkuru nziza kur'uwo murwi. Umukinyi Ighalo w'imyaka 30 aturuka muri Nigeria yahagaritse gukinira umurwi wo mu Bushinwa - Shanghai Shenhua - ngo aje gukomeza umurwi w'Abongereza inyuma y'aho Marcus Rashford akomerekeye. Iyimuka rya Ighalo ritangaje kuko ata vyinshi Ubwongereza bumuziko uretse ko yatsindiye ibitsindo 6 umurwi Watford yakiniye, mu mwaka wiwe wa nyuma. Inyuma y'ukugaragara incuro zitatu nk'umukinyi w'umusubirizi w'umurwi Manchester United, yatanguranye neza n'uwo murwi kuwa 27 z'ukwa kabiri, asubirira Anthony Martial. Yasubiriye kuvurwa ku mvo zitandukanye. Abakunzi ba Manchester United, banemera Ighalo, bamuririmba igihe ari mu batsindiye umurwi wiwe, uhura na Bruges, 5-0. Hari mu nkino zihuza imirwi ya Bulaya, urukino rwabereye mu gisagara ca Manchester, kuri kimwe mu bibuga vya kera ca Old Traffod, cubatswe mu 1909. Ighalo yariyemeye anikeza avuga ati "Ni ibihe bidasanzwe kuri jewe, nari ndindiriye kuva kera". Yongeye ati, "Ni urukino rutari rworoshe, ariko rwampaye amahirwe y'ugutangurana na Manchester United ku gitsindo. Ni n'iteka kuri jewe gutangurana uko n'umurwi nkunda kuva nkiri umwana." Ijoro ntibagiranwa rya Ighalo Odion Ighalo yihaye iteka mu minota 30 yanyuma y'urukino. Uretse ko rwari urukino rwa kane Ighalo akiniye Manchester United, bwabaye n'ubwa mbere atsinda mu nkino z'amahiganwa y'imirwi ya Bulaya. Ubuhinga bwa Ighalo bwasize umurwi wa Bruges mu 'kantu'. Igihe cose yakoze ku mupira, vyatera akoba abakinyi b'inyuma b'umurwi wa Bruges. Ighalo yatanguye yerekana ko agiye kubangamira umurwi wa Bruges kuva mu masekonda 60 ya mbere, ahawe umupira na mugenziwe Juan Mata. Igitsindo ciwe cavuye ku mupira ahawe na Bruno Fernandes, ku metero 5 z'igori. N'ica kabiri yari agiye kukironka iyo adahura na Simon Mignolet w'umurwi w'Ababirigi ba Bruges. Akamwemwe katumye Ighalo yitirira ico gitsindo mushikiwe Mushiki wa Ighalo yapfuye mukwa 12 kw'i 2019 Kabaye akaryo ko kwibuka mushikiwe, mu gushira ahabona agapira yari yambariyeko, gacapuyeko ifoto yiwe. Mushikiwe Mary Atole yapfiriye muri Canada afise imyaka 42, indwi 7 imbere y'uko musazawe yirangurira indoto ziwe. "Mushikanje nkunda yitavye Imana, yari umukunzi ruhebwa w'umurwi Manchester United." Ighalo yabibwiye imboneshakure MUTV. "Twarakunda kuganira ivy'iyi ndoto yanje. Ikibabaje n'uko ibi binshikiye atakiriho. Nico kimbabaje. Niyemeje ko igitsindo cose nzokwama ndakimwitirira. Iyo ari mw'ijuru, arabona ivyiza ndimwo na Manchester United." 'Biraboneka ko ari igitsindo c'akamwemwe kavanze n'amarira' Ole Gunnar Solskjaer, umutunganyabikorwa wa Manchester United - azwi ko yatsindiye uwo murwi incuro 126, agikina - yakeje Ighalo ko yishize ku rutonde rw'abatsindiye uwo murwi. Solskjaer yavuze ati, "Ighalo yaronse ico yakoreye". Yongeye ati, "Ashinzwe ijisho na benshi". "Nk'uwabaye umukinyi w'umusatirizi, ndazi uko umuntu yiyumva ku gitsindo ca mbere. Yagerageje kenshi. Yari yamotewe n'igitsindo ciwe." "Igitsindo ciwe cerekanye uko mumutwe yari yiteguye. Kuva Juan agifise umupira, Ighalo yar'azi aho abwirizwa kuba ari. Ni igitsindo cari gitunganije neza." Ighalo yatanganje abahinga Ighalo yanatangaje abagabo babiri bahoze bakinira Manchester United, bariko bakorera inganda z'ibinyamakuru z'inkino. Paul Scholes, umukinyi wo hagati we yavuze ati, "Yakoze neza cane, mu kwerekana ubukerebutsi bwiwe. Yaje muri uyu murwi hageze, nk'uko vyagenze kuri Bruno Fernandes. Hamwe Manchester United yoharura kuri we, ntagisivya azoshimisha umurwi n'abakunzi." Owen Hargreaves, uwundi yahoze ari umukinyi rurangiranwa wo hagati, yongeye ati: "Nakunze ingene Ighalo yagabiye igitsindo c'akarorero Manchester United. "Ni umugabo aboneka ko akomeye hageze nko gutsinda. Aratandukanye na Martial canke Rashford. Kandi nibaza ko agiye gutsindira n'ibindi bitsindo Manchester United, kuva ubu gushika mu mpera y'izi nkino z'imirwi ya Bulaya."

Ibyapa nk'ki byazengurukijwe icyo kibuga cyo gukiniraho, mu rwego rwo gushyigikira abo banyeshuri Iryo shuri ribanza ryitwa De Buut ryo mu mujyi wa Nijmegen, ryahawe igihe cyo kugera mu mpera y'uku kwezi kwa karindwi ngo ribe ryahagaritse abo banyeshuri ntibongere kuhakinira, bitaba ibyo rigacibwa amande y'ama-Euro 10,000 (arenga miliyoni 10 mu mafaranga y'u Rwanda). Abatuye aho iryo shuri riherereye binubiye ko iyo abo bana bari gukina, basakuza bakarenza ikigero cy'urusaku ntarengwa cya desibeli ('decibel') 70 mu bice bituwemo n'abantu. Abategetsi bapimye urwo rusaku rw'abo bana iyo bakina basanga rugera kuri desibeli 88. Icyemezo cyo kubuza abo banyeshuri gukina ntikivugwaho rumwe. Abantu barenga 4000 bamaze gushyira umukono ku nyandiko isaba ubutegetsi bw'akarere iryo shuri riherereyemo kwisubiraho bugafungura icyo kibuga kimaze imyaka 40. Ikinyamakuru Volkskrant cyo muri icyo gihugu gisubiramo amagambo ya Janneke Colsen, umuyobozi w'iryo shuri, agira ati: "Ni ibintu bitumvikana na busa, kandi rwose birimo kurenganya abana". "By'umwihariko muri iki gihe, aho duhora tubwirwa ko abana bagomba kujya hanze bagakora imyitozo ngororangingo kurushaho". Madamu Colsen yongeyeho ko ubuyobozi bw'ishuri bwari bwaragerageje kugusha neza abaturage baturanye naryo, harimo no kwimurira mu ishuri amasomo ajyanye no kuririmba. Abana bo mu Buholandi bahora baza mu ba mbere mu bishimye cyane ku isi, nkuko bikubiye mu byegeranyo by'ishami ry'umuryango w'abibumbye ryita ku bana (UNICEF). Impamvu zitangwa zibatera kwishima harimo nuko iyo bakiri bato bashyirwaho igitsure gicye ku bijyanye n'amasomo, ahubwo hakibandwa ku kwigira mu mikino itandukanye.

Robert Gabriel Mugabe yari afite imyaka 95, yari amaze igihe ari kuvurirwa muri Singapore. Bwana Mugabe yayoboye Zimbabwe kuva mu 1980 kugeza mu 2017 ahiritswe n'abasirikare kubera igitutu cy'imyivumbagatanyo ya rubanda. Jonathan Moyo wahoze umuvugizi wa Robert Mugabe yanditse kuri Twitter amagambo aca amarenga y'ibyabaye ati: "Igicu kirabuditse hejuru ya Zimbabwe no hirya yayo. Imana yaraduha, Imana yisubije; Izina ryimana nirishimwe". Impera ya Twitter ubutumwa, 1 Mu ntangiriro z'ukwezi gushize Emmerson Mnangagwa wamusimbuye yatangaje ko umukambwe Mugabe amaze amezi ane ari mu bitaro muri Singapore. Yagize ati: "Bwana Mugabe waharaniye ubwigenge bw'igihugu cyacu amaze igihe avurwa kandi aragenda yoroherwa". Ndetse yavugaga ko ashobora gusezererwa mu gihe cya vuba. Bwana Mnangagwa uyu munsi kandi yemeje urupfu rwa Mugabe, avuga ko uruhare rwe mu mateka ya Zimbabwe rutazibagirana. Bwana Mugabe niwe washinze ishyaka rya Zanu-PF ryaharaniye ubwigenge bwa Zimbabwe, afatwa nk'intwari y'iki gihugu, yahiritswe ku butegetsi agifite abakunzi benshi mu gihugu.
