Ni umutegetsi wari uzwi cyane ku isi no muri Afurika by'umwihariko kubera gutinda cyane ku butegetsi, kurwanya abazungu no kubambura ibikingi byabo muri Zimbabwe. Mu bihe bya byuma by'ubutegetsi bwe ariko ubukungu bwa Zimbabwe bwaraguye mu biryo butigeze bubaho mbere, ifaranga ry'igihugu ryataye agaciro inshuro zirenga miliyoni 100. Robert Mugabe yashakanye na Grace Marufu bari bamaze kubyarana kabiri

Iyo nama yari yatumweko na musenyeri wa Canterburg Justin Welby Ico gisata ca Anglican muri America, ciyita mu congereza Episcooal Church, ntibazosubira kwemererwa kuja mu bikorwa y'iryo shengero. Abarongoye ishengero rya Anglican kw'isi, bahuriye I Canterbury, bavuze ko baciye kubiri n'ivyo abayoboke b'idini rya Anglican bemera, kuvyerekeye ukwubukana. Uko guhagarikwa vy'agateganyo kw'ico gisata co muri Amerika, gufise intumbero yo kwanka ko haba abiyonkora kubera ukutumvikana ku vyerekeye ukwubakana kw'abasangiye igitsina. Uko kwubakana kw'abasangiye igitsina kwariyamirijwe caane n'ibisata vya Anglican vyo muri Afrika. Icemezo co guhagarika igisata ca Anglican muri Amerika cafashwe mu nama bivugwa ko itari yoroshe. Musenyeri w'ico gisata co muri Amerika, Michael Curry, yavuze koi co cemezo"kizotera ishavu ryinshi". Amatati yerekeye ukwubakana kw'abasangiye igitsina yatanguye inyuma y'aho Gene Robinson, yari yariyemereye ku mugaragaro ko akundana n'uwundi basangiye igitsina, agizwe musenyeri wa diyoseze ya New Hampshire mu 2003. Iyo ngingo yazanye ukutumvikana gukomeye hagati y'abategetsi n'abayoboke ba Anglican kw'isi yose.

Julian Assange amaze imyaka irindwi yarahungiye mu nzu y'uhagarariye Ecuador i London, akabigereranya no gufungwa azira ubusa Byatumye asaba ubuhungiro mu nzu y'uhagarariye igihugu cya Ecuador i London. Yagize ati: "Uyu munsi ni intsinzi y'ingenzi kuri jye no ku ishami ry'uburenganzira bwa muntu mu muryango w'abibumbye, ariko ntibihanagura imyaka irindwi maze mfunzwe nzira ubusa ... mu gihe abana banjye bakuze". "Icyo si ikintu nshobora kubabarira cyangwa ngo nibagirwe". Assange yavuze ko yiteguye kugirana ibiganiro n'abategetsi b'Ubwongereza na Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Amerika. Bwana Assange w'imyaka 45 y'amavuko, ashakishwa n'ubutegetsi bw'Amerika kubera kumena amabanga akubiye mu nyandiko za gisirikare n'imibanire n'ibihugu. Kuri uyu wa gatanu, Suwede yavuze ko yafashe umwanzuro wo guhagarika iperereza ku byaha ashinjwa byo gufata abagore ku ngufu. Hagati aho, igihugu cya Ecuador cyashishikarije Ubwongereza kumureka akagisohokamo mu mutekano. Assange yahisemo kuguma mu nzu y'uhagarariye Ecuador mu Bwongereza atinya ko yakoherezwa mu gihugu avukamo cya Suwede nacyo kikamwohereza muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Amerika.

Ubwicanyi bwakorewe abirabure bwatumye haba imyiyerekano kuva mu myaka mike iheze George Floyd, yari afise imyaka 46 yacungera inzu imwe y'uburiro mu gisagara ca Minneapolis, yahagaritswe n'igipolisi ku wa 25 z'ukwa gatanu mu gihe cariko kirahiga umuntu yagirizwa kwigana amafaranga. Ireresi y'iminota irenga icenda yerekana ingene Floyd yariko atakambira umupolisi w'umuzungu yariko aramunigisha ivi yamupfukamye kw'izosi, nawe yitakambira ati "sinshobora guhema". George Floyd yamaze iminota itari mike yitabazira ko vyanse ko ahema Imyiyerekano ibandanya muri Amerika mu kwiyamiriza urupfu rwa George Floyd rwabereye mu gasho k'igipolisi iri mi myiyerekano ikomeye cane yabaye inyuma y'ubwicanyi bukorerwa Abanyamerika b'abirabure. Ibiharuro vyerekanwa n'ikinyamakuru c'i Washington bivuga ko abantu 1014 barashwe n'abapolisi muri ico gihugu mu mwaka wa 2019, ubushakashatsi bukerekana ko abenshi muri bo ari abirabure. Ireresi yerekanye umupolisi ariko anigisha ivi George Floyd yamuhonyoye kw'izosi Akarenganyo k'igipolisi gakorerwa abirabure katumye haba isekeza bise #BlackLivesMatter movement ryo guharanira agateka k'abirabure baciye. Aba ni bamwe mu birabure benshi bagandaguwe bigatuma abanyagihugu biha amabarabara mu kwiyamiriza ubugome bw'igipolisi. Trayvon Martin, 26 z'ukwa kabiri 2012 Trayvon Martin yyishwe mu 2012 Trayvon Martin, umunyeshure w'umwirabure w'imyaka 17, yarishwe arashwe na George Zimmerman mu gisagara ca Sanford mu ntara ya Florida. Martin yari yagiye kuramutsa bagenziwe, ariko ashitse kuri bariyeri aca ahura na Zimmerman yari asanzwe acunze imihana y'ababanyi biwe. Mu mwaka wa 2013, sentare yavuze ko Zimmerman ata caha yari afise - ni mu gihe itegeko ry'ico gihugu ryamwejeje kuko ngo mu kurasa Trayvon yariko arivuna, ariko umuryango w'uyo musore hamwe n'incuti zabo babandanya bemeza ko yarashwe ataco ahorwa. Eric Garner, 17 z'ukw'indwi 2014 Eric Garner yishwe inyuma y'uko umupolisi, Daniel Pantaleo, amunyukuriye hasi mu gisagara ca New York amufashe amwagiriza ko yariko agurisha itabi bidaciye mu mategeko. Ireresi yamwerekanye arira atakamba ati "biranse ko mpema", amajambo yavuze incuro 11 zose. Ako kabi - kafashwe ireresi n'umuntu yari ku ruhande - yatumye haduka imyiyerekano mu gihugu cose. Umupolisi yakoze ivyo yarirukanywe mu kazi, ariko nta rubanza yigeze acirwa. Aho hari haciye umwaka isekeza ryiswe Black Lives Matter movement ritanguye mu kwiyamiriza irekurwa rya Zimmerman yari yishe wa musore Trayvon Martin muri Florida. Michael Brown, 9 z'ukwa munani 2014 Michael Brown, 18, yishwe n'umupolisi Darren Wilson mu gisagara ca Ferguson c'intara ya Missouri, amwagirije ko yari yivye itabi. Gushika ubu haracari impari ku vyatumye yicwa bunyamaswa, ariko Brown yarashwe amasasu atandatu, nk'uko ibipimo vyo kwa muganga bivyerekana. Icegeranyo gitangwa n'ubutungane cavuze ko uyo mupolisi muvyo yahoye Brown harimwo ivanguramoko hamwe no gukoresha inguvu zirenze urugero. Uyo mupolisi yaratanze imihoho mu gipolisi ariko ntiyigeze arengutswa mu bucamanza. Ubwo bwicanyi bwatumye haduka imyiyerekano n'imigumuko mu gisagara ca Ferguson, mbere ituma na rya sekeza Black Lives Matter movement rigira inguvu zidasanzwe. Walter Scott, 4 z'ukwa kane 2015 Walter Scott umwirabure w'imyaka 50 yarashwe n'umupolisi w'umuzungu Michael Slagger incuro zitanu mu gihe yariko ariruka amuhunga, hari mu gisagara ca Charleston, muri Caroline du Sud. Uyo mupolisi yahagaritse imodoka ya Bwana Scott kubera yari ifise ikibazo c'amatara y'inyuma, nawe aca ariruka inyuma yo guterana amajambo nawe. Ubwo bwicanyi bwatumye haduka imyiyerekano i Charleston, abari muri yo baririmba bati "Ahatari ubutungane nta mahoro ashoboka ". Slagger yarirukanywe mu gipolisi yongera acirirwa umunyororo w'imyaka 20. Freddie Gray, 12 z'ukwa kane 2015 Haciye hafi ikiringo c'indwi zibiri Walter Scott yishwe arashwe, ubundi bubisha bwagiye kuba mu gisagara ca Baltimore, Maryland. Umusore w'imyaka 25- Fred Gray yarafashwe yagirijwe kuba afise ikirwanisho, ni inyuma y'aho abapolisi bamusanganye imbugita mu mufuko wiwe. Ireresi yafashwe yerekana Gray yitabariza mu gihe yari yurijwe imodoka y'igipolisi. Haciye amasaha make, yashikanywe mu bitaro yuzuye ibikomere umubiri wose. Yacikanye haciye indwi imwe, bituma haduka imigumuko yakomerekeyemwo abapolisi hafi 20 . Abapolisi batatu muri batandatu bamufashe barahagaritswe ariko mu nyuma bakaba barejejwe, nayo abandi batatu bobo nta n'uko barengukishijwe. Sandra Bland, 13 z'ukw'indwi 2015 Sandra Bland yishwe ari hafi yo gutangura akazi kiwe muri Texas Bland ayari afise imyaka 28- yahagaritswe n'umupolisi mu ntara ya Texas Brian Encinia amwagiriza amakosa matoya yo kurenga ku mategeko y'ibarabara. Yapfuye ari hafi yo gutangura akazi gashasha muri Houston. Mu gihe yariko yegera uyo mu polisi, yari yakije isigara mbere aca ararita ritazimije. Camera yo mu modoka yerekana uyo mupolisi, Brian Encinia, ariko aharira n'umupfasoni Bland, anamutera n'ubwoba n'ibastola yiwe. Bland yarafashwe yagirizwa gusuzugura umupolisi, bituma haduka imyiyerekano. Haciye iminsi itatu, yariyahuriye mu gasho. N'aho Bland atishwe n'igipolisi, urupfu rwiwe rwaratumye haduka imyiyerekano muri amerika. Urubanza rwiwe rwataziriwe #SayHerName, mu rugamba rwo kurwanya ihohotera ry'igipolisi ku mwigeme w'umwirabure. Philando Castile, 6 July 2016 Castile yarashwe n'umupolisi Jeronimo Yanez inyuma y'uguhagarikwa n'igipolisi kijejwe uruja n'uruza muri Minnesota. Yari afise ikirwanisho akaba yabwiye abari bamuhagaritse ko afise uruhusha rwo gutunga ikirwanisho. Mu gihe yariko arondera urupapuro rumuha ubwo burenganzira, yaciye araswa nk'uko vyamenyeshejwe n'umukunzi wiwe bari kumwe mu modoka. Umupolisi yamurashe yarejejwe n'ubucamanza. Botham Jean, 6 z'ukw'icenda 2018 Botham Jean w'imyaka 26, yiciwe mu nzu iwe n'umupolisi w'umuzungu yari mu karuhuko, Amber Guyger. Uyo mupolisi avuga ko yinjiye mu nzu ya Jean yihenze, yibaza ko yinjiye iwe, ari naho yaca amurasa, yibaza ko Jean yari umusuma, kandi ata kirwanisho yari afise. Haciye umwaka, Guyger yaciriwe umunyororo w'imyaka cumi. Atatiana Jefferson, 13 z'ukw'icumi 2019 Jefferson yari umunyeshure w'imyaka 28 yariko yigira ubuganga akaba yarashwe ari mu cumba ciwe mu gisagara ca Forth Worth, Dallas, araswa n'umupolisi Aaron Dean. Dean yagiye muri ico cumba inyuma y'aho ababanyi ba Jefferson bamubwiriye ko umuryango w'imbere w'icumba ciwe wuguruye, akaba yamurashe acishije mw'idirisha. Uyo mupolisi yaragirijwe ubwicanyi ariko gushika ubu urubanza ntiruracibwa. Breonna Taylor, 13 z'ukwa gatatu 2020 Breonna Taylor w'imyaka 26 yari umuganga bitumwako iyo hari ibigoranye, akaba yarashwe amasasu umunani igihe abapolisi binjiye mu nzu yiwe ahitwa Louisville, Kentucky ku wa 13 z'ukwa gatatu. Binjiye barondera ibiyayuramutwe ariko nta na kimwe basanzeyo mu bintu vyiwe. Umuryango wa Taylor bavuga ko abo bapolisi batariko barondera uyo mwigeme canke umukunzi wiwe, ko ahubwo bariko barondera umuntu yari yamaze gufatwa kandi atari akiba muri iyo nzu. igipolisi ca Louisville ciregura kivuga ko abo bapolisi bafashe ingingo yo kurasa mu kwivuna inyuma y'aho umwe muri bagenzi babo arasiwe agakomereka.

Abategetsi bo mu Buhinde bafite ubwoba ko kugira urugwiro bikabije bishobora gutuma habaho ibitero kubera "kwirara mu gucunga umutekano" Ibi biraterwa n'impungenge ko urugwiro rushobora gutuma babonwa nk'abiraye mu gucunga umutekano, bikaba byateza akaga k'ibitero by'iterabwoba. Ikigo cy'Ubuhinde cy'umutekano w'inganda, ari na cyo gishinzwe umutekano w'indege, cyatangaje ko gishaka ko abakozi bacyo "baba maso kurushaho aho kugira urugwiro." Ikinyamakuru Indian Express cyo mu Buhinde cyatangaje ko aba bakozi bahawe ababwiriza yo kureka "kumwenyura byeruye", bagatangira gahunda yo "kumwenyura biri mu rugero." Bivugwa ko abategetsi bemeza ko kugira urugwiro rukabije bishyira mu kaga umutekano w'ibibuga by'indege bikaba byakwibasirwa n'ibitero by'iterabwoba. Rajesh Ranjan, ukuriye urwego rw'igihugu rushinzwe umutekano w'indege, yavuze ko n'ibitero by'iterabwoba byibasiye Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Amerika ku itariki ya 11 y'ukwezi kwa cyenda mu mwaka wa 2001, byabaye kubera "kurenza urugero mu buryo bwo kwita ku bagenzi." Si ubwa mbere abapolisi bo mu Buhinde basabwe kuvugurura imikorere cyangwa guhindura imyitwarire yabo. Mu kwezi kwa karindwi uyu mwaka, leta ya Karnataka - imwe mu zigize Ubuhinde - yasabye abapolisi bayo kugabanya ibiro, bitihise bagahagarikwa ku mirimo yabo. No mu mwaka wa 2004, abapolisi bo muri leta ya Madhya Pradesh mu Buhinde bongerewe amafaranga y'umushahara kugira ngo batereke ubwanwa bwo hejuru y'umunwa kuko ababakuriye bemezaga ko butuma bahabwa icyubahiro kurushaho. Bitandukanye no mu Buhinde, ahandi kuri uyu mugabane w'Aziya, polisi y'igihugu cya Nepal yahaye akazi abatoza 600 mu mwaka wa 2014 ngo bahugure abapolisi ku buryo barushaho kugira urugwiro.

Ni ihererekanya ry'imfungwa rinini ribaye kuva amakimbirane yatangira mu mwaka wa 2014 Iri ni ihererekanya ry'imfungwa rinini ribayeho kuva igihugu cyajya mu ntambara mu mwaka wa 2014. Amabisi n'izindi modoka zari zakoranyirijwe kuri bariyeri ya Mayorsk hafi y'umujyi wa Horlivka mu ntara ya Donetsk mu gikorwa cyo guhererekanya izo mfungwa. Abanyururu barenga 300 nibo bagombaga gusubizwa mu karere kagenzurwa n'inyeshyamba ariko hari amakuru avuga ko bamwe muri bo banze gusubirayo ku mpamvu zitasobanuwe. Igikorwa cyabaye mu mutekano ukaze Kugira ngo bigerweho, byatwaye amezi menshi y'imishyikirano ku buryo byabaye na ngombwa ko Perezida w'Uburusiya Vladmir Putin n'umukuru wa Kiliziya y'aba Orthodox babigiramo uruhare. Ariko rero impande zombi hari abanyururu zigifunze. Ibi kandi mu byukuri bishatse kuvuga ko ari intambwe ishimishe itewe mu gushyira mu bikorwa amasezerano y'amahoro y'i Minsk.

Igiporisi kimaze guhagarika abatari bake bari mu myiyerekano, harimwo n'uyu mugabo mu gisagra ca Vladivostok Ku mugwa mukuru Moscou, igiporisi cugaye ibituro vya gari ya moshi zigendera mu kuzimu congera kigabanya uruja n'uruza hagati mu gisagra. Itororokanirizo ry'amakuru Reuters rivuga ko abarenga 100 ari bo bahagaritswe aho hantu. Uyu munyaporitike Navalny anegura cane ubutegetsi bwa Vladimir Putin yarahagaritswe acinjira mu Burusiya avuye mu Budagi aho yari amaze igihe avurirwa inyuma y'aho aherewe isumu yahatswe kumwambura ubuzima. Yahagaritswe ku wa 17 z'uku kwa mbere avuye i Berlin yagirizwa ko yarenze ku mategeko ajanye no gupfungwa ic'amaso. Abategetsi b'Uburusiya bavuga ko yategerezwa kwama yishikana ku giporisi buri mwanya kubera yari apfunzwe ic'amaso ku vyo yagirizwa vyo gusesagura itunga ry'igihugu. Navalny ariyamiriza ipfungwa ryiwe, akavuga ko ari "ihonyanga ry'amategeko ryeruye", kandi ko abategetsi bari bazi neza ko yariko aravurirwa i Berlin inyuma yo guhabwa isumu yo mu bwoko bwa Novichok mu kwezi kw'umunani guheze, mu Burusiya nyene. Imyiyerekano yabaye kandi no mu gisagara ca St Petersburg Hagati aho, Perezida Vladimir Putin w'Uburusiya aramirira kure amakuru avuga ko ari we nyene ikirimba ca rurangiza kiri kw'ibahari Mer Noire, nk'uko vyavuzwe na Navalny mw'ireresi yakwiragiy mu burusiya hose, aho abashika imiliyoni 100 bayiravye. Ibintu bimeze gute? Abategetsi b'Uburusiya bavuga ko abantu bashika 300 ari bo bonyene bari bamaze kwiyegeranya muri iyo myiyerekano. Amashusho yerekana igiporisi kijejwe gutuza imigumuko gishoreye abantu ku ma modokari. Imyiyerekano kandi yabaye mu buseruko bw'igihugu, n'aho igiporisi cari cagabishije ko hatogira abantu bakoranira hamwe ari benshi. Mu gisagra ca Novosibirsk kiri muri Siberie, abantu bashika 20000 nibo bihaye amabarabara baririmba ngo "ubwigenge" hamwe na "Putin ni umusuma". Ahitwa Yakutsk, aho ibipimo vy'ubushuye vyamanutse gushika kuri degre 40 musi y'ubusa (-40C), umwe mu bari muri iyo myiyerekano yiyise Ivan yavuze ko ari bwo bwa mbere yari yitavye imyiyerekano. Yavuze ati: "Ndarambiwe n'intwaro y'agahotoro n'abategetsi batubahiriza amategeko. Nta kibazo na kimwe cigera cishurwa. Ndakeneye umuco, umwidegemvyo n'ihinduka. Ibi nivyo vyanzanye hano". Igiporisi kijejwe gutuza imigumuko cahagaritse abatari bake i Moscou, harimwo n'uyu mugore Aho nyene muri Siberia, iyabereye mu gisagara ca Omsk yitabwe n'abantu bababa 1000, hamwe kandi n'abashika 7000 bihaye amabarabara mu gisagara ca Yekaterinburg kiri mu ntara ya Ural, nk'uko bivugwa n'ibinyamakuru vy'Uburusiya. Ishirahamwe OVD-Info rikurikiranira hagufi iyi myiyerekano rivuga ko abaporisi bari bamaze guhagarika abantu barenga 1000 mu gihugu cose. Mu myiyerekano yabaye mu ndwi iheze, abantu barenga 4000 nibo bahagaritswe. Abatari bake mu begereye Navalny barapfunzwe kuva mu ndwi iheze, mu gihe abandi nabo, harimwo na mwenewabo, bapfunzwe ic'amaso. Ejo ku wa gatandatu, Sergei Smirnov, umukuru w'ikinyamakuru ngurukanabumenyi c'Uburusiya gitanga amakuru ku bijanye n'agateka ka zina muntu, na we nyene yarahagaritswe hanze y'umuhana wiwe. Yagirizwa ko yari mu myiyerekano yo mu ndwi iheze, abandi bamenyeshamakuru bakaba biyamirije ipfungwa ryiwe. I Moscou, bivugwa ko igiporisi kiriko kirondera ibibanza vyo gupfungiramwo abanywanyi b'uyu munyaporitike atavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi. Navalny yagiriza inzego z'umutekano ko zahawe amategeko na Perezida Putin ngo zimuhe isumu ya Novichok yahatswe kumuhitana. Ibiro vy'umukuru w'igihugu, Kremlin, bivuga ko ata ruhara bifise mu vyabaye kuri Navalny kandi bikiyamiriza icegeranyo c'abahinga bo mu karere k'uburengero bw'isi kivuga ko hakoreshejwe isumu ya Novichok

Robert Lewandowski yinjiza igitego cye cya kane muri uwo mukino Uyu rutahizamu ukomoka muri Pologne byamufashe iminota 14 n'amasegonda 31 gusa ngo abe atsinze ibyo bitego bine. Yabaye umukinnyi wa kabiri gusa mu mateka utsinze yikurikiranya mu mikino icyenda yo mu matsinda ya Champions League. Leon Goretzka ni we watsinze igitego cya mbere cya Bayern ku mupira yaherejwe na Philippe Coutinho, mu gihe Corentin Tolisso yashyizemo icya gatandatu. Ku rubuga nkoranyambaga rwa Twitter, Lewandowski yagize ati: "Ngomba kubabwiza ukuri... nagizwe imbata no gutsinda ibitego..." Lewandowski agejeje ku bitego 30 amaze gutsindira iyi kipe n'igihugu cye muri uyu mwaka w'imikino, muri uwo mukino wari uwa 24 akinnye mu mikino yose kugeza ubu. Ibitego 10 muri ibyo yabitsinze mu mikino yo mu matsinda ya Champions League. Uyu Munya-Pologne w'imyaka 31 y'amavuko yinjije penaliti ku munota wa 53 yabaye igitego cya kabiri cya Bayern, mu minota irindwi ya nyuma yaho (ku wa 60, 64 n'uwa 67) atsinda ibindi bitego bitatu mu buryo umunyezamu Milan Borjan wa Red Star na we atasobanukiwe. Mu mwaka wa 2015, Lewandowski yatsinze ibitego bitanu mu minota icyenda nyuma yo kwinjira mu kibuga asimbuye, mu mukino Bayern yatsinzemo Wolfsburg - wabaye umuhigo w'ibitego bitanu byihuse cyane bitsinzwe n'umukinnyi umwe mu mateka ya shampiyona ya Bundesliga yo mu Budage. Bayern Munich imaze gutsinda imikino yose itanu imaze gukina mu itsinda ryayo rya B ndetse yamaze kubona itike yo gukina icyiciro gikurikiyeho aho ikipe itsinzwe ihita ivamo. Yakigezemo ari yo iyoboye iryo tsinda. Uko gutsindwa kwa Red Star kuvuze ko Tottenham y'umutoza Jose Mourinho isanze Bayern mu mikino ya 1/8 iri ku mwanya wa kabiri nyuma yo gutsinda Olympiakos ibitego 4 - 2. Intsinzi ya Bayern ni inkuru nziza kandi ku mutoza wayo w'inzibacyuho Hansi Flick, kuri ubu utoza Bayern kuva yakwirukana uwari umutoza wayo Niko Kovac ubwo yari imaze gutsindwa ibitego 5 - 1 na Eintracht Frankfurt. Amakuru yakomeje kuvuga ko Mauricio Pochettino wahoze atoza Tottenham ashobora kubona akazi ko gutoza Bayern, ariko umutoza wayo w'inzibacyuho Flick amaze kuyihesha intsinzi enye mu mikino ine n'igiteranyo cy'ibitego 16.

Bwana Bemba yahoze ari umukuru w'inyeshyamba aza no kuba Visi-Perezida muri Kongo Ni umwanzuro ushimangiye icyemezo cyari cyafashwe n'akanama k'amatora ka Kongo. Bwana Bemba wahoze ari umukuru w'inyeshyamba akaza no kuba Visi-Perezida muri Kongo, ntiyemerewe kwiyamamaza kubera ko urukiko mpuzamahanga mpanabyaha rwamuhamije icyaha cyo guha ruswa abatangabuhamya. Bwana Bemba uzwi cyane muri Kongo, aheruka kugirwa umwere ku byaha by'intambara n'urukiko mpuzamahanga mpanabyaha nyuma yo gufungwa imyaka 10. Mu kwezi gushize kwa munani nibwo yasubiye muri Kongo, yakirwana igishyika cyinshi n'abamushyigikiye. Ni umwe mu bahabwaga amahirwe menshi yo kuba batsinda amatora yimirije.

Raheem Sterling yatsinze igitego ciwe ca mbere mu mugwi nserukiragihugu w'Ubwongereza kuva mu kwezi kwa cumi 2015 aho bakina na Estonia - hri haheze imisi 1.102 Abakinyi bamenyerezwa na Gareth Southgate bagiye kuruhuka bamaze gutsinda ibitego 3-0. Hari haheze imyaka itatu, inkino 27 Raheem Sterling adatsindiye igitego Ubwongereza, akaba yinjije n'igitego ca kabiri, kuri vyose akaba yahawe umupira na Marcus Rashford. Abakinyi ba Espanye baremerewe cane n'abo Ubwongereza kuva umupira ugitangura, bashoboye kwihagararako mu gice ca kabiri, aho Paco Alcacer yatsinze igitego akoresheje umutwe. Ubwongereza bwasumagijwe cane, na cane cane umunyegoli Jordan Pickford. Uwo mukinyi wa Everton yakinye neza cane akaba yanafashije kugira ibitego bibiri vya mbere biboneke ariko kandi yahatswe gutanga penalite igihe vyaboneka ko akubise hasi Rodrigo imbere y'igoli. Espagne yagwanye gushika aho Sergio Ramos yinjiza igitego ca kabiri ca Espagne ku munota wa 97 - ariko Ubwongereza butahukana intsinzi bwakoreye, iya mbere kuva batsinze uwo mugwi ibitego 4-2 mu 2987. Bubaye ubwa mbere Espagne itsindirwa iwabo mu mahiganwa mpuzamakungu mu myaka 15.

Amafoto yacishijwe ku mbuga hwaniro yerekana imyiyerekano mu mabarabara ya Kermanshah Ibihumbi vy'abanyagihugu binjiye muri iyo myiyerekano, abenshi muri bo bakaba bafashwe n'abajejwe umutekano. Itangazo ryavuye mu biro vy'umukuru w'igihugu wa Amerika, White House, rivuga ko abanya Irani barengewe n'ubutegetsi bwiziziwe n'ingeso y'ibiturire, bugakoresha amahera y'igihugu mu guterera mu bikogwa vy'iterabwoba". Hagataho ubutegetsi bwasavye ababushigikiye kuja ari benshi mu myiyerekano ku munsi wa gatandatu. Iyo myiyerekano niyo kwiyibutsa imyiyerekano yakozwe mu 2009 yashigikira leta y'abatipfuza amahinduka, yari irongowe na Mahmoud Ahmadinejad. Umumenyeshamakuru wa BBC yavuze ko hari ibihumbi vy'abanyagihugu bajanywe muri iyo myirekano n'amabisi ya leta ku mugwa mukuru Tehran. Amerika ivuga iki kuri iyo myiyerekano? "Leta ya Irani ikwiye kwubahiriza agateka k'abanyagihugu, karimwo uburenganzira bwo guserura iciyumviro. Amakungu ariko arabikurikirana," niko umuvugizi wa White House Sarah Huckabee yavuze kuri Twitter. Ubutegetsi bwa Amerika bwasavye ibihugu vyose "gushigikira abanyagihugu ba Irani n'ivyo basaba ku burenganzira bwabo, nuko ikibazo ca ruswa corangira".

Imikino ya nyuma izabera muri iyi nzu y'imikino yuzuye i Kigali Indi mikino y'iri rushanwa izabera mu mijyi ya Cairo (Misiri), Dakar (Senegal), Lagos (Nigeria), Luanda (Angola), Rabat (Morocco) na Monastir cyangwa Tunis (Tunisia). Iri rushanwa rigiye gukinwa ku nshuro ya mbere, ryateguwe ku bufatanye bw'abanyafurika bakina, n'abakinnye muri NBA, hamwe n'ishyirahamwe rya Basketball ku isi. Amakipe 12 y'ahatandukanye muri Afurika niyo azakina iri rushanwa rizatangira mu kwezi kwa gatatu umwaka utaha wa 2020. NBA ivuga ko umuyobozi wa Basketball Africa League, Amadou Gallo Fall, yatangaje ko iri rushanwa rizaba amateka akomeye kuri Afurika mu mukino wa Basketball. Amakipe 12 azakina iri rushanwa agabanyije mu bice (conferences) bibiri, amakipe atatu azazamuka muri buri gice azakina ikiciro cyo gushaka ane(4) azakina imikino ya nyuma. Aya makipe ane niyo azahurira i Kigali mu mpera z'ukwezi kwa gatanu 2020. Iri rushanwa rya Basketball Africa League ryatangajwe mu mikino ya NBA All-Star 2019 yabereye muri Charlotte, North Carolina muri Amerika mu kwezi ka kabiri uyu mwaka. Imikino ya nyuma y'iri rushanwa izabera mu nzu y'imikino y'intoki iherutse kuzura i Kigali.

George Floyd yatakambye kenshi ko atabasha guhukemeka Izi nyandiko z'urukiko zagaragajwe n'umwe mu bunganira mu mategeko umupolisi umwe mu baregwa uruhare mu kwica Bwana Floyd, umwirabura utari witwaje intwaro. Urupfu rwe mu kwezi kwa gatanu rwateje imyigaragambyo ikomeye muri Amerika, ndetse yageze n'ahandi ku isi. Izi nyandiko zitanga amakuru arushijeho ku bihe bya nyuma bya Bwana Floyd. Abapolisi bane; Derek Chauvin wari umushinzeho ivi, aregwa ibyaha birimo ubwicanyi bwo mu kiciro cya kabiri (ubwicanyi butateguwe), naho bagenzi be Thomas Lane, J Alexander Kueng na Tou Thao baregwa gufasha no kureberera ubwicanyi. Izi nyandiko zagaragajwe uyu munsi kuwa kane n'uwunganira Bwana Thomas Lane asaba ko uwo yunganira atongera gukurikiranwa. Izo nyandiko zerekana iki? Kugeza ubu amashusho yafashwe n'abari aho byabereye agashyirwa ku mbuga nkoranyambaga, niyo yari agize byinshi mu bizwi ku gufatwa no ku rupfu rwa Floyd. Izi nyandiko nshya zo zitanga amakuru arambuye kurushaho. Zerekana kuva ubwo abapolisi Lane na Kueng bageraga aho byabereye ku muhanda mu mujyi wa Minneapolis, kugeza haje imodoka itwara indembe ngo itware George Floyd. Izi nyandiko ni ibyandukuwe biva mu mashusho (video) yafashwe kuri camera ntoya zari kuri Lane na Kueng, zerekana ko Bwana Floyd yatakambye inshuro zirenga 20 ko atabasha guhumeka. Aba bapolisi bamusanze aho yahagaritse imodoka imbere y'iduka, bamukekaho gukoresha inoti ya $20 y'impimbano. Ari ku mapingu kandi bamupfukamyeho, Bwana Floyd yatsikimbye abwira umupolisi Chauvin ko atabasha guhumeka, yongeraho ati: "Ugiye kunyica, yewe". Bwana Chauvin, werekanwa mu mashusho yafashwe n'ababibonye ashinze ivi kuri Floyd hafi iminota umunani, aramusubiza ngo: "Noneho ceceka, reka gusakuza. "Kuko kuvuga bisaba umwuka mwinshi." Izi nyandiko zivuga ko Bwana Floyd atarwanyije aba bapolisi ubwo bari bamusanze. Bwana Lane yasabye Floyd inshuro icumi kwerekana amaboko ye mbere yo kumutegeka gusohoka mu modoka. Mu kumusubiza, Bwana Floyd yagize ati: "Nigeze, nigeze kuraswa muri ubu buryo, bwana mupolisi". Ntabwo bizwi neza icyo yasobanuraga. Aba bapolisi bahise bamwambika amapingu bamushyira inyuma y'imodoka yabo. Floyd yatangiye kubabwira ko afite ubwoba bw'aha hantu bamushyize. Bwana Lane yamubajije niba "hari ikintu yafashe". Floyd aramusubiza ati: "Mfite ubwoba". Aba bapolisi bamuvanye aho maze bamurambika hasi. Bwana Chauvin amushingaho ivi. Inyandiko z'uyu munyamategeko zivuga ko Bwana Floyd yatakambye inshuro zirenga 10 avuga ijambo "Mama". Yaravuze ngo: "Ibi simbyumva. Mama, ndagukunda. Ndagukunda". "Mubwire abana banjye ko mbakunda. Ndapfuye." Mu gihe kimwe muri iyo minota, Bwana Floyd ariho atsikimba ko atabasha guhumeka, Bwana Lane yabajije Bwana Chauvin ati: "Ese ntitwamuryamisha ku mbavu?". Chauvin aramusubiza ati: "Hoya, araguma atya aha twamufatiye". Uwunganira Chauvin ntacyo aravuga kuri izi nyandiko kuva zasohoka. Kuki izi nyandiko zisohotse ubu? Izi nyandiko zasohowe hagamijwe kurengera Bwana Lane muri iki kirego, umupolisi wari umaze iminsi atangiye uyu mwuga mu gihe Floyd yicwaga. Earl Gray umunyamategeko umwunganira, ari nawe wasohoye izi nyandiko, avuga ko "nta mpamvu umukiriya we akwiye kuba aregwa". Izi nyandiko yasohoye zirimo kandi ibazwa Lane yakorewe n'abashinzwe iperereza bo mu biro bikurikirana ibyaha bya leta ya Minnesota. Muri iryo bazwa, Bwana Lane yavuze ko yavanyemo imbunda agategeka Floyd kwerekana amaboko ye ubwo yari abonye ko yayashyize munsi y'intebe. Bwana Lane yari amaze iminsi atangiye umwuga w'igipolisi ubwo ibi byabaga mu kwezi kwa gatanu Amafoto yafatiwe mu modoka Bwana Floyd yari arimo mbere yo gufatwa, yerekana inoti ebyiri za $20, umunyamategeko Gray akavuga ko zari impimbano. Mu mpera z'ibazwa, umwe mu bamubazaga yabajije Bwana Lane niba we cyangwa Chauvin baragize uruhare mu rupfu rwa Floyd. Umunyamategeko we Gray yahise abwira umukiliya we ati: "Icyo ndagihagaritse. Ntabwo uri bugire icyo ugisubizaho". Ni ibiki byabaye kuva Floyd yapfa? Amashusho yafashwe n'abatambukaga yatumye ibyabaye bimenyekana, biteza imyigaragambyo ikomeye muri Amerika yamagana ivanguraruhu n'urugomo abapolisi bakorera abirabura. Inzego z'igipolisi, iza guverinoma n'abikorera ubushabitsi bamwe, zemeje impinduka mu bijyanye n'ubusumbane bushingiye ku ruhu bwateje ibi. Amashusho n'ibirango by'amateka bifitanye isano n'ubucakara muri Amerika no mu bindi bihugu byasenyuwe n'abigaragambya, ahandi abategetsi baba ari bo babyisenyera.

Isoko rya Gikomba rigenderwa n'ibihumbi vy'abantu bavuye mu buseruko bwa Afrika Abajejwe intwaro muri ako karere bavuga ko ibihumbi vy'abantu batakaje ivyo badandaza vyose mw'isoko rya Gikomba. Abajejwe kuzimya umuriro, bashoboye kuwuzimya haciye amasaha menshi utanguye. Vyibazwa ko iyo nkongi yatanguwe n'amakosa yabaye mu buryo umuyagankuba waho utunganijwe. Bivugwa ko iryo soko ryinjiza, ugereranije, amahera ashika ku muriyoni w'amadolari ku kwezi. Rigenderwa buri munsi n'ibihumbi vy'abantu bavuye hirya no hino mu buseruko bwa Afrika.

Umwe mu bakurikiranira hafi iyi dosiye, ku wa gatatu yabwiye ibiro ntaramakuru AFP ko abacamanza batatu bakurikirana ibyaha byo mu ntambara ku itariki ya 22 y'uku kwezi kwa cumi na kumwe banze ubusabe bwo kuyibyutsa. Ni iperereza rifatwa nk'ikimenyetso cy'ibikomere mu mubano w'u Rwanda n'Ubufaransa, bishingiye kuri jenoside yo mu Rwanda yo mu mwaka wa 1994. Mu mwaka wa 2005, abacitse ku icumu rya jenoside batandatu bashyigikiwe n'abarimo imiryango y'uburenganzira bwa muntu, bari batanze ikirego bashinja abasirikare b'Ubufaransa gutererana abatutsi b'abasivile bari bahungiye mu Bisesero mu burengerazuba bw'u Rwanda mu kwezi kwa gatandatu mu 1994. Iryo perereza ryahagaritswe mu kwezi kwa karindwi uyu mwaka, nyuma y'imyaka 13 yari ishize nta muntu ugejejwe imbere y'ubucamanza muri iyo dosiye. Aba bacitse ku icumu rya jenoside bavuga ko abasirikare b'Ubufaransa bari basezeranyije abatutsi bari bihishe mu misozi yo mu Bisesero mu gihe cya jenoside ko babatabara. Hari ku itariki ya 27 y'ukwezi kwa gatandatu mu mwaka wa 1994. Bavuga ko abo basirikare b'Ubufaransa bahageze nyuma y'iminsi itatu, nyuma yaho abantu babarirwa mu magana bari bamaze kwicwa. Abacitse ku icumu rya jenoside yo mu Rwanda bari mu Bisesero bavuga ko abasirikare b'Ubufaransa babatereranye Mu kwezi gushize kwa cumi, abunganira mu mategeko abo bari batanze icyo kirego, basaba abapererezi ko nubwo iryo perereza ryari ryamaze guhagarikwa, hagira ikindi gikorwa nko kwakira ubuhamya bw'abasirikare n'abanyamakuru bari hafi aho mu Bisesero ku itariki ya 27 y'ukwezi kwa gatatu mu mwaka wa 1994. Ariko abacamanza banzuye ko iperereza rindi "nta kamaro ryagira mu kugaragaza ukuri, cyangwa ngo ribe rishyize mu gaciro bitewe n'igihe kirekire gishize". Patrick Baudouin, wunganira mu mategeko ishyirahamwe mpuzamahanga ry'uburenganzira bwa muntu rifite icyicaro i Paris mu Bufaransa, yavuze ko abari batanze ikirego bateganya kujuririra uwo mwanzuro w'abacamanza (kanda hano wumve uko Patrick Baudouin yabibwiye BBC). Mu mwaka wa 2010, Ubufaransa bwemeye ko bwakoze "amakosa" mu gihe cya jenoside yo mu Rwanda, ariko buhakana ibirego by'ubufatanyacyaha muri jenoside na leta y'u Rwanda yari iriho muri icyo gihe cya jenoside, yari ifitanye umubano wa hafi n'Ubufaransa.

Umurwi Hull City wo mu Bwongereza Igitsindo kimwe rudende c'umurwi SportPesa All Stars wa Kenya, cinjijwe n'umukinyi Humphrey Mieno hasigaye iminota mike ngo urukino rurangire. Umurwi wa Kenya wahejeje urukino agashavu ari kose, mu gihe wari wemerewe agashirukabute ka US$ 11 000 iyo uramuka utsinze. Igitsindo co mu gice ca kabiri, umukinyi Harun Shakava yiyinjije nico cabaciye inkokora, inyuma y'ikindi cari cinjiye mu gice ca mbere cinjijwe n'umutwe n'umukinyi Elliot Holmes wa Hull City ku munota wa 11. Mu gihe umurwi Hull City wari usanzwe ufise urundi rukino mw'ihiganwa "Premier League" mu mpera z'ino ndwi, wari wakinishije abakinyi benshi badakunze gushigwa ku rutonde rw'abatangura. All Stars waragerageje gusatira urugo rwa City ariko umunyezamu yaguma yarikanuye. City iri mu kibanza ca 19, ikaba ishobora gukoroka ikava mu ihiganwa "Premier League" ryo mu mwaka uza, igihe itoba ibaye mu migwi 17 ya mbere.

Leonce Ngendakumana(i buryo) ari kumwe n'umushingwamanza wiwe Francois Nyamoya muri sentare Leonce Ngendakumana sanzwe ari n'umukuru w'umuhgambwe Sahwanya Frodebu yavuze ko ubutegetsi buriko burarondera kumunumya mu gihe buca himirije amatora mu mwaka uza. Leonce Ngendakumana yagirijwe gutyoza no gukwiza urwanko rufatiye ku moko inyuma y'ikete yandikiye mu kwezi kwa kabiri umunyamabanga mukuru wa ONU Ban Ki Moon. Iryo kete yanditse kw'izina rya ADC Ikibiri, Leonce Ngendakumana yagabisha ONU ko mu Burundi hashobora kuba ihonyabwoko kubera urwaruka rw'umugambwe uru ku butegetsi CNDD FDD ruhabwa ibigwanisho nayo iradiyo television yegereye uwo mugambwe Rema FM akayagiriza kwitwara nka RTLM mu Rwanda imbere y'uko ibara rigwa mu 1994. CNDD FDD na Rema FM ni nabo bari bamwitwariye. Uwamwunganira mu mu kuburana Francois Nyamoya yavuze ko ata ca mutangaje ''kuko rwari urubanza rwa politike'' ariko yavuze ko azokwunguruza. Leonce Ngendakumana agiye mu murongo w'abandi benshi mu barongoye imigambwe itavuga rumwe n'uwri ku butegetsi bakrukiranwa n'ubutugane canke bahunze igihugu bavuga ko ari ukubera itoteza bakorerwa n'ubutegetsi.

Islamic State ivuga ko yagavye igitero muri Kongo, ariko abahinga bavuga ko bigoye kwemera Mu rwandiko rwashizwe ahabona n'uwo mugwi, wavuze ko abarwanyi bawo bagavye igitero ku kirindiro c'abasirikare ba Kongo. Ico gitero ngo cagabwe ku kirindiro kiri i Kamango, hafi y'urubibe n'igihugu ca Uganda, ngo abo barwanyi barica banakomeretsa abasirikare benshi. Mu rugendo aherukamwo muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika, umukuru w'igihugu ca Kongo Felix Tshisekedi yavuze ko umugwi w'abanye Uganda, ADF, wacengewe na Islamic State. Ariko benshi mu bihweza utuntu n'utundi basa n'abatemera na gatoyi ibivugwa n'abajejwe intwaro muri Uganda hamwe na Kongo, yuko hoba hari isano na ritoyi. Bavuga ko aka ari akaryo ko kugerageza kuronswa imfashanyo na Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika mu kurwanya ubutagondwa, ngo kandi mu vy'ukuri intambara ziri mu buseruko bwa Kongo ziterwa n'abanyepolitike bo muri ako gace nyene.

Imyiyerekano yo kwiyamiriza iterwa rya missile na Korea ya ruguru Iterwa ry'izo missile ribaye inyuma y'imisi itatu Korea y'epfo ivuze ko Korea ya ruguru yeteye missile zishika kure mw'ibahari ubwa mbere kuva mu 2014. Amerika na Korea y'epfo bariko baragira imyimenyerezo bari kumwe ya gisirikare, Korea ya ruguru ikaba yikeka ko bashaka kugitera. Korea ya ruguru yateye izindi missile Ibihano bishasha vyafatiwe ico gihugu kubera ukugerageza missile zaco z'ubumara, no gutera ikigendajuru mu kirere itariki 7 z'ukwezi kwa kabiri, barenze ku bihano Onu yari yagifatiye. Korea y'epfo iracarondera kumenya ubwoko bwa missile ico gihugu cateye. Izo missile zatewe ziva mu gisagara kiri mu buraruko bushira ubuseruko ca Hamhung. Missile za Korea ya ruguru Ku musi wa gatanu, Korea ya ruguru yateye missile zibiri zidashika kure. Abategetsi ba Amerika bavuga ko izo missile yagiye mu kirere ibirometero 800, inyuma y'uko zigwa mu mazi. Mu nyuma Amerika yasavye ico gihugu kudateza umutekano muke.

Kuva hejuru ibumoso: Kim Kardashian West, Kanye West na Elon Musk; guhera hasi ibumoso: Bill Gates na Barack Obama. Bose bari mu bibasiwe n'ubwo bushukanyi Konti za Twitter za Barack Obama wahoze ari Perezida w'Amerika, Joe Biden uzahatanira umwanya wa perezida uyu mwaka ahagarariye ishyaka ry'abademokarate ndetse n'umuhanzi Kanye West, nazo zasabye inkunga yo mu muri ayo mafaranga yo mu ikoranabuhanga. Ubutumwa bwo kuri Twitter bwa konti ya Bwana Gates bugira buti: "Buri muntu wese ari kunsaba kugira icyo nanjye nitura ku neza nagiriwe". "Ohereza amadolari 1,000, nanjye ndakoherereza amadolari 2,000". Mu band bibasiwe harimo umuherwe Michael Bloomberg na Kim Kardashian West, umuhanzi akaba n'umugore wa Kanye West. Kompanyi ya Twitter ivuga ko kwinjirirwa muri mudasobwa ku bakozi bayo ari byo byateje uku kwabaye kumwe mu guhungabana gukomeye cyane k'umutekano wayo kuva yashingwa mu 2006. 'Igitero cy'urusobe giteguranye ubuhanga' Mu ruhererekane rw'ubutumwa bwo kuri Twitter, iyi kompanyi yatangaje ko cyari "igitero cy'urusobe giteguranye ubuhanga" kigambiriye abakozi bayo "bafite uruhushya rwo gukoresha ibikoresho n'amakuru by'imbere". Twitter yagize iti: "Tuzi ko bakoresheje uru ruhushya mu kwigarurira konti nyinshi zigaragara cyane (zirimo n'izifite ikimenyetso ko zagenzuwe) bagatangaza ubutumwa mu izina ryazo". Ubutumwa bwo kuri Twitter bw'abari bashimuse konti za Joe Biden na Barack Obama Yongeyeho ko yafashe "ingamba zikomeye" mu kugabanya abagira uruhushya kuri ayo makuru n'ibikoresho by'imbere, kandi ko iperereza rikomeje. Hagati aho, ku rubuga rwe rwa Twitter, Jack Dorsey, umuyobozi mukuru wa kompanyi ya Twitter, ku munsi w'ejo ku wa gatatu yaranditse ati: "Uyu munsi wadukomereye twe hano muri Twitter. Twese tubabajwe cyane n'ibi byabaye". Bwana Dorsey yongeyeho ati: "Turi kwiga ku cyabaye kandi tuzatangaza buri kintu cyose dushoboye igihe tuzaba tumaze gusobanukirwa neza icyabaye nyirizina". Konti ya Twitter ya kompanyi y'ikoranabuhanga ya Apple ifite abayikurikira barenga miliyoni enye, mu gihe iya Jeff Bezos ukuriye Amazon yo ikurikirwa n'abagera kuri miliyoni 1,5 Ingamba yihutirwa y'ubwirinzi Mbere yaho ku munsi w'ejo, Twitter yari yafashe ingamba idasanzwe kuri konti zifite ikirango cy'ubururu - kigaragaza izagenzuwe neza neza ko ari iza ba nyirazo nyirizina - izibuza kugira icyo zitangaza na kimwe. Ndetse n'ubusabe bwo guhindura ijambo ry'ibanga (password/mot de passe) bwari bwanze, naho bumwe "mu buryo bw'imikorere" bw'izindi butagikora. 'Ubujura bwa mbere bubi cyane ku rubuga nkoranyambaga rukomeye' Ahagana saa munani n'iminota 30 zo mu ijoro ryakeye, ku isaha yo mu Rwanda no mu Burundi, abakoresha izo konti za Twitter zigenzuwe bongeye gushobora kugira icyo batangaza kuri Twitter, ariko kompanyi ya Twitter ivuga ko ikiri gucyemura icyo kibazo. Dmitri Alperovitch, washinze kompanyi CrowdStrike y'ubwirinzi bwo kuri internet, yabwiye ibiro ntaramakuru Reuters ati: "Ibi bisa nkaho ari bwo bujura bwo kuri mudasobwa bwa mbere bubi cyane bubayeho kugeza ubu ku rubuga nkoranyambaga rukomeye". Umunyamakuru wa BBC Joe Tidy ukurikiranira hafi amakuru y'umutekano wo ku mbuga za internet avuga ko hari amakuru avuguruzanya ku ngano y'amafaranga abo bashukanyi bo kuri internet bashoboye gutwara muri icyo gihe bari bigaruriye zimwe muri konti zo kuri Twitter. Uyu munyamakuru avuga ko bizagorana cyane kugaruza ayo mafaranga yo mu ikoranabuhanga, ndetse ko kompanyi ya Twitter igomba kwitegura uruhuri rw'ibibazo izabazwa n'abarakajwe n'ibyabaye, bayisaba kwisobanura ku kuntu byashobotse. Mu mwanya muto konti zibasiwe zamaze zigaruriwe, 'link' yari mu butumwa bwa Twitter yahawe imfashanyo n'abantu babarirwa mu magana, batanze arenga ibihumbi 100 by'amadolari (arenga miliyoni 100 mu mafaranga y'u Rwanda), nkuko imibare ya 'blockchain' ibigaragaza. FBI yaburiye abantu Konti za Twitter zibasiwe zose zifite abazikurikira babarirwa muri za miliyoni. Mu mwaka ushize wa 2019, konti nyirizina y'umuyobozi mukuru wa Twitter Jack Dorsey yarinjiriwe, ariko iyi kompanyi nyuma iza gutangaza ko yacyemuye icyo kibazo cyari cyabayeho. Ibiro by'urwego rw'ubutasi bw'imbere muri Amerika (FBI) rwo mu mujyi wa San Francisco aho Twitter ifite icyicaro, byasohoye itangazo ejo ku wa gatatu rivuga kuri icyo gitero cyo kuri mudasobwa. Rigira riti: "Bigaragara ko konti zinjiriwe mu rwego rwo kugira ngo ubushukanyi bw'amafaranga yo mu ikoranabuhanga bukomeze". "Turasaba abaturage kutagwa muri uyu mutego w'ubushukanyi ngo bohereze amafaranga yo mu ikoranabuhanga cyangwa amafaranga [asanzwe]..." Ubutumwa bwo kuri Instagram bwigambye igitero BBC yabwiwe n'umukozi wo mu rwego rw'umutekano ko aderesi yo ku rubuga rwa internet ya cryptoforhealth.com, ari yo ubutumwa bumwe bw'abashukanyi kuri Twitter bwoherezagaho abantu, yari yashyizweho n'umujura wo kuri internet ukoresha aderesi ya email ya mkeyworth5@gmail.com. Izina rya "Anthony Elias" ni ryo ryifashishijwe mu kwandikisha urwo rubuga rwa internet. Cryptoforhealth inakoreshwa kuri Instagram, bisa nkaho yandikishijwe kuri Instagram mu gihe kimwe n'ubwo bujura bwo kuri internet. Mu mwirondoro w'iyo konti kuri Instagram handitse ngo "Bari twebwe", iruhande rwawo hari agashusho ko mu maso hamwenyura. Iyo konti yo kuri Instagram yanatangaje ubutumwa igira iti: "Cyari igitero kigamije ubufasha. Amafaranga yanyu azagezwa ahantu hakwiye".

Mu kwezi kwa 10 abakobwa 21 bararekuwe. Leta ya Nigeria iravuga ko ingabo zayo arizo zamubonye. Izo ngabo ziri mu gikorwa cyo kurwanya umutwe wa Boko Haram mu majyaruguru y'uburasirazuba bwa Nigeria. Izina ry'uwo mukobwa n'ukuntu amerewe ntabwo byatangajwe ariko Femi Adesina - umujyanama udasanzwe w'umukuru w'igihugu - yavuze ko uwo mukobwa atakiri mu maboko ya Boko Haram. Bwana Adesina yavuze ko usimbuye umukuru w'igihugu muri kino gihe - Yemi Osinbajo - yatangarije iyo nkuru mu nama ya leta ikorwa buri cyumweru. Mu cyumweru gishize abakobwa 82 b' i Chibok bararekuwe igihe leta na Boko Haram bahererekanyaga imfungwa nyuma y'imishyikirano yamaze igihe kirekire. Abo bakobwa byitezwe ko bazashyikirizwa imiryango yabo mu mpera za kino cyumweru.

Prezida Pierre Nkurunziza agiye kurongora umugambwe CNDD/FDD ubuzima bwiwe bwose Ku mbuga yiwe ya Facebook, uwujejwe guhererekana amakuru mu mugambwe CNDD-FDD, Nancy Ninette Mutoni yavuze ko muri iyo nama yabereye i Ngozi ku magenekerezo ya 9 na 10 Ukwezi kwa gatatu, ko hafatiwemwo "ingingo zikomeye kandi zibereye zizotuma bashika kw'ihangiro ryo guteza imbere Uburundi". Izo nazo ngo zijanye no "gukomeza inama nshingiro, gukurikirana ibikorwa n'inyifato vy'abagumyabanga n'indongozi, gushira mu ngiro imigabo n'imigambi y'Umugambwe CNDD-FDD", niko Nancy Ninette Mutoni yanditse avuga. Umunyamabanga mukuru wa CNDD/FDD yavuze ko Prezida Pierre Nkurunziza agenywe abikwiye kandi ko ata muntu numwe akwiye gukura aho ashize, niko Evariste Ndayishimiye yavuze. "Ni indongozi yacu. Kurivyo mu mugambwe wacu nta numwe twomugereranya," niko Bwana Ndayishimiye. Abatamuha ni rwere bavuze ko Bwana Nkurunziza w'imyaka 54, agiye gufatwa nk'"Imana". Jérémie Minani arongoye umugambwe utavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi yabwiye iradiyo ikorera hanze ati: "Prezida Pierre Nkurunziza yiyise indongozi y'umugambwe uri ku butegetsi, ni intango y'umugambi wo gushika kuvyo yipfuza, bimworohere kwikiza uwo wese yoba amubangamiye ata ngorane." Agenywe ukwo mu gihe igihugu kiriko kiratunganya amatora kamarampaka y'ibwirizwa shingiro, igihe ryoba ryemejwe agashobora kurongora igihugu gushika mu 2034. T Prezida Pierre Nkurunziza arongoye igihugu c'u Burundi kuva mu 2005, ikiringo ca gatatu yasubiye kwitozamwo agatsinda mu 2015 catumye igihugu cinjira mu ndyane za politike, abantu benshi barapfa, abandi ibihumbi amajana bahungira inyuma y'igihugu.

Bwana Guaidó aganira n'abanyamakuru nyuma y'imyigaragambyo yo kwamagana Perezida Maduro yabaye ku wa gatatu Muri uku kwezi kwa mbere, Bwana Guaidó yitangaje nka perezida w'agateganyo wa Venezuela, ako kanya ahita yemerwa na Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Amerika n'ibihugu bimwe byo muri Amerika y'epfo. Ibihugu bikomeye by'Ubusuriya n'Ubushinwa, bishyigikiye Bwana Maduro kandi gushyigikirwa n'igisirikare bibonwa ko ari byo bimufasha kuguma ku butegetsi. Mu nkuru y'igitekerezo cye bwite yanditse mu kinyamakuru The New York Times, Bwana Guaidó agira ati: "Twakoranye inama za rwihishwa n'abo mu gisirikare n'inzego z'umutekano". "Kuba igisirikare cyareka gushyigikira Bwana Maduro ni ingenzi mu gutuma habaho ihindurwa ry'ubutegetsi, kandi benshi muri bo bemera ko ibikorwa by'urugomo biherutse bitakwihanganirwa". Iyi nkuru-gitekerezo ya Bwana Guaidó, inavuga ko abatavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi bemereye imbabazi rusange abasirikare ba Venezuela "batahamwa n'ibyaha byibasiye inyoko muntu". Ariko Bwana Guaidó ntabwo yavuze abo yaganiriye na bo mu gisirikare cya Venezuela cyangwa ngo avuge imyanya y'akazi bakora. Koloneli José Luis Silva, umusirikare mukuru uhagarariye Venezuela mu bya gisirikare muri Amerika, yitandukanyije n'ubutegetsi, ariko abasirikare bakuru muri Venezuela bashyigikiye Bwana Maduro. Kugeza ubu, igirikare cya Venezuela kiracyashyigikiye Bwana Maduro Nk'umukuru w'inteko ishingamategeko ya Venezuela, Bwana Guaidó avuga ko itegekonshinga rimwemerera kuba afashe ubutegetsi mu gihe perezida uriho afatwa nk'uriho mu buryo butemewe n'amategeko. Ariko urukiko rw'ikirenga rwa Venezuela, ruzwiho gukurikiza amabwiriza ya Bwana Maduro, rwategetse ko Bwana Guaidó atemerewe kuva mu gihugu ndetse rutegeka ko imitungo ye yo muri banki ifatirwa. Iyi nkuru-gitekerezo ya Bwana Guaidó yasohotse mu kinyamakuru The New York Times, yatangajwe ku wa gatatu - umunsi watangiyeho n'imyigaragambyo mishya yo kwamagana Bwana Maduro. Ibi birikuba mu gihe Bwana Maduro, wageze ku butegetsi mu mwaka wa 2013, yatangiye manda ye ya kabiri nyuma yo gutangazwa ko yatsinze amatora ataravuzweho rumwe. Bamwe mu bakandida batavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi ntibemerewe kwiyamamaza, abandi na bo barafungwa. Abaturage bagera hafi kuri miliyoni eshatu bamaze guhunga Venezuela mu gihe ubukungu bukomeje kuzahara, kandi ibikorwa by'urugomo byariyongereye mu byumweru bishize bya vuba. Ku wa gatatu, Perezida Donald Trump w'Amerika yatangaje ubutumwa ku rubuga nkoranyambaga rwa Twitter ko yavuganye na Bwana Guaidó ndetse agashyigikira "gufata ubuperezida kw'amateka" kwe. Mu butumwa bwa kabiri yanditse kuri iyi ngingo, Bwana Trump yagize ati: "Urugamba rw'ubwisanzure rwatangiye!" Hagati aho, kuri uyu wa kane byitezwe ko Jeremy Hunt, minisitiri w'ububanyi n'amahanga w'Ubwongereza, aza gushishikariza ibihugu by'umuryango w'ubumwe bw'Uburayi gufatira ibihano abategetsi bamwe bo muri leta ya Bwana Maduro, nyuma yaho na we ku wa gatatu aganiriye na Bwana Guaidó.

Igisata kijejwe imfungurwa n'imiti muri Amerika (FDA) catanze uburenganzira bwo gukoresha uru rucanco rwakorewe muri ico gihugu inyuma y'indwi imwe gusa yemeje urwa Pfizer/BioNTech ruriko ruratangwa mu gihugu. Amerika yaciye yiyemeza kugura doze imiriyoni 200 za Moderna, muri zo imiriyoni zitandatu zishobora kuba ziri aho, zirindiriye gutangwa umwanya n'umwanya. Amerika nico gihugu ca mbere kw'isi gifise ibitigiri binini vy'abanduye n'abamaze guhitanwa na Covid-19. Ishure kaminuza Johns Hopkins risanzwe rikurikiranira hagufi ingene iki kiza karanda cifashe kw'isi rivuga ko muri Amerika abamaze kwandura Covid-19 ari imiriyoni 17.5, ikaba imaze guhitana abarenga 313.500. Umukuru w'ikigo FDA Stephen Hahn avuga ko iyemezwa ry'uru rundi rucanco nijoro ku wa gatanu ari intambwe ikomeye cane mu kurwanya iki kiza karanda gihanze isi. Umukuru w'ico gihugu aherutse gutorwa, Joe biden, yiteze gucandagwa ku wa mbere, avuga ko izi ncanco zibiri Pfizer na Moderna "zitanga umwizero ko imbere ari heza", ariko akagabisha ko "intambara yo kurwanya Covid-19 itararangira". Hari isano hagati ya Pfizer na Moderna? Mw'itangwa rya Moderna bisaba ko ishirwa mu vyuma bikanyisha gushika ku bushuhe bwa degré 20 musi y'ubusa (-20C) - vyumvikana ko ishobora kubikwa muri firigo isanzwe. Ariko Pfizer ni ngombwa ko ishirwa ku bushuhe bungana na degré 75 musi y'ubusa (-75C), ibi bigatuma bitoroha kuyishikana aho itegerezwa gushikanwa. Co kimwe na Pfizer, urucanco rwa Moderna na rwo nyene rukenera ko umuntu aterwa urundi rushinge rugira kabiri kugira rugire inguvu. Kuri Pfizer, umuntu atewe urwa mbere, bisaba imisi 21 kugira aterwe urwa kabiri, ariko kuri Moderna uru rwa kabiri umuntu ategerezwa kurutera haciye imisi 28.

Mu ntangiriro y'ukwezi gushize, Perezida Maduro yavuze ko azaba mu ba mbere bageragerezwaho urwo rukingo Tariki 11 z'uku kwezi kwa munani, Uburusiya ni cyo gihugu cya mbere cyatangaje ko cyageze ku rukingo rwa coronavirus. Gusa inzobere zikemanga ko rwaba rwarakorewe igerageza rikwiriye. Guverinoma ya Venezuela, ikunze guhabwa inkunga n'inguzanyo n'Uburusiya, ivuga ko yifuza kugira uruhare mu igeragezwa ry'urwo rukingo. Ku cyumweru, Bwana Maduro yagize ati: "Mu minsi iri imbere, turaza gusaba abakorerabushake ko baza bagakingirwa." Abahanga muri siyansi mu Burusiya bavuga ko amagerageza y'ibanze y'urukingo yasanze rukora - nubwo kwemeza urukingo ku isi bibaho nyuma y'igerageza rikorwa ku bantu ibihumbi. Uretse Uburusiya, leta ya Venezuela yanamaze kwemera ko yiteguye gufasha mu kugerageza urukingo rw'Ubushinwa hamwe n'urukingo rwa Cuba, inkingo zose z'iki cyorezo. Ubushinwa, Cuba n'Uburusiya ni inshuti za Nicolás Maduro, ukuriye guverinoma yanzwe n'ibihugu birenga 50, birimo Ubwongereza na Amerika, bikemeza mukeba we Juan Guaidó nka perezida w'inzibacyuho. Bwana Guaidó ukuriye inteko ishingamategeko ya Venezuela - urwego rwonyine rugenzurwa n'uruhande rutavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi - yemeje ko ari we perezida w'inzibacyuho mu kwezi kwa mbere 2019 nyuma y'amatora ataravuzweho rumwe yasubije ku butegetsi Bwana Maduro. Bwana Maduro ushyigikiwe n'igisirikare, guverinoma ye yafatiwe ibihano n'amahanga bituma isigara icungira cyane ku nguzanyo z'Uburusiya n'ibindi bihugu isigaranye by'inshuti. Nyuma y'uko Uburusiya bwemeje ko bwabonye urukingo rwa Covid-19, bakarwita Sputnik V, Bwana Maduro yashimiye Uburusiya iyo ntambwe. Tariki 16 z'uku kwezi kwa munani yagize ati: "Uwa mbere uzakingirwa ni njyewe. Ngiye gufata urwo rukingo, ngiye gutanga urugero." Gusa mu ijambo rye ku cyumweru, ntabwo yavuze niba ari mu bakorerabushake ba mbere bazageragerezwaho uru rukingo muri Venezuela. Iki gihugu kimaze gutangaza abantu barenga 46,000 banduye coronavirus n'abarenga 380 imaze kwica, imibare iri hasi ugereranyije n'ibihugu by'akarere kirimo. Abahanga mu buvuzi ariko bavuga ko iyo mibare ishobora kuba iri hasi cyane y'uko ibintu bimeze kuko abaturage ba Venezuela batisuzumisha iki cyorezo batinya kunenwa no gushyirwa mu kato kuko leta yashinje abava mu mahanga kuzana iki cyorezo.

Birtukan Mideska yabaye unenga bikomeye urugaga rw'amashyaka ari ku butegetsi muri Ethiopia, biza no kumuviramo guhunga igihugu Igenwa rya Birtukan Mideksa kuri uwo mwanya, ni ryo rya vuba aha mu ruhererekane rw'abagore bamaze gushingwa imirimo mu myanya ikomeye muri iki gihugu. Madamu Birtukan w'imyaka 45 y'amavuko, yasubiye muri Ethiopia mu ntangiriro y'uku kwezi kwa cumi na kumwe, nyuma yo kumara imyaka irindwi mu buhungiro muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Amerika. Yari umwe mu batavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi babarirwa mu macumi bafunzwe nyuma y'amatora yakemanzwe yabaye mu mwaka wa 2005, yaje kugwamo abantu babarirwa mu magana. Umunyamakuru wa BBC Emmanuel Igunza uri mu murwa mukuru wa Ethiopia, Addis-Abeba, avuga ko Madamu Birtukan afite akazi gakomeye ko gutuma rubanda yongera kugirira icyizere akanama k'amatora kakomeje gushinjwa kuba igikoresho cya leta. Azayobora amatora ateganyijwe kuba mu kwezi kwa gatanu mu mwaka wa 2020. 'Twiteguye impinduka' Nyuma yo kurahirira izi nshingano nshya, Madamu Birtukan yavuze ko kuba yarabaye umucamanza bizamufasha gukemura amakimbirane no kutavuga rumwe bishobora kubaho muri iyi mirimo yashinzwe. Ariko yavuze ko Abanya-Ethiopia bo mu nzego zose bagaragaje ko biteguye impinduka. Yabwiye abanyamakuru ati: "Abaturage ba Ethiopia biteguye gushyiraho inzego zigendera kuri demokarasi bashaka ndetse bakagenzura ibikorwa bya leta. Kandi ibyo babigaragaje bigomwa ibicyenewe [ngo bigerweho]". "Rero nemera ko ukwitegura kwa rubanda ari ikintu cyiza". "Nubwo hakiri byinshi byo gukorwa, turi kubona amavugurura menshi mu nzego za leta mu byerekezo bitandukanye. Ibi ni ibintu byiza". Yongeyeho ko leta ya Ethiopia "yagaragaje ko ishishikajwe na demokarasi y'ukuri, kandi nabyo ni ikindi kintu cyiza". Abiy Ahmed, minisitiri w'intebe wa Ethiopia, yageze ku butegetsi mu kwezi kwa kane uyu mwaka Kuva yagera ku butegetsi mu kwezi kwa kane uyu mwaka, Abiy Ahmed, minisitiri w'intebe wa Ethiopia, amaze gukora amavugurura menshi akomeye. Arimo nk'amasezerano y'amahoro n'igihugu gituranyi cya Eritrea nyuma y'amakimbirane yamaze imyaka 20, gufungura imfungwa za politiki no guha ikaze mu gihugu imitwe yitwaje intwaro yarwanyaga ubutegetsi yabaga mu buhungiro. Bwana Abiy w'imyaka 42 y'amavuko, yanahaye abagore kimwe cya kabiri cy'imyanya 20 y'abagize leta. Kandi mu kwezi gushize kwa cumi, inteko ishingamategeko yatoye Sahle-Work Zewde nka Perezida wa mbere w'umugore w'iki gihugu - umwanya w'umuhango kuko, bijyanye n'itegekonshinga, ububasha bwa politiki bufitwe na minisitiri w'intebe. Mu ntangiriro y'uku kwezi kwa cumi na kumwe, Bwana Abiy yashimwe kubera kugena Meaza Ashenafi nk'umukuru w'urukiko rw'ikirenga wa mbere w'umugore muri iki gihugu. Madamu Ashenafi yamenyekanye cyane nk'umwunganizi mu mategeko warwanyije ishyingirwa ku gahato ry'abakobwa batarageza imyaka y'ubukure. Ibikorwa bye byaje kuvamo igitekerezo cya filime y'Umunyamerikakazi Angelina Jolie, yasohotse mu mwaka wa 2014.

Igihugu ca Australia kiriko kiritegurira kwemeza kugurisha urumogi mu bindi bihugu Ico gihugu kiriko kiritegura gusubiramwo amategeko yaco kugira kimere co kimwe na Canada hamwe n'Ubuholane , ubu ari vyo bihugu vyonyene bishora urumogi mu bindi bihugu. Ibihugu vya Uruguay na Israel na vyo nyene birafise imigambi nk'iyo. Umushikiranganji w'amagara y'abantu muri Australia Greg Hunt yavuze ko iyo ngingo izofasha n'abagwayi bo muri ico gihugu. Ico gihugu cemeje gukoresha urumogi nk'umuti mu mwaka wa 2016 I California batoye itegeko ryemera kunywa urumogi Urumogi rurimwa n'abasirikare mu Butaliyano, rugurishwa mu mategeko muri za farumasi Kunywa urumogi nko kwinezereza, biracabujijwe. "Intumbero yacu iragaragara: Abarimyi n'abafise amahinguriro b'abanye Australia bazoronka akaryo keza ko kuba aba mbere mu kudandaza urumogi rukoreshwa muvyo amagara y'abantu kw'isi," ni ko Hunt yavuze. Amahera azova mu rudandazwa rw'urumogi kw'isi azoba agera ku miriyaridi 55 z'amadolari gushika mu 2025, nk'uko vyaharuwe n'ikompanyi yo muri Amerika ya Grand View Research. Mu ntango y'iyi ndwi, intara ya California yo muri Amerika, yabaye intara ya mbere nini irekuye ko abantu bashobora kunywa urumogi mu ntumbero yo kwinezereza.

Abigeme barafatanye mu nda mu kugira imyiyerekano yo kwiyamiriza ifatwa ku nguvu mw'ijoro ryo ku wa gatanu Yiyemeje gushiraho igipolisi kirwanya amabi akorerwa abakenyezi. Uwo mwigeme w'imyaka 16, yemeza ko yahawe ibiyayuramutwe yagiye kuramutsa umuhungu bakundana ku musi wa gatandatu uheze, kandi ko yikanguye ari mu yindi nzu, akikijwe n'abagabo 30. Abantu amajana n'amajana barihereje amabarabara ku musi wa gatanu basaba ko ifatwa ku nguvu ry'abakenyezi rihagarara. Amasanamu y'iryo fatwa ku nguvu yarashizwe ku mbuga ngurukanabumenyi, bibabaza Brezil yose. Igipolisi kiriko kirarondera abantu barenga 30 bakekwa gukora iryo bara. Imitahe yo kubahagarika yarasohotse harimwo n'uwuwo muhungu bakundana. "Ndateye ivyatsi ifatwa ku nguvu ry'uwo mwigeme i Rio de Janeiro," ni ko Temer yavuze. "Ntivyumvikana ingene mu kinjana ca 21 dushobora kubona ivyaha vy'ubunyamaswa nk'ibi." Yavuze ko abategetsi bariko barakora kugira "bafate ababifisemwo uruhara". Icapa canditse mu giportugal kivuga ngo " Twese turiko turava amaraso" Umukuru w'igipolisi c'i Rio de Janeiro, Fernando Veloso, mu kiganiro yahaye abamenyeshamakru ko abagira amatohoza bazosubiramwo kwihweza neza ibipimo vyo kwa muganga. "Iyo ayo masanamu atashirwa ku mbuga ngurukanabumenyi, ndakeka ko tutaba turi ngaha muri kino gihe," uko ni ko yavuze, yongerako ko abenshi bafatwa ku nguvu ntibimenyekane. Bivugwa ko uko gufatwa ku nguvu kwabereye mu karere kabamwo abantu bakenye mu burengero bw'igisagara ca Rio de Janeiro mu mpera z'indwi iheze.

Bobi Wine, ugaragara hano mbere gato yo kurira indege muri Uganda, avuga ko yakorewe iyicarubozo - ikirego igisirikare cya Uganda gihakana Mbere, Wine yari yangiwe kuva muri Uganda ariko ku wa gatanu yemerewe kurira indege yerekeza muri Amerika. We n'abandi banyapolitiki 32 batavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi bwa Uganda, mu cyumweru gishize bashinjwe ibirego by'ubugambanyi kubera ibirego byo gutera amabuye ku rukurikirane rw'imodoka zitwara Perezida Yoweri Kaguta Museveni wa Uganda. Nyuma yaho Wine yafunguwe by'agatenganyo. Igisirikare cya Uganda gihakana ibirego by'iyicarubozo. Ku wa gatanu, polisi ya Uganda yemeje ko Wine yemerewe kurira indege akava muri Uganda agiye gushaka ubuvuzi bw'umwihariko nyuma yaho leta yohereje itsinda ry'abaganga icyenda ngo bamusuzume. Mu butumwa yanyujije ku rubuga nkoranyambaga rwa Twitter ku wa gatandatu, Wine yemeje ko yageze muri Amerika aho yavuze ko agiye kubona ubuvuzi bw'umwihariko. Yanavuze ko mu gihe kiri imbere azatangaza ibyamubayeho guhera ku itariki ya 13 y'ukwezi kwa munani n'icyo ateganya mu bihe biri imbere. Robert Amsterdam, umwunganizi we mu mategeko, ku wa kane yavuze ko Wine - ubundi izina rye ry'ukuri rikaba ari Robert Kyagulanyi - yari yongeye gutabwa muri yombi ahutajwe ubwo yari ku kibuga cy'indege. Bwana Amsterdam yongeyeho ko ibyo byabaye "nubwo bwose umucamanza yari yamwemereye kongera gukoresha urupapuro rwe rw'inzira kubera ko yari arucyeneye kugira ngo abone uko ava mu gihugu agiye kwivuza."

Ignace Nkaka uzwi nka La Forge Fils Bazeye (ibumoso) na Lt Col Nsekanabo Jean Pierre uzwi nka "Abega" Abo ni Ignace Nkaka uzwi nka La Forge Fils Bazeye wahoze ari umuvugizi w'umutwe wa FDLR na Lt Col Nsekanabo Jean Pierre uzwi nka "Abega" wari ushinzwe ubutasi mu mutwe wa FDLR. Aba bagabo bafatiwe ku mupaka wa Bunagana uhuza Congo na Uganda muri Kivu ya ruguru mu mpera ya 2018. Ubushinjacyaha mu Rwanda buvuga ko bari bavuye i Kampala muri Uganda guhura n'itsinda ryoherejwe n'umutwe RNC ngo banoze umugambi wo gutera u Rwanda. Umunyamakuru wa BBC wari mu rukiko avuga ko inyandikomvugo 40 z'abatangabuhamya zongewe muri dosiye n'ubushinjacyaha, zabaye intandaro yo gusubika urubanza uyu munsi. Bwana Nkaka na Bwana Nsekanabo bari bitabye urukiko bari kumwe n'abunganizi babo. Nsekanabo Jean Pierre uzwi nka "Abega" wari ushinzwe ubutasi muri FDLR Me Nkuba Milton wunganira Nkaka yavuzeko bifuza guhabwa umwanya kugira ngo we n'umukiriya we basuzume ibimenyetso bishya byongewe muri dosiye n'ubushinjacyaha. Ibyo kandi ngo n'urukiko ni ko rwari rwabibonye nk'uko umucamanza yabitangaje. Ibyo bimenyetso bishya ngo birimo inyandikomvugo z'amabazwa y'abatangabuhamya. Me Habimfura Elias wunganira Bwana Nsekanabo na we yabwiye urukiko ko nta gihe gishize atangiye kunganira Nsekanabo, bityo nawe akeneye kwiga ibyo bimenyetso bishya. Uwunganiraga Bwana Nsekanabo mbere Me Beata Mukeshimana yivanye muri uru rubanza kubera icyo yise impamvu ze bwite. Ignace Nkaka uzwi nka LaForge Fils Bazeye wari umuvugizi wa FDLR Ubushinjacyaha bwo bwavuze ko nta bishya biri muri dosiye z'abaregwa, ko ari ububiko bw'ikoranabuhanga bahurizamo dosiye butafungukaga ngo abaregwa n'abunganizi babo babone ibirimo byose kandi ku gihe. Urukiko rwemeje ko urubanza rushyirwa ku itariki ya 10 z'ukwa gatatu. Aba bagabo bombi bararegwa ibyaha birimo iterabwoba, kuba mu mutwe wa gisirikare utemewe no gukorana n'igihugu cy'amahanga hagamijwe kugaba ibitero mu Rwanda.

Suarez yari yabwiwe ko atari mu bakinnyi umutoza mushya wa Barcelona Ronald Koeman akeneye Suarez ntabwo yifuzwa muri Barça ndetse iyi kipe yari yiteguye no kuba yamureka akayivamo ku buntu, icy'ingenzi ari uko atagiye muri imwe mu makipe akomeye. Uyu rutahizamu w'imyaka 33 ukomoka muri Uruguay, yemeye amasezerano arimo kugabanyirizwa umushahara mu ikipe ya Atletico, nyuma yuko gahunda yo kwerekeza muri Juventus idakunze kubera ibibazo bijyanye n'urwandiko rw'inzira (passport). Byatumye umukuru wa Barcelona Josep Maria Bartomeu yari yabaye ahagaritse amasezerano yo kuba Suarez yagenda kuko atashakaga kumugurisha mu ikipe mukeba muri shampiyona ya La Liga. Ariko, nyuma yo kugirana ibiganiro n'abahagarariye Suarez, Barcelona yisubiyeho kuri icyo cyemezo, nyuma yuko uyu rutahizamu akangishije ko ibibazo bye abishyira mu itangazamakuru. Atletico izamugura amafaranga ameze nk'ikimenyetso cy'ishimwe kuri Barcelona atarenze miliyoni 6 z'ama-euro, azashingirwa ku birimo nko guhesha iyo kipe itike yo gukina Champions League. Ku mwaka, Suarez azajya ahembwa kimwe cya kabiri (miliyoni 15 z'ama-euro) cya miliyoni 30 z'ama-euro yahembwaga muri Barcelona. Aya masezerano ashoje igihe cy'imyaka itandatu yari amaze muri Barça, yatsindiye ibitego 198 mu mikino 283 yayikiniye, ndetse aba umwe mu bari ba rutahizamu batatu bayo batinywaga ari kumwe na Lionel Messi na Neymar. Yageze muri Barcelona mu 2014 avuye muri Liverpool aguzwe miliyoni 74 z'amapawundi. Yafashije Barcelona kwegukana ibikombe bine bya shampiyona, ibikombe bine by'umwami (Copa del Rey), igikombe cya Champions League n'icy'isi cy'amakipe y'ama-clubs mu 2015. Aya masezerano yo kwerekeza muri Atletico anashoje kimwe mu bibazo byari bimaze igihe byo kuva mu ikipe kuri iyi mpeshyi, mbere byasaga nkaho uyu mukinnyi bizarangira ageze mu mujyi wa Turin gukinira Juventus. Ariko abakuru ba Juventus bavuga ko ibyo bitakunze kubera igihe byari gufata ngo babonere Suarez 'passport' y'Ubutaliyani.

Urukino rwa kivandimwe rwoyihuje na Afrika y'Epfo muri Zambia kuri uyu wa gatandatu rwahagaritswe bisabwe n'abakunzi ba Chipolopolo Iyo ngingo ifashwe inyuma y'ibitero vyakozwe ku banyamahanga mu gihugu ca Afrika y'Epfo. Abanyagihugu ba Zambia baciye ku mbuga hwaniro barasavye ko iryo shirahamwe FAZ rihagarika urukino hagati ya Chipolopolo na Bafana Bafana nk'ukwerekana akababaro. Umukuru wa FAZ Adrian Kashala yemeje iyo ngingo, yongera ko y'uko urwo rukino rwungururijwe ku rindi genekerezo ritamenyekanye, inyuma y'aho babonaniye n'ishirahamwe ry'umupira w'amaguru muri Afrika y'Epfo, SAFA. Muri uwo mwanya nyene, leta ya Zambia yahanuye abadereva b'amakamyo ko bohagarika ingendo zabo muri Afrika y'Epfo gushika umutekano ugarutse muri ico gihugu. Umushikiranganji w'ukwunguruza abantu n'ibintu, Mutotwe Kafwaya, yasavye abadereva basanzwe bari muri Afrika y'Epfo ko bobika amamodoka yabo ahantu hatekanye gushika umutekano ugarutse. Ivyo bitero ku banyamahanga vyasubiye kwiyongera vyatumye amaduka y'abanyamahanga asahurwa urukombamazi, amamodoka araturirwa, eka n'amakamyo yagendeshwa n'abanyamahanga araterwa. Eka n'ishirahamwe rijejwe iterambere rihuza ibihugu vyo mu karere ka Afrika y'Ubumanuko, SADC, ririyamiriza ivyo bitero. Aciye ku rubuga rwa Twitter, umunyamabanga nshingwabikorwa w'iryo shirahamwe, Stergomena Tax, avuga ko SADC iteye ivyatsi ubwo bukozi bw'ikibi butagira izina bukorerwa abanyamahanga muri Afrika y'Epfo, agasaba ko ico kibazo cotorerwa inyishu irama.

Nelson Chamissa ariko ahiganwa na Thokozani Khupe mu kibanza c'umukuru wa MDC Abashigikiye umukuru w'uwo mugambwe w'infatakibanza, Nelson Chamisa, bateye amabuye abashigikiye icegera ciwe, Thoko Khupe, mu gihe yari mw'ikoraniro mu muji wa Bulawayo. Imiduga y'abo mu mugambwe MDC yononekaye. Iki ni kimwe mu bindi bibazo vyinshi bimaze kuvyuka mu barwanya bwana Chamisa, yashizweho nk'umukuru w'umugambwe nfatakibanza igihe umukuru w'uwo mugambwe Morgan Tsvangirai yitabiye Imana.

Leta ya Kenya ivuga ko idashobora kwihanganira urudandazwa rw'abana Ibi ni nyuma y'itohoza ryakozwe n'igisata ca BBC gikora inkuru z'amatohoza, BBC Africa Eye, cashize ahabona urudandazwa rw'abana bato muri Kenya bibwa abavyeyi babo. Mu cumba cuzuyemwo abanyamakuru baje kwitaba ikiganiro bagenewe, abaserukiye leta ya Kenya bavuze ko ibintu bigomba kwumvikana neza. Bavuze ko abakora ibikorwa vy'urudandazwa rw'abana - yaba ababagura canke ababadandaza - bazohanwa n'amategeko ku buryo bukomeye. Umushikiranganji ajejwe ivy'akazi n'ukurengera abatishoboye, Simon Chelugui, yavuze ko hatanguye itohoza kuri ubwo bugizi bwa nabi. Yemeye ko hari ibikenewe gukosorwa mu nzego zimwe za Kenya zijejwe gukingira abana, yongerako yuko leta idashobora kwihanganira urudandazwa rw'abana. Ikiganiro ca BBC Africa Eye casanze hari imihora myinshi itemewe n'amategeko aho abana bibwa ba nyina baba basanzwe ari ba ntaho n'ikora, bakabagurisha mw'ibarabara ku mahera ahera ku $450. Ariko iryo soko ry'amagendu ntirigarukira ngaho, kuko ikipe ya BBC yabonye ibimenyetso vyerekana ko inzoya zikivuka zigurishwa mu bitaro bitemewe n'amategeko. Raba ikiganiro ca BBC Africa Eye ngaha: Itohoza rya BBC: Ubusuma bw'abana muri Kenya

Mw'ijambo yashikirije ku mboneshakure, Bwana Rouhani avuga ko Irani "izotanga inyishu izobabaza Amerika ku gatotezo kayo". Ubutegetsi bwa Trump buvuga ko ibi bihano bigiye gusubira gufatwa mu rwego rwa ya masezerano Amerika yivumburamwo. Ubwongereza, Ubufaransa n'Ubudagi bivuga ko Amerika ata bubasha ifise bwo gufata ingingo nk'iyi. Ibi bihugu bitatu - co kimwe n'Uburusiya, Ubushinwa na Amerika - vyari muri ya mazeserano vyagiriraniye na Irani mu 2015 mu ntumbero yo guhagarika umugambi wayo wo guhingura ubutare bw'ubumara. Ariko Perezida Donald Trump, umuntu aterekwa aya masezerano yashitsweko ku ntwaro ya Obama, yaruhutse akuyemwo Amerika mu 2018. Ivyo vyatumye Irani ica itangura guhonyanga bimwe mu vyo yari yiyemeje muri aya masezerano, aho yaciye itangura kwimbura ubutare bwa Uranium ku rugero rusumba urwo itagerezwa kurenga. Amerika ivuga ko iki gihugu gikwiye guhanwa, ikavuga ko ibihano vyose vyari vyafashwe n'ishirahamwe ONU bisubira gufatwa, mbere ko n'ibihano vyerekeye ibirwanisho Irani yari yafatiwe bidashobora kuvaho ku wa 18 z'ukwezi kw'icumi nk'uko vyari vyumvikanyweko. Hagati aho, iyi ngingo ya Washington yiyamirijwe bikomeye n'ibihugu vyose bigize akanama gashinzwe umutekano mw'ishirahamwe ONU, mbere uru rwego nta yindi ngingo rwigeze rufata. Ingaruka z'iyi ngingo ntiziratomoka. Ejo ku wa Mungu, itororokanirizo ry'amakuru Reuters ryasubiyemwo umutegetsi mukuru wa Amerika ariko atavuzwe izina, avuga ko uno munsi ku wa mbere Washington ifatira ibihano amashirahamwe n'abantu barenga mirongo ibiri bafise uruhara mu migambi ya Irani ijanye n'uguhingura ubutare bw'ubumara, misire hamwe n'ibindi birwanisho. Irani yavyifashemwo gute? Mw'ijambo ryiwe, Bwana Rouhani yavuze ati: "Amerika iriko yegera ikiringo co gutsindwa kuri ino ngingo ijanye n'ibihano...yitege ko igiye gutsindwa kandi ko n'amakungu azofata ingingo zitazoyishimisha". Mu ntango, umushikiranganji wa Irani ajejwe imigenderanire yavuze ko iyi ngendo ya Amerika ari "impfagusa", akavuga ko iyi "nzira ya Amerika ibangamiye amahoro n'umutekano mpuzamahanga, kandi ko ibangamiye, mu buryo butari bwabeho, ibikorwa vya ONU n'akanama kajejwe umutekano kw'isi". "Irani ishimangira ko mu gihe hogira ico Amerika ikora kijanye n'iri terabwoba, yo nyene ubwayo canke ibicishije ku ncuti zayo, izohura n'ikibazo gikomeye kandi ko ari yo izobazwa ingaruka mbi zayo zose". None amakungu yoyo abifata gute? Ubwongereza n'Ubufaransa, ibihugu bibiri ntayegayezwa mu kanama gashinzwe umutekano mw'ishirahamwe ONU, hamwe n'Ubudagi, bivuga ko iri tangazo rya Washington "ataco rimaze kuko ritajanye n'amategeko" kubera ko Amerika yisunze amasezerano yateye akagere. Mw'itangazo ibi bihugu vyasohoreye hamwe, bivuga biti: "Rero nico gituma ivyemezo n'ibikorwa ivyo ari vyo vyose vyofatwa hisunzwe iyi ngingo ataco vyoba bivuze kuko bitisunze amategeko". "Twaritanze uko dushoboye kwose kugira ngo aya masezerano ku mugambi wa Irani wo guhingura ubutare bw'ubumara yubahirizwe kandi turiyemeje kubandanya". Umushikiranganji w'imigenderanire w'Uburusiya, ikindi gihugu ntayegayezwa mu kanama gashinzwe umutekano mw'ishirahamwe ONU, avuga ati: "Ibikorwa n'ivyemezo vyose bifatwa na Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika bitisunze amategeko ntibishobora kugira ingaruka ku rwego mpuzamahanga ku bindi bihugu". Ku wa gatandatu, umunyamabanga mukuru w'ishirahamwe ONU, António Guterres, yabwiye akanama gashinzwe umutekano ko adashobora gufata icemezo na kimwe kuko "vyotera amakenga" kuri iki kibazo. Ariko, abategetsi ba Amerika bobo babandanya bavuga ko n'aho bavuye muri aya masezerano bagifise uburenganzira bwo gufata ingingo bayisunze. Hari haciye iminsi 30 umushikiranganji wa Amerika ajejwe imigenderanire Mike Pompeo amenyesheje ko ubutegetsi bwayo bwariko burihweza ingene bwofata ibi bihano. Mw'itangazo yasohoye ku mugoroba wo ku wa gatandatu, Pompeo yavuze ko mu minsi iri imbere ibihugu bitazoba biriko birashira mu ngiro ibi bihano bizofatirwa ingingo, ariko nta nsiguro yatanze. Imaze kwivumbura muri aya masezerano, Amerika yongeye gufatira ibihano igihugu ca Irani, ivyatumye ubutunzi bw'iki gihugu busubira inyuma mu gihe n'igiciro c'ibitoro cagabanutse, kandi gisanzwe carasinzikajwe n'ikiza karanda ca Covid-19. Amerika yatangaje iyi ngingo mu gihe hasigaye hafi indwi zitandatu ngo habe amatora y'umukuru w'igihugu. Perezida Trump ahanganye n'umukeba wiwe wo mu mugambwe w'aba Democrates Joe Biden wewe yemereye abanyamerika ko azosubiza igihugu cabo muri ayo masezerano.

Uwahoze ari prezida wa Zimbabwe Robert Mugabe yaragiye gutora mu kwezi kw'indwi ari kumwe n'umupfasoni wiwe Grace (i bubamfu) Yongeyeko ko Mugabe ariko aravurirwa muri Singapuru ingwara itamenyeshejwe ubu haraciye amezi abiri. Uwo yahoze ari umukuru w'igihugu kandi yaragize ingendo nyinshi zo kwivuza muri ico gihugu mu misi ya nyuma y'ubutegetsi bwiwe. Mnangagwa yabaye umukuru w'igihugu haraciye umwaka inyuma y'aho Mugabe akuriwe ku butegetsi n'igisirikare. Gushika ico gihe, Mugabe yari amaze ku butegetsi imyaka 37, ubwa mbere ari umushikiranganji wa mbere, hanyuma aba umukuru w'igihugu. Ni we yari arongoye umuhari waharanira ukwishira n'ukwizana kwa Zimbabwe yatwarwa n'abazungu bari ku rushi. Prezida Emmerson Mnangagwa yabwiye abayoboke biwe ko uwo yasubiriye ashobora gutahuka mu ndwi iza Prezida Mnangagwa yariko arashikiriza ijambo abamushigikiye mu karere uwo yasubiriye avukamwo aho yavuga ivyerekeye amagara ya Mugabe. Itororokanirizo ry'amakuru rya AFP ryamusubiyemwo avuga ati:"Ubu arashaje. Muvyo ukuri ntagishoboye gutambuka, ico cose azosaba tuzogitanga." Igihe Mugabe yari ku butegetsi, abategetsi bavuga ko yariko aravurwa amaso, bahakana inkuru zavuga ko agwaye kansere. Uretse kudashobora gutambuka, Mnangagwa yavuze ko uwo yahoze arongoye Zimbabwe ameze neza kandi ko ashobora gutahuka mu ndwi iza. Nk'uko AFP ivyandika, prezida yongeyeko ko "Turiko turamwitaho. Ni we muvyeyi yashinze iki gihugu ca Zimbabwe. Ni we muvyeyi yazanye ukwishira n'ukwizana kwa Zimbabwe." Reta ni yo ivuza Mugabe. Inyuma yo kumusubirira mu mwaka uheze, Mnangagwa yaratsinze amatora yagiyemwo impari nyinshi mu kwezi kw'indwi.

Stella Nyanzi avuga ko n'icyaha cya kabiri bamugizeho umwere yifuzaga ko kimuhama Madamu Nyanzi aregwa ibyaha bibiri; gutukanira kuri murandasi no kwibasira umuntu mu itumanaho, iki cya nyuma ntabwo kimuhama. Umunyamakuru wa BBC i Kampala avuga ko nyuma yo gusoma uyu mwanzuro, Stella Nyanzi wari kumwe n'abantu bamushyigikiye, yavuze ko atazabogoza cyangwa ngo atakambe ngo adafungwa. Yavuze ko abana be badakwiye kubana n'umubyeyi utegekwa kwicara agaceceka imbere yo kurenganywa mu gihugu, ko yiteguye guhara ubwo bubyeyi agahangana n'umunyagitugu. Mu magambo akomeye, yavuze ko yifuzaga ko na kiriya cyaha cya kabiri kimuhama kuko mu by'ukuri yabikoze agamije kwibasira Perezida Museveni. Mu kwezi kwa cyenda 2018, Stella Nyanzi yashyize umuvugo kuri Facebook, urimo amagambo y'urukozasoni kuri Perezida Museveni na nyina - wapfuye -, aho yavuze ko yifuza ko Museveni yakabaye yarapfuye ari kuvuka. Umucamanza yavuze ko ibyo Madamu Nyanzi yanditse, akavuga kenshi mu mvugo mbi imyanya y'ibanga ya nyina wa Perezida Museveni, ari ibintu bihabanye n'ubumuntu, biteye isoni, kandi bigayitse. Madamu Nyanzi yanze gusaba gufungurwa by'agateganyo, ubu amaze amezi umunani afunze. Muri Uganda, madamu Nyanzi amaze kuba umuntu uzwi cyane mu gukoresha imvugo ikomeye arwanya ubutegetsi yita bubi. Yari yarigeze gufungwa mbere nabwo azira kwanditse kuri Facebook, aho yise Perezida Museveni "akabuno". N'ubu aracyakurikiranyweho icyo cyaha. Madamu Nyanzi ni umwarimu akaba n'umushakashatsi, mbere y'ibi yari umwarimu muri kaminuza ya Makerere.

Ibendera ry'u Rwanda Radio Rwanda yatangaje ko yasimbuwe na Anastase Murekezi wari Minisitiri w'abakozi ba leta. Habumuremyi ukomoka mu ishyaka FPR yari amaze imyaka 3 kuri ako kazi. Ku rubuga rwe rwa twitter, Habumuremyi yashimiye Perezida Kagame kubera icyizere yamugiriye.

Manirambona Benjamin ntarekuriwe kwigisha canke gukora akazi ka leta mu kiringo c'imyaka 10 Umushikirizamanza yari yagirije ivyaha bitatu uwo muyobozi, harimwo n'ico gukora impapuro z'impimbano sentare yamuhanaguyeko. Ntiyigeze ahakana ivyaha yaregwa kiretse ico gukora impapuro z'impimbano z'uwo yariko arakorera ikibazo, Simbananiye Firmin, ari kurangurira ubutumwa mu gihugu ca Somalia. Abandi babiri, Nkurunziza Eric (hagati) na Nihezagire Lazard (i bubamfu) bahamwe n'ivyaha vyo gukingira ikibaba Manirakiza Benjamin Yahanishijwe igihano co gupfungwa imyaka itanu no kudakora akazi mu kiringo c'imyaka cumi. Abandi babiri, Nkurunziza Eric na Nihezagire Lazard, bahamwe n'ivyaha vyo gukingira ikibaba Manirakiza Benjamin, ivyaha ariko bobo bahakana. Bahanishijwe umunyororo w'imyaka 2 no kudakora akazi mu kiringo c'imyaka itanu. Gufatanwa itonga Benjamin Manirambona yafashwe ku wa gatanu w'indwi iheze, yambaye impuzu ziranga abanyeshure, ariko arakora ikibazo gitanga uburenganzira bwo kwinjira muri kaminuza. Benjamin Manirambona yafashwe kuwa gatanu yambaye impuzu z'ishure Umushikiranganji w'indero Janviere Ndirahisha yari yishikiye kw'ishure rya Lycee du Lac Tanganyika ayo yafatiwe, yari yavuze ko ivyo yakoze ategerezwa kubihanirwa.

Abo bana bavukiye ibyumweru 30 Ariko aba bana icyenda ba Halima Cissé bazacyenera gukomeza gukurikiranwa mu yandi mezi abiri mu bitaro Ain Borja byo mu mujyi wa Casablanca muri Maroc, nkuko umuvugizi wabyo Abdelkoddous Hafsi yabivuze. Yongeyeho ko aba bakobwa batanu n'abahungu bane barimo kugaburirwa binyuze mu muyoboro (tube) wo kwa muganga ndetse ko ibiro byabo byiyongereye "cyane". Bavuka, aba bana bapimaga hagati ya 500g na 1kg. Uwo muvugizi w'ibitaro yavuze ko ubu bapima hagati ya 800g na 1.4kg. Mbere y'aba bana, habayeho abandi bagore babiri gusa bazwi ko babyaye abana icyenda - ariko nta n'umwe muri abo bana warengeje iminsi micye akiriho. Umugore wabyaye abana umunani mu 2009 muri Amerika, ubu ni we ufite umuhigo w'isi wa Guinness World Record wo kubyara abana benshi icyarimwe bagakomeza kubaho.

Amapingu y'abaregwa ubwo baheruka mu rukiko rwa Kagarama muri Kicukiro mu kwezi gushize kwa karindwi Uwunganira abaregwa bamaze ukwezi kurenga bafunze yari yatanze ikirego asaba ko barekurwa, atanga impamvu avuga ko zerekana ko bafunze binyuranyije n'amategeko. Ikibazo cy'aba banyakenya cyaravuzwe cyane mu Rwanda no muri Kenya nyuma y'uko inama bari batumije muri Kigali Convention Centre ihuruje imbaga ariko ntibe kubera ibyo abategetsi n'abatumiwe bise 'ubutekamutwe'. Ejo kuwa kane, mu gusoma umwanzuro ku kirego cy'uruhande rw'abaregwa -cyaburanishijwe mu ntangiriro z'iki cyumweru - abaregwa nta n'umwe wagaragaye mu rukiko. Umucamanza yavuze ko nta mpamvu zumvikana zatanzwe n'abaregwa zatuma barekurwa by'agateganyo. Yavuze ko impamvu batanze basaba kurekurwa by'agateganyo ari nazo bari bagaragaje mu kuburana ifunga n'ifungurwa ry'agateganyo kandi icyo gihe zafashweho umwanzuro. Abaregwa bari babwiye urukiko ko badakwiye gufatwa nk'abatekamitwe kandi bagaragaza ibimenyetso by'uko bari bishyuye aho amahugurwa yagombaga gutangirwa kandi bakaba barafashwe bitegura kuyatangiza . Umucamanza yashimangiye ibyavuzwe n'ubushinjacyaha ko kwishyura aho yari kubera (Kigali Convention Centre) bwari uburyo bwo kwereka abahamagawe ko amahugurwa ahari koko kugira ngo nabo bishyure. Ku ngingo y'abaregwa ko urubanza rwabo rutihutishijwe nk'uko biteganywa n'itegeko, umucamanza yavuze ko bitashobotse kuko iperereza ryari ritararangira. Abaregwa bibazaga impamvu bafunze ari bane kandi harabajijwe abantu 14, umucamanza yavuze ko ubushinjacyaha bukurikirana uwo bufitiye ibimenyetso bimushinja. Abaregwa biteganyijwe ko bazaburanishwa mu mizi tariki 03 z'ukwezi gutaha kwa cyenda. Charles Kinuthia uri ku isonga mu baregwa, abanyakenya babiri n'undi munyarwanda umwe bafunze baregwa gukoresha inama itemewe n'ubushukanyi bugamije gutwara iby'abandi. Ibyaha abaregwa bahakana.

Umutekano warakomejwe ku ngoro y'amakoraniro ya Amerika Capitol inyuma y'igitero co mu ndwi iheze cahitanye ubuzima bw'abantu batanu Hari amakuru avuga ko imirwi yitwaje ibirwanisho ishobora guhurira ku ngoro z'amakoraniro, Capitol, mu mareta yose 50 hamwe n'i Washington DC imbere y'ibirori vyo kurahira bitegekanijwe ku wa 20 z'uku kwa mbere. Ubu bwoba buje mu gihe hariko hafatwa ingingo ruhasha zo gucungera ibi birori. Ejo ku wa mbere, Biden yabwiye abanyamakuru ko ata bwoba afise bwo kurahirira hanze y'ingoro ya Capitol. Joe Biden na Kamala Harris bompi bitezwe kurahira hanze y'iyi nyubakwa, inyuma y'indwi zibiri gusa iyi ngoro habaye igitero c'abanywanyi ba Perezida Donald Trump biyamiriza ivyavuye mu matora. Inzego zijejwe umutekano zariyemeje ko ata gitero nk'icabaye ku wa 06 z'uku kwa mbere kizosubira - aho ibihumbi n'ibihumbi vy'abanywanyi ba Trump binjira ku nguvu muri iyo ngoro yari ikoraniyemwo abashingamateka n'abakenguzamateka kugira bemeze ivyavuye mu matora. Chad Wolf, umukuru mfatakibanza w'igisata kijejwe umutekano yategetse ko inzego zijejwe igendereza zitangura ibikorwa bidasanzwe vyo gucungera umutekano hasigaye iminsi itandatu ngo ivyo birori bibe, "zisunze ivyabaye mu ndwi iheze". Abategetsi bavuga ko ingabo z'igihugu (Garde Nationale) 15.000 ari zo zishobora gutegurwa kugira ngo zicungere iki gikorwa. Ku mugoroba w'ejo ku wa mbere, Wolf yabaye uwundi mushikiranganji wa reta ya Trump atanze imihoho kuva hadutse akaguma kuri Capitol, akaba yakurikiye abandi babiri Betsy DeVos na Elaine Chao. Itanga ry'imihoho ryiwe ryateye ibibazo igisata yahora arongoye mu gihe kiriko kiriga ingene gikomeza umutekano w'irahira rya Biden. Mu ndwi iheze, Wolf yari yasavye Perezida Trump "kwiyamiriza bikomeye" iyo migumuko yabereye kuri Capitol. Wolf avuga ko ingingo yo gutanga imihoho yayifashe kubera "ibiherutse kuba", harimwo n'ingingo zagiye zifatwa na sentare zirwanya igenwa ryiwe. None ni iyihe migumuko yindi itegekanijwe? Abajejwe umutekano mu gihugu bavuga ko bariko bariga neza imigumuko ishobora kuba iriko irategurwa mu misi y'imbere y'uko Joe Biden ashikirizwa ubutegetsi. Inyandiko zicishwa ku mbuga ngurukanabumenyi n'imirwi y'abashigikiye Trump zibandanya zihamagarira imyiyerekano ku matariki atari make, harimwo n'ibitero vy'inkoho ku bisagara bitandukanye mu gihugu ku wa 17 z'uku kwa mbere, hamwe rero n'imytiyerekano i Washington DC ku musi nyezina w'irahira. Ikinyamakuru c'ikigo FBI, casubiwemwo n'ikinyamakuru ABC News hamwe n'ibindi binyamakuru, kiragabisha ko hari umurwi utegura "ibitero" ku nyubakwa z'amasentare ku rwego rw'uturere, rw'amareta n'igihugu, mu gihugu cose, mu gihe Trump yobogozwa imbere y'irahira rya Biden, hamwe no ku musi nyezina w'irahira mu gihe atobogozwa. Mu misi yakurikiye imigumuko yo mu ndwi iheze, abatari bake bo mu mugambwe w'abaharanira demokarasi (Democrats) hamwe na bamwe mu ba Repubulika babandanya basaba ko Trump atanga imihoho, canke akirukanwa ku butegetsi, canke akabogozwa n'inama nshingamateka na nkenguzamateka. Inzego zijejwe umutekano w'igihugu zategetse inzego z'igiporisi z'uturere gukomeza umutekano ku nyubakwa nyobozi inyuma y'akaguma k'indwi iheze, nk'uko bivugwa n'ibinyamakuru vya Amerika. Itororokanirizo ry'amakuru Reuters risubiramwo umutegetsi wo mu nzego z'umutekano w'igihugu avuga ko FBI yamaze kugabisha amareta yose ko yorikanura kuva ku wa 16 gushika ku wa 20 z'uku kwa mbere, hamwe na Washington DC n'imiburiburi imisi itatu imbere y'umusi w'irahira. N'aho havuzwe cane ivyabereye kuri iyi ngoro nkuru y'igihugu yonyene mu ndwi iheze, hari n'iyindi migumuko isa n'iyo yabaye mu tundi turere tw'igihugu muri ico gihe nyene. Umutekano uteguwe gute ku musi w'irahira? Ubunyamabanga bujejwe umutekano muri Reta Zunze Ubumwe z'Amerika buvuga ko buzotangura ibikorwa vy'umutekano bidasanzwe vy'igihugu (NSSE) kuva ejo ku wa gatatatu hasigaye imisi itandatu ngo ibirori bibe. Muri ibi bikorwa, inzego zitandukanye zijejwe umutekano zizokorera hamwe mu gushira mu ngiro ingingo zidasanzwe z'ugucungera umutekano, nko kuzibira amayira no gukingira akarere kazoberamwo ibirori. Iri tangazo rije inyuma y'aho umukuru w'igisagara ca Washington DC, Muriel Elizabeth Bowser, asabiye ko umutekano wokomezwa inyuma y'ico yise "igitero c'iterabwoba kitari bwabeho" kuri, Capitol, mu ndwi iheze. Asaba kandi n'Abanyamerika kwirinda ingendo i Washington DC mu ntumbero yo kwubahiriza umutekano w'ibi birori. Kuva kera, ibirori vyo kurahira vyari bisanzwe bikoranya ibihumbi amajama n'amajana mu mabarabara y'umugwa mukuru, ariko ikiza karanda ca coronavirus cari caramaze kubuza aya mahirwe imbere y'uko hanaduka n'ikibazo c'umutekano. Umukuru w'ibiro bijejwe umutekano w'igihugu, Jenerali Daniel Hokanson, avuga ko abasirikare 10.000 bazoba bamaze gushikanwa i Washington DC gushika mu mpera z'iyi ndwi, kandi ko n'abandi 5.000 bashobora kurungikwa mu burere mu gihe ababurongoye bobisaba. Mu bindi bisa n'ibi, ikigo kijejwe ibigo vy'amaratiro (National Park Service) gitangaza ko cugaye icibutso ca Washington inyuma y'aho kironkeye "amakuru yo kwizera" ku hashobora kwaduka akandi kaguma. Mw'itangazo ico kigo casohoye ejo ku wa mbere, kivuga kiti: "Imirwi yateye imigumuko yo ku wa 06 z'ukwa mbere kuri Capitol ibandanya igabisha ko izovyonga ibirori vy'irahira bigira 59 bitegekanijwe ku wa 20 z'ukwa mbere". Yongera ko y'uko hari n'ibindi bigo vy'ivyibutso bishobora kwugarwa .
