Mw'ijambo ryiwe yashikirije igihe yariko ahabwa urucanco rugira kabiri rwa Covid-19, Joe Biden yavuze ko "ata bwoba" afise bwo kurahira hanze y'iyo nyubakwa n'aho hari ubwoba bw'uko umutekano ushobora guhungabanywa. Mu gihe yariko ahabwa urucanco rugira kabiri rwa Covidi, Biden avuga ko yamaze kuvugana na bamwe mu bakenguzamateka ku bijanye n'ingingo yo kubogoza Donald Trump Abajejwe gutegura ibirori vy'irahira ryiwe batangaza ko ivyo birori bizoba bishingiye ku civuga ngo "Amerika yunze Ubumwe". Ahejeje kurahira nk'umukuru w'igihugu, bitegekanijwe ko azokwifatanya n'abandi bahoze barongoye ico gihugu, Barack Obama, George W Bush na Bill Clinton, mu birori vyo gushira urugori rw'amashurwe mu kibanza categuwe, kugira ngo bafashe gushimangira ubutumwa bwiwe bw'ubumwe. Donald Trump yaramaze gutangaza ko atazokwitabira ivyo birori - akaba azoba abaye umukuru w'ico gihugu wa mbere atitabiriye ivyo birori inyuma y'imyaka irenga 150.

Uganda (yambaye umuhondo) mu mukino na Djibouti wa kimwe cya kabiri Mu mikino ya ½ yabaye ku cyumweru, Uganda yasezereye biyigoye Djibouti iyitsinze igitego 1 - 0, igitego cyabonetse ku munota wa 90 w'umukino gitsinzwe na Oscar Mawa. Uyu mukinnyi akaba ari we umaze gutsinda ibitego byinshi muri iri rushanwa, amaze kwinjiza ibitego 6. Oscar Mawa wa Uganda amaze gutsinda ibitego 6 muri iri rushanwa rya CECAFA y'abatarengeje imyaka 17 Nyuma y'uwo mukino, umutoza wa Uganda Hamza Lutalo yavuze ko Djibouti yabahaye akazi katoroshye mu buryo batari babyiteze. Yagize ati: "Djibouti batugoye cyane. Ni ibintu tutari twiteze kuko barahindutse cyane. Ubushize ubwo twakiniraga muri Tanzania twari twabatsinze ibitego 8-0, ariko ubu barakina birundiye inyuma cyane". "Abakinnyi banjye bagize igihunga gikomeye bidusaba guhindura imikinire kuko byabaye ngombwa ko dukina imipira miremire kuko Djibouti batavaga inyuma". Serengeti Boys ya Tanzania yishimira igitego yatsinze Ethiopia Mu mukino wundi wa ½ , Serengeti Boys ya Tanzania yasezereye Ethiopia kuri za penaliti 4 - 3. Iminota 90 y'umukino yari yarangiye amakipe yombi atsindanye igitego 1 - 1. Umutoza wa Tanzania Maalim Swalehe avuga ko ari umukino utaboroheye na gato. Ati: "Umukino wa ½ ni wo wari ingenzi kurenza ibindi byose. Twari twawiteguye cyane kuko twari tuzi ko ari wo utugeza mu mikino ya nyuma y'igikombe cya Afurika. Ni nayo yari intego ya Tanzania". "Mu gice cya mbere twakinnye neza. Ethiopia twari tuzi neza ubushobozi bwabo uko buhagaze n'aho bafite imbaraga nkeya. Icyo twakoze ni ukubabuza gukina, cyane cyane mu gice cya mbere". Ikipe ya Ethiopia yasezerewe bigoranye kuri za penaliti U Rwanda rwavuyemo rugikubita Tanzania ni yo yari yabaye iya mbere mu itsinda ryarimo n'u Rwanda na Djibouti. Ikipe y'u Rwanda Amavubi yasezerewe mu mikino yo mu matsinda kuko yarangije ifite inota 1. Yanganyije na Djibouti 0 - 0 mu gihe Djibouti yarangije ifite amanota 2 kuko mu wundi mukino yanganyije na Tanzania 1 - 1. Imikino iraba nta bafana bari ku kibuga mu rwego rwo kwirinda ikwirakwizwa ry'icyorezo cya coronavirus. Umukino wa nyuma uteganyijwe ejo ku wa kabiri hagati ya Uganda na Serengeti Boys, zombi zarangije kubona itike yo kuzakina imikino ya nyuma y'igikombe cy'Afurika izabera mu gihugu cya Maroc mu mwaka utaha wa 2021.

Ibitero by'inzige bimaze igihe bitangajwe muri leta nyinshi zo mu Buhinde. (Ifoto yo mu bubiko) Abanyamakuru bari yo bavuga ko ari bwo bwa mbere ako karere ka Gurgaon (cyangwa Gurugram) kibasiwe n'igitero cy'inzige. Amashusho yo ku mbuga nkoranyambaga agaragaza udukoko tubarirwa mu bihumbi tuguruka hejuru y'inzu tukagwa ku bisenge. Ubuhinde bwugarijwe n'igitero cy'inzige cya mbere kibi cyane kibayeho mu myaka ibarirwa muri za mirongo ishize. Bivugwa ko izo nzige zaturutse mu karere ko mu ihembe ry'Afurika - izo na zo zikomotse muri Yemen. Ubu zimaze kurya ibihingwa muri leta nyinshi mu zigize Ubuhinde. Ejo ku wa gatandatu, Gopal Rai, Minisitiri w'ibidukikije i Delhi, yasabye abategetsi b'uturere two mu majyepfo no mu burengerazuba bw'uwo mujyi kuguma bari maso cyane, nkuko bitangazwa n'ikinyamakuru Times of India. Abatuye mu karere ka Gurgaon basabwe guteza urusaku rwinshi bakubita ku bikoresho birangira nk'amasafuriya cyangwa ingoma mu kwirukana izo nzige. Ibiro ntaramakuru ANI bitangaza ko abapilote bava cyangwa berekeza ku kibuga mpuzamahanga cy'indege cya Delhi, gihana imbibi n'akarere ka Gurgaon, basabwe kwigengesera kurushaho. KL Gurjar, umutegetsi ukora muri minisiteri y'ubuhinzi, yavuze ko bisa nkaho izo nzige ziri kwerekeza mu mujyi wa Palwal uri mu majyepfo ya Delhi. Mu gihe zidahagaritswe, izi nzige zo mu butayu zangiza imyaka mu mirima zikaba zishobora guteza inzara. Nkuko bitangazwa n'umuryango w'abibumbye (ONU/UN), izi nzige ziriho ubu zaturutse mu gihe cy'imiyaga myinshi yo mu mwaka wa 2018-2019, yateje imvura nyinshi mu karere k'umwigimbakirwa wo mu Barabu (Arabian Peninsula). ONU ivuga ko ibyo byatumye habaho nibura imiryango itatu y'inzige "yakuze mu buryo budasanzwe" ntibimenyekane. Izo nzige ubu zimaze kugera mu bice bimwe by'Afurika y'uburasirazuba, mu karere k'uburasirazuba bwo hagati no muri Aziya y'amajyepfo.

Umusigiti wasambuwe n'abasirikare ba leta ahitwa Nanduadua muri Mozambique, nyuma y'igitero c'abakekwa kuba ari abarwanyi ba ki Islam mu kwezi kwa gatatu 2018 Harabaye n'imiburiburi ibitero vyoza bishika 50 bikekwa ko vyagizwe n'imigwi yitwaza idini rya Islam mu buraruko bwa Mozambique kuva mu kwezi kwa cumi mu 2017. Abantu mirongo icenda barabuze ubuzima muri ubwo bwicanyi, iyindi miryango irenga 1.000 ita izabo. Igipolisi ca Tanzania kivuga ko abo bantu bahagaritswe mu bikorwa vy'isaka mu bumanuko no mu buseruko bw'ico gihugu. Bavuga ko abo bafashwe bemera ko bari bagiye muri Mozambique kuja mu migwi y'intagondwa. Akarere ka Mozambique gahana urubibe na Tanzania, Cabo Delagado, karangwamwo ubwicanyi muri iyi myaka ibiri iheze. Umugwi uri inyuma w'ivyo bitero nturigera uvyemera mw'itangazo ko ari wo ubikora. Abantu baba muri ako karere kasinzikaye bavuga ko ababifisemwo uruhara hamwo abo mu buseruko no hagatimuri Afrika, kandi baguma bategeka abanyagihugu gukurikiza Sharia. Reta ya Mozambique ivuga ko izohana yihanukiriye abari inyuma y'ivyo bitero, mu karere kegereye ahari ubutare bwa gaze bwinshi cane kw'isi.

Muri aya masezerano, ikipe ya Paris Saint-Germain, izajya yamamaza ibirango bya 'Visit Rwanda' ku kibuga cyayo Parc des Princes no ku myenda y'abakinnyi b'ikipe yayo y'abagore. Ikigo cya RDB kivuga ko kuri sitade ya Parc des Princes hazajya hacuruzwa icyayi n'ikawa by'u Rwanda guhera mu mwaka utaha w'imikino. Ntabwo impande zombi zatangaje igiciro cy'aya masezerano y'imyaka itatu. Ikipe ya Paris Saint-Germain yagaragaje videwo abakinnyi bayo nka Neymar, Kylian Mbappé, Marco Verratti n'abandi, bamamaza ubukerarugendo bw'u Rwanda. Ibihugu bimwe na bimwe, kompanyi z'indege, ibigo by'ubucuruzi n'inganda byishyura za miliyoni z'amadorari amakipe akomeye ku isi kugira ngo byamamaze ibikorwa bikora. Mu kwezi kwa gatanu mu 2018, u Rwanda rwasinye amasezerano yo kwamamaza ubukerarugendo bwarwo n'ikipe ya Arsenal yo mu Bwongereza. Aya masezerano bivugwa ko leta y'u Rwanda yishyuye miliyoni 30 z'amadorari. Impande zombi ntacyo zavuze kuri iki giciro. Amwe mu mashyaka atavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda avuga ko aya masezerano ataciye mu mucyo kuko Abanyarwanda cyangwa Inteko ishinga amategeko ibahagarariwe itamurikiwe ibyo guverinoma yayatanzeho. Hari na bamwe bibaza niba amasezerano nk'ayo ari mu by'ingenzi by'ibanze Abanyarwanda bacyeneye, gusa kuri iki leta yavuze ko umusaruro uyavamo ugaruka ugacyemura ibyo bibazo by'ibanze. Abakinnyi bo mu ikipe ya mbere ya PSG n'abakinnyi bakomeye bayikinnyemo bazasura u Rwanda kugira ngo bakangurire abafana b'iyi kipe barenga miliyoni 70 kumenya no gusura u Rwanda, nk'uko ikigo RDB kibivuga. Itangazo ryasohowe na RDB rivuga ko i Paris naho hazajya habera "Semaine du Rwanda à Paris", igikorwa kigamije guteza imbere ibikorerwa mu Rwanda aho mu mahanga. Iyi kipe y'i Paris nayo ngo izateza imbere umupira w'amaguru mu Rwanda muri gahunda zo gutoza abakiri bato n'abatoza.

Herman Julian akinira ikipe ya Embrace the World yo muri Leta Zune Ubumwe za Amerika Ni urugendo rw'ibirometero 200 guturuka mu mujyi wa Huye rusorezwa mu mujyi wa Musanze mu majyaruguru y'u Rwanda. Yasizeho amasegonda 7 gusa Lozano Riba David wo mu ikipe ya Team Novo Nordisk nayo yo muri Amerika waje ku mwanya wa kabiri. Gusa ariko ntiyashoboye kugabanya ibihe bimaze gukoreshwa n'Umunyarwanda Samuel Mugisha, kugeza ubu ukiyoboye iryo siganwa. Mugisha Samuel niwe akiyoboye itsinda Ku rutonde rw'agateganyo, Samuel Mugisha aracyarusha amasegonda 21 uwa kabiri ariwe Uwizeye Jean Claude nawe wo mu Rwanda. Ku munsi w'ejo abasiganwa bazahaguruka i Musanze berekeze mu mujyi wa Karongi, ni urugendo rw'ibirometero 135.

Johnny Clegg yatabarutse ku myaka 66 Uyu mugabo bakundaga kumwita 'white Zulu', azwi cyane kubera muzika ye yarwanyaga politiki y'ivangura ya apartheid mu bihe byari bigoye kuririmba iyo ngingo. Ronny Quinn wari umaze imyaka myinshi ahagarariye ibikorwa bye bya muzika ni we watangaje urupfu rwa Jonny. Yavuze ko Johnny azakomeza kwibukwa n'umuntu wese w'Umunyafurika. Ubutumwa bw'akababaro no kwihanganisha umuryango we bwakomeje kwisukiranya kuri uyu mugabo wakoze muzika yamagana ivanguramoko ryakorwaga n'abazungu nawe ari umuzungu. BBC Gahuzamiryango yibutse Johnny Clegg yaryamiye ukuboko kw'abagabo kuwa kabiri Johnny yaririmbye mu mihango yo guherekeza umukambwe Nelson Mandela. Johnny yabashije kwiga kuvuga no kuririmba mu rurimi rw'iki-Zulu, umuziki we uramamara cyane mu Banyafurika y'Epfo ndetse no mu bantu benshi muri Afurika. Johnny asize umugore we bari bamaranye imyaka 31 n'abahungu babiri Jesse na Jaron. Indirimbo ze nka 'Asimbonanga' (yaririmbanye na Savuka), 'Scatterings of Africa', 'Africa', 'Ibhola lethu' n'izindi zizakomeza kwibuka ibihe byose.

Prisca Akoth, umugore ucuruza amafi yokeje i Nairobi muri Kenya agaragaza ko ingamba zo guhagarika ibikorwa byose kuva saa moya z'ijoro ziri gutuma imibereho ye igorana Iyi nkuru itari nziza iravugwa n'ubushakashatsi bwa UN ku ngaruka z'iki cyorezo ku bukungu n'imibereho y'abantu. Buzaba ari ubwa mbere ubukene bwiyongereye ku isi kuri iki kigero kuva mu myaka 30 ishize nk'uko raporo ya UN ibivuga. Iyi raporo itangajwe mu gihe hategurwa inama za Banki y'isi, ikigega mpuzamahanga cy'imari (IMF) n'inama y'abaminisitiri b'imari b'ibihugu bigize umuryango wa G20 izaba mu cyumweru gitaha. Iyi raporo ya UN yanditswe n'abahanga mu bushakashatsi bo muri kaminuza za King's College London na Australian National University (ANU). Christopher Hoy wo muri ANU yagize ati: "Akaga k'ubukungu gashobora kuzaba gakomeye kurusha akaga kariho ubu mu by'ubuzima". Iyi raporo iteganya ko imibare y'abakene ku isi iziyongera ku kigereranyo kiri hagati y'abantu miliyoni 400 na 600. Ikavuga ko izo ngaruka ari ikibazo gikomeye ku ntego z'iterambere rirambye (SDGs) zigamije guca ubukene kugeza nibura mu 2030. Abahanga bavuga ko iki cyorezo kizajya kurangira ku isi bishoboka ko kimwe cya kabiri cy'abantu miliyari 7,8 bayituye bazaba bari mu bukene. Iyi raporo ivuga ko 40% by'abakene bashya bashobora kuzaba bari mu bice bya Aziya y'Epfo na Pasifika, naho abagera kuri kimwe cya gatatu bari muri Afurika yo munsi ya Sahara na Aziya y'efo. Mu ntangiriro z'iki cyumweru, imiryango irenga 100 ku isi yasabye ko ibihugu biri mu nzira y'amajyambere bikurirwaho amadeni bifite. Ibi ngo bikaba byafasha ibyo bihugu kubona miliyari $25 yafasha ubukungu bwabyo muri ibi bihe.

Bobi Wine avuga ko abanyagitugu kubakuraho bisaba kwigomeka Wine - izina rye ry'ukuri rikaba ari Robert Kyagulanyi - yamaze kuvuga ko aziyamamaza mu matora ya perezida yo mu mwaka wa 2021 agahatana na Yoweri Museveni, umaze imyaka 33 ku butegetsi . Kuva yakwinjira muri politike mu myaka ibiri ishize, Bobi Wine akomeje kugira abayoboke benshi. Depite Kyagulanyi w'imyaka 38 y'amavuko avuga ko avugira abakene, ndetse akaririmba ku butabera na demokarasi. Yambaye ingofero ye y'ibara ry'umutuku y'ikirango cy'umutwe we wa People Power, Wine yise Perezida Museveni umunyagitugu. Bobi Wine (wa kabiri uvuye ibumoso) mu kiganiro n'abanyamakuru ku munsi w'ejo ku wa gatatu Yagize ati: "Abanyagitugu nta wubaguyaguya ngo bave ku butegetsi. Abanyagitugu bigomekwaho". Yongeyeho ati: "Perezida Museveni afitiye ubwoba ibitekerezo duhagarariye". Avuga ku kuba polisi itamwemereye gukora igitaramo, Bobi Wine yavuze ko abakora ubucuruzi buciriritse baba bacuruza ibintu bitandukanye ku bitabiriye igitaramo, nabo bibagiraho ingaruka. Yavuze ko ibitaramo bye bibarirwa muri za mirongo bimaze kuburizwano na polisi guhera mu mwaka wa 2017.

Onesimus Twinamasiko avuga ko bikwiye gukubita umugore Onesimus Twinamasiko yavugiye kuri televiziyo yo muri Uganda, NTV, ati "nk'umuntu w'umugabo utegerezwa guha indero umugore wawe. "Utegerezwa kumukorako gato, ukamutega umuteaho, ukamukubita kugira umushire ku murongo." Ivyo yavuze vyariyamirijwe cane ku mbuga hwaniro, umwe mu bakomeye baharanira agateka k'abagore muri Uganda avuga ko uwo mushingamateka yari akwiye kwivuza. Guhohotera abagore Diana Kagere wo mu kigo kirwanira agateka k'abagore, CEDOVIP, yabariye BBC ati "Bwana Twinamasiko yari akwiye gusaba ikigongwe ku mugaragaro abagore bose bahohoterwa." "Yari akwiye gukora ibikwiye agasubira kw'ijambo yavuze. Birababaje cane kubona umushingamateka yemanga guhohotera abagore nk'uku. Iki ni icaha." Abagore barenga umwe kuri batanu bafise imyaka iri hagati ya 15-49 baramaze guhohoterwa muhira canke bagashurashuzwa ku nguvu muri Uganda, nk'uko bivugwa mu cigwa ca leta co mu mwaka uheze. Abakoresha imbuga hwaniro bariyamirije cane video ngufi yacanacanyeko ku mbuga, ivuye ku munyamakuru wa NTV.

Abantu bambaye udutambara two gupfuka amazuru muri Taipei i Taiwane Uri mu bwoko bw'ubwandu bita coronaviruses butera ubushuhe buvanze n'inkorora bugahava buvamwo umusonga kandi bugatuma umugwayi ahema nabi. Ubwo bwandu bw'uyo mugera wa coronavirus bwitwa SARS. Mu majambo yose babwita (severe acute respiratory syndrome)- bumaze kwica abantu 41 mu gihe abashika 1287 babaze kumenyekana ko bawanduye. Ubundi bwandu bwa coronaviruses burangwa nivyo bimenyesto nyene ariko bukaze ugusumba. Bwitwa Mers (Middle East respiratory syndrome) bwabonetse ubwambere muri Arabiya Saoudite bukaba bumaze guhitana hafi ibice 35% vy'abantu babwanduye. Kuber'iki ubu bwoko bw'uyu mugera bukwiragira hose mu kanya gato , ni kuber'iki bishoshora gutera ubwoba? Ni hehe uyo mugera wa coronaviruses utereye ubwoba ? Ibintu vyakabuye ubwo bwandu bita Sars na Mers hamwe n'ikiza ca kino gihe vyibazwa ko bitavuye mu bantu ariko mu bikoko. Mugihe ibikoko vyinshi bigendana imigera myinshi iteye ubwoba, amahirwe n'uko idakunze kuboneka ko isimbira ku bantu. Akenshi hariho umurongo ntarengwa ku bwoko bw'ibinyabuzima, bigatuma uyo mugera utabifata, nk'uko bivugwa n'umwigisha w'ibinyabuzima Andrew Easton wo muri Kaminuza ya Warwick. Abaganga bariko baravura mu Bushinwa ikiza ca coronaviruses Ariko iyo umubiri w'umuntu udafise ububasha bw'ukwikingira, canke hakaba ikindi gituma umugera uronka aho winjirira , umuntu arashobora kurwara yanduye kandi bidakunze kuboneka. Igitera ubwoba kenshi, ni igihe bihera ku mpinduka itari yitezwe Usanga ifise uburyo bwo gukurira muri ico kibanza gishasha. Ako gake cane uyo mugera wa coronavirus winjira mu magara y'abantu , bishobora kugorana cane. Ariko birakenewe kwibutsa ko ubwoko bw'imigera bwose bwa coronovirus budateye ubwoba rwose- abantu benshi bitega kubabara buke buke igihe cose - ariko uyo mugera wanse imiti bashobora kubabara cane. Kubera iki umugera uvuye mu bindi binyabuzima uteye ubwoba? ''Igihe umugera wimukiye mu kinyabuzima kindi ntushobora kumenya ico ukora kugira uwurwanye, mu ntango bishobora kugorana'', nk'uko umwigisha Easton abivuga. Ni kubera y'uko iyo umugera wa coronavirus uvuye ku bikoko ukaja mu bantu , umubiri wacu ushobora gutakaza inguvu, kubera utaba wari umenyereye ikintu nk'ico gishasha cawujemwo. Ingorane imeze uko iyo ibicurane bikwiragiye mu bwoko bw'ibinyabuzima bibiri bidasa. Abantu bariko barasuzumwa muri Wuhan mu Bushinwa ''Mugihe hari ikwiragira ry'ibicurane, abantu bakura ku nyoni ziba mu mazi , amakenga n'uko igihe bishitse ku bantu , iyo ndwara igira ubukari bukomeye''umwigisha Easton niko avuga. Ikiza c'ibicurane cabayemu 1918-1919 kizwi ko cavuye ku nyoni , kandi cahitanye abantu barenga imliyoni 50. Ntavyemezo vyerekana ko iki kiza ca coronavirus kizokwica ukwo , ariko muri kahise k 'ibiza bikomeye vyavuye ku bikoko bigashika mu bantu, vyarateye amakenga mu bijanye n'amagara y'abantu. none iyi migera ya coronavirus irashobora gukwiragira cane mu kanya gato ? Inkuru nziza ni uko hari icizere ko iyo umugera wavuye ku bikoko ukaja ku bantu udashobora kuva ku muntu uja ku wundi muntu. Easton ati: ''Iyo ni iyindi ntambamyi kuri uwo mugera". Hagati aho, avuga ko bishobora guhinduka mu kanya gato, kandi ko mu gihe birinze bihinduka, bishobora kuba ikibazo gikomeye cane . Izina coronavirus riva mu ki latini Ati: "Imigera ya coronaviruses yihimbaguramwo uduce twinshi". Iyo rero umugera umaze kwihindura ugafata iyindi sura, ushobora gukwiragira uva kumuntu ukaja ku wundi, bivuga ko ukwiragira ku rugero runini cane kandi mu kanya gato. Ibi vyarabaye ku vyerekeye iki kiza mu Bushinwa arico gituma hafashwe ingingo zikomeye zo kurwanya ikwiragira ry'uwo mugera. Ariko biguma biboneka ko abantu babandanya bandura. Umugera waragiye mu buryo bwo kwandurwa kuva ku muntu uja ku wundi Mu gihe umuntu afise amagara meza umubiri wiwe urashobora kugira ubushobozi bwo kuwurwanya. Imigera imwe imwe yinjira ubw onyene, hanyuma iyindi ikinjira buhoro buhoro. Kimwe mu bibazo umuntu yokwibaza ni aho uyo mugera wa coronavirus uba. Hokorwa iki mugihe ikiza c'umugera wa coronavirus catanguye ? Inkuru mbi n'uko umuti atari wo nyishu nyayo kenshi. ''Hariho imiti ikiza cane ico kiza", niko Easton yavuze. Ariko hariho izindi ngingo zisanzwe zikwiye gufatwa, cane nko gukaraba mu minwe no gukoresha udutambara. Ivyokorwa vyoroshe mu kwikingira ico umugera wa coronavirus ni ukuwubuza ko ukwiragira Avuga ko isuku risanzwe ari ikintu ciza cane. Bikingira ibintu vyose kandi ni naco kirwanisho nyamukuru kiriho kubera ata miti iriho muri aka kanya ka vuba. Kiretse ukuwukinga , uburyo abayobozi bafasha uwamaze kwandura uwo mugera navyo nyene bifise uruhara rudasanzwe. Hakoreshwa ivyuma bipima ubushuhe kugira bamenye igituma uyo mugera ''Ikindi ni ukurondera abantu banduye mu kiringo ca vuba kugira bafashwe vyihuta , bongere bashirwe mu kibanza kugira uwo mugera ntukwiragire ''. Amahirwe ni uko amakungu yihutira kurwanya ibiza nk'ivyo vya Sars na Mers iyo birinze vyaduka. Easton ati: "Twarabibonye incuro zitari nke, aho wasanga iyo bikenewe ko hafatwa ingingo zihuta zaca zifatwa mu buryo bubangutse. Umugwi w'abaganga ku rwego mpuzamakungu bizeye ko bigiye ku bindi biza vy'imigera ya coronaviruses yabaye imbere y'aho, kandi ko bizobafasha kugwanya iyi yadutse ubu, mber no muri kazoza, kugira ngo ntikore ibara.

Kubera coronavirus igice cy'abagize ubuzima bw'umujyi wa Butare cyawuvuyemo Abanyeshuri barenga 10,000 ba kaminuza babaga muri uyu mujyi, kuva mu kwezi kwa gatatu kugeza mu kwezi kwa cyenda ntabahari, aba basanzwe bagize igice cy'ingenzi cy'abaguzi ba serivisi i Butare. Nyuma y'iminsi irindwi coronavirus igeze mu Rwanda, tariki 14/03/2020 leta yatangaje ko amashuri yose mu Rwanda afunzwe, nyuma ivuga ko azongera gufungura mu kwa kwezi kwa cyenda uyu mwaka. Buri munyeshuri wa Kaminuza y'u Rwanda ahabwa buri kwezi inguzanyo ya leta y'amafaranga 40,000 azwi cyane nka 'bourse', ni ukuvuga miliyoni zisaga 400 buri kwezi ubu zitakijya mu mujyi wa Butare. Utongeyeho ibikorwa by'ibigo by'amashuri yisumbuye nabyo bifatiye runini ubucuruzi n'ubuzima muri uyu mujyi. Agace kazwi nka Madina mu mudugudu wa Mamba, akagari ka Butare, umurenge wa Ngoma, ni iruhande rwa Kaminuza y'u Rwanda ishami rya Huye, haba abanyeshuri babarirwa mu magana. I Madina (ku ifoto), i Tumba, i Cyarwa, ni uduce ducumbikamo abanyeshuri batabonye imyanya mu macumbi ya Kaminuza y'u Rwanda ishami rya Huye Aha haba 'restaurants' nyinshi, ubucuruzi buciriritse n'amacumbi menshi yubatswe n'abantu ku giti cyabo bijyanye n'ubushobozi bw'abanyeshuri, iyo badahari ubuzima buba busa n'ubwahagaze. Umugabo utifuje gutangazwa amazina uhafite amacumbi yabwiye BBC ko mu miryango 30 akodesha ubu hasigayemo abantu batatu. Ati: "Muri abo basigaye harimo umwe wabuze aho ajya kuko iwabo ari muri Nyabihu aho inzu yabo yashenywe n'ibiza. Twaramubwiye tuti 'ba wigumiye hano kuko n'aho wari kujya ni ibibazo'". Inzu nyinshi zabagamo abanyeshuri i Madina ubu zirafunze Avuga ko kuri we, n'abandi nka we bacumbikira abanyeshuri, bari mu gihombo gikomeye, kugeza abanyeshuri bagarutse. Ati: "Ni amacumbi twubatse mu buryo bw'ubushobozi bw'abanyeshuri, nta wundi muntu waza ngo ahacumbike kuko nta n'ibindi bikorwa bituriye kaminuza biri hano hafi byakurura abantu ngo baze gucumbikamo". Mu yindi mijyi mu Rwanda, ubuzima buri kugaruka nka mbere nyuma y'uko ingamba zikomeye zo kwirinda ikwirakwira rya Covid-19 zigenda zoroshywa. I Butare ho, abatwara abantu, abakora ubucuruzi butandukanye, abakora imirimo ishingiye ku banyeshuri nk'isuku, n'ibindi ...bugarijwe n'ingaruka zo kuba ubu nta banyeshuri bahari. Bwana Munyaneza yakiraga abantu bari hagati ya 50 na 70 ku munsi ubu yakira batanu Viateur Munyaneza yashinze 'restaurant' aho anacuruza ibintu nka 'pizza', 'hamburger' n'ibindi abanyeshuri bakunda nk'uko abivuga. Avuga ko mbere ya coronavirus yakiraga abantu bari hagati ya 50 na 70 ku munsi, biganjemo abanyeshuri. Bwana Munyaneza ati: "Ariko ubu, bushobora kwira nakiriye nk'abantu batanu b'abaturage basanzwe bihitira, ni uko tuba twanga gufunga ngo bavuge ngo hariya harafunze. "Kuva corona yatangira kuzageza mu kwezi kwa cyenda nibwo ubuzima buzongera gutangira, gacye gacyeya". Ishusho y'imibare y'abandura coronavirus mu Rwanda buri munsi Abakora ubucuruzi butandukanye i Butare bavuga ko imikorere izongera kuba nka mbere abanyeshuri bagarutse

Donald Trump yari yatangaje ko ata musirikare n'umwe yapfuye canke ngo akomereke muri ico gitero ca misire ca Irani Ico gitigiri kirengeye kure cane n'igitigiri ca 64 caheruka kumenyeshwa n'ibiro vyo kwivuna abansi bwa Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika, Pentagon. Mu ntango, Perezida Donald Trump wa Amerika wewe yari yamenyesheke ko ata Munyamerika n'umwe yigeze agira ikibazo muri ico gitero. Bwana Trump yamenyesheje ivyo ashaka gusigura igituma Amerika itasubije ico gitero co ku wa 08 z'ukwa mbere. Ico gitero cakozwe na Iran mu kwihora igandagurwa ry'umujenerali w'ico gihugu ryakozwe n'igisirikare ca Amerika. Itangazo ryasohowe na Pentagon rivuga ko hafi ibice 70% ry'abasirikare bagize ibibazo basubiye ku kazi kabo. Mu kwa mbere, Pentagon yavuze ko igituma ibitigiri vy'abagize izo ngorane zo mu bwonko biguma biduga ari uko ibimenyetso bimwe bimwe bifata umwanya muremure kugira ngo vyibonekeze. Ejo ku wa mbere, umushingamateka wa Amerika Joni Ernst wo mu mugambwe w'abarepubulikani yasavye izindi nsiguro. Ati: "Ni ngombwa ko haba integuro yo kuvura aba basirikare bagize ibibazo". "Nasavye Pentagon ko ubuzima bw'ingabo zacu zarungitswe muri Iraq bwokurikiranwa kubera zishobora guhura n'ibitero vy'amabombe". Ikirindiro ca Al Asad muri Iraq catewe n'ingabo za Iran ku wa 08 z'ukwa mbere 2020 Mu kwezi guheze, Perezida Trump yafashe ko ibibazo vyo mu bwonko izo ngabo zagize nk'inkurikizi y'ico gitero ari ingorane nto cane. Ati: "Narumvise ko hari abari bamenetse umutwe, bagira n'ibindi bibazo bimwe bimwe, ariko mvuga nti, kandi ndavyemeza, si ibintu bikomeye". "Si mfata ko ari ububabare bukomeye mfatiye ku bwo nabonye muri kahise". Igisirikare ca Amerika kivuga ko ibibazo vyo mu bwonko ku basirikare bari mu karere k'intambara ari ibintu vyama vyabaye. Ikigo ca gisirikare kijejwe kwitaho abahuye n'ibibazo vyo mu bwonko kivuga ko ingorane zo mu mutwe ku basirikare bari ku rugamba ziva ahanini ku bibombe baterwa. Abasirikare barenga 400.000 barahuye n'ivyo bibazo kuva mu mwaka wa 2000 nk'uko bivugwa na leta ya Amerika.

Kenneth Habaalu pictured left Ariko abagwanira agateka basanzwe, abo muri za kaminuza n'abanyatugenegene bariko baratora uburyo bwo guteza ugushikira ivya nkenerwa ku bagendana ubumuga ku rugero rw'ibihugu n'urwamakungu. Kuva ku gitabo co gufasha bene abo bantu muri Ethiopia gushika ku makinga y'abagendana ubumuga b'ahantu hagoye igenda mu gihugu hagati, hari uburorero bwinshi bwo kwiyumvira no kwubahuka. BBC Africa yavuganye na munani muri abo bariko barahindura ibintu-kugira imenye ico bakora n'aho bakuye ivyo vyiyumviro vyo guhindura ibintu. . NIGERIA: uwuharana mu kuririmba Mu 2002, Grace Jerry yari mu nzira ataha i muhira avuye gutegura indirimbo muri chorale igihe yagongwa n'umushoferi aborewe akahakura ubumuga bw'amaguru. Inyuma y'iryo sanganya avuga ko umuziki waciye ufata iyindi ntera. ''ubu birenze gufata micro, ubu niwo si yanje, nico kiraro canje, niryo jwi ryanje''. Mu mwaka uheze, niwe yamenyesheje ko prezida Obama ashitse mu nama y'abarongozi b'abanyafirca bakiri bato yitiriwe Mandela i Washington muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe Za Amerika. Yibuka ati ''nahatswe kurira igihe yashika akansanga aho abashikiriza amajambo bahagagara hanyuma akavuga ibintu vyiza cane kuri jewe no ku gikorwa turiko turarangura muri Nigeria tubicishije mw'ishirahamwe Inclusive Friends'' Narenze uko benshi babona abagendana ubumuga maze mba impirimbanyi iharanira ko abantu bose bafatwa kimwe no gusaba ko habaho impinduka mu mategeko yacu muri Nigeria. ETHIOPIA: igitabo kiyobora Haraheze imyaka ine, ikigo c'abagendana ubumuga n'iterambere muri Ethiopa cisohoye igitabo Guide to Accessible Addis Ababa (Inzira yo gushika muri Addis Ababa) cerekana uburyo bwo gushika mu mahoteli atandukanye, inyubakwa za leta, amazu y'uburiro n'ibibanza vyuguririwe bose. Umuyobozi w'uwo mugambi Retta Getachew avuga ati ''aho tuboneye ko vyafasha cane ingenzi n'abanyagihugu bo ngaha bagendana ubumuga, twavuze tuti 'ok dutegerezwa kwagura uyu mugambi'' ''ubu dufise ibitabo bitandatu n'ikindi kirimwo vyose mu gitabo kimwe, arinaco gitabo kiyobora ingene umuntu ashika muri Ethiopia''. Twasanze henshi mu buzi bwa leta no mu nzego zitandukanye mu bisagara byose 12 twakoreyemo harimo na Addis Ababa, abagendana ubumuga badashobora kuhashika. Africa y'Epfo: umuhanzi yabaye umuhinga mu vyo kwa muganga. Igihe umukobwa wiwe yavukana ubumuga, Shona McDonald avuga ko abakozi bo kwa muganga bamubwiye bati: ''genda umushire mu nzu, hanyuma uvyare uwundi mwana maze ubuzima bubandanye'-ko ata kintu na kimwe cari gushobora kumwongerereza agaciro. Akababaro n'ishavu nivyo vyatumye mfata ingingo yo kubereka ko bihenda''. Akoresha ubushinga bwiwe bwo gusarura, yaciye atangura gutunganya ibikoresho vyo gufasha kwiyunguruza no guhagarara-afashijwe n'igisata c'ubuhinga mu vyigwa vy'ingingo z'umubiri bijanye n'ivyo kwa muganga ca kaminuza ya Capetown. Ubu uruganda rwiwe, Shonaquip rurahingura ibintu vyose kuva ku ntebe z'abagendana ubumuga gushika ku bifasha umuntu guhagarara, vyoroshe guterateranya, bihabwa uwubikeneye kandi bigakurikiranwa n'abavuzi n'abahinga muri Africa yose. LESOTHO: Umwamikazi w'ubwiza bw'urundi rugero MU mwaka uheze, Tlhokomelo Elena Sabole yatewe iteka ryo kuba Miss Deaf Africa 2015 (Miss atumva wo muri Africa mu 2015). Avuga ko yabaye indoto ihindutse ukuri. ''gutsindira ico kibanza vyari igitangaza. Sinari bwigere nezerwa kugeza aho''. Avuga ko gukurira muri Lesotho ku muntu atumva bitoroshe .Ariko yizigiye guhindura ingene abantu babona canke bafata abatumva, kandi akaba ashaka ko amayira yo gushikira inkuru yokwugururwa-biciye nko mu rurimi rw'ibimenyetso kuri television n'ivyigwa hakoreshejwe ibimenyetso mu mashure. Avuga ati ''indoto yanje n'ukugira ivyo nikorera jewe nyene, nk'akarorero ikibanza nosangiriramwo n'abandi ubumenyi mfise kandi ngakorana n'abandi bakobwa batumva'' ZAMBIA: gufasha umuntu kwiyunguruza ku buryo buke Igihe Kenneth Habaalu yinjira mw'ishirahamwe APTERS, ntivyaborohera kumenya ahari abana bagendana ubumuga mu kibano. Asigura ati ''abantu ntibashaka ko abandi bamenya ko bafise umwana agendana ubumuga i muhira. Umuvyeyi umwe yambwiye ko asigaye aryamitse umwana wiwe iyo agiye kw'isoko''. Avuga ati kugira ndamufashe kwicara 'nimba akanogo hanze y'inzu nkamwicarikamwo'. N'aho ngo ashaka ko ahagarara, yabohera uwo mwana ku giti. Nibaza ko atari ubuntu kugira ivyo bintu''. Ku buryo bubayabaye, APTERS igizwe n'abantu 8(bose bagendana ubumuga) bakoresha impapuro zamaze gukora n'imbaho z'ububati kugira bakore intebe za ''papier maché'', ivyishimikizo vyo guhagarara no kugenda,hamwe n'ibifasha mu kugorora ingingo. UGANDA: Uruganda rwo gukora braille. Victor Locoro yakoze imyaka 20 nk'umwigisha mu gisata c'ivyankenerwa bidasanzwe n'ukugorora kuri kaminuza ya Kyambogo yo muri Uganda. Uretse gutanga ivyigwa bijanye n'ukugurora n'ubumuga mu kibano, ico gisata gifise uruganda rwaco rwo gukora braille (ibitabo vy'impumyi basomesha intoke). ''muri iki gihe rurahagaze kuko imwe mu mashini ikeneye gusubirizwa ivyuma''. Bivugwa na Locoro, umugabo yahumye afise imyaka 10. ''ariko turashoboye gukora ibitabo bike bike vy'abanyeshure, kandi tukaba turiko turarondera gusubiriza iyo mashini kugira dusubire gukora ibitabo ku rugero nk'urwo twahorako. Aho harimwo gukora ibitabo vyanditswe muri Braille vy'amashure mato mato n'ayisumbuye;ubushikiranganji bw'indero, ubuhanga n'ubuhinga hamwe n'inkino; hatibagiwe amashirahamwe adaharanira inyungu za politike''. Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika: Agakinisho gakoreshwa n'inguvu z'ubwonko. Hagati yo kwigira impamyabushobozi ya Masters mu vy'ubuhinga bw'umuyagankuba kuri kaminuza ya Colombia, Kay Igwe yagumye ariko arategura agakinisho ko kuri ordinateur gakoreshwa n'imipfunda y'ubwonko. Avuga ati ''abantu benshi ubu bariko barashira uburyo bwinshi mu muco w'udukinisho, ariko iyo umuntu afise ingorane zifatiye ku dutsi nsozabwenge zituma adashobora gukoresha na kimwe mu maboko yiwe canke amaguru canke guhindukiza amaso-canke mu gihe bagize isanganya ry'ubwonko canke ikintu catumye tudarara -ntibashobora gukoresha agakinisho nk'uko umuntu asanzwe abishobora'' Inyishu yiwe? Gukoresha icuma cumva ibimenyetso biva ku bwonko (electroencephalogram canke EEG) kugira bafatanye ubwonko n'agakinisho gakorana na ordinateur maze umuntu agaca ashobora gukina akoresheje imipfunda y'ubwonko. AFRICA Y'EPFO: Umukinyi wa Rugby atumva Mu kwezi kw'icenda mu 2007, Tim Stones yabaye umwe mu bashinze Ishirahamwe rya Rugby ry'Abatumva muri Africa y'Epfo (SADRU). Ariko hari ingorane , iryo shirahamwe ntiryari mw'ishirahamwe rya Rugby rya Africa y'Epfo-gutyo rikaba ritari rizwi muri Rugby kw'isi. Ivyo vyarahindutse mu 2014,mu kwezi kwa munani gukurikira SADRU yaripimye ubwa mbere mu rugero rwa Rugby rw'abatumva, ubwa mbere vyari bibereye muri Africa y'Epfo-mu gukina n'abari bafise igikombe c'isi muri Rugby y'abatumva bo muri Pays de Galles(Wales). Ubu iryo shirahamwe rifise abakinyi batumva 90. Stones ati ''ariko ibitigiri vyacu biguma vyiyongera, na cane cane ko turiko turashinga amashirahamwe yo mu ntara imwe imwe yose yo muri Africa y'Epfo ''. SADRU irakorana kandi n'abahinga mu vyo kwumva kugira bafashe mu kurondera mu mashure n'imigwi abashobora kuba abakinyi-no kumenya aboba bafise ingorane zo kwumva zitari bwamenbyekane.

Real Madrid yatsinze ifise ibice 39 kw'ijana Bayern na yo 61 Uwo mugwi usanganywe igikombe co mu mwaka uheze, uriko urita ku rutare kugira ugitware incuro ya gatatu wikurikiranya, vyagaragaye ko ucumbagira inyuma ariko ukaba ukomeye imbere. Marcelo na Asensio ni bo binjije ibitego vy'uwo mugwi. Umukinyi Joshua Kimmich ni we yatsindiye igitego umugwi wa Bayern. Bayern yananiwe n'ibitego vyinshi, mu gihe igitego ca Christiano Ronaldo na co cahakanywe n'umuhagarikizi kubera yari yakoze umupira n'ukuboko. Ubu rero Bayern bategerezwa gutsinda ibitego bibiri ku musi wa kabiri uza kugira babuze umugwi wa Real Madrid gushika mu gice ca nyuma incuro ya kane mu myaka itanu. Umugore amaze imyaka ameze nk'uwapfuye yibarutse mu bitaro vya Phoenix muri Amerika Uwo mugwayi ari mu bitaro Hacienda HealthCare i Phoenix muri leta ya Arizona, muri Amerika amaze imyaka hafi cumi ari muri "coma" inyuma yaho agiriye impanuka y'imodoka, ariko akaba yavyaye umwana w'umuhungu itariki 29 Ukwezi kwa 12, nkuko vyiganwa n'umuryango wiwe. Umuntu yahawe amakuru ku vyabaye yagize ati: «Nta muntu numwe mu bakozi b'ivyo bitaro yarazi ko yibungenze imbere yuko yibaruka." Igipolisi ca Phoenix kiriko gitohoza ku caha co guhohotera bishingiye ku gitsina. Kivuga ko umwana ameze neza. Bivugwa ko uwo mugwayi akenera gukurikiranwa amasaha 24 kuri 24, uwahawe amakuru akavuga ko abantu benshi bahora binjira mu cumba ciwe. Kuva iryo bara ribaye, uburongozi bw'ibitaro bwarahinduye amategeko muri ino ndwi. Iyo bikenewe ko umukozi w'umugabo aja mu cumba c'umurwayi w'umugore, amategeko mashasha asaba ko agenda aherekejwe n'uwundi mukozi w'umugore.

Abatavuga rumwe na leta ya Kongo bavuga ko hazoshika itariki 15/11/2018 bahisemwo uwuzobaserukira mu matora y'umukuru w'igihugu ca Kongo. Uvuye i bubamfu uja i buryo: Vital Kamerhe, Felix Tshisekedi, Adolphe Muzito, Moise Katumbi na Jean-Pierre Bemba Aba barongozi baserukiye imigambwe itavuga rumwe na leta, biyemeje ko itariki ya 15 z'ukwa cumi na rimwe izoshika bamaze kwumvikana ku mukandida umwe. Iyo nama ibera i Geneve irimwo kandi abakandida batatu bankiwe kwitoza mu matora y'umukuru w'igihugu hamwe n'abandi bane bemerewe kwitoza. Umwe mu bagize umugambwe UDPS yavuganye na BBC ari i Geneve, yavuze ko abo banyepolitike barimwo Moise Katumbi, uwahoze ari buramatari w'intara ya Katanga na Felix Tshisekedi umukuru wa UDPS. Barimwo kandi Vital Kamerhe uwahoze ari umukuru w'inama nshingamateka hamwe na Jean Pierre Bemba yahoze ari umushirikiranganji wa mbere. Iyo nama kandi itegekanya kwihweza igabangana ry'ibikorwa mu gihe c'ukwiyamamaza hamwe na nyuma y'amatora. Ivyitezwe kuva muri iyo nama bivugwa ko bizomenyekana ku wa Mungu itariki 11 z'ukwa cumi na rimwe. Emmanuel Ramazani Shadary, niwe azoserukira umugambwe uri ku butegetsi Bazohitamwo nde Naho bitaramenyekana, umunyepolitike wo muri Kongo Jean Bosco Barihima wo mu mugambwe ARC, Alliance pour le renouveau du Congo, yabwi ye BBC Gahuzamiryango ko bazohitamwo hagati ya Felix Tshisekedi na Vital Kamerhe. Mu kwezi guheze muri Afrika y'epfo, niho abanyepolitike indwi batavuga rumwe na leta ya Kongo biyemeza gutora umukandida umwe. Hari abakandida 21 mu matora y'umukuru w'igihugu yo mu kwezi kuza muri Kongo, uwahozi ari umushikiranganji w'intwaro yo hagati, Emmanuel Ramazani Shadary akaba ari we yagenywe n'umugamwe uri ku butegetsi.

Alan Boileau yasize abandi ho amasegonda atandatu Muri aka gace ka Kigali - Huye ka 120,5 Km Boileau yasize abandi akoresheje 03h07'14'', yasize uwamukurikiye Umba Lopez Santiago ho amasegonda atandatu. Manizabayo Eric wari mu bayoboye igikundi umwanya munini uyu munsi niwe wegukanye igihembo cya 'meilleur grimpeur' cyangwa uwarushije abandi gutwara amanota y'imisozi iterera cyane. Ku rutonde rusange, uyu munya-Colombia Umba Lopez wo mu ikipe ya Androni yo muri Colombia yahise afata umwenda w'umuhondo arusha mugenzi we Brayan Vergara Sanchez, wo mu ikipe ya Medellin, amasegonda abiri gusa. Kuri uru rutonde rusange rw'agateganyo, umusore w'umunyarwanda Uhiriwe Byiza Renus ukinira Team Rwanda, ubu ari mu bakinnyi 22 bafatwa nk'aba kabiri kuko bose barushwa na Umba Lopez amasegonda abiri gusa. Gusa Boileau wabaye uwa mbere uyu munsi ku rutonde rusange ari ku mwanya wa 29 aho arushwa amasegonda 35 n'uwa mbere. Umunyamakuru wa BBC Yves Bucyana ukurikiranye iri siganwa avuga ko ubu hakiri kare cyane kubona ibishobora kuzaba mu minsi isigaye y'iri siganwa kuko abarushanwa bacyegeranye cyane. Avuga ko mbere abagiye batsinda aka gace ka Kigali - Huye bakundaga no kwegukana isiganwa muri rusange kuko babaga barusha abandi iminota myinshi, ariko ko ubu begeranye cyane. Abasiganwa muri Tour du Rwanda bari kwerekeza mu karere ka Huye Binjiye mu mujyi wa Butare bakoze gusiganwa bavuduka 'sprint', Boileau abarusha ingufu arabasiga Ku rutonde rusange ariko Bileau watsinze uyu munsi ari inyuma kuko uwa mbere amurusha amasegonda 35 Uduce tuzakurikiraho: Agace ka 3: Nyanza-Gicumbi: 171,6 Km Agace ka 4: Kigali (Kimironko)-Musanze : 123,9 Km Agace ka 5 : Nyagatare-Kigali : 149,3 Km Agace ka 6: Kigali-Kigali: 152,6 Km Agace ka 7: Kigali-Kigali: 4,5 Km (gusiganwa n'igihe umuntu ku giti cye, ITT) Agace ka 8: Kigali (Canal Olympia)- Kigali (Canal Olympia): 75, 3 Km

Abaharanira agateka ka zina muntu bavuga ko kwimura aba Bedouin ku nguvu bizoba biciye kubira n'amategeko mpuzamakungu Ubwa mbere ibiro vya ministre wa mbere Benjamin Netanyahu vyari vyamenyesheje ko hari umugambi wo kuvugana izindi nyishu n'ababa mu kigwati ca Khan al-Ahmar. Ariko Netanyahu yashimitse avuga ko ababa muri ico kigwati bategerezwa kwimurwa kandi ko yizigiye ko ubu vuba azoronka uruhusha rwa leta yiwe. Imbere y'aho umuvugizi w'umunyepalestina (Walid Assaf) yari yemenyesheje ko imyiyerekano yo kwanka kuva muri ico kigwati izobandanya. Abaharanira ageteka ka zina muntu bavuga ko kubimura ku nguvu babajana ahandi bizoba biciye ku biri n'amategeko mpuzamakungu.

Rooney ashitse muri sentare ya Stockport Rooney w'imyaka 31 yafatiwe mu karere ka Wilmslow, i Cheshire ariko aragendesha imodoka yaborewe itariki imwe z'ukwezi kw'icenda. Rooney avuga ko urwo rubanza rwononye isura yari afise mu mupira w'amaguru Wayne Rooney azoriha amande 170 y'amapawundi kubera ico caha yakoze. "Ndemera icaha nakoze kandi ndasaba n'imbabazi umuryango wanje, umugwi wa Everton, umumenyereza hamwe n'abakunzi bumugwi. Ndasaba imbabazi kuvyabaye." ni ko Rooney, ubu afise abana batatu yavuze. Umucamanza yabwiye Rooney ko yageramiye ubuzima bwiwe n'ubwo abandi bakoresha ibarabara Uwo mukinyi yavukiye mu gisagara ca Liverpool yasubiye mu mugwi wa Everton yatanguye gukinamwo ari umwana avuye muri Manchester United inyuma y'imyaka 13 ayivuyemwo.

Xi Jinping ni Prezida w'Ubushinwa kuva mu 2013 Ikinyamakuru c'igihugu cavuze ko iyo nteguro yo guhindura ibwirizwa shingiro, yagaragajwe ku munsi wa Mungu. Muri kino gihe, abarongora igihugu ntibashobora kurenza ibiringo bibiri vy'imyaka itanu kimwe. BBC Gahuzamiryango Ico kiganiro caciye kuri imwe muri televisiyo za BBC mu Bwongereza, mu ntango z'uku kwezi. BBC irahakana ko ata gice na kimwe c'ico kiganiro '' gihakana genocide yakorewe Abatutsi''. Ku wa gatatu inama nshingamategeko mu Rwanda yemeje ingingo isaba leta guhagarika ibiganiro vya BBC no kwagiriza abakoze ico kiganiro guhakana genocide , ikintu gisanzwe ari icaha mu Rwanda. Ico kiganiro ca BBC, Rwanda's Untold Story kirimwo abashakashatsi bo muri Amerika bavuga ko benshi mu bapfuye bashobora kuba ari Abahutu. Ico kiganiro kirimwo kandi abantu bahoze bakorana hafi na Prezida Paul Kagame bemeza ko ariwe yategetse iraswa ry'indege ya Prezida Juvenal Habryarimana mu 1994, ikintu gifatwa nk'icabaye imbarutso ya jenoside. Ivyo Paul Kagame akaba abihakana. Ariko RURA ivuga ko yaronse ibirego biturutse mu banyagihugu, binegura ico kiganiro ko gikongereza urwanko, gipfovya ihonyabwoko ndetse kikanarihakana. Muri urwo rwandiko, RURA ivuga ko yahagaritse BBC Gahuzamiryango, mu gihe igikora iperereza kuri ivyo birego Hari ivyibutso vyinshi mu Rwanda vy'abahitanywe na jenocide yo mu 1994 Hagati aho, urwego rugenzura itangazamakuru mu Rwanda, HMC, ruvuga ko bidakwiye guhagarika BBC gutangariza mu Rwanda. Ivyo ngo bishobora kuba intango y'uko buri gitangazamakuru gikoze ibigaragara nko kurenga umurongo gica gihagarikwa, ngo kandi hari izindi ntambwe zishobora gufatwa. Inyuma y'inzego zihurikiyemwo abanyeshure zagize imyiyerekano kuwa gatatu, ku wa gatanu naho iyo myiyerekano yakozwe n'urunani rw'amashirahamwe y'abagore. Leta y'Urwanda izokorana ku ndwi iza kugira yige ivyasabwe n'inama nshingamategeko. BBC Gahuzamiruango yatanguye ari ikiganiro co guhuza imiryango yari yaratandukanye kubera intambara.

Ico gitero cabereye kw'ihoteri iri hafi y'ikirimba c'umukuru w'igihugu Igipolisi ca Somalia kvuga ko ico gitero cabereye kw'ihoteri SYL cahitanye abasirikare bashika babiri n'abasivire batatu. Abasirikare bandi babiri n'abasivire icenda barakomeretse. Aciye ku rubuga rwa Twitter, Zakia, icegera c'umukuru w'igipolisi c'ico gihugu, amenyesha ko abantu 82 harimwo abasivire n'abategetsi bashoboye kurokorwa. Abarwanyi batanu bavugwa ko ari abo uwo murwi nibo bakoze ico gitero kuri iyo hoteli iri hafi y'ikirimba c'umukuru w'igihugu, bakoresheje inkoho n'ama grenades. Iyo hoteri isanzwe kandi ikundwa cane n'abanye politike n'abanye Somalia baba hanze. Abategetsi bamenyesha ko bose bishwe mu gihe barasana n'abajejwe umutekano ba Somalia . Igipolisi kivuga ko igitigiri c'abahazise ubuzima gishobora kwiyongera. Iki nico gitero ca mbere uyu mugwi ukoze ku mugwa mukuru kuva aho hiciwe umukuru w'ico gisagara haraciye amezi ane.

Imodoka zari muri parking zahiye mw'ico gitero Hari igihe c'isaha icenda igihe humvikana ikintu gituritse c'inguvu nyinshi munyuma hagakurikira urwamo rw'inkoho, kw'ihoteri Ducit iri kw'ibarabara Riverside Drive hafi y'ibiro vya BBC. Urwamo rw'amasasu rwari rukibandanya inyuma y'iminota 30, imodoka zaka urubeya igihe BBC yashika mw'ico kibanza cari kimaze gukikuzwa n'abajejwe umutekano. Uwakomeretse araruwe Bamwe mu bapolisi bari bamaze gushika mw'ihoteri Ducit bahanganye n'inkozizikibi zateye, abandi basohora abantu bari muriyo. Abajejwe umutekano basohoye abantu benshi bari bagizwe ingwati, bamwe muribo bakaba bari bakomeretse, ndetse hakaba n'uwacikanye ageze hanze kubera inguma. Abarokotse bari bagwiriyemwo abigeme n'abakenyezi baza barira, abandi ubona ko bahahamutse, badashaka no kwigana ivyabaye. Uwakomeretse atwawe n'umukozi wa Croix rouge Abatabazi bo mu kigo c'umusalaba utukura nabo nyene bari bashitse, batabara abakomeretse, abandi babatwara kuvurigwa mu bitaro. Kuva ico gihe ico gitero kigabwa, abajejwe umutekano ntibemera kuvugana n'abigo vy'itangazamakuru. Bamwe mu babarongoye bashitse kwirabira ivyabaye, batanga amategeko y'ingene ibikorwa bikwiye kubandanya. Icegera c'umukuru w'igipolisi Njoroge Mbugua yaganiriye na BBC yemeje ko igitero cabaye ari ic'iterabwoba. "Twaronse amakuru kw'ihoteri ya Ducit yatewe n'inklozizikibi ariko ntiturashobora kumenya ukwo bangana. Amakuru twaronse ubwa mbere avuga ko boba bari bane canke batanu. Twahamagaje abapolisi bacu baze gukurikirana ibiriko biraba. Sinogira ico nemeza ku bantu boba bapfuye muri kino gihe. Igipolisi caruhariwe mu bitero nka mwen'ibi niyo bari." Abajejwe umutekano mu kibanza vyabereyemwo Uretse abo bapolisi karuhariwe, indege za kajugujugu zaguma zica hejuru y'iyo hoteri, ndetse n'abasirikare bakaba bagomowe. Mu makuru BBC yashoboye kuronka ku bari hafi y'iyo hoteri, bavuze ko babiri mu bateye bishwe, uwundi arafatwa. Abigeme bari mw'iyo hoteri bavuyeyo barira bavuga ko igihe bumvise igiturika n'amasasu ko baciye batagura kwinyegeza, bamwe mu tuzu twa surwumwe, abandi inyuma y'ububati. Babonye umwotsi mwinshi munyuma basohogwa n'abajejwe umutekano. Abarongoye inzego z'umutekano bavuze ko batanga amakuru arambuye hanyuma.

Abiy Ahmed yabaye umushikiranganji wa mbere inyuma yaho uwo yasubiriye atangiye imihoho Avugira kuri televiziyo y'igihugu ahejeje kurahira, Bwana Ahmed yasavye ko "imyaka yo kutumvikana" irangira. "Nsavye leta ya Eritreya kuvyifatamwo nkuko," niko yavuze. Imigenderanire y'ivyo bihugu bibiri yagumye icumbagizwa n'ingwano ishingiye ku vy'imbibe imaze imyaka ibiri, yahitanye ubuzima bw'abantu 70000. Yongeye ati: "Tuzofatana mu nda n'abavukanyi bacu b'abanyafrika muri rusangi, hamwe n'ababanyi bacu ku bw'umwihariko, mu bihe vyiza na bibi." Igihugu ca Eritrea nticahaye agaciro kanini ivyashikirijwe n'umushikiranganji wa mbere mushasha wa Ethiopia. Umushikiranganji wo guhererekana amakuru muri Eritreya, Yemane Gebre Meskel, yavuze ko atizeye ko hari kigiye guhinduka. "Nta gitandukanye n'ivyari vyavuzwe nuwo yasubiriye. Umupira wagumye igihe kirekire mu kibuga ca Ethiopia. Nta mpari zihari kuko ukurondera kuzitorera umuti bimaze imyaka 16 kurangiye," niko Bwana Mekel yavuze. Uwo mutegetsi yabandanije avuga ko Ethiopia yarikwiye kwubahiriza ibiri mu masezerano, ikubahiriza ubusugire bw'igihugu ca Eritreya mu kuva mu turere yigaruriye turimwo Badme. Bwana Ahmed yavuze ko igihugu citeguriye gutorera inyishu ibitandukanya abanyagihugu b'ivyo bihugu bibiri, basangiye inyungu n'amaraso. Ku rundi ruhande, umushikiranganji Meskel yemeje ko amahoro yogirira akamaro abanyagihugu b'impande zose ariko ngo bigakogwa mu kwubahiriza amategeko mpuzamakungu "Ethiopia iguma ihonyanga gushika kuri ino tariki."

Utwigoro two kugwanya iyo ngwara iterwa n'imibu tugenda tuburizwamwo n'ingene iyo ngwara itakivurwa n'imiti imwe imwe. Mu cegeranyo c'umwaka kuri iyo ndwara, iryo shirahamwe rivuga ko ibitigiri vy'abayirwaye n'abamaze gupfa atacahindutse muri iyi myaka ibiri iheze, bikaba bitandukanye n'ingene vyari vyakorotse bitangaje twinjira muri iki kinjana. Malaria yica abantu 400.000 buri mwaka, benshi muri bo bakaba ari abo musi y'ubugaragwa bwa Sahara muri Afrika. Hari ubwoba ko imfashanyo mu migambi yo kurwanya malaria zizogabanuka kubera amarorerwa ikiza ca coronavirus kiriko kirakora. Utwigoro two kurwanya iyo ndwara iterwa n'imibu kandi tugenda tuburizwamwo n'ingene iyo ndwara itakivurwa n'imiti imwe imwe. Icegeranyo c'igisata ca ONU kijejwe ubutabazi, OCHA co mu 2019, kivuga ko abantu imiliyoni zitanu n'ibice indwi banduye malariya muri uwo mwaka mu Burundi, igitigiri kingana hafi igice c'abanyagihugu bose bo muri ico gihugu. Muri abo bantu bose, abangana 1801 barahitanywe n'iyo ndwara iterwa n'umubu kuva mu kwezi kwa mbere gushika ku wa 21 ukwezi kw'indwi mu 2019.

Abanywanyi ba Perezida Donald Trump baragize imyiyerekano ejo ku wa kabiri imbere ya sentare nkuru y'igihugu Abarepubulika bo muri Pennsylvania bashaka ko intsinzi ya Joe Biden muri iyo reta ifutwa, ariko abacamanza banse urwo rubanza mu ngingo yashikirijwe mu ryungane rimwe rudende. Uru ni uruhombo runini kuri Prezida Donald Trump amaze igihe asaba ko impari ku vyavuye mu matora zotorerwa umuti na Sentare nkuru y'igihugu. Prezida Trump yatsinzwe mu matora yabaye mu kwezi guheze aho yariko arondera gutwara Amerika ikiringo kigira kabiri. Kuva ico gihe, we n'abanywanyi biwe baritwaye ahantu hatari hake biyamiriza ivyavuye mu matora. Nta na hamwe barigera batsinda. Joe Biden wo mu mugambwe w'aba Democrates yatsinze Perezida Trump ku majwi 306 kuri 232 y'intumwa z'itora, ari na zo zitora umukuru w'igihugu. Ku rwego rw'igihugu, Biden yarushije Trump amajwi imiriyoni indwi. Buramatari wa Pennsylvania Tom Wolf yaramaze kwemeza intsinzi ya Biden muri iyo reta. Nk'uko amategeko agenga intumwa z'itora, intumwa 20 z'iyo reta zizokorana ku wa 14 z'uku kwa cumi na kabiri kugira ngo zemeze ku mugaragaro umukuru w'igihugu yatowe. Hagari aho, Abarepubulika bo muri iyo reta bashaka ko ingingo ya Buramatari Wolf yo kwemeza itsinzi ya Biden ifutwa. Mu ndwi iheze, sentare nkuru y'iyo reta yaranse iki cipfuzo, ari na ho baca bungururiza muri sentare nkuru y'igihugu i Washington. Abashingwamanza bo muri iyo reta hamwe na Buramatari Wolf baneguye uru rubanza bavuga ko ata "shingiro rufise". Banditse bati: "Nta sentare n'imwe irigera ifata icemezo co gufuta ingingo ya Buramatari yo kwemeza ivyavuye mu matora y'umukuru w'igihugu". Ejo ku wa kabiri sentare nkuru y'igihugu yaranse urwo rubanza. Iyo ngingo yanditswe mw'iryungane rimwe rudende nta n'uko yagarutse ku birego vyashikirijwe n'abarepubulika, ikavuga gusa iti: "Icipfuzo cashikirijwe umucamanza Alito nawe akagishikiriza sentare nticakiriwe". Imbere y'amatora, mu gihe ca yo, n'inyuma yayo, Perezida Trump yagumye avuga ko amatora yabayemwo ubusuma ariko ata vyemezo atanga, mbere akama avuga ko sentare nkuru y'igihugu ari yo izofata ingingo ya nyuma ku bijanye n'ivyavuye mu matora. Mu kiringo kimwe gusa ciwe nk'umukuru w'igihugu, Perezida Trump yagenye abacamanza batatu ba sentare nkuru y'igihugu. Aheruka mbere n'ukugena Amy Coney Barrett yateye impari cane kubera basangiye ivyiyumviro, kugira asubirire Ruth Bader Ginsburg yari aherutse kwitaba Imana. Ariko ibi ntibivuze ko urugamba rw'amategeko rurangiriye ng'aha mu kurondera ko intsinzi ya Biden ifutwa. Abarepubulika muri reta ya Texas barashingishije urubanza muri sentare nkuru y'igihugu ejo ku wa kabiri, bavuga ko mu matora yabaye mu zindi ntara zine habayemwo utunenge - urubanza abahinga muvyo amategeko baneguye bikomeye. Mu ndwi iheze, umushikirizamanza mukuru wa Repubulika William Barr yavuze ko igisata ciwe c'amategeko kitigeze kibona ivyemezo vy'uko amatora ya 2020 yoba yarabayemwo ubusuma.

Neymar ubwo yari aryamye mu kibuga nyuma yo kuvunika umutsi wo mu itako Muri uwo mukino wabereye ku kibuga Milton Keynes mu Bwongereza cyarimo abafana 29669, Neymar yakinnye iminota itandatu gusa. Yavunitse ubwo yateraga ishoti, ahita asimburwa na Richarlison ukina mu ikipe ya Everton. Richarlison yagaragaje ko yari umukinnyi wari ukwiye gusimbura Neymar, atsinda igitego cy'umutwe igice cya mbere kirangira - igitego cyaje kuba icy'intsinzi muri uwo mukino. Neymar, abinyujije mu butumwa bwo ku rubuga nkoranyambaga rwa Instagram, yagize ati: "Ndashimira buri wese wanyoherereje ubutumwa bwo kunyifuriza kurwara ubukira, sintekereza ko [imvune] ikomeye". Neymar amaze gutsinda ibitego 16 mu ikipe y'igihugu no muri Paris Saint-Germain muri uyu mwaka w'imikino Byanemejwe kandi na Rodrigo Lasmar, umuganga w'ikipe y'igihugu ya Brezili, wagize ati: "Yababaye. Azakenera igihe gito cyo kugenzura [imvune] anyuzwe no mu cyuma, ariko urebye ntabwo ari imvune ikaze". Kylian Mbappe amaze gutsinda ibitego 15 mu ikipe y'igihugu no muri Paris Saint-Germain muri uyu mwaka w'imikino Mu wundi mukino, mugenzi we Kylian Mbappe bakinana mu ikipe ya Paris Saint-Germain yasimbuwe nyuma yo kuvunikira urutugu mu mukino wa gicuti wahuje Ubufaransa na Uruguay wabereye i Paris mu murwa mukuru w'Ubufaransa. Umukino utaha w'ikipe ya Paris Saint-Germain ifite igikombe cya shampiyona yo mu Bufaransa, uzaba ku wa gatandatu, yakira ikipe ya Toulouse.

Donald Trump yamagana iperereza ryo kumweguza avuga ko ari uburyo gusa bwo kumwibasira Icyegeranyo cy'ako kanama kivuga ko Perezida Trump yashyize inyungu ze bwite za politiki "hejuru y'inyungu za Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Amerika nk'igihugu". Kivuga ko ibyo yabikoze agerageza "gusaba kwivanga kw'amahanga" asaba Ukraine kumufasha ngo azongere gutorwa mu matora yo mu mwaka utaha wa 2020. Icyo cyegeranyo cy'amapaji 300 cyatangajwe ku munsi w'ejo ku wa kabiri kigamije gutanga ishingiro ryo guheraho mu gukura Bwana Trump ku butegetsi. Kivuga ko "cyatahuye ibikorwa byamaze amezi bya Perezida Trump byo gukoresha ububasha ahabwa n'umwanya arimo mu gusaba kwivanga kw'amahanga ku ruhande rwe mu matora yo mu 2020". Bwana Trump ahakana avuga ko nta kibi yakoze, ndetse yavuze ko iryo perereza rigamije gusa kumwibasira. Umukuru w'akanama k'ubutasi ko mu nteko, Adam Schiff (ibumoso) na Nancy Pelosi (iburyo), umukuru w'inteko, bari mu bashaka ko Perezida Trump yeguzwa Mbere yuko imbanzirizamushinga yacyo itangazwa, Perezida Trump - wo mu ishyaka ry'abarepubulikani - yamaganye iryo perereza riyobowe n'abo mu ishyaka ry'abademokarate. Yavuze ko rigaragaza "kudakunda igihugu na busa". Nyuma y'itangazwa ry'icyo cyegeranyo, Stephanie Grisham, umunyamabanga w'ibiro bya perezida w'Amerika bya White House, yavuze ko abademokarate "bananiwe kugaragaza na busa ikimenyetso na kimwe cyo gukora nabi [kwa Trump]". Madamu Grisham yongeyeho ko icyo cyegeranyo "nta kindi kigaragaza kitari ukumanjirwa kwabo [abagikoze]". Ubu iki cyegeranyo kigiye mu kanama k'ubucamanza ko mu nteko. Aka kanama karatangira kugisuzuma kuri uyu wa gatatu ndetse gasuzume ibirego byo kweguza ku mugaragaro Bwana Trump.

Impunzi z'abarundi zahunze uruhagarara rwa politike rwadutse mu mwaka wa 2015 Mw'itangazo ryasohoye ejo ku wa gatanu, iryo shirahamwe rivuga ko ryaronse urwandiko rwo mw'ibanga rwerekana ko abashikiranganji b'intwaro zo hagati ba Tanzania n'u Burundi bumvikanye ko ico gikorwa bagitangura mu ndwi igira kabiri y'uku kwezi kw'icenda bakakirangiza ku wa 31 z'ukwezi kwa 12 uyu mwaka. Seif Magango icegera c'umukuru w'iryo shirahamwe ajejwe akarere ka Afrika y'Ubuseruko, ibiyaga binini n'ihembe rya Afrika ati: "Birababaje cane kubona leta ya Tanzania ishaka kurungika abantu batavyiyumvamwo ahantu ishirahamwe ONU rivuga ko ihonyangwa ry'agateka ka zina muntu ribandanya kakaba akamizwe n'ingoma". Umushikiranganji w'intwaro yo hagati w'u Burundi Pascal Barandagiye, yagiriza ishirahamwe HCR rijejwe impunzi kw'isi ko ridashaka guhungura impunzi ku nyugu zaryo. Mw'iryo tangazo, Amnesty International ivuga ko abo bategetsi babiri bumvikanye ko bategerezwa kwihoza akamo katewe n'ishirahamwe HCR bakibandaniriza umugambi wabo w'uguhungura izo mpunzi. Isubiramwo ibiri muri urwo rwandiko ivuga, Amnesty International imenyesha ko bumvikanye bati: " N'aho HCR yokwerekana ko ishobora gufasha canke igashaka kudindiza umugambi, ibihugu bibiri bizobandanya uyu mugambi mpaka aba Barundi basubiye mu gihugu cabo". Bwana Magango ati: "Amaleta ya Tanzania n'u Burundi ategerezwa guhagarika vyihuta umugambi wabo w'uguhungura impunzi z'abarundi ku nguvu". "Mu gihe ibikorwa bikomeye vy'ihonyangwa ry'agateka ka zina muntu bibandanya, ni nkererwa ko imiryango yobandanya yuguruwe ku barundi bakiri mu gihugu, hamwe n'abo bandi bahunze". Asaba ko impande zose zitatu, Uburundi, Tanzania na HCR zokwumvikana ku buryo uwushaka guhunguka wese yotahukanwa ku gushaka kwiwe kandi bigakorwa mw'iteka n'itekane hisunzwe amasezerano mpuzamakungu. Uburundi buti 'HCR yishakira akazi' Ishirahamwe HCR rivuga ko ridashigikiye na gato ko impunzi zitahukanwa zitavyiyumvamwo. Rivuga ko ingene ibintu bimeze ubu mu Burundi hataragera ko bahimiriza ko impunzi z'Abarundi zihunguka. Ku ruhande rwiwe, umushikiranganji w'intwaro yo hagati w'u Burundi, Pascal Barandagiye, avuga ko kubona ishirahamwe HCR ridashaka ko impunzi zihunguka ari uko ryishakira akazi. Avugana n'abamenyeshamakuru ku wa 27 z'ukwezi kw'umunani i Bujumbura inyuma y'urugendo rwiwe mu makambi ya Nduta na Mtendeli ku wa 25 z'uko kwezi nyene, bwana Barandagiye yavuze ati: "Wonsigurira gute ingene impunzi iza kwiyandikisha mu nkambi ukamusubiza inyuma ngo ntakwije imyaka". "Urudandazwa rurimwo kubera ata mpunzi zihari bazoca bataha kuko nta kazi bosubira kuronka". "Ntidushobora kwemera abantu bagira urudandaza ku barundi bacu, uno munsi tubabwira tuti hagarika urwo rudandazwa, abarundi bacu turabatahana". Rachel Nicholson, umushakashatsi mw'ishirahamwe Amnesty International ku Burundi n'u Rwanda, avuga ko ivyo umushikiranganji yagirije ishirahamwe HCR bidafashe kuko ngo risanzwe rinafise ingorane, akavuga ko gushika mu mpera z'ukwezi kw'indwi ryahawe ibice 22 % ryamahera akenewe kugira rifashe impunzi z'abarundiu muri kano karere. Izo mpunzi zozo zisaba ko amakungu yofata mu minwe ikibazo cazo, zikavuga ko Tanzania ishaka kubirukana kuko ngo idakeneye "kubona umuntu wese yitwa Umurundi ku butaka bwayo". Amashirahamwe agera kw'13 atacemerewe gukorera ku butaka bw' Burundi yarandikye ishirahamwe HCR arisaba gukingira Abarundi bahungiye muri Tanzania, inyuma y'aho bumvitiye ko Uburundi na Tanzania bumvikanye kubahugura ku nguvu. Maitre Armel Niyongere arongoye ACAT rimwe muri ayo mashirahamwe, avuga ko basaba HCR ko yohanura Tanzania igahagarika uwo mugambi. Amenyesha ko bariko bategura kwitwarira leta ya Tanzania yagiriza ko iriko irenga ku masezerano mpuzamakungu yo mu mwaka wa 1951 agenga impunzi.

Riyad Mahrez (yambaye ubururu). Mu mukino ikipe ye ya Leicester City yanganyijemo na Stoke 2-2 kuri uyu wa gatandatu, Mahrez yatsinzemo igitego kimwe. Riyad Mahrez wo muri Algeria yegukanye igihembo cy'umukinnyi mwiza wa Afurika muri 2016. Muri iyi shampiyona arasa nkaho yananiwe kwerekana ubuhanga yerekanye muri Leicester City atsinda ibitego byinshi igihe yegukanaga igikombe cya shampiyona y'Ubwongereza cy'umwaka ushize. Dore uko andi makipe yatsindanye kuri uyu wa gatandatu 04/11/2017 muri shampiyona y'Ubwongereza: Huddersfield yatsinze West Brom 1-0 Newcastle yanganyije na Bournemouth 0-0 Burnley yatsinze Southampton 1-0 Brighton yatsinze Swansea 1-0 Naho ejo ku cyumweru: Tottenham Hotspur izakina Crystal Palace; Manchester City ihure na Arsenal; Chelsea ikine na Manchester United; Everton ihure na Watford.

Mbere bajyanaga 'cotex' zigera kuri 300 none ubu abantu bari kubemerera nyinshi kurushaho Mu kwezi gushize,leta y'u Rwanda yavanyeho umusoro ku nyongeragaciro (TVA) kuri utu dukoresho benshi bita 'Cotex'. Minisiteri y'uburinganire n'iterambere ry'umuryango yavuze ko iki gikorwa kigamije "korohereza abagore n'abakobwa kubona ibi bikoresho". Bamwe mu mpirimbanyi z'uburenganzira bw'abagore mu Rwanda, babwiye BBC ko nubwo iki ari igikorwa cyiza ariko ibi bikoresho bigihenze ku buryo hari benshi batabasha kubigura. Kuva mu kwezi kwa cyenda itsinda ry'abakobwa 10 n'abahungu babiri batangiye umuhate wo gushaka uko bageza 'cotex' ku bakobwa batabasha kuzibona ku mashuri. Kuva mu minsi micye ishize igitekerezo cyabo kiri guterwa ingabo mu bitugu mu buryo budasanzwe nk'uko Jeannine Kizima uri mu bayoboye iki gikorwa yabibwiye BBC Gahuzamiryango. Ikibazo giteye gite? Jeannine Kizima avuga ko ubusanzwe mu bakobwa mu Rwanda hari umuco wo guceceka, umukobwa akaba yabura 'cotex' ntagire uwo abibwira. Ati: "Hari uva iwabo bamuhaye 'cotex' imwe kandi agira imihango myinshi, zamushirana ugasanga yambaye ibitambaro agashaka uko akemura ikibazo acecetse kuko yumva ko ari ikintu kitavugwa". I Matter Initiative, niko umuryango ubahuza udaharanira inyungu witwa, Kizima avuga ko icya mbere bagamije ari uguca uwo muco wo guceceka ku bibazo nk'ibi bireba ubuzima bw'umukobwa. Ati: "Usanga nkatwe bo mu mujyi twibwira ko 'cotex' ihendutse nta muntu wapfa kuyibura, ariko ni ukuri barazibura kuko zirahenze. Kandi bagaceceka. "Uribaza ko 'cotex' imwe iciriritse igura 800Frw, wibaze n'igihe umwana azamara ku ishuri, ubihuze n'abantu badafite ubushobozi n'abumva ko umwana adashobora gukoresha irenze imwe mu kwezi. "Ibyo byose bigahurirana na wa mwana w'umukobwa ucecetse, utavuga icyo kibazo". Hari abumva ko iby'imihango bireba abantu bamwe... Ibi bikoresho I Matter Initiative itanga, Kizima avuga ko babihabwa n'abagiraneza batandukanye bumva impamvu n'akamaro k'igikorwa cyabo. Avuga ko ubu ibi bikoresho babashije kubigeza ku babikeneye kurusha abandi mu bigo by'amashuri bibiri; Marie Reine na St Vincent byombi biri i Rwaza mu majyaruguru y'u Rwanda. Muri ibi bigo avuga ko inshuro eshatu babashije gutanga ibi bikoresho ku bakobwa bagera kuri 450. Bamwe mu bagize I Matter Initiative batangije igikorwa cyo kugeza 'cotex' ku bakobwa badafite ubushobozi bwo kuzigura, Jeanninne Kizima ni ubanza iburyo Jeannine Kizima ati: "Ikindi dukora ni ukumvisha abantu ko ibi bireba buri wese, kuko iyo uvuze imihango abagabo -simvuze bose - hari abumva ko ibyo hari abo bireba, bikaba imbogamizi kumvisha abantu bose ko babigira ibyabo". Ikorosi rishya mu bikorwa byabo Mu minsi micye ishize kuri Twitter hatangiye ubukangurambaga bwo gushyigikira igikorwa cya I Matter Initiative mu ntero bise #FreeThePeriod. Ubu abantu baravuga amapaki y'ibi bikoresho bemeye gutanga, bakanararikira inshuti zabo kugenza nkabo. Abantu banyuranye bamaze kuvuga umubare w'ibi bikoresho bemeye gutanga, muri bo harimo n'umwe mu bategetsi muri guverinoma wemeye amapaki 100 y'ibi bikoresho. Kizima ati: "Umuntu wese ukora ikintu akabona abamushyigikiye aranezerwa, mu byo dukora tugamije ko abantu bamenya ko icyo kibazo gihari. "Twishimiye ko intego y'igitekerezo cyacu y'uko abantu babimenya iri kugerwaho, icya kabiri ni uko bari kubigira ibyabo, abantu ntibumve ko ikibazo cy'imihango kireba bamwe cyangwa kidahari. "Ikirenze kuri ibyo ni uko batari kubibona gusa ahubwo bari no kwitanga, biratwizeza ko intego yacu yo kugera kuri benshi iri kugenda igerwaho". Ntibabaha za 'cotex' gusa banabaganiriza ku buzima bw'imyororokere Kizima avuga ko kugeza ubu kuri Twitter bamaze kwemererwa amapaki arenga 1,000 y'ibi bikoresho. Ati: "Twajyaga dusura abana dufite nka 300 kandi zigakora pe! [zikagera kuri benshi], urumva rero niba tubonye izo zose ko bizarushaho". Kizima avuga ko badaha abakobwa 'cotex' gusa ahubwo babanza bakanabaganiriza ku mibiri yabo, uburyo bwo kuzikoresha n'ibindi bireba ubuzima bw'imyororokere.

Indege Il-20 y'Uburusiya yari isubiye ku kirindiro cayo mu buraruko bushira uburengero bwa Siriya Ubushikiranganji bwo kwivuna abansi bw'Uburusiya bwavuze ko Isarayeli yatumye indege yabwo Il-20 yinjira ku munsi wa mbere mu kirere Siriya yivuniyemwo umwansi, ntiyateguza mu gihe gikwiye Moscou. Indege Il-20 ntiyasubiye kuboneka kuri "radar"(igikoresho cerekana uruja n'uruza rw'indege mu kirere), kuva isaha zitanu z'ijoro zaho muri Siriya. Igisata ca Isarayeli co kwivuna abansi "Israel Defence Force" (IDF) cavuze ko "kibabajwe" n'urwo rupfu. Mw'itangazo cacishije kuri Twitter, cabandanije kivuga kiti: "Isarayeli ifata ubutegetsi bwa Siriya burongowe na Perezida Assad n'igisirikare ciwe, ko arico cakoroye indege y'Uburusiya, ko aribwo bukwiye kubibazwa." Isarayeli yabandanije ivuga ko indege zayo zari zimaze kugaruka mu kirere ca Isarayeli, igihe ibisasu vya "missiles" vyakoroye iyo ndege bitegwa. Isarayeli - yidogera Irani na Hezbollah - yemera gake ko igaba ibitero kuri Siriya, ariko umwe mu basirikare bayo yavuze mu minsi iheze ko ibitero vy'ico gihugu vyibasiye inyungu 200 za Irani muri Siriya, mu mezi 18 arangiye. Leta ya Isarayeli itewe amakenga no kubona igisirikare ca Irani muri Siriya, n'ibigwanisho vya Irani birungikigwa umuhari Hezbollah ufasha igisirikare c'igihugu ca Syria. Mu vyukuri vyagenze gute? Ayo makuru ntasobanutse neza kandi ivyo Uburusiya bushikiriza bikwiye gutohozwako. Ico gitero co ku munsi wa mbere bivugwa ko cabereye ku birometero 35 uvuye ku nkengera za Syria, mu gihe indege y'Uburusiya Ilyushin Il-20 yariko isubira ku kirindiro cayo ca Hmeimim hafi y'igisagara ca Latakia kiri mu buraruko bushira uburengero. Ikinyamakuru Tass c'Uburusiya kivuga ko indege Il-20 "yabuzw'irengero igihe c'igitero c'indege zine za Isarayeli F-16 ku nyungu za Siriya mu ntara ya Latakia". Amakuru aturuka mu binyamakuru vya Siriya, avuga ko vyavuze ku vyerekeye ico gitero imbere yuko iyo ndege inyika. Ikigo c'itangazamakuru Sana kivuga ko igisirikare cavuze ko casambuye "missiles z'umwansi zaje ziva mu kiyaga, zerekejwe mu gisagara ca Latakia". Ikarata yasohowe n'igisirikare c'Uburusiya yerekana inzira y'indege F-16 za Isirayeli n'indege Il-20 y'Uburusiya yarashwe igakoroka itariki 17/09/2018 Televiziyo ya Siriya yaratangaje ko habaye ibiturika mu kirere ca Latakia imbere y'isaha zine z'ijoro. Haheze iminota 30, Facebook y'ikigo Sana ivuga ko igisirikare ca Siriya co mu Kirere cihoye "missiles" z'umwansi. Uburusiya bwagiriza iki Isirayeli? Mw'itangazo ryashizwe ahabona, Uburusiya buvuga ko ibitero Isirayeli yakoze vyerekana ko ico gihugu ataco cinona, kw'ico gihugu gikwiye gushigwako ivyabaye, mu gihe cagabishije ko kigiye gutera mu kiringo kidashika no ku munota umwe, bituma indege y'Uburusiya yariko igenzura akarere itaronka umwanya ukwiye wo kuva muri ako karere. "Indege za Israeli zatumye amato y'ingwano n'indege zo mu kirere bibura ingene bivyifatamwo," niko umuvugizi w'igisirikare yavuze. Uwo muvugizi yavuze ko Isirayeli "yakoresheje indege y'Uburusiya mu kwikingira", ituma iyo ndege "ija mu nzira y'ibitero bigabwa n'igisirikare co mu kirere ca Siriya". Uwo muvugizi yavuze ko iyo ndege yahanuwe na "missile" ya Siriya. Indege 4 z'ingwano za Isarayeli zo mu bwoko F-16 (nk'iyi) nizo zagavye ibitero kuri Siriya Isirayeli yo ivuga iki? Isirayeli ivuga ko indege za IDF zahama ibirindiro vy'igisirikare ca Siriya "aho uburyo bwo gukora ibigwanisho bitumbereza kandi vyica, bwagira burungikigwe Hezbollah, butanzwe na Irani". Ivuga ko "missiles" za Siriya zitatumberejwe neza, ko indege za Isirayeli zari zimaze gushika mu karere kazo igihe zategwa. Iryo tangazo rivuga ko igisirikare ca Siriya cari gikwiye kubanza kuraba ko "ata ndege y'Uburusiya yari mu kirere", ico gihugu kigahererekana amakuru na Moscou. Inyuma y'ivyo, Ubushikiranganji bw'imigenderanire y'Uburusiya n'amakungu bwahamagaje uwuserukira Isirayeli mw'ico gihugu, ngo yisigure. Izo nsiguro zitangwa n'ivyo bihugu zirumvikana? Reka twumve insiguro y'umunyamakuru wa BBC mu vyo kwivuna abansi, Jonathan Marcus Uburusiya koko burashavuye. Ico umuntu yokwibaza, abarusiya bidogera Isirayeli bikwiye? Ivyaha biri kubiri. Uguhererekana amakuru kwakogwa kera ntakukiriho muri kino gihe. Igisirikare ca Isirayeli co mu kirere kirafise abagenzura indege zo mu kirere bavuga ururimi rw'ikirusiya, bashobora kuvugana na bagenzi babo mu Burusiya. Ariko Moscou ikavuga ko Isirayeli yabamenyesheje ivy'ico gitero hasigaye umunota umwe ngo kigabwe. Ubwa kabiri Uburusiya buvuga ko Isirayeli yakoresheje "radar signature" kugira ngo ikoreshe indege ya Ilyushin mu kunyegeza indege zayo. Igisirikare ca Siriya co mu kirere ngo categerezwa kuba camenye ko indege y'Uburusiya iri mu micungararo, kitiriwe kiraraba ivyo Isirayeli yari igiye gukora. Hashobora kuba hari ibintu vyinshi vyatumye iyo ndege ihanugwa. Kubera iki Uburusiya buri muri Siriya? Uburusiya bwatanguye kugabira ibitero muri Siriya mu 2015, bubisabwe na Perezida Bashar al-Assad, ari ku butegetsi bw'igihugu kiri mu ngwano imaze imyaka indwi, imaze guhitana abantu barenga 350000. Igisirikare c'Uburusiya cavuze mu kwezi kwa kane uno mwaka, ko kimaze amezi 18 gifasha Siriya kwubaka uburyo bwo mu kirere bwo kwivuna umwansi, nkuko bivugwa n'ikinyamakuru Guardian co mu Bwongereza. Uburusiya buvuga ko ibitero vyabwo vyibasira gusa "imirwi y'iterabwoba", ariko abaharanira amateka bo bakavuga ko bihitana abagwanyi hamwe n'abanyagihugu. Ku bw'ikigo kigenzura ingwano ibera muri Siriya "Syrian Observatory for Human Rights" co mu Bwongereza, niburiburi abasivile 7928 hamwe n'abagwanyi 10069 baramaze kugwa mu bitero vy'Uburusiya.

Diamond Platnumz Umushikiranganji ajejwe kumenyesha amakuru, imico n'inkino, Dr Harrison Mwakyembe yabwiye abashingamateka ko yahagaritswe hakurikijwe amategeko mashasha yerekeye imbuga ngurukanabumenyi aherutse kwemezwa mu kwezi guheze. Reta yaheruka kuvuga ko kimwe mu bibazo biyikomereye ari imico iva hanze, kurinda imico n'imigenzo vy'abatanzania kubera uruja n'uruza rw'abantu kw'isi. Impera ya Instagram ubutumwa, 1 "Hari abantu rurangiranwa benshi bacu bagira ibintu bibi ku mbuga ngurukanabumenyi. Ejo twarafashe umuririmvyo Diamond, turamushikana imbere ya polisi akaba ariko arabazwa ku mafoto yakwiragije, na Nandi na we nyene ategerezwa gushikanwa imbere ya polisi kugira abazwe, ari na ko tunihweza ingene twobashikana imbere ya sentare. "Ntere akamo ku rwaruka ko imbuga ngurukanabumenyi atari iyarara yo gutamwo imicafu, iki gihugu gifise imico dukeye kubungabunga", ni ko Mwakyembe yavuze. Nandi na we nyene n'umuririmvyi rurangiranwa, video ariko ikaba yarakwiragijwe ku mbuga ngurukanabumenyi ari kumwe n'umuririmvyi mugenzi we Billnas bivugwa ko bakundana, yambaye agahuzu ko musi gusa agaramye iruhande y'uwo mukunzi wiwe. Amategeko mashasdha agenga imbuga ngurukanabumenyi, yashizweho kugira zikoreshwe neza, mu gihe abayagwanya bavuga ko ayo mategeko ari ayo kubuza abantu gushikiriza iciyumviro muri Tanzania.

Mu buryo bw'impuzandengo, umugore wo muri Tanzaniya abyara abana barenga batanu mu buzima bwe Mpoki Ulisubisya, umunyamabanga uhoraho muri minisiteri y'ubuzima muri Tanzaniya, yabwiye iki kigo cyitwa FHI 360 ko kigomba gukurikiza iryo tegeko ako kanya. Mu ibaruwa yo ku itariki ya 19 y'uku kwezi kwa cyenda, Bwana Ulisubisya agira ati: "Nsabye ko muhagarika aka kanya gutangaza [mu bitangazamakuru] no mu bundi buryo bwo gutangaza, ibikorwa byose bijyanye no kuboneza urubyaro, kugeza igihe muzongera guhererwa andi mabwiriza." Ibiro ntaramakuru Reuters byatangaje ko byagerageje kuvugana n'iki kigo cyahagaritswe ariko ko ntacyo byatangarijwe n'iki kigo. Ibi bibaye nyuma yaho Perezida John Magufuli avuze ku itariki ya 9 y'uku kwezi kwa cyenda ko abagore bakwiye kureka gukoresha imiti yo kuboneza urubyaro kubera ko Tanzaniya icyeneye ko abantu barushaho kororoka. Icyo gihe Depite Cecil Mwambe utavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi yanenze ayo magambo ya Bwana Magufuli, avuga ko anyuranyije na gahunda y'ubuzima y'iki gihugu. Mu mwaka wa 2016, Bwana Magufuli na bwo yavuze amagambo nk'ayo. Nyuma yo gutangiza gahunda yo kwigira ubuntu mu burezi bw'ibanze no mu mashuri yisumbuye, yagize ati: "Abagore ubu bashobora kujugunya imiti yo kuboneza urubyaro. Uburezi ubu ni ubuntu." Tanzaniya ituwe n'abaturage barenga miliyoni 53. 49% byabo bakaba batunzwe n'amadolari y'Amerika atageze kuri abiri buri munsi. Mu buryo bw'impuzandengo, umugore wo muri Tanzaniya abyara abana barenga batanu mu buzima bwe - umwe mu mibare iri hejuru cyane ku isi. Kuva yagera ku butegetsi mu mwaka wa 2015, Bwana Magufuli yashyizeho ingamba nyinshi zitavugwaho rumwe. Nko mu mwaka ushize wa 2017, yavuze ko abanyeshuri b'abakobwa batwaye inda babuzwa kongera kwiga nyuma yo kubyara.

Mohamed Salah amaze kwinjiriza Liverpool ibitsindo 26 uno mwaka Hasigaye iminota itanu ngo igice ca mbere kirangire, Alex Oxlade-Chamberlain yahereje ipasi Salah yaciye yinjiza igitsindo ca 24 mw'ihiganwa rya Premier League ry'uno mwaka. Igitsindo ca kabiri cinjijwe na Sadio Mané ku munota wa 55 mu gice ca kabiri, aherejwe na Roberto Firmino. Umumenyereza Klopp yavuze ko akunda ingene Salah akina: "Ndakunda ibitsindo yinjiza, ndakunda ingene ahererekana umupira. Ndakunda uwo mukinyi, " niko yavuze kuri Salah. "Avyifatamwo neza cane, ariko n'abandi bakinyi bahambaye nkawe kandi arabizi."

Ole Gunnar Solskjaer amenyereza Cardiff mu 2014 Uwo mugwi wa Premier League watangaje iyo nkuru utabishaka ku rubuga rwayo ku munsi wa Kabiri ku mugoraba, munyuma uca uyikurako. Solskjaer w'imyaka 45, yinjirije Manchester United ibitsindo 126 mu mahiganwa 11 akina i Old Trafford. Uwo mugabo yahora akinira umugwi w'igihugu ca Norvège agiye gusubirira Jose Mourinho, yirukanywe ku munsi wa kabiri, akaba azofashwa n'uwigeze kuba umumenyereza wa kabiri w'uwo mugwi Mike Phelan. Solskjaer yarasanzwe amenyereza umugwi Molde wo muri Norvège, ariko ihiganwa ryabo ryo mu 2018 ryararangiye kubera kwinjira mu gihe c'imbeho nyinshi, irindi rikazotangura mu kwezi kwa Gatatu. Ku munsi wa kabiri United yashize akanya gato ku mbuga yayo videwo y'umukinyi Solskjaer yinjiza igitsindo catumye Manchester United itwara igikombe ca Champions League mu 1999, yahuye na Bayern Munich. Kuri iyo videwo hari handitse: "Solskjaer abaye umumenyereza wacu mfatakibanza, amahiganwa 20 atwaye igikombe kivuye kw'ico gitsindo yinjije i Camp Nou..." Umushikiranganji wa mbere wa Norvège, Erna Solberg yarakeje igena rya Solskjaer ku mbuga hwaniro, yandika ati: "Umunsi uhambaye ku mupira w'amaguru muri Norvège. Ugire amahirwe mu kugenzura aba Red Devils." Munyuma yahavuye ahanagura ubwo butumwa. Urukino rwa mbere Solskjaer azokinisha ka mumenyereza wa United ruzobahuza na Cardiff City ku munsi wa Gatandatu - warasubijwe mu mahiganwa yo hasi uvuye muri Premier League mu 2014, yaramaze amezi umunani amenyereza umugwi w'aba Bluebirds. Ari mu kiringo ca kabiri amenyereza umugwi Molde, akaba aheruka gushira igikumu ku yandi masezerano mu ntango za kuno kwezi. United iya gatandatu muri Premier League, izoraba ko yogena umumenyereza nyezina mu mpera z'ihiganwa ry'uno mwaka.
