Lucy Gichuhi agiye guserukira umugambwe Family First mu nama nshingamateka Ni we yitezwe kuba umukenguzamateka aserukira Australia yo mu bumanuko inyuma yaho sentare ihakaniye itogwa ry'umukuru w'umugambwe Bob Day. Hari ibibazo vyadutse, abantu bibaza niba umupfasoni Gichuhi yarafise ubwenegihugu bubiri igihe c'amatora -ivyo bikaba vyomubuza kuja mu nama nkenguzamateka. Ubuserukizi bwa Kenya muri Australia bwavuze ko yaciye atakaza ubwenegihugu bwa Kenya igihe aronkeye ubwa Australia, niko itororokanirizo ry'amakuru ABC ryavuze. Umupfasoni Gichuhi yavuze ko bikwiye ko atogwa kandi ko akwije ibisabwa ngo akore mu nama nkenguzamateka: "Narakomerewe igihe nashika muri Australia mu myaka 19 iheze ata muntu numwe nzi. Ndi kumwe n'umugabo wanje William hamwe n'imicuko itatu."

Kimwe bi bitero catumbereje ibisi yari itwaye abakozi ba leta Abashika ku munani baguye ku murwa mukuru Kabul, igihe ibisasu bitatu vyaturika bikurikirana mu mwanya muto. Ubushikiranganji bw'intwaro yo hagati bwavuze ko mu gitero kimwe, umwiyahuzi yagereye ibisi yari itwaye abakozi ba leta. Mu ntara ya Takhar, mu buraruko bwa Kabul, igitero c'aba Taliban kuri bariyeri zibiri cahitanye abapolisi batandatu, nayo i Nangarhar, abandi bantu indwi bahitwanywe n'igisasu caturikiye mu mpande z'ibarabara. Abahinga mu vy'umutekano bavuga ko ibitero vy'aba Taliban bigenda biraba vyinshi kugira biyongere igihagararo mu gihe bari mu biganiro na Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika.

Mbwana Samatta mu mwambaro mushya w'ikipe nshya Uyu rutahizamu yaguzwe avuye mu ikipe ya Genk yo mu Bubiligi, aba umuntu wa mbere wo muri Tanzania ugiye gukina muri shampiyona y'ikiciro cya mbere mu Bwongereza. Muri kiganiro cya mbere yahaye Villa TV y'iyi kipe, uyu musore w'imyaka 27 uzwi cyane ku izina rya 'Ally' yavuze ko ibi ari ishema ku gihugu cye. Ati: "Ndishimye cyane, ni intambwe nini cyane mu rugendo rwanjye rwo gukina umupira. "Ku bantu bose b'Abatanzania, iyi ni intambwe ikomeye no ku gihugu. "Buri wese iwacu yari ategereje kureba igihe umuntu wo muri Tanzania azabasha kugera muri Premier League, none ngaha ndahageze uyu munsi. Nshimiye cyane". Samatta yamenyekaniye mu ikipe ya Simba SC ariho ahita agurwa na TP Mazembe yo muri DR Congo (2011 - 2016) ikipe yanatwaranye nayo igikombe cy'amakipe yabaye aya mbere muri Africa. Iyi kipe niyo yaje kumugirisha muri Genk mu Bubiligi ari naho Aston Villa yamuguze. Samatta avuga ko yibuka cyane ko yakuze areba Premier League, ko yibuka abona Gabby Agbonlahor wakiniraga Aston Villa ayitsindira ibitego. Ati: "Kuva ndi umwana, imwe mu makipe narebaga na Aston Villa irimo. "Nzi byinshi kuri Aston Villa ariko cyane cyane abakinnyi bakinnye hano mbere. "Ni ikipe ikomeye cyane kuri njyewe".

Amazu menshi yahiye ahitwa Malibu Kino gitigiri kigezweko inyuma yaho hatorewe ibindi biziga 14 iruhande y'umuji wa Paradise mu buraruko, bituma igitigiri c'abemejwe ko bapfuye kija kuri 23. Abandi bantu babiri bapfiriye mu bumanuko, hafi ya Malibu. Abantu bashika 250000 vyabaye ngombwa ko bahunga, bata ingo zabo mu kwikingira uwo muriro. Hagataho Perezida Donald Trump yerekanye agashavu avuga ko abajejwe gukurikirana ivy'amashamba aribo bakwiye kubibazwa. Uwo muriro uherereye he? Uwo muriro w'abashinze ikambi wahereye ahitwa Butte County ku munsi wa kane, abazimya ntibashobora kuwuhagarika, uca wibasira umuji wa Paradise. Uwundi muriro wahereye ku nkengera zo mu bumanuko i Malibu ku munsi wa gatanu, ubu ukaba wiyongeye, wikuba kabiri. Amashusho ya Satellite yerekana aho umuriro uri mu buraruko no mu bumanuko bwa Californie Uwo muriro uzwi kw'izina Woolsey, watandukiye akarere k'amahegitare 28000. Ibisagara abantu bariko barimugwa bakugwamwo ni nka Thousand Oaks, aho umuntu yitwaje ikigwanisho yishe abantu 12 ku munsi wa gatatu. Abagenzura ihindagurika ry'ikirere bagabishije bavuga ko gishobora kubandanya kiba kibi gushika mu ndwi iza, ariko abagwanya umuriro bavuga ko umuyaga biteze ushobora kubafasha kuzimya umuriro. Perezida Donald Trump yavuze iki? Perezida yidogeye abakora mu kigo kigwanya umuriro muri Californie, avuga ko ashobora guhagarika amahera ubutegetsi bw'igihugu bwaha iyo leta ya Californie. Mu butumwa yacishije kuri Twitter ku munsi wa gatandatu, yagirije ubutegetsi "kudakora neza". Evan Westrub, umuvugizi wa Bulamatari Jerry Brown, yaramwishuye, avuga ko amajambo ya Bwana Trump "adafashe kandi ko ataciriwe agace ku biba". "Ikituraje ishinga n'abanya Californie bibasiwe n'uwo muriro hamwe n'abariko baricamwo kubiri ngo barokore ubuzima n'amatungo," niko yavuze. Abaririmvyi bakomeye baneguye imvugo ya Bwana Trump. Umuririmvyi aturuka muri Californie, Katy Perry yavuze ko amajambo yashikirije ari "inyishu y'umuntu adafise umutima", mu gihe uwundi muririmvyi John Legend yavuze ko Bwana Trump "adashobora kwifatanya n'abanya Californie bibasiwe n'impanuka ikomeye". Muri kino gihe hari imiriro 16 muri leta ya Californie. Ako karere karibasiwe n'imiriro y'ishamba mu myaka ya vuba, kaminuza mu mateka y'iyo leta, ukaba ari uwateye ahitwa Mendocino muri uno mwaka w'i 2018.

Ni indege yubatswe na kompanyi Stratolaunch - yashinzwe mu mwaka wa 2011 na nyakwigendera Paul Allen uri mu bashinze sosiyete ya Microsoft - yakorewe gufasha ibyogajuru guhagurukira mu kirere. Ifite ubugari bwa metero 117, ikaba mu rugendo rwayo rwa mbere yagendeye ku muvuduko wa kilometero 274 ku isaha. Byitezwe ko kohereza icyogajuru mu kirere kivuye kuri iyi ndege buzaba uburyo buhendutse kurusha ubusanzwe bukoreshwa bwo kucyoherereza ku butaka. Biteganyijwe ko iyi ndege izajya igurutswa ku butumburuke bwa kilometero 10 mbere yuko ibyogajuru byoherezwa mu isanzure biyihagurukiyeho. Iyi ndege ifite ubugari bungana n'uburebure bw'ikibuga cy'umupira w'amaguru cyo muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Amerika. Mu kugeragezwa ngo ijye mu kirere, yahagurukiye ku kibuga kiri ahitwa Mojave muri leta ya California, ku munsi w'ejo ku wa gatandatu. Evan Thomas, umupilote wayihagurukije, yabwiye abanyamakuru ko uyu mwitozo wari "mwiza cyane kandi ahanini wagenze uko wari wateguwe, indege iguruka uko byari byitezwe". Ku rubuga rwa interineti rwa Stratolaunch, iyi kompanyi yatangaje ko ifite intego yuko "ibyogajuru bizajya bizamuka bikajya mu isanzure mu buryo busanzwe nko gufata indege isanzwe y'ubucuruzi". Iyi kompanyi yongeyeho ko iyi ari intambwe ikomeye itewe mu buhanga bwo kubaka indege. Umuherwe w'Umwongereza Richard Branson ufite kompanyi yitwa Virgin Galactic, na we yakoze indege yo guhagurutsa ibyogajuru. Kompanyi Stratolaunch ivuga ko indege yayo ari yo "ngari cyane kurusha izindi ku isi", ariko hari izindi ndege ziyisumba mu burebure bwo guhera ku zuru kugera ku murizo.

Joan Nalubega w'imyaka 23, wakuriye mu kigo kirera abana b'imfubyi, yakoze isabune yirukana imibu. Yabwiye ikiganiro BBC Focus on Africa ati: "Mu mwaka wa 2016 nabonye ko ibyo abantu bakoresha hano mu kwirinda ari bimwe n'ibimaze imyaka igera muri za mirongo bikoreshwa". Nalubega avuga ko yanabonye ko abarwayi ba malaria bakomezaga kwiyongera mu bice byo mu cyaro byo muri Uganda, nubwo bwose hari ubukangurambaga bwa leta bwo kuyirwanya. Yagize ati: "Abantu benshi bakomeje kugerageza gukora ibyo za leta zibabwira, babona inzitiramibu ndetse bakaziraramo, ariko kubera ko n'ubundi bakomeza kuyirwara ibyo babivuyeho ntibakibikurikiza". Nalubega yashinze kompanyi yitwa Union-Ganics (Uganics) ikora ibikoresho byo kurwanya imibu birimo n'iyo sabune. Mu 2018, Africa Innovation Summit yashyize Joan Nalubega ku rutonde rw'Abanyafurika 50 barushije abandi guhanga udushya. Nalubega avuga ko iyo sabune yakoze yirukana imibu - irimo n'itera malaria - ishobora gukoreshwa buri munsi. Isabune igura $3 (hafi 3,000Frw) ituma umuntu adashobora kurumwa n'umubu Iboneka mu maduka no mu bitaro byo muri Uganda, ndetse ku bakene leta yabarihiye amwe mu mafaranga y'ikiguzi cyayo kugira ngo igiciro cyayo kibanogere bashobore kuyigura. Ubu buvumbuzi bwe bwatumye ashyirwa ku rutonde rwa nyuma rw'abarimo guhatanira igihembo cy'umuryango Jack Ma Foundation w'umuherwe wo mu Bushinwa. Kigenewe ba rwiyemezamirimo bo muri Afurika, mu kubongerera ubushobozi mu bushabitsi bwabo buba bukiri mu ntangiriro.

Ubutumwa benshi babonaga bashatse gufungura YouTube Ku mbuga nkoranyambaga hari ukwinuba kugaragara kw'abakoresha YouTube bavuga ko batashoboraga kuyifungura. Bamwe babanje kugira ngo ni ikibazo cyabo bonyine kugeza babonye ko kiri kuri benshi mu gihugu. Melchior Manirakiza w'i Ngozi yabwiye BBC ko yabanje kubyumvana abandi kuwa gatanu nijoro, nawe yagerageza ntifunguke, agatekereza ko ari ikibazo gisanzwe cyabaga kuri bamwe na bamwe. Bwana Manirakiza ati: "Kugeza ejo [ku cyumweru] byarabonekaga ko ari hose mu gihugu, abantu benshi bari kwidoga ko yaba yafunzwe, ntabwo tuzi ibiri kuba". Abakoresha uru rubuga mu Burundi babwiye BBC ko mu gitondo uyu munsi ari bwo YouTube yongeye kubasha gufunguka mu gihugu. Urwego rwa leta rushinzwe kugenzura iby'ikoranabuhanga (Agence de Régulation de Communication et des Télécommunications) ntacyo rwatangarije BBC kuri iki kibazo. Félicité Muganwa, umunyeshuri muri kaminuza mu Bujumbura wari wananiwe gufungura YouTube muri weekend yabwiye BBC ko yizeye ko ibi bitazasubira kuko uru rubuga aruvanaho byinshi. Leta y'u Burundi iheruka kwamagana imbuga zimwe zikorera kuri YouTube ivuga ko zikorera mu Rwanda zigacishwaho amakuru avuga ibitari ukuri mu Burundi. YouTube ni urubuga rwa kabiri rusurwa cyane ku isi nyuma ya Google nk'uko bivugwa n'urubuga rw'ubushakashatsi kuri internet Wearesocial. Ni urubuga rwa kabiri kandi rusurwa cyane mu Burundi nyuma ya Google nk'uko bigaragazwa na Alexa, urundi rubuga rw'ubushakashatsi ku basura internet ku isi. YouTube ishyirwaho amashusho ajyanye n'imyidagaduro, imikino, politiki, ubuzima, amakuru n'ibindi byinshi. U Burundi buritegura kwinjira mu matora y'umukuru w'igihugu mu kwezi kwa gatanu umwaka utaha.

Intambara ishingiye ku gusubiranamo kw'abatuye Somalia yatumye ubucuruzi bwinshi budakomeza gutera imbere. Ariko abacuruzi b'amafi bo ku cyambu cya Kismayo baravuga ko ubu noneho bashobora kohereza amafi kubera ko bashobora kuyabika neza mu cyuma gituma akomeza kuba afutse kiri ku ruganda ruyatunganya. Akunze kuhaboneka yiganjemo amafi manini nka kamongo. Al-Shabab yagavye igitero ku kirindiro c'abasirikare ba Somalia Abatama babiri bishwe barashwe na Al-Shabab muri Somalia Umugore yarongowe incuro 11 yicishijwe amabuye muri Somalia Mu myaka ya vuba iheruka, Kenya yongereye igipimo cy'amafi itumiza mu bihugu by'amahanga birimo Ubushinwa, kubera ko amafi aturuka mu kiyaga cya Victoria atari agishoboye guhaza isoko rya Kenya.

Abanyagihugu bihaye amabarabara muri Sudani mu kwezi kwa 12 basaba Perezida Omar al-Bashir gutanga imihoho Ababibonye bavuga ko abantu isinzi bariko baja ku kirimba c'umukuru w'igihugu, igihe abajejwe umutekano babazibira. Hari amakuru avugwa ko iyindi myiyerekano nka mweniyo yabaye no mu bindi bisagara. Amakuru ava muri ico gihugu avuga ko ku munsi wa Gatatu, igipolisi cafashe umufasha w'umukuru w'umuhari "Reform Now Movement" (RNM), Gazhi Salah al-Din, kimujana ahantu hataramenyekana. Iyo midugararo yatanguye mu kwezi kwa 12 inyuma yaho ibiciro vy'ibifungurwa bidugiye, ariko gikuru mu vyo abiha amabarabara basaba, bashaka ko Perezida Omar al-Bashir ava ku butegetsi. Leta ivuga ko abantu barenga 20 bapfuye muri iyo myiyerekano, umuryango mpuzamakungu ONU ukaba waraneguye inyifato y'igipolisi, uvuga ko cakoresheje inguvu nyinshi hamwe n'amasase y'ukuri.

Miley Cyrus n'umugabo we bakoze ubukwe mu kwezi kwa 12 Itangazo abahagarariye Miley bahaye televiziyo CBS yo muri Amerika rivuga ko "ubu bombi bumvikanye gutandukana". Uyu muhanzi hamwe n'uyu mukinnyi wa cinema bahuye mu myaka 10 ishize mu bikorwa byabo by'ubuhanzi. Aba bombi bagize ibihe byo kugenda bakundana bakongera bagatana - mu 2013 batandukanyeho igihe - bongeye gusubirana mu 2015 maze mu 2018 bararushinga. Miley wakunzwe cyane mu ndirimbo nka "Malibu" cyangwa "Party in the USA", yemeje iby'ubukwe bwabo ku mbuga nkoranyambaga yerekana amashusho yabwo ubwo bwabaga mu kwezi kwa 12. Bakoreye ubukwe mu nzu ya Miley iherereye muri Leta ya Tennessee ahari hatumiwe abantu bacye b'inshuti n'abo mu miryango yabo. Itangazo ryo gutana kwabo rigira riti: "Bemeranyije ko ibi ari byo bikwiriye mu gihe bombi bashyize imbaraga mu mirimo yabo". "Bazakomeza kuba ababyeyi beza b'amatungo yo mu nzu bafite kuko bazajya bagabana umwanya wo kubana nayo. Mwubahe ubuzima bwite bwabo". Mbere y'aya makuru bemeje, ku wa gatandatu Miley yari yashyize ifoto kuri Instagram imugaragaza asa n'ubabaye kandi atambaye impeta ye yo gushyingirwa.

Perezida Bashir yatanguye gutwara ahiritse ubutegetsi mu 1989 Yashikirije ayo majambo inyuma y'imyirekano iba muri Sudani isaba Bwana Bashir gutanga imihoho. Yagize ati: "Ivyo ni vyaba vyofasha gutabara ubuzima, bigafasha kwirinda ingwano yo gusesa amaraso, reka uwo mugabo yigire amahoro." "Naho nanka ukudahana ivyaha, nkemera ko abantu bakwiye guhanwa ku vyaha bakoze, ariko ni twaba dushobora kuvyishura muri ubwo buryo, reka uwo mugabo yigire." Perezida Bashir yagirizwa na CPI ivyaha vyo gutegura ingwano n'ivyaha vyibasira zina muntu i Darfur - ibirego ahakana. Bisigura ko ashobora gufatigwa mu gihugu icarico cose kiri mu masezerano ya CPI. Bwana Ibrahim niwe yatanguje agashimwe k'imiliyoni zitanu z'amadolari ($5m) gatangwa kira mwaka ku mutegetsi wa Afrika aba yatwaye neza, mu kuzamura ubuzima bw'abanyagihugu munyuma agakinjura. Abajijwe ko Bwana Bashir yoja mu bahabwa ako gashimwe, Bwana Ibrahim yabwiye BBC Focus on Africa ati: "Nibaza ko muriko murafyina."

Real Madrid yananiwe kugera muri kimwe cya kane cya Champions League bwa mbere guhera mu mwaka wa 2010 Ajax yari yatsinzwe ibitego 2-1 mu mukino ubanza, yatunguye Real ifite igikombe giheruka cya Champions League iyinyagira ibitego 4-1 ku kibuga Santiago Bernabéu cya Real, iyisezerera ityo ku giteranyo cy'ibitego 5-3 mu mikino yombi. Gutsindwa kandi kwa Real yikurikiranya mu mikino yayihuje na Barcelona, kwatumye isezererwa mu mikino yo guhatanira igikombe cy'umwami cyo muri Espanye cya Copa del Rey, ndetse kuri ubu irushwa amanota 12 na Barcelona iyoboye urutonde rw'agateganyo rwa shampiyona ya La Liga yo muri iki gihugu. Umutoza Solari yagize ati: "Ntabwo naje muri iyi kipe mu gihe nk'iki gikomeye nzanywe no kwegura". "Icyo tugomba gukora ni ugutuza mu buryo bushoboka bwose kandi tukabyakira dukomeza umutsi mu buryo bwiza bushoboka bwose". Solari wahoze ari umukinnyi ukina hagati mu kibuga muri iyi kipe ya Real, yatangiye gutoza Real mu kwezi kwa cumi na kumwe k'umwaka ushize wa 2018 "Madrid iruta buri muntu wese muri twe - kandi iteka igaruka yisuganyije, kandi ifite imbaraga nyinshi kurushaho". 'Uyu mwaka w'imikino urangiriye aha' Solari wahoze ari umukinnyi ukina hagati mu kibuga muri iyi kipe ya Real, yasimbuye ku butoza Julen Lopetegui mu kwezi kwa cumi na kumwe k'umwaka ushize wa 2018, ashyira umukono ku masezerano yo kuyitoza kugera mu mwaka wa 2021. Uku gusezererwa kwa Real mu mikino ya kimwe cy'umunani, kwanditse amateka yo kuba inshuro ya mbere iyi kipe yatsindiye igikombe cya Champions League inshuro 13 inaniwe kugera mu mikino ya kimwe cya kane guhera mu mwaka wa 2010. Ndetse myugariro wayo Dani Carvajal afite ubwoba ko "uyu mwaka w'imikino urangiriye aha" kuri iyi kipe yatwaye ibikombe bitatu biheruka bya Champions League. Carvajal yagize ati: "Ntabwo nari narigeze numva meze nabi muri jye nkuko numva meze kuri ubu, sinzi uko nabisobanura. Mu cyumweru kimwe, buri kintu cyose [buri rushanwa ryose] kiraducitse, kandi byose byabaye nyuma y'imikino twakiniye ku kibuga cyacu". "Biragaragara ko uyu mwaka w'imikino kuri twe urangiriye aha, ariko tuzakomeza gukora mu mikino ya shampiyona kuko nibyo tugomba gukora kandi tugomba kuba abanyamwuga".

Uyu muganga yahawe agashimwe k'amahoro kitiriwe Nobel avuga ko yaronse amajambo amubwira ko ashobora kwicwa inyuma y'aho yiyamirije igandagurwa ry'abantu 18 mu ntara ya Kivu y'Ubumanuko mu kwezi guheze. Umupfasoni Bachelet asaba ko haba amatohoza ataho yegamiye kuri iryo terabwoba. Umukuru w'igihugu Felix Tshisekedi yariyemeje ko leta izokora amatohoza kuri iryo terabwoba kandi yiyemeza gukingira umutekano wa Muganga Mukwege. Muganga Mukwege ni umuhinga mu bijanye n'ubuzima bw'irondoka ku bagore (gynécologue), akaba afise ivuriro mu ntara ya Kivu y'Ubumanuko. Yaronkejwe agashimwe k'amahoro kitiriwe Nobel mu 2018 ku gikorwa ciwe co kwitaho abakorewe ihohotera rishingiye ku gitsina mu gihe c'intambara.

Sergio Ramos yari afite imyaka 19 y'amavuko ubwo yageraga muri Real Madrid mu kwezi kwa munani muri 2005 avuye muri Sevilla, aguzwe miliyoni 18 n'ibihumbi 500 by'amapawundi Ku wa gatatu w'iki cyumweru, Florentino Perez, Perezida wa Real Madrid, yavuze ko uyu myugariro wa Real n'uw'ikipe y'igihugu ya Espanye yari yasabye kuyivamo akajya gukina muri shampiyona y'Ubushinwa. Ramos w'imyaka 33 y'amavuko yagize ati: "Ni ukuri ko hari ikipe yo mu Bushinwa yifuza ko nyikinira, ibyo sinabibeshyaho". Ramos watangiye gukinira Real mu mwaka wa 2005 ndetse ufite kontaro izarangira mu mwaka wa 2021, yongeyeho ati: "Inzozi zanjye ni ugusoreza umupira w'amaguru wanjye hano". Perez yavuze ko Ramos n'umuhagarariye mu byo kumushakira isoko bamubwiye ko babonye "ubusabe bwiza cyane" bw'ikipe batavuze mu izina yo mu Bushinwa, ariko ko iyo kipe itashoboraga kugura igihe Ramos asigaje kuri kontaro ye muri Real. 'Sinshobora kujya mu ikipe ihatana na Real' Perez yagize ati: "Nabwiye Ramos ko bidashoboka ko Real Madrid yareka kapiteni wayo akagenda gutyo gusa ku buntu". Ramos yagize ati: "Nta na rimwe nigeze ntekereza ku kujya gukina mu Bushinwa". "Ku munsi w'ejo nagiye kureba perezida ngo musobanurire buri kintu cyose". "Nabwiye perezida ko ntashobora kujya mu ikipe ishobora guhatana na Real Madrid". "Umunsi umwe nindamuka ngiye, nuko nzaba ntekereza ko umubiri wanjye utakinyemerera gukina byo ku rwego rwo hejuru". "Ndi kapiteni wa Real Madrid kandi numva nkunzwe cyane kandi nshyigikiwe na bagenzi banjye dukinana". "Ntabwo nteganya kongerera igihe [kontaro yanjye]. Nshimishijwe n'ibyo mfite. Abantu iteka batekereza ko ari amayeri yo kubona amafaranga menshi, ariko ni ikinyuranyo cyabyo ahubwo". Ramos yafashije Real gutsindira ibikombe 20 mu myaka 14 ayimazemo, birimo bine bya Champions League n'ibikombe bine bya shampiyona ya La Liga ya Espanye. Ariko, Real ntiyahiriwe n'umwaka w'imikino wa 2018-2019, yasoje idashoboye gutsindira igikombe.

Bamwe mu bari mu myiyerekano i Khartoum itariki 25 z'ukwezi kwa cumi na kabiri yo kwiyamiriza iduzwa ry'ibiciro vy'umukate n'igitoro Iyo myiyerekano yatanguye ubwa mbere hagati mu kwezi kwa cumi na kabiri inyuma y'aho reta idugirije ibiciro vy'igitoro n'umukate. Ico gihugu kimaze indwi zibiri mu myiyerekano yahitanye abantu mu mabarabara. N'imiburiburi abantu 19 baramaze gupfa. Ariko umugabo umwe wo muri Sudani ategekanya kwitaba iyo myiyerekano y'uyu musi yabiwye BBC Newsday ko, n'aho afise ubwoba, ntashobora kubandanya abaho gutyo. Avuga ati:"Mu myaka irenga mirongo itatu reta yaraducinyije buri musi ishaka kutwaka agateka kacu. Umuntu yopfuma apfa hakuguma aba muri ibi bintu ubuzima bwiwe bwose." Reta yaramenyesheje iduzwa ry'umushahara ku bakozi ba reta. Mw'ijambo yashikirije kuri uyu wa kane, prezida Omar al-Bashir yahimbaje umusi mukuru wo kwikukira kw'ico gihugu mu kumenyesha ivyo reta yashitseko - n'aho hariko haraba imyiyerekano mu bisagara vyinshi. Imyiyerekano irabandanya mu bisagara vyinshi mu gihugu ca Sudani Abwira amashirahamwe y'abakozxi, yavuze ko ubutunzi butifashe neza bwavuye ku gahombo k'ikori ryava ku bitoro ritatanzwe kuva Sudani y'epfi ihagaritse kuvyimba mu 2011, vyagiye kunyurwa n'ibihano vya Amerika vyo mu 2017. Abatavuga rumwe ba reta basaba prezida Bashir gutanga imihoho inyuma y'imyaka irenga mirongo itatu arongoye ico gihugu, bakaba bahamagaje iyindi myiyerekano itegekanijwe kuri uyu wa gatanu.

Leta y'u Burundi yasabye iyi nama rusange ya 110 ya Francophonie kuyivana mu kato Iyi nama y'uyu muryango, uyu munsi kuwa kane, yatangaje ko yakiriye neza icyifuzo cya leta y'u Burundi ariko umwanzuro mu buryo bwemewe uzemezwa nyuma. Kuva mu kwa karindwi 2016, uyu muryango w'ibihugu 88 wanzuye ko uhagaritse imikoranire na leta y'u Burundi kubera ihonyangwa ry'uburenganzira bwa muntu mu midugararo yabaye mu 2015. Leta ya Amerika hamwe n'umuryango w'Ubumwe bw'Uburayi byo byafatiye ibihano bamwe mu bategetsi mu Burundi- barimo minisitiri w'intebe na minisitiri w'ubutegetsi bw'igihugu n'umutekano - bibashinja ibyaha byakozwe ku kiremwamuntu icyo gihe. Ibihugu bikize n'imiryango nterankunga byo mu burengerazuba bw'isi, byateye umugongo u Burundi bishingiye kubyaregwaga ubutegetsi bwa Pierre Nkurunziza kuva mu 2015. Ernest Niyokindi, ambasaderi w'u Burundi mu Bufaransa ejo yabwiye inteko rusange y'umuryango w'ibihugu bikoresha igifaransa ko leta y'icyo gihugu "yarenganyijwe ifatirwa ibyo bihano bibogamye". Avuga ko nyuma y'imidugararo ya 2015 leta yafashe ingamba zo gusubiza ibintu mu buryo, nko gucyura impunzi no kurekura impfungwa, ariko ibyo bihano ntibikurweho. Mu ijambo rye, ryatangajwe na ambasade y'u Burundi mu Bufaransa, Bwana Niyokindi yavuze ko perezida mushya Gen. Major Evariste Ndayishimiye yiyemeje "kurengera uburenganzira bwa muntu no kuzahura umubano n'amahanga ushingiye ku kubahana." Amb. Niyokindi uhagarariye u Burundi mu Bufaransa Yabwiye iyi nama ko leta y'u Burundi yifuza kongera gukorana n'uyu muryango bityo iwusaba "kwiga uko wavanaho icyemezo gihagarika imikoranire" n'iyi leta cyafashwe mu kwa karindwi 2016. Iyi nama ya Francophonie, niyo ya mbere mu mateka yawo iteranye hakoreshejwe uburyo bw'ikoranabuhanga rya 'videoconference' nk'uko uyu muryango ubivuga. Iyi nama yanzuye ko yashimye icyifuzo cya leta y'u Burundi umwanzuro ukazemezwa n'inama nk'iyi yindi izaba mu gihembwe cya nyuma cy'uyu mwaka.

Iki ni kimwe mu bigize amasezerano ibihugu byombi byagiranye agamije kugabanya ubwicanyi muri icyo gihugu. Gushyira mu bikorwa aya masezerano adasanzwe hagati y'Uburusiya na Amerika kuri Syria bishobora gutangira mu minsi 10 niba guhagarika imirwano mu gihugu hose - bigomba gutangira kuwa mbere - bishyizwe mu bikorwa mu gihe cy'iminsi irindwi byibura. Mu byumweru bishize imirwano yarushijeho gukara mu burasirazuba bw'umujyi wa Aleppo. Minisitri w'ububanyi n'amahanga wa Amerika, John Kerry, yavuze ko ayo amaserano bagiranye n'Uburusiya akubiyemo ibintu byinshi kandi ngo naramuka ashyizwe mu bikorwa n'impande zose bishobora gutuma haba imishyikirano mu rwego rwa politiki agamije kugarura amahoro muri Syria. Mugenzi we w'Uburusiya, Sergei Lavrov, yavuze ko igihugu cye cyarangije gusaba Perezida Assad wa Syria kuyubahiriza.

Air Canada ivuga ko iriko iratohoza ingene vyagenze Tiffani Adams avuga ko ako gatiro kamufashe ari muri iyo ndege yariko iva mu gisagara ca Quebec ija muri Toronto, ni muri ico gihugu nyene, ku wa 09 z'uku kwa gatandatu. Yikanguye, yasanze yakonje kandi yiboshe mu ntebe yari yicayemwo, ariko indege yoyo yahagaze kandi ari mu mwiza mwinshi kuko indege yari yahgaze abantu bose bayivuyemo. Avuga ko kuva ico gihe yama arota "amarushwa yabonye muri iryo joro" . Air Canada iremeza ko ivyo vyabaye kandi ko iriko ikora amatohoza. Aciye ku rubuga rwa Facebook, Adams yavuze ati "navyutse hafi isaha zitandatu z'ijoro (haciye amasaha make iyo ndege ihagaze), nakonje kandi ngipfunze umukanda mu ntebe nari nicayemwo kandi mu mwiza". Avuga ko ivyamushikiye vyari "biteye ubwoba". Adams yarashoboye guhamagara mugenziwe, Deanna Dale, amubwira aho yari ari, imbere y'uko telefone yiwe izima hadaciye n'umunota. Ntiyashobora kuyishira ku muriro kuko indege yari yazimye. Uyo mugenziwe Dale yahamagaye abarongoye ikibuga c'indege ca Toronto ababwira ivyerekeye umupfasoni Adams yari yugaraniwe mu ndege. Ariko rero, umupfasoni Adams yashoboye gutora isitimu ahantu yari iri muri iyo ndege, ariho yagerageje kumurika kugira bashobore kumubona. Yagiye kubonwa n'umwe mu bajejwe gupakurura imizigo yo mu ndege, avuga ko nawe nyene "yumvise ubwoba". Umupfasoni Adams avuga ko Air Canada bamufatiye imodoka yitwa limousine n'ihoteri ariko aravyanka, avuga ko yipfuza gusubira muhira vyihuta. Yongera ko y'uko abaserukira Air Canada bamuhamagaye incuro zibiri ku mvo z'amatohoza, bongera bamusaba imbabazi. Air Canada iremeza ivyo umupfasoni Adams yabwiye ibinyamakuru bitandukanye, ikavuga ko iriko yihweza ingene vyagenze.

Ntabwo byari bizwi niba ministri w'intebe ashyigikiye ko abatiganyi basezerana. Ibyo yabivugiye imbere y'abantu babarirwa mu bihumbi bari mu myigaragambyo yo kwerekana ko babishyigikiye. Abantu barenga ibihumbi 20 bari bateraniye mu mujyi wa Sydney mu myigaragambyo barimo gukora mbere yuko inteko nshingamategeko ya Australia itora itegeko rigamije kwemeza cyangwa se kwanga ko abatiganyi bemererwa gusezerana mu mategeko. Bwana Turnbull avuga ko kwemerera abatinganyi bagasezerana ntacyo bitwaye. Inteko nshingamategeko ya Australia izatangira kubyiga ku itariki ya 12 z'uku kwezi ariko icyemezo kizafatwa mu kwezi kwa cumi na rimwe. Abandi banyapolitiki bo muri Australia, barimo umukuru w'abatavuga rumwe na leta, Bill Shorten, nabo bavugiye ijambo imbere y'iyo mbaga berekana ko babashyigikiye.

Abaharura amajwi y'amatora muri RD Congo Umuvugizi wa "Front Commun du Congo" (FCC) yabwiye BBC "ko bakoze ibitemewe n'amategeko kandi ko bariko bategurira abanyagihugu kugumuka". Urunani ruri ku butegetsi ruvuga ko akanama kajejwe amatora ariko ko nyene karekuriwe n'amategeko gutangaza ivyavuye mu matora. Mu ntango z'ino ndwi inama y'abepiskopi "Conference Episcopale Nationale du Congo" (Cenco) yavuze ko uwatsinze amatora amaze kwibonekeza iravye ibitigiri yabonye. Cenco yagomoye abarorerezi barenga 40000 umunsi w'amatora - igitigiri ata wundi mugwi washoboye gushikana- ariko ntiyavuze uwatsinze uwariwe. Abasenyeri basaba ubutegetsi kuba imvugakuri bagashikiriza ningoga ivyavuye mu matora. Ekleziya Katolika ya Congo yamye ishira ijwi hejuru yiyamiriza Perezida Joseph Kabila kwiyongera ikindi kiringo. Yategerezwa kuba yavuye ku butegetsi mu 2016.

Sergei Lavrov mu biganiro na John Kerry LONI yakomeje kuvuga ko itewe impungenge nabo bantu batabasha kugezwaho imfashanyo kubera imirwano ibera hagati y'ingabo za leta n'inyeshyamba nyuma y'amakuru avuga ko hari inzara ikomeye. Sergei Lavrov, avuga nyuma y'ibiganiro yagiranye na mugenzi we wo muri leta zunze ubumwe z'Amerika, John Kerry, yavuze ko banaganiriye ku kibazo cyo gushyira intwaro hasi mu bice bimwe na bimwe bya Syria. Ibiganiro by'amahoro biteganyijwe kuba i Geneve icyumweru gitaha, ariko abatavuga rumwe na leta ntibaratangaza niba bazabyitabira.

Agathon Rwasa ukuriye ishyaka CNL (ibumoso) n'Umuhuza w'Abarundi Edouard Nduwimana (iburyo) Ku rubuga rwa Twitter, Umuhuza w'Abarundi yanditse asubiza ku bivugwa ku ishyaka CNL, nyuma y'uko mu cyumweru gishize abadepite baryo banze kwitabira amatora y'umukuru w'inama nshingamateka y'u Burundi. Ku mbuga nkoranyambaga, hari abavuga ko kuwa gatanu ushize abadepite ba CNL banze kwitabira aya matora kuko iri shyaka ryasabwe gutanga undi mukandida utari Agathon Rwasa ukuriye iri shyaka, kandi udahuje ubwoko na Rwasa. Avuga kuri ibi byavugwaga kuri Agathon Rwasa n'ishyaka CNL kuri Twitter, Umuhuza w'Abarundi Edouard Nduwimana, yanditse ko iyo politiki ya "Njyewe cyangwa Ubusa ari ikibyimba kizamusenya kikazanasenya ishyaka rye". Ejo kuwa mbere, abadepite 32 b'ishyaka CNL, barimo na Agathon Rwasa, basinye ku rwandiko rwamagana abavuze ku mbuga nkoranyambaga "barimo Umuhuza w'Abarundi", bavuga ko ibyo yavuze birimo "urwango rushingiye ku moko ku mukuru wa CNL". Terence Manirambona, umuvugizi w'ishyaka CNL yabwiye BBC ko nta bibazo bishingiye ku moko no kwikubira biri mu ishyaka CNL, anenga ibyavuzwe n'Umuhuza w'Abarundi. Manirambona ati: "Nimba koko yaba yarabivuze, byaba bibabaje kuko umuntu amaze kwitwa Umuhuza ahuza abantu bose, ariko wumvise ko yagera ku rwego rwo gutanga ubutumwa burimo amacakubiri, twaba turiho dusubira inyuma". "Ni impanuro" Umuhuza w'Abarundi Edouard Nduwimana avuga ko ibyo yanditse kuri Twitter nta magambo y'urwango abirimo, ko nubwo ari Umuhuza afite uburenganzira bwo gutanga ibitekerezo bye. Yabwiye BBC ati: "Twavuze dufatiye kubyo abo bari kumwe {na Agathon Rwasa} mu mugambwe bamwagiriza, tuvuga ko adahinduye ingendo yo guhora yigungirako bizomugirira ingaruka mbi, ibyo turabyemanga uyu munsi n'ejo". Tumubajije niba ibyo ashinja umukuru wa CNL afite ukuri kwabyo, asubiza ko "ibyo ari ibintu Abarundi n'amakungu babona." Ati: "Iriya ni nk'impanuro tuba tumuhaye ariko tuyihaye n'abandi muri rusange ko atari byiza ko ukuriye ishyirahamwe cyangwa ishyaka wahora ureba inyungu zawe gusa." Amacakubiri muri CNL? Ku mbuga nkoranyambaga zihuza abantu, hari abavuga ko mu ishyaka CNL hari ibibazo byo kutumvikana, ndetse ko hashobora kuvuka ikindi gice kitwa CNL Nyakuri. Bwana Manirambona avuga ko abavuga ibyo ari abagamije kubacanishamwo. Ati: "Ariko ntibazabishikako kuko twebwe uyu munsi turegeranye gusumba uko bibaza ko dufite ibibazo. "Twifuza u Burundi burimo Abarundi banywanye mu butandukane bwabo. Nta macakubiri ari mu mugambwe CNL, iby'amacakubiri twamaze kubirenga". Ishyaka CNL rivuga ko ryanze kujya mu matora ya biro y'inama nshingamateka kuko abo mu ishyaka riri ku butegetsi CNDD-FDD - rifise abadepite benshi- "bahinyanyuye amategeko y'iyo nama kugira ngo bakumire abantu kanaka".

Zuckerbeg n'Umufasha we bishimira umwana wabo Bwana Zuckerberg yatangaje ibyo mu gihe yishimiraga ivuka ry'umwana wabo w'umukobwa wahawe izina rya Max,itangazo yashyize ku rukuta rwe rwa Facebook. Yavuze ko iyo migabane bazayishyira mu kigega cyabo batangije cyitiriwe "chan Zuckerberg" ngo kuko bifuza ko isi iba ahantu heza umukobwa wabo Max agomba gukurira. Zuckerberg yavuzeko uwo mutungo kuri ubu ungana na miliayari 45 z'amadolari y 'amerika. Zuckerberg ari mu bihe byiza Iyo migabane ntizahita ihabwa abatishoboye ako kanya.Ngo izajya itangwa buhoro buhoro bigendeye ku mibereho y'uwo muryango. Gusa ngo n'ubwo Bwana Zuckerberg yahita atanga 99 by'imigabane ye ako kanya ,ngo yakomeza akaba umutunzi wa za milioni z'amadolari n'ubwo umutungo we wa nyawo utazwi neza. Max yavutse mu cyumweru gishize ariko inkuru yo kuvuka kwe yashyizwe ku mugaragaro kuwa kabiri w'iki cyumweru. Umuherwe w'umushoramali Warren Buffet yashimiye cyane Zuckerberg n'umugorewe Chan,avuga ko iyo umuntu ageze aho kugaba umutungo we "imyaka 30 ihinduka 70". Yavuze ko abaherwe batagombye gutegereza igihe cyo gupfa kigeze ngo babone kugaba umutungo wabo.

Trusted Flaggers ifise impungenge z'ibica kuri YouTube bishobora kubangamira abana N'ubwo bivugira ko izo video ziterekana ibiterasoni vyo ku rugero rwa 'pornographie', bavuga ko amajambo yandikwa munsi y'ama video yerekana abakiri bato, usanga avuga yeruye ivyerekeye igitsina. Umugwi Trusted Flaggers uvuga ko hashobora kuba hari abahiga kugirira nabi abana, baciye kuri YouTube. Ariko YouTube, ifise umuhora kuri Google, yemeza ko ikumira yivuye inyuma, ibijanye na pornographie vyose, n'ibindi bishobora gukwegera abana mu busambanyi.

Ubwato butwara abimukira buhora bufatwa n'abacunga inkombe za Libiya Uyu muryango uharanira uburenganzira bwa kiremwamuntu ku isi, uvuga ibi kubera ko ngo izo guverinoma zifasha abacunga inkengero z'amazi ya Libya n'abayobozi b'ibigo abo bantu bafungiyemo mu gihugu. Uwo muryango kandi urashinja bamwe mubacunga inkengero z'amazi muri Libya gukorana n'abacuruza abantu. Mu 2016 Umuryango w'Uburayi wateye inkunga ibikorwa byo gucunga inkombe z'amazi. Mu bihe byashize uwo muryango wakomeje kwemera ko impunzi ziri muri Libya zikorerwa ihohoterwa, ariko ushimangira ko watanze amafaranga yo gufasha kuzamura imibereho y'izo mpunzi no gufasha abashaka gusubira iwabo. Benshi mu mpunzi ziri muri Libya bakorerwa iyica rubozo, ihohoterwa ndetse no gukoreshwa imirimo y'agahato n'abarwanyi, ari nabo bacunga byinshi mu bigo bifungiyemo izo mpunzi. Uwo muryango urengera ikiremwamuntu uvuga ko amategeko y'Uburayi agamije guca burundu inzira iva muri Libya yerekeza mu Burayi abahunga bakoresha kandi mu buryo butemewe n'amategeko.

Abakozi mu rwego rw'ubuzima bavuga ko Ebola itashoboye gukwira mu tundi duce kubera ko yadukiye mu gace kitaruye Minisitiri w'ubuzima, Oly Ilunga Kalenga, yatangaje ko iminsi 42 ikenewe yarangiye nta bundi bwandu bugaragaye. Dr Kalenga yavuze ko icyorezo cy'ingwara ya Ebola cyamaze amezi abiri mu gihugu cyishe abantubane ku munani bayanduye. Iyi ndwara yandura ku buryo bworoshye kandi yica vuba. Abategsti mu rwego rw'ubuzima bavuga ko kuba yaradukiye mu duce tw'amashyamba yitaruye mu majyaruguru y'uburasirazuba byafashije mu kuyikumira gusakara mu bindi bice by'igihugu.

Kuri uyu munsi mpuzamahanga wahariwe abakora uyu mwuga, BBC yavuganye n'abaforomo bane ku migabane ine bari ku rugamba na Covid-19. Umunsi w'abaforomokazi n'abaforomo wizihizwa tariki 12 z'ukwezi kwa gatanu, ku isabukuru ya Florence Nightingale washinze uyu mwuga w'ubufasha bw'abaganga. 'Mama ambwira ko atewe ishema no kuba ndi umuhungu we ' Mzwakhe Mohlaloganye umugabo w'imyaka 37 ufite abana babiri, amaze imyaka itanu ari umuforomo i Johannesburg, avuga ko umuryango we wabanje kwanga ko ajya gutanga umusanzu mu kurwanya Covid-19. Gusa ubu Afurika y'epfo iri mu rugamba igana ku ntsinzi kuko imibare iri kumanuka, ahanini kubera gupima abantu benshi cyane no kubitaho hakiri kare. Abantu barasuzumirwa aho batuye, hibanzwe ku bari hejuru y'imyaka 59 n'abasanzwe bafite izindi ndwara. Nubwo umuryango we wabanje kumwangira no kugira ubwoba, ubu umubyeyi we afite ishema. Mzwakhe ati: "Mama yarambwiye ngo atewe ishema n'uko ndi umuhungu we - kuko ndi umwe mu bantu bari kurwana n'iki cyorezo, mbarwanirira". Mzwakhe nawe avuga ko ibyo ari gukora ubu bituma yiyumva nk'intwari iri gukiza ubuzima mu gihugu. 'Iriya foto irerekana njyewe ariko ihagarariye twese" Ifoto yakwiriye henshi ku mbuga nkoranyambaga y'umuforomokazi waguye agacuho mu myambaro y'akazi asinziriye kuri mudasobwa. Elena Pagliarini mu karuhuko nyuma y'akazi k'ijoro ryose Uwo ni Elena Pagliarini wo mu Butaliyani - igihugu cyazahajwe mu Burayi - wari ufatiye akaruhuko ku rugamba. Yabwiye BBC ati: "Byari igihe gikomeye, abarwayi bamwe bapfiraga mu maso yanjye. Twakoraga ijoro ryose. Saa kumi n'ebyiri za mugitondo, nafashe akaruhuko nsinzirira ku meza umuganga niwe wafashe iyi foto" Elena yavuze ko yumvaga iyi foto ntacyo ivuze kidasanzwe kugeza ubwo abanyamakuru bamushatse hamwe n'abantu atari azi. Mu kwezi kwa gatatu ubwo abantu amagana bapfaga mu Butaliyani ku munsi, Elena nawe yaranduye, acika intege bikomeye. Yagumye mu rugo iminsi 23 agaruka mu kazi tariki 02/04 igihe virus yari igeze ku gasongero mu Butaliyani. Kuva ubwo virus yatangiye gucogora, Elena avuga ko n'ubu bakiri mu kazi ariko abarwayi baza bagabanutse kandi ibimenyetso bafite byoroshye bataza barembye. Mu Butaliyani, abakozi bo mu buzima 160 barapfuye muri iki gihe. Elena ati: "Ntewe ishema n'akazi kanjye, iriya foto irerekana njyewe gusa ariko ihagarariye abaforomokazi n'abaganga bose". 'Bari barengeje imyaka 70 kandi barakize' Gabriela Serrano, umuforomokazi wo muri leta zunze ubumwe za Amerika we avuga ko ahora yibuka igihe yabonye umurwayi wa mbere ava mu bitaro amaze gukira Covid-19. Ati: "Yari yishimye bikomeye ubwo namusohoraga mu bitaro mucunze mu kagare. Byari byiza cyane kongera kubona urumuri n'umwuka mwiza wo hanze". Gabriela w'imyaka 34 amaze imyaka irindwi ari umuforomokazi, muri iki gihe yakoreye ibitaro biri hanze gato y'umujyi wa San Francisco. Avuga ko yakurikiranye abarwayi babiri ba Covid-19 bose bari hejuru y'imyaka 70 kandi basanganywe izindi ndwara. Ati: "Bose barakize, byampaye ikizere". 'Umuntu umwe gusa wanduye yateza akaga abaturage bose' Shanti Teresa lakra umuforomokazi mu bitaro byo ku kirwa cy'Ubuhinde, yamenyekanye cyane kubera kwita ku barwayi bo mu bwoko bw'abantu bwugarijwe no gucika. Tariki 24/03 ku bitaro akoreramo ubwo babonaga abarwayi babiri ba mbere ba Covid-19 yahise asezerera abarwayi babiri bo muri ubwo bwoko bari bafite. Yariho akurikirana umwana w'imyaka itanu wo mu bwoko bw'aba Jarawa wari urwaye ibihaha, n'umugore wo mu bwoko bw'aba Shompen wivuzaga kubura urubyaro. Aba-Jarawa babonenye n'abandi bantu bo ku isi bwa mbere mu 1997. Ni abantu b'abahingi baba mu mashyamba ari ku birwa by'Ubuhinde bya Andaman na Nicobar, ayo mashyamba ari muri 80Km uvuye ku bitaro Shanti akoreraho. Hashize icyumweru uwo mwana w'umuhungu asezerewe, Shanti yagiye mu ishyamba kureba uko ameze. Shanti ashimirwa kwita ku bwoko buri gucika Ati: "Nasanze yarakize neza. Kuko nshobora kuvuga gacyeya ku rurimi rwabo, nabasabye ko bajya kure cyane mu ishyamba bakagumayo". Kwibera ukwa bonyine kw'aya moko y'abantu byarabarinze mu gihe cy'imyaka ibihumbi, ariko ibikorwa by'abantu bandi byagiye byugariza amashyamba yabo bibatera gupfa ari benshi. Shanti avuga ko ubu hasigaye abantu bagera kuri 450 bo mu bwoko bw'aba Jarawa. Ati: "Ubwirinzi bw'umubiri wabo buri hasi. Umuntu umwe gusa wanduye yateza akaga bose'

Iyi kompanyi yahagaritswe ku kugera ku bikoresho by'ingenzi nyuma yuko ubutegetsi bw'uwahoze ari Perezida Donald Trump buvuze ko iteje inkeke ku mutekano w'Amerika. Mu guhangana n'ikibazo cy'ubucuruzi butarimo kugenda bwa za 'smartphones' zayo, Huawei irimo kureba ahandi yakura inyungu mu ikoranabuhanga ryayo. Hamwe n'ikoranabuhanga rigezweho rya mudasobwa rikora akazi nk'ako umuntu yagakoze - rizwi nka Artificial Intelligence (AI) - rijyanye n'ubworozi bw'ingurube, Huawei irimo no gukorana n'urwego rw'ubucukuzi bwa nyiramugengeri (cyangwa ibizuku mu Kirundi). Trump wahoze ari Perezida w'Amerika yavuze ko Huawei ishobora gufata amakuru y'ibanga y'abakiliya bayo ikayaha leta y'Ubushinwa, ibirego iyi kompanyi yakomeje guhakana. Kubera iyo mpamvu, iyi kompanyi ya mbere ku isi mu gukora ibikoresho by'ikoranabuhanga byinshi yasigaye ku gukora gusa ibijyanye n'ikoranabuhanga ry'umuyoboro mugari wa 4G. Ni ukubera ko yimwe uruhushya rwa leta y'Amerika ngo ibe yashobora gutumiza ibikoresho byo kwifashisha mu ikoranabuhanga ry'umuyoboro mugari wa 5G. Ubucuruzi bwa 'smartphones' bwa Huawei bwagabanutseho 42% mu mezi atatu ya nyuma yo mu mwaka wa 2020. Byatewe n'ikibazo cy'igabanuka ry'ibikoresho (microchips) yifashisha, ritewe n'ibihano yafatiwe. Huawei kandi yakuwe muri gahunda yo kubaka umuyoboro wa 5G mu bihugu bimwe, birimo nk'Ubwongereza, kubera ubwoba ko ishobora guteza ikibazo ku mutekano w'ibyo bihugu. Gushakira ahandi Amakuru avuga ko muri uyu mwaka ishobora kugabanya ubushobozi bwayo bwo gukora 'smartphones' bukagabanuka ku kigero kigera kuri 60%, nubwo Huawei yo yavuze ko uyu mubare idashobora kuwemeza. Umuvugizi wayo yabwiye BBC ati: "Ikibazo gihari hano ntabwo ari nkaho hari ikibazo na kimwe kijyanye n'ireme cyangwa ikoreshwa ry'ibyo Huawei ikora". "Ntabwo Huawei ihabwa amahirwe angana kuko ikubirwa hagati mu bushyamirane bushingiye ku nyungu za politike". Ku bw'iyo mpamvu rero, bisa nkaho Huawei irimo gushakisha ahandi yakura inyungu - yerekeza mu ikoranabuhanga ry'iyakure (cloud computing), ibinyabiziga bigezweho n'ibikoresho by'ikoranabuhanga byambarwa. Ifite na gahunda yo gukora imodoka igezweho. Ariko inahanze amaso ku bikorwa bicye byo mu buryo burushijeho kuba ubwa gakondo. Korora ingurube Ubushinwa ni cyo gihugu cya mbere cyorora ingurube nyinshi ku isi ndetse bwihariye kimwe cya kabiri cy'ingurube zo mu gasozi (isatura) ziriho ku isi. Ikoranabuhanga ririmo gufasha mu gutuma ubworozi bw'ingurube bukorwa mu buryo bwa kijyambere hakoreshejwe ikoranabuhanga rya AI mu gutahura indwara zazo no mu kugenzura aho ingurube ziherereye . Ikoranabuhanga ryo kumenya mu maso hazo (facial recognition technology) rishobora gutuma hatandukanywa ingurube imwe n'indi, mu gihe irindi koranabuhanga ryo rigenzura ibiro by'ingurube, ibiryo byazo n'imyitozo zikora. Huawei imaze igihe ikora ikoranabuhanga ryo gutahura isura, ndetse mu kwezi gushize yanenzwe kubera uburyo (system) bwayo butahura abantu basa nk'abo mu bwoko bwa ba nyamuke bwa Uighur, mu mafoto y'abagenzi ku maguru. Izindi kompanyi zikomeye z'ikoranabuhanga zo mu Bushinwa, zirimo JD.com na Alibaba, zirimo gukorana n'aborozi b'ingurube bo muri iki gihugu mu gushyira ikoranabuhanga rishya mu bworozi bwabo. Umuvugizi wa Huawei yongeyeho ati: "Ubworozi bw'ingurube ni urundi rugero rw'uburyo tugerageza kongerera imbaraga ibikorwa bimwe bya gakondo hifashishijwe ikoranabuhanga mu itumanaho rya ICT mu kongerera agaciro ibyo bikorwa muri iki gihe cy'umuyoboro wa 5G".

Diamond Platinumz yatsindiye udushimwe 3 muri Afrimawards, mu gihugu ca Nigeria Nigeria Diamond yatsindiye ako gashimwe mu birori vyabereye mu gisagara ca Lagos mu gihugu ca Nigeria, aho bashimagije Munu Dibango, King Sunny Ade na n'umuhisi Papa Wemba. Umuririmyi wo mu gihugu ca Uganda, Cindy Sanyu na we yatahukanye agashimwe k'umuririmvyi mwiza ku ruhande rw'abapfasoni muri Afrika y'ubuseruko, mu gihe Wizkid wa Nigeria na we yatsindiye agashimwe k'umuririmvyi mwiza ku mugabane wa Afrika. Wizkid wa Nigeria yatsindiye agashimwe k'umuririmvyi mwiza ku mugabane wa Afrika Ku rubuga rwiwe rwa facebook, Diamond yanditse gutya:"Nipfuze gushima no kubamenyesha ko umuririmvyi mukunda yatsindiye udushimwe dutatu....indirimbo nziza yo muri Afrika -#Utanipenda, umuririmvyi mwiza mu muziki wa Afro Pop n'umuririmvyi mwiza mu karere k'ubuseruko bwa Afrika". Umuririmvyi mwiza muri uyu mwaka -Wizkid (Nigeria)

Perezida Buhari yatowe ubwa mbere mu mwaka wa 2015 Bwana Buhari w'imyaka 76 y'amavuko yarushije uwo bahiganwa vya hafi Atiku Abubakar - yigeze kuba icegera c'umukuru w'igihugu - amajwi agera hafi imiliyoni zine. Bwana Abubakar wo mu mugambwe People's Democratic Party (PDP) yahakanye ibiharuro vyatangajwe muri ayo matora yitabwe n'abantu bangana n'ibice 35,6 kw'ijana. N'aho abarorerezi bigenga atabusuma bavuga ko bwabaye, ayo matora yaranzwe n'umutekano wagiye uhungabana hamwe hamwe be n'ugucererwa. Umugambwe All Progressives Congress (APC) wa Bwana Buhari watsinze mu ntara 19 kuri 36, mu gihe PDP wowo watsinze mu ntara 17 no ku mugwa mukuru Abuja, nk'uko vyamenyeshejwe n'umurwi ujejwe amatora. Inyuma y'uko ivyo biharuro bimenyeshejwe, Bwana Buhari yavuze ko ubutegetsi bushasha butegerezwa kwibanda cane cane ku mutekano, kunagura ubutunzi hamwe n'ukurwanya igiturire. Umugambwe APC waronse amajwi imiliyoni 15,2 nayo PDP uronka amajwi imiliyoni 11,3. Bamwe mu bashigikiye Bwana Buhari baciye bihereza amabarabara ejo ku wa kabiri bigina iyo ntsinzi. Bwana Buhari yigeze kuba ari mu gisirikare, yararongoye igihugu ca Nigeria mu kiringo c'amezi 20 mu myaka ya 1980, aca atorwa nk'umukuru w'igihugu mu 2015, gutyo aca aba uwa mbere atsinze umukuru w'igihugu akiri ku butegetsi. Abarwanya Buhari bavuga ko amateka yari yatumye aronka amajwi mu myaka ine iheze - nk'umuntu yari agumye kandi agoye - vyagiye kuboneka nk'uko ataco vyamaze. Bamwagiriza ko atwaza umukazo kandi asa n'uwudafata ingingo iyo bikenewe. N'aho bitaborohera kwerekana ivyo yoba yarakoze mu bindi bisata nk'ukunagura ubutunzi, abamushigikiye bobo bavuga ko yakoze ivyo yari yiyemeje mu gihe yiyamamaza, nk'ukugwanya igiturire n'ukugwanya Boko Haram.

Abana bafite amabendera mu kwiyamamaza muri leta ya Delaware Iyi nshuro ariko ntibisanzwe kuko abakandida Donald Trump na Joe Biden nta witeguye kwemera ko yatsinzwe, Abanyamerika bafite ubwoba bw'urugomo. Kongera kubarura amajwi, ibirego mu nkiko byanga ibyayavuyemo, imidugararo mu gihugu, ibi ni ibintu bamwe babona ko byitezwe muri Amerika. Gusa ibi bishobora kwirindwa mu gihe Abanyamerika bemeye gutegereza ibyavuye mu matora. Ariko gutegereza igihe kingana gute? Iki ni cyo kibazo nyamukuru. Ikibazo ni ikihe? Gutora n'iposita. Mu matora yo mu 2016, Abanyamerika miliyoni 33 batoye bakoresheje iposita. Uyu mwaka, kubera coronavirus, abagera kuri miliyoni 82 basabye gutora batyo. Ariko umunsi w'itora wageze leta nyinshi zikirwana no gukuraho amategeko ashaje agena igihe amajwi yo ku iposita afungurirwa akabarwa. Bakora ari babiri bo mu mashyaka abiri atandukanye, aha ni muri leta ya Maryland yabaye iya mbere muri Amerika gutangira kubarura amajwi y'abatoye bakoresheje iposita Urugero muri Michigan, imwe muri leta z'ingenzi zitagira uruhande ruhoraho zitora, abantu bagera kuri miliyoni eshatu biteganyijwe ko batora n'iposita. Ariko, kuko badashobora gutangira kubara amajwi mbere y'umunsi w'itora, bishobora gufata iminsi kugira ngo Michigan ivuge ibyavuye mu matora. Aho kandi bikaba nta kongera kubara amajwi kwabaye. Uburyo bwo kugeza ubutumwa bw'iposita aho bugenewe ubu birimo ibibazo kubera iki cyorezo n'amatora, Perezida Trump nawe yahagaritse amafaranga y'ibikorwa byihutirwa yari agenewe Serivisi y'Iposita ya Amerika kuko avuga ko gutora muri ubwo buryo bibangamiye uruhande rwe. Imibare yerekana ko Abademokarate ari bo bari gutora muri ubu buryo ari benshi kurusha Abarepubulikani bo bashaka kwigira ku biro by'itora uyu munsi. Umukozi w'iposita atunganya amakarito yuzuyemo amajwi y'abatoye muri leta ya Oregon Ikibazo cya kabiri ni ibirego mu nkiko. Iyo ibyavuye mu matora byegeranye cyane ku buryo hatahita havugwa uwatsinze, abantu benshi batinya ko bigera mu nkiko barega ko hari amajwi atabazwe, ibi bitinza itangazwa ry'ibyavuye mu matora. Impamvu ikunze kubaho cyane ni amajwi yanga kubarwa kuko yoherejwe akagera aho abarurirwa yatinze cyane. Izindi mpamvu zibamo imikono itari ukuri cyangwa kubura kw'urupapuro rw'itora rw'ibanga. Kubera umubare munini cyane bidasanzwe w'abatoye bikazoherezwa n'iposita, gukerererwa no kutabarwa kw'amajwi amwe nabyo byitezwe ko biziyongera. Mu matora ya 2016, Perezida Trump yatsinze muri leta ya Michigan arusha uwo bahatanye amajwi ari munsi ya 11,000. Icyo ni ikinyuranyo gito iyo utekereje ko mu matora y'ibanze yabaye muri iyi leta mu kwezi kwa munani amajwi arenga 10,000 atabaruwe kubera ko yageze aho abarirwa atinze cyane kubara byarangiye. Iyo mu ijoro ry'amatora amajwi yerekana ko abahatana begeranye cyane, muri leta nyinshi zisanzwe zidafite uruhande ruzwi zitora ya majwi aba atabaruwe kuko yakererewe ahinduka ikibazo gikomeye. Byashoboka ko ibyayavuyemo bimenyekana uyu munsi? Yego. Nubwo bwose haba ubukerererwe bw'iposita, urebeye ku makusanyabitekerezo ariho ubu, mu mibare birashoboka ko hari uwarara atsinze. Ariko bigasaba ko uwo mukandida aba yatsinze ku bwiganze. Biden mu kwiyamamaza muri leta ya Michigan Kugira ngo Biden cyangwa Trump hagire utsinda biramusaba kurenza amajwi atora 270. Ibi ni ukubera ko perezida wa Amerika adatorwa mu buryo butaziguye n'abaturaga batoye, ahubwo n'amajwi atora agenewe buri leta mu zigize Amerika. Muri Amerika yose habarwa amajwi atora (electoral votes) yose hamwe 538. Ayo majwi atora atangwa hashingiwe ku mubare w'abatuye buri leta zose zigize Amerika. California ni yo igira umubare munini w'ayo majwi - 55 - mu gihe izindi leta zifite abaturage bacye nka Wyoming, Alaska na North Dakota usanga zibarirwa atatu. Muri buri leta, umukandida wagize amajwi menshi ahita ahabwa uwo mubare wose w'amajwi (electoral votes) y'iyo leta. Urugero: Uyu munsi umukandida uri bubone amajwi 50,1% y'abaturage batoye muri leta ya Texas arahita ahabwa amajwi yose atora 38 agenewe leta ya Texas. Kugeza kuri uyu munsi w'amatora Abanyamerika barenga miliyoni 70 bamaze kohereza amajwi yabo cyangwa se bamaze kujya gutora ubwabo. Uyu mubare usobanuye ko abarenga 1/2 cy'abatoye bose hamwe mu 2016 ubu bamaze gutora mbere y'umunsi nyirizina. Mu 2016, Donald Trump yishimiye intsinzi ahagana saa munani z'ijoro ry'umunsi w'itora (hari saa moya z'igitondo ku isaha ngengamasaha, GMT), hari nyuma y'uko leta ya Wisconsin imugejeje hejuru y'amajwi atora 270. Gusa uyu mwaka kubera ubwiyongere bw'abatoye n'iposita, ziriya leta nyinshi zisanzwe ari isibaniro ry'abakandika kuko zisanzwe zitagira uruhande ruzwi zitora, ibyavuye mu matora yaho bishobora kutamenyekana iri joro. Michigan, Pennsylvania na Wisconsin ni zimwe muri ziriya leta zifite amategeko ko amajwi y'iposita atangira kubarurwa ku munsi gusa w'amatora. Ndetse byaba ngombwa hakaba kongera kubara amajwi bwa kabiri no kuregera inkiko, mu gihe amajwi yegeranye cyane ku kuba hakemezwa uwatsinze. Gusa, ahari icyizere, ni muri Florida. Trump mu kwiyamamaza kurimo abantu benshi muri Pennsylvania Iyi ni imwe muri leta nini ziri muri ziriya zitagira uruhande - igira amajwi atora 29. Iyi leta ni imwe mu zigena niba umukandida runaka ashobora kurara amenye niba yatsinze amatora. Amategeko ya Florida avuga ko kugenzura no kubara amajwi y'iposita bishobora gutangira iminsi 40 mbere y'amatora. Ibi rero hano byaratangiye kandi biteganyijwe ko bishobora kurangira uyu munsi. Niba Biden, uri imbere mu makusanyabitekerezo, atsinzwe muri Florida, biraba ikimenyetso ko ashobora kudatsinda mu ijoro rya none. Gusa nanone ashobora kurenga ya majwi atora 270 aramutse atsinze amajwi akomatanyijwe ya leta za North Carolina, Arizona, Iowa na Ohio. Joe Biden avugana n'abanyamakuru muri North Carolina Mu gihe Trump ari inyuma mu makusanyabitekerezo, mu gihe yaba atsinze Florida, byamusaba gutsinda n'ahandi kugira ngo arare yegukanye intsinzi kubera bene ziriya leta nyinshi bitazwi niba zirara zitangaje uwatsinze. Niba kandi hatabayeho kwibeshya mu kubara amajwi. Amateka ya vuba, harimo no mu 2016, yerekana ko hari ukwibeshya kuba mu kubara amajwi amwe. Ibinyamakuru biraza nanone kuvuga uwatsinze mbere? Imbaraga z'itangazamakuru rya Amerika mu ijoro ry'amatora ziba ziteye inkeke. Mu matora yabayeho mbere, televiziyo zikomeye zagiye "zivuga" ibyavuye mu matora mbere cyane ko amajwi anabarwa. Mu gukorana n'inzobere mu makusanyabitekerezo zivugana n'abatoye, ibinyamakuru bikomeye biba bitanguranwa kuba aba mbere gutangaza uwatsinze. Iyo hari "uwatsinze" uvuzwe n'itangazamakuru, umukandida "watsinzwe" kenshi biba byitezweho ko ahita yemera ko yatsinzwe, mbere y'uko abantu bajya kwiryamira, rero uwatsinze ashobora kwemeza ko ari we watsinze kuri ibyo bitangazamakuru. Ariko ubu muri 2020 kubera miliyoni z'amajwi y'iposita aza kuba atarabarwa uyu munsi nijoro, agahenge karatangwa no kuba ibinyamakuru muri Amerika biza kubasha kwihangana. Benshi baratinya ko hashobora kuba akajagari kabaye mu 2000 igihe George W Bush yari ahatanye na Al Gore. Kuri iyi nshuro bwo byitezwe ko byarenga akajagari bikaba imidugararo mu gihugu. Icyo gihe mu ijoro ry'amatora, nubwo bwose ibiro byinshi by'amatora byavugaga ko amajwi yegeranye cyane ku buryo batavuga uwatsinze, televiziyo nyinshi zahaye Al Gore intsinzi muri leta ikomeye mu matora ya Florida, mbere y'uko bihinduka bagasanga ari Bush wahatsinze. Gore yemeye ko yatsinzwe, ariko Florida iba isibaniro kurusha uko byibazwaga mbere, nyuma Gore yavuze ko yisubiyeho ku kwemera gutsindwa. Byafashe iminsi 36 nyuma n'ikirego mu Rukiko rw'Ikirenga, Abanyamerika bamenye ko Gore yatsinze mu majwi menshi y'abaturage batora, ariko Bush atsinda kubera amajwi menshi atora (electrola college), bityo aba perezida. George W Bush yishimira intsinzi ye mu 2000 muri leta ya Florida Amerika mu 2020 yashegeshwe na coronavirus, icikamo ibice kubera inkubiri ya Black Lives Matter, none ubu Abanyamerika bagomba no gutegereza perezida wabo muri aya matora.

Jean Pierre Bemba Abo bagabo bane bakomoka muri republika iharanira demokrasi ya Kongo, ngo bahaye igiturire ivyo vyabona kugira bibeshe mu rubanza rw'uwahoze ari icegera c'umukuru w'ico gihugu. Abo bane, barimwo n'uwunganira bwana Bemba hamwe n'umushingamateka, bafatiwe mu bihugu bine ari vyo u Bufaransa, u Bubirigi, u Buholandi hamwe na Kongo. Bwana Bemba amaze imyaka irenga itanu apfunzwe na ICC, yagirizwa ivyaha vyo mu ntambara n'ivyo guhohotera ikiremwa muntu bivugwa ko vyakorewe mu gihugu ca Centre Afrique.

Bernie Sanders yarushije abandi bakandida muri leta ya New Hampshire Sanders yatangaje ko iri joro "ari intangiriro y'iherezo" rya Donald Trump. Mu mpera y'icyumweru gitaha, aya matora azakomereza muri leta ya Nevada. Mu majwi, inyuma y'uyu musenateri haje Pete Buttigieg wahoze ari Mayor wa South Bend muri Indiana n'umusenateri wa leta ya Minnesota witwa Amy Klobuchar watunguranye akaba uwa gatatu. Joe Biden ubusanzwe uhabwa amahirwe mu bademokarate yafashe umwanya wa gatanu. Muri iyi leta hatoye abademokarate bagera ku 280,000 mu ijoro ryo kuri uyu wa kabiri, Bwana Sanders w'imyaka 78 yabonye amajwi 26%. Mu kwishimira intsinzi, Sanders yagize ati: "Iyi ntsinzi ya hano ni intangiriro y'iherezo rya Donald Trump". Sanders yavuze ko agiye kubaka politiki ihuriyemo amoko yose izashobora gutsinda abarepubulikani. Iyi ntsinzi izaha Bwana Sanders icyenda mu ntumwa 24 zizahagararira New Hampshire mu matora rusange yo mu kwezi kwa karindwi y'ishyaka ry'abademokarate. Aya matora ajyamo abahagarariye za leta ni yo agena uzahagararira iri shyaka mu matora y'umukuru w'igihugu azaba mu kwezi kwa 11. Nubwo Bwana Buttigieg yagize amajwi macye kuri Sanders, na we ayo yabonye amwemerera kubona intumwa icyenda nk'iza Sanders. Ni yo mahirwe ya nyuma ya Biden? Kuva yakwinjira muri aya mahiganwa mu kwezi kwa kane 2019, Bwana Biden ni we wahabwaga amahirwe agera kuri 41%. Biden w'imyaka 77, yabaye uwa kane muri leta Iowa, abamushyigikiye bagabanutseho 20% muri Amerika bituma ajya inyuma ya Sanders - ku nshuro ya mbere. Biden aracyakomeje guhatana kuko hari umubare munini w'intumwa zitaratora muri leta zitandukanye. Aba bakandida bazakurikizaho guhatana muri leta za Nevada na South Carolina muri uku kwezi. Mu kwezi kwa gatatu ku munsi bise "Super Tuesday" tariki 15/03 nibwo hazaba itora rikomeye muri leta 15 aho hazatora intumwa zigera ku 1,344. Uzahagararira abademokarate mu matora, azatangazwa mu nama rusange y'iri shyaka mu kwezi kwa karindwi izabera i Milwaukee muri Wisconsin.

Iyi mpanuka yabaye kuwa gatandatu ahitwa Kabarore, abategetsi bavuga ko yatewe n'imvura nyinshi imaze iminsi igwa. Mu bakomeretse, bane bamerewe nabi cyane mu bitaro, nkuko abategetsi muri aka gace babibwiye ibiro ntaramakuru AFP. Kugeza kuwa gatandatu, abatabazi bo mu nzego za leta bafatanyije n'abo mu muryango utabara imbabare bari bakigerageza kurokora abagwiriwe n'ikirombe. Kabarore iherereye mu ntara ya Kayanza mu majyaruguru y'u Burundi kuri kilometero 90 uvuye mu murwa mukuru Bujumbura. Muri aka gace hari ibirombe byinshi bya Colta - amabuye y'agaciro akoreshwa cyane mu gukora za telefone zigezweho - n'amabuye ya tin na tungsten. AFP ivuga ko impanuka nk'izi zikunze kuba hano, ariko abayobozi bagasabwa kwirinda kuzitangaza.

Polisi yafunze imihanda imwe yo muri uwo mujyi nyuma y'icyo gitero cyo ku wa gatandatu ushize Uwo ucyekwaho icyaha w'imyaka 40 yabwiye abashinjacyaha ko uwo mupadiri yaryamanaga n'umugore we. Padiri Nikolaos Kakavelakis w'imyaka 52, yarashwe amasasu abiri ari hanze ya kiliziya ku itariki ya 31 y'ukwezi kwa 10. Yavuganye na polisi nyuma yo kuva muri 'coma' (nyuma yo kugarura ubwenge) ku wa gatatu. Uko kuraswa kwe kwabaye hashize iminsi abantu batatu bishwe batewe icyuma (cyangwa imbugita mu Kirundi) kuri kiliziya yo mu mujyi wa Nice mu majyepfo y'Ubufaransa. Mbere, byari byabanje gucyekwa ko kurasa no gukomeretsa uwo mupadiri bifitanye isano n'icyo Perezida Emmanuel Macron yise "igitero cy'ubuhezanguni muri Isilamu" cy'i Nice. Ntabwo byahise bimenyekana icyari cyihishe inyuma y'uko kurasa kw'i Lyon, abategetsi batangiza iperereza ku cyaha cyo kugerageza kwica umuntu. Ariko muri iki cyumweru abakora iperereza bateye intambwe mu kazi kabo ubwo uwo mupadiri yashoboye kuvugana na polisi. Uwo bivugwa ko afite ubwenegihugu bwa Géorgie ucyekwaho kurasa padiri, yatawe muri yombi iwe mu rugo i Lyon ku wa gatanu, nkuko bitangazwa n'ikinyamakuru Le Parisien cyo mu Bufaransa. Uwo mupadiri yarashwe ubwo yari arimo afunga kiliziya ye Iki kinyamakuru gisubiramo amagambo yo mu itangazo ry'umushinjacyaha wa Lyon, Nicolas Jacquet, wavuze ko ucyekwa "bigaragara ko ari umugabo w'umugore waryamanaga n'uwarashwe". Uwo ucyekwa yabwiye abashinjacyaha ko nta mugambi yari afite wo kwica uwo mupadiri wari ucuditse n'umugore we w'Umurusiya w'imyaka 35, nkuko Le Parisien ibitangaza. Uwo mupadiri arimo koroherwa aho bamubaze kwa muganga kubera ibikomere by'amasasu. Mu kwezi kwa cyenda uyu mwaka, yari yatangaje ko asezeye ku kuba padiri muri iryo dini.

Indege za Boeing 737 Max zari zahagaritswe kuva mu kwa gatatu 2019 Iyi ndege yari yarahagaritswe kw'isi yose kuva mu kwa gatatu 2019, inyuma y'amasanganya abiri yatikije inganda aho abantu 346 bapfuye. Ariko, inyuma y'aho isubiriwemwo, iya mbere yagurutse, ikaba ari iy'ikompanyi Gol mu gisagara ca São Paulo ija mu gisagara ca Porto Alegre muri Brezili. Imbere y'aho, Gol yatangaje ko 140 mu badereva bayo babanje kuronswa inyigisho muri Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika kuri iyi ndege yasubiwemwo. Gushika ubu, Amerika na Brezili nivyo bihugu vyonyene bimaze kwemerera iyo ndege gusubira gukora. Gol, ikompanyi nini gusumba izindi zose zikorera hagati mu gihugu muri Brezili, ifise indege indwi za Boeing 737 Max itegekanya gukoresha mu ngendo 27 zo hagati mu gihugu. Boeing yategetswe gukura ku rubuga indege zose za 737 Max inyuma y'amasanganya abiri mu mezi atanu gusa, yose hamwe yahitanye ubuzima bw'abantu 346. Kuva ico gihe, ihinguriro ry'izi ndege ryakoze impinduka zitari nke kuri iyi ndege harimwo logiciel igenzura indege, gusubiramwo ibijanye n'amategeko agenga abakozi bayo, no guhindura intsinga z'imbere. Icegera c'umuyobozi nshingwabikorwa wa Gol, Celso Ferrer, avuga ko yizeye neza ko iyi ndege imeze neza inyuma y'impinduka zakozwe kuri yo. Yasohoye itangazo avuga ati: "Mu mezi 20 aheze, twakoze isuzuma rikomeye ku mutekano wayo mu mateka y'indege zunguruza abantu. Umutekano nico kintu nyamukuru dushira imbere ya vyose". Umuvugizi w'iyi kompanyi yabwiye itororokanirizo ry'amakuru AFP ko ingenzi zishobora guhindurirwa indege n'amasaha ataco zirinze gutanga mu gihe zizoba zidashaka kugenda na Boeing 737 Max. Ati: "Bashobora guhindura integuro y'urugendo rwabo ataco barinze gutanga, kandi ata na kimwe gihindutse ku bijanye n'aho bava n'iyo baja mu gihe cose itike y'indege izomara, iki naco kikaba ari amezi 12 uhereye umunsi iguriweko". Kubona iyi ndege isubiriye kuguruka, ni akarusho kanini kuri Boeing. Uretse ko ari kompanyi ya mbere isubiriye kwunguruza abantu ikoresheje indege Boeing 737 Max, Gol ivuga ko yatumyeko indege 95 737 Max muri Boeing. Hari haciye ikiringo kiri musi y'indwi imwe gusa ikompanyi ya Irlande, Ryanair, imenyesheje ko yatumyeko indege 75 zo mu bwoko bwa Boeing 737 Max

Ejo ku wa gatatu, Perezida Donald Trump yavuze ko mu kwezi gutaha Abanyamerika bazashobora kubona urukingo rwa Covid-19, avuguruza ibyatangajwe n'umukuru w'ikigo cy'Amerika cyo kurwanya no kwirinda indwara (CDC). Perezida Trump yagize ati: "Dutekereza ko dushobora gutangira [kurutanga] mu gihe runaka cyo mu kwezi kwa cumi". Amatora ya perezida muri Amerika azaba ku wa kabiri, ku itariki ya 3 y'ukwezi kwa cumi na kumwe. Bwana Trump yanavuze ko Dr Robert Redfield ukuriye ikigo CDC "yataye umutwe" kubera ko yavuze ko kubona urukingo bizafata igihe kirekire kurushaho. Dr Redfield yabwiye inteko ishingamategeko y'Amerika ko abaganga n'abandi bafite ibyago byinshi byo kwandura Covid-19 bazaba aba mbere mu guhabwa urukingo, wenda nko mu kwezi kwa mbere umwaka utaha cyangwa se mu mpera y'uyu. Ariko Dr Redfield yavuze ko bisa nk'ibidashoboka ko urwo rukingo rwatangira guhabwa abantu bose muri rusange mbere y'ukwezi kwa gatandatu k'umwaka wa 2021. Kugeza ubu Amerika ni cyo gihugu cya mbere ku isi cyashegeshwe bikomeye na coronavirus, abarenga 6,600,000 bamaze kuyandura, muri bo abarenga 195,000 yarabishe, nkuko imibare ya Kaminuza ya Johns Hopkins ibigaragaza.

Bwana Kagame mu cyumweru gishize yatangaje ko intandaro y'ibibazo biri mu mubano w'u Rwanda na Uganda ari urupfu rwa Seth Sendashonga wishwe mu 1998. Mu ijambo Bwana Kagame yagejeje ku bitabiriye umwihererero uhuza abategetsi bose, yavuze ko adasaba imbabazi ku by'urupfu rwa Sendashonga wahoze ari minisitiri w'ubutegetsi bw'igihugu nyuma ya jenoside. Umugore we, Cyriaque Nikuze Sendashonga, yavuze ko yababajwe n'ibyavuzwe na Perezida Kagame kandi asaba ko yasobanura umurongo utukura ntarengwa yakoresheje mu ijambo yagejeje ku bategetsi. Prudent Nsengiyumva yavuganye na Madamu Sendashonga, atangira amubaza uko yakiriye ibyavuzwe na Bwana Kagame, mu kiganiro mushobora kumva aho hejuru.

Stephen Biegun yashitse muri Korea Yepfo itariki 3 Ukwezi kwa Kabiri mu 2019 Stephen Biegun avuga ko afise intego yo gutunganya ikirangamisi cokurikizwa mu kugabanya ibigwanisho ruhonyanganda muri Korea ya Ruguru. Iyo nama itegekanijwe mu mpera za kuno kwezi, igashobora kubera mu gihugu ca Vietnam. Urwo rugendo rwa Bwana Biegun rushitse mu gihe hari icegeranyo ca ONU kigabisha Korea ya Ruguru guca ku ruhande ibihano, ikanabandanya umugambi wayo wa "nucléaire". Umukuru wa Amerika Trump na Bwana Kim bahuriye i Singapour mu kwezi kwa Gatandatu, umubonano wakurikiwe cane, unatuma haba icizere, ariko ntiwagira ikivamwo kiboneka. Impande zose ziyemeje kugabanya ibigwanisho ruhonyanganda, ariko nta ruhande na rumwe rwavuze ingene ivyo vyoja mu ngiro canke vyokurikiranwa. Inama ya Kim na Trump yavuzwemwo vyinshi ariko ni bike vyashikirijwe ku kungene ivyo bumvikanye vyoja mu ngiro Abahinga baragabisha ku majambo Bwana Trump aheruka gushikiriza ko Korea ya Ruguru ata bwoba igiteye ku bijanye n'ibigwanisho ruhonyanganda, kandi ico gihugu kitarigera kivuga ko kigiye kuvavanura n'umugambi waco wa "nucléaire" mu gihe Amerika nayo nyene itoba igize mwenuko. Gukomeza ibihano Bwana Biegun agiye i Pyongyang amaze kugirana ibiganiro n'abategetsi ba Korea Yepfo, akaba yavuze ko yipfuza gushika ku kintu kiboneka. Ubushikiranganji bw'imigenderanira ya Amerika n'amakungu bwavuze ko urugendo rwiwe "ruzotuma ivyo perezida n'indongozi Kim biyemeje i Singapour bitera bija imbere." Amerika yipfuza ko Korea ya Ruguru ivuga ku mugaragaro ibigwanisho ruhonyanganda itunze, ikiyemeza kubisambura ihagarikiwe n'amakungu - ivyo navyo Korea ya Ruguru ikaba itigeze ivuga ko izobikora. Mw'ijambo yashikirije kuri Kaminuza ya Stamford mu ndwi iheze, Bwana Biegun yavuze ko Amerika idashobora kwemera gukuraho ibihano ivyo bitabaye, ariko avuga ko izofasha mu bundi buryo, avuga ngo: "Ntitwigeze tuvuga ko ataco tuzokora kugera igihe ukoze vyose." Yavuze kandi ko Kim Jong-un aheruka kwiyemeza gusambura ibibanza vyose vya Korea ya Ruguru vy'ubumara bwa "pluton na uranium", bituma hakogwa ibigwanisho vya "nucléaire". Ivyegeranyo vy'akanama ka ONU kajejwe umutekano vyasohotse ku munsi wa mbere bivuga ko Korea ya Ruguru ibandanya gukora ibigwanisho vyo mu bwoko bwa "missiles" hamwe na ruhonyanganda, igakingira ibibanza vyayo ngo ntibishobore kugabwako ibitero.

Akarere ka Darfur kamaze igihe kirekire kazwi cyane kubera intambara. Muri 2003, intambara hagati y'inyeshyamba n'ingabo za leta ya Sudani yahitanye abaturage b'abasivile babarirwa mu bihumbi amagana. Urukiko mpuzamahanga mpanabyaha rwanasohoreye kandi inyandiko zisaba guta muri yombi umukuru wa Sudani, Omar al-Bashir, rushinja ibyaha bya jenoside muri Darfur. Umukuru w'ibikorwa bya ONU byo kubungabunga amahoro ku isi, Jean Pierre Lacroix (hagati) Ariko rero muri kino cyumweru umukuru w'ibikorwa bya ONU byo kubungabunga amahoro ku isi, Jean-Pierre Lacroix, yavuze ko muri ako karere ibintu byahindutse cyane mu buryo bwiza. Umuryango w'abibumbye n'umuryango w'ubumwe bwa Afurika birashaka ko ingabo zo mu mutwe bihuriyeho zongera kugabanywa. Bwana Lacroix yabwiye BBC ko ariko ONU itagiye kuva burundu muri Darfur. Umva uko abisobanura hano hasi: ONU iravuga ko umutekano wagarutse muri Darfur

Uyu mugwi ushimangira ko iyubahirizwa ry'agateka ka zina muntu ariyo nkingi y'ivyo leta y'u Burundi yokora vyose mu guhangana n'iki kiza Izo ngingo ngo ni nko guhimiriza isuku mu banyaghugu mu gukaraba intoki, guhagarika ingendo z'indege hamwe no gushira ukwabo ingenzi zinjiye mu gihugu, cane cane iziturutse mu bihugu bimaze kubonekamwo ico kiza. Ariko rero ngo ivyo ntibihagije mu gutorera umuti ico kiza cateye isibe isi yose, cane cane ku gihugu nk'u Burundi, aho inzego z'ubuvuzi zitifashe neza kandi abantu baronka ico bashira ku munwa ari uko basohoye amaboko ku munsi ku munsi. Ngo ndetse abagera ku 70 % bakaba bari munsi y'umurongo w'ubukene, n'ukuvuga batunzwe n'uburyo buri munsi ya 1.90 $ ku munsi. Uyu mugwi ushimangira ko iyubahirizwa ry'agateka ka zina muntu ariyo nkingi y'ivyo leta y'u Burundi yokora vyose mu guhangana n'iki kiza. Ku bijanye n'amasezerano mpuzamakungu yiyemeje, cane cane ayerekeye kubahiriza uburenganzira ku buzima n'amagara y'abanyagihugu, uyu mugwi wibutsa leta y'u Burundi ko ibwirizwa gukungira abanyagihugu bayo coronavirus no kuvura abarwaye. Ngo kandi ivyo bigakorwa uburenganzira bwabo burimwo gufungurirwa budahungabanijwe. Uyu mugwi wibutsa leta y'u Burundi kandi ko uburenganzira bwo kumenya amakuru ari ntangere mu gihe nk'iki c'ikiza. Ngo niyo mpamvu ubwo burenganzira butegerezwa kwuhabirizwa kandi ntibuburizwemwo mu nzira yo kuzibira amakuru ashingiye ku bimenyetso vy'ukuri avuguruza ayaba yatanzwe n'abategetsi canke gutangaza ivyiyumviro n'ayandi makuru anegura ingingo zafashwe na leta. Ubuzima burabandanya uko bisanzwe mu Burundi, naho hari ikiza ca coronavirus Uyu mugwi wemeza ko ahubwo igikwiye ari uko hoba gushira ahabona amakuru yerekana uburyo ico kiza giteye impungenge, urugero kigezeko n'uburyo buhari bwo kukirwanya, no kuvura abanduye, kuko ari vyo vyoha ingoga abanyagihugu mu ruhara rwabo mu kugikumira. Uyu mugwi ubabazwa no kubona hari amashirahamwe y'abagiraneza yimwe uruhusha rwo gushika mu bibanza abantu bashizwemwo ukwa bonyene mu gukumira iki kiza ca Covd-19. Wemeza ko bari bafashwe mu buryo butabereye kiremwa muntu, ata mazi meza canke imfungurwa bahabwa, eka n'ubuvuzi. Ingingo zifatwa mu gukumira iki kiza kandi ngo ntizikwiye kubamwo ivangura, canke ngo zize gusongera isibe ku budasa bwari buhasanzwe hagati y'abakene n'abakire. Ikindi kandi ngo zikwiye guhuzwa n'ubuzima abanyagihugu babayemwo mu Burundi, aho abenshi batunzwe no kwikorera utwabo. Kuronswa uburyo bwo kwivuza ngo bikwiye guhabwa abanyagihugu bose, hatitaweho ubudasa bwabo, bwaba ubufatiye ku gitsina, imigwi ya politike, amadini, amoko, ubukire canke ubwenegihugu. U Burundi bwasubije iki? Felin Gakwaya yavuganye n'umushikiranganji w'u Burundi ajejwe ivy'agategaka ka zina muntu, Martin Nivyabandi. Umushikiranganji Nivyabandi yavuze ko u Burundi ari igihugu cikukiye, ko co kimwe n'ibindi bihugu, ata wokibwiriza ingene gikemura ibibazo vyaco. Yavuze ko uwo mugwi wa ONU ata kindi ugamije atari guhungabanya abanyagihugu mu gihe hitezwe amatora mu kwezi kuza. Inyishu ya Ministre Martin Nivyabandi ku mugwi wa ONU vya coronavirus

Abimukira, biganjemo abo mu gihugu cya Honduras, bambuka umugezi wa Suchiate utandukanya Guatemala na Mexico, ku itariki ya 29 y'uku kwezi kwa cumi Jenerali Terrence O'Shaughnessy wo mu ngabo zirwanira mu kirere z'Amerika, yavuze ko iki gikorwa cya gisirikare kizibanda muri leta za Texas, Arizona, na California. Cyahawe izina ry'urugamba rya Operation Faithful Patriot, cyangwa igikorwa cya gisirikare cy'uwihebeye gukunda igihugu ugenecyereje mu Kinyarwanda. Mbere yaho, Perezida Donald Trump yavuze ko "igitero" cy'abimukira kizasanga igisirikare cy'Amerika kiri maso. Bwana Trump ku wa mbere yabwiye igitangazamakuru Fox News ko "imijyi y'amahema" izubakwa ikakirirwamo abimukira basaba ubuhungiro muri Amerika. Jenerali Terrence O'Shaughnessy wo mu ngabo zirwanira mu kirere z'Amerika Bwana Trump yagize ati: "Nibasaba ubuhungiro, tuzaba tubagumanye muri icyo gihe cyose bazaba barindiriye igisubizo. Tuzabahamana, tuzubaka imijyi y'amahema, tuzubaka inzu z'amahema ahantu hose". Hasanzwe hari abasirikare b'Amerika 2100 barinda uwo mupaka, bahoherejwe ubwo Bwana Trump yabisabaga bwa mbere mu kwezi kwa kane. Polisi y'Amerika ihosha imyigaragambyo mu myitozo ku iteme mpuzamahanga rihuza Amerika na Mexico Mu gihe habura icyumweru ngo amatora rusange yo muri Amerika abe, impande zombi zihanganye muri politiki y'iki gihugu zishinjwa gukoresha ikibazo cy'abimukira mu nyungu za politiki. Muri aya matora yo ku itariki ya 6 y'ukwezi gutaha kwa cumi na kumwe, ishyaka ry'abarepubulikani rya Bwana Trump rizaba rishaka ko inteko ishingamategeko y'Amerika itigarurirwa n'abo mu ishyaka ry'abademokarate. Aba bimukira baracyafite urugendo rungana na kilometero 1600 mbere yuko bagera ku mupaka w'Amerika. Jenerali O'Shaughnessy yavuze ko abo basirikare bazoherezwa ku mupaka mu mpera y'iki cyumweru bafite ibikoresho byabo birimo imbunda, kajugujugu, indege nini, inzitiro cyangwa za 'bariyeri' ndetse n'inzitiro z'amashanyarazi zo kunganira abagenzura umupaka. Bwana Trump avuga ko abimukira bazasanga igisirikare cy'Amerika kiri maso Bwana Trump si we perezida wa mbere wohereje abasirikare ku mupaka w'Amerika na Mexico. Perezida Barack Obama na we yohereje abasirikare 1200 kurinda uwo mupaka, mu gihe Perezida George W Bush we yahohereje hafi abasirikare 6000 bo gufasha abari basanzwe barinda uwo mupaka - igikorwa cya gisirikare yise Operation Jump Start. Ibyo bikorwa bya gisirikare byombi byamaze igihe kigera hafi ku mwaka umwe.

Abo bahanzi b'injana ya Bongo Flava bavugije indirimbo yabo yitwa Mwanza, isanzwe ibujijwe, mu giteramwo barimwo cabo citiriwe Wasafi Festival. Kubera izo mvo, ikigo kigenzura ibijanye n'imico muri ico gihugu, Basata, caciye gifatira ibihano abo baririmvyi vyo kubabuza kuremesha ibiteramo muri Tanzania ikiringo kitamenyeshejwe. Mu gitondo c'uno munsi rero abo baririmvyi basohoye video kuri instagram basaba ikigongwe kuri iyo ndirimbo baririmvye kandi yari yarabujijwe kubera ibifatwa nk'ibiterasoni biyivugwamwo. Mw'iyo video vyagarara ko bafise inyifato yo kwicisha bugufi, bakavuga ko basaba ikigongwe bashimitse. Si ubwa mbere Diamond afatirwa ibihano kubera indirimbo bivugwa ko zirimwo ibitera soni, hakaba mbere hari indirimbo ziwe zibujijwe kuvuzwa muri Tanzania zirimwo Allelujah na Waka Waka.

Addyi n'umuti wagaragaje ibimenyetso vyo gufasha abafise ikibazo co gushaka imibonano Ariko uwo muti uzogurishwa kw'izina rya Addyi, uzoherekezwa n'impanuro zikomeye zigabisha abawukoresha ku ngaruka zawo, na cane cane iyo ukoreshejwe n'abanyoye inzoga. Umwe mu mirwi y'abaguzi bawushimye, uvuga ko ari ikimenyetso c'uko ikibazo c'imibonano mpuzabitsina ku bagore naco citaweho, nka kimwe mu bibazo vy'amagara y'abantu. Ariko hari abandi bavuze ko uwo muti Addyi, uzotera ibibazo vyinshi ku bagore gusumba ico uzobafasha. Uwo muti ufatwa buri munsi, bawutaziriye viagra y'abagore n'ubwo wowo ukorana n'ubwonko, bitandukanye na viagra y'abagabo, yoyo ikorana n'amaraso.

Mu mwaka uheze prezida Yoweri Museveni yavuze ko abahinga ba Uganda bariko baragerageza kugira ubushakashatsi bwo gukora urucanco n'umuti uvura Covid-19, vyose bikiriko birageragezwa. Prezida Museveni yagize ati:"Ndiko ndafashanya n'abantu banje gutangura kurondera urucanco rwacu, s'ukuguma turindiriye ngo badufashe. Twaracerewe ariko ubu twatanguye kurondera urucanco rwacu ruzotangwa hose kw'isi." Yabandanije avuga:"Tuzotangura kurugeragereza ku mbeba mu kwezi kwa gatandatu kugira turabe ko ata ngaruka rufise, hanyuma mu kwezi kw'umunani turugeragereze ku nkende, hanyuma turindire ko rwemezwa na WHO/OMS. Prezida Museveni n'umupfasoni wiwe Janet bariko baracandagwa Prezida Museveni yavuze ivyo igihe yari ahejeje gukingirwa Covid-19 n'urucanco rwa AstraZeneca ari kumwe n'umupfasoni wiwe Janet Museveni, ku kirimba c'umukuru w'igihugu i Nakasero mu gisagara ca Kampala. Museveni kandi yahamagariye abanyagihugu gusidukana n'iyonka kwicandagisha avuga ko urwo rucanco ata ngaruka rufise.

Papa Francis yavuze ko ibyo byaba ari igisubizo ku gice gito cy'ikibazo Abasenyeri benshi muri ako gace bari bashyigikiye iyi ngingo umwaka ushize, ariko Papa niwe wagombaga gufata umwanzuro ngo ishyirwe mu bikorwa. Abapadiri muri kiliziya gatolika bagomba kubahiriza itegeko ryo kudashaka abagore, kereka gusa umupasitoro washyingiwe wo mu itorero rya Angilikani ahinduye akaza muri kiliziya gatolika. Kudashyingirwa ni imwe mu ngingo ifatwa nko kwiyegurira Imana muri iri dini. Itangazo ryasohowe na Vatican rigira riti: "Amazon yaduhaye ihurizo, Papa yanditse ko, mu gukemura ikibazo tutakwishimira ibisubizo bikemura gusa igice cy'ikibazo". Papa yatangaje ko hakenewe abantu bihaye Imana bo muri ako gace bumva neza ikibazo n'imico yaho. Yasabye abasenyeri "gusengera kubona abahamagarirwa ubupadiri benshi" no gushishikariza abashaka kuba abavugabutumwa guhitamo kujya muri ako gace ka Amazon. Mu kwezi kwa cumi umwaka ushize, ikoraniro ry'abasenyeri 184 ryateraniye i Vatican ngo ryige kuri ejo hazaza h'iri dini muri ako gace. Ryaganiriye ku kwemeza ko abagabo bafite ingo bakwemererwa kuba abapadiri, benshi muri bo bashyigikiye iyi ngingo. Bivugwa ko 85% by'uturere tugize Amazon tutabasha gusomerwa misa buri cyumweru kubera ubuke bw'abapadiri. Hamwe bivugwa ko babona umupadiri rimwe mu mwaka. Gusa abakomeye ku bya kera bo muri kiliziya gatolika - cyane cyane abo mu Burayi na Amerika ya ruguru - banze iki cyifuzo bavuga ko cyatuma n'ahandi ku isi banga itegeko ryo kudashaka ku bihaye Imana. Papa Francis, mbere yigeze gutangaza ko ashobora kwiga kuri viri probati (abagabo b'ukwemera kudashidikanywaho) bagahabwa inshingano zimwe na zimwe. Uyu munsi kuwa gatatu kandi, Papa Francis yatangaje ko yangiye abagore kuba abadiyakoni, urwego ruri munsi y'abapadiri muri kiliziya gatolika.

Afrika y'epfo ihanganye no guca burundu ubwandu bw'umugera wa SIDA Muri Afrika y'epfo, abagera ku miliyoni indwi bagendana umugera wa SIDA, ni nayo mpamvu igerageza ry'urwo rucanco ryakorewe yo. Abahinga bavuga ko urwo rucanco ruzoba rubaye ikigwanisho ca nyuma co gutsinda burundu umugera wa VIH. Urucanco ruriko rurageragezwa rushingiye ku gwakoreshejwe muri Thailand mu 2009, rwakoze ku rugero rwa 30%. Ibizova muri iryo gerageza ryo muri Afrika y'epfo vyitezwe gushigwa ahabona mu myaka ine iri imbere. Kuva umugera wa VIH rushizwe ahagaragara mu 1983, vyarananiranye gurora urucanco ruyikinga neza. Abashakasahatsi bizeye ko ibura ry'urucanco rizoherana n'iri gerageza ryo muri Afrika y'epfo, ryahawe izina rifobetse rya HVTN 702. Ubwo bushakashatsi burongowe n'umunya Afrika y'epfo Glenda Gray, umwigisha muri kaminuza akaba akuriye n'ikigo c'ubushakashatsi mu buvuzi. Avuga ko iryo gerageza rizobereka nimba ibimenyetso vyagarageye ku rugero rwo hasi vyerekana ko ugwo rucanco rushobora gukora mu gukinga ubwandu bwa SIDA, noneho vyemezwa, rugatangura gufasha abanyagihgu ba Afrika y'epfo. SIDA itwara abakiri bato benshi muri Afrika Ibiharuro bitangwa n'ishirahamwe mpuzamakungu ONU vyerekana ko abantu bagera ku miliyoni 30 bamaze guhitanwa na SIDA kuva mu myaka ya 1980. Imiti imaze kuboneka yo gupfupfahaza iyo ngwara yarafashije cane abamaze kwandura. Ariko urukingo ruhari ubu rwo kwirinda kwandurira mu mibonano mpuzabitsina, n'ukwifata hamwe no gukoresha agakingirizo Kwandika amateka Abemeye kuja muri iri gerageza bazotegwa inshinge zitanu mu mwaka, nk' uko bivugwa n'ikigo c'inyigisho mu vyo amagara y'abantu ca Leta zunze Ubumwe za Amerika, ari naco gitanga uburyo. Awethu Benenengu, umusore umwe w'imyaka mu bari muri rino gerageza, yabwiye umunyamakuru wa BBC ari Johannesburg ko yemeye kurijamwo kuko yifuza gufasha kurwanya ivo kiza. Avuga ko ahri ikumira rikomeye. Ngo yifuza kuba mu runganwe ruzohindura ivyo kandi yifuza ko abana biwe bazonerezwa no kwumva ko se yagiye mu gitigiri c'abanditse amateka. Abazoramuka banduye SIDA muri iri gerageza bazorungikwa um mavuriro abafasha akongera akabavura. Bazokwigishwa kandi uko bokwigenza kugira ntibanzuze abandi.

Abategetsi babijejwe bariko barihweza amafoto kugira bamenye uwanditse ivyo bitutsi ku birabure ku nzu ya LeBron James. "N'aho yogira amahera angana gute, n'aho womenyekana gute....kuba umwirabure mu gihugu ca Amerika n'ikintu kitoroshe," ni ko yavuze. Iyo nyandiko yashikirijwe igipolisi ku musi wa gatatu mu gitondo n'uwo mukinyi rurangiranwa w'umugwi wa Cleveland Cavaliers, akaba yarishuye ibibazo vyinshi amasaha menshi mu nyuma. Abakozi ba LAPD bemereye BBC ko ari icaha gikomeye co kuvangura urukoba. Abategetsi babijejwe bariko barihweza amafoto mu matohoza yo kumenya uwakoze ivyo bintu. Ivyo James yabivugyei San Francisco, aho umugwi wiwe uriko uragirira imyimenyerezo imbere y'urukino rwa mbere rurangiza ihiganwa rya Basketball. "Amacakubiri afatiye ku rukoba azokwama avugwa kw'isi, muri Amerika, azane ukwinubana muri Amerika- na cane cane ku banyamerika bava muri Afrika bama basuzuguwe buri musi," ni ko yavuze. Yabandanije avuga ko :"turacafise urugendo rurerure twebwe nk'abantu na twebwe nk'abanyamerika bamuka muri Afrika kugira twumve ko twese tungana nk'abanyamerika." LeBron James w'imyaka 32 azwi nk'umukinyi ahembwa amahera menshi mw'ihiganwa rya Basketball muri Amerika, aho ahembwa amiliyoni z'amadolari 30 buri mwaka. Mu ndwi iheze ni we yamenyekanye ko yinjije amanota menshi gusumba mu nkino za Basketball muri Amerika, aho yarushije uwahora ari uwa mbere, Michael Jordan, yahoze akinira umugwi wa Chicago Bulls.

Si ubwa mbere Bwana Kagame agaragaje ko akunda 'ubucuruzi' Mu ruzinduko arimo mu majyaruguru n'iburengerazuba bw'u Rwanda, Bwana Kagame ibyo abwira abaturage byibanda ku mutekano, imibereho myiza n'ubukungu. Akarere ka Rubavu yasuye uyu munsi ubukungu bwako bushingira ku bucuruzi bwambukiranya umupaka ugahuza n'umugi wa Goma muri Kongo. Mu ijambo ryanyuraga kuri Radio na Televiziyo by'igihugu biri kuba yavuze ko abacuruzi ba hano bakwiye kwagura isoko ryabo bakanagura iryo hakurya (muri Kongo). Leta yo ikabafasha mu kubaha umutekano no kubaka imibanire n'imigenderanire n'andi masoko. Yabwiye abacuruzi ko bakwiye guhora bashaka kubona byinshi birenze, aho kumva ko bishoboye kuko babona inyungu bacuruje ibintu bicye ku bantu bacye. Ati: " ...ugacuruza utuntu ducye, ubwo kandi wahenze abantu, ibintu byabuze...ariko kubera ko wowe witwa ngo wabonye inyungu ukarekera aho. Ntabwo ari byo, ntabwo ari ko abantu bakora business. "Ngewe ndi uwikorera... cyangwa igihe nzaba nagiye muri uyu mwuga... birashoboka umunsi narangije ibi...nshobora kuzajya kwikorera. Ntabwo abikorera bakwiye kunyurwa na bikeye babona". Perezida Kagame yabwiye abacuruzi ko bakwiye guhora bashaka kubona byinshi birenze Kagame, umucuruzi? Si ubwa mbere Bwana Kagame agaragaje ko akunda 'ubucuruzi'. Mu 2015 Perezida Kagame yatangaje ko se (Deogratias Rutagambwa) yari umucuruzi uri mu batangije kompanyi y'ubucuruzi yari izwi cyane mu Rwanda yitwaga TRAFIPRO. David Himbara wari umujyanama wa Bwana Kagame, ubu utavuga rumwe n'ubutegetsi bwe, mu 2016 yanditse igitabo yise Kagame's Economic Mirage, muri cyo avuga ko ubucuruzi mu Rwanda bwihariwe kandi bugengwa n'ishyaka riri ku butegetsi bukayoborwa na Paul Kagame. Mu gitabo kitwa Rwanda, Inc cyo mu 2014 cyanditswe na Patricia Crisafulli na Andrea Redmond, abantu banyuranye barimo 'Perezida' Bill Clinton bavuze ko u Rwanda ari igihugu cyakoze ibidasanzwe mu bukungu kuko 'kiyobowe nk'ikigo cy'imari gicunzwe neza' n'umuyobozi mukuru (CEO) wacyo Paul Kagame. Ariko kuva kwa Kagame ku butegetsi akajya mu bucuruzi bishobora kuba bitari hafi, kuko itegeko nshinga ry'u Rwanda rimwemerera kuba yaguma ku butegetsi kugeza mu mwaka wa 2034.

Abategetsi b'Umuryango wa Afrika y'Ubuseruko bari bitavye inama i Arusha ku tariki 30/11/2018 Umukuru w'igihugu ca Uganda Yoweri Museveni ari nawe arongoye EAC uno mwaka yamenyesheje ko iyo nama yungururirijwe mu mpera z'Ukwezi kwa 12, we na bagenziwe ba Kenya na Tanzania barangije kwivuna umusase ku ngoro y'umukuru w'igihugu ca Tanzaniya i Arusha. Perezida Museveni yavuze ko bafashe iyo ngongo bisunze amategeko agenga uwo Muryango wa Afrika y'Ubuseruko. Yagize ati: "Dufashe ingingo yo kwunguruza inama y'uno munsi kubera uko umwe muri twebwe ataje uwo nawe akaba ari u Burundi. Twungururije iyo nama kw'itariki ya 27 Ukwezi kwa 12, 2018 igihe twese tuzoba ariho turi, kubera ko amasezerano ya Afrika y'Ubuseruko avuga ibintu bibiri, kimwe nuko dutegerezwa gukora inama imwe isanzwe ku mwaka ari nayo y'uno munsi. "Ariko kandi ingingo yose yofatwa aruko abanyamuryango bose baba bahari, kuri ivyo iyo umwe atariho ari si vyiza kubandanya, biba bigiye kubiri n'amasezerano".
