Uretse Perezida Museveni asanzwe arongoye umuryango muri kino gihe, umukuru w'igihugu ca Tanzaniya John Magufuli hamwe n'uwa Kenya, Uhuru Kenyatta nibo bandi bategetsi bo hejuru bari bitavye. Igihugu c'u Rwanda cari caserukiwe n'umushikiranganji w'imigenderanire n'amakungu Richard Sezibera yigeze kuba umunyamabanga mukuru wa EAC, igihugu ca Sudani yo mu Bumanuko giserukigwa n'umushikiranganji w'ubudandaji Paul Aketch. Igihugu c'u Burundi catumye iyo nama yungururizwa ku rindi sango cari carasavye imbere y'igihe ko yokwungururizwa ku wundi munsi. Mw'ikete ubutegetsi bw'u Burundi bwarungikiye Perezida Yoweri Museveni bwavuze ko hari imvo butokwirengagiza zituma butokwitaba iyo nama.

Major Callixte Nsabimana uzwi nka Sankara wari umuvugizi w'umutwe wa FLN Umuvugizi w'ubugenzacyaha yatangaje ko Bwana Nsabimana aregwa ibyaha by'iterabwoba ku nyungu za politiki, irema ry'umutwe w'ingabo zitemewe, gukora no kugira uruhare mu bikorwa by'iterabwoba n'ibindi. Ko bitarenze uyu munsi agezwa mu bushinjacyaha. Abanyamakuru bamubajije impamvu yatinze kugaragazwa, maze asubiza ko ibyaha by'iterabwoba bifite uburyo bikurikiranwa, ko ari yo mpamvu bifite itegeko ryihariye. Iri tegeko ngo riha uburenganzira umugenzacyaha kutarenza iminsi 15, ishobora kongerwa ntirenge 90, ategura inyandiko-mvugo y'uregwa yo guha ubushinjacyaha. Umunyamakuru wa BBC Jean Claude Mwambutsa uri i Kigali avuga ko Sankara yerekanywe mu gihe cy'iminota micye cyane, ko yagaragaraga nk'ufite imbaraga z'umubiri kandi anyuzamo akamwenyura. Major Callixte Nsabimana uzwi nka Sankara wari umuvugizi w'umutwe wa FLN Umwuganizi we mu mategeko Moïse Nkundabarashi yavuze ko umukiriya we afunzwe mu buryo bukurikije amategeko kandi uyu munsi yahisemo kutavuga. Umuvugizi w'ubugenzacyaha Modeste Mbabazi yabwiye abanyamakuru ko uko Sankara yafashwe n'aho yafatiwe bigikorwaho n'ubugenzacyaha bikazamenyekana mu rubanza rwe. Gusa yemeje ko yafashwe ku itariki ya 13 y'ukwezi gushize kwa kane. Yemeje na we ko uregwa ari we wahisemo kutagira icyo avuga hakavuga umwunganizi we. Ifatwa n'ihererekanywa rye ryagizwe ibanga Mu kwezi gushize kwa kane, umwe mu banyamakuru bigenga wo mu birwa bya Comores yatangarije BBC ko Sankara yafatiweyo agahabwa abategetsi b'u Rwanda ku itariki ya 13 y'ukwezi gushize kwa kane. Abategetsi b'impande zombi banze kugira icyo batangariza BBC kuri aya makuru. Ku itariki ya 30 y'ukwezi gushize ni bwo Minisitiri w'ububanyi n'amahanga w'u Rwanda yatangarije abanyamakuru ko Major Callixte Sankara "bamufite" kandi azashyikirizwa ubucamanza vuba. Mu kwezi kwa gatatu, Major Sankara yatangarije BBC ko umutwe avugira umaze amezi 11 mu ishyamba rya Nyungwe urwana n'abasirikare b'u Rwanda mu turere twegereye iri shyamba. Sankara wahoze akora ibikorwa by'ubucuruzi mu Rwanda, ahagana mu mwaka wa 2010 yagiye muri Afurika y'Epfo yifatanya n'abo mu ishyaka RNC naryo rirwanya ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda. Gusa yaje kurivamo. Yashinjaga ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda kwibasira abatavuga rumwe nabwo, gutanga amahirwe bushingiye ku moko, kudaha ubwisanzure Abanyarwanda no kutubahiriza uburenganzira bwa muntu - ibirego u Rwanda rwakomeje guhakana. Mu byumweru bishize, umukuru w'ishyaka MRCD rifite umutwe w'inyeshyamba wa FLN yatangarije BBC ko "bataciwe intege" n'ifatwa rya Sankara.

Icyo kiganiro cyo kuri Zoom hagati ya Marcus Rashford na Barack Obama cyateguwe n'inzu itangaza ibitabo ya Penguin Books, cyayobowe na June Sarpong ukuriye ibyo gutuma hababo urunyurane mu buhanzi/ubugeni muri BBC Rashford, w'imyaka 23, mu mwaka ushize yayoboye igikorwa cy'ubukangurambaga bwo gutuma abana b'abacyene babona icyo kurya mu gihe cy'icyorezo cya coronavirus, bituma ahabwa icyubahiro kizwi nka MBE. Yanashinze uburyo bwo gusoma ibitabo bwo gutuma abana b'abacyene bashobora kurushaho gusoma. Avuga ku kiganiro bagiranye, Obama yagize ati: "Urubyiruko rwinshi mpura narwo - rurimo na Marcus - ruri imbere y'aho jye nari ndi igihe nari mfite imyaka 23". "Baba barimo gukora impinduka no gutanga urugero rwiza aho batuye". Obama, w'imyaka 59, na Rashford baganiriye mu buryo bwa videwo bw'iyakure, banavuga ku byo bahuriyeho banyuzemo mu buzima bwabo, birimo no kuba bombi bararezwe n'umubyeyi w'umugore gusa. Rashford, wari wicaye mu gikoni cye, yavuze ko "byari birenze kwiyumvisha" igihe yavuganaga n'uwo wabaye Perezida wa 44 w'Amerika. Yongeyeho ati: "Ariko, ako kanya, yahise atuma numva mwisanzuyeho". "Bidatinze nahise mbona isano y'ukuntu ibyo twaciyemo turi abana byagize uruhare mu gutuma habaho aba bagabo mubona uyu munsi - ibibazo, ingorane n'ibindi byose". "Mu by'ukuri naryohewe na buri munota wose w'ikiganiro. Iyo Perezida Obama arimo kuvuga, icyo uba ushaka gukora gusa ni ugutega amatwi".

Jose Mourinho apakira ibye ngo agende nyuma yo kwirukanwa na Tottenham Uyu Munya-Portugal w'imyaka 58 yari yasimbuye Umunya-Argentina Mauricio Pochettino mu kwezi kwa cumi na kumwe mu 2019, ageza iyi kipe ku mwanya wa gatandatu mu mwaka ushize w'imikino. Kuri ubu Tottenham iri ku mwanya wa karindwi ku rutonde rwa shampiyona, nyuma yo kubona amanota abiri mu mikino itatu iheruka gukina, ndetse mu kwezi kwa gatatu yasezerewe mu irushanwa rya Europa League. Tottenham izakina na Manchester City ku mukino wa nyuma w'igikombe cya Carabao Cup, ku itariki ya 25 y'uku kwezi kwa kane. Ku cyumweru, Tottenham yabaye imwe mu makipe atandatu yo muri Premier League atangaje ko yinjiye mu irushanwa rishya ry'i Burayi rya European Super League. Itsinda ry'abatoza bafatanyaga na Mourinho - Joao Sacramento, Nuno Santos, Carlos Lalin na Giovanni Cerra - na bo birukanwe. Daniel Levy, umukuru wa Tottenham, yagize ati: "Jose n'abatoza bakoranaga babanye natwe muri bimwe mu bihe bigoye cyane twanyuzemo nk'ikipe". "Jose ni umunyamwuga wa nyawe wagaragaje kwihangana cyane muri iki cyorezo [cya coronavirus]". "Ku ruhande rwanjye bwite naryohewe no gukorana na we kandi ndicuza kubona ibintu bitaragenze uko twembi twabiteganyaga". "Iteka azahora yisanga hano ndetse twifuzaga kumushimira n'abatoza bakoranaga ku musanzu wabo". Muri uyu mwaka w'imikino, Mourinho yatsinzwe imikino 10 ya shampiyona. Ni bwo bwa mbere yari atsinzwe imikino ingana gutyo mu mwaka umwe kuva yatangira ubutoza. Nta kipe n'imwe yindi yo muri Premier League yatakaje amanota menshi yashoboraga gutsindira kurusha Tottenham, yatakaje amanota 20. Umukino wa nyuma nk'umutoza wa Tottenham wabaye uwo Mourinho yanganyijemo na Everton 2-2 ku wa gatanu. Ryan Mason, wahoze akina hagati muri Tottenham wari umaze igihe atoza mu ikipe y'abato ya Tottenham, ni we utoza ikipe nkuru mu myitozo yo kuri uyu wa mbere.

Yakoresheje amazina y'ububeshi 28 akagira n'imigenderanire ikomeye n'abantu bo ku migabane ibiri, ivyatumye adashobora gufatwa. Uyo mutama w'imyaka 84 yagumye yinyegeza igihe kirekire gushika aho sentare mpuzamakungu yari yashinzwe kugira ishengeze abateguye jenoside ya 1994 ihagarikiye ibikorwa. Ariko, yagiye gufatwa mu ndwi iheze aho yari yinjegeje mu gisagara ca Paris, bivuye ku matohoza yakozwe na Serge Brammertz, umushikirizamanza wa ONU arongoye umurwi ujejwe gukurikirana abakoze ivyaha vyo mu ntambara mu Rwanda na Yougoslavia Ati: "Hari haciye umwaka twibaza ko yashobora kuba ari mu Bwongereza, mu Bufaransa canke mu Bubirigi, nta mezi abiri yari ahaciye tumenye ko yari mu Bufaransa". "Abategetsi b'u Bufaransa barashoboye kumenya inzu yari yinyegejemwo, ari naho haciye haba igikorwa co kumufata". Avuga ko kimwe muri bikuru bikuru vyatumye adashobora gufatwa gushika ubwo abana biwe babigizemwo uruhara rukomeye. Félicien Kabuga yari yinyegeje mu nzu iri ahitwa Asnières-sur-Seine Azwi ko afise n'imuburiburi abana batanu - babiri mu bakobwa biwe bakaba barongowe n'abahungu b'uwahoze ari umukuru w'igihugu c'u Rwanda, Juvenal Habyarimana. Abajejwe amatohoza b'u Bufaransa baragendereje abana biwe kugira ngo bashobore kumufatira mw'igorofa ya gatatu mu karere ka Asnières-sur-Seine i Paris, aho yari asanzwe aba ku bimuranga vy'ububeshi, aho yakoresha igitabo c'inzira c'igihugu ca Afrika kitamenyekanye. Nk'uko bivugwa na koloneli Eric Emeraux arongoye igipolisi kidasanzwe kijejwe kurwanya amabi akorerwa mu ntambara, ikiza ca coronavirus naco nyene carafashije. Ingingo za gumamurugo mu Bufaransa zatumye ibikorwa vyinshi bihagarara mu burere butandukanye bwa Bulaya, bituma uyo muntu yagirizwa ko ari we yafashije jenoside afatirwa umwanya uhagije. Mu minsi 100 gusa mu 1994, hafi abantu 800.000 barishwe mu Rwanda n'Abahutu b'intagongwa - bafashwe mu mugongo na Kabuga, mu butunzi yari yakuye mu rudandazwa rw'icayi. Ubwo bwicanyi bw'agahomerabunwa bwabaye inyuma y'aho indege ya Juvenal Habyarimana irasiwe, akahasiga ubuzima. Leta Zunze Ubumwe za Amerika zari zemeye gutanga imiliyoni zitanu z'amadolari ku muntu yari gutanga amakuru yatuma Kabuga afatwa. Ariko rero vyarabaye ibisigabwenge ingene uyo muntu wa mbere yahigwa n'ubutungane ku mugabane wa Afrika, agatwe kiwe katanzweko imiliyoni zitanu z'amadolari ku vyaha indwi vya jenoside n'ivyaha vy'agahomerabunwa yagirijwe mu 1997, yashoboye kwinyegeza imyaka n'imyaka, abacamanza mu bihugu n'imigabane bakamurondera bakamubura. None yoba yaba muri Kenya? Bivugwa ko Kabuga yabaye mu bihugu vyinshi muri Afrika y'Ubuseruko harimwo na Kenya, aho we n'umuryango wiwe bari basanzwe bafise amatungo. Kenya yaravuzwe cane igihe kirekire ko ari yo yari ihaye indaro uyo mugabo, abategetsi bakomeye nabo bakamukingira ikibaba, maze utwigoro twose two kumuhagarika ntihagira ico dushikako. Mu 2006, sentare mpuzamakungu mpanavyaha ku Rwanda yavuze ko yari ifise ivyemezo ko Kabuga yagendera canke kandi akaba muri Kenya, aho yari asanzwe afise amatungo. Haciye imyaka itatu, Stephen Rapp, yaserukira Amerika mu bijanye no kurwanya ivyaha vyo mu ntambara, yaragirije amaleta ya Kenya yagiye akurikirana ko yanse gutanga Kabuga. Avuga ko hari n'ivyemezo ko Kabuga yanitabira iminsi mikuru yitabwa n'abantu bakomeye, ivyo Kenya yamye yamirira kure. Nta nkeka ko umuryango wa Kabuga wari ufise imitahe muri Kenya, kuko umwe mu mitungo yiwe wanateye impari gushika muri sentare mu 2015, igihe umugore wiwe, Josephine Mukazitoni, bari bawusangiye, arondeye kuwusubirana ariko bikanka. Uwo mutungo wari uzwi kw'izina rya Spanish Villas wagiye gufatwa inyuma y'aho ONU ifatiye icemezo isaba ibihugu vyose kurondera no gufata amatungo ya Kabuga. Uruhigi rw'imbwa Ibinyamakuru vyarerekanye incuro nyinshi ko Kabuga yari muri Kenya, n'aho bitigeze bitanga ivyemezo ko we canke umugore wiwe baba muri ico gihugu. Avugwa ko yashoboye gukwepa incuro nyinshi imitego y'abapolisi yo kumufata ku mugwa mukuru wa Kenya, Nairobi. Mu gitero cakozwe i Nairobi ku wa 19 z'ukw'indwi 1997, igihe igipolisi cahagarika abandi banyarwanda indwi bagirizwa jenoside, Kabuga yarashoboye kubacika afashijwe n'umutegetsi wo hejuru yari yamaze kumugabisha. Nayo ku bamenyeshamakuru barondera kumenya ivy'iwe, kwari ukwita mu mutego. Ku wa 16 z'ukwa mbere 2003, umunyamakuru yigenga William Munuhe, yatowe yapfiriye mu nzu i Nairobi. Mwenewabo, Josephat Gichuki, avuga ko amaze gupfa yasanze Munuhe yariko ategurana na FBI umugambi wo gufata Kabuga yiyise umudandaza. Gichuki yabwiye BBC ati: "Icadutangaje, ni uko igipolisi cavuze ko Munuhe yapfuye yiyahuye, yishwe n'umwuka urekurwa n'imbabura y'amakara (monoxide de carbone)". "Igihe twamuhamba, jewe nariboneye igikomere c'urusasu mu mutwe, n'amaraso mu cumba ciwe". Haciye imyaka umunani, umumenyeshamakuru John Allan Namu avuga ko yahenzwe n'ibigirankana n'uwamuhaye amakuru y'ububeshi amwereka umuntu w'umurwizatunga atari we, ngo ni we Kabuga. Avuga ko ivyo vyakozwe kubera hari abatari bishimiye ivyo amatohoza yiwe yari yashitseko, harimwo ko Kabuga yari afise inomero y'ikonte mw'ibanki imwe ya Kenya ariyo yakoresha mu rudandaza rwiwe. Vyarageze kure gushika aho we n'umuryango wiwe baba mu kinyegero kubera iterabwoba yariko akorwako ko yari gushobora kwicwa. Namu yabwiye BBC ati: "Uravye aho yafatiwe, biragaragara neza ko Kabuga yabayeho yinyegeza ikiringo kinini kubera yari akingiwe ikibaba n'abantu benshi kw'isi cane cane muri Kenya". Ng'urwo uruhigi rero Inyuma gato ya jenoside, Kabuga yahungiye mu Buswisi ariko ntiyemerewe kuhaba, bikavugwa ko yoba yaciye agaruka muri Afrika aciye i Kinshasa, umugwa mukuru wa Repubulika y'Intwaro Rusangi ya Congo, ico gihe yitwa Zaïre. Ivyemezo hafi vyose vyerekana ko yaba muri Kenya, n'aho Brammertz avuga ko yabonywe muri Madagascar no mu Burundi. Avuga ko ayo makuru yose ataco yigeze ashikako, ari co gituma urugamba rwo kumuhagarika rwabaye "urugamba ruhanitse cane, rwo kurondera ahantu hose yashobora kuba yikekwa". Abashingwamanza ba Kabuga bavuga ko ashaka kuburanishwa mu Bufaransa Ni urugamba rwafashe n'imiburiburi imyaka ibiri, uhereye aho yabonetse ubwa nyuma - mu Budagi aho yari yabonywe yagiye kwibagisha mu 2007. Umwihwezo muremure ku biganiro yagiranye n'abantu ku ma telefone hamwe n'ibijanye n'ikoreshwa ry'amafaranga watumye tumenya ko yari i Paris. Patrick Baudouin wo mw'ishirahamwe ryitaho uburenganzira bwa muntu, International Federation for Human Rights, avuga ati: "Biragoye kwibaza ko yoba yarahungiye ku butaka Bufaransa ata babimufashijemwo". Ibi bisigabwenge ku kuntu yashoboye kwinyegeza imyaka n'imyaka vyatumye ishirahamwe Human Righs Watch risaba ko haba amatohoza ku kungene vyagenze n'ababimufashijemwo. Ingendo ziwe imbere y'ingingo za guma mu rugo Ababanyi biwe i Paris bavuga ko uyo mutama yari abaye aho hantu mu kiringo c'imyaka itatu gushika kuri ine. Olivier Olsen, umwe mu babanyi biwe, yabwiye itororokanirizo ry'amakuru AFP ko Kabuga yari "umuntu yavuga make cane", kandi ko "mu kuvuga yongorera iyo hagize umuha yambu". Avuga ko imbere y'ingingo ya guma mu rugo Kabuga yakunda kuboneka kenshi agiye gutembera. Kabuga ubu apfungiwe mw'ibohero rya La Santé Prison hagati muri Paris, akaba ari ho azoguma mu kurindira ko ashikanwa mw'ibohero rya IRMCT. Brammertz avuga ko bishobora gufata indwi zitari nke canke amezi mbere n'imyaka imbere y'uko imanza zitangura, ari i La Haye canke mu gisagara ca Arusha, ahari icicaro ca sentare icira imanza abakoze jenoside mu Rwanda (TPIR). Hagati aho, ababuranira Kabuga bamenyesha ko yipfuza kuburanishwa mu Bufaransa. Abarokotse jenoside bafise icizere ko ivyo bitazotevya imanza, maze bakaronswa ubutungane bipfuza. Inyuma y'ifatwa rya Kabuga, Valerie Mukabayire, arongoye ishirahamwe ry'abapfakazi mu Rwanda, yabwiye BBC ati: "Uwarokotse jenoside wese aranezerejwe n'ihagarikwa ryiwe. Twese twari turindiranye igishika iyi nkuru nziza. Ni vyiza ko agiye gushirwa imbere y'ubutungane".

Alexei Navalny yerekanye isanamu yiwe asa n'uwunanutse ariko ahagaze wenyene atawumufashe Abarongoye ibitaro Charité yariko avurirwamwo bavuga ko amagara yiwe yifashe neza, ari co gituma atakivurwa nk'indembe. Bwana Navalny yifashe isanamu ayishira ku mbuga hwaniro ahagaze wenyene, iri kumwe n'ubutumwa buvuga ko abaganga bitanze uko bashobora vyose kugira ngo ashobore gukira. Ubudagi buvuga ko Bwana Navalny, umuntu azwi cane ko anegura ubutegetsi bwa Perezida Putin, yahawe isumu yo mu bwoko bwa Novichok. Yafashwe ari mu ndege ava mu karere ka Siberia ku wa 20 z'ukwa munani, aca atwarwa ku bitaro Charité biri ku mugwa mukuru w'Ubudagi. Abakorana nawe bavuga ko yahawe iyo sumu kw'itegeko rya Perezida Putin. Ibiro bya Kremlin bya Bwana Putin bitangaza ko ata ruhara abifisemwo. Abaganga bavuga iki? Itangazo ryasohowe n'ibitaro rivuga ko uyu mugabo w'imyaka 44 yari amaze iminsi 32 muri vyo, harimwo iminsi 24 yamaze ari indembe. Rivuga riti: "Turavye ingene amagara yiwe yagiye atera imbere n'ingene ameze ubu, abamuvura baremeza ko ashobora gukira burundu. Ariko, haracari kare kumenya ingaruka z'umwanya muremure zivuye kuri iyi sumu ikaze". Mu ntango z'uku kwezi, ibi bitaro vyamenyesheje ko Bwana Navalny yari yatanguye gutora mitende, kandi ko yari yavanywe muri vya vyuma bimufasha guhema, eka ko yashobora no kuvanwa ku gitanda yariko avurirwako. Ico gihe, leta y'Ubudagi yatangaje ko amazu y'ipimiro (laboratoires) yo mu Bufaransa no muri Suwede (Suède) yemeje inyishu z'ibipimo vyafatiwe mu Budagi vyerekana ko isumu yakoreshejwe kuri Bwana Navalny yari iyo mu bwoko bwa Novichok. Kremlin ibandanya ivuga ko atakivyemeza. Hari ico Navalny yoba yavuze? Mu butumwa yacishije ku rubuga rwa Instagram ejo ku wa kabiri, Bwana Navalny yaramiriye kure ibivugwa - yikeka ko vyavuzwe na Perezida Putin - ko ari we yihaye isumu. Ikinyamakuru co mu Bufaransa Le Monde catangaje ko mu kiganiro kuri telefone na Perezida Emmanuel Macron ku wa 14 z'uku kw'icenda, Bwana Putin yavuganye "agasuzuguro kuri Alexei Navalny, amufata nk'umuntu akorogana akoresheje imbuga ngurukanabumenyi, yirwaza indwara zitabaho kuva muri kahise". Bwana Navalny yanditse kuri Instagram akora kw'itama Perezida w'Uburusiya ati: "Putin yarampinyuye. Nta muntu yomushavurira. Kubera iyo mpamvu, jewe, nk'umusazi, namaze iminsi 18 muri koma ariko sinashoboye gushika ku co nipfuza. Agasotoro karatsinzwe".

Amakuru avuga ko Mira Ricardel (ibumoso) na Melania Trump (iburyo) bagiranye amasinde mu rugendo Madamu Trump yagiriye muri Afurika mu kwezi gushize kwa cumi Umuvugizi w'ibiro bya White House bya perezida w'Amerika, yavuze ko Madamu Ricardel "avuye muri White House yitegurira umwanya mushya muri ubu butegetsi". Ku wa gatatu, ibiro bya Madamu Trump byari byasohoye itangazo rivuga ko Madamu Ricardel "atagikwiye icyubahiro cyo gukora mu biro bya White House". Amakuru avuga ko aba bombi bagiranye amasinde mu rugendo Madamu Trump yagiriye muri Afurika mu kwezi gushize kwa cumi. Itangazo ryashyizweho umukono na Sarah Sanders, umuvugizi w'ibiro bya White House, rivuga ko Madamu Ricardel "azakomeza gushyigikira perezida". Gukurwa ku mwanya kwa Madamu Ricardel, kubaye mu gihe hari amakuru mu bitangazamakuru byo muri Amerika ko Perezida Trump ari kwiga ku kuba yakora amavugurura mu bakozi bo mu biro bye bya White House. Ayo makuru avuga ko Bwana Trump ashobora kuba ari kwitegura kuba yakuraho umukuru w'ibiro bye John Kelly cyangwa Kirstjen Nielsen, umujyanama mu rwego rw'umutekano w'Amerika. Amakimbirane na Melania Trump ateye gute? Amakuru yo mu bitangazamakuru byo muri Amerika yo mu ntangiriro y'iki cyumweru, avuga ko Madamu Ricardel na Madamu Trump bapfuye uburyo abantu bari bicajwe mu myanya yo mu ndege ye mu rugendo Madamu Trump yagiriye muri Afurika. Muri urwo rugendo, Madamu Trump yahaye ikiganiro igitangazamakuru ABC - bitari bikunze kubaho - avuga ko hari abantu bakora mu biro bya White House atizera. Yavuze ko yagejeje kuri Perezida Trump "inama yanjye y'ukuri n'ibitekerezo by'ukuri, hanyuma na we akore icyo ashaka gukora". Mbere yaho, ikinyamakuru The Wall Street Journal cyari cyatangaje ko itsinda rikorana na Madamu Trump ryemeza ko Madamu Ricardel ari we nyirabayazana w'"inkuru mbi" zitangazwa kuri Madamu Trump n'abakozi be. Iki kinyamakuru cyanatangaje ko yakomeje gushyamirana na James Mattis, umunyamabanga w'Amerika mu bya gisirikare, kubera "ibyemezo bijyanye no gutanga akazi no kunyuranya mu mikorere". Madamu Ricardel yari yahawe akazi na John Bolton, umujyanama mu by'umutekano w'igihugu, akuwe mu rwego rw'ubucuruzi rw'Amerika. Afite ubunararibonye bw'imyaka ibarirwa mu macumi akora muri leta.

hydroxychloroquine, umw emu miti iboneka ku isoko ry'u Rwanda Imiti ivugwa n'iki kigo FDA ni; chloroquine, hydroxychloroquine na azithromycin. Mu bihugu bitandukanye, hari aho bagiye bemeza ko uyu muti waba uvura iyi virus. Ku mbuga nkoranyambaga hari amakuru yakwiriye y'abavuga ko umuti wa chloroquine iyo uvanzwe na azithromycin bishobora kwica iyi virus ya covid-19. Gusa kugeza ubu, ishami ry'umuryango w'abibumbye rishinzwe ubuzima ku isi, OMS, ntiriremeza ko iyi miti ivura cyangwa irinda iyi ndwara. Ikigo FDA cyo mu Rwanda mu itangazo cyasohoye kivuga ko "iyi miti itaremezwa n'inzego zibishinzwe ko ivura cyangwa irinda coronavirus (Covid-19). Iki kigo kivuga ko imwe muri iyo miti isanzwe ikoreshwa mu kuvura indwara mu Rwanda, ariko ko kuyikoresha mu buryo butagenwe bibujijwe. Kivuga kandi ko iyi miti itangwa gusa iyo herekanywe urupapuro rwa muganga wayandikiye umurwayi. Mu gihe gito gishize, Perezida Donald Trump wa Amerika yumvikanye avuga ko chloroquine 'ikiza iyi virus', gusa aya makuru ntabwo yemejwe n'ikigo gishinzwe imiti muri Amerika. Umuhanga mu by'imiti wikorera mu Rwanda, yabwiye BBC ko umuti wa Chloroquine wakoreshwaga mu myaka ishize mu kuvura malaria ubu utakiboneka ku isoko mu Rwanda kubera imiti igezweho iyivura. Avuga ko umuti wa hydroxychloroquine ugurishwa mu Rwanda, ufatwa n'abantu bagiye ahantu bakeka ko hari malaria nk'uburyo bwo kwikingira. Naho umuti wa Azithromycin - nawo usanzwe ku isoko ry'u Rwanda - ni umuti wo mu bwoko bwa 'antibiotics' nk'uko uyu muhanga mu by'imiti abivuga.

Fidel Kajugiro Sebarinda (iburyo) na Kobe Bryant muri village olympique i Londres mu 2012 Abantu barenga miliyoni bamaze gusinya inyandiko isaba ko ishusho ya Kobe ariyo yashyirwa ku kirango (logo) cya NBA kubera ibyo yakoze muri uyu mukino kugeza apfuye ku cyumweru. Abahuye nawe bafite ibyo bamwibukiraho mu kibuga no hanze yacyo, Bwana Sebarinda ni umwe muri bo. Ikirango gisanzwe cya NBA cyashushanyijwe na Alan Siegel kirimo ishusho y'undi mukinnyi ukomeye witwa Jerry West nawe wakiniye Los Angeles Lakers, ubu afite imyaka 81. Mu gukomeza kwibuka Kobe bamwe bamaze gukora ibirango bye babona ko byasimbura iki gisanzwe kiranga NBA kirimo Jerry West. Bwana Sebalinda wahuye na Kobe Bryant mu 2012 we avuga ko akimwibuka nk'uwo bahuye vuba aha, cyane cyane kubera kwicisha bugufi no kwakira abamusanze bose abasekera. Bahuye gute? Mu mikino olempike ya 2012 yabereye i Londres ikipe ya Basketball ya USA - yari yanatwaye umudari wa zahabu w'imikino nk'iyi ya 2008 i Beijing - n'ubu yari yakoze ku bihangange byayo byose. Kevin Durant, LeBron James, Carmelo Anthony, Russell Westbrook, James Harden, Chris Paul, Kobe Bryant n'abandi bakomeye ntawari wasigaye, iyi kipe yatwaye n'uyu mudari idatsinzwe na rimwe. Abakinnyi, abatoza, abaganga na bamwe mu bayobozi b'amakipe mu mikino olempike baba ahantu hamwe bita muri 'Village Olympique' gusa siko byari bimeze kuri ibi byamamare byo muri NBA. Ikipe ya basketball ya Amerika ya 2012, ntabwo babanaga n'abandi muri village olympique, Kobe ni ubanza iburyo mu bicaye Bwana Kajugiro avuga ko abakinnyi nk'aba ba NBA, aba Tennis bakomeye n'abandi nka Usain Bolt usanga bo ibihugu byabo byarabacumbikiye muri za hoteli. Ati: "Usanga n'ubwo mu mikino nk'iyi haba hahuriye abakinnyi bakomeye ku isi ariko nka bariya b'ibyamamare hari n'abandi mu bari aho baba bafite indoto zo guhura nabo no kubabona". "Rero bariya b'ikipe ya Basket ya Amerika bagize batya baza muri village ari nijoro, baza mu nzu yo kuriramo, kiba ari ikintu kinini cyane, nawe wibaze ahantu hicaye abantu nk'ibihumbi 10". Bwana Sebalinda avuga ko atazi neza icyabagenzaga, ariko bashobora kuba bari baje nko kureba abandi bagenzi babo b'indi mikino ba Amerika baba muri 'village olympique'. Ati: "Bakinjira muri restaurant ya village, hahise havuga induru abantu bababonye, byabaye nko kubonekerwa, abantu barasakabaka buri wese ashaka kubegera, buri wese ashaka ko bifotozanya". Ibi byatumye abashinzwe umutekano babinginga ngo basohoke kuko byari biteje ikibazo batari kubasha kugenzura nk'uko abivuga. Nabo barabakundira bagenda basohoka buhoro buhoro. We bahuye bate bakanifotoza? Bwana Sebalinda avuga ko guhura na Kobe nabo byabaye nk'amahirwe. Ati: "Ibyo birangiye njyewe n'umuganga w'ikipe y'u Rwanda n'umukinnyi Robert Kajuga twariho dutembera muri village tugirango habe igogora nyuma yo kurya maze tujye kuryama. "Tugiye kubona tubona dukubitanye na Kobe Bryant ari kumwe n'abashinzwe umutekano we batatu. "Sinzi icyo yahashakaga muri ayo mayira, twakubitanye nawe nta n'abantu rwose bari aho hafi". Bwana Sebalinda avuga ko yatunguwe n'uburyo Kobe Bryant muri ako kanya yahise abereka urugwiro muri uko guhura gutunguranye kandi bwije. Ati: "Nahise musaba ifoto arayinyemerera ndetse rwose ushinzwe umutekano we bwite niwe wadufotoye. Nyuma tunamusaba ko twifotozanya nawe twese nabyo arabitwemerera yishimye". Uhereye ibumoso; Robert Kajuga, F.K. Sebarinda, Kobe Bryant n'umuganga w'ikipe y'u Rwanda Ikidasanzwe ni ikihe? Ibyamamare byinshi byishimira kwifotozanya n'abantu babyeretse ko babikunda, cyane cyane ahakoraniye abantu benshi. Bwana Sebalinda avuga ko aho bahuriye na Kobe Bryant, bwije kandi nta bantu bahari "no kumwegera byonyine byari biteye ubwoba, yari arinzwe n'abantu batatu ubona bafite icyo bashaka". Arakomeza ati: "Ariko nahise mbona ko Kobe ari umuntu wicisha bugufi cyane, yadutanze kubona icyo dushaka no kukitwemerera. "Umuntu wamamaye kuriya, ufite uburyo, ufite byose watekereza ko ari nka wa muntu utatinyuka no kwegera. "Ariko noneho Kobe ni wamuntu ahubwo wahitaga agutanga kubona icyo umushakaho akakubwira ati 'ngwino nta kibazo'". Mu mwanya muto cyane bamaranye, nta magambo menshi bavuganye ariko Sebarinda avuga ko Kobe yabasekeraga ubona abishimiye cyane, nyamara atanabazi. Sebarinda avuga ko n'ubundi yabonaga Kobe nk'umuntu wahoraga yishimye aseka Sebalinda ati: "Urabibona no kuri iriya foto kuriya aseka, ariko n'ubundi ndumva nta n'aho ndamubona arakaye, yenda amasshusho barayatunganya ariko ubona buri gihe ari umuntu wahoraga aseka. "Nanabubonye kandi bari gukina n'Ubufaransa muri iyi mikino, ni umuntu ugira fair play, wabonaga adashaka gukoza isoni bagenzi be nubwo icyo gihe France bayirushaga cyane. "Ni umuntu nabonye ko aca bugufi cyane kurenza urwego ariho". "Ishusho ye icyo gihe iracyari mu maso yanjye" Kimwe n'abandi benshi, Sebarinda nawe yabanje kumva ko inkuru y'impanuka n'urupfu rwa Kobe ari ibihuha, ariko nyuma yo gusanga ari impamo biramubabaza cyane. Abantu benshi ku isi bagiye bagaragaza akababaro batewe n'urupfu rwa Kobe Bryant,41, wasize umugore n'abana batatu b'abakobwa barimo umuto w'amezi arindwi. Abenshi bafata Kobe Bryant nk'umukinnyi uri mu bakomeye mu mateka ya Basketball, bakanahera aho basaba NBA guhindura Logo yayo ikavamo Jerry West ikajyamo Kobe. Ibumoso hari logo bamwe basaba ko yaba iya NBA igasimbura irimo Jerry West iburyo Jerry West, wahoze ari umuyobozi mukuru wa LA Lakers yatangaje ko gupfa kwa Kobe yabyakiriye nko kubura umuhungu we. Ati: "Nzakunda Kobe igihe cyose kandi nzahora nishimira ibihe byiza twagiranye. "Namubonye akura ari umwana w'imbaraga avamo umugabo yabaye we, yahinduye ubuzima bwa benshi. Yasize isi ari nziza". Bwana Sebalinda we ati: "Ku bwanjye numvaga atari umuntu wapfa nkurikije ukuntu nabonye ateye, ukuntu aca bugufi, udafite icyo abuze kandi w'umutima mwiza. "Nkanjye ishusho ye y'ukuntu yadusekeraga iracyari mu maso yanjye, biragoye kubyakira".

Luca Attanasio yari mu ruhererekane rw'imodoka za UN mu burasirazuba bwa Congo hafi y'ahitwa Kibumba ku muhanda wa Goma-Rutshuru Iryo tsinda rirahaguruka i Kinshasa none kuwa kabiri kandi rizajya riha raporo perezida wa repubulika ubwe. Itangazo rya perezidansi ya DR Congo rivuga kandi ko "intumwa ya perezida ijya mu Butaliyani ku itariki 23 - 02 gutanga ibaruwa bwite ya perezida igenewe perezida w'Ubutaliyani". Umunyamabanga mukuru w'umuryango w'abibumbye Antonio Guterres yasabye ko "haba iperereza ryihuse" kandi abakoze icyo gitero "bagashyikirizwa ubucamanza". Mu butumwa yatangaje kuri Twitter, Perezida Félix Tshisekedi yavuze ko ari gukurikirana byihariye iyicwa rya ambasaderi w'Ubutaliyani, Luca Attanasio. We n'abandi bantu babiri mu bari kumwe nawe bishwe mu gitondo cyo kuwa mbere n'abantu bitwaje intwaro hafi y'ahitwa Kibumba ku muhanda wa Goma-Rutshuru, abategetsi muri DR Congo bavuga ko wari umugambi wo gushimuta utaragezweho. Perezida Tshisekedi yamaganye iki gitero cyigabije urukurikirane rw'imodoka zarimo imwe ya PAM itwaye ambasaderi Attanasio. Tshisekedi yasabye inzego zibishinzwe kugaragaza neza ibyabaye mu gihe cya vuba gishoboka, kugira ngo ababikoze bamenyekane kandi bashyikirizwe ubucamanza. Abategetsi ba DR Congo bashinja umutwe urwanya ubutegetsi bw'u Rwanda, FDLR, ko ariwo wakoze iki gitero, FDLR yahakanye uruhare muri icyo gitero. Agace kegereye ibirunga iki gitero cyabereyemo kavugwamo imitwe itandukanye yitwaje intwaro. Abashinzwe umutekano muri Kivu ya ruguru bavuga ko batari bamenyeshejwe ko ambasaderi Attanasio ari muri ako gace. Kugeza ubu kandi nta makuru arambuye aratangazwa ku mpamvu ambasaderi Attanasio yari aho hantu.

Abo bamenyeshamakuru bahagaritswe ku wa 22 z'ukwezi kw'icumi bari gutohoza amakuru ku gitero c'abitwaje ibirwanisho Mu ntahe y'icese imbere ya sentare nkuru y'igihugu mu ntara ya Bubanza , abo bamenyeshamakuru bane bagirizwa gufasha umurwi w'abitwaje ibirwanisho bari bateye muri komine Musigati muri iyo ntara. Térence Mpozenzi, Agnès Ndirubusa, Egide Harerimana, Christine Kamikazi n'umushoferi wabo Adolphe Masabarakiza bahagaritswe igihe bariko bakurikirana igitero c'abitwaje ibirwanisho mu ntara ya Bubanza. Muri urwo rubanza, umushikirizamanza wa repubulika yasavye ko n'ibikoresho vyabo harimwo imodoka yabareruye, ama terefone n'udutabo twabo n'ama camera, bifatwa bigashirwa mu minwe ya leta. Abacamanza baciye barushira mu mwiherero, rukazosomwa mu prukiringo kitarenze iminsi 30. Abo bamenyeshamakuru bahagaritswe ku wa 22 z'ukwezi kw'icumi bagirizwa "kugira uruhara mw'ihungabanywa ry'umutekano w'igihugu", ariko bobo babandanya bavuga y'uko bafashwe bariko bakora umwuga wabo w'ukurondera amakuru. Mu kwezi kw'11, umunyamabanga ntayegayezwa wo mu bushikiranganji bw'imigenderanire y'u Burundi n'ayandi makungu yaragabishije ibinyamakuru avuga ko bizorondera guhungabanya umutekano w'igihugu.

Ku bibuga by'indege mu Misiri abagenzi barapimwa mu kurinda ikwirakwira rya coronavirus Tarik Jašarević, umuvugizi wa OMS, yavuze ko uwo mugabo ari hafi koroherwa ariko ko azagumishwa mu kato kugeza igihe cy'iminsi 14 kirangiye ndetse nyuma agakorerwa ibindi bizamini ngo harebwe niba yarakize neza. Mu cyumweru gishize, minisiteri y'ubuzima mu Misiri yavuze ko uwo muntu ari umunyamahanga, ariko ntiyavuga igihugu akomokamo. Ni we wari wabaye umuntu wa mbere wemejwe muri Afurika ko arwaye ubu bwoko bushya bwa coronavirus buzwi nka Covid-19.

Abategetsi b'Azerbaijan bavuga ko inyubako nyinshi zasenyutse mu mujyi wa Ganja Aka karere kemewe n'amahanga nk'ak'Azerbaijan, ariko gategekwa n'abo mu bwoko bw'abanya-Armenia. Abategetsi bishyizeho muri ako karere bavuze ko barashe ku kibuga cy'indege cya gisirikare cya Ganja nyuma yuko ingabo z'Azerbaijan zirashe ku murwa mukuru wako, Stepanakert. Azerbaijan ivuga ko nta hantu hakoreshwa n'igisirikare ho mu mujyi wa Ganja harashweho. Abantu barenga 220, barimo n'abaturage b'abasivile, kugeza ubu bamaze kumenyekana ko bishwe kuva iyi mirwano yatangira, ubu hashize icyumweru. Hari ubwoba ko umubare nyakuri w'abamaze gupfa ushobora kuba ari munini cyane kurushaho, kubera ko imibare y'abapfuye itangazwa n'impande zombi nta ruhande rudafite aho rubogamiye rwari rwayigenzura. Armenia n'Azerbaijan, buri kimwe gishinja ikindi gutangiza iyi mirwano ya mbere ikaze ibayeho hagati y'impande zombi guhera mu mwaka wa 2016. Bivugwa ko muri uyu mujyi wa Stepanakert ubu nta muriro w'amashanyarazi (umuyagankuba mu Kirundi) uhari Igisirikare cy'Azerbaijan kivuga ko cyisubije ahantu harindwi guhera ku cyumweru gishize, mu gihe akarere ka Nagorno-Karabakh kavuga ko ingabo zako "zongereye" ibirindiro ku rugamba. Mu ntangiriro y'iki cyumweru, Armenia yavuze ko "yiteguye" gukorana n'abahuza b'Ubufaransa, Uburusiya n'Amerika mu kugerageza kwemeranya ku masezerano y'agahenge. Azerbaijan, ishyigikiwe byeruye na Turukiya, yasabye ko Armenia ikura ingabo zayo mu karere ka Nagorno-Karabakh ndetse no mu turere tukegereye twafashwe n'ingabo zo mu bwoko bw'abanya-Armenia. Azerbaijan n'Armenia zahoze ari repubulika ebyiri mu zari zigize Leta Zunze Ubumwe z'Abasoviyeti (Uburusiya bw'ubu). Kuva mu 1988 kugeza mu 1994, impande zombi zarwaniye ako karere, ziza gutangaza agahenge. Ariko nta na rimwe zigeze zicyemura ubwo bushyamirane.

Iryo bwirizwa ritanga uburenganzira ku bagenzuzi bwo gufatira ingingo amakompanyi amwe amwe nka Facebook na Twitter kubera ukungene zigenzura ibica ku mbuga zazo. Igihe yariko atera umukono kuri iryo bwirizwa, Perezida Trump yagirije imbuga hwaniro ko zifise "ububasha kanaka zitategerezwa kugira". Inyuma gato yo gutangaza iryo bwiriza Twitter yacciye inyegeza ubutumwa Trump yari amaze gutangaza ku biriko bibera i Mineapolis. Hagati aho iryo bwirizwa rishobora guhura n'ibibazo bishingiye ku mategeko. Bwana Trump - asanzwe akoresha kenshi Twitter - amaze igihe yagiriza imbuga hwaniro ko ziburabuza canke zigerageza kuburizamwo amakuru amwe amwe benezo badashaka. Ku munsi wa gatatu, Bwana Trump yaragirije Twitter ko yivanga mu bijanye n'amatora. Ni inyuma y'aho ikoreye umwihwezo ku mwa tweet abiri yari ahejeje kwandika. Bwana Trump muri iki gitondo yanditse kuri Twitter avuga ku biriko bibera muri Minneapolis.Ubutumwa Twitter yaciye ibunyegeza, ivuga ko burimwo amajambo ateye kubiri n'amategeko ngenderwako ya Twitter abuza guhamagarira imigumuko. Ubwo butumwa ariko burashobora gusomwa n'umuntu abanje kubufyondako. Abahinga muvyo amategeko, bavuga ko inama nshingamateka ya Amerika canke abajejwe ubutungane bategerezwa kugira uruhara mu guhindura amategeko ajanye no gukingira izi mbuga. None iryo tegeko rivuga iki? Iryo bwirizwa ritanga umuco kuri bimwe bimwe biri mw'itegeko, Communications Decency Act, rikingira imbuga nka Facebook, Twitter na YouTube mu bihe bimwe bimwe. Mu ngingo ya 230 y'iryo tegeko, imbuga hwaniro ntizibazwa ivyandikwa n'abazikoresha, ariko ko "ku gatima keza" zishobora gukurako amajambo amwe amwe ateye isoni, yifatira mu gahanga abantu canke agumura. Iryo bwirizwa yateyeko igikumu, rihamagarira inama nshingamateka "gufuta canke guhindura ingingo ya 230" kandi rikavuga ko ubwo budahangarwa budakwiye gukora mu gihe izo mbuga ziramutse zihinduye ivyanditswe n'abazikoresha. Rivuga kandi ko ubwo budahangarwa budakwiye gukora iyo izo mbuga zihaye kuzibira bimwe mu bizicako, harimwo mbere n'ugufuta ama tweet y'abantu ku mvo zitandukanye n'amategeko ngenderwako y'urubuga ngurukanabumenyi. Bamwe babona ko izo mbuga hwaniro zishaka kwifata nk'ibinyamakuru aho kwifata nk'imbuga zihuza abantu. Ubutumwa bwa Trump bwanyegejwe Mu bindi biri mw'iryo bwirizwa, rihamagarira urwego rujejwe guhanahana amakuru rwa Amerika kwerekana neza ingene izo mbuga zishobora kurengera akarimbi iyo zihaye gufuta ivyanditswe na bene kuzikoresha. Risaba kandi ko ibiro vy'umukuru w'igihugu vyosubira kuronswa ubuhinga bwo kwakira imyidogo y'abanyagihugu mu gihe babonye ko izo mbuga hwaniro zabarenganije. Ukutumvikana hagati ya Bwana Trump n'imbuga hwaniro kumaze igihe, ibintu bikaba vyagiye gusubira kwunyuka ku wa kabiri w'iyi ndwi, aho ama tweets abiri akorewe umwihwezo na Twitter ku ncuro ya mbere. Vyamuteye ishavu, bituma ku munsi wa gatatu agabisha ko ashobora gufata ingingo yo "gukontorora cane" imbuga hwaniro. Urubuga rwa Twitter ruvuga ko iryo bwirizwa rifise intumbero za politike, rukorenga ko y'uko ingingo ya 230 "ikingira uburenganzira bw'Abanyamerika bw'ugushikiriza ivyiyumviro vyabo, kandi ko buri mu biranga intwaro rusangi". Eka na Google ariyo nyen'urubuga rwa YouTube, ivuga ko guhindura ingingo ya 230 ishoroa "guhungabanya ubutunzi bwa Amerika be n'uruhara ifise mu gutsimbataza uburenganzira bw'ugukoresha imbuga ngurukanabumenyi".

Uwo mugore nyuma yo gukomeretswa Umuryango w'uwo mugore uvuga ko uwo mugabo yakoze urwo rugomo kuko yashakaga kumenya igitsina cy'umwana uzavuka. Uvuga ko uwo mugore n'umugabo bafitanye abana batanu b'abakobwa kandi ko uwo mugabo yari amaze igihe yotsa igitutu umugore we ngo abyare umuhungu. Uwo mugabo yatawe muri yombi. Avuga ko atakomerekeje umugore we ku bushake, akavuga ko ahubwo ibyabaye ari impanuka. Ibi byabereye mu karere ka Badaun muri leta ya Uttar Pradesh mu majyaruguru y'Ubuhinde, ikaba ari nayo leta ituwe cyane kurusha izindi. Abakuru muri polisi y'Ubuhinde babwiye BBC ko uwo mugore wakomerekejwe, ubu igikomere cye cyorohejwe kitakomeje kumuzahaza, aho ari mu bitaro byo mu murwa mukuru Delhi. Umukobwa uvukana n'uwo mugore yavuze ko abo bashakanye bari bamaze igihe batongana bishingiye ku kutabyara umwana w'umuhungu, nkuko bitangazwa n'ishami rya BBC ritangaza ibiganiro mu rurimi rwa Hindi. Musaza w'uwo mugore avuga ko uwo mugore yajyanwe i Delhi ku cyumweru bagiriwe inama n'abaganga kubera ko igikomere cye cyari kimeze nabi cyane. Umugabo yavuze ko atibasiye umugore we ku bushake. Yabwiye ibitangazamakuru byo mu Buhinde ko yamutereye urukero, ariko ko atari azi ko rumukomeretsa bikomeye gutyo. Ati: "Mfite abana batanu b'abakobwa, umwe mu bahungu banjye arapfuye. Ndabizi ko abana ari impano itangwa n'Imana. None ubu ikigiye kuba icyo ari cyo cyose, kibe". Polisi ikomeje gukora iperereza. Abakobwa miliyoni 21 bavutse 'batifuzwa' Ubushake mu babyeyi b'Abahinde bwo kubyara abana b'abahungu aho kubyara abakobwa bwatumye habaho ikigero cy'uburinganire bw'abagore n'abagabo kitaboneye. Abakobwa miliyoni 46 baburiwe irengero mu Buhinde mu myaka 50 ishize, nkuko bikubiye muri raporo yo mu kwezi kwa gatandatu uyu mwaka y'ishami ry'umuryango w'abibumbye ryita ku baturage (FNUAP/UNFPA). Buri mwaka, abakobwa bagera ku 460,000 baricwa mu Buhinde binyuze ku gukuramo inda hatoranywa igitsina cy'umwana uzavuka, ndetse n'izindi mpfu z'abana b'abakobwa kubera kutitabwaho bikozwe ku bushake igihe bamaze kuvuka. Mu mwaka wa 2018, raporo ya leta y'Ubuhinde yavuze ko ubushake bwo kubyara abahungu bwatumye habaho abakobwa miliyoni 21 "batifuzwa". Iyo raporo ya minisiteri y'imari y'Ubuhinde yatahuye ko imiryango myinshi ikomeza kubyara kugeza ibyaye umuhungu.

Urugendo rwa Putin muri Autriche ni urwa mbere ku mugabane wa Buraya mu kiringo c'umwaka Yashikirije ayo majambo imbere yuko ashika mu gihugu ca Autriche, mu rugendo rwiwe rwa mbere rw'uno mwaka ku mugabane wa Buraya. Yabwiye imboneshakure ya Autriche ORF ko yipfuza kubona umuryango wa Buraya "wiyunze kandi uteye imbere", avuga ko ukorana n'Uburusiya mu vy'ubudandaji hamwe n'ivy'ubutunzi. Umugambwe United Russia ucuditse na Putin ufise imigenderanire n'imigambwe y'intagondwa y'i Buraya, ivyo bigatera akoba imigambwe y'abaharanira ukwishira n'ukwizana. Imigambwe ibiri y'aba "populistes" itwara Ubutaliyano muri kino gihe ishigikiye kugirana imigenderanire ya hafi na Moscou, kandi ikaba ifise amakenga ku mugambi w'ihera rimwe rya "euro". Mu kiganiro n'abamenyeshamakuru Bwana Putin yahakanye ko umugambwe United Russia ufitaniye imigenderanire n'umugambwe w'intagondwa Freedom Party (FPÖ) wo muri Autriche. Iyo migambwe irafise amasezerano yo gukorana, ariko umugambwe FPÖ urahakana ko wahawe amahera na Moscou. Indimi zibiri ku bihano vy'uburusiya Umugambwe FPÖ urafise ibibanza bikomeye muri leta ya Autriche - ufise ubushikiranganji bw'intwaro yo hagati hamwe n'ubwo kwivuna abansi - ukavuga ko wipfuza kw'ibihano umuryango wa Buraya wafatiye Uburusiya bihagarikwa ariko urunani rukaba rwavuze ko rukwiye gufata mu mugongo umuryango wa Buraya ku bijanye n'ivyo bihano. Leta nshasha y'Ubutaliyano yasavye ku munsi wa kabiri kw'ivyo bihano vyosubirwamwo, na cane cane "ibibangamiye abikorera utwabo mu Burusiya". Umushikiranganji wa mbere Giuseppe Conte yabwiye inama y'abatorewe amateka i Roma, ko Ubutaliyano bushira imbere gukorana n'Uburusiya, bufise uruhara runini mu gisata c'ubudandaji c'Ubutaliyano. Ibihano vy'umuryango wa Buraya vyibasira abantu ku giti cabo hamwe n'amashirahamwe yagize uruhara mu bikorwa vy'Uburusiya mu buseruko bwa Ukraine, aho abantu barenga 10000 bishwe kuva aho indyane zadukiye. Uburusiya nabwo bwaciye bwihora bufata ibihano ku mfungurwa no ku bidandazwa bidahinguye. "Ukwo haba ingorane nkoramutima ku Buraya, niko duhakwa canke tugira ingorane," niko Putin yabwiye ORF. "Dukeneye gutunganya imigambi y'ugufashanya n'Uburaya. Nta ntego dufise yo kuryanisha uwariwe wese i Buraya."

Amabwiriza mashya asaba abaganga kwandikira gacye gashoboka imiti igabanya ububabare abarwaye inkorora Aya amabwiriza asaba abaganga kwandikira gacye gashoboka imiti igabanya ububabare abarwaye inkorora. Impuguke mu buvuzi zo muri ibi bigo zivuga ko akenshi inkorora ihita yoroha ubwayo nyuma y'ibyumweru biri hagati ya bibiri na bitatu. Imiti igabanya ububabare ngo si myiza mu kuvura inkorora Aya mabwiriza yahawe abaganga, agamije gufasha mu guhangana n'ikibazo cy'ndwara zimwe na zimwe zisigaye zigarambana imiti igabanya ububabare ntizivure. Izi mpuguke zivuga ko gukoresha imiti igabanya ububabare igihe n'imburagihe, bituma indwara zimwe na zimwe zigorana kuzivura, haremwa udukoko twa mikorobe duhangana n'iyo miti.

Uwo mukinyi w'imbere wa Portugal yariko arakinira umugwi wa Juventus urukino rwa mbere rw'imigwi yabaye iya mbere iwabo i Buraya, kuva yimukiye muri uwo mugwi. Yagaragaye akwega imishatsi y'umukinyi w'inyuma wa Valence, Jeison Murillo, igihe bariko baragwanira umupira ku munota wa 29. Umuhagarikizi mukuru w'urwo rukino Felix Brych yavuganye na mugenzi we wo ku ruhande imbere yo kwereka Ronaldo ikarata itukura atazuyaje. Juve yasigaranye abakinyi cumi gusa mu kibuga, bitaye ku rutare baraninjiza n'igitego imbere y'umwanya muto ngo igice ca mbere kirangire, kuri penalite yatewe na Miralem Pjanic. Inyuma y'umwanya muto igice ca kabiri gitanguye, uwo mukinyi wo hagati ava mu gihugu ca Bosnia yinjije ikindi gitego ateye iyindi penalite ku munota wa 51. Pjanic ndiye ni we mukinyi wa mbere yinjije penalite zibiri mu rukino rumwe mw'ihiganwa ry'imigwi yabaye iya mbere iwabo i Buraya. Mu nyuma na Valence yahawe penalite yatewe na Daniel Parejo, ariko umunyegoli wa Juve Wojciech Szczesny ayikuramwo, bituma urukino rurangira abataliyano badatsinzwe igitego na kimwe. Amosozi ya Ronaldo Ronaldo yafashije Real Madrid gutwara igikombe c'imigwi yabaye iya mbere iwabo incuro zine mu myaka itanu Yagaragaye ababaye cane inyuma yo kwimukira muri uwo mugwi wa Juve avuye muri Real Madrid ku miliyoni 99.2 z'amapawundi mu ci riheze. Yari yatanguye kwerekana ubuhinga bwiwe aho yigeze gushaka gutera mw'igoli agakingirwa na Murillo yari yamaze kugwa hasi. Bubaye ubwa mbere yirukanwa mu kibuga mu rukino rw'imigwi yabaye iya mbere iwabo i Buraya. Ingene inkino zo ku musi wa gatatu zagenze Ronaldo azoba ariri mu kibuga mu rukino ruzobahuza na Manchester United? Cristiano Ronaldo azosubira gukina mu ruhe rukino? Mbega birashoboka ko atazokina igihe bazoba bariko barahura n'umugwi yahoze akinamwo wa Manchester United ku kibuga ca Old Trafford? Manchester United bari mw'itsinda rimwe na Juve, Young Boys na Valence. Biratandukanye no mw'ihiganwa ryo mu Bwongereza aho uronse ikarata itukura ukoze ikosa uca usiba imikino itatu, kuko muri Uefa bafata iyo ngingo babanje kwihweza uko ikosa rimeze. Cristiano Ronaldo yagaragaye ashavuye cane amaze kwirukanwa mu kibuga Nta nkeka rero ko Ronaldo w'imyaka 33 atazokina urukino ruzokurikira rw'imigwi yabaye iya mbere iwabo i Buraya ruzobahuza na Young Boys itariki 22 z'ukwezi kwa cumi. Mu gihe yoronka igiano co kudakina inkino zibiri, ntazoba akigize uruhara mu rukino ruzohuza Juventus na Manchester United itariki 23 z'ukwezi kwa cumi ku kibuga ca Old Trafford.

Prezida wa RDC Joseph Kabila ari ku butegetsi kuva mu 2001 Ishirahamwe ry'ubumwe bwa Buraya yashize ku rutonde abategetsi indwi harimwo abakuru ba gisirikare n'igipolisi hamwe n'uwurongoye ingabo zicungera umukuru w'igihugu Joseph Kabira. Amerika ku ruhande rwayo bafatiye ibihano umushikiranganji w'intwaro yo hagati mu gihugu hamwe n'umukuru w'iperereza. Reta ya Congo yavuze ko ivyo bihano bidakurikije amategeko. Abantu amajana n'amajana barishwe mu gihe c'imyiyerekano yatanguye mu kwezi kw'icenda, inyuma y'aho prezida Kabila atangarije ko amatora yari ategekanijwe muri uyu mwaka yungururijwe ku rindi sango.

Abakora mu bikorwa by'ubuzima bakomeje gukingira abantu muri Kongo mu kubuza ko virusi ya Ebola ikwirakwira Mu mujyi wa Beni no mu nkengero zawo, abantu 379 byamaze kwemezwa ko bayirwaye mu gihe 47 bacyekwa kuyirwara - bituma iyi ndwara irenga mu bukana kuri Ebola yadutse muri Uganda mu mwaka wa 2000. Umujyi wa Beni uri rwagati mu gace k'imirwano, ndetse ibikorwa by'ubutabazi byagiye bikomwa mu nkokora n'ibitero by'inyeshyamba. Imibare itangwa na OMS na leta ya Kongo ivuga ko iyi ndwara ya Ebola imaze guhitana abarenga 200 naho 126 bakaba bamaze kuyikira. Ariko iracyari ku kigero cyo hasi uyigereranyije n'icyorezo cya Ebola cyibasiye ibihugu bimwe byo mu burengerazuba bw'Afurika guhera mu mwaka wa 2013 kugera mu wa 2016, kigahitana abantu ibihumbi 11 na 310. Ni ubwa kabiri Ebola igaragaye muri Kongo muri uyu mwaka wa 2018. Ubwa mbere, ubwo yadukaga mu burengerazuba bw'igihugu, yahitanye abantu 33, nkuko bitangazwa na leta ya Kongo. Peter Salama, umuyobozi mukuru wungirije wa OMS ushinzwe ibikorwa by'ubutabazi bwihuse, ku wa kane yatangaje ubutumwa ku rubuga nkoranyambaga rwa Twitter agira ati: "Ebola yo muri Kongo ubu ni yo ya kabiri ikaze cyane ibayeho mu mateka... OMS n'abafatanyabikorwa tuzakomeza gukorana bya hafi na minisiteri y'ubuzima muri Kongo dukora ibishoboka byose ngo iyi ndwara icike". Iyi ndwara ya Ebola muri Kongo yatangiye mu kwezi kwa karindwi, ikaba ari ku nshuro ya 10 igaragaye muri Kongo kuva yahagaragara bwa mbere mu mwaka wa 1976. Abakora mu bikorwa by'ubuzima bizeye ko uburyo bw'igerageza bwa mbere bukomatanya imiti ivura Ebola bwatangijwe na minisiteri y'ubuzima ya Kongo ku wa mbere w'icyumweru gishize, buzafasha mu guhashya iyi Ebola ndetse n'izindi zishobora kwaduka mu gihe kiri imbere. Umutekano mucye urangwa mu burasirasuba bwa Kongo wagize ingaruka ku bikorwa by'ubutabazi ku ndwara ya Ebola. Igitero cy'inyeshyamba cyabaye mu kwezi kwa cyenda, cyatumye icyo gihe abakora mu bikorwa by'ubuzima baba bahagaritse gukingira no gushakisha abantu bashobora kuba baragize aho bahurira n'abacyekwa kuba abarwayi ba Ebola.

Saad Bguir yigina igitsindo yinjirije Esperance Umukinyi w'imyaka 24 Saad Baguir niwe yashikanye uwo mugwi ku ntsinzi, mu kwinjiriza Esperance ibitsindo bibiri. Uwitwa Anice Badri niwe yinjije igitsindo ca gatatu, bituma umugwi Esperance ugira 4-3 mu nkino zose. Umukinyi Baguir yahora ashigwa kenshi ku ntebe y'abasubirira, yashoboye gutangura gukina mu rukino rwa kabiri rwa finale bitewe nuko umukinyi Franck Kom yahagaritswe. Umugwi Esperance wari watsinzwe 3-1 mu rukino rwa mbere, inyuma yaho Ahly yinjirije ibitsindo bibiri vya penaliti vyahaririweko. Bubaye ubwa gatatu uwo mugwi utsindira igikombe c'imigwi yabaye iya mbere iwabo, inyuma yaho ugitwariye mu 1994 no mu 2011. Umugwi Esperance ugiye guhiganwa mu gikombe c'isi c'imigwi, ihiganwa ritegekanijwe mu kwezi kwa 12 mu gihugu ca Emirats Arabes Unis.
